questions.content: A company has a mobile application that makes HTTP API calls to an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The ALB routes requests to an AWS Lambda function. Many different versions of the application are in use at any given time, including versions that are in testing by a subset of users. The version of the application is defined in the user-agent header that is sent with all requests to the API. After a series of recent changes to the API, the company has observed issues with the application. The company needs to gather a metric for each API operation by response code for each version of the application that is in use. A DevOps engineer has modified the Lambda function to extract the API operation name, version information from the user-agent header and response code. Which additional set of actions should the DevOps engineer take to gather the required metrics?

options.label: A
options.content: Modify the Lambda function to write the API operation name, response code, and version number as a log line to an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. Configure a CloudWatch Logs metric filter that increments a metric for each API operation name. Specify response code and application version as dimensions for the metric.

contents.en: Modify the Lambda function to write the API operation name, response code, and version number as a log line to an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. Configure a CloudWatch Logs metric filter that increments a metric for each API operation name. Specify response code and application version as dimensions for the metric.
contents.zh: 修改 Lambda 函数，将 API 操作名称、响应代码和版本号作为日志行写入 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 日志组。配置 CloudWatch Logs 指标筛选器，为每个 API 操作名称递增一个指标。将响应代码和应用程序版本指定为该指标的维度。

options.label: B
options.content: Modify the Lambda function to write the API operation name, response code, and version number as a log line to an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. Configure a CloudWatch Logs Insights query to populate CloudWatch metrics from the log lines. Specify response code and application version as dimensions for the metric.

contents.en: Modify the Lambda function to write the API operation name, response code, and version number as a log line to an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. Configure a CloudWatch Logs Insights query to populate CloudWatch metrics from the log lines. Specify response code and application version as dimensions for the metric.
contents.zh: 修改 Lambda 函数，将 API 操作名称、响应代码和版本号作为日志行写入 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 日志组。配置 CloudWatch Logs Insights 查询，从日志行填充 CloudWatch 指标。将响应代码和应用程序版本指定为该指标的维度。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the ALB access logs to write to an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. Modify the Lambda function to respond to the ALB with the API operation name, response code, and version number as response metadata. Configure a CloudWatch Logs metric filter that increments a metric for each API operation name. Specify response code and application version as dimensions for the metric.

contents.en: Configure the ALB access logs to write to an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. Modify the Lambda function to respond to the ALB with the API operation name, response code, and version number as response metadata. Configure a CloudWatch Logs metric filter that increments a metric for each API operation name. Specify response code and application version as dimensions for the metric.
contents.zh: 配置 ALB 访问日志写入 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 日志组。修改 Lambda 函数，使其在对 ALB 的响应中以响应元数据形式返回 API 操作名称、响应代码和版本号。配置 CloudWatch Logs 指标筛选器，为每个 API 操作名称递增一个指标。将响应代码和应用程序版本指定为该指标的维度。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure AWS X-Ray integration on the Lambda function. Modify the Lambda function to create an X-Ray subsegment with the API operation name, response code, and version number. Configure X-Ray insights to extract an aggregated metric for each API operation name and to publish the metric to Amazon CloudWatch. Specify response code and application version as dimensions for the metric.

contents.en: Configure AWS X-Ray integration on the Lambda function. Modify the Lambda function to create an X-Ray subsegment with the API operation name, response code, and version number. Configure X-Ray insights to extract an aggregated metric for each API operation name and to publish the metric to Amazon CloudWatch. Specify response code and application version as dimensions for the metric.
contents.zh: 在 Lambda 函数上配置 AWS X-Ray 集成。修改 Lambda 函数，创建包含 API 操作名称、响应代码和版本号的 X-Ray 子分段。配置 X-Ray insights，为每个 API 操作名称提取聚合指标并将该指标发布到 Amazon CloudWatch。将响应代码和应用程序版本指定为该指标的维度。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A。将 API 操作名、响应代码和版本号写入 CloudWatch Logs 后，可以用指标筛选器按操作名递增指标，并把响应代码和应用版本作为维度。

讨论指出，Logs Insights、修改 ALB 访问日志或引入 X-Ray 都更复杂或不适合此处按响应代码和版本收集指标的需求。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A。将 API 操作名、响应代码和版本号写入 CloudWatch Logs 后，可以用指标筛选器按操作名递增指标，并把响应代码和应用版本作为维度。

讨论指出，Logs Insights、修改 ALB 访问日志或引入 X-Ray 都更复杂或不适合此处按响应代码和版本收集指标的需求。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: A. Writing the API operation name, response code, and version number to CloudWatch Logs lets a metric filter increment metrics by operation name and use response code and application version as dimensions.

The discussion notes that Logs Insights, ALB log changes, or X-Ray add unnecessary complexity or do not fit this metric-focused requirement as directly.

contents.en: A company has a mobile application that makes HTTP API calls to an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The ALB routes requests to an AWS Lambda function. Many different versions of the application are in use at any given time, including versions that are in testing by a subset of users. The version of the application is defined in the user-agent header that is sent with all requests to the API. After a series of recent changes to the API, the company has observed issues with the application. The company needs to gather a metric for each API operation by response code for each version of the application that is in use. A DevOps engineer has modified the Lambda function to extract the API operation name, version information from the user-agent header and response code. Which additional set of actions should the DevOps engineer take to gather the required metrics?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个移动应用程序，该应用程序向 Application Load Balancer (ALB) 发出 HTTP API 调用。ALB 将请求路由到一个 AWS Lambda 函数。在任意给定时间，应用程序都有许多不同版本正在使用，其中包括由部分用户测试的版本。应用程序版本在随所有 API 请求发送的 user-agent 标头中定义。在最近对 API 进行一系列更改后，公司观察到应用程序出现问题。公司需要按正在使用的每个应用程序版本，为每个 API 操作按响应代码收集指标。DevOps 工程师已修改 Lambda 函数，以提取 API 操作名称、user-agent 标头中的版本信息以及响应代码。为了收集所需指标，DevOps 工程师还应采取哪一组操作？

questions.content: A company provides an application to customers. The application has an Amazon API Gateway REST API that invokes an AWS Lambda function. On initialization, the Lambda function loads a large amount of data from an Amazon DynamoDB table. The data load process results in long cold-start times of 8-10 seconds. The DynamoDB table has DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) configured. Customers report that the application intermittently takes a long time to respond to requests. The application receives thousands of requests throughout the day. In the middle of the day, the application experiences 10 times more requests than at any other time of the day. Near the end of the day, the application's request volume decreases to 10% of its normal total. A DevOps engineer needs to reduce the latency of the Lambda function at all times of the day. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure provisioned concurrency on the Lambda function with a concurrency value of 1. Delete the DAX cluster for the DynamoDB table.

contents.en: Configure provisioned concurrency on the Lambda function with a concurrency value of 1. Delete the DAX cluster for the DynamoDB table.
contents.zh: 在 Lambda 函数上配置预置并发，并发值为 1。删除 DynamoDB 表的 DAX 集群。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure reserved concurrency on the Lambda function with a concurrency value of 0.

contents.en: Configure reserved concurrency on the Lambda function with a concurrency value of 0.
contents.zh: 在 Lambda 函数上配置预留并发，并发值为 0。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure provisioned concurrency on the Lambda function. Configure AWS Application Auto Scaling on the Lambda function with provisioned concurrency values set to a minimum of 1 and a maximum of 100.

contents.en: Configure provisioned concurrency on the Lambda function. Configure AWS Application Auto Scaling on the Lambda function with provisioned concurrency values set to a minimum of 1 and a maximum of 100.
contents.zh: 在 Lambda 函数上配置预置并发。在 Lambda 函数上配置 AWS Application Auto Scaling，将预置并发值设置为最小 1、最大 100。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure reserved concurrency on the Lambda function. Configure AWS Application Auto Scaling on the API Gateway API with a reserved concurrency maximum value of 100.

contents.en: Configure reserved concurrency on the Lambda function. Configure AWS Application Auto Scaling on the API Gateway API with a reserved concurrency maximum value of 100.
contents.zh: 在 Lambda 函数上配置预留并发。在 API Gateway API 上配置 AWS Application Auto Scaling，预留并发最大值为 100。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C。预置并发可以让 Lambda 始终保持可用执行环境，从而降低冷启动延迟；Application Auto Scaling 将预置并发设置为最小 1、最大 100，可以在流量突增时扩展，在低流量时控制成本。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C。预置并发可以让 Lambda 始终保持可用执行环境，从而降低冷启动延迟；Application Auto Scaling 将预置并发设置为最小 1、最大 100，可以在流量突增时扩展，在低流量时控制成本。
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. Provisioned concurrency keeps Lambda execution environments ready to reduce cold-start latency, while Application Auto Scaling with a minimum of 1 and maximum of 100 can handle traffic spikes and scale down to manage cost.

contents.en: A company provides an application to customers. The application has an Amazon API Gateway REST API that invokes an AWS Lambda function. On initialization, the Lambda function loads a large amount of data from an Amazon DynamoDB table. The data load process results in long cold-start times of 8-10 seconds. The DynamoDB table has DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) configured. Customers report that the application intermittently takes a long time to respond to requests. The application receives thousands of requests throughout the day. In the middle of the day, the application experiences 10 times more requests than at any other time of the day. Near the end of the day, the application's request volume decreases to 10% of its normal total. A DevOps engineer needs to reduce the latency of the Lambda function at all times of the day. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司向客户提供一个应用程序。该应用程序有一个 Amazon API Gateway REST API，用于调用 AWS Lambda 函数。初始化时，Lambda 函数会从 Amazon DynamoDB 表加载大量数据。数据加载过程导致较长的冷启动时间，达到 8-10 秒。该 DynamoDB 表已配置 DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX)。客户报告该应用程序间歇性地需要很长时间才能响应请求。该应用程序全天会收到数千个请求。中午时，该应用程序的请求量比一天中其他任何时间高 10 倍。接近一天结束时，应用程序的请求量下降到正常总量的 10%。DevOps 工程师需要在一天中的所有时间降低 Lambda 函数的延迟。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company is adopting AWS CodeDeploy to automate its application deployments for a Java-Apache Tomcat application with an Apache Webserver. The development team started with a proof of concept, created a deployment group for a developer environment, and performed functional tests within the application. After completion, the team will create additional deployment groups for staging and production. The current log level is configured within the Apache settings, but the team wants to change this configuration dynamically when the deployment occurs, so that they can set different log level configurations depending on the deployment group without having a different application revision for each group. How can these requirements be met with the LEAST management overhead and without requiring different script versions for each deployment group?

options.label: A
options.content: Tag the Amazon EC2 instances depending on the deployment group. Then place a script into the application revision that calls the metadata service and the EC2 API to identify which deployment group the instance is part of. Use this information to configure the log level settings. Reference the script as part of the AfterInstall lifecycle hook in the appspec.yml file.

contents.en: Tag the Amazon EC2 instances depending on the deployment group. Then place a script into the application revision that calls the metadata service and the EC2 API to identify which deployment group the instance is part of. Use this information to configure the log level settings. Reference the script as part of the AfterInstall lifecycle hook in the appspec.yml file.
contents.zh: 根据部署组为 Amazon EC2 实例打标签。然后在应用程序修订版中放置一个脚本，该脚本调用元数据服务和 EC2 API 来识别实例属于哪个部署组。使用此信息配置日志级别设置。在 appspec.yml 文件中将该脚本作为 AfterInstall 生命周期挂钩的一部分引用。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a script that uses the CodeDeploy environment variable DEPLOYMENT_GROUP_ NAME to identify which deployment group the instance is part of. Use this information to configure the log level settings. Reference this script as part of the BeforeInstall lifecycle hook in the appspec.yml file.

contents.en: Create a script that uses the CodeDeploy environment variable DEPLOYMENT_GROUP_ NAME to identify which deployment group the instance is part of. Use this information to configure the log level settings. Reference this script as part of the BeforeInstall lifecycle hook in the appspec.yml file.
contents.zh: 创建一个脚本，使用 CodeDeploy 环境变量 DEPLOYMENT_GROUP_ NAME 来识别实例属于哪个部署组。使用此信息配置日志级别设置。在 appspec.yml 文件中将此脚本作为 BeforeInstall 生命周期挂钩的一部分引用。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a CodeDeploy custom environment variable for each environment. Then place a script into the application revision that checks this environment variable to identify which deployment group the instance is part of. Use this information to configure the log level settings. Reference this script as part of the ValidateService lifecycle hook in the appspec.yml file.

contents.en: Create a CodeDeploy custom environment variable for each environment. Then place a script into the application revision that checks this environment variable to identify which deployment group the instance is part of. Use this information to configure the log level settings. Reference this script as part of the ValidateService lifecycle hook in the appspec.yml file.
contents.zh: 为每个环境创建一个 CodeDeploy 自定义环境变量。然后在应用程序修订版中放置一个脚本，该脚本检查此环境变量以识别实例属于哪个部署组。使用此信息配置日志级别设置。在 appspec.yml 文件中将此脚本作为 ValidateService 生命周期挂钩的一部分引用。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a script that uses the CodeDeploy environment variable DEPLOYMENT_GROUP_ID to identify which deployment group the instance is part of to configure the log level settings. Reference this script as part of the Install lifecycle hook in the appspec.yml file.

contents.en: Create a script that uses the CodeDeploy environment variable DEPLOYMENT_GROUP_ID to identify which deployment group the instance is part of to configure the log level settings. Reference this script as part of the Install lifecycle hook in the appspec.yml file.
contents.zh: 创建一个脚本，使用 CodeDeploy 环境变量 DEPLOYMENT_GROUP_ID 来识别实例属于哪个部署组，以配置日志级别设置。在 appspec.yml 文件中将此脚本作为 Install 生命周期挂钩的一部分引用。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：B。使用 CodeDeploy 环境变量 DEPLOYMENT_GROUP_NAME 识别实例所属部署组，再在 BeforeInstall 生命周期钩子中运行脚本配置日志级别。

讨论指出 Start、Install、TestTraffic、AllowTraffic 和 End 等事件不能脚本化，因此选择可执行脚本的生命周期钩子更合适。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：B。使用 CodeDeploy 环境变量 DEPLOYMENT_GROUP_NAME 识别实例所属部署组，再在 BeforeInstall 生命周期钩子中运行脚本配置日志级别。

讨论指出 Start、Install、TestTraffic、AllowTraffic 和 End 等事件不能脚本化，因此选择可执行脚本的生命周期钩子更合适。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: B. The script can use the CodeDeploy DEPLOYMENT_GROUP_NAME environment variable to identify the deployment group and configure log-level settings during the BeforeInstall lifecycle hook.

The discussion notes that several deployment events cannot be scripted, so a scriptable lifecycle hook is the appropriate place for this logic.

contents.en: A company is adopting AWS CodeDeploy to automate its application deployments for a Java-Apache Tomcat application with an Apache Webserver. The development team started with a proof of concept, created a deployment group for a developer environment, and performed functional tests within the application. After completion, the team will create additional deployment groups for staging and production. The current log level is configured within the Apache settings, but the team wants to change this configuration dynamically when the deployment occurs, so that they can set different log level configurations depending on the deployment group without having a different application revision for each group. How can these requirements be met with the LEAST management overhead and without requiring different script versions for each deployment group?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在采用 AWS CodeDeploy，为一个带有 Apache Webserver 的 Java-Apache Tomcat 应用程序自动化应用程序部署。开发团队从概念验证开始，为开发环境创建了一个部署组，并在应用程序内执行了功能测试。完成后，团队将为预发布和生产创建额外的部署组。当前日志级别在 Apache 设置中配置，但团队希望在部署发生时动态更改此配置，以便可以根据部署组设置不同的日志级别配置，而无需为每个组使用不同的应用程序修订版。如何以最少的管理开销并且不需要为每个部署组使用不同脚本版本的方式满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company requires its developers to tag all Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volumes in an account to indicate a desired backup frequency. This requirement Includes EBS volumes that do not require backups. The company uses custom tags named Backup_Frequency that have values of none, dally, or weekly that correspond to the desired backup frequency. An audit finds that developers are occasionally not tagging the EBS volumes. A DevOps engineer needs to ensure that all EBS volumes always have the Backup_Frequency tag so that the company can perform backups at least weekly unless a different value is specified. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Set up AWS Config in the account. Create a custom rule that returns a compliance failure for all Amazon EC2 resources that do not have a Backup Frequency tag applied. Configure a remediation action that uses a custom AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to apply the Backup_Frequency tag with a value of weekly.

contents.en: Set up AWS Config in the account. Create a custom rule that returns a compliance failure for all Amazon EC2 resources that do not have a Backup Frequency tag applied. Configure a remediation action that uses a custom AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to apply the Backup_Frequency tag with a value of weekly.
contents.zh: 在账户中设置 AWS Config。创建一个自定义规则，对所有未应用 Backup Frequency 标签的 Amazon EC2 资源返回合规性失败。配置一个修复操作，使用自定义 AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook 应用值为 weekly 的 Backup_Frequency 标签。

options.label: B
options.content: Set up AWS Config in the account. Use a managed rule that returns a compliance failure for EC2::Volume resources that do not have a Backup Frequency tag applied. Configure a remediation action that uses a custom AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to apply the Backup_Frequency tag with a value of weekly.

contents.en: Set up AWS Config in the account. Use a managed rule that returns a compliance failure for EC2::Volume resources that do not have a Backup Frequency tag applied. Configure a remediation action that uses a custom AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to apply the Backup_Frequency tag with a value of weekly.
contents.zh: 在账户中设置 AWS Config。使用一个托管规则，对未应用 Backup Frequency 标签的 EC2::Volume 资源返回合规性失败。配置一个修复操作，使用自定义 AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook 应用值为 weekly 的 Backup_Frequency 标签。

options.label: C
options.content: Turn on AWS CloudTrail in the account. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to EBS CreateVolume events. Configure a custom AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to apply the Backup_Frequency tag with a value of weekly. Specify the runbook as the target of the rule.

contents.en: Turn on AWS CloudTrail in the account. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to EBS CreateVolume events. Configure a custom AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to apply the Backup_Frequency tag with a value of weekly. Specify the runbook as the target of the rule.
contents.zh: 在账户中启用 AWS CloudTrail。创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，对 EBS CreateVolume 事件作出反应。配置自定义 AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook，以应用值为 weekly 的 Backup_Frequency 标签。将该 runbook 指定为规则的目标。

options.label: D
options.content: Turn on AWS CloudTrail in the account. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to EBS CreateVolume events or EBS ModifyVolume events. Configure a custom AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to apply the Backup_Frequency tag with a value of weekly. Specify the runbook as the target of the rule.

contents.en: Turn on AWS CloudTrail in the account. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to EBS CreateVolume events or EBS ModifyVolume events. Configure a custom AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to apply the Backup_Frequency tag with a value of weekly. Specify the runbook as the target of the rule.
contents.zh: 在账户中启用 AWS CloudTrail。创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，对 EBS CreateVolume 事件或 EBS ModifyVolume 事件作出反应。配置自定义 AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook，以应用值为 weekly 的 Backup_Frequency 标签。将该 runbook 指定为规则的目标。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：B。AWS Config 托管规则可以检查 EBS 卷是否缺少 Backup Frequency 标签，并通过自定义 Systems Manager Automation 运行手册自动补救，添加 Backup_Frequency=weekly。

讨论认为它比自定义规则更简单，并且能覆盖现有资源；只处理新卷的方案不满足要求。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：B。AWS Config 托管规则可以检查 EBS 卷是否缺少 Backup Frequency 标签，并通过自定义 Systems Manager Automation 运行手册自动补救，添加 Backup_Frequency=weekly。

讨论认为它比自定义规则更简单，并且能覆盖现有资源；只处理新卷的方案不满足要求。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: B. An AWS Config managed rule can detect EBS volumes without the Backup Frequency tag, and a custom Systems Manager Automation runbook can remediate them by applying Backup_Frequency=weekly.

The discussion favors this because it is simpler than a custom rule and addresses existing resources, not only newly created volumes.

contents.en: A company requires its developers to tag all Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volumes in an account to indicate a desired backup frequency. This requirement Includes EBS volumes that do not require backups. The company uses custom tags named Backup_Frequency that have values of none, dally, or weekly that correspond to the desired backup frequency. An audit finds that developers are occasionally not tagging the EBS volumes. A DevOps engineer needs to ensure that all EBS volumes always have the Backup_Frequency tag so that the company can perform backups at least weekly unless a different value is specified. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司要求其开发人员为账户中的所有 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 卷打标签，以指明所需的备份频率。此要求包括不需要备份的 EBS 卷。公司使用名为 Backup_Frequency 的自定义标签，其值为 none、dally 或 weekly，分别对应所需的备份频率。一次审计发现开发人员偶尔没有为 EBS 卷打标签。DevOps 工程师需要确保所有 EBS 卷始终具有 Backup_Frequency 标签，以便公司至少每周执行备份，除非指定了不同的值。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company is using an Amazon Aurora cluster as the data store for its application. The Aurora cluster is configured with a single DB instance. The application performs read and write operations on the database by using the cluster's instance endpoint. The company has scheduled an update to be applied to the cluster during an upcoming maintenance window. The cluster must remain available with the least possible interruption during the maintenance window. What should a DevOps engineer do to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Add a reader instance to the Aurora cluster. Update the application to use the Aurora cluster endpoint for write operations. Update the Aurora cluster's reader endpoint for reads.

contents.en: Add a reader instance to the Aurora cluster. Update the application to use the Aurora cluster endpoint for write operations. Update the Aurora cluster's reader endpoint for reads.
contents.zh: 向 Aurora 集群添加一个读取器实例。更新应用程序，使其使用 Aurora 集群端点执行写入操作。更新 Aurora 集群的读取器端点用于读取。

options.label: B
options.content: Add a reader instance to the Aurora cluster. Create a custom ANY endpoint for the cluster. Update the application to use the Aurora cluster's custom ANY endpoint for read and write operations.

contents.en: Add a reader instance to the Aurora cluster. Create a custom ANY endpoint for the cluster. Update the application to use the Aurora cluster's custom ANY endpoint for read and write operations.
contents.zh: 向 Aurora 集群添加一个读取器实例。为集群创建一个自定义 ANY 端点。更新应用程序，使其使用 Aurora 集群的自定义 ANY 端点执行读写操作。

options.label: C
options.content: Turn on the Multi-AZ option on the Aurora cluster. Update the application to use the Aurora cluster endpoint for write operations. Update the Aurora cluster's reader endpoint for reads.

contents.en: Turn on the Multi-AZ option on the Aurora cluster. Update the application to use the Aurora cluster endpoint for write operations. Update the Aurora cluster's reader endpoint for reads.
contents.zh: 在 Aurora 集群上启用 Multi-AZ 选项。更新应用程序，使其使用 Aurora 集群端点执行写入操作。更新 Aurora 集群的读取器端点用于读取。

options.label: D
options.content: Turn on the Multi-AZ option on the Aurora cluster. Create a custom ANY endpoint for the cluster. Update the application to use the Aurora cluster's custom ANY endpoint for read and write operations

contents.en: Turn on the Multi-AZ option on the Aurora cluster. Create a custom ANY endpoint for the cluster. Update the application to use the Aurora cluster's custom ANY endpoint for read and write operations
contents.zh: 在 Aurora 集群上启用 Multi-AZ 选项。为集群创建一个自定义 ANY 端点。更新应用程序，使其使用 Aurora 集群的自定义 ANY 端点执行读写操作

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A。为 Aurora 集群添加读取实例，并让应用写入使用集群端点、读取使用 reader endpoint，可以按 Aurora 的标准端点模型分离读写流量。

讨论指出 Aurora 不支持自定义 ANY 端点，并且 Multi-AZ 相关选项不能解决该读写端点需求。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A。为 Aurora 集群添加读取实例，并让应用写入使用集群端点、读取使用 reader endpoint，可以按 Aurora 的标准端点模型分离读写流量。

讨论指出 Aurora 不支持自定义 ANY 端点，并且 Multi-AZ 相关选项不能解决该读写端点需求。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: A. Adding a reader instance and using the Aurora cluster endpoint for writes plus the reader endpoint for reads follows Aurora's standard endpoint model for separating read and write traffic.

The discussion notes that Aurora does not support custom ANY endpoints, and the Multi-AZ options do not address this requirement.

contents.en: A company is using an Amazon Aurora cluster as the data store for its application. The Aurora cluster is configured with a single DB instance. The application performs read and write operations on the database by using the cluster's instance endpoint. The company has scheduled an update to be applied to the cluster during an upcoming maintenance window. The cluster must remain available with the least possible interruption during the maintenance window. What should a DevOps engineer do to meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon Aurora 集群作为其应用程序的数据存储。该 Aurora 集群配置了单个 DB 实例。应用程序使用集群的实例端点对数据库执行读写操作。公司已计划在即将到来的维护时段内对集群应用更新。集群必须在维护时段内保持可用，并尽可能减少中断。DevOps 工程师应做什么来满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company must encrypt all AMIs that the company shares across accounts. A DevOps engineer has access to a source account where an unencrypted custom AMI has been built. The DevOps engineer also has access to a target account where an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group will launch EC2 instances from the AMI. The DevOps engineer must share the AMI with the target account. The company has created an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key in the source account. Which additional steps should the DevOps engineer perform to meet the requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: In the source account, copy the unencrypted AMI to an encrypted AMI. Specify the KMS key in the copy action.

contents.en: In the source account, copy the unencrypted AMI to an encrypted AMI. Specify the KMS key in the copy action.
contents.zh: 在源账户中，将未加密的 AMI 复制为加密的 AMI。在复制操作中指定 KMS key。

options.label: B
options.content: In the source account, copy the unencrypted AMI to an encrypted AMI. Specify the default Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) encryption key in the copy action.

contents.en: In the source account, copy the unencrypted AMI to an encrypted AMI. Specify the default Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) encryption key in the copy action.
contents.zh: 在源账户中，将未加密的 AMI 复制为加密的 AMI。在复制操作中指定默认 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) encryption key。

options.label: C
options.content: In the source account, create a KMS grant that delegates permissions to the Auto Scaling group service-linked role in the target account.

contents.en: In the source account, create a KMS grant that delegates permissions to the Auto Scaling group service-linked role in the target account.
contents.zh: 在源账户中，创建一个 KMS grant，将权限委托给目标账户中的 Auto Scaling group service-linked role。

options.label: D
options.content: In the source account, modify the key policy to give the target account permissions to create a grant. In the target account, create a KMS grant that delegates permissions to the Auto Scaling group service-linked role.

contents.en: In the source account, modify the key policy to give the target account permissions to create a grant. In the target account, create a KMS grant that delegates permissions to the Auto Scaling group service-linked role.
contents.zh: 在源账户中，修改 key policy，授予目标账户创建 grant 的权限。在目标账户中，创建一个 KMS grant，将权限委托给 Auto Scaling group service-linked role。

options.label: E
options.content: In the source account, share the unencrypted AMI with the target account.

contents.en: In the source account, share the unencrypted AMI with the target account.
contents.zh: 在源账户中，与目标账户共享未加密的 AMI。

options.label: F
options.content: In the source account, share the encrypted AMI with the target account.

contents.en: In the source account, share the encrypted AMI with the target account.
contents.zh: 在源账户中，与目标账户共享加密的 AMI。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A、D、F。源账户先把未加密 AMI 复制为使用 KMS 密钥加密的 AMI，再共享加密 AMI 给目标账户。

同时，源账户需要调整密钥策略允许目标账户创建授权，目标账户再为 Auto Scaling group 的服务相关角色创建 KMS grant，才能使用该加密 AMI。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A、D、F。源账户先把未加密 AMI 复制为使用 KMS 密钥加密的 AMI，再共享加密 AMI 给目标账户。

同时，源账户需要调整密钥策略允许目标账户创建授权，目标账户再为 Auto Scaling group 的服务相关角色创建 KMS grant，才能使用该加密 AMI。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: A, D, and F. The source account first copies the unencrypted AMI to an encrypted AMI with the KMS key, then shares that encrypted AMI with the target account.

The source account also must update the key policy to let the target account create a grant, and the target account creates a KMS grant for the Auto Scaling group's service-linked role.

contents.en: A company must encrypt all AMIs that the company shares across accounts. A DevOps engineer has access to a source account where an unencrypted custom AMI has been built. The DevOps engineer also has access to a target account where an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group will launch EC2 instances from the AMI. The DevOps engineer must share the AMI with the target account. The company has created an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key in the source account. Which additional steps should the DevOps engineer perform to meet the requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司必须加密该公司跨账户共享的所有 AMI。DevOps 工程师可以访问一个源账户，其中已构建一个未加密的自定义 AMI。DevOps 工程师还可以访问一个目标账户，其中 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group 将从该 AMI 启动 EC2 实例。DevOps 工程师必须与目标账户共享该 AMI。公司已在源账户中创建了一个 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key。DevOps 工程师还应执行哪些额外步骤来满足要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company uses AWS CodePipeline pipelines to automate releases of its application A typical pipeline consists of three stages build, test, and deployment. The company has been using a separate AWS CodeBuild project to run scripts for each stage. However, the company now wants to use AWS CodeDeploy to handle the deployment stage of the pipelines. The company has packaged the application as an RPM package and must deploy the application to a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances. The EC2 instances are in an EC2 Auto Scaling group and are launched from a common AMI. Which combination of steps should a DevOps engineer perform to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a new version of the common AMI with the CodeDeploy agent installed. Update the IAM role of the EC2 instances to allow access to CodeDeploy.

contents.en: Create a new version of the common AMI with the CodeDeploy agent installed. Update the IAM role of the EC2 instances to allow access to CodeDeploy.
contents.zh: 创建安装了 CodeDeploy agent 的通用 AMI 新版本。更新 EC2 实例的 IAM role，以允许访问 CodeDeploy。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new version of the common AMI with the CodeDeploy agent installed. Create an AppSpec file that contains application deployment scripts and grants access to CodeDeploy.

contents.en: Create a new version of the common AMI with the CodeDeploy agent installed. Create an AppSpec file that contains application deployment scripts and grants access to CodeDeploy.
contents.zh: 创建安装了 CodeDeploy agent 的通用 AMI 新版本。创建一个 AppSpec file，其中包含应用程序部署脚本并授予对 CodeDeploy 的访问权限。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an application in CodeDeploy. Configure an in-place deployment type. Specify the Auto Scaling group as the deployment target. Add a step to the CodePipeline pipeline to use EC2 Image Builder to create a new AMI. Configure CodeDeploy to deploy the newly created AMI.

contents.en: Create an application in CodeDeploy. Configure an in-place deployment type. Specify the Auto Scaling group as the deployment target. Add a step to the CodePipeline pipeline to use EC2 Image Builder to create a new AMI. Configure CodeDeploy to deploy the newly created AMI.
contents.zh: 在 CodeDeploy 中创建一个 application。配置 in-place deployment type。将 Auto Scaling group 指定为部署目标。向 CodePipeline pipeline 添加一个步骤，使用 EC2 Image Builder 创建新的 AMI。配置 CodeDeploy 以部署新创建的 AMI。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an application in CodeDeploy. Configure an in-place deployment type. Specify the Auto Scaling group as the deployment target. Update the CodePipeline pipeline to use the CodeDeploy action to deploy the application.

contents.en: Create an application in CodeDeploy. Configure an in-place deployment type. Specify the Auto Scaling group as the deployment target. Update the CodePipeline pipeline to use the CodeDeploy action to deploy the application.
contents.zh: 在 CodeDeploy 中创建一个 application。配置 in-place deployment type。将 Auto Scaling group 指定为部署目标。更新 CodePipeline pipeline，使用 CodeDeploy action 部署应用程序。

options.label: E
options.content: Create an application in CodeDeploy. Configure an in-place deployment type. Specify the EC2 instances that are launched from the common AMI as the deployment target. Update the CodePipeline pipeline to use the CodeDeploy action to deploy the application.

contents.en: Create an application in CodeDeploy. Configure an in-place deployment type. Specify the EC2 instances that are launched from the common AMI as the deployment target. Update the CodePipeline pipeline to use the CodeDeploy action to deploy the application.
contents.zh: 在 CodeDeploy 中创建一个 application。配置 in-place deployment type。将从通用 AMI 启动的 EC2 实例指定为部署目标。更新 CodePipeline pipeline，使用 CodeDeploy action 部署应用程序。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A、D。需要先准备包含 CodeDeploy agent 的通用 AMI，并给 EC2 实例角色添加访问 CodeDeploy 的权限。

然后在 CodeDeploy 中创建应用，使用就地部署，以 Auto Scaling group 为部署目标，并让 CodePipeline 使用 CodeDeploy action 部署应用。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A、D。需要先准备包含 CodeDeploy agent 的通用 AMI，并给 EC2 实例角色添加访问 CodeDeploy 的权限。

然后在 CodeDeploy 中创建应用，使用就地部署，以 Auto Scaling group 为部署目标，并让 CodePipeline 使用 CodeDeploy action 部署应用。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: A and D. The EC2 fleet needs a common AMI that includes the CodeDeploy agent and an instance role that can access CodeDeploy.

Then create a CodeDeploy application, use an in-place deployment targeting the Auto Scaling group, and update CodePipeline to deploy through the CodeDeploy action.

contents.en: A company uses AWS CodePipeline pipelines to automate releases of its application A typical pipeline consists of three stages build, test, and deployment. The company has been using a separate AWS CodeBuild project to run scripts for each stage. However, the company now wants to use AWS CodeDeploy to handle the deployment stage of the pipelines. The company has packaged the application as an RPM package and must deploy the application to a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances. The EC2 instances are in an EC2 Auto Scaling group and are launched from a common AMI. Which combination of steps should a DevOps engineer perform to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS CodePipeline pipelines 自动化其应用程序发布。一个典型的 pipeline 包含三个阶段：build、test 和 deployment。公司一直使用单独的 AWS CodeBuild project 为每个阶段运行脚本。但是，公司现在希望使用 AWS CodeDeploy 处理 pipelines 的 deployment 阶段。公司已将应用程序打包为 RPM package，并且必须将应用程序部署到一组 Amazon EC2 实例。EC2 实例位于 EC2 Auto Scaling group 中，并从通用 AMI 启动。DevOps 工程师应执行哪一组步骤来满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company's security team requires that all external Application Load Balancers (ALBs) and Amazon API Gateway APIs are associated with AWS WAF web ACLs. The company has hundreds of AWS accounts, all of which are included in a single organization in AWS Organizations. The company has configured AWS Config for the organization. During an audit, the company finds some externally facing ALBs that are not associated with AWS WAF web ACLs. Which combination of steps should a DevOps engineer take to prevent future violations? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Delegate AWS Firewall Manager to a security account.

contents.en: Delegate AWS Firewall Manager to a security account.
contents.zh: 将 AWS Firewall Manager 委派给一个安全账户。

options.label: B
options.content: Delegate Amazon GuardDuty to a security account.

contents.en: Delegate Amazon GuardDuty to a security account.
contents.zh: 将 Amazon GuardDuty 委派给一个安全账户。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS Firewall Manager policy to attach AWS WAF web ACLs to any newly created ALBs and API Gateway APIs.

contents.en: Create an AWS Firewall Manager policy to attach AWS WAF web ACLs to any newly created ALBs and API Gateway APIs.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Firewall Manager policy，将 AWS WAF web ACLs 附加到任何新创建的 ALBs 和 API Gateway APIs。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon GuardDuty policy to attach AWS WAF web ACLs to any newly created ALBs and API Gateway APIs.

contents.en: Create an Amazon GuardDuty policy to attach AWS WAF web ACLs to any newly created ALBs and API Gateway APIs.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon GuardDuty policy，将 AWS WAF web ACLs 附加到任何新创建的 ALBs 和 API Gateway APIs。

options.label: E
options.content: Configure an AWS Config managed rule to attach AWS WAF web ACLs to any newly created ALBs and API Gateway APIs.

contents.en: Configure an AWS Config managed rule to attach AWS WAF web ACLs to any newly created ALBs and API Gateway APIs.
contents.zh: 配置一个 AWS Config managed rule，将 AWS WAF web ACLs 附加到任何新创建的 ALBs 和 API Gateway APIs。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A、C。讨论提示看到 WAF 应联想到 AWS Firewall Manager；先将 Firewall Manager 委派给安全账户，再创建策略，将 AWS WAF web ACL 自动附加到新建的 ALB 和 API Gateway API。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A、C。讨论提示看到 WAF 应联想到 AWS Firewall Manager；先将 Firewall Manager 委派给安全账户，再创建策略，将 AWS WAF web ACL 自动附加到新建的 ALB 和 API Gateway API。
explanations.en: Correct answers: A and C. The discussion points to AWS Firewall Manager for WAF governance: delegate Firewall Manager to a security account, then create a policy to attach AWS WAF web ACLs to newly created ALBs and API Gateway APIs.

contents.en: A company's security team requires that all external Application Load Balancers (ALBs) and Amazon API Gateway APIs are associated with AWS WAF web ACLs. The company has hundreds of AWS accounts, all of which are included in a single organization in AWS Organizations. The company has configured AWS Config for the organization. During an audit, the company finds some externally facing ALBs that are not associated with AWS WAF web ACLs. Which combination of steps should a DevOps engineer take to prevent future violations? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司的安全团队要求所有外部 Application Load Balancers (ALBs) 和 Amazon API Gateway APIs 都关联 AWS WAF web ACLs。公司有数百个 AWS 账户，全部包含在 AWS Organizations 中的单个组织内。公司已为该组织配置 AWS Config。在一次审计期间，公司发现一些面向外部的 ALBs 未关联 AWS WAF web ACLs。DevOps 工程师应采取哪一组步骤来防止未来违规？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company uses AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) keys and manual key rotation to meet regulatory compliance requirements. The security team wants to be notified when any keys have not been rotated after 90 days. Which solution will accomplish this?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure AWS KMS to publish to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic when keys are more than 90 days old.

contents.en: Configure AWS KMS to publish to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic when keys are more than 90 days old.
contents.zh: 配置 AWS KMS，在 keys 超过 90 天时发布到 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge event to launch an AWS Lambda function to call the AWS Trusted Advisor API and publish to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic.

contents.en: Configure an Amazon EventBridge event to launch an AWS Lambda function to call the AWS Trusted Advisor API and publish to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic.
contents.zh: 配置一个 Amazon EventBridge event 来启动 AWS Lambda function，调用 AWS Trusted Advisor API 并发布到 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic。

options.label: C
options.content: Develop an AWS Config custom rule that publishes to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic when keys are more than 90 days old.

contents.en: Develop an AWS Config custom rule that publishes to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic when keys are more than 90 days old.
contents.zh: 开发一个 AWS Config custom rule，在 keys 超过 90 天时发布到 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure AWS Security Hub to publish to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic when keys are more than 90 days old.

contents.en: Configure AWS Security Hub to publish to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic when keys are more than 90 days old.
contents.zh: 配置 AWS Security Hub，在 keys 超过 90 天时发布到 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C。讨论指出 KMS 本身不提供该通知功能，因此使用 AWS Config 自定义规则检测超过 90 天的密钥，并发布到 SNS 主题。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C。讨论指出 KMS 本身不提供该通知功能，因此使用 AWS Config 自定义规则检测超过 90 天的密钥，并发布到 SNS 主题。
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. The discussion says KMS does not provide this function directly, so an AWS Config custom rule can detect keys older than 90 days and publish notifications to an SNS topic.

contents.en: A company uses AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) keys and manual key rotation to meet regulatory compliance requirements. The security team wants to be notified when any keys have not been rotated after 90 days. Which solution will accomplish this?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) keys 和手动 key rotation 来满足法规合规要求。安全团队希望在任何 keys 超过 90 天未轮换时收到通知。哪种解决方案可以实现这一点？

questions.content: A security review has identified that an AWS CodeBuild project is downloading a database population script from an Amazon S3 bucket using an unauthenticated request. The security team does not allow unauthenticated requests to S3 buckets for this project. How can this issue be corrected in the MOST secure manner?

options.label: A
options.content: Add the bucket name to the AllowedBuckets section of the CodeBuild project settings. Update the build spec to use the AWS CLI to download the database population script.

contents.en: Add the bucket name to the AllowedBuckets section of the CodeBuild project settings. Update the build spec to use the AWS CLI to download the database population script.
contents.zh: 将 bucket 名称添加到 CodeBuild project 设置的 AllowedBuckets 部分。更新 build spec，使用 AWS CLI 下载数据库填充脚本。

options.label: B
options.content: Modify the S3 bucket settings to enable HTTPS basic authentication and specify a token. Update the build spec to use cURL to pass the token and download the database population script.

contents.en: Modify the S3 bucket settings to enable HTTPS basic authentication and specify a token. Update the build spec to use cURL to pass the token and download the database population script.
contents.zh: 修改 S3 bucket 设置以启用 HTTPS basic authentication 并指定 token。更新 build spec，使用 cURL 传递 token 并下载数据库填充脚本。

options.label: C
options.content: Remove unauthenticated access from the S3 bucket with a bucket policy. Modify the service role for the CodeBuild project to include Amazon S3 access. Use the AWS CLI to download the database population script.

contents.en: Remove unauthenticated access from the S3 bucket with a bucket policy. Modify the service role for the CodeBuild project to include Amazon S3 access. Use the AWS CLI to download the database population script.
contents.zh: 通过 bucket policy 从 S3 bucket 移除未经身份验证的访问。修改 CodeBuild project 的 service role，以包含 Amazon S3 访问权限。使用 AWS CLI 下载数据库填充脚本。

options.label: D
options.content: Remove unauthenticated access from the S3 bucket with a bucket policy. Use the AWS CLI to download the database population script using an IAM access key and a secret access key.

contents.en: Remove unauthenticated access from the S3 bucket with a bucket policy. Use the AWS CLI to download the database population script using an IAM access key and a secret access key.
contents.zh: 通过 bucket policy 从 S3 bucket 移除未经身份验证的访问。使用 IAM access key 和 secret access key 通过 AWS CLI 下载数据库填充脚本。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C。移除 S3 桶的未认证访问后，应把 S3 访问权限授予 CodeBuild 项目的服务角色，并让构建过程使用 AWS CLI 下载数据库初始化脚本。

这样脚本访问由 IAM 控制，不再依赖公开访问。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C。移除 S3 桶的未认证访问后，应把 S3 访问权限授予 CodeBuild 项目的服务角色，并让构建过程使用 AWS CLI 下载数据库初始化脚本。

这样脚本访问由 IAM 控制，不再依赖公开访问。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: C. After removing unauthenticated access from the S3 bucket, grant S3 access to the CodeBuild service role and use the AWS CLI to download the database population script.

This keeps access controlled by IAM rather than public bucket access.

contents.en: A security review has identified that an AWS CodeBuild project is downloading a database population script from an Amazon S3 bucket using an unauthenticated request. The security team does not allow unauthenticated requests to S3 buckets for this project. How can this issue be corrected in the MOST secure manner?
contents.zh: 一次安全审查发现，一个 AWS CodeBuild project 正在使用未经身份验证的请求从 Amazon S3 bucket 下载数据库填充脚本。安全团队不允许此项目对 S3 buckets 使用未经身份验证的请求。如何以最安全的方式纠正此问题？

questions.content: An ecommerce company has chosen AWS to host its new platform. The company's DevOps team has started building an AWS Control Tower landing zone. The DevOps team has set the identity store within AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) to external identity provider (IdP) and has configured SAML 2.0. The DevOps team wants a robust permission model that applies the principle of least privilege. The model must allow the team to build and manage only the team's own resources. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create IAM policies that include the required permissions. Include the aws:PrincipalTag condition key.

contents.en: Create IAM policies that include the required permissions. Include the aws:PrincipalTag condition key.
contents.zh: 创建包含所需权限的 IAM policies。包含 aws:PrincipalTag condition key。

options.label: B
options.content: Create permission sets. Attach an inline policy that includes the required permissions and uses the aws:PrincipalTag condition key to scope the permissions.

contents.en: Create permission sets. Attach an inline policy that includes the required permissions and uses the aws:PrincipalTag condition key to scope the permissions.
contents.zh: 创建 permission sets。附加一个 inline policy，该策略包含所需权限并使用 aws:PrincipalTag condition key 来限定权限范围。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a group in the IdP. Place users in the group. Assign the group to accounts and the permission sets in IAM Identity Center.

contents.en: Create a group in the IdP. Place users in the group. Assign the group to accounts and the permission sets in IAM Identity Center.
contents.zh: 在 IdP 中创建一个 group。将用户放入该 group。在 IAM Identity Center 中将该 group 分配到账户和 permission sets。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a group in the IdP. Place users in the group. Assign the group to OUs and IAM policies.

contents.en: Create a group in the IdP. Place users in the group. Assign the group to OUs and IAM policies.
contents.zh: 在 IdP 中创建一个 group。将用户放入该 group。将该 group 分配给 OUs 和 IAM policies。

options.label: E
options.content: Enable attributes for access control in IAM Identity Center. Apply tags to users. Map the tags as key-value pairs.

contents.en: Enable attributes for access control in IAM Identity Center. Apply tags to users. Map the tags as key-value pairs.
contents.zh: 在 IAM Identity Center 中启用 attributes for access control。为用户应用 tags。将 tags 映射为 key-value pairs。

options.label: F
options.content: Enable attributes for access control in IAM Identity Center. Map attributes from the IdP as key-value pairs.

contents.en: Enable attributes for access control in IAM Identity Center. Map attributes from the IdP as key-value pairs.
contents.zh: 在 IAM Identity Center 中启用 attributes for access control。将来自 IdP 的 attributes 映射为 key-value pairs。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：B、C、F。使用 IAM Identity Center permission sets，并在内联策略中通过 aws:PrincipalTag 限定权限范围。

讨论强调属性来自 IdP：需要在 IdP 中建组并分配到账户和权限集，同时启用 attributes for access control，把 IdP 属性映射为键值对。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：B、C、F。使用 IAM Identity Center permission sets，并在内联策略中通过 aws:PrincipalTag 限定权限范围。

讨论强调属性来自 IdP：需要在 IdP 中建组并分配到账户和权限集，同时启用 attributes for access control，把 IdP 属性映射为键值对。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: B, C, and F. Use IAM Identity Center permission sets with an inline policy scoped by the aws:PrincipalTag condition key.

The discussion emphasizes that attributes come from the IdP, so create IdP groups, assign them to accounts and permission sets, and enable attributes for access control with IdP attribute mappings.

contents.en: An ecommerce company has chosen AWS to host its new platform. The company's DevOps team has started building an AWS Control Tower landing zone. The DevOps team has set the identity store within AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) to external identity provider (IdP) and has configured SAML 2.0. The DevOps team wants a robust permission model that applies the principle of least privilege. The model must allow the team to build and manage only the team's own resources. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家电子商务公司选择 AWS 来托管其新平台。公司的 DevOps 团队已开始构建 AWS Control Tower landing zone。DevOps 团队已将 AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) 中的 identity store 设置为 external identity provider (IdP)，并已配置 SAML 2.0。DevOps 团队希望建立一个稳健的权限模型，该模型应用最小权限原则。该模型必须允许团队仅构建和管理团队自己的资源。哪一组步骤可以满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: An ecommerce company is receiving reports that its order history page is experiencing delays in reflecting the processing status of orders. The order processing system consists of an AWS Lambda function that uses reserved concurrency. The Lambda function processes order messages from an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue and inserts processed orders into an Amazon DynamoDB table. The DynamoDB table has auto scaling enabled for read and write capacity. Which actions should a DevOps engineer take to resolve this delay? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Check the ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage metric for the SQS queue. Increase the Lambda function concurrency limit.

contents.en: Check the ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage metric for the SQS queue. Increase the Lambda function concurrency limit.
contents.zh: 检查 SQS queue 的 ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage metric。增加 Lambda function concurrency limit。

options.label: B
options.content: Check the ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage metnc for the SQS queue Configure a redrive policy on the SQS queue.

contents.en: Check the ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage metnc for the SQS queue Configure a redrive policy on the SQS queue.
contents.zh: 检查 SQS queue 的 ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage metnc。为 SQS queue 配置 redrive policy。

options.label: C
options.content: Check the NumberOfMessagesSent metric for the SQS queue. Increase the SQS queue visibility timeout.

contents.en: Check the NumberOfMessagesSent metric for the SQS queue. Increase the SQS queue visibility timeout.
contents.zh: 检查 SQS queue 的 NumberOfMessagesSent metric。增加 SQS queue visibility timeout。

options.label: D
options.content: Check the WriteThrottleEvents metric for the DynamoDB table. Increase the maximum write capacity units (WCUs) for the table's scaling policy.

contents.en: Check the WriteThrottleEvents metric for the DynamoDB table. Increase the maximum write capacity units (WCUs) for the table's scaling policy.
contents.zh: 检查 DynamoDB table 的 WriteThrottleEvents metric。增加该 table 的 scaling policy 的最大 write capacity units (WCUs)。

options.label: E
options.content: Check the Throttles metric for the Lambda function. Increase the Lambda function timeout.

contents.en: Check the Throttles metric for the Lambda function. Increase the Lambda function timeout.
contents.zh: 检查 Lambda function 的 Throttles metric。增加 Lambda function timeout。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A、D。检查 SQS 的 ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage 可判断队列是否积压，并通过提高 Lambda 并发限制提升消费能力。

同时检查 DynamoDB WriteThrottleEvents，如果写入节流，应提高表扩展策略中的最大 WCU。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A、D。检查 SQS 的 ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage 可判断队列是否积压，并通过提高 Lambda 并发限制提升消费能力。

同时检查 DynamoDB WriteThrottleEvents，如果写入节流，应提高表扩展策略中的最大 WCU。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: A and D. The SQS ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage metric shows queue backlog, and increasing Lambda concurrency can improve processing throughput.

Also check DynamoDB WriteThrottleEvents; if writes are throttled, increase the maximum WCUs in the table's scaling policy.

contents.en: An ecommerce company is receiving reports that its order history page is experiencing delays in reflecting the processing status of orders. The order processing system consists of an AWS Lambda function that uses reserved concurrency. The Lambda function processes order messages from an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue and inserts processed orders into an Amazon DynamoDB table. The DynamoDB table has auto scaling enabled for read and write capacity. Which actions should a DevOps engineer take to resolve this delay? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家电子商务公司收到报告，称其订单历史页面在反映订单处理状态时出现延迟。订单处理系统由一个使用 reserved concurrency 的 AWS Lambda function 组成。该 Lambda function 从 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue 处理订单消息，并将处理后的订单插入 Amazon DynamoDB table。该 DynamoDB table 已为读写容量启用 auto scaling。DevOps 工程师应采取哪些操作来解决此延迟？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company has a single AWS account that runs hundreds of Amazon EC2 instances in a single AWS Region. New EC2 instances are launched and terminated each hour in the account. The account also includes existing EC2 instances that have been running for longer than a week. The company's security policy requires all running EC2 instances to use an EC2 instance profile. If an EC2 instance does not have an instance profile attached, the EC2 instance must use a default instance profile that has no IAM permissions assigned. A DevOps engineer reviews the account and discovers EC2 instances that are running without an instance profile. During the review, the DevOps engineer also observes that new EC2 instances are being launched without an instance profile. Which solution will ensure that an instance profile is attached to all existing and future EC2 instances in the Region?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to EC2 RunInstances API calls. Configure the rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function to attach the default instance profile to the EC2 instances.

contents.en: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to EC2 RunInstances API calls. Configure the rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function to attach the default instance profile to the EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 配置一个 Amazon EventBridge rule，对 EC2 RunInstances API calls 作出反应。配置该 rule 调用 AWS Lambda function，以将默认 instance profile 附加到 EC2 实例。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure the ec2-instance-profile-attached AWS Config managed rule with a trigger type of configuration changes. Configure an automatic remediation action that invokes an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to attach the default instance profile to the EC2 instances.

contents.en: Configure the ec2-instance-profile-attached AWS Config managed rule with a trigger type of configuration changes. Configure an automatic remediation action that invokes an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to attach the default instance profile to the EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 配置 ec2-instance-profile-attached AWS Config managed rule，并将 trigger type 设置为 configuration changes。配置自动修复操作，调用 AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook 将默认 instance profile 附加到 EC2 实例。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to EC2 StartInstances API calls. Configure the rule to invoke an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to attach the default instance profile to the EC2 instances

contents.en: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to EC2 StartInstances API calls. Configure the rule to invoke an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to attach the default instance profile to the EC2 instances
contents.zh: 配置一个 Amazon EventBridge rule，对 EC2 StartInstances API calls 作出反应。配置该 rule 调用 AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook，以将默认 instance profile 附加到 EC2 实例

options.label: D
options.content: Configure the iam-role-managed-policy-check AWS Config managed rule with a trigger type of configuration changes. Configure an automatic remediation action that invokes an AWS Lambda function to attach the default instance profile to the EC2 instances.

contents.en: Configure the iam-role-managed-policy-check AWS Config managed rule with a trigger type of configuration changes. Configure an automatic remediation action that invokes an AWS Lambda function to attach the default instance profile to the EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 配置 iam-role-managed-policy-check AWS Config managed rule，并将 trigger type 设置为 configuration changes。配置自动修复操作，调用 AWS Lambda function 将默认 instance profile 附加到 EC2 实例。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：B。使用 AWS Config 托管规则 ec2-instance-profile-attached，以配置变更作为触发器，能发现没有实例配置文件的 EC2 实例。

自动补救动作调用 Systems Manager Automation 运行手册，把默认 instance profile 附加到这些实例。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：B。使用 AWS Config 托管规则 ec2-instance-profile-attached，以配置变更作为触发器，能发现没有实例配置文件的 EC2 实例。

自动补救动作调用 Systems Manager Automation 运行手册，把默认 instance profile 附加到这些实例。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: B. The AWS Config managed rule ec2-instance-profile-attached, triggered by configuration changes, can detect EC2 instances without an instance profile.

An automatic remediation action can invoke a Systems Manager Automation runbook to attach the default instance profile.

contents.en: A company has a single AWS account that runs hundreds of Amazon EC2 instances in a single AWS Region. New EC2 instances are launched and terminated each hour in the account. The account also includes existing EC2 instances that have been running for longer than a week. The company's security policy requires all running EC2 instances to use an EC2 instance profile. If an EC2 instance does not have an instance profile attached, the EC2 instance must use a default instance profile that has no IAM permissions assigned. A DevOps engineer reviews the account and discovers EC2 instances that are running without an instance profile. During the review, the DevOps engineer also observes that new EC2 instances are being launched without an instance profile. Which solution will ensure that an instance profile is attached to all existing and future EC2 instances in the Region?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个单一 AWS 账户，该账户在单个 AWS Region 中运行数百个 Amazon EC2 实例。该账户中每小时都会启动和终止新的 EC2 实例。该账户还包括已运行超过一周的现有 EC2 实例。公司的安全策略要求所有正在运行的 EC2 实例都使用 EC2 instance profile。如果某个 EC2 实例没有附加 instance profile，则该 EC2 实例必须使用一个未分配任何 IAM 权限的默认 instance profile。DevOps 工程师审查该账户后发现，有 EC2 实例正在没有 instance profile 的情况下运行。在审查期间，DevOps 工程师还观察到新的 EC2 实例正在没有 instance profile 的情况下启动。哪种解决方案将确保该 Region 中所有现有和未来的 EC2 实例都附加 instance profile？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is building a continuous deployment pipeline for a serverless application that uses AWS Lambda functions. The company wants to reduce the customer impact of an unsuccessful deployment. The company also wants to monitor for issues. Which deploy stage configuration will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use an AWS Serverless Application Model (AWS SAM) template to define the serverless application. Use AWS CodeDeploy to deploy the Lambda functions with the Canary10Percent15Minutes Deployment Preference Type. Use Amazon CloudWatch alarms to monitor the health of the functions.

contents.en: Use an AWS Serverless Application Model (AWS SAM) template to define the serverless application. Use AWS CodeDeploy to deploy the Lambda functions with the Canary10Percent15Minutes Deployment Preference Type. Use Amazon CloudWatch alarms to monitor the health of the functions.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Serverless Application Model (AWS SAM) template 定义 serverless application。使用 AWS CodeDeploy 以 Canary10Percent15Minutes Deployment Preference Type 部署 Lambda functions。使用 Amazon CloudWatch alarms 监控 functions 的运行状况。

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation to publish a new stack update, and include Amazon CloudWatch alarms on all resources. Set up an AWS CodePipeline approval action for a developer to verify and approve the AWS CloudFormation change set.

contents.en: Use AWS CloudFormation to publish a new stack update, and include Amazon CloudWatch alarms on all resources. Set up an AWS CodePipeline approval action for a developer to verify and approve the AWS CloudFormation change set.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CloudFormation 发布新的 stack update，并在所有资源上包含 Amazon CloudWatch alarms。设置 AWS CodePipeline approval action，由开发人员验证并批准 AWS CloudFormation change set。

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation to publish a new version on every stack update, and include Amazon CloudWatch alarms on all resources. Use the RoutingConfig property of the AWS::Lambda::Alias resource to update the traffic routing during the stack update.

contents.en: Use AWS CloudFormation to publish a new version on every stack update, and include Amazon CloudWatch alarms on all resources. Use the RoutingConfig property of the AWS::Lambda::Alias resource to update the traffic routing during the stack update.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CloudFormation 在每次 stack update 时发布新版本，并在所有资源上包含 Amazon CloudWatch alarms。使用 AWS::Lambda::Alias resource 的 RoutingConfig property 在 stack update 期间更新流量路由。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS CodeBuild to add sample event payloads for testing to the Lambda functions. Publish a new version of the functions, and include Amazon CloudWatch alarms. Update the production alias to point to the new version. Configure rollbacks to occur when an alarm is in the ALARM state.

contents.en: Use AWS CodeBuild to add sample event payloads for testing to the Lambda functions. Publish a new version of the functions, and include Amazon CloudWatch alarms. Update the production alias to point to the new version. Configure rollbacks to occur when an alarm is in the ALARM state.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CodeBuild 向 Lambda functions 添加用于测试的 sample event payloads。发布 functions 的新版本，并包含 Amazon CloudWatch alarms。更新 production alias 指向新版本。配置在 alarm 处于 ALARM state 时发生回滚。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A。用 AWS SAM 模板定义无服务器应用，并通过 CodeDeploy 的 Canary10Percent15Minutes 部署偏好发布 Lambda，可以实现受控的金丝雀部署。

CloudWatch alarms 用于监控函数健康状况并支持部署判断。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A。用 AWS SAM 模板定义无服务器应用，并通过 CodeDeploy 的 Canary10Percent15Minutes 部署偏好发布 Lambda，可以实现受控的金丝雀部署。

CloudWatch alarms 用于监控函数健康状况并支持部署判断。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: A. Defining the serverless application with AWS SAM and using CodeDeploy's Canary10Percent15Minutes deployment preference provides controlled Lambda canary deployments.

CloudWatch alarms monitor function health during the deployment.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer is building a continuous deployment pipeline for a serverless application that uses AWS Lambda functions. The company wants to reduce the customer impact of an unsuccessful deployment. The company also wants to monitor for issues. Which deploy stage configuration will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: DevOps 工程师正在为使用 AWS Lambda functions 的 serverless application 构建 continuous deployment pipeline。公司希望减少不成功部署对客户的影响。公司还希望监控问题。哪种 deploy stage 配置可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: To run an application, a DevOps engineer launches an Amazon EC2 instance with public IP addresses in a public subnet. A user data script obtains the application artifacts and installs them on the instances upon launch. A change to the security classification of the application now requires the instances to run with no access to the internet. While the instances launch successfully and show as healthy, the application does not seem to be installed. Which of the following should successfully install the application while complying with the new rule?

options.label: A
options.content: Launch the instances in a public subnet with Elastic IP addresses attached. Once the application is installed and running, run a script to disassociate the Elastic IP addresses afterwards.

contents.en: Launch the instances in a public subnet with Elastic IP addresses attached. Once the application is installed and running, run a script to disassociate the Elastic IP addresses afterwards.
contents.zh: 在 public subnet 中启动实例，并附加 Elastic IP addresses。应用程序安装并运行后，随后运行脚本取消关联 Elastic IP addresses。

options.label: B
options.content: Set up a NAT gateway. Deploy the EC2 instances to a private subnet. Update the private subnet's route table to use the NAT gateway as the default route.

contents.en: Set up a NAT gateway. Deploy the EC2 instances to a private subnet. Update the private subnet's route table to use the NAT gateway as the default route.
contents.zh: 设置 NAT gateway。将 EC2 实例部署到 private subnet。更新 private subnet 的 route table，将 NAT gateway 用作 default route。

options.label: C
options.content: Publish the application artifacts to an Amazon S3 bucket and create a VPC endpoint for S3. Assign an IAM instance profile to the EC2 instances so they can read the application artifacts from the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Publish the application artifacts to an Amazon S3 bucket and create a VPC endpoint for S3. Assign an IAM instance profile to the EC2 instances so they can read the application artifacts from the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 将应用程序构件发布到 Amazon S3 bucket，并为 S3 创建 VPC endpoint。为 EC2 实例分配 IAM instance profile，使其可以从 S3 bucket 读取应用程序构件。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a security group for the application instances and allow only outbound traffic to the artifact repository. Remove the security group rule once the install is complete.

contents.en: Create a security group for the application instances and allow only outbound traffic to the artifact repository. Remove the security group rule once the install is complete.
contents.zh: 为应用程序实例创建 security group，并仅允许到构件存储库的出站流量。安装完成后移除该 security group rule。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C。把应用制品发布到 S3，并为 S3 创建 VPC endpoint，EC2 实例即可在初始化时通过实例配置文件读取制品。

讨论指出需求只是初始化时下载包，不需要持续互联网访问，因此 S3 方案更便宜且合适。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C。把应用制品发布到 S3，并为 S3 创建 VPC endpoint，EC2 实例即可在初始化时通过实例配置文件读取制品。

讨论指出需求只是初始化时下载包，不需要持续互联网访问，因此 S3 方案更便宜且合适。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: C. Publishing artifacts to S3 and using an S3 VPC endpoint lets EC2 instances download the artifacts during initialization through an IAM instance profile.

The discussion notes that continuous internet access is unnecessary for a one-time package download, making S3 the cheaper and suitable option.

contents.en: To run an application, a DevOps engineer launches an Amazon EC2 instance with public IP addresses in a public subnet. A user data script obtains the application artifacts and installs them on the instances upon launch. A change to the security classification of the application now requires the instances to run with no access to the internet. While the instances launch successfully and show as healthy, the application does not seem to be installed. Which of the following should successfully install the application while complying with the new rule?
contents.zh: 为了运行一个应用程序，DevOps 工程师在 public subnet 中启动带有 public IP addresses 的 Amazon EC2 instance。user data script 会在实例启动时获取应用程序构件并将其安装到实例上。应用程序安全分类的变更现在要求实例运行时不能访问互联网。虽然实例成功启动并显示为健康，但应用程序似乎未安装。以下哪项应能在遵守新规则的同时成功安装应用程序？

questions.content: A development team is using AWS CodeCommit to version control application code and AWS CodePipeline to orchestrate software deployments. The team has decided to use a remote main branch as the trigger for the pipeline to integrate code changes. A developer has pushed code changes to the CodeCommit repository, but noticed that the pipeline had no reaction, even after 10 minutes. Which of the following actions should be taken to troubleshoot this issue?

options.label: A
options.content: Check that an Amazon EventBridge rule has been created for the main branch to trigger the pipeline.

contents.en: Check that an Amazon EventBridge rule has been created for the main branch to trigger the pipeline.
contents.zh: 检查是否已为 main branch 创建 Amazon EventBridge rule 以触发 pipeline。

options.label: B
options.content: Check that the CodePipeline service role has permission to access the CodeCommit repository.

contents.en: Check that the CodePipeline service role has permission to access the CodeCommit repository.
contents.zh: 检查 CodePipeline service role 是否有权限访问 CodeCommit repository。

options.label: C
options.content: Check that the developer's IAM role has permission to push to the CodeCommit repository.

contents.en: Check that the developer's IAM role has permission to push to the CodeCommit repository.
contents.zh: 检查开发人员的 IAM role 是否有权限推送到 CodeCommit repository。

options.label: D
options.content: Check to see if the pipeline failed to start because of CodeCommit errors in Amazon CloudWatch Logs.

contents.en: Check to see if the pipeline failed to start because of CodeCommit errors in Amazon CloudWatch Logs.
contents.zh: 检查 pipeline 是否因 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 中的 CodeCommit errors 而未能启动。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A。源数据标记的正确项是检查是否为 main 分支创建 EventBridge 规则来触发流水线。

讨论同时提到 CodePipeline 与 CodeCommit 可直接集成，因此排查时应结合该触发机制和服务角色权限一起判断。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A。源数据标记的正确项是检查是否为 main 分支创建 EventBridge 规则来触发流水线。

讨论同时提到 CodePipeline 与 CodeCommit 可直接集成，因此排查时应结合该触发机制和服务角色权限一起判断。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: A. The source marks checking for an EventBridge rule on the main branch to trigger the pipeline as the correct option.

The discussion also notes that CodePipeline can integrate directly with CodeCommit, so this trigger configuration should be considered alongside service-role permissions when troubleshooting.

contents.en: A development team is using AWS CodeCommit to version control application code and AWS CodePipeline to orchestrate software deployments. The team has decided to use a remote main branch as the trigger for the pipeline to integrate code changes. A developer has pushed code changes to the CodeCommit repository, but noticed that the pipeline had no reaction, even after 10 minutes. Which of the following actions should be taken to troubleshoot this issue?
contents.zh: 开发团队正在使用 AWS CodeCommit 对应用程序代码进行版本控制，并使用 AWS CodePipeline 编排软件部署。团队已决定使用远程 main branch 作为 pipeline 的触发器，以集成代码更改。一名开发人员已将代码更改推送到 CodeCommit repository，但注意到即使过了 10 分钟，pipeline 也没有任何反应。应采取以下哪项操作来排查此问题？

questions.content: A company's developers use Amazon EC2 instances as remote workstations. The company is concerned that users can create or modify EC2 security groups to allow unrestricted inbound access. A DevOps engineer needs to develop a solution to detect when users create unrestricted security group rules. The solution must detect changes to security group rules in near real time, remove unrestricted rules, and send email notifications to the security team. The DevOps engineer has created an AWS Lambda function that checks for security group ID from input, removes rules that grant unrestricted access, and sends notifications through Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS). What should the DevOps engineer do next to meet the requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure the Lambda function to be invoked by the SNS topic. Create an AWS CloudTrail subscription for the SNS topic. Configure a subscription filter for security group modification events.

contents.en: Configure the Lambda function to be invoked by the SNS topic. Create an AWS CloudTrail subscription for the SNS topic. Configure a subscription filter for security group modification events.
contents.zh: 配置 Lambda function 由 SNS topic 调用。为 SNS topic 创建 AWS CloudTrail subscription。为 security group modification events 配置 subscription filter。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule to invoke the Lambda function. Define a schedule pattern that runs the Lambda function every hour.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule to invoke the Lambda function. Define a schedule pattern that runs the Lambda function every hour.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule 来调用 Lambda function。定义每小时运行 Lambda function 的 schedule pattern。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge event rule that has the default event bus as the source. Define the rule's event pattern to match EC2 security group creation and modification events. Configure the rule to invoke the Lambda function.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge event rule that has the default event bus as the source. Define the rule's event pattern to match EC2 security group creation and modification events. Configure the rule to invoke the Lambda function.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge event rule，以 default event bus 作为来源。定义该 rule 的 event pattern，以匹配 EC2 security group creation 和 modification events。配置该 rule 调用 Lambda function。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge custom event bus that subscribes to events from all AWS services. Configure the Lambda function to be invoked by the custom event bus.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge custom event bus that subscribes to events from all AWS services. Configure the Lambda function to be invoked by the custom event bus.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge custom event bus，订阅来自所有 AWS services 的 events。配置 Lambda function 由 custom event bus 调用。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C。创建 EventBridge 规则，匹配 EC2 安全组创建和修改事件，并调用 Lambda，能够在相关事件发生时立即处理。

讨论指出 Lambda 应由 EventBridge 调用，且此需求是事件驱动而不是定时扫描。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C。创建 EventBridge 规则，匹配 EC2 安全组创建和修改事件，并调用 Lambda，能够在相关事件发生时立即处理。

讨论指出 Lambda 应由 EventBridge 调用，且此需求是事件驱动而不是定时扫描。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: C. An EventBridge rule that matches EC2 security group creation and modification events can invoke Lambda immediately when relevant changes occur.

The discussion notes that Lambda should be invoked by EventBridge and that this requirement is event-driven, not scheduled polling.

contents.en: A company's developers use Amazon EC2 instances as remote workstations. The company is concerned that users can create or modify EC2 security groups to allow unrestricted inbound access. A DevOps engineer needs to develop a solution to detect when users create unrestricted security group rules. The solution must detect changes to security group rules in near real time, remove unrestricted rules, and send email notifications to the security team. The DevOps engineer has created an AWS Lambda function that checks for security group ID from input, removes rules that grant unrestricted access, and sends notifications through Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS). What should the DevOps engineer do next to meet the requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司的开发人员使用 Amazon EC2 实例作为远程工作站。公司担心用户可以创建或修改 EC2 security groups，以允许不受限制的入站访问。DevOps 工程师需要开发一个解决方案，用于检测用户创建不受限制的 security group rules 的情况。该解决方案必须近实时检测 security group rules 的更改，移除不受限制的 rules，并向安全团队发送电子邮件通知。DevOps 工程师已创建一个 AWS Lambda function，该函数会从输入中检查 security group ID，移除授予不受限制访问的 rules，并通过 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 发送通知。DevOps 工程师接下来应做什么来满足要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is creating an AWS CloudFormation template to deploy a web service. The web service will run on Amazon EC2 instances in a private subnet behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The DevOps engineer must ensure that the service can accept requests from clients that have IPv6 addresses. What should the DevOps engineer do with the CloudFormation template so that IPv6 clients can access the web service?

options.label: A
options.content: Add an IPv6 CIDR block to the VPC and the private subnet for the EC2 instances. Create route table entries for the IPv6 network, use EC2 instance types that support IPv6, and assign IPv6 addresses to each EC2 instance.

contents.en: Add an IPv6 CIDR block to the VPC and the private subnet for the EC2 instances. Create route table entries for the IPv6 network, use EC2 instance types that support IPv6, and assign IPv6 addresses to each EC2 instance.
contents.zh: 向 VPC 和 EC2 实例的 private subnet 添加 IPv6 CIDR block。为 IPv6 network 创建 route table entries，使用支持 IPv6 的 EC2 instance types，并为每个 EC2 instance 分配 IPv6 addresses。

options.label: B
options.content: Assign each EC2 instance an IPv6 Elastic IP address. Create a target group, and add the EC2 instances as targets. Create a listener on port 443 of the ALB, and associate the target group with the ALB.

contents.en: Assign each EC2 instance an IPv6 Elastic IP address. Create a target group, and add the EC2 instances as targets. Create a listener on port 443 of the ALB, and associate the target group with the ALB.
contents.zh: 为每个 EC2 instance 分配 IPv6 Elastic IP address。创建 target group，并将 EC2 instances 添加为 targets。在 ALB 的 port 443 上创建 listener，并将 target group 与 ALB 关联。

options.label: C
options.content: Replace the ALB with a Network Load Balancer (NLB). Add an IPv6 CIDR block to the VPC and subnets for the NLB, and assign the NLB an IPv6 Elastic IP address.

contents.en: Replace the ALB with a Network Load Balancer (NLB). Add an IPv6 CIDR block to the VPC and subnets for the NLB, and assign the NLB an IPv6 Elastic IP address.
contents.zh: 将 ALB 替换为 Network Load Balancer (NLB)。向 VPC 和 NLB 的 subnets 添加 IPv6 CIDR block，并为 NLB 分配 IPv6 Elastic IP address。

options.label: D
options.content: Add an IPv6 CIDR block to the VPC and subnets for the ALB. Create a listener on port 443. and specify the dualstack IP address type on the ALB. Create a target group, and add the EC2 instances as targets. Associate the target group with the ALB.

contents.en: Add an IPv6 CIDR block to the VPC and subnets for the ALB. Create a listener on port 443. and specify the dualstack IP address type on the ALB. Create a target group, and add the EC2 instances as targets. Associate the target group with the ALB.
contents.zh: 向 VPC 和 ALB 的 subnets 添加 IPv6 CIDR block。创建 port 443 上的 listener，并在 ALB 上指定 dualstack IP address type。创建 target group，并将 EC2 instances 添加为 targets。将 target group 与 ALB 关联。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：D。要支持 IPv6，需要为 VPC 和 ALB 子网添加 IPv6 CIDR，并将 ALB 设置为 dualstack 地址类型。

同时创建 443 监听器、目标组并注册 EC2 实例，使 ALB 可同时通过 IPv4 和 IPv6 服务客户端。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：D。要支持 IPv6，需要为 VPC 和 ALB 子网添加 IPv6 CIDR，并将 ALB 设置为 dualstack 地址类型。

同时创建 443 监听器、目标组并注册 EC2 实例，使 ALB 可同时通过 IPv4 和 IPv6 服务客户端。
explanations.en:
