Correct answer: D. To support IPv6, add IPv6 CIDR blocks to the VPC and ALB subnets and configure the ALB with the dualstack IP address type.

Create the port 443 listener, target group, and EC2 targets so clients can reach the ALB over both IPv4 and IPv6.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer is creating an AWS CloudFormation template to deploy a web service. The web service will run on Amazon EC2 instances in a private subnet behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The DevOps engineer must ensure that the service can accept requests from clients that have IPv6 addresses. What should the DevOps engineer do with the CloudFormation template so that IPv6 clients can access the web service?
contents.zh: DevOps 工程师正在创建 AWS CloudFormation template，以部署一个 Web 服务。该 Web 服务将在 Application Load Balancer (ALB) 后面的 private subnet 中的 Amazon EC2 实例上运行。DevOps 工程师必须确保该服务可以接受来自具有 IPv6 addresses 的客户端的请求。DevOps 工程师应在 CloudFormation template 中做什么，以便 IPv6 客户端可以访问该 Web 服务？

questions.content: A company uses AWS Organizations and AWS Control Tower to manage all the company's AWS accounts. The company uses the Enterprise Support plan. A DevOps engineer is using Account Factory for Terraform (AFT) to provision new accounts. When new accounts are provisioned, the DevOps engineer notices that the support plan for the new accounts is set to the Basic Support plan. The DevOps engineer needs to implement a solution to provision the new accounts with the Enterprise Support plan. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use an AWS Config conformance pack to deploy the account-part-of-organizations AWS Config rule and to automatically remediate any noncompliant accounts.

contents.en: Use an AWS Config conformance pack to deploy the account-part-of-organizations AWS Config rule and to automatically remediate any noncompliant accounts.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Config conformance pack 部署 account-part-of-organizations AWS Config rule，并自动修复任何不合规账户。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function to create a ticket for AWS Support to add the account to the Enterprise Support plan. Grant the Lambda function the support:ResolveCase permission.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function to create a ticket for AWS Support to add the account to the Enterprise Support plan. Grant the Lambda function the support:ResolveCase permission.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Lambda function，为 AWS Support 创建工单，以将该账户添加到 Enterprise Support plan。授予 Lambda function support:ResolveCase 权限。

options.label: C
options.content: Add an additional value to the control_tower_parameters input to set the AWSEnterpriseSupport parameter as the organization's management account number.

contents.en: Add an additional value to the control_tower_parameters input to set the AWSEnterpriseSupport parameter as the organization's management account number.
contents.zh: 向 control_tower_parameters input 添加一个额外值，将 AWSEnterpriseSupport parameter 设置为组织的管理账户编号。

options.label: D
options.content: Set the aft_feature_enterprise_support feature flag to True in the AFT deployment input configuration. Redeploy AFT and apply the changes.

contents.en: Set the aft_feature_enterprise_support feature flag to True in the AFT deployment input configuration. Redeploy AFT and apply the changes.
contents.zh: 在 AFT deployment input configuration 中将 aft_feature_enterprise_support feature flag 设置为 True。重新部署 AFT 并应用更改。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：D。将 AFT 输入配置中的 aft_feature_enterprise_support feature flag 设为 True，然后重新部署 AFT 并应用更改，即可启用企业支持相关功能。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：D。将 AFT 输入配置中的 aft_feature_enterprise_support feature flag 设为 True，然后重新部署 AFT 并应用更改，即可启用企业支持相关功能。
explanations.en: Correct answer: D. Set the aft_feature_enterprise_support feature flag to True in the AFT deployment input configuration, then redeploy AFT and apply the change.

contents.en: A company uses AWS Organizations and AWS Control Tower to manage all the company's AWS accounts. The company uses the Enterprise Support plan. A DevOps engineer is using Account Factory for Terraform (AFT) to provision new accounts. When new accounts are provisioned, the DevOps engineer notices that the support plan for the new accounts is set to the Basic Support plan. The DevOps engineer needs to implement a solution to provision the new accounts with the Enterprise Support plan. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations 和 AWS Control Tower 管理公司的所有 AWS 账户。公司使用 Enterprise Support plan。DevOps 工程师正在使用 Account Factory for Terraform (AFT) 预置新账户。当预置新账户时，DevOps 工程师注意到新账户的 support plan 被设置为 Basic Support plan。DevOps 工程师需要实施一个解决方案，以使用 Enterprise Support plan 预置新账户。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company's DevOps engineer uses AWS Systems Manager to perform maintenance tasks during maintenance windows. The company has a few Amazon EC2 instances that require a restart after notifications from AWS Health. The DevOps engineer needs to implement an automated solution to remediate these notifications. The DevOps engineer creates an Amazon EventBridge rule. How should the DevOps engineer configure the EventBridge rule to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure an event source of AWS Health, a service of EC2. and an event type that indicates instance maintenance. Target a Systems Manager document to restart the EC2 instance.

contents.en: Configure an event source of AWS Health, a service of EC2. and an event type that indicates instance maintenance. Target a Systems Manager document to restart the EC2 instance.
contents.zh: 配置 event source 为 AWS Health，service 为 EC2，并配置指示 instance maintenance 的 event type。将 Systems Manager document 作为目标以重启 EC2 instance。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure an event source of Systems Manager and an event type that indicates a maintenance window. Target a Systems Manager document to restart the EC2 instance.

contents.en: Configure an event source of Systems Manager and an event type that indicates a maintenance window. Target a Systems Manager document to restart the EC2 instance.
contents.zh: 配置 event source 为 Systems Manager，并配置指示 maintenance window 的 event type。将 Systems Manager document 作为目标以重启 EC2 instance。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure an event source of AWS Health, a service of EC2, and an event type that indicates instance maintenance. Target a newly created AWS Lambda function that registers an automation task to restart the EC2 instance during a maintenance window.

contents.en: Configure an event source of AWS Health, a service of EC2, and an event type that indicates instance maintenance. Target a newly created AWS Lambda function that registers an automation task to restart the EC2 instance during a maintenance window.
contents.zh: 配置 event source 为 AWS Health，service 为 EC2，并配置指示 instance maintenance 的 event type。将新创建的 AWS Lambda function 作为目标，该函数注册 automation task，以在 maintenance window 内重启 EC2 instance。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure an event source of EC2 and an event type that indicates instance maintenance. Target a newly created AWS Lambda function that registers an automation task to restart the EC2 instance during a maintenance window.

contents.en: Configure an event source of EC2 and an event type that indicates instance maintenance. Target a newly created AWS Lambda function that registers an automation task to restart the EC2 instance during a maintenance window.
contents.zh: 配置 event source 为 EC2，并配置指示 instance maintenance 的 event type。将新创建的 AWS Lambda function 作为目标，该函数注册 automation task，以在 maintenance window 内重启 EC2 instance。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A。使用 AWS Health 中与 EC2 实例维护相关的事件作为事件源，并以 Systems Manager document 为目标重启实例，符合讨论中给出的正确方向。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A。使用 AWS Health 中与 EC2 实例维护相关的事件作为事件源，并以 Systems Manager document 为目标重启实例，符合讨论中给出的正确方向。
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. Use AWS Health events for EC2 instance maintenance as the event source and target a Systems Manager document to restart the instance, matching the correct direction noted in the discussion.

contents.en: A company's DevOps engineer uses AWS Systems Manager to perform maintenance tasks during maintenance windows. The company has a few Amazon EC2 instances that require a restart after notifications from AWS Health. The DevOps engineer needs to implement an automated solution to remediate these notifications. The DevOps engineer creates an Amazon EventBridge rule. How should the DevOps engineer configure the EventBridge rule to meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司的 DevOps 工程师使用 AWS Systems Manager 在维护时段内执行维护任务。公司有几个 Amazon EC2 实例在收到 AWS Health 通知后需要重启。DevOps 工程师需要实施自动化解决方案来修复这些通知。DevOps 工程师创建了一个 Amazon EventBridge rule。DevOps 工程师应如何配置 EventBridge rule 以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has containerized all of its in-house quality control applications. The company is running Jenkins on Amazon EC2 instances, which require patching and upgrading. The compliance officer has requested a DevOps engineer begin encrypting build artifacts since they contain company intellectual property. What should the DevOps engineer do to accomplish this in the MOST maintainable manner?

options.label: A
options.content: Automate patching and upgrading using AWS Systems Manager on EC2 instances and encrypt Amazon EBS volumes by default.

contents.en: Automate patching and upgrading using AWS Systems Manager on EC2 instances and encrypt Amazon EBS volumes by default.
contents.zh: 在 EC2 实例上使用 AWS Systems Manager 自动执行打补丁和升级，并默认加密 Amazon EBS volumes。

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy Jenkins to an Amazon ECS cluster and copy build artifacts to an Amazon S3 bucket with default encryption enabled.

contents.en: Deploy Jenkins to an Amazon ECS cluster and copy build artifacts to an Amazon S3 bucket with default encryption enabled.
contents.zh: 将 Jenkins 部署到 Amazon ECS cluster，并将 build artifacts 复制到启用了 default encryption 的 Amazon S3 bucket。

options.label: C
options.content: Leverage AWS CodePipeline with a build action and encrypt the artifacts using AWS Secrets Manager.

contents.en: Leverage AWS CodePipeline with a build action and encrypt the artifacts using AWS Secrets Manager.
contents.zh: 利用 AWS CodePipeline 和 build action，并使用 AWS Secrets Manager 加密 artifacts。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS CodeBuild with artifact encryption to replace the Jenkins instance running on EC2 instances.

contents.en: Use AWS CodeBuild with artifact encryption to replace the Jenkins instance running on EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 使用带有 artifact encryption 的 AWS CodeBuild，替换运行在 EC2 实例上的 Jenkins instance。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：D。用托管的 AWS CodeBuild 替代运行在 EC2 上的 Jenkins，可以减少补丁和升级维护工作。

讨论还指出 CodeBuild 结合 S3 支持制品自动加密，因此是最容易维护的方案。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：D。用托管的 AWS CodeBuild 替代运行在 EC2 上的 Jenkins，可以减少补丁和升级维护工作。

讨论还指出 CodeBuild 结合 S3 支持制品自动加密，因此是最容易维护的方案。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: D. Replacing Jenkins on EC2 with managed AWS CodeBuild reduces patching and upgrade maintenance.

The discussion also notes that CodeBuild, using S3, provides automatic artifact encryption, making it the easiest option to maintain.

contents.en: A company has containerized all of its in-house quality control applications. The company is running Jenkins on Amazon EC2 instances, which require patching and upgrading. The compliance officer has requested a DevOps engineer begin encrypting build artifacts since they contain company intellectual property. What should the DevOps engineer do to accomplish this in the MOST maintainable manner?
contents.zh: 一家公司已将其所有内部质量控制应用程序容器化。公司在 Amazon EC2 实例上运行 Jenkins，这些实例需要打补丁和升级。合规官要求 DevOps 工程师开始加密构建构件，因为这些构件包含公司的知识产权。DevOps 工程师应做什么，以最易维护的方式完成此任务？

questions.content: An IT team has built an AWS CloudFormation template so others in the company can quickly and reliably deploy and terminate an application. The template creates an Amazon EC2 instance with a user data script to install the application and an Amazon S3 bucket that the application uses to serve static webpages while it is running. All resources should be removed when the CloudFormation stack is deleted. However, the team observes that CloudFormation reports an error during stack deletion, and the S3 bucket created by the stack is not deleted. How can the team resolve the error in the MOST efficient manner to ensure that all resources are deleted without errors?

options.label: A
options.content: Add a DelelionPolicy attribute to the S3 bucket resource, with the value Delete forcing the bucket to be removed when the stack is deleted.

contents.en: Add a DelelionPolicy attribute to the S3 bucket resource, with the value Delete forcing the bucket to be removed when the stack is deleted.
contents.zh: 向 S3 bucket resource 添加 DelelionPolicy attribute，值为 Delete，强制在 stack 删除时移除 bucket。

options.label: B
options.content: Add a custom resource with an AWS Lambda function with the DependsOn attribute specifying the S3 bucket, and an IAM role. Write the Lambda function to delete all objects from the bucket when RequestType is Delete.

contents.en: Add a custom resource with an AWS Lambda function with the DependsOn attribute specifying the S3 bucket, and an IAM role. Write the Lambda function to delete all objects from the bucket when RequestType is Delete.
contents.zh: 添加一个 custom resource，其中包含带 DependsOn attribute（指定 S3 bucket）的 AWS Lambda function，以及一个 IAM role。编写 Lambda function，在 RequestType 为 Delete 时删除 bucket 中的所有对象。

options.label: C
options.content: Identify the resource that was not deleted. Manually empty the S3 bucket and then delete it.

contents.en: Identify the resource that was not deleted. Manually empty the S3 bucket and then delete it.
contents.zh: 识别未删除的资源。手动清空 S3 bucket，然后删除它。

options.label: D
options.content: Replace the EC2 and S3 bucket resources with a single AWS OpsWorks Stacks resource. Define a custom recipe for the stack to create and delete the EC2 instance and the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Replace the EC2 and S3 bucket resources with a single AWS OpsWorks Stacks resource. Define a custom recipe for the stack to create and delete the EC2 instance and the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 将 EC2 和 S3 bucket resources 替换为单个 AWS OpsWorks Stacks resource。为该 stack 定义一个 custom recipe，以创建和删除 EC2 instance 和 S3 bucket。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：B。CloudFormation 删除 S3 bucket 前必须先删除桶内对象；自定义资源 Lambda 可以在删除请求时清空桶。

为该 Lambda 配置依赖 S3 bucket 和必要 IAM role，可让堆栈删除流程自动完成清理。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：B。CloudFormation 删除 S3 bucket 前必须先删除桶内对象；自定义资源 Lambda 可以在删除请求时清空桶。

为该 Lambda 配置依赖 S3 bucket 和必要 IAM role，可让堆栈删除流程自动完成清理。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: B. CloudFormation cannot delete an S3 bucket until all objects are removed, so a custom-resource Lambda can empty the bucket when the stack receives a Delete request.

Using DependsOn with the bucket and an IAM role lets the stack deletion process perform that cleanup automatically.

contents.en: An IT team has built an AWS CloudFormation template so others in the company can quickly and reliably deploy and terminate an application. The template creates an Amazon EC2 instance with a user data script to install the application and an Amazon S3 bucket that the application uses to serve static webpages while it is running. All resources should be removed when the CloudFormation stack is deleted. However, the team observes that CloudFormation reports an error during stack deletion, and the S3 bucket created by the stack is not deleted. How can the team resolve the error in the MOST efficient manner to ensure that all resources are deleted without errors?
contents.zh: 一个 IT 团队构建了 AWS CloudFormation template，使公司其他人员可以快速且可靠地部署和终止应用程序。该 template 创建一个带有 user data script 的 Amazon EC2 instance 来安装应用程序，并创建一个 Amazon S3 bucket，应用程序在运行时使用该 bucket 提供静态网页。删除 CloudFormation stack 时，应移除所有资源。但是，团队观察到 CloudFormation 在 stack deletion 期间报告错误，并且该 stack 创建的 S3 bucket 未被删除。团队如何以最高效的方式解决该错误，以确保所有资源都能无错误删除？

questions.content: A company has an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that is configured with an Amazon S3 bucket in the eu-west-1 Region. The pipeline deploys an AWS Lambda application to the same Region. The pipeline consists of an AWS CodeBuild project build action and an AWS CloudFormation deploy action. The CodeBuild project uses the aws cloudformation package AWS CLI command to build an artifact that contains the Lambda function code's .zip file and the CloudFormation template. The CloudFormation deploy action references the CloudFormation template from the output artifact of the CodeBuild project's build action. The company wants to also deploy the Lambda application to the us-east-1 Region by using the pipeline in eu-west-1. A DevOps engineer has already updated the CodeBuild project to use the aws cloudformation package command to produce an additional output artifact for us-east-1. Which combination of additional steps should the DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Modify the CloudFormation template to include a parameter for the Lambda function code's zip file location. Create a new CloudFormation deploy action for us-east-1 in the pipeline. Configure the new deploy action to pass in the us-east-1 artifact location as a parameter override.

contents.en: Modify the CloudFormation template to include a parameter for the Lambda function code's zip file location. Create a new CloudFormation deploy action for us-east-1 in the pipeline. Configure the new deploy action to pass in the us-east-1 artifact location as a parameter override.
contents.zh: 修改 CloudFormation template，为 Lambda function code 的 zip file location 添加一个 parameter。在 pipeline 中为 us-east-1 创建新的 CloudFormation deploy action。配置新的 deploy action，将 us-east-1 artifact location 作为 parameter override 传入。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new CloudFormation deploy action for us-east-1 in the pipeline. Configure the new deploy action to use the CloudFormation template from the us-east-1 output artifact.

contents.en: Create a new CloudFormation deploy action for us-east-1 in the pipeline. Configure the new deploy action to use the CloudFormation template from the us-east-1 output artifact.
contents.zh: 在 pipeline 中为 us-east-1 创建新的 CloudFormation deploy action。配置新的 deploy action 使用来自 us-east-1 output artifact 的 CloudFormation template。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an S3 bucket in us-east-1. Configure the S3 bucket policy to allow CodePipeline to have read and write access.

contents.en: Create an S3 bucket in us-east-1. Configure the S3 bucket policy to allow CodePipeline to have read and write access.
contents.zh: 在 us-east-1 中创建一个 S3 bucket。配置 S3 bucket policy，允许 CodePipeline 具有读写访问权限。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an S3 bucket in us-east-1. Configure S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR) from the S3 bucket in eu-west-1 to the S3 bucket in us-east-1.

contents.en: Create an S3 bucket in us-east-1. Configure S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR) from the S3 bucket in eu-west-1 to the S3 bucket in us-east-1.
contents.zh: 在 us-east-1 中创建一个 S3 bucket。配置从 eu-west-1 中的 S3 bucket 到 us-east-1 中的 S3 bucket 的 S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR)。

options.label: E
options.content: Modify the pipeline to include the S3 bucket for us-east-1 as an artifact store. Create a new CloudFormation deploy action for us-east-1 in the pipeline. Configure the new deploy action to use the CloudFormation template from the us-east-1 output artifact.

contents.en: Modify the pipeline to include the S3 bucket for us-east-1 as an artifact store. Create a new CloudFormation deploy action for us-east-1 in the pipeline. Configure the new deploy action to use the CloudFormation template from the us-east-1 output artifact.
contents.zh: 修改 pipeline，将 us-east-1 的 S3 bucket 包含为 artifact store。在 pipeline 中为 us-east-1 创建新的 CloudFormation deploy action。配置新的 deploy action 使用来自 us-east-1 output artifact 的 CloudFormation template。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C、E。跨区域 CodePipeline 操作需要在目标区域创建 artifact store，因此要在 us-east-1 创建 S3 桶并允许 CodePipeline 读写。

然后修改流水线，将该区域的 S3 桶作为 artifact store，并新增 us-east-1 的 CloudFormation deploy action。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C、E。跨区域 CodePipeline 操作需要在目标区域创建 artifact store，因此要在 us-east-1 创建 S3 桶并允许 CodePipeline 读写。

然后修改流水线，将该区域的 S3 桶作为 artifact store，并新增 us-east-1 的 CloudFormation deploy action。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: C and E. Cross-Region CodePipeline actions need an artifact store in the target Region, so create an S3 bucket in us-east-1 and allow CodePipeline read/write access.

Then update the pipeline to use that bucket as the us-east-1 artifact store and add a CloudFormation deploy action for that Region.

contents.en: A company has an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that is configured with an Amazon S3 bucket in the eu-west-1 Region. The pipeline deploys an AWS Lambda application to the same Region. The pipeline consists of an AWS CodeBuild project build action and an AWS CloudFormation deploy action. The CodeBuild project uses the aws cloudformation package AWS CLI command to build an artifact that contains the Lambda function code's .zip file and the CloudFormation template. The CloudFormation deploy action references the CloudFormation template from the output artifact of the CodeBuild project's build action. The company wants to also deploy the Lambda application to the us-east-1 Region by using the pipeline in eu-west-1. A DevOps engineer has already updated the CodeBuild project to use the aws cloudformation package command to produce an additional output artifact for us-east-1. Which combination of additional steps should the DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个 AWS CodePipeline pipeline，该 pipeline 配置了位于 eu-west-1 Region 的 Amazon S3 bucket。该 pipeline 将 AWS Lambda application 部署到同一 Region。该 pipeline 包含一个 AWS CodeBuild project build action 和一个 AWS CloudFormation deploy action。CodeBuild project 使用 aws cloudformation package AWS CLI command 构建一个 artifact，其中包含 Lambda function code 的 .zip file 和 CloudFormation template。CloudFormation deploy action 从 CodeBuild project 的 build action 的 output artifact 引用 CloudFormation template。公司还希望使用位于 eu-west-1 的 pipeline 将 Lambda application 部署到 us-east-1 Region。DevOps 工程师已更新 CodeBuild project，使其使用 aws cloudformation package command 为 us-east-1 生成一个额外的 output artifact。DevOps 工程师还应采取哪一组额外步骤来满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company runs an application on one Amazon EC2 instance. Application metadata is stored in Amazon S3 and must be retrieved if the instance is restarted. The instance must restart or relaunch automatically if the instance becomes unresponsive. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for the StatusCheckFailed metric. Use the recover action to stop and start the instance. Use an S3 event notification to push the metadata to the instance when the instance is back up and running.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for the StatusCheckFailed metric. Use the recover action to stop and start the instance. Use an S3 event notification to push the metadata to the instance when the instance is back up and running.
contents.zh: 为 StatusCheckFailed metric 创建 Amazon CloudWatch alarm。使用 recover action 停止并启动该实例。使用 S3 event notification 在实例恢复运行后将元数据推送到该实例。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure AWS OpsWorks, and use the auto healing feature to stop and start the instance. Use a lifecycle event in OpsWorks to pull the metadata from Amazon S3 and update it on the instance.

contents.en: Configure AWS OpsWorks, and use the auto healing feature to stop and start the instance. Use a lifecycle event in OpsWorks to pull the metadata from Amazon S3 and update it on the instance.
contents.zh: 配置 AWS OpsWorks，并使用 auto healing feature 停止并启动该实例。使用 OpsWorks 中的 lifecycle event 从 Amazon S3 拉取元数据并在实例上更新。

options.label: C
options.content: Use EC2 Auto Recovery to automatically stop and start the instance in case of a failure. Use an S3 event notification to push the metadata to the instance when the instance is back up and running.

contents.en: Use EC2 Auto Recovery to automatically stop and start the instance in case of a failure. Use an S3 event notification to push the metadata to the instance when the instance is back up and running.
contents.zh: 使用 EC2 Auto Recovery 在发生故障时自动停止并启动该实例。使用 S3 event notification 在实例恢复运行后将元数据推送到该实例。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation to create an EC2 instance that includes the UserData property for the EC2 resource. Add a command in UserData to retrieve the application metadata from Amazon S3.

contents.en: Use AWS CloudFormation to create an EC2 instance that includes the UserData property for the EC2 resource. Add a command in UserData to retrieve the application metadata from Amazon S3.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CloudFormation 创建一个包含 EC2 resource 的 UserData property 的 EC2 instance。在 UserData 中添加命令，从 Amazon S3 检索应用程序元数据。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：B。讨论指出 CloudWatch recover action 和 EC2 Auto Recovery 主要处理系统状态检查失败，而不是所有实例级无响应问题。

AWS OpsWorks 的 auto healing 可进行更复杂的健康处理，并通过生命周期事件从 S3 拉取元数据更新实例。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：B。讨论指出 CloudWatch recover action 和 EC2 Auto Recovery 主要处理系统状态检查失败，而不是所有实例级无响应问题。

AWS OpsWorks 的 auto healing 可进行更复杂的健康处理，并通过生命周期事件从 S3 拉取元数据更新实例。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: B. The discussion says CloudWatch recovery and EC2 Auto Recovery mainly address system status check failures, not every instance-level unresponsiveness case.

AWS OpsWorks auto healing can provide broader health handling, and a lifecycle event can pull metadata from S3 to update the instance.

contents.en: A company runs an application on one Amazon EC2 instance. Application metadata is stored in Amazon S3 and must be retrieved if the instance is restarted. The instance must restart or relaunch automatically if the instance becomes unresponsive. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司在一个 Amazon EC2 instance 上运行应用程序。应用程序元数据存储在 Amazon S3 中，并且如果该实例重启，必须检索这些元数据。如果该实例无响应，该实例必须自动重启或重新启动。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has multiple AWS accounts. The company uses AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) that is integrated with AWS Toolkit for Microsoft Azure DevOps. The attributes for access control feature is enabled in IAM Identity Center. The attribute mapping list contains two entries. The department key is mapped to ${path:enterprise.department}. The costCenter key is mapped to ${path:enterprise.costCenter}. All existing Amazon EC2 instances have a department tag that corresponds to three company departments (d1, d2, d3). A DevOps engineer must create policies based on the matching attributes. The policies must minimize administrative effort and must grant each Azure AD user access to only the EC2 instances that are tagged with the user's respective department name. Which condition key should the DevOps engineer include in the custom permissions policies to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
B
C
D

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C。讨论说明应检查 EC2 的 department 标签是否与用户的 principal tag 中 department 相同，相同才允许访问。

其他方案的问题是条件语法或标签范围不正确，或会导致不同部门用户也能访问所有 EC2。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C。讨论说明应检查 EC2 的 department 标签是否与用户的 principal tag 中 department 相同，相同才允许访问。

其他方案的问题是条件语法或标签范围不正确，或会导致不同部门用户也能访问所有 EC2。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: C. The discussion explains that access should be allowed only when the EC2 instance's department tag matches the user's department principal tag.

The other approaches have incorrect condition syntax or tag scope, or would allow users from any department to access every EC2 instance.

contents.en: A company has multiple AWS accounts. The company uses AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) that is integrated with AWS Toolkit for Microsoft Azure DevOps. The attributes for access control feature is enabled in IAM Identity Center. The attribute mapping list contains two entries. The department key is mapped to ${path:enterprise.department}. The costCenter key is mapped to ${path:enterprise.costCenter}. All existing Amazon EC2 instances have a department tag that corresponds to three company departments (d1, d2, d3). A DevOps engineer must create policies based on the matching attributes. The policies must minimize administrative effort and must grant each Azure AD user access to only the EC2 instances that are tagged with the user's respective department name. Which condition key should the DevOps engineer include in the custom permissions policies to meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司有多个 AWS 账户。公司使用与 AWS Toolkit for Microsoft Azure DevOps 集成的 AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)。IAM Identity Center 中已启用 attributes for access control feature。attribute mapping list 包含两个条目。department key 映射到 ${path:enterprise.department}。costCenter key 映射到 ${path:enterprise.costCenter}。所有现有 Amazon EC2 instances 都有一个 department tag，对应三个公司部门（d1、d2、d3）。DevOps 工程师必须基于匹配的 attributes 创建 policies。policies 必须最大限度减少管理工作，并且必须仅授予每个 Azure AD user 访问带有该用户相应 department name 标签的 EC2 instances 的权限。DevOps 工程师应在 custom permissions policies 中包含哪个 condition key 来满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company hosts a security auditing application in an AWS account. The auditing application uses an IAM role to access other AWS accounts. All the accounts are in the same organization in AWS Organizations. A recent security audit revealed that users in the audited AWS accounts could modify or delete the auditing application's IAM role. The company needs to prevent any modification to the auditing application's IAM role by any entity other than a trusted administrator IAM role. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an SCP that includes a Deny statement for changes to the auditing application's IAM role. Include a condition that allows the trusted administrator IAM role to make changes. Attach the SCP to the root of the organization.

contents.en: Create an SCP that includes a Deny statement for changes to the auditing application's IAM role. Include a condition that allows the trusted administrator IAM role to make changes. Attach the SCP to the root of the organization.
contents.zh: 创建一个 SCP，其中包含针对审计应用程序 IAM role 更改的 Deny statement。包含一个 condition，允许受信任管理员 IAM role 进行更改。将该 SCP 附加到组织根。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an SCP that includes an Allow statement for changes to the auditing application's IAM role by the trusted administrator IAM role. Include a Deny statement for changes by all other IAM principals. Attach the SCP to the IAM service in each AWS account where the auditing application has an IAM role.

contents.en: Create an SCP that includes an Allow statement for changes to the auditing application's IAM role by the trusted administrator IAM role. Include a Deny statement for changes by all other IAM principals. Attach the SCP to the IAM service in each AWS account where the auditing application has an IAM role.
contents.zh: 创建一个 SCP，其中包含允许受信任管理员 IAM role 更改审计应用程序 IAM role 的 Allow statement。包含一个 Deny statement，拒绝所有其他 IAM principals 的更改。将该 SCP 附加到审计应用程序具有 IAM role 的每个 AWS 账户中的 IAM service。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an IAM permissions boundary that includes a Deny statement for changes to the auditing application's IAM role. Include a condition that allows the trusted administrator IAM role to make changes. Attach the permissions boundary to the audited AWS accounts.

contents.en: Create an IAM permissions boundary that includes a Deny statement for changes to the auditing application's IAM role. Include a condition that allows the trusted administrator IAM role to make changes. Attach the permissions boundary to the audited AWS accounts.
contents.zh: 创建一个 IAM permissions boundary，其中包含针对审计应用程序 IAM role 更改的 Deny statement。包含一个 condition，允许受信任管理员 IAM role 进行更改。将 permissions boundary 附加到被审计的 AWS 账户。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an IAM permissions boundary that includes a Deny statement for changes to the auditing application's IAM role. Include a condition that allows the trusted administrator IAM role to make changes. Attach the permissions boundary to the auditing application's IAM role in the AWS accounts.

contents.en: Create an IAM permissions boundary that includes a Deny statement for changes to the auditing application's IAM role. Include a condition that allows the trusted administrator IAM role to make changes. Attach the permissions boundary to the auditing application's IAM role in the AWS accounts.
contents.zh: 创建一个 IAM permissions boundary，其中包含针对审计应用程序 IAM role 更改的 Deny statement。包含一个 condition，允许受信任管理员 IAM role 进行更改。将 permissions boundary 附加到 AWS 账户中的审计应用程序 IAM role。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A。SCP 可在组织级别限制对审计应用 IAM role 的修改，并通过条件允许受信任管理员角色例外操作。

讨论指出权限边界应用于 IAM 实体而不是账户整体，因此不如把 SCP 附加到组织根来集中限制有效。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A。SCP 可在组织级别限制对审计应用 IAM role 的修改，并通过条件允许受信任管理员角色例外操作。

讨论指出权限边界应用于 IAM 实体而不是账户整体，因此不如把 SCP 附加到组织根来集中限制有效。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: A. An SCP can restrict changes to the auditing application's IAM role at the organization level while allowing an exception for the trusted administrator role.

The discussion notes that permissions boundaries apply to IAM entities, not the whole account, so attaching an SCP to the organization root is more effective here.

contents.en: A company hosts a security auditing application in an AWS account. The auditing application uses an IAM role to access other AWS accounts. All the accounts are in the same organization in AWS Organizations. A recent security audit revealed that users in the audited AWS accounts could modify or delete the auditing application's IAM role. The company needs to prevent any modification to the auditing application's IAM role by any entity other than a trusted administrator IAM role. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司在一个 AWS 账户中托管安全审计应用程序。该审计应用程序使用 IAM role 访问其他 AWS 账户。所有账户都位于 AWS Organizations 中的同一组织内。最近一次安全审计发现，被审计 AWS 账户中的用户可以修改或删除该审计应用程序的 IAM role。公司需要阻止除受信任管理员 IAM role 以外的任何实体修改该审计应用程序的 IAM role。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has an on-premises application that is written in Go. A DevOps engineer must move the application to AWS. The company's development team wants to enable blue/green deployments and perform A/B testing. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Deploy the application on an Amazon EC2 instance, and create an AMI of the instance. Use the AMI to create an automatic scaling launch configuration that is used in an Auto Scaling group. Use Elastic Load Balancing to distribute traffic. When changes are made to the application, a new AMI will be created, which will initiate an EC2 instance refresh.

contents.en: Deploy the application on an Amazon EC2 instance, and create an AMI of the instance. Use the AMI to create an automatic scaling launch configuration that is used in an Auto Scaling group. Use Elastic Load Balancing to distribute traffic. When changes are made to the application, a new AMI will be created, which will initiate an EC2 instance refresh.
contents.zh: 在 Amazon EC2 instance 上部署该应用程序，并创建该实例的 AMI。使用该 AMI 创建用于 Auto Scaling group 的 automatic scaling launch configuration。使用 Elastic Load Balancing 分发流量。当应用程序发生更改时，将创建新的 AMI，这将启动 EC2 instance refresh。

options.label: B
options.content: Use Amazon Lightsail to deploy the application. Store the application in a zipped format in an Amazon S3 bucket. Use this zipped version to deploy new versions of the application to Lightsail. Use Lightsail deployment options to manage the deployment.

contents.en: Use Amazon Lightsail to deploy the application. Store the application in a zipped format in an Amazon S3 bucket. Use this zipped version to deploy new versions of the application to Lightsail. Use Lightsail deployment options to manage the deployment.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon Lightsail 部署该应用程序。将应用程序以 zipped format 存储在 Amazon S3 bucket 中。使用该 zipped version 将应用程序的新版本部署到 Lightsail。使用 Lightsail deployment options 管理部署。

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS CodeArtifact to store the application code. Use AWS CodeDeploy to deploy the application to a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances. Use Elastic Load Balancing to distribute the traffic to the EC2 instances. When making changes to the application, upload a new version to CodeArtifact and create a new CodeDeploy deployment.

contents.en: Use AWS CodeArtifact to store the application code. Use AWS CodeDeploy to deploy the application to a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances. Use Elastic Load Balancing to distribute the traffic to the EC2 instances. When making changes to the application, upload a new version to CodeArtifact and create a new CodeDeploy deployment.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CodeArtifact 存储应用程序代码。使用 AWS CodeDeploy 将应用程序部署到一组 Amazon EC2 instances。使用 Elastic Load Balancing 将流量分发到 EC2 instances。对应用程序进行更改时，将新版本上传到 CodeArtifact 并创建新的 CodeDeploy deployment。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS Elastic Beanstalk to host the application. Store a zipped version of the application in Amazon S3. Use that location to deploy new versions of the application. Use Elastic Beanstalk to manage the deployment options.

contents.en: Use AWS Elastic Beanstalk to host the application. Store a zipped version of the application in Amazon S3. Use that location to deploy new versions of the application. Use Elastic Beanstalk to manage the deployment options.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Elastic Beanstalk 托管该应用程序。将应用程序的 zipped version 存储在 Amazon S3 中。使用该位置部署应用程序的新版本。使用 Elastic Beanstalk 管理 deployment options。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：D。Elastic Beanstalk 可托管应用，并从 S3 中保存的 zip 版本部署新版本，同时管理部署选项。

讨论补充，蓝绿部署通常需要两个环境并通过 DNS 切换流量，以便两个版本可同时运行。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：D。Elastic Beanstalk 可托管应用，并从 S3 中保存的 zip 版本部署新版本，同时管理部署选项。

讨论补充，蓝绿部署通常需要两个环境并通过 DNS 切换流量，以便两个版本可同时运行。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: D. Elastic Beanstalk can host the application, deploy new zipped application versions stored in S3, and manage deployment options.

The discussion adds that blue/green deployment generally uses two environments and DNS swapping so both versions can run at the same time.

contents.en: A company has an on-premises application that is written in Go. A DevOps engineer must move the application to AWS. The company's development team wants to enable blue/green deployments and perform A/B testing. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个用 Go 编写的本地应用程序。DevOps 工程师必须将该应用程序迁移到 AWS。公司的开发团队希望启用 blue/green deployments 并执行 A/B testing。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A developer is maintaining a fleet of 50 Amazon EC2 Linux servers. The servers are part of an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group, and also use Elastic Load Balancing for load balancing. Occasionally, some application servers are being terminated after failing ELB HTTP health checks. The developer would like to perform a root cause analysis on the issue, but before being able to access application logs, the server is terminated. How can log collection be automated?

options.label: A
options.content: Use Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks to put instances in a Pending:Wait state. Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for EC2 Instance Terminate Successful and trigger an AWS Lambda function that invokes an SSM Run Command script to collect logs, push them to Amazon S3, and complete the lifecycle action once logs are collected.

contents.en: Use Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks to put instances in a Pending:Wait state. Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for EC2 Instance Terminate Successful and trigger an AWS Lambda function that invokes an SSM Run Command script to collect logs, push them to Amazon S3, and complete the lifecycle action once logs are collected.
contents.zh: 使用 Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks 将实例置于 Pending:Wait state。为 EC2 Instance Terminate Successful 创建 Amazon CloudWatch alarm，并触发 AWS Lambda function，该函数调用 SSM Run Command script 收集日志，将日志推送到 Amazon S3，并在日志收集完成后完成 lifecycle action。

options.label: B
options.content: Use Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks to put instances in a Terminating:Wait state. Create an AWS Config rule for EC2 Instance- terminate Lifecycle Action and trigger a step function that invokes a script to collect logs, push them to Amazon S3, and complete the lifecycle action once logs are collected.

contents.en: Use Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks to put instances in a Terminating:Wait state. Create an AWS Config rule for EC2 Instance- terminate Lifecycle Action and trigger a step function that invokes a script to collect logs, push them to Amazon S3, and complete the lifecycle action once logs are collected.
contents.zh: 使用 Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks 将实例置于 Terminating:Wait state。为 EC2 Instance- terminate Lifecycle Action 创建 AWS Config rule，并触发 step function，该函数调用脚本收集日志，将日志推送到 Amazon S3，并在日志收集完成后完成 lifecycle action。

options.label: C
options.content: Use Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks to put instances in a Terminating:Wait state. Create an Amazon CloudWatch subscription filter for EC2 Instance Terminate Successful and trigger a CloudWatch agent that invokes a script to collect logs, push them to Amazon S3, and complete the lifecycle action once logs are collected.

contents.en: Use Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks to put instances in a Terminating:Wait state. Create an Amazon CloudWatch subscription filter for EC2 Instance Terminate Successful and trigger a CloudWatch agent that invokes a script to collect logs, push them to Amazon S3, and complete the lifecycle action once logs are collected.
contents.zh: 使用 Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks 将实例置于 Terminating:Wait state。为 EC2 Instance Terminate Successful 创建 Amazon CloudWatch subscription filter，并触发 CloudWatch agent，该 agent 调用脚本收集日志，将日志推送到 Amazon S3，并在日志收集完成后完成 lifecycle action。

options.label: D
options.content: Use Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks to put instances in a Terminating:Wait state. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule for EC2 Instance-terminate Lifecycle Action and trigger an AWS Lambda function that invokes an SSM Run Command script to collect logs, push them to Amazon S3, and complete the lifecycle action once logs are collected.

contents.en: Use Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks to put instances in a Terminating:Wait state. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule for EC2 Instance-terminate Lifecycle Action and trigger an AWS Lambda function that invokes an SSM Run Command script to collect logs, push them to Amazon S3, and complete the lifecycle action once logs are collected.
contents.zh: 使用 Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks 将实例置于 Terminating:Wait state。为 EC2 Instance-terminate Lifecycle Action 创建 Amazon EventBridge rule，并触发 AWS Lambda function，该函数调用 SSM Run Command script 收集日志，将日志推送到 Amazon S3，并在日志收集完成后完成 lifecycle action。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：D。Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks 可把实例置于 Terminating:Wait，从而在终止前保留时间收集日志。

EventBridge 捕获终止生命周期事件后触发 Lambda，Lambda 调用 SSM Run Command 收集日志并上传 S3，完成后再结束 lifecycle action。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：D。Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks 可把实例置于 Terminating:Wait，从而在终止前保留时间收集日志。

EventBridge 捕获终止生命周期事件后触发 Lambda，Lambda 调用 SSM Run Command 收集日志并上传 S3，完成后再结束 lifecycle action。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: D. Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks can place instances in Terminating:Wait, giving time to collect logs before termination.

An EventBridge rule can trigger Lambda for the terminate lifecycle action; Lambda invokes SSM Run Command to collect logs, upload them to S3, and then complete the lifecycle action.

contents.en: A developer is maintaining a fleet of 50 Amazon EC2 Linux servers. The servers are part of an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group, and also use Elastic Load Balancing for load balancing. Occasionally, some application servers are being terminated after failing ELB HTTP health checks. The developer would like to perform a root cause analysis on the issue, but before being able to access application logs, the server is terminated. How can log collection be automated?
contents.zh: 一名开发人员正在维护一组 50 台 Amazon EC2 Linux servers。这些服务器属于 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group，也使用 Elastic Load Balancing 进行负载均衡。偶尔，一些应用程序服务器在 ELB HTTP health checks 失败后被终止。开发人员希望对此问题执行 root cause analysis，但在能够访问应用程序日志之前，服务器就被终止了。如何自动化日志收集？

questions.content: A company has an organization in AWS Organizations. The organization includes workload accounts that contain enterprise applications. The company centrally manages users from an operations account. No users can be created in the workload accounts. The company recently added an operations team and must provide the operations team members with administrator access to each workload account. Which combination of actions will provide this access? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a SysAdmin role in the operations account. Attach the AdministratorAccess policy to the role. Modify the trust relationship to allow the sts:AssumeRole action from the workload accounts.

contents.en: Create a SysAdmin role in the operations account. Attach the AdministratorAccess policy to the role. Modify the trust relationship to allow the sts:AssumeRole action from the workload accounts.
contents.zh: 在运维账户中创建 SysAdmin role。将 AdministratorAccess policy 附加到该 role。修改 trust relationship，允许来自工作负载账户的 sts:AssumeRole action。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a SysAdmin role in each workload account. Attach the AdministratorAccess policy to the role. Modify the trust relationship to allow the sts:AssumeRole action from the operations account.

contents.en: Create a SysAdmin role in each workload account. Attach the AdministratorAccess policy to the role. Modify the trust relationship to allow the sts:AssumeRole action from the operations account.
contents.zh: 在每个工作负载账户中创建 SysAdmin role。将 AdministratorAccess policy 附加到该 role。修改 trust relationship，允许来自运维账户的 sts:AssumeRole action。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon Cognito identity pool in the operations account. Attach the SysAdmin role as an authenticated role.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Cognito identity pool in the operations account. Attach the SysAdmin role as an authenticated role.
contents.zh: 在运维账户中创建 Amazon Cognito identity pool。将 SysAdmin role 附加为 authenticated role。

options.label: D
options.content: In the operations account, create an IAM user for each operations team member.

contents.en: In the operations account, create an IAM user for each operations team member.
contents.zh: 在运维账户中，为每个运维团队成员创建 IAM user。

options.label: E
options.content: In the operations account, create an IAM user group that is named SysAdmins. Add an IAM policy that allows the sts:AssumeRole action for the SysAdmin role in each workload account. Add all operations team members to the group.

contents.en: In the operations account, create an IAM user group that is named SysAdmins. Add an IAM policy that allows the sts:AssumeRole action for the SysAdmin role in each workload account. Add all operations team members to the group.
contents.zh: 在运维账户中，创建一个名为 SysAdmins 的 IAM user group。添加一个 IAM policy，允许对每个工作负载账户中的 SysAdmin role 执行 sts:AssumeRole action。将所有运维团队成员添加到该 group。

options.label: F
options.content: Create an Amazon Cognito user pool in the operations account. Create an Amazon Cognito user for each operations team member.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Cognito user pool in the operations account. Create an Amazon Cognito user for each operations team member.
contents.zh: 在运维账户中创建 Amazon Cognito user pool。为每个运维团队成员创建 Amazon Cognito user。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：B、D、E。在每个 workload account 中创建 SysAdmin role，附加所需管理权限，并信任 operations account 中的主体执行 sts:AssumeRole。

在 operations account 中为团队成员创建 IAM 用户和 SysAdmins 组，组策略允许假设各 workload account 的 SysAdmin role。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：B、D、E。在每个 workload account 中创建 SysAdmin role，附加所需管理权限，并信任 operations account 中的主体执行 sts:AssumeRole。

在 operations account 中为团队成员创建 IAM 用户和 SysAdmins 组，组策略允许假设各 workload account 的 SysAdmin role。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: B, D, and E. Create a SysAdmin role in each workload account, attach the required administrative permissions, and trust principals from the operations account to call sts:AssumeRole.

In the operations account, create IAM users and a SysAdmins group with a policy that allows assuming the SysAdmin roles in the workload accounts.

contents.en: A company has an organization in AWS Organizations. The organization includes workload accounts that contain enterprise applications. The company centrally manages users from an operations account. No users can be created in the workload accounts. The company recently added an operations team and must provide the operations team members with administrator access to each workload account. Which combination of actions will provide this access? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司在 AWS Organizations 中有一个组织。该组织包括包含企业应用程序的工作负载账户。公司从一个运维账户集中管理用户。不能在工作负载账户中创建用户。公司最近新增了一个运维团队，并且必须向运维团队成员提供对每个工作负载账户的管理员访问权限。哪一组操作将提供此访问权限？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company has multiple accounts in an organization in AWS Organizations. The company's SecOps team needs to receive an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) notification if any account in the organization turns off the Block Public Access feature on an Amazon S3 bucket. A DevOps engineer must implement this change without affecting the operation of any AWS accounts. The implementation must ensure that individual member accounts in the organization cannot turn off the notification. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Designate an account to be the delegated Amazon GuardDuty administrator account. Turn on GuardDuty for all accounts across the organization. In the GuardDuty administrator account, create an SNS topic. Subscribe the SecOps team's email address to the SNS topic. In the same account, create an Amazon EventBridge rule that uses an event pattern for GuardDuty findings and a target of the SNS topic.

contents.en: Designate an account to be the delegated Amazon GuardDuty administrator account. Turn on GuardDuty for all accounts across the organization. In the GuardDuty administrator account, create an SNS topic. Subscribe the SecOps team's email address to the SNS topic. In the same account, create an Amazon EventBridge rule that uses an event pattern for GuardDuty findings and a target of the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 指定一个账户作为 delegated Amazon GuardDuty administrator account。在整个组织的所有账户中启用 GuardDuty。在 GuardDuty administrator account 中创建 SNS topic。将 SecOps 团队的电子邮件地址订阅到 SNS topic。在同一账户中，创建一个 Amazon EventBridge rule，该 rule 使用 GuardDuty findings 的 event pattern，并以 SNS topic 为 target。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS CloudFormation template that creates an SNS topic and subscribes the SecOps team's email address to the SNS topic. In the template, include an Amazon EventBridge rule that uses an event pattern of CloudTrail activity for s3:PutBucketPublicAccessBlock and a target of the SNS topic. Deploy the stack to every account in the organization by using CloudFormation StackSets.

contents.en: Create an AWS CloudFormation template that creates an SNS topic and subscribes the SecOps team's email address to the SNS topic. In the template, include an Amazon EventBridge rule that uses an event pattern of CloudTrail activity for s3:PutBucketPublicAccessBlock and a target of the SNS topic. Deploy the stack to every account in the organization by using CloudFormation StackSets.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CloudFormation template，用于创建 SNS topic 并将 SecOps 团队的电子邮件地址订阅到 SNS topic。在该 template 中包含一个 Amazon EventBridge rule，该 rule 使用 s3:PutBucketPublicAccessBlock 的 CloudTrail activity event pattern，并以 SNS topic 为 target。使用 CloudFormation StackSets 将该 stack 部署到组织中的每个账户。

options.label: C
options.content: Turn on AWS Config across the organization. In the delegated administrator account, create an SNS topic. Subscribe the SecOps team's email address to the SNS topic. Deploy a conformance pack that uses the s3-bucket-level-public-access- prohibited AWS Config managed rule in each account and uses an AWS Systems Manager document to publish an event to the SNS topic to notify the SecOps team.

contents.en: Turn on AWS Config across the organization. In the delegated administrator account, create an SNS topic. Subscribe the SecOps team's email address to the SNS topic. Deploy a conformance pack that uses the s3-bucket-level-public-access- prohibited AWS Config managed rule in each account and uses an AWS Systems Manager document to publish an event to the SNS topic to notify the SecOps team.
contents.zh: 在整个组织中启用 AWS Config。在 delegated administrator account 中创建 SNS topic。将 SecOps 团队的电子邮件地址订阅到 SNS topic。部署一个 conformance pack，该 pack 在每个账户中使用 s3-bucket-level-public-access- prohibited AWS Config managed rule，并使用 AWS Systems Manager document 将 event 发布到 SNS topic，以通知 SecOps 团队。

options.label: D
options.content: Turn on Amazon Inspector across the organization. In the Amazon Inspector delegated administrator account, create an SNS topic. Subscribe the SecOps team's email address to the SNS topic. In the same account, create an Amazon EventBridge rule that uses an event pattern for public network exposure of the S3 bucket and publishes an event to the SNS topic to notify the SecOps team.

contents.en: Turn on Amazon Inspector across the organization. In the Amazon Inspector delegated administrator account, create an SNS topic. Subscribe the SecOps team's email address to the SNS topic. In the same account, create an Amazon EventBridge rule that uses an event pattern for public network exposure of the S3 bucket and publishes an event to the SNS topic to notify the SecOps team.
contents.zh: 在整个组织中启用 Amazon Inspector。在 Amazon Inspector delegated administrator account 中创建 SNS topic。将 SecOps 团队的电子邮件地址订阅到 SNS topic。在同一账户中，创建一个 Amazon EventBridge rule，该 rule 使用 S3 bucket 的 public network exposure event pattern，并将 event 发布到 SNS topic 以通知 SecOps 团队。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C。组织范围启用 AWS Config 后，可在委派管理员账户中创建 SNS 主题并订阅 SecOps 邮箱。

部署包含 s3-bucket-level-public-access-prohibited 托管规则的 conformance pack，并通过 Systems Manager document 发布 SNS 通知，符合讨论中偏向使用组织级 Config 和自动化的思路。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C。组织范围启用 AWS Config 后，可在委派管理员账户中创建 SNS 主题并订阅 SecOps 邮箱。

部署包含 s3-bucket-level-public-access-prohibited 托管规则的 conformance pack，并通过 Systems Manager document 发布 SNS 通知，符合讨论中偏向使用组织级 Config 和自动化的思路。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: C. Enable AWS Config across the organization, create an SNS topic in the delegated administrator account, and subscribe the SecOps email address.

Deploy a conformance pack with the s3-bucket-level-public-access-prohibited managed rule and use a Systems Manager document to publish SNS notifications, aligning with the discussion's preference for organization-wide Config and automation.

contents.en: A company has multiple accounts in an organization in AWS Organizations. The company's SecOps team needs to receive an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) notification if any account in the organization turns off the Block Public Access feature on an Amazon S3 bucket. A DevOps engineer must implement this change without affecting the operation of any AWS accounts. The implementation must ensure that individual member accounts in the organization cannot turn off the notification. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 AWS Organizations 的一个组织中有多个账户。如果组织中的任何账户关闭 Amazon S3 bucket 上的 Block Public Access feature，公司的 SecOps 团队需要接收 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 通知。DevOps 工程师必须在不影响任何 AWS 账户运行的情况下实施此更改。该实施必须确保组织中的各个成员账户无法关闭该通知。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has migrated its container-based applications to Amazon EKS and want to establish automated email notifications. The notifications sent to each email address are for specific activities related to EKS components. The solution will include Amazon SNS topics and an AWS Lambda function to evaluate incoming log events and publish messages to the correct SNS topic. Which logging solution will support these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Enable Amazon CloudWatch Logs to log the EKS components. Create a CloudWatch subscription filter for each component with Lambda as the subscription feed destination.

contents.en: Enable Amazon CloudWatch Logs to log the EKS components. Create a CloudWatch subscription filter for each component with Lambda as the subscription feed destination.
contents.zh: 启用 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 来记录 EKS components。为每个 component 创建 CloudWatch subscription filter，并将 Lambda 作为 subscription feed destination。

options.label: B
options.content: Enable Amazon CloudWatch Logs to log the EKS components. Create CloudWatch Logs Insights queries linked to Amazon EventBridge events that invoke Lambda.

contents.en: Enable Amazon CloudWatch Logs to log the EKS components. Create CloudWatch Logs Insights queries linked to Amazon EventBridge events that invoke Lambda.
contents.zh: 启用 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 来记录 EKS components。创建链接到调用 Lambda 的 Amazon EventBridge events 的 CloudWatch Logs Insights queries。

options.label: C
options.content: Enable Amazon S3 logging for the EKS components. Configure an Amazon CloudWatch subscription filter for each component with Lambda as the subscription feed destination.

contents.en: Enable Amazon S3 logging for the EKS components. Configure an Amazon CloudWatch subscription filter for each component with Lambda as the subscription feed destination.
contents.zh: 为 EKS components 启用 Amazon S3 logging。为每个 component 配置 Amazon CloudWatch subscription filter，并将 Lambda 作为 subscription feed destination。

options.label: D
options.content: Enable Amazon S3 logging for the EKS components. Configure S3 PUT Object event notifications with AWS Lambda as the destination.

contents.en: Enable Amazon S3 logging for the EKS components. Configure S3 PUT Object event notifications with AWS Lambda as the destination.
contents.zh: 为 EKS components 启用 Amazon S3 logging。配置 S3 PUT Object event notifications，并将 AWS Lambda 作为 destination。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A。EKS 可将控制平面组件日志发送到 CloudWatch Logs。

为每个组件创建 CloudWatch subscription filter，并以 Lambda 作为目标，Lambda 即可处理日志事件并发布到相应 SNS 主题。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A。EKS 可将控制平面组件日志发送到 CloudWatch Logs。

为每个组件创建 CloudWatch subscription filter，并以 Lambda 作为目标，Lambda 即可处理日志事件并发布到相应 SNS 主题。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: A. EKS can send control plane component logs to CloudWatch Logs.

Create a CloudWatch subscription filter for each component with Lambda as the destination, allowing Lambda to process log events and publish notifications to the appropriate SNS topic.

contents.en: A company has migrated its container-based applications to Amazon EKS and want to establish automated email notifications. The notifications sent to each email address are for specific activities related to EKS components. The solution will include Amazon SNS topics and an AWS Lambda function to evaluate incoming log events and publish messages to the correct SNS topic. Which logging solution will support these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司已将其基于容器的应用程序迁移到 Amazon EKS，并希望建立自动电子邮件通知。发送到每个电子邮件地址的通知针对与 EKS components 相关的特定活动。该解决方案将包括 Amazon SNS topics 和一个 AWS Lambda function，用于评估传入的 log events 并将 messages 发布到正确的 SNS topic。哪种日志记录解决方案将支持这些要求？

questions.content: A company is implementing an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster to run its workload. The company architecture will run multiple ECS services on the cluster. The architecture includes an Application Load Balancer on the front end and uses multiple target groups to route traffic. A DevOps engineer must collect application and access logs. The DevOps engineer then needs to send the logs to an Amazon S3 bucket for near-real-time analysis. Which combination of steps must the DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Download the Amazon CloudWatch Logs container instance from AWS. Configure this instance as a task. Update the application service definitions to include the logging task.

contents.en: Download the Amazon CloudWatch Logs container instance from AWS. Configure this instance as a task. Update the application service definitions to include the logging task.
contents.zh: 从 AWS 下载 Amazon CloudWatch Logs container instance。将此 instance 配置为 task。更新 application service definitions 以包含 logging task。

options.label: B
options.content: Install the Amazon CloudWatch Logs agent on the ECS instances. Change the logging driver in the ECS task definition to awslogs.

contents.en: Install the Amazon CloudWatch Logs agent on the ECS instances. Change the logging driver in the ECS task definition to awslogs.
contents.zh: 在 ECS instances 上安装 Amazon CloudWatch Logs agent。将 ECS task definition 中的 logging driver 更改为 awslogs。

options.label: C
options.content: Use Amazon EventBridge to schedule an AWS Lambda function that will run every 60 seconds and will run the Amazon CloudWatch Logs create-export-task command. Then point the output to the logging S3 bucket.

contents.en: Use Amazon EventBridge to schedule an AWS Lambda function that will run every 60 seconds and will run the Amazon CloudWatch Logs create-export-task command. Then point the output to the logging S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon EventBridge 调度一个 AWS Lambda function，该函数每 60 秒运行一次，并运行 Amazon CloudWatch Logs create-export-task command。然后将输出指向 logging S3 bucket。

options.label: D
options.content: Activate access logging on the ALB. Then point the ALB directly to the logging S3 bucket.

contents.en: Activate access logging on the ALB. Then point the ALB directly to the logging S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 在 ALB 上激活 access logging。然后将 ALB 直接指向 logging S3 bucket。

options.label: E
options.content: Activate access logging on the target groups that the ECS services use. Then send the logs directly to the logging S3 bucket.

contents.en: Activate access logging on the target groups that the ECS services use. Then send the logs directly to the logging S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 在 ECS services 使用的 target groups 上激活 access logging。然后将日志直接发送到 logging S3 bucket。

options.label: F
options.content: Create an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream that has a destination of the logging S3 bucket. Then create an Amazon CloudWatch Logs subscription filter for Kinesis Data Firehose.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream that has a destination of the logging S3 bucket. Then create an Amazon CloudWatch Logs subscription filter for Kinesis Data Firehose.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream，其 destination 为 logging S3 bucket。然后为 Kinesis Data Firehose 创建 Amazon CloudWatch Logs subscription filter。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：B、D、F。将 ECS task definition 的日志驱动改为 awslogs，可把容器日志送到 CloudWatch Logs；ALB access logging 可直接写入日志 S3 桶。

再创建以该 S3 桶为目标的 Kinesis Data Firehose，并通过 CloudWatch Logs subscription filter 转发日志，可近实时交付到 S3。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：B、D、F。将 ECS task definition 的日志驱动改为 awslogs，可把容器日志送到 CloudWatch Logs；ALB access logging 可直接写入日志 S3 桶。

再创建以该 S3 桶为目标的 Kinesis Data Firehose，并通过 CloudWatch Logs subscription filter 转发日志，可近实时交付到 S3。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: B, D, and F. Changing the ECS task definition logging driver to awslogs sends container logs to CloudWatch Logs, and ALB access logging can write directly to the logging S3 bucket.

A Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream with that S3 bucket as the destination, fed by a CloudWatch Logs subscription filter, can deliver logs to S3 in near real time.

contents.en: A company is implementing an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster to run its workload. The company architecture will run multiple ECS services on the cluster. The architecture includes an Application Load Balancer on the front end and uses multiple target groups to route traffic. A DevOps engineer must collect application and access logs. The DevOps engineer then needs to send the logs to an Amazon S3 bucket for near-real-time analysis. Which combination of steps must the DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司正在实施 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster 来运行其工作负载。公司架构将在该 cluster 上运行多个 ECS services。该架构在前端包含一个 Application Load Balancer，并使用多个 target groups 来路由流量。DevOps 工程师必须收集应用程序日志和访问日志。然后，DevOps 工程师需要将这些日志发送到 Amazon S3 bucket，以便进行近实时分析。DevOps 工程师必须采取哪一组步骤来满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company that uses electronic health records is running a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances with an Amazon Linux operating system. As part of patient privacy requirements, the company must ensure continuous compliance for patches for operating system and applications running on the EC2 instances. How can the deployments of the operating system and application patches be automated using a default and custom repository?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS Systems Manager to create a new patch baseline including the custom repository. Run the AWS-RunPatchBaseline document using the run command to verify and install patches.

contents.en: Use AWS Systems Manager to create a new patch baseline including the custom repository. Run the AWS-RunPatchBaseline document using the run command to verify and install patches.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Systems Manager 创建包含 custom repository 的新 patch baseline。使用 run command 运行 AWS-RunPatchBaseline document，以验证并安装 patches。

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS Direct Connect to integrate the corporate repository and deploy the patches using Amazon CloudWatch scheduled events, then use the CloudWatch dashboard to create reports.

contents.en: Use AWS Direct Connect to integrate the corporate repository and deploy the patches using Amazon CloudWatch scheduled events, then use the CloudWatch dashboard to create reports.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Direct Connect 集成 corporate repository，并使用 Amazon CloudWatch scheduled events 部署 patches，然后使用 CloudWatch dashboard 创建报告。

options.label: C
options.content: Use yum-config-manager to add the custom repository under /etc/yum.repos.d and run yum-config-manager-enable to activate the repository.

contents.en: Use yum-config-manager to add the custom repository under /etc/yum.repos.d and run yum-config-manager-enable to activate the repository.
contents.zh: 使用 yum-config-manager 将 custom repository 添加到 /etc/yum.repos.d 下，并运行 yum-config-manager-enable 激活该 repository。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS Systems Manager to create a new patch baseline including the corporate repository. Run the AWS- AmazonLinuxDefaultPatchBaseline document using the run command to verify and install patches.

contents.en: Use AWS Systems Manager to create a new patch baseline including the corporate repository. Run the AWS- AmazonLinuxDefaultPatchBaseline document using the run command to verify and install patches.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Systems Manager 创建包含 corporate repository 的新 patch baseline。使用 run command 运行 AWS- AmazonLinuxDefaultPatchBaseline document，以验证并安装 patches。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A。Systems Manager patch baseline 用于定义应安装或避免的补丁，包括自定义仓库中的补丁。

随后运行 AWS-RunPatchBaseline document，可验证并安装这些补丁。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A。Systems Manager patch baseline 用于定义应安装或避免的补丁，包括自定义仓库中的补丁。

随后运行 AWS-RunPatchBaseline document，可验证并安装这些补丁。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: A. A Systems Manager patch baseline defines which patches should be installed or avoided, including patches from a custom repository.

Running the AWS-RunPatchBaseline document verifies and installs the patches on the instance.

contents.en: A company that uses electronic health records is running a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances with an Amazon Linux operating system. As part of patient privacy requirements, the company must ensure continuous compliance for patches for operating system and applications running on the EC2 instances. How can the deployments of the operating system and application patches be automated using a default and custom repository?
contents.zh: 一家使用电子健康记录的公司正在运行一组采用 Amazon Linux operating system 的 Amazon EC2 instances。作为患者隐私要求的一部分，公司必须确保 EC2 instances 上运行的 operating system 和 applications 的补丁持续合规。如何使用默认和自定义存储库自动化 operating system 和 application patches 的部署？

questions.content: A company is using AWS CodePipeline to automate its release pipeline. AWS CodeDeploy is being used in the pipeline to deploy an application to Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) using the blue/green deployment model. The company wants to implement scripts to test the green version of the application before shifting traffic. These scripts will complete in 5 minutes or less. If errors are discovered during these tests, the application must be rolled back. Which strategy will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Add a stage to the CodePipeline pipeline between the source and deploy stages. Use AWS CodeBuild to create a runtime environment and build commands in the buildspec file to invoke test scripts. If errors are found, use the aws deploy stop- deployment command to stop the deployment.

contents.en: Add a stage to the CodePipeline pipeline between the source and deploy stages. Use AWS CodeBuild to create a runtime environment and build commands in the buildspec file to invoke test scripts. If errors are found, use the aws deploy stop- deployment command to stop the deployment.
contents.zh: 在 CodePipeline pipeline 中的 source 和 deploy stages 之间添加一个 stage。使用 AWS CodeBuild 创建 runtime environment，并在 buildspec file 中使用 build commands 调用 test scripts。如果发现错误，使用 aws deploy stop- deployment command 停止部署。

options.label: B
options.content: Add a stage to the CodePipeline pipeline between the source and deploy stages. Use this stage to invoke an AWS Lambda function that will run the test scripts. If errors are found, use the aws deploy stop-deployment command to stop the deployment.

contents.en: Add a stage to the CodePipeline pipeline between the source and deploy stages. Use this stage to invoke an AWS Lambda function that will run the test scripts. If errors are found, use the aws deploy stop-deployment command to stop the deployment.
contents.zh: 在 CodePipeline pipeline 中的 source 和 deploy stages 之间添加一个 stage。使用此 stage 调用一个将运行 test scripts 的 AWS Lambda function。如果发现错误，使用 aws deploy stop-deployment command 停止部署。

options.label: C
options.content: Add a hooks section to the CodeDeploy AppSpec file. Use the AfterAllowTestTraffic lifecycle event to invoke an AWS Lambda function to run the test scripts. If errors are found, exit the Lambda function with an error to initiate rollback.

contents.en: Add a hooks section to the CodeDeploy AppSpec file. Use the AfterAllowTestTraffic lifecycle event to invoke an AWS Lambda function to run the test scripts. If errors are found, exit the Lambda function with an error to initiate rollback.
contents.zh: 向 CodeDeploy AppSpec file 添加 hooks section。使用 AfterAllowTestTraffic lifecycle event 调用 AWS Lambda function 来运行 test scripts。如果发现错误，以错误退出 Lambda function 以启动回滚。

options.label: D
options.content: Add a hooks section to the CodeDeploy AppSpec file. Use the AfterAllowTraffic lifecycle event to invoke the test scripts. If errors are found, use the aws deploy stop-deployment CLI command to stop the deployment.

contents.en: Add a hooks section to the CodeDeploy AppSpec file. Use the AfterAllowTraffic lifecycle event to invoke the test scripts. If errors are found, use the aws deploy stop-deployment CLI command to stop the deployment.
contents.zh: 向 CodeDeploy AppSpec file 添加 hooks section。使用 AfterAllowTraffic lifecycle event 调用 test scripts。如果发现错误，使用 aws deploy stop-deployment CLI command 停止部署。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C。在 CodeDeploy AppSpec 中添加 hooks，并使用 AfterAllowTestTraffic 生命周期事件调用 Lambda 运行测试脚本。

如果测试发现错误，让 Lambda 以错误退出，CodeDeploy 就会将部署标记失败并触发回滚。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C。在 CodeDeploy AppSpec 中添加 hooks，并使用 AfterAllowTestTraffic 生命周期事件调用 Lambda 运行测试脚本。

如果测试发现错误，让 Lambda 以错误退出，CodeDeploy 就会将部署标记失败并触发回滚。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: C. Add hooks to the CodeDeploy AppSpec file and use the AfterAllowTestTraffic lifecycle event to invoke a Lambda function that runs the test scripts.

If the tests find errors, the Lambda function exits with an error so CodeDeploy fails the deployment and initiates rollback.

contents.en: A company is using AWS CodePipeline to automate its release pipeline. AWS CodeDeploy is being used in the pipeline to deploy an application to Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) using the blue/green deployment model. The company wants to implement scripts to test the green version of the application before shifting traffic. These scripts will complete in 5 minutes or less. If errors are discovered during these tests, the application must be rolled back. Which strategy will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在使用 AWS CodePipeline 自动化其发布 pipeline。AWS CodeDeploy 在该 pipeline 中用于通过 blue/green deployment model 将应用程序部署到 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)。公司希望实施脚本，在转移流量之前测试应用程序的 green version。这些脚本将在 5 分钟或更短时间内完成。如果这些测试期间发现错误，则必须回滚应用程序。哪种策略可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses AWS Storage Gateway in file gateway mode in front of an Amazon S3 bucket that is used by multiple resources. In the morning when business begins, users do not see the objects processed by a third party the previous evening. When a DevOps engineer looks directly at the S3 bucket, the data is there, but it is missing in Storage Gateway. Which solution ensures that all the updated third-party files are available in the morning?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure a nightly Amazon EventBridge event to invoke an AWS Lambda function to run the RefreshCache command for Storage Gateway.

contents.en: Configure a nightly Amazon EventBridge event to invoke an AWS Lambda function to run the RefreshCache command for Storage Gateway.
contents.zh: 配置一个夜间 Amazon EventBridge event，调用 AWS Lambda function 运行 Storage Gateway 的 RefreshCache command。

options.label: B
options.content: Instruct the third party to put data into the S3 bucket using AWS Transfer for SFTP.

contents.en: Instruct the third party to put data into the S3 bucket using AWS Transfer for SFTP.
contents.zh: 指示第三方使用 AWS Transfer for SFTP 将数据放入 S3 bucket。

options.label: C
options.content: Modify Storage Gateway to run in volume gateway mode.

contents.en: Modify Storage Gateway to run in volume gateway mode.
contents.zh: 修改 Storage Gateway，使其在 volume gateway mode 中运行。

options.label: D
options.content: Use S3 Same-Region Replication to replicate any changes made directly in the S3 bucket to Storage Gateway.

contents.en: Use S3 Same-Region Replication to replicate any changes made directly in the S3 bucket to Storage Gateway.
contents.zh: 使用 S3 Same-Region Replication 将直接在 S3 bucket 中所做的任何更改复制到 Storage Gateway。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A。Storage Gateway 的文件网关缓存不会因为 S3 中被其他服务修改的数据而自动刷新。

用每晚 EventBridge 事件触发 Lambda 调用 Storage Gateway 的 RefreshCache 命令，可确保早上能看到更新后的文件。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A。Storage Gateway 的文件网关缓存不会因为 S3 中被其他服务修改的数据而自动刷新。

用每晚 EventBridge 事件触发 Lambda 调用 Storage Gateway 的 RefreshCache 命令，可确保早上能看到更新后的文件。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: A. Storage Gateway file gateway caches do not automatically refresh when another service modifies data in S3.

A nightly EventBridge event can invoke Lambda to run the Storage Gateway RefreshCache command so updated files are available in the morning.

contents.en: A company uses AWS Storage Gateway in file gateway mode in front of an Amazon S3 bucket that is used by multiple resources. In the morning when business begins, users do not see the objects processed by a third party the previous evening. When a DevOps engineer looks directly at the S3 bucket, the data is there, but it is missing in Storage Gateway. Which solution ensures that all the updated third-party files are available in the morning?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 file gateway mode 中使用 AWS Storage Gateway，位于一个由多个资源使用的 Amazon S3 bucket 前面。早上业务开始时，用户看不到前一天晚上由第三方处理的对象。当 DevOps 工程师直接查看 S3 bucket 时，数据在那里，但在 Storage Gateway 中缺失。哪种解决方案可以确保所有更新后的第三方文件在早上可用？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer needs to back up sensitive Amazon S3 objects that are stored within an S3 bucket with a private bucket policy using S3 cross-Region replication functionality. The objects need to be copied to a target bucket in a different AWS Region and account. Which combination of actions should be performed to enable this replication? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a replication IAM role in the source account

contents.en: Create a replication IAM role in the source account
contents.zh: 在源账户中创建 replication IAM role

options.label: B
options.content: Create a replication I AM role in the target account.

contents.en: Create a replication I AM role in the target account.
contents.zh: 在目标账户中创建 replication I AM role。

options.label: C
options.content: Add statements to the source bucket policy allowing the replication IAM role to replicate objects.

contents.en: Add statements to the source bucket policy allowing the replication IAM role to replicate objects.
contents.zh: 向 source bucket policy 添加 statements，允许 replication IAM role 复制 objects。

options.label: D
options.content: Add statements to the target bucket policy allowing the replication IAM role to replicate objects.

contents.en: Add statements to the target bucket policy allowing the replication IAM role to replicate objects.
contents.zh: 向 target bucket policy 添加 statements，允许 replication IAM role 复制 objects。

options.label: E
options.content: Create a replication rule in the source bucket to enable the replication.

contents.en: Create a replication rule in the source bucket to enable the replication.
contents.zh: 在 source bucket 中创建 replication rule 以启用复制。

options.label: F
options.content: Create a replication rule in the target bucket to enable the replication.

contents.en: Create a replication rule in the target bucket to enable the replication.
contents.zh: 在 target bucket 中创建 replication rule 以启用复制。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A、D、E。S3 跨区域复制需要在源账户创建复制 IAM role，并在源 bucket 中创建 replication rule。

目标 bucket policy 还必须允许该复制角色复制对象，否则源 bucket 的复制配置无法写入目标 bucket。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A、D、E。S3 跨区域复制需要在源账户创建复制 IAM role，并在源 bucket 中创建 replication rule。

目标 bucket policy 还必须允许该复制角色复制对象，否则源 bucket 的复制配置无法写入目标 bucket。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: A, D, and E. S3 cross-Region replication requires a replication IAM role in the source account and a replication rule on the source bucket.

The target bucket policy must also allow that replication role to replicate objects into the destination bucket.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer needs to back up sensitive Amazon S3 objects that are stored within an S3 bucket with a private bucket policy using S3 cross-Region replication functionality. The objects need to be copied to a target bucket in a different AWS Region and account. Which combination of actions should be performed to enable this replication? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: DevOps 工程师需要使用 S3 cross-Region replication functionality 备份存储在具有私有 bucket policy 的 S3 bucket 中的敏感 Amazon S3 objects。这些对象需要复制到不同 AWS Region 和账户中的目标 bucket。应执行哪一组操作以启用此复制？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company has multiple member accounts that are part of an organization in AWS Organizations. The security team needs to review every Amazon EC2 security group and their inbound and outbound rules. The security team wants to programmatically retrieve this information from the member accounts using an AWS Lambda function in the management account of the organization. Which combination of access changes will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a trust relationship that allows users in the member accounts to assume the management account IAM role.

contents.en: Create a trust relationship that allows users in the member accounts to assume the management account IAM role.
contents.zh: 创建一个信任关系，允许成员账户中的用户代入管理账户 IAM 角色。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a trust relationship that allows users in the management account to assume the IAM roles of the member accounts.
