contents.en: Create a trust relationship that allows users in the management account to assume the IAM roles of the member accounts.
contents.zh: 创建一个信任关系，允许管理账户中的用户代入成员账户的 IAM 角色。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an IAM role in each member account that has access to the AmazonEC2ReadOnlyAccess managed policy.

contents.en: Create an IAM role in each member account that has access to the AmazonEC2ReadOnlyAccess managed policy.
contents.zh: 在每个成员账户中创建一个有权访问 AmazonEC2ReadOnlyAccess 托管策略的 IAM 角色。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an I AM role in each member account to allow the sts:AssumeRole action against the management account IAM role's ARN.

contents.en: Create an I AM role in each member account to allow the sts:AssumeRole action against the management account IAM role's ARN.
contents.zh: 在每个成员账户中创建一个 IAM 角色，允许对管理账户 IAM 角色的 ARN 执行 sts:AssumeRole 操作。

options.label: E
options.content: Create an I AM role in the management account that allows the sts:AssumeRole action against the member account IAM role's ARN.

contents.en: Create an I AM role in the management account that allows the sts:AssumeRole action against the member account IAM role's ARN.
contents.zh: 在管理账户中创建一个 IAM 角色，允许对成员账户 IAM 角色的 ARN 执行 sts:AssumeRole 操作。

options.label: F
options.content: Create an IAM role in the management account that has access to the AmazonEC2ReadOnlyAccess managed policy.

contents.en: Create an IAM role in the management account that has access to the AmazonEC2ReadOnlyAccess managed policy.
contents.zh: 在管理账户中创建一个有权访问 AmazonEC2ReadOnlyAccess 托管策略的 IAM 角色。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：B、C、E。每个 member account 中需要创建附加 AmazonEC2ReadOnlyAccess 的 IAM role。

该角色的信任关系允许 management account 中的用户或角色假设它；management account 中还需要一个允许对成员账户 role ARN 执行 sts:AssumeRole 的 IAM role。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：B、C、E。每个 member account 中需要创建附加 AmazonEC2ReadOnlyAccess 的 IAM role。

该角色的信任关系允许 management account 中的用户或角色假设它；management account 中还需要一个允许对成员账户 role ARN 执行 sts:AssumeRole 的 IAM role。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: B, C, and E. Each member account needs an IAM role with the AmazonEC2ReadOnlyAccess managed policy.

The role's trust relationship allows users or roles in the management account to assume it, and the management account also needs an IAM role that permits sts:AssumeRole against the member account role ARNs.

contents.en: A company has multiple member accounts that are part of an organization in AWS Organizations. The security team needs to review every Amazon EC2 security group and their inbound and outbound rules. The security team wants to programmatically retrieve this information from the member accounts using an AWS Lambda function in the management account of the organization. Which combination of access changes will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司有多个成员账户，这些账户属于 AWS Organizations 中的一个组织。安全团队需要审查每个 Amazon EC2 安全组及其入站和出站规则。安全团队希望使用组织管理账户中的 AWS Lambda 函数，以编程方式从成员账户检索这些信息。哪组访问权限变更组合可以满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A space exploration company receives telemetry data from multiple satellites. Small packets of data are received through Amazon API Gateway and are placed directly into an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queue. A custom application is subscribed to the queue and transforms the data into a standard format. Because of inconsistencies in the data that the satellites produce, the application is occasionally unable to transform the data. In these cases, the messages remain in the SQS queue. A DevOps engineer must develop a solution that retains the failed messages and makes them available to scientists for review and future processing. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure AWS Lambda to poll the SQS queue and invoke a Lambda function to check whether the queue messages are valid. If validation fails, send a copy of the data that is not valid to an Amazon S3 bucket so that the scientists can review and correct the data. When the data is corrected, amend the message in the SQS queue by using a replay Lambda function with the corrected data.

contents.en: Configure AWS Lambda to poll the SQS queue and invoke a Lambda function to check whether the queue messages are valid. If validation fails, send a copy of the data that is not valid to an Amazon S3 bucket so that the scientists can review and correct the data. When the data is corrected, amend the message in the SQS queue by using a replay Lambda function with the corrected data.
contents.zh: 配置 AWS Lambda 轮询 SQS 队列，并调用 Lambda 函数检查队列消息是否有效。如果验证失败，将无效数据的副本发送到 Amazon S3 存储桶，以便科学家查看并更正数据。数据更正后，使用重放 Lambda 函数和更正后的数据修改 SQS 队列中的消息。

options.label: B
options.content: Convert the SQS standard queue to an SQS FIFO queue. Configure AWS Lambda to poll the SQS queue every 10 minutes by using an Amazon EventBridge schedule. Invoke the Lambda function to identify any messages with a SentTimestamp value that is older than 5 minutes, push the data to the same location as the application's output location, and remove the messages from the queue.

contents.en: Convert the SQS standard queue to an SQS FIFO queue. Configure AWS Lambda to poll the SQS queue every 10 minutes by using an Amazon EventBridge schedule. Invoke the Lambda function to identify any messages with a SentTimestamp value that is older than 5 minutes, push the data to the same location as the application's output location, and remove the messages from the queue.
contents.zh: 将 SQS 标准队列转换为 SQS FIFO 队列。配置 AWS Lambda 使用 Amazon EventBridge 计划每 10 分钟轮询 SQS 队列。调用 Lambda 函数识别 SentTimestamp 值早于 5 分钟的任何消息，将数据推送到与应用程序输出位置相同的位置，并从队列中删除这些消息。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an SQS dead-letter queue. Modify the existing queue by including a redrive policy that sets the Maximum Receives setting to 1 and sets the dead-letter queue ARN to the ARN of the newly created queue. Instruct the scientists to use the dead-letter queue to review the data that is not valid. Reprocess this data at a later time.

contents.en: Create an SQS dead-letter queue. Modify the existing queue by including a redrive policy that sets the Maximum Receives setting to 1 and sets the dead-letter queue ARN to the ARN of the newly created queue. Instruct the scientists to use the dead-letter queue to review the data that is not valid. Reprocess this data at a later time.
contents.zh: 创建一个 SQS 死信队列。修改现有队列，加入一个重驱动策略，将 Maximum Receives 设置为 1，并将死信队列 ARN 设置为新创建队列的 ARN。指示科学家使用死信队列查看无效数据。稍后重新处理这些数据。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure API Gateway to send messages to different SQS virtual queues that are named for each of the satellites. Update the application to use a new virtual queue for any data that it cannot transform, and send the message to the new virtual queue. Instruct the scientists to use the virtual queue to review the data that is not valid. Reprocess this data at a later time.

contents.en: Configure API Gateway to send messages to different SQS virtual queues that are named for each of the satellites. Update the application to use a new virtual queue for any data that it cannot transform, and send the message to the new virtual queue. Instruct the scientists to use the virtual queue to review the data that is not valid. Reprocess this data at a later time.
contents.zh: 配置 API Gateway，将消息发送到以每颗卫星命名的不同 SQS 虚拟队列。更新应用程序，使其对任何无法转换的数据使用新的虚拟队列，并将消息发送到该新虚拟队列。指示科学家使用虚拟队列查看无效数据。稍后重新处理这些数据。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C。创建 SQS dead-letter queue，并在现有队列上配置 redrive policy，将 MaximumReceives 设为 1 后把无效消息转入 DLQ。

这样数据科学家可以在 DLQ 中查看无效数据，并在之后重新处理。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C。创建 SQS dead-letter queue，并在现有队列上配置 redrive policy，将 MaximumReceives 设为 1 后把无效消息转入 DLQ。

这样数据科学家可以在 DLQ 中查看无效数据，并在之后重新处理。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: C. Create an SQS dead-letter queue and configure the existing queue with a redrive policy that sets MaximumReceives to 1 and points to the DLQ ARN.

This lets scientists review invalid data in the DLQ and reprocess it later.

contents.en: A space exploration company receives telemetry data from multiple satellites. Small packets of data are received through Amazon API Gateway and are placed directly into an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queue. A custom application is subscribed to the queue and transforms the data into a standard format. Because of inconsistencies in the data that the satellites produce, the application is occasionally unable to transform the data. In these cases, the messages remain in the SQS queue. A DevOps engineer must develop a solution that retains the failed messages and makes them available to scientists for review and future processing. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家太空探索公司从多颗卫星接收遥测数据。小型数据包通过 Amazon API Gateway 接收，并直接放入 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 标准队列。一个自定义应用程序订阅该队列，并将数据转换为标准格式。由于卫星生成的数据存在不一致性，该应用程序偶尔无法转换数据。在这些情况下，消息会保留在 SQS 队列中。DevOps 工程师必须开发一个解决方案，用于保留失败的消息，并使科学家能够查看这些消息并在将来处理。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company wants to use AWS CloudFormation for infrastructure deployment. The company has strict tagging and resource requirements and wants to limit the deployment to two Regions. Developers will need to deploy multiple versions of the same application. Which solution ensures resources are deployed in accordance with company policy?

options.label: A
options.content: Create AWS Trusted Advisor checks to find and remediate unapproved CloudFormation StackSets.

contents.en: Create AWS Trusted Advisor checks to find and remediate unapproved CloudFormation StackSets.
contents.zh: 创建 AWS Trusted Advisor 检查，以查找并修复未经批准的 CloudFormation StackSets。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a Cloud Formation drift detection operation to find and remediate unapproved CloudFormation StackSets.

contents.en: Create a Cloud Formation drift detection operation to find and remediate unapproved CloudFormation StackSets.
contents.zh: 创建 CloudFormation 漂移检测操作，以查找并修复未经批准的 CloudFormation StackSets。

options.label: C
options.content: Create CloudFormation StackSets with approved CloudFormation templates.

contents.en: Create CloudFormation StackSets with approved CloudFormation templates.
contents.zh: 使用经批准的 CloudFormation 模板创建 CloudFormation StackSets。

options.label: D
options.content: Create AWS Service Catalog products with approved CloudFormation templates.

contents.en: Create AWS Service Catalog products with approved CloudFormation templates.
contents.zh: 使用经批准的 CloudFormation 模板创建 AWS Service Catalog 产品。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：D。AWS Service Catalog 可集中管理经批准的 CloudFormation 模板，让用户快速部署合规的云资源。

讨论指出它正是用于以治理方式管理基础设施即代码模板的服务。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：D。AWS Service Catalog 可集中管理经批准的 CloudFormation 模板，让用户快速部署合规的云资源。

讨论指出它正是用于以治理方式管理基础设施即代码模板的服务。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: D. AWS Service Catalog centrally manages approved CloudFormation templates so users can quickly deploy compliant cloud resources.

The discussion notes that this service is designed for governed management of infrastructure-as-code templates.

contents.en: A company wants to use AWS CloudFormation for infrastructure deployment. The company has strict tagging and resource requirements and wants to limit the deployment to two Regions. Developers will need to deploy multiple versions of the same application. Which solution ensures resources are deployed in accordance with company policy?
contents.zh: 一家公司希望使用 AWS CloudFormation 进行基础设施部署。该公司有严格的标签和资源要求，并希望将部署限制在两个 Region 中。开发人员需要部署同一应用程序的多个版本。哪种解决方案可确保资源按照公司策略部署？

questions.content: A company requires that its internally facing web application be highly available. The architecture is made up of one Amazon EC2 web server instance and one NAT instance that provides outbound internet access for updates and accessing public data. Which combination of architecture adjustments should the company implement to achieve high availability? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Add the NAT instance to an EC2 Auto Scaling group that spans multiple Availability Zones. Update the route tables.

contents.en: Add the NAT instance to an EC2 Auto Scaling group that spans multiple Availability Zones. Update the route tables.
contents.zh: 将 NAT 实例添加到跨多个 Availability Zones 的 EC2 Auto Scaling 组中。更新路由表。

options.label: B
options.content: Create additional EC2 instances spanning multiple Availability Zones. Add an Application Load Balancer to split the load between them.

contents.en: Create additional EC2 instances spanning multiple Availability Zones. Add an Application Load Balancer to split the load between them.
contents.zh: 创建跨多个 Availability Zones 的额外 EC2 实例。添加 Application Load Balancer 在这些实例之间分担负载。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure an Application Load Balancer in front of the EC2 instance. Configure Amazon CloudWatch alarms to recover the EC2 instance upon host failure.

contents.en: Configure an Application Load Balancer in front of the EC2 instance. Configure Amazon CloudWatch alarms to recover the EC2 instance upon host failure.
contents.zh: 在 EC2 实例前配置 Application Load Balancer。配置 Amazon CloudWatch 警报，在主机故障时恢复 EC2 实例。

options.label: D
options.content: Replace the NAT instance with a NAT gateway in each Availability Zone. Update the route tables.

contents.en: Replace the NAT instance with a NAT gateway in each Availability Zone. Update the route tables.
contents.zh: 将 NAT 实例替换为每个 Availability Zone 中的 NAT gateway。更新路由表。

options.label: E
options.content: Replace the NAT instance with a NAT gateway that spans multiple Availability Zones. Update the route tables.

contents.en: Replace the NAT instance with a NAT gateway that spans multiple Availability Zones. Update the route tables.
contents.zh: 将 NAT 实例替换为跨多个 Availability Zones 的 NAT gateway。更新路由表。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：B、D。增加跨多个可用区的 EC2 实例，并用 Application Load Balancer 分摊流量，可提高应用层可用性。

NAT gateway 不跨 AZ，因此需要在每个 AZ 中替换 NAT instance 为 NAT gateway，并更新路由表。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：B、D。增加跨多个可用区的 EC2 实例，并用 Application Load Balancer 分摊流量，可提高应用层可用性。

NAT gateway 不跨 AZ，因此需要在每个 AZ 中替换 NAT instance 为 NAT gateway，并更新路由表。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: B and D. Adding EC2 instances across multiple Availability Zones behind an Application Load Balancer improves application availability.

A NAT gateway does not span Availability Zones, so replace the NAT instance with a NAT gateway in each AZ and update the route tables.

contents.en: A company requires that its internally facing web application be highly available. The architecture is made up of one Amazon EC2 web server instance and one NAT instance that provides outbound internet access for updates and accessing public data. Which combination of architecture adjustments should the company implement to achieve high availability? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司要求其内部访问的 Web 应用程序具备高可用性。该架构由一个 Amazon EC2 Web 服务器实例和一个 NAT 实例组成，NAT 实例为更新和访问公共数据提供出站互联网访问。公司应实施哪组架构调整组合来实现高可用性？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is building a multistage pipeline with AWS CodePipeline to build, verify, stage, test, and deploy an application. A manual approval stage is required between the test stage and the deploy stage. The development team uses a custom chat tool with webhook support that requires near-real-time notifications. How should the DevOps engineer configure status updates for pipeline activity and approval requests to post to the chat tool?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch Logs subscription that filters on CodePipeline Pipeline Execution State Change. Publish subscription events to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe the chat webhook URL to the SNS topic, and complete the subscription validation.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch Logs subscription that filters on CodePipeline Pipeline Execution State Change. Publish subscription events to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe the chat webhook URL to the SNS topic, and complete the subscription validation.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 订阅，筛选 CodePipeline Pipeline Execution State Change。将订阅事件发布到 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。将聊天 webhook URL 订阅到 SNS 主题，并完成订阅验证。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function that is invoked by AWS CloudTrail events. When a CodePipeline Pipeline Execution State Change event is detected, send the event details to the chat webhook URL.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that is invoked by AWS CloudTrail events. When a CodePipeline Pipeline Execution State Change event is detected, send the event details to the chat webhook URL.
contents.zh: 创建一个由 AWS CloudTrail 事件调用的 AWS Lambda 函数。当检测到 CodePipeline Pipeline Execution State Change 事件时，将事件详细信息发送到聊天 webhook URL。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that filters on CodePipeline Pipeline Execution State Change. Publish the events to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Create an AWS Lambda function that sends event details to the chat webhook URL. Subscribe the function to the SNS topic.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that filters on CodePipeline Pipeline Execution State Change. Publish the events to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Create an AWS Lambda function that sends event details to the chat webhook URL. Subscribe the function to the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，筛选 CodePipeline Pipeline Execution State Change。将事件发布到 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，将事件详细信息发送到聊天 webhook URL。将该函数订阅到 SNS 主题。

options.label: D
options.content: Modify the pipeline code to send the event details to the chat webhook URL at the end of each stage. Parameterize the URL so that each pipeline can send to a different URL based on the pipeline environment.

contents.en: Modify the pipeline code to send the event details to the chat webhook URL at the end of each stage. Parameterize the URL so that each pipeline can send to a different URL based on the pipeline environment.
contents.zh: 修改流水线代码，在每个阶段结束时将事件详细信息发送到聊天 webhook URL。将 URL 参数化，以便每条流水线可以根据流水线环境发送到不同的 URL。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C。使用 EventBridge 过滤 CodePipeline pipeline execution state change 事件，并发布到 SNS topic。

再用订阅该 SNS topic 的 Lambda 将事件详情发送到聊天 webhook，即可发布流水线状态和审批请求更新。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C。使用 EventBridge 过滤 CodePipeline pipeline execution state change 事件，并发布到 SNS topic。

再用订阅该 SNS topic 的 Lambda 将事件详情发送到聊天 webhook，即可发布流水线状态和审批请求更新。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: C. Use EventBridge to filter CodePipeline pipeline execution state change events and publish them to an SNS topic.

A Lambda function subscribed to the topic can send the event details to the chat webhook for pipeline status and approval updates.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer is building a multistage pipeline with AWS CodePipeline to build, verify, stage, test, and deploy an application. A manual approval stage is required between the test stage and the deploy stage. The development team uses a custom chat tool with webhook support that requires near-real-time notifications. How should the DevOps engineer configure status updates for pipeline activity and approval requests to post to the chat tool?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师正在使用 AWS CodePipeline 构建一个多阶段流水线，用于构建、验证、预发布、测试和部署应用程序。在测试阶段和部署阶段之间需要一个手动审批阶段。开发团队使用一个支持 webhook 的自定义聊天工具，并要求接近实时的通知。DevOps 工程师应如何配置流水线活动和审批请求的状态更新，以便发布到该聊天工具？

questions.content: A company's application development team uses Linux-based Amazon EC2 instances as bastion hosts. Inbound SSH access to the bastion hosts is restricted to specific IP addresses, as defined in the associated security groups. The company's security team wants to receive a notification if the security group rules are modified to allow SSH access from any IP address. What should a DevOps engineer do to meet this requirement?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule with a source of aws.cloudtrail and the event name AuthorizeSecurityGroupIngress. Define an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic as the target.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule with a source of aws.cloudtrail and the event name AuthorizeSecurityGroupIngress. Define an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic as the target.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，source 为 aws.cloudtrail，事件名称为 AuthorizeSecurityGroupIngress。将 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题定义为目标。

options.label: B
options.content: Enable Amazon GuardDuty and check the findings for security groups in AWS Security Hub. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule with a custom pattern that matches GuardDuty events with an output of NON_COMPLIANT. Define an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic as the target.

contents.en: Enable Amazon GuardDuty and check the findings for security groups in AWS Security Hub. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule with a custom pattern that matches GuardDuty events with an output of NON_COMPLIANT. Define an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic as the target.
contents.zh: 启用 Amazon GuardDuty，并在 AWS Security Hub 中检查安全组的发现结果。配置一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，使用自定义模式匹配输出为 NON_COMPLIANT 的 GuardDuty 事件。将 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题定义为目标。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS Config rule by using the restricted-ssh managed rule to check whether security groups disallow unrestricted incoming SSH traffic. Configure automatic remediation to publish a message to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic.

contents.en: Create an AWS Config rule by using the restricted-ssh managed rule to check whether security groups disallow unrestricted incoming SSH traffic. Configure automatic remediation to publish a message to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic.
contents.zh: 使用 restricted-ssh 托管规则创建 AWS Config 规则，以检查安全组是否禁止不受限制的传入 SSH 流量。配置自动修复，将消息发布到 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。

options.label: D
options.content: Enable Amazon Inspector. Include the Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures-1.1 rules package to check the security groups that are associated with the bastion hosts. Configure Amazon Inspector to publish a message to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic.

contents.en: Enable Amazon Inspector. Include the Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures-1.1 rules package to check the security groups that are associated with the bastion hosts. Configure Amazon Inspector to publish a message to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic.
contents.zh: 启用 Amazon Inspector。包含 Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures-1.1 规则包，以检查与堡垒主机关联的安全组。配置 Amazon Inspector 将消息发布到 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C。源数据标记的正确项是使用 AWS Config 托管规则 restricted-ssh 检查安全组是否禁止不受限制的 SSH 入站流量。

自动补救可发布消息到 SNS topic，用于通知相关人员。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C。源数据标记的正确项是使用 AWS Config 托管规则 restricted-ssh 检查安全组是否禁止不受限制的 SSH 入站流量。

自动补救可发布消息到 SNS topic，用于通知相关人员。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: C. The source marks using the AWS Config managed rule restricted-ssh to check whether security groups disallow unrestricted inbound SSH as the correct option.

Automatic remediation can publish a message to an SNS topic for notification.

contents.en: A company's application development team uses Linux-based Amazon EC2 instances as bastion hosts. Inbound SSH access to the bastion hosts is restricted to specific IP addresses, as defined in the associated security groups. The company's security team wants to receive a notification if the security group rules are modified to allow SSH access from any IP address. What should a DevOps engineer do to meet this requirement?
contents.zh: 一家公司的应用程序开发团队使用基于 Linux 的 Amazon EC2 实例作为堡垒主机。对堡垒主机的入站 SSH 访问受限于特定 IP 地址，这些地址在关联的安全组中定义。公司的安全团队希望在安全组规则被修改为允许来自任意 IP 地址的 SSH 访问时收到通知。DevOps 工程师应做什么来满足此要求？

questions.content: A DevOps team manages an API running on-premises that serves as a backend for an Amazon API Gateway endpoint. Customers have been complaining about high response latencies, which the development team has verified using the API Gateway latency metrics in Amazon CloudWatch. To identify the cause, the team needs to collect relevant data without introducing additional latency. Which actions should be taken to accomplish this? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Install the CloudWatch agent server side and configure the agent to upload relevant logs to CloudWatch.

contents.en: Install the CloudWatch agent server side and configure the agent to upload relevant logs to CloudWatch.
contents.zh: 在服务器端安装 CloudWatch agent，并配置该 agent 将相关日志上传到 CloudWatch。

options.label: B
options.content: Enable AWS X-Ray tracing in API Gateway, modify the application to capture request segments, and upload those segments to X-Ray during each request.

contents.en: Enable AWS X-Ray tracing in API Gateway, modify the application to capture request segments, and upload those segments to X-Ray during each request.
contents.zh: 在 API Gateway 中启用 AWS X-Ray 跟踪，修改应用程序以捕获请求分段，并在每个请求期间将这些分段上传到 X-Ray。

options.label: C
options.content: Enable AWS X-Ray tracing in API Gateway, modify the application to capture request segments, and use the X-Ray daemon to upload segments to X-Ray.

contents.en: Enable AWS X-Ray tracing in API Gateway, modify the application to capture request segments, and use the X-Ray daemon to upload segments to X-Ray.
contents.zh: 在 API Gateway 中启用 AWS X-Ray 跟踪，修改应用程序以捕获请求分段，并使用 X-Ray daemon 将分段上传到 X-Ray。

options.label: D
options.content: Modify the on-premises application to send log information back to API Gateway with each request.

contents.en: Modify the on-premises application to send log information back to API Gateway with each request.
contents.zh: 修改本地应用程序，使其在每个请求中将日志信息返回给 API Gateway。

options.label: E
options.content: Modify the on-premises application to calculate and upload statistical data relevant to the API service requests to CloudWatch metrics.

contents.en: Modify the on-premises application to calculate and upload statistical data relevant to the API service requests to CloudWatch metrics.
contents.zh: 修改本地应用程序，计算与 API 服务请求相关的统计数据并将其上传到 CloudWatch metrics。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A、C。在服务器端安装并配置 CloudWatch agent，可将相关日志上传到 CloudWatch。

同时在 API Gateway 启用 AWS X-Ray tracing，并修改应用捕获请求 segment，再用 X-Ray daemon 上传 segment，是讨论中提到的标准方案组成部分。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A、C。在服务器端安装并配置 CloudWatch agent，可将相关日志上传到 CloudWatch。

同时在 API Gateway 启用 AWS X-Ray tracing，并修改应用捕获请求 segment，再用 X-Ray daemon 上传 segment，是讨论中提到的标准方案组成部分。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: A and C. Installing and configuring the CloudWatch agent on the server sends relevant logs to CloudWatch.

Enabling AWS X-Ray tracing in API Gateway, modifying the application to capture request segments, and using the X-Ray daemon to upload them are standard parts of the solution noted in the discussion.

contents.en: A DevOps team manages an API running on-premises that serves as a backend for an Amazon API Gateway endpoint. Customers have been complaining about high response latencies, which the development team has verified using the API Gateway latency metrics in Amazon CloudWatch. To identify the cause, the team needs to collect relevant data without introducing additional latency. Which actions should be taken to accomplish this? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一个 DevOps 团队管理一个在本地运行的 API，该 API 作为 Amazon API Gateway 端点的后端。客户一直抱怨响应延迟高，开发团队已使用 Amazon CloudWatch 中的 API Gateway 延迟指标验证了这一点。为了确定原因，团队需要收集相关数据，同时不引入额外延迟。应采取哪些操作来实现此目标？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company has an application that is using a MySQL-compatible Amazon Aurora Multi-AZ DB cluster as the database. A cross- Region read replica has been created for disaster recovery purposes. A DevOps engineer wants to automate the promotion of the replica so it becomes the primary database instance in the event of a failure. Which solution will accomplish this?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure a latency-based Amazon Route 53 CNAME with health checks so it points to both the primary and replica endpoints. Subscribe an Amazon SNS topic to Amazon RDS failure notifications from AWS CloudTrail and use that topic to invoke an AWS Lambda function that will promote the replica instance as the primary.

contents.en: Configure a latency-based Amazon Route 53 CNAME with health checks so it points to both the primary and replica endpoints. Subscribe an Amazon SNS topic to Amazon RDS failure notifications from AWS CloudTrail and use that topic to invoke an AWS Lambda function that will promote the replica instance as the primary.
contents.zh: 配置基于延迟的 Amazon Route 53 CNAME，并使用运行状况检查，使其指向主端点和副本端点。将 Amazon SNS 主题订阅到来自 AWS CloudTrail 的 Amazon RDS 故障通知，并使用该主题调用 AWS Lambda 函数，将副本实例提升为主实例。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Aurora custom endpoint to point to the primary database instance. Configure the application to use this endpoint. Configure AWS CloudTrail to run an AWS Lambda function to promote the replica instance and modify the custom endpoint to point to the newly promoted instance.

contents.en: Create an Aurora custom endpoint to point to the primary database instance. Configure the application to use this endpoint. Configure AWS CloudTrail to run an AWS Lambda function to promote the replica instance and modify the custom endpoint to point to the newly promoted instance.
contents.zh: 创建 Aurora custom endpoint 指向主数据库实例。配置应用程序使用此端点。配置 AWS CloudTrail 运行 AWS Lambda 函数，以提升副本实例，并修改 custom endpoint 指向新提升的实例。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function to modify the application's AWS CloudFormation template to promote the replica, apply the template to update the stack, and point the application to the newly promoted instance. Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to invoke this Lambda function after the failure event occurs.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function to modify the application's AWS CloudFormation template to promote the replica, apply the template to update the stack, and point the application to the newly promoted instance. Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to invoke this Lambda function after the failure event occurs.
contents.zh: 创建 AWS Lambda 函数，用于修改应用程序的 AWS CloudFormation 模板以提升副本，应用该模板以更新堆栈，并将应用程序指向新提升的实例。创建 Amazon CloudWatch 警报，在故障事件发生后调用此 Lambda 函数。

options.label: D
options.content: Store the Aurora endpoint in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store. Create an Amazon EventBridge event that detects the database failure and runs an AWS Lambda function to promote the replica instance and update the endpoint URL stored in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store. Code the application to reload the endpoint from Parameter Store if a database connection fails.

contents.en: Store the Aurora endpoint in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store. Create an Amazon EventBridge event that detects the database failure and runs an AWS Lambda function to promote the replica instance and update the endpoint URL stored in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store. Code the application to reload the endpoint from Parameter Store if a database connection fails.
contents.zh: 将 Aurora 端点存储在 AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store 中。创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 事件，用于检测数据库故障并运行 AWS Lambda 函数来提升副本实例，同时更新存储在 AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store 中的端点 URL。编写应用程序代码，使其在数据库连接失败时从 Parameter Store 重新加载端点。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：D。将 Aurora endpoint 存入 Systems Manager Parameter Store，应用在连接失败时重新读取该参数。

EventBridge 检测数据库故障后运行 Lambda，Lambda 提升 replica 并更新 Parameter Store 中的 endpoint URL，从而自动切换应用使用的端点。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：D。将 Aurora endpoint 存入 Systems Manager Parameter Store，应用在连接失败时重新读取该参数。

EventBridge 检测数据库故障后运行 Lambda，Lambda 提升 replica 并更新 Parameter Store 中的 endpoint URL，从而自动切换应用使用的端点。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: D. Store the Aurora endpoint in Systems Manager Parameter Store and have the application reload it when a database connection fails.

EventBridge can detect the database failure and invoke Lambda to promote the replica and update the endpoint URL in Parameter Store, automating the failover path used by the application.

contents.en: A company has an application that is using a MySQL-compatible Amazon Aurora Multi-AZ DB cluster as the database. A cross- Region read replica has been created for disaster recovery purposes. A DevOps engineer wants to automate the promotion of the replica so it becomes the primary database instance in the event of a failure. Which solution will accomplish this?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个应用程序，该应用程序使用与 MySQL 兼容的 Amazon Aurora Multi-AZ DB cluster 作为数据库。已为灾难恢复目的创建了跨 Region 只读副本。DevOps 工程师希望自动提升该副本，以便在发生故障时使其成为主数据库实例。哪种解决方案可以实现这一点？

questions.content: A company hosts its staging website using an Amazon EC2 instance backed with Amazon EBS storage. The company wants to recover quickly with minimal data losses in the event of network connectivity issues or power failures on the EC2 instance. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Add the instance to an EC2 Auto Scaling group with the minimum, maximum, and desired capacity set to 1.

contents.en: Add the instance to an EC2 Auto Scaling group with the minimum, maximum, and desired capacity set to 1.
contents.zh: 将该实例添加到 EC2 Auto Scaling 组中，并将最小容量、最大容量和所需容量设置为 1。

options.label: B
options.content: Add the instance to an EC2 Auto Scaling group with a lifecycle hook to detach the EBS volume when the EC2 instance shuts down or terminates.

contents.en: Add the instance to an EC2 Auto Scaling group with a lifecycle hook to detach the EBS volume when the EC2 instance shuts down or terminates.
contents.zh: 将该实例添加到 EC2 Auto Scaling 组中，并配置生命周期挂钩，在 EC2 实例关闭或终止时分离 EBS 卷。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for the StatusCheckFailed System metric and select the EC2 action to recover the instance.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for the StatusCheckFailed System metric and select the EC2 action to recover the instance.
contents.zh: 为 StatusCheckFailed System 指标创建 Amazon CloudWatch 警报，并选择 EC2 操作来恢复实例。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for the StatusCheckFailed Instance metric and select the EC2 action to reboot the instance.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for the StatusCheckFailed Instance metric and select the EC2 action to reboot the instance.
contents.zh: 为 StatusCheckFailed Instance 指标创建 Amazon CloudWatch 警报，并选择 EC2 操作来重启实例。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C。为 EC2 StatusCheckFailed_System 指标创建 CloudWatch alarm，并选择 recover instance 的 EC2 action，可在系统状态检查失败时恢复实例。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C。为 EC2 StatusCheckFailed_System 指标创建 CloudWatch alarm，并选择 recover instance 的 EC2 action，可在系统状态检查失败时恢复实例。
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. Create a CloudWatch alarm for the EC2 StatusCheckFailed_System metric and select the EC2 recover instance action to recover the instance after a system status check failure.

contents.en: A company hosts its staging website using an Amazon EC2 instance backed with Amazon EBS storage. The company wants to recover quickly with minimal data losses in the event of network connectivity issues or power failures on the EC2 instance. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用由 Amazon EBS 存储支持的 Amazon EC2 实例托管其预发布网站。公司希望在 EC2 实例出现网络连接问题或电源故障时，能够快速恢复并将数据损失降到最低。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company wants to use AWS development tools to replace its current bash deployment scripts. The company currently deploys a LAMP application to a group of Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). During the deployments, the company unit tests the committed application, stops and starts services, unregisters and re-registers instances with the load balancer, and updates file permissions. The company wants to maintain the same deployment functionality through the shift to using AWS services. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS CodeBuild to test the application. Use bash scripts invoked by AWS CodeDeploy's appspec.yml file to restart services, and deregister and register instances with the ALB. Use the appspec.yml file to update file permissions without a custom script.

contents.en: Use AWS CodeBuild to test the application. Use bash scripts invoked by AWS CodeDeploy's appspec.yml file to restart services, and deregister and register instances with the ALB. Use the appspec.yml file to update file permissions without a custom script.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CodeBuild 测试应用程序。使用由 AWS CodeDeploy 的 appspec.yml 文件调用的 bash 脚本重启服务，并从 ALB 注销和注册实例。使用 appspec.yml 文件在不使用自定义脚本的情况下更新文件权限。

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS CodePipeline to move the application from the AWS CodeCommit repository to AWS CodeDeploy. Use CodeDeploy's deployment group to test the application, unregister and re-register instances with the ALand restart services. Use the appspec.yml file to update file permissions without a custom script.

contents.en: Use AWS CodePipeline to move the application from the AWS CodeCommit repository to AWS CodeDeploy. Use CodeDeploy's deployment group to test the application, unregister and re-register instances with the ALand restart services. Use the appspec.yml file to update file permissions without a custom script.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CodePipeline 将应用程序从 AWS CodeCommit 存储库移动到 AWS CodeDeploy。使用 CodeDeploy 的部署组测试应用程序，注销并重新注册实例到 ALB，并重启服务。使用 appspec.yml 文件在不使用自定义脚本的情况下更新文件权限。

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS CodePipeline to move the application source code from the AWS CodeCommit repository to AWS CodeDeploy. Use CodeDeploy to test the application. Use CodeDeploy's appspec.yml file to restart services and update permissions without a custom script. Use AWS CodeBuild to unregister and re-register instances with the ALB.

contents.en: Use AWS CodePipeline to move the application source code from the AWS CodeCommit repository to AWS CodeDeploy. Use CodeDeploy to test the application. Use CodeDeploy's appspec.yml file to restart services and update permissions without a custom script. Use AWS CodeBuild to unregister and re-register instances with the ALB.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CodePipeline 将应用程序源代码从 AWS CodeCommit 存储库移动到 AWS CodeDeploy。使用 CodeDeploy 测试应用程序。使用 CodeDeploy 的 appspec.yml 文件在不使用自定义脚本的情况下重启服务并更新权限。使用 AWS CodeBuild 从 ALB 注销并重新注册实例。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS CodePipeline to trigger AWS CodeBuild to test the application. Use bash scripts invoked by AWS CodeDeploy's appspec.yml file to restart services. Unregister and re-register the instances in the AWS CodeDeploy deployment group with the ALB. Update the appspec.yml file to update file permissions without a custom script.

contents.en: Use AWS CodePipeline to trigger AWS CodeBuild to test the application. Use bash scripts invoked by AWS CodeDeploy's appspec.yml file to restart services. Unregister and re-register the instances in the AWS CodeDeploy deployment group with the ALB. Update the appspec.yml file to update file permissions without a custom script.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CodePipeline 触发 AWS CodeBuild 来测试应用程序。使用由 AWS CodeDeploy 的 appspec.yml 文件调用的 bash 脚本重启服务。将 AWS CodeDeploy 部署组中的实例从 ALB 注销并重新注册。更新 appspec.yml 文件以在不使用自定义脚本的情况下更新文件权限。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：D。讨论指出需要 CodePipeline 将流程从 CodeBuild 测试推进到 CodeDeploy 部署。

该方案用 CodeBuild 测试应用，通过 CodeDeploy AppSpec 中的脚本重启服务、处理 ALB 注册，并用 AppSpec 更新文件权限。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：D。讨论指出需要 CodePipeline 将流程从 CodeBuild 测试推进到 CodeDeploy 部署。

该方案用 CodeBuild 测试应用，通过 CodeDeploy AppSpec 中的脚本重启服务、处理 ALB 注册，并用 AppSpec 更新文件权限。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: D. The discussion notes that CodePipeline is needed to move execution from CodeBuild testing to CodeDeploy deployment.

This option uses CodeBuild to test the application, CodeDeploy AppSpec scripts to restart services and handle ALB registration, and AppSpec configuration to update file permissions.

contents.en: A company wants to use AWS development tools to replace its current bash deployment scripts. The company currently deploys a LAMP application to a group of Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). During the deployments, the company unit tests the committed application, stops and starts services, unregisters and re-registers instances with the load balancer, and updates file permissions. The company wants to maintain the same deployment functionality through the shift to using AWS services. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司希望使用 AWS 开发工具来替换当前的 bash 部署脚本。该公司目前将 LAMP 应用程序部署到 Application Load Balancer (ALB) 后面的一组 Amazon EC2 实例。在部署期间，公司会对已提交的应用程序进行单元测试，停止和启动服务，从负载均衡器注销并重新注册实例，以及更新文件权限。公司希望在转向使用 AWS 服务时保持相同的部署功能。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company runs an application with an Amazon EC2 and on-premises configuration. A DevOps engineer needs to standardize patching across both environments. Company policy dictates that patching only happens during non-business hours. Which combination of actions will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Add the physical machines into AWS Systems Manager using Systems Manager Hybrid Activations.

contents.en: Add the physical machines into AWS Systems Manager using Systems Manager Hybrid Activations.
contents.zh: 使用 Systems Manager Hybrid Activations 将物理计算机添加到 AWS Systems Manager 中。

options.label: B
options.content: Attach an IAM role to the EC2 instances, allowing them to be managed by AWS Systems Manager.

contents.en: Attach an IAM role to the EC2 instances, allowing them to be managed by AWS Systems Manager.
contents.zh: 将 IAM 角色附加到 EC2 实例，允许这些实例由 AWS Systems Manager 管理。

options.label: C
options.content: Create IAM access keys for the on-premises machines to interact with AWS Systems Manager.

contents.en: Create IAM access keys for the on-premises machines to interact with AWS Systems Manager.
contents.zh: 为本地计算机创建 IAM access keys，以便与 AWS Systems Manager 交互。

options.label: D
options.content: Run an AWS Systems Manager Automation document to patch the systems every hour

contents.en: Run an AWS Systems Manager Automation document to patch the systems every hour
contents.zh: 运行 AWS Systems Manager Automation 文档，每小时对系统打补丁

options.label: E
options.content: Use Amazon EventBridge scheduled events to schedule a patch window.

contents.en: Use Amazon EventBridge scheduled events to schedule a patch window.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon EventBridge 计划事件来安排补丁窗口。

options.label: F
options.content: Use AWS Systems Manager Maintenance Windows to schedule a patch window.

contents.en: Use AWS Systems Manager Maintenance Windows to schedule a patch window.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Systems Manager Maintenance Windows 来安排补丁窗口。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A、B、F。物理机需要通过 Systems Manager Hybrid Activations 加入 Systems Manager，EC2 实例则需要附加允许被 Systems Manager 管理的 IAM role。

使用 Systems Manager Maintenance Windows 可以把补丁安排在非业务时间执行，符合讨论中给出的排除理由。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A、B、F。物理机需要通过 Systems Manager Hybrid Activations 加入 Systems Manager，EC2 实例则需要附加允许被 Systems Manager 管理的 IAM role。

使用 Systems Manager Maintenance Windows 可以把补丁安排在非业务时间执行，符合讨论中给出的排除理由。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: A, B, and F. Physical machines should be added to Systems Manager through Hybrid Activations, while EC2 instances need an IAM role that allows Systems Manager management.

Systems Manager Maintenance Windows schedule patching during non-business hours, matching the discussion's reasoning.

contents.en: A company runs an application with an Amazon EC2 and on-premises configuration. A DevOps engineer needs to standardize patching across both environments. Company policy dictates that patching only happens during non-business hours. Which combination of actions will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司运行一个包含 Amazon EC2 和本地配置的应用程序。DevOps 工程师需要在两个环境中标准化补丁管理。公司策略规定只能在非工作时间进行补丁修补。哪组操作组合可以满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company has chosen AWS to host a new application. The company needs to implement a multi-account strategy. A DevOps engineer creates a new AWS account and an organization in AWS Organizations. The DevOps engineer also creates the OU structure for the organization and sets up a landing zone by using AWS Control Tower. The DevOps engineer must implement a solution that automatically deploys resources for new accounts that users create through AWS Control Tower Account Factory. When a user creates a new account, the solution must apply AWS CloudFormation templates and SCPs that are customized for the OU or the account to automatically deploy all the resources that are attached to the account. All the OUs are enrolled in AWS Control Tower. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST automated way?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS Service Catalog with AWS Control Tower. Create portfolios and products in AWS Service Catalog. Grant granular permissions to provision these resources. Deploy SCPs by using the AWS CLI and JSON documents.

contents.en: Use AWS Service Catalog with AWS Control Tower. Create portfolios and products in AWS Service Catalog. Grant granular permissions to provision these resources. Deploy SCPs by using the AWS CLI and JSON documents.
contents.zh: 将 AWS Service Catalog 与 AWS Control Tower 结合使用。在 AWS Service Catalog 中创建 portfolios 和 products。授予精细化权限以预置这些资源。使用 AWS CLI 和 JSON 文档部署 SCPs。

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy CloudFormation stack sets by using the required templates. Enable automatic deployment. Deploy stack instances to the required accounts. Deploy a CloudFormation stack set to the organization's management account to deploy SCPs.

contents.en: Deploy CloudFormation stack sets by using the required templates. Enable automatic deployment. Deploy stack instances to the required accounts. Deploy a CloudFormation stack set to the organization's management account to deploy SCPs.
contents.zh: 使用所需模板部署 CloudFormation stack sets。启用自动部署。将 stack instances 部署到所需账户。向组织的管理账户部署一个 CloudFormation stack set 来部署 SCPs。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to detect the CreateManagedAccount event. Configure AWS Service Catalog as the target to deploy resources to any new accounts. Deploy SCPs by using the AWS CLI and JSON documents.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to detect the CreateManagedAccount event. Configure AWS Service Catalog as the target to deploy resources to any new accounts. Deploy SCPs by using the AWS CLI and JSON documents.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则来检测 CreateManagedAccount 事件。配置 AWS Service Catalog 作为目标，将资源部署到任何新账户。使用 AWS CLI 和 JSON 文档部署 SCPs。

options.label: D
options.content: Deploy the Customizations for AWS Control Tower (CfCT) solution. Use an AWS CodeCommit repository as the source. In the repository, create a custom package that includes the CloudFormation templates and the SCP JSON documents.

contents.en: Deploy the Customizations for AWS Control Tower (CfCT) solution. Use an AWS CodeCommit repository as the source. In the repository, create a custom package that includes the CloudFormation templates and the SCP JSON documents.
contents.zh: 部署 Customizations for AWS Control Tower (CfCT) 解决方案。使用 AWS CodeCommit 存储库作为源。在存储库中创建一个自定义包，其中包含 CloudFormation 模板和 SCP JSON 文档。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：D。Customizations for AWS Control Tower (CfCT) 正是用于在 Control Tower 环境中自动部署账户定制内容。

把 CloudFormation 模板和 SCP JSON 文档放入 CodeCommit 源仓库中的自定义包，可在新账户通过 Account Factory 创建时自动应用资源和 SCP。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：D。Customizations for AWS Control Tower (CfCT) 正是用于在 Control Tower 环境中自动部署账户定制内容。

把 CloudFormation 模板和 SCP JSON 文档放入 CodeCommit 源仓库中的自定义包，可在新账户通过 Account Factory 创建时自动应用资源和 SCP。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: D. Customizations for AWS Control Tower is designed to automate account customizations in a Control Tower environment.

Putting CloudFormation templates and SCP JSON documents into a custom package in a CodeCommit source repository lets those resources and SCPs be applied automatically when new accounts are created through Account Factory.

contents.en: A company has chosen AWS to host a new application. The company needs to implement a multi-account strategy. A DevOps engineer creates a new AWS account and an organization in AWS Organizations. The DevOps engineer also creates the OU structure for the organization and sets up a landing zone by using AWS Control Tower. The DevOps engineer must implement a solution that automatically deploys resources for new accounts that users create through AWS Control Tower Account Factory. When a user creates a new account, the solution must apply AWS CloudFormation templates and SCPs that are customized for the OU or the account to automatically deploy all the resources that are attached to the account. All the OUs are enrolled in AWS Control Tower. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST automated way?
contents.zh: 一家公司选择 AWS 托管一个新应用程序。该公司需要实施多账户策略。DevOps 工程师创建了一个新的 AWS 账户以及 AWS Organizations 中的一个组织。DevOps 工程师还为组织创建了 OU 结构，并使用 AWS Control Tower 设置了 landing zone。DevOps 工程师必须实施一个解决方案，针对用户通过 AWS Control Tower Account Factory 创建的新账户自动部署资源。当用户创建新账户时，该解决方案必须应用针对 OU 或账户自定义的 AWS CloudFormation 模板和 SCPs，以自动部署附加到账户的所有资源。所有 OU 都已注册到 AWS Control Tower。哪种解决方案能以最自动化的方式满足这些要求？

questions.content: An online retail company based in the United States plans to expand its operations to Europe and Asia in the next six months. Its product currently runs on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer. The instances run in an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group across multiple Availability Zones. All data is stored in an Amazon Aurora database instance. When the product is deployed in multiple regions, the company wants a single product catalog across all regions, but for compliance purposes, its customer information and purchases must be kept in each region. How should the company meet these requirements with the LEAST amount of application changes?

options.label: A
options.content: Use Amazon Redshift for the product catalog and Amazon DynamoDB tables for the customer information and purchases.

contents.en: Use Amazon Redshift for the product catalog and Amazon DynamoDB tables for the customer information and purchases.
contents.zh: 将 Amazon Redshift 用于产品目录，并将 Amazon DynamoDB 表用于客户信息和购买记录。

options.label: B
options.content: Use Amazon DynamoDB global tables for the product catalog and regional tables for the customer information and purchases.

contents.en: Use Amazon DynamoDB global tables for the product catalog and regional tables for the customer information and purchases.
contents.zh: 将 Amazon DynamoDB global tables 用于产品目录，并将区域表用于客户信息和购买记录。

options.label: C
options.content: Use Aurora with read replicas for the product catalog and additional local Aurora instances in each region for the customer information and purchases.

contents.en: Use Aurora with read replicas for the product catalog and additional local Aurora instances in each region for the customer information and purchases.
contents.zh: 将 Aurora 与 read replicas 用于产品目录，并在每个区域中为客户信息和购买记录使用额外的本地 Aurora 实例。

options.label: D
options.content: Use Aurora for the product catalog and Amazon DynamoDB global tables for the customer information and purchases.

contents.en: Use Aurora for the product catalog and Amazon DynamoDB global tables for the customer information and purchases.
contents.zh: 将 Aurora 用于产品目录，并将 Amazon DynamoDB global tables 用于客户信息和购买记录。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C。产品目录使用 Aurora 和跨区域 read replicas，可在各区域提供低延迟读取并保持单一产品目录。

客户信息和购买记录使用各区域本地 Aurora 实例，有助于满足客户数据和购买数据留在本区域的要求。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C。产品目录使用 Aurora 和跨区域 read replicas，可在各区域提供低延迟读取并保持单一产品目录。

客户信息和购买记录使用各区域本地 Aurora 实例，有助于满足客户数据和购买数据留在本区域的要求。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: C. Using Aurora read replicas for the product catalog provides low-latency regional reads while keeping a single product catalog.

Using additional local Aurora instances in each Region for customer information and purchases supports the requirement to keep that data in its Region.

contents.en: An online retail company based in the United States plans to expand its operations to Europe and Asia in the next six months. Its product currently runs on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer. The instances run in an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group across multiple Availability Zones. All data is stored in an Amazon Aurora database instance. When the product is deployed in multiple regions, the company wants a single product catalog across all regions, but for compliance purposes, its customer information and purchases must be kept in each region. How should the company meet these requirements with the LEAST amount of application changes?
contents.zh: 一家总部位于美国的在线零售公司计划在未来六个月内将业务扩展到欧洲和亚洲。其产品目前运行在 Application Load Balancer 后面的 Amazon EC2 实例上。这些实例在跨多个 Availability Zones 的 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 组中运行。所有数据都存储在 Amazon Aurora 数据库实例中。当产品部署到多个区域时，公司希望所有区域共享一个产品目录，但出于合规目的，其客户信息和购买记录必须保留在各自区域中。公司应如何以最少的应用程序更改来满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company is implementing a well-architected design for its globally accessible API stack. The design needs to ensure both high reliability and fast response times for users located in North America and Europe. The API stack contains the following three tiers: Amazon API Gateway - AWS Lambda - Amazon DynamoDB - Which solution will meet the requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure Amazon Route 53 to point to API Gateway APIs in North America and Europe using health checks. Configure the APIs to forward requests to a Lambda function in that Region. Configure the Lambda functions to retrieve and update the data in a DynamoDB table in the same Region as the Lambda function.

contents.en: Configure Amazon Route 53 to point to API Gateway APIs in North America and Europe using health checks. Configure the APIs to forward requests to a Lambda function in that Region. Configure the Lambda functions to retrieve and update the data in a DynamoDB table in the same Region as the Lambda function.
contents.zh: 配置 Amazon Route 53 使用运行状况检查指向北美和欧洲的 API Gateway APIs。配置 APIs 将请求转发到该 Region 中的 Lambda 函数。配置 Lambda 函数从与该 Lambda 函数相同 Region 中的 DynamoDB 表检索和更新数据。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure Amazon Route 53 to point to API Gateway APIs in North America and Europe using latency-based routing and health checks. Configure the APIs to forward requests to a Lambda function in that Region. Configure the Lambda functions to retrieve and update the data in a DynamoDB global table.

contents.en: Configure Amazon Route 53 to point to API Gateway APIs in North America and Europe using latency-based routing and health checks. Configure the APIs to forward requests to a Lambda function in that Region. Configure the Lambda functions to retrieve and update the data in a DynamoDB global table.
contents.zh: 配置 Amazon Route 53 使用基于延迟的路由和运行状况检查指向北美和欧洲的 API Gateway APIs。配置 APIs 将请求转发到该 Region 中的 Lambda 函数。配置 Lambda 函数从 DynamoDB global table 检索和更新数据。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure Amazon Route 53 to point to API Gateway in North America, create a disaster recovery API in Europe, and configure both APIs to forward requests to the Lambda functions in that Region. Retrieve the data from a DynamoDB global table. Deploy a Lambda function to check the North America API health every 5 minutes. In the event of a failure, update Route 53 to point to the disaster recovery API.

contents.en: Configure Amazon Route 53 to point to API Gateway in North America, create a disaster recovery API in Europe, and configure both APIs to forward requests to the Lambda functions in that Region. Retrieve the data from a DynamoDB global table. Deploy a Lambda function to check the North America API health every 5 minutes. In the event of a failure, update Route 53 to point to the disaster recovery API.
contents.zh: 配置 Amazon Route 53 指向北美的 API Gateway，在欧洲创建灾难恢复 API，并配置两个 APIs 将请求转发到该 Region 中的 Lambda 函数。从 DynamoDB global table 检索数据。部署一个 Lambda 函数，每 5 分钟检查北美 API 的运行状况。如果发生故障，更新 Route 53 指向灾难恢复 API。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure Amazon Route 53 to point to API Gateway API in North America using latency-based routing. Configure the API to forward requests to the Lambda function in the Region nearest to the user. Configure the Lambda function to retrieve and update the data in a DynamoDB table.

contents.en: Configure Amazon Route 53 to point to API Gateway API in North America using latency-based routing. Configure the API to forward requests to the Lambda function in the Region nearest to the user. Configure the Lambda function to retrieve and update the data in a DynamoDB table.
contents.zh: 配置 Amazon Route 53 使用基于延迟的路由指向北美的 API Gateway API。配置该 API 将请求转发到距离用户最近 Region 中的 Lambda 函数。配置 Lambda 函数从 DynamoDB 表检索和更新数据。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：B。Route 53 latency-based routing 和 health checks 可把北美和欧洲用户引导到更近且健康的 API Gateway API。

各区域 API 转发到本区域 Lambda，Lambda 读写 DynamoDB global table，以兼顾快速响应和高可靠性。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：B。Route 53 latency-based routing 和 health checks 可把北美和欧洲用户引导到更近且健康的 API Gateway API。

各区域 API 转发到本区域 Lambda，Lambda 读写 DynamoDB global table，以兼顾快速响应和高可靠性。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: B. Route 53 latency-based routing and health checks direct North American and European users to the closest healthy API Gateway API.

Each regional API forwards to a Lambda function in that Region, and the functions read and update a DynamoDB global table to support fast responses and high reliability.

contents.en: A company is implementing a well-architected design for its globally accessible API stack. The design needs to ensure both high reliability and fast response times for users located in North America and Europe. The API stack contains the following three tiers: Amazon API Gateway - AWS Lambda - Amazon DynamoDB - Which solution will meet the requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在为其全球可访问的 API 堆栈实施 well-architected 设计。该设计需要确保位于北美和欧洲的用户同时获得高可靠性和快速响应时间。API 堆栈包含以下三层：Amazon API Gateway - AWS Lambda - Amazon DynamoDB - 哪种解决方案可以满足要求？

questions.content: A rapidly growing company wants to scale for developer demand for AWS development environments. Development environments are created manually in the AWS Management Console. The networking team uses AWS CloudFormation to manage the networking infrastructure, exporting stack output values for the Amazon VPC and all subnets. The development environments have common standards, such as Application Load Balancers, Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling groups, security groups, and Amazon DynamoDB tables. To keep up with demand, the DevOps engineer wants to automate the creation of development environments. Because the infrastructure required to support the application is expected to grow, there must be a way to easily update the deployed infrastructure. CloudFormation will be used to create a template for the development environments. Which approach will meet these requirements and quickly provide consistent AWS environments for developers?

options.label: A
options.content: Use Fn::ImportValue intrinsic functions in the Resources section of the template to retrieve Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) and subnet values. Use CloudFormation StackSets for the development environments, using the Count input parameter to indicate the number of environments needed. Use the UpdateStackSet command to update existing development environments.

contents.en: Use Fn::ImportValue intrinsic functions in the Resources section of the template to retrieve Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) and subnet values. Use CloudFormation StackSets for the development environments, using the Count input parameter to indicate the number of environments needed. Use the UpdateStackSet command to update existing development environments.
contents.zh: 在模板的 Resources 部分使用 Fn::ImportValue 内部函数来检索 Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) 和子网值。对开发环境使用 CloudFormation StackSets，并使用 Count 输入参数指示所需环境数量。使用 UpdateStackSet 命令更新现有开发环境。

options.label: B
options.content: Use nested stacks to define common infrastructure components. To access the exported values, use TemplateURL to reference the networking team's template. To retrieve Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) and subnet values, use Fn::ImportValue intrinsic functions in the Parameters section of the root template. Use the CreateChangeSet and ExecuteChangeSet commands to update existing development environments.

contents.en: Use nested stacks to define common infrastructure components. To access the exported values, use TemplateURL to reference the networking team's template. To retrieve Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) and subnet values, use Fn::ImportValue intrinsic functions in the Parameters section of the root template. Use the CreateChangeSet and ExecuteChangeSet commands to update existing development environments.
contents.zh: 使用 nested stacks 定义公共基础设施组件。要访问导出的值，使用 TemplateURL 引用网络团队的模板。要检索 Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) 和子网值，在根模板的 Parameters 部分使用 Fn::ImportValue 内部函数。使用 CreateChangeSet 和 ExecuteChangeSet 命令更新现有开发环境。

options.label: C
options.content: Use nested stacks to define common infrastructure components. Use Fn::ImportValue intrinsic functions with the resources of the nested stack to retrieve Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) and subnet values. Use the CreateChangeSet and ExecuteChangeSet commands to update existing development environments.

contents.en: Use nested stacks to define common infrastructure components. Use Fn::ImportValue intrinsic functions with the resources of the nested stack to retrieve Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) and subnet values. Use the CreateChangeSet and ExecuteChangeSet commands to update existing development environments.
contents.zh: 使用 nested stacks 定义公共基础设施组件。对 nested stack 的资源使用 Fn::ImportValue 内部函数，以检索 Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) 和子网值。使用 CreateChangeSet 和 ExecuteChangeSet 命令更新现有开发环境。

options.label: D
options.content: Use Fn::ImportValue intrinsic functions in the Parameters section of the root template to retrieve Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) and subnet values. Define the development resources in the order they need to be created in the CloudFormation nested stacks. Use the CreateChangeSet. and ExecuteChangeSet commands to update existing development environments.

contents.en: Use Fn::ImportValue intrinsic functions in the Parameters section of the root template to retrieve Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) and subnet values. Define the development resources in the order they need to be created in the CloudFormation nested stacks. Use the CreateChangeSet. and ExecuteChangeSet commands to update existing development environments.
contents.zh: 在根模板的 Parameters 部分使用 Fn::ImportValue 内部函数来检索 Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) 和子网值。按照需要创建的顺序在 CloudFormation nested stacks 中定义开发资源。使用 CreateChangeSet. 和 ExecuteChangeSet 命令更新现有开发环境。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C。用 nested stacks 定义公共基础设施组件，再通过 Fn::ImportValue 引用嵌套栈输出的 VPC 和 subnet 值。

讨论指出参数中不能使用 intrinsic functions；对已有开发环境更新时使用 CreateChangeSet 和 ExecuteChangeSet 更合适。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C。用 nested stacks 定义公共基础设施组件，再通过 Fn::ImportValue 引用嵌套栈输出的 VPC 和 subnet 值。

讨论指出参数中不能使用 intrinsic functions；对已有开发环境更新时使用 CreateChangeSet 和 ExecuteChangeSet 更合适。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: C. Use nested stacks for common infrastructure components, then retrieve VPC and subnet values from stack outputs with Fn::ImportValue.

The discussion notes that intrinsic functions cannot be used in parameters; use CreateChangeSet and ExecuteChangeSet to update existing development environments.

contents.en: A rapidly growing company wants to scale for developer demand for AWS development environments. Development environments are created manually in the AWS Management Console. The networking team uses AWS CloudFormation to manage the networking infrastructure, exporting stack output values for the Amazon VPC and all subnets. The development environments have common standards, such as Application Load Balancers, Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling groups, security groups, and Amazon DynamoDB tables. To keep up with demand, the DevOps engineer wants to automate the creation of development environments. Because the infrastructure required to support the application is expected to grow, there must be a way to easily update the deployed infrastructure. CloudFormation will be used to create a template for the development environments. Which approach will meet these requirements and quickly provide consistent AWS environments for developers?
contents.zh: 一家快速发展的公司希望扩展以满足开发人员对 AWS 开发环境的需求。开发环境目前是在 AWS Management Console 中手动创建的。网络团队使用 AWS CloudFormation 管理网络基础设施，并导出 Amazon VPC 和所有子网的堆栈输出值。开发环境具有共同标准，例如 Application Load Balancers、Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 组、安全组和 Amazon DynamoDB 表。为了跟上需求，DevOps 工程师希望自动创建开发环境。由于支持应用程序所需的基础设施预计会增长，因此必须有一种方法能够轻松更新已部署的基础设施。CloudFormation 将用于为开发环境创建模板。哪种方法可以满足这些要求，并快速为开发人员提供一致的 AWS 环境？

questions.content: A company uses AWS Organizations to manage multiple accounts. Information security policies require that all unencrypted Amazon EBS volumes be marked as non-compliant. A DevOps engineer needs to automatically deploy the solution and ensure that this compliance check is always present. Which solution will accomplish this?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS CloudFormation template that defines an AWS Inspector rule to check whether EBS encryption is enabled. Save the template to an Amazon S3 bucket that has been shared with all accounts within the company. Update the account creation script pointing to the CloudFormation template in Amazon S3.

contents.en: Create an AWS CloudFormation template that defines an AWS Inspector rule to check whether EBS encryption is enabled. Save the template to an Amazon S3 bucket that has been shared with all accounts within the company. Update the account creation script pointing to the CloudFormation template in Amazon S3.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CloudFormation 模板，该模板定义一个 AWS Inspector 规则来检查是否启用了 EBS 加密。将模板保存到已与公司内所有账户共享的 Amazon S3 存储桶。更新账户创建脚本，使其指向 Amazon S3 中的 CloudFormation 模板。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS Config organizational rule to check whether EBS encryption is enabled and deploy the rule using the AWS CLI. Create and apply an SCP to prohibit stopping and deleting AWS Config across the organization.

contents.en: Create an AWS Config organizational rule to check whether EBS encryption is enabled and deploy the rule using the AWS CLI. Create and apply an SCP to prohibit stopping and deleting AWS Config across the organization.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Config organizational rule 来检查是否启用了 EBS 加密，并使用 AWS CLI 部署该规则。创建并应用一个 SCP，以禁止在整个组织中停止和删除 AWS Config。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an SCP in Organizations. Set the policy to prevent the launch of Amazon EC2 instances without encryption on the EBS volumes using a conditional expression. Apply the SCP to all AWS accounts. Use Amazon Athena to analyze the AWS CloudTrail output, looking for events that deny an ec2:RunInstances action.

contents.en: Create an SCP in Organizations. Set the policy to prevent the launch of Amazon EC2 instances without encryption on the EBS volumes using a conditional expression. Apply the SCP to all AWS accounts. Use Amazon Athena to analyze the AWS CloudTrail output, looking for events that deny an ec2:RunInstances action.
contents.zh: 在 Organizations 中创建一个 SCP。使用条件表达式设置策略，防止在 EBS 卷未加密的情况下启动 Amazon EC2 实例。将 SCP 应用于所有 AWS 账户。使用 Amazon Athena 分析 AWS CloudTrail 输出，查找拒绝 ec2:RunInstances 操作的事件。

options.label: D
options.content: Deploy an IAM role to all accounts from a single trusted account. Build a pipeline with AWS CodePipeline with a stage in AWS Lambda to assume the IAM role, and list all EBS volumes in the account. Publish a report to Amazon S3.

contents.en: Deploy an IAM role to all accounts from a single trusted account. Build a pipeline with AWS CodePipeline with a stage in AWS Lambda to assume the IAM role, and list all EBS volumes in the account. Publish a report to Amazon S3.
contents.zh: 从一个受信任账户向所有账户部署 IAM 角色。使用 AWS CodePipeline 构建一条流水线，其中包含 AWS Lambda 阶段来代入该 IAM 角色，并列出账户中的所有 EBS 卷。将报告发布到 Amazon S3。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：B。合规检查适合使用 AWS Config；创建组织级 Config 规则检查 EBS encryption 是否启用，并用 AWS CLI 部署到组织。

再应用 SCP 禁止停止或删除 AWS Config，可帮助保证组织范围内持续合规检测。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：B。合规检查适合使用 AWS Config；创建组织级 Config 规则检查 EBS encryption 是否启用，并用 AWS CLI 部署到组织。

再应用 SCP 禁止停止或删除 AWS Config，可帮助保证组织范围内持续合规检测。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: B. Compliance checks fit AWS Config: create an organizational Config rule to check whether EBS encryption is enabled and deploy it with the AWS CLI.

Apply an SCP that prevents stopping or deleting AWS Config to help keep compliance monitoring active across the organization.

contents.en: A company uses AWS Organizations to manage multiple accounts. Information security policies require that all unencrypted Amazon EBS volumes be marked as non-compliant. A DevOps engineer needs to automatically deploy the solution and ensure that this compliance check is always present. Which solution will accomplish this?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations 管理多个账户。信息安全策略要求将所有未加密的 Amazon EBS 卷标记为不合规。DevOps 工程师需要自动部署该解决方案，并确保该合规性检查始终存在。哪种解决方案可以实现这一点？

questions.content: A company is performing vulnerability scanning for all Amazon EC2 instances across many accounts. The accounts are in an organization in AWS Organizations. Each account's VPCs are attached to a shared transit gateway. The VPCs send traffic to the internet through a central egress VPC. The company has enabled Amazon Inspector in a delegated administrator account and has enabled scanning for all member accounts. A DevOps engineer discovers that some EC2 instances are listed in the "not scanning" tab in Amazon Inspector. Which combination of actions should the DevOps engineer take to resolve this issue? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Verify that AWS Systems Manager Agent is installed and is running on the EC2 instances that Amazon Inspector is not scanning.

contents.en: Verify that AWS Systems Manager Agent is installed and is running on the EC2 instances that Amazon Inspector is not scanning.
contents.zh: 验证 AWS Systems Manager Agent 已安装并正在 Amazon Inspector 未扫描的 EC2 实例上运行。

options.label: B
options.content: Associate the target EC2 instances with security groups that allow outbound communication on port 443 to the AWS Systems Manager service endpoint.

contents.en: Associate the target EC2 instances with security groups that allow outbound communication on port 443 to the AWS Systems Manager service endpoint.
contents.zh: 将目标 EC2 实例与允许通过端口 443 与 AWS Systems Manager 服务端点进行出站通信的安全组关联。

options.label: C
options.content: Grant inspector:StartAssessmentRun permissions to the IAM role that the DevOps engineer is using.

contents.en: Grant inspector:StartAssessmentRun permissions to the IAM role that the DevOps engineer is using.
contents.zh: 向 DevOps 工程师正在使用的 IAM 角色授予 inspector:StartAssessmentRun 权限。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure EC2 Instance Connect for the EC2 instances that Amazon Inspector is not scanning.

contents.en: Configure EC2 Instance Connect for the EC2 instances that Amazon Inspector is not scanning.
contents.zh: 为 Amazon Inspector 未扫描的 EC2 实例配置 EC2 Instance Connect。

options.label: E
options.content: Associate the target EC2 instances with instance profiles that grant permissions to communicate with AWS Systems Manager.

contents.en: Associate the target EC2 instances with instance profiles that grant permissions to communicate with AWS Systems Manager.
contents.zh: 将目标 EC2 实例与授予其与 AWS Systems Manager 通信权限的 instance profiles 关联。

options.label: F
options.content: Create a managed-instance activation. Use the Activation Code and the Activation ID to register the EC2 instances.

contents.en: Create a managed-instance activation. Use the Activation Code and the Activation ID to register the EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 创建一个 managed-instance activation。使用 Activation Code 和 Activation ID 注册 EC2 实例。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：A、B、E。Amazon Inspector 扫描 EC2 需要目标实例上的 Systems Manager Agent 已安装并运行。

实例还需要能通过 443 出站访问 Systems Manager 服务端点，并关联授予与 Systems Manager 通信权限的 instance profile。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：A、B、E。Amazon Inspector 扫描 EC2 需要目标实例上的 Systems Manager Agent 已安装并运行。

实例还需要能通过 443 出站访问 Systems Manager 服务端点，并关联授予与 Systems Manager 通信权限的 instance profile。
explanations.en:
Correct answers: A, B, and E. Amazon Inspector EC2 scanning depends on the Systems Manager Agent being installed and running on the target instances.

The instances also need outbound HTTPS access to the Systems Manager service endpoint and instance profiles that grant permission to communicate with Systems Manager.

contents.en: A company is performing vulnerability scanning for all Amazon EC2 instances across many accounts. The accounts are in an organization in AWS Organizations. Each account's VPCs are attached to a shared transit gateway. The VPCs send traffic to the internet through a central egress VPC. The company has enabled Amazon Inspector in a delegated administrator account and has enabled scanning for all member accounts. A DevOps engineer discovers that some EC2 instances are listed in the "not scanning" tab in Amazon Inspector. Which combination of actions should the DevOps engineer take to resolve this issue? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司正在对多个账户中的所有 Amazon EC2 实例执行漏洞扫描。这些账户位于 AWS Organizations 中的一个组织内。每个账户的 VPC 都附加到一个共享 transit gateway。VPC 通过一个集中式出口 VPC 将流量发送到互联网。该公司已在一个 delegated administrator 账户中启用 Amazon Inspector，并已为所有成员账户启用扫描。DevOps 工程师发现，一些 EC2 实例列在 Amazon Inspector 的“not scanning”选项卡中。DevOps 工程师应采取哪组操作组合来解决此问题？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A development team uses AWS CodeCommit for version control for applications. The development team uses AWS CodePipeline, AWS CodeBuild. and AWS CodeDeploy for CI/CD infrastructure. In CodeCommit, the development team recently merged pull requests that did not pass long-running tests in the code base. The development team needed to perform rollbacks to branches in the codebase, resulting in lost time and wasted effort. A DevOps engineer must automate testing of pull requests in CodeCommit to ensure that reviewers more easily see the results of automated tests as part of the pull request review. What should the DevOps engineer do to meet this requirement?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to the pullRequestStatusChanged event. Create an AWS Lambda function that invokes a CodePipeline pipeline with a CodeBuild action that runs the tests for the application. Program the Lambda function to post the CodeBuild badge as a comment on the pull request so that developers will see the badge in their code review.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to the pullRequestStatusChanged event. Create an AWS Lambda function that invokes a CodePipeline pipeline with a CodeBuild action that runs the tests for the application. Program the Lambda function to post the CodeBuild badge as a comment on the pull request so that developers will see the badge in their code review.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，响应 pullRequestStatusChanged 事件。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，调用带有 CodeBuild 操作的 CodePipeline 流水线来运行应用程序测试。对 Lambda 函数进行编程，将 CodeBuild badge 作为评论发布到拉取请求，以便开发人员在代码审核中看到该 badge。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to the pullRequestCreated event. Create an AWS Lambda function that invokes a CodePipeline pipeline with a CodeBuild action that runs the tests for the application. Program the Lambda function to post the CodeBuild test results as a comment on the pull request when the test results are complete.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to the pullRequestCreated event. Create an AWS Lambda function that invokes a CodePipeline pipeline with a CodeBuild action that runs the tests for the application. Program the Lambda function to post the CodeBuild test results as a comment on the pull request when the test results are complete.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，响应 pullRequestCreated 事件。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，调用带有 CodeBuild 操作的 CodePipeline 流水线来运行应用程序测试。对 Lambda 函数进行编程，在测试结果完成时将 CodeBuild 测试结果作为评论发布到拉取请求。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to pullRequestCreated and pullRequestSourceBranchUpdated events. Create an AWS Lambda function that invokes a CodePipeline pipeline with a CodeBuild action that runs the tests for the application. Program the Lambda function to post the CodeBuild badge as a comment on the pull request so that developers will see the badge in their code review.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to pullRequestCreated and pullRequestSourceBranchUpdated events. Create an AWS Lambda function that invokes a CodePipeline pipeline with a CodeBuild action that runs the tests for the application. Program the Lambda function to post the CodeBuild badge as a comment on the pull request so that developers will see the badge in their code review.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，响应 pullRequestCreated 和 pullRequestSourceBranchUpdated 事件。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，调用带有 CodeBuild 操作的 CodePipeline 流水线来运行应用程序测试。对 Lambda 函数进行编程，将 CodeBuild badge 作为评论发布到拉取请求，以便开发人员在代码审核中看到该 badge。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to the pullRequestStatusChanged event. Create an AWS Lambda function that invokes a CodePipeline pipeline with a CodeBuild action that runs the tests for the application. Program the Lambda function to post the CodeBuild test results as a comment on the pull request when the test results are complete.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to the pullRequestStatusChanged event. Create an AWS Lambda function that invokes a CodePipeline pipeline with a CodeBuild action that runs the tests for the application. Program the Lambda function to post the CodeBuild test results as a comment on the pull request when the test results are complete.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，响应 pullRequestStatusChanged 事件。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，调用带有 CodeBuild 操作的 CodePipeline 流水线来运行应用程序测试。对 Lambda 函数进行编程，在测试结果完成时将 CodeBuild 测试结果作为评论发布到拉取请求。

questions.explanation:
正确答案：C。EventBridge 规则匹配 pullRequestCreated 和 pullRequestSourceBranchUpdated 事件后，可触发 Lambda 启动包含 CodeBuild 测试 action 的 CodePipeline。

Lambda 再把 CodeBuild badge 作为评论发布到 pull request，让开发者在代码评审中看到测试状态。

explanations.zh:
正确答案：C。EventBridge 规则匹配 pullRequestCreated 和 pullRequestSourceBranchUpdated 事件后，可触发 Lambda 启动包含 CodeBuild 测试 action 的 CodePipeline。

Lambda 再把 CodeBuild badge 作为评论发布到 pull request，让开发者在代码评审中看到测试状态。
explanations.en:
Correct answer: C. An EventBridge rule matching pullRequestCreated and pullRequestSourceBranchUpdated can invoke Lambda to start a CodePipeline pipeline with a CodeBuild test action.

The Lambda function can then post the CodeBuild badge as a pull request comment so developers see the test status during review.

contents.en: A development team uses AWS CodeCommit for version control for applications. The development team uses AWS CodePipeline, AWS CodeBuild. and AWS CodeDeploy for CI/CD infrastructure. In CodeCommit, the development team recently merged pull requests that did not pass long-running tests in the code base. The development team needed to perform rollbacks to branches in the codebase, resulting in lost time and wasted effort. A DevOps engineer must automate testing of pull requests in CodeCommit to ensure that reviewers more easily see the results of automated tests as part of the pull request review. What should the DevOps engineer do to meet this requirement?
contents.zh: 一个开发团队使用 AWS CodeCommit 对应用程序进行版本控制。开发团队使用 AWS CodePipeline、AWS CodeBuild 和 AWS CodeDeploy 作为 CI/CD 基础设施。在 CodeCommit 中，开发团队最近合并了一些未通过代码库中长时间运行测试的拉取请求。开发团队不得不对代码库中的分支执行回滚，导致时间损失和精力浪费。DevOps 工程师必须自动化 CodeCommit 中拉取请求的测试，以确保审核人员在拉取请求审核过程中更容易看到自动化测试结果。DevOps 工程师应做什么来满足此要求？

questions.content: A company has deployed an application in a production VPC in a single AWS account. The application is popular and is experiencing heavy usage.
