The company's security team wants to add additional security, such as AWS WAF, to the application deployment. However, the application's product manager is concerned about cost and does not want to approve the change unless the security team can prove that additional security is necessary. The security team believes that some of the application's demand might come from users that have IP addresses that are on a deny list. The security team provides the deny list to a DevOps engineer. If any of the IP addresses on the deny list access the application, the security team wants to receive automated notification in near real time so that the security team can document that the application needs additional security. The DevOps engineer creates a VPC flow log for the production VPC. Which set of additional steps should the DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a log group in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Configure the VPC flow log to capture accepted traffic and to send the data to the log group. Create an Amazon CloudWatch metric filter for IP addresses on the deny list. Create a CloudWatch alarm with the metric filter as input. Set the period to 5 minutes and the datapoints to alarm to 1. Use an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to send alarm notices to the security team.

contents.en: Create a log group in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Configure the VPC flow log to capture accepted traffic and to send the data to the log group. Create an Amazon CloudWatch metric filter for IP addresses on the deny list. Create a CloudWatch alarm with the metric filter as input. Set the period to 5 minutes and the datapoints to alarm to 1. Use an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to send alarm notices to the security team.
contents.zh: 在 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 中创建一个 log group。配置 VPC flow log 捕获 accepted traffic，并将数据发送到该 log group。为拒绝列表上的 IP 地址创建 Amazon CloudWatch metric filter。创建以该 metric filter 作为输入的 CloudWatch alarm。将 period 设置为 5 分钟，并将 datapoints to alarm 设置为 1。使用 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题向安全团队发送警报通知。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket for log files. Configure the VPC flow log to capture all traffic and to send the data to the S3 bucket. Configure Amazon Athena to return all log files in the S3 bucket for IP addresses on the deny list. Configure Amazon QuickSight to accept data from Athena and to publish the data as a dashboard that the security team can access. Create a threshold alert of 1 for successful access. Configure the alert to automatically notify the security team as frequently as possible when the alert threshold is met.

contents.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket for log files. Configure the VPC flow log to capture all traffic and to send the data to the S3 bucket. Configure Amazon Athena to return all log files in the S3 bucket for IP addresses on the deny list. Configure Amazon QuickSight to accept data from Athena and to publish the data as a dashboard that the security team can access. Create a threshold alert of 1 for successful access. Configure the alert to automatically notify the security team as frequently as possible when the alert threshold is met.
contents.zh: 为日志文件创建一个 Amazon S3 存储桶。配置 VPC flow log 捕获所有流量，并将数据发送到 S3 存储桶。配置 Amazon Athena 返回 S3 存储桶中所有包含拒绝列表 IP 地址的日志文件。配置 Amazon QuickSight 接受来自 Athena 的数据，并将数据发布为安全团队可访问的仪表板。为成功访问创建阈值为 1 的警报。配置该警报在达到警报阈值时尽可能频繁地自动通知安全团队。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket for log files. Configure the VPC flow log to capture accepted traffic and to send the data to the S3 bucket. Configure an Amazon OpenSearch Service cluster and domain for the log files. Create an AWS Lambda function to retrieve the logs from the S3 bucket, format the logs, and load the logs into the OpenSearch Service cluster. Schedule the Lambda function to run every 5 minutes. Configure an alert and condition in OpenSearch Service to send alerts to the security team through an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic when access from the IP addresses on the deny list is detected.

contents.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket for log files. Configure the VPC flow log to capture accepted traffic and to send the data to the S3 bucket. Configure an Amazon OpenSearch Service cluster and domain for the log files. Create an AWS Lambda function to retrieve the logs from the S3 bucket, format the logs, and load the logs into the OpenSearch Service cluster. Schedule the Lambda function to run every 5 minutes. Configure an alert and condition in OpenSearch Service to send alerts to the security team through an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic when access from the IP addresses on the deny list is detected.
contents.zh: 为日志文件创建一个 Amazon S3 存储桶。配置 VPC flow log 捕获 accepted traffic，并将数据发送到 S3 存储桶。为日志文件配置 Amazon OpenSearch Service cluster 和 domain。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，从 S3 存储桶检索日志，格式化日志，并将日志加载到 OpenSearch Service cluster。计划 Lambda 函数每 5 分钟运行一次。配置 OpenSearch Service 中的 alert 和 condition，当检测到来自拒绝列表 IP 地址的访问时，通过 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题向安全团队发送警报。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a log group in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Create an Amazon S3 bucket to hold query results. Configure the VPC flow log to capture all traffic and to send the data to the log group. Deploy an Amazon Athena CloudWatch connector in AWS Lambda. Connect the connector to the log group. Configure Athena to periodically query for all accepted traffic from the IP addresses on the deny list and to store the results in the S3 bucket. Configure an S3 event notification to automatically notify the security team through an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic when new objects are added to the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create a log group in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Create an Amazon S3 bucket to hold query results. Configure the VPC flow log to capture all traffic and to send the data to the log group. Deploy an Amazon Athena CloudWatch connector in AWS Lambda. Connect the connector to the log group. Configure Athena to periodically query for all accepted traffic from the IP addresses on the deny list and to store the results in the S3 bucket. Configure an S3 event notification to automatically notify the security team through an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic when new objects are added to the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 在 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 中创建一个 log group。创建一个 Amazon S3 存储桶来保存查询结果。配置 VPC flow log 捕获所有流量，并将数据发送到该 log group。在 AWS Lambda 中部署 Amazon Athena CloudWatch connector。将该 connector 连接到 log group。配置 Athena 定期查询来自拒绝列表 IP 地址的所有 accepted traffic，并将结果存储在 S3 存储桶中。配置 S3 event notification，在新对象添加到 S3 存储桶时通过 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题自动通知安全团队。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。该方案使用 VPC Flow Logs 将已接受流量发送到 CloudWatch Logs，再用针对拒绝列表 IP 的指标筛选器和 CloudWatch 告警触发 SNS 通知，满足监控与告警需求且讨论指出成本最低。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。该方案使用 VPC Flow Logs 将已接受流量发送到 CloudWatch Logs，再用针对拒绝列表 IP 的指标筛选器和 CloudWatch 告警触发 SNS 通知，满足监控与告警需求且讨论指出成本最低。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. This uses VPC Flow Logs to send accepted traffic to CloudWatch Logs, then uses a metric filter for deny-listed IP addresses and a CloudWatch alarm to notify the security team through SNS, meeting the requirements at the lowest cost noted in the discussion.

contents.en: A company has deployed an application in a production VPC in a single AWS account. The application is popular and is experiencing heavy usage. The company's security team wants to add additional security, such as AWS WAF, to the application deployment. However, the application's product manager is concerned about cost and does not want to approve the change unless the security team can prove that additional security is necessary. The security team believes that some of the application's demand might come from users that have IP addresses that are on a deny list. The security team provides the deny list to a DevOps engineer. If any of the IP addresses on the deny list access the application, the security team wants to receive automated notification in near real time so that the security team can document that the application needs additional security. The DevOps engineer creates a VPC flow log for the production VPC. Which set of additional steps should the DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?
contents.zh: 一家公司已在单个 AWS 账户的生产 VPC 中部署了一个应用程序。该应用程序很受欢迎，使用量很高。公司的安全团队希望为应用程序部署添加额外安全措施，例如 AWS WAF。然而，应用程序的产品经理担心成本，除非安全团队能够证明额外安全措施是必要的，否则不愿批准变更。安全团队认为，应用程序的部分需求可能来自 IP 地址在拒绝列表上的用户。安全团队将拒绝列表提供给 DevOps 工程师。如果拒绝列表上的任何 IP 地址访问应用程序，安全团队希望近实时收到自动通知，以便安全团队记录该应用程序需要额外安全措施。DevOps 工程师为生产 VPC 创建了 VPC flow log。DevOps 工程师还应采取哪组步骤来以最具成本效益的方式满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer has automated a web service deployment by using AWS CodePipeline with the following steps: 1. An AWS CodeBuild project compiles the deployment artifact and runs unit tests. 2. An AWS CodeDeploy deployment group deploys the web service to Amazon EC2 instances in the staging environment. 3. A CodeDeploy deployment group deploys the web service to EC2 instances in the production environment. The quality assurance (QA) team requests permission to inspect the build artifact before the deployment to the production environment occurs. The QA team wants to run an internal penetration testing tool to conduct manual tests. The tool will be invoked by a REST API call. Which combination of actions should the DevOps engineer take to fulfill this request? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Insert a manual approval action between the test actions and deployment actions of the pipeline.

contents.en: Insert a manual approval action between the test actions and deployment actions of the pipeline.
contents.zh: 在流水线的测试操作和部署操作之间插入一个手动审批操作。

options.label: B
options.content: Modify the buildspec.yml file for the compilation stage to require manual approval before completion.

contents.en: Modify the buildspec.yml file for the compilation stage to require manual approval before completion.
contents.zh: 修改编译阶段的 buildspec.yml 文件，要求在完成前进行手动审批。

options.label: C
options.content: Update the CodeDeploy deployment groups so that they require manual approval to proceed.

contents.en: Update the CodeDeploy deployment groups so that they require manual approval to proceed.
contents.zh: 更新 CodeDeploy 部署组，使其要求手动审批才能继续。

options.label: D
options.content: Update the pipeline to directly call the REST API for the penetration testing tool.

contents.en: Update the pipeline to directly call the REST API for the penetration testing tool.
contents.zh: 更新流水线，直接调用渗透测试工具的 REST API。

options.label: E
options.content: Update the pipeline to invoke an AWS Lambda function that calls the REST API for the penetration testing tool.

contents.en: Update the pipeline to invoke an AWS Lambda function that calls the REST API for the penetration testing tool.
contents.zh: 更新流水线，调用一个 AWS Lambda 函数，由该函数调用渗透测试工具的 REST API。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A 和 E。A 在测试和生产部署之间加入手动审批，让 QA 团队可以检查构建产物；E 通过 Lambda 调用渗透测试工具的 REST API，使测试可在流水线中自动执行。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A 和 E。A 在测试和生产部署之间加入手动审批，让 QA 团队可以检查构建产物；E 通过 Lambda 调用渗透测试工具的 REST API，使测试可在流水线中自动执行。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A and E. A adds a manual approval between testing and production deployment so QA can inspect the artifact, while E invokes a Lambda function to call the penetration testing tool's REST API and run those tests automatically in the pipeline.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer has automated a web service deployment by using AWS CodePipeline with the following steps: 1. An AWS CodeBuild project compiles the deployment artifact and runs unit tests. 2. An AWS CodeDeploy deployment group deploys the web service to Amazon EC2 instances in the staging environment. 3. A CodeDeploy deployment group deploys the web service to EC2 instances in the production environment. The quality assurance (QA) team requests permission to inspect the build artifact before the deployment to the production environment occurs. The QA team wants to run an internal penetration testing tool to conduct manual tests. The tool will be invoked by a REST API call. Which combination of actions should the DevOps engineer take to fulfill this request? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: DevOps 工程师已使用 AWS CodePipeline 自动化 Web 服务部署，步骤如下：1. AWS CodeBuild 项目编译部署构件并运行单元测试。2. AWS CodeDeploy 部署组将 Web 服务部署到预发布环境中的 Amazon EC2 实例。3. CodeDeploy 部署组将 Web 服务部署到生产环境中的 EC2 实例。质量保证 (QA) 团队请求在部署到生产环境之前检查构建构件的权限。QA 团队希望运行一个内部渗透测试工具来执行手动测试。该工具将通过 REST API 调用调用。DevOps 工程师应采取哪组操作组合来满足此请求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company is hosting a web application in an AWS Region. For disaster recovery purposes, a second region is being used as a standby. Disaster recovery requirements state that session data must be replicated between regions in near-real time and 1% of requests should route to the secondary region to continuously verify system functionality. Additionally, if there is a disruption in service in the main region, traffic should be automatically routed to the secondary region, and the secondary region must be able to scale up to handle all traffic. How should a DevOps engineer meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: In both regions, deploy the application on AWS Elastic Beanstalk and use Amazon DynamoDB global tables for session data. Use an Amazon Route 53 weighted routing policy with health checks to distribute the traffic across the regions.

contents.en: In both regions, deploy the application on AWS Elastic Beanstalk and use Amazon DynamoDB global tables for session data. Use an Amazon Route 53 weighted routing policy with health checks to distribute the traffic across the regions.
contents.zh: 在两个区域中，将应用程序部署在 AWS Elastic Beanstalk 上，并使用 Amazon DynamoDB global tables 存储 session 数据。使用带有运行状况检查的 Amazon Route 53 weighted routing policy 在区域之间分配流量。

options.label: B
options.content: In both regions, launch the application in Auto Scaling groups and use DynamoDB for session data. Use a Route 53 failover routing policy with health checks to distribute the traffic across the regions.

contents.en: In both regions, launch the application in Auto Scaling groups and use DynamoDB for session data. Use a Route 53 failover routing policy with health checks to distribute the traffic across the regions.
contents.zh: 在两个区域中，在 Auto Scaling groups 中启动应用程序，并使用 DynamoDB 存储 session 数据。使用带有运行状况检查的 Route 53 failover routing policy 在区域之间分配流量。

options.label: C
options.content: In both regions, deploy the application in AWS Lambda, exposed by Amazon API Gateway, and use Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL with cross-region replication for session data. Deploy the web application with client-side logic to call the API Gateway directly.

contents.en: In both regions, deploy the application in AWS Lambda, exposed by Amazon API Gateway, and use Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL with cross-region replication for session data. Deploy the web application with client-side logic to call the API Gateway directly.
contents.zh: 在两个区域中，将应用程序部署在 AWS Lambda 中，并通过 Amazon API Gateway 暴露，使用具有跨区域复制的 Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL 存储 session 数据。部署带有客户端逻辑的 Web 应用程序，以直接调用 API Gateway。

options.label: D
options.content: In both regions, launch the application in Auto Scaling groups and use DynamoDB global tables for session data. Enable an Amazon CloudFront weighted distribution across regions. Point the Amazon Route 53 DNS record at the CloudFront distribution.

contents.en: In both regions, launch the application in Auto Scaling groups and use DynamoDB global tables for session data. Enable an Amazon CloudFront weighted distribution across regions. Point the Amazon Route 53 DNS record at the CloudFront distribution.
contents.zh: 在两个区域中，在 Auto Scaling groups 中启动应用程序，并使用 DynamoDB global tables 存储 session 数据。启用跨区域的 Amazon CloudFront weighted distribution。将 Amazon Route 53 DNS 记录指向 CloudFront distribution。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。该方案在两个区域部署 Elastic Beanstalk，并使用 DynamoDB global tables 保存会话数据；Route 53 加权路由和健康检查可在区域之间分配流量并支持故障处理。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。该方案在两个区域部署 Elastic Beanstalk，并使用 DynamoDB global tables 保存会话数据；Route 53 加权路由和健康检查可在区域之间分配流量并支持故障处理。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. Deploying Elastic Beanstalk in both Regions with DynamoDB global tables for session data supports regional operation, and Route 53 weighted routing with health checks distributes traffic across the Regions.

contents.en: A company is hosting a web application in an AWS Region. For disaster recovery purposes, a second region is being used as a standby. Disaster recovery requirements state that session data must be replicated between regions in near-real time and 1% of requests should route to the secondary region to continuously verify system functionality. Additionally, if there is a disruption in service in the main region, traffic should be automatically routed to the secondary region, and the secondary region must be able to scale up to handle all traffic. How should a DevOps engineer meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司在一个 AWS Region 中托管 Web 应用程序。出于灾难恢复目的，第二个区域被用作备用区域。灾难恢复要求规定，session 数据必须在区域之间近实时复制，并且 1% 的请求应路由到辅助区域，以持续验证系统功能。此外，如果主区域发生服务中断，流量应自动路由到辅助区域，并且辅助区域必须能够扩展以处理所有流量。DevOps 工程师应如何满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company runs an application on Amazon EC2 instances. The company uses a series of AWS CloudFormation stacks to define the application resources. A developer performs updates by building and testing the application on a laptop and then uploading the build output and CloudFormation stack templates to Amazon S3. The developer's peers review the changes before the developer performs the CloudFormation stack update and installs a new version of the application onto the EC2 instances. The deployment process is prone to errors and is time-consuming when the developer updates each EC2 instance with the new application. The company wants to automate as much of the application deployment process as possible while retaining a final manual approval step before the modification of the application or resources. The company already has moved the source code for the application and the CloudFormation templates to AWS CodeCommit. The company also has created an AWS CodeBuild project to build and test the application. Which combination of steps will meet the company's requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an application group and a deployment group in AWS CodeDeploy. Install the CodeDeploy agent on the EC2 instances.

contents.en: Create an application group and a deployment group in AWS CodeDeploy. Install the CodeDeploy agent on the EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 在 AWS CodeDeploy 中创建 application group 和 deployment group。在 EC2 实例上安装 CodeDeploy agent。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an application revision and a deployment group in AWS CodeDeploy. Create an environment in CodeDeploy. Register the EC2 instances to the CodeDeploy environment.

contents.en: Create an application revision and a deployment group in AWS CodeDeploy. Create an environment in CodeDeploy. Register the EC2 instances to the CodeDeploy environment.
contents.zh: 在 AWS CodeDeploy 中创建 application revision 和 deployment group。在 CodeDeploy 中创建 environment。将 EC2 实例注册到 CodeDeploy environment。

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS CodePipeline to invoke the CodeBuild job, run the CloudFormation update, and pause for a manual approval step. After approval, start the AWS CodeDeploy deployment.

contents.en: Use AWS CodePipeline to invoke the CodeBuild job, run the CloudFormation update, and pause for a manual approval step. After approval, start the AWS CodeDeploy deployment.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CodePipeline 调用 CodeBuild 作业，运行 CloudFormation 更新，并暂停以执行手动审批步骤。审批后，启动 AWS CodeDeploy 部署。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS CodePipeline to invoke the CodeBuild job, create CloudFormation change sets for each of the application stacks, and pause for a manual approval step. After approval, run the CloudFormation change sets and start the AWS CodeDeploy deployment.

contents.en: Use AWS CodePipeline to invoke the CodeBuild job, create CloudFormation change sets for each of the application stacks, and pause for a manual approval step. After approval, run the CloudFormation change sets and start the AWS CodeDeploy deployment.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CodePipeline 调用 CodeBuild 作业，为每个应用程序堆栈创建 CloudFormation change sets，并暂停以执行手动审批步骤。审批后，运行 CloudFormation change sets 并启动 AWS CodeDeploy 部署。

options.label: E
options.content: Use AWS CodePipeline to invoke the CodeBuild job, create CloudFormation change sets for each of the application stacks, and pause for a manual approval step. After approval, start the AWS CodeDeploy deployment.

contents.en: Use AWS CodePipeline to invoke the CodeBuild job, create CloudFormation change sets for each of the application stacks, and pause for a manual approval step. After approval, start the AWS CodeDeploy deployment.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CodePipeline 调用 CodeBuild 作业，为每个应用程序堆栈创建 CloudFormation change sets，并暂停以执行手动审批步骤。审批后，启动 AWS CodeDeploy 部署。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A 和 D。A 为 EC2 实例部署准备 CodeDeploy 应用和部署组并安装代理；D 用 CodePipeline 编排 CodeBuild、CloudFormation change set、手动审批以及 CodeDeploy 部署。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A 和 D。A 为 EC2 实例部署准备 CodeDeploy 应用和部署组并安装代理；D 用 CodePipeline 编排 CodeBuild、CloudFormation change set、手动审批以及 CodeDeploy 部署。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A and D. A sets up CodeDeploy with an application, deployment group, and agent on the EC2 instances. D uses CodePipeline to orchestrate CodeBuild, CloudFormation change sets, manual approval, and the final CodeDeploy deployment.

contents.en: A company runs an application on Amazon EC2 instances. The company uses a series of AWS CloudFormation stacks to define the application resources. A developer performs updates by building and testing the application on a laptop and then uploading the build output and CloudFormation stack templates to Amazon S3. The developer's peers review the changes before the developer performs the CloudFormation stack update and installs a new version of the application onto the EC2 instances. The deployment process is prone to errors and is time-consuming when the developer updates each EC2 instance with the new application. The company wants to automate as much of the application deployment process as possible while retaining a final manual approval step before the modification of the application or resources. The company already has moved the source code for the application and the CloudFormation templates to AWS CodeCommit. The company also has created an AWS CodeBuild project to build and test the application. Which combination of steps will meet the company's requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司在 Amazon EC2 实例上运行一个应用程序。该公司使用一系列 AWS CloudFormation 堆栈来定义应用程序资源。开发人员通过在笔记本电脑上构建和测试应用程序，然后将构建输出和 CloudFormation 堆栈模板上传到 Amazon S3 来执行更新。在开发人员执行 CloudFormation 堆栈更新并将新版本应用程序安装到 EC2 实例之前，开发人员的同事会审核这些更改。当开发人员使用新应用程序更新每个 EC2 实例时，部署过程容易出错且耗时。公司希望尽可能自动化应用程序部署过程，同时在修改应用程序或资源之前保留最终手动审批步骤。公司已将应用程序源代码和 CloudFormation 模板移动到 AWS CodeCommit。公司还创建了一个 AWS CodeBuild 项目来构建和测试应用程序。哪组步骤组合可以满足公司的要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A DevOps engineer manages a web application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The instances run in an EC2 Auto Scaling group across multiple Availability Zones. The engineer needs to implement a deployment strategy that: Launches a second fleet of instances with the same capacity as the original fleet. Maintains the original fleet unchanged while the second fleet is launched. Transitions traffic to the second fleet when the second fleet is fully deployed. Terminates the original fleet automatically 1 hour after transition. Which solution will satisfy these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use an AWS CloudFormation template with a retention policy for the ALB set to 1 hour. Update the Amazon Route 53 record to reflect the new ALB.

contents.en: Use an AWS CloudFormation template with a retention policy for the ALB set to 1 hour. Update the Amazon Route 53 record to reflect the new ALB.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CloudFormation 模板，并将 ALB 的 retention policy 设置为 1 小时。更新 Amazon Route 53 记录以反映新的 ALB。

options.label: B
options.content: Use two AWS Elastic Beanstalk environments to perform a blue/green deployment from the original environment to the new one. Create an application version lifecycle policy to terminate the original environment in 1 hour.

contents.en: Use two AWS Elastic Beanstalk environments to perform a blue/green deployment from the original environment to the new one. Create an application version lifecycle policy to terminate the original environment in 1 hour.
contents.zh: 使用两个 AWS Elastic Beanstalk environments，从原始环境到新环境执行 blue/green deployment。创建 application version lifecycle policy，在 1 小时内终止原始环境。

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS CodeDeploy with a deployment group configured with a blue/green deployment configuration Select the option Terminate the original instances in the deployment group with a waiting period of 1 hour.

contents.en: Use AWS CodeDeploy with a deployment group configured with a blue/green deployment configuration Select the option Terminate the original instances in the deployment group with a waiting period of 1 hour.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CodeDeploy，并将部署组配置为 blue/green deployment configuration。选择 Terminate the original instances in the deployment group with a waiting period of 1 hour 选项。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS Elastic Beanstalk with the configuration set to Immutable. Create an .ebextension using the Resources key that sets the deletion policy of the ALB to 1 hour, and deploy the application.

contents.en: Use AWS Elastic Beanstalk with the configuration set to Immutable. Create an .ebextension using the Resources key that sets the deletion policy of the ALB to 1 hour, and deploy the application.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Elastic Beanstalk，并将配置设置为 Immutable。创建一个 .ebextension，使用 Resources 键将 ALB 的 deletion policy 设置为 1 小时，然后部署应用程序。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。CodeDeploy 的蓝/绿部署会启动第二组实例，并可将原始实例保持 1 小时后再终止，符合保留原始环境一段时间的要求。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。CodeDeploy 的蓝/绿部署会启动第二组实例，并可将原始实例保持 1 小时后再终止，符合保留原始环境一段时间的要求。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. A CodeDeploy blue/green deployment can launch the replacement fleet and use the option to terminate the original instances after a 1-hour waiting period, matching the requirement to keep the original fleet temporarily.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer manages a web application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The instances run in an EC2 Auto Scaling group across multiple Availability Zones. The engineer needs to implement a deployment strategy that: Launches a second fleet of instances with the same capacity as the original fleet. Maintains the original fleet unchanged while the second fleet is launched. Transitions traffic to the second fleet when the second fleet is fully deployed. Terminates the original fleet automatically 1 hour after transition. Which solution will satisfy these requirements?
contents.zh: DevOps 工程师管理一个运行在 Application Load Balancer (ALB) 后面的 Amazon EC2 实例上的 Web 应用程序。这些实例在跨多个 Availability Zones 的 EC2 Auto Scaling 组中运行。工程师需要实施一种部署策略，该策略：启动第二组实例，其容量与原始实例组相同。在启动第二组实例时保持原始实例组不变。当第二组实例完全部署后，将流量切换到第二组实例。切换后 1 小时自动终止原始实例组。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A video-sharing company stores its videos in Amazon S3. The company has observed a sudden increase in video access requests, but the company does not know which videos are most popular. The company needs to identify the general access pattern for the video files. This pattern includes the number of users who access a certain file on a given day, as well as the number of pull requests for certain files. How can the company meet these requirements with the LEAST amount of effort?

options.label: A
options.content: Activate S3 server access logging. Import the access logs into an Amazon Aurora database. Use an Aurora SQL query to analyze the access patterns.

contents.en: Activate S3 server access logging. Import the access logs into an Amazon Aurora database. Use an Aurora SQL query to analyze the access patterns.
contents.zh: 启用 S3 server access logging。将访问日志导入 Amazon Aurora 数据库。使用 Aurora SQL 查询分析访问模式。

options.label: B
options.content: Activate S3 server access logging. Use Amazon Athena to create an external table with the log files. Use Athena to create a SQL query to analyze the access patterns.

contents.en: Activate S3 server access logging. Use Amazon Athena to create an external table with the log files. Use Athena to create a SQL query to analyze the access patterns.
contents.zh: 启用 S3 server access logging。使用 Amazon Athena 通过日志文件创建外部表。使用 Athena 创建 SQL 查询来分析访问模式。

options.label: C
options.content: Invoke an AWS Lambda function for every S3 object access event. Configure the Lambda function to write the file access information, such as user. S3 bucket, and file key, to an Amazon Aurora database. Use an Aurora SQL query to analyze the access patterns.

contents.en: Invoke an AWS Lambda function for every S3 object access event. Configure the Lambda function to write the file access information, such as user. S3 bucket, and file key, to an Amazon Aurora database. Use an Aurora SQL query to analyze the access patterns.
contents.zh: 为每个 S3 对象访问事件调用 AWS Lambda 函数。配置 Lambda 函数将文件访问信息（例如 user、S3 bucket 和 file key）写入 Amazon Aurora 数据库。使用 Aurora SQL 查询分析访问模式。

options.label: D
options.content: Record an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log message for every S3 object access event. Configure a CloudWatch Logs log stream to write the file access information, such as user, S3 bucket, and file key, to an Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics for SQL application. Perform a sliding window analysis.

contents.en: Record an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log message for every S3 object access event. Configure a CloudWatch Logs log stream to write the file access information, such as user, S3 bucket, and file key, to an Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics for SQL application. Perform a sliding window analysis.
contents.zh: 为每个 S3 对象访问事件记录一条 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 日志消息。配置 CloudWatch Logs log stream，将文件访问信息（例如 user、S3 bucket 和 file key）写入 Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics for SQL application。执行 sliding window analysis。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。启用 S3 server access logging 后，Athena 可以基于日志文件创建外部表并用 SQL 分析访问模式，讨论中也指出 Athena 适合分析 S3 中的数据。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。启用 S3 server access logging 后，Athena 可以基于日志文件创建外部表并用 SQL 分析访问模式，讨论中也指出 Athena 适合分析 S3 中的数据。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. S3 server access logging captures the access data, and Athena can create an external table over those logs and query access patterns with SQL, which matches the discussion.

contents.en: A video-sharing company stores its videos in Amazon S3. The company has observed a sudden increase in video access requests, but the company does not know which videos are most popular. The company needs to identify the general access pattern for the video files. This pattern includes the number of users who access a certain file on a given day, as well as the number of pull requests for certain files. How can the company meet these requirements with the LEAST amount of effort?
contents.zh: 一家视频共享公司将其视频存储在 Amazon S3 中。该公司观察到视频访问请求突然增加，但不知道哪些视频最受欢迎。公司需要识别视频文件的一般访问模式。该模式包括在给定日期访问某个文件的用户数量，以及某些文件的拉取请求数量。公司如何以最少的工作量满足这些要求？

questions.content: A development team wants to use AWS CloudFormation stacks to deploy an application. However, the developer IAM role does not have the required permissions to provision the resources that are specified in the AWS CloudFormation template. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a solution that allows the developers to deploy the stacks. The solution must follow the principle of least privilege. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an IAM policy that allows the developers to provision the required resources. Attach the policy to the developer IAM role.

contents.en: Create an IAM policy that allows the developers to provision the required resources. Attach the policy to the developer IAM role.
contents.zh: 创建一个 IAM policy，允许开发人员预置所需资源。将该 policy 附加到开发人员 IAM 角色。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an IAM policy that allows full access to AWS CloudFormation. Attach the policy to the developer IAM role.

contents.en: Create an IAM policy that allows full access to AWS CloudFormation. Attach the policy to the developer IAM role.
contents.zh: 创建一个 IAM policy，允许对 AWS CloudFormation 的完全访问。将该 policy 附加到开发人员 IAM 角色。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS CloudFormation service role that has the required permissions. Grant the developer IAM role a cloudformation:* action. Use the new service role during stack deployments.

contents.en: Create an AWS CloudFormation service role that has the required permissions. Grant the developer IAM role a cloudformation:* action. Use the new service role during stack deployments.
contents.zh: 创建一个具有所需权限的 AWS CloudFormation service role。授予开发人员 IAM 角色 cloudformation:* 操作权限。在堆栈部署期间使用新的 service role。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS CloudFormation service role that has the required permissions. Grant the developer IAM role the iam:PassRole permission. Use the new service role during stack deployments.

contents.en: Create an AWS CloudFormation service role that has the required permissions. Grant the developer IAM role the iam:PassRole permission. Use the new service role during stack deployments.
contents.zh: 创建一个具有所需权限的 AWS CloudFormation service role。授予开发人员 IAM 角色 iam:PassRole 权限。在堆栈部署期间使用新的 service role。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。使用具有所需权限的 CloudFormation 服务角色，并授予开发者角色 iam:PassRole，使开发者可在堆栈部署时传递该服务角色而不直接拥有全部权限。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。使用具有所需权限的 CloudFormation 服务角色，并授予开发者角色 iam:PassRole，使开发者可在堆栈部署时传递该服务角色而不直接拥有全部权限。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. A CloudFormation service role holds the required deployment permissions, and granting the developer role iam:PassRole lets developers use that role during stack deployments.

contents.en: A development team wants to use AWS CloudFormation stacks to deploy an application. However, the developer IAM role does not have the required permissions to provision the resources that are specified in the AWS CloudFormation template. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a solution that allows the developers to deploy the stacks. The solution must follow the principle of least privilege. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 开发团队希望使用 AWS CloudFormation 堆栈部署应用程序。但是，开发人员 IAM 角色没有预置 AWS CloudFormation 模板中指定资源所需的权限。DevOps 工程师需要实施一个解决方案，允许开发人员部署堆栈。该解决方案必须遵循最小权限原则。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A production account has a requirement that any Amazon EC2 instance that has been logged in to manually must be terminated within 24 hours. All applications in the production account are using Auto Scaling groups with the Amazon CloudWatch Logs agent configured. How can this process be automated?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a CloudWatch Logs subscription to an AWS Step Functions application. Configure an AWS Lambda function to add a tag to the EC2 instance that produced the login event and mark the instance to be decommissioned. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke a second Lambda function once a day that will terminate all instances with this tag.

contents.en: Create a CloudWatch Logs subscription to an AWS Step Functions application. Configure an AWS Lambda function to add a tag to the EC2 instance that produced the login event and mark the instance to be decommissioned. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke a second Lambda function once a day that will terminate all instances with this tag.
contents.zh: 创建一个到 AWS Step Functions 应用程序的 CloudWatch Logs 订阅。配置一个 AWS Lambda 函数，为产生登录事件的 EC2 实例添加标签，并将该实例标记为待停用。创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，每天调用第二个 Lambda 函数来终止所有带有该标签的实例。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm that will be invoked by the login event. Send the notification to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic that the operations team is subscribed to, and have them terminate the EC2 instance within 24 hours.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm that will be invoked by the login event. Send the notification to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic that the operations team is subscribed to, and have them terminate the EC2 instance within 24 hours.
contents.zh: 创建一个由登录事件调用的 Amazon CloudWatch alarm。将通知发送到运维团队订阅的 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题，并让他们在 24 小时内终止 EC2 实例。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm that will be invoked by the login event. Configure the alarm to send to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Use a group of worker instances to process messages from the queue, which then schedules an Amazon EventBridge rule to be invoked.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm that will be invoked by the login event. Configure the alarm to send to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Use a group of worker instances to process messages from the queue, which then schedules an Amazon EventBridge rule to be invoked.
contents.zh: 创建一个由登录事件调用的 Amazon CloudWatch alarm。配置 alarm 发送到 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列。使用一组 worker instances 处理队列中的消息，然后安排调用 Amazon EventBridge 规则。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a CloudWatch Logs subscription to an AWS Lambda function. Configure the function to add a tag to the EC2 instance that produced the login event and mark the instance to be decommissioned. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke a daily Lambda function that terminates all instances with this tag.

contents.en: Create a CloudWatch Logs subscription to an AWS Lambda function. Configure the function to add a tag to the EC2 instance that produced the login event and mark the instance to be decommissioned. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke a daily Lambda function that terminates all instances with this tag.
contents.zh: 创建一个到 AWS Lambda 函数的 CloudWatch Logs 订阅。配置该函数为产生登录事件的 EC2 实例添加标签，并将该实例标记为待停用。创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，调用每日 Lambda 函数来终止所有带有该标签的实例。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。该方案用 CloudWatch Logs subscription 触发 Lambda 标记产生登录事件的 EC2 实例，再由每日 EventBridge 规则调用 Lambda 终止带有该标记的实例。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。该方案用 CloudWatch Logs subscription 触发 Lambda 标记产生登录事件的 EC2 实例，再由每日 EventBridge 规则调用 Lambda 终止带有该标记的实例。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. The CloudWatch Logs subscription invokes Lambda to tag the EC2 instance that produced the login event, and a daily EventBridge rule invokes another Lambda process to terminate instances with that tag.

contents.en: A production account has a requirement that any Amazon EC2 instance that has been logged in to manually must be terminated within 24 hours. All applications in the production account are using Auto Scaling groups with the Amazon CloudWatch Logs agent configured. How can this process be automated?
contents.zh: 生产账户有一项要求：任何被手动登录过的 Amazon EC2 实例必须在 24 小时内终止。生产账户中的所有应用程序都使用配置了 Amazon CloudWatch Logs agent 的 Auto Scaling groups。如何自动化此流程？

questions.content: A company has enabled all features for its organization in AWS Organizations. The organization contains 10 AWS accounts. The company has turned on AWS CloudTrail in all the accounts. The company expects the number of AWS accounts in the organization to increase to 500 during the next year. The company plans to use multiple OUs for these accounts. The company has enabled AWS Config in each existing AWS account in the organization. A DevOps engineer must implement a solution that enables AWS Config automatically for all future AWS accounts that are created in the organization. Which solution will meet this requirement?

options.label: A
options.content: In the organization's management account, create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to a CreateAccount API call. Configure the rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function that enables trusted access to AWS Config for the organization.

contents.en: In the organization's management account, create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to a CreateAccount API call. Configure the rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function that enables trusted access to AWS Config for the organization.
contents.zh: 在组织的管理账户中，创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，响应 CreateAccount API 调用。配置该规则调用 AWS Lambda 函数，为组织启用 AWS Config 的 trusted access。

options.label: B
options.content: In the organization's management account, create an AWS CloudFormation stack set to enable AWS Config. Configure the stack set to deploy automatically when an account is created through Organizations.

contents.en: In the organization's management account, create an AWS CloudFormation stack set to enable AWS Config. Configure the stack set to deploy automatically when an account is created through Organizations.
contents.zh: 在组织的管理账户中，创建一个 AWS CloudFormation stack set 来启用 AWS Config。配置该 stack set 在通过 Organizations 创建账户时自动部署。

options.label: C
options.content: In the organization's management account, create an SCP that allows the appropriate AWS Config API calls to enable AWS Config. Apply the SCP to the root-level OU.

contents.en: In the organization's management account, create an SCP that allows the appropriate AWS Config API calls to enable AWS Config. Apply the SCP to the root-level OU.
contents.zh: 在组织的管理账户中，创建一个 SCP，允许适当的 AWS Config API 调用以启用 AWS Config。将该 SCP 应用于根级 OU。

options.label: D
options.content: In the organization's management account, create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to a CreateAccount API call. Configure the rule to invoke an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to enable AWS Config for the account.

contents.en: In the organization's management account, create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to a CreateAccount API call. Configure the rule to invoke an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to enable AWS Config for the account.
contents.zh: 在组织的管理账户中，创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，响应 CreateAccount API 调用。配置该规则调用 AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook，为该账户启用 AWS Config。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。CloudFormation StackSets 可从组织管理账户向成员账户部署 AWS Config，并配置为在通过 Organizations 创建新账户时自动部署，从而覆盖未来账户。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。CloudFormation StackSets 可从组织管理账户向成员账户部署 AWS Config，并配置为在通过 Organizations 创建新账户时自动部署，从而覆盖未来账户。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. A CloudFormation StackSet from the management account can enable AWS Config across accounts and automatically deploy when new accounts are created through Organizations.

contents.en: A company has enabled all features for its organization in AWS Organizations. The organization contains 10 AWS accounts. The company has turned on AWS CloudTrail in all the accounts. The company expects the number of AWS accounts in the organization to increase to 500 during the next year. The company plans to use multiple OUs for these accounts. The company has enabled AWS Config in each existing AWS account in the organization. A DevOps engineer must implement a solution that enables AWS Config automatically for all future AWS accounts that are created in the organization. Which solution will meet this requirement?
contents.zh: 一家公司已为其 AWS Organizations 中的组织启用所有功能。该组织包含 10 个 AWS 账户。公司已在所有账户中启用 AWS CloudTrail。公司预计组织中的 AWS 账户数量将在下一年增加到 500 个。公司计划为这些账户使用多个 OU。公司已在组织中的每个现有 AWS 账户中启用 AWS Config。DevOps 工程师必须实施一个解决方案，为组织中未来创建的所有 AWS 账户自动启用 AWS Config。哪种解决方案可以满足此要求？

questions.content: A company has many applications. Different teams in the company developed the applications by using multiple languages and frameworks. The applications run on premises and on different servers with different operating systems. Each team has its own release protocol and process. The company wants to reduce the complexity of the release and maintenance of these applications. The company is migrating its technology stacks, including these applications, to AWS. The company wants centralized control of source code, a consistent and automatic delivery pipeline, and as few maintenance tasks as possible on the underlying infrastructure. What should a DevOps engineer do to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create one AWS CodeCommit repository for all applications. Put each application's code in a different branch. Merge the branches, and use AWS CodeBuild to build the applications. Use AWS CodeDeploy to deploy the applications to one centralized application server.

contents.en: Create one AWS CodeCommit repository for all applications. Put each application's code in a different branch. Merge the branches, and use AWS CodeBuild to build the applications. Use AWS CodeDeploy to deploy the applications to one centralized application server.
contents.zh: 为所有应用程序创建一个 AWS CodeCommit 存储库。将每个应用程序的代码放在不同分支中。合并这些分支，并使用 AWS CodeBuild 构建应用程序。使用 AWS CodeDeploy 将应用程序部署到一个集中式应用服务器。

options.label: B
options.content: Create one AWS CodeCommit repository for each of the applications. Use AWS CodeBuild to build the applications one at a time. Use AWS CodeDeploy to deploy the applications to one centralized application server.

contents.en: Create one AWS CodeCommit repository for each of the applications. Use AWS CodeBuild to build the applications one at a time. Use AWS CodeDeploy to deploy the applications to one centralized application server.
contents.zh: 为每个应用程序创建一个 AWS CodeCommit 存储库。使用 AWS CodeBuild 逐个构建应用程序。使用 AWS CodeDeploy 将应用程序部署到一个集中式应用服务器。

options.label: C
options.content: Create one AWS CodeCommit repository for each of the applications. Use AWS CodeBuild to build the applications one at a time and to create one AMI for each server. Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to automatically provision and decommission Amazon EC2 fleets by using these AMIs.

contents.en: Create one AWS CodeCommit repository for each of the applications. Use AWS CodeBuild to build the applications one at a time and to create one AMI for each server. Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to automatically provision and decommission Amazon EC2 fleets by using these AMIs.
contents.zh: 为每个应用程序创建一个 AWS CodeCommit 存储库。使用 AWS CodeBuild 逐个构建应用程序，并为每台服务器创建一个 AMI。使用 AWS CloudFormation StackSets 通过这些 AMIs 自动预置和停用 Amazon EC2 fleets。

options.label: D
options.content: Create one AWS CodeCommit repository for each of the applications. Use AWS CodeBuild to build one Docker image for each application in Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR). Use AWS CodeDeploy to deploy the applications to Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) on infrastructure that AWS Fargate manages.

contents.en: Create one AWS CodeCommit repository for each of the applications. Use AWS CodeBuild to build one Docker image for each application in Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR). Use AWS CodeDeploy to deploy the applications to Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) on infrastructure that AWS Fargate manages.
contents.zh: 为每个应用程序创建一个 AWS CodeCommit 存储库。使用 AWS CodeBuild 为 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) 中的每个应用程序构建一个 Docker image。使用 AWS CodeDeploy 将应用程序部署到由 AWS Fargate 管理基础设施的 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。每个应用使用独立 CodeCommit 仓库和 CodeBuild 构建镜像，镜像存入 ECR，再通过 CodeDeploy 部署到由 Fargate 管理的 ECS，提供集中代码控制、自动交付和较低维护量。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。每个应用使用独立 CodeCommit 仓库和 CodeBuild 构建镜像，镜像存入 ECR，再通过 CodeDeploy 部署到由 Fargate 管理的 ECS，提供集中代码控制、自动交付和较低维护量。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. Separate CodeCommit repositories and CodeBuild image builds provide controlled source and consistent delivery, while ECR, ECS, CodeDeploy, and Fargate reduce operational maintenance.

contents.en: A company has many applications. Different teams in the company developed the applications by using multiple languages and frameworks. The applications run on premises and on different servers with different operating systems. Each team has its own release protocol and process. The company wants to reduce the complexity of the release and maintenance of these applications. The company is migrating its technology stacks, including these applications, to AWS. The company wants centralized control of source code, a consistent and automatic delivery pipeline, and as few maintenance tasks as possible on the underlying infrastructure. What should a DevOps engineer do to meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司有许多应用程序。公司中的不同团队使用多种语言和框架开发了这些应用程序。这些应用程序在本地以及运行不同操作系统的不同服务器上运行。每个团队都有自己的发布协议和流程。公司希望降低这些应用程序发布和维护的复杂性。公司正在将其技术栈（包括这些应用程序）迁移到 AWS。公司希望集中控制源代码，拥有一致且自动化的交付流水线，并尽可能减少底层基础设施的维护任务。DevOps 工程师应做什么来满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company's application is currently deployed to a single AWS Region. Recently, the company opened a new office on a different continent. The users in the new office are experiencing high latency. The company's application runs on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB) and uses Amazon DynamoDB as the database layer. The instances run in an EC2 Auto Scaling group across multiple Availability Zones. A DevOps engineer is tasked with minimizing application response times and improving availability for users in both Regions. Which combination of actions should be taken to address the latency issues? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a new DynamoDB table in the new Region with cross-Region replication enabled.

contents.en: Create a new DynamoDB table in the new Region with cross-Region replication enabled.
contents.zh: 在新 Region 中创建一个新的 DynamoDB 表，并启用跨 Region 复制。

options.label: B
options.content: Create new ALB and Auto Scaling group global resources and configure the new ALB to direct traffic to the new Auto Scaling group.

contents.en: Create new ALB and Auto Scaling group global resources and configure the new ALB to direct traffic to the new Auto Scaling group.
contents.zh: 创建新的 ALB 和 Auto Scaling group 全局资源，并配置新的 ALB 将流量定向到新的 Auto Scaling group。

options.label: C
options.content: Create new ALB and Auto Scaling group resources in the new Region and configure the new ALB to direct traffic to the new Auto Scaling group.

contents.en: Create new ALB and Auto Scaling group resources in the new Region and configure the new ALB to direct traffic to the new Auto Scaling group.
contents.zh: 在新 Region 中创建新的 ALB 和 Auto Scaling group 资源，并配置新的 ALB 将流量定向到新的 Auto Scaling group。

options.label: D
options.content: Create Amazon Route 53 records, health checks, and latency-based routing policies to route to the ALB.

contents.en: Create Amazon Route 53 records, health checks, and latency-based routing policies to route to the ALB.
contents.zh: 创建 Amazon Route 53 records、health checks 和 latency-based routing policies，以路由到 ALB。

options.label: E
options.content: Create Amazon Route 53 aliases, health checks, and failover routing policies to route to the ALB.

contents.en: Create Amazon Route 53 aliases, health checks, and failover routing policies to route to the ALB.
contents.zh: 创建 Amazon Route 53 aliases、health checks 和 failover routing policies，以路由到 ALB。

options.label: F
options.content: Convert the DynamoDB table to a global table.

contents.en: Convert the DynamoDB table to a global table.
contents.zh: 将 DynamoDB 表转换为 global table。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C、D 和 F。C 在新区部署 ALB 和 Auto Scaling 组，D 用 Route 53 记录、健康检查和基于延迟的路由将用户导向合适 ALB，F 将 DynamoDB 转为 global table 以支持跨区域低延迟数据访问。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C、D 和 F。C 在新区部署 ALB 和 Auto Scaling 组，D 用 Route 53 记录、健康检查和基于延迟的路由将用户导向合适 ALB，F 将 DynamoDB 转为 global table 以支持跨区域低延迟数据访问。
explanations.en: The correct answers are C, D, and F. C adds the ALB and Auto Scaling group in the new Region, D uses Route 53 health checks and latency-based routing to direct users, and F converts DynamoDB to a global table for low-latency regional data access.

contents.en: A company's application is currently deployed to a single AWS Region. Recently, the company opened a new office on a different continent. The users in the new office are experiencing high latency. The company's application runs on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB) and uses Amazon DynamoDB as the database layer. The instances run in an EC2 Auto Scaling group across multiple Availability Zones. A DevOps engineer is tasked with minimizing application response times and improving availability for users in both Regions. Which combination of actions should be taken to address the latency issues? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司的应用程序目前部署在单个 AWS Region 中。最近，该公司在另一个大陆开设了新办公室。新办公室的用户遇到高延迟。公司的应用程序运行在 Application Load Balancer (ALB) 后面的 Amazon EC2 实例上，并使用 Amazon DynamoDB 作为数据库层。这些实例在跨多个 Availability Zones 的 EC2 Auto Scaling 组中运行。DevOps 工程师的任务是为两个 Region 的用户最大限度降低应用程序响应时间并提高可用性。应采取哪组操作组合来解决延迟问题？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A DevOps engineer needs to apply a core set of security controls to an existing set of AWS accounts. The accounts are in an organization in AWS Organizations. Individual teams will administer individual accounts by using the AdministratorAccess AWS managed policy. For all accounts. AWS CloudTrail and AWS Config must be turned on in all available AWS Regions. Individual account administrators must not be able to edit or delete any of the baseline resources. However, individual account administrators must be able to edit or delete their own CloudTrail trails and AWS Config rules. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient way?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS CloudFormation template that defines the standard account resources. Deploy the template to all accounts from the organization's management account by using CloudFormation StackSets. Set the stack policy to deny Update:Delete actions.

contents.en: Create an AWS CloudFormation template that defines the standard account resources. Deploy the template to all accounts from the organization's management account by using CloudFormation StackSets. Set the stack policy to deny Update:Delete actions.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CloudFormation 模板，定义标准账户资源。使用 CloudFormation StackSets 从组织的管理账户将该模板部署到所有账户。将 stack policy 设置为拒绝 Update:Delete 操作。

options.label: B
options.content: Enable AWS Control Tower. Enroll the existing accounts in AWS Control Tower. Grant the individual account administrators access to CloudTrail and AWS Config.

contents.en: Enable AWS Control Tower. Enroll the existing accounts in AWS Control Tower. Grant the individual account administrators access to CloudTrail and AWS Config.
contents.zh: 启用 AWS Control Tower。将现有账户注册到 AWS Control Tower。授予各个账户管理员访问 CloudTrail 和 AWS Config 的权限。

options.label: C
options.content: Designate an AWS Config management account. Create AWS Config recorders in all accounts by using AWS CloudFormation StackSets. Deploy AWS Config rules to the organization by using the AWS Config management account. Create a CloudTrail organization trail in the organization's management account. Deny modification or deletion of the AWS Config recorders by using an SCP.

contents.en: Designate an AWS Config management account. Create AWS Config recorders in all accounts by using AWS CloudFormation StackSets. Deploy AWS Config rules to the organization by using the AWS Config management account. Create a CloudTrail organization trail in the organization's management account. Deny modification or deletion of the AWS Config recorders by using an SCP.
contents.zh: 指定一个 AWS Config 管理账户。使用 AWS CloudFormation StackSets 在所有账户中创建 AWS Config recorders。使用 AWS Config 管理账户将 AWS Config rules 部署到组织。创建一个组织管理账户中的 CloudTrail organization trail。使用 SCP 拒绝修改或删除 AWS Config recorders。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS CloudFormation template that defines the standard account resources. Deploy the template to all accounts from the organization's management account by using Cloud Formation StackSets Create an SCP that prevents updates or deletions to CloudTrail resources or AWS Config resources unless the principal is an administrator of the organization's management account.

contents.en: Create an AWS CloudFormation template that defines the standard account resources. Deploy the template to all accounts from the organization's management account by using Cloud Formation StackSets Create an SCP that prevents updates or deletions to CloudTrail resources or AWS Config resources unless the principal is an administrator of the organization's management account.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CloudFormation 模板，定义标准账户资源。使用 CloudFormation StackSets 从组织的管理账户将该模板部署到所有账户。创建一个 SCP，除非主体是组织管理账户的管理员，否则阻止对 CloudTrail resources 或 AWS Config resources 进行更新或删除。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。该方案用 StackSets 在所有账户部署 AWS Config recorders，并通过 AWS Config 管理账户部署规则；组织级 CloudTrail 收集日志，SCP 防止账户管理员修改或删除 Config recorders。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。该方案用 StackSets 在所有账户部署 AWS Config recorders，并通过 AWS Config 管理账户部署规则；组织级 CloudTrail 收集日志，SCP 防止账户管理员修改或删除 Config recorders。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. StackSets deploy AWS Config recorders in all accounts, the AWS Config management account deploys rules centrally, an organization CloudTrail collects logs, and an SCP denies modification or deletion of the Config recorders.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer needs to apply a core set of security controls to an existing set of AWS accounts. The accounts are in an organization in AWS Organizations. Individual teams will administer individual accounts by using the AdministratorAccess AWS managed policy. For all accounts. AWS CloudTrail and AWS Config must be turned on in all available AWS Regions. Individual account administrators must not be able to edit or delete any of the baseline resources. However, individual account administrators must be able to edit or delete their own CloudTrail trails and AWS Config rules. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient way?
contents.zh: DevOps 工程师需要将一组核心安全控制应用到现有的一组 AWS 账户。这些账户位于 AWS Organizations 中的一个组织内。各个团队将使用 AdministratorAccess AWS managed policy 管理各自账户。对于所有账户，AWS CloudTrail 和 AWS Config 必须在所有可用 AWS Regions 中启用。各个账户管理员不得编辑或删除任何基线资源。但是，各个账户管理员必须能够编辑或删除他们自己的 CloudTrail trails 和 AWS Config rules。哪种解决方案能以最高运营效率满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has its AWS accounts in an organization in AWS Organizations. AWS Config is manually configured in each AWS account. The company needs to implement a solution to centrally configure AWS Config for all accounts in the organization The solution also must record resource changes to a central account. Which combination of actions should a DevOps engineer perform to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Configure a delegated administrator account for AWS Config. Enable trusted access for AWS Config in the organization.

contents.en: Configure a delegated administrator account for AWS Config. Enable trusted access for AWS Config in the organization.
contents.zh: 为 AWS Config 配置 delegated administrator account。在组织中为 AWS Config 启用 trusted access。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure a delegated administrator account for AWS Config. Create a service-linked role for AWS Config in the organization's management account.

contents.en: Configure a delegated administrator account for AWS Config. Create a service-linked role for AWS Config in the organization's management account.
contents.zh: 为 AWS Config 配置 delegated administrator account。在组织的管理账户中为 AWS Config 创建 service-linked role。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS CloudFormation template to create an AWS Config aggregator. Configure a CloudFormation stack set to deploy the template to all accounts in the organization.

contents.en: Create an AWS CloudFormation template to create an AWS Config aggregator. Configure a CloudFormation stack set to deploy the template to all accounts in the organization.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CloudFormation 模板来创建 AWS Config aggregator。配置 CloudFormation stack set 将该模板部署到组织中的所有账户。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS Config organization aggregator in the organization's management account. Configure data collection from all AWS accounts in the organization and from all AWS Regions.

contents.en: Create an AWS Config organization aggregator in the organization's management account. Configure data collection from all AWS accounts in the organization and from all AWS Regions.
contents.zh: 在组织的管理账户中创建 AWS Config organization aggregator。配置从组织中的所有 AWS 账户和所有 AWS Regions 收集数据。

options.label: E
options.content: Create an AWS Config organization aggregator in the delegated administrator account. Configure data collection from all AWS accounts in the organization and from all AWS Regions.

contents.en: Create an AWS Config organization aggregator in the delegated administrator account. Configure data collection from all AWS accounts in the organization and from all AWS Regions.
contents.zh: 在 delegated administrator account 中创建 AWS Config organization aggregator。配置从组织中的所有 AWS 账户和所有 AWS Regions 收集数据。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A 和 E。A 为 AWS Config 配置委派管理员并启用组织可信访问；E 在该委派管理员账户中创建组织聚合器，从所有账户和所有区域集中收集配置数据。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A 和 E。A 为 AWS Config 配置委派管理员并启用组织可信访问；E 在该委派管理员账户中创建组织聚合器，从所有账户和所有区域集中收集配置数据。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A and E. A configures a delegated administrator and trusted access for AWS Config, and E creates an organization aggregator in that account to collect data from all accounts and Regions.

contents.en: A company has its AWS accounts in an organization in AWS Organizations. AWS Config is manually configured in each AWS account. The company needs to implement a solution to centrally configure AWS Config for all accounts in the organization The solution also must record resource changes to a central account. Which combination of actions should a DevOps engineer perform to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司将其 AWS 账户放在 AWS Organizations 中的一个组织内。AWS Config 在每个 AWS 账户中手动配置。公司需要实施一个解决方案，为组织中的所有账户集中配置 AWS Config。该解决方案还必须将资源更改记录到一个中央账户。DevOps 工程师应执行哪组操作组合来满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company wants to migrate its content sharing web application hosted on Amazon EC2 to a serverless architecture. The company currently deploys changes to its application by creating a new Auto Scaling group of EC2 instances and a new Elastic Load Balancer, and then shifting the traffic away using an Amazon Route 53 weighted routing policy. For its new serverless application, the company is planning to use Amazon API Gateway and AWS Lambda. The company will need to update its deployment processes to work with the new application. It will also need to retain the ability to test new features on a small number of users before rolling the features out to the entire user base. Which deployment strategy will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS CDK to deploy API Gateway and Lambda functions. When code needs to be changed, update the AWS CloudFormation stack and deploy the new version of the APIs and Lambda functions. Use a Route 53 failover routing policy for the canary release strategy.

contents.en: Use AWS CDK to deploy API Gateway and Lambda functions. When code needs to be changed, update the AWS CloudFormation stack and deploy the new version of the APIs and Lambda functions. Use a Route 53 failover routing policy for the canary release strategy.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CDK 部署 API Gateway 和 Lambda functions。当代码需要更改时，更新 AWS CloudFormation stack，并部署 APIs 和 Lambda functions 的新版本。使用 Route 53 failover routing policy 作为 canary release strategy。

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation to deploy API Gateway and Lambda functions using Lambda function versions. When code needs to be changed, update the CloudFormation stack with the new Lambda code and update the API versions using a canary release strategy. Promote the new version when testing is complete.

contents.en: Use AWS CloudFormation to deploy API Gateway and Lambda functions using Lambda function versions. When code needs to be changed, update the CloudFormation stack with the new Lambda code and update the API versions using a canary release strategy. Promote the new version when testing is complete.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CloudFormation 通过 Lambda function versions 部署 API Gateway 和 Lambda functions。当代码需要更改时，使用新的 Lambda 代码更新 CloudFormation stack，并使用 canary release strategy 更新 API versions。测试完成后提升新版本。

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS Elastic Beanstalk to deploy API Gateway and Lambda functions. When code needs to be changed, deploy a new version of the API and Lambda functions. Shift traffic gradually using an Elastic Beanstalk blue/green deployment.

contents.en: Use AWS Elastic Beanstalk to deploy API Gateway and Lambda functions. When code needs to be changed, deploy a new version of the API and Lambda functions. Shift traffic gradually using an Elastic Beanstalk blue/green deployment.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Elastic Beanstalk 部署 API Gateway 和 Lambda functions。当代码需要更改时，部署 API 和 Lambda functions 的新版本。使用 Elastic Beanstalk blue/green deployment 逐步转移流量。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS OpsWorks to deploy API Gateway in the service layer and Lambda functions in a custom layer. When code needs to be changed, use OpsWorks to perform a blue/green deployment and shift traffic gradually.

contents.en: Use AWS OpsWorks to deploy API Gateway in the service layer and Lambda functions in a custom layer. When code needs to be changed, use OpsWorks to perform a blue/green deployment and shift traffic gradually.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS OpsWorks 在 service layer 中部署 API Gateway，并在 custom layer 中部署 Lambda functions。当代码需要更改时，使用 OpsWorks 执行 blue/green deployment 并逐步转移流量。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。CloudFormation 部署 API Gateway 和 Lambda 版本后，可在代码变更时更新堆栈，并使用 canary 发布策略让少量用户先测试，完成后再提升新版本。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。CloudFormation 部署 API Gateway 和 Lambda 版本后，可在代码变更时更新堆栈，并使用 canary 发布策略让少量用户先测试，完成后再提升新版本。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. CloudFormation manages API Gateway and Lambda versions, and a canary release lets the new version be tested with a small user group before promotion.

contents.en: A company wants to migrate its content sharing web application hosted on Amazon EC2 to a serverless architecture. The company currently deploys changes to its application by creating a new Auto Scaling group of EC2 instances and a new Elastic Load Balancer, and then shifting the traffic away using an Amazon Route 53 weighted routing policy. For its new serverless application, the company is planning to use Amazon API Gateway and AWS Lambda. The company will need to update its deployment processes to work with the new application. It will also need to retain the ability to test new features on a small number of users before rolling the features out to the entire user base. Which deployment strategy will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司希望将托管在 Amazon EC2 上的内容共享 Web 应用程序迁移到 serverless architecture。该公司目前通过创建新的 EC2 实例 Auto Scaling 组和新的 Elastic Load Balancer，然后使用 Amazon Route 53 weighted routing policy 转移流量来部署应用程序变更。对于新的 serverless 应用程序，公司计划使用 Amazon API Gateway 和 AWS Lambda。公司需要更新其部署流程，以适配新的应用程序。公司还需要保留在向整个用户群推出新功能之前，先让少量用户测试新功能的能力。哪种部署策略可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A development team uses AWS CodeCommit, AWS CodePipeline, and AWS CodeBuild to develop and deploy an application. Changes to the code are submitted by pull requests. The development team reviews and merges the pull requests, and then the pipeline builds and tests the application. Over time, the number of pull requests has increased. The pipeline is frequently blocked because of failing tests. To prevent this blockage, the development team wants to run the unit and integration tests on each pull request before it is merged. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a CodeBuild project to run the unit and integration tests. Create a CodeCommit approval rule template. Configure the template to require the successful invocation of the CodeBuild project. Attach the approval rule to the project's CodeCommit repository.

contents.en: Create a CodeBuild project to run the unit and integration tests. Create a CodeCommit approval rule template. Configure the template to require the successful invocation of the CodeBuild project. Attach the approval rule to the project's CodeCommit repository.
contents.zh: 创建一个 CodeBuild project 来运行单元测试和集成测试。创建 CodeCommit approval rule template。配置该 template 要求成功调用 CodeBuild project。将 approval rule 附加到项目的 CodeCommit repository。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to match pullRequestCreated events from CodeCommit Create a CodeBuild project to run the unit and integration tests. Configure the CodeBuild project as a target of the EventBridge rule that includes a custom event payload with the CodeCommit repository and branch information from the event.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to match pullRequestCreated events from CodeCommit Create a CodeBuild project to run the unit and integration tests. Configure the CodeBuild project as a target of the EventBridge rule that includes a custom event payload with the CodeCommit repository and branch information from the event.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，用于匹配来自 CodeCommit 的 pullRequestCreated 事件。创建一个 CodeBuild project 来运行单元测试和集成测试。将 CodeBuild project 配置为 EventBridge 规则的目标，并包含带有事件中 CodeCommit repository 和 branch 信息的自定义事件负载。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to match pullRequestCreated events from CodeCommit. Modify the existing CodePipeline pipeline to not run the deploy steps if the build is started from a pull request. Configure the EventBridge rule to run the pipeline with a custom payload that contains the CodeCommit repository and branch information from the event.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to match pullRequestCreated events from CodeCommit. Modify the existing CodePipeline pipeline to not run the deploy steps if the build is started from a pull request. Configure the EventBridge rule to run the pipeline with a custom payload that contains the CodeCommit repository and branch information from the event.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，用于匹配来自 CodeCommit 的 pullRequestCreated 事件。修改现有 CodePipeline 流水线，使其在构建从拉取请求启动时不运行部署步骤。配置 EventBridge 规则使用包含事件中 CodeCommit repository 和 branch 信息的自定义负载运行流水线。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a CodeBuild project to run the unit and integration tests. Create a CodeCommit notification rule that matches when a pull request is created or updated. Configure the notification rule to invoke the CodeBuild project.

contents.en: Create a CodeBuild project to run the unit and integration tests. Create a CodeCommit notification rule that matches when a pull request is created or updated. Configure the notification rule to invoke the CodeBuild project.
contents.zh: 创建一个 CodeBuild project 来运行单元测试和集成测试。创建 CodeCommit notification rule，匹配拉取请求创建或更新时的情况。配置 notification rule 调用 CodeBuild project。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。EventBridge 规则匹配 CodeCommit 的 pullRequestCreated 事件，并把仓库和分支信息传给 CodeBuild 项目运行单元测试和集成测试，适合在合并前自动验证拉取请求。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。EventBridge 规则匹配 CodeCommit 的 pullRequestCreated 事件，并把仓库和分支信息传给 CodeBuild 项目运行单元测试和集成测试，适合在合并前自动验证拉取请求。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. An EventBridge rule matches CodeCommit pullRequestCreated events and passes repository and branch details to CodeBuild so unit and integration tests run before merge.

contents.en: A development team uses AWS CodeCommit, AWS CodePipeline, and AWS CodeBuild to develop and deploy an application. Changes to the code are submitted by pull requests. The development team reviews and merges the pull requests, and then the pipeline builds and tests the application. Over time, the number of pull requests has increased. The pipeline is frequently blocked because of failing tests. To prevent this blockage, the development team wants to run the unit and integration tests on each pull request before it is merged. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一个开发团队使用 AWS CodeCommit、AWS CodePipeline 和 AWS CodeBuild 开发和部署应用程序。代码更改通过拉取请求提交。开发团队审核并合并拉取请求，然后流水线构建和测试应用程序。随着时间推移，拉取请求数量增加。由于测试失败，流水线经常被阻塞。为防止这种阻塞，开发团队希望在每个拉取请求合并之前运行单元测试和集成测试。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has an application that runs on a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances. The application requires frequent restarts. The application logs contain error messages when a restart is required. The application logs are published to a log group in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. An Amazon CloudWatch alarm notifies an application engineer through an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic when the logs contain a large number of restart-related error messages. The application engineer manually restarts the application on the instances after the application engineer receives a notification from the SNS topic. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a solution to automate the application restart on the instances without restarting the instances. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient manner?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook that runs a script to restart the application on the instances. Configure the SNS topic to invoke the runbook.

contents.en: Configure an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook that runs a script to restart the application on the instances. Configure the SNS topic to invoke the runbook.
contents.zh: 配置一个 AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook，运行脚本以重启实例上的应用程序。配置 SNS 主题调用该 runbook。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function that restarts the application on the instances. Configure the Lambda function as an event destination of the SNS topic.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that restarts the application on the instances. Configure the Lambda function as an event destination of the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，用于重启实例上的应用程序。将 Lambda 函数配置为 SNS 主题的 event destination。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook that runs a script to restart the application on the instances. Create an AWS Lambda function to invoke the runbook. Configure the Lambda function as an event destination of the SNS topic.

contents.en: Configure an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook that runs a script to restart the application on the instances. Create an AWS Lambda function to invoke the runbook. Configure the Lambda function as an event destination of the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 配置一个 AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook，运行脚本以重启实例上的应用程序。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数来调用该 runbook。将 Lambda 函数配置为 SNS 主题的 event destination。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook that runs a script to restart the application on the instances. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts when the CloudWatch alarm enters ALARM state. Specify the runbook as a target of the rule.

contents.en: Configure an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook that runs a script to restart the application on the instances. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts when the CloudWatch alarm enters ALARM state. Specify the runbook as a target of the rule.
contents.zh: 配置一个 AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook，运行脚本以重启实例上的应用程序。配置一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，在 CloudWatch alarm 进入 ALARM 状态时响应。将该 runbook 指定为规则的目标。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。CloudWatch 告警进入 ALARM 状态时，EventBridge 规则直接触发 Systems Manager Automation runbook 来重启实例上的应用；讨论指出该路径组件更少、定制更少。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。CloudWatch 告警进入 ALARM 状态时，EventBridge 规则直接触发 Systems Manager Automation runbook 来重启实例上的应用；讨论指出该路径组件更少、定制更少。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. When the CloudWatch alarm enters ALARM state, EventBridge can target a Systems Manager Automation runbook that restarts the application, using fewer components and less customization as discussed.

contents.en: A company has an application that runs on a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances. The application requires frequent restarts. The application logs contain error messages when a restart is required. The application logs are published to a log group in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. An Amazon CloudWatch alarm notifies an application engineer through an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic when the logs contain a large number of restart-related error messages. The application engineer manually restarts the application on the instances after the application engineer receives a notification from the SNS topic. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a solution to automate the application restart on the instances without restarting the instances. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient manner?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个运行在 Amazon EC2 实例群上的应用程序。该应用程序需要频繁重启。当需要重启时，应用程序日志会包含错误消息。应用程序日志发布到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 中的一个 log group。当日志中包含大量与重启相关的错误消息时，Amazon CloudWatch alarm 会通过 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题通知应用程序工程师。应用程序工程师收到 SNS 主题的通知后，会手动重启实例上的应用程序。DevOps 工程师需要实施一个解决方案，在不重启实例的情况下自动重启实例上的应用程序。哪种解决方案能以最高运营效率满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer at a company is supporting an AWS environment in which all users use AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On). The company wants to immediately disable credentials of any new IAM user and wants the security team to receive a notification. Which combination of steps should the DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to an IAM CreateUser API call in AWS CloudTrail.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to an IAM CreateUser API call in AWS CloudTrail.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，响应 AWS CloudTrail 中的 IAM CreateUser API 调用。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to an IAM GetLoginProfile API call in AWS CloudTrail.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to an IAM GetLoginProfile API call in AWS CloudTrail.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，响应 AWS CloudTrail 中的 IAM GetLoginProfile API 调用。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function that is a target of the EventBridge rule. Configure the Lambda function to disable any access keys and delete the login profiles that are associated with the IAM user.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that is a target of the EventBridge rule. Configure the Lambda function to disable any access keys and delete the login profiles that are associated with the IAM user.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数作为 EventBridge 规则的目标。配置该 Lambda 函数禁用任何 access keys，并删除与 IAM 用户关联的 login profiles。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function that is a target of the EventBridge rule. Configure the Lambda function to delete the login profiles that are associated with the IAM user.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that is a target of the EventBridge rule. Configure the Lambda function to delete the login profiles that are associated with the IAM user.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数作为 EventBridge 规则的目标。配置该 Lambda 函数删除与 IAM 用户关联的 login profiles。

options.label: E
options.content: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic that is a target of the EventBridge rule. Subscribe the security team's group email address to the topic.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic that is a target of the EventBridge rule. Subscribe the security team's group email address to the topic.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题作为 EventBridge 规则的目标。将安全团队的群组电子邮件地址订阅到该主题。

options.label: F
