options.content: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue that is a target of the Lambda function. Subscribe the security team's group email address to the queue.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue that is a target of the Lambda function. Subscribe the security team's group email address to the queue.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列作为 Lambda 函数的目标。将安全团队的群组电子邮件地址订阅到该队列。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、C 和 E。A 用 EventBridge 检测 CloudTrail 中的 IAM CreateUser API 调用；C 触发 Lambda 禁用相关访问密钥并删除登录配置文件；E 通过 SNS 通知安全团队。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、C 和 E。A 用 EventBridge 检测 CloudTrail 中的 IAM CreateUser API 调用；C 触发 Lambda 禁用相关访问密钥并删除登录配置文件；E 通过 SNS 通知安全团队。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A, C, and E. A detects IAM CreateUser calls from CloudTrail with EventBridge, C invokes Lambda to disable associated access keys and delete login profiles, and E notifies the security team through SNS.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer at a company is supporting an AWS environment in which all users use AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On). The company wants to immediately disable credentials of any new IAM user and wants the security team to receive a notification. Which combination of steps should the DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司的一名 DevOps 工程师正在支持一个 AWS 环境，其中所有用户都使用 AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)。公司希望立即禁用任何新 IAM 用户的凭证，并希望安全团队收到通知。DevOps 工程师应采取哪组步骤组合来满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company wants to set up a continuous delivery pipeline. The company stores application code in a private GitHub repository. The company needs to deploy the application components to Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). Amazon EC2, and AWS Lambda. The pipeline must support manual approval actions. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS CodePipeline with Amazon ECS. Amazon EC2, and Lambda as deploy providers.

contents.en: Use AWS CodePipeline with Amazon ECS. Amazon EC2, and Lambda as deploy providers.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CodePipeline，并将 Amazon ECS、Amazon EC2 和 Lambda 作为 deploy providers。

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS CodePipeline with AWS CodeDeploy as the deploy provider.

contents.en: Use AWS CodePipeline with AWS CodeDeploy as the deploy provider.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CodePipeline，并将 AWS CodeDeploy 作为 deploy provider。

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS CodePipeline with AWS Elastic Beanstalk as the deploy provider.

contents.en: Use AWS CodePipeline with AWS Elastic Beanstalk as the deploy provider.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CodePipeline，并将 AWS Elastic Beanstalk 作为 deploy provider。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS CodeDeploy with GitHub integration to deploy the application.

contents.en: Use AWS CodeDeploy with GitHub integration to deploy the application.
contents.zh: 使用带 GitHub integration 的 AWS CodeDeploy 来部署应用程序。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。使用 CodePipeline 并将 CodeDeploy 作为部署提供方，符合讨论中确认的流水线部署方式。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。使用 CodePipeline 并将 CodeDeploy 作为部署提供方，符合讨论中确认的流水线部署方式。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. CodePipeline with CodeDeploy as the deploy provider matches the deployment approach confirmed in the discussion.

contents.en: A company wants to set up a continuous delivery pipeline. The company stores application code in a private GitHub repository. The company needs to deploy the application components to Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). Amazon EC2, and AWS Lambda. The pipeline must support manual approval actions. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司希望设置一条 continuous delivery pipeline。公司将应用程序代码存储在私有 GitHub repository 中。公司需要将应用程序组件部署到 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)、Amazon EC2 和 AWS Lambda。该流水线必须支持手动审批操作。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has an application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances that are in an Auto Scaling group. When the application starts up. the application needs to process data from an Amazon S3 bucket before the application can start to serve requests. The size of the data that is stored in the S3 bucket is growing. When the Auto Scaling group adds new instances, the application now takes several minutes to download and process the data before the application can serve requests. The company must reduce the time that elapses before new EC2 instances are ready to serve requests. Which solution is the MOST cost-effective way to reduce the application startup time?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure a warm pool for the Auto Scaling group with warmed EC2 instances in the Stopped state. Configure an autoscaling:EC2_INSTANCE_LAUNCHING lifecycle hook on the Auto Scaling group. Modify the application to complete the lifecycle hook when the application is ready to serve requests.

contents.en: Configure a warm pool for the Auto Scaling group with warmed EC2 instances in the Stopped state. Configure an autoscaling:EC2_INSTANCE_LAUNCHING lifecycle hook on the Auto Scaling group. Modify the application to complete the lifecycle hook when the application is ready to serve requests.
contents.zh: 为 Auto Scaling 组配置一个 warm pool，其中预热的 EC2 实例处于 Stopped 状态。在 Auto Scaling 组上配置 autoscaling:EC2_INSTANCE_LAUNCHING lifecycle hook。修改应用程序，使其在应用程序准备好处理请求时完成 lifecycle hook。

options.label: B
options.content: Increase the maximum instance count of the Auto Scaling group. Configure an autoscaling:EC2_INSTANCE_LAUNCHING lifecycle hook on the Auto Scaling group. Modify the application to complete the lifecycle hook when the application is ready to serve requests.

contents.en: Increase the maximum instance count of the Auto Scaling group. Configure an autoscaling:EC2_INSTANCE_LAUNCHING lifecycle hook on the Auto Scaling group. Modify the application to complete the lifecycle hook when the application is ready to serve requests.
contents.zh: 增加 Auto Scaling 组的最大实例数。在 Auto Scaling 组上配置 autoscaling:EC2_INSTANCE_LAUNCHING lifecycle hook。修改应用程序，使其在应用程序准备好处理请求时完成 lifecycle hook。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure a warm pool for the Auto Scaling group with warmed EC2 instances in the Running state. Configure an autoscaling:EC2_INSTANCE_LAUNCHING lifecycle hook on the Auto Scaling group. Modify the application to complete the lifecycle hook when the application is ready to serve requests.

contents.en: Configure a warm pool for the Auto Scaling group with warmed EC2 instances in the Running state. Configure an autoscaling:EC2_INSTANCE_LAUNCHING lifecycle hook on the Auto Scaling group. Modify the application to complete the lifecycle hook when the application is ready to serve requests.
contents.zh: 为 Auto Scaling 组配置一个 warm pool，其中预热的 EC2 实例处于 Running 状态。在 Auto Scaling 组上配置 autoscaling:EC2_INSTANCE_LAUNCHING lifecycle hook。修改应用程序，使其在应用程序准备好处理请求时完成 lifecycle hook。

options.label: D
options.content: Increase the maximum instance count of the Auto Scaling group. Configure an autoscaling:EC2_INSTANCE_LAUNCHING lifecycle hook on the Auto Scaling group. Modify the application to complete the lifecycle hook and to place the new instance in the Standby state when the application is ready to serve requests.

contents.en: Increase the maximum instance count of the Auto Scaling group. Configure an autoscaling:EC2_INSTANCE_LAUNCHING lifecycle hook on the Auto Scaling group. Modify the application to complete the lifecycle hook and to place the new instance in the Standby state when the application is ready to serve requests.
contents.zh: 增加 Auto Scaling 组的最大实例数。在 Auto Scaling 组上配置 autoscaling:EC2_INSTANCE_LAUNCHING lifecycle hook。修改应用程序，使其在应用程序准备好处理 lifecycle hook，并在应用程序准备好处理请求时将新实例置于 Standby 状态。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。将 warm pool 中的 EC2 实例保持为 Stopped 状态可降低等待成本；实例启动时用 lifecycle hook 等待应用准备完成，再让其接收请求。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。将 warm pool 中的 EC2 实例保持为 Stopped 状态可降低等待成本；实例启动时用 lifecycle hook 等待应用准备完成，再让其接收请求。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. A warm pool with stopped EC2 instances reduces startup time without keeping them running, and the launch lifecycle hook lets the application signal readiness before serving traffic.

contents.en: A company has an application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances that are in an Auto Scaling group. When the application starts up. the application needs to process data from an Amazon S3 bucket before the application can start to serve requests. The size of the data that is stored in the S3 bucket is growing. When the Auto Scaling group adds new instances, the application now takes several minutes to download and process the data before the application can serve requests. The company must reduce the time that elapses before new EC2 instances are ready to serve requests. Which solution is the MOST cost-effective way to reduce the application startup time?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个应用程序运行在 Auto Scaling 组中的 Amazon EC2 实例上。当应用程序启动时，在能够开始处理请求之前，需要先处理来自 Amazon S3 存储桶的数据。S3 存储桶中存储的数据量正在增长。当 Auto Scaling 组添加新实例时，应用程序现在需要几分钟来下载并处理数据，然后才能处理请求。公司必须缩短新 EC2 实例准备好处理请求之前经过的时间。哪种解决方案是降低应用程序启动时间的最具成本效益的方法？

questions.content: A company is using an AWS CodeBuild project to build and package an application. The packages are copied to a shared Amazon S3 bucket before being deployed across multiple AWS accounts. The buildspec.yml file contains the following: The DevOps engineer has noticed that anybody with an AWS account is able to download the artifacts. What steps should the DevOps engineer take to stop this?

options.label: A
options.content: Modify the post_build command to use --acl public-read and configure a bucket policy that grants read access to the relevant AWS accounts only.

contents.en: Modify the post_build command to use --acl public-read and configure a bucket policy that grants read access to the relevant AWS accounts only.
contents.zh: 修改 post_build 命令以使用 --acl public-read，并配置一个 bucket policy，仅向相关 AWS 账户授予读取访问权限。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure a default ACL for the S3 bucket that defines the set of authenticated users as the relevant AWS accounts only and grants read-only access.

contents.en: Configure a default ACL for the S3 bucket that defines the set of authenticated users as the relevant AWS accounts only and grants read-only access.
contents.zh: 为 S3 存储桶配置默认 ACL，将经过身份验证的用户集合定义为仅包含相关 AWS 账户，并授予只读访问权限。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an S3 bucket policy that grants read access to the relevant AWS accounts and denies read access to the principal "*".

contents.en: Create an S3 bucket policy that grants read access to the relevant AWS accounts and denies read access to the principal "*".
contents.zh: 创建一个 S3 bucket policy，向相关 AWS 账户授予读取访问权限，并拒绝 principal "*" 的读取访问权限。

options.label: D
options.content: Modify the post_build command to remove --acl authenticated-read and configure a bucket policy that allows read access to the relevant AWS accounts only.

contents.en: Modify the post_build command to remove --acl authenticated-read and configure a bucket policy that allows read access to the relevant AWS accounts only.
contents.zh: 修改 post_build 命令以移除 --acl authenticated-read，并配置一个 bucket policy，仅允许相关 AWS 账户读取访问。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。移除 --acl authenticated-read 可避免过宽访问，并改用只允许相关 AWS 账户读取的 bucket policy 来控制访问。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。移除 --acl authenticated-read 可避免过宽访问，并改用只允许相关 AWS 账户读取的 bucket policy 来控制访问。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. Removing --acl authenticated-read avoids overly broad access, and a bucket policy can restrict read access to only the relevant AWS accounts.

contents.en: A company is using an AWS CodeBuild project to build and package an application. The packages are copied to a shared Amazon S3 bucket before being deployed across multiple AWS accounts. The buildspec.yml file contains the following: The DevOps engineer has noticed that anybody with an AWS account is able to download the artifacts. What steps should the DevOps engineer take to stop this?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在使用 AWS CodeBuild 项目来构建和打包应用程序。在跨多个 AWS 账户部署之前，软件包会被复制到共享的 Amazon S3 存储桶。buildspec.yml 文件包含以下内容：DevOps 工程师注意到，任何拥有 AWS 账户的人都可以下载这些构件。DevOps 工程师应采取哪些步骤来阻止这种情况？

questions.content: A company has developed a serverless web application that is hosted on AWS. The application consists of Amazon S3. Amazon API Gateway, several AWS Lambda functions, and an Amazon RDS for MySQL database. The company is using AWS CodeCommit to store the source code. The source code is a combination of AWS Serverless Application Model (AWS SAM) templates and Python code. A security audit and penetration test reveal that user names and passwords for authentication to the database are hardcoded within CodeCommit repositories. A DevOps engineer must implement a solution to automatically detect and prevent hardcoded secrets. What is the MOST secure solution that meets these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Enable Amazon CodeGuru Profiler. Decorate the handler function with @with_lambda_profiler(). Manually review the recommendation report. Write the secret to AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store as a secure string. Update the SAM templates and the Python code to pull the secret from Parameter Store.

contents.en: Enable Amazon CodeGuru Profiler. Decorate the handler function with @with_lambda_profiler(). Manually review the recommendation report. Write the secret to AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store as a secure string. Update the SAM templates and the Python code to pull the secret from Parameter Store.
contents.zh: 启用 Amazon CodeGuru Profiler。使用 @with_lambda_profiler() 修饰 handler 函数。手动查看建议报告。将密钥作为 secure string 写入 AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store。更新 SAM 模板和 Python 代码，从 Parameter Store 拉取密钥。

options.label: B
options.content: Associate the CodeCommit repository with Amazon CodeGuru Reviewer. Manually check the code review for any recommendations. Choose the option to protect the secret. Update the SAM templates and the Python code to pull the secret from AWS Secrets Manager.

contents.en: Associate the CodeCommit repository with Amazon CodeGuru Reviewer. Manually check the code review for any recommendations. Choose the option to protect the secret. Update the SAM templates and the Python code to pull the secret from AWS Secrets Manager.
contents.zh: 将 CodeCommit 存储库与 Amazon CodeGuru Reviewer 关联。手动检查代码审查中的任何建议。选择用于保护密钥的选项。更新 SAM 模板和 Python 代码，从 AWS Secrets Manager 拉取密钥。

options.label: C
options.content: Enable Amazon CodeGuru Profiler. Decorate the handler function with @with_lambda_profiler(). Manually review the recommendation report. Choose the option to protect the secret. Update the SAM templates and the Python code to pull the secret from AWS Secrets Manager.

contents.en: Enable Amazon CodeGuru Profiler. Decorate the handler function with @with_lambda_profiler(). Manually review the recommendation report. Choose the option to protect the secret. Update the SAM templates and the Python code to pull the secret from AWS Secrets Manager.
contents.zh: 启用 Amazon CodeGuru Profiler。使用 @with_lambda_profiler() 修饰 handler 函数。手动查看建议报告。选择用于保护密钥的选项。更新 SAM 模板和 Python 代码，从 AWS Secrets Manager 拉取密钥。

options.label: D
options.content: Associate the CodeCommit repository with Amazon CodeGuru Reviewer. Manually check the code review for any recommendations. Write the secret to AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store as a string. Update the SAM templates and the Python code to pull the secret from Parameter Store.

contents.en: Associate the CodeCommit repository with Amazon CodeGuru Reviewer. Manually check the code review for any recommendations. Write the secret to AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store as a string. Update the SAM templates and the Python code to pull the secret from Parameter Store.
contents.zh: 将 CodeCommit 存储库与 Amazon CodeGuru Reviewer 关联。手动检查代码审查中的任何建议。将密钥作为 string 写入 AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store。更新 SAM 模板和 Python 代码，从 Parameter Store 拉取密钥。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。CodeGuru Reviewer 可检查 CodeCommit 仓库中的硬编码密钥并给出保护建议，然后将 SAM 模板和 Python 代码改为从 AWS Secrets Manager 获取密钥。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。CodeGuru Reviewer 可检查 CodeCommit 仓库中的硬编码密钥并给出保护建议，然后将 SAM 模板和 Python 代码改为从 AWS Secrets Manager 获取密钥。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. CodeGuru Reviewer can review the CodeCommit repository for hardcoded secrets, and the templates and Python code can then be updated to retrieve secrets from AWS Secrets Manager.

contents.en: A company has developed a serverless web application that is hosted on AWS. The application consists of Amazon S3. Amazon API Gateway, several AWS Lambda functions, and an Amazon RDS for MySQL database. The company is using AWS CodeCommit to store the source code. The source code is a combination of AWS Serverless Application Model (AWS SAM) templates and Python code. A security audit and penetration test reveal that user names and passwords for authentication to the database are hardcoded within CodeCommit repositories. A DevOps engineer must implement a solution to automatically detect and prevent hardcoded secrets. What is the MOST secure solution that meets these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司开发了一个托管在 AWS 上的无服务器 Web 应用程序。该应用程序由 Amazon S3、Amazon API Gateway、多个 AWS Lambda 函数以及 Amazon RDS for MySQL 数据库组成。公司使用 AWS CodeCommit 存储源代码。源代码由 AWS Serverless Application Model (AWS SAM) 模板和 Python 代码组成。一次安全审计和渗透测试显示，用于数据库身份验证的用户名和密码被硬编码在 CodeCommit 存储库中。DevOps 工程师必须实现一种解决方案，以自动检测并防止硬编码密钥。满足这些要求的最安全解决方案是什么？

questions.content: A company is using Amazon S3 buckets to store important documents. The company discovers that some S3 buckets are not encrypted. Currently, the company's IAM users can create new S3 buckets without encryption. The company is implementing a new requirement that all S3 buckets must be encrypted. A DevOps engineer must implement a solution to ensure that server-side encryption is enabled on all existing S3 buckets and all new S3 buckets. The encryption must be enabled on new S3 buckets as soon as the S3 buckets are created. The default encryption type must be 256-bit Advanced Encryption Standard (AES-256). Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function that is invoked periodically by an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule. Program the Lambda function to scan all current S3 buckets for encryption status and to set AES-256 as the default encryption for any S3 bucket that does not have an encryption configuration.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that is invoked periodically by an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule. Program the Lambda function to scan all current S3 buckets for encryption status and to set AES-256 as the default encryption for any S3 bucket that does not have an encryption configuration.
contents.zh: 创建一个由 Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule 定期调用的 AWS Lambda 函数。编写 Lambda 函数以扫描所有当前 S3 存储桶的加密状态，并为任何没有加密配置的 S3 存储桶将 AES-256 设置为默认加密。

options.label: B
options.content: Set up and activate the s3-bucket-server-side-encryption-enabled AWS Config managed rule. Configure the rule to use the AWS-EnableS3BucketEncryption AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook as the remediation action. Manually run the re- evaluation process to ensure that existing S3 buckets are compliant.

contents.en: Set up and activate the s3-bucket-server-side-encryption-enabled AWS Config managed rule. Configure the rule to use the AWS-EnableS3BucketEncryption AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook as the remediation action. Manually run the re- evaluation process to ensure that existing S3 buckets are compliant.
contents.zh: 设置并激活 s3-bucket-server-side-encryption-enabled AWS Config managed rule。将该规则配置为使用 AWS-EnableS3BucketEncryption AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook 作为修复操作。手动运行重新评估过程，以确保现有 S3 存储桶合规。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function that is invoked by an Amazon EventBridge event rule. Define the rule with an event pattern that matches the creation of new S3 buckets. Program the Lambda function to parse the EventBridge event, check the configuration of the S3 buckets from the event, and set AES-256 as the default encryption.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that is invoked by an Amazon EventBridge event rule. Define the rule with an event pattern that matches the creation of new S3 buckets. Program the Lambda function to parse the EventBridge event, check the configuration of the S3 buckets from the event, and set AES-256 as the default encryption.
contents.zh: 创建一个由 Amazon EventBridge event rule 调用的 AWS Lambda 函数。使用与新 S3 存储桶创建相匹配的 event pattern 定义该规则。编写 Lambda 函数以解析 EventBridge 事件，检查事件中 S3 存储桶的配置，并将 AES-256 设置为默认加密。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure an IAM policy that denies the s3:CreateBucket action if the s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption condition key has a value that is not AES-256. Create an IAM group for all the company's IAM users. Associate the IAM policy with the IAM group.

contents.en: Configure an IAM policy that denies the s3:CreateBucket action if the s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption condition key has a value that is not AES-256. Create an IAM group for all the company's IAM users. Associate the IAM policy with the IAM group.
contents.zh: 配置一个 IAM policy：如果 s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption condition key 的值不是 AES-256，则拒绝 s3:CreateBucket action。为公司的所有 IAM 用户创建一个 IAM group。将 IAM policy 与 IAM group 关联。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。AWS Config managed rule s3-bucket-server-side-encryption-enabled 可检查 S3 加密合规性，并通过 AWS-EnableS3BucketEncryption runbook 修复；手动重新评估可覆盖已有 bucket。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。AWS Config managed rule s3-bucket-server-side-encryption-enabled 可检查 S3 加密合规性，并通过 AWS-EnableS3BucketEncryption runbook 修复；手动重新评估可覆盖已有 bucket。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. The s3-bucket-server-side-encryption-enabled AWS Config managed rule checks bucket encryption, the AWS-EnableS3BucketEncryption runbook remediates it, and manual re-evaluation covers existing buckets.

contents.en: A company is using Amazon S3 buckets to store important documents. The company discovers that some S3 buckets are not encrypted. Currently, the company's IAM users can create new S3 buckets without encryption. The company is implementing a new requirement that all S3 buckets must be encrypted. A DevOps engineer must implement a solution to ensure that server-side encryption is enabled on all existing S3 buckets and all new S3 buckets. The encryption must be enabled on new S3 buckets as soon as the S3 buckets are created. The default encryption type must be 256-bit Advanced Encryption Standard (AES-256). Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在使用 Amazon S3 存储桶存储重要文档。公司发现某些 S3 存储桶未加密。目前，公司的 IAM 用户可以创建未加密的新 S3 存储桶。公司正在实施一项新要求：所有 S3 存储桶都必须加密。DevOps 工程师必须实现一种解决方案，确保所有现有 S3 存储桶和所有新 S3 存储桶都启用服务器端加密。新 S3 存储桶创建后必须立即启用加密。默认加密类型必须是 256-bit Advanced Encryption Standard (AES-256)。哪种解决方案将满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is architecting a continuous development strategy for a company's software as a service (SaaS) web application running on AWS. For application and security reasons, users subscribing to this application are distributed across multiple Application Load Balancers (ALBs), each of which has a dedicated Auto Scaling group and fleet of Amazon EC2 instances. The application does not require a build stage, and when it is committed to AWS CodeCommit, the application must trigger a simultaneous deployment to all ALBs, Auto Scaling groups, and EC2 fleets. Which architecture will meet these requirements with the LEAST amount of configuration?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a single AWS CodePipeline pipeline that deploys the application in parallel using unique AWS CodeDeploy applications and deployment groups created for each ALB-Auto Scaling group pair.

contents.en: Create a single AWS CodePipeline pipeline that deploys the application in parallel using unique AWS CodeDeploy applications and deployment groups created for each ALB-Auto Scaling group pair.
contents.zh: 创建单个 AWS CodePipeline pipeline，使用为每个 ALB-Auto Scaling 组对创建的唯一 AWS CodeDeploy applications 和 deployment groups 并行部署应用程序。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a single AWS CodePipeline pipeline that deploys the application using a single AWS CodeDeploy application and single deployment group.

contents.en: Create a single AWS CodePipeline pipeline that deploys the application using a single AWS CodeDeploy application and single deployment group.
contents.zh: 创建单个 AWS CodePipeline pipeline，使用单个 AWS CodeDeploy application 和单个 deployment group 部署应用程序。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a single AWS CodePipeline pipeline that deploys the application in parallel using a single AWS CodeDeploy application and unique deployment group for each ALB-Auto Scaling group pair.

contents.en: Create a single AWS CodePipeline pipeline that deploys the application in parallel using a single AWS CodeDeploy application and unique deployment group for each ALB-Auto Scaling group pair.
contents.zh: 创建单个 AWS CodePipeline pipeline，使用单个 AWS CodeDeploy application 以及每个 ALB-Auto Scaling 组对各自唯一的 deployment group 并行部署应用程序。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline for each ALB-Auto Scaling group pair that deploys the application using an AWS CodeDeploy application and deployment group created for the same ALB-Auto Scaling group pair.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline for each ALB-Auto Scaling group pair that deploys the application using an AWS CodeDeploy application and deployment group created for the same ALB-Auto Scaling group pair.
contents.zh: 为每个 ALB-Auto Scaling 组对创建一个 AWS CodePipeline pipeline，使用为同一 ALB-Auto Scaling 组对创建的 AWS CodeDeploy application 和 deployment group 部署应用程序。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。一个 CodeDeploy application 可以配合多个 deployment group 使用；为每个 ALB 和 Auto Scaling group 组合创建唯一部署组，并由单个 CodePipeline 并行部署。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。一个 CodeDeploy application 可以配合多个 deployment group 使用；为每个 ALB 和 Auto Scaling group 组合创建唯一部署组，并由单个 CodePipeline 并行部署。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. One CodeDeploy application can use multiple deployment groups, so a single CodePipeline can deploy in parallel to unique deployment groups for each ALB and Auto Scaling group pair.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer is architecting a continuous development strategy for a company's software as a service (SaaS) web application running on AWS. For application and security reasons, users subscribing to this application are distributed across multiple Application Load Balancers (ALBs), each of which has a dedicated Auto Scaling group and fleet of Amazon EC2 instances. The application does not require a build stage, and when it is committed to AWS CodeCommit, the application must trigger a simultaneous deployment to all ALBs, Auto Scaling groups, and EC2 fleets. Which architecture will meet these requirements with the LEAST amount of configuration?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师正在为公司运行在 AWS 上的软件即服务 (SaaS) Web 应用程序设计持续开发策略。出于应用程序和安全原因，订阅该应用程序的用户分布在多个 Application Load Balancers (ALBs) 上，每个 ALB 都有专用的 Auto Scaling 组和 Amazon EC2 实例队列。该应用程序不需要构建阶段，并且当应用程序提交到 AWS CodeCommit 时，必须触发同时部署到所有 ALBs、Auto Scaling 组和 EC2 队列。哪种架构将以最少的配置满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company is hosting a static website from an Amazon S3 bucket. The website is available to customers at example.com. The company uses an Amazon Route 53 weighted routing policy with a TTL of 1 day. The company has decided to replace the existing static website with a dynamic web application. The dynamic web application uses an Application Load Balancer (ALB) in front of a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances. On the day of production launch to customers, the company creates an additional Route 53 weighted DNS record entry that points to the ALB with a weight of 255 and a TTL of 1 hour. Two days later, a DevOps engineer notices that the previous static website is displayed sometimes when customers navigate to example.com. How can the DevOps engineer ensure that the company serves only dynamic content for example.com?

options.label: A
options.content: Delete all objects, including previous versions, from the S3 bucket that contains the static website content.

contents.en: Delete all objects, including previous versions, from the S3 bucket that contains the static website content.
contents.zh: 从包含静态网站内容的 S3 存储桶中删除所有对象，包括先前版本。

options.label: B
options.content: Update the weighted DNS record entry that points to the S3 bucket. Apply a weight of 0. Specify the domain reset option to propagate changes immediately.

contents.en: Update the weighted DNS record entry that points to the S3 bucket. Apply a weight of 0. Specify the domain reset option to propagate changes immediately.
contents.zh: 更新指向 S3 存储桶的 weighted DNS record entry。应用 weight 0。指定 domain reset 选项以立即传播更改。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure webpage redirect requests on the S3 bucket with a hostname that redirects to the ALB.

contents.en: Configure webpage redirect requests on the S3 bucket with a hostname that redirects to the ALB.
contents.zh: 在 S3 存储桶上配置网页重定向请求，使用重定向到 ALB 的 hostname。

options.label: D
options.content: Remove the weighted DNS record entry that points to the S3 bucket from the example.com hosted zone. Wait for DNS propagation to become complete.

contents.en: Remove the weighted DNS record entry that points to the S3 bucket from the example.com hosted zone. Wait for DNS propagation to become complete.
contents.zh: 从 example.com hosted zone 中移除指向 S3 存储桶的 weighted DNS record entry。等待 DNS 传播完成。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。讨论指出当非零权重记录都不健康时，Route 53 可能考虑零权重记录；因此应从托管区域中删除指向 S3 bucket 的加权记录并等待 DNS 传播完成。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。讨论指出当非零权重记录都不健康时，Route 53 可能考虑零权重记录；因此应从托管区域中删除指向 S3 bucket 的加权记录并等待 DNS 传播完成。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. The discussion notes that Route 53 can consider zero-weighted records when all nonzero weighted records are unhealthy, so the weighted DNS record pointing to the S3 bucket should be removed and DNS propagation allowed to complete.

contents.en: A company is hosting a static website from an Amazon S3 bucket. The website is available to customers at example.com. The company uses an Amazon Route 53 weighted routing policy with a TTL of 1 day. The company has decided to replace the existing static website with a dynamic web application. The dynamic web application uses an Application Load Balancer (ALB) in front of a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances. On the day of production launch to customers, the company creates an additional Route 53 weighted DNS record entry that points to the ALB with a weight of 255 and a TTL of 1 hour. Two days later, a DevOps engineer notices that the previous static website is displayed sometimes when customers navigate to example.com. How can the DevOps engineer ensure that the company serves only dynamic content for example.com?
contents.zh: 一家公司从 Amazon S3 存储桶托管静态网站。客户可以通过 example.com 访问该网站。公司使用 Amazon Route 53 weighted routing policy，TTL 为 1 天。公司决定用动态 Web 应用程序替换现有静态网站。动态 Web 应用程序使用 Application Load Balancer (ALB) 置于一组 Amazon EC2 实例前面。在向客户生产发布当天，公司创建了一个额外的 Route 53 weighted DNS record entry，该记录指向 ALB，weight 为 255，TTL 为 1 小时。两天后，DevOps 工程师注意到，当客户导航到 example.com 时，有时会显示先前的静态网站。DevOps 工程师如何确保公司只为 example.com 提供动态内容？

questions.content: A company is implementing AWS CodePipeline to automate its testing process. The company wants to be notified when the execution state fails and used the following custom event pattern in Amazon EventBridge: Which type of events will match this event pattern?

options.label: A
options.content: Failed deploy and build actions across all the pipelines

contents.en: Failed deploy and build actions across all the pipelines
contents.zh: 所有 pipelines 中失败的部署和构建 actions

options.label: B
options.content: All rejected or failed approval actions across all the pipelines

contents.en: All rejected or failed approval actions across all the pipelines
contents.zh: 所有 pipelines 中所有被拒绝或失败的 approval actions

options.label: C
options.content: All the events across all pipelines

contents.en: All the events across all pipelines
contents.zh: 所有 pipelines 中的所有事件

options.label: D
options.content: Approval actions across all the pipelines

contents.en: Approval actions across all the pipelines
contents.zh: 所有 pipelines 中的 approval actions

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。该事件模式用于捕获所有流水线中被拒绝或失败的审批操作，因此 B 与讨论中说明的目标一致。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。该事件模式用于捕获所有流水线中被拒绝或失败的审批操作，因此 B 与讨论中说明的目标一致。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. The referenced event pattern is for capturing all rejected or failed approval actions across all pipelines, which matches option B.

contents.en: A company is implementing AWS CodePipeline to automate its testing process. The company wants to be notified when the execution state fails and used the following custom event pattern in Amazon EventBridge: Which type of events will match this event pattern?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在实施 AWS CodePipeline 以自动化其测试过程。公司希望在执行状态失败时收到通知，并在 Amazon EventBridge 中使用了以下自定义 event pattern：哪类事件会匹配此 event pattern？

questions.content: An application running on a set of Amazon EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group requires a configuration file to operate. The instances are created and maintained with AWS CloudFormation. A DevOps engineer wants the instances to have the latest configuration file when launched, and wants changes to the configuration file to be reflected on all the instances with a minimal delay when the CloudFormation template is updated. Company policy requires that application configuration files be maintained along with AWS infrastructure configuration files in source control. Which solution will accomplish this?

options.label: A
options.content: In the CloudFormation template, add an AWS Config rule. Place the configuration file content in the rule's InputParameters property, and set the Scope property to the EC2 Auto Scaling group. Add an AWS Systems Manager Resource Data Sync resource to the template to poll for updates to the configuration.

contents.en: In the CloudFormation template, add an AWS Config rule. Place the configuration file content in the rule's InputParameters property, and set the Scope property to the EC2 Auto Scaling group. Add an AWS Systems Manager Resource Data Sync resource to the template to poll for updates to the configuration.
contents.zh: 在 CloudFormation 模板中，添加一个 AWS Config rule。将配置文件内容放入该 rule 的 InputParameters 属性中，并将 Scope 属性设置为 EC2 Auto Scaling 组。向模板添加一个 AWS Systems Manager Resource Data Sync 资源，用于轮询配置更新。

options.label: B
options.content: In the CloudFormation template, add an EC2 launch template resource. Place the configuration file content in the launch template. Configure the cfn-init script to run when the instance is launched, and configure the cfn-hup script to poll for updates to the configuration.

contents.en: In the CloudFormation template, add an EC2 launch template resource. Place the configuration file content in the launch template. Configure the cfn-init script to run when the instance is launched, and configure the cfn-hup script to poll for updates to the configuration.
contents.zh: 在 CloudFormation 模板中，添加一个 EC2 launch template 资源。将配置文件内容放入 launch template。配置 cfn-init script 在实例启动时运行，并配置 cfn-hup script 轮询配置更新。

options.label: C
options.content: In the CloudFormation template, add an EC2 launch template resource. Place the configuration file content in the launch template. Add an AWS Systems Manager Resource Data Sync resource to the template to poll for updates to the configuration.

contents.en: In the CloudFormation template, add an EC2 launch template resource. Place the configuration file content in the launch template. Add an AWS Systems Manager Resource Data Sync resource to the template to poll for updates to the configuration.
contents.zh: 在 CloudFormation 模板中，添加一个 EC2 launch template 资源。将配置文件内容放入 launch template。向模板添加一个 AWS Systems Manager Resource Data Sync 资源，用于轮询配置更新。

options.label: D
options.content: In the CloudFormation template, add CloudFormation init metadata. Place the configuration file content in the metadata. Configure the cfn-init script to run when the instance is launched, and configure the cfn-hup script to poll for updates to the configuration.

contents.en: In the CloudFormation template, add CloudFormation init metadata. Place the configuration file content in the metadata. Configure the cfn-init script to run when the instance is launched, and configure the cfn-hup script to poll for updates to the configuration.
contents.zh: 在 CloudFormation 模板中，添加 CloudFormation init metadata。将配置文件内容放入 metadata。配置 cfn-init script 在实例启动时运行，并配置 cfn-hup script 轮询配置更新。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。CloudFormation init metadata 可在模板中保存配置内容，cfn-init 在实例启动时应用配置，cfn-hup 轮询更新以便后续配置变更生效。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。CloudFormation init metadata 可在模板中保存配置内容，cfn-init 在实例启动时应用配置，cfn-hup 轮询更新以便后续配置变更生效。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. CloudFormation init metadata stores the configuration, cfn-init applies it when the instance launches, and cfn-hup polls for updates to apply later changes.

contents.en: An application running on a set of Amazon EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group requires a configuration file to operate. The instances are created and maintained with AWS CloudFormation. A DevOps engineer wants the instances to have the latest configuration file when launched, and wants changes to the configuration file to be reflected on all the instances with a minimal delay when the CloudFormation template is updated. Company policy requires that application configuration files be maintained along with AWS infrastructure configuration files in source control. Which solution will accomplish this?
contents.zh: 在 Auto Scaling 组中一组 Amazon EC2 实例上运行的应用程序需要一个配置文件才能运行。这些实例使用 AWS CloudFormation 创建和维护。DevOps 工程师希望实例在启动时拥有最新的配置文件，并希望在更新 CloudFormation 模板时，配置文件的更改能以最小延迟反映到所有实例上。公司政策要求应用程序配置文件与 AWS 基础设施配置文件一起在源代码控制中维护。哪种解决方案可以实现这一点？

questions.content: A company manages an application that stores logs in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. The company wants to archive the logs to an Amazon S3 bucket. Logs are rarely accessed after 90 days and must be retained for 10 years. Which combination of steps should a DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Configure a CloudWatch Logs subscription filter to use AWS Glue to transfer all logs to an S3 bucket.

contents.en: Configure a CloudWatch Logs subscription filter to use AWS Glue to transfer all logs to an S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 配置 CloudWatch Logs subscription filter，使用 AWS Glue 将所有日志传输到 S3 存储桶。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure a CloudWatch Logs subscription filter to use Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose to stream all logs to an S3 bucket.

contents.en: Configure a CloudWatch Logs subscription filter to use Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose to stream all logs to an S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 配置 CloudWatch Logs subscription filter，使用 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 将所有日志流式传输到 S3 存储桶。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure a CloudWatch Logs subscription filter to stream all logs to an S3 bucket.

contents.en: Configure a CloudWatch Logs subscription filter to stream all logs to an S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 配置 CloudWatch Logs subscription filter，将所有日志流式传输到 S3 存储桶。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure the S3 bucket lifecycle policy to transition logs to S3 Glacier after 90 days and to expire logs after 3.650 days.

contents.en: Configure the S3 bucket lifecycle policy to transition logs to S3 Glacier after 90 days and to expire logs after 3.650 days.
contents.zh: 配置 S3 存储桶 lifecycle policy，在 90 天后将日志转换到 S3 Glacier，并在 3.650 天后使日志过期。

options.label: E
options.content: Configure the S3 bucket lifecycle policy to transition logs to Reduced Redundancy after 90 days and to expire logs after 3.650 days.

contents.en: Configure the S3 bucket lifecycle policy to transition logs to Reduced Redundancy after 90 days and to expire logs after 3.650 days.
contents.zh: 配置 S3 存储桶 lifecycle policy，在 90 天后将日志转换到 Reduced Redundancy，并在 3.650 天后使日志过期。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B 和 D。B 使用 CloudWatch Logs subscription filter 将日志通过 Kinesis Data Firehose 流式写入 S3；D 通过 S3 生命周期策略在 90 天后转入 Glacier，并在保留期结束后过期删除。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B 和 D。B 使用 CloudWatch Logs subscription filter 将日志通过 Kinesis Data Firehose 流式写入 S3；D 通过 S3 生命周期策略在 90 天后转入 Glacier，并在保留期结束后过期删除。
explanations.en: The correct answers are B and D. B streams CloudWatch Logs to S3 through Kinesis Data Firehose, and D uses an S3 lifecycle policy to transition logs to Glacier after 90 days and expire them after the retention period.

contents.en: A company manages an application that stores logs in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. The company wants to archive the logs to an Amazon S3 bucket. Logs are rarely accessed after 90 days and must be retained for 10 years. Which combination of steps should a DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司管理一个将日志存储在 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 中的应用程序。公司希望将日志归档到 Amazon S3 存储桶。日志在 90 天后很少被访问，并且必须保留 10 年。DevOps 工程师应采取哪组步骤来满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company is developing a new application. The application uses AWS Lambda functions for its compute tier. The company must use a canary deployment for any changes to the Lambda functions. Automated rollback must occur if any failures are reported. The company's DevOps team needs to create the infrastructure as code (IaC) and the CI/CD pipeline for this solution. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS CloudFormation template for the application. Define each Lambda function in the template by using the AWS::Lambda::Function resource type. In the template, include a version for the Lambda function by using the AWS::Lambda::Version resource type. Declare the CodeSha256 property. Configure an AWS::Lambda::Alias resource that references the latest version of the Lambda function.

contents.en: Create an AWS CloudFormation template for the application. Define each Lambda function in the template by using the AWS::Lambda::Function resource type. In the template, include a version for the Lambda function by using the AWS::Lambda::Version resource type. Declare the CodeSha256 property. Configure an AWS::Lambda::Alias resource that references the latest version of the Lambda function.
contents.zh: 为应用程序创建一个 AWS CloudFormation 模板。使用 AWS::Lambda::Function resource type 在模板中定义每个 Lambda 函数。在模板中，使用 AWS::Lambda::Version resource type 为 Lambda 函数包含一个版本。声明 CodeSha256 属性。配置一个引用 Lambda 函数最新版本的 AWS::Lambda::Alias 资源。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS Serverless Application Model (AWS SAM) template for the application. Define each Lambda function in the template by using the AWS::Serverless::Function resource type. For each function, include configurations for the AutoPublishAlias property and the DeploymentPreference property. Configure the deployment configuration type to LambdaCanary10Percent10Minutes.

contents.en: Create an AWS Serverless Application Model (AWS SAM) template for the application. Define each Lambda function in the template by using the AWS::Serverless::Function resource type. For each function, include configurations for the AutoPublishAlias property and the DeploymentPreference property. Configure the deployment configuration type to LambdaCanary10Percent10Minutes.
contents.zh: 为应用程序创建一个 AWS Serverless Application Model (AWS SAM) 模板。使用 AWS::Serverless::Function resource type 在模板中定义每个 Lambda 函数。对于每个函数，包含 AutoPublishAlias 属性和 DeploymentPreference 属性的配置。将 deployment configuration type 配置为 LambdaCanary10Percent10Minutes。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS CodeCommit repository. Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline. Use the CodeCommit repository in a new source stage that starts the pipeline. Create an AWS CodeBuild project to deploy the AWS Serverless Application Model (AWS SAM) template. Upload the template and source code to the CodeCommit repository. In the CodeCommit repository, create a buildspec.yml file that includes the commands to build and deploy the SAM application.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodeCommit repository. Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline. Use the CodeCommit repository in a new source stage that starts the pipeline. Create an AWS CodeBuild project to deploy the AWS Serverless Application Model (AWS SAM) template. Upload the template and source code to the CodeCommit repository. In the CodeCommit repository, create a buildspec.yml file that includes the commands to build and deploy the SAM application.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CodeCommit 存储库。创建一个 AWS CodePipeline pipeline。使用 CodeCommit 存储库作为启动 pipeline 的新 source stage。创建一个 AWS CodeBuild 项目来部署 AWS Serverless Application Model (AWS SAM) 模板。将模板和源代码上传到 CodeCommit 存储库。在 CodeCommit 存储库中，创建一个 buildspec.yml 文件，其中包含构建和部署 SAM 应用程序的命令。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS CodeCommit repository. Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline. Use the CodeCommit repository in a new source stage that starts the pipeline. Create an AWS CodeDeploy deployment group that is configured for canary deployments with a DeploymentPreference type of Canary10Percent10Minutes. Upload the AWS CloudFormation template and source code to the CodeCommit repository. In the CodeCommit repository, create an appspec.yml file that includes the commands to deploy the CloudFormation template.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodeCommit repository. Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline. Use the CodeCommit repository in a new source stage that starts the pipeline. Create an AWS CodeDeploy deployment group that is configured for canary deployments with a DeploymentPreference type of Canary10Percent10Minutes. Upload the AWS CloudFormation template and source code to the CodeCommit repository. In the CodeCommit repository, create an appspec.yml file that includes the commands to deploy the CloudFormation template.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CodeCommit 存储库。创建一个 AWS CodePipeline pipeline。使用 CodeCommit 存储库作为启动 pipeline 的新 source stage。创建一个配置为 canary deployments 且 DeploymentPreference type 为 Canary10Percent10Minutes 的 AWS CodeDeploy deployment group。将 AWS CloudFormation 模板和源代码上传到 CodeCommit 存储库。在 CodeCommit 存储库中，创建一个 appspec.yml 文件，其中包含部署 CloudFormation 模板的命令。

options.label: E
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch composite alarm for all the Lambda functions. Configure an evaluation period and dimensions for Lambda. Configure the alarm to enter the ALARM state if any errors are detected or if there is insufficient data.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch composite alarm for all the Lambda functions. Configure an evaluation period and dimensions for Lambda. Configure the alarm to enter the ALARM state if any errors are detected or if there is insufficient data.
contents.zh: 为所有 Lambda 函数创建一个 Amazon CloudWatch composite alarm。为 Lambda 配置 evaluation period 和 dimensions。如果检测到任何错误或数据不足，则配置 alarm 进入 ALARM 状态。

options.label: F
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for each Lambda function. Configure the alarms to enter the ALARM state if any errors are detected. Configure an evaluation period, dimensions for each Lambda function and version, and the namespace as AWS/Lambda on the Errors metric.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for each Lambda function. Configure the alarms to enter the ALARM state if any errors are detected. Configure an evaluation period, dimensions for each Lambda function and version, and the namespace as AWS/Lambda on the Errors metric.
contents.zh: 为每个 Lambda 函数创建一个 Amazon CloudWatch alarm。配置 alarms，使其在检测到任何错误时进入 ALARM 状态。为每个 Lambda 函数和版本配置 evaluation period、dimensions，并将 namespace 配置为 AWS/Lambda 上的 Errors metric。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B、C 和 F。B 在 SAM 模板中为 Lambda 配置 AutoPublishAlias 和 canary DeploymentPreference；C 用 CodeCommit、CodePipeline 和 CodeBuild 构建部署 SAM 应用；F 为每个 Lambda 版本配置错误告警。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B、C 和 F。B 在 SAM 模板中为 Lambda 配置 AutoPublishAlias 和 canary DeploymentPreference；C 用 CodeCommit、CodePipeline 和 CodeBuild 构建部署 SAM 应用；F 为每个 Lambda 版本配置错误告警。
explanations.en: The correct answers are B, C, and F. B defines Lambda canary deployment settings in SAM, C creates the CodeCommit, CodePipeline, and CodeBuild deployment flow for the SAM app, and F adds CloudWatch error alarms for each Lambda function version.

contents.en: A company is developing a new application. The application uses AWS Lambda functions for its compute tier. The company must use a canary deployment for any changes to the Lambda functions. Automated rollback must occur if any failures are reported. The company's DevOps team needs to create the infrastructure as code (IaC) and the CI/CD pipeline for this solution. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司正在开发一个新应用程序。该应用程序使用 AWS Lambda 函数作为其计算层。公司必须对 Lambda 函数的任何更改使用 canary deployment。如果报告任何故障，必须自动回滚。公司的 DevOps 团队需要为此解决方案创建基础设施即代码 (IaC) 和 CI/CD pipeline。哪组步骤将满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is deploying a new version of a company's application in an AWS CodeDeploy deployment group associated with its Amazon EC2 instances. After some time, the deployment fails. The engineer realizes that all the events associated with the specific deployment ID are in a Skipped status, and code was not deployed in the instances associated with the deployment group. What are valid reasons for this failure? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: The networking configuration does not allow the EC2 instances to reach the internet via a NAT gateway or internet gateway, and the CodeDeploy endpoint cannot be reached.

contents.en: The networking configuration does not allow the EC2 instances to reach the internet via a NAT gateway or internet gateway, and the CodeDeploy endpoint cannot be reached.
contents.zh: 网络配置不允许 EC2 实例通过 NAT gateway 或 internet gateway 访问互联网，并且无法访问 CodeDeploy endpoint。

options.label: B
options.content: The IAM user who triggered the application deployment does not have permission to interact with the CodeDeploy endpoint.

contents.en: The IAM user who triggered the application deployment does not have permission to interact with the CodeDeploy endpoint.
contents.zh: 触发应用程序部署的 IAM 用户没有与 CodeDeploy endpoint 交互的权限。

options.label: C
options.content: The target EC2 instances were not properly registered with the CodeDeploy endpoint.

contents.en: The target EC2 instances were not properly registered with the CodeDeploy endpoint.
contents.zh: 目标 EC2 实例未正确注册到 CodeDeploy endpoint。

options.label: D
options.content: An instance profile with proper permissions was not attached to the target EC2 instances.

contents.en: An instance profile with proper permissions was not attached to the target EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 未将具有适当权限的 instance profile 附加到目标 EC2 实例。

options.label: E
options.content: The appspec.yml file was not included in the application revision.

contents.en: The appspec.yml file was not included in the application revision.
contents.zh: 应用程序修订版中未包含 appspec.yml 文件。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A 和 D。A 说明实例网络无法通过 NAT gateway 或 internet gateway 访问 CodeDeploy endpoint 会导致部署失败；D 说明目标 EC2 实例缺少具备适当权限的 instance profile 也会失败。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A 和 D。A 说明实例网络无法通过 NAT gateway 或 internet gateway 访问 CodeDeploy endpoint 会导致部署失败；D 说明目标 EC2 实例缺少具备适当权限的 instance profile 也会失败。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A and D. A covers EC2 instances being unable to reach the CodeDeploy endpoint through NAT or an internet gateway, and D covers missing instance profile permissions on the target instances.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer is deploying a new version of a company's application in an AWS CodeDeploy deployment group associated with its Amazon EC2 instances. After some time, the deployment fails. The engineer realizes that all the events associated with the specific deployment ID are in a Skipped status, and code was not deployed in the instances associated with the deployment group. What are valid reasons for this failure? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师正在与其 Amazon EC2 实例关联的 AWS CodeDeploy deployment group 中部署公司应用程序的新版本。过了一段时间后，部署失败。工程师意识到，与特定 deployment ID 关联的所有事件都处于 Skipped 状态，并且代码未部署到与 deployment group 关联的实例中。此故障的有效原因是什么？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company has a guideline that every Amazon EC2 instance must be launched from an AMI that the company's security team produces. Every month, the security team sends an email message with the latest approved AMIs to all the development teams. The development teams use AWS CloudFormation to deploy their applications. When developers launch a new service, they have to search their email for the latest AMIs that the security department sent. A DevOps engineer wants to automate the process that the security team uses to provide the AMI IDs to the development teams. What is the MOST scalable solution that meets these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Direct the security team to use CloudFormation to create new versions of the AMIs and to list the AMI ARNs in an encrypted Amazon S3 object as part of the stack's Outputs section. Instruct the developers to use a cross-stack reference to load the encrypted S3 object and obtain the most recent AMI ARNs.

contents.en: Direct the security team to use CloudFormation to create new versions of the AMIs and to list the AMI ARNs in an encrypted Amazon S3 object as part of the stack's Outputs section. Instruct the developers to use a cross-stack reference to load the encrypted S3 object and obtain the most recent AMI ARNs.
contents.zh: 指示安全团队使用 CloudFormation 创建新版本的 AMIs，并在堆栈 Outputs section 中将 AMI ARNs 列入加密的 Amazon S3 对象。指示开发人员使用 cross-stack reference 加载加密的 S3 对象并获取最新的 AMI ARNs。

options.label: B
options.content: Direct the security team to use a CloudFormation stack to create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that builds new AMIs and places the latest AMI ARNs in an encrypted Amazon S3 object as part of the pipeline output. Instruct the developers to use a cross-stack reference within their own CloudFormation template to obtain the S3 object location and the most recent AMI ARNs.

contents.en: Direct the security team to use a CloudFormation stack to create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that builds new AMIs and places the latest AMI ARNs in an encrypted Amazon S3 object as part of the pipeline output. Instruct the developers to use a cross-stack reference within their own CloudFormation template to obtain the S3 object location and the most recent AMI ARNs.
contents.zh: 指示安全团队使用 CloudFormation stack 创建一个 AWS CodePipeline pipeline，用于构建新的 AMIs，并将最新 AMI ARNs 作为 pipeline output 放入加密的 Amazon S3 对象。指示开发人员在自己的 CloudFormation 模板中使用 cross-stack reference 获取 S3 对象位置和最新 AMI ARNs。

options.label: C
options.content: Direct the security team to use Amazon EC2 Image Builder to create new AMIs and to place the AMI ARNs as parameters in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store. Instruct the developers to specify a parameter of type SSM in their CloudFormation stack to obtain the most recent AMI ARNs from Parameter Store.

contents.en: Direct the security team to use Amazon EC2 Image Builder to create new AMIs and to place the AMI ARNs as parameters in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store. Instruct the developers to specify a parameter of type SSM in their CloudFormation stack to obtain the most recent AMI ARNs from Parameter Store.
contents.zh: 指示安全团队使用 Amazon EC2 Image Builder 创建新的 AMIs，并将 AMI ARNs 作为参数放入 AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store。指示开发人员在其 CloudFormation stack 中指定 SSM 类型的参数，以从 Parameter Store 获取最新的 AMI ARNs。

options.label: D
options.content: Direct the security team to use Amazon EC2 Image Builder to create new AMIs and to create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic so that every development team can receive notifications. When the development teams receive a notification, instruct them to write an AWS Lambda function that will update their CloudFormation stack with the most recent AMI ARNs.

contents.en: Direct the security team to use Amazon EC2 Image Builder to create new AMIs and to create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic so that every development team can receive notifications. When the development teams receive a notification, instruct them to write an AWS Lambda function that will update their CloudFormation stack with the most recent AMI ARNs.
contents.zh: 指示安全团队使用 Amazon EC2 Image Builder 创建新的 AMIs，并创建一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题，以便每个开发团队都能接收通知。当开发团队收到通知时，指示他们编写一个 AWS Lambda 函数，用最新的 AMI ARNs 更新其 CloudFormation stack。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。安全团队用 EC2 Image Builder 自动创建 AMI，并将 AMI ARN 放入 Systems Manager Parameter Store；开发团队在 CloudFormation 中使用 SSM 参数类型即可获取最新 AMI ARN。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。安全团队用 EC2 Image Builder 自动创建 AMI，并将 AMI ARN 放入 Systems Manager Parameter Store；开发团队在 CloudFormation 中使用 SSM 参数类型即可获取最新 AMI ARN。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. EC2 Image Builder automates AMI creation, Parameter Store holds the AMI ARNs, and developers can reference SSM parameters in CloudFormation to use the latest AMIs.

contents.en: A company has a guideline that every Amazon EC2 instance must be launched from an AMI that the company's security team produces. Every month, the security team sends an email message with the latest approved AMIs to all the development teams. The development teams use AWS CloudFormation to deploy their applications. When developers launch a new service, they have to search their email for the latest AMIs that the security department sent. A DevOps engineer wants to automate the process that the security team uses to provide the AMI IDs to the development teams. What is the MOST scalable solution that meets these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一项准则：每个 Amazon EC2 实例都必须从公司安全团队生成的 AMI 启动。每个月，安全团队都会向所有开发团队发送一封电子邮件，其中包含最新批准的 AMIs。开发团队使用 AWS CloudFormation 部署其应用程序。当开发人员启动新服务时，他们必须在电子邮件中查找安全部门发送的最新 AMIs。DevOps 工程师希望自动化安全团队向开发团队提供 AMI IDs 的流程。满足这些要求的最具可扩展性的解决方案是什么？

questions.content: An application runs on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). A DevOps engineer is using AWS CodeDeploy to release a new version. The deployment fails during the AllowTraffic lifecycle event, but a cause for the failure is not indicated in the deployment logs. What would cause this?

options.label: A
options.content: The appspec.yml file contains an invalid script that runs in the AllowTraffic lifecycle hook.

contents.en: The appspec.yml file contains an invalid script that runs in the AllowTraffic lifecycle hook.
contents.zh: appspec.yml 文件包含在 AllowTraffic lifecycle hook 中运行的无效脚本。

options.label: B
options.content: The user who initiated the deployment does not have the necessary permissions to interact with the ALB.

contents.en: The user who initiated the deployment does not have the necessary permissions to interact with the ALB.
contents.zh: 启动部署的用户没有与 ALB 交互所需的权限。

options.label: C
options.content: The health checks specified for the ALB target group are misconfigured.

contents.en: The health checks specified for the ALB target group are misconfigured.
contents.zh: 为 ALB target group 指定的 health checks 配置错误。

options.label: D
options.content: The CodeDeploy agent was not installed in the EC2 instances that are part of the ALB target group.

contents.en: The CodeDeploy agent was not installed in the EC2 instances that are part of the ALB target group.
contents.zh: CodeDeploy agent 未安装在属于 ALB target group 的 EC2 实例中。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。如果 ALB target group 的健康检查配置错误，CodeDeploy 在切换流量时可能无法确认目标健康，从而导致部署问题。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。如果 ALB target group 的健康检查配置错误，CodeDeploy 在切换流量时可能无法确认目标健康，从而导致部署问题。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. Misconfigured ALB target group health checks can prevent CodeDeploy from validating healthy targets during traffic shifting, causing the deployment issue.

contents.en: An application runs on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). A DevOps engineer is using AWS CodeDeploy to release a new version. The deployment fails during the AllowTraffic lifecycle event, but a cause for the failure is not indicated in the deployment logs. What would cause this?
contents.zh: 一个应用程序运行在 Application Load Balancer (ALB) 后面的 Amazon EC2 实例上。DevOps 工程师正在使用 AWS CodeDeploy 发布新版本。部署在 AllowTraffic lifecycle event 期间失败，但部署日志中未指明失败原因。什么会导致这种情况？

questions.content: A company has 20 service teams. Each service team is responsible for its own microservice. Each service team uses a separate AWS account for its microservice and a VPC with the 192.168.0.0/22 CIDR block. The company manages the AWS accounts with AWS Organizations. Each service team hosts its microservice on multiple Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer. The microservices communicate with each other across the public internet. The company's security team has issued a new guideline that all communication between microservices must use HTTPS over private network connections and cannot traverse the public internet. A DevOps engineer must implement a solution that fulfills these obligations and minimizes the number of changes for each service team. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a new AWS account in AWS Organizations. Create a VPC in this account, and use AWS Resource Access Manager to share the private subnets of this VPC with the organization. Instruct the service teams to launch a new Network Load Balancer (NLB) and EC2 instances that use the shared private subnets. Use the NLB DNS names for communication between microservices.

contents.en: Create a new AWS account in AWS Organizations. Create a VPC in this account, and use AWS Resource Access Manager to share the private subnets of this VPC with the organization. Instruct the service teams to launch a new Network Load Balancer (NLB) and EC2 instances that use the shared private subnets. Use the NLB DNS names for communication between microservices.
contents.zh: 在 AWS Organizations 中创建一个新的 AWS 账户。在此账户中创建一个 VPC，并使用 AWS Resource Access Manager 与组织共享此 VPC 的私有子网。指示服务团队启动一个新的 Network Load Balancer (NLB) 和使用共享私有子网的 EC2 实例。使用 NLB DNS names 进行微服务之间的通信。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a Network Load Balancer (NLB) in each of the microservice VPCs. Use AWS PrivateLink to create VPC endpoints in each AWS account for the NLBs. Create subscriptions to each VPC endpoint in each of the other AWS accounts. Use the VPC endpoint DNS names for communication between microservices.

contents.en: Create a Network Load Balancer (NLB) in each of the microservice VPCs. Use AWS PrivateLink to create VPC endpoints in each AWS account for the NLBs. Create subscriptions to each VPC endpoint in each of the other AWS accounts. Use the VPC endpoint DNS names for communication between microservices.
contents.zh: 在每个微服务 VPC 中创建一个 Network Load Balancer (NLB)。使用 AWS PrivateLink 在每个 AWS 账户中为这些 NLBs 创建 VPC endpoints。在其他每个 AWS 账户中为每个 VPC endpoint 创建订阅。使用 VPC endpoint DNS names 进行微服务之间的通信。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a Network Load Balancer (NLB) in each of the microservice VPCs. Create VPC peering connections between each of the microservice VPCs. Update the route tables for each VPC to use the peering links. Use the NLB DNS names for communication between microservices.

contents.en: Create a Network Load Balancer (NLB) in each of the microservice VPCs. Create VPC peering connections between each of the microservice VPCs. Update the route tables for each VPC to use the peering links. Use the NLB DNS names for communication between microservices.
contents.zh: 在每个微服务 VPC 中创建一个 Network Load Balancer (NLB)。在每个微服务 VPC 之间创建 VPC peering connections。更新每个 VPC 的 route tables 以使用 peering links。使用 NLB DNS names 进行微服务之间的通信。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a new AWS account in AWS Organizations. Create a transit gateway in this account, and use AWS Resource Access Manager to share the transit gateway with the organization. In each of the microservice VPCs, create a transit gateway attachment to the shared transit gateway. Update the route tables of each VPC to use the transit gateway. Create a Network Load Balancer (NLB) in each of the microservice VPCs. Use the NLB DNS names for communication between microservices.

contents.en: Create a new AWS account in AWS Organizations. Create a transit gateway in this account, and use AWS Resource Access Manager to share the transit gateway with the organization. In each of the microservice VPCs, create a transit gateway attachment to the shared transit gateway. Update the route tables of each VPC to use the transit gateway. Create a Network Load Balancer (NLB) in each of the microservice VPCs. Use the NLB DNS names for communication between microservices.
contents.zh: 在 AWS Organizations 中创建一个新的 AWS 账户。在此账户中创建一个 transit gateway，并使用 AWS Resource Access Manager 与组织共享该 transit gateway。在每个微服务 VPC 中，创建到共享 transit gateway 的 transit gateway attachment。更新每个 VPC 的 route tables 以使用 transit gateway。在每个微服务 VPC 中创建一个 Network Load Balancer (NLB)。使用 NLB DNS names 进行微服务之间的通信。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。讨论指出各账户 VPC 使用重叠 CIDR，因此不能依赖需要非重叠 CIDR 的 Transit Gateway 路由；NLB 配合 AWS PrivateLink 和 VPC endpoint DNS 可支持跨账户微服务通信。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。讨论指出各账户 VPC 使用重叠 CIDR，因此不能依赖需要非重叠 CIDR 的 Transit Gateway 路由；NLB 配合 AWS PrivateLink 和 VPC endpoint DNS 可支持跨账户微服务通信。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. Because the VPCs have overlapping CIDR ranges, the discussed Transit Gateway approach is not suitable; NLBs with AWS PrivateLink and VPC endpoint DNS names support communication between the microservices.

contents.en: A company has 20 service teams. Each service team is responsible for its own microservice. Each service team uses a separate AWS account for its microservice and a VPC with the 192.168.0.0/22 CIDR block. The company manages the AWS accounts with AWS Organizations. Each service team hosts its microservice on multiple Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer. The microservices communicate with each other across the public internet. The company's security team has issued a new guideline that all communication between microservices must use HTTPS over private network connections and cannot traverse the public internet. A DevOps engineer must implement a solution that fulfills these obligations and minimizes the number of changes for each service team. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司有 20 个服务团队。每个服务团队负责自己的微服务。每个服务团队都为其微服务使用单独的 AWS 账户，以及一个使用 192.168.0.0/22 CIDR block 的 VPC。公司使用 AWS Organizations 管理 AWS 账户。每个服务团队在 Application Load Balancer 后面的多个 Amazon EC2 实例上托管其微服务。微服务之间通过公网互联网相互通信。公司的安全团队发布了一项新准则：微服务之间的所有通信都必须通过私有网络连接使用 HTTPS，且不能经过公网互联网。DevOps 工程师必须实现一种解决方案，以履行这些义务，并最大限度减少每个服务团队所需的更改。哪种解决方案将满足这些要求？

questions.content: An Amazon EC2 instance is running in a VPC and needs to download an object from a restricted Amazon S3 bucket. When the DevOps engineer tries to download the object, an AccessDenied error is received. What are the possible causes for this error? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: The S3 bucket default encryption is enabled.

contents.en: The S3 bucket default encryption is enabled.
contents.zh: 已启用 S3 存储桶默认加密。

options.label: B
options.content: There is an error in the S3 bucket policy.

contents.en: There is an error in the S3 bucket policy.
contents.zh: S3 bucket policy 中存在错误。

options.label: C
options.content: The object has been moved to S3 Glacier.

contents.en: The object has been moved to S3 Glacier.
contents.zh: 该对象已移至 S3 Glacier。

options.label: D
options.content: There is an error in the IAM role configuration.

contents.en: There is an error in the IAM role configuration.
contents.zh: IAM role 配置中存在错误。

options.label: E
options.content: S3 Versioning is enabled.

contents.en: S3 Versioning is enabled.
contents.zh: 已启用 S3 Versioning。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B 和 D。给出的正确选项指向两类可能配置错误：S3 bucket policy 错误，以及 IAM role 配置错误；这两者都会影响相关访问或部署流程。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B 和 D。给出的正确选项指向两类可能配置错误：S3 bucket policy 错误，以及 IAM role 配置错误；这两者都会影响相关访问或部署流程。
explanations.en: The correct answers are B and D. The supported causes are an error in the S3 bucket policy and an error in the IAM role configuration, either of which can block the required access or workflow.

contents.en: An Amazon EC2 instance is running in a VPC and needs to download an object from a restricted Amazon S3 bucket. When the DevOps engineer tries to download the object, an AccessDenied error is received. What are the possible causes for this error? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一个 Amazon EC2 实例正在 VPC 中运行，并且需要从受限的 Amazon S3 存储桶下载对象。当 DevOps 工程师尝试下载该对象时，收到 AccessDenied 错误。此错误的可能原因是什么？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company wants to use a grid system for a proprietary enterprise in-memory data store on top of AWS. This system can run in multiple server nodes in any Linux-based distribution. The system must be able to reconfigure the entire cluster every time a node is added or removed. When adding or removing nodes, an /etc/cluster/nodes.config file must be updated, listing the IP addresses of the current node members of that cluster. The company wants to automate the task of adding new nodes to a cluster. What can a DevOps engineer do to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS OpsWorks Stacks to layer the server nodes of that cluster. Create a Chef recipe that populates the content of the /etc/cluster/nodes.config file and restarts the service by using the current members of the layer. Assign that recipe to the Configure lifecycle event.

contents.en: Use AWS OpsWorks Stacks to layer the server nodes of that cluster. Create a Chef recipe that populates the content of the /etc/cluster/nodes.config file and restarts the service by using the current members of the layer. Assign that recipe to the Configure lifecycle event.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS OpsWorks Stacks 对该集群的服务器节点进行分层。创建一个 Chef recipe，使用该 layer 的当前成员填充 /etc/cluster/nodes.config 文件内容并重启服务。将该 recipe 分配给 Configure lifecycle event。

options.label: B
options.content: Put the file nodes.config in version control. Create an AWS CodeDeploy deployment configuration and deployment group based on an Amazon EC2 tag value for the cluster nodes. When adding a new node to the cluster, update the file with all tagged instances, and make a commit in version control. Deploy the new file and restart the services.

contents.en: Put the file nodes.config in version control. Create an AWS CodeDeploy deployment configuration and deployment group based on an Amazon EC2 tag value for the cluster nodes. When adding a new node to the cluster, update the file with all tagged instances, and make a commit in version control. Deploy the new file and restart the services.
contents.zh: 将 nodes.config 文件放入版本控制。基于集群节点的 Amazon EC2 tag value 创建 AWS CodeDeploy deployment configuration 和 deployment group。向集群添加新节点时，使用所有带标签的实例更新该文件，并在版本控制中提交。部署新文件并重启服务。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket and upload a version of the /etc/cluster/nodes.config file. Create a crontab script that will poll for that S3 file and download it frequently. Use a process manager, such as Monit or systemd, to restart the cluster services when it detects that the new file was modified. When adding a node to the cluster, edit the file's most recent members. Upload the new file to the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket and upload a version of the /etc/cluster/nodes.config file. Create a crontab script that will poll for that S3 file and download it frequently. Use a process manager, such as Monit or systemd, to restart the cluster services when it detects that the new file was modified. When adding a node to the cluster, edit the file's most recent members. Upload the new file to the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon S3 存储桶，并上传 /etc/cluster/nodes.config 文件的一个版本。创建一个 crontab script，用于频繁轮询该 S3 文件并下载它。使用进程管理器（例如 Monit 或 systemd）在检测到新文件被修改时重启集群服务。向集群添加节点时，编辑文件中最新的成员列表。将新文件上传到 S3 存储桶。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a user data script that lists all members of the current security group of the cluster and automatically updates the /etc/cluster/nodes.config file whenever a new instance is added to the cluster.

contents.en: Create a user data script that lists all members of the current security group of the cluster and automatically updates the /etc/cluster/nodes.config file whenever a new instance is added to the cluster.
contents.zh: 创建一个 user data script，列出集群当前 security group 的所有成员，并在新实例添加到集群时自动更新 /etc/cluster/nodes.config 文件。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。OpsWorks Stacks 使用 Chef recipe 管理集群节点配置，在 Configure lifecycle event 中根据当前 layer 成员更新 /etc/cluster/nodes.config 并重启服务，符合讨论中的配置管理思路。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。OpsWorks Stacks 使用 Chef recipe 管理集群节点配置，在 Configure lifecycle event 中根据当前 layer 成员更新 /etc/cluster/nodes.config 并重启服务，符合讨论中的配置管理思路。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. OpsWorks Stacks uses a Chef recipe as a configuration management tool to populate /etc/cluster/nodes.config from current layer members and restart the service during the Configure lifecycle event.

contents.en: A company wants to use a grid system for a proprietary enterprise in-memory data store on top of AWS. This system can run in multiple server nodes in any Linux-based distribution. The system must be able to reconfigure the entire cluster every time a node is added or removed. When adding or removing nodes, an /etc/cluster/nodes.config file must be updated, listing the IP addresses of the current node members of that cluster. The company wants to automate the task of adding new nodes to a cluster. What can a DevOps engineer do to meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司希望在 AWS 上为专有企业级内存数据存储使用网格系统。该系统可以在任意基于 Linux 的发行版中的多个服务器节点上运行。每次添加或移除节点时，系统必须能够重新配置整个集群。添加或移除节点时，必须更新 /etc/cluster/nodes.config 文件，列出该集群当前节点成员的 IP 地址。公司希望自动化向集群添加新节点的任务。DevOps 工程师可以做什么来满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is working on a data archival project that requires the migration of on-premises data to an Amazon S3 bucket. The DevOps engineer develops a script that incrementally archives on-premises data that is older than 1 month to Amazon S3. Data that is transferred to Amazon S3 is deleted from the on-premises location. The script uses the S3 PutObject operation. During a code review, the DevOps engineer notices that the script does not verify whether the data was successfully copied to Amazon S3. The DevOps engineer must update the script to ensure that data is not corrupted during transmission. The script must use MD5 checksums to verify data integrity before the on-premises data is deleted. Which solutions for the script will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Check the returned response for the VersionId. Compare the returned VersionId against the MD5 checksum.

contents.en: Check the returned response for the VersionId. Compare the returned VersionId against the MD5 checksum.
contents.zh: 检查返回响应中的 VersionId。将返回的 VersionId 与 MD5 checksum 进行比较。

options.label: B
options.content: Include the MD5 checksum within the Content-MD5 parameter. Check the operation call's return status to find out if an error was returned.

contents.en: Include the MD5 checksum within the Content-MD5 parameter. Check the operation call's return status to find out if an error was returned.
contents.zh: 在 Content-MD5 参数中包含 MD5 checksum。检查 operation call 的返回状态以确定是否返回了错误。

options.label: C
options.content: Include the checksum digest within the tagging parameter as a URL query parameter.

contents.en: Include the checksum digest within the tagging parameter as a URL query parameter.
contents.zh: 将 checksum digest 作为 URL query parameter 包含在 tagging 参数中。

options.label: D
options.content: Check the returned response for the ETag. Compare the returned ETag against the MD5 checksum.

contents.en: Check the returned response for the ETag. Compare the returned ETag against the MD5 checksum.
contents.zh: 检查返回响应中的 ETag。将返回的 ETag 与 MD5 checksum 进行比较。

options.label: E
options.content: Include the checksum digest within the Metadata parameter as a name-value pair. After upload, use the S3 HeadObject operation to retrieve metadata from the object.

contents.en: Include the checksum digest within the Metadata parameter as a name-value pair. After upload, use the S3 HeadObject operation to retrieve metadata from the object.
contents.zh: 将 checksum digest 作为 name-value pair 包含在 Metadata 参数中。上传后，使用 S3 HeadObject operation 从对象中检索 metadata。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B 和 D。B 在 PutObject 请求中提供 Content-MD5 并检查返回状态，可让 S3 校验上传内容；D 检查响应中的 ETag 并与本地 MD5 校验值比较，用于确认对象完整性。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B 和 D。B 在 PutObject 请求中提供 Content-MD5 并检查返回状态，可让 S3 校验上传内容；D 检查响应中的 ETag 并与本地 MD5 校验值比较，用于确认对象完整性。
explanations.en: The correct answers are B and D. B supplies the Content-MD5 value and checks whether S3 returns an error, while D compares the returned ETag with the local MD5 checksum to confirm object integrity.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer is working on a data archival project that requires the migration of on-premises data to an Amazon S3 bucket. The DevOps engineer develops a script that incrementally archives on-premises data that is older than 1 month to Amazon S3. Data that is transferred to Amazon S3 is deleted from the on-premises location. The script uses the S3 PutObject operation. During a code review, the DevOps engineer notices that the script does not verify whether the data was successfully copied to Amazon S3. The DevOps engineer must update the script to ensure that data is not corrupted during transmission. The script must use MD5 checksums to verify data integrity before the on-premises data is deleted. Which solutions for the script will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师正在处理一个数据归档项目，该项目需要将本地数据迁移到 Amazon S3 存储桶。DevOps 工程师开发了一个脚本，将早于 1 个月的本地数据增量归档到 Amazon S3。传输到 Amazon S3 的数据会从本地位置删除。该脚本使用 S3 PutObject operation。在代码审查期间，DevOps 工程师注意到脚本没有验证数据是否已成功复制到 Amazon S3。DevOps 工程师必须更新脚本，以确保数据在传输过程中未损坏。脚本必须使用 MD5 checksums 在删除本地数据之前验证数据完整性。哪些脚本解决方案将满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company deploys updates to its Amazon API Gateway API several times a week by using an AWS CodePipeline pipeline. As part of the update process, the company exports the JavaScript SDK for the API from the API Gateway console and uploads the SDK to an Amazon S3 bucket. The company has configured an Amazon CloudFront distribution that uses the S3 bucket as an origin. Web clients then download the SDK by using the CloudFront distribution's endpoint. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a solution to make the new SDK available automatically during new API deployments. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a CodePipeline action immediately after the deployment stage of the API. Configure the action to invoke an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to download the SDK from API Gateway, upload the SDK to the S3 bucket, and create a CloudFront invalidation for the SDK path.

contents.en: Create a CodePipeline action immediately after the deployment stage of the API. Configure the action to invoke an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to download the SDK from API Gateway, upload the SDK to the S3 bucket, and create a CloudFront invalidation for the SDK path.
contents.zh: 在 API 的 deployment stage 之后立即创建一个 CodePipeline action。配置该 action 调用 AWS Lambda 函数。配置 Lambda 函数从 API Gateway 下载 SDK，将 SDK 上传到 S3 存储桶，并为 SDK path 创建 CloudFront invalidation。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a CodePipeline action immediately after the deployment stage of the API. Configure the action to use the CodePipeline integration with API Gateway to export the SDK to Amazon S3. Create another action that uses the CodePipeline integration with Amazon S3 to invalidate the cache for the SDK path.
