contents.zh: 从 AWS Systems Manager SecureString parameter 检索 access key，以访问 AWS services。从 Systems Manager SecureString parameter 检索数据库凭据。

options.label: B
options.content: Launch the EC2 instances with an EC2 IAM role to access AWS services. Retrieve the database credentials from AWS Secrets Manager.

contents.en: Launch the EC2 instances with an EC2 IAM role to access AWS services. Retrieve the database credentials from AWS Secrets Manager.
contents.zh: 使用 EC2 IAM role 启动 EC2 实例，以访问 AWS services。从 AWS Secrets Manager 检索数据库凭据。

options.label: C
options.content: Retrieve an access key from an AWS Systems Manager plaintext parameter to access AWS services. Retrieve the database credentials from a Systems Manager SecureString parameter.

contents.en: Retrieve an access key from an AWS Systems Manager plaintext parameter to access AWS services. Retrieve the database credentials from a Systems Manager SecureString parameter.
contents.zh: 从 AWS Systems Manager plaintext parameter 检索 access key，以访问 AWS services。从 Systems Manager SecureString parameter 检索数据库凭据。

options.label: D
options.content: Launch the EC2 instances with an EC2 IAM role to access AWS services. Store the database passwords in an encrypted config file with the application artifacts.

contents.en: Launch the EC2 instances with an EC2 IAM role to access AWS services. Store the database passwords in an encrypted config file with the application artifacts.
contents.zh: 使用 EC2 IAM role 启动 EC2 实例，以访问 AWS services。将数据库密码存储在随应用程序构件一起提供的加密 config file 中。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。EC2 实例通过 IAM role 访问 AWS 服务，并从 AWS Secrets Manager 获取数据库凭证，这是一种安全且灵活的凭证获取方式。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。EC2 实例通过 IAM role 访问 AWS 服务，并从 AWS Secrets Manager 获取数据库凭证，这是一种安全且灵活的凭证获取方式。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. Launching EC2 instances with an IAM role and retrieving database credentials from AWS Secrets Manager provides a secure and flexible way to obtain the password credentials.

contents.en: A large enterprise is deploying a web application on AWS. The application runs on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer. The instances run in an Auto Scaling group across multiple Availability Zones. The application stores data in an Amazon RDS for Oracle DB instance and Amazon DynamoDB. There are separate environments for development, testing, and production. What is the MOST secure and flexible way to obtain password credentials during deployment?
contents.zh: 一家大型企业正在 AWS 上部署 Web 应用程序。该应用程序运行在 Application Load Balancer 后面的 Amazon EC2 实例上。实例在跨多个 Availability Zones 的 Auto Scaling 组中运行。该应用程序将数据存储在 Amazon RDS for Oracle DB instance 和 Amazon DynamoDB 中。开发、测试和生产有独立环境。部署期间获取密码凭据的最安全且最灵活的方法是什么？

questions.content: The security team depends on AWS CloudTrail to detect sensitive security issues in the company's AWS account. The DevOps engineer needs a solution to auto-remediate CloudTrail being turned off in an AWS account. What solution ensures the LEAST amount of downtime for the CloudTrail log deliveries?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule for the CloudTrail StopLogging event. Create an AWS Lambda function that uses the AWS SDK to call StartLogging on the ARN of the resource in which StopLogging was called. Add the Lambda function ARN as a target to the EventBridge rule.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule for the CloudTrail StopLogging event. Create an AWS Lambda function that uses the AWS SDK to call StartLogging on the ARN of the resource in which StopLogging was called. Add the Lambda function ARN as a target to the EventBridge rule.
contents.zh: 为 CloudTrail StopLogging 事件创建 Amazon EventBridge 规则。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，该函数使用 AWS SDK 对调用 StopLogging 的资源的 ARN 调用 StartLogging。将 Lambda 函数 ARN 添加为 EventBridge 规则的目标。

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy the AWS-managed CloudTrail-enabled AWS Config rule, set with a periodic interval of 1 hour. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule for AWS Config rules compliance change. Create an AWS Lambda function that uses the AWS SDK to call StartLogging on the ARN of the resource in which StopLogging was called. Add the Lambda function ARN as a target to the EventBridge rule.

contents.en: Deploy the AWS-managed CloudTrail-enabled AWS Config rule, set with a periodic interval of 1 hour. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule for AWS Config rules compliance change. Create an AWS Lambda function that uses the AWS SDK to call StartLogging on the ARN of the resource in which StopLogging was called. Add the Lambda function ARN as a target to the EventBridge rule.
contents.zh: 部署 AWS 托管的 CloudTrail-enabled AWS Config 规则，并将周期性间隔设置为 1 小时。为 AWS Config 规则合规性变更创建 Amazon EventBridge 规则。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，该函数使用 AWS SDK 对调用 StopLogging 的资源的 ARN 调用 StartLogging。将 Lambda 函数 ARN 添加为 EventBridge 规则的目标。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule for a scheduled event every 5 minutes. Create an AWS Lambda function that uses the AWS SDK to call StartLogging on a CloudTrail trail in the AWS account. Add the Lambda function ARN as a target to the EventBridge rule.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule for a scheduled event every 5 minutes. Create an AWS Lambda function that uses the AWS SDK to call StartLogging on a CloudTrail trail in the AWS account. Add the Lambda function ARN as a target to the EventBridge rule.
contents.zh: 创建一个每 5 分钟运行一次的计划事件 Amazon EventBridge 规则。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，该函数使用 AWS SDK 对 AWS 账户中的 CloudTrail trail 调用 StartLogging。将 Lambda 函数 ARN 添加为 EventBridge 规则的目标。

options.label: D
options.content: Launch a t2.nano instance with a script running every 5 minutes that uses the AWS SDK to query CloudTrail in the current account. If the CloudTrail trail is disabled, have the script re-enable the trail.

contents.en: Launch a t2.nano instance with a script running every 5 minutes that uses the AWS SDK to query CloudTrail in the current account. If the CloudTrail trail is disabled, have the script re-enable the trail.
contents.zh: 启动一个 t2.nano 实例，并运行一个每 5 分钟执行一次的脚本，该脚本使用 AWS SDK 查询当前账户中的 CloudTrail。如果 CloudTrail trail 已禁用，则让脚本重新启用该 trail。

questions.explanation: ????? A????? CloudTrail ? StopLogging ???? EventBridge ????? A ?? EventBridge ?? Lambda??? Lambda ?? StartLogging ????????????????? CloudTrail ??????

explanations.zh: ????? A????? CloudTrail ? StopLogging ???? EventBridge ????? A ?? EventBridge ?? Lambda??? Lambda ?? StartLogging ????????????????? CloudTrail ??????
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The discussion points to monitoring the CloudTrail StopLogging event with EventBridge; option A triggers Lambda and has Lambda call StartLogging, which directly restores CloudTrail logging automatically.

contents.en: The security team depends on AWS CloudTrail to detect sensitive security issues in the company's AWS account. The DevOps engineer needs a solution to auto-remediate CloudTrail being turned off in an AWS account. What solution ensures the LEAST amount of downtime for the CloudTrail log deliveries?
contents.zh: 安全团队依赖 AWS CloudTrail 来检测公司 AWS 账户中的敏感安全问题。DevOps 工程师需要一个解决方案，以便在 AWS 账户中 CloudTrail 被关闭时自动修复。哪种解决方案能确保 CloudTrail 日志交付的停机时间最短？

questions.content: A company uses AWS CodeArtifact to centrally store Python packages. The CodeArtifact repository is configured with the following repository policy: A development team is building a new project in an account that is in an organization in AWS Organizations. The development team wants to use a Python library that has already been stored in the CodeArtifact repository in the organization. The development team uses AWS CodePipeline and AWS CodeBuild to build the new application. The CodeBuild job that the development team uses to build the application is configured to run in a VPC. Because of compliance requirements, the VPC has no internet connectivity. The development team creates the VPC endpoints for CodeArtifact and updates the CodeBuild buildspec.yaml file. However, the development team cannot download the Python library from the repository. Which combination of steps should a DevOps engineer take so that the development team can use CodeArtifact? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 gateway endpoint. Update the route tables for the subnets that are running the CodeBuild job.

contents.en: Create an Amazon S3 gateway endpoint. Update the route tables for the subnets that are running the CodeBuild job.
contents.zh: 创建 Amazon S3 gateway endpoint。更新运行 CodeBuild 作业的子网的路由表。

options.label: B
options.content: Update the repository policy's Principal statement to include the ARN of the role that the CodeBuild project uses.

contents.en: Update the repository policy's Principal statement to include the ARN of the role that the CodeBuild project uses.
contents.zh: 更新存储库策略的 Principal 语句，以包含 CodeBuild 项目使用的角色 ARN。

options.label: C
options.content: Share the CodeArtifact repository with the organization by using AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM).

contents.en: Share the CodeArtifact repository with the organization by using AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM).
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM) 与组织共享 CodeArtifact 存储库。

options.label: D
options.content: Update the role that the CodeBuild project uses so that the role has sufficient permissions to use the CodeArtifact repository.

contents.en: Update the role that the CodeBuild project uses so that the role has sufficient permissions to use the CodeArtifact repository.
contents.zh: 更新 CodeBuild 项目使用的角色，使该角色具有使用 CodeArtifact 存储库的足够权限。

options.label: E
options.content: Specify the account that hosts the repository as the delegated administrator for CodeArtifact in the organization.

contents.en: Specify the account that hosts the repository as the delegated administrator for CodeArtifact in the organization.
contents.zh: 将托管该存储库的账户指定为组织中 CodeArtifact 的 delegated administrator。

explanations.en: The correct answers are A and D. The discussion notes that CodeArtifact stores data through services such as S3; without internet connectivity, CodeBuild needs an S3 gateway endpoint and subnet routes, and its role must have permission to use the CodeArtifact repository.

contents.en: A company uses AWS CodeArtifact to centrally store Python packages. The CodeArtifact repository is configured with the following repository policy: A development team is building a new project in an account that is in an organization in AWS Organizations. The development team wants to use a Python library that has already been stored in the CodeArtifact repository in the organization. The development team uses AWS CodePipeline and AWS CodeBuild to build the new application. The CodeBuild job that the development team uses to build the application is configured to run in a VPC. Because of compliance requirements, the VPC has no internet connectivity. The development team creates the VPC endpoints for CodeArtifact and updates the CodeBuild buildspec.yaml file. However, the development team cannot download the Python library from the repository. Which combination of steps should a DevOps engineer take so that the development team can use CodeArtifact? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS CodeArtifact 集中存储 Python 软件包。CodeArtifact 存储库配置了以下存储库策略：一个开发团队正在 AWS Organizations 中某个组织内的账户中构建一个新项目。开发团队希望使用组织内 CodeArtifact 存储库中已经存储的 Python 库。开发团队使用 AWS CodePipeline 和 AWS CodeBuild 构建新应用程序。开发团队用于构建应用程序的 CodeBuild 作业配置为在 VPC 中运行。由于合规性要求，该 VPC 没有互联网连接。开发团队创建了 CodeArtifact 的 VPC endpoints，并更新了 CodeBuild buildspec.yaml 文件。但是，开发团队无法从存储库下载 Python 库。DevOps 工程师应采取哪组步骤，以便开发团队可以使用 CodeArtifact？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company uses a series of individual Amazon CloudFormation templates to deploy its multi-Region applications. These templates must be deployed in a specific order. The company is making more changes to the templates than previously expected and wants to deploy new templates more efficiently. Additionally, the data engineering team must be notified of all changes to the templates. What should the company do to accomplish these goals?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function to deploy the CloudFormation templates in the required order. Use stack policies to alert the data engineering team.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function to deploy the CloudFormation templates in the required order. Use stack policies to alert the data engineering team.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，按所需顺序部署 CloudFormation 模板。使用 stack policies 通知数据工程团队。

options.label: B
options.content: Host the CloudFormation templates in Amazon S3. Use Amazon S3 events to directly trigger CloudFormation updates and Amazon SNS notifications.

contents.en: Host the CloudFormation templates in Amazon S3. Use Amazon S3 events to directly trigger CloudFormation updates and Amazon SNS notifications.
contents.zh: 将 CloudFormation 模板托管在 Amazon S3 中。使用 Amazon S3 事件直接触发 CloudFormation 更新和 Amazon SNS 通知。

options.label: C
options.content: Implement CloudFormation StackSets and use drift detection to trigger update alerts to the data engineering team.

contents.en: Implement CloudFormation StackSets and use drift detection to trigger update alerts to the data engineering team.
contents.zh: 实施 CloudFormation StackSets，并使用 drift detection 触发发送给数据工程团队的更新警报。

options.label: D
options.content: Leverage CloudFormation nested stacks and stack sets for deployments. Use Amazon SNS to notify the data engineering team.

contents.en: Leverage CloudFormation nested stacks and stack sets for deployments. Use Amazon SNS to notify the data engineering team.
contents.zh: 利用 CloudFormation nested stacks 和 stack sets 进行部署。使用 Amazon SNS 通知数据工程团队。

explanations.en: The correct answer is D. The discussion explicitly selects D; the option uses CloudFormation nested stacks and StackSets for deployment and SNS to notify the data engineering team, matching the deployment and notification approach described.

contents.en: A company uses a series of individual Amazon CloudFormation templates to deploy its multi-Region applications. These templates must be deployed in a specific order. The company is making more changes to the templates than previously expected and wants to deploy new templates more efficiently. Additionally, the data engineering team must be notified of all changes to the templates. What should the company do to accomplish these goals?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用一系列单独的 Amazon CloudFormation 模板来部署其多区域应用程序。这些模板必须按特定顺序部署。公司对模板进行的更改比之前预期的更多，并希望更高效地部署新模板。此外，数据工程团队必须收到所有模板更改的通知。公司应如何实现这些目标？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer has implemented a CI/CD pipeline to deploy an AWS CloudFormation template that provisions a web application. The web application consists of an Application Load Balancer (ALB), a target group, a launch template that uses an Amazon Linux 2 AMI, an Auto Scaling group of Amazon EC2 instances, a security group, and an Amazon RDS for MySQL database. The launch template includes user data that specifies a script to install and start the application. The initial deployment of the application was successful. The DevOps engineer made changes to update the version of the application with the user data. The CI/CD pipeline has deployed a new version of the template. However, the health checks on the ALB are now failing. The health checks have marked all targets as unhealthy. During investigation, the DevOps engineer notices that the CloudFormation stack has a status of UPDATE_COMPLETE. However, when the DevOps engineer connects to one of the EC2 instances and checks /var/log/messages, the DevOps engineer notices that the Apache web server failed to start successfully because of a configuration error. How can the DevOps engineer ensure that the CloudFormation deployment will fail if the user data fails to successfully finish running?

options.label: A
options.content: Use the cfn-signal helper script to signal success or failure to CloudFormation. Use the WaitOnResourceSignals update policy within the CloudFormation template. Set an appropriate timeout for the update policy.

contents.en: Use the cfn-signal helper script to signal success or failure to CloudFormation. Use the WaitOnResourceSignals update policy within the CloudFormation template. Set an appropriate timeout for the update policy.
contents.zh: 使用 cfn-signal helper script 向 CloudFormation 发出成功或失败信号。在 CloudFormation 模板中使用 WaitOnResourceSignals update policy。为 update policy 设置适当的超时时间。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for the UnhealthyHostCount metric. Include an appropriate alarm threshold for the target group. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic as the target to signal success or failure to CloudFormation.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for the UnhealthyHostCount metric. Include an appropriate alarm threshold for the target group. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic as the target to signal success or failure to CloudFormation.
contents.zh: 为 UnhealthyHostCount 指标创建 Amazon CloudWatch alarm。为目标组包含适当的警报阈值。创建 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题作为目标，用于向 CloudFormation 发出成功或失败信号。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a lifecycle hook on the Auto Scaling group by using the AWS::AutoScaling::LifecycleHook resource. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic as the target to signal success or failure to CloudFormation. Set an appropriate timeout on the lifecycle hook.

contents.en: Create a lifecycle hook on the Auto Scaling group by using the AWS::AutoScaling::LifecycleHook resource. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic as the target to signal success or failure to CloudFormation. Set an appropriate timeout on the lifecycle hook.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS::AutoScaling::LifecycleHook 资源在 Auto Scaling group 上创建 lifecycle hook。创建 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题作为目标，用于向 CloudFormation 发出成功或失败信号。在 lifecycle hook 上设置适当的超时时间。

options.label: D
options.content: Use the Amazon CloudWatch agent to stream the cloud-init logs. Create a subscription filter that includes an AWS Lambda function with an appropriate invocation timeout. Configure the Lambda function to use the SignalResource API operation to signal success or failure to CloudFormation.

contents.en: Use the Amazon CloudWatch agent to stream the cloud-init logs. Create a subscription filter that includes an AWS Lambda function with an appropriate invocation timeout. Configure the Lambda function to use the SignalResource API operation to signal success or failure to CloudFormation.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon CloudWatch agent 流式传输 cloud-init 日志。创建一个 subscription filter，其中包含具有适当调用超时时间的 AWS Lambda 函数。配置 Lambda 函数使用 SignalResource API 操作向 CloudFormation 发出成功或失败信号。

questions.explanation: ????? A????? A?????? cfn-signal ? CloudFormation ??????????? WaitOnResourceSignals ???????????????????????

explanations.zh: ????? A????? A?????? cfn-signal ? CloudFormation ??????????? WaitOnResourceSignals ???????????????????????
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The discussion confirms A; cfn-signal reports success or failure to CloudFormation, and WaitOnResourceSignals with a timeout lets the stack update wait for the resource signal before continuing.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer has implemented a CI/CD pipeline to deploy an AWS CloudFormation template that provisions a web application. The web application consists of an Application Load Balancer (ALB), a target group, a launch template that uses an Amazon Linux 2 AMI, an Auto Scaling group of Amazon EC2 instances, a security group, and an Amazon RDS for MySQL database. The launch template includes user data that specifies a script to install and start the application. The initial deployment of the application was successful. The DevOps engineer made changes to update the version of the application with the user data. The CI/CD pipeline has deployed a new version of the template. However, the health checks on the ALB are now failing. The health checks have marked all targets as unhealthy. During investigation, the DevOps engineer notices that the CloudFormation stack has a status of UPDATE_COMPLETE. However, when the DevOps engineer connects to one of the EC2 instances and checks /var/log/messages, the DevOps engineer notices that the Apache web server failed to start successfully because of a configuration error. How can the DevOps engineer ensure that the CloudFormation deployment will fail if the user data fails to successfully finish running?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师已实施 CI/CD 管道，用于部署一个预置 Web 应用程序的 AWS CloudFormation 模板。该 Web 应用程序由 Application Load Balancer (ALB)、目标组、使用 Amazon Linux 2 AMI 的启动模板、Amazon EC2 实例的 Auto Scaling group、安全组以及 Amazon RDS for MySQL 数据库组成。启动模板包含 user data，其中指定了用于安装并启动应用程序的脚本。应用程序的初始部署成功。DevOps 工程师更改了 user data，以更新应用程序版本。CI/CD 管道已部署模板的新版本。但是，ALB 上的运行状况检查现在失败。运行状况检查已将所有目标标记为不正常。在调查期间，DevOps 工程师注意到 CloudFormation stack 的状态为 UPDATE_COMPLETE。但是，当 DevOps 工程师连接到其中一个 EC2 实例并检查 /var/log/messages 时，发现 Apache Web 服务器由于配置错误而未能成功启动。DevOps 工程师如何确保如果 user data 未能成功完成运行，CloudFormation 部署将失败？

questions.content: A company has a data ingestion application that runs across multiple AWS accounts. The accounts are in an organization in AWS Organizations. The company needs to monitor the application and consolidate access to the application. Currently, the company is running the application on Amazon EC2 instances from several Auto Scaling groups. The EC2 instances have no access to the internet because the data is sensitive. Engineers have deployed the necessary VPC endpoints. The EC2 instances run a custom AMI that is built specifically for the application. To maintain and troubleshoot the application, system administrators need the ability to log in to the EC2 instances. This access must be automated and controlled centrally. The company's security team must receive a notification whenever the instances are accessed. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to send notifications to the security team whenever a user logs in to an EC2 instance. Use EC2 Instance Connect to log in to the instances. Deploy Auto Scaling groups by using AWS CloudFormation. Use the cfn- init helper script to deploy appropriate VPC routes for external access. Rebuild the custom AMI so that the custom AMI includes AWS Systems Manager Agent.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to send notifications to the security team whenever a user logs in to an EC2 instance. Use EC2 Instance Connect to log in to the instances. Deploy Auto Scaling groups by using AWS CloudFormation. Use the cfn- init helper script to deploy appropriate VPC routes for external access. Rebuild the custom AMI so that the custom AMI includes AWS Systems Manager Agent.
contents.zh: 创建 Amazon EventBridge 规则，在用户登录 EC2 实例时向安全团队发送通知。使用 EC2 Instance Connect 登录实例。使用 AWS CloudFormation 部署 Auto Scaling groups。使用 cfn- init helper script 部署适当的 VPC 路由以进行外部访问。重新构建自定义 AMI，使自定义 AMI 包含 AWS Systems Manager Agent。

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy a NAT gateway and a bastion host that has internet access. Create a security group that allows incoming traffic on all the EC2 instances from the bastion host. Install AWS Systems Manager Agent on all the EC2 instances. Use Auto Scaling group lifecycle hooks for monitoring and auditing access. Use Systems Manager Session Manager to log in to the instances. Send logs to a log group in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Export data to Amazon S3 for auditing. Send notifications to the security team by using S3 event notifications.

contents.en: Deploy a NAT gateway and a bastion host that has internet access. Create a security group that allows incoming traffic on all the EC2 instances from the bastion host. Install AWS Systems Manager Agent on all the EC2 instances. Use Auto Scaling group lifecycle hooks for monitoring and auditing access. Use Systems Manager Session Manager to log in to the instances. Send logs to a log group in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Export data to Amazon S3 for auditing. Send notifications to the security team by using S3 event notifications.
contents.zh: 部署 NAT gateway 和具有互联网访问权限的 bastion host。创建一个安全组，允许来自 bastion host 的流量进入所有 EC2 实例。在所有 EC2 实例上安装 AWS Systems Manager Agent。使用 Auto Scaling group lifecycle hooks 进行访问监控和审计。使用 Systems Manager Session Manager 登录实例。将日志发送到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 中的日志组。将数据导出到 Amazon S3 以便审计。使用 S3 event notifications 向安全团队发送通知。

options.label: C
options.content: Use EC2 Image Builder to rebuild the custom AMI. Include the most recent version of AWS Systems Manager Agent in the image. Configure the Auto Scaling group to attach the AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore role to all the EC2 instances. Use Systems Manager Session Manager to log in to the instances. Enable logging of session details to Amazon S3. Create an S3 event notification for new file uploads to send a message to the security team through an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic.

contents.en: Use EC2 Image Builder to rebuild the custom AMI. Include the most recent version of AWS Systems Manager Agent in the image. Configure the Auto Scaling group to attach the AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore role to all the EC2 instances. Use Systems Manager Session Manager to log in to the instances. Enable logging of session details to Amazon S3. Create an S3 event notification for new file uploads to send a message to the security team through an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic.
contents.zh: 使用 EC2 Image Builder 重新构建自定义 AMI。在镜像中包含最新版本的 AWS Systems Manager Agent。配置 Auto Scaling group，将 AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore 角色附加到所有 EC2 实例。使用 Systems Manager Session Manager 登录实例。启用将会话详细信息记录到 Amazon S3。为新文件上传创建 S3 event notification，通过 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题向安全团队发送消息。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS Systems Manager Automation to build Systems Manager Agent into the custom AMI. Configure AWS Config to attach an SCP to the root organization account to allow the EC2 instances to connect to Systems Manager. Use Systems Manager Session Manager to log in to the instances. Enable logging of session details to Amazon S3. Create an S3 event notification for new file uploads to send a message to the security team through an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic.

contents.en: Use AWS Systems Manager Automation to build Systems Manager Agent into the custom AMI. Configure AWS Config to attach an SCP to the root organization account to allow the EC2 instances to connect to Systems Manager. Use Systems Manager Session Manager to log in to the instances. Enable logging of session details to Amazon S3. Create an S3 event notification for new file uploads to send a message to the security team through an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Systems Manager Automation 将 Systems Manager Agent 构建到自定义 AMI 中。配置 AWS Config，将 SCP 附加到 root organization account，以允许 EC2 实例连接到 Systems Manager。使用 Systems Manager Session Manager 登录实例。启用将会话详细信息记录到 Amazon S3。为新文件上传创建 S3 event notification，通过 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题向安全团队发送消息。

questions.explanation: ????? C??????? EC2 ?????????????? SSM Agent ???? AMI ?????? C ?????? AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore??? Session Manager ??????????? S3 ?? SNS ???????

explanations.zh: ????? C??????? EC2 ?????????????? SSM Agent ???? AMI ?????? C ?????? AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore??? Session Manager ??????????? S3 ?? SNS ???????
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. The discussion says the lack of internet access makes an AMI with the latest SSM Agent appropriate; option C also attaches AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore, uses Session Manager, logs sessions to S3, and notifies security through SNS.

contents.en: A company has a data ingestion application that runs across multiple AWS accounts. The accounts are in an organization in AWS Organizations. The company needs to monitor the application and consolidate access to the application. Currently, the company is running the application on Amazon EC2 instances from several Auto Scaling groups. The EC2 instances have no access to the internet because the data is sensitive. Engineers have deployed the necessary VPC endpoints. The EC2 instances run a custom AMI that is built specifically for the application. To maintain and troubleshoot the application, system administrators need the ability to log in to the EC2 instances. This access must be automated and controlled centrally. The company's security team must receive a notification whenever the instances are accessed. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个跨多个 AWS 账户运行的数据摄取应用程序。这些账户位于 AWS Organizations 的一个组织中。公司需要监控该应用程序并整合对应用程序的访问。目前，公司在来自多个 Auto Scaling groups 的 Amazon EC2 实例上运行该应用程序。由于数据敏感，EC2 实例无法访问互联网。工程师已经部署了必要的 VPC endpoints。EC2 实例运行专门为该应用程序构建的自定义 AMI。为了维护和排查应用程序问题，系统管理员需要能够登录 EC2 实例。此访问必须自动化并集中控制。每当实例被访问时，公司的安全团队必须收到通知。哪种解决方案将满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses Amazon S3 to store proprietary information. The development team creates buckets for new projects on a daily basis. The security team wants to ensure that all existing and future buckets have encryption, logging, and versioning enabled. Additionally, no buckets should ever be publicly read or write accessible. What should a DevOps engineer do to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Enable AWS CloudTrail and configure automatic remediation using AWS Lambda.

contents.en: Enable AWS CloudTrail and configure automatic remediation using AWS Lambda.
contents.zh: 启用 AWS CloudTrail，并使用 AWS Lambda 配置自动修复。

options.label: B
options.content: Enable AWS Config rules and configure automatic remediation using AWS Systems Manager documents.

contents.en: Enable AWS Config rules and configure automatic remediation using AWS Systems Manager documents.
contents.zh: 启用 AWS Config rules，并使用 AWS Systems Manager documents 配置自动修复。

options.label: C
options.content: Enable AWS Trusted Advisor and configure automatic remediation using Amazon EventBridge.

contents.en: Enable AWS Trusted Advisor and configure automatic remediation using Amazon EventBridge.
contents.zh: 启用 AWS Trusted Advisor，并使用 Amazon EventBridge 配置自动修复。

options.label: D
options.content: Enable AWS Systems Manager and configure automatic remediation using Systems Manager documents.

contents.en: Enable AWS Systems Manager and configure automatic remediation using Systems Manager documents.
contents.zh: 启用 AWS Systems Manager，并使用 Systems Manager documents 配置自动修复。

explanations.en: The correct answer is B. The discussion points to AWS Config for remediating noncompliance; option B enables Config rules and uses Systems Manager documents for automatic remediation.

contents.en: A company uses Amazon S3 to store proprietary information. The development team creates buckets for new projects on a daily basis. The security team wants to ensure that all existing and future buckets have encryption, logging, and versioning enabled. Additionally, no buckets should ever be publicly read or write accessible. What should a DevOps engineer do to meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon S3 存储专有信息。开发团队每天都会为新项目创建 bucket。安全团队希望确保所有现有和未来的 bucket 都启用加密、日志记录和版本控制。此外，任何 bucket 都不应可被公开读取或写入。DevOps 工程师应如何满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is researching the least expensive way to implement an image batch processing cluster on AWS. The application cannot run in Docker containers and must run on Amazon EC2. The batch job stores checkpoint data on an NFS volume and can tolerate interruptions. Configuring the cluster software from a generic EC2 Linux image takes 30 minutes. What is the MOST cost-effective solution?

options.label: A
options.content: Use Amazon EFS for checkpoint data. To complete the job, use an EC2 Auto Scaling group and an On-Demand pricing model to provision EC2 instances temporarily.

contents.en: Use Amazon EFS for checkpoint data. To complete the job, use an EC2 Auto Scaling group and an On-Demand pricing model to provision EC2 instances temporarily.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon EFS 存储 checkpoint 数据。为完成作业，使用 EC2 Auto Scaling group 和 On-Demand pricing model 临时预置 EC2 实例。

options.label: B
options.content: Use GlusterFS on EC2 instances for checkpoint data. To run the batch job, configure EC2 instances manually. When the job completes, shut down the instances manually.

contents.en: Use GlusterFS on EC2 instances for checkpoint data. To run the batch job, configure EC2 instances manually. When the job completes, shut down the instances manually.
contents.zh: 在 EC2 实例上使用 GlusterFS 存储 checkpoint 数据。为运行批处理作业，手动配置 EC2 实例。作业完成后，手动关闭实例。

options.label: C
options.content: Use Amazon EFS for checkpoint data. Use EC2 Fleet to launch EC2 Spot Instances, and utilize user data to configure the EC2 Linux instance on startup.

contents.en: Use Amazon EFS for checkpoint data. Use EC2 Fleet to launch EC2 Spot Instances, and utilize user data to configure the EC2 Linux instance on startup.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon EFS 存储 checkpoint 数据。使用 EC2 Fleet 启动 EC2 Spot Instances，并利用 user data 在启动时配置 EC2 Linux 实例。

options.label: D
options.content: Use Amazon EFS for checkpoint data. Use EC2 Fleet to launch EC2 Spot Instances. Create a custom AMI for the cluster and use the latest AMI when creating instances.

contents.en: Use Amazon EFS for checkpoint data. Use EC2 Fleet to launch EC2 Spot Instances. Create a custom AMI for the cluster and use the latest AMI when creating instances.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon EFS 存储 checkpoint 数据。使用 EC2 Fleet 启动 EC2 Spot Instances。为集群创建自定义 AMI，并在创建实例时使用最新的 AMI。

explanations.en: The correct answer is D. The discussion emphasizes avoiding a 30-minute launch time; option D uses a custom AMI to speed instance readiness, EFS for checkpoint data, and EC2 Fleet for Spot Instances.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer is researching the least expensive way to implement an image batch processing cluster on AWS. The application cannot run in Docker containers and must run on Amazon EC2. The batch job stores checkpoint data on an NFS volume and can tolerate interruptions. Configuring the cluster software from a generic EC2 Linux image takes 30 minutes. What is the MOST cost-effective solution?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师正在研究在 AWS 上实施图像批处理集群的最低成本方式。该应用程序无法在 Docker 容器中运行，必须在 Amazon EC2 上运行。批处理作业将 checkpoint 数据存储在 NFS 卷上，并且可以容忍中断。从通用 EC2 Linux 镜像配置集群软件需要 30 分钟。最具成本效益的解决方案是什么？

questions.content: A company recently migrated its legacy application from on-premises to AWS. The application is hosted on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer, which is behind Amazon API Gateway. The company wants to ensure users experience minimal disruptions during any deployment of a new version of the application. The company also wants to ensure it can quickly roll back updates if there is an issue. Which solution will meet these requirements with MINIMAL changes to the application?

options.label: A
options.content: Introduce changes as a separate environment parallel to the existing one. Configure API Gateway to use a canary release deployment to send a small subset of user traffic to the new environment.

contents.en: Introduce changes as a separate environment parallel to the existing one. Configure API Gateway to use a canary release deployment to send a small subset of user traffic to the new environment.
contents.zh: 将更改作为与现有环境并行的独立环境引入。配置 API Gateway 使用 canary release deployment，将一小部分用户流量发送到新环境。

options.label: B
options.content: Introduce changes as a separate environment parallel to the existing one. Update the application's DNS alias records to point to the new environment.

contents.en: Introduce changes as a separate environment parallel to the existing one. Update the application's DNS alias records to point to the new environment.
contents.zh: 将更改作为与现有环境并行的独立环境引入。更新应用程序的 DNS alias records，使其指向新环境。

options.label: C
options.content: Introduce changes as a separate target group behind the existing Application Load Balancer. Configure API Gateway to route user traffic to the new target group in steps.

contents.en: Introduce changes as a separate target group behind the existing Application Load Balancer. Configure API Gateway to route user traffic to the new target group in steps.
contents.zh: 将更改作为现有 Application Load Balancer 后面的独立目标组引入。配置 API Gateway 分阶段将用户流量路由到新的目标组。

options.label: D
options.content: Introduce changes as a separate target group behind the existing Application Load Balancer. Configure API Gateway to route all traffic to the Application Load Balancer, which then sends the traffic to the new target group.

contents.en: Introduce changes as a separate target group behind the existing Application Load Balancer. Configure API Gateway to route all traffic to the Application Load Balancer, which then sends the traffic to the new target group.
contents.zh: 将更改作为现有 Application Load Balancer 后面的独立目标组引入。配置 API Gateway 将所有流量路由到 Application Load Balancer，然后由其将流量发送到新的目标组。

explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The discussion explains that a parallel environment with an API Gateway canary release sends only a small subset of traffic to the new version while most traffic stays on the existing environment, minimizing application changes.

contents.en: A company recently migrated its legacy application from on-premises to AWS. The application is hosted on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer, which is behind Amazon API Gateway. The company wants to ensure users experience minimal disruptions during any deployment of a new version of the application. The company also wants to ensure it can quickly roll back updates if there is an issue. Which solution will meet these requirements with MINIMAL changes to the application?
contents.zh: 一家公司最近将其旧版应用程序从本地迁移到 AWS。该应用程序托管在 Application Load Balancer 后面的 Amazon EC2 实例上，而该 Application Load Balancer 位于 Amazon API Gateway 后面。公司希望确保用户在应用程序新版本的任何部署期间受到的干扰最小。公司还希望确保在出现问题时可以快速回滚更新。哪种解决方案将在对应用程序进行最少更改的情况下满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company is storing 100 GB of log data in .csv format in an Amazon S3 bucket. SQL developers want to query this data and generate graphs to visualize it. The SQL developers also need an efficient, automated way to store metadata from the .csv file. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the LEAST amount of effort? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Filter the data through AWS X-Ray to visualize the data.

contents.en: Filter the data through AWS X-Ray to visualize the data.
contents.zh: 通过 AWS X-Ray 过滤数据以可视化数据。

options.label: B
options.content: Filter the data through Amazon QuickSight to visualize the data.

contents.en: Filter the data through Amazon QuickSight to visualize the data.
contents.zh: 通过 Amazon QuickSight 过滤数据以可视化数据。

options.label: C
options.content: Query the data with Amazon Athena.

contents.en: Query the data with Amazon Athena.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon Athena 查询数据。

options.label: D
options.content: Query the data with Amazon Redshift.

contents.en: Query the data with Amazon Redshift.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon Redshift 查询数据。

options.label: E
options.content: Use the AWS Glue Data Catalog as the persistent metadata store.

contents.en: Use the AWS Glue Data Catalog as the persistent metadata store.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Glue Data Catalog 作为持久元数据存储。

options.label: F
options.content: Use Amazon DynamoDB as the persistent metadata store.

contents.en: Use Amazon DynamoDB as the persistent metadata store.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon DynamoDB 作为持久元数据存储。

explanations.en: The correct answers are B, C, and E. The discussion says Glue Data Catalog stores S3 table metadata, Athena queries through the catalog and shows partitions, and QuickSight visualizes the data, so BCE fits the analysis flow.

contents.en: A company is storing 100 GB of log data in .csv format in an Amazon S3 bucket. SQL developers want to query this data and generate graphs to visualize it. The SQL developers also need an efficient, automated way to store metadata from the .csv file. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the LEAST amount of effort? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司在 Amazon S3 bucket 中以 .csv 格式存储了 100 GB 日志数据。SQL 开发人员希望查询这些数据并生成图表进行可视化。SQL 开发人员还需要一种高效、自动化的方式来存储 .csv 文件中的元数据。哪组步骤能以最少工作量满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company deploys its corporate infrastructure on AWS across multiple AWS Regions and Availability Zones. The infrastructure is deployed on Amazon EC2 instances and connects with AWS IoT Greengrass devices. The company deploys additional resources on on-premises servers that are located in the corporate headquarters. The company wants to reduce the overhead involved in maintaining and updating its resources. The company's DevOps team plans to use AWS Systems Manager to implement automated management and application of patches. The DevOps team confirms that Systems Manager is available in the Regions that the resources are deployed in. Systems Manager also is available in a Region near the corporate headquarters. Which combination of steps must the DevOps team take to implement automated patch and configuration management across the company's EC2 instances, IoT devices, and on-premises infrastructure? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Apply tags to all the EC2 instances, AWS IoT Greengrass devices, and on-premises servers. Use Systems Manager Session Manager to push patches to all the tagged devices.

contents.en: Apply tags to all the EC2 instances, AWS IoT Greengrass devices, and on-premises servers. Use Systems Manager Session Manager to push patches to all the tagged devices.
contents.zh: 为所有 EC2 实例、AWS IoT Greengrass 设备和本地服务器应用标签。使用 Systems Manager Session Manager 将补丁推送到所有带标签的设备。

options.label: B
options.content: Use Systems Manager Run Command to schedule patching for the EC2 instances, AWS IoT Greengrass devices, and on- premises servers.

contents.en: Use Systems Manager Run Command to schedule patching for the EC2 instances, AWS IoT Greengrass devices, and on- premises servers.
contents.zh: 使用 Systems Manager Run Command 为 EC2 实例、AWS IoT Greengrass 设备和 on- premises 服务器安排补丁。

options.label: C
options.content: Use Systems Manager Patch Manager to schedule patching for the EC2 instances, AWS IoT Greengrass devices, and on- premises servers as a Systems Manager maintenance window task.

contents.en: Use Systems Manager Patch Manager to schedule patching for the EC2 instances, AWS IoT Greengrass devices, and on- premises servers as a Systems Manager maintenance window task.
contents.zh: 使用 Systems Manager Patch Manager 为 EC2 实例、AWS IoT Greengrass 设备和 on- premises 服务器安排补丁，作为 Systems Manager maintenance window task。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure Amazon EventBridge to monitor Systems Manager Patch Manager for updates to patch baselines. Associate Systems Manager Run Command with the event to initiate a patch action for all EC2 instances, AWS IoT Greengrass devices, and on-premises servers.

contents.en: Configure Amazon EventBridge to monitor Systems Manager Patch Manager for updates to patch baselines. Associate Systems Manager Run Command with the event to initiate a patch action for all EC2 instances, AWS IoT Greengrass devices, and on-premises servers.
contents.zh: 配置 Amazon EventBridge 监控 Systems Manager Patch Manager 中 patch baselines 的更新。将 Systems Manager Run Command 与该事件关联，以对所有 EC2 实例、AWS IoT Greengrass 设备和本地服务器发起补丁操作。

options.label: E
options.content: Create an IAM instance profile for Systems Manager. Attach the instance profile to all the EC2 instances in the AWS account. For the AWS IoT Greengrass devices and on-premises servers, create an IAM service role for Systems Manager.

contents.en: Create an IAM instance profile for Systems Manager. Attach the instance profile to all the EC2 instances in the AWS account. For the AWS IoT Greengrass devices and on-premises servers, create an IAM service role for Systems Manager.
contents.zh: 为 Systems Manager 创建 IAM instance profile。将 instance profile 附加到 AWS 账户中的所有 EC2 实例。对于 AWS IoT Greengrass 设备和本地服务器，为 Systems Manager 创建 IAM service role。

options.label: F
options.content: Generate a managed-instance activation. Use the Activation Code and Activation ID to install Systems Manager Agent (SSM Agent) on each server in the on-premises environment. Update the AWS IoT Greengrass IAM token exchange role. Use the role to deploy SSM Agent on all the IoT devices.

contents.en: Generate a managed-instance activation. Use the Activation Code and Activation ID to install Systems Manager Agent (SSM Agent) on each server in the on-premises environment. Update the AWS IoT Greengrass IAM token exchange role. Use the role to deploy SSM Agent on all the IoT devices.
contents.zh: 生成 managed-instance activation。使用 Activation Code 和 Activation ID 在本地环境中的每台服务器上安装 Systems Manager Agent (SSM Agent)。更新 AWS IoT Greengrass IAM token exchange role。使用该角色在所有 IoT 设备上部署 SSM Agent。

questions.explanation: ????? C?E?F????? Patch Manager ?????????????? Run Command??? E ? F ?? EC2?Greengrass ?????????? Systems Manager ????????????? SSM Agent ???

explanations.zh: ????? C?E?F????? Patch Manager ?????????????? Run Command??? E ? F ?? EC2?Greengrass ?????????? Systems Manager ????????????? SSM Agent ???
explanations.en: The correct answers are C, E, and F. The discussion notes that Patch Manager schedules patching rather than relying on Run Command alone; E and F provide the roles, managed-instance activation, and SSM Agent setup needed for EC2, Greengrass devices, and on-premises servers.

contents.en: A company deploys its corporate infrastructure on AWS across multiple AWS Regions and Availability Zones. The infrastructure is deployed on Amazon EC2 instances and connects with AWS IoT Greengrass devices. The company deploys additional resources on on-premises servers that are located in the corporate headquarters. The company wants to reduce the overhead involved in maintaining and updating its resources. The company's DevOps team plans to use AWS Systems Manager to implement automated management and application of patches. The DevOps team confirms that Systems Manager is available in the Regions that the resources are deployed in. Systems Manager also is available in a Region near the corporate headquarters. Which combination of steps must the DevOps team take to implement automated patch and configuration management across the company's EC2 instances, IoT devices, and on-premises infrastructure? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司在多个 AWS Regions 和 Availability Zones 上的 AWS 中部署其企业基础设施。该基础设施部署在 Amazon EC2 实例上，并与 AWS IoT Greengrass 设备连接。公司还在位于企业总部的本地服务器上部署额外资源。公司希望减少维护和更新资源所涉及的开销。公司的 DevOps 团队计划使用 AWS Systems Manager 实施自动化管理和补丁应用。DevOps 团队确认 Systems Manager 在资源部署所在的 Regions 中可用。Systems Manager 也在企业总部附近的一个 Region 中可用。DevOps 团队必须采取哪组步骤，才能在公司的 EC2 实例、IoT 设备和本地基础设施中实施自动化补丁和配置管理？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company is testing a web application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer. The instances run in an Auto Scaling group across multiple Availability Zones. The company uses a blue/green deployment process with immutable instances when deploying new software. During testing, users are being automatically logged out of the application at random times. Testers also report that, when a new version of the application is deployed, all users are logged out. The development team needs a solution to ensure users remain logged in across scaling events and application deployments. What is the MOST operationally efficient way to ensure users remain logged in?

options.label: A
options.content: Enable smart sessions on the load balancer and modify the application to check for an existing session.

contents.en: Enable smart sessions on the load balancer and modify the application to check for an existing session.
contents.zh: 在负载均衡器上启用 smart sessions，并修改应用程序以检查现有会话。

options.label: B
options.content: Enable session sharing on the load balancer and modify the application to read from the session store.

contents.en: Enable session sharing on the load balancer and modify the application to read from the session store.
contents.zh: 在负载均衡器上启用 session sharing，并修改应用程序从 session store 读取。

options.label: C
options.content: Store user session information in an Amazon S3 bucket and modify the application to read session information from the bucket.

contents.en: Store user session information in an Amazon S3 bucket and modify the application to read session information from the bucket.
contents.zh: 将用户会话信息存储在 Amazon S3 bucket 中，并修改应用程序从该 bucket 读取会话信息。

options.label: D
options.content: Modify the application to store user session information in an Amazon ElastiCache cluster.

contents.en: Modify the application to store user session information in an Amazon ElastiCache cluster.
contents.zh: 修改应用程序，将用户会话信息存储在 Amazon ElastiCache cluster 中。

explanations.en: The correct answer is D. The discussion says random logouts occur because session data is not stored; option D stores user session information in Amazon ElastiCache so instances can share session state.

contents.en: A company is testing a web application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer. The instances run in an Auto Scaling group across multiple Availability Zones. The company uses a blue/green deployment process with immutable instances when deploying new software. During testing, users are being automatically logged out of the application at random times. Testers also report that, when a new version of the application is deployed, all users are logged out. The development team needs a solution to ensure users remain logged in across scaling events and application deployments. What is the MOST operationally efficient way to ensure users remain logged in?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在测试一个 Web 应用程序，该应用程序运行在 Application Load Balancer 后面的 Amazon EC2 实例上。这些实例在跨多个 Availability Zones 的 Auto Scaling group 中运行。公司在部署新软件时使用带不可变实例的蓝/绿部署流程。在测试期间，用户会在随机时间被自动登出应用程序。测试人员还报告说，当部署应用程序的新版本时，所有用户都会被登出。开发团队需要一个解决方案，确保用户在扩缩容事件和应用程序部署期间保持登录状态。确保用户保持登录状态的最具运营效率的方法是什么？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer needs to configure a blue/green deployment for an existing three-tier application. The application runs on Amazon EC2 instances and uses an Amazon RDS database. The EC2 instances run behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB) and are in an Auto Scaling group. The DevOps engineer has created a launch template and an Auto Scaling group for the blue environment. The DevOps engineer also has created a launch template and an Auto Scaling group for the green environment. Each Auto Scaling group deploys to a matching blue or green target group. The target group also specifies which software, blue or green, gets loaded on the EC2 instances. The ALB can be configured to send traffic to the blue environment's target group or the green environment's target group. An Amazon Route 53 record for www.example.com points to the ALB. The deployment must move traffic all at once between the software on the blue environment's EC2 instances to the newly deployed software on the green environment's EC2 instances. What should the DevOps engineer do to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Start a rolling restart of the Auto Scaling group for the green environment to deploy the new software on the green environment's EC2 instances. When the rolling restart is complete, use an AWS CLI command to update the ALB to send traffic to the green environment's target group.

contents.en: Start a rolling restart of the Auto Scaling group for the green environment to deploy the new software on the green environment's EC2 instances. When the rolling restart is complete, use an AWS CLI command to update the ALB to send traffic to the green environment's target group.
contents.zh: 启动绿色环境 Auto Scaling group 的 rolling restart，以在绿色环境的 EC2 实例上部署新软件。rolling restart 完成后，使用 AWS CLI 命令更新 ALB，将流量发送到绿色环境的目标组。

options.label: B
options.content: Use an AWS CLI command to update the ALB to send traffic to the green environment's target group. Then start a rolling restart of the Auto Scaling group for the green environment to deploy the new software on the green environment's EC2 instances.

contents.en: Use an AWS CLI command to update the ALB to send traffic to the green environment's target group. Then start a rolling restart of the Auto Scaling group for the green environment to deploy the new software on the green environment's EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CLI 命令更新 ALB，将流量发送到绿色环境的目标组。然后启动绿色环境 Auto Scaling group 的 rolling restart，以在绿色环境的 EC2 实例上部署新软件。

options.label: C
options.content: Update the launch template to deploy the green environment's software on the blue environment's EC2 instances. Keep the target groups and Auto Scaling groups unchanged in both environments. Perform a rolling restart of the blue environment's EC2 instances.

contents.en: Update the launch template to deploy the green environment's software on the blue environment's EC2 instances. Keep the target groups and Auto Scaling groups unchanged in both environments. Perform a rolling restart of the blue environment's EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 更新 launch template，在蓝色环境的 EC2 实例上部署绿色环境的软件。保持两个环境中的目标组和 Auto Scaling groups 不变。对蓝色环境的 EC2 实例执行 rolling restart。

options.label: D
options.content: Start a rolling restart of the Auto Scaling group for the green environment to deploy the new software on the green environment's EC2 instances. When the rolling restart is complete, update the Route 53 DNS to point to the green environment's endpoint on the ALB.

contents.en: Start a rolling restart of the Auto Scaling group for the green environment to deploy the new software on the green environment's EC2 instances. When the rolling restart is complete, update the Route 53 DNS to point to the green environment's endpoint on the ALB.
contents.zh: 启动绿色环境 Auto Scaling group 的 rolling restart，以在绿色环境的 EC2 实例上部署新软件。rolling restart 完成后，更新 Route 53 DNS，使其指向 ALB 上绿色环境的 endpoint。

explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The discussion explains that with one ALB, blue/green traffic routing is controlled by the load balancer target group; option A restarts the green environment and then updates the ALB to send traffic to the green target group.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer needs to configure a blue/green deployment for an existing three-tier application. The application runs on Amazon EC2 instances and uses an Amazon RDS database. The EC2 instances run behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB) and are in an Auto Scaling group. The DevOps engineer has created a launch template and an Auto Scaling group for the blue environment. The DevOps engineer also has created a launch template and an Auto Scaling group for the green environment. Each Auto Scaling group deploys to a matching blue or green target group. The target group also specifies which software, blue or green, gets loaded on the EC2 instances. The ALB can be configured to send traffic to the blue environment's target group or the green environment's target group. An Amazon Route 53 record for www.example.com points to the ALB. The deployment must move traffic all at once between the software on the blue environment's EC2 instances to the newly deployed software on the green environment's EC2 instances. What should the DevOps engineer do to meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师需要为现有三层应用程序配置蓝/绿部署。该应用程序运行在 Amazon EC2 实例上，并使用 Amazon RDS 数据库。EC2 实例在 Application Load Balancer (ALB) 后运行，并位于 Auto Scaling group 中。DevOps 工程师已为蓝色环境创建 launch template 和 Auto Scaling group。DevOps 工程师也已为绿色环境创建 launch template 和 Auto Scaling group。每个 Auto Scaling group 都部署到匹配的蓝色或绿色目标组。目标组还指定在 EC2 实例上加载哪个软件（蓝色或绿色）。可以配置 ALB 将流量发送到蓝色环境的目标组或绿色环境的目标组。www.example.com 的 Amazon Route 53 记录指向 ALB。部署必须一次性将流量从蓝色环境 EC2 实例上的软件切换到绿色环境 EC2 实例上新部署的软件。DevOps 工程师应如何满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company is building a new pipeline by using AWS CodePipeline and AWS CodeBuild in a build account. The pipeline consists of two stages. The first stage is a CodeBuild job to build and package an AWS Lambda function. The second stage consists of deployment actions that operate on two different AWS accounts: a development environment account and a production environment account. The deployment stages use the AWS CloudFormation action that CodePipeline invokes to deploy the infrastructure that the Lambda function requires. A DevOps engineer creates the CodePipeline pipeline and configures the pipeline to encrypt build artifacts by using the AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) AWS managed key for Amazon S3 (the aws/s3 key). The artifacts are stored in an S3 bucket. When the pipeline runs, the CloudFormation actions fail with an access denied error. Which combination of actions must the DevOps engineer perform to resolve this error? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an S3 bucket in each AWS account for the artifacts. Allow the pipeline to write to the S3 buckets. Create a CodePipeline S3 action to copy the artifacts to the S3 bucket in each AWS account. Update the CloudFormation actions to reference the artifacts S3 bucket in the production account.

contents.en: Create an S3 bucket in each AWS account for the artifacts. Allow the pipeline to write to the S3 buckets. Create a CodePipeline S3 action to copy the artifacts to the S3 bucket in each AWS account. Update the CloudFormation actions to reference the artifacts S3 bucket in the production account.
contents.zh: 在每个 AWS 账户中为工件创建 S3 bucket。允许管道写入这些 S3 buckets。创建 CodePipeline S3 action，将工件复制到每个 AWS 账户中的 S3 bucket。更新 CloudFormation 操作以引用生产账户中的 artifacts S3 bucket。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a customer managed KMS key. Configure the KMS key policy to allow the IAM roles used by the CloudFormation action to perform decrypt operations. Modify the pipeline to use the customer managed KMS key to encrypt artifacts.

contents.en: Create a customer managed KMS key. Configure the KMS key policy to allow the IAM roles used by the CloudFormation action to perform decrypt operations. Modify the pipeline to use the customer managed KMS key to encrypt artifacts.
contents.zh: 创建 customer managed KMS key。配置 KMS key policy，允许 CloudFormation 操作使用的 IAM roles 执行 decrypt 操作。修改管道以使用 customer managed KMS key 加密工件。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS managed KMS key. Configure the KMS key policy to allow the development account and the production account to perform decrypt operations. Modify the pipeline to use the KMS key to encrypt artifacts.

contents.en: Create an AWS managed KMS key. Configure the KMS key policy to allow the development account and the production account to perform decrypt operations. Modify the pipeline to use the KMS key to encrypt artifacts.
contents.zh: 创建 AWS managed KMS key。配置 KMS key policy，允许开发账户和生产账户执行 decrypt 操作。修改管道以使用该 KMS key 加密工件。

options.label: D
options.content: In the development account and in the production account, create an IAM role for CodePipeline. Configure the roles with permissions to perform CloudFormation operations and with permissions to retrieve and decrypt objects from the artifacts S3 bucket. In the CodePipeline account, configure the CodePipeline CloudFormation action to use the roles.

contents.en: In the development account and in the production account, create an IAM role for CodePipeline. Configure the roles with permissions to perform CloudFormation operations and with permissions to retrieve and decrypt objects from the artifacts S3 bucket. In the CodePipeline account, configure the CodePipeline CloudFormation action to use the roles.
contents.zh: 在开发账户和生产账户中，为 CodePipeline 创建 IAM role。配置这些角色，使其具有执行 CloudFormation 操作的权限，以及从 artifacts S3 bucket 检索和解密对象的权限。在 CodePipeline 账户中，配置 CodePipeline CloudFormation 操作使用这些角色。

options.label: E
options.content: In the development account and in the production account, create an IAM role for CodePipeline. Configure the roles with permissions to perform CloudFormation operations and with permissions to retrieve and decrypt objects from the artifacts S3 bucket. In the CodePipeline account, modify the artifacts S3 bucket policy to allow the roles access. Configure the CodePipeline CloudFormation action to use the roles.

contents.en: In the development account and in the production account, create an IAM role for CodePipeline. Configure the roles with permissions to perform CloudFormation operations and with permissions to retrieve and decrypt objects from the artifacts S3 bucket. In the CodePipeline account, modify the artifacts S3 bucket policy to allow the roles access. Configure the CodePipeline CloudFormation action to use the roles.
contents.zh: 在开发账户和生产账户中，为 CodePipeline 创建 IAM role。配置这些角色，使其具有执行 CloudFormation 操作的权限，以及从 artifacts S3 bucket 检索和解密对象的权限。在 CodePipeline 账户中，修改 artifacts S3 bucket policy 以允许这些角色访问。配置 CodePipeline CloudFormation 操作使用这些角色。

explanations.en: The correct answers are B and E. The discussion notes that AWS managed KMS key policies cannot be modified for cross-account access; B uses a customer managed KMS key with decrypt permissions, and E configures the cross-account CodePipeline/CloudFormation roles and artifact bucket access.

contents.en: A company is building a new pipeline by using AWS CodePipeline and AWS CodeBuild in a build account. The pipeline consists of two stages. The first stage is a CodeBuild job to build and package an AWS Lambda function. The second stage consists of deployment actions that operate on two different AWS accounts: a development environment account and a production environment account. The deployment stages use the AWS CloudFormation action that CodePipeline invokes to deploy the infrastructure that the Lambda function requires. A DevOps engineer creates the CodePipeline pipeline and configures the pipeline to encrypt build artifacts by using the AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) AWS managed key for Amazon S3 (the aws/s3 key). The artifacts are stored in an S3 bucket. When the pipeline runs, the CloudFormation actions fail with an access denied error. Which combination of actions must the DevOps engineer perform to resolve this error? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司正在 build account 中使用 AWS CodePipeline 和 AWS CodeBuild 构建一个新管道。该管道包含两个阶段。第一阶段是 CodeBuild 作业，用于构建并打包 AWS Lambda 函数。第二阶段包含在两个不同 AWS 账户上运行的部署操作：开发环境账户和生产环境账户。部署阶段使用 CodePipeline 调用的 AWS CloudFormation 操作来部署 Lambda 函数所需的基础设施。DevOps 工程师创建了 CodePipeline 管道，并配置管道使用 Amazon S3 的 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) AWS managed key（aws/s3 key）加密构建工件。工件存储在 S3 bucket 中。当管道运行时，CloudFormation 操作因 access denied error 而失败。DevOps 工程师必须执行哪组操作来解决此错误？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company is using an organization in AWS Organizations to manage multiple AWS accounts. The company's development team wants to use AWS Lambda functions to meet resiliency requirements and is rewriting all applications to work with Lambda functions that are deployed in a VPC. The development team is using Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) as shared storage in Account A in the organization. The company wants to continue to use Amazon EFS with Lambda. Company policy requires all serverless projects to be deployed in Account B. A DevOps engineer needs to reconfigure an existing EFS file system to allow Lambda functions to access the data through an existing EFS access point. Which combination of steps should the DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Update the EFS file system policy to provide Account B with access to mount and write to the EFS file system in Account A.

contents.en: Update the EFS file system policy to provide Account B with access to mount and write to the EFS file system in Account A.
contents.zh: 更新 EFS file system policy，向 Account B 提供挂载和写入 Account A 中 EFS file system 的访问权限。

options.label: B
options.content: Create SCPs to set permission guardrails with fine-grained control for Amazon EFS.

contents.en: Create SCPs to set permission guardrails with fine-grained control for Amazon EFS.
contents.zh: 创建 SCPs，为 Amazon EFS 设置具有细粒度控制的权限护栏。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a new EFS file system in Account B. Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to keep data from Account A and Account B synchronized.

contents.en: Create a new EFS file system in Account B. Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to keep data from Account A and Account B synchronized.
contents.zh: 在 Account B 中创建新的 EFS file system。使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 保持 Account A 和 Account B 的数据同步。

options.label: D
options.content: Update the Lambda execution roles with permission to access the VPC and the EFS file system.

contents.en: Update the Lambda execution roles with permission to access the VPC and the EFS file system.
contents.zh: 更新 Lambda execution roles，使其具有访问 VPC 和 EFS file system 的权限。

options.label: E
options.content: Create a VPC peering connection to connect Account A to Account B.

contents.en: Create a VPC peering connection to connect Account A to Account B.
contents.zh: 创建 VPC peering connection 以连接 Account A 和 Account B。

options.label: F
options.content: Configure the Lambda functions in Account B to assume an existing IAM role in Account A.

contents.en: Configure the Lambda functions in Account B to assume an existing IAM role in Account A.
contents.zh: 配置 Account B 中的 Lambda 函数以代入 Account A 中的现有 IAM role。

questions.explanation: ????? A?D?E?????? ADE???????? Account B ??????? Account A ? EFS?? Lambda ?????? VPC ? EFS ???????? VPC peering ??????????

explanations.zh: ????? A?D?E?????? ADE???????? Account B ??????? Account A ? EFS?? Lambda ?????? VPC ? EFS ???????? VPC peering ??????????
explanations.en: The correct answers are A, D, and E. The discussion gives ADE; together these options grant Account B access to mount and write to Account A's EFS, allow the Lambda execution roles to access the VPC and file system, and connect the accounts with VPC peering.

contents.en: A company is using an organization in AWS Organizations to manage multiple AWS accounts. The company's development team wants to use AWS Lambda functions to meet resiliency requirements and is rewriting all applications to work with Lambda functions that are deployed in a VPC. The development team is using Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) as shared storage in Account A in the organization. The company wants to continue to use Amazon EFS with Lambda. Company policy requires all serverless projects to be deployed in Account B. A DevOps engineer needs to reconfigure an existing EFS file system to allow Lambda functions to access the data through an existing EFS access point. Which combination of steps should the DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司正在使用 AWS Organizations 中的组织来管理多个 AWS 账户。公司的开发团队希望使用 AWS Lambda 函数满足弹性要求，并正在重写所有应用程序，使其与部署在 VPC 中的 Lambda 函数配合工作。开发团队正在组织中的 Account A 中使用 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 作为共享存储。公司希望继续将 Amazon EFS 与 Lambda 结合使用。公司政策要求所有无服务器项目都部署在 Account B 中。DevOps 工程师需要重新配置现有 EFS file system，以允许 Lambda 函数通过现有 EFS access point 访问数据。DevOps 工程师应采取哪组步骤来满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A media company has several thousand Amazon EC2 instances in an AWS account. The company is using Slack and a shared email inbox for team communications and important updates. A DevOps engineer needs to send all AWS-scheduled EC2 maintenance notifications to the Slack channel and the shared inbox. The solution must include the instances' Name and Owner tags. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Integrate AWS Trusted Advisor with AWS Config. Configure a custom AWS Config rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function to publish notifications to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe a Slack channel endpoint and the shared inbox to the topic.

contents.en: Integrate AWS Trusted Advisor with AWS Config. Configure a custom AWS Config rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function to publish notifications to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe a Slack channel endpoint and the shared inbox to the topic.
contents.zh: 将 AWS Trusted Advisor 与 AWS Config 集成。配置自定义 AWS Config rule，以调用 AWS Lambda 函数向 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题发布通知。将 Slack channel endpoint 和共享收件箱订阅到该主题。

options.label: B
options.content: Use Amazon EventBridge to monitor for AWS Health events. Configure the maintenance events to target an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe an AWS Lambda function to the SNS topic to send notifications to the Slack channel and the shared inbox.

contents.en: Use Amazon EventBridge to monitor for AWS Health events. Configure the maintenance events to target an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe an AWS Lambda function to the SNS topic to send notifications to the Slack channel and the shared inbox.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon EventBridge 监控 AWS Health events。配置维护事件以 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题为目标。将 AWS Lambda 函数订阅到 SNS 主题，以向 Slack channel 和共享收件箱发送通知。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function that sends EC2 maintenance notifications to the Slack channel and the shared inbox. Monitor EC2 health events by using Amazon CloudWatch metrics. Configure a CloudWatch alarm that invokes the Lambda function when a maintenance notification is received.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that sends EC2 maintenance notifications to the Slack channel and the shared inbox. Monitor EC2 health events by using Amazon CloudWatch metrics. Configure a CloudWatch alarm that invokes the Lambda function when a maintenance notification is received.
contents.zh: 创建 AWS Lambda 函数，将 EC2 维护通知发送到 Slack channel 和共享收件箱。使用 Amazon CloudWatch metrics 监控 EC2 health events。配置 CloudWatch alarm，在收到维护通知时调用 Lambda 函数。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure AWS Support integration with AWS CloudTrail. Create a CloudTrail lookup event to invoke an AWS Lambda function to pass EC2 maintenance notifications to Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS). Configure Amazon SNS to target the Slack channel and the shared inbox.

contents.en: Configure AWS Support integration with AWS CloudTrail. Create a CloudTrail lookup event to invoke an AWS Lambda function to pass EC2 maintenance notifications to Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS). Configure Amazon SNS to target the Slack channel and the shared inbox.
contents.zh: 配置 AWS Support 与 AWS CloudTrail 的集成。创建 CloudTrail lookup event，以调用 AWS Lambda 函数将 EC2 维护通知传递给 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)。配置 Amazon SNS 以 Slack channel 和共享收件箱为目标。

questions.explanation: ????? B????? B?????? EventBridge ?? AWS Health ??????????? SNS?????? Lambda ?? Slack ??????

explanations.zh: ????? B????? B?????? EventBridge ?? AWS Health ??????????? SNS?????? Lambda ?? Slack ??????
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. The discussion confirms B; the option monitors AWS Health events with EventBridge, targets an SNS topic, and uses a subscribed Lambda function to notify Slack and the shared inbox.

contents.en: A media company has several thousand Amazon EC2 instances in an AWS account. The company is using Slack and a shared email inbox for team communications and important updates. A DevOps engineer needs to send all AWS-scheduled EC2 maintenance notifications to the Slack channel and the shared inbox. The solution must include the instances' Name and Owner tags. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家媒体公司在一个 AWS 账户中拥有数千个 Amazon EC2 实例。公司使用 Slack 和共享电子邮件收件箱进行团队通信和重要更新。DevOps 工程师需要将所有 AWS 计划的 EC2 维护通知发送到 Slack channel 和共享收件箱。该解决方案必须包含实例的 Name 和 Owner 标签。哪种解决方案将满足这些要求？

questions.content: An AWS CodePipeline pipeline has implemented a code release process. The pipeline is integrated with AWS CodeDeploy to deploy versions of an application to multiple Amazon EC2 instances for each CodePipeline stage. During a recent deployment, the pipeline failed due to a CodeDeploy issue. The DevOps team wants to improve monitoring and notifications during deployment to decrease resolution times. What should the DevOps engineer do to create notifications when issues are discovered?

options.label: A
options.content: Implement Amazon CloudWatch Logs for CodePipeline and CodeDeploy, create an AWS Config rule to evaluate code deployment issues, and create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to notify stakeholders of deployment issues.

contents.en: Implement Amazon CloudWatch Logs for CodePipeline and CodeDeploy, create an AWS Config rule to evaluate code deployment issues, and create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to notify stakeholders of deployment issues.
contents.zh: 为 CodePipeline 和 CodeDeploy 实施 Amazon CloudWatch Logs，创建 AWS Config rule 以评估代码部署问题，并创建 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题以通知利益相关者部署问题。

options.label: B
options.content: Implement Amazon EventBridge for CodePipeline and CodeDeploy, create an AWS Lambda function to evaluate code deployment issues, and create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to notify stakeholders of deployment issues.

contents.en: Implement Amazon EventBridge for CodePipeline and CodeDeploy, create an AWS Lambda function to evaluate code deployment issues, and create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to notify stakeholders of deployment issues.
contents.zh: 为 CodePipeline 和 CodeDeploy 实施 Amazon EventBridge，创建 AWS Lambda 函数以评估代码部署问题，并创建 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题以通知利益相关者部署问题。

options.label: C
options.content: Implement AWS CloudTrail to record CodePipeline and CodeDeploy API call information, create an AWS Lambda function to evaluate code deployment issues, and create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to notify stakeholders of deployment issues.

contents.en: Implement AWS CloudTrail to record CodePipeline and CodeDeploy API call information, create an AWS Lambda function to evaluate code deployment issues, and create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to notify stakeholders of deployment issues.
contents.zh: 实施 AWS CloudTrail 以记录 CodePipeline 和 CodeDeploy API 调用信息，创建 AWS Lambda 函数以评估代码部署问题，并创建 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题以通知利益相关者部署问题。

options.label: D
options.content: Implement Amazon EventBridge for CodePipeline and CodeDeploy, create an Amazon Inspector assessment target to evaluate code deployment issues, and create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to notify stakeholders of deployment issues.

contents.en: Implement Amazon EventBridge for CodePipeline and CodeDeploy, create an Amazon Inspector assessment target to evaluate code deployment issues, and create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to notify stakeholders of deployment issues.
contents.zh: 为 CodePipeline 和 CodeDeploy 实施 Amazon EventBridge，创建 Amazon Inspector assessment target 以评估代码部署问题，并创建 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题以通知利益相关者部署问题。

questions.explanation: ????? B??????????????????? EventBridge ? SNS??? B ?? CodePipeline ? CodeDeploy ????? Lambda ???????? SNS ???????

explanations.zh: ????? B??????????????????? EventBridge ? SNS??? B ?? CodePipeline ? CodeDeploy ????? Lambda ???????? SNS ???????
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. The discussion says deployment monitoring and notifications call for EventBridge and SNS; option B monitors CodePipeline and CodeDeploy events, uses Lambda to evaluate deployment issues, and notifies stakeholders through SNS.

contents.en: An AWS CodePipeline pipeline has implemented a code release process. The pipeline is integrated with AWS CodeDeploy to deploy versions of an application to multiple Amazon EC2 instances for each CodePipeline stage. During a recent deployment, the pipeline failed due to a CodeDeploy issue. The DevOps team wants to improve monitoring and notifications during deployment to decrease resolution times. What should the DevOps engineer do to create notifications when issues are discovered?
contents.zh: 一个 AWS CodePipeline 管道已实施代码发布流程。该管道与 AWS CodeDeploy 集成，用于在每个 CodePipeline 阶段将应用程序版本部署到多个 Amazon EC2 实例。在最近一次部署期间，管道因 CodeDeploy 问题而失败。DevOps 团队希望改进部署期间的监控和通知，以缩短解决时间。DevOps 工程师应如何在发现问题时创建通知？

questions.content: A global company manages multiple AWS accounts by using AWS Control Tower. The company hosts internal applications and public applications. Each application team in the company has its own AWS account for application hosting. The accounts are consolidated in an organization in AWS Organizations. One of the AWS Control Tower member accounts serves as a centralized DevOps account with CI/CD pipelines that application teams use to deploy applications to their respective target AWS accounts. An IAM role for deployment exists in the centralized DevOps account. An application team is attempting to deploy its application to an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster in an application AWS account. An IAM role for deployment exists in the application AWS account. The deployment is through an AWS CodeBuild project that is set up in the centralized DevOps account. The CodeBuild project uses an IAM service role for CodeBuild. The deployment is failing with an Unauthorized error during attempts to connect to the cross-account EKS cluster from CodeBuild. Which solution will resolve this error?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure the application account's deployment IAM role to have a trust relationship with the centralized DevOps account. Configure the trust relationship to allow the sts:AssumeRole action. Configure the application account's deployment IAM role to have the required access to the EKS cluster. Configure the EKS cluster aws-auth ConfigMap to map the role to the appropriate system permissions.

contents.en: Configure the application account's deployment IAM role to have a trust relationship with the centralized DevOps account. Configure the trust relationship to allow the sts:AssumeRole action. Configure the application account's deployment IAM role to have the required access to the EKS cluster. Configure the EKS cluster aws-auth ConfigMap to map the role to the appropriate system permissions.
contents.zh: 配置应用程序账户的部署 IAM role，使其与集中式 DevOps 账户建立 trust relationship。配置该 trust relationship 以允许 sts:AssumeRole 操作。配置应用程序账户的部署 IAM role，使其具有对 EKS cluster 的所需访问权限。配置 EKS cluster aws-auth ConfigMap，将该角色映射到适当的系统权限。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure the centralized DevOps account's deployment IAM role to have a trust relationship with the application account. Configure the trust relationship to allow the sts:AssumeRole action. Configure the centralized DevOps account's deployment IAM role to allow the required access to CodeBuild.

contents.en: Configure the centralized DevOps account's deployment IAM role to have a trust relationship with the application account. Configure the trust relationship to allow the sts:AssumeRole action. Configure the centralized DevOps account's deployment IAM role to allow the required access to CodeBuild.
contents.zh: 配置集中式 DevOps 账户的部署 IAM role，使其与应用程序账户建立 trust relationship。配置该 trust relationship 以允许 sts:AssumeRole 操作。配置集中式 DevOps 账户的部署 IAM role，以允许对 CodeBuild 的所需访问权限。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the centralized DevOps account's deployment IAM role to have a trust relationship with the application account. Configure the trust relationship to allow the sts:AssumeRoleWithSAML action. Configure the centralized DevOps account's deployment IAM role to allow the required access to CodeBuild.

contents.en: Configure the centralized DevOps account's deployment IAM role to have a trust relationship with the application account.
