Configure the trust relationship to allow the sts:AssumeRoleWithSAML action. Configure the centralized DevOps account's deployment IAM role to allow the required access to CodeBuild.
contents.zh: 配置集中式 DevOps 账户的部署 IAM role，使其与应用程序账户建立 trust relationship。配置该 trust relationship 以允许 sts:AssumeRoleWithSAML 操作。配置集中式 DevOps 账户的部署 IAM role，以允许对 CodeBuild 的所需访问权限。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure the application account's deployment IAM role to have a trust relationship with the AWS Control Tower management account. Configure the trust relationship to allow the sts:AssumeRole action. Configure the application account's deployment IAM role to have the required access to the EKS cluster. Configure the EKS cluster aws-auth ConfigMap to map the role to the appropriate system permissions.

contents.en: Configure the application account's deployment IAM role to have a trust relationship with the AWS Control Tower management account. Configure the trust relationship to allow the sts:AssumeRole action. Configure the application account's deployment IAM role to have the required access to the EKS cluster. Configure the EKS cluster aws-auth ConfigMap to map the role to the appropriate system permissions.
contents.zh: 配置应用程序账户的部署 IAM role，使其与 AWS Control Tower 管理账户建立 trust relationship。配置该 trust relationship 以允许 sts:AssumeRole 操作。配置应用程序账户的部署 IAM role，使其具有对 EKS cluster 的所需访问权限。配置 EKS cluster aws-auth ConfigMap，将该角色映射到适当的系统权限。

explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The discussion says the trust direction should be from the application account deployment role to the centralized DevOps account with sts:AssumeRole; that role also needs EKS access and an aws-auth ConfigMap mapping.

contents.en: A global company manages multiple AWS accounts by using AWS Control Tower. The company hosts internal applications and public applications. Each application team in the company has its own AWS account for application hosting. The accounts are consolidated in an organization in AWS Organizations. One of the AWS Control Tower member accounts serves as a centralized DevOps account with CI/CD pipelines that application teams use to deploy applications to their respective target AWS accounts. An IAM role for deployment exists in the centralized DevOps account. An application team is attempting to deploy its application to an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster in an application AWS account. An IAM role for deployment exists in the application AWS account. The deployment is through an AWS CodeBuild project that is set up in the centralized DevOps account. The CodeBuild project uses an IAM service role for CodeBuild. The deployment is failing with an Unauthorized error during attempts to connect to the cross-account EKS cluster from CodeBuild. Which solution will resolve this error?
contents.zh: 一家全球公司使用 AWS Control Tower 管理多个 AWS 账户。公司托管内部应用程序和公共应用程序。公司中的每个应用程序团队都有自己的 AWS 账户用于应用程序托管。这些账户集中在 AWS Organizations 中的一个组织内。其中一个 AWS Control Tower 成员账户作为集中式 DevOps 账户，拥有应用程序团队用来将应用程序部署到各自目标 AWS 账户的 CI/CD 管道。集中式 DevOps 账户中存在一个用于部署的 IAM role。一个应用程序团队正尝试将其应用程序部署到应用程序 AWS 账户中的 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster。应用程序 AWS 账户中存在一个用于部署的 IAM role。部署通过在集中式 DevOps 账户中设置的 AWS CodeBuild 项目完成。该 CodeBuild 项目使用 CodeBuild 的 IAM service role。在 CodeBuild 尝试连接到跨账户 EKS cluster 期间，部署因 Unauthorized error 而失败。哪种解决方案将解决此错误？

questions.content: A highly regulated company has a policy that DevOps engineers should not log in to their Amazon EC2 instances except in emergencies. If a DevOps engineer does log in, the security team must be notified within 15 minutes of the occurrence. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Install the Amazon Inspector agent on each EC2 instance. Subscribe to Amazon EventBridge notifications. Invoke an AWS Lambda function to check if a message is about user logins. If it is, send a notification to the security team using Amazon SNS.

contents.en: Install the Amazon Inspector agent on each EC2 instance. Subscribe to Amazon EventBridge notifications. Invoke an AWS Lambda function to check if a message is about user logins. If it is, send a notification to the security team using Amazon SNS.
contents.zh: 在每个 EC2 实例上安装 Amazon Inspector agent。订阅 Amazon EventBridge notifications。调用 AWS Lambda 函数检查消息是否与用户登录有关。如果是，则使用 Amazon SNS 向安全团队发送通知。

options.label: B
options.content: Install the Amazon CloudWatch agent on each EC2 instance. Configure the agent to push all logs to Amazon CloudWatch Logs and set up a CloudWatch metric filter that searches for user logins. If a login is found, send a notification to the security team using Amazon SNS.

contents.en: Install the Amazon CloudWatch agent on each EC2 instance. Configure the agent to push all logs to Amazon CloudWatch Logs and set up a CloudWatch metric filter that searches for user logins. If a login is found, send a notification to the security team using Amazon SNS.
contents.zh: 在每个 EC2 实例上安装 Amazon CloudWatch agent。配置该 agent 将所有日志推送到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs，并设置 CloudWatch metric filter 以搜索用户登录。如果发现登录，则使用 Amazon SNS 向安全团队发送通知。

options.label: C
options.content: Set up AWS CloudTrail with Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Subscribe CloudWatch Logs to Amazon Kinesis. Attach AWS Lambda to Kinesis to parse and determine if a log contains a user login. If it does, send a notification to the security team using Amazon SNS.

contents.en: Set up AWS CloudTrail with Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Subscribe CloudWatch Logs to Amazon Kinesis. Attach AWS Lambda to Kinesis to parse and determine if a log contains a user login. If it does, send a notification to the security team using Amazon SNS.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 设置 AWS CloudTrail。将 CloudWatch Logs 订阅到 Amazon Kinesis。将 AWS Lambda 附加到 Kinesis，以解析并确定日志是否包含用户登录。如果包含，则使用 Amazon SNS 向安全团队发送通知。

options.label: D
options.content: Set up a script on each Amazon EC2 instance to push all logs to Amazon S3. Set up an S3 event to invoke an AWS Lambda function, which invokes an Amazon Athena query to run. The Athena query checks for logins and sends the output to the security team using Amazon SNS.

contents.en: Set up a script on each Amazon EC2 instance to push all logs to Amazon S3. Set up an S3 event to invoke an AWS Lambda function, which invokes an Amazon Athena query to run. The Athena query checks for logins and sends the output to the security team using Amazon SNS.
contents.zh: 在每个 Amazon EC2 实例上设置脚本，将所有日志推送到 Amazon S3。设置 S3 event 以调用 AWS Lambda 函数，该函数调用 Amazon Athena query 运行。Athena query 检查登录，并使用 Amazon SNS 将输出发送给安全团队。

explanations.en: The correct answer is B. The discussion highlights the need to notify the security team through SNS; option B installs the CloudWatch agent, pushes logs to CloudWatch Logs, creates a metric filter for user logins, and sends an SNS notification when one is found.

contents.en: A highly regulated company has a policy that DevOps engineers should not log in to their Amazon EC2 instances except in emergencies. If a DevOps engineer does log in, the security team must be notified within 15 minutes of the occurrence. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家高度受监管的公司有一项政策，规定除紧急情况外，DevOps 工程师不应登录其 Amazon EC2 实例。如果 DevOps 工程师确实登录，安全团队必须在事件发生后 15 分钟内收到通知。哪种解决方案将满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company updated the AWS CloudFormation template for a critical business application. The stack update process failed due to an error in the updated template, and AWS CloudFormation automatically began the stack rollback process. Later, a DevOps engineer discovered that the application was still unavailable and that the stack was in the UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED state. Which combination of actions should the DevOps engineer perform so that the stack rollback can complete successfully? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Attach the AWSCloudFormationFullAccess IAM policy to the AWS CloudFormation role.

contents.en: Attach the AWSCloudFormationFullAccess IAM policy to the AWS CloudFormation role.
contents.zh: 将 AWSCloudFormationFullAccess IAM policy 附加到 AWS CloudFormation role。

options.label: B
options.content: Automatically recover the stack resources by using AWS CloudFormation drift detection.

contents.en: Automatically recover the stack resources by using AWS CloudFormation drift detection.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CloudFormation drift detection 自动恢复 stack 资源。

options.label: C
options.content: Issue a ContinueUpdateRollback command from the AWS CloudFormation console or the AWS CLI.

contents.en: Issue a ContinueUpdateRollback command from the AWS CloudFormation console or the AWS CLI.
contents.zh: 从 AWS CloudFormation console 或 AWS CLI 发出 ContinueUpdateRollback 命令。

options.label: D
options.content: Manually adjust the resources to match the expectations of the stack.

contents.en: Manually adjust the resources to match the expectations of the stack.
contents.zh: 手动调整资源，使其符合 stack 的预期。

options.label: E
options.content: Update the existing AWS CloudFormation stack by using the original template.

contents.en: Update the existing AWS CloudFormation stack by using the original template.
contents.zh: 使用原始模板更新现有 AWS CloudFormation stack。

explanations.en: The correct answers are C and D. The discussion explains that ContinueUpdateRollback lets CloudFormation continue the rollback from where it paused, and manually adjusting resources aligns them with stack expectations to resolve the failed update state.

contents.en: A company updated the AWS CloudFormation template for a critical business application. The stack update process failed due to an error in the updated template, and AWS CloudFormation automatically began the stack rollback process. Later, a DevOps engineer discovered that the application was still unavailable and that the stack was in the UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED state. Which combination of actions should the DevOps engineer perform so that the stack rollback can complete successfully? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司更新了关键业务应用程序的 AWS CloudFormation 模板。由于更新后的模板中存在错误，stack 更新过程失败，AWS CloudFormation 自动开始 stack rollback 过程。后来，DevOps 工程师发现应用程序仍然不可用，并且 stack 处于 UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED 状态。DevOps 工程师应执行哪组操作，以便 stack rollback 能够成功完成？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A development team manually builds an artifact locally and then places it in an Amazon S3 bucket. The application has a local cache that must be cleared when a deployment occurs. The team runs a command to do this, downloads the artifact from Amazon S3, and unzips the artifact to complete the deployment. A DevOps team wants to migrate to a CI/CD process and build in checks to stop and roll back the deployment when a failure occurs. This requires the team to track the progression of the deployment. Which combination of actions will accomplish this? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Allow developers to check the code into a code repository. Using Amazon EventBridge, on every pull into the main branch, invoke an AWS Lambda function to build the artifact and store it in Amazon S3.

contents.en: Allow developers to check the code into a code repository. Using Amazon EventBridge, on every pull into the main branch, invoke an AWS Lambda function to build the artifact and store it in Amazon S3.
contents.zh: 允许开发人员将代码签入代码存储库。使用 Amazon EventBridge，在每次 pull 到 main 分支时，调用 AWS Lambda 函数构建工件并将其存储在 Amazon S3 中。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a custom script to clear the cache. Specify the script in the BeforeInstall lifecycle hook in the AppSpec file.

contents.en: Create a custom script to clear the cache. Specify the script in the BeforeInstall lifecycle hook in the AppSpec file.
contents.zh: 创建自定义脚本以清除缓存。在 AppSpec 文件的 BeforeInstall lifecycle hook 中指定该脚本。

options.label: C
options.content: Create user data for each Amazon EC2 instance that contains the clear cache script. Once deployed, test the application. If it is not successful, deploy it again.

contents.en: Create user data for each Amazon EC2 instance that contains the clear cache script. Once deployed, test the application. If it is not successful, deploy it again.
contents.zh: 为每个 Amazon EC2 实例创建包含清除缓存脚本的 user data。部署后，测试应用程序。如果不成功，则再次部署。

options.label: D
options.content: Set up AWS CodePipeline to deploy the application. Allow developers to check the code into a code repository as a source for the pipeline.

contents.en: Set up AWS CodePipeline to deploy the application. Allow developers to check the code into a code repository as a source for the pipeline.
contents.zh: 设置 AWS CodePipeline 以部署应用程序。允许开发人员将代码签入代码存储库，作为管道的源。

options.label: E
options.content: Use AWS CodeBuild to build the artifact and place it in Amazon S3. Use AWS CodeDeploy to deploy the artifact to Amazon EC2 instances.

contents.en: Use AWS CodeBuild to build the artifact and place it in Amazon S3. Use AWS CodeDeploy to deploy the artifact to Amazon EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CodeBuild 构建工件并将其放入 Amazon S3。使用 AWS CodeDeploy 将工件部署到 Amazon EC2 实例。

options.label: F
options.content: Use AWS Systems Manager to fetch the artifact from Amazon S3 and deploy it to all the instances.

contents.en: Use AWS Systems Manager to fetch the artifact from Amazon S3 and deploy it to all the instances.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Systems Manager 从 Amazon S3 获取工件并将其部署到所有实例。

questions.explanation: ????? B?D?E????? AppSpec ? BeforeInstall hook ???????????????CodePipeline ????????CodeBuild ???????? S3?CodeDeploy ???? EC2?

explanations.zh: ????? B?D?E????? AppSpec ? BeforeInstall hook ???????????????CodePipeline ????????CodeBuild ???????? S3?CodeDeploy ???? EC2?
explanations.en: The correct answers are B, D, and E. The discussion says a BeforeInstall hook in the AppSpec file can clear the local cache before installation; CodePipeline automates the release, CodeBuild creates the artifact in S3, and CodeDeploy deploys it to EC2.

contents.en: A development team manually builds an artifact locally and then places it in an Amazon S3 bucket. The application has a local cache that must be cleared when a deployment occurs. The team runs a command to do this, downloads the artifact from Amazon S3, and unzips the artifact to complete the deployment. A DevOps team wants to migrate to a CI/CD process and build in checks to stop and roll back the deployment when a failure occurs. This requires the team to track the progression of the deployment. Which combination of actions will accomplish this? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一个开发团队在本地手动构建工件，然后将其放入 Amazon S3 bucket。该应用程序有一个本地缓存，在部署发生时必须清除。团队运行一个命令来执行此操作，从 Amazon S3 下载工件，并解压该工件以完成部署。DevOps 团队希望迁移到 CI/CD 流程，并内置检查，以便在发生失败时停止并回滚部署。这要求团队跟踪部署的进展。哪组操作将实现这一点？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is working on a project that is hosted on Amazon Linux and has failed a security review. The DevOps manager has been asked to review the company buildspec.yaml file for an AWS CodeBuild project and provide recommendations. The buildspec.yaml file is configured as follows: What changes should be recommended to comply with AWS security best practices? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Add a post-build command to remove the temporary files from the container before termination to ensure they cannot be seen by other CodeBuild users.

contents.en: Add a post-build command to remove the temporary files from the container before termination to ensure they cannot be seen by other CodeBuild users.
contents.zh: 添加 post-build 命令，在容器终止前从容器中删除临时文件，以确保其他 CodeBuild 用户无法看到这些文件。

options.label: B
options.content: Update the CodeBuild project role with the necessary permissions and then remove the AWS credentials from the environment variable.

contents.en: Update the CodeBuild project role with the necessary permissions and then remove the AWS credentials from the environment variable.
contents.zh: 使用必要权限更新 CodeBuild project role，然后从环境变量中删除 AWS credentials。

options.label: C
options.content: Store the DB_PASSWORD as a SecureString value in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store and then remove the DB_PASSWORD from the environment variables.

contents.en: Store the DB_PASSWORD as a SecureString value in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store and then remove the DB_PASSWORD from the environment variables.
contents.zh: 将 DB_PASSWORD 作为 SecureString 值存储在 AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store 中，然后从环境变量中删除 DB_PASSWORD。

options.label: D
options.content: Move the environment variables to the 'db-deploy-bucket' Amazon S3 bucket, add a prebuild stage to download, then export the variables.

contents.en: Move the environment variables to the 'db-deploy-bucket' Amazon S3 bucket, add a prebuild stage to download, then export the variables.
contents.zh: 将环境变量移动到 'db-deploy-bucket' Amazon S3 bucket，添加 prebuild 阶段进行下载，然后导出这些变量。

options.label: E
options.content: Use AWS Systems Manager run command versus scp and ssh commands directly to the instance.

contents.en: Use AWS Systems Manager run command versus scp and ssh commands directly to the instance.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Systems Manager run command，而不是直接对实例使用 scp 和 ssh 命令。

options.label: F
options.content: Scramble the environment variables using XOR followed by Base64, add a section to install, and then run XOR and Base64 to the build phase.

contents.en: Scramble the environment variables using XOR followed by Base64, add a section to install, and then run XOR and Base64 to the build phase.
contents.zh: 使用 XOR 后接 Base64 对环境变量进行混淆，添加一个 install 部分，然后在 build 阶段运行 XOR 和 Base64。

questions.explanation: ????? B?C?E????? BCE????????????????????? CodeBuild ????????????????? Parameter Store SecureString??? Systems Manager Run Command ???? scp/ssh?

explanations.zh: ????? B?C?E????? BCE????????????????????? CodeBuild ????????????????? Parameter Store SecureString??? Systems Manager Run Command ???? scp/ssh?
explanations.en: The correct answers are B, C, and E. The discussion confirms BCE and notes that credentials should not remain in build environment variables; use the CodeBuild project role, store DB_PASSWORD as a Parameter Store SecureString, and use Systems Manager Run Command instead of direct scp/ssh.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer is working on a project that is hosted on Amazon Linux and has failed a security review. The DevOps manager has been asked to review the company buildspec.yaml file for an AWS CodeBuild project and provide recommendations. The buildspec.yaml file is configured as follows: What changes should be recommended to comply with AWS security best practices? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师正在处理一个托管在 Amazon Linux 上的项目，该项目未通过安全审查。DevOps 经理被要求审查公司 AWS CodeBuild 项目的 buildspec.yaml 文件并提供建议。buildspec.yaml 文件配置如下：应建议哪些更改以符合 AWS 安全最佳实践？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company has a legacy application. A DevOps engineer needs to automate the process of building the deployable artifact for the legacy application. The solution must store the deployable artifact in an existing Amazon S3 bucket for future deployments to reference. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient way?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a custom Docker image that contains all the dependencies for the legacy application. Store the custom Docker image in a new Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository. Configure a new AWS CodeBuild project to use the custom Docker image to build the deployable artifact and to save the artifact to the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create a custom Docker image that contains all the dependencies for the legacy application. Store the custom Docker image in a new Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository. Configure a new AWS CodeBuild project to use the custom Docker image to build the deployable artifact and to save the artifact to the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 创建包含旧版应用程序所有依赖项的自定义 Docker image。将自定义 Docker image 存储在新的 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository 中。配置新的 AWS CodeBuild 项目，使用该自定义 Docker image 构建可部署工件并将该工件保存到 S3 bucket。

options.label: B
options.content: Launch a new Amazon EC2 instance. Install all the dependencies for the legacy application on the EC2 instance. Use the EC2 instance to build the deployable artifact and to save the artifact to the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Launch a new Amazon EC2 instance. Install all the dependencies for the legacy application on the EC2 instance. Use the EC2 instance to build the deployable artifact and to save the artifact to the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 启动新的 Amazon EC2 实例。在该 EC2 实例上安装旧版应用程序的所有依赖项。使用该 EC2 实例构建可部署工件并将该工件保存到 S3 bucket。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a custom EC2 Image Builder image. Install all the dependencies for the legacy application on the image. Launch a new Amazon EC2 instance from the image. Use the new EC2 instance to build the deployable artifact and to save the artifact to the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create a custom EC2 Image Builder image. Install all the dependencies for the legacy application on the image. Launch a new Amazon EC2 instance from the image. Use the new EC2 instance to build the deployable artifact and to save the artifact to the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 创建自定义 EC2 Image Builder image。在该镜像上安装旧版应用程序的所有依赖项。从该镜像启动新的 Amazon EC2 实例。使用新的 EC2 实例构建可部署工件并将该工件保存到 S3 bucket。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster with an AWS Fargate profile that runs in multiple Availability Zones. Create a custom Docker image that contains all the dependencies for the legacy application. Store the custom Docker image in a new Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository. Use the custom Docker image inside the EKS cluster to build the deployable artifact and to save the artifact to the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster with an AWS Fargate profile that runs in multiple Availability Zones. Create a custom Docker image that contains all the dependencies for the legacy application. Store the custom Docker image in a new Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository. Use the custom Docker image inside the EKS cluster to build the deployable artifact and to save the artifact to the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 创建 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster，其中包含在多个 Availability Zones 中运行的 AWS Fargate profile。创建包含旧版应用程序所有依赖项的自定义 Docker image。将自定义 Docker image 存储在新的 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository 中。在 EKS cluster 内使用该自定义 Docker image 构建可部署工件并将该工件保存到 S3 bucket。

explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The discussion explains that a custom Docker image packages the legacy dependencies into a consistent, isolated build environment; CodeBuild can use that image to build the artifact and save it to the existing S3 bucket efficiently.

contents.en: A company has a legacy application. A DevOps engineer needs to automate the process of building the deployable artifact for the legacy application. The solution must store the deployable artifact in an existing Amazon S3 bucket for future deployments to reference. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient way?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个旧版应用程序。DevOps 工程师需要自动化为该旧版应用程序构建可部署工件的过程。该解决方案必须将可部署工件存储在现有 Amazon S3 bucket 中，以便未来部署引用。哪种解决方案将以最具运营效率的方式满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company builds a container image in an AWS CodeBuild project by running Docker commands. After the container image is built, the CodeBuild project uploads the container image to an Amazon S3 bucket. The CodeBuild project has an IAM service role that has permissions to access the S3 bucket. A DevOps engineer needs to replace the S3 bucket with an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository to store the container images. The DevOps engineer creates an ECR private image repository in the same AWS Region of the CodeBuild project. The DevOps engineer adjusts the IAM service role with the permissions that are necessary to work with the new ECR repository. The DevOps engineer also places new repository information into the docker build command and the docker push command that are used in the buildspec.yml file. When the CodeBuild project runs a build job, the job fails when the job tries to access the ECR repository. Which solution will resolve the issue of failed access to the ECR repository?

options.label: A
options.content: Update the buildspec.yml file to log in to the ECR repository by using the aws ecr get-login-password AWS CLI command to obtain an authentication token. Update the docker login command to use the authentication token to access the ECR repository.

contents.en: Update the buildspec.yml file to log in to the ECR repository by using the aws ecr get-login-password AWS CLI command to obtain an authentication token. Update the docker login command to use the authentication token to access the ECR repository.
contents.zh: 更新 buildspec.yml 文件，使用 aws ecr get-login-password AWS CLI 命令获取 authentication token 以登录 ECR repository。更新 docker login 命令以使用该 authentication token 访问 ECR repository。

options.label: B
options.content: Add an environment variable of type SECRETS_MANAGER to the CodeBuild project. In the environment variable, include the ARN of the CodeBuild project's IAM service role. Update the buildspec.yml file to use the new environment variable to log in with the docker login command to access the ECR repository.

contents.en: Add an environment variable of type SECRETS_MANAGER to the CodeBuild project. In the environment variable, include the ARN of the CodeBuild project's IAM service role. Update the buildspec.yml file to use the new environment variable to log in with the docker login command to access the ECR repository.
contents.zh: 向 CodeBuild 项目添加类型为 SECRETS_MANAGER 的环境变量。在环境变量中包含 CodeBuild 项目的 IAM service role 的 ARN。更新 buildspec.yml 文件，使用新的环境变量通过 docker login 命令登录以访问 ECR repository。

options.label: C
options.content: Update the ECR repository to be a public image repository. Add an ECR repository policy that allows the IAM service role to have access.

contents.en: Update the ECR repository to be a public image repository. Add an ECR repository policy that allows the IAM service role to have access.
contents.zh: 将 ECR repository 更新为 public image repository。添加 ECR repository policy，允许 IAM service role 访问。

options.label: D
options.content: Update the buildspec.yml file to use the AWS CLI to assume the IAM service role for ECR operations. Add an ECR repository policy that allows the IAM service role to have access.

contents.en: Update the buildspec.yml file to use the AWS CLI to assume the IAM service role for ECR operations. Add an ECR repository policy that allows the IAM service role to have access.
contents.zh: 更新 buildspec.yml 文件，使用 AWS CLI 为 ECR 操作代入 IAM service role。添加 ECR repository policy，允许 IAM service role 访问。

questions.explanation: ????? A????? Docker ?? ECR ?????? buildspec.yml ??? aws ecr get-login-password ???????? docker login ??????? ECR????????

explanations.zh: ????? A????? Docker ?? ECR ?????? buildspec.yml ??? aws ecr get-login-password ???????? docker login ??????? ECR????????
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The discussion states that Docker must authenticate to ECR; the buildspec should run aws ecr get-login-password to obtain a token and pass it to docker login before pushing or pulling images.

contents.en: A company builds a container image in an AWS CodeBuild project by running Docker commands. After the container image is built, the CodeBuild project uploads the container image to an Amazon S3 bucket. The CodeBuild project has an IAM service role that has permissions to access the S3 bucket. A DevOps engineer needs to replace the S3 bucket with an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository to store the container images. The DevOps engineer creates an ECR private image repository in the same AWS Region of the CodeBuild project. The DevOps engineer adjusts the IAM service role with the permissions that are necessary to work with the new ECR repository. The DevOps engineer also places new repository information into the docker build command and the docker push command that are used in the buildspec.yml file. When the CodeBuild project runs a build job, the job fails when the job tries to access the ECR repository. Which solution will resolve the issue of failed access to the ECR repository?
contents.zh: 一家公司通过运行 Docker 命令在 AWS CodeBuild 项目中构建容器镜像。容器镜像构建完成后，CodeBuild 项目将容器镜像上传到 Amazon S3 bucket。CodeBuild 项目具有 IAM service role，该角色有权访问 S3 bucket。DevOps 工程师需要用 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository 替换 S3 bucket 来存储容器镜像。DevOps 工程师在 CodeBuild 项目的同一 AWS Region 中创建了 ECR private image repository。DevOps 工程师调整了 IAM service role，使其具备使用新 ECR repository 所需的权限。DevOps 工程师还将新的存储库信息放入 buildspec.yml 文件中使用的 docker build 命令和 docker push 命令。当 CodeBuild 项目运行构建作业时，作业在尝试访问 ECR repository 时失败。哪种解决方案将解决访问 ECR repository 失败的问题？

questions.content: A company manually provisions IAM access for its employees. The company wants to replace the manual process with an automated process. The company has an existing Active Directory system configured with an external SAML 2.0 identity provider (IdP). The company wants employees to use their existing corporate credentials to access AWS. The groups from the existing Active Directory system must be available for permission management in AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM). A DevOps engineer has completed the initial configuration of AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) in the company's AWS account. What should the DevOps engineer do next to meet the requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure an external IdP as an identity source. Configure automatic provisioning of users and groups by using the SCIM protocol.

contents.en: Configure an external IdP as an identity source. Configure automatic provisioning of users and groups by using the SCIM protocol.
contents.zh: 将外部 IdP 配置为 identity source。使用 SCIM protocol 配置用户和组的自动预置。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure AWS Directory Service as an identity source. Configure automatic provisioning of users and groups by using the SAML protocol.

contents.en: Configure AWS Directory Service as an identity source. Configure automatic provisioning of users and groups by using the SAML protocol.
contents.zh: 将 AWS Directory Service 配置为 identity source。使用 SAML protocol 配置用户和组的自动预置。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure an AD Connector as an identity source. Configure automatic provisioning of users and groups by using the SCIM protocol.

contents.en: Configure an AD Connector as an identity source. Configure automatic provisioning of users and groups by using the SCIM protocol.
contents.zh: 将 AD Connector 配置为 identity source。使用 SCIM protocol 配置用户和组的自动预置。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure an external IdP as an identity source Configure automatic provisioning of users and groups by using the SAML protocol.

contents.en: Configure an external IdP as an identity source Configure automatic provisioning of users and groups by using the SAML protocol.
contents.zh: 将外部 IdP 配置为 identity source 使用 SAML protocol 配置用户和组的自动预置。

explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The discussion explains that AWS SSO/IAM Identity Center integrates with an external IdP and uses SCIM to provision users and groups automatically, enabling existing corporate credentials and group-based permission management.

contents.en: A company manually provisions IAM access for its employees. The company wants to replace the manual process with an automated process. The company has an existing Active Directory system configured with an external SAML 2.0 identity provider (IdP). The company wants employees to use their existing corporate credentials to access AWS. The groups from the existing Active Directory system must be available for permission management in AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM). A DevOps engineer has completed the initial configuration of AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) in the company's AWS account. What should the DevOps engineer do next to meet the requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司手动为员工预置 IAM 访问权限。公司希望用自动化流程替代手动流程。公司现有 Active Directory 系统已配置外部 SAML 2.0 identity provider (IdP)。公司希望员工使用其现有企业凭证访问 AWS。现有 Active Directory 系统中的组必须可用于 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) 中的权限管理。DevOps 工程师已在公司的 AWS 账户中完成 AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) 的初始配置。DevOps 工程师下一步应如何满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company is using AWS to run digital workloads. Each application team in the company has its own AWS account for application hosting. The accounts are consolidated in an organization in AWS Organizations. The company wants to enforce security standards across the entire organization. To avoid noncompliance because of security misconfiguration, the company has enforced the use of AWS CloudFormation. A production support team can modify resources in the production environment by using the AWS Management Console to troubleshoot and resolve application-related issues. A DevOps engineer must implement a solution to identify in near real time any AWS service misconfiguration that results in noncompliance. The solution must automatically remediate the issue within 15 minutes of identification. The solution also must track noncompliant resources and events in a centralized dashboard with accurate timestamps. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST development overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Use CloudFormation drift detection to identify noncompliant resources. Use drift detection events from CloudFormation to invoke an AWS Lambda function for remediation. Configure the Lambda function to publish logs to an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. Configure an Amazon CloudWatch dashboard to use the log group for tracking.

contents.en: Use CloudFormation drift detection to identify noncompliant resources. Use drift detection events from CloudFormation to invoke an AWS Lambda function for remediation. Configure the Lambda function to publish logs to an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. Configure an Amazon CloudWatch dashboard to use the log group for tracking.
contents.zh: 使用 CloudFormation drift detection 识别不合规资源。使用来自 CloudFormation 的 drift detection events 调用 AWS Lambda 函数进行修复。配置 Lambda 函数将日志发布到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group。配置 Amazon CloudWatch dashboard 使用该 log group 进行跟踪。

options.label: B
options.content: Turn on AWS CloudTrail in the AWS accounts. Analyze CloudTrail logs by using Amazon Athena to identify noncompliant resources. Use AWS Step Functions to track query results on Athena for drift detection and to invoke an AWS Lambda function for remediation. For tracking, set up an Amazon QuickSight dashboard that uses Athena as the data source.

contents.en: Turn on AWS CloudTrail in the AWS accounts. Analyze CloudTrail logs by using Amazon Athena to identify noncompliant resources. Use AWS Step Functions to track query results on Athena for drift detection and to invoke an AWS Lambda function for remediation. For tracking, set up an Amazon QuickSight dashboard that uses Athena as the data source.
contents.zh: 在 AWS 账户中启用 AWS CloudTrail。使用 Amazon Athena 分析 CloudTrail 日志以识别不合规资源。使用 AWS Step Functions 跟踪 Athena 上用于 drift detection 的查询结果，并调用 AWS Lambda 函数进行修复。为跟踪设置使用 Athena 作为数据源的 Amazon QuickSight dashboard。

options.label: C
options.content: Turn on the configuration recorder in AWS Config in all the AWS accounts to identify noncompliant resources. Enable AWS Security Hub with the --no-enable-default-standards option in all the AWS accounts. Set up AWS Config managed rules and custom rules. Set up automatic remediation by using AWS Config conformance packs. For tracking, set up a dashboard on Security Hub in a designated Security Hub administrator account.

contents.en: Turn on the configuration recorder in AWS Config in all the AWS accounts to identify noncompliant resources. Enable AWS Security Hub with the --no-enable-default-standards option in all the AWS accounts. Set up AWS Config managed rules and custom rules. Set up automatic remediation by using AWS Config conformance packs. For tracking, set up a dashboard on Security Hub in a designated Security Hub administrator account.
contents.zh: 在所有 AWS 账户中启用 AWS Config 的 configuration recorder 以识别不合规资源。在所有 AWS 账户中使用 --no-enable-default-standards 选项启用 AWS Security Hub。设置 AWS Config managed rules 和 custom rules。使用 AWS Config conformance packs 设置自动修复。为跟踪，在指定的 Security Hub administrator account 中设置 Security Hub 上的 dashboard。

options.label: D
options.content: Turn on AWS CloudTrail in the AWS accounts. Analyze CloudTrail logs by using Amazon CloudWatch Logs to identify noncompliant resources. Use CloudWatch Logs filters for drift detection. Use Amazon EventBridge to invoke the Lambda function for remediation. Stream filtered CloudWatch logs to Amazon OpenSearch Service. Set up a dashboard on OpenSearch Service for tracking.

contents.en: Turn on AWS CloudTrail in the AWS accounts. Analyze CloudTrail logs by using Amazon CloudWatch Logs to identify noncompliant resources. Use CloudWatch Logs filters for drift detection. Use Amazon EventBridge to invoke the Lambda function for remediation. Stream filtered CloudWatch logs to Amazon OpenSearch Service. Set up a dashboard on OpenSearch Service for tracking.
contents.zh: 在 AWS 账户中启用 AWS CloudTrail。使用 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 分析 CloudTrail 日志以识别不合规资源。使用 CloudWatch Logs filters 进行 drift detection。使用 Amazon EventBridge 调用 Lambda 函数进行修复。将过滤后的 CloudWatch 日志流式传输到 Amazon OpenSearch Service。在 OpenSearch Service 上设置 dashboard 进行跟踪。

questions.explanation: ????? C?????????????? AWS Config??? C ??????? Config recorder??????????????? conformance packs ??????? Security Hub ??????

explanations.zh: ????? C?????????????? AWS Config??? C ??????? Config recorder??????????????? conformance packs ??????? Security Hub ??????
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. The discussion links compliance requirements to AWS Config; option C enables the Config recorder, sets managed and custom rules, uses conformance packs for remediation, and tracks results in Security Hub.

contents.en: A company is using AWS to run digital workloads. Each application team in the company has its own AWS account for application hosting. The accounts are consolidated in an organization in AWS Organizations. The company wants to enforce security standards across the entire organization. To avoid noncompliance because of security misconfiguration, the company has enforced the use of AWS CloudFormation. A production support team can modify resources in the production environment by using the AWS Management Console to troubleshoot and resolve application-related issues. A DevOps engineer must implement a solution to identify in near real time any AWS service misconfiguration that results in noncompliance. The solution must automatically remediate the issue within 15 minutes of identification. The solution also must track noncompliant resources and events in a centralized dashboard with accurate timestamps. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST development overhead?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在使用 AWS 运行数字工作负载。公司中的每个应用程序团队都有自己的 AWS 账户用于应用程序托管。这些账户集中在 AWS Organizations 中的一个组织内。公司希望在整个组织中强制执行安全标准。为避免因安全配置错误而导致不合规，公司已强制使用 AWS CloudFormation。生产支持团队可以使用 AWS Management Console 修改生产环境中的资源，以排查并解决与应用程序相关的问题。DevOps 工程师必须实施一个解决方案，以近实时识别导致不合规的任何 AWS 服务配置错误。该解决方案必须在识别后 15 分钟内自动修复问题。该解决方案还必须在集中式仪表板中跟踪不合规资源和事件，并具有准确的时间戳。哪种解决方案将以最少开发开销满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses AWS Organizations to manage its AWS accounts. The organization root has an OU that is named Environments. The Environments OU has two child OUs that are named Development and Production, respectively. The Environments OU and the child OUs have the default FullAWSAccess policy in place. A DevOps engineer plans to remove the FullAWSAccess policy from the Development OU and replace the policy with a policy that allows all actions on Amazon EC2 resources. What will be the outcome of this policy replacement?

options.label: A
options.content: All users in the Development OU will be allowed all API actions on all resources.

contents.en: All users in the Development OU will be allowed all API actions on all resources.
contents.zh: Development OU 中的所有用户将被允许对所有资源执行所有 API 操作。

options.label: B
options.content: All users in the Development OU will be allowed all API actions on EC2 resources. All other API actions will be denied.

contents.en: All users in the Development OU will be allowed all API actions on EC2 resources. All other API actions will be denied.
contents.zh: Development OU 中的所有用户将被允许对 EC2 资源执行所有 API 操作。所有其他 API 操作将被拒绝。

options.label: C
options.content: All users in the Development OU will be denied all API actions on all resources.

contents.en: All users in the Development OU will be denied all API actions on all resources.
contents.zh: Development OU 中的所有用户将被拒绝对所有资源执行所有 API 操作。

options.label: D
options.content: All users in the Development OU will be denied all API actions on EC2 resources. All other API actions will be allowed.

contents.en: All users in the Development OU will be denied all API actions on EC2 resources. All other API actions will be allowed.
contents.zh: Development OU 中的所有用户将被拒绝对 EC2 资源执行所有 API 操作。所有其他 API 操作将被允许。

questions.explanation: ????? B????? SCP ? Allow ? Deny ???????? Development OU ???? Allow ???????????? EC2 API ????? API ?????????????

explanations.zh: ????? B????? SCP ? Allow ? Deny ???????? Development OU ???? Allow ???????????? EC2 API ????? API ?????????????
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. The discussion emphasizes that SCP Allow and Deny inheritance differ; once the Development OU has its own Allow policy, only the EC2 API actions in that policy are allowed and other API actions are denied.

contents.en: A company uses AWS Organizations to manage its AWS accounts. The organization root has an OU that is named Environments. The Environments OU has two child OUs that are named Development and Production, respectively. The Environments OU and the child OUs have the default FullAWSAccess policy in place. A DevOps engineer plans to remove the FullAWSAccess policy from the Development OU and replace the policy with a policy that allows all actions on Amazon EC2 resources. What will be the outcome of this policy replacement?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations 管理其 AWS 账户。组织根下有一个名为 Environments 的 OU。Environments OU 有两个子 OU，分别名为 Development 和 Production。Environments OU 和子 OU 都应用了默认的 FullAWSAccess policy。DevOps 工程师计划从 Development OU 中移除 FullAWSAccess policy，并将该策略替换为允许对 Amazon EC2 资源执行所有操作的策略。此策略替换将产生什么结果？

questions.content: A company is examining its disaster recovery capability and wants the ability to switch over its daily operations to a secondary AWS Region. The company uses AWS CodeCommit as a source control tool in the primary Region. A DevOps engineer must provide the capability for the company to develop code in the secondary Region. If the company needs to use the secondary Region, developers can add an additional remote URL to their local Git configuration. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a CodeCommit repository in the secondary Region. Create an AWS CodeBuild project to perform a Git mirror operation of the primary Region's CodeCommit repository to the secondary Region's CodeCommit repository. Create an AWS Lambda function that invokes the CodeBuild project. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to merge events in the primary Region's CodeCommit repository. Configure the EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function.

contents.en: Create a CodeCommit repository in the secondary Region. Create an AWS CodeBuild project to perform a Git mirror operation of the primary Region's CodeCommit repository to the secondary Region's CodeCommit repository. Create an AWS Lambda function that invokes the CodeBuild project. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to merge events in the primary Region's CodeCommit repository. Configure the EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function.
contents.zh: 在辅助 Region 中创建 CodeCommit repository。创建 AWS CodeBuild 项目，对主 Region 的 CodeCommit repository 执行 Git mirror 操作到辅助 Region 的 CodeCommit repository。创建调用该 CodeBuild 项目的 AWS Lambda 函数。创建 Amazon EventBridge 规则，响应主 Region CodeCommit repository 中的 merge events。配置 EventBridge 规则调用 Lambda 函数。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket in the secondary Region. Create an AWS Fargate task to perform a Git mirror operation of the primary Region's CodeCommit repository and copy the result to the S3 bucket. Create an AWS Lambda function that initiates the Fargate task. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to merge events in the CodeCommit repository. Configure the EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function.

contents.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket in the secondary Region. Create an AWS Fargate task to perform a Git mirror operation of the primary Region's CodeCommit repository and copy the result to the S3 bucket. Create an AWS Lambda function that initiates the Fargate task. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to merge events in the CodeCommit repository. Configure the EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function.
contents.zh: 在辅助 Region 中创建 Amazon S3 bucket。创建 AWS Fargate task，对主 Region 的 CodeCommit repository 执行 Git mirror 操作，并将结果复制到 S3 bucket。创建启动 Fargate task 的 AWS Lambda 函数。创建 Amazon EventBridge 规则，响应 CodeCommit repository 中的 merge events。配置 EventBridge 规则调用 Lambda 函数。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS CodeArtifact repository in the secondary Region. Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that uses the primary Region's CodeCommit repository for the source action. Create a cross-Region stage in the pipeline that packages the CodeCommit repository contents and stores the contents in the CodeArtifact repository when a pull request is merged into the CodeCommit repository.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodeArtifact repository in the secondary Region. Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that uses the primary Region's CodeCommit repository for the source action. Create a cross-Region stage in the pipeline that packages the CodeCommit repository contents and stores the contents in the CodeArtifact repository when a pull request is merged into the CodeCommit repository.
contents.zh: 在辅助 Region 中创建 AWS CodeArtifact repository。创建 AWS CodePipeline pipeline，该管道使用主 Region 的 CodeCommit repository 作为 source action。在管道中创建 cross-Region stage，在 pull request 合并到 CodeCommit repository 时打包 CodeCommit repository 内容并将内容存储在 CodeArtifact repository 中。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS Cloud9 environment and a CodeCommit repository in the secondary Region. Configure the primary Region's CodeCommit repository as a remote repository in the AWS Cloud9 environment. Connect the secondary Region's CodeCommit repository to the AWS Cloud9 environment.

contents.en: Create an AWS Cloud9 environment and a CodeCommit repository in the secondary Region. Configure the primary Region's CodeCommit repository as a remote repository in the AWS Cloud9 environment. Connect the secondary Region's CodeCommit repository to the AWS Cloud9 environment.
contents.zh: 在辅助 Region 中创建 AWS Cloud9 environment 和 CodeCommit repository。将主 Region 的 CodeCommit repository 配置为 AWS Cloud9 environment 中的 remote repository。将辅助 Region 的 CodeCommit repository 连接到 AWS Cloud9 environment。

questions.explanation: ????? A??????????????????????????? A ????????? CodeCommit ????? CodeBuild?Lambda?EventBridge ???? Git mirror ???

explanations.zh: ????? A??????????????????????????? A ????????? CodeCommit ????? CodeBuild?Lambda?EventBridge ???? Git mirror ???
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The discussion says the goal is to continue development in a secondary Region during failover; option A creates a mirrored CodeCommit repository there and automates Git mirroring with CodeBuild, Lambda, and EventBridge.

contents.en: A company is examining its disaster recovery capability and wants the ability to switch over its daily operations to a secondary AWS Region. The company uses AWS CodeCommit as a source control tool in the primary Region. A DevOps engineer must provide the capability for the company to develop code in the secondary Region. If the company needs to use the secondary Region, developers can add an additional remote URL to their local Git configuration. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在检查其灾难恢复能力，并希望能够将日常运营切换到辅助 AWS Region。公司在主 Region 中使用 AWS CodeCommit 作为源代码控制工具。DevOps 工程师必须为公司提供在辅助 Region 中开发代码的能力。如果公司需要使用辅助 Region，开发人员可以向其本地 Git 配置添加一个额外的远程 URL。哪种解决方案将满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps team is merging code revisions for an application that uses an Amazon RDS Multi-AZ DB cluster for its production database. The DevOps team uses continuous integration to periodically verify that the application works. The DevOps team needs to test the changes before the changes are deployed to the production database. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use a buildspec file in AWS CodeBuild to restore the DB cluster from a snapshot of the production database, run integration tests, and drop the restored database after verification.

contents.en: Use a buildspec file in AWS CodeBuild to restore the DB cluster from a snapshot of the production database, run integration tests, and drop the restored database after verification.
contents.zh: 在 AWS CodeBuild 中使用 buildspec 文件，从生产数据库的快照还原 DB cluster，运行集成测试，并在验证后删除还原的数据库。

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy the application to production. Configure an audit log of data control language (DCL) operations to capture database activities to perform if verification fails.

contents.en: Deploy the application to production. Configure an audit log of data control language (DCL) operations to capture database activities to perform if verification fails.
contents.zh: 将应用程序部署到生产环境。配置 data control language (DCL) 操作的审计日志，以捕获在验证失败时要执行的数据库活动。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a snapshot of the DB cluster before deploying the application. Use the Update requires:Replacement property on the DB instance in AWS CloudFormation to deploy the application and apply the changes.

contents.en: Create a snapshot of the DB cluster before deploying the application. Use the Update requires:Replacement property on the DB instance in AWS CloudFormation to deploy the application and apply the changes.
contents.zh: 在部署应用程序之前创建 DB cluster 的快照。使用 AWS CloudFormation 中 DB instance 的 Update requires:Replacement 属性部署应用程序并应用更改。

options.label: D
options.content: Ensure that the DB cluster is a Multi-AZ deployment. Deploy the application with the updates. Fail over to the standby instance if verification fails.

contents.en: Ensure that the DB cluster is a Multi-AZ deployment. Deploy the application with the updates. Fail over to the standby instance if verification fails.
contents.zh: 确保 DB cluster 是 Multi-AZ deployment。使用更新部署应用程序。如果验证失败，则故障转移到 standby instance。

explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The discussion says this enables testing without such consequences; option A has CodeBuild restore a temporary DB cluster from a production snapshot, run integration tests, and drop the restored database afterward.

contents.en: A DevOps team is merging code revisions for an application that uses an Amazon RDS Multi-AZ DB cluster for its production database. The DevOps team uses continuous integration to periodically verify that the application works. The DevOps team needs to test the changes before the changes are deployed to the production database. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一个 DevOps 团队正在合并某应用程序的代码修订，该应用程序使用 Amazon RDS Multi-AZ DB cluster 作为生产数据库。DevOps 团队使用 continuous integration 定期验证应用程序是否正常工作。DevOps 团队需要在将更改部署到生产数据库之前测试这些更改。哪种解决方案将满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company manages a multi-tenant environment in its VPC and has configured Amazon GuardDuty for the corresponding AWS account. The company sends all GuardDuty findings to AWS Security Hub. Traffic from suspicious sources is generating a large number of findings. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a solution to automatically deny traffic across the entire VPC when GuardDuty discovers a new suspicious source. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a GuardDuty threat list. Configure GuardDuty to reference the list. Create an AWS Lambda function that will update the threat list. Configure the Lambda function to run in response to new Security Hub findings that come from GuardDuty.

contents.en: Create a GuardDuty threat list. Configure GuardDuty to reference the list. Create an AWS Lambda function that will update the threat list. Configure the Lambda function to run in response to new Security Hub findings that come from GuardDuty.
contents.zh: 创建 GuardDuty threat list。配置 GuardDuty 引用该列表。创建 AWS Lambda 函数来更新 threat list。配置该 Lambda 函数响应来自 GuardDuty 的新 Security Hub findings 运行。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure an AWS WAF web ACL that includes a custom rule group. Create an AWS Lambda function that will create a block rule in the custom rule group. Configure the Lambda function to run in response to new Security Hub findings that come from GuardDuty.

contents.en: Configure an AWS WAF web ACL that includes a custom rule group. Create an AWS Lambda function that will create a block rule in the custom rule group. Configure the Lambda function to run in response to new Security Hub findings that come from GuardDuty.
contents.zh: 配置包含 custom rule group 的 AWS WAF web ACL。创建 AWS Lambda 函数，在 custom rule group 中创建 block rule。配置该 Lambda 函数响应来自 GuardDuty 的新 Security Hub findings 运行。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure a firewall in AWS Network Firewall. Create an AWS Lambda function that will create a Drop action rule in the firewall policy. Configure the Lambda function to run in response to new Security Hub findings that come from GuardDuty.

contents.en: Configure a firewall in AWS Network Firewall. Create an AWS Lambda function that will create a Drop action rule in the firewall policy. Configure the Lambda function to run in response to new Security Hub findings that come from GuardDuty.
contents.zh: 在 AWS Network Firewall 中配置 firewall。创建 AWS Lambda 函数，在 firewall policy 中创建 Drop action rule。配置该 Lambda 函数响应来自 GuardDuty 的新 Security Hub findings 运行。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function that will create a GuardDuty suppression rule. Configure the Lambda function to run in response to new Security Hub findings that come from GuardDuty.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that will create a GuardDuty suppression rule. Configure the Lambda function to run in response to new Security Hub findings that come from GuardDuty.
contents.zh: 创建 AWS Lambda 函数来创建 GuardDuty suppression rule。配置该 Lambda 函数响应来自 GuardDuty 的新 Security Hub findings 运行。

questions.explanation: ????? C??????? AWS Network Firewall ? GuardDuty ??????????? C ? Lambda ???? GuardDuty ? Security Hub findings??????????? Drop ???

explanations.zh: ????? C??????? AWS Network Firewall ? GuardDuty ??????????? C ? Lambda ???? GuardDuty ? Security Hub findings??????????? Drop ???
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. The discussion points to automatically blocking suspicious traffic with AWS Network Firewall and GuardDuty; option C has Lambda respond to GuardDuty findings in Security Hub and create a Drop rule in the firewall policy.

contents.en: A company manages a multi-tenant environment in its VPC and has configured Amazon GuardDuty for the corresponding AWS account. The company sends all GuardDuty findings to AWS Security Hub. Traffic from suspicious sources is generating a large number of findings. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a solution to automatically deny traffic across the entire VPC when GuardDuty discovers a new suspicious source. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司在其 VPC 中管理多租户环境，并已为相应的 AWS 账户配置 Amazon GuardDuty。公司将所有 GuardDuty findings 发送到 AWS Security Hub。来自可疑来源的流量正在生成大量 findings。DevOps 工程师需要实施一个解决方案，当 GuardDuty 发现新的可疑来源时，自动在整个 VPC 中拒绝流量。哪种解决方案将满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses AWS Secrets Manager to store a set of sensitive API keys that an AWS Lambda function uses. When the Lambda function is invoked the Lambda function retrieves the API keys and makes an API call to an external service. The Secrets Manager secret is encrypted with the default AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key. A DevOps engineer needs to update the infrastructure to ensure that only the Lambda function's execution role can access the values in Secrets Manager. The solution must apply the principle of least privilege. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Update the default KMS key for Secrets Manager to allow only the Lambda function's execution role to decrypt

contents.en: Update the default KMS key for Secrets Manager to allow only the Lambda function's execution role to decrypt
contents.zh: 更新 Secrets Manager 的默认 KMS key，使其仅允许 Lambda 函数的 execution role 解密

options.label: B
options.content: Create a KMS customer managed key that trusts Secrets Manager and allows the Lambda function's execution role to decrypt. Update Secrets Manager to use the new customer managed key

contents.en: Create a KMS customer managed key that trusts Secrets Manager and allows the Lambda function's execution role to decrypt. Update Secrets Manager to use the new customer managed key
contents.zh: 创建 KMS customer managed key，该 key 信任 Secrets Manager 并允许 Lambda 函数的 execution role 解密。更新 Secrets Manager 以使用新的 customer managed key

options.label: C
options.content: Create a KMS customer managed key that trusts Secrets Manager and allows the account's root principal to decrypt. Update Secrets Manager to use the new customer managed key

contents.en: Create a KMS customer managed key that trusts Secrets Manager and allows the account's root principal to decrypt. Update Secrets Manager to use the new customer managed key
contents.zh: 创建 KMS customer managed key，该 key 信任 Secrets Manager 并允许账户的 root principal 解密。更新 Secrets Manager 以使用新的 customer managed key

options.label: D
options.content: Ensure that the Lambda function's execution role has the KMS permissions scoped on the resource level. Configure the permissions so that the KMS key can encrypt the Secrets Manager secret

contents.en: Ensure that the Lambda function's execution role has the KMS permissions scoped on the resource level. Configure the permissions so that the KMS key can encrypt the Secrets Manager secret
contents.zh: 确保 Lambda 函数的 execution role 具有按资源级别限定范围的 KMS 权限。配置权限，使 KMS key 可以加密 Secrets Manager secret

options.label: E
options.content: Remove all KMS permissions from the Lambda function's execution role

contents.en: Remove all KMS permissions from the Lambda function's execution role
contents.zh: 从 Lambda 函数的 execution role 中移除所有 KMS 权限

questions.explanation: ????? B?D?????????? Lambda ???????????????? KMS key ?? Secrets Manager???? Lambda ????????? Lambda ??? KMS ???????????

explanations.zh: ????? B?D?????????? Lambda ???????????????? KMS key ?? Secrets Manager???? Lambda ????????? Lambda ??? KMS ???????????
explanations.en: The correct answers are B and D. The discussion says that to ensure only the Lambda execution role can access the secret, use a customer managed KMS key that trusts Secrets Manager and permits that role to decrypt, with KMS permissions scoped to the resource.

contents.en: A company uses AWS Secrets Manager to store a set of sensitive API keys that an AWS Lambda function uses. When the Lambda function is invoked the Lambda function retrieves the API keys and makes an API call to an external service. The Secrets Manager secret is encrypted with the default AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key. A DevOps engineer needs to update the infrastructure to ensure that only the Lambda function's execution role can access the values in Secrets Manager. The solution must apply the principle of least privilege. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Secrets Manager 存储一组 AWS Lambda 函数使用的敏感 API keys。当 Lambda 函数被调用时，Lambda 函数会检索 API keys，并对外部服务进行 API 调用。Secrets Manager secret 使用默认的 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key 加密。DevOps 工程师需要更新基础设施，以确保只有 Lambda 函数的 execution role 可以访问 Secrets Manager 中的值。该解决方案必须应用最小权限原则。哪组步骤将满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company's DevOps engineer is creating an AWS Lambda function to process notifications from an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. The Lambda function will process the notification messages and will write the contents of the notification messages to an Amazon RDS Multi-AZ DB instance. During testing, a database administrator accidentally shut down the DB instance. While the database was down the company lost several of the SNS notification messages that were delivered during that time. The DevOps engineer needs to prevent the loss of notification messages in the future. Which solutions will meet this requirement? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Replace the RDS Multi-AZ DB instance with an Amazon DynamoDB table.

contents.en: Replace the RDS Multi-AZ DB instance with an Amazon DynamoDB table.
contents.zh: 将 RDS Multi-AZ DB instance 替换为 Amazon DynamoDB table。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue as a destination of the Lambda function.

contents.en: Configure an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue as a destination of the Lambda function.
contents.zh: 将 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue 配置为 Lambda 函数的 destination。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) dead-letter queue for the SNS topic.

contents.en: Configure an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) dead-letter queue for the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 为 SNS 主题配置 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) dead-letter queue。

options.label: D
options.content: Subscribe an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue to the SNS topic. Configure the Lambda function to process messages from the SQS queue.

contents.en: Subscribe an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue to the SNS topic. Configure the Lambda function to process messages from the SQS queue.
contents.zh: 将 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue 订阅到 SNS 主题。配置 Lambda 函数处理来自 SQS queue 的消息。

options.label: E
options.content: Replace the SNS topic with an Amazon EventBridge event bus. Configure an EventBridge rule on the new event bus to invoke the Lambda function for each event.

contents.en: Replace the SNS topic with an Amazon EventBridge event bus. Configure an EventBridge rule on the new event bus to invoke the Lambda function for each event.
contents.zh: 将 SNS 主题替换为 Amazon EventBridge event bus。在新的 event bus 上配置 EventBridge rule，为每个事件调用 Lambda 函数。

explanations.en: The correct answers are C and D. The discussion explains that adding an SQS queue between SNS and Lambda prevents message loss while Lambda processes at its own pace, and an SQS dead-letter queue for the SNS topic preserves undeliverable notifications.

contents.en: A company's DevOps engineer is creating an AWS Lambda function to process notifications from an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. The Lambda function will process the notification messages and will write the contents of the notification messages to an Amazon RDS Multi-AZ DB instance. During testing, a database administrator accidentally shut down the DB instance. While the database was down the company lost several of the SNS notification messages that were delivered during that time. The DevOps engineer needs to prevent the loss of notification messages in the future. Which solutions will meet this requirement? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司的 DevOps 工程师正在创建 AWS Lambda 函数，用于处理来自 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题的通知。Lambda 函数将处理通知消息，并将通知消息的内容写入 Amazon RDS Multi-AZ DB instance。在测试期间，一名数据库管理员意外关闭了 DB instance。当数据库停机时，公司丢失了在该期间传递的几条 SNS notification messages。DevOps 工程师需要防止未来丢失通知消息。哪些解决方案将满足此要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company has an application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances. The company uses an AWS CodePipeline pipeline to deploy the application into multiple AWS Regions. The pipeline is configured with a stage for each Region. Each stage contains an AWS CloudFormation action for each Region. When the pipeline deploys the application to a Region, the company wants to confirm that the application is in a healthy state before the pipeline moves on to the next Region. Amazon Route 53 record sets are configured for the application in each Region. A DevOps engineer creates a Route 53 health check that is based on an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for each Region where the application is deployed. What should the DevOps engineer do next to meet the requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS Step Functions workflow to check the state of the CloudWatch alarm. Configure the Step Functions workflow to exit with an error if the alarm is in the ALARM state. Create a new stage in the pipeline between each Region deployment stage. In each new stage, include an action to invoke the Step Functions workflow.

contents.en: Create an AWS Step Functions workflow to check the state of the CloudWatch alarm. Configure the Step Functions workflow to exit with an error if the alarm is in the ALARM state. Create a new stage in the pipeline between each Region deployment stage. In each new stage, include an action to invoke the Step Functions workflow.
contents.zh: 创建 AWS Step Functions workflow 来检查 CloudWatch alarm 的状态。配置 Step Functions workflow 在 alarm 处于 ALARM 状态时以错误退出。在每个 Region 部署阶段之间的管道中创建一个新阶段。在每个新阶段中，包含一个调用 Step Functions workflow 的操作。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure an AWS CodeDeploy application to deploy a CloudFormation template with automatic rollback. Configure the CloudWatch alarm as the instance health check for the CodeDeploy application. Remove the CloudFormation actions from the pipeline. Create a CodeDeploy action in the pipeline stage for each Region.

contents.en: Configure an AWS CodeDeploy application to deploy a CloudFormation template with automatic rollback. Configure the CloudWatch alarm as the instance health check for the CodeDeploy application. Remove the CloudFormation actions from the pipeline. Create a CodeDeploy action in the pipeline stage for each Region.
contents.zh: 配置 AWS CodeDeploy application，以部署带自动回滚的 CloudFormation 模板。将 CloudWatch alarm 配置为 CodeDeploy application 的 instance health check。从管道中移除 CloudFormation 操作。在每个 Region 的管道阶段中创建 CodeDeploy action。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a new pipeline stage for each Region where the application is deployed. Configure a CloudWatch alarm action for the new stage to check the state of the CloudWatch alarm and to exit with an error if the alarm is in the ALARM state

contents.en: Create a new pipeline stage for each Region where the application is deployed. Configure a CloudWatch alarm action for the new stage to check the state of the CloudWatch alarm and to exit with an error if the alarm is in the ALARM state
contents.zh: 为部署应用程序的每个 Region 创建新的管道阶段。为新阶段配置 CloudWatch alarm action，以检查 CloudWatch alarm 的状态，并在 alarm 处于 ALARM 状态时以错误退出

options.label: D
options.content: Configure the CloudWatch agent on the EC2 instances to report the application status to the Route 53 health check. Create a new pipeline stage for each Region where the application is deployed. Configure a CloudWatch alarm action to exit with an error if the CloudWatch alarm is in the ALARM state.

contents.en: Configure the CloudWatch agent on the EC2 instances to report the application status to the Route 53 health check. Create a new pipeline stage for each Region where the application is deployed. Configure a CloudWatch alarm action to exit with an error if the CloudWatch alarm is in the ALARM state.
contents.zh: 在 EC2 实例上配置 CloudWatch agent，将应用程序状态报告给 Route 53 health check。为部署应用程序的每个 Region 创建新的管道阶段。配置 CloudWatch alarm action 在 CloudWatch alarm 处于 ALARM 状态时以错误退出。

questions.explanation: ????? A??????????? CloudWatch alarm action ???????????? A ???????????? Step Functions ?? CloudWatch alarm ?????? ALARM ??????????????

explanations.zh: ????? A??????????? CloudWatch alarm action ???????????? A ???????????? Step Functions ?? CloudWatch alarm ?????? ALARM ??????????????
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The discussion says this kind of pipeline control should not rely on CloudWatch alarm actions alone; option A inserts Step Functions checks between Regional stages and fails the workflow if the alarm is in ALARM state.

contents.en: A company has an application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances. The company uses an AWS CodePipeline pipeline to deploy the application into multiple AWS Regions. The pipeline is configured with a stage for each Region. Each stage contains an AWS CloudFormation action for each Region. When the pipeline deploys the application to a Region, the company wants to confirm that the application is in a healthy state before the pipeline moves on to the next Region. Amazon Route 53 record sets are configured for the application in each Region. A DevOps engineer creates a Route 53 health check that is based on an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for each Region where the application is deployed. What should the DevOps engineer do next to meet the requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个运行在 Amazon EC2 实例上的应用程序。公司使用 AWS CodePipeline 管道将应用程序部署到多个 AWS Regions。该管道配置了每个 Region 一个阶段。每个阶段包含该 Region 的 AWS CloudFormation 操作。当管道将应用程序部署到某个 Region 时，公司希望确认应用程序处于健康状态，然后管道再进入下一个 Region。Amazon Route 53 record sets 已为每个 Region 中的应用程序配置。DevOps 工程师为部署应用程序的每个 Region 创建了基于 Amazon CloudWatch alarm 的 Route 53 health check。DevOps 工程师下一步应如何满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company plans to use Amazon CloudWatch to monitor its Amazon EC2 instances. The company needs to stop EC2 instances when the average of the NetworkPacketsIn metric is less than 5 for at least 3 hours in a 12-hour time window. The company must evaluate the metric every hour. The EC2 instances must continue to run if there is missing data for the NetworkPacketsIn metric during the evaluation period. A DevOps engineer creates a CloudWatch alarm for the NetworkPacketsIn metric. The DevOps engineer configures a threshold value of 5 and an evaluation period of 1 hour. Which set of additional actions should the DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure the Datapoints to Alarm value to be 3 out of 12. Configure the alarm to treat missing data as breaching the threshold. Add an AWS Systems Manager action to stop the instance when the alarm enters the ALARM state.

contents.en: Configure the Datapoints to Alarm value to be 3 out of 12. Configure the alarm to treat missing data as breaching the threshold. Add an AWS Systems Manager action to stop the instance when the alarm enters the ALARM state.
contents.zh: 将 Datapoints to Alarm 值配置为 12 个中的 3 个。配置 alarm 将缺失数据视为违反阈值。添加 AWS Systems Manager action，在 alarm 进入 ALARM 状态时停止实例。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure the Datapoints to Alarm value to be 3 out of 12. Configure the alarm to treat missing data as not breaching the threshold. Add an EC2 action to stop the instance when the alarm enters the ALARM state.

contents.en: Configure the Datapoints to Alarm value to be 3 out of 12. Configure the alarm to treat missing data as not breaching the threshold. Add an EC2 action to stop the instance when the alarm enters the ALARM state.
contents.zh: 将 Datapoints to Alarm 值配置为 12 个中的 3 个。配置 alarm 将缺失数据视为未违反阈值。添加 EC2 action，在 alarm 进入 ALARM 状态时停止实例。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the Datapoints to Alarm value to be 9 out of 12. Configure the alarm to treat missing data as breaching the threshold. Add an EC2 action to stop the instance when the alarm enters the ALARM state.

contents.en: Configure the Datapoints to Alarm value to be 9 out of 12. Configure the alarm to treat missing data as breaching the threshold. Add an EC2 action to stop the instance when the alarm enters the ALARM state.
contents.zh: 将 Datapoints to Alarm 值配置为 12 个中的 9 个。配置 alarm 将缺失数据视为违反阈值。添加 EC2 action，在 alarm 进入 ALARM 状态时停止实例。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure the Datapoints to Alarm value to be 9 out of 12. Configure the alarm to treat missing data as not breaching the threshold. Add an AWS Systems Manager action to stop the instance when the alarm enters the ALARM state.

contents.en: Configure the Datapoints to Alarm value to be 9 out of 12. Configure the alarm to treat missing data as not breaching the threshold. Add an AWS Systems Manager action to stop the instance when the alarm enters the ALARM state.
contents.zh: 将 Datapoints to Alarm 值配置为 12 个中的 9 个。配置 alarm 将缺失数据视为未违反阈值。添加 AWS Systems Manager action，在 alarm 进入 ALARM 状态时停止实例。

explanations.en: The correct answer is B. The discussion points to CloudWatch alarm actions; option B uses 3 out of 12 datapoints, treats missing data as not breaching, and adds an EC2 stop action when the alarm enters ALARM state.

contents.en: A company plans to use Amazon CloudWatch to monitor its Amazon EC2 instances. The company needs to stop EC2 instances when the average of the NetworkPacketsIn metric is less than 5 for at least 3 hours in a 12-hour time window. The company must evaluate the metric every hour. The EC2 instances must continue to run if there is missing data for the NetworkPacketsIn metric during the evaluation period. A DevOps engineer creates a CloudWatch alarm for the NetworkPacketsIn metric. The DevOps engineer configures a threshold value of 5 and an evaluation period of 1 hour. Which set of additional actions should the DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司计划使用 Amazon CloudWatch 监控其 Amazon EC2 实例。当 NetworkPacketsIn 指标的平均值在 12 小时时间窗口内至少 3 小时小于 5 时，公司需要停止 EC2 实例。公司必须每小时评估一次该指标。如果在评估期间 NetworkPacketsIn 指标存在缺失数据，EC2 实例必须继续运行。DevOps 工程师为 NetworkPacketsIn 指标创建了 CloudWatch alarm。DevOps 工程师配置了阈值 5 和 1 小时的评估周期。DevOps 工程师还应采取哪组附加操作来满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company manages 500 AWS accounts that are in an organization in AWS Organizations. The company discovers many unattached Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volumes in all the accounts. The company wants to automatically tag the unattached EBS volumes for investigation. A DevOps engineer needs to deploy an AWS Lambda function to all the AWS accounts. The Lambda function must run every 30 minutes to tag all the EBS volumes that have been unattached for a period of 7 days or more. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient manner?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure a delegated administrator account for the organization. Create an AWS CloudFormation template that contains the Lambda function. Use CloudFormation StackSets to deploy the CloudFormation template from the delegated administrator account to all the member accounts in the organization. Create an Amazon EventBridge event bus in the delegated administrator account to invoke the Lambda function in each member account every 30 minutes.

contents.en: Configure a delegated administrator account for the organization. Create an AWS CloudFormation template that contains the Lambda function. Use CloudFormation StackSets to deploy the CloudFormation template from the delegated administrator account to all the member accounts in the organization. Create an Amazon EventBridge event bus in the delegated administrator account to invoke the Lambda function in each member account every 30 minutes.
contents.zh: 为组织配置 delegated administrator account。创建包含 Lambda 函数的 AWS CloudFormation 模板。使用 CloudFormation StackSets 从 delegated administrator account 将 CloudFormation 模板部署到组织中的所有成员账户。在 delegated administrator account 中创建 Amazon EventBridge event bus，以每 30 分钟调用每个成员账户中的 Lambda 函数。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a cross-account IAM role in the organization's member accounts. Attach the AWSLambda_FullAccess policy and the AWSCloudFormationFullAccess policy to the role. Create an AWS CloudFormation template that contains the Lambda function and an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule to invoke the Lambda function every 30 minutes. Create a custom script in the organization's management account that assumes the role and deploys the CloudFormation template to the member accounts.

contents.en: Create a cross-account IAM role in the organization's member accounts. Attach the AWSLambda_FullAccess policy and the AWSCloudFormationFullAccess policy to the role. Create an AWS CloudFormation template that contains the Lambda function and an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule to invoke the Lambda function every 30 minutes. Create a custom script in the organization's management account that assumes the role and deploys the CloudFormation template to the member accounts.
contents.zh: 在组织的成员账户中创建 cross-account IAM role。将 AWSLambda_FullAccess policy 和 AWSCloudFormationFullAccess policy 附加到该角色。创建包含 Lambda 函数和 Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule 的 AWS CloudFormation 模板，以每 30 分钟调用 Lambda 函数。在组织的管理账户中创建自定义脚本，该脚本代入该角色并将 CloudFormation 模板部署到成员账户。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure a delegated administrator account for the organization. Create an AWS CloudFormation template that contains the Lambda function and an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule to invoke the Lambda function every 30 minutes. Use CloudFormation StackSets to deploy the CloudFormation template from the delegated administrator account to all the member accounts in the organization

contents.en: Configure a delegated administrator account for the organization. Create an AWS CloudFormation template that contains the Lambda function and an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule to invoke the Lambda function every 30 minutes. Use CloudFormation StackSets to deploy the CloudFormation template from the delegated administrator account to all the member accounts in the organization
contents.zh: 为组织配置 delegated administrator account。创建包含 Lambda 函数和 Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule 的 AWS CloudFormation 模板，以每 30 分钟调用 Lambda 函数。使用 CloudFormation StackSets 从 delegated administrator account 将 CloudFormation 模板部署到组织中的所有成员账户

options.label: D
options.content: Create a cross-account IAM role in the organization's member accounts. Attach the AmazonS3FullAccess policy and the AWSCodeDeployDeployerAccess policy to the role. Use AWS CodeDeploy to assume the role to deploy the Lambda function from the organization's management account. Configure an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule in the member accounts to invoke the Lambda function every 30 minutes.

contents.en: Create a cross-account IAM role in the organization's member accounts. Attach the AmazonS3FullAccess policy and the AWSCodeDeployDeployerAccess policy to the role. Use AWS CodeDeploy to assume the role to deploy the Lambda function from the organization's management account. Configure an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule in the member accounts to invoke the Lambda function every 30 minutes.
contents.zh: 在组织的成员账户中创建 cross-account IAM role。将 AmazonS3FullAccess policy 和 AWSCodeDeployDeployerAccess policy 附加到该角色。使用 AWS CodeDeploy 代入该角色，从组织的管理账户部署 Lambda 函数。在成员账户中配置 Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule，每 30 分钟调用 Lambda 函数。

questions.explanation: ????? C????? Lambda ??? 30 ?????????? EventBridge ????? Lambda??? C ? StackSets ? delegated administrator ????? Lambda ??????????????????

explanations.zh: ????? C????? Lambda ??? 30 ?????????? EventBridge ????? Lambda??? C ? StackSets ? delegated administrator ????? Lambda ??????????????????
