explanations.en: The correct answer is C. The discussion says the Lambda function must run every 30 minutes, so EventBridge scheduling with Lambda is needed; option C deploys the Lambda and scheduled rule to all member accounts using StackSets from a delegated administrator account.

contents.en: A company manages 500 AWS accounts that are in an organization in AWS Organizations. The company discovers many unattached Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volumes in all the accounts. The company wants to automatically tag the unattached EBS volumes for investigation. A DevOps engineer needs to deploy an AWS Lambda function to all the AWS accounts. The Lambda function must run every 30 minutes to tag all the EBS volumes that have been unattached for a period of 7 days or more. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient manner?
contents.zh: 一家公司管理 AWS Organizations 中一个组织内的 500 个 AWS 账户。公司在所有账户中发现了许多未附加的 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volumes。公司希望自动为未附加的 EBS volumes 添加标签以便调查。DevOps 工程师需要将 AWS Lambda 函数部署到所有 AWS 账户。该 Lambda 函数必须每 30 分钟运行一次，为所有已未附加 7 天或更长时间的 EBS volumes 添加标签。哪种解决方案将以最具运营效率的方式满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company's production environment uses an AWS CodeDeploy blue/green deployment to deploy an application. The deployment incudes Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling groups that launch instances that run Amazon Linux 2. A working appspec.yml file exists in the code repository and contains the following text: A DevOps engineer needs to ensure that a script downloads and installs a license file onto the instances before the replacement instances start to handle request traffic. The DevOps engineer adds a hooks section to the appspec.yml file. Which hook should the DevOps engineer use to run the script that downloads and installs the license file?

options.label: A
options.content: AfterBlockTraffic

contents.en: AfterBlockTraffic
contents.zh: AfterBlockTraffic

options.label: B
options.content: BeforeBlockTraffic

contents.en: BeforeBlockTraffic
contents.zh: BeforeBlockTraffic

options.label: C
options.content: BeforeInstall

contents.en: BeforeInstall
contents.zh: BeforeInstall

options.label: D
options.content: DownloadBundle

contents.en: DownloadBundle
contents.zh: DownloadBundle

explanations.en: The correct answer is C. The discussion says that in a blue/green deployment, the BeforeInstall hook runs before replacement instances start handling request traffic, making it the appropriate lifecycle hook.

contents.en: A company's production environment uses an AWS CodeDeploy blue/green deployment to deploy an application. The deployment incudes Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling groups that launch instances that run Amazon Linux 2. A working appspec.yml file exists in the code repository and contains the following text: A DevOps engineer needs to ensure that a script downloads and installs a license file onto the instances before the replacement instances start to handle request traffic. The DevOps engineer adds a hooks section to the appspec.yml file. Which hook should the DevOps engineer use to run the script that downloads and installs the license file?
contents.zh: 一家公司的生产环境使用 AWS CodeDeploy blue/green deployment 来部署应用程序。该部署包括 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling groups，这些组启动运行 Amazon Linux 2 的实例。代码存储库中存在一个可工作的 appspec.yml 文件，并包含以下文本：DevOps 工程师需要确保在替换实例开始处理请求流量之前，脚本将许可证文件下载并安装到实例上。DevOps 工程师向 appspec.yml 文件添加了 hooks 部分。DevOps 工程师应使用哪个 hook 来运行下载并安装许可证文件的脚本？

questions.content: A company has an application that includes AWS Lambda functions. The Lambda functions run Python code that is stored in an AWS CodeCommit repository. The company has recently experienced failures in the production environment because of an error in the Python code. An engineer has written unit tests for the Lambda functions to help avoid releasing any future defects into the production environment. The company's DevOps team needs to implement a solution to integrate the unit tests into an existing AWS CodePipeline pipeline. The solution must produce reports about the unit tests for the company to view. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Associate the CodeCommit repository with Amazon CodeGuru Reviewer. Create a new AWS CodeBuild project. In the CodePipeline pipeline, configure a test stage that uses the new CodeBuild project. Create a buildspec.yml file in the CodeCommit repository. In the buildspec yml file, define the actions to run a CodeGuru review.

contents.en: Associate the CodeCommit repository with Amazon CodeGuru Reviewer. Create a new AWS CodeBuild project. In the CodePipeline pipeline, configure a test stage that uses the new CodeBuild project. Create a buildspec.yml file in the CodeCommit repository. In the buildspec yml file, define the actions to run a CodeGuru review.
contents.zh: 将 CodeCommit repository 与 Amazon CodeGuru Reviewer 关联。创建新的 AWS CodeBuild 项目。在 CodePipeline 管道中，配置使用新 CodeBuild 项目的测试阶段。在 CodeCommit repository 中创建 buildspec.yml 文件。在 buildspec yml 文件中，定义运行 CodeGuru review 的操作。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new AWS CodeBuild project. In the CodePipeline pipeline, configure a test stage that uses the new CodeBuild project. Create a CodeBuild report group. Create a buildspec.yml file in the CodeCommit repository. In the buildspec.yml file, define the actions to run the unit tests with an output of JUNITXML in the build phase section. Configure the test reports to be uploaded to the new CodeBuild report group.

contents.en: Create a new AWS CodeBuild project. In the CodePipeline pipeline, configure a test stage that uses the new CodeBuild project. Create a CodeBuild report group. Create a buildspec.yml file in the CodeCommit repository. In the buildspec.yml file, define the actions to run the unit tests with an output of JUNITXML in the build phase section. Configure the test reports to be uploaded to the new CodeBuild report group.
contents.zh: 创建新的 AWS CodeBuild 项目。在 CodePipeline 管道中，配置使用新 CodeBuild 项目的测试阶段。创建 CodeBuild report group。在 CodeCommit repository 中创建 buildspec.yml 文件。在 buildspec.yml 文件中，在 build phase section 中定义以 JUNITXML 输出运行单元测试的操作。配置将测试报告上传到新的 CodeBuild report group。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a new AWS CodeArtifact repository. Create a new AWS CodeBuild project. In the CodePipeline pipeline, configure a test stage that uses the new CodeBuild project. Create an appspec.yml file in the original CodeCommit repository. In the appspec.yml file, define the actions to run the unit tests with an output of CUCUMBERJSON in the build phase section. Configure the tests reports to be sent to the new CodeArtifact repository.

contents.en: Create a new AWS CodeArtifact repository. Create a new AWS CodeBuild project. In the CodePipeline pipeline, configure a test stage that uses the new CodeBuild project. Create an appspec.yml file in the original CodeCommit repository. In the appspec.yml file, define the actions to run the unit tests with an output of CUCUMBERJSON in the build phase section. Configure the tests reports to be sent to the new CodeArtifact repository.
contents.zh: 创建新的 AWS CodeArtifact repository。创建新的 AWS CodeBuild 项目。在 CodePipeline 管道中，配置使用新 CodeBuild 项目的测试阶段。在原始 CodeCommit repository 中创建 appspec.yml 文件。在 appspec.yml 文件中，在 build phase section 中定义以 CUCUMBERJSON 输出运行单元测试的操作。配置将 tests reports 发送到新的 CodeArtifact repository。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a new AWS CodeBuild project. In the CodePipeline pipeline, configure a test stage that uses the new CodeBuild project. Create a new Amazon S3 bucket. Create a buildspec.yml file in the CodeCommit repository. In the buildspec yml file, define the actions to run the unit tests with an output of HTML in the phases section. In the reports section, upload the test reports to the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create a new AWS CodeBuild project. In the CodePipeline pipeline, configure a test stage that uses the new CodeBuild project. Create a new Amazon S3 bucket. Create a buildspec.yml file in the CodeCommit repository. In the buildspec yml file, define the actions to run the unit tests with an output of HTML in the phases section. In the reports section, upload the test reports to the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 创建新的 AWS CodeBuild 项目。在 CodePipeline 管道中，配置使用新 CodeBuild 项目的测试阶段。创建新的 Amazon S3 bucket。在 CodeCommit repository 中创建 buildspec.yml 文件。在 buildspec yml 文件中，在 phases section 中定义以 HTML 输出运行单元测试的操作。在 reports section 中，将测试报告上传到 S3 bucket。

questions.explanation: ????? B??????????? CodeBuild ?????????? CodeBuild report group??? B ? CodePipeline ??? CodeBuild ??????? buildspec.yml ??? JUNITXML ???

explanations.zh: ????? B??????????? CodeBuild ?????????? CodeBuild report group??? B ? CodePipeline ??? CodeBuild ??????? buildspec.yml ??? JUNITXML ???
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. The discussion says unit tests should run in CodeBuild and reports should be uploaded to a CodeBuild report group; option B adds a CodeBuild test stage and defines JUNITXML test report output in buildspec.yml.

contents.en: A company has an application that includes AWS Lambda functions. The Lambda functions run Python code that is stored in an AWS CodeCommit repository. The company has recently experienced failures in the production environment because of an error in the Python code. An engineer has written unit tests for the Lambda functions to help avoid releasing any future defects into the production environment. The company's DevOps team needs to implement a solution to integrate the unit tests into an existing AWS CodePipeline pipeline. The solution must produce reports about the unit tests for the company to view. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个包含 AWS Lambda 函数的应用程序。Lambda 函数运行存储在 AWS CodeCommit repository 中的 Python 代码。公司最近因 Python 代码中的错误而在生产环境中发生故障。一名工程师已为 Lambda 函数编写单元测试，以帮助避免未来将任何缺陷发布到生产环境。公司的 DevOps 团队需要实施一个解决方案，将单元测试集成到现有 AWS CodePipeline 管道中。该解决方案必须生成有关单元测试的报告，以供公司查看。哪种解决方案将满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company manages multiple AWS accounts in AWS Organizations. The company's security policy states that AWS account root user credentials for member accounts must not be used. The company monitors access to the root user credentials. A recent alert shows that the root user in a member account launched an Amazon EC2 instance. A DevOps engineer must create an SCP at the organization's root level that will prevent the root user in member accounts from making any AWS service API calls. Which SCP will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
B
C
D

explanations.en: The correct answer is C. The discussion says preventing the root user in member accounts requires a Deny statement, and that SCPs do not use a Principal element but rely on conditions, which makes C the matching choice.

contents.en: A company manages multiple AWS accounts in AWS Organizations. The company's security policy states that AWS account root user credentials for member accounts must not be used. The company monitors access to the root user credentials. A recent alert shows that the root user in a member account launched an Amazon EC2 instance. A DevOps engineer must create an SCP at the organization's root level that will prevent the root user in member accounts from making any AWS service API calls. Which SCP will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 AWS Organizations 中管理多个 AWS 账户。公司的安全策略规定，成员账户的 AWS 账户根用户凭证不得被使用。公司会监控对根用户凭证的访问。最近的一条告警显示，某个成员账户中的根用户启动了一台 Amazon EC2 实例。DevOps 工程师必须在组织根级别创建一个 SCP，以阻止成员账户中的根用户发起任何 AWS 服务 API 调用。哪一个 SCP 能满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses AWS and has a VPC that contains critical compute infrastructure with predictable traffic patterns. The company has configured VPC flow logs that are published to a log group in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. The company's DevOps team needs to configure a monitoring solution for the VPC flow logs to identify anomalies in network traffic to the VPC over time. If the monitoring solution detects an anomaly, the company needs the ability to initiate a response to the anomaly. How should the DevOps team configure the monitoring solution to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon Kinesis data stream. Subscribe the log group to the data stream. Configure Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics to detect log anomalies in the data stream. Create an AWS Lambda function to use as the output of the data stream. Configure the Lambda function to write to the default Amazon EventBridge event bus in the event of an anomaly finding.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Kinesis data stream. Subscribe the log group to the data stream. Configure Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics to detect log anomalies in the data stream. Create an AWS Lambda function to use as the output of the data stream. Configure the Lambda function to write to the default Amazon EventBridge event bus in the event of an anomaly finding.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon Kinesis data stream。将日志组订阅到该 data stream。配置 Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics 以检测 data stream 中的日志异常。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数作为 data stream 的输出。配置该 Lambda 函数在发现异常时写入默认 Amazon EventBridge event bus。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream that delivers events to an Amazon S3 bucket. Subscribe the log group to the delivery stream. Configure Amazon Lookout for Metrics to monitor the data in the S3 bucket for anomalies. Create an AWS Lambda function to run in response to Lookout for Metrics anomaly findings. Configure the Lambda function to publish to the default Amazon EventBridge event bus.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream that delivers events to an Amazon S3 bucket. Subscribe the log group to the delivery stream. Configure Amazon Lookout for Metrics to monitor the data in the S3 bucket for anomalies. Create an AWS Lambda function to run in response to Lookout for Metrics anomaly findings. Configure the Lambda function to publish to the default Amazon EventBridge event bus.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream，将事件传输到 Amazon S3 bucket。将日志组订阅到该 delivery stream。配置 Amazon Lookout for Metrics 监控 S3 bucket 中的数据是否存在异常。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，以响应 Lookout for Metrics 异常发现而运行。配置该 Lambda 函数发布到默认 Amazon EventBridge event bus。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function to detect anomalies. Configure the Lambda function to publish an event to the default Amazon EventBridge event bus if the Lambda function detects an anomaly. Subscribe the Lambda function to the log group.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function to detect anomalies. Configure the Lambda function to publish an event to the default Amazon EventBridge event bus if the Lambda function detects an anomaly. Subscribe the Lambda function to the log group.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数来检测异常。配置该 Lambda 函数在检测到异常时向默认 Amazon EventBridge event bus 发布事件。将该 Lambda 函数订阅到日志组。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon Kinesis data stream. Subscribe the log group to the data stream. Create an AWS Lambda function to detect log anomalies. Configure the Lambda function to write to the default Amazon EventBridge event bus if the Lambda function detects an anomaly. Set the Lambda function as the processor for the data stream.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Kinesis data stream. Subscribe the log group to the data stream. Create an AWS Lambda function to detect log anomalies. Configure the Lambda function to write to the default Amazon EventBridge event bus if the Lambda function detects an anomaly. Set the Lambda function as the processor for the data stream.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon Kinesis data stream。将日志组订阅到该 data stream。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数来检测日志异常。配置该 Lambda 函数在检测到异常时写入默认 Amazon EventBridge event bus。将该 Lambda 函数设置为 data stream 的处理器。

questions.explanation: ????? B????? Lookout for Metrics ??? S3 ????????? Lambda??? B ? Kinesis Data Firehose ????? S3??? Lookout for Metrics ?????Lambda ?????????? EventBridge?

explanations.zh: ????? B????? Lookout for Metrics ??? S3 ????????? Lambda??? B ? Kinesis Data Firehose ????? S3??? Lookout for Metrics ?????Lambda ?????????? EventBridge?
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. The discussion states that Lookout for Metrics can detect anomalies from S3 data and trigger Lambda; option B sends logs to S3 with Kinesis Data Firehose, monitors them with Lookout for Metrics, and has Lambda publish anomaly findings to EventBridge.

contents.en: A company uses AWS and has a VPC that contains critical compute infrastructure with predictable traffic patterns. The company has configured VPC flow logs that are published to a log group in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. The company's DevOps team needs to configure a monitoring solution for the VPC flow logs to identify anomalies in network traffic to the VPC over time. If the monitoring solution detects an anomaly, the company needs the ability to initiate a response to the anomaly. How should the DevOps team configure the monitoring solution to meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS，并且有一个 VPC，其中包含具有可预测流量模式的关键计算基础设施。公司已配置 VPC 流日志，并将其发布到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 中的一个日志组。公司的 DevOps 团队需要为 VPC 流日志配置一个监控解决方案，以识别一段时间内进入 VPC 的网络流量异常。如果监控解决方案检测到异常，公司需要能够启动对该异常的响应。DevOps 团队应如何配置监控解决方案以满足这些要求？

questions.content: AnyCompany is using AWS Organizations to create and manage multiple AWS accounts. AnyCompany recently acquired a smaller company, Example Corp. During the acquisition process, Example Corp's single AWS account joined AnyCompany's management account through an Organizations invitation. AnyCompany moved the new member account under an OU that is dedicated to Example Corp. AnyCompany's DevOps engineer has an IAM user that assumes a role that is named OrganizationAccountAccessRole to access member accounts. This role is configured with a full access policy. When the DevOps engineer tries to use the AWS Management Console to assume the role in Example Corp's new member account, the DevOps engineer receives the following error message: "Invalid information in one or more fields. Check your information or contact your administrator." Which solution will give the DevOps engineer access to the new member account?

options.label: A
options.content: In the management account, grant the DevOps engineer's IAM user permission to assume the OrganizationAccountAccessRole IAM role in the new member account.

contents.en: In the management account, grant the DevOps engineer's IAM user permission to assume the OrganizationAccountAccessRole IAM role in the new member account.
contents.zh: 在管理账户中，授予 DevOps 工程师的 IAM 用户权限，以代入新成员账户中的 OrganizationAccountAccessRole IAM 角色。

options.label: B
options.content: In the management account, create a new SCP. In the SCP, grant the DevOps engineer's IAM user full access to all resources in the new member account. Attach the SCP to the OU that contains the new member account.

contents.en: In the management account, create a new SCP. In the SCP, grant the DevOps engineer's IAM user full access to all resources in the new member account. Attach the SCP to the OU that contains the new member account.
contents.zh: 在管理账户中，创建一个新的 SCP。在该 SCP 中，授予 DevOps 工程师的 IAM 用户对新成员账户中所有资源的完全访问权限。将该 SCP 附加到包含新成员账户的 OU。

options.label: C
options.content: In the new member account, create a new IAM role that is named OrganizationAccountAccessRole. Attach the AdministratorAccess AWS managed policy to the role. In the role's trust policy, grant the management account permission to assume the role.

contents.en: In the new member account, create a new IAM role that is named OrganizationAccountAccessRole. Attach the AdministratorAccess AWS managed policy to the role. In the role's trust policy, grant the management account permission to assume the role.
contents.zh: 在新成员账户中，创建一个名为 OrganizationAccountAccessRole 的新 IAM 角色。将 AdministratorAccess AWS 托管策略附加到该角色。在该角色的信任策略中，授予管理账户代入该角色的权限。

options.label: D
options.content: In the new member account, edit the trust policy for the OrganizationAccountAccessRole IAM role. Grant the management account permission to assume the role.

contents.en: In the new member account, edit the trust policy for the OrganizationAccountAccessRole IAM role. Grant the management account permission to assume the role.
contents.zh: 在新成员账户中，编辑 OrganizationAccountAccessRole IAM 角色的信任策略。授予管理账户代入该角色的权限。

questions.explanation: ????? C????????????????????? assume ???????????????? C ?? OrganizationAccountAccessRole??? AdministratorAccess????????????????????

explanations.zh: ????? C????????????????????? assume ???????????????? C ?? OrganizationAccountAccessRole??? AdministratorAccess????????????????????
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. The discussion says the assumable role in the new member account is missing or improperly configured; option C creates OrganizationAccountAccessRole, attaches AdministratorAccess, and trusts the management account to assume it.

contents.en: AnyCompany is using AWS Organizations to create and manage multiple AWS accounts. AnyCompany recently acquired a smaller company, Example Corp. During the acquisition process, Example Corp's single AWS account joined AnyCompany's management account through an Organizations invitation. AnyCompany moved the new member account under an OU that is dedicated to Example Corp. AnyCompany's DevOps engineer has an IAM user that assumes a role that is named OrganizationAccountAccessRole to access member accounts. This role is configured with a full access policy. When the DevOps engineer tries to use the AWS Management Console to assume the role in Example Corp's new member account, the DevOps engineer receives the following error message: "Invalid information in one or more fields. Check your information or contact your administrator." Which solution will give the DevOps engineer access to the new member account?
contents.zh: AnyCompany 正在使用 AWS Organizations 创建和管理多个 AWS 账户。AnyCompany 最近收购了一家较小的公司 Example Corp。在收购过程中，Example Corp 的单个 AWS 账户通过 Organizations 邀请加入了 AnyCompany 的管理账户。AnyCompany 将新的成员账户移到了一个专用于 Example Corp 的 OU 下。AnyCompany 的 DevOps 工程师有一个 IAM 用户，该用户通过代入名为 OrganizationAccountAccessRole 的角色来访问成员账户。该角色配置了完全访问策略。当 DevOps 工程师尝试使用 AWS Management Console 代入 Example Corp 新成员账户中的该角色时，收到以下错误消息："Invalid information in one or more fields. Check your information or contact your administrator." 哪个解决方案将使 DevOps 工程师能够访问新的成员账户？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is designing an application that integrates with a legacy REST API. The application has an AWS Lambda function that reads records from an Amazon Kinesis data stream. The Lambda function sends the records to the legacy REST API. Approximately 10% of the records that the Lambda function sends from the Kinesis data stream have data errors and must be processed manually. The Lambda function event source configuration has an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) dead- letter queue as an on-failure destination. The DevOps engineer has configured the Lambda function to process records in batches and has implemented retries in case of failure. During testing, the DevOps engineer notices that the dead-letter queue contains many records that have no data errors and that already have been processed by the legacy REST API. The DevOps engineer needs to configure the Lambda function's event source options to reduce the number of errorless records that are sent to the dead-letter queue. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Increase the retry attempts.

contents.en: Increase the retry attempts.
contents.zh: 增加重试次数。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure the setting to split the batch when an error occurs.

contents.en: Configure the setting to split the batch when an error occurs.
contents.zh: 配置在发生错误时拆分批次的设置。

options.label: C
options.content: Increase the concurrent batches per shard.

contents.en: Increase the concurrent batches per shard.
contents.zh: 增加每个分片的并发批次数。

options.label: D
options.content: Decrease the maximum age of record.

contents.en: Decrease the maximum age of record.
contents.zh: 降低记录的最大年龄。

explanations.en: The correct answer is B. The discussion explains that when Lambda processes Kinesis records in batches, one failed record can cause the whole batch to go to the dead-letter queue; splitting the batch on error isolates failed records and avoids sending successful records there.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer is designing an application that integrates with a legacy REST API. The application has an AWS Lambda function that reads records from an Amazon Kinesis data stream. The Lambda function sends the records to the legacy REST API. Approximately 10% of the records that the Lambda function sends from the Kinesis data stream have data errors and must be processed manually. The Lambda function event source configuration has an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) dead- letter queue as an on-failure destination. The DevOps engineer has configured the Lambda function to process records in batches and has implemented retries in case of failure. During testing, the DevOps engineer notices that the dead-letter queue contains many records that have no data errors and that already have been processed by the legacy REST API. The DevOps engineer needs to configure the Lambda function's event source options to reduce the number of errorless records that are sent to the dead-letter queue. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师正在设计一个与旧版 REST API 集成的应用程序。该应用程序有一个 AWS Lambda 函数，该函数从 Amazon Kinesis data stream 读取记录。Lambda 函数将这些记录发送到旧版 REST API。Lambda 函数从 Kinesis data stream 发送的记录中约有 10% 存在数据错误，必须手动处理。Lambda 函数事件源配置将 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) dead-letter queue 作为失败目标。DevOps 工程师已将 Lambda 函数配置为按批次处理记录，并已实现失败时的重试。在测试期间，DevOps 工程师注意到 dead-letter queue 中包含许多没有数据错误且已经由旧版 REST API 处理过的记录。DevOps 工程师需要配置 Lambda 函数的事件源选项，以减少被发送到 dead-letter queue 的无错误记录数量。哪种解决方案将满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has microservices running in AWS Lambda that read data from Amazon DynamoDB. The Lambda code is manually deployed by developers after successful testing. The company now needs the tests and deployments be automated and run in the cloud. Additionally, traffic to the new versions of each microservice should be incrementally shifted over time after deployment. What solution meets all the requirements, ensuring the MOST developer velocity?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS CodePipeline configuration and set up a post-commit hook to trigger the pipeline after tests have passed. Use AWS CodeDeploy and create a Canary deployment configuration that specifies the percentage of traffic and interval.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodePipeline configuration and set up a post-commit hook to trigger the pipeline after tests have passed. Use AWS CodeDeploy and create a Canary deployment configuration that specifies the percentage of traffic and interval.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CodePipeline 配置，并设置 post-commit hook，在测试通过后触发流水线。使用 AWS CodeDeploy，并创建一个 Canary 部署配置，用于指定流量百分比和间隔。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS CodeBuild configuration that triggers when the test code is pushed. Use AWS CloudFormation to trigger an AWS CodePipeline configuration that deploys the new Lambda versions and specifies the traffic shift percentage and interval.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodeBuild configuration that triggers when the test code is pushed. Use AWS CloudFormation to trigger an AWS CodePipeline configuration that deploys the new Lambda versions and specifies the traffic shift percentage and interval.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CodeBuild 配置，在测试代码被推送时触发。使用 AWS CloudFormation 触发一个 AWS CodePipeline 配置，该配置部署新的 Lambda 版本并指定流量切换百分比和间隔。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS CodePipeline configuration and set up the source code step to trigger when code is pushed. Set up the build step to use AWS CodeBuild to run the tests. Set up an AWS CodeDeploy configuration to deploy, then select the CodeDeployDefault.LambdaLinear10PercentEvery3Minutes option.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodePipeline configuration and set up the source code step to trigger when code is pushed. Set up the build step to use AWS CodeBuild to run the tests. Set up an AWS CodeDeploy configuration to deploy, then select the CodeDeployDefault.LambdaLinear10PercentEvery3Minutes option.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CodePipeline 配置，并将源代码步骤设置为在代码被推送时触发。设置构建步骤以使用 AWS CodeBuild 运行测试。设置一个 AWS CodeDeploy 配置用于部署，然后选择 CodeDeployDefault.LambdaLinear10PercentEvery3Minutes 选项。

options.label: D
options.content: Use the AWS CLI to set up a post-commit hook that uploads the code to an Amazon S3 bucket after tests have passed Set up an S3 event trigger that runs a Lambda function that deploys the new version. Use an interval in the Lambda function to deploy the code over time at the required percentage.

contents.en: Use the AWS CLI to set up a post-commit hook that uploads the code to an Amazon S3 bucket after tests have passed Set up an S3 event trigger that runs a Lambda function that deploys the new version. Use an interval in the Lambda function to deploy the code over time at the required percentage.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CLI 设置一个 post-commit hook，在测试通过后将代码上传到 Amazon S3 bucket。设置一个 S3 事件触发器，运行一个部署新版本的 Lambda 函数。在该 Lambda 函数中使用间隔，以所需百分比随时间部署代码。

explanations.en: The correct answer is C. The discussion highlights automation, managed-service integration, and incremental deployment; option C uses CodePipeline for source triggers, CodeBuild for tests, and CodeDeploy's Lambda linear deployment configuration to shift traffic gradually.

contents.en: A company has microservices running in AWS Lambda that read data from Amazon DynamoDB. The Lambda code is manually deployed by developers after successful testing. The company now needs the tests and deployments be automated and run in the cloud. Additionally, traffic to the new versions of each microservice should be incrementally shifted over time after deployment. What solution meets all the requirements, ensuring the MOST developer velocity?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 AWS Lambda 中运行微服务，这些微服务从 Amazon DynamoDB 读取数据。开发人员在成功测试后手动部署 Lambda 代码。公司现在需要在云中自动运行测试和部署。此外，在部署后，每个微服务新版本的流量应随时间逐步切换。哪种解决方案能满足所有要求，并确保最高的开发人员效率？

questions.content: A company is building a web and mobile application that uses a serverless architecture powered by AWS Lambda and Amazon API Gateway. The company wants to fully automate the backend Lambda deployment based on code that is pushed to the appropriate environment branch in an AWS CodeCommit repository. The deployment must have the following: • Separate environment pipelines for testing and production • Automatic deployment that occurs for test environments only Which steps should be taken to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure a new AWS CodePipeline service. Create a CodeCommit repository for each environment. Set up CodePipeline to retrieve the source code from the appropriate repository. Set up the deployment step to deploy the Lambda functions with AWS CloudFormation.

contents.en: Configure a new AWS CodePipeline service. Create a CodeCommit repository for each environment. Set up CodePipeline to retrieve the source code from the appropriate repository. Set up the deployment step to deploy the Lambda functions with AWS CloudFormation.
contents.zh: 配置一个新的 AWS CodePipeline 服务。为每个环境创建一个 CodeCommit 存储库。设置 CodePipeline 从相应的存储库检索源代码。设置部署步骤，使用 AWS CloudFormation 部署 Lambda 函数。

options.label: B
options.content: Create two AWS CodePipeline configurations for test and production environments. Configure the production pipeline to have a manual approval step. Create a CodeCommit repository for each environment. Set up each CodePipeline to retrieve the source code from the appropriate repository. Set up the deployment step to deploy the Lambda functions with AWS CloudFormation.

contents.en: Create two AWS CodePipeline configurations for test and production environments. Configure the production pipeline to have a manual approval step. Create a CodeCommit repository for each environment. Set up each CodePipeline to retrieve the source code from the appropriate repository. Set up the deployment step to deploy the Lambda functions with AWS CloudFormation.
contents.zh: 为测试和生产环境创建两个 AWS CodePipeline 配置。配置生产流水线，使其具有手动审批步骤。为每个环境创建一个 CodeCommit 存储库。设置每个 CodePipeline 从相应的存储库检索源代码。设置部署步骤，使用 AWS CloudFormation 部署 Lambda 函数。

options.label: C
options.content: Create two AWS CodePipeline configurations for test and production environments. Configure the production pipeline to have a manual approval step. Create one CodeCommit repository with a branch for each environment. Set up each CodePipeline to retrieve the source code from the appropriate branch in the repository. Set up the deployment step to deploy the Lambda functions with AWS CloudFormation.

contents.en: Create two AWS CodePipeline configurations for test and production environments. Configure the production pipeline to have a manual approval step. Create one CodeCommit repository with a branch for each environment. Set up each CodePipeline to retrieve the source code from the appropriate branch in the repository. Set up the deployment step to deploy the Lambda functions with AWS CloudFormation.
contents.zh: 为测试和生产环境创建两个 AWS CodePipeline 配置。配置生产流水线，使其具有手动审批步骤。创建一个 CodeCommit 存储库，并为每个环境创建一个分支。设置每个 CodePipeline 从存储库中的相应分支检索源代码。设置部署步骤，使用 AWS CloudFormation 部署 Lambda 函数。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS CodeBuild configuration for test and production environments. Configure the production pipeline to have a manual approval step. Create one CodeCommit repository with a branch for each environment. Push the Lambda function code to an Amazon S3 bucket. Set up the deployment step to deploy the Lambda functions from the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodeBuild configuration for test and production environments. Configure the production pipeline to have a manual approval step. Create one CodeCommit repository with a branch for each environment. Push the Lambda function code to an Amazon S3 bucket. Set up the deployment step to deploy the Lambda functions from the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 为测试和生产环境创建一个 AWS CodeBuild 配置。配置生产流水线，使其具有手动审批步骤。创建一个 CodeCommit 存储库，并为每个环境创建一个分支。将 Lambda 函数代码推送到 Amazon S3 bucket。设置部署步骤，从 S3 bucket 部署 Lambda 函数。

explanations.en: The correct answer is C. The discussion says separate testing and production pipelines are required and each should use the appropriate CodeCommit branch; option C also adds manual approval for production and deploys Lambda functions with CloudFormation.

contents.en: A company is building a web and mobile application that uses a serverless architecture powered by AWS Lambda and Amazon API Gateway. The company wants to fully automate the backend Lambda deployment based on code that is pushed to the appropriate environment branch in an AWS CodeCommit repository. The deployment must have the following: • Separate environment pipelines for testing and production • Automatic deployment that occurs for test environments only Which steps should be taken to meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在构建一个 Web 和移动应用程序，该应用程序使用由 AWS Lambda 和 Amazon API Gateway 支持的无服务器架构。公司希望基于推送到 AWS CodeCommit 存储库中相应环境分支的代码，完全自动化后端 Lambda 部署。部署必须满足以下要求：• 为测试和生产提供独立的环境流水线 • 仅测试环境发生自动部署 应采取哪些步骤来满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer wants to find a solution to migrate an application from on premises to AWS. The application is running on Linux and needs to run on specific versions of Apache Tomcat, HAProxy, and Varnish Cache to function properly. The application's operating system-level parameters require tuning. The solution must include a way to automate the deployment of new application versions. The infrastructure should be scalable and faulty servers should be replaced automatically. Which solution should the DevOps engineer use?

options.label: A
options.content: Upload the application as a Docker image that contains all the necessary software to Amazon ECR. Create an Amazon ECS cluster using an AWS Fargate launch type and an Auto Scaling group. Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that uses Amazon ECR as a source and Amazon ECS as a deployment provider.

contents.en: Upload the application as a Docker image that contains all the necessary software to Amazon ECR. Create an Amazon ECS cluster using an AWS Fargate launch type and an Auto Scaling group. Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that uses Amazon ECR as a source and Amazon ECS as a deployment provider.
contents.zh: 将应用程序作为包含所有必要软件的 Docker 镜像上传到 Amazon ECR。使用 AWS Fargate 启动类型和 Auto Scaling group 创建 Amazon ECS cluster。创建一个 AWS CodePipeline pipeline，使用 Amazon ECR 作为源，并使用 Amazon ECS 作为部署提供程序。

options.label: B
options.content: Upload the application code to an AWS CodeCommit repository with a saved configuration file to configure and install the software. Create an AWS Elastic Beanstalk web server tier and a load balanced-type environment that uses the Tomcat solution stack. Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that uses CodeCommit as a source and Elastic Beanstalk as a deployment provider.

contents.en: Upload the application code to an AWS CodeCommit repository with a saved configuration file to configure and install the software. Create an AWS Elastic Beanstalk web server tier and a load balanced-type environment that uses the Tomcat solution stack. Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that uses CodeCommit as a source and Elastic Beanstalk as a deployment provider.
contents.zh: 将应用程序代码上传到 AWS CodeCommit 存储库，并包含一个保存的配置文件来配置和安装软件。创建 AWS Elastic Beanstalk Web server tier 和一个使用 Tomcat solution stack 的负载均衡类型环境。创建一个 AWS CodePipeline pipeline，使用 CodeCommit 作为源，并使用 Elastic Beanstalk 作为部署提供程序。

options.label: C
options.content: Upload the application code to an AWS CodeCommit repository with a set of .ebextensions files to configure and install the software. Create an AWS Elastic Beanstalk worker tier environment that uses the Tomcat solution stack. Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that uses CodeCommit as a source and Elastic Beanstalk as a deployment provider.

contents.en: Upload the application code to an AWS CodeCommit repository with a set of .ebextensions files to configure and install the software. Create an AWS Elastic Beanstalk worker tier environment that uses the Tomcat solution stack. Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that uses CodeCommit as a source and Elastic Beanstalk as a deployment provider.
contents.zh: 将应用程序代码上传到 AWS CodeCommit 存储库，并包含一组 .ebextensions 文件来配置和安装软件。创建一个使用 Tomcat solution stack 的 AWS Elastic Beanstalk worker tier 环境。创建一个 AWS CodePipeline pipeline，使用 CodeCommit 作为源，并使用 Elastic Beanstalk 作为部署提供程序。

options.label: D
options.content: Upload the application code to an AWS CodeCommit repository with an appspec.yml file to configure and install the necessary software. Create an AWS CodeDeploy deployment group associated with an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group. Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that uses CodeCommit as a source and CodeDeploy as a deployment provider.

contents.en: Upload the application code to an AWS CodeCommit repository with an appspec.yml file to configure and install the necessary software. Create an AWS CodeDeploy deployment group associated with an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group. Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that uses CodeCommit as a source and CodeDeploy as a deployment provider.
contents.zh: 将应用程序代码上传到 AWS CodeCommit 存储库，并包含一个 appspec.yml 文件来配置和安装必要软件。创建一个与 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group 关联的 AWS CodeDeploy deployment group。创建一个 AWS CodePipeline pipeline，使用 CodeCommit 作为源，并使用 CodeDeploy 作为部署提供程序。

questions.explanation: ????? D????? D???? Fargate ???????????? D ?? EC2 Auto Scaling?CodeDeploy AppSpec ???????? CodePipeline ? CodeCommit ? CodeDeploy ?????

explanations.zh: ????? D????? D???? Fargate ???????????? D ?? EC2 Auto Scaling?CodeDeploy AppSpec ???????? CodePipeline ? CodeCommit ? CodeDeploy ?????
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. The discussion selects D and notes that Fargate provides limited OS access; option D uses EC2 Auto Scaling with a CodeDeploy AppSpec to install software and automates release from CodeCommit through CodePipeline and CodeDeploy.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer wants to find a solution to migrate an application from on premises to AWS. The application is running on Linux and needs to run on specific versions of Apache Tomcat, HAProxy, and Varnish Cache to function properly. The application's operating system-level parameters require tuning. The solution must include a way to automate the deployment of new application versions. The infrastructure should be scalable and faulty servers should be replaced automatically. Which solution should the DevOps engineer use?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师希望找到一种解决方案，将应用程序从本地迁移到 AWS。该应用程序运行在 Linux 上，并且需要运行特定版本的 Apache Tomcat、HAProxy 和 Varnish Cache 才能正常工作。该应用程序的操作系统级参数需要调优。该解决方案必须包含一种自动部署新应用程序版本的方法。基础设施应具有可扩展性，并且故障服务器应自动替换。DevOps 工程师应使用哪种解决方案？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is using AWS CodeDeploy across a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances in an EC2 Auto Scaling group. The associated CodeDeploy deployment group, which is integrated with EC2 Auto Scaling, is configured to perform in-place deployments with CodeDeployDefault.OneAtATime. During an ongoing new deployment, the engineer discovers that, although the overall deployment finished successfully, two out of five instances have the previous application revision deployed. The other three instances have the newest application revision. What is likely causing this issue?

options.label: A
options.content: The two affected instances failed to fetch the new deployment.

contents.en: The two affected instances failed to fetch the new deployment.
contents.zh: 两个受影响的实例无法获取新的部署。

options.label: B
options.content: A failed AfterInstall lifecycle event hook caused the CodeDeploy agent to roll back to the previous version on the affected instances.

contents.en: A failed AfterInstall lifecycle event hook caused the CodeDeploy agent to roll back to the previous version on the affected instances.
contents.zh: 失败的 AfterInstall 生命周期事件钩子导致 CodeDeploy agent 在受影响的实例上回滚到先前版本。

options.label: C
options.content: The CodeDeploy agent was not installed in two affected instances.

contents.en: The CodeDeploy agent was not installed in two affected instances.
contents.zh: 两个受影响的实例中未安装 CodeDeploy agent。

options.label: D
options.content: EC2 Auto Scaling launched two new instances while the new deployment had not yet finished, causing the previous version to be deployed on the affected instances.

contents.en: EC2 Auto Scaling launched two new instances while the new deployment had not yet finished, causing the previous version to be deployed on the affected instances.
contents.zh: EC2 Auto Scaling 在新部署尚未完成时启动了两个新实例，导致先前版本被部署到受影响的实例上。

questions.explanation: ????? D????? in-place deployment ???????????? CodeDeploy agent?? Auto Scaling ????????????????????????????????

explanations.zh: ????? D????? in-place deployment ???????????? CodeDeploy agent?? Auto Scaling ????????????????????????????????
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. The discussion explains that an in-place deployment updates the agents found when deployment starts; if Auto Scaling launches new instances before deployment finishes, those instances can miss the deployment and receive the previous revision.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer is using AWS CodeDeploy across a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances in an EC2 Auto Scaling group. The associated CodeDeploy deployment group, which is integrated with EC2 Auto Scaling, is configured to perform in-place deployments with CodeDeployDefault.OneAtATime. During an ongoing new deployment, the engineer discovers that, although the overall deployment finished successfully, two out of five instances have the previous application revision deployed. The other three instances have the newest application revision. What is likely causing this issue?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师正在 EC2 Auto Scaling group 中的一组 Amazon EC2 实例上使用 AWS CodeDeploy。关联的 CodeDeploy deployment group 与 EC2 Auto Scaling 集成，并配置为使用 CodeDeployDefault.OneAtATime 执行就地部署。在一次正在进行的新部署期间，工程师发现虽然整体部署成功完成，但 5 个实例中有 2 个部署的是先前的应用程序修订版。另外 3 个实例部署的是最新的应用程序修订版。最可能导致此问题的原因是什么？

questions.content: A security team is concerned that a developer can unintentionally attach an Elastic IP address to an Amazon EC2 instance in production. No developer should be allowed to attach an Elastic IP address to an instance. The security team must be notified if any production server has an Elastic IP address at any time. How can this task be automated?

options.label: A
options.content: Use Amazon Athena to query AWS CloudTrail logs to check for any associate-address attempts. Create an AWS Lambda function to disassociate the Elastic IP address from the instance, and alert the security team.

contents.en: Use Amazon Athena to query AWS CloudTrail logs to check for any associate-address attempts. Create an AWS Lambda function to disassociate the Elastic IP address from the instance, and alert the security team.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon Athena 查询 AWS CloudTrail 日志，以检查任何 associate-address 尝试。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，将 Elastic IP 地址从实例解除关联，并提醒安全团队。

options.label: B
options.content: Attach an IAM policy to the developers' IAM group to deny associate-address permissions. Create a custom AWS Config rule to check whether an Elastic IP address is associated with any instance tagged as production, and alert the security team.

contents.en: Attach an IAM policy to the developers' IAM group to deny associate-address permissions. Create a custom AWS Config rule to check whether an Elastic IP address is associated with any instance tagged as production, and alert the security team.
contents.zh: 向开发人员的 IAM 组附加 IAM policy，以拒绝 associate-address 权限。创建一个自定义 AWS Config 规则，检查是否有 Elastic IP 地址与任何标记为生产环境的实例关联，并提醒安全团队。

options.label: C
options.content: Ensure that all IAM groups associated with developers do not have associate-address permissions. Create a scheduled AWS Lambda function to check whether an Elastic IP address is associated with any instance tagged as production, and alert the security team if an instance has an Elastic IP address associated with it.

contents.en: Ensure that all IAM groups associated with developers do not have associate-address permissions. Create a scheduled AWS Lambda function to check whether an Elastic IP address is associated with any instance tagged as production, and alert the security team if an instance has an Elastic IP address associated with it.
contents.zh: 确保与开发人员关联的所有 IAM 组都没有 associate-address 权限。创建一个计划运行的 AWS Lambda 函数，检查是否有 Elastic IP 地址与任何标记为生产环境的实例关联；如果某个实例关联了 Elastic IP 地址，则提醒安全团队。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS Config rule to check that all production instances have EC2 IAM roles that include deny associate-address permissions. Verify whether there is an Elastic IP address associated with any instance, and alert the security team if an instance has an Elastic IP address associated with it.

contents.en: Create an AWS Config rule to check that all production instances have EC2 IAM roles that include deny associate-address permissions. Verify whether there is an Elastic IP address associated with any instance, and alert the security team if an instance has an Elastic IP address associated with it.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Config 规则，检查所有生产实例都具有包含拒绝 associate-address 权限的 EC2 IAM roles。验证是否有 Elastic IP 地址与任何实例关联；如果某个实例关联了 Elastic IP 地址，则提醒安全团队。

questions.explanation: ????? B???????? IAM ????????? associate-address ??????? Elastic IP?????? AWS Config ???????????? Elastic IP?????????

explanations.zh: ????? B???????? IAM ????????? associate-address ??????? Elastic IP?????? AWS Config ???????????? Elastic IP?????????
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. The discussion says an IAM deny on associate-address for the developers' group can block Elastic IP associations; a custom AWS Config rule then checks whether production-tagged instances have an Elastic IP and alerts the security team.

contents.en: A security team is concerned that a developer can unintentionally attach an Elastic IP address to an Amazon EC2 instance in production. No developer should be allowed to attach an Elastic IP address to an instance. The security team must be notified if any production server has an Elastic IP address at any time. How can this task be automated?
contents.zh: 安全团队担心开发人员可能会无意中将 Elastic IP 地址附加到生产环境中的 Amazon EC2 实例。任何开发人员都不应被允许将 Elastic IP 地址附加到实例。如果任何生产服务器在任何时候具有 Elastic IP 地址，必须通知安全团队。如何自动化此任务？

questions.content: A company is using AWS Organizations to create separate AWS accounts for each of its departments. The company needs to automate the following tasks: • Update the Linux AMIs with new patches periodically and generate a golden image • Install a new version of Chef agents in the golden image, if available • Provide the newly generated AMIs to the department's accounts Which solution meets these requirements with the LEAST management overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Write a script to launch an Amazon EC2 instance from the previous golden image. Apply the patch updates. Install the new version of the Chef agent, generate a new golden image, and then modify the AMI permissions to share only the new image with the department's accounts.

contents.en: Write a script to launch an Amazon EC2 instance from the previous golden image. Apply the patch updates. Install the new version of the Chef agent, generate a new golden image, and then modify the AMI permissions to share only the new image with the department's accounts.
contents.zh: 编写脚本，从先前的 golden image 启动 Amazon EC2 实例。应用补丁更新。安装新版本的 Chef agent，生成新的 golden image，然后修改 AMI 权限，仅与各部门的账户共享新镜像。

options.label: B
options.content: Use Amazon EC2 Image Builder to create an image pipeline that consists of the base Linux AMI and components to install the Chef agent. Use AWS Resource Access Manager to share EC2 Image Builder images with the department's accounts.

contents.en: Use Amazon EC2 Image Builder to create an image pipeline that consists of the base Linux AMI and components to install the Chef agent. Use AWS Resource Access Manager to share EC2 Image Builder images with the department's accounts.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon EC2 Image Builder 创建一个 image pipeline，该 pipeline 由基础 Linux AMI 和用于安装 Chef agent 的组件组成。使用 AWS Resource Access Manager 与各部门的账户共享 EC2 Image Builder 镜像。

options.label: C
options.content: Use an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to update the Linux AMI by using the previous image. Provide the URL for the script that will update the Chef agent. Use AWS Organizations to replace the previous golden image in the department's accounts.

contents.en: Use an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to update the Linux AMI by using the previous image. Provide the URL for the script that will update the Chef agent. Use AWS Organizations to replace the previous golden image in the department's accounts.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook，通过先前镜像更新 Linux AMI。提供用于更新 Chef agent 的脚本 URL。使用 AWS Organizations 替换各部门账户中的先前 golden image。

options.label: D
options.content: Use Amazon EC2 Image Builder to create an image pipeline that consists of the base Linux AMI and components to install the Chef agent. Create a parameter in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store to store the new AMI ID that can be referenced by the department's accounts.

contents.en: Use Amazon EC2 Image Builder to create an image pipeline that consists of the base Linux AMI and components to install the Chef agent. Create a parameter in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store to store the new AMI ID that can be referenced by the department's accounts.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon EC2 Image Builder 创建一个 image pipeline，该 pipeline 由基础 Linux AMI 和用于安装 Chef agent 的组件组成。在 AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store 中创建一个参数来存储新的 AMI ID，各部门的账户可引用该参数。

questions.explanation: ????? B??????? golden image ??? EC2 Image Builder ??????? B ? Image Builder ?? Chef agent???? AWS Resource Access Manager ????????????

explanations.zh: ????? B??????? golden image ??? EC2 Image Builder ??????? B ? Image Builder ?? Chef agent???? AWS Resource Access Manager ????????????
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. The discussion says a golden image should be built with EC2 Image Builder; option B creates an image pipeline that installs the Chef agent and shares the resulting images to department accounts with AWS Resource Access Manager.

contents.en: A company is using AWS Organizations to create separate AWS accounts for each of its departments. The company needs to automate the following tasks: • Update the Linux AMIs with new patches periodically and generate a golden image • Install a new version of Chef agents in the golden image, if available • Provide the newly generated AMIs to the department's accounts Which solution meets these requirements with the LEAST management overhead?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在使用 AWS Organizations 为其各部门创建独立的 AWS 账户。公司需要自动化以下任务：• 定期用新补丁更新 Linux AMI 并生成 golden image • 如果可用，在 golden image 中安装新版本的 Chef agents • 将新生成的 AMI 提供给各部门的账户 哪种解决方案能以最少的管理开销满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has a mission-critical application on AWS that uses automatic scaling. The company wants the deployment lifecycle to meet the following parameters: • The application must be deployed one instance at a time to ensure the remaining fleet continues to serve traffic. • The application is CPU intensive and must be closely monitored. • The deployment must automatically roll back if the CPU utilization of the deployment instance exceeds 85%. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation to create an AWS Step Functions state machine and Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks to move to one instance at a time into a wait state. Use AWS Systems Manager automation to deploy the update to each instance and move it back into the Auto Scaling group using the heartbeat timeout.

contents.en: Use AWS CloudFormation to create an AWS Step Functions state machine and Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks to move to one instance at a time into a wait state. Use AWS Systems Manager automation to deploy the update to each instance and move it back into the Auto Scaling group using the heartbeat timeout.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CloudFormation 创建 AWS Step Functions state machine 和 Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks，以一次将一个实例移入等待状态。使用 AWS Systems Manager automation 将更新部署到每个实例，并使用 heartbeat timeout 将其移回 Auto Scaling group。

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS CodeDeploy with Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling Configure an alarm tied to the CPU utilization metric. Use the CodeDeployDefault OneAtAtime configuration as a deployment strategy. Configure automatic rollbacks within the deployment group to roll back the deployment if the alarm thresholds are breached.

contents.en: Use AWS CodeDeploy with Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling Configure an alarm tied to the CPU utilization metric. Use the CodeDeployDefault OneAtAtime configuration as a deployment strategy. Configure automatic rollbacks within the deployment group to roll back the deployment if the alarm thresholds are breached.
contents.zh: 将 AWS CodeDeploy 与 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 结合使用。配置一个与 CPU utilization 指标关联的告警。使用 CodeDeployDefault OneAtAtime 配置作为部署策略。在 deployment group 中配置自动回滚，以便在告警阈值被突破时回滚部署。

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS Elastic Beanstalk for load balancing and AWS Auto Scaling. Configure an alarm tied to the CPU utilization metric. Configure rolling deployments with a fixed batch size of one instance. Enable enhanced health to monitor the status of the deployment and roll back based on the alarm previously created.

contents.en: Use AWS Elastic Beanstalk for load balancing and AWS Auto Scaling. Configure an alarm tied to the CPU utilization metric. Configure rolling deployments with a fixed batch size of one instance. Enable enhanced health to monitor the status of the deployment and roll back based on the alarm previously created.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Elastic Beanstalk 实现负载均衡和 AWS Auto Scaling。配置一个与 CPU utilization 指标关联的告警。配置固定批次大小为一个实例的滚动部署。启用 enhanced health 以监控部署状态，并基于先前创建的告警进行回滚。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS Systems Manager to perform a blue/green deployment with Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling. Configure an alarm tied to the CPU utilization metric. Deploy updates one at a time. Configure automatic rollbacks within the Auto Scaling group to roll back the deployment if the alarm thresholds are breached.

contents.en: Use AWS Systems Manager to perform a blue/green deployment with Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling. Configure an alarm tied to the CPU utilization metric. Deploy updates one at a time. Configure automatic rollbacks within the Auto Scaling group to roll back the deployment if the alarm thresholds are breached.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Systems Manager 结合 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 执行 blue/green deployment。配置一个与 CPU utilization 指标关联的告警。一次部署一个更新。在 Auto Scaling group 中配置自动回滚，以便在告警阈值被突破时回滚部署。

questions.explanation: ????? B????????????????? CodeDeploy ???????? B ?? CodeDeployDefault OneAtATime??? CPU ??????????????????????

explanations.zh: ????? B????????????????? CodeDeploy ???????? B ?? CodeDeployDefault OneAtATime??? CPU ??????????????????????
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. The discussion says deploying one instance at a time maps to a CodeDeploy deployment configuration; option B uses CodeDeployDefault OneAtATime and configures automatic rollback tied to a CPU alarm.

contents.en: A company has a mission-critical application on AWS that uses automatic scaling. The company wants the deployment lifecycle to meet the following parameters: • The application must be deployed one instance at a time to ensure the remaining fleet continues to serve traffic. • The application is CPU intensive and must be closely monitored. • The deployment must automatically roll back if the CPU utilization of the deployment instance exceeds 85%. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 上有一个使用自动扩缩的关键任务应用程序。公司希望部署生命周期满足以下参数：• 应用程序必须一次部署到一个实例，以确保其余实例队列继续提供流量服务。• 该应用程序是 CPU 密集型的，必须被密切监控。• 如果部署实例的 CPU 利用率超过 85%，部署必须自动回滚。哪种解决方案将满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has a single developer writing code for an automated deployment pipeline. The developer is storing source code in an Amazon S3 bucket for each project. The company wants to add more developers to the team but is concerned about code conflicts and lost work. The company also wants to build a test environment to deploy newer versions of code for testing and allow developers to automatically deploy to both environments when code is changed in the repository. What is the MOST efficient way to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS CodeCommit repository for each project, use the main branch for production code, and create a testing branch for code deployed to testing. Use feature branches to develop new features and pull requests to merge code to testing and main branches.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodeCommit repository for each project, use the main branch for production code, and create a testing branch for code deployed to testing. Use feature branches to develop new features and pull requests to merge code to testing and main branches.
contents.zh: 为每个项目创建一个 AWS CodeCommit 存储库，使用 main 分支存放生产代码，并创建一个 testing 分支用于部署到测试环境的代码。使用 feature branches 开发新功能，并使用 pull requests 将代码合并到 testing 和 main 分支。

options.label: B
options.content: Create another S3 bucket for each project for testing code, and use an AWS Lambda function to promote code changes between testing and production buckets. Enable versioning on all buckets to prevent code conflicts.

contents.en: Create another S3 bucket for each project for testing code, and use an AWS Lambda function to promote code changes between testing and production buckets. Enable versioning on all buckets to prevent code conflicts.
contents.zh: 为每个项目再创建一个 S3 bucket 用于测试代码，并使用 AWS Lambda 函数在测试和生产 bucket 之间提升代码更改。在所有 bucket 上启用版本控制以防止代码冲突。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS CodeCommit repository for each project, and use the main branch for production and test code with different deployment pipelines for each environment. Use feature branches to develop new features.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodeCommit repository for each project, and use the main branch for production and test code with different deployment pipelines for each environment. Use feature branches to develop new features.
contents.zh: 为每个项目创建一个 AWS CodeCommit 存储库，并将 main 分支同时用于生产和测试代码，对每个环境使用不同的部署流水线。使用 feature branches 开发新功能。

options.label: D
options.content: Enable versioning and branching on each S3 bucket, use the main branch for production code, and create a testing branch for code deployed to testing. Have developers use each branch for developing in each environment.

contents.en: Enable versioning and branching on each S3 bucket, use the main branch for production code, and create a testing branch for code deployed to testing. Have developers use each branch for developing in each environment.
contents.zh: 在每个 S3 bucket 上启用版本控制和分支，使用 main 分支存放生产代码，并创建一个 testing 分支用于部署到测试环境的代码。让开发人员使用各分支在各环境中开发。

questions.explanation: ????? A?????? S3 ?????????????????????????? CodeCommit??? A ??????????? main?testing ? feature branches???? pull request ???

explanations.zh: ????? A?????? S3 ?????????????????????????? CodeCommit??? A ??????????? main?testing ? feature branches???? pull request ???
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The discussion says CodeCommit is needed to avoid conflicts and lost work when adding developers; option A creates a repository per project, uses main and testing branches, feature branches, and pull requests for merging.

contents.en: A company has a single developer writing code for an automated deployment pipeline. The developer is storing source code in an Amazon S3 bucket for each project. The company wants to add more developers to the team but is concerned about code conflicts and lost work. The company also wants to build a test environment to deploy newer versions of code for testing and allow developers to automatically deploy to both environments when code is changed in the repository. What is the MOST efficient way to meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一名开发人员为自动化部署流水线编写代码。该开发人员为每个项目将源代码存储在一个 Amazon S3 bucket 中。公司希望向团队添加更多开发人员，但担心代码冲突和工作丢失。公司还希望构建一个测试环境，用于部署较新版本的代码进行测试，并允许开发人员在存储库中的代码发生更改时自动部署到两个环境。满足这些要求的最高效方式是什么？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer notices that all Amazon EC2 instances running behind an Application Load Balancer in an Auto Scaling group are failing to respond to user requests. The EC2 instances are also failing target group HTTP health checks. Upon inspection, the engineer notices the application process was not running in any EC2 instances. There are a significant number of out of memory messages in the system logs. The engineer needs to improve the resilience of the application to cope with a potential application memory leak. Monitoring and notifications should be enabled to alert when there is an issue. Which combination of actions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Change the Auto Scaling configuration to replace the instances when they fail the load balancer's health checks.

contents.en: Change the Auto Scaling configuration to replace the instances when they fail the load balancer's health checks.
contents.zh: 更改 Auto Scaling 配置，使实例在未通过 load balancer 的 health checks 时被替换。

options.label: B
options.content: Change the target group health check HealthCheckIntervalSeconds parameter to reduce the interval between health checks.

contents.en: Change the target group health check HealthCheckIntervalSeconds parameter to reduce the interval between health checks.
contents.zh: 更改 target group health check 的 HealthCheckIntervalSeconds 参数，以缩短 health checks 之间的间隔。

options.label: C
options.content: Change the target group health checks from HTTP to TCP to check if the port where the application is listening is reachable.

contents.en: Change the target group health checks from HTTP to TCP to check if the port where the application is listening is reachable.
contents.zh: 将 target group health checks 从 HTTP 更改为 TCP，以检查应用程序正在监听的端口是否可达。

options.label: D
options.content: Enable the available memory consumption metric within the Amazon CloudWatch dashboard for the entire Auto Scaling group. Create an alarm when the memory utilization is high. Associate an Amazon SNS topic to the alarm to receive notifications when the alarm goes off.

contents.en: Enable the available memory consumption metric within the Amazon CloudWatch dashboard for the entire Auto Scaling group. Create an alarm when the memory utilization is high. Associate an Amazon SNS topic to the alarm to receive notifications when the alarm goes off.
contents.zh: 在整个 Auto Scaling group 的 Amazon CloudWatch dashboard 中启用可用内存消耗指标。当内存利用率较高时创建告警。将 Amazon SNS topic 关联到该告警，以便在告警触发时接收通知。

options.label: E
options.content: Use the Amazon CloudWatch agent to collect the memory utilization of the EC2 instances in the Auto Scaling group. Create an alarm when the memory utilization is high and associate an Amazon SNS topic to receive a notification.

contents.en: Use the Amazon CloudWatch agent to collect the memory utilization of the EC2 instances in the Auto Scaling group. Create an alarm when the memory utilization is high and associate an Amazon SNS topic to receive a notification.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon CloudWatch agent 收集 Auto Scaling group 中 EC2 实例的内存利用率。当内存利用率较高时创建告警，并关联 Amazon SNS topic 以接收通知。

explanations.en: The correct answers are A and E. The discussion says failed instances should be replaced and memory metrics require the CloudWatch agent; A makes Auto Scaling replace instances that fail load balancer health checks, and E monitors high memory usage and notifies through SNS.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer notices that all Amazon EC2 instances running behind an Application Load Balancer in an Auto Scaling group are failing to respond to user requests. The EC2 instances are also failing target group HTTP health checks. Upon inspection, the engineer notices the application process was not running in any EC2 instances. There are a significant number of out of memory messages in the system logs. The engineer needs to improve the resilience of the application to cope with a potential application memory leak. Monitoring and notifications should be enabled to alert when there is an issue. Which combination of actions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师注意到，Auto Scaling group 中位于 Application Load Balancer 后面的所有 Amazon EC2 实例都无法响应用户请求。这些 EC2 实例也未通过 target group HTTP health checks。检查后，工程师注意到任何 EC2 实例中都没有运行应用程序进程。系统日志中有大量 out of memory 消息。工程师需要提高应用程序的弹性，以应对潜在的应用程序内存泄漏。应启用监控和通知，以便在出现问题时发出提醒。哪一组操作组合将满足这些要求？（选择两个。）

questions.content: An ecommerce company uses a large number of Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) backed Amazon EC2 instances. To decrease manual work across all the instances, a DevOps engineer is tasked with automating restart actions when EC2 instance retirement events are scheduled. How can this be accomplished?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a scheduled Amazon EventBridge rule to run an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook that checks if any EC2 instances are scheduled for retirement once a week. If the instance is scheduled for retirement, the runbook will hibernate the instance.

contents.en: Create a scheduled Amazon EventBridge rule to run an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook that checks if any EC2 instances are scheduled for retirement once a week. If the instance is scheduled for retirement, the runbook will hibernate the instance.
contents.zh: 创建一个计划运行的 Amazon EventBridge 规则，每周运行一次 AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook，以检查是否有 EC2 实例计划退役。如果实例计划退役，该 runbook 将休眠该实例。

options.label: B
options.content: Enable EC2 Auto Recovery on all of the instances. Create an AWS Config rule to limit the recovery to occur during a maintenance window only.

contents.en: Enable EC2 Auto Recovery on all of the instances. Create an AWS Config rule to limit the recovery to occur during a maintenance window only.
contents.zh: 在所有实例上启用 EC2 Auto Recovery。创建一个 AWS Config 规则，将恢复限制为仅在维护时段内发生。

options.label: C
options.content: Reboot all EC2 instances during an approved maintenance window that is outside of standard business hours. Set up Amazon CloudWatch alarms to send a notification in case any instance is failing EC2 instance status checks.

contents.en: Reboot all EC2 instances during an approved maintenance window that is outside of standard business hours. Set up Amazon CloudWatch alarms to send a notification in case any instance is failing EC2 instance status checks.
contents.zh: 在标准业务时间之外的已批准维护时段内重启所有 EC2 实例。设置 Amazon CloudWatch alarms，以便在任何实例未通过 EC2 instance status checks 时发送通知。

options.label: D
options.content: Set up an AWS Health Amazon EventBridge rule to run AWS Systems Manager Automation runbooks that stop and start the EC2 instance when a retirement scheduled event occurs.

contents.en: Set up an AWS Health Amazon EventBridge rule to run AWS Systems Manager Automation runbooks that stop and start the EC2 instance when a retirement scheduled event occurs.
contents.zh: 设置一个 AWS Health Amazon EventBridge 规则，在发生 retirement scheduled event 时运行 AWS Systems Manager Automation runbooks，以停止并启动 EC2 实例。

questions.explanation: ????? D????? EC2 instance retirement ????????????????????????????? D ? AWS Health EventBridge ???? Systems Manager Automation runbook ??????

explanations.zh: ????? D????? EC2 instance retirement ????????????????????????????? D ? AWS Health EventBridge ???? Systems Manager Automation runbook ??????
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. The discussion explains that EC2 instance retirement events require stopping and starting the instance to move it to different underlying hardware; option D triggers Systems Manager Automation runbooks from an AWS Health EventBridge rule.

contents.en: An ecommerce company uses a large number of Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) backed Amazon EC2 instances. To decrease manual work across all the instances, a DevOps engineer is tasked with automating restart actions when EC2 instance retirement events are scheduled. How can this be accomplished?
contents.zh: 一家电子商务公司使用大量由 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 支持的 Amazon EC2 实例。为了减少所有实例上的手动工作，DevOps 工程师被要求在 EC2 instance retirement events 被计划时自动化重启操作。如何实现这一点？

questions.content: A company manages AWS accounts for application teams in AWS Control Tower. Individual application teams are responsible for securing their respective AWS accounts. A DevOps engineer needs to enable Amazon GuardDuty for all AWS accounts in which the application teams have not already enabled GuardDuty. The DevOps engineer is using AWS CloudFormation StackSets from the AWS Control Tower management account. How should the DevOps engineer configure the CloudFormation template to prevent failure during the StackSets deployment?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a CloudFormation custom resource that invokes an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to conditionally enable GuardDuty if GuardDuty is not already enabled in the accounts.

contents.en: Create a CloudFormation custom resource that invokes an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to conditionally enable GuardDuty if GuardDuty is not already enabled in the accounts.
contents.zh: 创建一个 CloudFormation custom resource，该资源调用 AWS Lambda 函数。配置该 Lambda 函数在账户中尚未启用 GuardDuty 时有条件地启用 GuardDuty。

options.label: B
options.content: Use the Conditions section of the CloudFormation template to enable GuardDuty in accounts where GuardDuty is not already enabled.

contents.en: Use the Conditions section of the CloudFormation template to enable GuardDuty in accounts where GuardDuty is not already enabled.
contents.zh: 使用 CloudFormation 模板的 Conditions 部分，在尚未启用 GuardDuty 的账户中启用 GuardDuty。

options.label: C
options.content: Use the CloudFormation Fn::GetAtt intrinsic function to check whether GuardDuty is already enabled. If GuardDuty is not already enabled, use the Resources section of the CloudFormation template to enable GuardDuty.

contents.en: Use the CloudFormation Fn::GetAtt intrinsic function to check whether GuardDuty is already enabled. If GuardDuty is not already enabled, use the Resources section of the CloudFormation template to enable GuardDuty.
contents.zh: 使用 CloudFormation Fn::GetAtt intrinsic function 检查 GuardDuty 是否已启用。如果 GuardDuty 尚未启用，则使用 CloudFormation 模板的 Resources 部分启用 GuardDuty。

options.label: D
options.content: Manually discover the list of AWS account IDs where GuardDuty is not enabled. Use the CloudFormation Fn::ImportValue intrinsic function to import the list of account IDs into the CloudFormation template to skip deployment for the listed AWS accounts.

contents.en: Manually discover the list of AWS account IDs where GuardDuty is not enabled. Use the CloudFormation Fn::ImportValue intrinsic function to import the list of account IDs into the CloudFormation template to skip deployment for the listed AWS accounts.
contents.zh: 手动发现未启用 GuardDuty 的 AWS account IDs 列表。使用 CloudFormation Fn::ImportValue intrinsic function 将 account IDs 列表导入 CloudFormation 模板，以跳过列出的 AWS 账户的部署。

questions.explanation: ????? A????? CloudFormation ???????? GuardDuty?????????????????? Lambda?Lambda ?? GuardDuty ???????????

explanations.zh: ????? A????? CloudFormation ???????? GuardDuty?????????????????? Lambda?Lambda ?? GuardDuty ???????????
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The discussion says CloudFormation does not directly enable GuardDuty by default, so the template should use a custom resource that invokes Lambda; the function conditionally enables GuardDuty when it is not already enabled.

contents.en: A company manages AWS accounts for application teams in AWS Control Tower. Individual application teams are responsible for securing their respective AWS accounts. A DevOps engineer needs to enable Amazon GuardDuty for all AWS accounts in which the application teams have not already enabled GuardDuty. The DevOps engineer is using AWS CloudFormation StackSets from the AWS Control Tower management account. How should the DevOps engineer configure the CloudFormation template to prevent failure during the StackSets deployment?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 AWS Control Tower 中为应用程序团队管理 AWS 账户。各个应用程序团队负责保护各自的 AWS 账户。DevOps 工程师需要为所有尚未启用 Amazon GuardDuty 的 AWS 账户启用 GuardDuty。DevOps 工程师正在从 AWS Control Tower 管理账户使用 AWS CloudFormation StackSets。DevOps 工程师应如何配置 CloudFormation 模板，以防止 StackSets 部署期间失败？

questions.content: A company has an AWS Control Tower landing zone. The company's DevOps team creates a workload OU. A development OU and a production OU are nested under the workload OU. The company grants users full access to the company's AWS accounts to deploy applications. The DevOps team needs to allow only a specific management IAM role to manage the IAM roles and policies of any AWS accounts in only the production OU. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an SCP that denies full access with a condition to exclude the management IAM role for the organization root.

contents.en: Create an SCP that denies full access with a condition to exclude the management IAM role for the organization root.
contents.zh: 创建一个 SCP，拒绝完全访问，并使用条件排除组织根中的管理 IAM role。

options.label: B
options.content: Ensure that the FullAWSAccess SCP is applied at the organization root.

contents.en: Ensure that the FullAWSAccess SCP is applied at the organization root.
contents.zh: 确保 FullAWSAccess SCP 应用于组织根。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an SCP that allows IAM related actions. Attach the SCP to the development OU.

contents.en: Create an SCP that allows IAM related actions. Attach the SCP to the development OU.
contents.zh: 创建一个允许 IAM related actions 的 SCP。将该 SCP 附加到 development OU。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an SCP that denies IAM related actions with a condition to exclude the management IAM role. Attach the SCP to the workload OU.

contents.en: Create an SCP that denies IAM related actions with a condition to exclude the management IAM role. Attach the SCP to the workload OU.
contents.zh: 创建一个拒绝 IAM related actions 的 SCP，并使用条件排除管理 IAM role。将该 SCP 附加到 workload OU。

options.label: E
options.content: Create an SCP that denies IAM related actions with a condition to exclude the management IAM role. Attach the SCP to the production OU.

contents.en: Create an SCP that denies IAM related actions with a condition to exclude the management IAM role. Attach the SCP to the production OU.
contents.zh: 创建一个拒绝 IAM related actions 的 SCP，并使用条件排除管理 IAM role。将该 SCP 附加到 production OU。

questions.explanation: ????? B?E????? SCP ?????Deny ????????????? FullAWSAccess ?????????????? FullAWSAccess??? production OU ???????? Deny IAM ?? SCP?

explanations.zh: ????? B?E????? SCP ?????Deny ????????????? FullAWSAccess ?????????????? FullAWSAccess??? production OU ???????? Deny IAM ?? SCP?
explanations.en: The correct answers are B and E. The discussion emphasizes SCP inheritance: Deny policies inherit downward, while the root normally keeps FullAWSAccess as the default allow; therefore keep FullAWSAccess at the root and attach a deny-IAM SCP with an exception for the management role to the production OU.

contents.en: A company has an AWS Control Tower landing zone. The company's DevOps team creates a workload OU. A development OU and a production OU are nested under the workload OU. The company grants users full access to the company's AWS accounts to deploy applications. The DevOps team needs to allow only a specific management IAM role to manage the IAM roles and policies of any AWS accounts in only the production OU. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个 AWS Control Tower landing zone。公司的 DevOps 团队创建了一个 workload OU。development OU 和 production OU 嵌套在 workload OU 下。公司授予用户对公司 AWS 账户的完全访问权限，以部署应用程序。DevOps 团队需要只允许某个特定的管理 IAM role 管理仅 production OU 中任何 AWS 账户的 IAM roles 和 policies。哪一组步骤组合将满足这些要求？（选择两个。）

questions.content: A company hired a penetration tester to simulate an internal security breach. The tester performed port scans on the company's Amazon EC2 instances. The company's security measures did not detect the port scans. The company needs a solution that automatically provides notification when port scans are performed on EC2 instances. The company creates and subscribes to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. What should the company do next to meet the requirement?

options.label: A
options.content: Ensure that Amazon GuardDuty is enabled. Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for detected EC2 and port scan findings. Connect the alarm to the SNS topic.

contents.en: Ensure that Amazon GuardDuty is enabled. Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for detected EC2 and port scan findings. Connect the alarm to the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 确保 Amazon GuardDuty 已启用。为检测到的 EC2 和端口扫描 findings 创建 Amazon CloudWatch alarm。将该 alarm 连接到 SNS topic。

options.label: B
options.content: Ensure that Amazon Inspector is enabled. Create an Amazon EventBridge event for detected network reachability findings that indicate port scans. Connect the event to the SNS topic.

contents.en: Ensure that Amazon Inspector is enabled. Create an Amazon EventBridge event for detected network reachability findings that indicate port scans. Connect the event to the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 确保 Amazon Inspector 已启用。为检测到的表示端口扫描的 network reachability findings 创建 Amazon EventBridge event。将该 event 连接到 SNS topic。

options.label: C
options.content: Ensure that Amazon Inspector is enabled. Create an Amazon EventBridge event for detected CVEs that cause open port vulnerabilities. Connect the event to the SNS topic.
