contents.en: Ensure that Amazon Inspector is enabled. Create an Amazon EventBridge event for detected CVEs that cause open port vulnerabilities. Connect the event to the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 确保 Amazon Inspector 已启用。为检测到的导致开放端口漏洞的 CVEs 创建 Amazon EventBridge event。将该 event 连接到 SNS topic。

options.label: D
options.content: Ensure that AWS CloudTrail is enabled. Create an AWS Lambda function to analyze the CloudTrail logs for unusual amounts of traffic from an IP address range. Connect the Lambda function to the SNS topic.

contents.en: Ensure that AWS CloudTrail is enabled. Create an AWS Lambda function to analyze the CloudTrail logs for unusual amounts of traffic from an IP address range. Connect the Lambda function to the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 确保 AWS CloudTrail 已启用。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，用于分析 CloudTrail 日志中来自某个 IP 地址范围的异常流量量。将该 Lambda 函数连接到 SNS topic。

questions.explanation: ????? A????? GuardDuty ? Inspector?GuardDuty ???????????????? EC2 ?????????? A ?? GuardDuty??? CloudWatch alarm ?? SNS ???

explanations.zh: ????? A????? GuardDuty ? Inspector?GuardDuty ???????????????? EC2 ?????????? A ?? GuardDuty??? CloudWatch alarm ?? SNS ???
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The discussion distinguishes GuardDuty from Inspector: GuardDuty provides continuous threat detection and alerting, which fits EC2 and port scan findings; option A enables GuardDuty and connects a CloudWatch alarm to SNS.

contents.en: A company hired a penetration tester to simulate an internal security breach. The tester performed port scans on the company's Amazon EC2 instances. The company's security measures did not detect the port scans. The company needs a solution that automatically provides notification when port scans are performed on EC2 instances. The company creates and subscribes to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. What should the company do next to meet the requirement?
contents.zh: 一家公司聘请了一名渗透测试人员来模拟内部安全漏洞。测试人员对公司的 Amazon EC2 实例执行了端口扫描。公司的安全措施未检测到这些端口扫描。公司需要一种解决方案，当 EC2 实例上发生端口扫描时自动提供通知。公司创建并订阅了一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic。为满足要求，公司接下来应做什么？

questions.content: A company runs applications in an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster. The EKS cluster uses an Application Load Balancer to route traffic to the applications that run in the cluster. A new application that was migrated to the EKS cluster is performing poorly. All the other applications in the EKS cluster maintain appropriate operation. The new application scales out horizontally to the preconfigured maximum number of pods immediately upon deployment, before any user traffic routes to the web application. Which solution will resolve the scaling behavior of the web application in the EKS cluster?

options.label: A
options.content: Implement the Horizontal Pod Autoscaler in the EKS cluster.

contents.en: Implement the Horizontal Pod Autoscaler in the EKS cluster.
contents.zh: 在 EKS cluster 中实施 Horizontal Pod Autoscaler。

options.label: B
options.content: Implement the Vertical Pod Autoscaler in the EKS cluster.

contents.en: Implement the Vertical Pod Autoscaler in the EKS cluster.
contents.zh: 在 EKS cluster 中实施 Vertical Pod Autoscaler。

options.label: C
options.content: Implement the Cluster Autoscaler.

contents.en: Implement the Cluster Autoscaler.
contents.zh: 实施 Cluster Autoscaler。

options.label: D
options.content: Implement the AWS Load Balancer Controller in the EKS cluster.

contents.en: Implement the AWS Load Balancer Controller in the EKS cluster.
contents.zh: 在 EKS cluster 中实施 AWS Load Balancer Controller。

questions.explanation: ????? B???????????????? pod ??????????????????????Vertical Pod Autoscaler ???? Pod ???? right sizing????? B?

explanations.zh: ????? B???????????????? pod ??????????????????????Vertical Pod Autoscaler ???? Pod ???? right sizing????? B?
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. The discussion says the application already scales horizontally to the maximum pod count but still performs poorly, indicating resource allocation may be wrong; Vertical Pod Autoscaler helps right-size pod resources, so B fits.

contents.en: A company runs applications in an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster. The EKS cluster uses an Application Load Balancer to route traffic to the applications that run in the cluster. A new application that was migrated to the EKS cluster is performing poorly. All the other applications in the EKS cluster maintain appropriate operation. The new application scales out horizontally to the preconfigured maximum number of pods immediately upon deployment, before any user traffic routes to the web application. Which solution will resolve the scaling behavior of the web application in the EKS cluster?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster 中运行应用程序。该 EKS cluster 使用 Application Load Balancer 将流量路由到 cluster 中运行的应用程序。一个迁移到 EKS cluster 的新应用程序性能很差。EKS cluster 中的所有其他应用程序都保持正常运行。该新应用程序在部署后立即水平扩展到预配置的最大 pod 数量，在任何用户流量路由到该 Web 应用程序之前就已发生。哪种解决方案将解决 EKS cluster 中 Web 应用程序的扩展行为？

questions.content: A company has an AWS Control Tower landing zone that manages its organization in AWS Organizations. The company created an OU structure that is based on the company's requirements. The company's DevOps team has established the core accounts for the solution and an account for all centralized AWS CloudFormation and AWS Service Catalog solutions. The company wants to offer a series of customizations that an account can request through AWS Control Tower. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Enable trusted access for CloudFormation with Organizations by using service-managed permissions.

contents.en: Enable trusted access for CloudFormation with Organizations by using service-managed permissions.
contents.zh: 使用 service-managed permissions 为 CloudFormation 启用与 Organizations 的 trusted access。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an IAM role that is named AWSControlTowerBlueprintAccess. Configure the role with a trust policy that allows the AWSControlTowerAdmin role in the management account to assume the role. Attach the AWSServiceCatalogAdminFullAccess IAM policy to the AWSControlTowerBlueprintAccess role.

contents.en: Create an IAM role that is named AWSControlTowerBlueprintAccess. Configure the role with a trust policy that allows the AWSControlTowerAdmin role in the management account to assume the role. Attach the AWSServiceCatalogAdminFullAccess IAM policy to the AWSControlTowerBlueprintAccess role.
contents.zh: 创建一个名为 AWSControlTowerBlueprintAccess 的 IAM role。为该角色配置 trust policy，允许管理账户中的 AWSControlTowerAdmin role 代入该角色。将 AWSServiceCatalogAdminFullAccess IAM policy 附加到 AWSControlTowerBlueprintAccess role。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a Service Catalog product for each CloudFormation template.

contents.en: Create a Service Catalog product for each CloudFormation template.
contents.zh: 为每个 CloudFormation template 创建一个 Service Catalog product。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a CloudFormation stack set for each CloudFormation template. Enable automatic deployment for each stack set. Create a CloudFormation stack instance that targets specific OUs.

contents.en: Create a CloudFormation stack set for each CloudFormation template. Enable automatic deployment for each stack set. Create a CloudFormation stack instance that targets specific OUs.
contents.zh: 为每个 CloudFormation template 创建一个 CloudFormation stack set。为每个 stack set 启用自动部署。创建一个以特定 OU 为目标的 CloudFormation stack instance。

options.label: E
options.content: Deploy the Customizations for AWS Control Tower (CfCT) CloudFormation stack.

contents.en: Deploy the Customizations for AWS Control Tower (CfCT) CloudFormation stack.
contents.zh: 部署 Customizations for AWS Control Tower (CfCT) CloudFormation stack。

options.label: F
options.content: Create a CloudFormation template that contains the resources for each customization.

contents.en: Create a CloudFormation template that contains the resources for each customization.
contents.zh: 创建一个包含每个自定义项资源的 CloudFormation template。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B、C、F。F 先为每个自定义项创建包含资源的 CloudFormation 模板，C 再把每个模板封装为 Service Catalog 产品，B 则创建 AWSControlTowerBlueprintAccess 角色并授权管理账号中的 AWSControlTowerAdmin 角色代入，以便 Control Tower 蓝图访问这些产品。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B、C、F。F 先为每个自定义项创建包含资源的 CloudFormation 模板，C 再把每个模板封装为 Service Catalog 产品，B 则创建 AWSControlTowerBlueprintAccess 角色并授权管理账号中的 AWSControlTowerAdmin 角色代入，以便 Control Tower 蓝图访问这些产品。
explanations.en: Correct answers: B, C, and F. F creates the CloudFormation templates that contain each customization, C wraps each template as a Service Catalog product, and B creates the AWSControlTowerBlueprintAccess role with trust for AWSControlTowerAdmin in the management account so Control Tower can access the blueprint resources.

contents.en: A company has an AWS Control Tower landing zone that manages its organization in AWS Organizations. The company created an OU structure that is based on the company's requirements. The company's DevOps team has established the core accounts for the solution and an account for all centralized AWS CloudFormation and AWS Service Catalog solutions. The company wants to offer a series of customizations that an account can request through AWS Control Tower. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个 AWS Control Tower landing zone，用于在 AWS Organizations 中管理其组织。公司根据自身要求创建了 OU 结构。公司的 DevOps 团队已为该解决方案建立核心账户，并建立一个用于所有集中式 AWS CloudFormation 和 AWS Service Catalog 解决方案的账户。公司希望提供一系列自定义项，账户可以通过 AWS Control Tower 请求这些自定义项。哪一组步骤组合将满足这些要求？（选择三个。）

questions.content: A company runs a workload on Amazon EC2 instances. The company needs a control that requires the use of Instance Metadata Service Version 2 (IMDSv2) on all EC2 instances in the AWS account. If an EC2 instance does not prevent the use of Instance Metadata Service Version 1 (IMDSv1), the EC2 instance must be terminated. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Set up AWS Config in the account. Use a managed rule to check EC2 instances. Configure the rule to remediate the findings by using AWS Systems Manager Automation to terminate the instance.

contents.en: Set up AWS Config in the account. Use a managed rule to check EC2 instances. Configure the rule to remediate the findings by using AWS Systems Manager Automation to terminate the instance.
contents.zh: 在账户中设置 AWS Config。使用 managed rule 检查 EC2 实例。配置该规则使用 AWS Systems Manager Automation 终止实例来修复发现的问题。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a permissions boundary that prevents the ec2:RunInstance action if the ec2:MetadataHttpTokens condition key is not set to a value of required. Attach the permissions boundary to the IAM role that was used to launch the instance.

contents.en: Create a permissions boundary that prevents the ec2:RunInstance action if the ec2:MetadataHttpTokens condition key is not set to a value of required. Attach the permissions boundary to the IAM role that was used to launch the instance.
contents.zh: 创建 permissions boundary，如果 ec2:MetadataHttpTokens condition key 未设置为 required 值，则阻止 ec2:RunInstance action。将该 permissions boundary 附加到用于启动实例的 IAM role。

options.label: C
options.content: Set up Amazon Inspector in the account. Configure Amazon Inspector to activate deep inspection for EC2 instances. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule for an Inspector2 finding. Set an AWS Lambda function as the target to terminate the instance.

contents.en: Set up Amazon Inspector in the account. Configure Amazon Inspector to activate deep inspection for EC2 instances. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule for an Inspector2 finding. Set an AWS Lambda function as the target to terminate the instance.
contents.zh: 在账户中设置 Amazon Inspector。配置 Amazon Inspector 为 EC2 实例激活 deep inspection。为 Inspector2 finding 创建 Amazon EventBridge rule。将 AWS Lambda 函数设置为目标以终止实例。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule for the EC2 instance launch successful event. Send the event to an AWS Lambda function to inspect the EC2 metadata and to terminate the instance.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule for the EC2 instance launch successful event. Send the event to an AWS Lambda function to inspect the EC2 metadata and to terminate the instance.
contents.zh: 为 EC2 instance launch successful event 创建 Amazon EventBridge rule。将事件发送到 AWS Lambda 函数，以检查 EC2 metadata 并终止实例。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A。讨论指出 AWS Config 的托管规则 ec2-imdsv2-check 可以检查 EC2 实例是否使用 IMDSv2；将该规则配置为通过 Systems Manager Automation 终止不合规实例，符合自动发现和修复的要求。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A。讨论指出 AWS Config 的托管规则 ec2-imdsv2-check 可以检查 EC2 实例是否使用 IMDSv2；将该规则配置为通过 Systems Manager Automation 终止不合规实例，符合自动发现和修复的要求。
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. The discussion identifies the AWS Config managed rule ec2-imdsv2-check for checking EC2 instances. Configuring remediation with Systems Manager Automation to terminate noncompliant instances matches the required automated check and response.

contents.en: A company runs a workload on Amazon EC2 instances. The company needs a control that requires the use of Instance Metadata Service Version 2 (IMDSv2) on all EC2 instances in the AWS account. If an EC2 instance does not prevent the use of Instance Metadata Service Version 1 (IMDSv1), the EC2 instance must be terminated. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 Amazon EC2 实例上运行工作负载。公司需要一种控制措施，要求 AWS 账户中的所有 EC2 实例使用 Instance Metadata Service Version 2 (IMDSv2)。如果 EC2 实例未阻止使用 Instance Metadata Service Version 1 (IMDSv1)，则必须终止该 EC2 实例。哪种解决方案将满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company builds an application that uses an Application Load Balancer in front of Amazon EC2 instances that are in an Auto Scaling group. The application is stateless. The Auto Scaling group uses a custom AMI that is fully prebuilt. The EC2 instances do not have a custom bootstrapping process. The AMI that the Auto Scaling group uses was recently deleted. The Auto Scaling group's scaling activities show failures because the AMI ID does not exist. Which combination of steps should a DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a new launch template that uses the new AMI.

contents.en: Create a new launch template that uses the new AMI.
contents.zh: 创建一个使用新 AMI 的新 launch template。

options.label: B
options.content: Update the Auto Scaling group to use the new launch template.

contents.en: Update the Auto Scaling group to use the new launch template.
contents.zh: 更新 Auto Scaling group 以使用新的 launch template。

options.label: C
options.content: Reduce the Auto Scaling group's desired capacity to 0.

contents.en: Reduce the Auto Scaling group's desired capacity to 0.
contents.zh: 将 Auto Scaling group 的 desired capacity 降低到 0。

options.label: D
options.content: Increase the Auto Scaling group's desired capacity by 1.

contents.en: Increase the Auto Scaling group's desired capacity by 1.
contents.zh: 将 Auto Scaling group 的 desired capacity 增加 1。

options.label: E
options.content: Create a new AMI from a running EC2 instance in the Auto Scaling group.

contents.en: Create a new AMI from a running EC2 instance in the Auto Scaling group.
contents.zh: 从 Auto Scaling group 中正在运行的 EC2 实例创建一个新的 AMI。

options.label: F
options.content: Create a new AMI by copying the most recent public AMI of the operating system that the EC2 instances use.

contents.en: Create a new AMI by copying the most recent public AMI of the operating system that the EC2 instances use.
contents.zh: 通过复制 EC2 实例所用操作系统的最新 public AMI 来创建新的 AMI。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A、B、E。原 Auto Scaling 组使用的 AMI 已删除，因此需要先从正在运行的实例创建新 AMI（E），再创建使用该 AMI 的新启动模板（A），最后让 Auto Scaling 组使用新的启动模板（B）。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A、B、E。原 Auto Scaling 组使用的 AMI 已删除，因此需要先从正在运行的实例创建新 AMI（E），再创建使用该 AMI 的新启动模板（A），最后让 Auto Scaling 组使用新的启动模板（B）。
explanations.en: Correct answers: A, B, and E. Because the AMI used by the Auto Scaling group was deleted, a new AMI must be created from a running instance (E), a new launch template must use that AMI (A), and the Auto Scaling group must be updated to use the new template (B).

contents.en: A company builds an application that uses an Application Load Balancer in front of Amazon EC2 instances that are in an Auto Scaling group. The application is stateless. The Auto Scaling group uses a custom AMI that is fully prebuilt. The EC2 instances do not have a custom bootstrapping process. The AMI that the Auto Scaling group uses was recently deleted. The Auto Scaling group's scaling activities show failures because the AMI ID does not exist. Which combination of steps should a DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司构建了一个应用程序，该应用程序在 Auto Scaling group 中的 Amazon EC2 实例前使用 Application Load Balancer。该应用程序是无状态的。Auto Scaling group 使用一个完全预构建的自定义 AMI。EC2 实例没有自定义引导过程。Auto Scaling group 使用的 AMI 最近被删除。Auto Scaling group 的扩缩活动显示失败，因为 AMI ID 不存在。DevOps 工程师应采取哪一组步骤组合来满足这些要求？（选择三个。）

questions.content: A company deploys a web application on Amazon EC2 instances that are behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The company stores the application code in an AWS CodeCommit repository. When code is merged to the main branch, an AWS Lambda function invokes an AWS CodeBuild project. The CodeBuild project packages the code, stores the packaged code in AWS CodeArtifact, and invokes AWS Systems Manager Run Command to deploy the packaged code to the EC2 instances. Previous deployments have resulted in defects, EC2 instances that are not running the latest version of the packaged code, and inconsistencies between instances. Which combination of actions should a DevOps engineer take to implement a more reliable deployment solution? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline that uses the CodeCommit repository as a source provider. Configure pipeline stages that run the CodeBuild project in parallel to build and test the application. In the pipeline, pass the CodeBuild project output artifact to an AWS CodeDeploy action.

contents.en: Create a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline that uses the CodeCommit repository as a source provider. Configure pipeline stages that run the CodeBuild project in parallel to build and test the application. In the pipeline, pass the CodeBuild project output artifact to an AWS CodeDeploy action.
contents.zh: 在 AWS CodePipeline 中创建一个 pipeline，使用 CodeCommit 存储库作为 source provider。配置 pipeline stages，并行运行 CodeBuild 项目以构建和测试应用程序。在 pipeline 中，将 CodeBuild 项目的 output artifact 传递给 AWS CodeDeploy action。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline that uses the CodeCommit repository as a source provider. Create separate pipeline stages that run a CodeBuild project to build and then test the application. In the pipeline, pass the CodeBuild project output artifact to an AWS CodeDeploy action.

contents.en: Create a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline that uses the CodeCommit repository as a source provider. Create separate pipeline stages that run a CodeBuild project to build and then test the application. In the pipeline, pass the CodeBuild project output artifact to an AWS CodeDeploy action.
contents.zh: 在 AWS CodePipeline 中创建一个 pipeline，使用 CodeCommit 存储库作为 source provider。创建独立的 pipeline stages，运行 CodeBuild 项目先构建再测试应用程序。在 pipeline 中，将 CodeBuild 项目的 output artifact 传递给 AWS CodeDeploy action。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS CodeDeploy application and a deployment group to deploy the packaged code to the EC2 instances. Configure the ALB for the deployment group.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodeDeploy application and a deployment group to deploy the packaged code to the EC2 instances. Configure the ALB for the deployment group.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CodeDeploy application 和 deployment group，以将打包代码部署到 EC2 实例。为 deployment group 配置 ALB。

options.label: D
options.content: Create individual Lambda functions that use AWS CodeDeploy instead of Systems Manager to run build, test, and deploy actions.

contents.en: Create individual Lambda functions that use AWS CodeDeploy instead of Systems Manager to run build, test, and deploy actions.
contents.zh: 创建单独的 Lambda 函数，使用 AWS CodeDeploy 而不是 Systems Manager 来运行构建、测试和部署操作。

options.label: E
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket. Modify the CodeBuild project to store the packages in the S3 bucket instead of in CodeArtifact. Use deploy actions in CodeDeploy to deploy the artifact to the EC2 instances.

contents.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket. Modify the CodeBuild project to store the packages in the S3 bucket instead of in CodeArtifact. Use deploy actions in CodeDeploy to deploy the artifact to the EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon S3 bucket。修改 CodeBuild 项目，将包存储在 S3 bucket 中，而不是 CodeArtifact 中。使用 CodeDeploy 中的 deploy actions 将 artifact 部署到 EC2 实例。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B、C。B 使用 CodePipeline 从 CodeCommit 获取代码，并通过 CodeBuild 构建和测试后把构件交给 CodeDeploy；C 创建 CodeDeploy 应用和部署组，并把 ALB 配置到部署组中，以便将打包代码部署到 EC2 实例。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B、C。B 使用 CodePipeline 从 CodeCommit 获取代码，并通过 CodeBuild 构建和测试后把构件交给 CodeDeploy；C 创建 CodeDeploy 应用和部署组，并把 ALB 配置到部署组中，以便将打包代码部署到 EC2 实例。
explanations.en: Correct answers: B and C. B builds the pipeline from CodeCommit through CodeBuild build and test stages and passes the output to CodeDeploy. C supplies the CodeDeploy application and deployment group, including ALB configuration, to deploy the package to the EC2 instances.

contents.en: A company deploys a web application on Amazon EC2 instances that are behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The company stores the application code in an AWS CodeCommit repository. When code is merged to the main branch, an AWS Lambda function invokes an AWS CodeBuild project. The CodeBuild project packages the code, stores the packaged code in AWS CodeArtifact, and invokes AWS Systems Manager Run Command to deploy the packaged code to the EC2 instances. Previous deployments have resulted in defects, EC2 instances that are not running the latest version of the packaged code, and inconsistencies between instances. Which combination of actions should a DevOps engineer take to implement a more reliable deployment solution? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司在 Application Load Balancer (ALB) 后面的 Amazon EC2 实例上部署 Web 应用程序。公司将应用程序代码存储在 AWS CodeCommit 存储库中。当代码合并到 main 分支时，一个 AWS Lambda 函数会调用 AWS CodeBuild 项目。CodeBuild 项目打包代码，将打包后的代码存储在 AWS CodeArtifact 中，并调用 AWS Systems Manager Run Command 将打包代码部署到 EC2 实例。以往部署导致了缺陷、EC2 实例未运行最新版本的打包代码，以及实例之间不一致。DevOps 工程师应采取哪一组操作组合来实施更可靠的部署解决方案？（选择两个。）

questions.content: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations to manage its AWS accounts. The company's automation account contains a CI/CD pipeline that creates and configures new AWS accounts. The company has a group of internal service teams that provide services to accounts in the organization. The service teams operate out of a set of services accounts. The service teams want to receive an AWS CloudTrail event in their services accounts when the CreateAccount API call creates a new account. How should the company share this CloudTrail event with the service accounts?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule in the automation account to send account creation events to the default event bus in the services accounts. Update the default event bus in the services accounts to allow events from the automation account.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule in the automation account to send account creation events to the default event bus in the services accounts. Update the default event bus in the services accounts to allow events from the automation account.
contents.zh: 在 automation account 中创建一个 Amazon EventBridge rule，将账户创建事件发送到 services accounts 中的 default event bus。更新 services accounts 中的 default event bus，以允许来自 automation account 的事件。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a custom Amazon EventBridge event bus in the services accounts. Update the custom event bus to allow events from the automation account. Create an EventBridge rule in the services account that directly listens to CloudTrail events from the automation account.

contents.en: Create a custom Amazon EventBridge event bus in the services accounts. Update the custom event bus to allow events from the automation account. Create an EventBridge rule in the services account that directly listens to CloudTrail events from the automation account.
contents.zh: 在 services accounts 中创建一个 custom Amazon EventBridge event bus。更新 custom event bus，以允许来自 automation account 的事件。在 services account 中创建一个 EventBridge rule，直接监听来自 automation account 的 CloudTrail events。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a custom Amazon EventBridge event bus in the automation account and the services accounts. Create an EventBridge rule and policy that connects the custom event buses that are in the automation account and the services accounts.

contents.en: Create a custom Amazon EventBridge event bus in the automation account and the services accounts. Create an EventBridge rule and policy that connects the custom event buses that are in the automation account and the services accounts.
contents.zh: 在 automation account 和 services accounts 中创建 custom Amazon EventBridge event bus。创建 EventBridge rule 和 policy，用于连接 automation account 和 services accounts 中的 custom event buses。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a custom Amazon EventBridge event bus in the automation account. Create an EventBridge rule and policy that connects the custom event bus to the default event buses in the services accounts.

contents.en: Create a custom Amazon EventBridge event bus in the automation account. Create an EventBridge rule and policy that connects the custom event bus to the default event buses in the services accounts.
contents.zh: 在 automation account 中创建一个 custom Amazon EventBridge event bus。创建 EventBridge rule 和 policy，用于将 custom event bus 连接到 services accounts 中的 default event buses。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A。应在自动化账号中创建 EventBridge 规则，将账号创建事件发送到服务账号的默认事件总线，并在服务账号中允许来自自动化账号的事件；讨论也强调规则应由自动化账号推送事件，而不是让服务账号直接监听自动化账号的 CloudTrail 事件。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A。应在自动化账号中创建 EventBridge 规则，将账号创建事件发送到服务账号的默认事件总线，并在服务账号中允许来自自动化账号的事件；讨论也强调规则应由自动化账号推送事件，而不是让服务账号直接监听自动化账号的 CloudTrail 事件。
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. The EventBridge rule belongs in the automation account to forward account creation events to the services accounts' default event buses, and those buses must allow events from the automation account. The discussion notes that the services accounts should not directly listen for CloudTrail events from the automation account.

contents.en: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations to manage its AWS accounts. The company's automation account contains a CI/CD pipeline that creates and configures new AWS accounts. The company has a group of internal service teams that provide services to accounts in the organization. The service teams operate out of a set of services accounts. The service teams want to receive an AWS CloudTrail event in their services accounts when the CreateAccount API call creates a new account. How should the company share this CloudTrail event with the service accounts?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations 中的一个组织来管理其 AWS 账户。公司的 automation account 包含一个 CI/CD pipeline，用于创建和配置新的 AWS 账户。公司有一组内部服务团队，这些团队向组织中的账户提供服务。服务团队在一组 services accounts 中运行。服务团队希望在 CreateAccount API call 创建新账户时，在其 services accounts 中接收 AWS CloudTrail event。公司应如何与 services accounts 共享此 CloudTrail event？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is building a solution that uses Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queues. The solution also includes an AWS Lambda function and an Amazon DynamoDB table. The Lambda function pulls content from an SQS queue event source and writes the content to the DynamoDB table. The solution must maximize the scalability of Lambda and must prevent successfully processed SQS messages from being processed multiple times. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Decrease the batch window to 1 second when configuring the Lambda function's event source mapping.

contents.en: Decrease the batch window to 1 second when configuring the Lambda function's event source mapping.
contents.zh: 配置 Lambda 函数的 event source mapping 时，将 batch window 降低到 1 秒。

options.label: B
options.content: Decrease the batch size to 1 when configuring the Lambda function's event source mapping.

contents.en: Decrease the batch size to 1 when configuring the Lambda function's event source mapping.
contents.zh: 配置 Lambda 函数的 event source mapping 时，将 batch size 降低到 1。

options.label: C
options.content: Include the ReportBatchItemFailures value in the FunctionResponseTypes list in the Lambda function's event source mapping.

contents.en: Include the ReportBatchItemFailures value in the FunctionResponseTypes list in the Lambda function's event source mapping.
contents.zh: 在 Lambda 函数的 event source mapping 的 FunctionResponseTypes 列表中包含 ReportBatchItemFailures 值。

options.label: D
options.content: Set the queue visibility timeout on the Lambda function's event source mapping to account for invocation throttling of the Lambda function.

contents.en: Set the queue visibility timeout on the Lambda function's event source mapping to account for invocation throttling of the Lambda function.
contents.zh: 在 Lambda 函数的 event source mapping 上设置 queue visibility timeout，以考虑 Lambda 函数的 invocation throttling。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C。对于 SQS 触发的 Lambda 批处理失败，应在事件源映射的 FunctionResponseTypes 中加入 ReportBatchItemFailures，让函数可以报告单个失败消息，而不是让整个批次都重试。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C。对于 SQS 触发的 Lambda 批处理失败，应在事件源映射的 FunctionResponseTypes 中加入 ReportBatchItemFailures，让函数可以报告单个失败消息，而不是让整个批次都重试。
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. For Lambda processing SQS batches, adding ReportBatchItemFailures to FunctionResponseTypes in the event source mapping lets the function report only failed records, avoiding a retry of the entire batch.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer is building a solution that uses Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queues. The solution also includes an AWS Lambda function and an Amazon DynamoDB table. The Lambda function pulls content from an SQS queue event source and writes the content to the DynamoDB table. The solution must maximize the scalability of Lambda and must prevent successfully processed SQS messages from being processed multiple times. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师正在构建一个使用 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queues 的解决方案。该解决方案还包括一个 AWS Lambda 函数和一个 Amazon DynamoDB 表。Lambda 函数从 SQS queue event source 拉取内容，并将内容写入 DynamoDB 表。该解决方案必须最大化 Lambda 的可扩展性，并且必须防止已成功处理的 SQS 消息被多次处理。哪种解决方案将满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has a new AWS account that teams will use to deploy various applications. The teams will create many Amazon S3 buckets for application-specific purposes and to store AWS CloudTrail logs. The company has enabled Amazon Macie for the account. A DevOps engineer needs to optimize the Macie costs for the account without compromising the account's functionality. Which solutions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Exclude S3 buckets that contain CloudTrail logs from automated discovery.

contents.en: Exclude S3 buckets that contain CloudTrail logs from automated discovery.
contents.zh: 从 automated discovery 中排除包含 CloudTrail 日志的 S3 buckets。

options.label: B
options.content: Exclude S3 buckets that have public read access from automated discovery.

contents.en: Exclude S3 buckets that have public read access from automated discovery.
contents.zh: 从 automated discovery 中排除具有 public read access 的 S3 buckets。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure scheduled daily discovery jobs for all S3 buckets in the account.

contents.en: Configure scheduled daily discovery jobs for all S3 buckets in the account.
contents.zh: 为账户中的所有 S3 buckets 配置每天计划运行的 discovery jobs。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure discovery jobs to include S3 objects based on the last modified criterion.

contents.en: Configure discovery jobs to include S3 objects based on the last modified criterion.
contents.zh: 配置 discovery jobs，根据 last modified criterion 包含 S3 objects。

options.label: E
options.content: Configure discovery jobs to include S3 objects that are tagged as production only.

contents.en: Configure discovery jobs to include S3 objects that are tagged as production only.
contents.zh: 配置 discovery jobs，仅包含标记为 production 的 S3 objects。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A、D。讨论强调应让敏感数据发现作业尽量有针对性：A 排除包含 CloudTrail 日志的 S3 存储桶，D 使用最后修改时间等对象条件限定扫描范围，从而减少无关发现作业。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A、D。讨论强调应让敏感数据发现作业尽量有针对性：A 排除包含 CloudTrail 日志的 S3 存储桶，D 使用最后修改时间等对象条件限定扫描范围，从而减少无关发现作业。
explanations.en: Correct answers: A and D. The discussion says sensitive data discovery jobs should be targeted. A excludes S3 buckets that hold CloudTrail logs, and D uses object criteria such as last modified time to limit which S3 objects are included.

contents.en: A company has a new AWS account that teams will use to deploy various applications. The teams will create many Amazon S3 buckets for application-specific purposes and to store AWS CloudTrail logs. The company has enabled Amazon Macie for the account. A DevOps engineer needs to optimize the Macie costs for the account without compromising the account's functionality. Which solutions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个新的 AWS 账户，团队将使用该账户部署各种应用程序。团队将为特定应用程序用途以及存储 AWS CloudTrail 日志创建许多 Amazon S3 buckets。公司已为该账户启用 Amazon Macie。DevOps 工程师需要在不影响账户功能的情况下优化该账户的 Macie 成本。哪些解决方案将满足这些要求？（选择两个。）

questions.content: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations to manage its AWS accounts. The company recently acquired another company that has standalone AWS accounts. The acquiring company's DevOps team needs to consolidate the administration of the AWS accounts for both companies and retain full administrative control of the accounts. The DevOps team also needs to collect and group findings across all the accounts to implement and maintain a security posture. Which combination of steps should the DevOps team take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Invite the acquired company's AWS accounts to join the organization. Create an SCP that has full administrative privileges. Attach the SCP to the management account.

contents.en: Invite the acquired company's AWS accounts to join the organization. Create an SCP that has full administrative privileges. Attach the SCP to the management account.
contents.zh: 邀请被收购公司的 AWS 账户加入该组织。创建一个具有完全管理权限的 SCP。将该 SCP 附加到管理账户。

options.label: B
options.content: Invite the acquired company's AWS accounts to join the organization. Create the OrganizationAccountAccessRole IAM role in the invited accounts. Grant permission to the management account to assume the role.

contents.en: Invite the acquired company's AWS accounts to join the organization. Create the OrganizationAccountAccessRole IAM role in the invited accounts. Grant permission to the management account to assume the role.
contents.zh: 邀请被收购公司的 AWS 账户加入该组织。在被邀请的账户中创建 OrganizationAccountAccessRole IAM role。授予管理账户代入该角色的权限。

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS Security Hub to collect and group findings across all accounts. Use Security Hub to automatically detect new accounts as the accounts are added to the organization.

contents.en: Use AWS Security Hub to collect and group findings across all accounts. Use Security Hub to automatically detect new accounts as the accounts are added to the organization.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Security Hub 跨所有账户收集并分组 findings。使用 Security Hub 在账户被添加到组织时自动检测新账户。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS Firewall Manager to collect and group findings across all accounts. Enable all features for the organization. Designate an account in the organization as the delegated administrator account for Firewall Manager.

contents.en: Use AWS Firewall Manager to collect and group findings across all accounts. Enable all features for the organization. Designate an account in the organization as the delegated administrator account for Firewall Manager.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Firewall Manager 跨所有账户收集并分组 findings。为组织启用所有功能。将组织中的一个账户指定为 Firewall Manager 的 delegated administrator account。

options.label: E
options.content: Use Amazon Inspector to collect and group findings across all accounts. Designate an account in the organization as the delegated administrator account for Amazon Inspector.

contents.en: Use Amazon Inspector to collect and group findings across all accounts. Designate an account in the organization as the delegated administrator account for Amazon Inspector.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon Inspector 跨所有账户收集并分组 findings。将组织中的一个账户指定为 Amazon Inspector 的 delegated administrator account。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B、C。B 将被收购公司的账号邀请加入现有 AWS Organizations，并创建 OrganizationAccountAccessRole 以便管理账号保留管理控制；C 使用 Security Hub 跨账号收集和汇总发现结果，并在新账号加入组织时自动纳入。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B、C。B 将被收购公司的账号邀请加入现有 AWS Organizations，并创建 OrganizationAccountAccessRole 以便管理账号保留管理控制；C 使用 Security Hub 跨账号收集和汇总发现结果，并在新账号加入组织时自动纳入。
explanations.en: Correct answers: B and C. B consolidates administration by inviting the acquired company's accounts into the existing organization and enabling management account access. C uses Security Hub to collect and group findings across accounts and detect new organization accounts automatically.

contents.en: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations to manage its AWS accounts. The company recently acquired another company that has standalone AWS accounts. The acquiring company's DevOps team needs to consolidate the administration of the AWS accounts for both companies and retain full administrative control of the accounts. The DevOps team also needs to collect and group findings across all the accounts to implement and maintain a security posture. Which combination of steps should the DevOps team take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations 中的一个组织来管理其 AWS 账户。该公司最近收购了另一家公司，后者拥有独立的 AWS 账户。收购方公司的 DevOps 团队需要整合两家公司 AWS 账户的管理，并保留对这些账户的完全管理控制。DevOps 团队还需要跨所有账户收集并分组 findings，以实施和维护安全态势。DevOps 团队应采取哪一组步骤组合来满足这些要求？（选择两个。）

questions.content: A company has an application and a CI/CD pipeline. The CI/CD pipeline consists of an AWS CodePipeline pipeline and an AWS CodeBuild project. The CodeBuild project runs tests against the application as part of the build process and outputs a test report. The company must keep the test reports for 90 days. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Add a new stage in the CodePipeline pipeline after the stage that contains the CodeBuild project. Create an Amazon S3 bucket to store the reports. Configure an S3 deploy action type in the new CodePipeline stage with the appropriate path and format for the reports.

contents.en: Add a new stage in the CodePipeline pipeline after the stage that contains the CodeBuild project. Create an Amazon S3 bucket to store the reports. Configure an S3 deploy action type in the new CodePipeline stage with the appropriate path and format for the reports.
contents.zh: 在 CodePipeline pipeline 中包含 CodeBuild 项目的阶段之后添加一个新阶段。创建一个 Amazon S3 bucket 用于存储报告。在新的 CodePipeline 阶段中配置 S3 deploy action type，并为报告指定适当的路径和格式。

options.label: B
options.content: Add a report group in the CodeBuild project buildspec file with the appropriate path and format for the reports. Create an Amazon S3 bucket to store the reports. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that invokes an AWS Lambda function to copy the reports to the S3 bucket when a build is completed. Create an S3 Lifecycle rule to expire the objects after 90 days.

contents.en: Add a report group in the CodeBuild project buildspec file with the appropriate path and format for the reports. Create an Amazon S3 bucket to store the reports. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that invokes an AWS Lambda function to copy the reports to the S3 bucket when a build is completed. Create an S3 Lifecycle rule to expire the objects after 90 days.
contents.zh: 在 CodeBuild 项目的 buildspec 文件中添加一个 report group，并为报告指定适当的路径和格式。创建一个 Amazon S3 bucket 用于存储报告。配置一个 Amazon EventBridge rule，在构建完成时调用 AWS Lambda 函数将报告复制到 S3 bucket。创建一个 S3 Lifecycle rule，使对象在 90 天后过期。

options.label: C
options.content: Add a new stage in the CodePipeline pipeline. Configure a test action type with the appropriate path and format for the reports. Configure the report expiration time to be 90 days in the CodeBuild project buildspec file.

contents.en: Add a new stage in the CodePipeline pipeline. Configure a test action type with the appropriate path and format for the reports. Configure the report expiration time to be 90 days in the CodeBuild project buildspec file.
contents.zh: 在 CodePipeline pipeline 中添加一个新阶段。配置 test action type，并为报告指定适当的路径和格式。在 CodeBuild 项目的 buildspec 文件中将报告过期时间配置为 90 天。

options.label: D
options.content: Add a report group in the CodeBuild project buildspec file with the appropriate path and format for the reports. Create an Amazon S3 bucket to store the reports. Configure the report group as an artifact in the CodeBuild project buildspec file. Configure the S3 bucket as the artifact destination. Set the object expiration to 90 days.

contents.en: Add a report group in the CodeBuild project buildspec file with the appropriate path and format for the reports. Create an Amazon S3 bucket to store the reports. Configure the report group as an artifact in the CodeBuild project buildspec file. Configure the S3 bucket as the artifact destination. Set the object expiration to 90 days.
contents.zh: 在 CodeBuild 项目的 buildspec 文件中添加一个 report group，并为报告指定适当的路径和格式。创建一个 Amazon S3 bucket 用于存储报告。将 report group 配置为 CodeBuild 项目 buildspec 文件中的 artifact。将 S3 bucket 配置为 artifact destination。将 object expiration 设置为 90 天。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B。需要让 CodeBuild 生成测试报告并保留 90 天；B 在 buildspec 中添加 report group，构建完成后通过 EventBridge 和 Lambda 将报告复制到 S3，并用 S3 生命周期规则在 90 天后过期对象。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B。需要让 CodeBuild 生成测试报告并保留 90 天；B 在 buildspec 中添加 report group，构建完成后通过 EventBridge 和 Lambda 将报告复制到 S3，并用 S3 生命周期规则在 90 天后过期对象。
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. The reports need to be produced by CodeBuild and retained for 90 days. B adds a report group in the buildspec, copies completed reports to S3 with EventBridge and Lambda, and uses an S3 Lifecycle rule to expire them after 90 days.

contents.en: A company has an application and a CI/CD pipeline. The CI/CD pipeline consists of an AWS CodePipeline pipeline and an AWS CodeBuild project. The CodeBuild project runs tests against the application as part of the build process and outputs a test report. The company must keep the test reports for 90 days. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个应用程序和一个 CI/CD pipeline。该 CI/CD pipeline 由一个 AWS CodePipeline pipeline 和一个 AWS CodeBuild 项目组成。CodeBuild 项目在构建过程中运行针对该应用程序的测试，并输出测试报告。公司必须将测试报告保留 90 天。哪种解决方案将满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses an Amazon API Gateway regional REST API to host its application API. The REST API has a custom domain. The REST API's default endpoint is deactivated. The company's internal teams consume the API. The company wants to use mutual TLS between the API and the internal teams as an additional layer of authentication. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) to create a private certificate authority (CA). Provision a client certificate that is signed by the private CA.

contents.en: Use AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) to create a private certificate authority (CA). Provision a client certificate that is signed by the private CA.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 创建一个 private certificate authority (CA)。预置一个由 private CA 签名的 client certificate。

options.label: B
options.content: Provision a client certificate that is signed by a public certificate authority (CA). Import the certificate into AWS Certificate Manager (ACM).

contents.en: Provision a client certificate that is signed by a public certificate authority (CA). Import the certificate into AWS Certificate Manager (ACM).
contents.zh: 预置一个由 public certificate authority (CA) 签名的 client certificate。将该证书导入 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM)。

options.label: C
options.content: Upload the provisioned client certificate to an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure the API Gateway mutual TLS to use the client certificate that is stored in the S3 bucket as the trust store.

contents.en: Upload the provisioned client certificate to an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure the API Gateway mutual TLS to use the client certificate that is stored in the S3 bucket as the trust store.
contents.zh: 将预置的 client certificate 上传到 Amazon S3 bucket。配置 API Gateway mutual TLS，使用存储在 S3 bucket 中的 client certificate 作为 trust store。

options.label: D
options.content: Upload the provisioned client certificate private key to an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure the API Gateway mutual TLS to use the private key that is stored in the S3 bucket as the trust store.

contents.en: Upload the provisioned client certificate private key to an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure the API Gateway mutual TLS to use the private key that is stored in the S3 bucket as the trust store.
contents.zh: 将预置的 client certificate private key 上传到 Amazon S3 bucket。配置 API Gateway mutual TLS，使用存储在 S3 bucket 中的 private key 作为 trust store。

options.label: E
options.content: Upload the root private certificate authority (CA) certificate to an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure the API Gateway mutual TLS to use the private CA certificate that is stored in the S3 bucket as the trust store.

contents.en: Upload the root private certificate authority (CA) certificate to an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure the API Gateway mutual TLS to use the private CA certificate that is stored in the S3 bucket as the trust store.
contents.zh: 将 root private certificate authority (CA) certificate 上传到 Amazon S3 bucket。配置 API Gateway mutual TLS，使用存储在 S3 bucket 中的 private CA certificate 作为 trust store。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A、E。因为证书仅供内部团队使用，A 使用 ACM 私有 CA 创建并签发客户端证书；E 将根私有 CA 证书作为 API Gateway mutual TLS 的信任存储放在 S3 中，使 API Gateway 信任该 CA 签发的客户端证书。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A、E。因为证书仅供内部团队使用，A 使用 ACM 私有 CA 创建并签发客户端证书；E 将根私有 CA 证书作为 API Gateway mutual TLS 的信任存储放在 S3 中，使 API Gateway 信任该 CA 签发的客户端证书。
explanations.en: Correct answers: A and E. Because the clients are internal, A creates a private CA in ACM and provisions a client certificate signed by it. E places the root private CA certificate in S3 as the API Gateway mutual TLS trust store so API Gateway trusts certificates from that CA.

contents.en: A company uses an Amazon API Gateway regional REST API to host its application API. The REST API has a custom domain. The REST API's default endpoint is deactivated. The company's internal teams consume the API. The company wants to use mutual TLS between the API and the internal teams as an additional layer of authentication. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon API Gateway regional REST API 托管其应用程序 API。该 REST API 有一个自定义域。该 REST API 的默认 endpoint 已停用。公司的内部团队使用该 API。公司希望在 API 与内部团队之间使用 mutual TLS，作为额外的身份验证层。哪一组步骤组合将满足这些要求？（选择两个。）

questions.content: A company uses AWS Directory Service for Microsoft Active Directory as its identity provider (IdP). The company requires all infrastructure to be defined and deployed by AWS CloudFormation. A DevOps engineer needs to create a fleet of Windows-based Amazon EC2 instances to host an application. The DevOps engineer has created a CloudFormation template that contains an EC2 launch template, IAM role, EC2 security group, and EC2 Auto Scaling group. The DevOps engineer must implement a solution that joins all EC2 instances to the domain of the AWS Managed Microsoft AD directory. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: In the CloudFormation template, create an AWS::SSM::Document resource that joins the EC2 instance to the AWS Managed Microsoft AD domain by using the parameters for the existing directory. Update the launch template to include the SSMAssociation property to use the new SSM document. Attach the AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore and AmazonSSMDirectoryServiceAccess AWS managed policies to the IAM role that the EC2 instances use.

contents.en: In the CloudFormation template, create an AWS::SSM::Document resource that joins the EC2 instance to the AWS Managed Microsoft AD domain by using the parameters for the existing directory. Update the launch template to include the SSMAssociation property to use the new SSM document. Attach the AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore and AmazonSSMDirectoryServiceAccess AWS managed policies to the IAM role that the EC2 instances use.
contents.zh: 在 CloudFormation 模板中，创建一个 AWS::SSM::Document 资源，使用现有目录的参数将 EC2 实例加入 AWS Managed Microsoft AD 域。更新 launch template，以包含 SSMAssociation property 来使用新的 SSM document。将 AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore 和 AmazonSSMDirectoryServiceAccess AWS managed policies 附加到 EC2 实例使用的 IAM role。

options.label: B
options.content: In the CloudFormation template, update the launch template to include specific tags that propagate on launch. Create an AWS::SSM::Association resource to associate the AWS-JoinDirectoryServiceDomain Automation runbook with the EC2 instances that have the specified tags. Define the required parameters to join the AWS Managed Microsoft AD directory. Attach the AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore and AmazonSSMDirectoryServiceAccess AWS managed policies to the IAM role that the EC2 instances use.

contents.en: In the CloudFormation template, update the launch template to include specific tags that propagate on launch. Create an AWS::SSM::Association resource to associate the AWS-JoinDirectoryServiceDomain Automation runbook with the EC2 instances that have the specified tags. Define the required parameters to join the AWS Managed Microsoft AD directory. Attach the AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore and AmazonSSMDirectoryServiceAccess AWS managed policies to the IAM role that the EC2 instances use.
contents.zh: 在 CloudFormation 模板中，更新 launch template 以包含在启动时传播的特定 tags。创建一个 AWS::SSM::Association 资源，将 AWS-JoinDirectoryServiceDomain Automation runbook 与具有指定 tags 的 EC2 实例关联。定义加入 AWS Managed Microsoft AD 目录所需的参数。将 AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore 和 AmazonSSMDirectoryServiceAccess AWS managed policies 附加到 EC2 实例使用的 IAM role。

options.label: C
options.content: Store the existing AWS Managed Microsoft AD domain connection details in AWS Secrets Manager. In the CloudFormation template, create an AWS::SSM::Association resource to associate the AWS-CreateManagedWindowsInstanceWithApproval Automation runbook with the EC2 Auto Scaling group. Pass the ARNs for the parameters from Secrets Manager to join the domain. Attach the AmazonSSMDirectoryServiceAccess and SecretsManagerReadWrite AWS managed policies to the IAM role that the EC2 instances use.

contents.en: Store the existing AWS Managed Microsoft AD domain connection details in AWS Secrets Manager. In the CloudFormation template, create an AWS::SSM::Association resource to associate the AWS-CreateManagedWindowsInstanceWithApproval Automation runbook with the EC2 Auto Scaling group. Pass the ARNs for the parameters from Secrets Manager to join the domain. Attach the AmazonSSMDirectoryServiceAccess and SecretsManagerReadWrite AWS managed policies to the IAM role that the EC2 instances use.
contents.zh: 将现有 AWS Managed Microsoft AD 域连接详细信息存储在 AWS Secrets Manager 中。在 CloudFormation 模板中，创建一个 AWS::SSM::Association 资源，将 AWS-CreateManagedWindowsInstanceWithApproval Automation runbook 与 EC2 Auto Scaling group 关联。传递来自 Secrets Manager 的参数 ARNs 以加入域。将 AmazonSSMDirectoryServiceAccess 和 SecretsManagerReadWrite AWS managed policies 附加到 EC2 实例使用的 IAM role。

options.label: D
options.content: Store the existing AWS Managed Microsoft AD domain administrator credentials in AWS Secrets Manager. In the CloudFormation template, update the EC2 launch template to include user data. Configure the user data to pull the administrator credentials from Secrets Manager and to join the AWS Managed Microsoft AD domain. Attach the AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore and SecretsManagerReadWrite AWS managed policies to the IAM role that the EC2 instances use.

contents.en: Store the existing AWS Managed Microsoft AD domain administrator credentials in AWS Secrets Manager. In the CloudFormation template, update the EC2 launch template to include user data. Configure the user data to pull the administrator credentials from Secrets Manager and to join the AWS Managed Microsoft AD domain. Attach the AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore and SecretsManagerReadWrite AWS managed policies to the IAM role that the EC2 instances use.
contents.zh: 将现有 AWS Managed Microsoft AD 域管理员凭证存储在 AWS Secrets Manager 中。在 CloudFormation 模板中，更新 EC2 launch template 以包含 user data。配置 user data 从 Secrets Manager 拉取管理员凭证并加入 AWS Managed Microsoft AD 域。将 AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore 和 SecretsManagerReadWrite AWS managed policies 附加到 EC2 实例使用的 IAM role。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B。B 在 CloudFormation 中为启动模板添加启动时传播的标签，再用 AWS::SSM::Association 将 AWS-JoinDirectoryServiceDomain 自动化运行手册关联到带这些标签的实例，并为实例角色附加 SSM 与 Directory Service 所需的托管策略。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B。B 在 CloudFormation 中为启动模板添加启动时传播的标签，再用 AWS::SSM::Association 将 AWS-JoinDirectoryServiceDomain 自动化运行手册关联到带这些标签的实例，并为实例角色附加 SSM 与 Directory Service 所需的托管策略。
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. B tags instances from the launch template, associates the AWS-JoinDirectoryServiceDomain Automation runbook through AWS::SSM::Association for instances with those tags, and attaches the required SSM and Directory Service managed policies to the EC2 role.

contents.en: A company uses AWS Directory Service for Microsoft Active Directory as its identity provider (IdP). The company requires all infrastructure to be defined and deployed by AWS CloudFormation. A DevOps engineer needs to create a fleet of Windows-based Amazon EC2 instances to host an application. The DevOps engineer has created a CloudFormation template that contains an EC2 launch template, IAM role, EC2 security group, and EC2 Auto Scaling group. The DevOps engineer must implement a solution that joins all EC2 instances to the domain of the AWS Managed Microsoft AD directory. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Directory Service for Microsoft Active Directory 作为其身份提供者 (IdP)。公司要求所有基础设施都由 AWS CloudFormation 定义和部署。DevOps 工程师需要创建一组基于 Windows 的 Amazon EC2 实例来托管应用程序。DevOps 工程师已创建一个 CloudFormation 模板，其中包含 EC2 launch template、IAM role、EC2 security group 和 EC2 Auto Scaling group。DevOps 工程师必须实施一种解决方案，使所有 EC2 实例加入 AWS Managed Microsoft AD 目录的域。哪种解决方案能以最高的运营效率满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses AWS Organizations to manage its AWS accounts. The company has a root OU that has a child OU. The root OU has an SCP that allows all actions on all resources. The child OU has an SCP that allows all actions for Amazon DynamoDB and AWS Lambda, and denies all other actions. The company has an AWS account that is named vendor-data in the child OU. A DevOps engineer has an IAM user that is attached to the Administrator Access IAM policy in the vendor-data account. The DevOps engineer attempts to launch an Amazon EC2 instance in the vendor-data account but receives an access denied error. Which change should the DevOps engineer make to launch the EC2 instance in the vendor-data account?

options.label: A
options.content: Attach the AmazonEC2FullAccess IAM policy to the IAM user.

contents.en: Attach the AmazonEC2FullAccess IAM policy to the IAM user.
contents.zh: 将 AmazonEC2FullAccess IAM policy 附加到该 IAM 用户。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new SCP that allows all actions for Amazon EC2. Attach the SCP to the vendor-data account.

contents.en: Create a new SCP that allows all actions for Amazon EC2. Attach the SCP to the vendor-data account.
contents.zh: 创建一个新的 SCP，允许对 Amazon EC2 执行所有操作。将该 SCP 附加到 vendor-data 账户。

options.label: C
options.content: Update the SCP in the child OU to allow all actions for Amazon EC2.

contents.en: Update the SCP in the child OU to allow all actions for Amazon EC2.
contents.zh: 更新 child OU 中的 SCP，以允许对 Amazon EC2 执行所有操作。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a new SCP that allows all actions for Amazon EC2. Attach the SCP to the root OU.

contents.en: Create a new SCP that allows all actions for Amazon EC2. Attach the SCP to the root OU.
contents.zh: 创建一个新的 SCP，允许对 Amazon EC2 执行所有操作。将该 SCP 附加到 root OU。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C。源答案要求更新子 OU 的 SCP 以允许 Amazon EC2 的所有操作；讨论也承认 C 可行，但指出它会影响该子 OU 下其他账号，因此关键点是 SCP 附加在 OU 层级会控制该 OU 内账号的 EC2 权限。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C。源答案要求更新子 OU 的 SCP 以允许 Amazon EC2 的所有操作；讨论也承认 C 可行，但指出它会影响该子 OU 下其他账号，因此关键点是 SCP 附加在 OU 层级会控制该 OU 内账号的 EC2 权限。
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. The source answer updates the SCP on the child OU to allow all EC2 actions. The discussion notes that this is possible, while also observing that an OU-level SCP affects the other accounts under that child OU.

contents.en: A company uses AWS Organizations to manage its AWS accounts. The company has a root OU that has a child OU. The root OU has an SCP that allows all actions on all resources. The child OU has an SCP that allows all actions for Amazon DynamoDB and AWS Lambda, and denies all other actions. The company has an AWS account that is named vendor-data in the child OU. A DevOps engineer has an IAM user that is attached to the Administrator Access IAM policy in the vendor-data account. The DevOps engineer attempts to launch an Amazon EC2 instance in the vendor-data account but receives an access denied error. Which change should the DevOps engineer make to launch the EC2 instance in the vendor-data account?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations 管理其 AWS 账户。公司有一个 root OU，该 root OU 有一个 child OU。root OU 有一个 SCP，允许对所有资源执行所有操作。child OU 有一个 SCP，允许对 Amazon DynamoDB 和 AWS Lambda 执行所有操作，并拒绝所有其他操作。公司有一个名为 vendor-data 的 AWS 账户位于 child OU 中。DevOps 工程师在 vendor-data 账户中有一个 IAM 用户，该用户附加了 Administrator Access IAM policy。DevOps 工程师尝试在 vendor-data 账户中启动 Amazon EC2 实例，但收到 access denied 错误。DevOps 工程师应做出什么更改才能在 vendor-data 账户中启动 EC2 实例？

questions.content: A company's security policies require the use of security hardened AMIs in production environments. A DevOps engineer has used EC2 Image Builder to create a pipeline that builds the AMIs on a recurring schedule. The DevOps engineer needs to update the launch templates of the company's Auto Scaling groups. The Auto Scaling groups must use the newest AMIs during the launch of Amazon EC2 instances. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to receive new AMI events from Image Builder. Target an AWS Systems Manager Run Command document that updates the launch templates of the Auto Scaling groups with the newest AMI ID.

contents.en: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to receive new AMI events from Image Builder. Target an AWS Systems Manager Run Command document that updates the launch templates of the Auto Scaling groups with the newest AMI ID.
contents.zh: 配置 Amazon EventBridge rule 以接收来自 Image Builder 的新 AMI 事件。将 AWS Systems Manager Run Command document 作为目标，用于使用最新的 AMI ID 更新 Auto Scaling groups 的 launch templates。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to receive new AMI events from Image Builder. Target an AWS Lambda function that updates the launch templates of the Auto Scaling groups with the newest AMI ID.

contents.en: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to receive new AMI events from Image Builder. Target an AWS Lambda function that updates the launch templates of the Auto Scaling groups with the newest AMI ID.
contents.zh: 配置 Amazon EventBridge rule 以接收来自 Image Builder 的新 AMI 事件。将 AWS Lambda 函数作为目标，用于使用最新的 AMI ID 更新 Auto Scaling groups 的 launch templates。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the launch template to use a value from AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store for the AMI ID. Configure the Image Builder pipeline to update the Parameter Store value with the newest AMI ID.

contents.en: Configure the launch template to use a value from AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store for the AMI ID. Configure the Image Builder pipeline to update the Parameter Store value with the newest AMI ID.
contents.zh: 配置 launch template 使用 AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store 中的值作为 AMI ID。配置 Image Builder pipeline 以使用最新的 AMI ID 更新 Parameter Store 值。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure the Image Builder distribution settings to update the launch templates with the newest AMI IConfigure the Auto Scaling groups to use the newest version of the launch template.

contents.en: Configure the Image Builder distribution settings to update the launch templates with the newest AMI IConfigure the Auto Scaling groups to use the newest version of the launch template.
contents.zh: 配置 Image Builder distribution settings，以使用最新的 AMI IConfigure 更新 launch templates。配置 Auto Scaling groups 使用 launch template 的最新版本。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：D。讨论指出 EC2 Image Builder 内置支持在分发设置中更新启动模板；因此应让分发设置写入最新 AMI，并让 Auto Scaling 组使用启动模板的最新版本。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：D。讨论指出 EC2 Image Builder 内置支持在分发设置中更新启动模板；因此应让分发设置写入最新 AMI，并让 Auto Scaling 组使用启动模板的最新版本。
explanations.en: Correct answer: D. The discussion notes that EC2 Image Builder can update launch templates through distribution settings. The Auto Scaling groups then use the newest launch template version that contains the latest AMI.

contents.en: A company's security policies require the use of security hardened AMIs in production environments. A DevOps engineer has used EC2 Image Builder to create a pipeline that builds the AMIs on a recurring schedule. The DevOps engineer needs to update the launch templates of the company's Auto Scaling groups. The Auto Scaling groups must use the newest AMIs during the launch of Amazon EC2 instances. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?
contents.zh: 一家公司的安全策略要求在生产环境中使用经过安全加固的 AMI。DevOps 工程师已使用 EC2 Image Builder 创建一个按重复计划构建 AMI 的 pipeline。DevOps 工程师需要更新公司 Auto Scaling groups 的 launch templates。Auto Scaling groups 在启动 Amazon EC2 实例时必须使用最新的 AMI。哪种解决方案能以最高的运营效率满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has configured an Amazon S3 event source on an AWS Lambda function. The company needs the Lambda function to run when a new object is created or an existing object is modified in a particular S3 bucket. The Lambda function will use the S3 bucket name and the S3 object key of the incoming event to read the contents of the created or modified S3 object. The Lambda function will parse the contents and save the parsed contents to an Amazon DynamoDB table. The Lambda function's execution role has permissions to read from the S3 bucket and to write to the DynamoDB table. During testing, a DevOps engineer discovers that the Lambda function does not run when objects are added to the S3 bucket or when existing objects are modified. Which solution will resolve this problem?

options.label: A
options.content: Increase the memory of the Lambda function to give the function the ability to process large files from the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Increase the memory of the Lambda function to give the function the ability to process large files from the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 增加 Lambda 函数的内存，以使该函数能够处理来自 S3 bucket 的大文件。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a resource policy on the Lambda function to grant Amazon S3 the permission to invoke the Lambda function for the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create a resource policy on the Lambda function to grant Amazon S3 the permission to invoke the Lambda function for the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 在 Lambda 函数上创建 resource policy，授予 Amazon S3 针对该 S3 bucket 调用 Lambda 函数的权限。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue as an OnFailure destination for the Lambda function.

contents.en: Configure an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue as an OnFailure destination for the Lambda function.
contents.zh: 为 Lambda 函数配置 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue 作为 OnFailure destination。

options.label: D
options.content: Provision space in the /tmp folder of the Lambda function to give the function the ability to process large files from the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Provision space in the /tmp folder of the Lambda function to give the function the ability to process large files from the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 在 Lambda 函数的 /tmp 文件夹中预置空间，以使该函数能够处理来自 S3 bucket 的大文件。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B。S3 事件没有触发 Lambda 时，需要在 Lambda 的资源型策略中授予该 S3 存储桶调用函数的权限；讨论也说明这是函数完全未运行的权限问题，而不是内存、磁盘或 DLQ 问题。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B。S3 事件没有触发 Lambda 时，需要在 Lambda 的资源型策略中授予该 S3 存储桶调用函数的权限；讨论也说明这是函数完全未运行的权限问题，而不是内存、磁盘或 DLQ 问题。
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. If S3 is not invoking the Lambda function, the Lambda resource-based policy must grant the S3 bucket permission to invoke it. The discussion frames this as an invocation permission issue, not memory, disk, or dead-letter queue behavior.

contents.en: A company has configured an Amazon S3 event source on an AWS Lambda function. The company needs the Lambda function to run when a new object is created or an existing object is modified in a particular S3 bucket. The Lambda function will use the S3 bucket name and the S3 object key of the incoming event to read the contents of the created or modified S3 object. The Lambda function will parse the contents and save the parsed contents to an Amazon DynamoDB table. The Lambda function's execution role has permissions to read from the S3 bucket and to write to the DynamoDB table. During testing, a DevOps engineer discovers that the Lambda function does not run when objects are added to the S3 bucket or when existing objects are modified. Which solution will resolve this problem?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 AWS Lambda 函数上配置了 Amazon S3 event source。公司需要在特定 S3 bucket 中创建新对象或修改现有对象时运行该 Lambda 函数。Lambda 函数将使用传入事件中的 S3 bucket name 和 S3 object key 来读取已创建或修改的 S3 object 的内容。Lambda 函数将解析这些内容，并将解析后的内容保存到 Amazon DynamoDB 表。Lambda 函数的 execution role 具有从 S3 bucket 读取和写入 DynamoDB 表的权限。在测试期间，DevOps 工程师发现，当对象被添加到 S3 bucket 或现有对象被修改时，Lambda 函数没有运行。哪种解决方案将解决此问题？

questions.content: A company has deployed a critical application in two AWS Regions. The application uses an Application Load Balancer (ALB) in both Regions. The company has Amazon Route 53 alias DNS records for both ALBs. The company uses Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller to ensure that the application can fail over between the two Regions. The Route 53 ARC configuration includes a routing control for both Regions. The company uses Route 53 ARC to perform quarterly disaster recovery (DR) tests. During the most recent DR test, a DevOps engineer accidentally turned off both routing controls. The company needs to ensure that at least one routing control is turned on at all times. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: In Route 53 ARC, create a new assertion safety rule. Apply the assertion safety rule to the two routing controls. Configure the rule with the ATLEAST type with a threshold of 1.

contents.en: In Route 53 ARC, create a new assertion safety rule. Apply the assertion safety rule to the two routing controls. Configure the rule with the ATLEAST type with a threshold of 1.
contents.zh: 在 Route 53 ARC 中，创建一个新的 assertion safety rule。将该 assertion safety rule 应用于两个 routing controls。将规则配置为 ATLEAST type，threshold 为 1。

options.label: B
options.content: In Route 53 ARC, create a new gating safety rule. Apply the assertion safety rule to the two routing controls. Configure the rule with the OR type with a threshold of 1.

contents.en: In Route 53 ARC, create a new gating safety rule. Apply the assertion safety rule to the two routing controls. Configure the rule with the OR type with a threshold of 1.
contents.zh: 在 Route 53 ARC 中，创建一个新的 gating safety rule。将该 assertion safety rule 应用于两个 routing controls。将规则配置为 OR type，threshold 为 1。

options.label: C
options.content: In Route 53 ARC, create a new resource set. Configure the resource set with an AWS::Route53::HealthCheck resource type. Specify the ARNs of the two routing controls as the target resource. Create a new readiness check for the resource set.

contents.en: In Route 53 ARC, create a new resource set. Configure the resource set with an AWS::Route53::HealthCheck resource type. Specify the ARNs of the two routing controls as the target resource. Create a new readiness check for the resource set.
contents.zh: 在 Route 53 ARC 中，创建一个新的 resource set。将该 resource set 配置为 AWS::Route53::HealthCheck resource type。指定两个 routing controls 的 ARNs 作为 target resource。为该 resource set 创建一个新的 readiness check。

options.label: D
options.content: In Route 53 ARC, create a new resource set. Configure the resource set with an AWS::Route53RecoveryReadiness::DNSTargetResource resource type. Add the domain names of the two Route 53 alias DNS records as the target resource. Create a new readiness check for the resource set.

contents.en: In Route 53 ARC, create a new resource set. Configure the resource set with an AWS::Route53RecoveryReadiness::DNSTargetResource resource type. Add the domain names of the two Route 53 alias DNS records as the target resource. Create a new readiness check for the resource set.
contents.zh: 在 Route 53 ARC 中，创建一个新的 resource set。将该 resource set 配置为 AWS::Route53RecoveryReadiness::DNSTargetResource resource type。将两个 Route 53 alias DNS records 的域名添加为 target resource。为该 resource set 创建一个新的 readiness check。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A。Route 53 ARC 的 assertion safety rule 可以约束两个 routing controls 的状态；使用 ATLEAST 且阈值为 1，可确保至少一个 routing control 保持开启，从而避免两个都关闭。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A。Route 53 ARC 的 assertion safety rule 可以约束两个 routing controls 的状态；使用 ATLEAST 且阈值为 1，可确保至少一个 routing control 保持开启，从而避免两个都关闭。
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. A Route 53 ARC assertion safety rule can constrain the two routing controls. Using the ATLEAST type with a threshold of 1 ensures at least one routing control remains on.

contents.en: A company has deployed a critical application in two AWS Regions. The application uses an Application Load Balancer (ALB) in both Regions. The company has Amazon Route 53 alias DNS records for both ALBs. The company uses Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller to ensure that the application can fail over between the two Regions. The Route 53 ARC configuration includes a routing control for both Regions. The company uses Route 53 ARC to perform quarterly disaster recovery (DR) tests. During the most recent DR test, a DevOps engineer accidentally turned off both routing controls. The company needs to ensure that at least one routing control is turned on at all times. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司已在两个 AWS Regions 中部署一个关键应用程序。该应用程序在两个 Regions 中都使用 Application Load Balancer (ALB)。公司为两个 ALB 都设置了 Amazon Route 53 alias DNS records。公司使用 Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller 来确保应用程序可以在两个 Regions 之间故障转移。Route 53 ARC 配置包括两个 Regions 的 routing control。公司使用 Route 53 ARC 执行季度灾难恢复 (DR) 测试。在最近一次 DR 测试期间，一名 DevOps 工程师意外关闭了两个 routing controls。公司需要确保至少有一个 routing control 始终处于开启状态。哪种解决方案将满足这些要求？

questions.content: A healthcare services company is concerned about the growing costs of software licensing for an application for monitoring patient wellness. The company wants to create an audit process to ensure that the application is running exclusively on Amazon EC2 Dedicated Hosts. A DevOps engineer must create a workflow to audit the application to ensure compliance. What steps should the engineer take to meet this requirement with the LEAST administrative overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS Systems Manager Configuration Compliance. Use calls to the put-compliance-items API action to scan and build a database of noncompliant EC2 instances based on their host placement configuration. Use an Amazon DynamoDB table to store these instance IDs for fast access. Generate a report through Systems Manager by calling the list-compliance-summaries API action.

contents.en: Use AWS Systems Manager Configuration Compliance. Use calls to the put-compliance-items API action to scan and build a database of noncompliant EC2 instances based on their host placement configuration. Use an Amazon DynamoDB table to store these instance IDs for fast access. Generate a report through Systems Manager by calling the list-compliance-summaries API action.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Systems Manager Configuration Compliance。调用 put-compliance-items API action，根据 EC2 实例的 host placement configuration 扫描并构建不合规 EC2 实例数据库。使用 Amazon DynamoDB 表存储这些 instance IDs 以便快速访问。通过调用 list-compliance-summaries API action 生成 Systems Manager 报告。

options.label: B
options.content: Use custom Java code running on an EC2 instance. Set up EC2 Auto Scaling for the instance depending on the number of instances to be checked. Send the list of noncompliant EC2 instance IDs to an Amazon SQS queue. Set up another worker instance to process instance IDs from the SQS queue and write them to Amazon DynamoDUse an AWS Lambda function to terminate noncompliant instance IDs obtained from the queue, and send them to an Amazon SNS email topic for distribution.

contents.en: Use custom Java code running on an EC2 instance. Set up EC2 Auto Scaling for the instance depending on the number of instances to be checked. Send the list of noncompliant EC2 instance IDs to an Amazon SQS queue. Set up another worker instance to process instance IDs from the SQS queue and write them to Amazon DynamoDUse an AWS Lambda function to terminate noncompliant instance IDs obtained from the queue, and send them to an Amazon SNS email topic for distribution.
contents.zh: 使用在 EC2 实例上运行的自定义 Java 代码。根据要检查的实例数量为该实例设置 EC2 Auto Scaling。将不合规 EC2 instance IDs 列表发送到 Amazon SQS queue。设置另一个 worker instance 来处理来自 SQS queue 的 instance IDs，并将它们写入 Amazon DynamoDUse an AWS Lambda function 以终止从队列获得的不合规 instance IDs，并将它们发送到 Amazon SNS email topic 进行分发。

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS Config. Identify all EC2 instances to be audited by enabling Config Recording on all Amazon EC2 resources for the region. Create a custom AWS Config rule that triggers an AWS Lambda function by using the "config-rule-change -triggered" blueprint. Modify the Lambda evaluateCompliance() function to verify host placement to return a NON_COMPLIANT result if the instance is not running on an EC2 Dedicated Host. Use the AWS Config report to address noncompliant instances.

contents.en: Use AWS Config. Identify all EC2 instances to be audited by enabling Config Recording on all Amazon EC2 resources for the region. Create a custom AWS Config rule that triggers an AWS Lambda function by using the "config-rule-change -triggered" blueprint. Modify the Lambda evaluateCompliance() function to verify host placement to return a NON_COMPLIANT result if the instance is not running on an EC2 Dedicated Host. Use the AWS Config report to address noncompliant instances.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Config。通过对该区域的所有 Amazon EC2 resources 启用 Config Recording，识别所有要审计的 EC2 实例。创建一个自定义 AWS Config rule，该规则使用 "config-rule-change -triggered" blueprint 触发 AWS Lambda 函数。修改 Lambda evaluateCompliance() 函数以验证 host placement，如果实例未在 EC2 Dedicated Host 上运行，则返回 NON_COMPLIANT 结果。使用 AWS Config 报告处理不合规实例。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS CloudTrail. Identify all EC2 instances to be audited by analyzing all calls to the EC2 RunCommand API action. Invoke an AWS Lambda function that analyzes the host placement of the instance. Store the EC2 instance ID of noncompliant resources in an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance. Generate a report by querying the RDS instance and exporting the query results to a CSV text file.

contents.en: Use AWS CloudTrail. Identify all EC2 instances to be audited by analyzing all calls to the EC2 RunCommand API action. Invoke an AWS Lambda function that analyzes the host placement of the instance. Store the EC2 instance ID of noncompliant resources in an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance. Generate a report by querying the RDS instance and exporting the query results to a CSV text file.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CloudTrail。通过分析对 EC2 RunCommand API action 的所有调用，识别所有要审计的 EC2 实例。调用 AWS Lambda 函数分析实例的 host placement。将不合规资源的 EC2 instance ID 存储在 Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance 中。通过查询 RDS 实例并将查询结果导出到 CSV 文本文件来生成报告。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C。讨论很简短，因此依据正确选项内容：C 使用 AWS Config 记录该区域的 EC2 资源，并通过自定义 Config 规则触发 Lambda，在 evaluateCompliance 中检查实例是否运行在 EC2 Dedicated Host 上，对不合规实例返回 NON_COMPLIANT。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C。讨论很简短，因此依据正确选项内容：C 使用 AWS Config 记录该区域的 EC2 资源，并通过自定义 Config 规则触发 Lambda，在 evaluateCompliance 中检查实例是否运行在 EC2 Dedicated Host 上，对不合规实例返回 NON_COMPLIANT。
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. The discussion is thin, so the correct option provides the basis: use AWS Config to record EC2 resources and a custom Config rule backed by Lambda to evaluate whether each instance runs on an EC2 Dedicated Host, returning NON_COMPLIANT when it does not.

contents.en: A healthcare services company is concerned about the growing costs of software licensing for an application for monitoring patient wellness. The company wants to create an audit process to ensure that the application is running exclusively on Amazon EC2 Dedicated Hosts. A DevOps engineer must create a workflow to audit the application to ensure compliance. What steps should the engineer take to meet this requirement with the LEAST administrative overhead?
contents.zh: 一家医疗保健服务公司担心用于监控患者健康状况的应用程序的软件许可成本不断增长。公司希望创建一个审计流程，确保该应用程序仅在 Amazon EC2 Dedicated Hosts 上运行。DevOps 工程师必须创建一个工作流来审计该应用程序，以确保合规。工程师应采取哪些步骤，以最少的管理开销满足此要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is planning to deploy a Ruby-based application to production. The application needs to interact with an Amazon RDS for MySQL database and should have automatic scaling and high availability. The stored data in the database is critical and should persist regardless of the state of the application stack. The DevOps engineer needs to set up an automated deployment strategy for the application with automatic rollbacks. The solution also must alert the application team when a deployment fails. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Deploy the application on AWS Elastic Beanstalk. Deploy an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance as part of the Elastic Beanstalk configuration.

contents.en: Deploy the application on AWS Elastic Beanstalk. Deploy an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance as part of the Elastic Beanstalk configuration.
contents.zh: 在 AWS Elastic Beanstalk 上部署应用程序。将 Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance 作为 Elastic Beanstalk 配置的一部分进行部署。

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy the application on AWS Elastic Beanstalk. Deploy a separate Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance outside of Elastic Beanstalk.

contents.en: Deploy the application on AWS Elastic Beanstalk. Deploy a separate Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance outside of Elastic Beanstalk.
contents.zh: 在 AWS Elastic Beanstalk 上部署应用程序。在 Elastic Beanstalk 外部部署单独的 Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure a notification email address that alerts the application team in the AWS Elastic Beanstalk configuration.

contents.en: Configure a notification email address that alerts the application team in the AWS Elastic Beanstalk configuration.
