contents.zh: 在 AWS Elastic Beanstalk 配置中配置一个通知电子邮件地址，以提醒应用程序团队。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to monitor AWS Health events. Use an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic as a target to alert the application team.

contents.en: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to monitor AWS Health events. Use an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic as a target to alert the application team.
contents.zh: 配置一个 Amazon EventBridge rule 以监控 AWS Health events。使用 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic 作为目标来提醒应用程序团队。

options.label: E
options.content: Use the immutable deployment method to deploy new application versions.

contents.en: Use the immutable deployment method to deploy new application versions.
contents.zh: 使用 immutable deployment method 部署新的应用程序版本。

options.label: F
options.content: Use the rolling deployment method to deploy new application versions.

contents.en: Use the rolling deployment method to deploy new application versions.
contents.zh: 使用 rolling deployment method 部署新的应用程序版本。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B、C、E。B 将应用部署到 Elastic Beanstalk，并把关键的 MySQL RDS 实例放在 Beanstalk 外部以避免随环境生命周期受影响；C 配置通知邮件以提醒应用团队；E 使用 immutable deployment 发布新版本以降低部署风险。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B、C、E。B 将应用部署到 Elastic Beanstalk，并把关键的 MySQL RDS 实例放在 Beanstalk 外部以避免随环境生命周期受影响；C 配置通知邮件以提醒应用团队；E 使用 immutable deployment 发布新版本以降低部署风险。
explanations.en: Correct answers: B, C, and E. B deploys the application on Elastic Beanstalk while keeping the critical RDS for MySQL database outside the Beanstalk environment, C configures notification email alerts for the team, and E uses immutable deployments for new versions.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer is planning to deploy a Ruby-based application to production. The application needs to interact with an Amazon RDS for MySQL database and should have automatic scaling and high availability. The stored data in the database is critical and should persist regardless of the state of the application stack. The DevOps engineer needs to set up an automated deployment strategy for the application with automatic rollbacks. The solution also must alert the application team when a deployment fails. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师计划将一个基于 Ruby 的应用程序部署到生产环境。该应用程序需要与 Amazon RDS for MySQL 数据库交互，并且应具有自动扩缩和高可用性。数据库中存储的数据非常关键，无论应用程序堆栈状态如何都应保留。DevOps 工程师需要为应用程序设置一种具有自动回滚的自动化部署策略。该解决方案还必须在部署失败时提醒应用程序团队。哪一组步骤组合将满足这些要求？（选择三个。）

questions.content: A company is using AWS CodePipeline to deploy an application. According to a new guideline, a member of the company's security team must sign off on any application changes before the changes are deployed into production. The approval must be recorded and retained. Which combination of actions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Configure CodePipeline to write actions to Amazon CloudWatch Logs.

contents.en: Configure CodePipeline to write actions to Amazon CloudWatch Logs.
contents.zh: 配置 CodePipeline 将操作写入 Amazon CloudWatch Logs。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure CodePipeline to write actions to an Amazon S3 bucket at the end of each pipeline stage.

contents.en: Configure CodePipeline to write actions to an Amazon S3 bucket at the end of each pipeline stage.
contents.zh: 配置 CodePipeline 在每个 pipeline stage 结束时将操作写入 Amazon S3 bucket。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS CloudTrail trail to deliver logs to Amazon S3.

contents.en: Create an AWS CloudTrail trail to deliver logs to Amazon S3.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CloudTrail trail，将日志传输到 Amazon S3。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a CodePipeline custom action to invoke an AWS Lambda function for approval. Create a policy that gives the security team access to manage CodePipeline custom actions.

contents.en: Create a CodePipeline custom action to invoke an AWS Lambda function for approval. Create a policy that gives the security team access to manage CodePipeline custom actions.
contents.zh: 创建一个 CodePipeline custom action，以调用 AWS Lambda 函数进行审批。创建一个 policy，授予安全团队管理 CodePipeline custom actions 的访问权限。

options.label: E
options.content: Create a CodePipeline manual approval action before the deployment step. Create a policy that grants the security team access to approve manual approval stages.

contents.en: Create a CodePipeline manual approval action before the deployment step. Create a policy that grants the security team access to approve manual approval stages.
contents.zh: 在部署步骤之前创建一个 CodePipeline manual approval action。创建一个 policy，授予安全团队批准 manual approval stages 的访问权限。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C、E。C 使用 CloudTrail 将用户操作日志交付到 S3，以满足审计监控需求；E 在部署前加入 CodePipeline 手动审批动作，并授权安全团队审批，从而把发布控制交给安全团队。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C、E。C 使用 CloudTrail 将用户操作日志交付到 S3，以满足审计监控需求；E 在部署前加入 CodePipeline 手动审批动作，并授权安全团队审批，从而把发布控制交给安全团队。
explanations.en: Correct answers: C and E. C uses CloudTrail to deliver user activity logs to S3 for auditing, and E adds a CodePipeline manual approval action before deployment with a policy that lets the security team approve it.

contents.en: A company is using AWS CodePipeline to deploy an application. According to a new guideline, a member of the company's security team must sign off on any application changes before the changes are deployed into production. The approval must be recorded and retained. Which combination of actions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司正在使用 AWS CodePipeline 部署应用程序。根据一项新准则，在任何应用程序更改部署到生产环境之前，公司的安全团队成员必须签署批准。该批准必须被记录并保留。哪一组操作组合将满足这些要求？（选择两个。）

questions.content: A company requires its internal business teams to launch resources through pre-approved AWS CloudFormation templates only. The security team requires automated monitoring when resources drift from their expected state. Which strategy should be used to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Allow users to deploy CloudFormation stacks using a CloudFormation service role only. Use CloudFormation drift detection to detect when resources have drifted from their expected state.

contents.en: Allow users to deploy CloudFormation stacks using a CloudFormation service role only. Use CloudFormation drift detection to detect when resources have drifted from their expected state.
contents.zh: 仅允许用户使用 CloudFormation service role 部署 CloudFormation stacks。使用 CloudFormation drift detection 检测资源何时偏离其预期状态。

options.label: B
options.content: Allow users to deploy CloudFormation stacks using a CloudFormation service role only. Use AWS Config rules to detect when resources have drifted from their expected state.

contents.en: Allow users to deploy CloudFormation stacks using a CloudFormation service role only. Use AWS Config rules to detect when resources have drifted from their expected state.
contents.zh: 仅允许用户使用 CloudFormation service role 部署 CloudFormation stacks。使用 AWS Config rules 检测资源何时偏离其预期状态。

options.label: C
options.content: Allow users to deploy CloudFormation stacks using AWS Service Catalog only. Enforce the use of a launch constraint. Use AWS Config rules to detect when resources have drifted from their expected state.

contents.en: Allow users to deploy CloudFormation stacks using AWS Service Catalog only. Enforce the use of a launch constraint. Use AWS Config rules to detect when resources have drifted from their expected state.
contents.zh: 仅允许用户使用 AWS Service Catalog 部署 CloudFormation stacks。强制使用 launch constraint。使用 AWS Config rules 检测资源何时偏离其预期状态。

options.label: D
options.content: Allow users to deploy CloudFormation stacks using AWS Service Catalog only. Enforce the use of a template constraint. Use Amazon EventBridge notifications to detect when resources have drifted from their expected state.

contents.en: Allow users to deploy CloudFormation stacks using AWS Service Catalog only. Enforce the use of a template constraint. Use Amazon EventBridge notifications to detect when resources have drifted from their expected state.
contents.zh: 仅允许用户使用 AWS Service Catalog 部署 CloudFormation stacks。强制使用 template constraint。使用 Amazon EventBridge notifications 检测资源何时偏离其预期状态。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C。讨论指出单纯依赖手动或定时漂移检测不完全满足自动监控要求；C 通过 Service Catalog 和启动约束控制 CloudFormation 堆栈部署，并用 AWS Config 规则自动检测资源是否偏离预期状态。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C。讨论指出单纯依赖手动或定时漂移检测不完全满足自动监控要求；C 通过 Service Catalog 和启动约束控制 CloudFormation 堆栈部署，并用 AWS Config 规则自动检测资源是否偏离预期状态。
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. The discussion says manual or scheduled drift detection alone does not fully meet automated monitoring. C controls stack deployment through Service Catalog with a launch constraint and uses AWS Config rules to detect drift from the expected state.

contents.en: A company requires its internal business teams to launch resources through pre-approved AWS CloudFormation templates only. The security team requires automated monitoring when resources drift from their expected state. Which strategy should be used to meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司要求其内部业务团队只能通过预先批准的 AWS CloudFormation 模板来启动资源。安全团队要求在资源偏离其预期状态时进行自动监控。应使用哪种策略来满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has multiple development groups working in a single shared AWS account. The senior manager of the groups wants to be alerted via a third-party API call when the creation of resources approaches the service limits for the account. Which solution will accomplish this with the LEAST amount of development effort?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that runs periodically and targets an AWS Lambda function. Within the Lambda function, evaluate the current state of the AWS environment and compare deployed resource values to resource limits on the account. Notify the senior manager if the account is approaching a service limit.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that runs periodically and targets an AWS Lambda function. Within the Lambda function, evaluate the current state of the AWS environment and compare deployed resource values to resource limits on the account. Notify the senior manager if the account is approaching a service limit.
contents.zh: 创建一个定期运行并以 AWS Lambda function 为目标的 Amazon EventBridge rule。在 Lambda function 中，评估 AWS 环境的当前状态，并将已部署资源的值与账户上的资源限制进行比较。如果账户正在接近服务限制，则通知高级经理。

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy an AWS Lambda function that refreshes AWS Trusted Advisor checks, and configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to run the Lambda function periodically. Create another EventBridge rule with an event pattern matching Trusted Advisor events and a target Lambda function. In the target Lambda function, notify the senior manager.

contents.en: Deploy an AWS Lambda function that refreshes AWS Trusted Advisor checks, and configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to run the Lambda function periodically. Create another EventBridge rule with an event pattern matching Trusted Advisor events and a target Lambda function. In the target Lambda function, notify the senior manager.
contents.zh: 部署一个刷新 AWS Trusted Advisor checks 的 AWS Lambda function，并配置一个 Amazon EventBridge rule 定期运行该 Lambda function。创建另一个 EventBridge rule，其事件模式匹配 Trusted Advisor events，并以 Lambda function 为目标。在目标 Lambda function 中通知高级经理。

options.label: C
options.content: Deploy an AWS Lambda function that refreshes AWS Health Dashboard checks, and configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to run the Lambda function periodically. Create another EventBridge rule with an event pattern matching Health Dashboard events and a target Lambda function. In the target Lambda function, notify the senior manager.

contents.en: Deploy an AWS Lambda function that refreshes AWS Health Dashboard checks, and configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to run the Lambda function periodically. Create another EventBridge rule with an event pattern matching Health Dashboard events and a target Lambda function. In the target Lambda function, notify the senior manager.
contents.zh: 部署一个刷新 AWS Health Dashboard checks 的 AWS Lambda function，并配置一个 Amazon EventBridge rule 定期运行该 Lambda function。创建另一个 EventBridge rule，其事件模式匹配 Health Dashboard events，并以 Lambda function 为目标。在目标 Lambda function 中通知高级经理。

options.label: D
options.content: Add an AWS Config custom rule that runs periodically, checks the AWS service limit status, and streams notifications to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Deploy an AWS Lambda function that notifies the senior manager, and subscribe the Lambda function to the SNS topic.

contents.en: Add an AWS Config custom rule that runs periodically, checks the AWS service limit status, and streams notifications to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Deploy an AWS Lambda function that notifies the senior manager, and subscribe the Lambda function to the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 添加一个定期运行的 AWS Config custom rule，检查 AWS service limit 状态，并将通知流式传输到 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic。部署一个通知高级经理的 AWS Lambda function，并将该 Lambda function 订阅到 SNS topic。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B。讨论强调需要持续监控服务配额；B 定期用 Lambda 刷新 Trusted Advisor 检查，再用 EventBridge 匹配 Trusted Advisor 事件并触发另一个 Lambda 通知高级经理，符合自动化配额告警流程。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B。讨论强调需要持续监控服务配额；B 定期用 Lambda 刷新 Trusted Advisor 检查，再用 EventBridge 匹配 Trusted Advisor 事件并触发另一个 Lambda 通知高级经理，符合自动化配额告警流程。
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. The discussion emphasizes continuous monitoring of service limits. B periodically refreshes Trusted Advisor checks with Lambda, then uses EventBridge to match Trusted Advisor events and invoke a Lambda function that notifies the senior manager.

contents.en: A company has multiple development groups working in a single shared AWS account. The senior manager of the groups wants to be alerted via a third-party API call when the creation of resources approaches the service limits for the account. Which solution will accomplish this with the LEAST amount of development effort?
contents.zh: 一家公司有多个开发组在单个共享 AWS 账户中工作。这些组的高级经理希望在资源创建接近该账户的服务限制时，通过第三方 API 调用收到提醒。哪种解决方案能以最少的开发工作量实现这一点？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is setting up a container-based architecture. The engineer has decided to use AWS CloudFormation to automatically provision an Amazon ECS cluster and an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group to launch the EC2 container instances. After successfully creating the CloudFormation stack, the engineer noticed that, even though the ECS cluster and the EC2 instances were created successfully and the stack finished the creation, the EC2 instances were associating with a different cluster. How should the DevOps engineer update the CloudFormation template to resolve this issue?

options.label: A
options.content: Reference the EC2 instances in the AWS::ECS::Cluster resource and reference the ECS cluster in the AWS::ECS::Service resource.

contents.en: Reference the EC2 instances in the AWS::ECS::Cluster resource and reference the ECS cluster in the AWS::ECS::Service resource.
contents.zh: 在 AWS::ECS::Cluster resource 中引用 EC2 instances，并在 AWS::ECS::Service resource 中引用 ECS cluster。

options.label: B
options.content: Reference the ECS cluster in the AWS::AutoScaling::LaunchConfiguration resource of the UserData property.

contents.en: Reference the ECS cluster in the AWS::AutoScaling::LaunchConfiguration resource of the UserData property.
contents.zh: 在 AWS::AutoScaling::LaunchConfiguration resource 的 UserData property 中引用 ECS cluster。

options.label: C
options.content: Reference the ECS cluster in the AWS::EC2::Instance resource of the UserData property.

contents.en: Reference the ECS cluster in the AWS::EC2::Instance resource of the UserData property.
contents.zh: 在 AWS::EC2::Instance resource 的 UserData property 中引用 ECS cluster。

options.label: D
options.content: Reference the ECS cluster in the AWS::CloudFormation::CustomResource resource to trigger an AWS Lambda function that registers the EC2 instances with the appropriate ECS cluster.

contents.en: Reference the ECS cluster in the AWS::CloudFormation::CustomResource resource to trigger an AWS Lambda function that registers the EC2 instances with the appropriate ECS cluster.
contents.zh: 在 AWS::CloudFormation::CustomResource resource 中引用 ECS cluster，以触发 AWS Lambda function 将 EC2 instances 注册到相应的 ECS cluster。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B。讨论引用 CloudFormation 的 ECS 集群资源文档；正确做法是在 Auto Scaling 启动配置的 UserData 中引用 ECS 集群，使启动的 EC2 实例加入指定 ECS 集群。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B。讨论引用 CloudFormation 的 ECS 集群资源文档；正确做法是在 Auto Scaling 启动配置的 UserData 中引用 ECS 集群，使启动的 EC2 实例加入指定 ECS 集群。
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. The discussion points to the CloudFormation ECS cluster resource. Referencing the ECS cluster in the LaunchConfiguration UserData lets EC2 instances launched by Auto Scaling join the intended ECS cluster.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer is setting up a container-based architecture. The engineer has decided to use AWS CloudFormation to automatically provision an Amazon ECS cluster and an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group to launch the EC2 container instances. After successfully creating the CloudFormation stack, the engineer noticed that, even though the ECS cluster and the EC2 instances were created successfully and the stack finished the creation, the EC2 instances were associating with a different cluster. How should the DevOps engineer update the CloudFormation template to resolve this issue?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps engineer 正在设置基于容器的架构。该工程师决定使用 AWS CloudFormation 自动预置 Amazon ECS cluster 和 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group，以启动 EC2 container instances。成功创建 CloudFormation stack 后，该工程师注意到，虽然 ECS cluster 和 EC2 instances 已成功创建，并且 stack 已完成创建，但 EC2 instances 却关联到了另一个 cluster。DevOps engineer 应如何更新 CloudFormation template 来解决此问题？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is implementing governance controls for a company that requires its infrastructure to be housed within the United States. The engineer must restrict which AWS Regions can be used, and ensure an alert is sent as soon as possible if any activity outside the governance policy takes place. The controls should be automatically enabled on any new Region outside the United States (US). Which combination of actions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS Organizations SCP that denies access to all non-global services in non-US Regions. Attach the policy to the root of the organization.

contents.en: Create an AWS Organizations SCP that denies access to all non-global services in non-US Regions. Attach the policy to the root of the organization.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Organizations SCP，拒绝在非 US Regions 中访问所有非全局服务。将该策略附加到组织根。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure AWS CloudTrail to send logs to Amazon CloudWatch Logs and enable it for all Regions. Use a CloudWatch Logs metric filter to send an alert on any service activity in non-US Regions.

contents.en: Configure AWS CloudTrail to send logs to Amazon CloudWatch Logs and enable it for all Regions. Use a CloudWatch Logs metric filter to send an alert on any service activity in non-US Regions.
contents.zh: 配置 AWS CloudTrail 将日志发送到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs，并为所有 Regions 启用它。使用 CloudWatch Logs metric filter 在非 US Regions 中发生任何服务活动时发送警报。

options.label: C
options.content: Use an AWS Lambda function that checks for AWS service activity and deploy it to all Regions. Write an Amazon EventBridge rule that runs the Lambda function every hour, sending an alert if activity is found in a non-US Region.

contents.en: Use an AWS Lambda function that checks for AWS service activity and deploy it to all Regions. Write an Amazon EventBridge rule that runs the Lambda function every hour, sending an alert if activity is found in a non-US Region.
contents.zh: 使用一个 AWS Lambda function 检查 AWS service activity，并将其部署到所有 Regions。编写一个 Amazon EventBridge rule，每小时运行该 Lambda function，如果在非 US Region 中发现活动则发送警报。

options.label: D
options.content: Use an AWS Lambda function to query Amazon Inspector to look for service activity in non-US Regions and send alerts if any activity is found.

contents.en: Use an AWS Lambda function to query Amazon Inspector to look for service activity in non-US Regions and send alerts if any activity is found.
contents.zh: 使用一个 AWS Lambda function 查询 Amazon Inspector，以查找非 US Regions 中的服务活动，并在发现任何活动时发送警报。

options.label: E
options.content: Write an SCP using the aws:RequestedRegion condition key limiting access to US Regions. Apply the policy to all users, groups, and roles.

contents.en: Write an SCP using the aws:RequestedRegion condition key limiting access to US Regions. Apply the policy to all users, groups, and roles.
contents.zh: 编写一个 SCP，使用 aws:RequestedRegion condition key 将访问限制到 US Regions。将该策略应用于所有用户、组和角色。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A、B。A 通过 Organizations SCP 在组织根上拒绝非美国区域中的非全局服务访问，实现预防控制；B 在所有区域启用 CloudTrail 并发送到 CloudWatch Logs，再用指标筛选器对非美国区域活动告警，实现监控。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A、B。A 通过 Organizations SCP 在组织根上拒绝非美国区域中的非全局服务访问，实现预防控制；B 在所有区域启用 CloudTrail 并发送到 CloudWatch Logs，再用指标筛选器对非美国区域活动告警，实现监控。
explanations.en: Correct answers: A and B. A uses an Organizations SCP at the root to deny non-global services in non-US Regions, providing preventive control. B enables CloudTrail in all Regions, sends logs to CloudWatch Logs, and alerts on non-US Region activity with a metric filter.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer is implementing governance controls for a company that requires its infrastructure to be housed within the United States. The engineer must restrict which AWS Regions can be used, and ensure an alert is sent as soon as possible if any activity outside the governance policy takes place. The controls should be automatically enabled on any new Region outside the United States (US). Which combination of actions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps engineer 正在为一家公司实施治理控制，该公司要求其基础设施位于美国境内。该工程师必须限制可使用的 AWS Regions，并确保一旦发生任何超出治理策略的活动，就尽快发送警报。对于美国 (US) 以外的任何新 Region，这些控制应自动启用。哪组操作组合可以满足这些要求？（选择两个。）

questions.content: A company sells products through an ecommerce web application. The company wants a dashboard that shows a pie chart of product transaction details. The company wants to integrate the dashboard with the company's existing Amazon CloudWatch dashboards. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Update the ecommerce application to emit a JSON object to a CloudWatch log group for each processed transaction. Use CloudWatch Logs Insights to query the log group and to visualize the results in a pie chart format. Attach the results to the desired CloudWatch dashboard.

contents.en: Update the ecommerce application to emit a JSON object to a CloudWatch log group for each processed transaction. Use CloudWatch Logs Insights to query the log group and to visualize the results in a pie chart format. Attach the results to the desired CloudWatch dashboard.
contents.zh: 更新电子商务应用程序，使其为每个已处理交易向 CloudWatch log group 发出一个 JSON object。使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 查询该 log group，并以饼图格式可视化结果。将结果附加到所需的 CloudWatch dashboard。

options.label: B
options.content: Update the ecommerce application to emit a JSON object to an Amazon S3 bucket for each processed transaction. Use Amazon Athena to query the S3 bucket and to visualize the results in a pie chart format. Export the results from Athena. Attach the results to the desired CloudWatch dashboard.

contents.en: Update the ecommerce application to emit a JSON object to an Amazon S3 bucket for each processed transaction. Use Amazon Athena to query the S3 bucket and to visualize the results in a pie chart format. Export the results from Athena. Attach the results to the desired CloudWatch dashboard.
contents.zh: 更新电子商务应用程序，使其为每个已处理交易向 Amazon S3 bucket 发出一个 JSON object。使用 Amazon Athena 查询该 S3 bucket，并以饼图格式可视化结果。从 Athena 导出结果。将结果附加到所需的 CloudWatch dashboard。

options.label: C
options.content: Update the ecommerce application to use AWS X-Ray for instrumentation. Create a new X-Ray subsegment. Add an annotation for each processed transaction. Use X-Ray traces to query the data and to visualize the results in a pie chart format. Attach the results to the desired CloudWatch dashboard.

contents.en: Update the ecommerce application to use AWS X-Ray for instrumentation. Create a new X-Ray subsegment. Add an annotation for each processed transaction. Use X-Ray traces to query the data and to visualize the results in a pie chart format. Attach the results to the desired CloudWatch dashboard.
contents.zh: 更新电子商务应用程序以使用 AWS X-Ray 进行 instrumentation。创建一个新的 X-Ray subsegment。为每个已处理交易添加一个 annotation。使用 X-Ray traces 查询数据，并以饼图格式可视化结果。将结果附加到所需的 CloudWatch dashboard。

options.label: D
options.content: Update the ecommerce application to emit a JSON object to a CloudWatch log group for each processed transaction. Create an AWS Lambda function to aggregate and write the results to Amazon DynamoDB. Create a Lambda subscription filter for the log file. Attach the results to the desired CloudWatch dashboard.

contents.en: Update the ecommerce application to emit a JSON object to a CloudWatch log group for each processed transaction. Create an AWS Lambda function to aggregate and write the results to Amazon DynamoDB. Create a Lambda subscription filter for the log file. Attach the results to the desired CloudWatch dashboard.
contents.zh: 更新电子商务应用程序，使其为每个已处理交易向 CloudWatch log group 发出一个 JSON object。创建一个 AWS Lambda function 来聚合结果并将结果写入 Amazon DynamoDB。为日志文件创建一个 Lambda subscription filter。将结果附加到所需的 CloudWatch dashboard。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A。应用应为每笔交易向 CloudWatch Logs 输出 JSON 对象，然后使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 查询并以饼图展示结果，再把图表加入 CloudWatch dashboard；讨论也指出 CloudWatch 支持饼图展示。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A。应用应为每笔交易向 CloudWatch Logs 输出 JSON 对象，然后使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 查询并以饼图展示结果，再把图表加入 CloudWatch dashboard；讨论也指出 CloudWatch 支持饼图展示。
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. The application should emit a JSON object for each processed transaction to CloudWatch Logs, use CloudWatch Logs Insights to query and visualize the results as a pie chart, and attach the visualization to the CloudWatch dashboard.

contents.en: A company sells products through an ecommerce web application. The company wants a dashboard that shows a pie chart of product transaction details. The company wants to integrate the dashboard with the company's existing Amazon CloudWatch dashboards. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?
contents.zh: 一家公司通过一个电子商务 Web 应用程序销售产品。该公司希望有一个显示产品交易详细信息饼图的 dashboard。该公司希望将该 dashboard 与公司现有的 Amazon CloudWatch dashboards 集成。哪种解决方案能以最高的运维效率满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company is launching an application. The application must use only approved AWS services. The account that runs the application was created less than 1 year ago and is assigned to an AWS Organizations OU. The company needs to create a new Organizations account structure. The account structure must have an appropriate SCP that supports the use of only services that are currently active in the AWS account. The company will use AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) Access Analyzer in the solution. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an SCP that allows the services that IAM Access Analyzer identifies. Create an OU for the account. Move the account into the new OU. Attach the new SCP to the new OU. Detach the default FullAWSAccess SCP from the new OU.

contents.en: Create an SCP that allows the services that IAM Access Analyzer identifies. Create an OU for the account. Move the account into the new OU. Attach the new SCP to the new OU. Detach the default FullAWSAccess SCP from the new OU.
contents.zh: 创建一个 SCP，允许 IAM Access Analyzer 识别出的服务。为该账户创建一个 OU。将该账户移动到新的 OU。将新的 SCP 附加到新的 OU。从新的 OU 分离默认的 FullAWSAccess SCP。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an SCP that denies the services that IAM Access Analyzer identifies. Create an OU for the account. Move the account into the new OU. Attach the new SCP to the new OU.

contents.en: Create an SCP that denies the services that IAM Access Analyzer identifies. Create an OU for the account. Move the account into the new OU. Attach the new SCP to the new OU.
contents.zh: 创建一个 SCP，拒绝 IAM Access Analyzer 识别出的服务。为该账户创建一个 OU。将该账户移动到新的 OU。将新的 SCP 附加到新的 OU。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an SCP that allows the services that IAM Access Analyzer identifies. Attach the new SCP to the organization's root.

contents.en: Create an SCP that allows the services that IAM Access Analyzer identifies. Attach the new SCP to the organization's root.
contents.zh: 创建一个 SCP，允许 IAM Access Analyzer 识别出的服务。将新的 SCP 附加到组织的根。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an SCP that allows the services that IAM Access Analyzer identifies. Create an OU for the account. Move the account into the new OU. Attach the new SCP to the management account. Detach the default FullAWSAccess SCP from the new OU.

contents.en: Create an SCP that allows the services that IAM Access Analyzer identifies. Create an OU for the account. Move the account into the new OU. Attach the new SCP to the management account. Detach the default FullAWSAccess SCP from the new OU.
contents.zh: 创建一个 SCP，允许 IAM Access Analyzer 识别出的服务。为该账户创建一个 OU。将该账户移动到新的 OU。将新的 SCP 附加到管理账户。从新的 OU 分离默认的 FullAWSAccess SCP。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A。A 根据 IAM Access Analyzer 识别出的服务创建允许型 SCP，把账号移动到新的 OU，附加该 SCP，并从该 OU 分离默认 FullAWSAccess，从而按已识别的实际访问需求收紧权限。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A。A 根据 IAM Access Analyzer 识别出的服务创建允许型 SCP，把账号移动到新的 OU，附加该 SCP，并从该 OU 分离默认 FullAWSAccess，从而按已识别的实际访问需求收紧权限。
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. A creates an SCP that allows the services identified by IAM Access Analyzer, moves the account into a new OU, attaches the SCP, and detaches the default FullAWSAccess policy from that OU to restrict access to observed needs.

contents.en: A company is launching an application. The application must use only approved AWS services. The account that runs the application was created less than 1 year ago and is assigned to an AWS Organizations OU. The company needs to create a new Organizations account structure. The account structure must have an appropriate SCP that supports the use of only services that are currently active in the AWS account. The company will use AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) Access Analyzer in the solution. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在启动一个应用程序。该应用程序必须仅使用已批准的 AWS services。运行该应用程序的账户创建不到 1 年，并被分配到 AWS Organizations OU。该公司需要创建新的 Organizations 账户结构。账户结构必须具有适当的 SCP，以支持仅使用当前在 AWS 账户中处于活动状态的服务。该公司将在解决方案中使用 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) Access Analyzer。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has multiple development teams in different business units that work in a shared single AWS account. All Amazon EC2 resources that are created in the account must include tags that specify who created the resources. The tagging must occur within the first hour of resource creation. A DevOps engineer needs to add tags to the created resources that include the user ID that created the resource and the cost center ID. The DevOps engineer configures an AWS Lambda function with the cost center mappings to tag the resources. The DevOps engineer also sets up AWS CloudTrail in the AWS account. An Amazon S3 bucket stores the CloudTrail event logs. Which solution will meet the tagging requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an S3 event notification on the S3 bucket to invoke the Lambda function for s3:ObjectTagging:Put events. Enable bucket versioning on the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create an S3 event notification on the S3 bucket to invoke the Lambda function for s3:ObjectTagging:Put events. Enable bucket versioning on the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 在 S3 bucket 上创建 S3 event notification，以便针对 s3:ObjectTagging:Put events 调用 Lambda function。在 S3 bucket 上启用 bucket versioning。

options.label: B
options.content: Enable server access logging on the S3 bucket. Create an S3 event notification on the S3 bucket for s3:ObjectTagging:* events.

contents.en: Enable server access logging on the S3 bucket. Create an S3 event notification on the S3 bucket for s3:ObjectTagging:* events.
contents.zh: 在 S3 bucket 上启用 server access logging。为 s3:ObjectTagging:* events 在 S3 bucket 上创建 S3 event notification。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a recurring hourly Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule that invokes the Lambda function. Modify the Lambda function to read the logs from the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create a recurring hourly Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule that invokes the Lambda function. Modify the Lambda function to read the logs from the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 创建一个每小时重复运行的 Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule，用于调用 Lambda function。修改 Lambda function 以从 S3 bucket 读取日志。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that uses Amazon EC2 as the event source. Configure the rule to match events delivered by CloudTrail. Configure the rule to target the Lambda function.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that uses Amazon EC2 as the event source. Configure the rule to match events delivered by CloudTrail. Configure the rule to target the Lambda function.
contents.zh: 创建一个使用 Amazon EC2 作为事件源的 Amazon EventBridge rule。配置该 rule 以匹配 CloudTrail 传送的事件。配置该 rule 以 Lambda function 为目标。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：D。讨论认为 D 更相关；D 创建以 EC2 为事件源、匹配 CloudTrail 交付事件的 EventBridge 规则，并把 Lambda 函数作为目标，从而在相关 EC2 API 活动发生时触发自动处理。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：D。讨论认为 D 更相关；D 创建以 EC2 为事件源、匹配 CloudTrail 交付事件的 EventBridge 规则，并把 Lambda 函数作为目标，从而在相关 EC2 API 活动发生时触发自动处理。
explanations.en: Correct answer: D. The discussion identifies D as most relevant. It creates an EventBridge rule using EC2 as the event source, matches events delivered by CloudTrail, and targets the Lambda function for automated handling.

contents.en: A company has multiple development teams in different business units that work in a shared single AWS account. All Amazon EC2 resources that are created in the account must include tags that specify who created the resources. The tagging must occur within the first hour of resource creation. A DevOps engineer needs to add tags to the created resources that include the user ID that created the resource and the cost center ID. The DevOps engineer configures an AWS Lambda function with the cost center mappings to tag the resources. The DevOps engineer also sets up AWS CloudTrail in the AWS account. An Amazon S3 bucket stores the CloudTrail event logs. Which solution will meet the tagging requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司在不同业务部门中有多个开发团队，这些团队在一个共享的单个 AWS 账户中工作。账户中创建的所有 Amazon EC2 资源都必须包含用于指定资源创建者的标签。标记必须在资源创建后的第一个小时内完成。DevOps engineer 需要为创建的资源添加标签，其中包括创建该资源的用户 ID 和成本中心 ID。DevOps engineer 配置了一个带有成本中心映射的 AWS Lambda function，用于标记资源。DevOps engineer 还在 AWS 账户中设置了 AWS CloudTrail。Amazon S3 bucket 存储 CloudTrail event logs。哪种解决方案可以满足标记要求？

questions.content: A company runs an application for multiple environments in a single AWS account. An AWS CodePipeline pipeline uses a development Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster to test an image for the application from an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository. The pipeline promotes the image to a production ECS cluster. The company needs to move the production cluster into a separate AWS account in the same AWS Region. The production cluster must be able to download the images over a private connection. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use Amazon ECR VPC endpoints and an Amazon S3 gateway endpoint. In the separate AWS account, create an ECR repository. Set the repository policy to allow the production ECS tasks to pull images from the main AWS account. Configure the production ECS task execution role to have permission to download the image from the ECR repository.

contents.en: Use Amazon ECR VPC endpoints and an Amazon S3 gateway endpoint. In the separate AWS account, create an ECR repository. Set the repository policy to allow the production ECS tasks to pull images from the main AWS account. Configure the production ECS task execution role to have permission to download the image from the ECR repository.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon ECR VPC endpoints 和 Amazon S3 gateway endpoint。在单独的 AWS 账户中，创建 ECR repository。将 repository policy 设置为允许生产 ECS tasks 从主 AWS 账户拉取镜像。配置生产 ECS task execution role，使其有权从 ECR repository 下载镜像。

options.label: B
options.content: Set a repository policy on the production ECR repository in the main AWS account. Configure the repository policy to allow the production ECS tasks in the separate AWS account to pull images from the main account. Configure the production ECS task execution role to have permission to download the image from the ECR repository.

contents.en: Set a repository policy on the production ECR repository in the main AWS account. Configure the repository policy to allow the production ECS tasks in the separate AWS account to pull images from the main account. Configure the production ECS task execution role to have permission to download the image from the ECR repository.
contents.zh: 在主 AWS 账户中的生产 ECR repository 上设置 repository policy。配置 repository policy，允许单独 AWS 账户中的生产 ECS tasks 从主账户拉取镜像。配置生产 ECS task execution role，使其有权从 ECR repository 下载镜像。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure ECR private image replication in the main AWS account. Activate cross-account replication. Define the destination account ID of the separate AWS account.

contents.en: Configure ECR private image replication in the main AWS account. Activate cross-account replication. Define the destination account ID of the separate AWS account.
contents.zh: 在主 AWS 账户中配置 ECR private image replication。激活 cross-account replication。定义单独 AWS 账户的 destination account ID。

options.label: D
options.content: Use Amazon ECR VPC endpoints and an Amazon S3 gateway endpoint. Set a repository policy on the production ECR repository in the main AWS account. Configure the repository policy to allow the production ECS tasks in the separate AWS account to pull images from the main account. Configure the production ECS task execution role to have permission to download the image from the ECR repository.

contents.en: Use Amazon ECR VPC endpoints and an Amazon S3 gateway endpoint. Set a repository policy on the production ECR repository in the main AWS account. Configure the repository policy to allow the production ECS tasks in the separate AWS account to pull images from the main account. Configure the production ECS task execution role to have permission to download the image from the ECR repository.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon ECR VPC endpoints 和 Amazon S3 gateway endpoint。在主 AWS 账户中的生产 ECR repository 上设置 repository policy。配置 repository policy，允许单独 AWS 账户中的生产 ECS tasks 从主账户拉取镜像。配置生产 ECS task execution role，使其有权从 ECR repository 下载镜像。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：D。D 通过 ECR VPC 端点和 S3 网关端点支持私有拉取镜像，并在主账号的 ECR 仓库策略中允许另一个账号的生产 ECS 任务拉取，同时让生产 ECS 任务执行角色具备下载镜像权限。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：D。D 通过 ECR VPC 端点和 S3 网关端点支持私有拉取镜像，并在主账号的 ECR 仓库策略中允许另一个账号的生产 ECS 任务拉取，同时让生产 ECS 任务执行角色具备下载镜像权限。
explanations.en: Correct answer: D. D uses ECR VPC endpoints and an S3 gateway endpoint, allows the production ECS tasks in the separate account to pull from the main account ECR repository through a repository policy, and grants the ECS task execution role permission to download the image.

contents.en: A company runs an application for multiple environments in a single AWS account. An AWS CodePipeline pipeline uses a development Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster to test an image for the application from an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository. The pipeline promotes the image to a production ECS cluster. The company needs to move the production cluster into a separate AWS account in the same AWS Region. The production cluster must be able to download the images over a private connection. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司在单个 AWS 账户中为多个环境运行一个应用程序。一个 AWS CodePipeline pipeline 使用开发 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster 来测试来自 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository 的应用程序镜像。该 pipeline 将镜像提升到生产 ECS cluster。公司需要将生产 cluster 移动到同一 AWS Region 中的单独 AWS 账户。生产 cluster 必须能够通过私有连接下载镜像。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company needs to ensure that flow logs remain configured for all existing and new VPCs in its AWS account. The company uses an AWS CloudFormation stack to manage its VPCs. The company needs a solution that will work for any VPCs that any IAM user creates. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Add the AWS::EC2::FlowLog resource to the CloudFormation stack that creates the VPCs.

contents.en: Add the AWS::EC2::FlowLog resource to the CloudFormation stack that creates the VPCs.
contents.zh: 将 AWS::EC2::FlowLog resource 添加到创建 VPC 的 CloudFormation stack 中。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an organization in AWS Organizations. Add the company's AWS account to the organization. Create an SCP to prevent users from modifying VPC flow logs.

contents.en: Create an organization in AWS Organizations. Add the company's AWS account to the organization. Create an SCP to prevent users from modifying VPC flow logs.
contents.zh: 在 AWS Organizations 中创建一个组织。将公司的 AWS 账户添加到该组织。创建一个 SCP，以防止用户修改 VPC flow logs。

options.label: C
options.content: Turn on AWS Config. Create an AWS Config rule to check whether VPC flow logs are turned on. Configure automatic remediation to turn on VPC flow logs.

contents.en: Turn on AWS Config. Create an AWS Config rule to check whether VPC flow logs are turned on. Configure automatic remediation to turn on VPC flow logs.
contents.zh: 启用 AWS Config。创建一个 AWS Config rule，以检查 VPC flow logs 是否已启用。配置 automatic remediation 以启用 VPC flow logs。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an IAM policy to deny the use of API calls for VPC flow logs. Attach the IAM policy to all IAM users.

contents.en: Create an IAM policy to deny the use of API calls for VPC flow logs. Attach the IAM policy to all IAM users.
contents.zh: 创建一个 IAM policy，以拒绝使用 VPC flow logs 的 API calls。将该 IAM policy 附加到所有 IAM users。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C。AWS Config 可以持续检查现有和新建 VPC 是否启用 VPC Flow Logs；C 创建对应的 Config 规则并配置自动修复来开启 Flow Logs，讨论也指出这同时覆盖监控和修复。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C。AWS Config 可以持续检查现有和新建 VPC 是否启用 VPC Flow Logs；C 创建对应的 Config 规则并配置自动修复来开启 Flow Logs，讨论也指出这同时覆盖监控和修复。
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. AWS Config can monitor both existing and new VPCs for VPC flow logs. C creates a Config rule to check whether flow logs are enabled and configures automatic remediation to turn them on.

contents.en: A company needs to ensure that flow logs remain configured for all existing and new VPCs in its AWS account. The company uses an AWS CloudFormation stack to manage its VPCs. The company needs a solution that will work for any VPCs that any IAM user creates. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司需要确保其 AWS 账户中所有现有和新的 VPC 都保持配置 flow logs。该公司使用 AWS CloudFormation stack 管理其 VPC。该公司需要一个对任何 IAM user 创建的任何 VPC 都有效的解决方案。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company's application teams use AWS CodeCommit repositories for their applications. The application teams have repositories in multiple AWS accounts. All accounts are in an organization in AWS Organizations. Each application team uses AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) configured with an external IdP to assume a developer IAM role. The developer role allows the application teams to use Git to work with the code in the repositories. A security audit reveals that the application teams can modify the main branch in any repository. A DevOps engineer must implement a solution that allows the application teams to modify the main branch of only the repositories that they manage. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Update the SAML assertion to pass the user's team name. Update the IAM role's trust policy to add an access-team session tag that has the team name.

contents.en: Update the SAML assertion to pass the user's team name. Update the IAM role's trust policy to add an access-team session tag that has the team name.
contents.zh: 更新 SAML assertion 以传递用户的团队名称。更新 IAM role 的 trust policy，以添加一个具有团队名称的 access-team session tag。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an approval rule template for each team in the Organizations management account. Associate the template with all the repositories. Add the developer role ARN as an approver.

contents.en: Create an approval rule template for each team in the Organizations management account. Associate the template with all the repositories. Add the developer role ARN as an approver.
contents.zh: 在 Organizations management account 中为每个团队创建 approval rule template。将该 template 与所有 repositories 关联。将 developer role ARN 添加为 approver。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an approval rule template for each account. Associate the template with all repositories. Add the "aws:ResourceTag/access-team": "$ ;{aws:PrincipalTag/access-team}" condition to the approval rule template.

contents.en: Create an approval rule template for each account. Associate the template with all repositories. Add the "aws:ResourceTag/access-team": "$ ;{aws:PrincipalTag/access-team}" condition to the approval rule template.
contents.zh: 为每个账户创建 approval rule template。将该 template 与所有 repositories 关联。向 approval rule template 添加 "aws:ResourceTag/access-team": "$ ;{aws:PrincipalTag/access-team}" condition。

options.label: D
options.content: For each CodeCommit repository, add an access-team tag that has the value set to the name of the associated team.

contents.en: For each CodeCommit repository, add an access-team tag that has the value set to the name of the associated team.
contents.zh: 对于每个 CodeCommit repository，添加一个 access-team tag，其值设置为关联团队的名称。

options.label: E
options.content: Attach an SCP to the accounts. Include the following statement:

contents.en: Attach an SCP to the accounts. Include the following statement:
contents.zh: 将一个 SCP 附加到账户。包含以下 statement:

options.label: F
options.content: Create an IAM permissions boundary in each account. Include the following statement:

contents.en: Create an IAM permissions boundary in each account. Include the following statement:
contents.zh: 在每个账户中创建一个 IAM permissions boundary。包含以下 statement:

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A、D、E。A 让 SAML 断言传递用户团队名，并在角色信任策略中形成 access-team 会话标签；D 给每个 CodeCommit 仓库设置对应的 access-team 资源标签；E 通过 SCP 使用资源标签条件实施访问控制。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A、D、E。A 让 SAML 断言传递用户团队名，并在角色信任策略中形成 access-team 会话标签；D 给每个 CodeCommit 仓库设置对应的 access-team 资源标签；E 通过 SCP 使用资源标签条件实施访问控制。
explanations.en: Correct answers: A, D, and E. A passes the user's team name through the SAML assertion and trust policy as an access-team session tag. D tags each CodeCommit repository with the matching access-team value, and E applies an SCP whose condition is based on that resource tag.

contents.en: A company's application teams use AWS CodeCommit repositories for their applications. The application teams have repositories in multiple AWS accounts. All accounts are in an organization in AWS Organizations. Each application team uses AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) configured with an external IdP to assume a developer IAM role. The developer role allows the application teams to use Git to work with the code in the repositories. A security audit reveals that the application teams can modify the main branch in any repository. A DevOps engineer must implement a solution that allows the application teams to modify the main branch of only the repositories that they manage. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司的应用程序团队为其应用程序使用 AWS CodeCommit repositories。应用程序团队在多个 AWS 账户中拥有 repositories。所有账户都位于 AWS Organizations 中的一个组织内。每个应用程序团队都使用配置了外部 IdP 的 AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) 来代入 developer IAM role。该 developer role 允许应用程序团队使用 Git 处理 repositories 中的代码。一次安全审计显示，应用程序团队可以修改任何 repository 中的 main branch。DevOps engineer 必须实施一种解决方案，使应用程序团队只能修改他们所管理 repositories 的 main branch。哪组步骤组合可以满足这些要求？（选择三个。）

questions.content: A company uses AWS WAF to protect its cloud infrastructure. A DevOps engineer needs to give an operations team the ability to analyze log messages from AWS WAF. The operations team needs to be able to create alarms for specific patterns in the log output. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. Configure the appropriate AWS WAF web ACL to send log messages to the log group. Instruct the operations team to create CloudWatch metric filters.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. Configure the appropriate AWS WAF web ACL to send log messages to the log group. Instruct the operations team to create CloudWatch metric filters.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group。配置相应的 AWS WAF web ACL，将日志消息发送到该 log group。指导运维团队创建 CloudWatch metric filters。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon OpenSearch Service cluster and appropriate indexes. Configure an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream to stream log data to the indexes. Use OpenSearch Dashboards to create filters and widgets.

contents.en: Create an Amazon OpenSearch Service cluster and appropriate indexes. Configure an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream to stream log data to the indexes. Use OpenSearch Dashboards to create filters and widgets.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon OpenSearch Service cluster 和相应 indexes。配置 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream，将日志数据流式传输到这些 indexes。使用 OpenSearch Dashboards 创建 filters 和 widgets。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket for the log output. Configure AWS WAF to send log outputs to the S3 bucket. Instruct the operations team to create AWS Lambda functions that detect each desired log message pattern. Configure the Lambda functions to publish to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic.

contents.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket for the log output. Configure AWS WAF to send log outputs to the S3 bucket. Instruct the operations team to create AWS Lambda functions that detect each desired log message pattern. Configure the Lambda functions to publish to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic.
contents.zh: 为日志输出创建一个 Amazon S3 bucket。配置 AWS WAF 将日志输出发送到 S3 bucket。指导运维团队创建 AWS Lambda functions，以检测每个所需的日志消息模式。配置 Lambda functions 发布到 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket for the log output. Configure AWS WAF to send log outputs to the S3 bucket. Use Amazon Athena to create an external table definition that fits the log message pattern. Instruct the operations team to write SQL queries and to create Amazon CloudWatch metric filters for the Athena queries.

contents.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket for the log output. Configure AWS WAF to send log outputs to the S3 bucket. Use Amazon Athena to create an external table definition that fits the log message pattern. Instruct the operations team to write SQL queries and to create Amazon CloudWatch metric filters for the Athena queries.
contents.zh: 为日志输出创建一个 Amazon S3 bucket。配置 AWS WAF 将日志输出发送到 S3 bucket。使用 Amazon Athena 创建适合日志消息模式的外部表定义。指导运维团队编写 SQL queries，并为 Athena queries 创建 Amazon CloudWatch metric filters。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A。应创建 CloudWatch Logs 日志组，并配置相应 AWS WAF web ACL 将日志发送到该日志组；之后运维团队可以基于这些日志创建 CloudWatch metric filters。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A。应创建 CloudWatch Logs 日志组，并配置相应 AWS WAF web ACL 将日志发送到该日志组；之后运维团队可以基于这些日志创建 CloudWatch metric filters。
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. Create a CloudWatch Logs log group and configure the AWS WAF web ACL to send logs to it. Once WAF logging is enabled, the operations team can create CloudWatch metric filters from those log messages.

contents.en: A company uses AWS WAF to protect its cloud infrastructure. A DevOps engineer needs to give an operations team the ability to analyze log messages from AWS WAF. The operations team needs to be able to create alarms for specific patterns in the log output. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS WAF 保护其云基础设施。DevOps engineer 需要让运维团队能够分析来自 AWS WAF 的日志消息。运维团队需要能够为日志输出中的特定模式创建警报。哪种解决方案能以最少的运维开销满足这些要求？

questions.content: A software team is using AWS CodePipeline to automate its Java application release pipeline. The pipeline consists of a source stage, then a build stage, and then a deploy stage. Each stage contains a single action that has a runOrder value of 1. The team wants to integrate unit tests into the existing release pipeline. The team needs a solution that deploys only the code changes that pass all unit tests. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Modify the build stage. Add a test action that has a runOrder value of 1. Use AWS CodeDeploy as the action provider to run unit tests.

contents.en: Modify the build stage. Add a test action that has a runOrder value of 1. Use AWS CodeDeploy as the action provider to run unit tests.
contents.zh: 修改 build stage。添加一个 runOrder 值为 1 的 test action。使用 AWS CodeDeploy 作为 action provider 来运行单元测试。

options.label: B
options.content: Modify the build stage. Add a test action that has a runOrder value of 2. Use AWS CodeBuild as the action provider to run unit tests.

contents.en: Modify the build stage. Add a test action that has a runOrder value of 2. Use AWS CodeBuild as the action provider to run unit tests.
contents.zh: 修改 build stage。添加一个 runOrder 值为 2 的 test action。使用 AWS CodeBuild 作为 action provider 来运行单元测试。

options.label: C
options.content: Modify the deploy stage. Add a test action that has a runOrder value of 1. Use AWS CodeDeploy as the action provider to run unit tests.

contents.en: Modify the deploy stage. Add a test action that has a runOrder value of 1. Use AWS CodeDeploy as the action provider to run unit tests.
contents.zh: 修改 deploy stage。添加一个 runOrder 值为 1 的 test action。使用 AWS CodeDeploy 作为 action provider 来运行单元测试。

options.label: D
options.content: Modify the deploy stage. Add a test action that has a runOrder value of 2. Use AWS CodeBuild as the action provider to run unit tests.

contents.en: Modify the deploy stage. Add a test action that has a runOrder value of 2. Use AWS CodeBuild as the action provider to run unit tests.
contents.zh: 修改 deploy stage。添加一个 runOrder 值为 2 的 test action。使用 AWS CodeBuild 作为 action provider 来运行单元测试。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B。单元测试必须在构建产物完成后运行；B 修改 build 阶段，添加 runOrder 为 2 的 CodeBuild 测试动作，确保测试在构建动作之后执行，而不是与构建并行或等到部署前才处理。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B。单元测试必须在构建产物完成后运行；B 修改 build 阶段，添加 runOrder 为 2 的 CodeBuild 测试动作，确保测试在构建动作之后执行，而不是与构建并行或等到部署前才处理。
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. Unit tests should run after artifacts are built. B adds a CodeBuild test action in the build stage with runOrder 2, ensuring it runs after the build action rather than in parallel or only before deployment.

contents.en: A software team is using AWS CodePipeline to automate its Java application release pipeline. The pipeline consists of a source stage, then a build stage, and then a deploy stage. Each stage contains a single action that has a runOrder value of 1. The team wants to integrate unit tests into the existing release pipeline. The team needs a solution that deploys only the code changes that pass all unit tests. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一个软件团队正在使用 AWS CodePipeline 自动化其 Java 应用程序发布 pipeline。该 pipeline 包含 source stage，然后是 build stage，再然后是 deploy stage。每个 stage 都包含一个 runOrder 值为 1 的单个 action。团队希望将单元测试集成到现有发布 pipeline 中。团队需要一种只部署通过所有单元测试的代码更改的解决方案。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations to manage several AWS accounts that the company's developers use. The company requires all data to be encrypted in transit. Multiple Amazon S3 buckets that were created in developer accounts allow unencrypted connections. A DevOps engineer must enforce encryption of data in transit for all existing S3 buckets that are created in accounts in the organization. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to deploy an AWS Network Firewall firewall to each account. Route all outbound requests from the AWS environment through the firewall. Deploy a policy to block access to all outbound requests on port 80.

contents.en: Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to deploy an AWS Network Firewall firewall to each account. Route all outbound requests from the AWS environment through the firewall. Deploy a policy to block access to all outbound requests on port 80.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CloudFormation StackSets 将 AWS Network Firewall firewall 部署到每个账户。将来自 AWS 环境的所有出站请求通过该 firewall 路由。部署一个策略来阻止端口 80 上的所有出站请求访问。

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to deploy an AWS Network Firewall firewall to each account. Route all inbound requests to the AWS environment through the firewall. Deploy a policy to block access to all inbound requests on port 80.

contents.en: Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to deploy an AWS Network Firewall firewall to each account. Route all inbound requests to the AWS environment through the firewall. Deploy a policy to block access to all inbound requests on port 80.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CloudFormation StackSets 将 AWS Network Firewall firewall 部署到每个账户。将所有入站请求通过该 firewall 路由到 AWS 环境。部署一个策略来阻止端口 80 上的所有入站请求访问。

options.label: C
options.content: Turn on AWS Config for the organization. Deploy a conformance pack that uses the s3-bucket-ssl-requests-only managed rule and an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook. Use a runbook that adds a bucket policy statement to deny access to an S3 bucket when the value of the aws:SecureTransport condition key is false.

contents.en: Turn on AWS Config for the organization. Deploy a conformance pack that uses the s3-bucket-ssl-requests-only managed rule and an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook. Use a runbook that adds a bucket policy statement to deny access to an S3 bucket when the value of the aws:SecureTransport condition key is false.
contents.zh: 为组织启用 AWS Config。部署一个 conformance pack，该 pack 使用 s3-bucket-ssl-requests-only managed rule 和 AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook。使用一个 runbook 添加 bucket policy statement，在 aws:SecureTransport condition key 的值为 false 时拒绝访问 S3 bucket。

options.label: D
options.content: Turn on AWS Config for the organization. Deploy a conformance pack that uses the s3-bucket-ssl-requests-only managed rule and an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook. Use a runbook that adds a bucket policy statement to deny access to an S3 bucket when the value of the s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption-aws-kms-key-id condition key is null.

contents.en: Turn on AWS Config for the organization. Deploy a conformance pack that uses the s3-bucket-ssl-requests-only managed rule and an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook. Use a runbook that adds a bucket policy statement to deny access to an S3 bucket when the value of the s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption-aws-kms-key-id condition key is null.
contents.zh: 为组织启用 AWS Config。部署一个 conformance pack，该 pack 使用 s3-bucket-ssl-requests-only managed rule 和 AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook。使用一个 runbook 添加 bucket policy statement，在 s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption-aws-kms-key-id condition key 的值为 null 时拒绝访问 S3 bucket。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C。讨论强调需要使用 aws:SecureTransport 条件只允许 HTTPS/TLS 访问。C 在组织中启用 AWS Config，并部署包含 s3-bucket-ssl-requests-only 托管规则和 Systems Manager 自动化运行手册的合规包，通过桶策略拒绝 aws:SecureTransport 为 false 的请求。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C。讨论强调需要使用 aws:SecureTransport 条件只允许 HTTPS/TLS 访问。C 在组织中启用 AWS Config，并部署包含 s3-bucket-ssl-requests-only 托管规则和 Systems Manager 自动化运行手册的合规包，通过桶策略拒绝 aws:SecureTransport 为 false 的请求。
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. The discussion highlights aws:SecureTransport as the needed condition for HTTPS/TLS-only access. C enables AWS Config for the organization and deploys a conformance pack with the s3-bucket-ssl-requests-only rule and an Automation runbook that adds a bucket policy denying requests where aws:SecureTransport is false.

contents.en: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations to manage several AWS accounts that the company's developers use. The company requires all data to be encrypted in transit. Multiple Amazon S3 buckets that were created in developer accounts allow unencrypted connections. A DevOps engineer must enforce encryption of data in transit for all existing S3 buckets that are created in accounts in the organization. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations 中的一个组织来管理公司开发人员使用的多个 AWS 账户。公司要求所有数据在传输过程中加密。在开发人员账户中创建的多个 Amazon S3 buckets 允许未加密连接。DevOps engineer 必须对组织中账户内创建的所有现有 S3 buckets 强制执行传输中数据加密。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company is reviewing its IAM policies. One policy written by the DevOps engineer has been flagged as too permissive. The policy is used by an AWS Lambda function that issues a stop command to Amazon EC2 instances tagged with Environment: NonProduction over the weekend. The current policy is: What changes should the engineer make to achieve a policy of least permission? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Add the following conditional expression:

contents.en: Add the following conditional expression:
contents.zh: 添加以下 conditional expression:

options.label: B
options.content: Change "Resource": "*"to "Resource": "arn:aws:ec2:*:*:instance/*"

contents.en: Change "Resource": "*"to "Resource": "arn:aws:ec2:*:*:instance/*"
contents.zh: 将 "Resource": "*"更改为 "Resource": "arn:aws:ec2:*:*:instance/*"

options.label: C
options.content: Add the following conditional expression:

contents.en: Add the following conditional expression:
contents.zh: 添加以下 conditional expression:

options.label: D
options.content: Add the following conditional expression:

contents.en: Add the following conditional expression:
contents.zh: 添加以下 conditional expression:

options.label: E
options.content: Change "Action": "ec2:*"to "Action": "ec2:StopInstances"

contents.en: Change "Action": "ec2:*"to "Action": "ec2:StopInstances"
contents.zh: 将 "Action": "ec2:*"更改为 "Action": "ec2:StopInstances"

options.label: F
options.content: Add the following conditional expression:

contents.en: Add the following conditional expression:
contents.zh: 添加以下 conditional expression:

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B。B 将策略中的 Resource 从通配符改为 arn:aws:ec2:*:*:instance/*，把允许范围限制为 EC2 实例资源；讨论也指出这能让相关操作只作用在 EC2 实例上。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B。B 将策略中的 Resource 从通配符改为 arn:aws:ec2:*:*:instance/*，把允许范围限制为 EC2 实例资源；讨论也指出这能让相关操作只作用在 EC2 实例上。
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. B changes Resource from a wildcard to arn:aws:ec2:*:*:instance/*, limiting the permission scope to EC2 instance resources. The discussion notes this is the relevant resource restriction for EC2 actions.

contents.en: A company is reviewing its IAM policies. One policy written by the DevOps engineer has been flagged as too permissive. The policy is used by an AWS Lambda function that issues a stop command to Amazon EC2 instances tagged with Environment: NonProduction over the weekend. The current policy is: What changes should the engineer make to achieve a policy of least permission? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司正在审查其 IAM policies。DevOps engineer 编写的一项 policy 被标记为过于宽松。该 policy 由一个 AWS Lambda function 使用，该函数会在周末向标记为 Environment: NonProduction 的 Amazon EC2 instances 发出 stop 命令。当前 policy 如下：工程师应进行哪些更改以实现最小权限策略？（选择三个。）

questions.content: A company is developing an application that will generate log events. The log events consist of five distinct metrics every one tenth of a second and produce a large amount of data. The company needs to configure the application to write the logs to Amazon Timestream. The company will configure a daily query against the Timestream table. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the FASTEST query performance? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Use batch writes to write multiple log events in a single write operation.

contents.en: Use batch writes to write multiple log events in a single write operation.
contents.zh: 使用 batch writes 在单个写入操作中写入多个日志事件。

options.label: B
options.content: Write each log event as a single write operation.

contents.en: Write each log event as a single write operation.
contents.zh: 将每个日志事件作为单个写入操作写入。

options.label: C
options.content: Treat each log as a single-measure record.

contents.en: Treat each log as a single-measure record.
contents.zh: 将每条日志视为 single-measure record。

options.label: D
options.content: Treat each log as a multi-measure record.

contents.en: Treat each log as a multi-measure record.
contents.zh: 将每条日志视为 multi-measure record。

options.label: E
options.content: Configure the memory store retention period to be longer than the magnetic store retention period.

contents.en: Configure the memory store retention period to be longer than the magnetic store retention period.
contents.zh: 将 memory store retention period 配置为长于 magnetic store retention period。

options.label: F
options.content: Configure the memory store retention period to be shorter than the magnetic store retention period.

contents.en: Configure the memory store retention period to be shorter than the magnetic store retention period.
contents.zh: 将 memory store retention period 配置为短于 magnetic store retention period。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A、D、F。A 使用批量写入减少写入调用，D 将每条日志作为多度量记录以提高 Timestream 写入和查询效率，F 将内存存储保留期设置短于磁性存储保留期，符合按近期数据加速查询、长期数据降本保存的思路。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A、D、F。A 使用批量写入减少写入调用，D 将每条日志作为多度量记录以提高 Timestream 写入和查询效率，F 将内存存储保留期设置短于磁性存储保留期，符合按近期数据加速查询、长期数据降本保存的思路。
explanations.en: Correct answers: A, D, and F. A batches log writes, D treats each log as a multi-measure record, and F keeps memory store retention shorter than magnetic store retention, aligning fast access for recent data with longer-term storage for older data.

contents.en: A company is developing an application that will generate log events. The log events consist of five distinct metrics every one tenth of a second and produce a large amount of data. The company needs to configure the application to write the logs to Amazon Timestream. The company will configure a daily query against the Timestream table. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the FASTEST query performance? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司正在开发一个会生成日志事件的应用程序。日志事件由每十分之一秒产生的五个不同指标组成，并会产生大量数据。公司需要配置应用程序将日志写入 Amazon Timestream。公司将针对 Timestream table 配置每日查询。哪组步骤组合能以最快的查询性能满足这些要求？（选择三个。）

questions.content: A DevOps engineer has created an AWS CloudFormation template that deploys an application on Amazon EC2 instances. The EC2 instances run Amazon Linux. The application is deployed to the EC2 instances by using shell scripts that contain user data. The EC2 instances have an IAM instance profile that has an IAM role with the AmazonSSMManagedinstanceCore managed policy attached. The DevOps engineer has modified the user data in the CloudFormation template to install a new version of the application. The engineer has also applied the stack update. However, the application was not updated on the running EC2 instances. The engineer needs to ensure that the changes to the application are installed on the running EC2 instances. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Configure the user data content to use the Multipurpose Internet Mail Extensions (MIME) multipart format. Set the scripts- user parameter to always in the text/cloud-config section.

contents.en: Configure the user data content to use the Multipurpose Internet Mail Extensions (MIME) multipart format. Set the scripts- user parameter to always in the text/cloud-config section.
contents.zh: 将 user data 内容配置为使用 Multipurpose Internet Mail Extensions (MIME) multipart format。在 text/cloud-config section 中将 scripts- user parameter 设置为 always。

options.label: B
options.content: Refactor the user data commands to use the cfn-init helper script. Update the user data to install and configure the cfn-hup and cfn-init helper scripts to monitor and apply the metadata changes.

contents.en: Refactor the user data commands to use the cfn-init helper script. Update the user data to install and configure the cfn-hup and cfn-init helper scripts to monitor and apply the metadata changes.
contents.zh: 重构 user data commands 以使用 cfn-init helper script。更新 user data，以安装和配置 cfn-hup 与 cfn-init helper scripts，从而监控并应用 metadata changes。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure an EC2 launch template for the EC2 instances. Create a new EC2 Auto Scaling group. Associate the Auto Scaling group with the EC2 launch template. Use the AutoScalingScheduledAction update policy for the Auto Scaling group.

contents.en: Configure an EC2 launch template for the EC2 instances. Create a new EC2 Auto Scaling group. Associate the Auto Scaling group with the EC2 launch template. Use the AutoScalingScheduledAction update policy for the Auto Scaling group.
contents.zh: 为 EC2 instances 配置 EC2 launch template。创建一个新的 EC2 Auto Scaling group。将该 Auto Scaling group 与 EC2 launch template 关联。对该 Auto Scaling group 使用 AutoScalingScheduledAction update policy。

options.label: D
options.content: Refactor the user data commands to use an AWS Systems Manager document (SSM document). Add an AWS CLI command in the user data to use Systems Manager Run Command to apply the SSM document to the EC2 instances.

contents.en: Refactor the user data commands to use an AWS Systems Manager document (SSM document). Add an AWS CLI command in the user data to use Systems Manager Run Command to apply the SSM document to the EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 重构 user data commands 以使用 AWS Systems Manager document (SSM document)。在 user data 中添加 AWS CLI command，以使用 Systems Manager Run Command 将 SSM document 应用于 EC2 instances。

options.label: E
options.content: Refactor the user data command to use an AWS Systems Manager document (SSM document). Use Systems Manager State Manager to create an association between the SSM document and the EC2 instances.

contents.en: Refactor the user data command to use an AWS Systems Manager document (SSM document). Use Systems Manager State Manager to create an association between the SSM document and the EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 重构 user data command 以使用 AWS Systems Manager document (SSM document)。使用 Systems Manager State Manager 在 SSM document 和 EC2 instances 之间创建 association。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B、E。B 将用户数据重构为 cfn-init，并配置 cfn-hup 监控和应用元数据变化；E 将配置逻辑重构为 SSM document，并用 Systems Manager State Manager 关联到实例。两者都能让运行中的 EC2 实例接收后续配置更新。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B、E。B 将用户数据重构为 cfn-init，并配置 cfn-hup 监控和应用元数据变化；E 将配置逻辑重构为 SSM document，并用 Systems Manager State Manager 关联到实例。两者都能让运行中的 EC2 实例接收后续配置更新。
explanations.en: Correct answers: B and E. B refactors user data to use cfn-init and cfn-hup so metadata changes can be monitored and applied. E uses an SSM document with State Manager associations, giving another managed way to apply updates to running EC2 instances.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer has created an AWS CloudFormation template that deploys an application on Amazon EC2 instances. The EC2 instances run Amazon Linux. The application is deployed to the EC2 instances by using shell scripts that contain user data. The EC2 instances have an IAM instance profile that has an IAM role with the AmazonSSMManagedinstanceCore managed policy attached. The DevOps engineer has modified the user data in the CloudFormation template to install a new version of the application. The engineer has also applied the stack update. However, the application was not updated on the running EC2 instances. The engineer needs to ensure that the changes to the application are installed on the running EC2 instances. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps engineer 创建了一个 AWS CloudFormation template，用于在 Amazon EC2 instances 上部署应用程序。EC2 instances 运行 Amazon Linux。应用程序通过包含 user data 的 shell scripts 部署到 EC2 instances。EC2 instances 具有一个 IAM instance profile，该 profile 包含一个附加了 AmazonSSMManagedinstanceCore managed policy 的 IAM role。DevOps engineer 修改了 CloudFormation template 中的 user data，以安装应用程序的新版本。工程师还应用了 stack update。但是，正在运行的 EC2 instances 上的应用程序并未更新。工程师需要确保应用程序的更改安装到正在运行的 EC2 instances 上。哪组步骤组合可以满足这些要求？（选择两个。）

questions.content: A company is refactoring applications to use AWS. The company identifies an internal web application that needs to make Amazon S3 API calls in a specific AWS account. The company wants to use its existing identity provider (IdP) auth.company.com for authentication. The IdP supports only OpenID Connect (OIDC). A DevOps engineer needs to secure the web application's access to the AWS account. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Configure AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On). Configure an IdP. Upload the IdP metadata from the existing IdP.

contents.en: Configure AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On). Configure an IdP. Upload the IdP metadata from the existing IdP.
contents.zh: 配置 AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)。配置一个 IdP。上传来自现有 IdP 的 IdP metadata。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an IAM IdP by using the provider URL, audience, and signature from the existing IP.

contents.en: Create an IAM IdP by using the provider URL, audience, and signature from the existing IP.
contents.zh: 使用来自现有 IP 的 provider URL、audience 和 signature 创建 IAM IdP。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an IAM role that has a policy that allows the necessary S3 actions. Configure the role's trust policy to allow the OIDC IP to assume the role if the sts.amazon.com:aud context key is appid_from_idp.

contents.en: Create an IAM role that has a policy that allows the necessary S3 actions. Configure the role's trust policy to allow the OIDC IP to assume the role if the sts.amazon.com:aud context key is appid_from_idp.
contents.zh: 创建一个具有允许必要 S3 actions 的 policy 的 IAM role。配置该 role 的 trust policy，在 sts.amazon.com:aud context key 为 appid_from_idp 时，允许 OIDC IP assume 该 role。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an IAM role that has a policy that allows the necessary S3 actions. Configure the role's trust policy to allow the OIDC IP to assume the role if the auth.company.com:aud context key is appid_from_idp.

contents.en: Create an IAM role that has a policy that allows the necessary S3 actions. Configure the role's trust policy to allow the OIDC IP to assume the role if the auth.company.com:aud context key is appid_from_idp.
contents.zh: 创建一个具有允许必要 S3 actions 的 policy 的 IAM role。配置该 role 的 trust policy，在 auth.company.com:aud context key 为 appid_from_idp 时，允许 OIDC IP assume 该 role。

options.label: E
options.content: Configure the web application to use the AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity API operation to retrieve temporary credentials. Use the temporary credentials to make the S3 API calls.

contents.en: Configure the web application to use the AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity API operation to retrieve temporary credentials. Use the temporary credentials to make the S3 API calls.
contents.zh: 配置 Web 应用程序使用 AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity API operation 检索临时凭证。使用临时凭证发起 S3 API calls。

options.label: F
options.content: Configure the web application to use the GetFederationToken API operation to retrieve temporary credentials. Use the temporary credentials to make the S3 API calls.

contents.en: Configure the web application to use the GetFederationToken API operation to retrieve temporary credentials. Use the temporary credentials to make the S3 API calls.
contents.zh: 配置 Web 应用程序使用 GetFederationToken API operation 检索临时凭证。使用临时凭证发起 S3 API calls。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B、D、E。B 使用现有 OIDC 身份提供商的信息创建 IAM IdP；D 创建具有必要 S3 权限的角色，并在信任策略中限制特定 audience；E 让 Web 应用调用 AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity 获取临时凭证，再用这些凭证访问 S3。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B、D、E。B 使用现有 OIDC 身份提供商的信息创建 IAM IdP；D 创建具有必要 S3 权限的角色，并在信任策略中限制特定 audience；E 让 Web 应用调用 AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity 获取临时凭证，再用这些凭证访问 S3。
explanations.en: Correct answers: B, D, and E. B creates an IAM OIDC identity provider from the existing provider details. D creates an IAM role with required S3 permissions and a trust policy constrained by the audience value. E has the web application call AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity to obtain temporary credentials for S3 API calls.

contents.en: A company is refactoring applications to use AWS. The company identifies an internal web application that needs to make Amazon S3 API calls in a specific AWS account. The company wants to use its existing identity provider (IdP) auth.company.com for authentication. The IdP supports only OpenID Connect (OIDC). A DevOps engineer needs to secure the web application's access to the AWS account. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司正在重构应用程序以使用 AWS。该公司确定了一个内部 Web 应用程序，该应用程序需要在特定 AWS 账户中发起 Amazon S3 API calls。公司希望使用其现有身份提供商 (IdP) auth.company.com 进行身份验证。该 IdP 仅支持 OpenID Connect (OIDC)。DevOps engineer 需要保护该 Web 应用程序对 AWS 账户的访问。哪组步骤组合可以满足这些要求？（选择三个。）

questions.content: A company uses Amazon RDS for all databases in its AWS accounts. The company uses AWS Control Tower to build a landing zone that has an audit and logging account. All databases must be encrypted at rest for compliance reasons. The company's security engineer needs to receive notification about any noncompliant databases that are in the company's accounts. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS Control Tower to activate the optional detective control (guardrail) to determine whether the RDS storage is encrypted. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic in the company's audit account. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to filter noncompliant events from the AWS Control Tower control (guardrail) to notify the SNS topic. Subscribe the security engineer's email address to the SNS topic.

contents.en: Use AWS Control Tower to activate the optional detective control (guardrail) to determine whether the RDS storage is encrypted. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic in the company's audit account. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to filter noncompliant events from the AWS Control Tower control (guardrail) to notify the SNS topic. Subscribe the security engineer's email address to the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Control Tower 激活 optional detective control (guardrail)，以确定 RDS storage 是否已加密。在公司的 audit account 中创建一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic。创建一个 Amazon EventBridge rule，用于筛选来自 AWS Control Tower control (guardrail) 的 noncompliant events，并通知 SNS topic。将安全工程师的电子邮件地址订阅到 SNS topic。

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to deploy AWS Lambda functions to every account. Write the Lambda function code to determine whether the RDS storage is encrypted in the account the function is deployed to. Send the findings as an Amazon CloudWatch metric to the management account. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Create a CloudWatch alarm that notifies the SNS topic when metric thresholds are met. Subscribe the security engineer's email address to the SNS topic.

contents.en: Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to deploy AWS Lambda functions to every account. Write the Lambda function code to determine whether the RDS storage is encrypted in the account the function is deployed to. Send the findings as an Amazon CloudWatch metric to the management account. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic.
