Create a CloudWatch alarm that notifies the SNS topic when metric thresholds are met. Subscribe the security engineer's email address to the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CloudFormation StackSets 将 AWS Lambda functions 部署到每个账户。编写 Lambda function 代码，以确定该函数部署到的账户中的 RDS storage 是否已加密。将发现结果作为 Amazon CloudWatch metric 发送到 management account。创建一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic。创建一个 CloudWatch alarm，在达到 metric thresholds 时通知 SNS topic。将安全工程师的电子邮件地址订阅到 SNS topic。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a custom AWS Config rule in every account to determine whether the RDS storage is encrypted. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic in the audit account. Create an Amazon EventBidge rule to filter noncompliant events from the AWS Control Tower control (guardrail) to notify the SNS topic. Subscribe the security engineer's email address to the SNS topic.

contents.en: Create a custom AWS Config rule in every account to determine whether the RDS storage is encrypted. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic in the audit account. Create an Amazon EventBidge rule to filter noncompliant events from the AWS Control Tower control (guardrail) to notify the SNS topic. Subscribe the security engineer's email address to the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 在每个账户中创建一个 custom AWS Config rule，以确定 RDS storage 是否已加密。在 audit account 中创建一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic。创建一个 Amazon EventBidge rule，用于筛选来自 AWS Control Tower control (guardrail) 的 noncompliant events，并通知 SNS topic。将安全工程师的电子邮件地址订阅到 SNS topic。

options.label: D
options.content: Launch an Amazon C2 instance. Run an hourly cron job by using the AWS CLI to determine whether the RDS storage is encrypted in each AWS account. Store the results in an RDS database. Notify the security engineer by sending email messages from the EC2 instance when noncompliance is detected

contents.en: Launch an Amazon C2 instance. Run an hourly cron job by using the AWS CLI to determine whether the RDS storage is encrypted in each AWS account. Store the results in an RDS database. Notify the security engineer by sending email messages from the EC2 instance when noncompliance is detected
contents.zh: 启动一个 Amazon C2 instance。使用 AWS CLI 运行每小时 cron job，以确定每个 AWS 账户中的 RDS storage 是否已加密。将结果存储在 RDS database 中。当检测到不合规时，从 EC2 instance 发送电子邮件通知安全工程师

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A。题干使用 AWS Control Tower；A 启用用于检测 RDS 存储加密的可选侦测控制，并在审计账号中用 EventBridge 过滤不合规事件发送到 SNS，以通知安全工程师。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A。题干使用 AWS Control Tower；A 启用用于检测 RDS 存储加密的可选侦测控制，并在审计账号中用 EventBridge 过滤不合规事件发送到 SNS，以通知安全工程师。
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. Because the company uses AWS Control Tower, A activates the optional detective control for RDS storage encryption and uses EventBridge in the audit account to route noncompliant events to an SNS topic for the security engineer.

contents.en: A company uses Amazon RDS for all databases in its AWS accounts. The company uses AWS Control Tower to build a landing zone that has an audit and logging account. All databases must be encrypted at rest for compliance reasons. The company's security engineer needs to receive notification about any noncompliant databases that are in the company's accounts. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?
contents.zh: 一家公司在其 AWS 账户中的所有数据库都使用 Amazon RDS。该公司使用 AWS Control Tower 构建了一个包含审计账户和日志账户的 landing zone。出于合规原因，所有数据库都必须静态加密。公司的安全工程师需要收到公司账户中任何不合规数据库的通知。哪种解决方案能以最高的运维效率满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company is migrating from its on-premises data center to AWS. The company currently uses a custom on-premises Cl/CD pipeline solution to build and package software. The company wants its software packages and dependent public repositories to be available in AWS CodeArtifact to facilitate the creation of application-specific pipelines. Which combination of steps should the company take to update the CI/CD pipeline solution and to configure CodeArtifact with the LEAST operational overhead? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Update the C1ICD pipeline to create a VM image that contains newly packaged software. Use AWS Import/Export to make the VM image available as an Amazon EC2 AMI. Launch the AMI with an attached IAM instance profile that allows CodeArtifact actions. Use AWS CLI commands to publish the packages to a CodeArtifact repository.

contents.en: Update the C1ICD pipeline to create a VM image that contains newly packaged software. Use AWS Import/Export to make the VM image available as an Amazon EC2 AMI. Launch the AMI with an attached IAM instance profile that allows CodeArtifact actions. Use AWS CLI commands to publish the packages to a CodeArtifact repository.
contents.zh: 更新 C1ICD pipeline 以创建包含新打包软件的 VM image。使用 AWS Import/Export 将 VM image 作为 Amazon EC2 AMI 提供。启动该 AMI，并附加允许 CodeArtifact actions 的 IAM instance profile。使用 AWS CLI commands 将 packages 发布到 CodeArtifact repository。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS Identity and Access Management Roles Anywhere trust anchor. Create an IAM role that allows CodeArtifact actions and that has a trust relationship on the trust anchor. Update the on-premises CI/CD pipeline to assume the new IAM role and to publish the packages to CodeArtifact.

contents.en: Create an AWS Identity and Access Management Roles Anywhere trust anchor. Create an IAM role that allows CodeArtifact actions and that has a trust relationship on the trust anchor. Update the on-premises CI/CD pipeline to assume the new IAM role and to publish the packages to CodeArtifact.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Identity and Access Management Roles Anywhere trust anchor。创建一个允许 CodeArtifact actions 且对该 trust anchor 具有 trust relationship 的 IAM role。更新本地 CI/CD pipeline，使其 assume 新的 IAM role 并将 packages 发布到 CodeArtifact。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a new Amazon S3 bucket. Generate a presigned URL that allows the PutObject request. Update the on-premises CI/CD pipeline to use the presigned URL to publish the packages from the on-premises location to the S3 bucket. Create an AWS Lambda function that runs when packages are created in the bucket through a put command. Configure the Lambda function to publish the packages to CodeArtifact.

contents.en: Create a new Amazon S3 bucket. Generate a presigned URL that allows the PutObject request. Update the on-premises CI/CD pipeline to use the presigned URL to publish the packages from the on-premises location to the S3 bucket. Create an AWS Lambda function that runs when packages are created in the bucket through a put command. Configure the Lambda function to publish the packages to CodeArtifact.
contents.zh: 创建一个新的 Amazon S3 bucket。生成一个允许 PutObject request 的 presigned URL。更新本地 CI/CD pipeline，使用该 presigned URL 从本地位置将 packages 发布到 S3 bucket。创建一个 AWS Lambda function，该函数在通过 put command 在 bucket 中创建 packages 时运行。配置 Lambda function 将 packages 发布到 CodeArtifact。

options.label: D
options.content: For each public repository, create a CodeArutact repository that is configured with an external connection. Configure the dependent repositories as upstream public repositories.

contents.en: For each public repository, create a CodeArutact repository that is configured with an external connection. Configure the dependent repositories as upstream public repositories.
contents.zh: 对于每个 public repository，创建一个配置了 external connection 的 CodeArutact repository。将依赖 repositories 配置为 upstream public repositories。

options.label: E
options.content: Create a Codeartitact repository that is configured with a set of external connections to the public repositories. Configure the external connections to be downstream of the repository.

contents.en: Create a Codeartitact repository that is configured with a set of external connections to the public repositories. Configure the external connections to be downstream of the repository.
contents.zh: 创建一个配置了到 public repositories 的一组 external connections 的 Codeartitact repository。将 external connections 配置为该 repository 的 downstream。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B、D。B 使用 IAM Roles Anywhere 信任锚和 IAM 角色，让本地 CI/CD 流水线代入角色并发布包到 CodeArtifact；D 为每个公共仓库创建带 external connection 的 CodeArtifact 仓库，并把依赖仓库配置为上游公共仓库。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B、D。B 使用 IAM Roles Anywhere 信任锚和 IAM 角色，让本地 CI/CD 流水线代入角色并发布包到 CodeArtifact；D 为每个公共仓库创建带 external connection 的 CodeArtifact 仓库，并把依赖仓库配置为上游公共仓库。
explanations.en: Correct answers: B and D. B uses IAM Roles Anywhere with a trust anchor and IAM role so the on-premises CI/CD pipeline can assume the role and publish packages to CodeArtifact. D creates CodeArtifact repositories with external connections and configures dependent public repositories as upstreams.

contents.en: A company is migrating from its on-premises data center to AWS. The company currently uses a custom on-premises Cl/CD pipeline solution to build and package software. The company wants its software packages and dependent public repositories to be available in AWS CodeArtifact to facilitate the creation of application-specific pipelines. Which combination of steps should the company take to update the CI/CD pipeline solution and to configure CodeArtifact with the LEAST operational overhead? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司正在从本地数据中心迁移到 AWS。该公司当前使用自定义本地 Cl/CD pipeline solution 来构建和打包软件。公司希望其软件包和依赖的公共 repositories 可在 AWS CodeArtifact 中使用，以便创建特定于应用程序的 pipelines。公司应采取哪组步骤组合来更新 CI/CD pipeline solution 并以最少的运维开销配置 CodeArtifact？（选择两个。）

questions.content: A DevOps team uses AWS CodePipeline, AWS CodeBuild, and AWS CodeDeploy to deploy an application. The application is a REST API that uses AWS Lambda functions and Amazon API Gateway. Recent deployments have introduced errors that have affected many customers. The DevOps team needs a solution that reverts to the most recent stable version of the application when an error is detected. The solution must affect the fewest customers possible. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Set the deployment configuration in CodeDeploy to LambdaAllAtOnce. Configure automatic rollbacks on the deployment group. Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm that detects HTTP Bad Gateway errors on API Gateway. Configure the deployment group to roll back when the number of alarms meets the alarm threshold.

contents.en: Set the deployment configuration in CodeDeploy to LambdaAllAtOnce. Configure automatic rollbacks on the deployment group. Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm that detects HTTP Bad Gateway errors on API Gateway. Configure the deployment group to roll back when the number of alarms meets the alarm threshold.
contents.zh: 将 CodeDeploy 中的 deployment configuration 设置为 LambdaAllAtOnce。在 deployment group 上配置 automatic rollbacks。创建一个 Amazon CloudWatch alarm，用于检测 API Gateway 上的 HTTP Bad Gateway errors。配置 deployment group 在 alarms 数量达到 alarm threshold 时回滚。

options.label: B
options.content: Set the deployment configuration in CodeDeploy to LambdaCanary10Percent10Minutes. Configure automatic rollbacks on the deployment group. Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm that detects HTTP Bad Gateway errors on API Gateway. Configure the deployment group to roll back when the number of alarms meets the alarm threshold.

contents.en: Set the deployment configuration in CodeDeploy to LambdaCanary10Percent10Minutes. Configure automatic rollbacks on the deployment group. Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm that detects HTTP Bad Gateway errors on API Gateway. Configure the deployment group to roll back when the number of alarms meets the alarm threshold.
contents.zh: 将 CodeDeploy 中的 deployment configuration 设置为 LambdaCanary10Percent10Minutes。在 deployment group 上配置 automatic rollbacks。创建一个 Amazon CloudWatch alarm，用于检测 API Gateway 上的 HTTP Bad Gateway errors。配置 deployment group 在 alarms 数量达到 alarm threshold 时回滚。

options.label: C
options.content: Set the deployment configuration in CodeDeploy to LambdaAllAtOnce. Configure manual rollbacks on the deployment group. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to send notifications every time a deployment fails. Configure the SNS topic to invoke a new Lambda function that stops the current deployment and starts the most recent successful deployment.

contents.en: Set the deployment configuration in CodeDeploy to LambdaAllAtOnce. Configure manual rollbacks on the deployment group. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to send notifications every time a deployment fails. Configure the SNS topic to invoke a new Lambda function that stops the current deployment and starts the most recent successful deployment.
contents.zh: 将 CodeDeploy 中的 deployment configuration 设置为 LambdaAllAtOnce。在 deployment group 上配置 manual rollbacks。创建一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic，以便每次部署失败时发送通知。配置 SNS topic 调用一个新的 Lambda function，该函数停止当前部署并启动最近一次成功的部署。

options.label: D
options.content: Set the deployment configuration in CodeDeploy to LambdaCanary10Percent10Minutes. Configure manual rollbacks on the deployment group. Create a metric filter on an Amazon CloudWatch log group for API Gateway to monitor HTTP Bad Gateway errors. Configure the metric filter to invoke a new Lambda function that stops the current deployment and starts the most recent successful deployment.

contents.en: Set the deployment configuration in CodeDeploy to LambdaCanary10Percent10Minutes. Configure manual rollbacks on the deployment group. Create a metric filter on an Amazon CloudWatch log group for API Gateway to monitor HTTP Bad Gateway errors. Configure the metric filter to invoke a new Lambda function that stops the current deployment and starts the most recent successful deployment.
contents.zh: 将 CodeDeploy 中的 deployment configuration 设置为 LambdaCanary10Percent10Minutes。在 deployment group 上配置 manual rollbacks。在 API Gateway 的 Amazon CloudWatch log group 上创建一个 metric filter，以监控 HTTP Bad Gateway errors。配置该 metric filter 调用一个新的 Lambda function，该函数停止当前部署并启动最近一次成功的部署。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B。B 使用 LambdaCanary10Percent10Minutes 金丝雀部署，而不是一次性全量替换；同时配置自动回滚和 API Gateway 502 错误的 CloudWatch alarm，让 CodeDeploy 在告警达到阈值时回滚。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B。B 使用 LambdaCanary10Percent10Minutes 金丝雀部署，而不是一次性全量替换；同时配置自动回滚和 API Gateway 502 错误的 CloudWatch alarm，让 CodeDeploy 在告警达到阈值时回滚。
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. B uses the LambdaCanary10Percent10Minutes deployment configuration instead of all-at-once replacement, enables automatic rollback, and ties rollback to a CloudWatch alarm for API Gateway Bad Gateway errors.

contents.en: A DevOps team uses AWS CodePipeline, AWS CodeBuild, and AWS CodeDeploy to deploy an application. The application is a REST API that uses AWS Lambda functions and Amazon API Gateway. Recent deployments have introduced errors that have affected many customers. The DevOps team needs a solution that reverts to the most recent stable version of the application when an error is detected. The solution must affect the fewest customers possible. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?
contents.zh: 一个 DevOps team 使用 AWS CodePipeline、AWS CodeBuild 和 AWS CodeDeploy 部署应用程序。该应用程序是一个使用 AWS Lambda functions 和 Amazon API Gateway 的 REST API。最近的部署引入了影响许多客户的错误。DevOps team 需要一种在检测到错误时回滚到应用程序最近稳定版本的解决方案。该解决方案必须尽可能少影响客户。哪种解决方案能以最高的运维效率满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company recently deployed its web application on AWS. The company is preparing for a large-scale sales event and must ensure that the web application can scale to meet the demand. The application's frontend infrastructure includes an Amazon CloudFront distribution that has an Amazon S3 bucket as an origin. The backend infrastructure includes an Amazon API Gateway API, several AWS Lambda functions, and an Amazon Aurora DB cluster. The company's DevOps engineer conducts a load test and identifies that the Lambda functions can fulfil the peak number of requests. However, the DevOps engineer notices request latency during the initial burst of requests. Most of the requests to the Lambda functions produce queries to the database. A large portion of the invocation time is used to establish database connections. Which combination of steps will provide the application with the required scalability? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Configure a higher reserved concurrency for the Lambda functions.

contents.en: Configure a higher reserved concurrency for the Lambda functions.
contents.zh: 为 Lambda functions 配置更高的 reserved concurrency。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure a higher provisioned concurrency for the Lambda functions.

contents.en: Configure a higher provisioned concurrency for the Lambda functions.
contents.zh: 为 Lambda functions 配置更高的 provisioned concurrency。

options.label: C
options.content: Convert the DB cluster to an Aurora global database. Add additional Aurora Replicas in AWS Regions based on the locations of the company's customers.

contents.en: Convert the DB cluster to an Aurora global database. Add additional Aurora Replicas in AWS Regions based on the locations of the company's customers.
contents.zh: 将 DB cluster 转换为 Aurora global database。根据公司客户所在位置，在 AWS Regions 中添加额外的 Aurora Replicas。

options.label: D
options.content: Refactor the Lambda functions. Move the code blocks that initialize database connections into the function handlers.

contents.en: Refactor the Lambda functions. Move the code blocks that initialize database connections into the function handlers.
contents.zh: 重构 Lambda functions。将初始化数据库连接的 code blocks 移入 function handlers。

options.label: F
options.content: Use Amazon RDS Proxy to create a proxy for the Aurora database. Update the Lambda functions to use the proxy endpoints for database connections.

contents.en: Use Amazon RDS Proxy to create a proxy for the Aurora database. Update the Lambda functions to use the proxy endpoints for database connections.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon RDS Proxy 为 Aurora database 创建 proxy。更新 Lambda functions，以使用 proxy endpoints 进行数据库连接。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B、C、F。B 提高 Lambda 预置并发以降低突发流量下的冷启动延迟；C 将 Aurora 转为 global database 并按客户位置添加跨区域只读副本；F 使用 RDS Proxy，并让 Lambda 通过代理端点连接数据库，以缓解连接管理问题。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B、C、F。B 提高 Lambda 预置并发以降低突发流量下的冷启动延迟；C 将 Aurora 转为 global database 并按客户位置添加跨区域只读副本；F 使用 RDS Proxy，并让 Lambda 通过代理端点连接数据库，以缓解连接管理问题。
explanations.en: Correct answers: B, C, and F. B raises provisioned concurrency to reduce Lambda cold-start latency during bursts, C converts Aurora to a global database with regional read replicas for customer locations, and F uses RDS Proxy so Lambda connects through proxy endpoints instead of overwhelming the database with direct connections.

contents.en: A company recently deployed its web application on AWS. The company is preparing for a large-scale sales event and must ensure that the web application can scale to meet the demand. The application's frontend infrastructure includes an Amazon CloudFront distribution that has an Amazon S3 bucket as an origin. The backend infrastructure includes an Amazon API Gateway API, several AWS Lambda functions, and an Amazon Aurora DB cluster. The company's DevOps engineer conducts a load test and identifies that the Lambda functions can fulfil the peak number of requests. However, the DevOps engineer notices request latency during the initial burst of requests. Most of the requests to the Lambda functions produce queries to the database. A large portion of the invocation time is used to establish database connections. Which combination of steps will provide the application with the required scalability? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司最近在 AWS 上部署了其 Web 应用程序。公司正在为一场大规模销售活动做准备，必须确保 Web 应用程序能够扩展以满足需求。该应用程序的 frontend infrastructure 包括一个 Amazon CloudFront distribution，其 origin 为 Amazon S3 bucket。backend infrastructure 包括一个 Amazon API Gateway API、多个 AWS Lambda functions 和一个 Amazon Aurora DB cluster。公司的 DevOps engineer 进行了负载测试，并确认 Lambda functions 能够满足峰值请求数量。但是，DevOps engineer 注意到在初始突发请求期间存在 request latency。大多数对 Lambda functions 的请求都会对数据库产生查询。调用时间的很大一部分用于建立数据库连接。哪组步骤组合将为应用程序提供所需的可扩展性？（选择三个。）

questions.content: A company runs a web application that extends across multiple Availability Zones. The company uses an Application Load Balancer (ALB) for routing, AWS Fargate for the application, and Amazon Aurora for the application data. The company uses AWS CloudFormation templates to deploy the application. The company stores all Docker images in an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository in the same AWS account and AWS Region. A DevOps engineer needs to establish a disaster recovery (DR) process in another Region. The solution must meet an RPO of 8 hours and an RTO of 2 hours. The company sometimes needs more than 2 hours to build the Docker images from the Dockerfile. Which solution will meet the RTO and RPO requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.label: A
options.content: Copy the CloudFormation templates and the Dockerfile to an Amazon S3 bucket in the DR Region. Use AWS Backup to configure automated Aurora cross-Region hourly snapshots. In case of DR, build the most recent Docker image and upload the Docker image to an ECR repository in the DR Region. Use the CloudFormation template that has the most recent Aurora snapshot and the Docker image from the ECR repository to launch a new CloudFormation stack in the DR Region. Update the application DNS records to point to the new ALB.

contents.en: Copy the CloudFormation templates and the Dockerfile to an Amazon S3 bucket in the DR Region. Use AWS Backup to configure automated Aurora cross-Region hourly snapshots. In case of DR, build the most recent Docker image and upload the Docker image to an ECR repository in the DR Region. Use the CloudFormation template that has the most recent Aurora snapshot and the Docker image from the ECR repository to launch a new CloudFormation stack in the DR Region. Update the application DNS records to point to the new ALB.
contents.zh: 将 CloudFormation templates 和 Dockerfile 复制到 DR Region 中的 Amazon S3 bucket。使用 AWS Backup 配置自动化 Aurora cross-Region hourly snapshots。发生 DR 时，构建最新的 Docker image，并将 Docker image 上传到 DR Region 中的 ECR repository。使用包含最新 Aurora snapshot 和来自 ECR repository 的 Docker image 的 CloudFormation template，在 DR Region 中启动新的 CloudFormation stack。更新应用程序 DNS records 以指向新的 ALB。

options.label: B
options.content: Copy the CloudFormation templates to an Amazon S3 bucket in the DR Region. Configure Aurora automated backup Cross- Region Replication. Configure ECR Cross-Region Replication. In case of DR, use the CloudFormation template with the most recent Aurora snapshot and the Docker image from the local ECR repository to launch a new CloudFormation stack in the DR Region. Update the application DNS records to point to the new ALB.

contents.en: Copy the CloudFormation templates to an Amazon S3 bucket in the DR Region. Configure Aurora automated backup Cross- Region Replication. Configure ECR Cross-Region Replication. In case of DR, use the CloudFormation template with the most recent Aurora snapshot and the Docker image from the local ECR repository to launch a new CloudFormation stack in the DR Region. Update the application DNS records to point to the new ALB.
contents.zh: 将 CloudFormation templates 复制到 DR Region 中的 Amazon S3 bucket。配置 Aurora automated backup Cross- Region Replication。配置 ECR Cross-Region Replication。发生 DR 时，使用包含最新 Aurora snapshot 和来自本地 ECR repository 的 Docker image 的 CloudFormation template，在 DR Region 中启动新的 CloudFormation stack。更新应用程序 DNS records 以指向新的 ALB。

options.label: C
options.content: Copy the CloudFormation templates to an Amazon S3 bucket in the DR Region. Use Amazon EventBridge to schedule an AWS Lambda function to take an hourly snapshot of the Aurora database and of the most recent Docker image in the ECR repository. Copy the snapshot and the Docker image to the DR Region. In case of DR, use the CloudFormation template with the most recent Aurora snapshot and the Docker image from the local ECR repository to launch a new CloudFormation stack in the DR Region.

contents.en: Copy the CloudFormation templates to an Amazon S3 bucket in the DR Region. Use Amazon EventBridge to schedule an AWS Lambda function to take an hourly snapshot of the Aurora database and of the most recent Docker image in the ECR repository. Copy the snapshot and the Docker image to the DR Region. In case of DR, use the CloudFormation template with the most recent Aurora snapshot and the Docker image from the local ECR repository to launch a new CloudFormation stack in the DR Region.
contents.zh: 将 CloudFormation templates 复制到 DR Region 中的 Amazon S3 bucket。使用 Amazon EventBridge 调度 AWS Lambda function，每小时为 Aurora database 和 ECR repository 中的最新 Docker image 拍摄 snapshot。将 snapshot 和 Docker image 复制到 DR Region。发生 DR 时，使用包含最新 Aurora snapshot 和来自本地 ECR repository 的 Docker image 的 CloudFormation template，在 DR Region 中启动新的 CloudFormation stack。

options.label: D
options.content: Copy the CloudFormation templates to an Amazon S3 bucket in the DR Region. Deploy a second application CloudFormation stack in the DR Region. Reconfigure Aurora to be a global database. Update both CloudFormation stacks when a new application release in the current Region is needed. In case of DR, update the application DNS records to point to the new ALB.

contents.en: Copy the CloudFormation templates to an Amazon S3 bucket in the DR Region. Deploy a second application CloudFormation stack in the DR Region. Reconfigure Aurora to be a global database. Update both CloudFormation stacks when a new application release in the current Region is needed. In case of DR, update the application DNS records to point to the new ALB.
contents.zh: 将 CloudFormation templates 复制到 DR Region 中的 Amazon S3 bucket。在 DR Region 中部署第二个应用程序 CloudFormation stack。重新配置 Aurora 使其成为 global database。当当前 Region 需要新的应用程序发布时，更新两个 CloudFormation stacks。发生 DR 时，更新应用程序 DNS records 以指向新的 ALB。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B。B 预先把 CloudFormation 模板复制到灾备区域，启用 Aurora 自动备份跨区域复制和 ECR 跨区域复制；灾难发生时使用最新 Aurora 快照和本地 ECR 镜像在灾备区域启动新堆栈，再更新 DNS 指向新 ALB，以满足较短 RTO。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B。B 预先把 CloudFormation 模板复制到灾备区域，启用 Aurora 自动备份跨区域复制和 ECR 跨区域复制；灾难发生时使用最新 Aurora 快照和本地 ECR 镜像在灾备区域启动新堆栈，再更新 DNS 指向新 ALB，以满足较短 RTO。
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. B prepositions the CloudFormation templates in the DR Region, enables Aurora automated backup cross-Region replication and ECR cross-Region replication, then launches a new stack from the latest Aurora snapshot and local ECR image and updates DNS to the new ALB.

contents.en: A company runs a web application that extends across multiple Availability Zones. The company uses an Application Load Balancer (ALB) for routing, AWS Fargate for the application, and Amazon Aurora for the application data. The company uses AWS CloudFormation templates to deploy the application. The company stores all Docker images in an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository in the same AWS account and AWS Region. A DevOps engineer needs to establish a disaster recovery (DR) process in another Region. The solution must meet an RPO of 8 hours and an RTO of 2 hours. The company sometimes needs more than 2 hours to build the Docker images from the Dockerfile. Which solution will meet the RTO and RPO requirements MOST cost-effectively?
contents.zh: 一家公司运行一个跨多个 Availability Zones 的 Web 应用程序。该公司使用 Application Load Balancer (ALB) 进行路由，使用 AWS Fargate 运行应用程序，使用 Amazon Aurora 存储应用程序数据。公司使用 AWS CloudFormation templates 部署应用程序。公司将所有 Docker images 存储在同一 AWS 账户和 AWS Region 中的 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository。DevOps engineer 需要在另一个 Region 中建立 disaster recovery (DR) 流程。该解决方案必须满足 8 小时的 RPO 和 2 小时的 RTO。公司有时需要超过 2 小时才能从 Dockerfile 构建 Docker images。哪种解决方案能以最具成本效益的方式满足 RTO 和 RPO 要求？

questions.content: A company's application runs on Amazon EC2 instances. The application writes to a log file that records the username, date, time, and source IP address of the login. The log is published to a log group in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. The company is performing a root cause analysis for an event that occurred on the previous day. The company needs to know the number of logins for a specific user from the past 7 days. Which solution will provide this information?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a CloudWatch Logs metric filter on the log group. Use a filter pattern that matches the username. Publish a CloudWatch metric that sums the number of logins over the past 7 days.

contents.en: Create a CloudWatch Logs metric filter on the log group. Use a filter pattern that matches the username. Publish a CloudWatch metric that sums the number of logins over the past 7 days.
contents.zh: 在该 log group 上创建 CloudWatch Logs metric filter。使用匹配用户名的 filter pattern。发布一个 CloudWatch metric，用于汇总过去 7 天的登录次数。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a CloudWatch Logs subscription on the log group. Use a filter pattern that matches the username. Publish a CloudWatch metric that sums the number of logins over the past 7 days.

contents.en: Create a CloudWatch Logs subscription on the log group. Use a filter pattern that matches the username. Publish a CloudWatch metric that sums the number of logins over the past 7 days.
contents.zh: 在该 log group 上创建 CloudWatch Logs subscription。使用匹配用户名的 filter pattern。发布一个 CloudWatch metric，用于汇总过去 7 天的登录次数。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a CloudWatch Logs Insights query that uses an aggregation function to count the number of logins for the username over the past 7 days. Run the query against the log group.

contents.en: Create a CloudWatch Logs Insights query that uses an aggregation function to count the number of logins for the username over the past 7 days. Run the query against the log group.
contents.zh: 创建一个 CloudWatch Logs Insights query，该查询使用 aggregation function 统计过去 7 天中该用户名的登录次数。针对该 log group 运行该 query。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a CloudWatch dashboard. Add a number widget that has a filter pattern that counts the number of logins for the username over the past 7 days directly from the log group.

contents.en: Create a CloudWatch dashboard. Add a number widget that has a filter pattern that counts the number of logins for the username over the past 7 days directly from the log group.
contents.zh: 创建一个 CloudWatch dashboard。添加一个 number widget，该 widget 具有一个 filter pattern，可直接从该 log group 统计过去 7 天中该用户名的登录次数。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C。需要统计过去 7 天某用户名的登录次数；C 使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 聚合查询在日志组上计数，正好匹配讨论中所说的获取所需信息。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C。需要统计过去 7 天某用户名的登录次数；C 使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 聚合查询在日志组上计数，正好匹配讨论中所说的获取所需信息。
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. To get the number of logins for a username over the past 7 days, C runs a CloudWatch Logs Insights query with an aggregation function against the log group.

contents.en: A company's application runs on Amazon EC2 instances. The application writes to a log file that records the username, date, time, and source IP address of the login. The log is published to a log group in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. The company is performing a root cause analysis for an event that occurred on the previous day. The company needs to know the number of logins for a specific user from the past 7 days. Which solution will provide this information?
contents.zh: 一家公司的应用程序运行在 Amazon EC2 instances 上。该应用程序写入一个日志文件，记录登录的用户名、日期、时间和源 IP 地址。该日志发布到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 中的一个 log group。公司正在对前一天发生的事件进行根因分析。公司需要知道过去 7 天中特定用户的登录次数。哪种解决方案可以提供此信息？

questions.content: A company has an AWS CodeDeploy application. The application has a deployment group that uses a single tag group to identify instances for the deployment of Application. The single tag group configuration identifies instances that have Environment=Production and Name=ApplicationA tags for the deployment of ApplicationA. The company launches an additional Amazon EC2 instance with Department=Marketing, Environment=Production, and Name=ApplicationB tags. On the next CodeDeploy deployment of Application, the additional instance has ApplicationA installed on it. A DevOps engineer needs to configure the existing deployment group to prevent ApplicationA from being installed on the additional instance. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Change the current single tag group to include only the Environment=Production tag. Add another single tag group that includes only the Name=ApplicationA tag.

contents.en: Change the current single tag group to include only the Environment=Production tag. Add another single tag group that includes only the Name=ApplicationA tag.
contents.zh: 将当前单个 tag group 更改为仅包含 Environment=Production tag。添加另一个仅包含 Name=ApplicationA tag 的单个 tag group。

options.label: B
options.content: Change the current single tag group to include the Department=Marketing, Environment=production, and Name=ApplicationA tags.

contents.en: Change the current single tag group to include the Department=Marketing, Environment=production, and Name=ApplicationA tags.
contents.zh: 将当前单个 tag group 更改为包含 Department=Marketing、Environment=production 和 Name=ApplicationA tags。

options.label: C
options.content: Add another single tag group that includes only the Department=Marketing tag. Keep the Environment=Production and Name=ApplicationA tags with the current single tag group.

contents.en: Add another single tag group that includes only the Department=Marketing tag. Keep the Environment=Production and Name=ApplicationA tags with the current single tag group.
contents.zh: 添加另一个仅包含 Department=Marketing tag 的单个 tag group。保留当前单个 tag group 中的 Environment=Production 和 Name=ApplicationA tags。

options.label: D
options.content: Change the current single tag group to include only the Environment=Production tag. Add another single tag group that includes only the Department=Marketing tag.

contents.en: Change the current single tag group to include only the Environment=Production tag. Add another single tag group that includes only the Department=Marketing tag.
contents.zh: 将当前单个 tag group 更改为仅包含 Environment=Production tag。添加另一个仅包含 Department=Marketing tag 的单个 tag group。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A。讨论指出同一个标签组内的标签是 OR 关系，不同标签组之间是 AND 关系；因此 A 将 Environment=Production 和 Name=ApplicationA 放入两个单独标签组，才能同时匹配生产环境和指定应用。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A。讨论指出同一个标签组内的标签是 OR 关系，不同标签组之间是 AND 关系；因此 A 将 Environment=Production 和 Name=ApplicationA 放入两个单独标签组，才能同时匹配生产环境和指定应用。
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. The discussion states that tags within one tag group use OR logic, while separate tag groups use AND logic. A places Environment=Production and Name=ApplicationA in separate single tag groups so both conditions must match.

contents.en: A company has an AWS CodeDeploy application. The application has a deployment group that uses a single tag group to identify instances for the deployment of Application. The single tag group configuration identifies instances that have Environment=Production and Name=ApplicationA tags for the deployment of ApplicationA. The company launches an additional Amazon EC2 instance with Department=Marketing, Environment=Production, and Name=ApplicationB tags. On the next CodeDeploy deployment of Application, the additional instance has ApplicationA installed on it. A DevOps engineer needs to configure the existing deployment group to prevent ApplicationA from being installed on the additional instance. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个 AWS CodeDeploy application。该 application 有一个 deployment group，该 group 使用单个 tag group 来识别用于部署 Application 的 instances。该单个 tag group 配置识别具有 Environment=Production 和 Name=ApplicationA tags 的 instances，用于部署 ApplicationA。公司启动了一个额外的 Amazon EC2 instance，该 instance 具有 Department=Marketing、Environment=Production 和 Name=ApplicationB tags。在下一次 Application 的 CodeDeploy deployment 中，额外的 instance 上安装了 ApplicationA。DevOps engineer 需要配置现有 deployment group，以防止 ApplicationA 安装到该额外 instance 上。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company is launching an application that stores raw data in an Amazon S3 bucket. Three applications need to access the data to generate reports. The data must be redacted differently for each application before the applications can access the data. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an S3 bucket for each application. Configure S3 Same-Region Replication (SRR) from the raw data's S3 bucket to each application's S3 bucket. Configure each application to consume data from its own S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create an S3 bucket for each application. Configure S3 Same-Region Replication (SRR) from the raw data's S3 bucket to each application's S3 bucket. Configure each application to consume data from its own S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 为每个应用程序创建一个 S3 bucket。配置从原始数据的 S3 bucket 到每个应用程序 S3 bucket 的 S3 Same-Region Replication (SRR)。配置每个应用程序从其自己的 S3 bucket 消费数据。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon Kinesis data stream. Create an AWS Lambda function that is invoked by object creation events in the raw data's S3 bucket. Program the Lambda function to redact data for each application. Publish the data on the Kinesis data stream. Configure each application to consume data from the Kinesis data stream.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Kinesis data stream. Create an AWS Lambda function that is invoked by object creation events in the raw data's S3 bucket. Program the Lambda function to redact data for each application. Publish the data on the Kinesis data stream. Configure each application to consume data from the Kinesis data stream.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon Kinesis data stream。创建一个由原始数据 S3 bucket 中对象创建事件调用的 AWS Lambda function。编写 Lambda function，为每个应用程序脱敏数据。将数据发布到 Kinesis data stream。配置每个应用程序从 Kinesis data stream 消费数据。

options.label: C
options.content: For each application, create an S3 access point that uses the raw data's S3 bucket as the destination. Create an AWS Lambda function that is invoked by object creation events in the raw data's S3 bucket. Program the Lambda function to redact data for each application. Store the data in each application's S3 access point. Configure each application to consume data from its own S3 access point.

contents.en: For each application, create an S3 access point that uses the raw data's S3 bucket as the destination. Create an AWS Lambda function that is invoked by object creation events in the raw data's S3 bucket. Program the Lambda function to redact data for each application. Store the data in each application's S3 access point. Configure each application to consume data from its own S3 access point.
contents.zh: 为每个应用程序创建一个以原始数据的 S3 bucket 作为目标的 S3 access point。创建一个由原始数据 S3 bucket 中对象创建事件调用的 AWS Lambda function。编写 Lambda function，为每个应用程序脱敏数据。将数据存储在每个应用程序的 S3 access point 中。配置每个应用程序从其自己的 S3 access point 消费数据。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an S3 access point that uses the raw data's S3 bucket as the destination. For each application, create an S3 Object Lambda access point that uses the S3 access point. Configure the AWS Lambda function for each S3 Object Lambda access point to redact data when objects are retrieved. Configure each application to consume data from its own S3 Object Lambda access point

contents.en: Create an S3 access point that uses the raw data's S3 bucket as the destination. For each application, create an S3 Object Lambda access point that uses the S3 access point. Configure the AWS Lambda function for each S3 Object Lambda access point to redact data when objects are retrieved. Configure each application to consume data from its own S3 Object Lambda access point
contents.zh: 创建一个以原始数据的 S3 bucket 作为目标的 S3 access point。为每个应用程序创建一个使用该 S3 access point 的 S3 Object Lambda access point。为每个 S3 Object Lambda access point 配置 AWS Lambda function，以便在检索对象时脱敏数据。配置每个应用程序从其自己的 S3 Object Lambda access point 消费数据

questions.explanation: 正确答案：D。讨论关键词是使用 S3 Object Lambda access point 进行数据脱敏；D 为原始数据桶创建 S3 access point，再为每个应用创建自己的 S3 Object Lambda access point，并配置各自 Lambda 在对象读取时进行脱敏。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：D。讨论关键词是使用 S3 Object Lambda access point 进行数据脱敏；D 为原始数据桶创建 S3 access point，再为每个应用创建自己的 S3 Object Lambda access point，并配置各自 Lambda 在对象读取时进行脱敏。
explanations.en: Correct answer: D. The discussion identifies S3 Object Lambda access points for redaction. D creates an S3 access point for the raw data bucket, then gives each application its own S3 Object Lambda access point backed by a Lambda function that redacts data on retrieval.

contents.en: A company is launching an application that stores raw data in an Amazon S3 bucket. Three applications need to access the data to generate reports. The data must be redacted differently for each application before the applications can access the data. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在启动一个将原始数据存储在 Amazon S3 bucket 中的应用程序。三个应用程序需要访问这些数据以生成报告。在这些应用程序能够访问数据之前，必须针对每个应用程序以不同方式对数据进行脱敏。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses AWS Control Tower and AWS CloudFormation to manage its AWS accounts and to create AWS resources. The company requires all Amazon S3 buckets to be encrypted with AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) when the S3 buckets are created in a CloudFormation stack. Which solution will meet this requirement?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS Organizations. Attach an SCP that denies the s3:PutObject permission if the request does not include an x-amz- server-side-encryption header that requests server-side encryption with AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS).

contents.en: Use AWS Organizations. Attach an SCP that denies the s3:PutObject permission if the request does not include an x-amz- server-side-encryption header that requests server-side encryption with AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS).
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Organizations。附加一个 SCP，如果请求未包含要求使用 AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS) 进行服务器端加密的 x-amz- server-side-encryption header，则拒绝 s3:PutObject permission。

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS Control Tower with a multi-account environment. Configure and enable proactive AWS Control Tower controls on all OUs with CloudFormation hooks.

contents.en: Use AWS Control Tower with a multi-account environment. Configure and enable proactive AWS Control Tower controls on all OUs with CloudFormation hooks.
contents.zh: 使用具有 multi-account environment 的 AWS Control Tower。在所有 OU 上配置并启用带有 CloudFormation hooks 的 proactive AWS Control Tower controls。

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS Control Tower with a multi-account environment. Configure and enable detective AWS Control Tower controls on all OUs with CloudFormation hooks.

contents.en: Use AWS Control Tower with a multi-account environment. Configure and enable detective AWS Control Tower controls on all OUs with CloudFormation hooks.
contents.zh: 使用具有 multi-account environment 的 AWS Control Tower。在所有 OU 上配置并启用带有 CloudFormation hooks 的 detective AWS Control Tower controls。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS Organizations. Create an AWS Config organizational rule to check whether a KMS encryption key is enabled for all S3 buckets. Deploy the rule. Create and apply an SCP to prevent users from stopping and deleting AWS Config across all AWS accounts,

contents.en: Use AWS Organizations. Create an AWS Config organizational rule to check whether a KMS encryption key is enabled for all S3 buckets. Deploy the rule. Create and apply an SCP to prevent users from stopping and deleting AWS Config across all AWS accounts,
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Organizations。创建一个 AWS Config organizational rule，以检查是否为所有 S3 buckets 启用了 KMS encryption key。部署该 rule。创建并应用一个 SCP，以防止用户在所有 AWS 账户中停止和删除 AWS Config,

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B。B 使用 AWS Control Tower 的多账号环境，并在所有 OU 上启用 proactive controls 与 CloudFormation hooks；讨论说明 proactive controls 能在创建资源前阻止不合规操作，适合强制通过 CloudFormation 创建的 S3 桶启用加密。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B。B 使用 AWS Control Tower 的多账号环境，并在所有 OU 上启用 proactive controls 与 CloudFormation hooks；讨论说明 proactive controls 能在创建资源前阻止不合规操作，适合强制通过 CloudFormation 创建的 S3 桶启用加密。
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. B uses AWS Control Tower across a multi-account environment and enables proactive controls on all OUs with CloudFormation hooks. The discussion explains that proactive controls prevent noncompliant resource creation, making them suitable for enforcing S3 encryption during CloudFormation stack operations.

contents.en: A company uses AWS Control Tower and AWS CloudFormation to manage its AWS accounts and to create AWS resources. The company requires all Amazon S3 buckets to be encrypted with AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) when the S3 buckets are created in a CloudFormation stack. Which solution will meet this requirement?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Control Tower 和 AWS CloudFormation 管理其 AWS 账户并创建 AWS 资源。公司要求在 CloudFormation stack 中创建所有 Amazon S3 buckets 时，必须使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 对其进行加密。哪种解决方案可以满足此要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer has developed an AWS Lambda function. The Lambda function starts an AWS CloudFormation drift detection operation on all supported resources for a specific CloudFormation stack. The Lambda function then exits its invocation. The DevOps engineer has created an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule that invokes the Lambda function every hour. An Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic already exists in the AWS account. The DevOps engineer has subscribed to the SNS topic to receive notifications. The DevOps engineer needs to receive a notification as soon as possible when drift is detected in this specific stack configuration. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure the existing EventBridge rule to also target the SNS topic. Configure an SNS subscription filter policy to match the CloudFormation stack. Attach the subscription filter policy to the SNS topic.

contents.en: Configure the existing EventBridge rule to also target the SNS topic. Configure an SNS subscription filter policy to match the CloudFormation stack. Attach the subscription filter policy to the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 配置现有 EventBridge rule，使其也以 SNS topic 为目标。配置 SNS subscription filter policy，以匹配 CloudFormation stack。将 subscription filter policy 附加到 SNS topic。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a second Lambda function to query the CloudFormation API for the drift detection results for the stack. Configure the second Lambda function to publish a message to the SNS topic if drift is detected. Adjust the existing EventBridge rule to also target the second Lambda function.

contents.en: Create a second Lambda function to query the CloudFormation API for the drift detection results for the stack. Configure the second Lambda function to publish a message to the SNS topic if drift is detected. Adjust the existing EventBridge rule to also target the second Lambda function.
contents.zh: 创建第二个 Lambda function，以查询 CloudFormation API 获取该 stack 的 drift detection results。如果检测到 drift，配置第二个 Lambda function 将消息发布到 SNS topic。调整现有 EventBridge rule，使其也以第二个 Lambda function 为目标。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure Amazon GuardDuty in the account with drift detection for all CloudFormation stacks. Create a second EventBridge rule that reacts to the GuardDuty drift detection event finding for the specific CloudFormation stack. Configure the SNS topic as a target of the second EventBridge rule.

contents.en: Configure Amazon GuardDuty in the account with drift detection for all CloudFormation stacks. Create a second EventBridge rule that reacts to the GuardDuty drift detection event finding for the specific CloudFormation stack. Configure the SNS topic as a target of the second EventBridge rule.
contents.zh: 在账户中配置 Amazon GuardDuty，为所有 CloudFormation stacks 启用 drift detection。创建第二个 EventBridge rule，用于响应特定 CloudFormation stack 的 GuardDuty drift detection event finding。将 SNS topic 配置为第二个 EventBridge rule 的目标。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure AWS Config in the account. Use the cloudformation-stack-drift-detection-check managed rule. Create a second EventBridge rule that reacts to a compliance change event for the CloudFormation stack. Configure the SNS topic as a target of the second EventBridge rule.

contents.en: Configure AWS Config in the account. Use the cloudformation-stack-drift-detection-check managed rule. Create a second EventBridge rule that reacts to a compliance change event for the CloudFormation stack. Configure the SNS topic as a target of the second EventBridge rule.
contents.zh: 在账户中配置 AWS Config。使用 cloudformation-stack-drift-detection-check managed rule。创建第二个 EventBridge rule，用于响应 CloudFormation stack 的 compliance change event。将 SNS topic 配置为第二个 EventBridge rule 的目标。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：D。D 使用 AWS Config 的 cloudformation-stack-drift-detection-check 托管规则检测堆栈漂移，再创建第二个 EventBridge 规则响应 CloudFormation 堆栈合规性变化，并把 SNS topic 作为目标发送通知。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：D。D 使用 AWS Config 的 cloudformation-stack-drift-detection-check 托管规则检测堆栈漂移，再创建第二个 EventBridge 规则响应 CloudFormation 堆栈合规性变化，并把 SNS topic 作为目标发送通知。
explanations.en: Correct answer: D. D configures AWS Config with the cloudformation-stack-drift-detection-check managed rule, then uses a second EventBridge rule for compliance change events on the CloudFormation stack and sends those events to the SNS topic.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer has developed an AWS Lambda function. The Lambda function starts an AWS CloudFormation drift detection operation on all supported resources for a specific CloudFormation stack. The Lambda function then exits its invocation. The DevOps engineer has created an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule that invokes the Lambda function every hour. An Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic already exists in the AWS account. The DevOps engineer has subscribed to the SNS topic to receive notifications. The DevOps engineer needs to receive a notification as soon as possible when drift is detected in this specific stack configuration. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps engineer 开发了一个 AWS Lambda function。该 Lambda function 会对特定 CloudFormation stack 的所有受支持资源启动 AWS CloudFormation drift detection operation。然后该 Lambda function 结束其调用。DevOps engineer 创建了一个 Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule，每小时调用该 Lambda function。AWS 账户中已存在一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic。DevOps engineer 已订阅该 SNS topic 以接收通知。DevOps engineer 需要在检测到此特定 stack 配置发生 drift 时尽快收到通知。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has deployed a complex container-based workload on AWS. The workload uses Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus for monitoring. The workload runs in an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster in an AWS account. The company's DevOps team wants to receive workload alerts by using the company's Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. The SNS topic is in the same AWS account as the EKS cluster. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Use the Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus remote write URL to send alerts to the SNS topic

contents.en: Use the Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus remote write URL to send alerts to the SNS topic
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus remote write URL 将警报发送到 SNS topic

options.label: B
options.content: Create an alerting rule that checks the availability of each of the workload's containers.

contents.en: Create an alerting rule that checks the availability of each of the workload's containers.
contents.zh: 创建一个 alerting rule，用于检查工作负载中每个容器的可用性。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an alert manager configuration for the SNS topic.

contents.en: Create an alert manager configuration for the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 为 SNS topic 创建 alert manager configuration。

options.label: D
options.content: Modify the access policy of the SNS topic. Grant the aps.amazonaws.com service principal the sns:Publish permission and the sns:GetTopicAttributes permission for the SNS topic.

contents.en: Modify the access policy of the SNS topic. Grant the aps.amazonaws.com service principal the sns:Publish permission and the sns:GetTopicAttributes permission for the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 修改 SNS topic 的 access policy。向 aps.amazonaws.com service principal 授予该 SNS topic 的 sns:Publish permission 和 sns:GetTopicAttributes permission。

options.label: E
options.content: Modify the IAM role that Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus uses. Grant the role the sns:Publish permission and the sns:GetTopicAttributes permission for the SNS topic.

contents.en: Modify the IAM role that Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus uses. Grant the role the sns:Publish permission and the sns:GetTopicAttributes permission for the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 修改 Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus 使用的 IAM role。向该 role 授予该 SNS topic 的 sns:Publish permission 和 sns:GetTopicAttributes permission。

options.label: F
options.content: Create an OpenID Connect (OIDC) provider for the EKS cluster. Create a cluster service account. Grant the account the sns:Publish permission and the sns:GetTopicAttributes permission by using an IAM role.

contents.en: Create an OpenID Connect (OIDC) provider for the EKS cluster. Create a cluster service account. Grant the account the sns:Publish permission and the sns:GetTopicAttributes permission by using an IAM role.
contents.zh: 为 EKS cluster 创建 OpenID Connect (OIDC) provider。创建一个 cluster service account。使用 IAM role 向该 account 授予 sns:Publish permission 和 sns:GetTopicAttributes permission。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B、C、D。讨论只给出 BCD，因此依据正确选项内容：B 创建检查每个容器可用性的告警规则，C 为 SNS topic 创建 alert manager 配置，D 修改 SNS topic 策略允许 aps.amazonaws.com 发布并读取主题属性。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B、C、D。讨论只给出 BCD，因此依据正确选项内容：B 创建检查每个容器可用性的告警规则，C 为 SNS topic 创建 alert manager 配置，D 修改 SNS topic 策略允许 aps.amazonaws.com 发布并读取主题属性。
explanations.en: Correct answers: B, C, and D. The discussion is brief, so the option text provides the basis: B creates alerting rules for container availability, C creates the alert manager configuration for the SNS topic, and D grants the aps.amazonaws.com service principal permission to publish to and read attributes from the SNS topic.

contents.en: A company has deployed a complex container-based workload on AWS. The workload uses Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus for monitoring. The workload runs in an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster in an AWS account. The company's DevOps team wants to receive workload alerts by using the company's Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. The SNS topic is in the same AWS account as the EKS cluster. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 上部署了一个复杂的基于容器的工作负载。该工作负载使用 Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus 进行监控。工作负载运行在一个 AWS 账户中的 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster 内。公司的 DevOps team 希望使用公司的 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic 接收工作负载警报。该 SNS topic 与 EKS cluster 位于同一个 AWS 账户中。哪组步骤组合可以满足这些要求？（选择三个。）

questions.content: A company's organization in AWS Organizations has a single OU. The company runs Amazon EC2 instances in the OU accounts. The company needs to limit the use of each EC2 instance's credentials to the specific EC2 instance that the credential is assigned to. A DevOps engineer must configure security for the EC2 instances. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an SCP that specifies the VPC CIDR block. Configure the SCP to check whether the value of the aws:VpcSourcelp condition key is in the specified block. In the same SCP check, check whether the values of the aws:EC2InstanceSourcePrivatelPv4 and aws:SourceVpc condition keys are the same. Deny access if either condition is false. Apply the SCP to the OU.

contents.en: Create an SCP that specifies the VPC CIDR block. Configure the SCP to check whether the value of the aws:VpcSourcelp condition key is in the specified block. In the same SCP check, check whether the values of the aws:EC2InstanceSourcePrivatelPv4 and aws:SourceVpc condition keys are the same. Deny access if either condition is false. Apply the SCP to the OU.
contents.zh: 创建一个指定 VPC CIDR block 的 SCP。配置该 SCP 以检查 aws:VpcSourcelp condition key 的值是否位于指定 block 中。在同一 SCP 检查中，检查 aws:EC2InstanceSourcePrivatelPv4 和 aws:SourceVpc condition keys 的值是否相同。如果任一条件为 false，则拒绝访问。将该 SCP 应用于 OU。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an SCP that checks whether the values of the aws:EC2InstanceSourceVPC and aws:SourceVpc condition keys are the same. Deny access if the values are not the same. In the same SCP check, check whether the values of the aws:EC2InstanceSourcePrivateIPv4 and aws:VpcSourceIp condition keys are the same. Deny access if the values are not the same. Apply the SCP to the OU.

contents.en: Create an SCP that checks whether the values of the aws:EC2InstanceSourceVPC and aws:SourceVpc condition keys are the same. Deny access if the values are not the same. In the same SCP check, check whether the values of the aws:EC2InstanceSourcePrivateIPv4 and aws:VpcSourceIp condition keys are the same. Deny access if the values are not the same. Apply the SCP to the OU.
contents.zh: 创建一个 SCP，检查 aws:EC2InstanceSourceVPC 和 aws:SourceVpc condition keys 的值是否相同。如果这些值不同，则拒绝访问。在同一 SCP 检查中，检查 aws:EC2InstanceSourcePrivateIPv4 和 aws:VpcSourceIp condition keys 的值是否相同。如果这些值不同，则拒绝访问。将该 SCP 应用于 OU。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an SCP that includes a list of acceptable VPC values and checks whether the value of the aws:SourceVpc condition key is in the list. In the same SCP check, define a list of acceptable IP address values and check whether the value of the aws:VpcSourceIp condition key is in the list. Deny access if either condition is false. Apply the SCP to each account in the organization.

contents.en: Create an SCP that includes a list of acceptable VPC values and checks whether the value of the aws:SourceVpc condition key is in the list. In the same SCP check, define a list of acceptable IP address values and check whether the value of the aws:VpcSourceIp condition key is in the list. Deny access if either condition is false. Apply the SCP to each account in the organization.
contents.zh: 创建一个 SCP，其中包含可接受 VPC 值的列表，并检查 aws:SourceVpc condition key 的值是否在该列表中。在同一 SCP 检查中，定义可接受 IP 地址值的列表，并检查 aws:VpcSourceIp condition key 的值是否在该列表中。如果任一条件为 false，则拒绝访问。将该 SCP 应用于组织中的每个账户。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an SCP that checks whether the values of the aws:EC2InstanceSourceVPC and aws:VpcSourceIp condition keys are the same. Deny access if the values are not the same. In the same SCP check, check whether the values of the aws:EC2InstanceSourcePrivateIPv4 and aws:SourceVpc condition keys are the same. Deny access if the values are not the same. Apply the SCP to each account in the organization.

contents.en: Create an SCP that checks whether the values of the aws:EC2InstanceSourceVPC and aws:VpcSourceIp condition keys are the same. Deny access if the values are not the same. In the same SCP check, check whether the values of the aws:EC2InstanceSourcePrivateIPv4 and aws:SourceVpc condition keys are the same. Deny access if the values are not the same. Apply the SCP to each account in the organization.
contents.zh: 创建一个 SCP，检查 aws:EC2InstanceSourceVPC 和 aws:VpcSourceIp condition keys 的值是否相同。如果这些值不同，则拒绝访问。在同一 SCP 检查中，检查 aws:EC2InstanceSourcePrivateIPv4 和 aws:SourceVpc condition keys 的值是否相同。如果这些值不同，则拒绝访问。将该 SCP 应用于组织中的每个账户。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B。B 使用 SCP 比较 aws:EC2InstanceSourceVPC 与 aws:SourceVpc，以及 aws:EC2InstanceSourcePrivateIPv4 与 aws:VpcSourceIp；如果来源 VPC 或私有 IP 不匹配就拒绝访问，用于限制 EC2 实例凭证只能从其预期网络位置使用。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B。B 使用 SCP 比较 aws:EC2InstanceSourceVPC 与 aws:SourceVpc，以及 aws:EC2InstanceSourcePrivateIPv4 与 aws:VpcSourceIp；如果来源 VPC 或私有 IP 不匹配就拒绝访问，用于限制 EC2 实例凭证只能从其预期网络位置使用。
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. B applies an SCP that compares aws:EC2InstanceSourceVPC with aws:SourceVpc and aws:EC2InstanceSourcePrivateIPv4 with aws:VpcSourceIp, denying access when they do not match. This restricts where EC2 instance credentials can be used from.

contents.en: A company's organization in AWS Organizations has a single OU. The company runs Amazon EC2 instances in the OU accounts. The company needs to limit the use of each EC2 instance's credentials to the specific EC2 instance that the credential is assigned to. A DevOps engineer must configure security for the EC2 instances. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 AWS Organizations 中的组织有一个单一 OU。公司在 OU 账户中运行 Amazon EC2 instances。公司需要将每个 EC2 instance 凭证的使用限制为该凭证被分配到的特定 EC2 instance。DevOps engineer 必须为 EC2 instances 配置安全性。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances that run Linux in a single AWS account. The company is using an AWS Systems Manager Automation task across the EC2 instances. During the most recent patch cycle, several EC2 instances went into an error state because of insufficient available disk space. A DevOps engineer needs to ensure that the EC2 instances have sufficient available disk space during the patching process in the future. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Ensure that the Amazon CloudWatch agent is installed on all EC2 instances.

contents.en: Ensure that the Amazon CloudWatch agent is installed on all EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 确保所有 EC2 instances 上都安装了 Amazon CloudWatch agent。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a cron job that is installed on each EC2 instance to periodically delete temporary files.

contents.en: Create a cron job that is installed on each EC2 instance to periodically delete temporary files.
contents.zh: 创建一个安装在每个 EC2 instance 上的 cron job，用于定期删除临时文件。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch log group for the EC2 instances. Configure a cron job that is installed on each EC2 instance to write the available disk space to a CloudWatch log stream for the relevant EC2 instance.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch log group for the EC2 instances. Configure a cron job that is installed on each EC2 instance to write the available disk space to a CloudWatch log stream for the relevant EC2 instance.
contents.zh: 为 EC2 instances 创建一个 Amazon CloudWatch log group。配置一个安装在每个 EC2 instance 上的 cron job，将可用磁盘空间写入相关 EC2 instance 的 CloudWatch log stream。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to monitor available disk space on all EC2 instances. Add the alarm as a safety control to the Systems Manager Automation task.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to monitor available disk space on all EC2 instances. Add the alarm as a safety control to the Systems Manager Automation task.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon CloudWatch alarm，用于监控所有 EC2 instances 上的可用磁盘空间。将该 alarm 作为 safety control 添加到 Systems Manager Automation task。

options.label: E
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function to periodically check for sufficient available disk space on all EC2 instances by evaluating each EC2 instance's respective Amazon CloudWatch log stream.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function to periodically check for sufficient available disk space on all EC2 instances by evaluating each EC2 instance's respective Amazon CloudWatch log stream.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Lambda function，通过评估每个 EC2 instance 各自的 Amazon CloudWatch log stream，定期检查所有 EC2 instances 是否具有足够的可用磁盘空间。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A、D。A 在所有 EC2 实例上安装 CloudWatch agent，以收集磁盘空间等系统级指标；D 创建 CloudWatch alarm 监控可用磁盘空间，并把该告警作为 Systems Manager Automation 任务的安全控制，确保空间不足时不继续补丁流程。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A、D。A 在所有 EC2 实例上安装 CloudWatch agent，以收集磁盘空间等系统级指标；D 创建 CloudWatch alarm 监控可用磁盘空间，并把该告警作为 Systems Manager Automation 任务的安全控制，确保空间不足时不继续补丁流程。
explanations.en: Correct answers: A and D. A installs the CloudWatch agent on all EC2 instances so disk space metrics can be collected. D creates a CloudWatch alarm for available disk space and adds it as a safety control to the Systems Manager Automation task.

contents.en: A company has a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances that run Linux in a single AWS account. The company is using an AWS Systems Manager Automation task across the EC2 instances. During the most recent patch cycle, several EC2 instances went into an error state because of insufficient available disk space. A DevOps engineer needs to ensure that the EC2 instances have sufficient available disk space during the patching process in the future. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司在单个 AWS 账户中拥有一组运行 Linux 的 Amazon EC2 instances。公司正在跨 EC2 instances 使用 AWS Systems Manager Automation task。在最近的补丁周期中，几个 EC2 instances 因可用磁盘空间不足而进入错误状态。DevOps engineer 需要确保 EC2 instances 在未来的补丁过程中具有足够的可用磁盘空间。哪组步骤组合可以满足这些要求？（选择两个。）

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is building an application that uses an AWS Lambda function to query an Amazon Aurora MySQL DB cluster. The Lambda function performs only read queries. Amazon EventBridge events invoke the Lambda function. As more events invoke the Lambda function each second, the database's latency increases and the database's throughput decreases. The DevOps engineer needs to improve the performance of the application. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Use Amazon RDS Proxy to create a proxy. Connect the proxy to the Aurora cluster reader endpoint. Set a maximum connections percentage on the proxy.

contents.en: Use Amazon RDS Proxy to create a proxy. Connect the proxy to the Aurora cluster reader endpoint. Set a maximum connections percentage on the proxy.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon RDS Proxy 创建一个 proxy。将该 proxy 连接到 Aurora cluster reader endpoint。在该 proxy 上设置 maximum connections percentage。

options.label: B
options.content: Implement database connection pooling inside the Lambda code. Set a maximum number of connections on the database connection pool.

contents.en: Implement database connection pooling inside the Lambda code. Set a maximum number of connections on the database connection pool.
contents.zh: 在 Lambda code 内实现 database connection pooling。在 database connection pool 上设置最大连接数。

options.label: C
options.content: Implement the database connection opening outside the Lambda event handler code.

contents.en: Implement the database connection opening outside the Lambda event handler code.
contents.zh: 在 Lambda event handler code 外部实现 database connection opening。

options.label: D
options.content: Implement the database connection opening and closing inside the Lambda event handler code.

contents.en: Implement the database connection opening and closing inside the Lambda event handler code.
contents.zh: 在 Lambda event handler code 内部实现 database connection opening 和 closing。

options.label: E
options.content: Connect to the proxy endpoint from the Lambda function.

contents.en: Connect to the proxy endpoint from the Lambda function.
contents.zh: 从 Lambda function 连接到 proxy endpoint。

options.label: F
options.content: Connect to the Aurora cluster endpoint from the Lambda function.

contents.en: Connect to the Aurora cluster endpoint from the Lambda function.
contents.zh: 从 Lambda function 连接到 Aurora cluster endpoint。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：A、C、E。A 创建 RDS Proxy 并连接到 Aurora reader endpoint，同时设置最大连接百分比；C 将数据库连接打开逻辑放在 Lambda handler 外部以复用连接；E 让 Lambda 连接代理端点，从而改善 Lambda 到 Aurora 的连接管理。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：A、C、E。A 创建 RDS Proxy 并连接到 Aurora reader endpoint，同时设置最大连接百分比；C 将数据库连接打开逻辑放在 Lambda handler 外部以复用连接；E 让 Lambda 连接代理端点，从而改善 Lambda 到 Aurora 的连接管理。
explanations.en: Correct answers: A, C, and E. A creates an RDS Proxy connected to the Aurora reader endpoint and caps connections, C opens the database connection outside the Lambda event handler for reuse, and E has the Lambda function connect through the proxy endpoint.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer is building an application that uses an AWS Lambda function to query an Amazon Aurora MySQL DB cluster. The Lambda function performs only read queries. Amazon EventBridge events invoke the Lambda function. As more events invoke the Lambda function each second, the database's latency increases and the database's throughput decreases. The DevOps engineer needs to improve the performance of the application. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps engineer 正在构建一个使用 AWS Lambda function 查询 Amazon Aurora MySQL DB cluster 的应用程序。该 Lambda function 只执行读取查询。Amazon EventBridge events 调用该 Lambda function。随着每秒调用 Lambda function 的事件增多，数据库的 latency 增加，throughput 下降。DevOps engineer 需要提高应用程序的性能。哪组步骤组合可以满足这些要求？（选择三个。）

questions.content: A company has an AWS CloudFormation stack that is deployed in a single AWS account. The company has configured the stack to send event notifications to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. A DevOps engineer must implement an automated solution that applies a tag to the specific CloudFormation stack instance only after a successful stack update occurs. The DevOps engineer has created an AWS Lambda function that applies and updates this tag for the specific stack instance. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Run the AWS-UpdateCloudFormationStack AWS Systems ManagerAutomation runbook when Systems Manager detects an UPDATE_COMPLETE event for the instance status of the CloudFormation stack. Configure the runbook to invoke the Lambda function.

contents.en: Run the AWS-UpdateCloudFormationStack AWS Systems ManagerAutomation runbook when Systems Manager detects an UPDATE_COMPLETE event for the instance status of the CloudFormation stack. Configure the runbook to invoke the Lambda function.
contents.zh: 当 Systems Manager 检测到 CloudFormation stack 的 instance status 为 UPDATE_COMPLETE event 时，运行 AWS-UpdateCloudFormationStack AWS Systems ManagerAutomation runbook。配置该 runbook 调用 Lambda function。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a custom AWS Config rule that produces a compliance change event if the CloudFormation stack has an UPDATE_COMPLETE instance status. Configure AWS Config to directly invoke the Lambda function to automatically remediate the change event.

contents.en: Create a custom AWS Config rule that produces a compliance change event if the CloudFormation stack has an UPDATE_COMPLETE instance status. Configure AWS Config to directly invoke the Lambda function to automatically remediate the change event.
contents.zh: 创建一个 custom AWS Config rule，如果 CloudFormation stack 具有 UPDATE_COMPLETE instance status，则生成 compliance change event。配置 AWS Config 直接调用 Lambda function，以自动修复该 change event。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that matches the UPDATE_COMPLETE event pattern for the instance status of the CloudFormation stack. Configure the rule to invoke the Lambda function.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that matches the UPDATE_COMPLETE event pattern for the instance status of the CloudFormation stack. Configure the rule to invoke the Lambda function.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge rule，匹配 CloudFormation stack 的 instance status 的 UPDATE_COMPLETE event pattern。配置该 rule 调用 Lambda function。

options.label: D
options.content: Adjust the configuration of the CloudFormation stack to send notifications for only an UPDATE_COMPLETE instance status event to the SNS topic. Subscribe the Lambda function to the SNS topic.

contents.en: Adjust the configuration of the CloudFormation stack to send notifications for only an UPDATE_COMPLETE instance status event to the SNS topic. Subscribe the Lambda function to the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 调整 CloudFormation stack 的配置，使其仅将 UPDATE_COMPLETE instance status event 的通知发送到 SNS topic。将 Lambda function 订阅到 SNS topic。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C。EventBridge 可以匹配 CloudFormation 的 UPDATE_COMPLETE 事件；C 创建匹配该实例状态事件模式的规则并调用 Lambda，让 Lambda 在堆栈更新完成时自动给 stack instances 添加所需标签。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C。EventBridge 可以匹配 CloudFormation 的 UPDATE_COMPLETE 事件；C 创建匹配该实例状态事件模式的规则并调用 Lambda，让 Lambda 在堆栈更新完成时自动给 stack instances 添加所需标签。
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. EventBridge can match CloudFormation UPDATE_COMPLETE events. C creates a rule for that stack instance status event pattern and invokes Lambda so the tag can be applied automatically when the stack update completes.

contents.en: A company has an AWS CloudFormation stack that is deployed in a single AWS account. The company has configured the stack to send event notifications to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. A DevOps engineer must implement an automated solution that applies a tag to the specific CloudFormation stack instance only after a successful stack update occurs. The DevOps engineer has created an AWS Lambda function that applies and updates this tag for the specific stack instance. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个部署在单个 AWS 账户中的 AWS CloudFormation stack。公司已配置该 stack 将事件通知发送到 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic。DevOps engineer 必须实施一个自动化解决方案，仅在成功发生 stack update 后才将标签应用到特定 CloudFormation stack instance。DevOps engineer 已创建一个 AWS Lambda function，用于为该特定 stack instance 应用和更新此标签。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company deploys an application to two AWS Regions. The application creates and stores objects in an Amazon S3 bucket that is in the same Region as the application. Both deployments of the application need to have access to all the objects and their metadata from both Regions. The company has configured two-way replication between the S3 buckets and has enabled S3 Replication metrics on each S3 bucket. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a solution that retries the replication process if an object fails to replicate. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that listens to S3 event notifications for failed replication events. Create an AWS Lambda function that downloads the failed replication object and then runs a PutObject command for the object to the destination bucket. Configure the EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function to handle the object that failed to replicate.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that listens to S3 event notifications for failed replication events. Create an AWS Lambda function that downloads the failed replication object and then runs a PutObject command for the object to the destination bucket. Configure the EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function to handle the object that failed to replicate.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge rule，用于监听 failed replication events 的 S3 event notifications。创建一个 AWS Lambda function，该函数下载复制失败的对象，然后对目标 bucket 运行 PutObject command。配置 EventBridge rule 调用 Lambda function 来处理复制失败的对象。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Configure S3 event notifications to send failed replication notifications to the SQS queue. Create an AWS Lambda function that downloads the failed replication object and then runs a PutObject command for the object to the destination bucket. Configure the Lambda function to poll the queue for notifications to process.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Configure S3 event notifications to send failed replication notifications to the SQS queue. Create an AWS Lambda function that downloads the failed replication object and then runs a PutObject command for the object to the destination bucket. Configure the Lambda function to poll the queue for notifications to process.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue。配置 S3 event notifications 将 failed replication notifications 发送到 SQS queue。创建一个 AWS Lambda function，该函数下载复制失败的对象，然后对目标 bucket 运行 PutObject command。配置 Lambda function 轮询该 queue 以处理通知。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that listens to S3 event notifications for failed replications. Create an AWS Lambda function that downloads the failed replication object and then runs a PutObject command for the object to the destination bucket.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that listens to S3 event notifications for failed replications. Create an AWS Lambda function that downloads the failed replication object and then runs a PutObject command for the object to the destination bucket.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge rule，用于监听 failed replications 的 S3 event notifications。创建一个 AWS Lambda function，该函数下载复制失败的对象，然后对目标 bucket 运行 PutObject command。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function that will use S3 batch operations to retry the replication on the existing object for a failed replication. Configure S3 event notifications to send failed replication notifications to the Lambda function.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that will use S3 batch operations to retry the replication on the existing object for a failed replication. Configure S3 event notifications to send failed replication notifications to the Lambda function.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Lambda function，该函数将使用 S3 batch operations 对复制失败的现有对象重试复制。配置 S3 event notifications 将 failed replication notifications 发送到 Lambda function。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：D。讨论说明 S3 Batch Replication 可复制之前存在、已复制过或复制失败的对象；D 用 S3 事件通知把失败复制事件发送给 Lambda，再由 Lambda 使用 S3 Batch Operations 对失败对象重试复制。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：D。讨论说明 S3 Batch Replication 可复制之前存在、已复制过或复制失败的对象；D 用 S3 事件通知把失败复制事件发送给 Lambda，再由 Lambda 使用 S3 Batch Operations 对失败对象重试复制。
explanations.en: Correct answer: D. The discussion notes that S3 Batch Replication can handle objects that existed before replication, were already replicated, or failed replication. D sends failed replication notifications to Lambda, which uses S3 Batch Operations to retry replication for those objects.

contents.en: A company deploys an application to two AWS Regions. The application creates and stores objects in an Amazon S3 bucket that is in the same Region as the application. Both deployments of the application need to have access to all the objects and their metadata from both Regions. The company has configured two-way replication between the S3 buckets and has enabled S3 Replication metrics on each S3 bucket. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a solution that retries the replication process if an object fails to replicate. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司将应用程序部署到两个 AWS Regions。该应用程序在与应用程序相同 Region 中的 Amazon S3 bucket 内创建并存储对象。应用程序的两个部署都需要访问两个 Regions 中的所有对象及其 metadata。公司已在 S3 buckets 之间配置双向复制，并在每个 S3 bucket 上启用了 S3 Replication metrics。DevOps engineer 需要实施一个解决方案，如果对象复制失败，则重试复制过程。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company needs to implement failover for its application. The application includes an Amazon CloudFront distribution and a public Application Load Balancer (ALB) in an AWS Region. The company has configured the ALB as the default origin for the distribution. After some recent application outages, the company wants a zero-second RTO. The company deploys the application to a secondary Region in a warm standby configuration. A DevOps engineer needs to automate the failover of the application to the secondary Region so that HTTP GET requests meet the desired RTO. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a second CloudFront distribution that has the secondary ALB as the default origin. Create Amazon Route 53 alias records that have a failover policy and Evaluate Target Health set to Yes for both CloudFront distributions. Update the application to use the new record set.
