contents.en: Create a second CloudFront distribution that has the secondary ALB as the default origin. Create Amazon Route 53 alias records that have a failover policy and Evaluate Target Health set to Yes for both CloudFront distributions. Update the application to use the new record set.
contents.zh: 创建第二个 CloudFront distribution，以 secondary ALB 作为 default origin。为两个 CloudFront distributions 创建具有 failover policy 且 Evaluate Target Health 设置为 Yes 的 Amazon Route 53 alias records。更新应用程序以使用新的 record set。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new origin on the distribution for the secondary ALCreate a new origin group. Set the original ALB as the primary origin. Configure the origin group to fail over for HTTP 5xx status codes. Update the default behavior to use the origin group.

contents.en: Create a new origin on the distribution for the secondary ALCreate a new origin group. Set the original ALB as the primary origin. Configure the origin group to fail over for HTTP 5xx status codes. Update the default behavior to use the origin group.
contents.zh: 在 distribution 上为 secondary ALCreate 创建一个新的 origin。创建一个新的 origin group。将原始 ALB 设置为 primary origin。配置 origin group 对 HTTP 5xx status codes 进行 fail over。更新 default behavior 以使用 origin group。

options.label: C
options.content: Create Amazon Route 53 alias records that have a failover policy and Evaluate Target Health set to Yes for both ALBs. Set the TTL of both records to 0. Update the distribution's origin to use the new record set.

contents.en: Create Amazon Route 53 alias records that have a failover policy and Evaluate Target Health set to Yes for both ALBs. Set the TTL of both records to 0. Update the distribution's origin to use the new record set.
contents.zh: 为两个 ALBs 创建具有 failover policy 且 Evaluate Target Health 设置为 Yes 的 Amazon Route 53 alias records。将两个 records 的 TTL 设置为 0。更新 distribution 的 origin 以使用新的 record set。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a CloudFront function that detects HTTP 5xx status codes. Configure the function to return a 307 Temporary Redirect error response to the secondary ALB if the function detects 5xx status codes. Update the distribution's default behavior to send origin responses to the function.

contents.en: Create a CloudFront function that detects HTTP 5xx status codes. Configure the function to return a 307 Temporary Redirect error response to the secondary ALB if the function detects 5xx status codes. Update the distribution's default behavior to send origin responses to the function.
contents.zh: 创建一个 CloudFront function，用于检测 HTTP 5xx status codes。如果该 function 检测到 5xx status codes，则配置该 function 返回到 secondary ALB 的 307 Temporary Redirect error response。更新 distribution 的 default behavior，以将 origin responses 发送到该 function。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：B。讨论很简短，因此依据正确选项内容：B 在 CloudFront 分配中为辅助 ALB 创建新源，建立 origin group，将原 ALB 设为主源，并配置在 HTTP 5xx 时故障转移，最后让默认行为使用该 origin group。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：B。讨论很简短，因此依据正确选项内容：B 在 CloudFront 分配中为辅助 ALB 创建新源，建立 origin group，将原 ALB 设为主源，并配置在 HTTP 5xx 时故障转移，最后让默认行为使用该 origin group。
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. The discussion is brief, so the correct option provides the basis: add a secondary ALB as a new CloudFront origin, create an origin group with the original ALB as primary, configure failover for HTTP 5xx status codes, and update the default behavior to use the origin group.

contents.en: A company needs to implement failover for its application. The application includes an Amazon CloudFront distribution and a public Application Load Balancer (ALB) in an AWS Region. The company has configured the ALB as the default origin for the distribution. After some recent application outages, the company wants a zero-second RTO. The company deploys the application to a secondary Region in a warm standby configuration. A DevOps engineer needs to automate the failover of the application to the secondary Region so that HTTP GET requests meet the desired RTO. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司需要为其应用程序实施故障转移。该应用程序包括一个 Amazon CloudFront distribution 和位于某个 AWS Region 中的公共 Application Load Balancer (ALB)。公司已将该 ALB 配置为 distribution 的 default origin。在最近发生一些应用程序中断后，公司希望实现零秒 RTO。公司以 warm standby configuration 将应用程序部署到 secondary Region。DevOps engineer 需要自动化应用程序到 secondary Region 的故障转移，使 HTTP GET requests 满足所需的 RTO。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A cloud team uses AWS Organizations and AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) to manage a company's AWS accounts. The company recently established a research team. The research team requires the ability to fully manage the resources in its account. The research team must not be able to create IAM users. The cloud team creates a Research Administrator permission set in IAM Identity Center for the research team. The permission set has the AdministratorAccess AWS managed policy attached. The cloud team must ensure that no one on the research team can create IAM users. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an IAM policy that denies the iam:CreateUser action. Attach the IAM policy to the Research Administrator permission set.

contents.en: Create an IAM policy that denies the iam:CreateUser action. Attach the IAM policy to the Research Administrator permission set.
contents.zh: 创建一个拒绝 iam:CreateUser action 的 IAM policy。将该 IAM policy 附加到 Research Administrator permission set。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an IAM policy that allows all actions except the iam:CreateUser action. Use the IAM policy to set the permissions boundary for the Research Administrator permission set.

contents.en: Create an IAM policy that allows all actions except the iam:CreateUser action. Use the IAM policy to set the permissions boundary for the Research Administrator permission set.
contents.zh: 创建一个允许除 iam:CreateUser action 之外所有 actions 的 IAM policy。使用该 IAM policy 设置 Research Administrator permission set 的 permissions boundary。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an SCP that denies the iam:CreateUser action. Attach the SCP to the research team's AWS account.

contents.en: Create an SCP that denies the iam:CreateUser action. Attach the SCP to the research team's AWS account.
contents.zh: 创建一个拒绝 iam:CreateUser action 的 SCP。将该 SCP 附加到研究团队的 AWS 账户。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function that deletes IAM users. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that detects the IAM CreateUser event. Configure the rule to invoke the Lambda function.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that deletes IAM users. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that detects the IAM CreateUser event. Configure the rule to invoke the Lambda function.
contents.zh: 创建一个删除 IAM users 的 AWS Lambda function。创建一个检测 IAM CreateUser event 的 Amazon EventBridge rule。配置该 rule 调用 Lambda function。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：C。C 创建拒绝 iam:CreateUser 操作的 SCP，并将其附加到研究团队的 AWS 账号；讨论也选择 C，说明这是阻止该账号中创建 IAM 用户的集中式 Organizations 控制。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：C。C 创建拒绝 iam:CreateUser 操作的 SCP，并将其附加到研究团队的 AWS 账号；讨论也选择 C，说明这是阻止该账号中创建 IAM 用户的集中式 Organizations 控制。
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. C creates an SCP that denies iam:CreateUser and attaches it to the research team's AWS account, providing the centralized Organizations control needed to prevent IAM user creation there.

contents.en: A cloud team uses AWS Organizations and AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) to manage a company's AWS accounts. The company recently established a research team. The research team requires the ability to fully manage the resources in its account. The research team must not be able to create IAM users. The cloud team creates a Research Administrator permission set in IAM Identity Center for the research team. The permission set has the AdministratorAccess AWS managed policy attached. The cloud team must ensure that no one on the research team can create IAM users. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一个云团队使用 AWS Organizations 和 AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) 管理公司的 AWS 账户。公司最近成立了一个研究团队。研究团队需要能够完全管理其账户中的资源。研究团队不得创建 IAM users。云团队在 IAM Identity Center 中为研究团队创建了 Research Administrator permission set。该 permission set 附加了 AdministratorAccess AWS managed policy。云团队必须确保研究团队中没有任何人可以创建 IAM users。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company releases a new application in a new AWS account. The application includes an AWS Lambda function that processes messages from an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queue. The Lambda function stores the results in an Amazon S3 bucket for further downstream processing. The Lambda function needs to process the messages within a specific period of time after the messages are published. The Lambda function has a batch size of 10 messages and takes a few seconds to process a batch of messages. As load increases on the application's first day of service, messages in the queue accumulate at a greater rate than the Lambda function can process the messages. Some messages miss the required processing timelines. The logs show that many messages in the queue have data that is not valid. The company needs to meet the timeline requirements for messages that have valid data. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Increase the Lambda function's batch size. Change the SQS standard queue to an SQS FIFO queue. Request a Lambda concurrency increase in the AWS Region.

contents.en: Increase the Lambda function's batch size. Change the SQS standard queue to an SQS FIFO queue. Request a Lambda concurrency increase in the AWS Region.
contents.zh: 增加 Lambda function 的 batch size。将 SQS standard queue 更改为 SQS FIFO queue。请求提高 AWS Region 中的 Lambda concurrency。

options.label: B
options.content: Reduce the Lambda function's batch size. Increase the SQS message throughput quota. Request a Lambda concurrency increase in the AWS Region.

contents.en: Reduce the Lambda function's batch size. Increase the SQS message throughput quota. Request a Lambda concurrency increase in the AWS Region.
contents.zh: 减小 Lambda function 的 batch size。提高 SQS message throughput quota。请求提高 AWS Region 中的 Lambda concurrency。

options.label: C
options.content: Increase the Lambda function's batch size. Configure S3 Transfer Acceleration on the S3 bucket. Configure an SQS dead- letter queue.

contents.en: Increase the Lambda function's batch size. Configure S3 Transfer Acceleration on the S3 bucket. Configure an SQS dead- letter queue.
contents.zh: 增加 Lambda function 的 batch size。在 S3 bucket 上配置 S3 Transfer Acceleration。配置 SQS dead- letter queue。

options.label: D
options.content: Keep the Lambda function's batch size the same. Configure the Lambda function to report failed batch items. Configure an SQS dead-letter queue.

contents.en: Keep the Lambda function's batch size the same. Configure the Lambda function to report failed batch items. Configure an SQS dead-letter queue.
contents.zh: 保持 Lambda function 的 batch size 不变。配置 Lambda function 报告 failed batch items。配置 SQS dead-letter queue。

questions.explanation: 正确答案：D。D 保持 Lambda 批大小不变，但启用 failed batch item reporting，并配置 SQS dead-letter queue；讨论指出 ReportBatchItemFailures 可只让失败消息重新可见，而 DLQ 可避免失败消息不断回流形成 snowball anti-pattern。

explanations.zh: 正确答案：D。D 保持 Lambda 批大小不变，但启用 failed batch item reporting，并配置 SQS dead-letter queue；讨论指出 ReportBatchItemFailures 可只让失败消息重新可见，而 DLQ 可避免失败消息不断回流形成 snowball anti-pattern。
explanations.en: Correct answer: D. D keeps the Lambda batch size unchanged, enables reporting of failed batch items, and configures an SQS dead-letter queue. The discussion notes that ReportBatchItemFailures makes only failed messages visible again, while a DLQ helps avoid a snowball anti-pattern.

contents.en: A company releases a new application in a new AWS account. The application includes an AWS Lambda function that processes messages from an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queue. The Lambda function stores the results in an Amazon S3 bucket for further downstream processing. The Lambda function needs to process the messages within a specific period of time after the messages are published. The Lambda function has a batch size of 10 messages and takes a few seconds to process a batch of messages. As load increases on the application's first day of service, messages in the queue accumulate at a greater rate than the Lambda function can process the messages. Some messages miss the required processing timelines. The logs show that many messages in the queue have data that is not valid. The company needs to meet the timeline requirements for messages that have valid data. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司在新的 AWS 账户中发布了一个新应用程序。该应用程序包括一个 AWS Lambda function，用于处理来自 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queue 的消息。Lambda function 将结果存储在 Amazon S3 bucket 中，以供进一步的下游处理。Lambda function 需要在消息发布后的特定时间段内处理这些消息。Lambda function 的 batch size 为 10 条消息，处理一批消息需要几秒钟。随着应用程序上线第一天负载增加，队列中的消息累积速度超过了 Lambda function 处理消息的速度。一些消息错过了所需的处理时间线。日志显示，队列中的许多消息包含无效数据。公司需要满足具有有效数据的消息的时间线要求。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has an application that runs on AWS Lambda and sends logs to Amazon CloudWatch Logs. An Amazon Kinesis data stream is subscribed to the log groups in CloudWatch Logs. A single consumer Lambda function processes the logs from the data stream and stores the logs in an Amazon S3 bucket. The company's DevOps team has noticed high latency during the processing and ingestion of some logs. Which combination of steps will reduce the latency? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a data stream consumer with enhanced fan-out. Set the Lambda function that processes the logs as the consumer.

contents.en: Create a data stream consumer with enhanced fan-out. Set the Lambda function that processes the logs as the consumer.
contents.zh: 创建一个启用增强型扇出的数据流消费者。将处理日志的 Lambda 函数设置为该消费者。

options.label: B
options.content: Increase the ParallelizationFactor setting in the Lambda event source mapping.

contents.en: Increase the ParallelizationFactor setting in the Lambda event source mapping.
contents.zh: 提高 Lambda 事件源映射中的 ParallelizationFactor 设置。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure reserved concurrency for the Lambda function that processes the logs.

contents.en: Configure reserved concurrency for the Lambda function that processes the logs.
contents.zh: 为处理日志的 Lambda 函数配置预留并发。

options.label: D
options.content: Increase the batch size in the Kinesis data stream.

contents.en: Increase the batch size in the Kinesis data stream.
contents.zh: 增加 Kinesis 数据流中的批处理大小。

options.label: E
options.content: Turn off the ReportBatchItemFailures setting in the Lambda event source mapping.

contents.en: Turn off the ReportBatchItemFailures setting in the Lambda event source mapping.
contents.zh: 关闭 Lambda 事件源映射中的 ReportBatchItemFailures 设置。

options.label: F
options.content: Increase the number of shards in the Kinesis data stream.

contents.en: Increase the number of shards in the Kinesis data stream.
contents.zh: 增加 Kinesis 数据流中的分片数量。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、B、F。A 使用 Kinesis enhanced fan-out，让 Lambda 消费者获得每个分片专用吞吐量，避免与其他消费者争用。B 提高 Lambda 事件源映射的 ParallelizationFactor，增加并行处理能力。F 增加 Kinesis 分片数，因为流的总容量由分片容量相加而来。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、B、F。A 使用 Kinesis enhanced fan-out，让 Lambda 消费者获得每个分片专用吞吐量，避免与其他消费者争用。B 提高 Lambda 事件源映射的 ParallelizationFactor，增加并行处理能力。F 增加 Kinesis 分片数，因为流的总容量由分片容量相加而来。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A, B, and F. A uses Kinesis enhanced fan-out so the Lambda consumer gets dedicated per-shard throughput and does not compete with other consumers. B increases the Lambda event source mapping ParallelizationFactor to process records in parallel. F increases the number of Kinesis shards, because stream capacity is the sum of shard capacity.

contents.en: A company has an application that runs on AWS Lambda and sends logs to Amazon CloudWatch Logs. An Amazon Kinesis data stream is subscribed to the log groups in CloudWatch Logs. A single consumer Lambda function processes the logs from the data stream and stores the logs in an Amazon S3 bucket. The company's DevOps team has noticed high latency during the processing and ingestion of some logs. Which combination of steps will reduce the latency? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个在 AWS Lambda 上运行的应用程序，并将日志发送到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs。一个 Amazon Kinesis 数据流订阅了 CloudWatch Logs 中的日志组。单个消费者 Lambda 函数处理来自该数据流的日志，并将日志存储在 Amazon S3 存储桶中。公司的 DevOps 团队注意到，在处理和摄取某些日志时延迟很高。哪组步骤可以降低延迟？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company operates sensitive workloads across the AWS accounts that are in the company's organization in AWS Organizations. The company uses an IP address range to delegate IP addresses for Amazon VPC CIDR blocks and all non-cloud hardware. The company needs a solution that prevents principals that are outside the company's IP address range from performing AWS actions in the organization's accounts. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure AWS Firewall Manager for the organization. Create an AWS Network Firewall policy that allows only source traffic from the company's IP address range. Set the policy scope to all accounts in the organization.

contents.en: Configure AWS Firewall Manager for the organization. Create an AWS Network Firewall policy that allows only source traffic from the company's IP address range. Set the policy scope to all accounts in the organization.
contents.zh: 为该组织配置 AWS Firewall Manager。创建一个 AWS Network Firewall 策略，仅允许来自公司 IP 地址范围的源流量。将策略范围设置为组织中的所有账户。

options.label: B
options.content: In Organizations, create an SCP that denies source IP addresses that are outside of the company's IP address range. Attach the SCP to the organization's root.

contents.en: In Organizations, create an SCP that denies source IP addresses that are outside of the company's IP address range. Attach the SCP to the organization's root.
contents.zh: 在 Organizations 中，创建一个 SCP，拒绝公司 IP 地址范围之外的源 IP 地址。将该 SCP 附加到组织根。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure Amazon GuardDuty for the organization. Create a GuardDuty trusted IP address list for the company's IP range. Activate the trusted IP list for the organization.

contents.en: Configure Amazon GuardDuty for the organization. Create a GuardDuty trusted IP address list for the company's IP range. Activate the trusted IP list for the organization.
contents.zh: 为该组织配置 Amazon GuardDuty。为公司的 IP 范围创建 GuardDuty 可信 IP 地址列表。为该组织激活该可信 IP 列表。

options.label: D
options.content: In Organizations, create an SCP that allows source IP addresses that are inside of the company's IP address range. Attach the SCP to the organization's root.

contents.en: In Organizations, create an SCP that allows source IP addresses that are inside of the company's IP address range. Attach the SCP to the organization's root.
contents.zh: 在 Organizations 中，创建一个 SCP，允许公司 IP 地址范围内的源 IP 地址。将该 SCP 附加到组织根。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。通过在 AWS Organizations 中创建 SCP，拒绝公司 IP 范围之外的源 IP，并附加到组织根，可以在整个组织范围内强制该访问限制。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。通过在 AWS Organizations 中创建 SCP，拒绝公司 IP 范围之外的源 IP，并附加到组织根，可以在整个组织范围内强制该访问限制。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. Creating an SCP in AWS Organizations that denies source IPs outside the company's range and attaching it to the organization root enforces the restriction across the organization.

contents.en: A company operates sensitive workloads across the AWS accounts that are in the company's organization in AWS Organizations. The company uses an IP address range to delegate IP addresses for Amazon VPC CIDR blocks and all non-cloud hardware. The company needs a solution that prevents principals that are outside the company's IP address range from performing AWS actions in the organization's accounts. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 AWS Organizations 中的公司组织内的 AWS 账户之间运行敏感工作负载。该公司使用一个 IP 地址范围，为 Amazon VPC CIDR 块以及所有非云硬件分配 IP 地址。公司需要一种解决方案，防止公司 IP 地址范围之外的主体在组织账户中执行 AWS 操作。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company deploys an application in two AWS Regions. The application currently uses an Amazon S3 bucket in the primary Region to store data. A DevOps engineer needs to ensure that the application is highly available in both Regions. The DevOps engineer has created a new S3 bucket in the secondary Region. All existing and new objects must be in both S3 buckets. The application must fail over between the Regions with no data loss. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a new IAM role that allows the Amazon S3 and S3 Batch Operations service principals to assume the role that has the necessary permissions for S3 replication.

contents.en: Create a new IAM role that allows the Amazon S3 and S3 Batch Operations service principals to assume the role that has the necessary permissions for S3 replication.
contents.zh: 创建一个新的 IAM 角色，允许 Amazon S3 和 S3 Batch Operations 服务主体代入具有 S3 复制所需权限的角色。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new IAM role that allows the AWS Batch service principal to assume the role that has the necessary permissions for S3 replication.

contents.en: Create a new IAM role that allows the AWS Batch service principal to assume the role that has the necessary permissions for S3 replication.
contents.zh: 创建一个新的 IAM 角色，允许 AWS Batch 服务主体代入具有 S3 复制所需权限的角色。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR) rule on the source S3 bucket. Configure the rule to use the IAM role for Amazon S3 to replicate to the target S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create an S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR) rule on the source S3 bucket. Configure the rule to use the IAM role for Amazon S3 to replicate to the target S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 在源 S3 存储桶上创建 S3 跨区域复制 (CRR) 规则。配置该规则使用 Amazon S3 的 IAM 角色复制到目标 S3 存储桶。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a two-way replication rule on the source S3 bucket. Configure the rule to use the IAM role for Amazon S3 to replicate to the target S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create a two-way replication rule on the source S3 bucket. Configure the rule to use the IAM role for Amazon S3 to replicate to the target S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 在源 S3 存储桶上创建双向复制规则。配置该规则使用 Amazon S3 的 IAM 角色复制到目标 S3 存储桶。

options.label: E
options.content: Create an AWS Batch job that has an AWS Fargate orchestration type. Configure the job to use the IAM role for AWS Batch. Specify a Bash command to use the AWS CLI to synchronize the contents of the source S3 bucket and the target S3 bucket

contents.en: Create an AWS Batch job that has an AWS Fargate orchestration type. Configure the job to use the IAM role for AWS Batch. Specify a Bash command to use the AWS CLI to synchronize the contents of the source S3 bucket and the target S3 bucket
contents.zh: 创建一个具有 AWS Fargate 编排类型的 AWS Batch 作业。配置该作业使用 AWS Batch 的 IAM 角色。指定一个 Bash 命令，使用 AWS CLI 同步源 S3 存储桶和目标 S3 存储桶的内容

options.label: F
options.content: Create an operation in S3 Batch Operations to replicate the contents of the source S3 bucket to the target S3 bucket. Configure the operation to use the IAM role for Amazon S3.

contents.en: Create an operation in S3 Batch Operations to replicate the contents of the source S3 bucket to the target S3 bucket. Configure the operation to use the IAM role for Amazon S3.
contents.zh: 在 S3 Batch Operations 中创建一个操作，将源 S3 存储桶的内容复制到目标 S3 存储桶。配置该操作使用 Amazon S3 的 IAM 角色。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、D、F。题目要求现有对象和新对象都存在于两个 S3 存储桶中，因此需要 A 创建可供 S3 和 S3 Batch Operations 使用的复制 IAM 角色，D 配置双向复制规则处理新对象，F 使用 S3 Batch Operations 复制源桶中的现有对象。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、D、F。题目要求现有对象和新对象都存在于两个 S3 存储桶中，因此需要 A 创建可供 S3 和 S3 Batch Operations 使用的复制 IAM 角色，D 配置双向复制规则处理新对象，F 使用 S3 Batch Operations 复制源桶中的现有对象。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A, D, and F. Because all existing and new objects must be in both S3 buckets, A creates the replication IAM role for S3 and S3 Batch Operations, D configures two-way replication for new objects, and F uses S3 Batch Operations to replicate existing objects.

contents.en: A company deploys an application in two AWS Regions. The application currently uses an Amazon S3 bucket in the primary Region to store data. A DevOps engineer needs to ensure that the application is highly available in both Regions. The DevOps engineer has created a new S3 bucket in the secondary Region. All existing and new objects must be in both S3 buckets. The application must fail over between the Regions with no data loss. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司在两个 AWS 区域中部署了一个应用程序。该应用程序目前使用主区域中的一个 Amazon S3 存储桶来存储数据。一名 DevOps 工程师需要确保该应用程序在两个区域中都高度可用。DevOps 工程师已在辅助区域中创建了一个新的 S3 存储桶。所有现有对象和新对象都必须存在于两个 S3 存储桶中。应用程序必须能在区域之间故障转移且不丢失数据。哪组步骤能以最高运营效率满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations to manage multiple AWS accounts. The company needs an automated process across all AWS accounts to isolate any compromised Amazon EC2 instances when the instances receive a specific tag. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to deploy the CloudFormation stacks in all AWS accounts.

contents.en: Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to deploy the CloudFormation stacks in all AWS accounts.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CloudFormation StackSets 在所有 AWS 账户中部署 CloudFormation 堆栈。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an SCP that has a Deny statement for the ec2:* action with a condition of "aws:RequestTag/isolation": false.

contents.en: Create an SCP that has a Deny statement for the ec2:* action with a condition of "aws:RequestTag/isolation": false.
contents.zh: 创建一个 SCP，其中包含针对 ec2:* 操作的 Deny 语句，并带有 "aws:RequestTag/isolation": false 条件。

options.label: C
options.content: Attach the SCP to the root of the organization.

contents.en: Attach the SCP to the root of the organization.
contents.zh: 将该 SCP 附加到组织根。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS CloudFormation template that creates an EC2 instance role that has no IAM policies attached. Configure the template to have a security group that has an explicit Deny rule on all traffic. Use the CloudFormation template to create an AWS Lambda function that attaches the IAM role to instances. Configure the Lambda function to add a network ACL. Set up an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function when a specific tag is applied to a compromised EC2 instance.

contents.en: Create an AWS CloudFormation template that creates an EC2 instance role that has no IAM policies attached. Configure the template to have a security group that has an explicit Deny rule on all traffic. Use the CloudFormation template to create an AWS Lambda function that attaches the IAM role to instances. Configure the Lambda function to add a network ACL. Set up an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function when a specific tag is applied to a compromised EC2 instance.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CloudFormation 模板，该模板创建一个没有附加任何 IAM 策略的 EC2 实例角色。配置该模板，使其包含一个对所有流量具有显式 Deny 规则的安全组。使用该 CloudFormation 模板创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，将该 IAM 角色附加到实例。配置 Lambda 函数添加网络 ACL。设置一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，在特定标签应用到受损 EC2 实例时调用该 Lambda 函数。

options.label: E
options.content: Create an AWS CloudFormation template that creates an EC2 instance role that has no IAM policies attached. Configure the template to have a security group that has no inbound rules or outbound rules. Use the CloudFormation template to create an AWS Lambda function that attaches the IAM role to instances. Configure the Lambda function to replace any existing security groups with the new security group. Set up an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function when a specific tag is applied to a compromised EC2 instance.

contents.en: Create an AWS CloudFormation template that creates an EC2 instance role that has no IAM policies attached. Configure the template to have a security group that has no inbound rules or outbound rules. Use the CloudFormation template to create an AWS Lambda function that attaches the IAM role to instances. Configure the Lambda function to replace any existing security groups with the new security group. Set up an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function when a specific tag is applied to a compromised EC2 instance.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CloudFormation 模板，该模板创建一个没有附加任何 IAM 策略的 EC2 实例角色。配置该模板，使其包含一个没有入站规则或出站规则的安全组。使用该 CloudFormation 模板创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，将该 IAM 角色附加到实例。配置 Lambda 函数用新的安全组替换任何现有安全组。设置一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，在特定标签应用到受损 EC2 实例时调用该 Lambda 函数。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、E。A 使用 CloudFormation StackSets 在所有 AWS 账户中统一部署所需堆栈。E 通过无策略实例角色、无入站/出站规则的安全组和 EventBridge 触发的 Lambda，在实例被打上特定标签时隔离受影响的 EC2 实例。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、E。A 使用 CloudFormation StackSets 在所有 AWS 账户中统一部署所需堆栈。E 通过无策略实例角色、无入站/出站规则的安全组和 EventBridge 触发的 Lambda，在实例被打上特定标签时隔离受影响的 EC2 实例。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A and E. A uses CloudFormation StackSets to deploy the required stacks across all AWS accounts. E isolates a tagged compromised EC2 instance by attaching a role with no policies and replacing security groups with one that has no inbound or outbound rules through an EventBridge-triggered Lambda function.

contents.en: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations to manage multiple AWS accounts. The company needs an automated process across all AWS accounts to isolate any compromised Amazon EC2 instances when the instances receive a specific tag. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations 中的一个组织来管理多个 AWS 账户。公司需要在所有 AWS 账户中实现一个自动化流程，以便在任何受损的 Amazon EC2 实例收到特定标签时将其隔离。哪组步骤可以满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company manages multiple AWS accounts by using AWS Organizations with OUs for the different business divisions. The company is updating their corporate network to use new IP address ranges. The company has 10 Amazon S3 buckets in different AWS accounts. The S3 buckets store reports for the different divisions. The S3 bucket configurations allow only private corporate network IP addresses to access the S3 buckets. A DevOps engineer needs to change the range of IP addresses that have permission to access the contents of the S3 buckets. The DevOps engineer also needs to revoke the permissions of two OUs in the company. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a new SCP that has two statements, one that allows access to the new range of IP addresses for all the S3 buckets and one that denies access to the old range of IP addresses for all the S3 buckets. Set a permissions boundary for the OrganizationAccountAccessRole role in the two OUs to deny access to the S3 buckets.

contents.en: Create a new SCP that has two statements, one that allows access to the new range of IP addresses for all the S3 buckets and one that denies access to the old range of IP addresses for all the S3 buckets. Set a permissions boundary for the OrganizationAccountAccessRole role in the two OUs to deny access to the S3 buckets.
contents.zh: 创建一个新的 SCP，其中包含两条语句：一条允许新的 IP 地址范围访问所有 S3 存储桶，另一条拒绝旧的 IP 地址范围访问所有 S3 存储桶。为两个 OU 中的 OrganizationAccountAccessRole 角色设置权限边界，以拒绝访问 S3 存储桶。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new SCP that has a statement that allows only the new range of IP addresses to access the S3 buckets. Create another SCP that denies access to the S3 buckets. Attach the second SCP to the two OUs.

contents.en: Create a new SCP that has a statement that allows only the new range of IP addresses to access the S3 buckets. Create another SCP that denies access to the S3 buckets. Attach the second SCP to the two OUs.
contents.zh: 创建一个新的 SCP，其中包含一条仅允许新的 IP 地址范围访问 S3 存储桶的语句。创建另一个 SCP，拒绝访问 S3 存储桶。将第二个 SCP 附加到这两个 OU。

options.label: C
options.content: On all the S3 buckets, configure resource-based policies that allow only the new range of IP addresses to access the S3 buckets. Create a new SCP that denies access to the S3 buckets. Attach the SCP to the two OUs.

contents.en: On all the S3 buckets, configure resource-based policies that allow only the new range of IP addresses to access the S3 buckets. Create a new SCP that denies access to the S3 buckets. Attach the SCP to the two OUs.
contents.zh: 在所有 S3 存储桶上，配置基于资源的策略，仅允许新的 IP 地址范围访问这些 S3 存储桶。创建一个新的 SCP，拒绝访问 S3 存储桶。将该 SCP 附加到这两个 OU。

options.label: D
options.content: On all the S3 buckets, configure resource-based policies that allow only the new range of IP addresses to access the S3 buckets. Set a permissions boundary for the OrganizationAccountAccessRole role in the two OUs to deny access to the S3 buckets.

contents.en: On all the S3 buckets, configure resource-based policies that allow only the new range of IP addresses to access the S3 buckets. Set a permissions boundary for the OrganizationAccountAccessRole role in the two OUs to deny access to the S3 buckets.
contents.zh: 在所有 S3 存储桶上，配置基于资源的策略，仅允许新的 IP 地址范围访问这些 S3 存储桶。为两个 OU 中的 OrganizationAccountAccessRole 角色设置权限边界，以拒绝访问 S3 存储桶。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。S3 存储桶资源策略只允许新的 IP 地址范围访问，从网络来源层面限制访问；同时对两个 OU 附加拒绝访问这些存储桶的 SCP，可以撤销这些 OU 对存储桶的访问。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。S3 存储桶资源策略只允许新的 IP 地址范围访问，从网络来源层面限制访问；同时对两个 OU 附加拒绝访问这些存储桶的 SCP，可以撤销这些 OU 对存储桶的访问。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. Resource-based policies on the S3 buckets allow access only from the new IP ranges, controlling access by network source. Attaching an SCP that denies access to the buckets to the two OUs revokes those OUs' access.

contents.en: A company manages multiple AWS accounts by using AWS Organizations with OUs for the different business divisions. The company is updating their corporate network to use new IP address ranges. The company has 10 Amazon S3 buckets in different AWS accounts. The S3 buckets store reports for the different divisions. The S3 bucket configurations allow only private corporate network IP addresses to access the S3 buckets. A DevOps engineer needs to change the range of IP addresses that have permission to access the contents of the S3 buckets. The DevOps engineer also needs to revoke the permissions of two OUs in the company. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations 和面向不同业务部门的 OU 来管理多个 AWS 账户。公司正在更新其企业网络，以使用新的 IP 地址范围。公司在不同 AWS 账户中有 10 个 Amazon S3 存储桶。这些 S3 存储桶存储不同部门的报告。S3 存储桶配置仅允许私有企业网络 IP 地址访问这些 S3 存储桶。一名 DevOps 工程师需要更改有权访问这些 S3 存储桶内容的 IP 地址范围。DevOps 工程师还需要撤销公司中两个 OU 的权限。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has started using AWS across several teams. Each team has multiple accounts and unique security profiles. The company manages the accounts in an organization in AWS Organizations. Each account has its own configuration and security controls. The company's DevOps team wants to use preventive and detective controls to govern all accounts. The DevOps team needs to ensure the security of accounts now and in the future as the company creates new accounts in the organization. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use Organizations to create OUs that have appropriate SCPs attached for each team. Place team accounts in the appropriate OUs to apply security controls. Create any new team accounts in the appropriate OUs.

contents.en: Use Organizations to create OUs that have appropriate SCPs attached for each team. Place team accounts in the appropriate OUs to apply security controls. Create any new team accounts in the appropriate OUs.
contents.zh: 使用 Organizations 为每个团队创建附加了适当 SCP 的 OU。将团队账户放入相应的 OU 以应用安全控制。在相应的 OU 中创建任何新的团队账户。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS Control Tower landing zone. Configure OUs and appropriate controls in AWS Control Tower for the existing teams. Configure trusted access for AWS Control Tower. Enroll the existing accounts in the appropriate OUs that match the appropriate security policies for each team. Use AWS Control Tower to provision any new accounts.

contents.en: Create an AWS Control Tower landing zone. Configure OUs and appropriate controls in AWS Control Tower for the existing teams. Configure trusted access for AWS Control Tower. Enroll the existing accounts in the appropriate OUs that match the appropriate security policies for each team. Use AWS Control Tower to provision any new accounts.
contents.zh: 创建 AWS Control Tower landing zone。在 AWS Control Tower 中为现有团队配置 OU 和适当的控制。为 AWS Control Tower 配置可信访问。将现有账户注册到与每个团队相应安全策略匹配的适当 OU 中。使用 AWS Control Tower 预置任何新账户。

options.label: C
options.content: Create AWS CloudFormation stack sets in the organization's management account. Configure a stack set that deploys AWS Config with configuration rules and remediation actions for all controls to each account in the organization. Update the stack sets to deploy to new accounts as the accounts are created.

contents.en: Create AWS CloudFormation stack sets in the organization's management account. Configure a stack set that deploys AWS Config with configuration rules and remediation actions for all controls to each account in the organization. Update the stack sets to deploy to new accounts as the accounts are created.
contents.zh: 在组织的管理账户中创建 AWS CloudFormation stack sets。配置一个 stack set，将带有配置规则和修复操作的 AWS Config 部署到组织中的每个账户，用于所有控制。更新 stack sets，以便在创建新账户时部署到新账户。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure AWS Config to manage the AWS Config rules across all AWS accounts in the organization. Deploy conformance packs that provide AWS Config rules and remediation actions across the organization.

contents.en: Configure AWS Config to manage the AWS Config rules across all AWS accounts in the organization. Deploy conformance packs that provide AWS Config rules and remediation actions across the organization.
contents.zh: 配置 AWS Config 来管理组织中所有 AWS 账户的 AWS Config 规则。部署提供 AWS Config 规则和修复操作的合规性包，覆盖整个组织。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。AWS Control Tower landing zone 可以通过 OU 和控制项为账户提供持续治理；启用可信访问并将现有账户纳入匹配安全策略的 OU 后，新账户也可通过 Account Factory 以同样治理方式创建。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。AWS Control Tower landing zone 可以通过 OU 和控制项为账户提供持续治理；启用可信访问并将现有账户纳入匹配安全策略的 OU 后，新账户也可通过 Account Factory 以同样治理方式创建。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. An AWS Control Tower landing zone provides ongoing governance through OUs and controls. After trusted access is configured and existing accounts are enrolled into OUs with the right security policies, new accounts can be provisioned consistently through Control Tower.

contents.en: A company has started using AWS across several teams. Each team has multiple accounts and unique security profiles. The company manages the accounts in an organization in AWS Organizations. Each account has its own configuration and security controls. The company's DevOps team wants to use preventive and detective controls to govern all accounts. The DevOps team needs to ensure the security of accounts now and in the future as the company creates new accounts in the organization. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司已开始在多个团队中使用 AWS。每个团队都有多个账户和独特的安全配置文件。公司在 AWS Organizations 中的一个组织内管理这些账户。每个账户都有自己的配置和安全控制。公司的 DevOps 团队希望使用预防性和检测性控制来治理所有账户。DevOps 团队需要确保当前账户以及将来公司在组织中创建的新账户的安全。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses an AWS CodeCommit repository to store its source code and corresponding unit tests. The company has configured an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that includes an AWS CodeBuild project that runs when code is merged to the main branch of the repository. The company wants the CodeBuild project to run the unit tests. If the unit tests pass, the CodeBuild project must tag the most recent commit. How should the company configure the CodeBuild project to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure the CodeBuild project to use native Git to done the CodeCommit repository. Configure the project to run the unit tests. Configure the project to use native Git to create a tag and to push the Git tag to the repository if the code passes the unit tests.

contents.en: Configure the CodeBuild project to use native Git to done the CodeCommit repository. Configure the project to run the unit tests. Configure the project to use native Git to create a tag and to push the Git tag to the repository if the code passes the unit tests.
contents.zh: 配置 CodeBuild 项目使用原生 Git 来 done CodeCommit 存储库。配置该项目运行单元测试。如果代码通过单元测试，配置该项目使用原生 Git 创建标签并将 Git 标签推送到存储库。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure the CodeBuild projed to use native Git to done the CodeCommit repository. Configure the project to run the unit tests. Configure the project to use AWS CLI commands to create a new repository tag in the repository if the code passes the unit tests.

contents.en: Configure the CodeBuild projed to use native Git to done the CodeCommit repository. Configure the project to run the unit tests. Configure the project to use AWS CLI commands to create a new repository tag in the repository if the code passes the unit tests.
contents.zh: 配置 CodeBuild projed 使用原生 Git 来 done CodeCommit 存储库。配置该项目运行单元测试。如果代码通过单元测试，配置该项目使用 AWS CLI 命令在存储库中创建新的存储库标签。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the CodeBuild project to use AWS CLI commands to copy the code from the CodeCommit repository. Configure the project to run the unit tests. Configure the project to use AWS CLI commands to create a new Git tag in the repository if the code passes the unit tests.

contents.en: Configure the CodeBuild project to use AWS CLI commands to copy the code from the CodeCommit repository. Configure the project to run the unit tests. Configure the project to use AWS CLI commands to create a new Git tag in the repository if the code passes the unit tests.
contents.zh: 配置 CodeBuild 项目使用 AWS CLI 命令从 CodeCommit 存储库复制代码。配置该项目运行单元测试。如果代码通过单元测试，配置该项目使用 AWS CLI 命令在存储库中创建新的 Git 标签。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure the CodeBuild project to use AWS CLI commands to copy the code from the CodeCommit repository. Configure the project to run the unit tests. Configure the project to use AWS CLI commands to create a new repository tag in the repository if the code passes the unit tests.

contents.en: Configure the CodeBuild project to use AWS CLI commands to copy the code from the CodeCommit repository. Configure the project to run the unit tests. Configure the project to use AWS CLI commands to create a new repository tag in the repository if the code passes the unit tests.
contents.zh: 配置 CodeBuild 项目使用 AWS CLI 命令从 CodeCommit 存储库复制代码。配置该项目运行单元测试。如果代码通过单元测试，配置该项目使用 AWS CLI 命令在存储库中创建新的存储库标签。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。CodeBuild 使用原生 Git 克隆 CodeCommit 仓库、运行单元测试，并在测试通过后用 Git 创建并推送标签，满足基于测试结果管理仓库标签的要求。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。CodeBuild 使用原生 Git 克隆 CodeCommit 仓库、运行单元测试，并在测试通过后用 Git 创建并推送标签，满足基于测试结果管理仓库标签的要求。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. CodeBuild can use native Git to clone the CodeCommit repository, run unit tests, and create and push a Git tag only when the tests pass, which matches the required workflow.

contents.en: A company uses an AWS CodeCommit repository to store its source code and corresponding unit tests. The company has configured an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that includes an AWS CodeBuild project that runs when code is merged to the main branch of the repository. The company wants the CodeBuild project to run the unit tests. If the unit tests pass, the CodeBuild project must tag the most recent commit. How should the company configure the CodeBuild project to meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS CodeCommit 存储库来存储其源代码和相应的单元测试。公司已配置一个 AWS CodePipeline 管道，其中包含一个 AWS CodeBuild 项目，该项目在代码合并到存储库的 main 分支时运行。公司希望 CodeBuild 项目运行单元测试。如果单元测试通过，CodeBuild 项目必须为最近一次提交打标签。公司应如何配置 CodeBuild 项目以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer manages a company's Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster. The cluster runs on several Amazon EC2 instances that are in an Auto Scaling group. The DevOps engineer must implement a solution that logs and reviews all stopped tasks for errors. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to capture task state changes. Send the event to Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Use CloudWatch Logs Insights to investigate stopped tasks.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to capture task state changes. Send the event to Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Use CloudWatch Logs Insights to investigate stopped tasks.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则来捕获任务状态变化。将事件发送到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs。使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 调查已停止的任务。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure tasks to write log data in the embedded metric format. Store the logs in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Monitor the ContainerInstanceCount metric for changes.

contents.en: Configure tasks to write log data in the embedded metric format. Store the logs in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Monitor the ContainerInstanceCount metric for changes.
contents.zh: 配置任务以嵌入式指标格式写入日志数据。将日志存储在 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 中。监控 ContainerInstanceCount 指标的变化。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the EC2 instances to store logs in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Create a CloudWatch Contributor Insights rule that uses the EC2 instance log data. Use the Contributor Insights rule to investigate stopped tasks.

contents.en: Configure the EC2 instances to store logs in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Create a CloudWatch Contributor Insights rule that uses the EC2 instance log data. Use the Contributor Insights rule to investigate stopped tasks.
contents.zh: 配置 EC2 实例将日志存储在 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 中。创建一个使用 EC2 实例日志数据的 CloudWatch Contributor Insights 规则。使用 Contributor Insights 规则调查已停止的任务。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure an EC2 Auto Scaling lifecycle hook for the EC2_INSTANCE_TERMINATING scale-in event. Write the SystemEventLog file to Amazon S3. Use Amazon Athena to query the log file for errors.

contents.en: Configure an EC2 Auto Scaling lifecycle hook for the EC2_INSTANCE_TERMINATING scale-in event. Write the SystemEventLog file to Amazon S3. Use Amazon Athena to query the log file for errors.
contents.zh: 为 EC2_INSTANCE_TERMINATING 缩容事件配置 EC2 Auto Scaling 生命周期挂钩。将 SystemEventLog 文件写入 Amazon S3。使用 Amazon Athena 查询日志文件中的错误。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。EventBridge 捕获 ECS 任务状态变化并发送到 CloudWatch Logs 后，可以使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 查询和调查停止的任务及其错误信息。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。EventBridge 捕获 ECS 任务状态变化并发送到 CloudWatch Logs 后，可以使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 查询和调查停止的任务及其错误信息。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. Capturing ECS task state changes with EventBridge and sending them to CloudWatch Logs lets CloudWatch Logs Insights query and investigate stopped tasks and related errors.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer manages a company's Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster. The cluster runs on several Amazon EC2 instances that are in an Auto Scaling group. The DevOps engineer must implement a solution that logs and reviews all stopped tasks for errors. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师管理一家公司的 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 集群。该集群在 Auto Scaling 组中的多个 Amazon EC2 实例上运行。DevOps 工程师必须实现一种解决方案，记录并审查所有已停止任务中的错误。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company wants to deploy a workload on several hundred Amazon EC2 instances. The company will provision the EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group by using a launch template. The workload will pull files from an Amazon S3 bucket, process the data, and put the results into a different S3 bucket. The EC2 instances must have least-privilege permissions and must use temporary security credentials. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an IAM role that has the appropriate permissions for S3 buckets Add the IAM role to an instance profile.

contents.en: Create an IAM role that has the appropriate permissions for S3 buckets Add the IAM role to an instance profile.
contents.zh: 创建一个具有 S3 存储桶适当权限的 IAM 角色 将该 IAM 角色添加到实例配置文件。

options.label: B
options.content: Update the launch template to include the IAM instance profile.

contents.en: Update the launch template to include the IAM instance profile.
contents.zh: 更新启动模板以包含 IAM 实例配置文件。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an IAM user that has the appropriate permissions for Amazon S3 Generate a secret key and token.

contents.en: Create an IAM user that has the appropriate permissions for Amazon S3 Generate a secret key and token.
contents.zh: 创建一个具有 Amazon S3 适当权限的 IAM 用户 生成密钥和令牌。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a trust anchor and profile Attach the IAM role to the profile.

contents.en: Create a trust anchor and profile Attach the IAM role to the profile.
contents.zh: 创建信任锚和配置文件 将 IAM 角色附加到该配置文件。

options.label: E
options.content: Update the launch template Modify the user data to use the new secret key and token.

contents.en: Update the launch template Modify the user data to use the new secret key and token.
contents.zh: 更新启动模板 修改用户数据以使用新的密钥和令牌。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、B。A 创建具备 S3 访问权限的 IAM 角色并放入实例配置文件，使 EC2 实例无需长期凭证即可访问存储桶。B 更新启动模板以包含该实例配置文件，确保 Auto Scaling 组新启动的实例自动获得这些权限。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、B。A 创建具备 S3 访问权限的 IAM 角色并放入实例配置文件，使 EC2 实例无需长期凭证即可访问存储桶。B 更新启动模板以包含该实例配置文件，确保 Auto Scaling 组新启动的实例自动获得这些权限。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A and B. A creates an IAM role with the needed S3 permissions and adds it to an instance profile, avoiding long-term credentials. B updates the launch template so instances launched by the Auto Scaling group automatically use that profile.

contents.en: A company wants to deploy a workload on several hundred Amazon EC2 instances. The company will provision the EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group by using a launch template. The workload will pull files from an Amazon S3 bucket, process the data, and put the results into a different S3 bucket. The EC2 instances must have least-privilege permissions and must use temporary security credentials. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司希望在数百个 Amazon EC2 实例上部署一个工作负载。公司将使用启动模板在 Auto Scaling 组中预置这些 EC2 实例。该工作负载将从一个 Amazon S3 存储桶拉取文件、处理数据，并将结果放入另一个 S3 存储桶。EC2 实例必须具有最小权限，并且必须使用临时安全凭证。哪组步骤可以满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company is using AWS CodeDeploy to automate software deployment. The deployment must meet these requirements: • A number of instances must be available to serve traffic during the deployment. Traffic must be balanced across those instances, and the instances must automatically heal in the event of failure. • A new fleet of instances must be launched for deploying a new revision automatically, with no manual provisioning. • Traffic must be rerouted to the new environment to half of the new instances at a time. The deployment should succeed if traffic is rerouted to at least half of the instances: otherwise, it should fail. • Before routing traffic to the new fleet of instances, the temporary files generated during the deployment process must be deleted. • At the end of a successful deployment, the original instances in the deployment group must be deleted immediately to reduce costs. How can a DevOps engineer meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use an Application Load Balancer and an in-place deployment. Associate the Auto Scaling group with the deployment group. Use the Automatically copy Auto Scaling group option, and use CodeDeployDefault.OneAtAtime as the deployment configuration. Instruct AWS CodeDeploy to terminate the original instances in the deployment group, and use the AllowTraffic hook within appspec.yml to delete the temporary files.

contents.en: Use an Application Load Balancer and an in-place deployment. Associate the Auto Scaling group with the deployment group. Use the Automatically copy Auto Scaling group option, and use CodeDeployDefault.OneAtAtime as the deployment configuration. Instruct AWS CodeDeploy to terminate the original instances in the deployment group, and use the AllowTraffic hook within appspec.yml to delete the temporary files.
contents.zh: 使用 Application Load Balancer 和就地部署。将 Auto Scaling 组与部署组关联。使用 Automatically copy Auto Scaling group 选项，并使用 CodeDeployDefault.OneAtAtime 作为部署配置。指示 AWS CodeDeploy 终止部署组中的原始实例，并在 appspec.yml 中使用 AllowTraffic 挂钩删除临时文件。

options.label: B
options.content: Use an Application Load Balancer and a blue/green deployment. Associate the Auto Scaling group and Application Load Balancer target group with the deployment group. Use the Automatically copy Auto Scaling group option, create a custom deployment configuration with minimum healthy hosts defined as 50%, and assign the configuration to the deployment group. Instruct AWS CodeDeploy to terminate the original instances in the deployment group, and use the BeforeBlockTraffic hook within appspec.yml to delete the temporary files.

contents.en: Use an Application Load Balancer and a blue/green deployment. Associate the Auto Scaling group and Application Load Balancer target group with the deployment group. Use the Automatically copy Auto Scaling group option, create a custom deployment configuration with minimum healthy hosts defined as 50%, and assign the configuration to the deployment group. Instruct AWS CodeDeploy to terminate the original instances in the deployment group, and use the BeforeBlockTraffic hook within appspec.yml to delete the temporary files.
contents.zh: 使用 Application Load Balancer 和蓝/绿部署。将 Auto Scaling 组和 Application Load Balancer 目标组与部署组关联。使用 Automatically copy Auto Scaling group 选项，创建一个自定义部署配置，将最小正常主机定义为 50%，并将该配置分配给部署组。指示 AWS CodeDeploy 终止部署组中的原始实例，并在 appspec.yml 中使用 BeforeBlockTraffic 挂钩删除临时文件。

options.label: C
options.content: Use an Application Load Balancer and a blue/green deployment. Associate the Auto Scaling group and the Application Load Balancer target group with the deployment group. Use the Automatically copy Auto Scaling group option, and use CodeDeployDefault.HalfAtAtime as the deployment configuration. Instruct AWS CodeDeploy to terminate the original instances in the deployment group, and use the BeforeAllowTraffic hook within appspec.yml to delete the temporary files.

contents.en: Use an Application Load Balancer and a blue/green deployment. Associate the Auto Scaling group and the Application Load Balancer target group with the deployment group. Use the Automatically copy Auto Scaling group option, and use CodeDeployDefault.HalfAtAtime as the deployment configuration. Instruct AWS CodeDeploy to terminate the original instances in the deployment group, and use the BeforeAllowTraffic hook within appspec.yml to delete the temporary files.
contents.zh: 使用 Application Load Balancer 和蓝/绿部署。将 Auto Scaling 组和 Application Load Balancer 目标组与部署组关联。使用 Automatically copy Auto Scaling group 选项，并使用 CodeDeployDefault.HalfAtAtime 作为部署配置。指示 AWS CodeDeploy 终止部署组中的原始实例，并在 appspec.yml 中使用 BeforeAllowTraffic 挂钩删除临时文件。

options.label: D
options.content: Use an Application Load Balancer and an in-place deployment. Associate the Auto Scaling group and Application Load Balancer target group with the deployment group. Use the Automatically copy Auto Scaling group option, and use CodeDeployDefault.AllatOnce as a deployment configuration. Instruct AWS CodeDeploy to terminate the original instances in the deployment group, and use the BlockTraffic hook within appspec.yml to delete the temporary files.

contents.en: Use an Application Load Balancer and an in-place deployment. Associate the Auto Scaling group and Application Load Balancer target group with the deployment group. Use the Automatically copy Auto Scaling group option, and use CodeDeployDefault.AllatOnce as a deployment configuration. Instruct AWS CodeDeploy to terminate the original instances in the deployment group, and use the BlockTraffic hook within appspec.yml to delete the temporary files.
contents.zh: 使用 Application Load Balancer 和就地部署。将 Auto Scaling 组和 Application Load Balancer 目标组与部署组关联。使用 Automatically copy Auto Scaling group 选项，并使用 CodeDeployDefault.AllatOnce 作为部署配置。指示 AWS CodeDeploy 终止部署组中的原始实例，并在 appspec.yml 中使用 BlockTraffic 挂钩删除临时文件。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。该选项使用 ALB 和蓝/绿部署，自动复制 Auto Scaling 组，并使用 CodeDeployDefault.HalfAtATime 配置控制流量切换；BeforeAllowTraffic 钩子在允许流量前删除临时文件，原实例随后由 CodeDeploy 终止以控制成本。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。该选项使用 ALB 和蓝/绿部署，自动复制 Auto Scaling 组，并使用 CodeDeployDefault.HalfAtATime 配置控制流量切换；BeforeAllowTraffic 钩子在允许流量前删除临时文件，原实例随后由 CodeDeploy 终止以控制成本。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. It uses an ALB with a blue/green deployment, automatically copies the Auto Scaling group, and uses the CodeDeployDefault.HalfAtATime configuration for traffic shifting. The BeforeAllowTraffic hook removes temporary files before traffic is allowed, and CodeDeploy terminates the original instances to manage cost.

contents.en: A company is using AWS CodeDeploy to automate software deployment. The deployment must meet these requirements: • A number of instances must be available to serve traffic during the deployment. Traffic must be balanced across those instances, and the instances must automatically heal in the event of failure. • A new fleet of instances must be launched for deploying a new revision automatically, with no manual provisioning. • Traffic must be rerouted to the new environment to half of the new instances at a time. The deployment should succeed if traffic is rerouted to at least half of the instances: otherwise, it should fail. • Before routing traffic to the new fleet of instances, the temporary files generated during the deployment process must be deleted. • At the end of a successful deployment, the original instances in the deployment group must be deleted immediately to reduce costs. How can a DevOps engineer meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在使用 AWS CodeDeploy 自动化软件部署。该部署必须满足以下要求： • 部署期间必须有一定数量的实例可用于提供流量服务。流量必须在这些实例之间均衡，并且实例必须在发生故障时自动恢复。 • 必须自动启动一组新的实例来部署新修订版本，无需手动预置。 • 必须将流量重新路由到新环境，并且每次路由到一半的新实例。如果流量被重新路由到至少一半的实例，部署应成功；否则应失败。 • 在将流量路由到新的实例组之前，必须删除部署过程中生成的临时文件。 • 成功部署结束时，必须立即删除部署组中的原始实例以降低成本。DevOps 工程师如何满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company needs to adopt a multi-account strategy to deploy its applications and the associated CI/CD infrastructure. The company has created an organization in AWS Organizations that has all features enabled. The company has configured AWS Control Tower and has set up a landing zone. The company needs to use AWS Control Tower controls (guardrails) in all AWS accounts in the organization. The company must create the accounts for a multi-environment application and must ensure that all accounts are configured to an initial baseline. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS Control Tower Account Factory Customization (AFC) blueprint that uses the baseline configuration. Use AWS Control Tower Account Factory to provision a dedicated AWS account for each environment and a CI/CD account by using the blueprint.

contents.en: Create an AWS Control Tower Account Factory Customization (AFC) blueprint that uses the baseline configuration. Use AWS Control Tower Account Factory to provision a dedicated AWS account for each environment and a CI/CD account by using the blueprint.
contents.zh: 创建一个使用基线配置的 AWS Control Tower Account Factory Customization (AFC) blueprint。使用 AWS Control Tower Account Factory 通过该 blueprint 为每个环境预置专用 AWS 账户以及一个 CI/CD 账户。

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS Control Tower Account Factory to provision a dedicated AWS account for each environment and a CI/CD account. Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to apply the baseline configuration to the new accounts.

contents.en: Use AWS Control Tower Account Factory to provision a dedicated AWS account for each environment and a CI/CD account. Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to apply the baseline configuration to the new accounts.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Control Tower Account Factory 为每个环境预置专用 AWS 账户以及一个 CI/CD 账户。使用 AWS CloudFormation StackSets 将基线配置应用到新账户。

options.label: C
options.content: Use Organizations to provision a multi-environment AWS account and a CI/CD account. In the Organizations management account, create an AWS Lambda function that assumes the Organizations access role to apply the baseline configuration to the new accounts.

contents.en: Use Organizations to provision a multi-environment AWS account and a CI/CD account. In the Organizations management account, create an AWS Lambda function that assumes the Organizations access role to apply the baseline configuration to the new accounts.
contents.zh: 使用 Organizations 预置一个多环境 AWS 账户和一个 CI/CD 账户。在 Organizations 管理账户中，创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，该函数代入 Organizations 访问角色以将基线配置应用到新账户。

options.label: D
options.content: Use Organizations to provision a dedicated AWS account for each environment, an audit account, and a CI/CD account. Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to apply the baseline configuration to the new accounts.

contents.en: Use Organizations to provision a dedicated AWS account for each environment, an audit account, and a CI/CD account. Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to apply the baseline configuration to the new accounts.
contents.zh: 使用 Organizations 为每个环境、一个审计账户和一个 CI/CD 账户预置专用 AWS 账户。使用 AWS CloudFormation StackSets 将基线配置应用到新账户。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。AWS Control Tower Account Factory Customization blueprint 可以包含基线配置，并通过 Account Factory 为每个环境和 CI/CD 账户创建专用账户，从而减少手动配置并保持一致性。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。AWS Control Tower Account Factory Customization blueprint 可以包含基线配置，并通过 Account Factory 为每个环境和 CI/CD 账户创建专用账户，从而减少手动配置并保持一致性。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. An AWS Control Tower Account Factory Customization blueprint can include the baseline configuration and use Account Factory to provision dedicated accounts for each environment and for CI/CD, reducing manual work and keeping accounts consistent.

contents.en: A company needs to adopt a multi-account strategy to deploy its applications and the associated CI/CD infrastructure. The company has created an organization in AWS Organizations that has all features enabled. The company has configured AWS Control Tower and has set up a landing zone. The company needs to use AWS Control Tower controls (guardrails) in all AWS accounts in the organization. The company must create the accounts for a multi-environment application and must ensure that all accounts are configured to an initial baseline. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?
contents.zh: 一家公司需要采用多账户策略来部署其应用程序以及相关的 CI/CD 基础设施。公司已创建一个启用了所有功能的 AWS Organizations 组织。公司已配置 AWS Control Tower，并设置了 landing zone。公司需要在组织中的所有 AWS 账户中使用 AWS Control Tower 控制（guardrails）。公司必须为一个多环境应用程序创建账户，并且必须确保所有账户都配置为初始基线。哪种解决方案能以最少的运营开销满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps team has created a Custom Lambda rule in AWS Config. The rule monitors Amazon Elastic Container Repository (Amazon ECR) policy statements for ecr:* actions. When a noncompliant repository is detected, Amazon EventBridge uses Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) to route the notification to a security team. When the custom AWS Config rule is evaluated, the AWS Lambda function fails to run. Which solution will resolve the issue?

options.label: A
options.content: Modify the Lambda function's resource policy to grant AWS Config permission to invoke the function.

contents.en: Modify the Lambda function's resource policy to grant AWS Config permission to invoke the function.
contents.zh: 修改 Lambda 函数的资源策略，授予 AWS Config 调用该函数的权限。

options.label: B
options.content: Modify the SNS topic policy to include configuration changes for EventBridge to publish to the SNS topic.

contents.en: Modify the SNS topic policy to include configuration changes for EventBridge to publish to the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 修改 SNS 主题策略，以包含允许 EventBridge 发布到 SNS 主题的配置更改。

options.label: C
options.content: Modify the Lambda function's execution role to include configuration changes for custom AWS Config rules.

contents.en: Modify the Lambda function's execution role to include configuration changes for custom AWS Config rules.
contents.zh: 修改 Lambda 函数的执行角色，以包含自定义 AWS Config 规则所需的配置更改。

options.label: D
options.content: Modify all the ECR repository policies to grant AWS Config access to the necessary ECR API actions.

contents.en: Modify all the ECR repository policies to grant AWS Config access to the necessary ECR API actions.
contents.zh: 修改所有 ECR 存储库策略，授予 AWS Config 访问必要 ECR API 操作的权限。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。问题实际是 AWS Config 无法调用 Lambda；修改 Lambda 资源策略授予 AWS Config 调用函数的权限，可以解决该调用权限问题。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。问题实际是 AWS Config 无法调用 Lambda；修改 Lambda 资源策略授予 AWS Config 调用函数的权限，可以解决该调用权限问题。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The issue is that AWS Config cannot invoke the Lambda function. Updating the Lambda resource policy to grant AWS Config permission to invoke the function fixes that invocation permission problem.

contents.en: A DevOps team has created a Custom Lambda rule in AWS Config. The rule monitors Amazon Elastic Container Repository (Amazon ECR) policy statements for ecr:* actions. When a noncompliant repository is detected, Amazon EventBridge uses Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) to route the notification to a security team. When the custom AWS Config rule is evaluated, the AWS Lambda function fails to run. Which solution will resolve the issue?
contents.zh: 一个 DevOps 团队在 AWS Config 中创建了一个 Custom Lambda rule。该规则监控 Amazon Elastic Container Repository (Amazon ECR) 策略语句中的 ecr:* 操作。当检测到不合规的存储库时，Amazon EventBridge 使用 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 将通知路由到安全团队。当自定义 AWS Config 规则被评估时，AWS Lambda 函数无法运行。哪种解决方案可以解决该问题？

questions.content: A developer is creating a proof of concept for a new software as a service (SaaS) application. The application is in a shared development AWS account that is part of an organization in AWS Organizations. The developer needs to create service-linked IAM roles for the AWS services that are being considered for the proof of concept. The solution needs to give the developer the ability to create and configure the service-linked roles only. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an IAM user for the developer in the organization's management account. Configure a cross-account role in the development account for the developer to use. Limit the scope of the cross-account role to common services.

contents.en: Create an IAM user for the developer in the organization's management account. Configure a cross-account role in the development account for the developer to use. Limit the scope of the cross-account role to common services.
contents.zh: 在组织的管理账户中为开发人员创建一个 IAM 用户。在开发账户中配置一个供开发人员使用的跨账户角色。将该跨账户角色的范围限制为常用服务。

options.label: B
options.content: Add the developer to an IAM group. Attach the PowerUserAccess managed policy to the IAM group. Enforce multi-factor authentication (MFA) on the user account.

contents.en: Add the developer to an IAM group. Attach the PowerUserAccess managed policy to the IAM group. Enforce multi-factor authentication (MFA) on the user account.
contents.zh: 将开发人员添加到 IAM 组。将 PowerUserAccess 托管策略附加到 IAM 组。对该用户账户强制执行多重身份验证 (MFA)。

options.label: C
options.content: Add an SCP to the development account in Organizations. Configure the SCP with a Deny rule for iam:* to limit the developer's access.

contents.en: Add an SCP to the development account in Organizations. Configure the SCP with a Deny rule for iam:* to limit the developer's access.
contents.zh: 在 Organizations 中向开发账户添加一个 SCP。使用针对 iam:* 的 Deny 规则配置该 SCP，以限制开发人员的访问。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an IAM role that has the necessary IAM access to allow the developer to create policies and roles. Create and attach a permissions boundary to the role. Grant the developer access to assume the role.

contents.en: Create an IAM role that has the necessary IAM access to allow the developer to create policies and roles. Create and attach a permissions boundary to the role. Grant the developer access to assume the role.
contents.zh: 创建一个 IAM 角色，该角色具有允许开发人员创建策略和角色所需的 IAM 访问权限。创建并附加一个权限边界到该角色。授予开发人员代入该角色的访问权限。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。创建可由开发人员代入的 IAM 角色，并用权限边界限制该角色，可以授予创建策略和角色所需权限，同时避免 PowerUserAccess 之类的过宽权限；SCP 只提供限制，不会授予权限。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。创建可由开发人员代入的 IAM 角色，并用权限边界限制该角色，可以授予创建策略和角色所需权限，同时避免 PowerUserAccess 之类的过宽权限；SCP 只提供限制，不会授予权限。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. Creating an assumable IAM role with the needed permissions and attaching a permissions boundary gives the developer controlled ability to create policies and roles without broad PowerUserAccess. SCPs are guardrails and do not grant permissions.

contents.en: A developer is creating a proof of concept for a new software as a service (SaaS) application. The application is in a shared development AWS account that is part of an organization in AWS Organizations. The developer needs to create service-linked IAM roles for the AWS services that are being considered for the proof of concept. The solution needs to give the developer the ability to create and configure the service-linked roles only. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一名开发人员正在为一个新的软件即服务 (SaaS) 应用程序创建概念验证。该应用程序位于一个共享的开发 AWS 账户中，该账户是 AWS Organizations 中某个组织的一部分。开发人员需要为概念验证中正在考虑的 AWS 服务创建服务相关 IAM 角色。该解决方案需要仅赋予开发人员创建和配置服务相关角色的能力。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses AWS Organizations to manage its AWS accounts. The company wants its monitoring system to receive an alert when a root user logs in. The company also needs a dashboard to display any log activity that the root user generates. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Enable AWS Config with a multi-account aggregator. Configure log forwarding to Amazon CloudWatch Logs.

contents.en: Enable AWS Config with a multi-account aggregator. Configure log forwarding to Amazon CloudWatch Logs.
contents.zh: 启用带有多账户聚合器的 AWS Config。配置日志转发到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon QuickSight dashboard that uses an Amazon CloudWatch Logs query.

contents.en: Create an Amazon QuickSight dashboard that uses an Amazon CloudWatch Logs query.
contents.zh: 创建一个使用 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 查询的 Amazon QuickSight 仪表板。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch Logs metric filter to match root user login events. Configure a CloudWatch alarm and an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to send alerts to the company's monitoring system.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch Logs metric filter to match root user login events. Configure a CloudWatch alarm and an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to send alerts to the company's monitoring system.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 指标筛选器，以匹配 root user 登录事件。配置 CloudWatch 告警和 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题，将警报发送到公司的监控系统。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch Logs subscription filter to match root user login events. Configure the filter to forward events to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Configure the SNS topic to send alerts to the company's monitoring system.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch Logs subscription filter to match root user login events. Configure the filter to forward events to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Configure the SNS topic to send alerts to the company's monitoring system.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 订阅筛选器，以匹配 root user 登录事件。配置该筛选器将事件转发到 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。配置 SNS 主题将警报发送到公司的监控系统。

options.label: E
options.content: Create an AWS CloudTrail organization trail. Configure the organization trail to send events to Amazon CloudWatch Logs.

contents.en: Create an AWS CloudTrail organization trail. Configure the organization trail to send events to Amazon CloudWatch Logs.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CloudTrail 组织跟踪。配置该组织跟踪将事件发送到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs。

options.label: F
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch dashboard that uses a CloudWatch Logs Insights query.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch dashboard that uses a CloudWatch Logs Insights query.
contents.zh: 创建一个使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 查询的 Amazon CloudWatch 仪表板。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C、E、F。E 创建组织级 CloudTrail 并把事件发送到 CloudWatch Logs；C 用 CloudWatch Logs metric filter 匹配 root 用户登录事件并通过告警和 SNS 通知监控系统；F 使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 查询构建仪表板。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C、E、F。E 创建组织级 CloudTrail 并把事件发送到 CloudWatch Logs；C 用 CloudWatch Logs metric filter 匹配 root 用户登录事件并通过告警和 SNS 通知监控系统；F 使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 查询构建仪表板。
explanations.en: The correct answers are C, E, and F. E creates an organization CloudTrail trail and sends events to CloudWatch Logs. C adds a metric filter for root user login events with an alarm and SNS notifications. F uses a CloudWatch Logs Insights query for a CloudWatch dashboard.

contents.en: A company uses AWS Organizations to manage its AWS accounts. The company wants its monitoring system to receive an alert when a root user logs in. The company also needs a dashboard to display any log activity that the root user generates. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations 管理其 AWS 账户。公司希望其监控系统在 root user 登录时收到警报。公司还需要一个仪表板来显示 root user 生成的任何日志活动。哪组步骤可以满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company uses AWS Organizations to manage its AWS accounts. A DevOps engineer must ensure that all users who access the AWS Management Console are authenticated through the company's corporate identity provider (IdP). Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Use Amazon GuardDuty with a delegated administrator account Use GuardDuty to enforce denial of IAM user logins.

contents.en: Use Amazon GuardDuty with a delegated administrator account Use GuardDuty to enforce denial of IAM user logins.
contents.zh: 使用带有委派管理员账户的 Amazon GuardDuty 使用 GuardDuty 强制拒绝 IAM 用户登录。

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS IAM Identity Center to configure identity federation with SAML 2.0.

contents.en: Use AWS IAM Identity Center to configure identity federation with SAML 2.0.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS IAM Identity Center 配置与 SAML 2.0 的身份联合。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a permissions boundary in AWS IAM Identity Center to deny password logins for IAM users.

contents.en: Create a permissions boundary in AWS IAM Identity Center to deny password logins for IAM users.
contents.zh: 在 AWS IAM Identity Center 中创建权限边界，以拒绝 IAM 用户的密码登录。

options.label: D
options.content: Create IAM groups in the Organizations management account to apply consistent permissions for all IAM users.

contents.en: Create IAM groups in the Organizations management account to apply consistent permissions for all IAM users.
contents.zh: 在 Organizations 管理账户中创建 IAM 组，以对所有 IAM 用户应用一致的权限。

options.label: E
options.content: Create an SCP in Organizations to deny password creation for IAM users.

contents.en: Create an SCP in Organizations to deny password creation for IAM users.
contents.zh: 在 Organizations 中创建一个 SCP，拒绝为 IAM 用户创建密码。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B、E。B 使用 IAM Identity Center 通过 SAML 2.0 与公司 IdP 联合身份验证，使用户通过企业身份源登录。E 通过 Organizations 中的 SCP 拒绝为 IAM 用户创建密码，减少 IAM 用户控制台密码登录的可能。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B、E。B 使用 IAM Identity Center 通过 SAML 2.0 与公司 IdP 联合身份验证，使用户通过企业身份源登录。E 通过 Organizations 中的 SCP 拒绝为 IAM 用户创建密码，减少 IAM 用户控制台密码登录的可能。
explanations.en: The correct answers are B and E. B configures IAM Identity Center for SAML 2.0 federation with the corporate IdP so users authenticate through the company identity source. E uses an Organizations SCP to deny password creation for IAM users, reducing native IAM console password logins.

contents.en: A company uses AWS Organizations to manage its AWS accounts. A DevOps engineer must ensure that all users who access the AWS Management Console are authenticated through the company's corporate identity provider (IdP). Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations 管理其 AWS 账户。一名 DevOps 工程师必须确保所有访问 AWS Management Console 的用户都通过公司的企业身份提供商 (IdP) 进行身份验证。哪组步骤可以满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company has deployed a new platform that runs on Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). The new platform hosts web applications that users frequently update. The application developers build the Docker images for the applications and deploy the Docker images manually to the platform. The platform usage has increased to more than 500 users every day. Frequent updates, building the updated Docker images for the applications, and deploying the Docker images on the platform manually have all become difficult to manage. The company needs to receive an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) notification if Docker image scanning returns any HIGH or CRITICAL findings for operating system or programming language package vulnerabilities. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS CodeCommit repository to store the Dockerfile and Kubernetes deployment files. Create a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline. Use an Amazon S3 event to invoke the pipeline when a newer version of the Dockerfile is committed. Add a step to the pipeline to initiate the AWS CodeBuild project.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodeCommit repository to store the Dockerfile and Kubernetes deployment files. Create a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline. Use an Amazon S3 event to invoke the pipeline when a newer version of the Dockerfile is committed. Add a step to the pipeline to initiate the AWS CodeBuild project.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CodeCommit 存储库，用于存储 Dockerfile 和 Kubernetes 部署文件。创建一个 AWS CodePipeline 管道。当提交较新版本的 Dockerfile 时，使用 Amazon S3 事件调用该管道。向管道添加一个步骤以启动 AWS CodeBuild 项目。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS CodeCommit repository to store the Dockerfile and Kubernetes deployment files. Create a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline. Use an Amazon EventBridge event to invoke the pipeline when a newer version of the Dockerfile is committed. Add a step to the pipeline to initiate the AWS CodeBuild project.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodeCommit repository to store the Dockerfile and Kubernetes deployment files. Create a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline. Use an Amazon EventBridge event to invoke the pipeline when a newer version of the Dockerfile is committed. Add a step to the pipeline to initiate the AWS CodeBuild project.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CodeCommit 存储库，用于存储 Dockerfile 和 Kubernetes 部署文件。创建一个 AWS CodePipeline 管道。当提交较新版本的 Dockerfile 时，使用 Amazon EventBridge 事件调用该管道。向管道添加一个步骤以启动 AWS CodeBuild 项目。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS CodeBuild project that builds the Docker images and stores the Docker images in an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository. Turn on basic scanning for the ECR repository. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that monitors Amazon GuardDuty events. Configure the EventBridge rule to send an event to an SNS topic when the finding-severity-counts parameter is more than 0 at a CRITICAL or HIGH level.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodeBuild project that builds the Docker images and stores the Docker images in an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository. Turn on basic scanning for the ECR repository. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that monitors Amazon GuardDuty events. Configure the EventBridge rule to send an event to an SNS topic when the finding-severity-counts parameter is more than 0 at a CRITICAL or HIGH level.
