contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CodeBuild 项目，用于构建 Docker 镜像并将 Docker 镜像存储在 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) 存储库中。为 ECR 存储库开启基本扫描。创建一个监控 Amazon GuardDuty 事件的 Amazon EventBridge 规则。当 finding-severity-counts 参数在 CRITICAL 或 HIGH 级别大于 0 时，配置 EventBridge 规则向 SNS 主题发送事件。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS CodeBuild project that builds the Docker images and stores the Docker images in an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository. Turn on enhanced scanning for the ECR repository. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that monitors ECR image scan events. Configure the EventBridge rule to send an event to an SNS topic when the finding-severity-counts parameter is more than 0 at a CRITICAL or HIGH level.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodeBuild project that builds the Docker images and stores the Docker images in an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository. Turn on enhanced scanning for the ECR repository. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that monitors ECR image scan events. Configure the EventBridge rule to send an event to an SNS topic when the finding-severity-counts parameter is more than 0 at a CRITICAL or HIGH level.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CodeBuild 项目，用于构建 Docker 镜像并将 Docker 镜像存储在 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) 存储库中。为 ECR 存储库开启增强扫描。创建一个监控 ECR 镜像扫描事件的 Amazon EventBridge 规则。当 finding-severity-counts 参数在 CRITICAL 或 HIGH 级别大于 0 时，配置 EventBridge 规则向 SNS 主题发送事件。

options.label: E
options.content: Create an AWS CodeBuild project that scans the Dockerfile. Configure the project to build the Docker images and store the Docker images in an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository if the scan is successful. Configure an SNS topic to provide notification if the scan returns any vulnerabilities.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodeBuild project that scans the Dockerfile. Configure the project to build the Docker images and store the Docker images in an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository if the scan is successful. Configure an SNS topic to provide notification if the scan returns any vulnerabilities.
contents.zh: 创建一个扫描 Dockerfile 的 AWS CodeBuild 项目。如果扫描成功，配置该项目构建 Docker 镜像并将 Docker 镜像存储在 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) 存储库中。配置 SNS 主题，在扫描返回任何漏洞时提供通知。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B、D。B 在 CodeCommit 中存放 Dockerfile 和 Kubernetes 部署文件，并用 EventBridge 在提交新版本时触发 CodePipeline 和 CodeBuild。D 由 CodeBuild 构建镜像并推送到 ECR，启用 enhanced scanning，并在 HIGH 或 CRITICAL 漏洞扫描事件出现时通过 EventBridge 和 SNS 通知。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B、D。B 在 CodeCommit 中存放 Dockerfile 和 Kubernetes 部署文件，并用 EventBridge 在提交新版本时触发 CodePipeline 和 CodeBuild。D 由 CodeBuild 构建镜像并推送到 ECR，启用 enhanced scanning，并在 HIGH 或 CRITICAL 漏洞扫描事件出现时通过 EventBridge 和 SNS 通知。
explanations.en: The correct answers are B and D. B stores the Dockerfile and Kubernetes deployment files in CodeCommit and uses EventBridge to trigger CodePipeline and CodeBuild on new commits. D builds and pushes images to ECR, enables enhanced scanning, and uses EventBridge plus SNS to notify on HIGH or CRITICAL findings.

contents.en: A company has deployed a new platform that runs on Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). The new platform hosts web applications that users frequently update. The application developers build the Docker images for the applications and deploy the Docker images manually to the platform. The platform usage has increased to more than 500 users every day. Frequent updates, building the updated Docker images for the applications, and deploying the Docker images on the platform manually have all become difficult to manage. The company needs to receive an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) notification if Docker image scanning returns any HIGH or CRITICAL findings for operating system or programming language package vulnerabilities. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司已部署一个运行在 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 上的新平台。该新平台托管用户频繁更新的 Web 应用程序。应用程序开发人员为应用程序构建 Docker 镜像，并手动将 Docker 镜像部署到该平台。该平台每天的使用量已增加到超过 500 名用户。频繁更新、为应用程序构建更新后的 Docker 镜像以及在平台上手动部署 Docker 镜像都变得难以管理。如果 Docker 镜像扫描针对操作系统或编程语言包漏洞返回任何 HIGH 或 CRITICAL 发现项，公司需要收到 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 通知。哪组步骤可以满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company groups its AWS accounts in OUs in an organization in AWS Organizations. The company has deployed a set of Amazon API Gateway APIs in one of the Organizations accounts. The APIs are bound to the account's VPC and have no existing authentication mechanism. Only principals in a specific OU can have permissions to invoke the APIs. The company applies the following policy to the API Gateway interface VPC endpoint: The company also updates the API Gateway resource policies to deny invocations that do not come through the interface VPC endpoint. After the updates, the following error message appears during attempts to use the interface VPC endpoint URL to invoke an API: "User: anonymous is not authorized." Which combination of steps will solve this problem? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Enable IAM authentication on all API methods by setting AWS JAM as the authorization method.

contents.en: Enable IAM authentication on all API methods by setting AWS JAM as the authorization method.
contents.zh: 通过将 AWS JAM 设置为授权方法，在所有 API 方法上启用 IAM 身份验证。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a token-based AWS Lambda authorizer that passes the caller's identity in a bearer token.

contents.en: Create a token-based AWS Lambda authorizer that passes the caller's identity in a bearer token.
contents.zh: 创建一个基于令牌的 AWS Lambda 授权方，在 bearer token 中传递调用方的身份。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a request parameter-based AWS Lambda authorizer that passes the caller's identity in a combination of headers, query string parameters, stage variables, and $cortext variables.

contents.en: Create a request parameter-based AWS Lambda authorizer that passes the caller's identity in a combination of headers, query string parameters, stage variables, and $cortext variables.
contents.zh: 创建一个基于请求参数的 AWS Lambda 授权方，通过请求头、查询字符串参数、阶段变量和 $cortext 变量的组合传递调用方的身份。

options.label: D
options.content: Use Amazon Cognito user pools as the authorizer to control access to the API.

contents.en: Use Amazon Cognito user pools as the authorizer to control access to the API.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon Cognito user pools 作为授权方来控制对 API 的访问。

options.label: E
options.content: Verify the identity of the requester by using Signature Version 4 to sign client requests by using AWS credentials.

contents.en: Verify the identity of the requester by using Signature Version 4 to sign client requests by using AWS credentials.
contents.zh: 通过使用 Signature Version 4 以 AWS 凭证签署客户端请求来验证请求者的身份。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、E。A 将所有 API 方法的授权方式设置为 AWS IAM，阻止匿名访问。E 要求客户端使用 AWS 凭证和 Signature Version 4 对请求签名，从而验证请求者身份并按 IAM 策略授权。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、E。A 将所有 API 方法的授权方式设置为 AWS IAM，阻止匿名访问。E 要求客户端使用 AWS 凭证和 Signature Version 4 对请求签名，从而验证请求者身份并按 IAM 策略授权。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A and E. A sets AWS IAM as the authorization method for all API methods, preventing anonymous access. E requires clients to sign requests with AWS credentials using Signature Version 4 so the requester identity can be verified and authorized by IAM policy.

contents.en: A company groups its AWS accounts in OUs in an organization in AWS Organizations. The company has deployed a set of Amazon API Gateway APIs in one of the Organizations accounts. The APIs are bound to the account's VPC and have no existing authentication mechanism. Only principals in a specific OU can have permissions to invoke the APIs. The company applies the following policy to the API Gateway interface VPC endpoint: The company also updates the API Gateway resource policies to deny invocations that do not come through the interface VPC endpoint. After the updates, the following error message appears during attempts to use the interface VPC endpoint URL to invoke an API: "User: anonymous is not authorized." Which combination of steps will solve this problem? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司将其 AWS 账户分组到 AWS Organizations 中某个组织的 OU 中。公司已在其中一个 Organizations 账户中部署了一组 Amazon API Gateway API。这些 API 绑定到账户的 VPC，并且没有现有的身份验证机制。只有特定 OU 中的主体可以拥有调用这些 API 的权限。公司将以下策略应用到 API Gateway 接口 VPC 端点：公司还更新了 API Gateway 资源策略，以拒绝不通过该接口 VPC 端点发起的调用。更新后，在尝试使用接口 VPC 端点 URL 调用 API 时出现以下错误消息："User: anonymous is not authorized." 哪组步骤可以解决此问题？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company wants to decrease the time it takes to develop new features. The company uses AWS CodeBuild and AWS CodeDeploy to build and deploy its applications. The company uses AWS CodePipeline to deploy each microservice with its own CI/CD pipeline. The company needs more visibility into the average time between the release of new features and the average time to recover after a failed deployment. Which solution will provide this visibility with the LEAST configuration effort?

options.label: A
options.content: Program an AWS Lambda function that creates Amazon CloudWatch custom metrics with information about successful runs and failed runs for each pipeline. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function every 5 minutes. Use the metrics to build a CloudWatch dashboard.

contents.en: Program an AWS Lambda function that creates Amazon CloudWatch custom metrics with information about successful runs and failed runs for each pipeline. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function every 5 minutes. Use the metrics to build a CloudWatch dashboard.
contents.zh: 编写一个 AWS Lambda 函数，为每个管道创建包含成功运行和失败运行信息的 Amazon CloudWatch 自定义指标。创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，每 5 分钟调用该 Lambda 函数。使用这些指标构建 CloudWatch 仪表板。

options.label: B
options.content: Program an AWS Lambda function that creates Amazon CloudWatch custom metrics with information about successful runs and failed runs for each pipeline. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function after every successful run and after every failed run. Use the metrics to build a CloudWatch dashboard.

contents.en: Program an AWS Lambda function that creates Amazon CloudWatch custom metrics with information about successful runs and failed runs for each pipeline. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function after every successful run and after every failed run. Use the metrics to build a CloudWatch dashboard.
contents.zh: 编写一个 AWS Lambda 函数，为每个管道创建包含成功运行和失败运行信息的 Amazon CloudWatch 自定义指标。创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，在每次成功运行和每次失败运行后调用该 Lambda 函数。使用这些指标构建 CloudWatch 仪表板。

options.label: C
options.content: Program an AWS Lambda function that writes information about successful runs and failed runs to Amazon DynamoDB. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function after every successful run and after every failed run. Build an Amazon QuickSight dashboard to show the information from DynamoDB.

contents.en: Program an AWS Lambda function that writes information about successful runs and failed runs to Amazon DynamoDB. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function after every successful run and after every failed run. Build an Amazon QuickSight dashboard to show the information from DynamoDB.
contents.zh: 编写一个 AWS Lambda 函数，将成功运行和失败运行的信息写入 Amazon DynamoDB。创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，在每次成功运行和每次失败运行后调用该 Lambda 函数。构建一个 Amazon QuickSight 仪表板，以显示来自 DynamoDB 的信息。

options.label: D
options.content: Program an AWS Lambda function that writes information about successful runs and failed runs to Amazon DynamoDB. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function every 5 minutes. Build an Amazon QuickSight dashboard to show the information from DynamoDB.

contents.en: Program an AWS Lambda function that writes information about successful runs and failed runs to Amazon DynamoDB. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function every 5 minutes. Build an Amazon QuickSight dashboard to show the information from DynamoDB.
contents.zh: 编写一个 AWS Lambda 函数，将成功运行和失败运行的信息写入 Amazon DynamoDB。创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，每 5 分钟调用该 Lambda 函数。构建一个 Amazon QuickSight 仪表板，以显示来自 DynamoDB 的信息。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。EventBridge 在每次管道成功或失败后调用 Lambda，Lambda 发布包含每条管道成功和失败运行情况的 CloudWatch 自定义指标，再用这些指标构建 CloudWatch dashboard。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。EventBridge 在每次管道成功或失败后调用 Lambda，Lambda 发布包含每条管道成功和失败运行情况的 CloudWatch 自定义指标，再用这些指标构建 CloudWatch dashboard。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. EventBridge invokes a Lambda function after each successful or failed pipeline run. The Lambda function publishes CloudWatch custom metrics for successful and failed runs per pipeline, and those metrics are used for the CloudWatch dashboard.

contents.en: A company wants to decrease the time it takes to develop new features. The company uses AWS CodeBuild and AWS CodeDeploy to build and deploy its applications. The company uses AWS CodePipeline to deploy each microservice with its own CI/CD pipeline. The company needs more visibility into the average time between the release of new features and the average time to recover after a failed deployment. Which solution will provide this visibility with the LEAST configuration effort?
contents.zh: 一家公司希望缩短开发新功能所需的时间。公司使用 AWS CodeBuild 和 AWS CodeDeploy 来构建和部署其应用程序。公司使用 AWS CodePipeline 为每个微服务部署自己的 CI/CD 管道。公司需要更清楚地了解新功能发布之间的平均时间，以及部署失败后恢复的平均时间。哪种解决方案能以最少的配置工作量提供这种可见性？

questions.content: A company has developed a static website hosted on an Amazon S3 bucket. The website is deployed using AWS CloudFormation. The CloudFormation template defines an S3 bucket and a custom resource that copies content into the bucket from a source location. The company has decided that it needs to move the website to a new location, so the existing CloudFormation stack must be deleted and re-created. However, CloudFormation reports that the stack could not be deleted cleanly. What is the MOST likely cause and how can the DevOps engineer mitigate this problem for this and future versions of the website?

options.label: A
options.content: Deletion has failed because the S3 bucket has an active website configuration. Modify the CloudFormation template to remove the WebsiteConfiguration property from the S3 bucket resource.

contents.en: Deletion has failed because the S3 bucket has an active website configuration. Modify the CloudFormation template to remove the WebsiteConfiguration property from the S3 bucket resource.
contents.zh: 删除失败是因为 S3 存储桶具有活动的网站配置。修改 CloudFormation 模板，从 S3 存储桶资源中删除 WebsiteConfiguration 属性。

options.label: B
options.content: Deletion has failed because the S3 bucket is not empty. Modify the custom resource's AWS Lambda function code to recursively empty the bucket when RequestType is Delete.

contents.en: Deletion has failed because the S3 bucket is not empty. Modify the custom resource's AWS Lambda function code to recursively empty the bucket when RequestType is Delete.
contents.zh: 删除失败是因为 S3 存储桶不为空。修改自定义资源的 AWS Lambda 函数代码，在 RequestType 为 Delete 时递归清空该存储桶。

options.label: C
options.content: Deletion has failed because the custom resource does not define a deletion policy. Add a DeletionPolicy property to the custom resource definition with a value of RemoveOnDeletion.

contents.en: Deletion has failed because the custom resource does not define a deletion policy. Add a DeletionPolicy property to the custom resource definition with a value of RemoveOnDeletion.
contents.zh: 删除失败是因为自定义资源未定义删除策略。在自定义资源定义中添加 DeletionPolicy 属性，并将值设置为 RemoveOnDeletion。

options.label: D
options.content: Deletion has failed because the S3 bucket is not empty. Modify the S3 bucket resource in the CloudFormation template to add a DeletionPolicy property with a value of Empty.

contents.en: Deletion has failed because the S3 bucket is not empty. Modify the S3 bucket resource in the CloudFormation template to add a DeletionPolicy property with a value of Empty.
contents.zh: 删除失败是因为 S3 存储桶不为空。修改 CloudFormation 模板中的 S3 存储桶资源，添加 DeletionPolicy 属性并将值设置为 Empty。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。S3 存储桶必须为空才能删除；如果 CloudFormation 删除失败是因为桶中仍有对象，则应修改自定义资源 Lambda，在 RequestType 为 Delete 时递归清空存储桶。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。S3 存储桶必须为空才能删除；如果 CloudFormation 删除失败是因为桶中仍有对象，则应修改自定义资源 Lambda，在 RequestType 为 Delete 时递归清空存储桶。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. An S3 bucket must be empty before it can be deleted. If CloudFormation deletion fails because the bucket still has contents, the custom resource Lambda should recursively empty the bucket when RequestType is Delete.

contents.en: A company has developed a static website hosted on an Amazon S3 bucket. The website is deployed using AWS CloudFormation. The CloudFormation template defines an S3 bucket and a custom resource that copies content into the bucket from a source location. The company has decided that it needs to move the website to a new location, so the existing CloudFormation stack must be deleted and re-created. However, CloudFormation reports that the stack could not be deleted cleanly. What is the MOST likely cause and how can the DevOps engineer mitigate this problem for this and future versions of the website?
contents.zh: 一家公司开发了一个托管在 Amazon S3 存储桶上的静态网站。该网站使用 AWS CloudFormation 部署。CloudFormation 模板定义了一个 S3 存储桶和一个自定义资源，该自定义资源从源位置将内容复制到该存储桶中。公司决定需要将网站迁移到新位置，因此必须删除并重新创建现有的 CloudFormation 堆栈。但是，CloudFormation 报告该堆栈无法干净地删除。最可能的原因是什么？DevOps 工程师如何为当前版本和未来版本的网站缓解此问题？

questions.content: A company uses Amazon EC2 as its primary compute platform. A DevOps team wants to audit the company's EC2 instances to check whether any prohibited applications have been installed on the EC2 instances. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure AWS Systems Manager on each instance. Use AWS Systems Manager Inventory. Use Systems Manager resource data sync to synchronize and store findings in an Amazon S3 bucket. Create an AWS Lambda function that runs when new objects are added to the S3 bucket. Configure the Lambda function to identify prohibited applications.

contents.en: Configure AWS Systems Manager on each instance. Use AWS Systems Manager Inventory. Use Systems Manager resource data sync to synchronize and store findings in an Amazon S3 bucket. Create an AWS Lambda function that runs when new objects are added to the S3 bucket. Configure the Lambda function to identify prohibited applications.
contents.zh: 在每个实例上配置 AWS Systems Manager。使用 AWS Systems Manager Inventory。使用 Systems Manager resource data sync 将发现项同步并存储到 Amazon S3 存储桶中。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，在新对象添加到 S3 存储桶时运行。配置 Lambda 函数识别被禁止的应用程序。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure AWS Systems Manager on each instance. Use Systems Manager Inventory Create AWS Config rules that monitor changes from Systems Manager Inventory to identify prohibited applications.

contents.en: Configure AWS Systems Manager on each instance. Use Systems Manager Inventory Create AWS Config rules that monitor changes from Systems Manager Inventory to identify prohibited applications.
contents.zh: 在每个实例上配置 AWS Systems Manager。使用 Systems Manager Inventory 创建 AWS Config 规则，监控来自 Systems Manager Inventory 的更改以识别被禁止的应用程序。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure AWS Systems Manager on each instance. Use Systems Manager Inventory. Filter a trail in AWS CloudTrail for Systems Manager Inventory events to identify prohibited applications.

contents.en: Configure AWS Systems Manager on each instance. Use Systems Manager Inventory. Filter a trail in AWS CloudTrail for Systems Manager Inventory events to identify prohibited applications.
contents.zh: 在每个实例上配置 AWS Systems Manager。使用 Systems Manager Inventory。在 AWS CloudTrail 中筛选 Systems Manager Inventory 事件的跟踪，以识别被禁止的应用程序。

options.label: D
options.content: Designate Amazon CloudWatch Logs as the log destination for all application instances. Run an automated script across all instances to create an inventory of installed applications. Configure the script to forward the results to CloudWatch Logs. Create a CloudWatch alarm that uses filter patterns to search log data to identify prohibited applications.

contents.en: Designate Amazon CloudWatch Logs as the log destination for all application instances. Run an automated script across all instances to create an inventory of installed applications. Configure the script to forward the results to CloudWatch Logs. Create a CloudWatch alarm that uses filter patterns to search log data to identify prohibited applications.
contents.zh: 将 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 指定为所有应用程序实例的日志目标。在所有实例上运行自动化脚本，以创建已安装应用程序的清单。配置该脚本将结果转发到 CloudWatch Logs。创建一个使用筛选模式搜索日志数据以识别被禁止应用程序的 CloudWatch 告警。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。在每个实例上配置 AWS Systems Manager 并使用 Systems Manager Inventory，可以收集已安装软件信息；再用 AWS Config 规则监控 Inventory 变化，即可识别被禁止的应用程序。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。在每个实例上配置 AWS Systems Manager 并使用 Systems Manager Inventory，可以收集已安装软件信息；再用 AWS Config 规则监控 Inventory 变化，即可识别被禁止的应用程序。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. Configuring AWS Systems Manager on each instance and using Systems Manager Inventory collects installed software data. AWS Config rules can then monitor Inventory changes to identify prohibited applications.

contents.en: A company uses Amazon EC2 as its primary compute platform. A DevOps team wants to audit the company's EC2 instances to check whether any prohibited applications have been installed on the EC2 instances. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon EC2 作为其主要计算平台。一个 DevOps 团队希望审计公司的 EC2 实例，以检查 EC2 实例上是否安装了任何被禁止的应用程序。哪种解决方案能以最高运营效率满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has an event-driven JavaScript application. The application uses decoupled AWS managed services that publish, consume, and route events. During application testing, events are not delivered to the target that is specified by an Amazon EventBridge rule. A DevOps team must provide application testers with additional functionality to view, troubleshoot, and prevent the loss of events without redeployment of the application. Which combination of steps should the DevOps team take to meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Launch AWS Device Farm with a standard test environment and project to run a specific build of the application.

contents.en: Launch AWS Device Farm with a standard test environment and project to run a specific build of the application.
contents.zh: 启动 AWS Device Farm，使用标准测试环境和项目来运行应用程序的特定构建版本。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket. Enable AWS CloudTrail. Create a CloudTrail trail that specifies the S3 bucket as the storage location.

contents.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket. Enable AWS CloudTrail. Create a CloudTrail trail that specifies the S3 bucket as the storage location.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon S3 存储桶。启用 AWS CloudTrail。创建一个 CloudTrail 跟踪，将该 S3 存储桶指定为存储位置。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the EventBridge rule to use an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queue as a dead-letter queue.

contents.en: Configure the EventBridge rule to use an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queue as a dead-letter queue.
contents.zh: 配置 EventBridge 规则，将 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 标准队列用作死信队列。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure the EventBridge rule to use an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queue as a dead-letter queue.

contents.en: Configure the EventBridge rule to use an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queue as a dead-letter queue.
contents.zh: 配置 EventBridge 规则，将 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO 队列用作死信队列。

options.label: E
options.content: Create a log group in Amazon CloudWatch Logs Specify the log group as an additional target of the EventBridge rule.

contents.en: Create a log group in Amazon CloudWatch Logs Specify the log group as an additional target of the EventBridge rule.
contents.zh: 在 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 中创建一个日志组 将该日志组指定为 EventBridge 规则的附加目标。

options.label: F
options.content: Update the application code base to use the AWS X-Ray SDK tracing feature to instrument the code with support for the X- Amzn-Trace-Id header.

contents.en: Update the application code base to use the AWS X-Ray SDK tracing feature to instrument the code with support for the X- Amzn-Trace-Id header.
contents.zh: 更新应用程序代码库，使用 AWS X-Ray SDK 跟踪功能为代码添加检测，并支持 X- Amzn-Trace-Id 标头。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B、C、E。B 启用 CloudTrail 并将日志写入 S3 以保留事件记录。C 为 EventBridge 规则配置 SQS 标准队列作为死信队列，帮助捕获投递失败。E 将 CloudWatch Logs 日志组作为额外目标，便于查看事件。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B、C、E。B 启用 CloudTrail 并将日志写入 S3 以保留事件记录。C 为 EventBridge 规则配置 SQS 标准队列作为死信队列，帮助捕获投递失败。E 将 CloudWatch Logs 日志组作为额外目标，便于查看事件。
explanations.en: The correct answers are B, C, and E. B enables CloudTrail and stores the trail in S3 to retain event records. C configures an SQS standard queue as the EventBridge rule dead-letter queue to capture delivery failures. E adds a CloudWatch Logs log group as another target for event visibility.

contents.en: A company has an event-driven JavaScript application. The application uses decoupled AWS managed services that publish, consume, and route events. During application testing, events are not delivered to the target that is specified by an Amazon EventBridge rule. A DevOps team must provide application testers with additional functionality to view, troubleshoot, and prevent the loss of events without redeployment of the application. Which combination of steps should the DevOps team take to meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个事件驱动的 JavaScript 应用程序。该应用程序使用解耦的 AWS 托管服务来发布、消费和路由事件。在应用程序测试期间，事件未传递到 Amazon EventBridge 规则中指定的目标。DevOps 团队必须为应用程序测试人员提供额外功能，以便在不重新部署应用程序的情况下查看、排查并防止事件丢失。DevOps 团队应采取哪组步骤来满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company is migrating its container-based workloads to an AWS Organizations multi-account environment. The environment consists of application workload accounts that the company uses to deploy and run the containerized workloads. The company has also provisioned a shared services account for shared workloads in the organization. The company must follow strict compliance regulations. All container images must receive security scanning before they are deployed to any environment. Images can be consumed by downstream deployment mechanisms after the images pass a scan with no critical vulnerabilities. Pre-scan and post-scan images must be isolated from one another so that a deployment can never use pre-scan images. A DevOps engineer needs to create a strategy to centralize this process. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the LEAST administrative overhead? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repositories in the shared services account: one repository for each pre-scan image and one repository for each post-scan image. Configure Amazon ECR image scanning to run on new image pushes to the pre-scan repositories. Use resource-based policies to grant the organization write access to the pre-scan repositories and read access to the post-scan repositories.

contents.en: Create Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repositories in the shared services account: one repository for each pre-scan image and one repository for each post-scan image. Configure Amazon ECR image scanning to run on new image pushes to the pre-scan repositories. Use resource-based policies to grant the organization write access to the pre-scan repositories and read access to the post-scan repositories.
contents.zh: 在共享服务账户中创建 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) 存储库：每个扫描前镜像一个存储库，每个扫描后镜像一个存储库。配置 Amazon ECR 镜像扫描在新镜像推送到扫描前存储库时运行。使用基于资源的策略，授予组织对扫描前存储库的写入访问权限以及对扫描后存储库的读取访问权限。

options.label: B
options.content: Create pre-scan Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repositories in each account that publishes container images. Create repositories for post-scan images in the shared services account. Configure Amazon ECR image scanning to run on new image pushes to the pre-scan repositories. Use resource-based policies to grant the organization read access to the post-scan repositories.

contents.en: Create pre-scan Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repositories in each account that publishes container images. Create repositories for post-scan images in the shared services account. Configure Amazon ECR image scanning to run on new image pushes to the pre-scan repositories. Use resource-based policies to grant the organization read access to the post-scan repositories.
contents.zh: 在每个发布容器镜像的账户中创建扫描前 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) 存储库。在共享服务账户中为扫描后镜像创建存储库。配置 Amazon ECR 镜像扫描在新镜像推送到扫描前存储库时运行。使用基于资源的策略，授予组织对扫描后存储库的读取访问权限。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure image replication for each image from the image's pre-scan repository to the image's post-scan repository.

contents.en: Configure image replication for each image from the image's pre-scan repository to the image's post-scan repository.
contents.zh: 为每个镜像配置从该镜像的扫描前存储库到扫描后存储库的镜像复制。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline for each pre-scan repository. Create a source stage that runs when new images are pushed to the pre-scan repositories. Create a stage that uses AWS CodeBuild as the action provider. Write a buildspec.yaml definition that determines the image scanning status and pushes images without critical vulnerabilities to the post-scan repositories.

contents.en: Create a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline for each pre-scan repository. Create a source stage that runs when new images are pushed to the pre-scan repositories. Create a stage that uses AWS CodeBuild as the action provider. Write a buildspec.yaml definition that determines the image scanning status and pushes images without critical vulnerabilities to the post-scan repositories.
contents.zh: 为每个扫描前存储库在 AWS CodePipeline 中创建一个管道。创建一个源阶段，在新镜像推送到扫描前存储库时运行。创建一个使用 AWS CodeBuild 作为操作提供程序的阶段。编写 buildspec.yaml 定义，用于确定镜像扫描状态，并将没有严重漏洞的镜像推送到扫描后存储库。

options.label: E
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to image scanning completed events and invokes the Lambda function. Write function code that determines the image scanning status and pushes images without critical vulnerabilities to the post-scan repositories.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to image scanning completed events and invokes the Lambda function. Write function code that determines the image scanning status and pushes images without critical vulnerabilities to the post-scan repositories.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数。创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，对镜像扫描完成事件作出响应并调用该 Lambda 函数。编写函数代码，用于确定镜像扫描状态，并将没有严重漏洞的镜像推送到扫描后存储库。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、E。A 在共享服务账户中创建预扫描和后扫描 ECR 仓库，启用推送扫描，并用资源策略授予组织写入预扫描仓库和读取后扫描仓库的权限。E 用一个 Lambda 响应扫描完成事件，只把没有 critical 漏洞的镜像推送到后扫描仓库，管理开销较低。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、E。A 在共享服务账户中创建预扫描和后扫描 ECR 仓库，启用推送扫描，并用资源策略授予组织写入预扫描仓库和读取后扫描仓库的权限。E 用一个 Lambda 响应扫描完成事件，只把没有 critical 漏洞的镜像推送到后扫描仓库，管理开销较低。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A and E. A creates pre-scan and post-scan ECR repositories in the shared services account, enables scanning on push, and uses resource policies for organization write and read access. E uses one Lambda function on scan-completed events to move only images without critical vulnerabilities to the post-scan repositories, reducing administrative overhead.

contents.en: A company is migrating its container-based workloads to an AWS Organizations multi-account environment. The environment consists of application workload accounts that the company uses to deploy and run the containerized workloads. The company has also provisioned a shared services account for shared workloads in the organization. The company must follow strict compliance regulations. All container images must receive security scanning before they are deployed to any environment. Images can be consumed by downstream deployment mechanisms after the images pass a scan with no critical vulnerabilities. Pre-scan and post-scan images must be isolated from one another so that a deployment can never use pre-scan images. A DevOps engineer needs to create a strategy to centralize this process. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the LEAST administrative overhead? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司正在将其基于容器的工作负载迁移到 AWS Organizations 多账户环境。该环境由应用程序工作负载账户组成，公司使用这些账户部署和运行容器化工作负载。公司还为组织中的共享工作负载预置了一个共享服务账户。公司必须遵循严格的合规法规。所有容器镜像在部署到任何环境之前都必须接受安全扫描。镜像在通过扫描且没有严重漏洞后，才能被下游部署机制使用。扫描前镜像和扫描后镜像必须彼此隔离，以便部署永远无法使用扫描前镜像。一名 DevOps 工程师需要创建一种策略来集中化此流程。哪组步骤能以最少的管理开销满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company uses an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster to deploy its web applications on containers. The web applications contain confidential data that cannot be decrypted without specific credentials. A DevOps engineer has stored the credentials in AWS Secrets Manager. The secrets are encrypted by an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed key. A Kubernetes service account for a third-party tool makes the secrets available to the applications. The service account assumes an IAM role that the company created to access the secrets. The service account receives an Access Denied (403 Forbidden) error while trying to retrieve the secrets from Secrets Manager. What is the root cause of this issue?

options.label: A
options.content: The IAM role that is attached to the EKS cluster does not have access to retrieve the secrets from Secrets Manager.

contents.en: The IAM role that is attached to the EKS cluster does not have access to retrieve the secrets from Secrets Manager.
contents.zh: 附加到 EKS 集群的 IAM 角色无权从 Secrets Manager 检索密钥。

options.label: B
options.content: The key policy for the customer managed key does not allow the Kubernetes service account IAM role to use the key.

contents.en: The key policy for the customer managed key does not allow the Kubernetes service account IAM role to use the key.
contents.zh: 客户托管密钥的密钥策略不允许 Kubernetes 服务账户 IAM 角色使用该密钥。

options.label: C
options.content: The key policy for the customer managed key does not allow the EKS cluster IAM role to use the key.

contents.en: The key policy for the customer managed key does not allow the EKS cluster IAM role to use the key.
contents.zh: 客户托管密钥的密钥策略不允许 EKS 集群 IAM 角色使用该密钥。

options.label: D
options.content: The IAM role that is assumed by the Kubernetes service account does not have permission to access the EKS cluster.

contents.en: The IAM role that is assumed by the Kubernetes service account does not have permission to access the EKS cluster.
contents.zh: Kubernetes 服务账户代入的 IAM 角色无权访问 EKS 集群。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。问题与客户托管 KMS 密钥策略有关：如果密钥策略不允许 Kubernetes service account 的 IAM 角色使用该密钥，相关工作负载就无法使用该密钥进行所需操作。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。问题与客户托管 KMS 密钥策略有关：如果密钥策略不允许 Kubernetes service account 的 IAM 角色使用该密钥，相关工作负载就无法使用该密钥进行所需操作。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. The issue is with the customer managed KMS key policy: if it does not allow the Kubernetes service account IAM role to use the key, the workload cannot perform the required key operations.

contents.en: A company uses an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster to deploy its web applications on containers. The web applications contain confidential data that cannot be decrypted without specific credentials. A DevOps engineer has stored the credentials in AWS Secrets Manager. The secrets are encrypted by an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed key. A Kubernetes service account for a third-party tool makes the secrets available to the applications. The service account assumes an IAM role that the company created to access the secrets. The service account receives an Access Denied (403 Forbidden) error while trying to retrieve the secrets from Secrets Manager. What is the root cause of this issue?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 集群在容器上部署其 Web 应用程序。这些 Web 应用程序包含机密数据，如果没有特定凭证就无法解密。一名 DevOps 工程师已将凭证存储在 AWS Secrets Manager 中。这些密钥由 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 客户托管密钥加密。一个第三方工具的 Kubernetes 服务账户使应用程序能够使用这些密钥。该服务账户代入公司为访问密钥而创建的 IAM 角色。该服务账户在尝试从 Secrets Manager 检索密钥时收到 Access Denied (403 Forbidden) 错误。此问题的根本原因是什么？

questions.content: A company is migrating its product development teams from an on-premises data center to a hybrid environment. The new environment will add four AWS Regions and will give the developers the ability to use the Region that is geographically closest to them. All the development teams use a shared set of Linux applications. The on-premises data center stores the applications on a NetApp ONTAP storage device. The storage volume is mounted read-only on the development on-premises VMs. The company updates the applications on the shared volume once a week. A DevOps engineer needs to replicate the data to all the new Regions. The DevOps engineer must ensure that the data is always up to date with deduplication. The data also must not be dependent on the availability of the on-premises storage device. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 File Gateway in the on-premises data center. Create S3 buckets in each Region. Set up a cron job to copy the data from the storage device to the S3 File Gateway. Set up S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR) to the S3 buckets in each Region.

contents.en: Create an Amazon S3 File Gateway in the on-premises data center. Create S3 buckets in each Region. Set up a cron job to copy the data from the storage device to the S3 File Gateway. Set up S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR) to the S3 buckets in each Region.
contents.zh: 在本地数据中心创建 Amazon S3 File Gateway。在每个区域中创建 S3 存储桶。设置 cron 作业，将数据从存储设备复制到 S3 File Gateway。设置 S3 跨区域复制 (CRR) 到每个区域中的 S3 存储桶。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon FSx File Gateway in one Region. Create file servers in Amazon FSx for Windows File Server in each Region. Set up a cron job to copy the data from the storage device to the FSx File Gateway.

contents.en: Create an Amazon FSx File Gateway in one Region. Create file servers in Amazon FSx for Windows File Server in each Region. Set up a cron job to copy the data from the storage device to the FSx File Gateway.
contents.zh: 在一个区域中创建 Amazon FSx File Gateway。在每个区域中创建 Amazon FSx for Windows File Server 文件服务器。设置 cron 作业，将数据从存储设备复制到 FSx File Gateway。

options.label: C
options.content: Create Multi-AZ Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP instances and volumes in each Region. Configure a scheduled SnapMirror relationship between the on-premises storage device and the FSx for ONTAP instances.

contents.en: Create Multi-AZ Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP instances and volumes in each Region. Configure a scheduled SnapMirror relationship between the on-premises storage device and the FSx for ONTAP instances.
contents.zh: 在每个区域中创建多可用区 Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP 实例和卷。在本地存储设备与 FSx for ONTAP 实例之间配置计划的 SnapMirror 关系。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system in each Region. Deploy an AWS DataSync agent in the on- premises data center. Configure a schedule for DataSync to copy the data to Amazon EFS daily.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system in each Region. Deploy an AWS DataSync agent in the on- premises data center. Configure a schedule for DataSync to copy the data to Amazon EFS daily.
contents.zh: 在每个区域中创建一个 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 文件系统。在本地数据中心部署 AWS DataSync 代理。配置 DataSync 按计划每天将数据复制到 Amazon EFS。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。该选项在每个 Region 创建 Multi-AZ Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP 实例和卷，并配置从本地存储设备到 FSx for ONTAP 的计划 SnapMirror 关系，用于复制数据到各区域的 ONTAP 存储。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。该选项在每个 Region 创建 Multi-AZ Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP 实例和卷，并配置从本地存储设备到 FSx for ONTAP 的计划 SnapMirror 关系，用于复制数据到各区域的 ONTAP 存储。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. This option creates Multi-AZ Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP instances and volumes in each Region and configures scheduled SnapMirror relationships from the on-premises storage device to FSx for ONTAP to replicate the data.

contents.en: A company is migrating its product development teams from an on-premises data center to a hybrid environment. The new environment will add four AWS Regions and will give the developers the ability to use the Region that is geographically closest to them. All the development teams use a shared set of Linux applications. The on-premises data center stores the applications on a NetApp ONTAP storage device. The storage volume is mounted read-only on the development on-premises VMs. The company updates the applications on the shared volume once a week. A DevOps engineer needs to replicate the data to all the new Regions. The DevOps engineer must ensure that the data is always up to date with deduplication. The data also must not be dependent on the availability of the on-premises storage device. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在将其产品开发团队从本地数据中心迁移到混合环境。新环境将增加四个 AWS 区域，并让开发人员能够使用地理位置上离他们最近的区域。所有开发团队都使用一组共享的 Linux 应用程序。本地数据中心将这些应用程序存储在 NetApp ONTAP 存储设备上。该存储卷以只读方式挂载到开发用本地 VM 上。公司每周更新一次共享卷上的应用程序。一名 DevOps 工程师需要将数据复制到所有新区域。DevOps 工程师必须确保数据始终保持最新并具有重复数据删除。数据也不得依赖本地存储设备的可用性。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has an application that stores data that includes personally identifiable information (PII) in an Amazon S3 bucket. All data is encrypted with AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed keys. All AWS resources are deployed from an AWS CloudFormation template. A DevOps engineer needs to set up a development environment for the application in a different AWS account. The data in the development environment's S3 bucket needs to be updated once a week from the production environment's S3 bucket. The company must not move PII from the production environment without anonymizing the PII first. The data in each environment must be encrypted with different KMS customer managed keys. Which combination of steps should the DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Activate Amazon Macie on the S3 bucket in the production account. Create an AWS Step Functions state machine to initiate a discovery job and redact all PII before copying files to the S3 bucket in the development account. Give the state machine tasks decrypt permissions on the KMS key in the production account. Give the state machine tasks encrypt permissions on the KMS key in the development account.

contents.en: Activate Amazon Macie on the S3 bucket in the production account. Create an AWS Step Functions state machine to initiate a discovery job and redact all PII before copying files to the S3 bucket in the development account. Give the state machine tasks decrypt permissions on the KMS key in the production account. Give the state machine tasks encrypt permissions on the KMS key in the development account.
contents.zh: 在生产账户的 S3 存储桶上激活 Amazon Macie。创建一个 AWS Step Functions 状态机，用于启动发现作业，并在将文件复制到开发账户中的 S3 存储桶之前编辑所有 PII。授予状态机任务对生产账户中 KMS 密钥的解密权限。授予状态机任务对开发账户中 KMS 密钥的加密权限。

options.label: B
options.content: Set up S3 replication between the production S3 bucket and the development S3 bucket. Activate Amazon Macie on the development S3 bucket. Create an AWS Step Functions state machine to initiate a discovery job and redact all PII as the files are copied to the development S3 bucket. Give the state machine tasks encrypt and decrypt permissions on the KMS key in the development account.

contents.en: Set up S3 replication between the production S3 bucket and the development S3 bucket. Activate Amazon Macie on the development S3 bucket. Create an AWS Step Functions state machine to initiate a discovery job and redact all PII as the files are copied to the development S3 bucket. Give the state machine tasks encrypt and decrypt permissions on the KMS key in the development account.
contents.zh: 在生产 S3 存储桶和开发 S3 存储桶之间设置 S3 复制。在开发 S3 存储桶上激活 Amazon Macie。创建一个 AWS Step Functions 状态机，用于启动发现作业，并在文件复制到开发 S3 存储桶时编辑所有 PII。授予状态机任务对开发账户中 KMS 密钥的加密和解密权限。

options.label: C
options.content: Set up an S3 Batch Operations job to copy files from the production S3 bucket to the development S3 bucket. In the development account, configure an AWS Lambda function to redact ail PII. Configure S3 Object Lambda to use the Lambda function for S3 GET requests. Give the Lambda function's IAM role encrypt and decrypt permissions on the KMS key in the development account.

contents.en: Set up an S3 Batch Operations job to copy files from the production S3 bucket to the development S3 bucket. In the development account, configure an AWS Lambda function to redact ail PII. Configure S3 Object Lambda to use the Lambda function for S3 GET requests. Give the Lambda function's IAM role encrypt and decrypt permissions on the KMS key in the development account.
contents.zh: 设置一个 S3 Batch Operations 作业，将文件从生产 S3 存储桶复制到开发 S3 存储桶。在开发账户中，配置一个 AWS Lambda 函数以编辑 ail PII。配置 S3 Object Lambda 使用该 Lambda 函数处理 S3 GET 请求。授予 Lambda 函数的 IAM 角色对开发账户中 KMS 密钥的加密和解密权限。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a development environment from the CloudFormation template in the development account. Schedule an Amazon EventBridge rule to start the AWS Step Functions state machine once a week.

contents.en: Create a development environment from the CloudFormation template in the development account. Schedule an Amazon EventBridge rule to start the AWS Step Functions state machine once a week.
contents.zh: 在开发账户中从 CloudFormation 模板创建开发环境。计划一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，每周启动一次 AWS Step Functions 状态机。

options.label: E
options.content: Create a development environment from the CloudFormation template in the development account. Schedule a cron job on an Amazon EC2 instance to run once a week to start the S3 Batch Operations job.

contents.en: Create a development environment from the CloudFormation template in the development account. Schedule a cron job on an Amazon EC2 instance to run once a week to start the S3 Batch Operations job.
contents.zh: 在开发账户中从 CloudFormation 模板创建开发环境。计划在 Amazon EC2 实例上运行的 cron 作业，每周启动一次 S3 Batch Operations 作业。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、D。A 使用 Macie 发现生产 S3 存储桶中的 PII，并由 Step Functions 编排脱敏后再复制到开发账户，同时配置跨账户 KMS 解密和加密权限。D 用 CloudFormation 创建开发环境，并通过 EventBridge 每周触发该状态机，实现定期自动更新。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、D。A 使用 Macie 发现生产 S3 存储桶中的 PII，并由 Step Functions 编排脱敏后再复制到开发账户，同时配置跨账户 KMS 解密和加密权限。D 用 CloudFormation 创建开发环境，并通过 EventBridge 每周触发该状态机，实现定期自动更新。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A and D. A uses Macie to discover PII in the production S3 bucket and Step Functions to redact it before copying data to the development account, with the needed KMS decrypt and encrypt permissions. D creates the development environment from CloudFormation and schedules EventBridge to run the workflow weekly.

contents.en: A company has an application that stores data that includes personally identifiable information (PII) in an Amazon S3 bucket. All data is encrypted with AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed keys. All AWS resources are deployed from an AWS CloudFormation template. A DevOps engineer needs to set up a development environment for the application in a different AWS account. The data in the development environment's S3 bucket needs to be updated once a week from the production environment's S3 bucket. The company must not move PII from the production environment without anonymizing the PII first. The data in each environment must be encrypted with different KMS customer managed keys. Which combination of steps should the DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个应用程序，该应用程序在 Amazon S3 存储桶中存储包含个人身份信息 (PII) 的数据。所有数据都使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 客户托管密钥加密。所有 AWS 资源都从 AWS CloudFormation 模板部署。一名 DevOps 工程师需要在另一个 AWS 账户中为该应用程序设置开发环境。开发环境的 S3 存储桶中的数据需要每周从生产环境的 S3 存储桶更新一次。公司不得在未先对 PII 进行匿名化的情况下从生产环境移动 PII。每个环境中的数据必须使用不同的 KMS 客户托管密钥加密。DevOps 工程师应采取哪组步骤来满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company uses an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster to host its machine learning (ML) application. As the ML model and the container image size grow, the time that new pods take to start up has increased to several minutes. A DevOps engineer needs to reduce the startup time to seconds. The solution must also reduce the startup time to seconds when the pod runs on nodes that were recently added to the cluster. The DevOps engineer creates an Amazon EventBridge rule that invokes an automation in AWS Systems Manager. The automation prefetches the container images from an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository when new images are pushed to the repository. The DevOps engineer also configures tags to be applied to the cluster and the node groups. What should the DevOps engineer do next to meet the requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an IAM role that has a policy that allows EventBridge to use Systems Manager to run commands in the EKS cluster's control plane nodes. Create a Systems Manager State Manager association that uses the control plane nodes' tags to prefetch corresponding container images.

contents.en: Create an IAM role that has a policy that allows EventBridge to use Systems Manager to run commands in the EKS cluster's control plane nodes. Create a Systems Manager State Manager association that uses the control plane nodes' tags to prefetch corresponding container images.
contents.zh: 创建一个 IAM 角色，该角色具有允许 EventBridge 使用 Systems Manager 在 EKS 集群控制平面节点中运行命令的策略。创建一个 Systems Manager State Manager 关联，该关联使用控制平面节点的标签来预取相应的容器镜像。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an IAM role that has a policy that allows EventBridge to use Systems Manager to run commands in the EKS cluster's nodes. Create a Systems Manager State Manager association that uses the nodes' machine size to prefetch corresponding container images.

contents.en: Create an IAM role that has a policy that allows EventBridge to use Systems Manager to run commands in the EKS cluster's nodes. Create a Systems Manager State Manager association that uses the nodes' machine size to prefetch corresponding container images.
contents.zh: 创建一个 IAM 角色，该角色具有允许 EventBridge 使用 Systems Manager 在 EKS 集群节点中运行命令的策略。创建一个 Systems Manager State Manager 关联，该关联使用节点的机器大小来预取相应的容器镜像。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an IAM role that has a policy that allows EventBridge to use Systems Manager to run commands in the EKS cluster's nodes. Create a Systems Manager State Manager association that uses the nodes' tags to prefetch corresponding container images.

contents.en: Create an IAM role that has a policy that allows EventBridge to use Systems Manager to run commands in the EKS cluster's nodes. Create a Systems Manager State Manager association that uses the nodes' tags to prefetch corresponding container images.
contents.zh: 创建一个 IAM 角色，该角色具有允许 EventBridge 使用 Systems Manager 在 EKS 集群节点中运行命令的策略。创建一个 Systems Manager State Manager 关联，该关联使用节点的标签来预取相应的容器镜像。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an IAM role that has a policy that allows EventBridge to use Systems Manager to run commands in the EKS cluster's control plane nodes. Create a Systems Manager State Manager association that uses the nodes' tags to prefetch corresponding container images.

contents.en: Create an IAM role that has a policy that allows EventBridge to use Systems Manager to run commands in the EKS cluster's control plane nodes. Create a Systems Manager State Manager association that uses the nodes' tags to prefetch corresponding container images.
contents.zh: 创建一个 IAM 角色，该角色具有允许 EventBridge 使用 Systems Manager 在 EKS 集群控制平面节点中运行命令的策略。创建一个 Systems Manager State Manager 关联，该关联使用节点的标签来预取相应的容器镜像。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。容器镜像需要预取到运行应用容器的 EKS 节点，而不是控制平面。C 使用带标签目标的 Systems Manager State Manager association，并让 EventBridge 通过 Systems Manager 在节点上运行命令，按节点标签预取对应镜像。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。容器镜像需要预取到运行应用容器的 EKS 节点，而不是控制平面。C 使用带标签目标的 Systems Manager State Manager association，并让 EventBridge 通过 Systems Manager 在节点上运行命令，按节点标签预取对应镜像。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. Container images need to be prefetched on the EKS nodes that run application containers, not on the control plane. C uses a Systems Manager State Manager association targeted by node tags, with EventBridge allowed to use Systems Manager to run the commands.

contents.en: A company uses an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster to host its machine learning (ML) application. As the ML model and the container image size grow, the time that new pods take to start up has increased to several minutes. A DevOps engineer needs to reduce the startup time to seconds. The solution must also reduce the startup time to seconds when the pod runs on nodes that were recently added to the cluster. The DevOps engineer creates an Amazon EventBridge rule that invokes an automation in AWS Systems Manager. The automation prefetches the container images from an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository when new images are pushed to the repository. The DevOps engineer also configures tags to be applied to the cluster and the node groups. What should the DevOps engineer do next to meet the requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 集群托管其机器学习 (ML) 应用程序。随着 ML 模型和容器镜像大小增长，新 pod 启动所需的时间已增加到数分钟。一名 DevOps 工程师需要将启动时间减少到数秒。当 pod 运行在最近添加到集群的节点上时，该解决方案也必须将启动时间减少到数秒。DevOps 工程师创建了一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，该规则调用 AWS Systems Manager 中的自动化。当新镜像被推送到 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) 存储库时，该自动化会预取容器镜像。DevOps 工程师还配置了要应用到集群和节点组的标签。DevOps 工程师接下来应做什么以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company's application has an API that retrieves workload metrics. The company needs to audit, analyze, and visualize these metrics from the application to detect issues at scale. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge schedule to invoke an AWS Lambda function that calls the API to retrieve workload metrics. Store the workload metric data in an Amazon S3 bucket.

contents.en: Configure an Amazon EventBridge schedule to invoke an AWS Lambda function that calls the API to retrieve workload metrics. Store the workload metric data in an Amazon S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 配置 Amazon EventBridge 计划来调用 AWS Lambda 函数，该函数调用 API 以检索工作负载指标。将工作负载指标数据存储在 Amazon S3 存储桶中。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge schedule to invoke an AWS Lambda function that calls the API to retrieve workload metrics. Store the workload metric data in an Amazon DynamoDB table that has a DynamoDB stream enabled.

contents.en: Configure an Amazon EventBridge schedule to invoke an AWS Lambda function that calls the API to retrieve workload metrics. Store the workload metric data in an Amazon DynamoDB table that has a DynamoDB stream enabled.
contents.zh: 配置 Amazon EventBridge 计划来调用 AWS Lambda 函数，该函数调用 API 以检索工作负载指标。将工作负载指标数据存储在启用了 DynamoDB 流的 Amazon DynamoDB 表中。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS Glue crawler to catalog the workload metric data in the Amazon S3 bucket. Create views in Amazon Athena for the cataloged data.

contents.en: Create an AWS Glue crawler to catalog the workload metric data in the Amazon S3 bucket. Create views in Amazon Athena for the cataloged data.
contents.zh: 创建 AWS Glue 爬虫，对 Amazon S3 存储桶中的工作负载指标数据进行编目。在 Amazon Athena 中为已编目的数据创建视图。

options.label: D
options.content: Connect an AWS Glue crawler to the Amazon DynamoDB stream to catalog the workload metric data. Create views in Amazon Athena for the cataloged data.

contents.en: Connect an AWS Glue crawler to the Amazon DynamoDB stream to catalog the workload metric data. Create views in Amazon Athena for the cataloged data.
contents.zh: 将 AWS Glue 爬虫连接到 Amazon DynamoDB 流，以对工作负载指标数据进行编目。在 Amazon Athena 中为已编目的数据创建视图。

options.label: E
options.content: Create Amazon QuickSight datasets from the Amazon Athena views. Create a QuickSight analysis to visualize the workload metric data as a dashboard.

contents.en: Create Amazon QuickSight datasets from the Amazon Athena views. Create a QuickSight analysis to visualize the workload metric data as a dashboard.
contents.zh: 从 Amazon Athena 视图创建 Amazon QuickSight 数据集。创建 QuickSight 分析，将工作负载指标数据可视化为仪表板。

options.label: F
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch dashboard that has custom widgets that invoke AWS Lambda functions. Configure the Lambda functions to query the workload metrics data from the Amazon Athena views.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch dashboard that has custom widgets that invoke AWS Lambda functions. Configure the Lambda functions to query the workload metrics data from the Amazon Athena views.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon CloudWatch 仪表板，其中包含调用 AWS Lambda 函数的自定义小部件。配置 Lambda 函数从 Amazon Athena 视图查询工作负载指标数据。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、C、E。A 用 EventBridge 定时调用 Lambda 从 API 拉取工作负载指标并存入 S3。C 用 Glue crawler 编目 S3 数据并在 Athena 中创建视图。E 从 Athena 视图创建 QuickSight 数据集和分析，用仪表板可视化指标。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、C、E。A 用 EventBridge 定时调用 Lambda 从 API 拉取工作负载指标并存入 S3。C 用 Glue crawler 编目 S3 数据并在 Athena 中创建视图。E 从 Athena 视图创建 QuickSight 数据集和分析，用仪表板可视化指标。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A, C, and E. A schedules Lambda with EventBridge to retrieve workload metrics from the API and store them in S3. C catalogs the S3 data with a Glue crawler and creates Athena views. E creates QuickSight datasets and analysis from the Athena views to visualize the metrics.

contents.en: A company's application has an API that retrieves workload metrics. The company needs to audit, analyze, and visualize these metrics from the application to detect issues at scale. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司的应用程序有一个用于检索工作负载指标的 API。公司需要审计、分析并可视化来自该应用程序的这些指标，以便大规模检测问题。哪组步骤可以满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is building the infrastructure for an application. The application needs to run on an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster that includes Amazon EC2 instances. The EC2 instances need to use an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system as a storage backend. The Amazon EFS Container Storage Interface (CSI) driver is installed on the EKS cluster. When the DevOps engineer starts the application, the EC2 instances do not mount the EFS file system. Which solutions will fix the problem? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Switch the EKS nodes from Amazon EC2 to AWS Fargate.

contents.en: Switch the EKS nodes from Amazon EC2 to AWS Fargate.
contents.zh: 将 EKS 节点从 Amazon EC2 切换到 AWS Fargate。

options.label: B
options.content: Add an inbound rule to the EFS file system's security group to allow NFS traffic from the EKS cluster.

contents.en: Add an inbound rule to the EFS file system's security group to allow NFS traffic from the EKS cluster.
contents.zh: 向 EFS 文件系统的安全组添加入站规则，允许来自 EKS 集群的 NFS 流量。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an IAM role that allows the Amazon EFS CSI driver to interact with the file system

contents.en: Create an IAM role that allows the Amazon EFS CSI driver to interact with the file system
contents.zh: 创建一个 IAM 角色，允许 Amazon EFS CSI 驱动与该文件系统交互

options.label: D
options.content: Set up AWS DataSync to configure file transfer between the EFS file system and the EKS nodes.

contents.en: Set up AWS DataSync to configure file transfer between the EFS file system and the EKS nodes.
contents.zh: 设置 AWS DataSync，以配置 EFS 文件系统和 EKS 节点之间的文件传输。

options.label: E
options.content: Create a mount target for the EFS file system in the subnet of the EKS nodes.

contents.en: Create a mount target for the EFS file system in the subnet of the EKS nodes.
contents.zh: 在 EKS 节点所在子网中为 EFS 文件系统创建挂载目标。

options.label: F
options.content: Disable encryption or the EFS file system.

contents.en: Disable encryption or the EFS file system.
contents.zh: 禁用 EFS 文件系统的加密。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B、C、E。B 允许 EFS 安全组接收来自 EKS 集群的 NFS 流量。C 为 EFS CSI driver 创建可操作文件系统的 IAM 角色。E 在 EKS 节点所在子网创建 EFS mount target，提供网络连接路径。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B、C、E。B 允许 EFS 安全组接收来自 EKS 集群的 NFS 流量。C 为 EFS CSI driver 创建可操作文件系统的 IAM 角色。E 在 EKS 节点所在子网创建 EFS mount target，提供网络连接路径。
explanations.en: The correct answers are B, C, and E. B allows NFS traffic from the EKS cluster to the EFS security group. C creates an IAM role so the EFS CSI driver can interact with the file system. E creates a mount target in the subnet where the EKS nodes run, providing network connectivity.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer is building the infrastructure for an application. The application needs to run on an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster that includes Amazon EC2 instances. The EC2 instances need to use an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system as a storage backend. The Amazon EFS Container Storage Interface (CSI) driver is installed on the EKS cluster. When the DevOps engineer starts the application, the EC2 instances do not mount the EFS file system. Which solutions will fix the problem? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师正在为一个应用程序构建基础设施。该应用程序需要运行在包含 Amazon EC2 实例的 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 集群上。EC2 实例需要使用 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 文件系统作为存储后端。Amazon EFS Container Storage Interface (CSI) 驱动已安装在 EKS 集群上。当 DevOps 工程师启动应用程序时，EC2 实例没有挂载 EFS 文件系统。哪些解决方案可以解决该问题？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company deploys an application on on-premises devices in the company's on-premises data center. The company uses an AWS Direct Connect connection between the data center and the company's AWS account. During initial setup of the on-premises devices and during application updates, the application needs to retrieve configuration files from an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. All traffic from the on-premises devices to Amazon EFS must remain private and encrypted. The on-premises devices must follow the principle of least privilege for AWS access. The company's DevOps team needs the ability to revoke access from a single device without affecting the access of the other devices. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an IAM user that has an access key and a secret key for each device. Attach the AmazonElasticFileSystemFullAccess policy to all IAM users. Configure the AWS CLI on the on-premises devices to use the IAM user's access key and secret key.

contents.en: Create an IAM user that has an access key and a secret key for each device. Attach the AmazonElasticFileSystemFullAccess policy to all IAM users. Configure the AWS CLI on the on-premises devices to use the IAM user's access key and secret key.
contents.zh: 为每台设备创建一个具有访问密钥和秘密密钥的 IAM 用户。将 AmazonElasticFileSystemFullAccess 策略附加到所有 IAM 用户。配置本地设备上的 AWS CLI 使用 IAM 用户的访问密钥和秘密密钥。

options.label: B
options.content: Generate certificates for each on-premises device in AWS Private Certificate Authority. Create a trust anchor in IAM Roles Anywhere that references an AWS Private CA. Create an IAM role that trust IAM Roles Anywhere. Attach the AmazonElasticFileSystemClientReadWriteAccess to the role. Create an IAM Roles Anywhere profile for the IAM role. Configure the AWS CLI on the on-premises devices to use the aws_signing_helper command to obtain credentials.

contents.en: Generate certificates for each on-premises device in AWS Private Certificate Authority. Create a trust anchor in IAM Roles Anywhere that references an AWS Private CA. Create an IAM role that trust IAM Roles Anywhere. Attach the AmazonElasticFileSystemClientReadWriteAccess to the role. Create an IAM Roles Anywhere profile for the IAM role. Configure the AWS CLI on the on-premises devices to use the aws_signing_helper command to obtain credentials.
contents.zh: 在 AWS Private Certificate Authority 中为每台本地设备生成证书。在 IAM Roles Anywhere 中创建一个引用 AWS Private CA 的信任锚。创建一个信任 IAM Roles Anywhere 的 IAM 角色。将 AmazonElasticFileSystemClientReadWriteAccess 附加到该角色。为该 IAM 角色创建 IAM Roles Anywhere 配置文件。配置本地设备上的 AWS CLI 使用 aws_signing_helper 命令获取凭证。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an IAM user that has an access key and a secret key for all devices. Attach the AmazonElasticFileSystemClientReadWriteAccess policy to the IAM user. Configure the AWS CLI on the on-premises devices to use the IAM user's access key and secret key.

contents.en: Create an IAM user that has an access key and a secret key for all devices. Attach the AmazonElasticFileSystemClientReadWriteAccess policy to the IAM user. Configure the AWS CLI on the on-premises devices to use the IAM user's access key and secret key.
contents.zh: 为所有设备创建一个具有访问密钥和秘密密钥的 IAM 用户。将 AmazonElasticFileSystemClientReadWriteAccess 策略附加到该 IAM 用户。配置本地设备上的 AWS CLI 使用 IAM 用户的访问密钥和秘密密钥。

options.label: D
options.content: Use the amazon-efs-utils package to mount the EFS file system.

contents.en: Use the amazon-efs-utils package to mount the EFS file system.
contents.zh: 使用 amazon-efs-utils 包挂载 EFS 文件系统。

options.label: E
options.content: Use the native Linux NFS client to mount the EFS file system.

contents.en: Use the native Linux NFS client to mount the EFS file system.
contents.zh: 使用原生 Linux NFS 客户端挂载 EFS 文件系统。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B、D。B 使用 AWS Private CA、IAM Roles Anywhere trust anchor、角色和 profile，让本地设备通过 aws_signing_helper 获取访问 EFS 所需的临时凭证。D 使用 amazon-efs-utils 挂载 EFS 文件系统。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B、D。B 使用 AWS Private CA、IAM Roles Anywhere trust anchor、角色和 profile，让本地设备通过 aws_signing_helper 获取访问 EFS 所需的临时凭证。D 使用 amazon-efs-utils 挂载 EFS 文件系统。
explanations.en: The correct answers are B and D. B uses AWS Private CA, an IAM Roles Anywhere trust anchor, role, and profile so on-premises devices can obtain temporary credentials with aws_signing_helper. D uses the amazon-efs-utils package to mount the EFS file system.

contents.en: A company deploys an application on on-premises devices in the company's on-premises data center. The company uses an AWS Direct Connect connection between the data center and the company's AWS account. During initial setup of the on-premises devices and during application updates, the application needs to retrieve configuration files from an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. All traffic from the on-premises devices to Amazon EFS must remain private and encrypted. The on-premises devices must follow the principle of least privilege for AWS access. The company's DevOps team needs the ability to revoke access from a single device without affecting the access of the other devices. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司在公司本地数据中心的本地设备上部署了一个应用程序。公司在数据中心和公司的 AWS 账户之间使用 AWS Direct Connect 连接。在本地设备的初始设置期间以及应用程序更新期间，应用程序需要从 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 文件系统检索配置文件。从本地设备到 Amazon EFS 的所有流量都必须保持私有且加密。本地设备必须遵循 AWS 访问的最小权限原则。公司的 DevOps 团队需要能够撤销单个设备的访问权限，而不影响其他设备的访问。哪组步骤可以满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is setting up an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) blue/green deployment for an application by using AWS CodeDeploy and AWS CloudFormation. During the deployment window, the application must be highly available and CodeDeploy must shift 10% of traffic to a new version of the application every minute until all traffic is shifted. Which configuration should the DevOps engineer add in the CloudFormation template to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Add an AppSpec file with the CodeDeployDefault.ECSLinearl OPercentEveryl Minutes deployment configuration.

contents.en: Add an AppSpec file with the CodeDeployDefault.ECSLinearl OPercentEveryl Minutes deployment configuration.
contents.zh: 添加一个 AppSpec 文件，其中包含 CodeDeployDefault.ECSLinearl OPercentEveryl Minutes 部署配置。

options.label: B
options.content: Add the AWS::CodeDeployBlueGreen transform and the AWS::CodeDeploy::BlueGreen hook parameter with the CodeDeployDefault.ECSLinear10PercentEvery1Minutes deployment configuration.

contents.en: Add the AWS::CodeDeployBlueGreen transform and the AWS::CodeDeploy::BlueGreen hook parameter with the CodeDeployDefault.ECSLinear10PercentEvery1Minutes deployment configuration.
contents.zh: 添加 AWS::CodeDeployBlueGreen transform 和 AWS::CodeDeploy::BlueGreen hook 参数，并使用 CodeDeployDefault.ECSLinear10PercentEvery1Minutes 部署配置。

options.label: C
options.content: Add an AppSpec file with the ECSCanary10Percent5Minutes deployment configuration.

contents.en: Add an AppSpec file with the ECSCanary10Percent5Minutes deployment configuration.
contents.zh: 添加一个 AppSpec 文件，其中包含 ECSCanary10Percent5Minutes 部署配置。

options.label: D
options.content: Add the AWS::CodeDeployBlueGreen transform and the AWS::CodeDepioy::BlueGreen hook parameter with the ECSCanary10Percent5Minutes deployment configuration.

contents.en: Add the AWS::CodeDeployBlueGreen transform and the AWS::CodeDepioy::BlueGreen hook parameter with the ECSCanary10Percent5Minutes deployment configuration.
contents.zh: 添加 AWS::CodeDeployBlueGreen transform 和 AWS::CodeDepioy::BlueGreen hook 参数，并使用 ECSCanary10Percent5Minutes 部署配置。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。在 CloudFormation 中添加 AWS::CodeDeployBlueGreen transform 和 AWS::CodeDeploy::BlueGreen hook，并使用 CodeDeployDefault.ECSLinear10PercentEvery1Minutes 部署配置，可以为 ECS 实现指定的蓝/绿线性部署。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。在 CloudFormation 中添加 AWS::CodeDeployBlueGreen transform 和 AWS::CodeDeploy::BlueGreen hook，并使用 CodeDeployDefault.ECSLinear10PercentEvery1Minutes 部署配置，可以为 ECS 实现指定的蓝/绿线性部署。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. Adding the AWS::CodeDeployBlueGreen transform and AWS::CodeDeploy::BlueGreen hook to CloudFormation with the CodeDeployDefault.ECSLinear10PercentEvery1Minutes configuration implements the specified ECS blue/green linear deployment.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer is setting up an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) blue/green deployment for an application by using AWS CodeDeploy and AWS CloudFormation. During the deployment window, the application must be highly available and CodeDeploy must shift 10% of traffic to a new version of the application every minute until all traffic is shifted. Which configuration should the DevOps engineer add in the CloudFormation template to meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师正在使用 AWS CodeDeploy 和 AWS CloudFormation 为应用程序设置 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 蓝/绿部署。在部署窗口期间，应用程序必须高度可用，并且 CodeDeploy 必须每分钟将 10% 的流量转移到应用程序的新版本，直到所有流量都被转移。DevOps 工程师应在 CloudFormation 模板中添加哪项配置以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations to manage its AWS accounts. The company's DevOps team has developed an AWS Lambda function that calls the Organizations API to create new AWS accounts. The Lambda function runs in the organization's management account. The DevOps team needs to move the Lambda function from the management account to a dedicated AWS account. The DevOps team must ensure that the Lambda function has the ability to create new AWS accounts only in Organizations before the team deploys the Lambda function to the new account. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: In the management account, create a new IAM role that has the necessary permission to create new accounts in Organizations. Allow the role to be assumed by the Lambda execution role in the new AWS account. Update the Lambda function code to assume the role when the Lambda function creates new AWS accounts. Update the Lambda execution role to ensure that it has permission to assume the new role.

contents.en: In the management account, create a new IAM role that has the necessary permission to create new accounts in Organizations. Allow the role to be assumed by the Lambda execution role in the new AWS account. Update the Lambda function code to assume the role when the Lambda function creates new AWS accounts. Update the Lambda execution role to ensure that it has permission to assume the new role.
contents.zh: 在管理账户中，创建一个具有在 Organizations 中创建新账户所需权限的新 IAM 角色。允许新 AWS 账户中的 Lambda 执行角色代入该角色。更新 Lambda 函数代码，使 Lambda 函数在创建新 AWS 账户时代入该角色。更新 Lambda 执行角色，确保其有权代入新角色。

options.label: B
options.content: In the management account, turn on delegated administration for Organizations. Create a new delegation policy that grants the new AWS account permission to create new AWS accounts in Organizations. Ensure that the Lambda execution role has the organizations:CreateAccount permission.

contents.en: In the management account, turn on delegated administration for Organizations. Create a new delegation policy that grants the new AWS account permission to create new AWS accounts in Organizations. Ensure that the Lambda execution role has the organizations:CreateAccount permission.
contents.zh: 在管理账户中，为 Organizations 开启委派管理。创建一个新的委派策略，授予新 AWS 账户在 Organizations 中创建新 AWS 账户的权限。确保 Lambda 执行角色具有 organizations:CreateAccount 权限。

options.label: C
options.content: In the management account, create a new IAM role that has the necessary permission to create new accounts in Organizations. Allow the role to be assumed by the Lambda service principal. Update the Lambda function code to assume the role when the Lambda function creates new AWS accounts. Update the Lambda execution role to ensure that it has permission to assume the new role.

contents.en: In the management account, create a new IAM role that has the necessary permission to create new accounts in Organizations. Allow the role to be assumed by the Lambda service principal. Update the Lambda function code to assume the role when the Lambda function creates new AWS accounts. Update the Lambda execution role to ensure that it has permission to assume the new role.
contents.zh: 在管理账户中，创建一个具有创建 Organizations 新账户所需权限的新 IAM 角色。允许 Lambda 服务主体代入该角色。更新 Lambda 函数代码，使 Lambda 函数在创建新 AWS 账户时代入该角色。更新 Lambda 执行角色，确保其有权代入新角色。

options.label: D
options.content: In the management account, enable AWS Control Tower. Turn on delegated administration for AWS Control Tower. Create a resource policy that allows the new AWS account to create new AWS accounts in AWS Control Tower. Update the Lambda function code to use the AWS Control Tower API in the new AWS account. Ensure that the Lambda execution role has the controltower:CreateManagedAccount permission.

contents.en: In the management account, enable AWS Control Tower. Turn on delegated administration for AWS Control Tower. Create a resource policy that allows the new AWS account to create new AWS accounts in AWS Control Tower. Update the Lambda function code to use the AWS Control Tower API in the new AWS account. Ensure that the Lambda execution role has the controltower:CreateManagedAccount permission.
contents.zh: 在管理账户中，启用 AWS Control Tower。为 AWS Control Tower 开启委派管理。创建一个资源策略，允许新 AWS 账户在 AWS Control Tower 中创建新的 AWS 账户。更新 Lambda 函数代码，在新 AWS 账户中使用 AWS Control Tower API。确保 Lambda 执行角色具有 controltower:CreateManagedAccount 权限。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。在 Organizations 管理账户中创建具备创建账户权限的 IAM 角色，并允许新账户中的 Lambda 执行角色代入；Lambda 代码再 assume 该角色创建新账户，同时自身执行角色需具备 sts:AssumeRole 权限。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。在 Organizations 管理账户中创建具备创建账户权限的 IAM 角色，并允许新账户中的 Lambda 执行角色代入；Lambda 代码再 assume 该角色创建新账户，同时自身执行角色需具备 sts:AssumeRole 权限。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. Create an IAM role in the Organizations management account with permissions to create accounts, and allow the Lambda execution role in the new account to assume it. The Lambda code then assumes that role, and its execution role must have permission to do so.

contents.en: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations to manage its AWS accounts. The company's DevOps team has developed an AWS Lambda function that calls the Organizations API to create new AWS accounts. The Lambda function runs in the organization's management account. The DevOps team needs to move the Lambda function from the management account to a dedicated AWS account. The DevOps team must ensure that the Lambda function has the ability to create new AWS accounts only in Organizations before the team deploys the Lambda function to the new account. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations 中的一个组织来管理其 AWS 账户。公司的 DevOps 团队开发了一个 AWS Lambda 函数，该函数调用 Organizations API 来创建新的 AWS 账户。该 Lambda 函数运行在组织的管理账户中。DevOps 团队需要将该 Lambda 函数从管理账户移动到一个专用 AWS 账户。DevOps 团队必须确保在将 Lambda 函数部署到新账户之前，该 Lambda 函数仅具有在 Organizations 中创建新 AWS 账户的能力。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has deployed an application in a single AWS Region. The application backend uses Amazon DynamoDB tables and Amazon S3 buckets. The company wants to deploy the application in a secondary Region. The company must ensure that the data in the DynamoDB tables and the S3 buckets persists across both Regions. The data must also immediately propagate across Regions. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Implement two-way S3 bucket replication between the primary Region's S3 buckets and the secondary Region's S3 buckets. Convert the DynamoDB tables into global tables. Set the secondary Region as the additional Region.

contents.en: Implement two-way S3 bucket replication between the primary Region's S3 buckets and the secondary Region's S3 buckets. Convert the DynamoDB tables into global tables. Set the secondary Region as the additional Region.
contents.zh: 在主区域的 S3 存储桶和辅助区域的 S3 存储桶之间实现双向 S3 存储桶复制。将 DynamoDB 表转换为全局表。将辅助区域设置为附加区域。

options.label: B
options.content: Implement S3 Batch Operations copy jobs between the primary Region and the secondary Region for all S3 buckets. Convert the DynamoDB tables into global tables. Set the secondary Region as the additional Region.

contents.en: Implement S3 Batch Operations copy jobs between the primary Region and the secondary Region for all S3 buckets. Convert the DynamoDB tables into global tables. Set the secondary Region as the additional Region.
contents.zh: 在主区域和辅助区域之间为所有 S3 存储桶实现 S3 Batch Operations 复制作业。将 DynamoDB 表转换为全局表。将辅助区域设置为附加区域。

options.label: C
options.content: Implement two-way S3 bucket replication between the primary Region's S3 buckets and the secondary Region's S3 buckets. Enable DynamoDB streams on the DynamoDB tables in both Regions. In each Region, create an AWS Lambda function that subscribes to the DynamoDB streams. Configure the Lambda function to copy new records to the DynamoDB tables in the other Region.

contents.en: Implement two-way S3 bucket replication between the primary Region's S3 buckets and the secondary Region's S3 buckets. Enable DynamoDB streams on the DynamoDB tables in both Regions. In each Region, create an AWS Lambda function that subscribes to the DynamoDB streams. Configure the Lambda function to copy new records to the DynamoDB tables in the other Region.
contents.zh: 在主区域的 S3 存储桶和辅助区域的 S3 存储桶之间实现双向 S3 存储桶复制。在两个区域的 DynamoDB 表上启用 DynamoDB streams。在每个区域中，创建一个订阅 DynamoDB streams 的 AWS Lambda 函数。配置 Lambda 函数将新记录复制到另一个区域中的 DynamoDB 表。

options.label: D
options.content: Implement S3 Batch Operations copy jobs between the primary Region and the secondary Region for all S3 buckets. Enable DynamoDB streams on the DynamoDB tables in both Regions. In each Region, create an AWS Lambda function that subscribes to the DynamoDB streams. Configure the Lambda function to copy new records to the DynamoDB tables in the other Region.

contents.en: Implement S3 Batch Operations copy jobs between the primary Region and the secondary Region for all S3 buckets. Enable DynamoDB streams on the DynamoDB tables in both Regions. In each Region, create an AWS Lambda function that subscribes to the DynamoDB streams. Configure the Lambda function to copy new records to the DynamoDB tables in the other Region.
