contents.zh: 在主区域和辅助区域之间为所有 S3 存储桶实现 S3 Batch Operations 复制作业。在两个区域的 DynamoDB 表上启用 DynamoDB streams。在每个区域中，创建一个订阅 DynamoDB streams 的 AWS Lambda 函数。配置 Lambda 函数将新记录复制到另一个区域中的 DynamoDB 表。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。双向 S3 bucket replication 可以在主区域和辅助区域的 S3 存储桶之间复制对象；将 DynamoDB 表转换为 global tables 并添加辅助 Region，可以为 DynamoDB 提供跨区域复制。讨论中也指出批量复制或自建 Lambda 复制会带来时效性或复杂度问题。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。双向 S3 bucket replication 可以在主区域和辅助区域的 S3 存储桶之间复制对象；将 DynamoDB 表转换为 global tables 并添加辅助 Region，可以为 DynamoDB 提供跨区域复制。讨论中也指出批量复制或自建 Lambda 复制会带来时效性或复杂度问题。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. Two-way S3 bucket replication replicates objects between the primary and secondary Region buckets. Converting DynamoDB tables to global tables and adding the secondary Region provides cross-Region DynamoDB replication. The discussion also notes that batch copy jobs or custom Lambda replication introduce timeliness or complexity issues.

contents.en: A company has deployed an application in a single AWS Region. The application backend uses Amazon DynamoDB tables and Amazon S3 buckets. The company wants to deploy the application in a secondary Region. The company must ensure that the data in the DynamoDB tables and the S3 buckets persists across both Regions. The data must also immediately propagate across Regions. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?
contents.zh: 一家公司已在单个 AWS 区域中部署了一个应用程序。该应用程序后端使用 Amazon DynamoDB 表和 Amazon S3 存储桶。公司希望在辅助区域中部署该应用程序。公司必须确保 DynamoDB 表和 S3 存储桶中的数据在两个区域中都持久存在。数据还必须立即跨区域传播。哪种解决方案能以最高运营效率满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has configured Amazon RDS storage autoscaling for its RDS DB instances. A DevOps team needs to visualize the autoscaling events on an Amazon CloudWatch dashboard. Which solution will meet this requirement?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to RDS storage autoscaling events from RDS events. Create an AWS Lambda function that publishes a CloudWatch custom metric. Configure the EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function. Visualize the custom metric by using the CloudWatch dashboard.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to RDS storage autoscaling events from RDS events. Create an AWS Lambda function that publishes a CloudWatch custom metric. Configure the EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function. Visualize the custom metric by using the CloudWatch dashboard.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，对来自 RDS 事件的 RDS 存储自动扩展事件作出响应。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，发布 CloudWatch 自定义指标。配置 EventBridge 规则调用该 Lambda 函数。使用 CloudWatch 仪表板可视化该自定义指标。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a trail by using AWS CloudTrail with management events configured. Configure the trail to send the management events to Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Create a metric filter in CloudWatch Logs to match the RDS storage autoscaling events. Visualize the metric filter by using the CloudWatch dashboard.

contents.en: Create a trail by using AWS CloudTrail with management events configured. Configure the trail to send the management events to Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Create a metric filter in CloudWatch Logs to match the RDS storage autoscaling events. Visualize the metric filter by using the CloudWatch dashboard.
contents.zh: 使用配置了管理事件的 AWS CloudTrail 创建一个跟踪。配置该跟踪将管理事件发送到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs。在 CloudWatch Logs 中创建一个指标筛选器，以匹配 RDS 存储自动扩展事件。使用 CloudWatch 仪表板可视化该指标筛选器。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to RDS storage autoscaling events from the RDS events. Create a CloudWatch alarm. Configure the EventBridge rule to change the status of the CloudWatch alarm. Visualize the alarm status by using the CloudWatch dashboard.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to RDS storage autoscaling events from the RDS events. Create a CloudWatch alarm. Configure the EventBridge rule to change the status of the CloudWatch alarm. Visualize the alarm status by using the CloudWatch dashboard.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，对来自 RDS 事件的 RDS 存储自动扩展事件作出响应。创建一个 CloudWatch 告警。配置 EventBridge 规则更改 CloudWatch 告警的状态。使用 CloudWatch 仪表板可视化告警状态。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a trail by using AWS CloudTrail with data events configured. Configure the trail to send the data events to Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Create a metric filter in CloudWatch Logs to match the RDS storage autoscaling events. Visualize the metric filter by using the CloudWatch dashboard.

contents.en: Create a trail by using AWS CloudTrail with data events configured. Configure the trail to send the data events to Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Create a metric filter in CloudWatch Logs to match the RDS storage autoscaling events. Visualize the metric filter by using the CloudWatch dashboard.
contents.zh: 使用配置了数据事件的 AWS CloudTrail 创建一个跟踪。配置该跟踪将数据事件发送到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs。在 CloudWatch Logs 中创建一个指标筛选器，以匹配 RDS 存储自动扩展事件。使用 CloudWatch 仪表板可视化该指标筛选器。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。该选项使用 EventBridge 监听 RDS storage autoscaling 事件，由 Lambda 发布 CloudWatch 自定义指标，并在 CloudWatch dashboard 中展示这些指标，直接满足可视化 RDS 存储自动扩展事件的需求。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。该选项使用 EventBridge 监听 RDS storage autoscaling 事件，由 Lambda 发布 CloudWatch 自定义指标，并在 CloudWatch dashboard 中展示这些指标，直接满足可视化 RDS 存储自动扩展事件的需求。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. It uses EventBridge to react to RDS storage autoscaling events, invokes Lambda to publish a CloudWatch custom metric, and visualizes that metric on a CloudWatch dashboard.

contents.en: A company has configured Amazon RDS storage autoscaling for its RDS DB instances. A DevOps team needs to visualize the autoscaling events on an Amazon CloudWatch dashboard. Which solution will meet this requirement?
contents.zh: 一家公司已为其 RDS DB 实例配置 Amazon RDS 存储自动扩展。一个 DevOps 团队需要在 Amazon CloudWatch 仪表板上可视化这些自动扩展事件。哪种解决方案可以满足此要求？

questions.content: A company uses containers for its applications. The company learns that some container images are missing required security configurations. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a solution to create a standard base image. The solution must publish the base image weekly to the us-west-2 Region, us-east-2 Region, and eu-central-1 Region. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an EC2 Image Builder pipeline that uses a container recipe to build the image. Configure the pipeline to distribute the image to an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository in us-west-2. Configure ECR replication from us- west-2 to us-east-2 and from us-east-2 to eu-central-1. Configure the pipeline to run weekly.

contents.en: Create an EC2 Image Builder pipeline that uses a container recipe to build the image. Configure the pipeline to distribute the image to an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository in us-west-2. Configure ECR replication from us- west-2 to us-east-2 and from us-east-2 to eu-central-1. Configure the pipeline to run weekly.
contents.zh: 创建一个使用容器配方构建镜像的 EC2 Image Builder 管道。配置该管道将镜像分发到 us-west-2 中的 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) 存储库。配置从 us- west-2 到 us-east-2 以及从 us-east-2 到 eu-central-1 的 ECR 复制。配置该管道每周运行一次。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that uses an AWS CodeBuild project to build the image. Use AWS CodeDeploy to publish the image to an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository in us-west-2. Configure ECR replication from us-west-2 to us-east-2 and from us-east-2 to eu-central-1. Configure the pipeline to run weekly.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that uses an AWS CodeBuild project to build the image. Use AWS CodeDeploy to publish the image to an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository in us-west-2. Configure ECR replication from us-west-2 to us-east-2 and from us-east-2 to eu-central-1. Configure the pipeline to run weekly.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CodePipeline 管道，该管道使用 AWS CodeBuild 项目构建镜像。使用 AWS CodeDeploy 将镜像发布到 us-west-2 中的 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) 存储库。配置从 us-west-2 到 us-east-2 以及从 us-east-2 到 eu-central-1 的 ECR 复制。配置该管道每周运行一次。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an EC2 Image Builder pipeline that uses a container recipe to build the image. Configure the pipeline to distribute the image to Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repositories in all three Regions. Configure the pipeline to run weekly.

contents.en: Create an EC2 Image Builder pipeline that uses a container recipe to build the image. Configure the pipeline to distribute the image to Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repositories in all three Regions. Configure the pipeline to run weekly.
contents.zh: 创建一个使用容器配方构建镜像的 EC2 Image Builder 管道。配置该管道将镜像分发到所有三个区域中的 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) 存储库。配置该管道每周运行一次。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that uses an AWS CodeBuild project to build the image. Use AWS CodeDeploy to publish the image to Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repositories in all three Regions. Configure the pipeline to run weekly.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that uses an AWS CodeBuild project to build the image. Use AWS CodeDeploy to publish the image to Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repositories in all three Regions. Configure the pipeline to run weekly.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CodePipeline 管道，该管道使用 AWS CodeBuild 项目构建镜像。使用 AWS CodeDeploy 将镜像发布到所有三个区域中的 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) 存储库。配置该管道每周运行一次。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。EC2 Image Builder 支持使用 container recipe 自动构建容器镜像，并可将镜像分发到多个 Region 的 ECR 仓库；配置每周运行满足定期更新要求。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。EC2 Image Builder 支持使用 container recipe 自动构建容器镜像，并可将镜像分发到多个 Region 的 ECR 仓库；配置每周运行满足定期更新要求。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. EC2 Image Builder can use a container recipe to automate image builds and distribute the resulting image to ECR repositories in multiple Regions. Scheduling the pipeline weekly satisfies the regular update requirement.

contents.en: A company uses containers for its applications. The company learns that some container images are missing required security configurations. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a solution to create a standard base image. The solution must publish the base image weekly to the us-west-2 Region, us-east-2 Region, and eu-central-1 Region. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司将容器用于其应用程序。公司了解到一些容器镜像缺少所需的安全配置。一名 DevOps 工程师需要实现一种解决方案来创建标准基础镜像。该解决方案必须每周将基础镜像发布到 us-west-2 区域、us-east-2 区域和 eu-central-1 区域。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer needs to implement a solution to install antivirus software on all the Amazon EC2 instances in an AWS account. The EC2 instances run the most recent version of Amazon Linux. The solution must detect all instances and must use an AWS Systems Manager document to install the software if the software is not present. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an association in Systems Manager State Manager. Target all the managed nodes. Include the software in the association. Configure the association to use the Systems Manager document.

contents.en: Create an association in Systems Manager State Manager. Target all the managed nodes. Include the software in the association. Configure the association to use the Systems Manager document.
contents.zh: 在 Systems Manager State Manager 中创建一个关联。以所有托管节点为目标。在该关联中包含该软件。配置该关联使用 Systems Manager 文档。

options.label: B
options.content: Set up AWS Config to record all the resources in the account. Create an AWS Config custom rule to determine if the software is installed on all the EC2 instances. Configure an automatic remediation action that uses the Systems Manager document for noncompliant EC2 instances.

contents.en: Set up AWS Config to record all the resources in the account. Create an AWS Config custom rule to determine if the software is installed on all the EC2 instances. Configure an automatic remediation action that uses the Systems Manager document for noncompliant EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 设置 AWS Config 记录账户中的所有资源。创建一个 AWS Config 自定义规则，以确定该软件是否安装在所有 EC2 实例上。配置一个自动修复操作，对不合规的 EC2 实例使用 Systems Manager 文档。

options.label: C
options.content: Activate Amazon EC2 scanning on Amazon Inspector to determine if the software is installed on all the EC2 instances. Associate the findings with the Systems Manager document.

contents.en: Activate Amazon EC2 scanning on Amazon Inspector to determine if the software is installed on all the EC2 instances. Associate the findings with the Systems Manager document.
contents.zh: 在 Amazon Inspector 上激活 Amazon EC2 扫描，以确定该软件是否安装在所有 EC2 实例上。将发现项与 Systems Manager 文档关联。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that uses AWS CloudTrail to detect the Runinstances API call. Configure inventory collection in Systems Manager Inventory to determine if the software is installed on the EC2 instances. Associate the Systems Manager inventory with the Systems Manager document.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that uses AWS CloudTrail to detect the Runinstances API call. Configure inventory collection in Systems Manager Inventory to determine if the software is installed on the EC2 instances. Associate the Systems Manager inventory with the Systems Manager document.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，使用 AWS CloudTrail 检测 Runinstances API 调用。在 Systems Manager Inventory 中配置清单收集，以确定软件是否安装在 EC2 实例上。将 Systems Manager 清单与 Systems Manager 文档关联。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。Systems Manager State Manager association 可面向所有 managed nodes 执行 Systems Manager document，并在 association 中包含所需软件，用于集中安装或保持软件状态。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。Systems Manager State Manager association 可面向所有 managed nodes 执行 Systems Manager document，并在 association 中包含所需软件，用于集中安装或保持软件状态。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. A Systems Manager State Manager association can target all managed nodes and use the Systems Manager document with the required software to install or maintain that software state centrally.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer needs to implement a solution to install antivirus software on all the Amazon EC2 instances in an AWS account. The EC2 instances run the most recent version of Amazon Linux. The solution must detect all instances and must use an AWS Systems Manager document to install the software if the software is not present. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师需要实现一种解决方案，在 AWS 账户中的所有 Amazon EC2 实例上安装防病毒软件。EC2 实例运行最新版本的 Amazon Linux。该解决方案必须检测所有实例，并且如果软件不存在，必须使用 AWS Systems Manager 文档安装该软件。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company needs to increase the security of the container images that run in its production environment. The company wants to integrate operating system scanning and programming language package vulnerability scanning for the containers in its CI/CD pipeline. The CI/CD pipeline is an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that includes an AWS CodeBuild build project, AWS CodeDeploy actions, and an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository. A DevOps engineer needs to add an image scan to the CI/CD pipeline. The CI/CD pipeline must deploy only images without CRITICAL and HIGH findings into production. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Use Amazon ECR basic scanning.

contents.en: Use Amazon ECR basic scanning.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon ECR 基本扫描。

options.label: B
options.content: Use Amazon ECR enhanced scanning.

contents.en: Use Amazon ECR enhanced scanning.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon ECR 增强扫描。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure Amazon ECR to submit a Rejected status to the CI/CD pipeline when the image scan returns CRITICAL or HIGH findings.

contents.en: Configure Amazon ECR to submit a Rejected status to the CI/CD pipeline when the image scan returns CRITICAL or HIGH findings.
contents.zh: 配置 Amazon ECR 在镜像扫描返回 CRITICAL 或 HIGH 发现项时向 CI/CD 管道提交 Rejected 状态。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function when the image scan is completed. Configure the Lambda function to consume the Amazon Inspector scan status and to submit an Approved or Rejected status to the CI/CD pipeline.

contents.en: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function when the image scan is completed. Configure the Lambda function to consume the Amazon Inspector scan status and to submit an Approved or Rejected status to the CI/CD pipeline.
contents.zh: 配置一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，在镜像扫描完成时调用 AWS Lambda 函数。配置 Lambda 函数使用 Amazon Inspector 扫描状态，并向 CI/CD 管道提交 Approved 或 Rejected 状态。

options.label: E
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function when the image scan is completed. Configure the Lambda function to consume the Clair scan status and to submit an Approved or Rejected status to the CI/CD pipeline.

contents.en: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function when the image scan is completed. Configure the Lambda function to consume the Clair scan status and to submit an Approved or Rejected status to the CI/CD pipeline.
contents.zh: 配置一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，在镜像扫描完成时调用 AWS Lambda 函数。配置 Lambda 函数使用 Clair 扫描状态，并向 CI/CD 管道提交 Approved 或 Rejected 状态。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B、D。B 使用 Amazon ECR enhanced scanning，它集成 Amazon Inspector，可检查操作系统和应用依赖漏洞并识别 HIGH、CRITICAL 风险。D 在扫描完成事件后调用 Lambda，读取 Inspector 扫描状态并向 CI/CD 管道提交 Approved 或 Rejected 状态。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B、D。B 使用 Amazon ECR enhanced scanning，它集成 Amazon Inspector，可检查操作系统和应用依赖漏洞并识别 HIGH、CRITICAL 风险。D 在扫描完成事件后调用 Lambda，读取 Inspector 扫描状态并向 CI/CD 管道提交 Approved 或 Rejected 状态。
explanations.en: The correct answers are B and D. B uses Amazon ECR enhanced scanning, which integrates with Amazon Inspector and can detect operating system and application package vulnerabilities, including HIGH and CRITICAL findings. D invokes Lambda when scanning completes so the function can read the Inspector status and submit Approved or Rejected to the CI/CD pipeline.

contents.en: A company needs to increase the security of the container images that run in its production environment. The company wants to integrate operating system scanning and programming language package vulnerability scanning for the containers in its CI/CD pipeline. The CI/CD pipeline is an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that includes an AWS CodeBuild build project, AWS CodeDeploy actions, and an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository. A DevOps engineer needs to add an image scan to the CI/CD pipeline. The CI/CD pipeline must deploy only images without CRITICAL and HIGH findings into production. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司需要提高其生产环境中运行的容器镜像的安全性。公司希望在其 CI/CD 管道中集成针对容器的操作系统扫描和编程语言包漏洞扫描。该 CI/CD 管道是一个 AWS CodePipeline 管道，其中包括一个 AWS CodeBuild 构建项目、AWS CodeDeploy 操作和一个 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) 存储库。一名 DevOps 工程师需要向 CI/CD 管道添加镜像扫描。该 CI/CD 管道必须仅将没有 CRITICAL 和 HIGH 发现项的镜像部署到生产环境。哪组步骤可以满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company's DevOps team manages a set of AWS accounts that are in an organization in AWS Organizations. The company needs a solution that ensures that all Amazon EC2 instances use approved AM Is that the DevOps team manages. The solution also must remediate the usage of AMIs that are not approved. The individual account administrators must not be able to remove the restriction to use approved AMIs. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to deploy an Amazon EventBridge rule to each account. Configure the rule to react to AWS CloudTrail events for Amazon EC2 and to send a notification to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe the DevOps team to the SNS topic.

contents.en: Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to deploy an Amazon EventBridge rule to each account. Configure the rule to react to AWS CloudTrail events for Amazon EC2 and to send a notification to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe the DevOps team to the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CloudFormation StackSets 向每个账户部署一条 Amazon EventBridge 规则。将该规则配置为响应 Amazon EC2 的 AWS CloudTrail 事件，并向 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题发送通知。将 DevOps 团队订阅到该 SNS 主题。

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to deploy the approved-amis-by-id AWS Config managed rule to each account. Configure the rule with the list of approved AMIs. Configure the rule to run the AWS-StopEC2Instance AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook for the noncompliant EC2 instances.

contents.en: Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to deploy the approved-amis-by-id AWS Config managed rule to each account. Configure the rule with the list of approved AMIs. Configure the rule to run the AWS-StopEC2Instance AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook for the noncompliant EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CloudFormation StackSets 向每个账户部署 approved-amis-by-id AWS Config 托管规则。使用已批准 AMI 列表配置该规则。将该规则配置为针对不合规的 EC2 实例运行 AWS-StopEC2Instance AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function that processes AWS CloudTrail events for Amazon EC2. Configure the Lambda function to send a notification to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe the DevOps team to the SNS topic. Deploy the Lambda function in each account in the organization. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule in each account. Configure the EventBridge rules to react to AWS CloudTrail events for Amazon EC2 and to invoke the Lambda function.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that processes AWS CloudTrail events for Amazon EC2. Configure the Lambda function to send a notification to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe the DevOps team to the SNS topic. Deploy the Lambda function in each account in the organization. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule in each account. Configure the EventBridge rules to react to AWS CloudTrail events for Amazon EC2 and to invoke the Lambda function.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，用于处理 Amazon EC2 的 AWS CloudTrail 事件。将该 Lambda 函数配置为向 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题发送通知。将 DevOps 团队订阅到该 SNS 主题。在组织中的每个账户中部署该 Lambda 函数。在每个账户中创建一条 Amazon EventBridge 规则。将 EventBridge 规则配置为响应 Amazon EC2 的 AWS CloudTrail 事件并调用该 Lambda 函数。

options.label: D
options.content: Enable AWS Config across the organization. Create a conformance pack that uses the approved-amis-by-id AWS Config managed rule with the list of approved AMIs. Deploy the conformance pack across the organization. Configure the rule to run the AWS-StopEC2lnstance AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook for the noncompliant EC2 instances.

contents.en: Enable AWS Config across the organization. Create a conformance pack that uses the approved-amis-by-id AWS Config managed rule with the list of approved AMIs. Deploy the conformance pack across the organization. Configure the rule to run the AWS-StopEC2lnstance AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook for the noncompliant EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 在整个组织中启用 AWS Config。创建一个 conformance pack，该 conformance pack 使用 approved-amis-by-id AWS Config 托管规则并包含已批准 AMI 列表。在整个组织中部署该 conformance pack。将该规则配置为针对不合规的 EC2 实例运行 AWS-StopEC2lnstance AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。启用组织级 AWS Config 并部署包含 approved-amis-by-id 托管规则的 conformance pack，可以统一检查是否使用批准 AMI；配置该规则触发 AWS-StopEC2Instance Systems Manager Automation runbook，可自动停止不合规 EC2 实例。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。启用组织级 AWS Config 并部署包含 approved-amis-by-id 托管规则的 conformance pack，可以统一检查是否使用批准 AMI；配置该规则触发 AWS-StopEC2Instance Systems Manager Automation runbook，可自动停止不合规 EC2 实例。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. Enabling AWS Config across the organization and deploying a conformance pack with the approved-amis-by-id managed rule checks for approved AMIs consistently. Configuring the rule to run the AWS-StopEC2Instance Systems Manager Automation runbook automatically stops noncompliant EC2 instances.

contents.en: A company's DevOps team manages a set of AWS accounts that are in an organization in AWS Organizations. The company needs a solution that ensures that all Amazon EC2 instances use approved AM Is that the DevOps team manages. The solution also must remediate the usage of AMIs that are not approved. The individual account administrators must not be able to remove the restriction to use approved AMIs. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司的 DevOps 团队管理 AWS Organizations 中某个组织内的一组 AWS 账户。该公司需要一种解决方案，确保所有 Amazon EC2 实例都使用 DevOps 团队管理的已批准 AMI。该解决方案还必须修复使用未批准 AMI 的情况。各个账户管理员不得能够移除只能使用已批准 AMI 的限制。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company gives its employees limited rights to AWS. DevOps engineers have the ability to assume an administrator role. For tracking purposes, the security team wants to receive a near-real-time notification when the administrator role is assumed. How should this be accomplished?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure AWS Config to publish logs to an Amazon S3 bucket. Use Amazon Athena to query the logs and send a notification to the security team when the administrator role is assumed.

contents.en: Configure AWS Config to publish logs to an Amazon S3 bucket. Use Amazon Athena to query the logs and send a notification to the security team when the administrator role is assumed.
contents.zh: 配置 AWS Config 将日志发布到 Amazon S3 存储桶。使用 Amazon Athena 查询日志，并在管理员角色被代入时向安全团队发送通知。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure Amazon GuardDuty to monitor when the administrator role is assumed and send a notification to the security team.

contents.en: Configure Amazon GuardDuty to monitor when the administrator role is assumed and send a notification to the security team.
contents.zh: 配置 Amazon GuardDuty 监控管理员角色何时被代入，并向安全团队发送通知。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge event rule using an AWS Management Console sign-in events event pattern that publishes a message to an Amazon SNS topic if the administrator role is assumed.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge event rule using an AWS Management Console sign-in events event pattern that publishes a message to an Amazon SNS topic if the administrator role is assumed.
contents.zh: 创建一条 Amazon EventBridge 事件规则，使用 AWS Management Console sign-in events 事件模式；如果管理员角色被代入，则向 Amazon SNS 主题发布消息。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge events rule using an AWS API call that uses an AWS CloudTrail event pattern to invoke an AWS Lambda function that publishes a message to an Amazon SNS topic if the administrator role is assumed.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge events rule using an AWS API call that uses an AWS CloudTrail event pattern to invoke an AWS Lambda function that publishes a message to an Amazon SNS topic if the administrator role is assumed.
contents.zh: 创建一条 Amazon EventBridge 事件规则，使用基于 AWS CloudTrail 事件模式的 AWS API 调用，以在管理员角色被代入时调用 AWS Lambda 函数，该函数向 Amazon SNS 主题发布消息。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。使用基于 CloudTrail API 调用事件模式的 EventBridge 规则检测 administrator role 被 AssumeRole 的事件，再调用 Lambda 向 SNS 发布消息，可以跟踪并告警角色被代入；仅监控控制台登录事件无法覆盖 AssumeRole。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。使用基于 CloudTrail API 调用事件模式的 EventBridge 规则检测 administrator role 被 AssumeRole 的事件，再调用 Lambda 向 SNS 发布消息，可以跟踪并告警角色被代入；仅监控控制台登录事件无法覆盖 AssumeRole。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. An EventBridge rule using a CloudTrail API call event pattern can detect when the administrator role is assumed, then invoke Lambda to publish an SNS notification. Monitoring only console sign-in events would not detect AssumeRole activity.

contents.en: A company gives its employees limited rights to AWS. DevOps engineers have the ability to assume an administrator role. For tracking purposes, the security team wants to receive a near-real-time notification when the administrator role is assumed. How should this be accomplished?
contents.zh: 一家公司向员工授予有限的 AWS 权限。DevOps 工程师能够代入管理员角色。出于跟踪目的，安全团队希望在管理员角色被代入时收到近实时通知。应如何实现这一点？

questions.content: A company needs a strategy for failover and disaster recovery of its data and application. The application uses a MySQL database and Amazon EC2 instances. The company requires a maximum RPO of 2 hours and a maximum RTO of 10 minutes for its data and application at all times. Which combination of deployment strategies will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon Aurora Single-AZ cluster in multiple AWS Regions as the data store. Use Aurora's automatic recovery capabilities in the event of a disaster.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Aurora Single-AZ cluster in multiple AWS Regions as the data store. Use Aurora's automatic recovery capabilities in the event of a disaster.
contents.zh: 在多个 AWS Region 中创建 Amazon Aurora Single-AZ 集群作为数据存储。在发生灾难时使用 Aurora 的自动恢复功能。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon Aurora global database in two AWS Regions as the data store. In the event of a failure, promote the secondary Region to the primary for the application. Update the application to use the Aurora cluster endpoint in the secondary Region.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Aurora global database in two AWS Regions as the data store. In the event of a failure, promote the secondary Region to the primary for the application. Update the application to use the Aurora cluster endpoint in the secondary Region.
contents.zh: 在两个 AWS Region 中创建 Amazon Aurora global database 作为数据存储。发生故障时，将辅助 Region 提升为应用程序的主 Region。更新应用程序，使其使用辅助 Region 中的 Aurora 集群端点。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon Aurora cluster in multiple AWS Regions as the data store. Use a Network Load Balancer to balance the database traffic in different Regions.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Aurora cluster in multiple AWS Regions as the data store. Use a Network Load Balancer to balance the database traffic in different Regions.
contents.zh: 在多个 AWS Region 中创建 Amazon Aurora 集群作为数据存储。使用 Network Load Balancer 在不同 Region 中均衡数据库流量。

options.label: D
options.content: Set up the application in two AWS Regions. Use Amazon Route 53 failover routing that points to Application Load Balancers in both Regions. Use health checks and Auto Scaling groups in each Region.

contents.en: Set up the application in two AWS Regions. Use Amazon Route 53 failover routing that points to Application Load Balancers in both Regions. Use health checks and Auto Scaling groups in each Region.
contents.zh: 在两个 AWS Region 中设置应用程序。使用 Amazon Route 53 failover routing，指向两个 Region 中的 Application Load Balancers。在每个 Region 中使用健康检查和 Auto Scaling groups。

options.label: E
options.content: Set up the application in two AWS Regions. Configure AWS Global Accelerator to point to Application Load Balancers (ALBs) in both Regions. Add both ALBs to a single endpoint group. Use health checks and Auto Scaling groups in each Region.

contents.en: Set up the application in two AWS Regions. Configure AWS Global Accelerator to point to Application Load Balancers (ALBs) in both Regions. Add both ALBs to a single endpoint group. Use health checks and Auto Scaling groups in each Region.
contents.zh: 在两个 AWS Region 中设置应用程序。配置 AWS Global Accelerator 指向两个 Region 中的 Application Load Balancers (ALBs)。将两个 ALB 添加到单个 endpoint group。在每个 Region 中使用健康检查和 Auto Scaling groups。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B、D。B 使用跨两个 Region 的 Aurora global database，并在故障时提升辅助 Region 为主库、更新应用端点。D 在两个 Region 部署应用，用 Route 53 failover routing 指向两地 ALB，并结合健康检查和 Auto Scaling 组实现 Web 应用故障转移。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B、D。B 使用跨两个 Region 的 Aurora global database，并在故障时提升辅助 Region 为主库、更新应用端点。D 在两个 Region 部署应用，用 Route 53 failover routing 指向两地 ALB，并结合健康检查和 Auto Scaling 组实现 Web 应用故障转移。
explanations.en: The correct answers are B and D. B uses an Aurora global database in two Regions and promotes the secondary Region on failure, then updates the application endpoint. D deploys the application in two Regions with Route 53 failover routing to ALBs, health checks, and Auto Scaling groups for the web application failover path.

contents.en: A company needs a strategy for failover and disaster recovery of its data and application. The application uses a MySQL database and Amazon EC2 instances. The company requires a maximum RPO of 2 hours and a maximum RTO of 10 minutes for its data and application at all times. Which combination of deployment strategies will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司需要为其数据和应用程序制定故障转移和灾难恢复策略。该应用程序使用 MySQL 数据库和 Amazon EC2 实例。公司要求其数据和应用程序在任何时候的最大 RPO 为 2 小时，最大 RTO 为 10 分钟。哪种部署策略组合可以满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A developer is using the AWS Serverless Application Model (AWS SAM) to create a prototype for an AWS Lambda function. The AWS SAM template contains an AWS::Serverless::Function resource that has the CodeUri property that points to an Amazon S3 location. The developer wants to identify the correct commands for deployment before creating a CI/CD pipeline. The developer creates an archive of the Lambda function code named package.zip. The developer uploads the .zip file archive to the S3 location specified in the CodeUri property. The developer runs the sam deploy command and deploys the Lambda function. The developer updates the Lambda function code and uses the same steps to deploy the new version of the Lambda function. The sam deploy command fails and returns an error of no changes to deploy. Which solutions will deploy the new version? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Use the aws cloudformation update-stack command instead of the sam deploy command.

contents.en: Use the aws cloudformation update-stack command instead of the sam deploy command.
contents.zh: 使用 aws cloudformation update-stack 命令，而不是 sam deploy 命令。

options.label: B
options.content: Use the aws cloudformation update-stack-instances command instead of the sam deploy command.

contents.en: Use the aws cloudformation update-stack-instances command instead of the sam deploy command.
contents.zh: 使用 aws cloudformation update-stack-instances 命令，而不是 sam deploy 命令。

options.label: C
options.content: Update the CodeUri property to reference the local application code folder. Use the sam deploy command.

contents.en: Update the CodeUri property to reference the local application code folder. Use the sam deploy command.
contents.zh: 更新 CodeUri 属性，使其引用本地应用程序代码文件夹。使用 sam deploy 命令。

options.label: D
options.content: Update the CodeUri property to reference the local application code folder. Use the aws cloudformation create-change-set command and the aws cloudformation execute-change-set command.

contents.en: Update the CodeUri property to reference the local application code folder. Use the aws cloudformation create-change-set command and the aws cloudformation execute-change-set command.
contents.zh: 更新 CodeUri 属性，使其引用本地应用程序代码文件夹。使用 aws cloudformation create-change-set 命令和 aws cloudformation execute-change-set 命令。

options.label: E
options.content: Update the CodeUri property to reference the local application code folder. Use the aws cloudformation package command and the aws cloudformation deploy command.

contents.en: Update the CodeUri property to reference the local application code folder. Use the aws cloudformation package command and the aws cloudformation deploy command.
contents.zh: 更新 CodeUri 属性，使其引用本地应用程序代码文件夹。使用 aws cloudformation package 命令和 aws cloudformation deploy 命令。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C、E。两者都先将 CodeUri 指向本地应用代码目录。C 使用 sam deploy，由 AWS SAM 处理打包和上传；E 使用 aws cloudformation package 上传本地构件并生成引用它们的模板，再用 aws cloudformation deploy 部署。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C、E。两者都先将 CodeUri 指向本地应用代码目录。C 使用 sam deploy，由 AWS SAM 处理打包和上传；E 使用 aws cloudformation package 上传本地构件并生成引用它们的模板，再用 aws cloudformation deploy 部署。
explanations.en: The correct answers are C and E. Both update CodeUri to reference the local application code folder. C uses sam deploy, where AWS SAM handles packaging and upload. E uses aws cloudformation package to upload local artifacts and generate a template that references them, then aws cloudformation deploy to deploy it.

contents.en: A developer is using the AWS Serverless Application Model (AWS SAM) to create a prototype for an AWS Lambda function. The AWS SAM template contains an AWS::Serverless::Function resource that has the CodeUri property that points to an Amazon S3 location. The developer wants to identify the correct commands for deployment before creating a CI/CD pipeline. The developer creates an archive of the Lambda function code named package.zip. The developer uploads the .zip file archive to the S3 location specified in the CodeUri property. The developer runs the sam deploy command and deploys the Lambda function. The developer updates the Lambda function code and uses the same steps to deploy the new version of the Lambda function. The sam deploy command fails and returns an error of no changes to deploy. Which solutions will deploy the new version? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一名开发人员正在使用 AWS Serverless Application Model (AWS SAM) 为 AWS Lambda 函数创建原型。AWS SAM 模板包含一个 AWS::Serverless::Function 资源，其 CodeUri 属性指向 Amazon S3 位置。开发人员想在创建 CI/CD 管道之前确定正确的部署命令。开发人员创建了名为 package.zip 的 Lambda 函数代码归档文件。开发人员将 .zip 文件归档上传到 CodeUri 属性中指定的 S3 位置。开发人员运行 sam deploy 命令并部署 Lambda 函数。开发人员更新 Lambda 函数代码，并使用相同步骤部署 Lambda 函数的新版本。sam deploy 命令失败并返回 no changes to deploy 错误。哪些解决方案可以部署新版本？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company runs its container workloads in AWS App Runner. A DevOps engineer manages the company's container repository in Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR). The DevOps engineer must implement a solution that continuously monitors the container repository. The solution must create a new container image when the solution detects an operating system vulnerability or language package vulnerability. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use EC2 Image Builder to create a container image pipeline. Use Amazon ECR as the target repository. Turn on enhanced scanning on the ECR repository. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to capture an Inspector? finding event. Use the event to invoke the image pipeline. Re-upload the container to the repository.

contents.en: Use EC2 Image Builder to create a container image pipeline. Use Amazon ECR as the target repository. Turn on enhanced scanning on the ECR repository. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to capture an Inspector? finding event. Use the event to invoke the image pipeline. Re-upload the container to the repository.
contents.zh: 使用 EC2 Image Builder 创建容器镜像管道。使用 Amazon ECR 作为目标存储库。在 ECR 存储库上开启 enhanced scanning。创建一条 Amazon EventBridge 规则来捕获 Inspector? finding event。使用该事件调用镜像管道。将容器重新上传到存储库。

options.label: B
options.content: Use EC2 Image Builder to create a container image pipeline. Use Amazon ECR as the target repository. Enable Amazon GuardDuty Malware Protection on the container workload. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to capture a GuardDuty finding event. Use the event to invoke the image pipeline.

contents.en: Use EC2 Image Builder to create a container image pipeline. Use Amazon ECR as the target repository. Enable Amazon GuardDuty Malware Protection on the container workload. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to capture a GuardDuty finding event. Use the event to invoke the image pipeline.
contents.zh: 使用 EC2 Image Builder 创建容器镜像管道。使用 Amazon ECR 作为目标存储库。在容器工作负载上启用 Amazon GuardDuty Malware Protection。创建一条 Amazon EventBridge 规则来捕获 GuardDuty finding event。使用该事件调用镜像管道。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS CodeBuild project to create a container image. Use Amazon ECR as the target repository. Turn on basic scanning on the repository. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to capture an ECR image action event. Use the event to invoke the CodeBuild project. Re-upload the container to the repository.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodeBuild project to create a container image. Use Amazon ECR as the target repository. Turn on basic scanning on the repository. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to capture an ECR image action event. Use the event to invoke the CodeBuild project. Re-upload the container to the repository.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CodeBuild 项目来创建容器镜像。使用 Amazon ECR 作为目标存储库。在存储库上开启 basic scanning。创建一条 Amazon EventBridge 规则来捕获 ECR image action event。使用该事件调用 CodeBuild 项目。将容器重新上传到存储库。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS CodeBuild project to create a container image. Use Amazon ECR as the target repository. Configure AWS Systems Manager Compliance to scan all managed nodes. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to capture a configuration compliance state change event. Use the event to invoke the CodeBuild project.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodeBuild project to create a container image. Use Amazon ECR as the target repository. Configure AWS Systems Manager Compliance to scan all managed nodes. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to capture a configuration compliance state change event. Use the event to invoke the CodeBuild project.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CodeBuild 项目来创建容器镜像。使用 Amazon ECR 作为目标存储库。配置 AWS Systems Manager Compliance 扫描所有托管节点。创建一条 Amazon EventBridge 规则来捕获 configuration compliance state change event。使用该事件调用 CodeBuild 项目。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。该选项使用 EC2 Image Builder 创建容器镜像管道并以 ECR 为目标仓库，开启 ECR enhanced scanning；当 Inspector finding 事件出现时，EventBridge 触发镜像管道重新构建并重新上传容器镜像。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。该选项使用 EC2 Image Builder 创建容器镜像管道并以 ECR 为目标仓库，开启 ECR enhanced scanning；当 Inspector finding 事件出现时，EventBridge 触发镜像管道重新构建并重新上传容器镜像。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. It creates a container image pipeline with EC2 Image Builder targeting ECR, enables ECR enhanced scanning, and uses an EventBridge rule for Inspector finding events to invoke the image pipeline and re-upload the container image.

contents.en: A company runs its container workloads in AWS App Runner. A DevOps engineer manages the company's container repository in Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR). The DevOps engineer must implement a solution that continuously monitors the container repository. The solution must create a new container image when the solution detects an operating system vulnerability or language package vulnerability. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 AWS App Runner 中运行其容器工作负载。一名 DevOps 工程师管理公司在 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) 中的容器存储库。该 DevOps 工程师必须实施一种解决方案，持续监控容器存储库。该解决方案必须在检测到操作系统漏洞或语言包漏洞时创建新的容器镜像。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company wants to use AWS Systems Manager documents to bootstrap physical laptops for developers. The bootstrap code is stored in GitHub. A DevOps engineer has already created a Systems Manager activation, installed the Systems Manager agent with the registration code, and installed an activation ID on all the laptops. Which set of steps should be taken next?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure the Systems Manager document to use the AWS-RunShellScript command to copy the files from GitHub to Amazon S3, then use the aws-downloadContent plugin with a sourceType of S3.

contents.en: Configure the Systems Manager document to use the AWS-RunShellScript command to copy the files from GitHub to Amazon S3, then use the aws-downloadContent plugin with a sourceType of S3.
contents.zh: 配置 Systems Manager document 使用 AWS-RunShellScript command 将文件从 GitHub 复制到 Amazon S3，然后使用 sourceType 为 S3 的 aws-downloadContent plugin。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure the Systems Manager document to use the aws-configurePackage plugin with an install action and point to the Git repository.

contents.en: Configure the Systems Manager document to use the aws-configurePackage plugin with an install action and point to the Git repository.
contents.zh: 配置 Systems Manager document 使用带有 install action 的 aws-configurePackage plugin，并指向 Git repository。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the Systems Manager document to use the aws-downloadContent plugin with a sourceType of GitHub and sourceInfo with the repository details.

contents.en: Configure the Systems Manager document to use the aws-downloadContent plugin with a sourceType of GitHub and sourceInfo with the repository details.
contents.zh: 配置 Systems Manager document 使用 aws-downloadContent plugin，并将 sourceType 设置为 GitHub，将 sourceInfo 设置为存储库详细信息。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure the Systems Manager document to use the aws:softwareInventory plugin and run the script from the Git repository.

contents.en: Configure the Systems Manager document to use the aws:softwareInventory plugin and run the script from the Git repository.
contents.zh: 配置 Systems Manager document 使用 aws:softwareInventory plugin，并从 Git repository 运行脚本。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。Systems Manager document 可使用 aws:downloadContent 插件，并将 sourceType 设置为 GitHub、sourceInfo 设置为仓库详情，从远程 GitHub 位置下载脚本或文档内容。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。Systems Manager document 可使用 aws:downloadContent 插件，并将 sourceType 设置为 GitHub、sourceInfo 设置为仓库详情，从远程 GitHub 位置下载脚本或文档内容。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. A Systems Manager document can use the aws:downloadContent plugin with sourceType set to GitHub and sourceInfo containing the repository details to download scripts or document content from GitHub.

contents.en: A company wants to use AWS Systems Manager documents to bootstrap physical laptops for developers. The bootstrap code is stored in GitHub. A DevOps engineer has already created a Systems Manager activation, installed the Systems Manager agent with the registration code, and installed an activation ID on all the laptops. Which set of steps should be taken next?
contents.zh: 一家公司想使用 AWS Systems Manager documents 为开发人员的物理笔记本电脑执行引导配置。引导代码存储在 GitHub 中。一名 DevOps 工程师已经创建了 Systems Manager activation，使用 registration code 安装了 Systems Manager agent，并在所有笔记本电脑上安装了 activation ID。接下来应采取哪组步骤？

questions.content: A company's development team uses AWS CloudFormation to deploy its application resources. The team must use CloudFormation for all changes to the environment. The team cannot use the AWS Management Console or the AWS CLI to make manual changes directly. The team uses a developer IAM role to access the environment. The role is configured with the AdministratorAccess managed IAM policy. The company has created a new CloudFormationDeployment IAM role that has the following policy attached: The company wants to ensure that only CloudFormation can use the new role. The development team cannot make any manual changes to the deployed resources. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Remove the AdministratorAccess policy. Assign the ReadOnlyAccess managed IAM policy to the developer role. Instruct the developers to use the CloudFormationDeployment role as a CloudFormation service role when the developers deploy new stacks.

contents.en: Remove the AdministratorAccess policy. Assign the ReadOnlyAccess managed IAM policy to the developer role. Instruct the developers to use the CloudFormationDeployment role as a CloudFormation service role when the developers deploy new stacks.
contents.zh: 移除 AdministratorAccess policy。将 ReadOnlyAccess managed IAM policy 分配给 developer role。指示开发人员在部署新堆栈时将 CloudFormationDeployment role 用作 CloudFormation service role。

options.label: B
options.content: Update the trust policy of the CloudFormationDeployment role to allow the developer IAM role to assume the CloudFormationDeployment role.

contents.en: Update the trust policy of the CloudFormationDeployment role to allow the developer IAM role to assume the CloudFormationDeployment role.
contents.zh: 更新 CloudFormationDeployment role 的 trust policy，允许 developer IAM role 代入 CloudFormationDeployment role。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the developer IAM role to be able to get and pass the CloudFormationDeployment role if iam:PassedToService equals . Configure the CloudFormationDeployment role to allow all cloudformation actions for all resources.

contents.en: Configure the developer IAM role to be able to get and pass the CloudFormationDeployment role if iam:PassedToService equals . Configure the CloudFormationDeployment role to allow all cloudformation actions for all resources.
contents.zh: 配置 developer IAM role，使其在 iam:PassedToService 等于  时能够获取并传递 CloudFormationDeployment role。配置 CloudFormationDeployment role 允许对所有资源执行所有 cloudformation 操作。

options.label: D
options.content: Update the trust policy of the CloudFormationDeployment role to allow the cloudformation.amazonaws.com AWS principal to perform the iam:AssumeRole action.

contents.en: Update the trust policy of the CloudFormationDeployment role to allow the cloudformation.amazonaws.com AWS principal to perform the iam:AssumeRole action.
contents.zh: 更新 CloudFormationDeployment role 的 trust policy，允许 cloudformation.amazonaws.com AWS principal 执行 iam:AssumeRole action。

options.label: E
options.content: Remove the AdministratorAccess policy. Assign the ReadOnlyAccess managed IAM policy to the developer role. Instruct the developers to assume the CloudFormationDeployment role when the developers deploy new stacks.

contents.en: Remove the AdministratorAccess policy. Assign the ReadOnlyAccess managed IAM policy to the developer role. Instruct the developers to assume the CloudFormationDeployment role when the developers deploy new stacks.
contents.zh: 移除 AdministratorAccess policy。将 ReadOnlyAccess managed IAM policy 分配给 developer role。指示开发人员在部署新堆栈时代入 CloudFormationDeployment role。

options.label: F
options.content: Add an IAM policy to the CloudFormationDeployment role to allow cloudformation:* on all resources. Add a policy that allows the iam:PassRole action for the ARN of the CloudFormationDeployment role if iam:PassedToService equals cloudformation.amazonaws.com.

contents.en: Add an IAM policy to the CloudFormationDeployment role to allow cloudformation:* on all resources. Add a policy that allows the iam:PassRole action for the ARN of the CloudFormationDeployment role if iam:PassedToService equals cloudformation.amazonaws.com.
contents.zh: 向 CloudFormationDeployment role 添加 IAM policy，允许对所有资源执行 cloudformation:*。添加一项策略，在 iam:PassedToService 等于 cloudformation.amazonaws.com 时，允许对 CloudFormationDeployment role 的 ARN 执行 iam:PassRole action。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、D、F。A 移除开发人员角色的 AdministratorAccess，只保留 ReadOnlyAccess，并要求使用 CloudFormationDeployment 作为服务角色。D 让该角色信任 cloudformation.amazonaws.com。F 为该角色授予 CloudFormation 权限，并允许在 iam:PassedToService 为 cloudformation.amazonaws.com 时传递该角色。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、D、F。A 移除开发人员角色的 AdministratorAccess，只保留 ReadOnlyAccess，并要求使用 CloudFormationDeployment 作为服务角色。D 让该角色信任 cloudformation.amazonaws.com。F 为该角色授予 CloudFormation 权限，并允许在 iam:PassedToService 为 cloudformation.amazonaws.com 时传递该角色。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A, D, and F. A removes AdministratorAccess from the developer role, assigns ReadOnlyAccess, and has developers use CloudFormationDeployment as the CloudFormation service role. D updates that role to trust cloudformation.amazonaws.com. F grants the role CloudFormation permissions and permits iam:PassRole for that role when passed to CloudFormation.

contents.en: A company's development team uses AWS CloudFormation to deploy its application resources. The team must use CloudFormation for all changes to the environment. The team cannot use the AWS Management Console or the AWS CLI to make manual changes directly. The team uses a developer IAM role to access the environment. The role is configured with the AdministratorAccess managed IAM policy. The company has created a new CloudFormationDeployment IAM role that has the following policy attached: The company wants to ensure that only CloudFormation can use the new role. The development team cannot make any manual changes to the deployed resources. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司的开发团队使用 AWS CloudFormation 部署其应用程序资源。该团队必须对环境的所有更改使用 CloudFormation。该团队不能使用 AWS Management Console 或 AWS CLI 直接进行手动更改。该团队使用 developer IAM role 访问环境。该角色配置了 AdministratorAccess managed IAM policy。公司创建了一个新的 CloudFormationDeployment IAM role，并附加了以下策略：公司希望确保只有 CloudFormation 可以使用新角色。开发团队不能对已部署资源进行任何手动更改。哪种步骤组合可以满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company is developing a web application's infrastructure using AWS CloudFormation. The database engineering team maintains the database resources in a CloudFormation template, and the software development team maintains the web application resources in a separate CloudFormation template. As the scope of the application grows, the software development team needs to use resources maintained by the database engineering team. However, both teams have their own review and lifecycle management processes that they want to keep. Both teams also require resource-level change-set reviews. The software development team would like to deploy changes to this template using their CI/CD pipeline. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a stack export from the database CloudFormation template and import those references into the web application CloudFormation template.

contents.en: Create a stack export from the database CloudFormation template and import those references into the web application CloudFormation template.
contents.zh: 从数据库 CloudFormation 模板创建 stack export，并将这些引用导入 Web 应用程序 CloudFormation 模板。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a CloudFormation nested stack to make cross-stack resource references and parameters available in both stacks.

contents.en: Create a CloudFormation nested stack to make cross-stack resource references and parameters available in both stacks.
contents.zh: 创建 CloudFormation nested stack，使跨堆栈资源引用和参数在两个堆栈中可用。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a CloudFormation stack set to make cross-stack resource references and parameters available in both stacks.

contents.en: Create a CloudFormation stack set to make cross-stack resource references and parameters available in both stacks.
contents.zh: 创建 CloudFormation stack set，使跨堆栈资源引用和参数在两个堆栈中可用。

options.label: D
options.content: Create input parameters in the web application CloudFormation template and pass resource names and IDs from the database stack.

contents.en: Create input parameters in the web application CloudFormation template and pass resource names and IDs from the database stack.
contents.zh: 在 Web 应用程序 CloudFormation 模板中创建输入参数，并从数据库堆栈传递资源名称和 ID。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。数据库 CloudFormation 模板导出资源值，Web 应用模板通过导入这些引用来使用数据库资源，既能保持两个团队栈的独立生命周期，又避免手动维护参数值。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。数据库 CloudFormation 模板导出资源值，Web 应用模板通过导入这些引用来使用数据库资源，既能保持两个团队栈的独立生命周期，又避免手动维护参数值。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. Exporting values from the database CloudFormation template and importing those references into the web application template lets the stacks keep independent lifecycles while avoiding manual parameter updates.

contents.en: A company is developing a web application's infrastructure using AWS CloudFormation. The database engineering team maintains the database resources in a CloudFormation template, and the software development team maintains the web application resources in a separate CloudFormation template. As the scope of the application grows, the software development team needs to use resources maintained by the database engineering team. However, both teams have their own review and lifecycle management processes that they want to keep. Both teams also require resource-level change-set reviews. The software development team would like to deploy changes to this template using their CI/CD pipeline. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在使用 AWS CloudFormation 开发 Web 应用程序的基础设施。数据库工程团队在一个 CloudFormation 模板中维护数据库资源，软件开发团队在单独的 CloudFormation 模板中维护 Web 应用程序资源。随着应用程序范围扩大，软件开发团队需要使用数据库工程团队维护的资源。但是，两个团队都有各自想要保留的审查和生命周期管理流程。两个团队还都要求进行资源级 change-set 审查。软件开发团队希望使用其 CI/CD 管道部署对此模板的更改。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has an organization in AWS Organizations. A DevOps engineer needs to maintain multiple AWS accounts that belong to different OUs in the organization. All resources, including IAM policies and Amazon S3 policies within an account, are deployed through AWS CloudFormation. All templates and code are maintained in an AWS CodeCommit repository. Recently, some developers have not been able to access an S3 bucket from some accounts in the organization. The following policy is attached to the S3 bucket: What should the DevOps engineer do to resolve this access issue?

options.label: A
options.content: Modify the S3 bucket policy. Turn off the S3 Block Public Access setting on the S3 bucket. In the S3 policy, add the aws:SourceAccount condition. Add the AWS account IDs of all developers who are experiencing the issue.

contents.en: Modify the S3 bucket policy. Turn off the S3 Block Public Access setting on the S3 bucket. In the S3 policy, add the aws:SourceAccount condition. Add the AWS account IDs of all developers who are experiencing the issue.
contents.zh: 修改 S3 bucket policy。关闭 S3 存储桶上的 S3 Block Public Access 设置。在 S3 policy 中添加 aws:SourceAccount condition。添加遇到该问题的所有开发人员的 AWS account IDs。

options.label: B
options.content: Verify that no IAM permissions boundaries are denying developers access to the S3 bucket. Make the necessary changes to IAM permissions boundaries. Use an AWS Config recorder in the individual developer accounts that are experiencing the issue to revert any changes that are blocking access. Commit the fix back into the CodeCommit repository. Invoke deployment through CloudFormation to apply the changes.

contents.en: Verify that no IAM permissions boundaries are denying developers access to the S3 bucket. Make the necessary changes to IAM permissions boundaries. Use an AWS Config recorder in the individual developer accounts that are experiencing the issue to revert any changes that are blocking access. Commit the fix back into the CodeCommit repository. Invoke deployment through CloudFormation to apply the changes.
contents.zh: 验证没有 IAM permissions boundaries 拒绝开发人员访问 S3 存储桶。对 IAM permissions boundaries 进行必要更改。在遇到该问题的各个开发人员账户中使用 AWS Config recorder 来还原任何阻止访问的更改。将修复提交回 CodeCommit 存储库。通过 CloudFormation 调用部署以应用更改。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure an SCP that stops anyone from modifying IAM resources in developer OUs. In the S3 policy, add the aws:SourceAccount condition. Add the AWS account IDs of all developers who are experiencing the issue. Commit the fix back into the CodeCommit repository. Invoke deployment through CloudFormation to apply the changes.

contents.en: Configure an SCP that stops anyone from modifying IAM resources in developer OUs. In the S3 policy, add the aws:SourceAccount condition. Add the AWS account IDs of all developers who are experiencing the issue. Commit the fix back into the CodeCommit repository. Invoke deployment through CloudFormation to apply the changes.
contents.zh: 配置一个 SCP，阻止任何人修改开发人员 OU 中的 IAM 资源。在 S3 policy 中添加 aws:SourceAccount condition。添加遇到该问题的所有开发人员的 AWS account IDs。将修复提交回 CodeCommit 存储库。通过 CloudFormation 调用部署以应用更改。

options.label: D
options.content: Ensure that no SCP is blocking access for developers to the S3 bucket. Ensure that no IAM policy permissions boundaries are denying access to developer IAM users. Make the necessary changes to the SCP and IAM policy permissions boundaries in the CodeCommit repository. Invoke deployment through CloudFormation to apply the changes.

contents.en: Ensure that no SCP is blocking access for developers to the S3 bucket. Ensure that no IAM policy permissions boundaries are denying access to developer IAM users. Make the necessary changes to the SCP and IAM policy permissions boundaries in the CodeCommit repository. Invoke deployment through CloudFormation to apply the changes.
contents.zh: 确保没有 SCP 阻止开发人员访问 S3 存储桶。确保没有 IAM policy permissions boundaries 拒绝开发人员 IAM users 的访问。对 CodeCommit 存储库中的 SCP 和 IAM policy permissions boundaries 进行必要更改。通过 CloudFormation 调用部署以应用更改。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。需要同时确认没有 SCP 阻止开发人员访问 S3，也没有 IAM permissions boundary 拒绝访问；所有必要更改都放入 CodeCommit 仓库，并通过 CloudFormation 部署，符合集中管理和 IaC 变更方式。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。需要同时确认没有 SCP 阻止开发人员访问 S3，也没有 IAM permissions boundary 拒绝访问；所有必要更改都放入 CodeCommit 仓库，并通过 CloudFormation 部署，符合集中管理和 IaC 变更方式。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. It checks both possible guardrails: no SCP blocking developer access to S3 and no IAM permissions boundary denying access. The required changes are made in the CodeCommit repository and deployed through CloudFormation, matching the managed IaC process.

contents.en: A company has an organization in AWS Organizations. A DevOps engineer needs to maintain multiple AWS accounts that belong to different OUs in the organization. All resources, including IAM policies and Amazon S3 policies within an account, are deployed through AWS CloudFormation. All templates and code are maintained in an AWS CodeCommit repository. Recently, some developers have not been able to access an S3 bucket from some accounts in the organization. The following policy is attached to the S3 bucket: What should the DevOps engineer do to resolve this access issue?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 AWS Organizations 中有一个组织。一名 DevOps 工程师需要维护组织中属于不同 OU 的多个 AWS 账户。账户内的所有资源（包括 IAM policies 和 Amazon S3 policies）都通过 AWS CloudFormation 部署。所有模板和代码都维护在 AWS CodeCommit 存储库中。最近，一些开发人员无法从组织中的某些账户访问 S3 存储桶。以下策略附加到该 S3 存储桶：DevOps 工程师应怎么做来解决此访问问题？

questions.content: A company has an organization in AWS Organizations for its multi-account environment. A DevOps engineer is developing an AWS CodeArtifact based strategy for application package management across the organization. Each application team at the company has its own account in the organization. Each application team also has limited access to a centralized shared services account. Each application team needs full access to download, publish, and grant access to its own packages. Some common library packages that the application teams use must also be shared with the entire organization. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the LEAST administrative overhead? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a domain in each application team's account. Grant each application team's account full read access and write access to the application team's domain.

contents.en: Create a domain in each application team's account. Grant each application team's account full read access and write access to the application team's domain.
contents.zh: 在每个应用程序团队的账户中创建一个 domain。授予每个应用程序团队账户对该应用程序团队 domain 的完整读取访问权限和写入访问权限。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a domain in the shared services account. Grant the organization read access and CreateRepository access.

contents.en: Create a domain in the shared services account. Grant the organization read access and CreateRepository access.
contents.zh: 在 shared services account 中创建一个 domain。授予组织 read access 和 CreateRepository access。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a repository in each application team's account. Grant each application team's account full read access and write access to its own repository.

contents.en: Create a repository in each application team's account. Grant each application team's account full read access and write access to its own repository.
contents.zh: 在每个应用程序团队的账户中创建一个 repository。授予每个应用程序团队账户对其自己 repository 的完整读取访问权限和写入访问权限。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a repository in the shared services account. Grant the organization read access to the repository in the shared services account Set the repository as the upstream repository in each application team's repository.

contents.en: Create a repository in the shared services account. Grant the organization read access to the repository in the shared services account Set the repository as the upstream repository in each application team's repository.
contents.zh: 在 shared services account 中创建一个 repository。授予组织对 shared services account 中 repository 的 read access。将该 repository 设置为每个应用程序团队 repository 中的 upstream repository。

options.label: E
options.content: For teams that require shared packages, create resource-based policies that allow read access to the repository from other application teams' accounts.

contents.en: For teams that require shared packages, create resource-based policies that allow read access to the repository from other application teams' accounts.
contents.zh: 对于需要共享包的团队，创建 resource-based policies，允许其他应用程序团队账户对 repository 进行 read access。

options.label: F
options.content: Set the other application teams' repositories as upstream repositories.

contents.en: Set the other application teams' repositories as upstream repositories.
contents.zh: 将其他应用程序团队的 repositories 设置为 upstream repositories。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B、C、D。B 在共享服务账户创建 CodeArtifact domain，并向组织授予读取和 CreateRepository 权限。C 让每个应用团队在自己的账户中拥有自己的 repository 并具备读写权限。D 在共享服务账户创建公共库 repository，授予组织读取权限，并作为各团队 repository 的 upstream。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B、C、D。B 在共享服务账户创建 CodeArtifact domain，并向组织授予读取和 CreateRepository 权限。C 让每个应用团队在自己的账户中拥有自己的 repository 并具备读写权限。D 在共享服务账户创建公共库 repository，授予组织读取权限，并作为各团队 repository 的 upstream。
explanations.en: The correct answers are B, C, and D. B creates a centralized CodeArtifact domain in the shared services account and grants organization read and CreateRepository access. C gives each application team its own repository with full read and write access. D creates a shared common-libraries repository, grants organization read access, and sets it as the upstream for each team's repository.

contents.en: A company has an organization in AWS Organizations for its multi-account environment. A DevOps engineer is developing an AWS CodeArtifact based strategy for application package management across the organization. Each application team at the company has its own account in the organization. Each application team also has limited access to a centralized shared services account. Each application team needs full access to download, publish, and grant access to its own packages. Some common library packages that the application teams use must also be shared with the entire organization. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the LEAST administrative overhead? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司在 AWS Organizations 中有一个用于多账户环境的组织。一名 DevOps 工程师正在为整个组织的应用程序包管理开发基于 AWS CodeArtifact 的策略。公司中的每个应用程序团队在组织中都有自己的账户。每个应用程序团队也对集中式 shared services account 具有有限访问权限。每个应用程序团队需要对自己的包拥有下载、发布和授予访问权限的完全访问权限。应用程序团队使用的一些通用库包还必须与整个组织共享。哪种步骤组合可以以最少的管理开销满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company deploys an application to Amazon EC2 instances. The application runs Amazon Linux 2 and uses AWS CodeDeploy. The application has the following file structure for its code repository: The appspec.yml file has the following contents in the files section: What will the result be for the deployment of the config.txt file?

options.label: A
options.content: The config.txt file will be deployed to only /var/www/html/config/config.txt.

contents.en: The config.txt file will be deployed to only /var/www/html/config/config.txt.
contents.zh: config.txt 文件将仅部署到 /var/www/html/config/config.txt。

options.label: B
options.content: The config.txt file will be deployed to /usr/local/src/config.txt and to /var/www/html/config/config.txt.

contents.en: The config.txt file will be deployed to /usr/local/src/config.txt and to /var/www/html/config/config.txt.
contents.zh: config.txt 文件将部署到 /usr/local/src/config.txt 和 /var/www/html/config/config.txt。

options.label: C
options.content: The config.txt file will be deployed to only /usr/local/src/config.txt.

contents.en: The config.txt file will be deployed to only /usr/local/src/config.txt.
contents.zh: config.txt 文件将仅部署到 /usr/local/src/config.txt。

options.label: D
options.content: The config.txt file will be deployed to /usr/local/src/config.txt and to /var/www/html/application/web/config.txt.

contents.en: The config.txt file will be deployed to /usr/local/src/config.txt and to /var/www/html/application/web/config.txt.
contents.zh: config.txt 文件将部署到 /usr/local/src/config.txt 和 /var/www/html/application/web/config.txt。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。第一个 appspec 文件规则将 config/config.txt 复制到 /usr/local/src/config.txt；第二个规则把仓库根目录全部复制到 /var/www/html，因此同一个 config/config.txt 也会出现在 /var/www/html/config/config.txt。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。第一个 appspec 文件规则将 config/config.txt 复制到 /usr/local/src/config.txt；第二个规则把仓库根目录全部复制到 /var/www/html，因此同一个 config/config.txt 也会出现在 /var/www/html/config/config.txt。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. The first appspec file rule copies config/config.txt to /usr/local/src/config.txt. The second rule copies the repository root to /var/www/html, so the same file is also deployed as /var/www/html/config/config.txt.

contents.en: A company deploys an application to Amazon EC2 instances. The application runs Amazon Linux 2 and uses AWS CodeDeploy. The application has the following file structure for its code repository: The appspec.yml file has the following contents in the files section: What will the result be for the deployment of the config.txt file?
contents.zh: 一家公司将应用程序部署到 Amazon EC2 实例。该应用程序运行 Amazon Linux 2 并使用 AWS CodeDeploy。应用程序的代码存储库具有以下文件结构：appspec.yml 文件在 files section 中包含以下内容：config.txt 文件的部署结果将是什么？

questions.content: A company has set up AWS CodeArtifact repositories with public upstream repositories. The company's development team consumes open source dependencies from the repositories in the company's internal network. The company's security team recently discovered a critical vulnerability in the most recent version of a package that the development team consumes. The security team has produced a patched version to fix the vulnerability. The company needs to prevent the vulnerable version from being downloaded. The company also needs to allow the security team to publish the patched version. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Update the status of the affected CodeArtifact package version to unlisted.

contents.en: Update the status of the affected CodeArtifact package version to unlisted.
contents.zh: 将受影响的 CodeArtifact package version 的状态更新为 unlisted。

options.label: B
options.content: Update the status of the affected CodeArtifact package version to deleted.

contents.en: Update the status of the affected CodeArtifact package version to deleted.
contents.zh: 将受影响的 CodeArtifact package version 的状态更新为 deleted。

options.label: C
options.content: Update the status of the affected CodeArtifact package version to archived.

contents.en: Update the status of the affected CodeArtifact package version to archived.
contents.zh: 将受影响的 CodeArtifact package version 的状态更新为 archived。

options.label: D
options.content: Update the CodeArtifact package origin control settings to allow direct publishing and to block upstream operations.

contents.en: Update the CodeArtifact package origin control settings to allow direct publishing and to block upstream operations.
contents.zh: 更新 CodeArtifact package origin control settings，以允许 direct publishing 并阻止 upstream operations。

options.label: E
options.content: Update the CodeArtifact package origin control settings to block direct publishing and to allow upstream operations.

contents.en: Update the CodeArtifact package origin control settings to block direct publishing and to allow upstream operations.
contents.zh: 更新 CodeArtifact package origin control settings，以阻止 direct publishing 并允许 upstream operations。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C、D。C 将受影响的 CodeArtifact package version 状态更新为 archived，可阻止下载。D 将 package origin control 设置为允许直接发布并阻止 upstream 操作，避免继续从上游获取受影响版本。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C、D。C 将受影响的 CodeArtifact package version 状态更新为 archived，可阻止下载。D 将 package origin control 设置为允许直接发布并阻止 upstream 操作，避免继续从上游获取受影响版本。
explanations.en: The correct answers are C and D. C changes the affected CodeArtifact package version status to archived, which prevents downloads. D changes package origin control to allow direct publishing and block upstream operations, preventing continued retrieval from upstream.

contents.en: A company has set up AWS CodeArtifact repositories with public upstream repositories. The company's development team consumes open source dependencies from the repositories in the company's internal network. The company's security team recently discovered a critical vulnerability in the most recent version of a package that the development team consumes. The security team has produced a patched version to fix the vulnerability. The company needs to prevent the vulnerable version from being downloaded. The company also needs to allow the security team to publish the patched version. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司已设置带有 public upstream repositories 的 AWS CodeArtifact repositories。公司的开发团队从公司内部网络中的这些 repositories 使用开源依赖项。公司的安全团队最近发现开发团队使用的某个包的最新版本中存在严重漏洞。安全团队已生成一个修补版本来修复该漏洞。公司需要阻止下载存在漏洞的版本。公司还需要允许安全团队发布修补版本。哪种步骤组合可以满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company is running a custom-built application that processes records. All the components run on Amazon EC2 instances that run in an Auto Scaling group. Each record's processing is a multistep sequential action that is compute-intensive. Each step is always completed in 5 minutes or less. A limitation of the current system is that if any steps fail, the application has to reprocess the record from the beginning. The company wants to update the architecture so that the application must reprocess only the failed steps. What is the MOST operationally efficient solution that meets these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a web application to write records to Amazon S3. Use S3 Event Notifications to publish to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Use an EC2 instance to poll Amazon SNS and start processing. Save intermediate results to Amazon S3 to pass on to the next step.

contents.en: Create a web application to write records to Amazon S3. Use S3 Event Notifications to publish to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Use an EC2 instance to poll Amazon SNS and start processing. Save intermediate results to Amazon S3 to pass on to the next step.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Web 应用程序，将记录写入 Amazon S3。使用 S3 Event Notifications 发布到 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。使用 EC2 实例轮询 Amazon SNS 并开始处理。将中间结果保存到 Amazon S3，以传递给下一步。

options.label: B
options.content: Perform the processing steps by using logic in the application. Convert the application code to run in a container. Use AWS Fargate to manage the container instances. Configure the container to invoke itself to pass the state from one step to the next.

contents.en: Perform the processing steps by using logic in the application. Convert the application code to run in a container. Use AWS Fargate to manage the container instances. Configure the container to invoke itself to pass the state from one step to the next.
contents.zh: 使用应用程序中的逻辑执行处理步骤。将应用程序代码转换为在容器中运行。使用 AWS Fargate 管理容器实例。配置容器调用自身，以将状态从一个步骤传递到下一个步骤。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a web application to pass records to an Amazon Kinesis data stream. Decouple the processing by using the Kinesis data stream and AWS Lambda functions.

contents.en: Create a web application to pass records to an Amazon Kinesis data stream. Decouple the processing by using the Kinesis data stream and AWS Lambda functions.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Web 应用程序，将记录传递到 Amazon Kinesis data stream。使用 Kinesis data stream 和 AWS Lambda 函数解耦处理过程。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a web application to pass records to AWS Step Functions. Decouple the processing into Step Functions tasks and AWS Lambda functions.

contents.en: Create a web application to pass records to AWS Step Functions. Decouple the processing into Step Functions tasks and AWS Lambda functions.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Web 应用程序，将记录传递到 AWS Step Functions。将处理过程解耦为 Step Functions tasks 和 AWS Lambda 函数。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。将 Web 应用提交的记录传递给 AWS Step Functions，并把处理拆分成 Step Functions 任务和 Lambda 函数，可以用工作流编排解耦处理步骤。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。将 Web 应用提交的记录传递给 AWS Step Functions，并把处理拆分成 Step Functions 任务和 Lambda 函数，可以用工作流编排解耦处理步骤。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. Passing records from the web application to AWS Step Functions and breaking processing into Step Functions tasks and Lambda functions decouples the processing through workflow orchestration.

contents.en: A company is running a custom-built application that processes records. All the components run on Amazon EC2 instances that run in an Auto Scaling group. Each record's processing is a multistep sequential action that is compute-intensive. Each step is always completed in 5 minutes or less. A limitation of the current system is that if any steps fail, the application has to reprocess the record from the beginning. The company wants to update the architecture so that the application must reprocess only the failed steps. What is the MOST operationally efficient solution that meets these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在运行一个处理记录的自定义构建应用程序。所有组件都运行在 Auto Scaling group 中的 Amazon EC2 实例上。每条记录的处理都是多步骤的顺序操作，并且计算密集。每个步骤始终在 5 分钟或更短时间内完成。当前系统的一个限制是，如果任何步骤失败，应用程序必须从头开始重新处理该记录。公司希望更新架构，使应用程序只需重新处理失败的步骤。满足这些要求的最具运营效率的解决方案是什么？

questions.content: A company is migrating its on-premises Windows applications and Linux applications to AWS. The company will use automation to launch Amazon EC2 instances to mirror the on-premises configurations. The migrated applications require access to shared storage that uses SMB for Windows and NFS for Linux. The company is also creating a pilot light disaster recovery (DR) environment in another AWS Region. The company will use automation to launch and configure the EC2 instances in the DR Region. The company needs to replicate the storage to the DR Region. Which storage solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use Amazon S3 for the application storage. Create an S3 bucket in the primary Region and an S3 bucket in the DR Region. Configure S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR) from the primary Region to the DR Region.

contents.en: Use Amazon S3 for the application storage. Create an S3 bucket in the primary Region and an S3 bucket in the DR Region. Configure S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR) from the primary Region to the DR Region.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 作为应用程序存储。在主 Region 创建一个 S3 存储桶，并在 DR Region 创建一个 S3 存储桶。配置从主 Region 到 DR Region 的 S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR)。

options.label: B
options.content: Use Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) for the application storage. Create a backup plan in AWS Backup that creates snapshots of the EBS volumes that are in the primary Region and replicates the snapshots to the DR Region.

contents.en: Use Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) for the application storage. Create a backup plan in AWS Backup that creates snapshots of the EBS volumes that are in the primary Region and replicates the snapshots to the DR Region.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 作为应用程序存储。在 AWS Backup 中创建 backup plan，为主 Region 中的 EBS volumes 创建快照，并将快照复制到 DR Region。

options.label: C
options.content: Use a Volume Gateway in AWS Storage Gateway for the application storage. Configure Cross-Region Replication (CRR) of the Volume Gateway from the primary Region to the DR Region.

contents.en: Use a Volume Gateway in AWS Storage Gateway for the application storage. Configure Cross-Region Replication (CRR) of the Volume Gateway from the primary Region to the DR Region.
