contents.zh: 使用 AWS Storage Gateway 中的 Volume Gateway 作为应用程序存储。配置从主 Region 到 DR Region 的 Volume Gateway Cross-Region Replication (CRR)。

options.label: D
options.content: Use Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP for the application storage. Create an FSx for ONTAP instance in the DR Region. Configure NetApp SnapMirror replication from the primary Region to the DR Region.

contents.en: Use Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP for the application storage. Create an FSx for ONTAP instance in the DR Region. Configure NetApp SnapMirror replication from the primary Region to the DR Region.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP 作为应用程序存储。在 DR Region 中创建一个 FSx for ONTAP 实例。配置从主 Region 到 DR Region 的 NetApp SnapMirror replication。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP 支持 NFS、SMB、iSCSI 和 NVMe 等多协议访问；在 DR Region 创建 FSx for ONTAP 并配置 SnapMirror 从主 Region 复制，可为应用存储提供灾难恢复复制路径。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP 支持 NFS、SMB、iSCSI 和 NVMe 等多协议访问；在 DR Region 创建 FSx for ONTAP 并配置 SnapMirror 从主 Region 复制，可为应用存储提供灾难恢复复制路径。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP supports multiprotocol access such as NFS, SMB, iSCSI, and NVMe. Creating FSx for ONTAP in the DR Region and configuring SnapMirror replication from the primary Region provides the application storage DR replication path.

contents.en: A company is migrating its on-premises Windows applications and Linux applications to AWS. The company will use automation to launch Amazon EC2 instances to mirror the on-premises configurations. The migrated applications require access to shared storage that uses SMB for Windows and NFS for Linux. The company is also creating a pilot light disaster recovery (DR) environment in another AWS Region. The company will use automation to launch and configure the EC2 instances in the DR Region. The company needs to replicate the storage to the DR Region. Which storage solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在将其本地 Windows 应用程序和 Linux 应用程序迁移到 AWS。公司将使用自动化启动 Amazon EC2 实例，以镜像本地配置。迁移后的应用程序需要访问共享存储，Windows 使用 SMB，Linux 使用 NFS。公司还在另一个 AWS Region 创建 pilot light disaster recovery (DR) 环境。公司将使用自动化在 DR Region 中启动并配置 EC2 实例。公司需要将存储复制到 DR Region。哪种存储解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company's application uses a fleet of Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances to analyze and process data. The EC2 instances are in an Auto Scaling group. The Auto Scaling group is a target group for an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The application analyzes critical data that cannot tolerate interruption. The application also analyzes noncritical data that can withstand interruption. The critical data analysis requires quick scalability in response to real-time application demand. The noncritical data analysis involves memory consumption. A DevOps engineer must implement a solution that reduces scale-out latency for the critical data. The solution also must process the noncritical data. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: For the critical data, modify the existing Auto Scaling group. Create a warm pool instance in the stopped state. Define the warm pool size. Create a new version of the launch template that has detailed monitoring enabled. Use Spot Instances.

contents.en: For the critical data, modify the existing Auto Scaling group. Create a warm pool instance in the stopped state. Define the warm pool size. Create a new version of the launch template that has detailed monitoring enabled. Use Spot Instances.
contents.zh: 对于关键数据，修改现有 Auto Scaling group。创建处于 stopped 状态的 warm pool instance。定义 warm pool size。创建启用了 detailed monitoring 的新 launch template 版本。使用 Spot Instances。

options.label: B
options.content: For the critical data, modify the existing Auto Scaling group. Create a warm pool instance in the stopped state. Define the warm pool size. Create a new version of the launch template that has detailed monitoring enabled. Use On-Demand Instances.

contents.en: For the critical data, modify the existing Auto Scaling group. Create a warm pool instance in the stopped state. Define the warm pool size. Create a new version of the launch template that has detailed monitoring enabled. Use On-Demand Instances.
contents.zh: 对于关键数据，修改现有 Auto Scaling group。创建处于 stopped 状态的 warm pool instance。定义 warm pool size。创建启用了 detailed monitoring 的新 launch template 版本。使用 On-Demand Instances。

options.label: C
options.content: For the critical data, modify the existing Auto Scaling group. Create a lifecycle hook to ensure that bootstrap scripts are completed successfully. Ensure that the application on the instances is ready to accept traffic before the instances are registered. Create a new version of the launch template that has detailed monitoring enabled.

contents.en: For the critical data, modify the existing Auto Scaling group. Create a lifecycle hook to ensure that bootstrap scripts are completed successfully. Ensure that the application on the instances is ready to accept traffic before the instances are registered. Create a new version of the launch template that has detailed monitoring enabled.
contents.zh: 对于关键数据，修改现有 Auto Scaling group。创建 lifecycle hook，确保 bootstrap scripts 成功完成。确保实例上的应用程序在实例注册之前已准备好接收流量。创建启用了 detailed monitoring 的新 launch template 版本。

options.label: D
options.content: For the noncritical data, create a second Auto Scaling group that uses a launch template. Configure the launch template to install the unified Amazon CloudWatch agent and to configure the CloudWatch agent with a custom memory utilization metric. Use Spot Instances. Add the new Auto Scaling group as the target group for the ALB. Modify the application to use two target groups for critical data and noncritical data.

contents.en: For the noncritical data, create a second Auto Scaling group that uses a launch template. Configure the launch template to install the unified Amazon CloudWatch agent and to configure the CloudWatch agent with a custom memory utilization metric. Use Spot Instances. Add the new Auto Scaling group as the target group for the ALB. Modify the application to use two target groups for critical data and noncritical data.
contents.zh: 对于非关键数据，创建第二个使用 launch template 的 Auto Scaling group。配置 launch template 安装 unified Amazon CloudWatch agent，并使用自定义内存利用率指标配置 CloudWatch agent。使用 Spot Instances。将新的 Auto Scaling group 添加为 ALB 的 target group。修改应用程序，使其为关键数据和非关键数据使用两个 target groups。

options.label: E
options.content: For the noncritical data, create a second Auto Scaling group. Choose the predefined memory utilization metric type for the target tracking scaling policy. Use Spot Instances. Add the new Auto Scaling group as the target group for the ALB. Modify the application to use two target groups for critical data and noncritical data.

contents.en: For the noncritical data, create a second Auto Scaling group. Choose the predefined memory utilization metric type for the target tracking scaling policy. Use Spot Instances. Add the new Auto Scaling group as the target group for the ALB. Modify the application to use two target groups for critical data and noncritical data.
contents.zh: 对于非关键数据，创建第二个 Auto Scaling group。为 target tracking scaling policy 选择预定义的内存利用率指标类型。使用 Spot Instances。将新的 Auto Scaling group 添加为 ALB 的 target group。修改应用程序，使其为关键数据和非关键数据使用两个 target groups。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B、D。B 为关键数据修改现有 Auto Scaling 组，使用停止状态 warm pool、详细监控和 On-Demand Instances，以提高就绪能力和稳定性。D 为非关键数据使用第二个 Auto Scaling 组、Spot Instances 和带自定义内存指标的 CloudWatch agent；讨论指出 Auto Scaling 没有预定义内存利用率指标，因此需要自定义指标。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B、D。B 为关键数据修改现有 Auto Scaling 组，使用停止状态 warm pool、详细监控和 On-Demand Instances，以提高就绪能力和稳定性。D 为非关键数据使用第二个 Auto Scaling 组、Spot Instances 和带自定义内存指标的 CloudWatch agent；讨论指出 Auto Scaling 没有预定义内存利用率指标，因此需要自定义指标。
explanations.en: The correct answers are B and D. B modifies the existing Auto Scaling group for critical data with a stopped warm pool, detailed monitoring, and On-Demand Instances for readiness and stability. D uses a second Auto Scaling group with Spot Instances and the CloudWatch agent for a custom memory metric; the discussion notes that Auto Scaling does not provide a predefined memory utilization metric.

contents.en: A company's application uses a fleet of Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances to analyze and process data. The EC2 instances are in an Auto Scaling group. The Auto Scaling group is a target group for an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The application analyzes critical data that cannot tolerate interruption. The application also analyzes noncritical data that can withstand interruption. The critical data analysis requires quick scalability in response to real-time application demand. The noncritical data analysis involves memory consumption. A DevOps engineer must implement a solution that reduces scale-out latency for the critical data. The solution also must process the noncritical data. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司的应用程序使用一组 Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances 来分析和处理数据。EC2 实例位于 Auto Scaling group 中。该 Auto Scaling group 是 Application Load Balancer (ALB) 的 target group。应用程序分析无法容忍中断的关键数据。应用程序还分析可以承受中断的非关键数据。关键数据分析需要根据实时应用程序需求快速扩展。非关键数据分析涉及内存消耗。一名 DevOps 工程师必须实施一种解决方案，降低关键数据的扩展延迟。该解决方案还必须处理非关键数据。哪种步骤组合可以满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company recently migrated its application to an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster that uses Amazon EC2 instances. The company configured the application to automatically scale based on CPU utilization. The application produces memory errors when it experiences heavy loads. The application also does not scale out enough to handle the increased load. The company needs to collect and analyze memory metrics for the application over time. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Attach the CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy managed IAM policy to the IAM instance profile that the cluster uses.

contents.en: Attach the CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy managed IAM policy to the IAM instance profile that the cluster uses.
contents.zh: 将 CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy managed IAM policy 附加到集群使用的 IAM instance profile。

options.label: B
options.content: Attach the CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy managed IAM policy to a service account role for the cluster.

contents.en: Attach the CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy managed IAM policy to a service account role for the cluster.
contents.zh: 将 CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy managed IAM policy 附加到集群的 service account role。

options.label: C
options.content: Collect performance metrics by deploying the unified Amazon CloudWatch agent to the existing EC2 instances in the cluster. Add the agent to the AMI for any new EC2 instances that are added to the cluster.

contents.en: Collect performance metrics by deploying the unified Amazon CloudWatch agent to the existing EC2 instances in the cluster. Add the agent to the AMI for any new EC2 instances that are added to the cluster.
contents.zh: 通过将 unified Amazon CloudWatch agent 部署到集群中现有 EC2 实例来收集性能指标。将该 agent 添加到任何新增到集群的 EC2 实例所用的 AMI 中。

options.label: D
options.content: Collect performance logs by deploying the AWS Distro for OpenTelemetry collector as a DaemonSet.

contents.en: Collect performance logs by deploying the AWS Distro for OpenTelemetry collector as a DaemonSet.
contents.zh: 通过将 AWS Distro for OpenTelemetry collector 部署为 DaemonSet 来收集性能日志。

options.label: E
options.content: Analyze the pod_memory_utilization Amazon CloudWatch metric in the ContainerInsights namespace by using the Service dimension.

contents.en: Analyze the pod_memory_utilization Amazon CloudWatch metric in the ContainerInsights namespace by using the Service dimension.
contents.zh: 使用 Service dimension 分析 ContainerInsights namespace 中的 pod_memory_utilization Amazon CloudWatch metric。

options.label: F
options.content: Analyze the node_memory_utilization Amazon CloudWatch metric in the ContainerInsights namespace by using the ClusterName dimension.

contents.en: Analyze the node_memory_utilization Amazon CloudWatch metric in the ContainerInsights namespace by using the ClusterName dimension.
contents.zh: 使用 ClusterName dimension 分析 ContainerInsights namespace 中的 node_memory_utilization Amazon CloudWatch metric。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、C、E。A 为集群实例配置文件附加 CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy，使代理能发布指标。C 在现有 EC2 实例部署 unified CloudWatch agent，并加入新 AMI 以收集内存指标。E 通过 ContainerInsights 命名空间中按 Service 维度的 pod_memory_utilization 分析 pod 级内存使用。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、C、E。A 为集群实例配置文件附加 CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy，使代理能发布指标。C 在现有 EC2 实例部署 unified CloudWatch agent，并加入新 AMI 以收集内存指标。E 通过 ContainerInsights 命名空间中按 Service 维度的 pod_memory_utilization 分析 pod 级内存使用。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A, C, and E. A attaches CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy to the instance profile so the agent can publish metrics. C deploys the unified CloudWatch agent to existing EC2 instances and adds it to the AMI for new instances to collect memory metrics. E analyzes pod_memory_utilization in the ContainerInsights namespace by Service dimension for pod-level memory usage.

contents.en: A company recently migrated its application to an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster that uses Amazon EC2 instances. The company configured the application to automatically scale based on CPU utilization. The application produces memory errors when it experiences heavy loads. The application also does not scale out enough to handle the increased load. The company needs to collect and analyze memory metrics for the application over time. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司最近将其应用程序迁移到使用 Amazon EC2 实例的 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 集群。公司已将应用程序配置为根据 CPU 利用率自动扩展。应用程序在负载较重时产生内存错误。应用程序也没有足够地扩展以处理增加的负载。公司需要随时间收集并分析应用程序的内存指标。哪种步骤组合可以满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company's video streaming platform usage has increased from 10,000 users each day to 50,000 users each day in multiple countries. The company deploys the streaming platform on Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). The EKS workload scales up to thousands of nodes during peak viewing time. The company's users report occurrences of unauthorized logins. Users also report sudden interruptions and logouts from the platform. The company wants additional security measures for the entire platform. The company also needs a summarized view of the resource behaviors and interactions across the company's entire AWS environment. The summarized view must show login attempts, API calls, and network traffic. The solution must permit network traffic analysis while minimizing the overhead of managing logs. The solution must also quickly investigate any potential malicious behavior that is associated with the EKS workload. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Enable Amazon GuardDuty for EKS Audit Log Monitoring. Enable AWS CloudTrail logs. Store the EKS audit logs and CloudTrail log files in an Amazon S3 bucket. Use Amazon Athena to create an external table. Use Amazon QuickSight to create a dashboard.

contents.en: Enable Amazon GuardDuty for EKS Audit Log Monitoring. Enable AWS CloudTrail logs. Store the EKS audit logs and CloudTrail log files in an Amazon S3 bucket. Use Amazon Athena to create an external table. Use Amazon QuickSight to create a dashboard.
contents.zh: 为 EKS Audit Log Monitoring 启用 Amazon GuardDuty。启用 AWS CloudTrail logs。将 EKS audit logs 和 CloudTrail log files 存储在 Amazon S3 存储桶中。使用 Amazon Athena 创建 external table。使用 Amazon QuickSight 创建 dashboard。

options.label: B
options.content: Enable Amazon GuardDuty for EKS Audit Log Monitoring. Enable Amazon Detective in the company's AWS account. Enable EKS audit logs from optional source packages in Detective.

contents.en: Enable Amazon GuardDuty for EKS Audit Log Monitoring. Enable Amazon Detective in the company's AWS account. Enable EKS audit logs from optional source packages in Detective.
contents.zh: 为 EKS Audit Log Monitoring 启用 Amazon GuardDuty。在公司的 AWS 账户中启用 Amazon Detective。在 Detective 中启用来自 optional source packages 的 EKS audit logs。

options.label: C
options.content: Enable Amazon CloudWatch Container Insights. Enable AWS CloudTrail logs. Store the EKS audit logs and CloudTrail log files in an Amazon S3 bucket. Use Amazon Athena to create an external table. Use Amazon QuickSight to create a dashboard.

contents.en: Enable Amazon CloudWatch Container Insights. Enable AWS CloudTrail logs. Store the EKS audit logs and CloudTrail log files in an Amazon S3 bucket. Use Amazon Athena to create an external table. Use Amazon QuickSight to create a dashboard.
contents.zh: 启用 Amazon CloudWatch Container Insights。启用 AWS CloudTrail logs。将 EKS audit logs 和 CloudTrail log files 存储在 Amazon S3 存储桶中。使用 Amazon Athena 创建 external table。使用 Amazon QuickSight 创建 dashboard。

options.label: D
options.content: Enable Amazon GuardDuty for EKS Audit Log Monitoring. Enable Amazon CloudWatch Container Insights and VPC Flow Logs. Enable AWS CloudTrail logs.

contents.en: Enable Amazon GuardDuty for EKS Audit Log Monitoring. Enable Amazon CloudWatch Container Insights and VPC Flow Logs. Enable AWS CloudTrail logs.
contents.zh: 为 EKS Audit Log Monitoring 启用 Amazon GuardDuty。启用 Amazon CloudWatch Container Insights 和 VPC Flow Logs。启用 AWS CloudTrail logs。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。GuardDuty EKS Audit Log Monitoring 可以产生与 EKS 审计日志相关的安全发现；Amazon Detective 能可视化和调查 GuardDuty findings，并可启用 EKS audit logs 作为可选数据源包来丰富行为图分析。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。GuardDuty EKS Audit Log Monitoring 可以产生与 EKS 审计日志相关的安全发现；Amazon Detective 能可视化和调查 GuardDuty findings，并可启用 EKS audit logs 作为可选数据源包来丰富行为图分析。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. GuardDuty EKS Audit Log Monitoring provides security findings from EKS audit activity. Amazon Detective can visualize and investigate GuardDuty findings, and enabling EKS audit logs as an optional source package enriches the Detective behavior graph.

contents.en: A company's video streaming platform usage has increased from 10,000 users each day to 50,000 users each day in multiple countries. The company deploys the streaming platform on Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). The EKS workload scales up to thousands of nodes during peak viewing time. The company's users report occurrences of unauthorized logins. Users also report sudden interruptions and logouts from the platform. The company wants additional security measures for the entire platform. The company also needs a summarized view of the resource behaviors and interactions across the company's entire AWS environment. The summarized view must show login attempts, API calls, and network traffic. The solution must permit network traffic analysis while minimizing the overhead of managing logs. The solution must also quickly investigate any potential malicious behavior that is associated with the EKS workload. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司的视频流平台使用量从每天 10,000 名用户增加到多个国家每天 50,000 名用户。公司将流媒体平台部署在 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 上。EKS 工作负载在观看高峰期扩展到数千个节点。公司的用户报告出现未经授权的登录。用户还报告平台突然中断和注销。公司希望为整个平台增加安全措施。公司还需要对整个 AWS 环境中的资源行为和交互进行汇总视图。该汇总视图必须显示登录尝试、API 调用和网络流量。该解决方案必须允许网络流量分析，同时最大限度减少日志管理开销。该解决方案还必须快速调查与 EKS 工作负载相关的任何潜在恶意行为。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses AWS Organizations to manage hundreds of AWS accounts. The company has a team that is responsible for AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM). The IAM team wants to implement AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On). The IAM team must have only the minimum needed permissions to manage IAM Identity Center. The IAM team must not be able to gain unneeded access to the Organizations management account. The IAM team must be able to provision new IAM Identity Center permission sets and assignments for existing and new member accounts. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a new AWS account for the IAM team. In the new account, enable IAM Identity Center. In the Organizations management account, register the new account as a delegated administrator for IAM Identity Center.

contents.en: Create a new AWS account for the IAM team. In the new account, enable IAM Identity Center. In the Organizations management account, register the new account as a delegated administrator for IAM Identity Center.
contents.zh: 为 IAM 团队创建一个新的 AWS 账户。在新账户中启用 IAM Identity Center。在 Organizations management account 中，将新账户注册为 IAM Identity Center 的 delegated administrator。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new AWS account for the IAM team. In the Organizations management account, enable IAM Identity Center. In the Organizations management account, register the new account as a delegated administrator for IAM Identity Center.

contents.en: Create a new AWS account for the IAM team. In the Organizations management account, enable IAM Identity Center. In the Organizations management account, register the new account as a delegated administrator for IAM Identity Center.
contents.zh: 为 IAM 团队创建一个新的 AWS 账户。在 Organizations management account 中启用 IAM Identity Center。在 Organizations management account 中，将新账户注册为 IAM Identity Center 的 delegated administrator。

options.label: C
options.content: In IAM Identity Center, create users and a group for the IAM team. Add the users to the group. Create a new permission set. Attach the AWSSSODirectoryAdministrator managed IAM policy to the group.

contents.en: In IAM Identity Center, create users and a group for the IAM team. Add the users to the group. Create a new permission set. Attach the AWSSSODirectoryAdministrator managed IAM policy to the group.
contents.zh: 在 IAM Identity Center 中，为 IAM 团队创建用户和组。将用户添加到该组。创建新的 permission set。将 AWSSSODirectoryAdministrator managed IAM policy 附加到该组。

options.label: D
options.content: In IAM Identity Center, create users and a group for the IAM team. Add the users to the group. Create a new permission set. Attach the AWSSSOMemberAccountAdministrator managed IAM policy to the group.

contents.en: In IAM Identity Center, create users and a group for the IAM team. Add the users to the group. Create a new permission set. Attach the AWSSSOMemberAccountAdministrator managed IAM policy to the group.
contents.zh: 在 IAM Identity Center 中，为 IAM 团队创建用户和组。将用户添加到该组。创建新的 permission set。将 AWSSSOMemberAccountAdministrator managed IAM policy 附加到该组。

options.label: E
options.content: Assign the permission set to the Organizations management account. Allow the IAM team group to use the permission set.

contents.en: Assign the permission set to the Organizations management account. Allow the IAM team group to use the permission set.
contents.zh: 将 permission set 分配给 Organizations management account。允许 IAM 团队组使用该 permission set。

options.label: F
options.content: Assign the permission set to the new AWS account. Allow the IAM team group to use the permission set.

contents.en: Assign the permission set to the new AWS account. Allow the IAM team group to use the permission set.
contents.zh: 将 permission set 分配给新的 AWS 账户。允许 IAM 团队组使用该 permission set。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B、D、F。B 创建 IAM 团队专用账户，在管理账户启用 IAM Identity Center，并将新账户注册为委派管理员。D 在 IAM Identity Center 中创建用户、组和 permission set，并为组附加 AWSSSOMemberAccountAdministrator。F 将 permission set 分配到新账户，让 IAM 团队组可使用这些权限。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B、D、F。B 创建 IAM 团队专用账户，在管理账户启用 IAM Identity Center，并将新账户注册为委派管理员。D 在 IAM Identity Center 中创建用户、组和 permission set，并为组附加 AWSSSOMemberAccountAdministrator。F 将 permission set 分配到新账户，让 IAM 团队组可使用这些权限。
explanations.en: The correct answers are B, D, and F. B creates a dedicated account for the IAM team, enables IAM Identity Center in the management account, and registers the new account as delegated administrator. D creates users, a group, and a permission set in IAM Identity Center and attaches AWSSSOMemberAccountAdministrator to the group. F assigns the permission set to the new account for that group.

contents.en: A company uses AWS Organizations to manage hundreds of AWS accounts. The company has a team that is responsible for AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM). The IAM team wants to implement AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On). The IAM team must have only the minimum needed permissions to manage IAM Identity Center. The IAM team must not be able to gain unneeded access to the Organizations management account. The IAM team must be able to provision new IAM Identity Center permission sets and assignments for existing and new member accounts. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations 管理数百个 AWS 账户。公司有一个负责 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) 的团队。IAM 团队希望实施 AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)。IAM 团队必须仅拥有管理 IAM Identity Center 所需的最小权限。IAM 团队不得能够获得对 Organizations management account 的不必要访问权限。IAM 团队必须能够为现有和新的 member accounts 预置新的 IAM Identity Center permission sets 和 assignments。哪种步骤组合可以满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations that has all features enabled. The company uses AWS Backup in a primary account and uses an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key to encrypt the backups. The company needs to automate a cross-account backup of the resources that AWS Backup backs up in the primary account. The company configures cross-account backup in the Organizations management account. The company creates a new AWS account in the organization and configures an AWS Backup backup vault in the new account. The company creates a KMS key in the new account to encrypt the backups. Finally, the company configures a new backup plan in the primary account. The destination for the new backup plan is the backup vault in the new account. When the AWS Backup job in the primary account is invoked, the job creates backups in the primary account. However, the backups are not copied to the new account's backup vault. Which combination of steps must the company take so that backups can be copied to the new account's backup vault? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Edit the backup vault access policy in the new account to allow access to the primary account.

contents.en: Edit the backup vault access policy in the new account to allow access to the primary account.
contents.zh: 编辑新账户中的 backup vault access policy，以允许主账户访问。

options.label: B
options.content: Edit the backup vault access policy in the primary account to allow access to the new account.

contents.en: Edit the backup vault access policy in the primary account to allow access to the new account.
contents.zh: 编辑主账户中的 backup vault access policy，以允许新账户访问。

options.label: C
options.content: Edit the backup vault access policy in the primary account to allow access to the KMS key in the new account.

contents.en: Edit the backup vault access policy in the primary account to allow access to the KMS key in the new account.
contents.zh: 编辑主账户中的 backup vault access policy，以允许访问新账户中的 KMS key。

options.label: D
options.content: Edit the key policy of the KMS key in the primary account to share the key with the new account.

contents.en: Edit the key policy of the KMS key in the primary account to share the key with the new account.
contents.zh: 编辑主账户中 KMS key 的 key policy，以与新账户共享该 key。

options.label: E
options.content: Edit the key policy of the KMS key in the new account to share the key with the primary account.

contents.en: Edit the key policy of the KMS key in the new account to share the key with the primary account.
contents.zh: 编辑新账户中 KMS key 的 key policy，以与主账户共享该 key。

explanations.en: Correct answers: A and D. A updates the backup vault access policy in the new account to allow the primary account, and D shares the primary account customer managed KMS key with the new account, matching the cross-account backup requirements for vault access and encrypted source resources.

contents.en: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations that has all features enabled. The company uses AWS Backup in a primary account and uses an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key to encrypt the backups. The company needs to automate a cross-account backup of the resources that AWS Backup backs up in the primary account. The company configures cross-account backup in the Organizations management account. The company creates a new AWS account in the organization and configures an AWS Backup backup vault in the new account. The company creates a KMS key in the new account to encrypt the backups. Finally, the company configures a new backup plan in the primary account. The destination for the new backup plan is the backup vault in the new account. When the AWS Backup job in the primary account is invoked, the job creates backups in the primary account. However, the backups are not copied to the new account's backup vault. Which combination of steps must the company take so that backups can be copied to the new account's backup vault? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司使用启用了所有功能的 AWS Organizations 中的组织。公司在主账户中使用 AWS Backup，并使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key 加密备份。公司需要自动化对主账户中 AWS Backup 所备份资源的跨账户备份。公司在 Organizations management account 中配置 cross-account backup。公司在组织中创建一个新的 AWS 账户，并在新账户中配置 AWS Backup backup vault。公司在新账户中创建 KMS key 来加密备份。最后，公司在主账户中配置新的 backup plan。新 backup plan 的目标是新账户中的 backup vault。当主账户中的 AWS Backup job 被调用时，该作业会在主账户中创建备份。但是，备份没有复制到新账户的 backup vault。公司必须采取哪种步骤组合，才能将备份复制到新账户的 backup vault？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company runs an application that uses an Amazon S3 bucket to store images. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a multi- Region strategy for the objects that are stored in the S3 bucket. The company needs to be able to fail over to an S3 bucket in another AWS Region. When an image is added to either S3 bucket, the image must be replicated to the other S3 bucket within 15 minutes. The DevOps engineer enables two-way replication between the S3 buckets. Which combination of steps should the DevOps engineer take next to meet the requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Enable S3 Replication Time Control (S3 RTC) on each replication rule.

contents.en: Enable S3 Replication Time Control (S3 RTC) on each replication rule.
contents.zh: 在每条 replication rule 上启用 S3 Replication Time Control (S3 RTC)。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an S3 Multi-Region Access Point in an active-passive configuration.

contents.en: Create an S3 Multi-Region Access Point in an active-passive configuration.
contents.zh: 以 active-passive 配置创建 S3 Multi-Region Access Point。

options.label: C
options.content: Call the SubmitMultiRegionAccessPointRoutes operation in the AWS API when the company needs to fail over to the S3 bucket in the other Region.

contents.en: Call the SubmitMultiRegionAccessPointRoutes operation in the AWS API when the company needs to fail over to the S3 bucket in the other Region.
contents.zh: 当公司需要故障转移到另一个 Region 中的 S3 存储桶时，调用 AWS API 中的 SubmitMultiRegionAccessPointRoutes operation。

options.label: D
options.content: Enable S3 Transfer Acceleration on both S3 buckets.

contents.en: Enable S3 Transfer Acceleration on both S3 buckets.
contents.zh: 在两个 S3 存储桶上启用 S3 Transfer Acceleration。

options.label: E
options.content: Configure a routing control in Amazon Route 53 Recovery Controller. Add the S3 buckets in an active-passive configuration.

contents.en: Configure a routing control in Amazon Route 53 Recovery Controller. Add the S3 buckets in an active-passive configuration.
contents.zh: 在 Amazon Route 53 Recovery Controller 中配置 routing control。以 active-passive 配置添加 S3 存储桶。

options.label: F
options.content: Call the UpdateRoutingControlStates operation in the AWS API when the company needs to fail over to the S3 bucket in the other Region.

contents.en: Call the UpdateRoutingControlStates operation in the AWS API when the company needs to fail over to the S3 bucket in the other Region.
contents.zh: 当公司需要故障转移到另一个 Region 中的 S3 存储桶时，调用 AWS API 中的 UpdateRoutingControlStates operation。

questions.explanation: ????? A?B?C?A ??????? S3 RTC?B ????-??? S3 ???????C ???????? SubmitMultiRegionAccessPointRoutes ???????

explanations.zh: ????? A?B?C?A ??????? S3 RTC?B ????-??? S3 ???????C ???????? SubmitMultiRegionAccessPointRoutes ???????
explanations.en: Correct answers: A, B, and C. A enables S3 RTC on replication rules, B uses an active-passive S3 Multi-Region Access Point, and C calls SubmitMultiRegionAccessPointRoutes during failover to change the traffic routing.

contents.en: A company runs an application that uses an Amazon S3 bucket to store images. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a multi- Region strategy for the objects that are stored in the S3 bucket. The company needs to be able to fail over to an S3 bucket in another AWS Region. When an image is added to either S3 bucket, the image must be replicated to the other S3 bucket within 15 minutes. The DevOps engineer enables two-way replication between the S3 buckets. Which combination of steps should the DevOps engineer take next to meet the requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司运行一个使用 Amazon S3 存储桶来存储图像的应用程序。一名 DevOps 工程师需要为存储在 S3 存储桶中的对象实施 multi- Region 策略。公司需要能够故障转移到另一个 AWS Region 中的 S3 存储桶。当图像添加到任一 S3 存储桶时，该图像必须在 15 分钟内复制到另一个 S3 存储桶。DevOps 工程师在 S3 存储桶之间启用了双向复制。DevOps 工程师接下来应采取哪种步骤组合来满足要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company uses the AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) to define its application. The company uses a pipeline that consists of AWS CodePipeline and AWS CodeBuild to deploy the CDK application. The company wants to introduce unit tests to the pipeline to test various infrastructure components. The company wants to ensure that a deployment proceeds if no unit tests result in a failure. Which combination of steps will enforce the testing requirement in the pipeline? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Update the CodeBuild build phase commands to run the tests then to deploy the application. Set the OnFailure phase property to ABORT.

contents.en: Update the CodeBuild build phase commands to run the tests then to deploy the application. Set the OnFailure phase property to ABORT.
contents.zh: 更新 CodeBuild build phase commands，先运行测试，然后部署应用程序。将 OnFailure phase property 设置为 ABORT。

options.label: B
options.content: Update the CodeBuild build phase commands to run the tests then to deploy the application. Add the --rollback true flag to the cdk deploy command.

contents.en: Update the CodeBuild build phase commands to run the tests then to deploy the application. Add the --rollback true flag to the cdk deploy command.
contents.zh: 更新 CodeBuild build phase commands，先运行测试，然后部署应用程序。向 cdk deploy 命令添加 --rollback true 标志。

options.label: C
options.content: Update the CodeBuild build phase commands to run the tests then to deploy the application. Add the --require-approval any-change flag to the cdk deploy command.

contents.en: Update the CodeBuild build phase commands to run the tests then to deploy the application. Add the --require-approval any-change flag to the cdk deploy command.
contents.zh: 更新 CodeBuild build phase commands，先运行测试，然后部署应用程序。向 cdk deploy 命令添加 --require-approval any-change 标志。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a test that uses the AWS CDK assertions module. Use the template.hasResourceProperties assertion to test that resources have the expected properties.

contents.en: Create a test that uses the AWS CDK assertions module. Use the template.hasResourceProperties assertion to test that resources have the expected properties.
contents.zh: 创建一个使用 AWS CDK assertions module 的测试。使用 template.hasResourceProperties assertion 测试资源是否具有预期属性。

options.label: E
options.content: Create a test that uses the cdk diff command. Configure the test to fail if any resources have changed.

contents.en: Create a test that uses the cdk diff command. Configure the test to fail if any resources have changed.
contents.zh: 创建一个使用 cdk diff 命令的测试。配置该测试，使其在任何资源发生更改时失败。

questions.explanation: ????? A?D?A ? CodeBuild ?????????? ABORT?????????????D ?? AWS CDK assertions ? template.hasResourceProperties ?????????

explanations.zh: ????? A?D?A ? CodeBuild ?????????? ABORT?????????????D ?? AWS CDK assertions ? template.hasResourceProperties ?????????
explanations.en: Correct answers: A and D. A makes CodeBuild run tests before deployment and abort on failure, preventing a failed test run from deploying. D uses AWS CDK assertions with template.hasResourceProperties to validate expected resource properties.

contents.en: A company uses the AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) to define its application. The company uses a pipeline that consists of AWS CodePipeline and AWS CodeBuild to deploy the CDK application. The company wants to introduce unit tests to the pipeline to test various infrastructure components. The company wants to ensure that a deployment proceeds if no unit tests result in a failure. Which combination of steps will enforce the testing requirement in the pipeline? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) 定义其应用程序。公司使用由 AWS CodePipeline 和 AWS CodeBuild 组成的管道部署 CDK 应用程序。公司希望向管道引入单元测试，以测试各种基础设施组件。公司希望确保只有在没有单元测试失败时才继续部署。哪种步骤组合将在管道中强制执行该测试要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company has an application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The EC2 instances are in multiple Availability Zones. The application was misconfigured in a single Availability Zone, which caused a partial outage of the application. A DevOps engineer made changes to ensure that the unhealthy EC2 instances in one Availability Zone do not affect the healthy EC2 instances in the other Availability Zones. The DevOps engineer needs to test the application's failover and shift where the ALB sends traffic. During failover, the ALB must avoid sending traffic to the Availability Zone where the failure has occurred. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Turn off cross-zone load balancing on the ALB. Use Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller to start a zonal shift away from the Availability Zone.

contents.en: Turn off cross-zone load balancing on the ALB. Use Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller to start a zonal shift away from the Availability Zone.
contents.zh: 关闭 ALB 上的 cross-zone load balancing。使用 Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller 启动从该 Availability Zone 移出的 zonal shift。

options.label: B
options.content: Turn off cross-zone load balancing on the ALB's target group. Use Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller to start a zonal shift away from the Availability Zone.

contents.en: Turn off cross-zone load balancing on the ALB's target group. Use Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller to start a zonal shift away from the Availability Zone.
contents.zh: 关闭 ALB 的 target group 上的 cross-zone load balancing。使用 Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller 启动从该 Availability Zone 移出的 zonal shift。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller resource set that uses the DNS hostname of the ALB. Start a zonal shift for the resource set away from the Availability Zone.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller resource set that uses the DNS hostname of the ALB. Start a zonal shift for the resource set away from the Availability Zone.
contents.zh: 创建一个使用 ALB 的 DNS hostname 的 Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller resource set。为该 resource set 启动从该 Availability Zone 移出的 zonal shift。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller resource set that uses the ARN of the ALB's target group. Create a readiness check that uses the ElbV2TargetGroupsCanServeTraffic rule.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller resource set that uses the ARN of the ALB's target group. Create a readiness check that uses the ElbV2TargetGroupsCanServeTraffic rule.
contents.zh: 创建一个使用 ALB 的 target group 的 ARN 的 Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller resource set。创建一个使用 ElbV2TargetGroupsCanServeTraffic rule 的 readiness check。

questions.explanation: ????? A??????? Route 53 ARC zonal shift ??Elastic Load Balancing ???????????????????? ALB ? cross-zone load balancing ??? zonal shift?

explanations.zh: ????? A??????? Route 53 ARC zonal shift ??Elastic Load Balancing ???????????????????? ALB ? cross-zone load balancing ??? zonal shift?
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. The discussion notes that Route 53 ARC zonal shift requires cross-zone load balancing to be turned off for Elastic Load Balancing resources, so the ALB should disable cross-zone load balancing and shift traffic away from the affected AZ.

contents.en: A company has an application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The EC2 instances are in multiple Availability Zones. The application was misconfigured in a single Availability Zone, which caused a partial outage of the application. A DevOps engineer made changes to ensure that the unhealthy EC2 instances in one Availability Zone do not affect the healthy EC2 instances in the other Availability Zones. The DevOps engineer needs to test the application's failover and shift where the ALB sends traffic. During failover, the ALB must avoid sending traffic to the Availability Zone where the failure has occurred. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个在 Application Load Balancer (ALB) 后面的 Amazon EC2 实例上运行的应用程序。EC2 实例位于多个 Availability Zones 中。该应用程序在单个 Availability Zone 中配置错误，导致应用程序部分中断。一名 DevOps 工程师进行了更改，以确保一个 Availability Zone 中的不健康 EC2 实例不会影响其他 Availability Zones 中的健康 EC2 实例。DevOps 工程师需要测试应用程序的故障转移，并改变 ALB 发送流量的位置。在故障转移期间，ALB 必须避免向发生故障的 Availability Zone 发送流量。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company sends its AWS Network Firewall flow logs to an Amazon S3 bucket. The company then analyzes the flow logs by using Amazon Athena. The company needs to transform the flow logs and add additional data before the flow logs are delivered to the existing S3 bucket. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function to transform the data and to write a new object to the existing S3 bucket. Configure the Lambda function with an S3 trigger for the existing S3 bucket. Specify all object create events for the event type. Acknowledge the recursive invocation.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function to transform the data and to write a new object to the existing S3 bucket. Configure the Lambda function with an S3 trigger for the existing S3 bucket. Specify all object create events for the event type. Acknowledge the recursive invocation.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数来转换数据，并向现有 S3 存储桶写入新对象。为现有 S3 存储桶配置该 Lambda 函数的 S3 trigger。为事件类型指定所有 object create events。确认 recursive invocation。

options.label: B
options.content: Enable Amazon EventBridge notifications on the existing S3 bucket. Create a custom EventBridge event bus. Create an EventBridge rule that is associated with the custom event bus. Configure the rule to react to all object create events for the existing S3 bucket and to invoke an AWS Step Functions workflow. Configure a Step Functions task to transform the data and to write the data into a new S3 bucket.

contents.en: Enable Amazon EventBridge notifications on the existing S3 bucket. Create a custom EventBridge event bus. Create an EventBridge rule that is associated with the custom event bus. Configure the rule to react to all object create events for the existing S3 bucket and to invoke an AWS Step Functions workflow. Configure a Step Functions task to transform the data and to write the data into a new S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 在现有 S3 存储桶上启用 Amazon EventBridge notifications。创建一个 custom EventBridge event bus。创建一条与 custom event bus 关联的 EventBridge 规则。将该规则配置为响应现有 S3 存储桶的所有 object create events，并调用 AWS Step Functions workflow。配置一个 Step Functions task 来转换数据，并将数据写入新的 S3 存储桶。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that is associated with the default EventBridge event bus. Configure the rule to react to all object create events for the existing S3 bucket. Define a new S3 bucket as the target for the rule. Create an EventBridge input transformation to customize the event before passing the event to the rule target.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that is associated with the default EventBridge event bus. Configure the rule to react to all object create events for the existing S3 bucket. Define a new S3 bucket as the target for the rule. Create an EventBridge input transformation to customize the event before passing the event to the rule target.
contents.zh: 创建一条与默认 EventBridge event bus 关联的 Amazon EventBridge 规则。将该规则配置为响应现有 S3 存储桶的所有 object create events。将新的 S3 存储桶定义为该规则的目标。创建 EventBridge input transformation，在将事件传递给规则目标之前自定义事件。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream that is configured with an AWS Lambda transformer. Specify the existing S3 bucket as the destination. Change the Network Firewall logging destination from Amazon S3 to Kinesis Data Firehose.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream that is configured with an AWS Lambda transformer. Specify the existing S3 bucket as the destination. Change the Network Firewall logging destination from Amazon S3 to Kinesis Data Firehose.
contents.zh: 创建一个配置了 AWS Lambda transformer 的 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream。指定现有 S3 存储桶作为目标。将 Network Firewall logging destination 从 Amazon S3 更改为 Kinesis Data Firehose。

questions.explanation: ????? D?Kinesis Data Firehose ???? Network Firewall ????? Lambda transformer ???????????????????? S3 ????

explanations.zh: ????? D?Kinesis Data Firehose ???? Network Firewall ????? Lambda transformer ???????????????????? S3 ????
explanations.en: Correct answer: D. Kinesis Data Firehose can receive the Network Firewall logs, transform them with a Lambda transformer, and deliver the transformed records to the existing S3 bucket.

contents.en: A company sends its AWS Network Firewall flow logs to an Amazon S3 bucket. The company then analyzes the flow logs by using Amazon Athena. The company needs to transform the flow logs and add additional data before the flow logs are delivered to the existing S3 bucket. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司将其 AWS Network Firewall flow logs 发送到 Amazon S3 存储桶。然后，公司使用 Amazon Athena 分析这些 flow logs。公司需要在 flow logs 传送到现有 S3 存储桶之前对其进行转换并添加额外数据。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer needs to implement integration tests into an existing AWS CodePipeline CI/CD workflow for an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) service. The CI/CD workflow retrieves new application code from an AWS CodeCommit repository and builds a container image. The Cl/CD workflow then uploads the container image to Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) with a new image tag version. The integration tests must ensure that new versions of the service endpoint are reachable and that various API methods return successful response data. The DevOps engineer has already created an ECS cluster to test the service. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the LEAST management overhead? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Add a deploy stage to the pipeline. Configure Amazon ECS as the action provider.

contents.en: Add a deploy stage to the pipeline. Configure Amazon ECS as the action provider.
contents.zh: 向管道添加 deploy stage。将 Amazon ECS 配置为 action provider。

options.label: B
options.content: Add a deploy stage to the pipeline. Configure AWS CodeDeploy as the action provider.

contents.en: Add a deploy stage to the pipeline. Configure AWS CodeDeploy as the action provider.
contents.zh: 向管道添加 deploy stage。将 AWS CodeDeploy 配置为 action provider。

options.label: C
options.content: Add an appspec.yml file to the CodeCommit repository.

contents.en: Add an appspec.yml file to the CodeCommit repository.
contents.zh: 向 CodeCommit 存储库添加 appspec.yml 文件。

options.label: D
options.content: Update the image build pipeline stage to output an imagedefinitions.json file that references the new image tag.

contents.en: Update the image build pipeline stage to output an imagedefinitions.json file that references the new image tag.
contents.zh: 更新 image build pipeline stage，使其输出引用新 image tag 的 imagedefinitions.json 文件。

options.label: E
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function that runs connectivity checks and API calls against the service. Integrate the Lambda function with CodePipeline by using a Lambda action stage.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that runs connectivity checks and API calls against the service. Integrate the Lambda function with CodePipeline by using a Lambda action stage.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，对服务运行连接检查和 API 调用。通过使用 Lambda action stage 将该 Lambda 函数与 CodePipeline 集成。

options.label: F
options.content: Write a script that runs integration tests against the service. Upload the script to an Amazon S3 bucket. Integrate the script in the S3 bucket with CodePipeline by using an S3 action stage.

contents.en: Write a script that runs integration tests against the service. Upload the script to an Amazon S3 bucket. Integrate the script in the S3 bucket with CodePipeline by using an S3 action stage.
contents.zh: 编写一个对服务运行集成测试的脚本。将脚本上传到 Amazon S3 存储桶。通过使用 S3 action stage 将 S3 存储桶中的脚本与 CodePipeline 集成。

questions.explanation: ????? A?D?E?A ??? Amazon ECS ??????????D ????????????????? imagedefinitions.json?E ? Lambda ?????????? API ???

explanations.zh: ????? A?D?E?A ??? Amazon ECS ??????????D ????????????????? imagedefinitions.json?E ? Lambda ?????????? API ???
explanations.en: Correct answers: A, D, and E. A adds an Amazon ECS deployment stage, D has the image build stage output an imagedefinitions.json file that references the new image tag, and E uses a Lambda action stage for connectivity and API checks.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer needs to implement integration tests into an existing AWS CodePipeline CI/CD workflow for an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) service. The CI/CD workflow retrieves new application code from an AWS CodeCommit repository and builds a container image. The Cl/CD workflow then uploads the container image to Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) with a new image tag version. The integration tests must ensure that new versions of the service endpoint are reachable and that various API methods return successful response data. The DevOps engineer has already created an ECS cluster to test the service. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the LEAST management overhead? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师需要将集成测试实施到现有的 AWS CodePipeline CI/CD workflow 中，用于 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 服务。该 CI/CD workflow 从 AWS CodeCommit 存储库检索新的应用程序代码并构建容器镜像。然后，Cl/CD workflow 将容器镜像上传到 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR)，并使用新的 image tag version。集成测试必须确保服务端点的新版本可访问，并且各种 API 方法返回成功的响应数据。DevOps 工程师已经创建了一个 ECS 集群来测试该服务。哪种步骤组合可以以最少的管理开销满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company runs applications on Windows and Linux Amazon EC2 instances. The instances run across multiple Availability Zones in an AWS Region. The company uses Auto Scaling groups for each application. The company needs a durable storage solution for the instances. The solution must use SMB for Windows and must use NFS for Linux. The solution must also have sub-millisecond latencies. All instances will read and write the data. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system that has targets in multiple Availability Zones.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system that has targets in multiple Availability Zones.
contents.zh: 创建一个在多个 Availability Zones 中具有 targets 的 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP Multi-AZ file system.

contents.en: Create an Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP Multi-AZ file system.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP Multi-AZ file system。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a General Purpose SSD (gp3) Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume to use for shared storage.

contents.en: Create a General Purpose SSD (gp3) Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume to use for shared storage.
contents.zh: 创建一个 General Purpose SSD (gp3) Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume 作为共享存储。

options.label: D
options.content: Update the user data for each application's launch template to mount the file system.

contents.en: Update the user data for each application's launch template to mount the file system.
contents.zh: 更新每个应用程序 launch template 的 user data，以挂载 file system。

options.label: E
options.content: Perform an instance refresh on each Auto Scaling group.

contents.en: Perform an instance refresh on each Auto Scaling group.
contents.zh: 对每个 Auto Scaling group 执行 instance refresh。

options.label: F
options.content: Update the EC2 instances for each application to mount the file system when new instances are launched.

contents.en: Update the EC2 instances for each application to mount the file system when new instances are launched.
contents.zh: 更新每个应用程序的 EC2 实例，使其在新实例启动时挂载 file system。

explanations.en: Correct answers: B, D, and E. B provides a Multi-AZ FSx for NetApp ONTAP file system for SMB and NFS with low latency, D mounts it through each launch template user data, and E refreshes the Auto Scaling groups so existing instances receive the new configuration.

contents.en: A company runs applications on Windows and Linux Amazon EC2 instances. The instances run across multiple Availability Zones in an AWS Region. The company uses Auto Scaling groups for each application. The company needs a durable storage solution for the instances. The solution must use SMB for Windows and must use NFS for Linux. The solution must also have sub-millisecond latencies. All instances will read and write the data. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司在 Windows 和 Linux Amazon EC2 实例上运行应用程序。这些实例跨 AWS Region 中的多个 Availability Zones 运行。公司为每个应用程序使用 Auto Scaling groups。公司需要为这些实例提供持久存储解决方案。该解决方案必须为 Windows 使用 SMB，并且必须为 Linux 使用 NFS。该解决方案还必须具有亚毫秒级延迟。所有实例都将读写数据。哪种步骤组合可以满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations that a security team and a DevOps team manage. Both teams access the accounts by using AWS IAM Identity Center. A dedicated group has been created for each team. The DevOps team's group has been assigned a permission set named DevOps. The permission set has the AdministratorAccess managed IAM policy attached. The permission set has been applied to all accounts in the organization. The security team wants to ensure that the DevOps team does not have access to IAM Identity Center in the organization's management account. The security team has attached the following SCP to the organization root: After implementing the policy, the security team discovers that the DevOps team can still access IAM Identity Center. Which solution will fix the problem?

options.label: A
options.content: In the organization's management account, create a new OU. Move the organization's management account to the new OU. Detach the SCP from the organization root. Attach the SCP to the new OU.

contents.en: In the organization's management account, create a new OU. Move the organization's management account to the new OU. Detach the SCP from the organization root. Attach the SCP to the new OU.
contents.zh: 在组织的 management account 中，创建新的 OU。将组织的 management account 移动到新的 OU。将 SCP 从组织 root 分离。将 SCP 附加到新的 OU。

options.label: B
options.content: In the organization's management account, update the SCP condition reference to the ARN of the DevOps team's group role to include the AWS account ID of the organization's management account.

contents.en: In the organization's management account, update the SCP condition reference to the ARN of the DevOps team's group role to include the AWS account ID of the organization's management account.
contents.zh: 在组织的 management account 中，更新 SCP condition reference，使其引用 DevOps 团队 group role 的 ARN，并包含组织 management account 的 AWS account ID。

options.label: C
options.content: In IAM Identity Center, create a new permission set. Ensure that the assigned policy has full access but explicitly denies permission for the sso:* action and the sso-directory:* action. Update the assigned permission set for the DevOps team's group role in the organization's management account. Delete the SCP.

contents.en: In IAM Identity Center, create a new permission set. Ensure that the assigned policy has full access but explicitly denies permission for the sso:* action and the sso-directory:* action. Update the assigned permission set for the DevOps team's group role in the organization's management account. Delete the SCP.
contents.zh: 在 IAM Identity Center 中，创建新的 permission set。确保分配的策略具有完全访问权限，但显式拒绝 sso:* action 和 sso-directory:* action 的权限。更新组织 management account 中 DevOps 团队 group role 的已分配 permission set。删除 SCP。

options.label: D
options.content: In IAM Identity Center, update the DevOps permission set. Ensure that the assigned policy has full access but explicitly denies permission for the sso:* action and the sso-directory:* action. In the Deny statement, add a StringEquals condition that compares the aws:SourceAccount global condition context key with the organization's management account IDelete the SCP.

contents.en: In IAM Identity Center, update the DevOps permission set. Ensure that the assigned policy has full access but explicitly denies permission for the sso:* action and the sso-directory:* action. In the Deny statement, add a StringEquals condition that compares the aws:SourceAccount global condition context key with the organization's management account IDelete the SCP.
contents.zh: 在 IAM Identity Center 中，更新 DevOps permission set。确保分配的策略具有完全访问权限，但显式拒绝 sso:* action 和 sso-directory:* action 的权限。在 Deny statement 中，添加 StringEquals condition，将 aws:SourceAccount global condition context key 与组织的 management account IDelete the SCP 进行比较。

questions.explanation: ????? D????? IAM Identity Center ???????????????? sso:* ? sso-directory:*???? SourceAccount ??????????????????? SCP?

explanations.zh: ????? D????? IAM Identity Center ???????????????? sso:* ? sso-directory:*???? SourceAccount ??????????????????? SCP?
explanations.en: Correct answer: D. This approach keeps the needed access through an IAM Identity Center permission set while explicitly denying sso:* and sso-directory:* with a SourceAccount condition for the management account, then removes the unsuitable SCP.

contents.en: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations that a security team and a DevOps team manage. Both teams access the accounts by using AWS IAM Identity Center. A dedicated group has been created for each team. The DevOps team's group has been assigned a permission set named DevOps. The permission set has the AdministratorAccess managed IAM policy attached. The permission set has been applied to all accounts in the organization. The security team wants to ensure that the DevOps team does not have access to IAM Identity Center in the organization's management account. The security team has attached the following SCP to the organization root: After implementing the policy, the security team discovers that the DevOps team can still access IAM Identity Center. Which solution will fix the problem?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用由安全团队和 DevOps 团队管理的 AWS Organizations 中的组织。两个团队都使用 AWS IAM Identity Center 访问账户。每个团队都创建了专用组。DevOps 团队的组已分配名为 DevOps 的 permission set。该 permission set 附加了 AdministratorAccess managed IAM policy。该 permission set 已应用到组织中的所有账户。安全团队希望确保 DevOps 团队无法访问组织 management account 中的 IAM Identity Center。安全团队已将以下 SCP 附加到组织 root：实施该策略后，安全团队发现 DevOps 团队仍然可以访问 IAM Identity Center。哪种解决方案可以修复该问题？

questions.content: An Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group manages EC2 instances that were created from an AMI. The AMI has the AWS Systems Manager Agent installed. When an EC2 instance is launched into the Auto Scaling group, tags are applied to the EC2 instance. EC2 instances that are launched by the Auto Scaling group must have the correct operating system configuration. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a Systems Manager Run Command document that configures the desired instance configuration. Set up Systems Manager Compliance to invoke the Run Command document when the EC2 instances are not in compliance with the most recent patches.

contents.en: Create a Systems Manager Run Command document that configures the desired instance configuration. Set up Systems Manager Compliance to invoke the Run Command document when the EC2 instances are not in compliance with the most recent patches.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Systems Manager Run Command document，用于配置所需的实例配置。设置 Systems Manager Compliance，使其在 EC2 实例不符合最新补丁要求时调用 Run Command document。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a Systems Manager State Manager association that links to the Systems Manager command document. Create a tag query that runs immediately.

contents.en: Create a Systems Manager State Manager association that links to the Systems Manager command document. Create a tag query that runs immediately.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Systems Manager State Manager association，链接到 Systems Manager command document。创建一个立即运行的 tag query。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a Systems Manager Run Command task that specifies the desired instance configuration. Create a maintenance window in Systems Manager Maintenance Windows that runs daily. Register the Run Command task against the maintenance window. Designate the targets.

contents.en: Create a Systems Manager Run Command task that specifies the desired instance configuration. Create a maintenance window in Systems Manager Maintenance Windows that runs daily. Register the Run Command task against the maintenance window. Designate the targets.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Systems Manager Run Command task，指定所需的实例配置。在 Systems Manager Maintenance Windows 中创建一个每天运行的 maintenance window。将 Run Command task 注册到 maintenance window。指定 targets。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a Systems Manager Patch Manager patch baseline and a patch group that use the same tags that the Auto Scaling group applies. Register the patch group with the patch baseline. Define a Systems Manager command document to patch the instances Invoke the document by using Systems Manager Run Command.

contents.en: Create a Systems Manager Patch Manager patch baseline and a patch group that use the same tags that the Auto Scaling group applies. Register the patch group with the patch baseline. Define a Systems Manager command document to patch the instances Invoke the document by using Systems Manager Run Command.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Systems Manager Patch Manager patch baseline 和一个使用 Auto Scaling group 所应用相同 tags 的 patch group。将 patch group 注册到 patch baseline。定义一个 Systems Manager command document 来修补实例 Invoke the document by using Systems Manager Run Command。

questions.explanation: ????? B?Systems Manager State Manager association ?????????????????????????? Auto Scaling ??????????

explanations.zh: ????? B?Systems Manager State Manager association ?????????????????????????? Auto Scaling ??????????
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. A Systems Manager State Manager association can link to the command document and use an immediate tag query so the configuration is applied to newly launched, tagged Auto Scaling instances.

contents.en: An Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group manages EC2 instances that were created from an AMI. The AMI has the AWS Systems Manager Agent installed. When an EC2 instance is launched into the Auto Scaling group, tags are applied to the EC2 instance. EC2 instances that are launched by the Auto Scaling group must have the correct operating system configuration. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一个 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group 管理从 AMI 创建的 EC2 实例。该 AMI 已安装 AWS Systems Manager Agent。当 EC2 实例启动到 Auto Scaling group 中时，会将 tags 应用于该 EC2 实例。由 Auto Scaling group 启动的 EC2 实例必须具有正确的操作系统配置。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses AWS Organizations to manage its AWS accounts. The organization root has a child OU that is named Department. The Department OU has a child OU that is named Engineering. The default FullAWSAccess policy is attached to the root, the Department OU, and the Engineering OU. The company has many AWS accounts in the Engineering OU. Each account has an administrative IAM role with the AdministratorAccess IAM policy attached. The default FullAWSAccessPolicy is also attached to each account. A DevOps engineer plans to remove the FullAWSAccess policy from the Department OU. The DevOps engineer will replace the policy with a policy that contains an Allow statement for all Amazon EC2 API operations. What will happen to the permissions of the administrative 1AM roles as a result of this change?

options.label: A
options.content: All API actions on all resources will be allowed.

contents.en: All API actions on all resources will be allowed.
contents.zh: 将允许对所有资源执行所有 API actions。

options.label: B
options.content: All API actions on EC2 resources will be allowed. All other API actions will be denied.

contents.en: All API actions on EC2 resources will be allowed. All other API actions will be denied.
contents.zh: 将允许对 EC2 resources 执行所有 API actions。所有其他 API actions 将被拒绝。

options.label: C
options.content: All API actions on all resources will be denied.

contents.en: All API actions on all resources will be denied.
contents.zh: 将拒绝对所有资源执行所有 API actions。

options.label: D
options.content: All API actions on EC2 resources will be denied. All other API actions will be allowed.

contents.en: All API actions on EC2 resources will be denied. All other API actions will be allowed.
contents.zh: 将拒绝对 EC2 resources 执行所有 API actions。所有其他 API actions 将被允许。

explanations.en: Correct answer: B. Based on the SCP evaluation logic cited in the discussion, API actions on EC2 resources are allowed while other API actions are denied.

contents.en: A company uses AWS Organizations to manage its AWS accounts. The organization root has a child OU that is named Department. The Department OU has a child OU that is named Engineering. The default FullAWSAccess policy is attached to the root, the Department OU, and the Engineering OU. The company has many AWS accounts in the Engineering OU. Each account has an administrative IAM role with the AdministratorAccess IAM policy attached. The default FullAWSAccessPolicy is also attached to each account. A DevOps engineer plans to remove the FullAWSAccess policy from the Department OU. The DevOps engineer will replace the policy with a policy that contains an Allow statement for all Amazon EC2 API operations. What will happen to the permissions of the administrative 1AM roles as a result of this change?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations 管理其 AWS 账户。组织 root 有一个名为 Department 的子 OU。Department OU 有一个名为 Engineering 的子 OU。默认 FullAWSAccess policy 附加到 root、Department OU 和 Engineering OU。公司在 Engineering OU 中有许多 AWS 账户。每个账户都有一个附加了 AdministratorAccess IAM policy 的 administrative IAM role。默认 FullAWSAccessPolicy 也附加到每个账户。一名 DevOps 工程师计划从 Department OU 移除 FullAWSAccess policy。DevOps 工程师将用一项包含允许所有 Amazon EC2 API 操作的 Allow statement 的策略替换该策略。此更改将导致 administrative 1AM roles 的权限发生什么变化？

questions.content: A company manages AWS accounts in AWS Organizations. The company needs a solution to send Amazon CloudWatch Logs data to an Amazon S3 bucket in a dedicated AWS account. The solution must support all existing and future CloudWatch Logs log groups. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Enable Organizations backup policies to back up all log groups to a dedicated S3 bucket. Add an S3 bucket policy that allows access from all accounts that belong to the company.

contents.en: Enable Organizations backup policies to back up all log groups to a dedicated S3 bucket. Add an S3 bucket policy that allows access from all accounts that belong to the company.
contents.zh: 启用 Organizations backup policies，将所有 log groups 备份到专用 S3 存储桶。添加 S3 bucket policy，允许属于公司的所有账户访问。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a backup plan in AWS Backup. Specify a dedicated S3 bucket as a backup vault. Assign all CloudWatch Logs log group resources to the backup plan. Create resource assignments in the backup plan for all accounts that belong to the company.

contents.en: Create a backup plan in AWS Backup. Specify a dedicated S3 bucket as a backup vault. Assign all CloudWatch Logs log group resources to the backup plan. Create resource assignments in the backup plan for all accounts that belong to the company.
contents.zh: 在 AWS Backup 中创建 backup plan。指定专用 S3 存储桶作为 backup vault。将所有 CloudWatch Logs log group resources 分配给 backup plan。在 backup plan 中为属于公司的所有账户创建 resource assignments。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a backup plan in AWS Backup. Specify a dedicated S3 bucket as a backup vault. Assign all existing log groups to the backup plan. Create resource assignments in the backup plan for all accounts that belong to the company. Create an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to assign log groups to a backup plan. Create an AWS Config rule that has an automatic remediation action for all noncompliant log groups. Specify the runbook as the rule's target.

contents.en: Create a backup plan in AWS Backup. Specify a dedicated S3 bucket as a backup vault. Assign all existing log groups to the backup plan. Create resource assignments in the backup plan for all accounts that belong to the company. Create an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to assign log groups to a backup plan. Create an AWS Config rule that has an automatic remediation action for all noncompliant log groups. Specify the runbook as the rule's target.
contents.zh: 在 AWS Backup 中创建 backup plan。指定专用 S3 存储桶作为 backup vault。将所有现有 log groups 分配给 backup plan。在 backup plan 中为属于公司的所有账户创建 resource assignments。创建 AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook，用于将 log groups 分配给 backup plan。创建带有 automatic remediation action 的 AWS Config rule，用于所有不合规的 log groups。将 runbook 指定为该规则的目标。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a CloudWatch Logs destination and an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream in the dedicated AWS account. Specify the S3 bucket as the destination of the delivery stream. Create subscription filters for all existing log groups in all accounts. Create an AWS Lambda function to call the CloudWatch Logs PutSubscriptionFilter API operation. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function when a CreateLogGroup event occurs.

contents.en: Create a CloudWatch Logs destination and an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream in the dedicated AWS account. Specify the S3 bucket as the destination of the delivery stream. Create subscription filters for all existing log groups in all accounts. Create an AWS Lambda function to call the CloudWatch Logs PutSubscriptionFilter API operation. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function when a CreateLogGroup event occurs.
contents.zh: 在专用 AWS 账户中创建 CloudWatch Logs destination 和 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream。指定 S3 存储桶作为 delivery stream 的目标。为所有账户中的所有现有 log groups 创建 subscription filters。创建 AWS Lambda 函数来调用 CloudWatch Logs PutSubscriptionFilter API operation。创建一条 Amazon EventBridge 规则，在 CreateLogGroup event 发生时调用该 Lambda 函数。

questions.explanation: ????? D?CloudWatch Logs destination ? Kinesis Data Firehose ???????????????? S3??????????????????? EventBridge ?? Lambda ?? PutSubscriptionFilter ?????

explanations.zh: ????? D?CloudWatch Logs destination ? Kinesis Data Firehose ???????????????? S3??????????????????? EventBridge ?? Lambda ?? PutSubscriptionFilter ?????
explanations.en: Correct answer: D. A CloudWatch Logs destination and Kinesis Data Firehose centralize logs into the dedicated account S3 bucket; existing log groups use subscription filters, and EventBridge invokes Lambda to call PutSubscriptionFilter for newly created log groups.

contents.en: A company manages AWS accounts in AWS Organizations. The company needs a solution to send Amazon CloudWatch Logs data to an Amazon S3 bucket in a dedicated AWS account. The solution must support all existing and future CloudWatch Logs log groups. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 AWS Organizations 中管理 AWS 账户。公司需要一种解决方案，将 Amazon CloudWatch Logs data 发送到专用 AWS 账户中的 Amazon S3 存储桶。该解决方案必须支持所有现有和未来的 CloudWatch Logs log groups。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer manages a Java-based application that runs in an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster on AWS Fargate. Auto scaling has not been configured for the application. The DevOps engineer has determined that the Java Virtual Machine (JVM) thread count is a good indicator of when to scale the application. The application serves customer traffic on port 8080 and makes JVM metrics available on port 9404. Application use has recently increased. The DevOps engineer needs to configure auto scaling for the application. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Deploy the Amazon CloudWatch agent as a container sidecar. Configure the CloudWatch agent to retrieve JVM metrics from port 9404. Create CloudWatch alarms on the JVM thread count metric to scale the application. Add a step scaling policy in Fargate to scale up and scale down based on the CloudWatch alarms.

contents.en: Deploy the Amazon CloudWatch agent as a container sidecar. Configure the CloudWatch agent to retrieve JVM metrics from port 9404. Create CloudWatch alarms on the JVM thread count metric to scale the application. Add a step scaling policy in Fargate to scale up and scale down based on the CloudWatch alarms.
contents.zh: 将 Amazon CloudWatch agent 部署为 container sidecar。配置 CloudWatch agent 从端口 9404 检索 JVM 指标。在 JVM thread count metric 上创建 CloudWatch alarms 以扩展应用程序。在 Fargate 中添加 step scaling policy，以基于 CloudWatch alarms 扩展和缩减。

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy the Amazon CloudWatch agent as a container sidecar. Configure a metric filter for the JVM thread count metric on the CloudWatch log group for the CloudWatch agent. Add a target tracking policy in Fargate. Select the metric from the metric filter as a scale target.

contents.en: Deploy the Amazon CloudWatch agent as a container sidecar. Configure a metric filter for the JVM thread count metric on the CloudWatch log group for the CloudWatch agent. Add a target tracking policy in Fargate. Select the metric from the metric filter as a scale target.
contents.zh: 将 Amazon CloudWatch agent 部署为 container sidecar。为 CloudWatch agent 的 CloudWatch log group 上的 JVM thread count metric 配置 metric filter。在 Fargate 中添加 target tracking policy。选择 metric filter 中的指标作为 scale target。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus workspace. Deploy AWS Distro for OpenTelemetry as a container sidecar to publish the JVM metrics from port 9404 to the Prometheus workspace. Configure rules for the workspace to use the JVM thread count metric to scale the application. Add a step scaling policy in Fargate. Select the Prometheus rules to scale up and scaling down.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus workspace. Deploy AWS Distro for OpenTelemetry as a container sidecar to publish the JVM metrics from port 9404 to the Prometheus workspace. Configure rules for the workspace to use the JVM thread count metric to scale the application. Add a step scaling policy in Fargate. Select the Prometheus rules to scale up and scaling down.
contents.zh: 创建 Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus workspace。将 AWS Distro for OpenTelemetry 部署为 container sidecar，以将端口 9404 的 JVM 指标发布到 Prometheus workspace。为该 workspace 配置 rules，以使用 JVM thread count metric 扩展应用程序。在 Fargate 中添加 step scaling policy。选择 Prometheus rules 来扩展和缩减。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus workspace. Deploy AWS Distro for OpenTelemetry as a container sidecar to retrieve JVM metrics from port 9404 to publish the JVM metrics from port 9404 to the Prometheus workspace. Add a target tracking policy in Fargate. Select the Prometheus metric as a scale target.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus workspace. Deploy AWS Distro for OpenTelemetry as a container sidecar to retrieve JVM metrics from port 9404 to publish the JVM metrics from port 9404 to the Prometheus workspace. Add a target tracking policy in Fargate. Select the Prometheus metric as a scale target.
contents.zh: 创建 Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus workspace。将 AWS Distro for OpenTelemetry 部署为 container sidecar，以从端口 9404 检索 JVM 指标并将端口 9404 的 JVM 指标发布到 Prometheus workspace。在 Fargate 中添加 target tracking policy。选择 Prometheus metric 作为 scale target。

questions.explanation: ????? A?D?A ? CloudWatch agent sidecar ? 9404 ???? JVM ????? CloudWatch ???? Fargate step scaling?D ? ADOT sidecar ??? Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus??? Prometheus ???????????

explanations.zh: ????? A?D?A ? CloudWatch agent sidecar ? 9404 ???? JVM ????? CloudWatch ???? Fargate step scaling?D ? ADOT sidecar ??? Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus??? Prometheus ???????????
explanations.en: Correct answers: A and D. A uses a CloudWatch agent sidecar to scrape JVM metrics from port 9404 and drive Fargate step scaling through CloudWatch alarms. D uses an ADOT sidecar to publish metrics to Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus and scale with a Prometheus metric target.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer manages a Java-based application that runs in an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster on AWS Fargate. Auto scaling has not been configured for the application. The DevOps engineer has determined that the Java Virtual Machine (JVM) thread count is a good indicator of when to scale the application. The application serves customer traffic on port 8080 and makes JVM metrics available on port 9404. Application use has recently increased. The DevOps engineer needs to configure auto scaling for the application. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师管理一个基于 Java 的应用程序，该应用程序在 AWS Fargate 上的 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 集群中运行。尚未为该应用程序配置 auto scaling。DevOps 工程师已确定 Java Virtual Machine (JVM) thread count 是何时扩展应用程序的良好指标。该应用程序在端口 8080 上提供客户流量，并在端口 9404 上提供 JVM 指标。应用程序使用量最近有所增加。DevOps 工程师需要为该应用程序配置 auto scaling。哪种解决方案可以以最少的运营开销满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company has an application that runs in a single AWS Region. The application runs on an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster and connects to an Amazon Aurora MySQL cluster. The application is built in an AWS CodeBuild project. The container images are published to Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR). The company needs to replicate the state of the application for the container images and the database to a second Region. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient way?

options.label: A
options.content: Turn on Amazon S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR) on the bucket that holds the ECR container images.
