Deploy the application to an EKS cluster in the second Region by referencing the new S3 bucket object URL for the container image in a Kubernetes deployment file. Configure a cross-Region Aurora Replica in the second Region. Configure the new application deployment to use the endpoints for the cross-Region Aurora Replica.

contents.en: Turn on Amazon S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR) on the bucket that holds the ECR container images. Deploy the application to an EKS cluster in the second Region by referencing the new S3 bucket object URL for the container image in a Kubernetes deployment file. Configure a cross-Region Aurora Replica in the second Region. Configure the new application deployment to use the endpoints for the cross-Region Aurora Replica.
contents.zh: 在保存 ECR 容器镜像的存储桶上开启 Amazon S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR)。通过在 Kubernetes deployment file 中引用容器镜像的新 S3 bucket object URL，将应用程序部署到第二个 Region 中的 EKS 集群。配置第二个 Region 中的 cross-Region Aurora Replica。配置新的应用程序部署使用 cross-Region Aurora Replica 的端点。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to image pushes to the ECR repository. Configure the EventBridge rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function to replicate the image to a new ECR repository in the second Region. Deploy the application to an EKS cluster in the second Region by referencing the new ECR repository in a Kubernetes deployment file. Configure a cross-Region Aurora Replica in the second Region. Configure the new application deployment to use the endpoints for the cross-Region Aurora Replica.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to image pushes to the ECR repository. Configure the EventBridge rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function to replicate the image to a new ECR repository in the second Region. Deploy the application to an EKS cluster in the second Region by referencing the new ECR repository in a Kubernetes deployment file. Configure a cross-Region Aurora Replica in the second Region. Configure the new application deployment to use the endpoints for the cross-Region Aurora Replica.
contents.zh: 创建一条 Amazon EventBridge 规则来响应推送到 ECR repository 的镜像。配置 EventBridge 规则调用 AWS Lambda 函数，将镜像复制到第二个 Region 中的新 ECR repository。通过在 Kubernetes deployment file 中引用新的 ECR repository，将应用程序部署到第二个 Region 中的 EKS 集群。配置第二个 Region 中的 cross-Region Aurora Replica。配置新的应用程序部署使用 cross-Region Aurora Replica 的端点。

options.label: C
options.content: Turn on Cross-Region Replication to replicate the ECR repository to the second Region. Deploy the application to an EKS cluster in the second Region by referencing the new ECR repository in a Kubernetes deployment file. Configure an Aurora global database with clusters in the initial Region and the second Region. Configure the new application deployment to use the endpoints for the second Region's cluster in the Aurora global database.

contents.en: Turn on Cross-Region Replication to replicate the ECR repository to the second Region. Deploy the application to an EKS cluster in the second Region by referencing the new ECR repository in a Kubernetes deployment file. Configure an Aurora global database with clusters in the initial Region and the second Region. Configure the new application deployment to use the endpoints for the second Region's cluster in the Aurora global database.
contents.zh: 开启 Cross-Region Replication，将 ECR repository 复制到第二个 Region。通过在 Kubernetes deployment file 中引用新的 ECR repository，将应用程序部署到第二个 Region 中的 EKS 集群。配置一个 Aurora global database，其中包含初始 Region 和第二个 Region 中的集群。配置新的应用程序部署使用 Aurora global database 中第二个 Region 集群的端点。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure the CodeBuild project to also push the container image to an ECR repository in the second Region. Deploy the application to an EKS cluster in the second Region by referencing the new ECR repository in a Kubernetes deployment file. Configure an Aurora MySQL cluster in the second Region as the target for binary log replication from the Aurora MySQL cluster in the initial Region. Configure the new application deployment to use the endpoints for the second Region's cluster.

contents.en: Configure the CodeBuild project to also push the container image to an ECR repository in the second Region. Deploy the application to an EKS cluster in the second Region by referencing the new ECR repository in a Kubernetes deployment file. Configure an Aurora MySQL cluster in the second Region as the target for binary log replication from the Aurora MySQL cluster in the initial Region. Configure the new application deployment to use the endpoints for the second Region's cluster.
contents.zh: 配置 CodeBuild 项目也将容器镜像推送到第二个 Region 中的 ECR repository。通过在 Kubernetes deployment file 中引用新的 ECR repository，将应用程序部署到第二个 Region 中的 EKS 集群。将第二个 Region 中的 Aurora MySQL 集群配置为从初始 Region 中 Aurora MySQL 集群进行 binary log replication 的目标。配置新的应用程序部署使用第二个 Region 集群的端点。

explanations.en: Correct answer: C. The discussion supports ECR cross-Region replication; this option also deploys the application to EKS in the second Region and points it to the Aurora global database cluster endpoint in that Region.

contents.en: A company has an application that runs in a single AWS Region. The application runs on an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster and connects to an Amazon Aurora MySQL cluster. The application is built in an AWS CodeBuild project. The container images are published to Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR). The company needs to replicate the state of the application for the container images and the database to a second Region. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient way?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个在单个 AWS Region 中运行的应用程序。该应用程序运行在 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 集群上，并连接到 Amazon Aurora MySQL 集群。该应用程序在 AWS CodeBuild 项目中构建。容器镜像发布到 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR)。公司需要将应用程序的容器镜像和数据库状态复制到第二个 Region。哪种解决方案能以最具运营效率的方式满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company is building a serverless application that uses AWS Lambda functions to process data. A BeginResponse Lambda function initializes data in response to specific application events. The company needs to ensure that a large number of Lambda functions are invoked after the BeginResponse Lambda function runs. Each Lambda function must be invoked in parallel and depends on only the outputs of the BeginResponse Lambda function. Each Lambda function has retry logic for invocation and must be able to fine-tune concurrency without losing data. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Modify the BeginResponse Lambda function to publish to the SNS topic before the BeginResponse Lambda function finishes running. Subscribe all Lambda functions that need to invoke after the BeginResponse Lambda function runs to the SNS topic. Subscribe any new Lambda functions to the SNS topic.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Modify the BeginResponse Lambda function to publish to the SNS topic before the BeginResponse Lambda function finishes running. Subscribe all Lambda functions that need to invoke after the BeginResponse Lambda function runs to the SNS topic. Subscribe any new Lambda functions to the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。修改 BeginResponse Lambda 函数，使其在 BeginResponse Lambda 函数完成运行之前发布到 SNS 主题。将所有需要在 BeginResponse Lambda 函数运行后调用的 Lambda 函数订阅到 SNS 主题。将任何新的 Lambda 函数订阅到 SNS 主题。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue for each Lambda function that needs to run after the BeginResponse Lambda function runs. Subscribe each Lambda function to its own SQS queue. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe each SQS queue to the SNS topic. Modify the BeginResponse function to publish to the SNS topic when it finishes running.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue for each Lambda function that needs to run after the BeginResponse Lambda function runs. Subscribe each Lambda function to its own SQS queue. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe each SQS queue to the SNS topic. Modify the BeginResponse function to publish to the SNS topic when it finishes running.
contents.zh: 为每个需要在 BeginResponse Lambda 函数运行后运行的 Lambda 函数创建一个 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列。将每个 Lambda 函数订阅到自己的 SQS 队列。创建一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。将每个 SQS 队列订阅到 SNS 主题。修改 BeginResponse 函数，使其在完成运行时发布到 SNS 主题。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue for each Lambda function that needs to run after the BeginResponse Lambda function runs. Subscribe the Lambda function to the SQS queue. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic for each SQS queue. Subscribe the SQS queues to the SNS topics. Modify the BeginResponse function to publish to the SNS topics when the function finishes running.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue for each Lambda function that needs to run after the BeginResponse Lambda function runs. Subscribe the Lambda function to the SQS queue. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic for each SQS queue. Subscribe the SQS queues to the SNS topics. Modify the BeginResponse function to publish to the SNS topics when the function finishes running.
contents.zh: 为每个需要在 BeginResponse Lambda 函数运行后运行的 Lambda 函数创建一个 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列。将 Lambda 函数订阅到 SQS 队列。为每个 SQS 队列创建一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。将 SQS 队列订阅到 SNS 主题。修改 BeginResponse 函数，使其在函数完成运行时发布到 SNS 主题。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS Step Functions Standard Workflow. Configure states in the workflow to invoke the Lambda functions sequentially. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Modify the BeginResponse Lambda function to publish to the SNS topic before the Lambda function finishes running. Create a new Lambda function that is subscribed to the SNS topic and that invokes the Step Functions workflow.

contents.en: Create an AWS Step Functions Standard Workflow. Configure states in the workflow to invoke the Lambda functions sequentially. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Modify the BeginResponse Lambda function to publish to the SNS topic before the Lambda function finishes running. Create a new Lambda function that is subscribed to the SNS topic and that invokes the Step Functions workflow.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Step Functions Standard Workflow。配置 workflow 中的 states 以顺序调用 Lambda 函数。创建一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。修改 BeginResponse Lambda 函数，使其在 Lambda 函数完成运行之前发布到 SNS 主题。创建一个新的 Lambda 函数，该函数订阅到 SNS 主题并调用 Step Functions workflow。

questions.explanation: ????? B????????? fan-out?BeginResponse ?????? SNS topic????? Lambda ??????? topic ? SQS ??????

explanations.zh: ????? B????????? fan-out?BeginResponse ?????? SNS topic????? Lambda ??????? topic ? SQS ??????
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. The discussion points to fan-out: when BeginResponse finishes, it publishes to an SNS topic, and each downstream Lambda is triggered through its own SQS queue subscribed to that topic.

contents.en: A company is building a serverless application that uses AWS Lambda functions to process data. A BeginResponse Lambda function initializes data in response to specific application events. The company needs to ensure that a large number of Lambda functions are invoked after the BeginResponse Lambda function runs. Each Lambda function must be invoked in parallel and depends on only the outputs of the BeginResponse Lambda function. Each Lambda function has retry logic for invocation and must be able to fine-tune concurrency without losing data. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在构建一个使用 AWS Lambda 函数处理数据的无服务器应用程序。BeginResponse Lambda 函数响应特定应用程序事件初始化数据。公司需要确保在 BeginResponse Lambda 函数运行后调用大量 Lambda 函数。每个 Lambda 函数都必须并行调用，并且仅依赖 BeginResponse Lambda 函数的输出。每个 Lambda 函数都具有调用重试逻辑，并且必须能够在不丢失数据的情况下微调并发。哪种解决方案可以以最高运营效率满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company operates a globally deployed product out of multiple AWS Regions. The company's DevOps team needs to use Amazon API Gateway to deploy an API to support the product. The API must be deployed redundantly. The deployment must provide independent availability from each company location. The deployment also must respond to a custom domain URL and must optimize performance for the API user requests. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Deploy an API Gateway edge-optimized API endpoint in the us-east-1 Region. Create an API Gateway custom domain for the API. Create an Amazon Route 53 record set with a geoproximity routing policy for the API's custom domain. Increase the geographic bias to the maximum allowed value.

contents.en: Deploy an API Gateway edge-optimized API endpoint in the us-east-1 Region. Create an API Gateway custom domain for the API. Create an Amazon Route 53 record set with a geoproximity routing policy for the API's custom domain. Increase the geographic bias to the maximum allowed value.
contents.zh: 在 us-east-1 Region 中部署 API Gateway edge-optimized API endpoint。为该 API 创建 API Gateway custom domain。为 API 的 custom domain 创建一个具有 geoproximity routing policy 的 Amazon Route 53 record set。将 geographic bias 增加到允许的最大值。

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy an API Gateway regional API endpoint in the us-east-1 Region. Integrate the API Gateway API with a public Application Load Balancer (ALB). Create an AWS Global Accelerator standard accelerator. Associate the endpoint with the ALCreate an Amazon Route 53 alias record set that points the custom domain name to the DNS name that is assigned to the accelerator.

contents.en: Deploy an API Gateway regional API endpoint in the us-east-1 Region. Integrate the API Gateway API with a public Application Load Balancer (ALB). Create an AWS Global Accelerator standard accelerator. Associate the endpoint with the ALCreate an Amazon Route 53 alias record set that points the custom domain name to the DNS name that is assigned to the accelerator.
contents.zh: 在 us-east-1 Region 中部署 API Gateway regional API endpoint。将 API Gateway API 与 public Application Load Balancer (ALB) 集成。创建 AWS Global Accelerator standard accelerator。将 endpoint 与 ALCreate an Amazon Route 53 alias record set 关联，该记录集指向分配给 accelerator 的 DNS name。

options.label: C
options.content: Deploy an API Gateway regional API endpoint in every AWS Region where the company's product is deployed. Create an API Gateway custom domain in each Region for the deployed API Gateway API. Create an Amazon Route 53 record set that has a latency routing policy for every deployed API Gateway custom domain.

contents.en: Deploy an API Gateway regional API endpoint in every AWS Region where the company's product is deployed. Create an API Gateway custom domain in each Region for the deployed API Gateway API. Create an Amazon Route 53 record set that has a latency routing policy for every deployed API Gateway custom domain.
contents.zh: 在公司产品部署所在的每个 AWS Region 中部署 API Gateway regional API endpoint。为每个 Region 中已部署的 API Gateway API 创建 API Gateway custom domain。为每个已部署的 API Gateway custom domain 创建具有 latency routing policy 的 Amazon Route 53 record set。

options.label: D
options.content: Deploy an API Gateway edge-optimized API endpoint in the us-east-1 Region. Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution. Configure the CloudFront distribution with an alternate domain name. Specify the API Gateway Invoke URL as the origin domain. Create an Amazon Route 53 alias record set with a simple routing policy. Point the routing policy to the CloudFront distribution domain name.

contents.en: Deploy an API Gateway edge-optimized API endpoint in the us-east-1 Region. Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution. Configure the CloudFront distribution with an alternate domain name. Specify the API Gateway Invoke URL as the origin domain. Create an Amazon Route 53 alias record set with a simple routing policy. Point the routing policy to the CloudFront distribution domain name.
contents.zh: 在 us-east-1 Region 中部署 API Gateway edge-optimized API endpoint。创建 Amazon CloudFront distribution。使用 alternate domain name 配置 CloudFront distribution。将 API Gateway Invoke URL 指定为 origin domain。创建一个使用 simple routing policy 的 Amazon Route 53 alias record set。将 routing policy 指向 CloudFront distribution domain name。

questions.explanation: ????? C??????? API Gateway regional API endpoint ????????? Route 53 latency routing ????????????????

explanations.zh: ????? C??????? API Gateway regional API endpoint ????????? Route 53 latency routing ????????????????
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. Deploying regional API Gateway endpoints and custom domains in each Region, then using Route 53 latency-based routing, sends users to the nearest deployed API endpoint.

contents.en: A company operates a globally deployed product out of multiple AWS Regions. The company's DevOps team needs to use Amazon API Gateway to deploy an API to support the product. The API must be deployed redundantly. The deployment must provide independent availability from each company location. The deployment also must respond to a custom domain URL and must optimize performance for the API user requests. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司在多个 AWS Regions 中运营一个全球部署的产品。公司的 DevOps 团队需要使用 Amazon API Gateway 部署 API 来支持该产品。API 必须冗余部署。该部署必须从每个公司位置提供独立可用性。该部署还必须响应自定义域 URL，并且必须优化 API 用户请求的性能。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer uses AWS CodeBuild to frequently produce software packages. The CodeBuild project builds large Docker images that the DevOps engineer can use across multiple builds. The DevOps engineer wants to improve build performance and minimize costs. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Store the Docker images in an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository. Implement a local Docker layer cache for CodeBuild.

contents.en: Store the Docker images in an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository. Implement a local Docker layer cache for CodeBuild.
contents.zh: 将 Docker 镜像存储在 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository 中。为 CodeBuild 实施 local Docker layer cache。

options.label: B
options.content: Cache the Docker images in an Amazon S3 bucket that is available across multiple build hosts. Expire the cache by using an S3 Lifecycle policy.

contents.en: Cache the Docker images in an Amazon S3 bucket that is available across multiple build hosts. Expire the cache by using an S3 Lifecycle policy.
contents.zh: 将 Docker 镜像缓存在可跨多个 build hosts 使用的 Amazon S3 存储桶中。使用 S3 Lifecycle policy 使缓存过期。

options.label: C
options.content: Store the Docker images in an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository. Modify the CodeBuild project runtime configuration to always use the most recent image version.

contents.en: Store the Docker images in an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository. Modify the CodeBuild project runtime configuration to always use the most recent image version.
contents.zh: 将 Docker 镜像存储在 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository 中。修改 CodeBuild project runtime configuration，使其始终使用最新的 image version。

options.label: D
options.content: Create custom AMIs that contain the cached Docker images. In the CodeBuild build, launch Amazon EC2 instances from the custom AMIs.

contents.en: Create custom AMIs that contain the cached Docker images. In the CodeBuild build, launch Amazon EC2 instances from the custom AMIs.
contents.zh: 创建包含缓存 Docker 镜像的 custom AMIs。在 CodeBuild 构建中，从 custom AMIs 启动 Amazon EC2 实例。

questions.explanation: ????? A?? Docker ????? Amazon ECR??? CodeBuild ????? Docker layer cache??????????????????????

explanations.zh: ????? A?? Docker ????? Amazon ECR??? CodeBuild ????? Docker layer cache??????????????????????
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. Storing Docker images in Amazon ECR and using a local Docker layer cache in CodeBuild lets unchanged layers be reused, reducing repeated build time.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer uses AWS CodeBuild to frequently produce software packages. The CodeBuild project builds large Docker images that the DevOps engineer can use across multiple builds. The DevOps engineer wants to improve build performance and minimize costs. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师使用 AWS CodeBuild 频繁生成软件包。CodeBuild 项目构建大型 Docker 镜像，DevOps 工程师可在多个构建中使用这些镜像。DevOps 工程师希望提高构建性能并最大限度降低成本。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A large company recently acquired a small company. The large company invited the small company to join the large company's existing organization in AWS Organizations as a new OU. A DevOps engineer determines that the small company needs to launch t3.small Amazon EC2 instance types for the company's application workloads. The small company needs to deploy the instances only within US-based AWS Regions. The DevOps engineer needs to use an SCP in the small company's new OU to ensure that the small company can launch only the required instance types. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure a statement to deny the ec2:RunInstances action for all EC2 instance resources when the ec2:InstanceType condition is not equal to t3.small. Configure another statement to deny the ec2:RunInstances action for all EC2 instance resources when the aws:RequestedRegion condition is not equal to us-*.

contents.en: Configure a statement to deny the ec2:RunInstances action for all EC2 instance resources when the ec2:InstanceType condition is not equal to t3.small. Configure another statement to deny the ec2:RunInstances action for all EC2 instance resources when the aws:RequestedRegion condition is not equal to us-*.
contents.zh: 配置一条 statement，当 ec2:InstanceType condition 不等于 t3.small 时，拒绝对所有 EC2 instance resources 执行 ec2:RunInstances action。配置另一条 statement，当 aws:RequestedRegion condition 不等于 us-* 时，拒绝对所有 EC2 instance resources 执行 ec2:RunInstances action。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure a statement to allow the ec2:RunInstances action for all EC2 instance resources when the ec2:InstanceType condition is not equal to t3.small. Configure another statement to allow the ec2:RunInstances action for all EC2 instance resources when the aws:RequestedRegion condition is not equal to us-*.

contents.en: Configure a statement to allow the ec2:RunInstances action for all EC2 instance resources when the ec2:InstanceType condition is not equal to t3.small. Configure another statement to allow the ec2:RunInstances action for all EC2 instance resources when the aws:RequestedRegion condition is not equal to us-*.
contents.zh: 配置一条 statement，当 ec2:InstanceType condition 不等于 t3.small 时，允许对所有 EC2 instance resources 执行 ec2:RunInstances action。配置另一条 statement，当 aws:RequestedRegion condition 不等于 us-* 时，允许对所有 EC2 instance resources 执行 ec2:RunInstances action。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure a statement to deny the ec2:RunInstances action for all EC2 instance resources when the ec2:InstanceType condition is equal to t3.small. Configure another statement to deny the ec2:RunInstances action for all EC2 instance resources when the aws:RequestedRegion condition is equal to us-*.

contents.en: Configure a statement to deny the ec2:RunInstances action for all EC2 instance resources when the ec2:InstanceType condition is equal to t3.small. Configure another statement to deny the ec2:RunInstances action for all EC2 instance resources when the aws:RequestedRegion condition is equal to us-*.
contents.zh: 配置一条 statement，当 ec2:InstanceType condition 等于 t3.small 时，拒绝对所有 EC2 instance resources 执行 ec2:RunInstances action。配置另一条 statement，当 aws:RequestedRegion condition 等于 us-* 时，拒绝对所有 EC2 instance resources 执行 ec2:RunInstances action。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure a statement to allow the ec2:RunInstances action for all EC2 instance resources when the ec2:InstanceType condition is equal to t3.small. Configure another statement to allow the ec2:RunInstances action for all EC2 instance resources when the aws:RequestedRegion condition is equal to us-*.

contents.en: Configure a statement to allow the ec2:RunInstances action for all EC2 instance resources when the ec2:InstanceType condition is equal to t3.small. Configure another statement to allow the ec2:RunInstances action for all EC2 instance resources when the aws:RequestedRegion condition is equal to us-*.
contents.zh: 配置一条 statement，当 ec2:InstanceType condition 等于 t3.small 时，允许对所有 EC2 instance resources 执行 ec2:RunInstances action。配置另一条 statement，当 aws:RequestedRegion condition 等于 us-* 时，允许对所有 EC2 instance resources 执行 ec2:RunInstances action。

questions.explanation: ????? A????? SCP ? Allow ????? Condition?????? Deny ???? ec2:RunInstances???????? t3.small??????? us-*?

explanations.zh: ????? A????? SCP ? Allow ????? Condition?????? Deny ???? ec2:RunInstances???????? t3.small??????? us-*?
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. The discussion notes that SCP Allow statements cannot include conditions, so the control should use Deny conditions on ec2:RunInstances to require t3.small and Regions matching us-*.

contents.en: A large company recently acquired a small company. The large company invited the small company to join the large company's existing organization in AWS Organizations as a new OU. A DevOps engineer determines that the small company needs to launch t3.small Amazon EC2 instance types for the company's application workloads. The small company needs to deploy the instances only within US-based AWS Regions. The DevOps engineer needs to use an SCP in the small company's new OU to ensure that the small company can launch only the required instance types. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家大型公司最近收购了一家小型公司。大型公司邀请小型公司加入大型公司在 AWS Organizations 中的现有组织，作为新的 OU。一名 DevOps 工程师确定小型公司需要为公司的应用程序工作负载启动 t3.small Amazon EC2 instance types。小型公司只需要在美国境内的 AWS Regions 中部署实例。DevOps 工程师需要在小型公司的新 OU 中使用 SCP，以确保小型公司只能启动所需的实例类型。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps team manages infrastructure for an application. The application uses long-running processes to process items from an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. The application is deployed to an Auto Scaling group. The application recently experienced an issue where items were taking significantly longer to process. The queue exceeded the expected size, which prevented various business processes from functioning properly. The application records all logs to a third- party tool. The team is currently subscribed to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic that the team uses for alerts. The team needs to be alerted if the queue exceeds the expected size. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch metric alarm with a period of 1 hour and a static threshold to alarm if the average of the ApproximateNumberOfMessagesDelayed metric is greater than the expected value. Configure the alarm to notify the SNS topic.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch metric alarm with a period of 1 hour and a static threshold to alarm if the average of the ApproximateNumberOfMessagesDelayed metric is greater than the expected value. Configure the alarm to notify the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon CloudWatch metric alarm，周期为 1 小时，并设置静态阈值；如果 ApproximateNumberOfMessagesDelayed metric 的平均值大于预期值，则进入 alarm 状态。配置该 alarm 通知 SNS 主题。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch metric alarm with a period of 1 hour and a static threshold to alarm if the sum of the ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible metric is greater than the expected value. Configure the alarm to notify the SNS topic.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch metric alarm with a period of 1 hour and a static threshold to alarm if the sum of the ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible metric is greater than the expected value. Configure the alarm to notify the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon CloudWatch metric alarm，周期为 1 小时，并设置静态阈值；如果 ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible metric 的总和大于预期值，则进入 alarm 状态。配置该 alarm 通知 SNS 主题。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function that retrieves the ApproximateNumberOfMessages SQS queue attribute value and publishes the value as a new CloudWatch custom metric. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that is scheduled to run every 5 minutes and that invokes the Lambda function. Configure a CloudWatch metrics alarm with a period of 1 hour and a static threshold to alarm if the sum of the new custom metric is greater than the expected value.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that retrieves the ApproximateNumberOfMessages SQS queue attribute value and publishes the value as a new CloudWatch custom metric. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that is scheduled to run every 5 minutes and that invokes the Lambda function. Configure a CloudWatch metrics alarm with a period of 1 hour and a static threshold to alarm if the sum of the new custom metric is greater than the expected value.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，检索 ApproximateNumberOfMessages SQS queue attribute 值，并将该值发布为新的 CloudWatch custom metric。创建一条计划每 5 分钟运行一次的 Amazon EventBridge 规则，并调用该 Lambda 函数。配置一个周期为 1 小时且具有静态阈值的 CloudWatch metrics alarm，如果新的自定义指标总和大于预期值，则进入 alarm 状态。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function that checks the ApproximateNumberOfMessagesDelayed SQS queue attribute and compares the value to a defined expected size in the function. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that is scheduled to run every 5 minutes and that invokes the Lambda function. When the ApproximateNumberOfMessagesDelayed SQS queue attribute exceeds the expected size, send a notification the SNS topic.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that checks the ApproximateNumberOfMessagesDelayed SQS queue attribute and compares the value to a defined expected size in the function. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that is scheduled to run every 5 minutes and that invokes the Lambda function. When the ApproximateNumberOfMessagesDelayed SQS queue attribute exceeds the expected size, send a notification the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，检查 ApproximateNumberOfMessagesDelayed SQS queue attribute，并将该值与函数中定义的预期大小进行比较。创建一条计划每 5 分钟运行一次的 Amazon EventBridge 规则，并调用该 Lambda 函数。当 ApproximateNumberOfMessagesDelayed SQS queue attribute 超过预期大小时，向 SNS 主题发送通知。

questions.explanation: ????? B?ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible ??????????????? 1 ??????????? CloudWatch ?????? SNS topic?????????????

explanations.zh: ????? B?ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible ??????????????? 1 ??????????? CloudWatch ?????? SNS topic?????????????
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible shows how many messages are waiting to be processed, so a CloudWatch alarm with a 1-hour period and static threshold can notify the SNS topic when backlog exceeds the expected value.

contents.en: A DevOps team manages infrastructure for an application. The application uses long-running processes to process items from an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. The application is deployed to an Auto Scaling group. The application recently experienced an issue where items were taking significantly longer to process. The queue exceeded the expected size, which prevented various business processes from functioning properly. The application records all logs to a third- party tool. The team is currently subscribed to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic that the team uses for alerts. The team needs to be alerted if the queue exceeds the expected size. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?
contents.zh: 一个 DevOps 团队管理某个应用程序的基础设施。该应用程序使用长时间运行的进程来处理来自 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列的项目。该应用程序部署到 Auto Scaling group。该应用程序最近遇到一个问题：项目处理时间显著变长。队列超过了预期大小，导致各种业务流程无法正常运行。该应用程序将所有日志记录到第三方工具。团队目前订阅了一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题，该团队使用该主题接收警报。团队需要在队列超过预期大小时收到警报。哪种解决方案可以以最高运营效率满足这些要求？

questions.content: A large company runs critical workloads in multiple AWS accounts. The AWS accounts are managed under AWS Organizations with all features enabled. The company stores confidential customer data in an Amazon S3 bucket. Access to the S3 bucket requires multiple levels of approval. The company wants to monitor when the S3 bucket is accessed by using the AWS CLI. The company also wants insights into the various activities performed by other users on all other S3 buckets in the AWS accounts to detect any issues. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS CloudTrail trail that is delivered to Amazon CloudWatch in each AWS account. Enable data events logs for all S3 buckets. Use Amazon GuardDuty for anomaly detection in all the AWS accounts. Use Amazon Athena to perform SQL queries on the custom metrics created from the CloudTrail logs.

contents.en: Create an AWS CloudTrail trail that is delivered to Amazon CloudWatch in each AWS account. Enable data events logs for all S3 buckets. Use Amazon GuardDuty for anomaly detection in all the AWS accounts. Use Amazon Athena to perform SQL queries on the custom metrics created from the CloudTrail logs.
contents.zh: 在每个 AWS 账户中创建一个交付到 Amazon CloudWatch 的 AWS CloudTrail 跟踪。为所有 S3 桶启用数据事件日志。在所有 AWS 账户中使用 Amazon GuardDuty 进行异常检测。使用 Amazon Athena 对从 CloudTrail 日志创建的自定义指标执行 SQL 查询。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS CloudTrail organization trail that is delivered to Amazon CloudWatch in the Organizations management account. Enable data events logs for all S3 buckets. Use Amazon CloudWatch anomaly detection in all the AWS accounts. Use Amazon Athena to perform SQL queries on the custom metrics created from the CloudTrail logs.

contents.en: Create an AWS CloudTrail organization trail that is delivered to Amazon CloudWatch in the Organizations management account. Enable data events logs for all S3 buckets. Use Amazon CloudWatch anomaly detection in all the AWS accounts. Use Amazon Athena to perform SQL queries on the custom metrics created from the CloudTrail logs.
contents.zh: 创建一个交付到 Organizations 管理账户中的 Amazon CloudWatch 的 AWS CloudTrail 组织跟踪。为所有 S3 桶启用数据事件日志。在所有 AWS 账户中使用 Amazon CloudWatch anomaly detection。使用 Amazon Athena 对从 CloudTrail 日志创建的自定义指标执行 SQL 查询。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS CloudTrail organization trail that is delivered to Amazon CloudWatch in the Organizations management account. Enable data events logs for all S3 buckets. Use Amazon CloudWatch anomaly detection in all the AWS accounts. Use Amazon CloudWatch Metrics Insights to perform SQL queries on the custom metrics created from the CloudTrail logs.

contents.en: Create an AWS CloudTrail organization trail that is delivered to Amazon CloudWatch in the Organizations management account. Enable data events logs for all S3 buckets. Use Amazon CloudWatch anomaly detection in all the AWS accounts. Use Amazon CloudWatch Metrics Insights to perform SQL queries on the custom metrics created from the CloudTrail logs.
contents.zh: 创建一个交付到 Organizations 管理账户中的 Amazon CloudWatch 的 AWS CloudTrail 组织跟踪。为所有 S3 桶启用数据事件日志。在所有 AWS 账户中使用 Amazon CloudWatch anomaly detection。使用 Amazon CloudWatch Metrics Insights 对从 CloudTrail 日志创建的自定义指标执行 SQL 查询。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS CloudTrail trail that is delivered to Amazon CloudWatch in each AWS account. Enable data events logs for all S3 buckets. Use a custom solution for anomaly detection in all the AWS accounts. Use Amazon CloudWatch Metrics Insights to perform SQL queries on the custom metrics created from the CloudTrail logs.

contents.en: Create an AWS CloudTrail trail that is delivered to Amazon CloudWatch in each AWS account. Enable data events logs for all S3 buckets. Use a custom solution for anomaly detection in all the AWS accounts. Use Amazon CloudWatch Metrics Insights to perform SQL queries on the custom metrics created from the CloudTrail logs.
contents.zh: 在每个 AWS 账户中创建一个交付到 Amazon CloudWatch 的 AWS CloudTrail 跟踪。为所有 S3 桶启用数据事件日志。在所有 AWS 账户中使用自定义解决方案进行异常检测。使用 Amazon CloudWatch Metrics Insights 对从 CloudTrail 日志创建的自定义指标执行 SQL 查询。

questions.explanation: ????? C?????? CloudTrail ???????? S3 bucket ????? CloudWatch??? CloudWatch anomaly detection ? Metrics Insights ??????????????????? Athena ???? CloudWatch ???

explanations.zh: ????? C?????? CloudTrail ???????? S3 bucket ????? CloudWatch??? CloudWatch anomaly detection ? Metrics Insights ??????????????????? Athena ???? CloudWatch ???
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. The solution delivers an organization CloudTrail with S3 data events to CloudWatch, then uses CloudWatch anomaly detection and Metrics Insights on custom metrics from the logs; the discussion also notes that Athena cannot query CloudWatch metrics.

contents.en: A large company runs critical workloads in multiple AWS accounts. The AWS accounts are managed under AWS Organizations with all features enabled. The company stores confidential customer data in an Amazon S3 bucket. Access to the S3 bucket requires multiple levels of approval. The company wants to monitor when the S3 bucket is accessed by using the AWS CLI. The company also wants insights into the various activities performed by other users on all other S3 buckets in the AWS accounts to detect any issues. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家大型公司在多个 AWS 账户中运行关键工作负载。这些 AWS 账户由 AWS Organizations 管理，并已启用所有功能。该公司在 Amazon S3 桶中存储机密客户数据。访问该 S3 桶需要多级审批。该公司希望使用 AWS CLI 监控何时访问该 S3 桶。该公司还希望深入了解其他用户在 AWS 账户中所有其他 S3 桶上执行的各种活动，以检测任何问题。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps team is deploying microservices for an application on an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster. The cluster uses managed node groups. The DevOps team wants to enable auto scaling for the microservice Pods based on a specific CPU utilization percentage. The DevOps team has already installed the Kubernetes Metrics Server on the cluster. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient way?

options.label: A
options.content: Edit the Auto Scaling group that is associated with the worker nodes of the EKS cluster. Configure the Auto Scaling group to use a target tracking scaling policy to scale when the average CPU utilization of the Auto Scaling group reaches a specific percentage.

contents.en: Edit the Auto Scaling group that is associated with the worker nodes of the EKS cluster. Configure the Auto Scaling group to use a target tracking scaling policy to scale when the average CPU utilization of the Auto Scaling group reaches a specific percentage.
contents.zh: 编辑与 EKS 集群工作节点关联的 Auto Scaling group。配置该 Auto Scaling group 使用目标跟踪扩缩策略，在 Auto Scaling group 的平均 CPU 利用率达到特定百分比时进行扩缩。

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy the Kubernetes Horizontal Pod Autoscaler (HPA) and the Kubernetes Vertical Pod Autoscaler (VPA) in the cluster. Configure the HPA to scale based on the target CPU utilization percentage. Configure the VPA to use the recommender mode setting.

contents.en: Deploy the Kubernetes Horizontal Pod Autoscaler (HPA) and the Kubernetes Vertical Pod Autoscaler (VPA) in the cluster. Configure the HPA to scale based on the target CPU utilization percentage. Configure the VPA to use the recommender mode setting.
contents.zh: 在集群中部署 Kubernetes Horizontal Pod Autoscaler (HPA) 和 Kubernetes Vertical Pod Autoscaler (VPA)。配置 HPA 根据目标 CPU 利用率百分比进行扩缩。配置 VPA 使用 recommender 模式设置。

options.label: C
options.content: Run the AWS Systems Manager AWS-UpdateEKSManagedNodeGroup Automation document. Modify the values for NodeGroupDesiredSize, NodeGroupMaxSize, and NodeGroupMinSize to be based on an estimate for the required node size.

contents.en: Run the AWS Systems Manager AWS-UpdateEKSManagedNodeGroup Automation document. Modify the values for NodeGroupDesiredSize, NodeGroupMaxSize, and NodeGroupMinSize to be based on an estimate for the required node size.
contents.zh: 运行 AWS Systems Manager AWS-UpdateEKSManagedNodeGroup Automation document。修改 NodeGroupDesiredSize、NodeGroupMaxSize 和 NodeGroupMinSize 的值，使其基于所需节点大小的估算值。

options.label: D
options.content: Deploy the Kubernetes Horizontal Pod Autoscaler (HPA) and the Kubernetes Cluster Autoscaler in the cluster. Configure the HPA to scale based on the target CPU utilization percentage. Configure the Cluster Autoscaler to use the auto-discovery setting.

contents.en: Deploy the Kubernetes Horizontal Pod Autoscaler (HPA) and the Kubernetes Cluster Autoscaler in the cluster. Configure the HPA to scale based on the target CPU utilization percentage. Configure the Cluster Autoscaler to use the auto-discovery setting.
contents.zh: 在集群中部署 Kubernetes Horizontal Pod Autoscaler (HPA) 和 Kubernetes Cluster Autoscaler。配置 HPA 根据目标 CPU 利用率百分比进行扩缩。配置 Cluster Autoscaler 使用 auto-discovery 设置。

questions.explanation: ????? D?HPA ???? CPU ????? Pod?? Pod ????????????Cluster Autoscaler ?? auto-discovery ??????????

explanations.zh: ????? D?HPA ???? CPU ????? Pod?? Pod ????????????Cluster Autoscaler ?? auto-discovery ??????????
explanations.en: Correct answer: D. HPA scales Pods based on target CPU utilization, and when additional Pods require more capacity, Cluster Autoscaler uses auto-discovery to scale the managed node group.

contents.en: A DevOps team is deploying microservices for an application on an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster. The cluster uses managed node groups. The DevOps team wants to enable auto scaling for the microservice Pods based on a specific CPU utilization percentage. The DevOps team has already installed the Kubernetes Metrics Server on the cluster. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient way?
contents.zh: 一个 DevOps 团队正在 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 集群上为应用程序部署微服务。该集群使用托管节点组。DevOps 团队希望根据特定的 CPU 利用率百分比为微服务 Pod 启用自动扩缩。DevOps 团队已经在集群上安装了 Kubernetes Metrics Server。哪种解决方案能以最高的运维效率满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has multiple AWS accounts. The company uses AWS IAM Identity Center that is integrated with a third-party SAML 2.0 identity provider (IdP). The attributes for access control feature is enabled in IAM Identity Center. The attribute mapping list maps the department key from the IdP to the ${path:enterprise.department} attribute. All existing Amazon EC2 instances have a d1, d2, d3 department tag that corresponds to three company's departments. A DevOps engineer must create policies based on the matching attributes. The policies must grant each user access to only the EC2 instances that are tagged with the user's respective department name. Which condition key should the DevOps engineer include in the custom permissions policies to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
B
C
D

questions.explanation: ????? C????? aws:PrincipalTag ????????????????????????? ec2:ResourceTag/CostCenter ?? aws:PrincipalTag/CostCenter?

explanations.zh: ????? C????? aws:PrincipalTag ????????????????????????? ec2:ResourceTag/CostCenter ?? aws:PrincipalTag/CostCenter?
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. The discussion emphasizes that the tag name in the aws:PrincipalTag condition key must exactly match the resource tag name, such as ec2:ResourceTag/CostCenter matching aws:PrincipalTag/CostCenter.

contents.en: A company has multiple AWS accounts. The company uses AWS IAM Identity Center that is integrated with a third-party SAML 2.0 identity provider (IdP). The attributes for access control feature is enabled in IAM Identity Center. The attribute mapping list maps the department key from the IdP to the ${path:enterprise.department} attribute. All existing Amazon EC2 instances have a d1, d2, d3 department tag that corresponds to three company's departments. A DevOps engineer must create policies based on the matching attributes. The policies must grant each user access to only the EC2 instances that are tagged with the user's respective department name. Which condition key should the DevOps engineer include in the custom permissions policies to meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司拥有多个 AWS 账户。该公司使用与第三方 SAML 2.0 身份提供商 (IdP) 集成的 AWS IAM Identity Center。IAM Identity Center 中已启用 attributes for access control 功能。属性映射列表将来自 IdP 的 department 键映射到 ${path:enterprise.department} 属性。所有现有 Amazon EC2 实例都有一个 d1、d2、d3 department 标签，对应公司的三个部门。DevOps 工程师必须基于匹配属性创建策略。这些策略必须授予每个用户仅访问标记有该用户相应部门名称的 EC2 实例的权限。DevOps 工程师应在自定义权限策略中包含哪个条件键以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A security team wants to use AWS CloudTrail to monitor all actions and API calls in multiple accounts that are in the same organization in AWS Organizations. The security team needs to ensure that account users cannot turn off CloudTrail in the accounts. Which solution will meet this requirement?

options.label: A
options.content: Apply an SCP to all OUs to deny the cloudtrail:StopLogging action and the cloudtrail:DeleteTrail action.

contents.en: Apply an SCP to all OUs to deny the cloudtrail:StopLogging action and the cloudtrail:DeleteTrail action.
contents.zh: 向所有 OU 应用 SCP，以拒绝 cloudtrail:StopLogging 操作和 cloudtrail:DeleteTrail 操作。

options.label: B
options.content: Create IAM policies in each account to deny the cloudtrail:StopLogging action and the cloudtrail:DeleteTrail action.

contents.en: Create IAM policies in each account to deny the cloudtrail:StopLogging action and the cloudtrail:DeleteTrail action.
contents.zh: 在每个账户中创建 IAM 策略，以拒绝 cloudtrail:StopLogging 操作和 cloudtrail:DeleteTrail 操作。

options.label: C
options.content: Set up Amazon CloudWatch alarms to notify the security team when a user disables CloudTrail in an account.

contents.en: Set up Amazon CloudWatch alarms to notify the security team when a user disables CloudTrail in an account.
contents.zh: 设置 Amazon CloudWatch 警报，在用户禁用账户中的 CloudTrail 时通知安全团队。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS Config to automatically re-enable CloudTrail if a user disables CloudTrail in an account.

contents.en: Use AWS Config to automatically re-enable CloudTrail if a user disables CloudTrail in an account.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Config 在用户禁用账户中的 CloudTrail 时自动重新启用 CloudTrail。

questions.explanation: ????? A?????????? SCP???? OU ?? SCP??? cloudtrail:StopLogging ? cloudtrail:DeleteTrail?????????? CloudTrail?

explanations.zh: ????? A?????????? SCP???? OU ?? SCP??? cloudtrail:StopLogging ? cloudtrail:DeleteTrail?????????? CloudTrail?
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. The discussion identifies SCP as the answer; applying an SCP to all OUs to deny cloudtrail:StopLogging and cloudtrail:DeleteTrail prevents stopping or deleting CloudTrail.

contents.en: A security team wants to use AWS CloudTrail to monitor all actions and API calls in multiple accounts that are in the same organization in AWS Organizations. The security team needs to ensure that account users cannot turn off CloudTrail in the accounts. Which solution will meet this requirement?
contents.zh: 安全团队希望使用 AWS CloudTrail 监控 AWS Organizations 中同一组织内多个账户中的所有操作和 API 调用。安全团队需要确保账户用户无法在账户中关闭 CloudTrail。哪种解决方案可以满足此要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer needs to configure a blue/green deployment for an existing three-tier application. The application runs on Amazon EC2 instances and uses an Amazon RDS database. The EC2 instances run behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB) and are in an Auto Scaling group. The DevOps engineer has created launch templates, Auto Scaling groups, and ALB target groups for the blue environment and the green environment. Each target group specifies which application version, blue or green, will be loaded on the EC2 instances. An Amazon Route 53 record for www.example.com points to the ALB. The deployment must shift traffic all at once from the blue environment to the green environment. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Starta rolling restart of the Auto Scaling group for the green environment to deploy the new application version to the green environment's EC2 instances. When the rolling restart is complete, use an AWS CLI command to update the ALB to send traffic to the green environment's target group.

contents.en: Starta rolling restart of the Auto Scaling group for the green environment to deploy the new application version to the green environment's EC2 instances. When the rolling restart is complete, use an AWS CLI command to update the ALB to send traffic to the green environment's target group.
contents.zh: 启动绿色环境的 Auto Scaling group 的滚动重启，以将新的应用程序版本部署到绿色环境的 EC2 实例。滚动重启完成后，使用 AWS CLI 命令更新 ALB，使其将流量发送到绿色环境的 target group。

options.label: B
options.content: Use an AWS CLI command to update the ALB to send traffic to the green environments target group. Start a rolling restart of the Auto Scaling group for the green environment to deploy the new application version to the green environment's EC2 instances.

contents.en: Use an AWS CLI command to update the ALB to send traffic to the green environments target group. Start a rolling restart of the Auto Scaling group for the green environment to deploy the new application version to the green environment's EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CLI 命令更新 ALB，使其将流量发送到绿色环境的 target group。启动绿色环境的 Auto Scaling group 的滚动重启，以将新的应用程序版本部署到绿色环境的 EC2 实例。

options.label: C
options.content: Update the launch template to deploy the green environment's application version to the blue environment's EC2 instances. Do not change the target groups or the Auto Scaling groups in either environment. Perform a rolling restart of the blue environments EC2 instances.

contents.en: Update the launch template to deploy the green environment's application version to the blue environment's EC2 instances. Do not change the target groups or the Auto Scaling groups in either environment. Perform a rolling restart of the blue environments EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 更新启动模板，将绿色环境的应用程序版本部署到蓝色环境的 EC2 实例。不要更改任一环境中的 target groups 或 Auto Scaling groups。对蓝色环境的 EC2 实例执行滚动重启。

options.label: D
options.content: Starta rolling restart of the Auto Scaling group for the green environment to deploy the new application version to the green environment's EC2 instances. When the rolling restart is complete, update Route 53 to point to the green environment's endpoint on the ALB.

contents.en: Starta rolling restart of the Auto Scaling group for the green environment to deploy the new application version to the green environment's EC2 instances. When the rolling restart is complete, update Route 53 to point to the green environment's endpoint on the ALB.
contents.zh: 启动绿色环境的 Auto Scaling group 的滚动重启，以将新的应用程序版本部署到绿色环境的 EC2 实例。滚动重启完成后，更新 Route 53，使其指向 ALB 上绿色环境的端点。

explanations.en: Correct answer: A. First perform a rolling restart of the green Auto Scaling group to deploy the new version, then use the AWS CLI to update the ALB so traffic goes to the green target group.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer needs to configure a blue/green deployment for an existing three-tier application. The application runs on Amazon EC2 instances and uses an Amazon RDS database. The EC2 instances run behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB) and are in an Auto Scaling group. The DevOps engineer has created launch templates, Auto Scaling groups, and ALB target groups for the blue environment and the green environment. Each target group specifies which application version, blue or green, will be loaded on the EC2 instances. An Amazon Route 53 record for www.example.com points to the ALB. The deployment must shift traffic all at once from the blue environment to the green environment. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: DevOps 工程师需要为现有的三层应用程序配置蓝/绿部署。该应用程序在 Amazon EC2 实例上运行，并使用 Amazon RDS 数据库。EC2 实例位于 Application Load Balancer (ALB) 后面，并在 Auto Scaling group 中。DevOps 工程师已为蓝色环境和绿色环境创建了启动模板、Auto Scaling groups 和 ALB target groups。每个 target group 都指定将在 EC2 实例上加载哪个应用程序版本（蓝色或绿色）。www.example.com 的 Amazon Route 53 记录指向 ALB。部署必须一次性将流量从蓝色环境切换到绿色环境。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has an application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group. The application processes a high volume of messages from an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. A DevOps engineer noticed that the application took several hours to process a group of messages from the SQS queue. The average CPU utilization of the Auto Scaling group did not cross the threshold of a target tracking scaling policy when processing the messages. The application that processes the SQS queue publishes logs to 'Amazon CloudWatch Logs. The DevOps engineer needs to ensure that the queue is processed quickly. Which solution meets these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to publish a custom metric by using the ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible SQS queue attribute and the GroupInServiceInstances Auto Scaling group attribute to publish the queue messages for each instance. Schedule an Amazon EventBridge rule to run the Lambda function every hour. Create a target tracking scaling policy for the Auto Scaling group that uses the custom metric to scale in and out.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to publish a custom metric by using the ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible SQS queue attribute and the GroupInServiceInstances Auto Scaling group attribute to publish the queue messages for each instance. Schedule an Amazon EventBridge rule to run the Lambda function every hour. Create a target tracking scaling policy for the Auto Scaling group that uses the custom metric to scale in and out.
contents.zh: 创建 AWS Lambda 函数。配置 Lambda 函数使用 ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible SQS 队列属性和 GroupInServiceInstances Auto Scaling group 属性发布自定义指标，以发布每个实例的队列消息数。计划 Amazon EventBridge 规则每小时运行该 Lambda 函数。为 Auto Scaling group 创建使用该自定义指标进行扩缩的目标跟踪扩缩策略。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to publish a custom metric by using the ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible SQS queue attribute and the GroupInServiceInstances Auto Scaling group attribute to publish the queue messages for each instance. Create a CloudWatch subscription filter for the application logs with the Lambda function as the target. Create a target tracking scaling policy for the Auto Scaling group that uses the custom metric to scale in and out.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to publish a custom metric by using the ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible SQS queue attribute and the GroupInServiceInstances Auto Scaling group attribute to publish the queue messages for each instance. Create a CloudWatch subscription filter for the application logs with the Lambda function as the target. Create a target tracking scaling policy for the Auto Scaling group that uses the custom metric to scale in and out.
contents.zh: 创建 AWS Lambda 函数。配置 Lambda 函数使用 ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible SQS 队列属性和 GroupInServiceInstances Auto Scaling group 属性发布自定义指标，以发布每个实例的队列消息数。为应用程序日志创建 CloudWatch subscription filter，并将 Lambda 函数作为目标。为 Auto Scaling group 创建使用该自定义指标进行扩缩的目标跟踪扩缩策略。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a target tracking scaling policy for the Auto Scaling group. In the target tracking policy, use the ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible SQS queue attribute and the GroupInServiceInstances Auto Scaling group attribute to calculate how many messages are in the queue for each number of instances by using metric math. Use the calculated attribute to scale in and out.

contents.en: Create a target tracking scaling policy for the Auto Scaling group. In the target tracking policy, use the ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible SQS queue attribute and the GroupInServiceInstances Auto Scaling group attribute to calculate how many messages are in the queue for each number of instances by using metric math. Use the calculated attribute to scale in and out.
contents.zh: 为 Auto Scaling group 创建目标跟踪扩缩策略。在目标跟踪策略中，使用 ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible SQS 队列属性和 GroupInServiceInstances Auto Scaling group 属性，通过 metric math 计算每个实例数量对应的队列消息数。使用计算出的属性进行扩缩。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function that logs the ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible attribute of the SQS queue to a CloudWatch Logs log group. Schedule an Amazon EventBridge rule to run the Lambda function every 5 minutes. Create a metric filer to count the number of log events from a CloudWatch logs group. Create a target tracking scaling policy for the Auto Scaling group that uses the custom metric to scale in and out.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that logs the ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible attribute of the SQS queue to a CloudWatch Logs log group. Schedule an Amazon EventBridge rule to run the Lambda function every 5 minutes. Create a metric filer to count the number of log events from a CloudWatch logs group. Create a target tracking scaling policy for the Auto Scaling group that uses the custom metric to scale in and out.
contents.zh: 创建 AWS Lambda 函数，将 SQS 队列的 ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible 属性记录到 CloudWatch Logs log group。计划 Amazon EventBridge 规则每 5 分钟运行该 Lambda 函数。创建 metric filer 以统计来自 CloudWatch logs group 的日志事件数。为 Auto Scaling group 创建使用该自定义指标进行扩缩的目标跟踪扩缩策略。

questions.explanation: ????? C?CloudWatch ?? GroupInServiceInstances ? ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible?????? metric math ?????????????????????????????? Lambda?

explanations.zh: ????? C?CloudWatch ?? GroupInServiceInstances ? ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible?????? metric math ?????????????????????????????? Lambda?
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. CloudWatch already provides GroupInServiceInstances and ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible, so metric math can calculate messages per instance for target tracking scaling without needing Lambda.

contents.en: A company has an application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group. The application processes a high volume of messages from an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. A DevOps engineer noticed that the application took several hours to process a group of messages from the SQS queue. The average CPU utilization of the Auto Scaling group did not cross the threshold of a target tracking scaling policy when processing the messages. The application that processes the SQS queue publishes logs to 'Amazon CloudWatch Logs. The DevOps engineer needs to ensure that the queue is processed quickly. Which solution meets these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个在 Auto Scaling group 中的 Amazon EC2 实例上运行的应用程序。该应用程序处理来自 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列的大量消息。DevOps 工程师注意到，该应用程序处理 SQS 队列中的一组消息花费了数小时。处理消息时，Auto Scaling group 的平均 CPU 利用率未超过目标跟踪扩缩策略的阈值。处理 SQS 队列的应用程序将日志发布到 'Amazon CloudWatch Logs。DevOps 工程师需要确保快速处理该队列。哪种解决方案能以最少的运维开销满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has a single AWS account that runs hundreds of Amazon EC2 instances in a single AWS Region. The company launches and terminates new EC2 instances every hour. The account includes existing EC2 instances that have been running for longer than a week. The company's security policy requires all running EC2 instances to have an EC2 instance profile attached. The company has created a default EC2 instance profile. The default EC2 instance profile must be attached to any EC2 instances that do not have a profile attached. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that matches the Amazon EC2 RunInstances API calls. Configure the rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function to attach the default instance profile to the EC2 instances.

contents.en: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that matches the Amazon EC2 RunInstances API calls. Configure the rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function to attach the default instance profile to the EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 配置匹配 Amazon EC2 RunInstances API 调用的 Amazon EventBridge 规则。配置该规则调用 AWS Lambda 函数，将默认 instance profile 附加到 EC2 实例。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure AWS Config. Deploy an AWS Config ec2-instance-profile-attached managed rule. Configure an automatic remediation action that invokes an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to attach the default instance profile to the EC2 instances.

contents.en: Configure AWS Config. Deploy an AWS Config ec2-instance-profile-attached managed rule. Configure an automatic remediation action that invokes an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to attach the default instance profile to the EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 配置 AWS Config。部署 AWS Config ec2-instance-profile-attached 托管规则。配置自动修复操作，调用 AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook 将默认 instance profile 附加到 EC2 实例。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that matches the Amazon EC2 StartInstances API calls. Configure the rule to invoke an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to attach the default instance profile to the EC2 instances.

contents.en: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that matches the Amazon EC2 StartInstances API calls. Configure the rule to invoke an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to attach the default instance profile to the EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 配置匹配 Amazon EC2 StartInstances API 调用的 Amazon EventBridge 规则。配置该规则调用 AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook 将默认 instance profile 附加到 EC2 实例。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure AWS Config. Deploy an AWS Config iam-role-managed-policy-check managed rule. Configure an automatic remediation action that invokes an AWS Lambda function to attach the default instance profile to the EC2 instances.

contents.en: Configure AWS Config. Deploy an AWS Config iam-role-managed-policy-check managed rule. Configure an automatic remediation action that invokes an AWS Lambda function to attach the default instance profile to the EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 配置 AWS Config。部署 AWS Config iam-role-managed-policy-check 托管规则。配置自动修复操作，调用 AWS Lambda 函数将默认 instance profile 附加到 EC2 实例。

questions.explanation: ????? B?AWS Config ? ec2-instance-profile-attached ?????????????????? EC2????????? SSM Automation runbook ???????????

explanations.zh: ????? B?AWS Config ? ec2-instance-profile-attached ?????????????????? EC2????????? SSM Automation runbook ???????????
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. The AWS Config ec2-instance-profile-attached managed rule detects EC2 instances without an instance profile, and automatic remediation can invoke an SSM Automation runbook to attach the default profile.

contents.en: A company has a single AWS account that runs hundreds of Amazon EC2 instances in a single AWS Region. The company launches and terminates new EC2 instances every hour. The account includes existing EC2 instances that have been running for longer than a week. The company's security policy requires all running EC2 instances to have an EC2 instance profile attached. The company has created a default EC2 instance profile. The default EC2 instance profile must be attached to any EC2 instances that do not have a profile attached. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个单一 AWS 账户，在单个 AWS Region 中运行数百个 Amazon EC2 实例。该公司每小时都会启动和终止新的 EC2 实例。该账户包括已运行超过一周的现有 EC2 实例。公司的安全策略要求所有正在运行的 EC2 实例都附加 EC2 instance profile。该公司已创建默认 EC2 instance profile。必须将默认 EC2 instance profile 附加到任何未附加 profile 的 EC2 实例。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses AWS Organizations to manage hundreds of AWS accounts. The company has a team that is responsible for AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM). The IAM team wants to implement AWS IAM Identity Center. The IAM team must have only the minimum required permissions to manage IAM Identity Center. The IAM team must not be able to gain unnecessary access to the Organizations management account. The IAM team must be able to provision new IAM Identity Center permission sets and assignments for new and existing member accounts. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a new AWS account for the IAM team. Enable IAM Identity Center in the new account. In the Organizations management account, register the new account as a delegated administrator for IAM Identity Center.

contents.en: Create a new AWS account for the IAM team. Enable IAM Identity Center in the new account. In the Organizations management account, register the new account as a delegated administrator for IAM Identity Center.
contents.zh: 为 IAM 团队创建一个新的 AWS 账户。在新账户中启用 IAM Identity Center。在 Organizations 管理账户中，将新账户注册为 IAM Identity Center 的 delegated administrator。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new AWS account for the IAM team. Enable IAM Identity Center in the Organizations management account. In the Organizations management account, register the new account as a delegated administrator for IAM Identity Center.

contents.en: Create a new AWS account for the IAM team. Enable IAM Identity Center in the Organizations management account. In the Organizations management account, register the new account as a delegated administrator for IAM Identity Center.
contents.zh: 为 IAM 团队创建一个新的 AWS 账户。在 Organizations 管理账户中启用 IAM Identity Center。在 Organizations 管理账户中，将新账户注册为 IAM Identity Center 的 delegated administrator。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an SCP in Organizations. Create a new OU for the Organizations management account, and link the new SCP to the OU. Configure the SCP to deny all access to IAM Identity Center.

contents.en: Create an SCP in Organizations. Create a new OU for the Organizations management account, and link the new SCP to the OU. Configure the SCP to deny all access to IAM Identity Center.
contents.zh: 在 Organizations 中创建 SCP。为 Organizations 管理账户创建新的 OU，并将新 SCP 链接到该 OU。配置 SCP 拒绝对 IAM Identity Center 的所有访问。

options.label: D
options.content: Create IAM users and an IAM group for the IAM team in IAM Identity Center. Add the users to the group. Create a new permission set. Attach the AWSSSOMemberAccountAdministrator managed IAM policy to the group.

contents.en: Create IAM users and an IAM group for the IAM team in IAM Identity Center. Add the users to the group. Create a new permission set. Attach the AWSSSOMemberAccountAdministrator managed IAM policy to the group.
contents.zh: 在 IAM Identity Center 中为 IAM 团队创建 IAM users 和 IAM group。将用户添加到该组。创建新的 permission set。将 AWSSSOMemberAccountAdministrator 托管 IAM policy 附加到该组。

options.label: E
options.content: Assign the new permission set to the Organizations management account. Allow the IAM team's group to use the permission set.

contents.en: Assign the new permission set to the Organizations management account. Allow the IAM team's group to use the permission set.
contents.zh: 将新的 permission set 分配给 Organizations 管理账户。允许 IAM 团队的组使用该 permission set。

options.label: F
options.content: Assign the new permission set to the new AWS account. Allow the IAM team's group to use the permission set.

contents.en: Assign the new permission set to the new AWS account. Allow the IAM team's group to use the permission set.
contents.zh: 将新的 permission set 分配给新的 AWS 账户。允许 IAM 团队的组使用该 permission set。

questions.explanation: ????? B?D?F?B ??????? IAM Identity Center ???????????D ????????????? AWSSSOMemberAccountAdministrator?F ????????????? IAM ????

explanations.zh: ????? B?D?F?B ??????? IAM Identity Center ???????????D ????????????? AWSSSOMemberAccountAdministrator?F ????????????? IAM ????
explanations.en: Correct answers: B, D, and F. B enables IAM Identity Center in the management account and registers the delegated administrator account, D creates the users, group, permission set, and AWSSSOMemberAccountAdministrator attachment, and F assigns that permission set to the IAM team group in the new account.

contents.en: A company uses AWS Organizations to manage hundreds of AWS accounts. The company has a team that is responsible for AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM). The IAM team wants to implement AWS IAM Identity Center. The IAM team must have only the minimum required permissions to manage IAM Identity Center. The IAM team must not be able to gain unnecessary access to the Organizations management account. The IAM team must be able to provision new IAM Identity Center permission sets and assignments for new and existing member accounts. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations 管理数百个 AWS 账户。该公司有一个负责 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) 的团队。IAM 团队希望实施 AWS IAM Identity Center。IAM 团队必须仅拥有管理 IAM Identity Center 所需的最低权限。IAM 团队不得能够获得对 Organizations 管理账户的不必要访问权限。IAM 团队必须能够为新的和现有的成员账户预置新的 IAM Identity Center permission sets 和 assignments。哪组步骤组合可以满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company uses an Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL global database that has two secondary AWS Regions. A DevOps engineer has configured the database parameter group to guarantee an RPO of 60 seconds. Write operations on the primary cluster are occasionally blocked because of the RPO setting. The DevOps engineer needs to reduce the frequency of blocked write operations. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Add an additional secondary cluster to the global database.

contents.en: Add an additional secondary cluster to the global database.
contents.zh: 向 global database 添加一个额外的辅助集群。

options.label: B
options.content: Enable write forwarding for the global database.

contents.en: Enable write forwarding for the global database.
contents.zh: 为 global database 启用 write forwarding。

options.label: C
options.content: Remove one of the secondary clusters from the global database.

contents.en: Remove one of the secondary clusters from the global database.
contents.zh: 从 global database 中移除其中一个辅助集群。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure synchronous replication for the global database.

contents.en: Configure synchronous replication for the global database.
contents.zh: 为 global database 配置 synchronous replication。

questions.explanation: ????? C?????????? Aurora PostgreSQL global database ?????????????? 60 ? RPO????? secondary cluster ??????????????????????

explanations.zh: ????? C?????????? Aurora PostgreSQL global database ?????????????? 60 ? RPO????? secondary cluster ??????????????????????
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. The discussion says the goal is to improve replication performance so lag does not exceed the 60-second RPO; removing one secondary cluster reduces replication pressure and can reduce blocked write operations.

contents.en: A company uses an Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL global database that has two secondary AWS Regions. A DevOps engineer has configured the database parameter group to guarantee an RPO of 60 seconds. Write operations on the primary cluster are occasionally blocked because of the RPO setting. The DevOps engineer needs to reduce the frequency of blocked write operations. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL global database，并有两个辅助 AWS Regions。DevOps 工程师已配置数据库参数组，以保证 60 秒的 RPO。由于 RPO 设置，主集群上的写入操作偶尔会被阻塞。DevOps 工程师需要降低写入操作被阻塞的频率。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has a web application that is hosted on an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster. The EKS cluster runs on AWS Fargate that is available through an internet-facing Application Load Balancer. The application is experiencing stability issues that lead to longer response times. A DevOps engineer needs to configure observability in Amazon CloudWatch to troubleshoot the issue. The solution must provide only the minimum necessary permissions. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Deploy the CloudWatch agent as a Kubernetes StatefulSet to the EKS cluster.

contents.en: Deploy the CloudWatch agent as a Kubernetes StatefulSet to the EKS cluster.
contents.zh: 将 CloudWatch agent 作为 Kubernetes StatefulSet 部署到 EKS 集群。

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy the AWS Distro for OpenTelemetry Collector as a Kubernetes DaemonSet to the EKS cluster.

contents.en: Deploy the AWS Distro for OpenTelemetry Collector as a Kubernetes DaemonSet to the EKS cluster.
contents.zh: 将 AWS Distro for OpenTelemetry Collector 作为 Kubernetes DaemonSet 部署到 EKS 集群。

options.label: C
options.content: Associate a Kubernetes service account with an IAM role by using IAM roles for service accounts in Amazon EKS. Use the CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy AWS managed policy.

contents.en: Associate a Kubernetes service account with an IAM role by using IAM roles for service accounts in Amazon EKS. Use the CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy AWS managed policy.
contents.zh: 通过 Amazon EKS 中的 IAM roles for service accounts，将 Kubernetes service account 与 IAM role 关联。使用 CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy AWS managed policy。

options.label: D
options.content: Associate a Kubernetes service account with an IAM role by using IAM roles for service accounts in Amazon EKS. Use the CloudWatchAgentAdminPolicy AWS managed policy.

contents.en: Associate a Kubernetes service account with an IAM role by using IAM roles for service accounts in Amazon EKS. Use the CloudWatchAgentAdminPolicy AWS managed policy.
contents.zh: 通过 Amazon EKS 中的 IAM roles for service accounts，将 Kubernetes service account 与 IAM role 关联。使用 CloudWatchAgentAdminPolicy AWS managed policy。

options.label: E
options.content: Configure an IAM OpenID Connect (OIDC) provider for the EKS cluster.

contents.en: Configure an IAM OpenID Connect (OIDC) provider for the EKS cluster.
contents.zh: 为 EKS 集群配置 IAM OpenID Connect (OIDC) provider。

options.label: F
options.content: Enable EKS control plane logging for the EKS cluster.

contents.en: Enable EKS control plane logging for the EKS cluster.
contents.zh: 为 EKS 集群启用 EKS control plane logging。

questions.explanation: ????? A?C?F?A ?? CloudWatch agent?C ?? IRSA ? Kubernetes service account ????? CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy ? IAM role?F ?? EKS control plane logging????????????????????

explanations.zh: ????? A?C?F?A ?? CloudWatch agent?C ?? IRSA ? Kubernetes service account ????? CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy ? IAM role?F ?? EKS control plane logging????????????????????
explanations.en: Correct answers: A, C, and F. A deploys the CloudWatch agent, C associates a Kubernetes service account with an IAM role using IRSA and CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy, and F enables EKS control plane logging, covering metric permissions and control plane logs.

contents.en: A company has a web application that is hosted on an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster. The EKS cluster runs on AWS Fargate that is available through an internet-facing Application Load Balancer. The application is experiencing stability issues that lead to longer response times. A DevOps engineer needs to configure observability in Amazon CloudWatch to troubleshoot the issue. The solution must provide only the minimum necessary permissions. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个托管在 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 集群上的 Web 应用程序。EKS 集群运行在 AWS Fargate 上，并通过面向互联网的 Application Load Balancer 提供服务。该应用程序出现稳定性问题，导致响应时间变长。DevOps 工程师需要在 Amazon CloudWatch 中配置可观测性以排查问题。该解决方案必须仅提供所需的最低权限。哪组步骤组合可以满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company stores its Python-based application code in AWS CodeCommit. The company uses AWS CodePipeline to deploy the application. The CodeCommit repository and the CodePipeline pipeline are deployed to the same AWS account. The company's security team requires all code to be scanned for vulnerabilities before the code is deployed to production. If any vulnerabilities are found, the deployment must stop. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a new CodeBuild project. Configure the project to run a security scan on the code by using Amazon CodeGuru Security. Configure the CodeBuild project to raise an error if CodeGuru Security finds vulnerabilities. Create a new IAM role that has sufficient permissions to run CodeGuru Security scans. Assign the role to the CodeBuild project. In the CodePipeline pipeline, add a new stage before the deployment stage. Select AWS CodeBuild as the action provider for the new stage. Use the source artifact from the CodeCommit repository. Configure the action to use the CodeBuild project.

contents.en: Create a new CodeBuild project. Configure the project to run a security scan on the code by using Amazon CodeGuru Security. Configure the CodeBuild project to raise an error if CodeGuru Security finds vulnerabilities. Create a new IAM role that has sufficient permissions to run CodeGuru Security scans. Assign the role to the CodeBuild project. In the CodePipeline pipeline, add a new stage before the deployment stage. Select AWS CodeBuild as the action provider for the new stage. Use the source artifact from the CodeCommit repository. Configure the action to use the CodeBuild project.
contents.zh: 创建一个新的 CodeBuild project。配置该 project 使用 Amazon CodeGuru Security 对代码运行安全扫描。配置 CodeBuild project 在 CodeGuru Security 发现漏洞时引发错误。创建一个具有足够权限运行 CodeGuru Security 扫描的新 IAM role。将该 role 分配给 CodeBuild project。在 CodePipeline pipeline 中，在部署阶段之前添加一个新阶段。为新阶段选择 AWS CodeBuild 作为 action provider。使用来自 CodeCommit repository 的 source artifact。配置该 action 使用 CodeBuild project。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new CodeBuild project. Configure the project to run a security scan on the code by using Amazon Inspector. Configure the CodeBuild project to raise an error if Amazon Inspector finds vulnerabilities. Create a new IAM role that has sufficient permissions to run Amazon Inspector scans. Assign the role to the CodeBuild project. In the CodePipeline pipeline, add a new stage before the deployment stage. Select AWS CodeBuild as the action provider for the new stage. Use the source artifact from the CodeCommit repository. Configure the action to use the CodeBuild project.

contents.en: Create a new CodeBuild project. Configure the project to run a security scan on the code by using Amazon Inspector. Configure the CodeBuild project to raise an error if Amazon Inspector finds vulnerabilities. Create a new IAM role that has sufficient permissions to run Amazon Inspector scans. Assign the role to the CodeBuild project. In the CodePipeline pipeline, add a new stage before the deployment stage. Select AWS CodeBuild as the action provider for the new stage. Use the source artifact from the CodeCommit repository. Configure the action to use the CodeBuild project.
contents.zh: 创建一个新的 CodeBuild project。配置该 project 使用 Amazon Inspector 对代码运行安全扫描。配置 CodeBuild project 在 Amazon Inspector 发现漏洞时引发错误。创建一个具有足够权限运行 Amazon Inspector 扫描的新 IAM role。将该 role 分配给 CodeBuild project。在 CodePipeline pipeline 中，在部署阶段之前添加一个新阶段。为新阶段选择 AWS CodeBuild 作为 action provider。使用来自 CodeCommit repository 的 source artifact。配置该 action 使用 CodeBuild project。

options.label: C
options.content: Update the IAM role that is attached to CodePipeline to include sufficient permissions to invoke Amazon DevOps Guru. In the CodePipeline pipeline, add a new stage before the deployment stage. Select DevOps Guru as the action provider for the new stage. Use the source artifact from the CodeCommit repository.

contents.en: Update the IAM role that is attached to CodePipeline to include sufficient permissions to invoke Amazon DevOps Guru.
