In the CodePipeline pipeline, add a new stage before the deployment stage. Select DevOps Guru as the action provider for the new stage. Use the source artifact from the CodeCommit repository.
contents.zh: 更新附加到 CodePipeline 的 IAM role，使其包含调用 Amazon DevOps Guru 的足够权限。在 CodePipeline pipeline 中，在部署阶段之前添加一个新阶段。为新阶段选择 DevOps Guru 作为 action provider。使用来自 CodeCommit repository 的 source artifact。

options.label: D
options.content: Update the IAM role that is attached to CodePipeline to include sufficient permissions to invoke Amazon DevOps Guru. In the CodePipeline pipeline, add a new stage before the deployment stage. Select CodeGuru Security as the action provider for the new stage. Use the source artifact from the CodeCommit repository.

contents.en: Update the IAM role that is attached to CodePipeline to include sufficient permissions to invoke Amazon DevOps Guru. In the CodePipeline pipeline, add a new stage before the deployment stage. Select CodeGuru Security as the action provider for the new stage. Use the source artifact from the CodeCommit repository.
contents.zh: 更新附加到 CodePipeline 的 IAM role，使其包含调用 Amazon DevOps Guru 的足够权限。在 CodePipeline pipeline 中，在部署阶段之前添加一个新阶段。为新阶段选择 CodeGuru Security 作为 action provider。使用来自 CodeCommit repository 的 source artifact。

questions.explanation: ????? A????????????????? CodeGuru Security ??? DevOps Guru??????? CodeBuild ?????????????????

explanations.zh: ????? A????????????????? CodeGuru Security ??? DevOps Guru??????? CodeBuild ?????????????????
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. The discussion states this is static code analysis and should use CodeGuru Security, not DevOps Guru; adding a CodeBuild stage before deployment runs the scan and fails when vulnerabilities are found.

contents.en: A company stores its Python-based application code in AWS CodeCommit. The company uses AWS CodePipeline to deploy the application. The CodeCommit repository and the CodePipeline pipeline are deployed to the same AWS account. The company's security team requires all code to be scanned for vulnerabilities before the code is deployed to production. If any vulnerabilities are found, the deployment must stop. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司将其基于 Python 的应用程序代码存储在 AWS CodeCommit 中。该公司使用 AWS CodePipeline 部署应用程序。CodeCommit repository 和 CodePipeline pipeline 部署在同一个 AWS 账户中。公司的安全团队要求在代码部署到生产环境之前扫描所有代码的漏洞。如果发现任何漏洞，部署必须停止。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer deploys an application to a fleet of Amazon Linux EC2 instances. The DevOps engineer needs to monitor system metrics across the fleet. The DevOps engineer wants to monitor the relationship between network traffic and memory utilization for the application code. The DevOps engineer wants to track the data on a 60 second interval. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use Amazon CloudWatch basic monitoring to collect the NetworkIn metric and the MemoryBytesUsed metric. Graph the metrics in CloudWatch.

contents.en: Use Amazon CloudWatch basic monitoring to collect the NetworkIn metric and the MemoryBytesUsed metric. Graph the metrics in CloudWatch.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon CloudWatch basic monitoring 收集 NetworkIn 指标和 MemoryBytesUsed 指标。在 CloudWatch 中绘制这些指标。

options.label: B
options.content: Use Amazon CloudWatch detailed monitoring to collect the NetworkIn metric and the MemoryBytesUsed metric. Graph the metrics in CloudWatch.

contents.en: Use Amazon CloudWatch detailed monitoring to collect the NetworkIn metric and the MemoryBytesUsed metric. Graph the metrics in CloudWatch.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon CloudWatch detailed monitoring 收集 NetworkIn 指标和 MemoryBytesUsed 指标。在 CloudWatch 中绘制这些指标。

options.label: C
options.content: Use Amazon CloudWatch detailed monitoring to collect the NetworkIn metric. Install the CloudWatch agent on the EC2 instances to collect the mem_used metric. Graph the metrics in CloudWatch.

contents.en: Use Amazon CloudWatch detailed monitoring to collect the NetworkIn metric. Install the CloudWatch agent on the EC2 instances to collect the mem_used metric. Graph the metrics in CloudWatch.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon CloudWatch detailed monitoring 收集 NetworkIn 指标。在 EC2 实例上安装 CloudWatch agent 以收集 mem_used 指标。在 CloudWatch 中绘制这些指标。

options.label: D
options.content: Use Amazon CloudWatch basic monitoring to collect the built-in NetworkIn metric. Install the CloudWatch agent on the EC2 instances to collect the mem_used metric. Graph the metrics in CloudWatch.

contents.en: Use Amazon CloudWatch basic monitoring to collect the built-in NetworkIn metric. Install the CloudWatch agent on the EC2 instances to collect the mem_used metric. Graph the metrics in CloudWatch.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon CloudWatch basic monitoring 收集内置的 NetworkIn 指标。在 EC2 实例上安装 CloudWatch agent 以收集 mem_used 指标。在 CloudWatch 中绘制这些指标。

questions.explanation: ????? C???????? 1 ?????? EC2 ? NetworkIn?CloudWatch agent ??? mem_used???????? CloudWatch ???????????????

explanations.zh: ????? C???????? 1 ?????? EC2 ? NetworkIn?CloudWatch agent ??? mem_used???????? CloudWatch ???????????????
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. Detailed monitoring collects the EC2 NetworkIn metric at 1-minute frequency, the CloudWatch agent collects mem_used, and graphing both in CloudWatch lets the team correlate network traffic and memory usage.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer deploys an application to a fleet of Amazon Linux EC2 instances. The DevOps engineer needs to monitor system metrics across the fleet. The DevOps engineer wants to monitor the relationship between network traffic and memory utilization for the application code. The DevOps engineer wants to track the data on a 60 second interval. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: DevOps 工程师将应用程序部署到一组 Amazon Linux EC2 实例。DevOps 工程师需要监控整个实例组的系统指标。DevOps 工程师希望监控应用程序代码的网络流量与内存利用率之间的关系。DevOps 工程师希望以 60 秒间隔跟踪数据。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses AWS Systems Manager to manage a fleet of Amazon Linux EC2 instances that have SSM Agent installed. All EC2 instances are configured to use Instance Metadata Service Version 2 (IMDSv2) and are running in the same AWS account and AWS Region. Company policy requires developers to use only Amazon Linux. The company wants to ensure that all new EC2 instances are automatically managed by Systems Manager after creation. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an IAM role that has a trust policy that allows Systems Manager to assume the role. Attach the AmazonSSMManagedEC2InstanceDefaultPolicy policy to the role. Configure the default-ec2-instance-management-role SSM service setting to use the role.

contents.en: Create an IAM role that has a trust policy that allows Systems Manager to assume the role. Attach the AmazonSSMManagedEC2InstanceDefaultPolicy policy to the role. Configure the default-ec2-instance-management-role SSM service setting to use the role.
contents.zh: 创建一个 IAM role，其 trust policy 允许 Systems Manager 代入该 role。将 AmazonSSMManagedEC2InstanceDefaultPolicy policy 附加到该 role。配置 default-ec2-instance-management-role SSM service setting 使用该 role。

options.label: B
options.content: Ensure that AWS Config is set up. Create an AWS Config rule that validates if an EC2 instance has SSM Agent installed. Configure the rule to run on EC2 configuration changes. Configure automatic remediation for the rule to run the AWS- InstallSSMAgent SSM document to install SSM Agent.

contents.en: Ensure that AWS Config is set up. Create an AWS Config rule that validates if an EC2 instance has SSM Agent installed. Configure the rule to run on EC2 configuration changes. Configure automatic remediation for the rule to run the AWS- InstallSSMAgent SSM document to install SSM Agent.
contents.zh: 确保已设置 AWS Config。创建 AWS Config 规则，验证 EC2 实例是否已安装 SSM Agent。配置该规则在 EC2 配置更改时运行。为该规则配置自动修复，以运行 AWS- InstallSSMAgent SSM document 来安装 SSM Agent。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure Systems Manager Patch Manager. Create a patch baseline that automatically installs SSM Agent on all new EC2 instances. Create a patch group for all EC2 instances. Attach the patch baseline to the patch group. Create a maintenance window and maintenance window task to start installing SSM Agent daily.

contents.en: Configure Systems Manager Patch Manager. Create a patch baseline that automatically installs SSM Agent on all new EC2 instances. Create a patch group for all EC2 instances. Attach the patch baseline to the patch group. Create a maintenance window and maintenance window task to start installing SSM Agent daily.
contents.zh: 配置 Systems Manager Patch Manager。创建 patch baseline，在所有新的 EC2 实例上自动安装 SSM Agent。为所有 EC2 实例创建 patch group。将 patch baseline 附加到 patch group。创建 maintenance window 和 maintenance window task，每日开始安装 SSM Agent。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an EC2 instance role that has a trust policy that allows Amazon EC2 to assume the role. Attach the AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore policy to the role. Ensure that AWS Config is set up. Use the ec2-instance-profile-attached managed AWS Config rule to validate if an EC2 instance has the role attached. Configure the rule to run on EC2 configuration changes. Configure automatic remediation for the rule to run the AWS-SetupManagedRoleOnEc2Instance SSM document to attach the role to the EC2 instance.

contents.en: Create an EC2 instance role that has a trust policy that allows Amazon EC2 to assume the role. Attach the AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore policy to the role. Ensure that AWS Config is set up. Use the ec2-instance-profile-attached managed AWS Config rule to validate if an EC2 instance has the role attached. Configure the rule to run on EC2 configuration changes. Configure automatic remediation for the rule to run the AWS-SetupManagedRoleOnEc2Instance SSM document to attach the role to the EC2 instance.
contents.zh: 创建一个 EC2 instance role，其 trust policy 允许 Amazon EC2 代入该 role。将 AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore policy 附加到该 role。确保已设置 AWS Config。使用 ec2-instance-profile-attached managed AWS Config rule 验证 EC2 实例是否已附加该 role。配置该规则在 EC2 配置更改时运行。为该规则配置自动修复，以运行 AWS-SetupManagedRoleOnEc2Instance SSM document 将该 role 附加到 EC2 实例。

questions.explanation: ????? A??? default-ec2-instance-management-role ????????? Systems Manager ?????? AmazonSSMManagedEC2InstanceDefaultPolicy ????? EC2 ????? Systems Manager ???

explanations.zh: ????? A??? default-ec2-instance-management-role ????????? Systems Manager ?????? AmazonSSMManagedEC2InstanceDefaultPolicy ????? EC2 ????? Systems Manager ???
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. Setting default-ec2-instance-management-role to a role that Systems Manager can assume and that has AmazonSSMManagedEC2InstanceDefaultPolicy allows new EC2 instances to be managed by Systems Manager.

contents.en: A company uses AWS Systems Manager to manage a fleet of Amazon Linux EC2 instances that have SSM Agent installed. All EC2 instances are configured to use Instance Metadata Service Version 2 (IMDSv2) and are running in the same AWS account and AWS Region. Company policy requires developers to use only Amazon Linux. The company wants to ensure that all new EC2 instances are automatically managed by Systems Manager after creation. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Systems Manager 管理一组已安装 SSM Agent 的 Amazon Linux EC2 实例。所有 EC2 实例都配置为使用 Instance Metadata Service Version 2 (IMDSv2)，并在同一个 AWS 账户和 AWS Region 中运行。公司策略要求开发人员只能使用 Amazon Linux。该公司希望确保所有新的 EC2 实例在创建后自动由 Systems Manager 管理。哪种解决方案能以最高的运维效率满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company configured an Amazon S3 event source for an AWS Lambda function. The company needs the Lambda function to run when a new object is created or an existing object is modified in a specific S3 bucket. The Lambda function will use the S3 bucket name and the S3 object key of the incoming event to read the contents of the new or modified S3 object. The Lambda function will parse the contents and save the parsed contents to an Amazon DynamoDB table. The Lambda function's execution role has permissions to read from the S3 bucket and to write to the DynamoDB table. During testing, a DevOps engineer discovers that the Lambda function does not run when objects are added to the S3 bucket or when existing objects are modified. Which solution will resolve these problems?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an S3 bucket policy for the S3 bucket that grants the S3 bucket permission to invoke the Lambda function.

contents.en: Create an S3 bucket policy for the S3 bucket that grants the S3 bucket permission to invoke the Lambda function.
contents.zh: 为 S3 桶创建 S3 bucket policy，授予 S3 桶调用 Lambda 函数的权限。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a resource policy for the Lambda function to grant Amazon S3 permission to invoke the Lambda function on the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create a resource policy for the Lambda function to grant Amazon S3 permission to invoke the Lambda function on the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 为 Lambda 函数创建 resource policy，授予 Amazon S3 在 S3 桶上调用 Lambda 函数的权限。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue as an OnFailure destination for the Lambda function. Update the Lambda function to process messages from the SQS queue and the S3 event notifications.

contents.en: Configure an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue as an OnFailure destination for the Lambda function. Update the Lambda function to process messages from the SQS queue and the S3 event notifications.
contents.zh: 将 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列配置为 Lambda 函数的 OnFailure destination。更新 Lambda 函数以处理来自 SQS 队列和 S3 event notifications 的消息。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue as the destination for the S3 bucket event notifications. Update the Lambda function's execution role to have permission to read from the SQS queue. Update the Lambda function to consume messages from the SQS queue.

contents.en: Configure an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue as the destination for the S3 bucket event notifications. Update the Lambda function's execution role to have permission to read from the SQS queue. Update the Lambda function to consume messages from the SQS queue.
contents.zh: 将 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列配置为 S3 bucket event notifications 的目标。更新 Lambda 函数的 execution role，使其具有从 SQS 队列读取的权限。更新 Lambda 函数以消费来自 SQS 队列的消息。

questions.explanation: ????? B?S3 ?? Lambda ?? Lambda ?????????? s3.amazonaws.com ?? lambda:InvokeFunction??????????S3 ???????????

explanations.zh: ????? B?S3 ?? Lambda ?? Lambda ?????????? s3.amazonaws.com ?? lambda:InvokeFunction??????????S3 ???????????
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. S3 needs the Lambda function resource policy to explicitly allow s3.amazonaws.com to call lambda:InvokeFunction; adding that permission lets S3 object events invoke the function.

contents.en: A company configured an Amazon S3 event source for an AWS Lambda function. The company needs the Lambda function to run when a new object is created or an existing object is modified in a specific S3 bucket. The Lambda function will use the S3 bucket name and the S3 object key of the incoming event to read the contents of the new or modified S3 object. The Lambda function will parse the contents and save the parsed contents to an Amazon DynamoDB table. The Lambda function's execution role has permissions to read from the S3 bucket and to write to the DynamoDB table. During testing, a DevOps engineer discovers that the Lambda function does not run when objects are added to the S3 bucket or when existing objects are modified. Which solution will resolve these problems?
contents.zh: 一家公司为 AWS Lambda 函数配置了 Amazon S3 事件源。该公司需要在特定 S3 桶中创建新对象或修改现有对象时运行 Lambda 函数。Lambda 函数将使用传入事件中的 S3 bucket name 和 S3 object key 来读取新对象或已修改 S3 对象的内容。Lambda 函数将解析内容，并将解析后的内容保存到 Amazon DynamoDB 表。Lambda 函数的 execution role 具有从 S3 桶读取和写入 DynamoDB 表的权限。在测试期间，DevOps 工程师发现，当对象添加到 S3 桶或现有对象被修改时，Lambda 函数不会运行。哪种解决方案可以解决这些问题？

questions.content: A company recently configured AWS Control Tower in its organization in AWS Organizations. The company enrolled all existing AWS accounts in AWS Control Tower. The company wants to ensure that all new AWS accounts are automatically enrolled in AWS Control Tower. The company has an existing AWS Step Functions workflow that creates new AWS accounts and performs any actions required as part of account creation. The Step Functions workflow is defined in the same AWS account as AWS Control Tower. Which combination of steps should the company add to the Step Functions workflow to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge event that has an aws.controltower source and a CreateManagedAccount detail-type. Add the details of the new AWS account to the detail field of the event.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge event that has an aws.controltower source and a CreateManagedAccount detail-type. Add the details of the new AWS account to the detail field of the event.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 事件，其 source 为 aws.controltower，detail-type 为 CreateManagedAccount。将新 AWS 账户的详细信息添加到事件的 detail 字段。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge event that has an aws.controltower source and a SetupLandingZone detail-type. Add the details of the new AWS account to the detail field of the event.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge event that has an aws.controltower source and a SetupLandingZone detail-type. Add the details of the new AWS account to the detail field of the event.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 事件，其 source 为 aws.controltower，detail-type 为 SetupLandingZone。将新 AWS 账户的详细信息添加到事件的 detail 字段。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWSControlTowerExecution role in the new AWS account. Configure the role to allow the AWS Control Tower administrator account to assume the role.

contents.en: Create an AWSControlTowerExecution role in the new AWS account. Configure the role to allow the AWS Control Tower administrator account to assume the role.
contents.zh: 在新的 AWS 账户中创建 AWSControlTowerExecution role。配置该 role 允许 AWS Control Tower administrator account 代入该 role。

options.label: D
options.content: Call the AWS Service Catalog ProvisionProduct API operation with the details of the new AWS account.

contents.en: Call the AWS Service Catalog ProvisionProduct API operation with the details of the new AWS account.
contents.zh: 使用新 AWS 账户的详细信息调用 AWS Service Catalog ProvisionProduct API operation。

options.label: E
options.content: Call the Organizations EnableAWSServiceAccess API operation with the controltower.amazonaws.com service name and the details of the new AWS account.

contents.en: Call the Organizations EnableAWSServiceAccess API operation with the controltower.amazonaws.com service name and the details of the new AWS account.
contents.zh: 使用 controltower.amazonaws.com service name 和新 AWS 账户的详细信息调用 Organizations EnableAWSServiceAccess API operation。

questions.explanation: ????? C?D?C ??????? AWSControlTowerExecution role ??? Control Tower ????????D ?? Service Catalog ProvisionProduct API???????????????

explanations.zh: ????? C?D?C ??????? AWSControlTowerExecution role ??? Control Tower ????????D ?? Service Catalog ProvisionProduct API???????????????
explanations.en: Correct answers: C and D. C creates the AWSControlTowerExecution role in the new account and allows the Control Tower administrator account to assume it, while D calls the Service Catalog ProvisionProduct API with the new account details.

contents.en: A company recently configured AWS Control Tower in its organization in AWS Organizations. The company enrolled all existing AWS accounts in AWS Control Tower. The company wants to ensure that all new AWS accounts are automatically enrolled in AWS Control Tower. The company has an existing AWS Step Functions workflow that creates new AWS accounts and performs any actions required as part of account creation. The Step Functions workflow is defined in the same AWS account as AWS Control Tower. Which combination of steps should the company add to the Step Functions workflow to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司最近在其 AWS Organizations 组织中配置了 AWS Control Tower。该公司已将所有现有 AWS 账户注册到 AWS Control Tower。该公司希望确保所有新的 AWS 账户都自动注册到 AWS Control Tower。该公司有一个现有的 AWS Step Functions 工作流，用于创建新的 AWS 账户并执行账户创建过程中所需的任何操作。Step Functions 工作流定义在与 AWS Control Tower 相同的 AWS 账户中。公司应向 Step Functions 工作流添加哪组步骤组合以满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company's web application uses an Application Load Balancer (ALB) to direct traffic to Amazon EC2 instances across three Availability Zones. The company has deployed a newer version of the application to one Availability Zone for testing. If a problem is detected with the application, the company wants to direct traffic away from the affected Availability Zone until the deployment has been rolled back. The application must remain available and maintain static stability during the rollback. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Disable cross-zone load balancing on the ALB's target group. Initiate a zonal shift on the ALB to direct traffic away from the affected Availability Zone.

contents.en: Disable cross-zone load balancing on the ALB's target group. Initiate a zonal shift on the ALB to direct traffic away from the affected Availability Zone.
contents.zh: 在 ALB 的 target group 上禁用 cross-zone load balancing。在 ALB 上发起 zonal shift，将流量从受影响的 Availability Zone 转移出去。

options.label: B
options.content: Disable cross-zone load balancing on the ALB's target group. Manually remove instances in the target group that belong to the affected Availability Zone.

contents.en: Disable cross-zone load balancing on the ALB's target group. Manually remove instances in the target group that belong to the affected Availability Zone.
contents.zh: 在 ALB 的 target group 上禁用 cross-zone load balancing。手动移除 target group 中属于受影响 Availability Zone 的实例。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure cross-zone load balancing on the ALB's target group to inherit settings from the ALB. Initiate a zonal shift on the ALB to direct traffic away from the affected Availability Zone.

contents.en: Configure cross-zone load balancing on the ALB's target group to inherit settings from the ALB. Initiate a zonal shift on the ALB to direct traffic away from the affected Availability Zone.
contents.zh: 配置 ALB 的 target group 上的 cross-zone load balancing 继承 ALB 的设置。在 ALB 上发起 zonal shift，将流量从受影响的 Availability Zone 转移出去。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure cross-zone load balancing on the ALB's target group to inherit settings from the ALB. Remove the subnet that is associated with the affected Availability Zone.

contents.en: Configure cross-zone load balancing on the ALB's target group to inherit settings from the ALB. Remove the subnet that is associated with the affected Availability Zone.
contents.zh: 配置 ALB 的 target group 上的 cross-zone load balancing 继承 ALB 的设置。移除与受影响 Availability Zone 关联的 subnet。

questions.explanation: ????? A????? ARC ? Route 53??? A ??? ALB target group ???????????? ALB ?? zonal shift??????????????

explanations.zh: ????? A????? ARC ? Route 53??? A ??? ALB target group ???????????? ALB ?? zonal shift??????????????
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. The discussion points to ARC and Route 53; option A disables cross-zone load balancing on the ALB target group and initiates a zonal shift away from the affected Availability Zone.

contents.en: A company's web application uses an Application Load Balancer (ALB) to direct traffic to Amazon EC2 instances across three Availability Zones. The company has deployed a newer version of the application to one Availability Zone for testing. If a problem is detected with the application, the company wants to direct traffic away from the affected Availability Zone until the deployment has been rolled back. The application must remain available and maintain static stability during the rollback. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?
contents.zh: 一家公司的 Web 应用程序使用 Application Load Balancer (ALB) 将流量定向到跨三个 Availability Zones 的 Amazon EC2 实例。该公司已将较新版本的应用程序部署到一个 Availability Zone 进行测试。如果检测到应用程序存在问题，公司希望将流量从受影响的 Availability Zone 转移出去，直到部署回滚完成。应用程序必须在回滚期间保持可用并维持静态稳定性。哪种解决方案能以最高的运维效率满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has several AWS accounts. An Amazon Connect instance runs in each account. The company uses an Amazon EventBridge default event bus in each account for event handling. A DevOps team needs to receive all the Amazon Connect events in a single DevOps account. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Update the resource-based policy of the default event bus in each account to allow the DevOps account to replay events. Configure an EventBridge rule in the DevOps account that matches Amazon Connect events and has a target of the default event bus in the other accounts.

contents.en: Update the resource-based policy of the default event bus in each account to allow the DevOps account to replay events. Configure an EventBridge rule in the DevOps account that matches Amazon Connect events and has a target of the default event bus in the other accounts.
contents.zh: 更新每个账户中 default event bus 的 resource-based policy，允许 DevOps 账户重放事件。在 DevOps 账户中配置 EventBridge rule，匹配 Amazon Connect 事件，并将其他账户中的 default event bus 作为目标。

options.label: B
options.content: Update the resource-based policy of the default event bus in each account to allow the DevOps account to receive events. Configure an EventBridge rule in the DevOps account that matches Amazon Connect events and has a target of the default event bus in the other accounts.

contents.en: Update the resource-based policy of the default event bus in each account to allow the DevOps account to receive events. Configure an EventBridge rule in the DevOps account that matches Amazon Connect events and has a target of the default event bus in the other accounts.
contents.zh: 更新每个账户中 default event bus 的 resource-based policy，允许 DevOps 账户接收事件。在 DevOps 账户中配置 EventBridge rule，匹配 Amazon Connect 事件，并将其他账户中的 default event bus 作为目标。

options.label: C
options.content: Update the resource-based policy of the default event bus in the DevOps account. Update the policy to allow events to be received from the accounts. Configure an EventBridge rule in each account that matches Amazon Connect events and has a target of the DevOps account's default event bus.

contents.en: Update the resource-based policy of the default event bus in the DevOps account. Update the policy to allow events to be received from the accounts. Configure an EventBridge rule in each account that matches Amazon Connect events and has a target of the DevOps account's default event bus.
contents.zh: 更新 DevOps 账户中 default event bus 的 resource-based policy。更新该 policy 以允许从这些账户接收事件。在每个账户中配置 EventBridge rule，匹配 Amazon Connect 事件，并将 DevOps 账户的 default event bus 作为目标。

options.label: D
options.content: Update the resource-based policy of the default event bus in the DevOps account. Update the policy to allow events to be replayed by the accounts. Configure an EventBridge rule in each account that matches Amazon Connect events and has a target of the DevOps account's default event bus.

contents.en: Update the resource-based policy of the default event bus in the DevOps account. Update the policy to allow events to be replayed by the accounts. Configure an EventBridge rule in each account that matches Amazon Connect events and has a target of the DevOps account's default event bus.
contents.zh: 更新 DevOps 账户中 default event bus 的 resource-based policy。更新该 policy 以允许这些账户重放事件。在每个账户中配置 EventBridge rule，匹配 Amazon Connect 事件，并将 DevOps 账户的 default event bus 作为目标。

questions.explanation: ????? C?DevOps ????? event bus ??????????????????????????? Amazon Connect ??? EventBridge rule??????? DevOps ???? event bus?

explanations.zh: ????? C?DevOps ????? event bus ??????????????????????????? Amazon Connect ??? EventBridge rule??????? DevOps ???? event bus?
explanations.en: Correct answer: C. The DevOps account default event bus needs a resource policy that allows events from the source accounts; each source account then creates an EventBridge rule for Amazon Connect events targeting that DevOps event bus.

contents.en: A company has several AWS accounts. An Amazon Connect instance runs in each account. The company uses an Amazon EventBridge default event bus in each account for event handling. A DevOps team needs to receive all the Amazon Connect events in a single DevOps account. Which solution meets these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司有多个 AWS 账户。每个账户中都运行一个 Amazon Connect instance。该公司在每个账户中使用 Amazon EventBridge default event bus 进行事件处理。DevOps 团队需要在单个 DevOps 账户中接收所有 Amazon Connect 事件。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has deployed an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster with Amazon EC2 node groups. The company's DevOps team uses the Kubernetes Horizontal Pod Autoscaler and recently installed a supported EKS cluster Autoscaler. The DevOps team needs to implement a solution to collect metrics and logs of the EKS cluster to establish a baseline for performance. The DevOps team will create an initial set of thresholds for specific metrics and will update the thresholds over time as the cluster is used. The DevOps team must receive an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) email notification if the initial set of thresholds is exceeded or if the EKS cluster Autoscaler is not functioning properly. The solution must collect cluster, node, and pod metrics. The solution also must capture logs in Amazon CloudWatch. Which combination of steps should the DevOps team take to meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Deploy the CloudWatch agent and Fluent Bit to the cluster. Ensure that the EKS cluster has appropriate permissions to send metrics and logs to CloudWatch.

contents.en: Deploy the CloudWatch agent and Fluent Bit to the cluster. Ensure that the EKS cluster has appropriate permissions to send metrics and logs to CloudWatch.
contents.zh: 将 CloudWatch agent 和 Fluent Bit 部署到集群。确保 EKS 集群具有向 CloudWatch 发送指标和日志的适当权限。

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy AWS Distro for OpenTelemetry to the cluster. Ensure that the EKS cluster has appropriate permissions to send metrics and logs to CloudWatch.

contents.en: Deploy AWS Distro for OpenTelemetry to the cluster. Ensure that the EKS cluster has appropriate permissions to send metrics and logs to CloudWatch.
contents.zh: 将 AWS Distro for OpenTelemetry 部署到集群。确保 EKS 集群具有向 CloudWatch 发送指标和日志的适当权限。

options.label: C
options.content: Create CloudWatch alarms to monitor the CPU, memory, and node failure metrics of the cluster. Configure the alarms to send an SNS email notification to the DevOps team if thresholds are exceeded.

contents.en: Create CloudWatch alarms to monitor the CPU, memory, and node failure metrics of the cluster. Configure the alarms to send an SNS email notification to the DevOps team if thresholds are exceeded.
contents.zh: 创建 CloudWatch alarms 来监控集群的 CPU、内存和节点故障指标。配置这些 alarms 在阈值被超过时向 DevOps 团队发送 SNS 电子邮件通知。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a CloudWatch composite alarm to monitor a metric log filter of the CPU, memory, and node metrics of the cluster. Configure the alarm to send an SNS email notification to the DevOps team when anomalies are detected.

contents.en: Create a CloudWatch composite alarm to monitor a metric log filter of the CPU, memory, and node metrics of the cluster. Configure the alarm to send an SNS email notification to the DevOps team when anomalies are detected.
contents.zh: 创建 CloudWatch composite alarm，以监控集群 CPU、内存和节点指标的 metric log filter。配置该 alarm 在检测到异常时向 DevOps 团队发送 SNS 电子邮件通知。

options.label: E
options.content: Create a CloudWatch alarm to monitor the logs of the Autoscaler deployments for errors. Configure the alarm to send an SNS email notification to the DevOps team if thresholds are exceeded.

contents.en: Create a CloudWatch alarm to monitor the logs of the Autoscaler deployments for errors. Configure the alarm to send an SNS email notification to the DevOps team if thresholds are exceeded.
contents.zh: 创建 CloudWatch alarm 来监控 Autoscaler deployments 的日志中的错误。配置该 alarm 在阈值被超过时向 DevOps 团队发送 SNS 电子邮件通知。

options.label: F
options.content: Create a CloudWatch alarm to monitor a metric log filter of the Autoscaler deployments for errors. Configure the alarm to send an SNS email notification to the DevOps team if thresholds are exceeded.

contents.en: Create a CloudWatch alarm to monitor a metric log filter of the Autoscaler deployments for errors. Configure the alarm to send an SNS email notification to the DevOps team if thresholds are exceeded.
contents.zh: 创建 CloudWatch alarm 来监控 Autoscaler deployments 错误的 metric log filter。配置该 alarm 在阈值被超过时向 DevOps 团队发送 SNS 电子邮件通知。

questions.explanation: ????? A?C?F?A ?? CloudWatch agent ? Fluent Bit ????????????????C ?? CPU????????????? SNS?F ? Autoscaler ??????? metric filter ?????

explanations.zh: ????? A?C?F?A ?? CloudWatch agent ? Fluent Bit ????????????????C ?? CPU????????????? SNS?F ? Autoscaler ??????? metric filter ?????
explanations.en: Correct answers: A, C, and F. A deploys the CloudWatch agent and Fluent Bit with permissions to send metrics and logs, C creates CPU, memory, and node failure alarms that notify SNS, and F alarms on a metric filter for Autoscaler deployment errors.

contents.en: A company has deployed an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster with Amazon EC2 node groups. The company's DevOps team uses the Kubernetes Horizontal Pod Autoscaler and recently installed a supported EKS cluster Autoscaler. The DevOps team needs to implement a solution to collect metrics and logs of the EKS cluster to establish a baseline for performance. The DevOps team will create an initial set of thresholds for specific metrics and will update the thresholds over time as the cluster is used. The DevOps team must receive an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) email notification if the initial set of thresholds is exceeded or if the EKS cluster Autoscaler is not functioning properly. The solution must collect cluster, node, and pod metrics. The solution also must capture logs in Amazon CloudWatch. Which combination of steps should the DevOps team take to meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司已部署带有 Amazon EC2 node groups 的 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 集群。公司的 DevOps 团队使用 Kubernetes Horizontal Pod Autoscaler，并且最近安装了受支持的 EKS cluster Autoscaler。DevOps 团队需要实施一种解决方案来收集 EKS 集群的指标和日志，以建立性能基线。DevOps 团队将创建一组初始阈值用于特定指标，并会随着集群使用情况随时间更新这些阈值。如果初始阈值被超过，或者 EKS cluster Autoscaler 未正常运行，DevOps 团队必须收到 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 电子邮件通知。该解决方案必须收集集群、节点和 Pod 指标。该解决方案还必须在 Amazon CloudWatch 中捕获日志。DevOps 团队应采取哪组步骤组合来满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company discovers that its production environment and disaster recovery (DR) environment are deployed to the same AWS Region. All the production applications run on Amazon EC2 instances and are deployed by AWS CloudFormation. The applications use an Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP volume for application storage. No application data resides on the EC2 instances. A DevOps engineer copies the required AMIs to a new DR Region. The DevOps engineer also updates the CloudFormation code to accept a Region as a parameter. The storage needs to have an RPO of 10 minutes in the DR Region. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket in both Regions. Configure S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR) for the S3 buckets. Create a scheduled AWS Lambda function to copy any new content from the FSx for ONTAP volume to the S3 bucket in the production Region.

contents.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket in both Regions. Configure S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR) for the S3 buckets. Create a scheduled AWS Lambda function to copy any new content from the FSx for ONTAP volume to the S3 bucket in the production Region.
contents.zh: 在两个 Regions 中创建 Amazon S3 bucket。为 S3 buckets 配置 S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR)。创建计划的 AWS Lambda 函数，将 FSx for ONTAP volume 中的任何新内容复制到生产 Region 中的 S3 bucket。

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS Backup to create a backup vault and a custom backup plan that has a 10-minute frequency. Specify the DR Region as the target Region. Assign the EC2 instances in the production Region to the backup plan.

contents.en: Use AWS Backup to create a backup vault and a custom backup plan that has a 10-minute frequency. Specify the DR Region as the target Region. Assign the EC2 instances in the production Region to the backup plan.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Backup 创建 backup vault 和具有 10 分钟频率的 custom backup plan。将 DR Region 指定为目标 Region。将生产 Region 中的 EC2 实例分配给该 backup plan。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function to create snapshots of the instance store volumes that are attached to the EC2 instances. Configure the Lambda function to copy the snapshots to the DR Region and to remove the previous copies. Create an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule that invokes the Lambda function every 10 minutes.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function to create snapshots of the instance store volumes that are attached to the EC2 instances. Configure the Lambda function to copy the snapshots to the DR Region and to remove the previous copies. Create an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule that invokes the Lambda function every 10 minutes.
contents.zh: 创建 AWS Lambda 函数，为附加到 EC2 实例的 instance store volumes 创建 snapshots。配置 Lambda 函数将 snapshots 复制到 DR Region，并移除先前的副本。创建 Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule，每 10 分钟调用该 Lambda 函数。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an FSx for ONTAP instance in the DR Region. Configure a 5-minute schedule for a volume-level NetApp SnapMirror to replicate the volume from the production Region to the DR Region.

contents.en: Create an FSx for ONTAP instance in the DR Region. Configure a 5-minute schedule for a volume-level NetApp SnapMirror to replicate the volume from the production Region to the DR Region.
contents.zh: 在 DR Region 中创建 FSx for ONTAP instance。为 volume-level NetApp SnapMirror 配置 5 分钟计划，将 volume 从生产 Region 复制到 DR Region。

questions.explanation: ????? D?? DR ???? FSx for ONTAP???? 5 ??????? NetApp SnapMirror ????????????? 10 ?? RPO?

explanations.zh: ????? D?? DR ???? FSx for ONTAP???? 5 ??????? NetApp SnapMirror ????????????? 10 ?? RPO?
explanations.en: Correct answer: D. Creating FSx for ONTAP in the DR Region and configuring volume-level NetApp SnapMirror replication every 5 minutes satisfies the 10-minute RPO described in the discussion.

contents.en: A company discovers that its production environment and disaster recovery (DR) environment are deployed to the same AWS Region. All the production applications run on Amazon EC2 instances and are deployed by AWS CloudFormation. The applications use an Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP volume for application storage. No application data resides on the EC2 instances. A DevOps engineer copies the required AMIs to a new DR Region. The DevOps engineer also updates the CloudFormation code to accept a Region as a parameter. The storage needs to have an RPO of 10 minutes in the DR Region. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司发现其生产环境和灾难恢复 (DR) 环境部署在同一个 AWS Region。所有生产应用程序都运行在 Amazon EC2 实例上，并由 AWS CloudFormation 部署。应用程序使用 Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP volume 作为应用程序存储。EC2 实例上没有应用程序数据。DevOps 工程师将所需的 AMIs 复制到新的 DR Region。DevOps 工程师还更新了 CloudFormation 代码，以接受 Region 作为参数。存储需要在 DR Region 中具有 10 分钟的 RPO。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: During a security audit, a company discovered that some security groups allow SSH traffic from 0.0.0.0/0. A security team must implement a solution to detect and remediate this issue as soon as possible. The company uses one organization in AWS Organizations to manage all the company's AWS accounts. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Enable AWS Config for all AWS accounts. Use a periodic trigger to activate the vpe-sg-port-restriction-check AWS Config rule. Create an AWS Lambda function to remediate any noncompliant rules.

contents.en: Enable AWS Config for all AWS accounts. Use a periodic trigger to activate the vpe-sg-port-restriction-check AWS Config rule. Create an AWS Lambda function to remediate any noncompliant rules.
contents.zh: 为所有 AWS 账户启用 AWS Config。使用 periodic trigger 激活 vpe-sg-port-restriction-check AWS Config rule。创建 AWS Lambda 函数来修复任何不合规规则。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function in each AWS account to delete all the security group rules. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to match security group update events or creation events. Set the Lambda function in each account as a target for the rule.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function in each AWS account to delete all the security group rules. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to match security group update events or creation events. Set the Lambda function in each account as a target for the rule.
contents.zh: 在每个 AWS 账户中创建 AWS Lambda 函数以删除所有 security group rules。创建 Amazon EventBridge rule 来匹配 security group 更新事件或创建事件。将每个账户中的 Lambda 函数设置为该规则的目标。

options.label: C
options.content: Enable AWS Config for all AWS accounts. Create a custom AWS Config rule to run on the restricted-ssh configuration change trigger. Configure the rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function to remediate any noncompliant resources.

contents.en: Enable AWS Config for all AWS accounts. Create a custom AWS Config rule to run on the restricted-ssh configuration change trigger. Configure the rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function to remediate any noncompliant resources.
contents.zh: 为所有 AWS 账户启用 AWS Config。创建自定义 AWS Config rule，在 restricted-ssh configuration change trigger 上运行。配置该规则调用 AWS Lambda 函数来修复任何不合规资源。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS Systems Manager Automation document in each account to inspect all security groups and to delete noncompliant rules. Use an Amazon EventBridge rule to run the Automation document every hour.

contents.en: Create an AWS Systems Manager Automation document in each account to inspect all security groups and to delete noncompliant rules. Use an Amazon EventBridge rule to run the Automation document every hour.
contents.zh: 在每个账户中创建 AWS Systems Manager Automation document，以检查所有 security groups 并删除不合规规则。使用 Amazon EventBridge rule 每小时运行该 Automation document。

explanations.en: Correct answer: C. After AWS Config is enabled in all accounts, a custom rule can trigger on restricted-ssh configuration changes and invoke Lambda to remediate noncompliant resources, matching the need for quicker detection than periodic checks.

contents.en: During a security audit, a company discovered that some security groups allow SSH traffic from 0.0.0.0/0. A security team must implement a solution to detect and remediate this issue as soon as possible. The company uses one organization in AWS Organizations to manage all the company's AWS accounts. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 在一次安全审计期间，一家公司发现某些 security groups 允许来自 0.0.0.0/0 的 SSH 流量。安全团队必须实施一种解决方案，以尽快检测并修复此问题。该公司使用 AWS Organizations 中的一个组织来管理公司的所有 AWS 账户。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company's DevOps engineer must install a software package on 30 on-premises VMs and 15 Amazon EC2 instances. The DevOps engineer needs to ensure that all VMs receive the package in a process that is auditable and that any configuration drift on the VMs is automatically identified and alerted on. The company uses AWS Direct Connect to connect its on-premises data center to AWS. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Write a script that iterates through the list of VMs once a week. Configure the script to check for the package and install the package if the package is not found. Configure the script to send an email message notification to the system administrator if the package is not found.

contents.en: Write a script that iterates through the list of VMs once a week. Configure the script to check for the package and install the package if the package is not found. Configure the script to send an email message notification to the system administrator if the package is not found.
contents.zh: 编写一个脚本，每周遍历一次 VM 列表。配置该脚本检查软件包，并在未找到软件包时安装该软件包。配置该脚本在未找到软件包时向系统管理员发送电子邮件通知。

options.label: B
options.content: Install the AWS Systems Manager Agent (SSM Agent) on all VMs. Use the SSM Agent to install the package. Use AWS Config to monitor for configuration drift. Use Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) to notify the system administrator if any drift is found.

contents.en: Install the AWS Systems Manager Agent (SSM Agent) on all VMs. Use the SSM Agent to install the package. Use AWS Config to monitor for configuration drift. Use Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) to notify the system administrator if any drift is found.
contents.zh: 在所有 VM 上安装 AWS Systems Manager Agent (SSM Agent)。使用 SSM Agent 安装该软件包。使用 AWS Config 监控配置漂移。如果发现任何漂移，使用 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 通知系统管理员。

options.label: C
options.content: Write a script that checks if the package is installed across the environment. Configure the script to create a list of all VMs that are noncompliant. Configure the script to send the list to the system administrator, who will install the package on the noncompliant VMs.

contents.en: Write a script that checks if the package is installed across the environment. Configure the script to create a list of all VMs that are noncompliant. Configure the script to send the list to the system administrator, who will install the package on the noncompliant VMs.
contents.zh: 编写一个脚本，检查整个环境中是否已安装该软件包。配置该脚本创建所有不合规 VM 的列表。配置该脚本将列表发送给系统管理员，由系统管理员在不合规 VM 上安装该软件包。

options.label: D
options.content: Log in to each VM. Use a local package manager to install the package. Use AWS Config to monitor the AWS resources for configuration changes. Write a script to monitor the on-premises resources.

contents.en: Log in to each VM. Use a local package manager to install the package. Use AWS Config to monitor the AWS resources for configuration changes. Write a script to monitor the on-premises resources.
contents.zh: 登录到每台 VM。使用本地包管理器安装该软件包。使用 AWS Config 监控 AWS 资源的配置更改。编写脚本监控本地资源。

questions.explanation: ????? B???? VM ?? SSM Agent ?????? Systems Manager ????AWS Config ????????? SNS ??????????????

explanations.zh: ????? B???? VM ?? SSM Agent ?????? Systems Manager ????AWS Config ????????? SNS ??????????????
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. Installing the SSM Agent on all VMs lets Systems Manager install the package, while AWS Config monitors configuration drift and SNS notifies the administrator when drift is found.

contents.en: A company's DevOps engineer must install a software package on 30 on-premises VMs and 15 Amazon EC2 instances. The DevOps engineer needs to ensure that all VMs receive the package in a process that is auditable and that any configuration drift on the VMs is automatically identified and alerted on. The company uses AWS Direct Connect to connect its on-premises data center to AWS. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?
contents.zh: 一家公司的 DevOps 工程师必须在 30 台本地 VM 和 15 个 Amazon EC2 实例上安装软件包。DevOps 工程师需要确保所有 VM 都以可审计的流程接收该软件包，并且自动识别 VM 上的任何配置漂移并发出警报。该公司使用 AWS Direct Connect 将其本地数据中心连接到 AWS。哪种解决方案能以最高的运维效率满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has an AWS CodePipeline pipeline in the eu-west-1 Region. The pipeline stores the build artifacts in an Amazon S3 bucket. The pipeline builds and deploys an AWS Lambda function by using an AWS CloudFormation deploy action. A DevOps engineer needs to update the existing pipeline to also deploy the Lambda function to the us-east-1 Region. The pipeline has already been updated to create an additional artifact to deploy to us-east-1. Which combination of steps should the DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Modify the CloudFormation template to include a parameter for the Lambda function code's .zip file location. Create a new CloudFormation deploy action for us-east-1 in the pipeline. Configure the new deploy action to pass in the us-east-1 artifact location as a parameter override.

contents.en: Modify the CloudFormation template to include a parameter for the Lambda function code's .zip file location. Create a new CloudFormation deploy action for us-east-1 in the pipeline. Configure the new deploy action to pass in the us-east-1 artifact location as a parameter override.
contents.zh: 修改 CloudFormation template，为 Lambda function code 的 .zip file location 包含一个参数。在 pipeline 中为 us-east-1 创建新的 CloudFormation deploy action。配置新的 deploy action，将 us-east-1 artifact location 作为 parameter override 传入。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new CloudFormation deploy action for us-east-1 in the pipeline. Configure the new deploy action to use the CloudFormation template from the additional artifact that was created for us-east-1.

contents.en: Create a new CloudFormation deploy action for us-east-1 in the pipeline. Configure the new deploy action to use the CloudFormation template from the additional artifact that was created for us-east-1.
contents.zh: 在 pipeline 中为 us-east-1 创建新的 CloudFormation deploy action。配置新的 deploy action 使用为 us-east-1 创建的额外 artifact 中的 CloudFormation template。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an S3 bucket in us-east-1. Configure the S3 bucket policy to allow CodePipeline to have read and write access.

contents.en: Create an S3 bucket in us-east-1. Configure the S3 bucket policy to allow CodePipeline to have read and write access.
contents.zh: 在 us-east-1 中创建 S3 bucket。配置 S3 bucket policy，允许 CodePipeline 拥有读写访问权限。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an S3 bucket in us-east-1. Configure S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR) from the S3 bucket in eu-west-1 to the S3 bucket in us-east-1.

contents.en: Create an S3 bucket in us-east-1. Configure S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR) from the S3 bucket in eu-west-1 to the S3 bucket in us-east-1.
contents.zh: 在 us-east-1 中创建 S3 bucket。配置从 eu-west-1 中 S3 bucket 到 us-east-1 中 S3 bucket 的 S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR)。

options.label: E
options.content: Modify the pipeline to include the S3 bucket for us-east-1 as an artifact store. Create a new CloudFormation deploy action for us-east-1 in the pipeline. Configure the new deploy action to use the CloudFormation template from the us-east-1 artifact.

contents.en: Modify the pipeline to include the S3 bucket for us-east-1 as an artifact store. Create a new CloudFormation deploy action for us-east-1 in the pipeline. Configure the new deploy action to use the CloudFormation template from the us-east-1 artifact.
contents.zh: 修改 pipeline，将 us-east-1 的 S3 bucket 包含为 artifact store。在 pipeline 中为 us-east-1 创建新的 CloudFormation deploy action。配置新的 deploy action 使用来自 us-east-1 artifact 的 CloudFormation template。

questions.explanation: ????? C?E?C ? us-east-1 ?? S3 artifact bucket ??? CodePipeline ???E ?? bucket ?? us-east-1 artifact store?????? us-east-1 artifact ? CloudFormation ?????

explanations.zh: ????? C?E?C ? us-east-1 ?? S3 artifact bucket ??? CodePipeline ???E ?? bucket ?? us-east-1 artifact store?????? us-east-1 artifact ? CloudFormation ?????
explanations.en: Correct answers: C and E. C creates the us-east-1 S3 artifact bucket with CodePipeline read/write access, and E adds that bucket as the us-east-1 artifact store plus a CloudFormation deploy action that uses the us-east-1 artifact.

contents.en: A company has an AWS CodePipeline pipeline in the eu-west-1 Region. The pipeline stores the build artifacts in an Amazon S3 bucket. The pipeline builds and deploys an AWS Lambda function by using an AWS CloudFormation deploy action. A DevOps engineer needs to update the existing pipeline to also deploy the Lambda function to the us-east-1 Region. The pipeline has already been updated to create an additional artifact to deploy to us-east-1. Which combination of steps should the DevOps engineer take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司在 eu-west-1 Region 中有一个 AWS CodePipeline pipeline。该 pipeline 将构建 artifacts 存储在 Amazon S3 bucket 中。该 pipeline 使用 AWS CloudFormation deploy action 构建并部署 AWS Lambda 函数。DevOps 工程师需要更新现有 pipeline，使其也将 Lambda 函数部署到 us-east-1 Region。该 pipeline 已更新为创建一个额外的 artifact，用于部署到 us-east-1。DevOps 工程师应采取哪组步骤组合来满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company uses an AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) application for its infrastructure. The AWS CDK application creates AWS Lambda functions and the IAM roles that are attached to the functions. The company also uses AWS Organizations. The company's developers can assume the AWS CDK application deployment role. The company's security team discovered that the developers and the role used to deploy the AWS CDK application have more permissions than necessary. The security team also discovered that the roles attached to the Lambda functions that the CDK application creates have more permissions than necessary. The developers must not have the ability to grant additional permissions. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an SCP that denies the iam:CreateRole action and the iam:UpdateRole action for the developer role and the AWS CDK application deployment role. Centrally create new IAM roles to attach to the Lambda functions for the developers to use to provision Lambda functions.

contents.en: Create an SCP that denies the iam:CreateRole action and the iam:UpdateRole action for the developer role and the AWS CDK application deployment role. Centrally create new IAM roles to attach to the Lambda functions for the developers to use to provision Lambda functions.
contents.zh: 创建 SCP，拒绝 developer role 和 AWS CDK application deployment role 的 iam:CreateRole 操作和 iam:UpdateRole 操作。集中创建新的 IAM roles，附加到 Lambda 函数，供开发人员用于预置 Lambda 函数。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an IAM permission boundary policy. Define the maximum actions that the AWS CDK application requires in the policy. Update the account's AWS CDK bootstrapping to use the permission boundary. Update the configuration in the AWS CDK application for the default permissions boundary to use the policy.

contents.en: Create an IAM permission boundary policy. Define the maximum actions that the AWS CDK application requires in the policy. Update the account's AWS CDK bootstrapping to use the permission boundary. Update the configuration in the AWS CDK application for the default permissions boundary to use the policy.
contents.zh: 创建 IAM permission boundary policy。在该 policy 中定义 AWS CDK 应用程序所需的最大操作。更新账户的 AWS CDK bootstrapping 以使用 permission boundary。更新 AWS CDK 应用程序中的配置，使 default permissions boundary 使用该 policy。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an IAM permission boundary policy. Define the maximum actions that the AWS CDK application requires in the policy. Instruct the developers to use the permission boundary policy name when they create a role in the AWS CDK application code.

contents.en: Create an IAM permission boundary policy. Define the maximum actions that the AWS CDK application requires in the policy. Instruct the developers to use the permission boundary policy name when they create a role in the AWS CDK application code.
contents.zh: 创建 IAM permission boundary policy。在该 policy 中定义 AWS CDK 应用程序所需的最大操作。指示开发人员在 AWS CDK application code 中创建 role 时使用 permission boundary policy name。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an SCP that denies the iam:CreateRole action and the iam:UpdateRole action for the developer role. Give the AWS CDK deployment role access to create roles associated with Lambda functions. Run AWS Identity and Access Management Access Analyzer to verify that the Lambda functions role does not have permissions.

contents.en: Create an SCP that denies the iam:CreateRole action and the iam:UpdateRole action for the developer role. Give the AWS CDK deployment role access to create roles associated with Lambda functions. Run AWS Identity and Access Management Access Analyzer to verify that the Lambda functions role does not have permissions.
contents.zh: 创建 SCP，拒绝 developer role 的 iam:CreateRole 操作和 iam:UpdateRole 操作。向 AWS CDK deployment role 授予创建与 Lambda 函数关联的 roles 的访问权限。运行 AWS Identity and Access Management Access Analyzer 来验证 Lambda functions role 没有权限。

explanations.en: Correct answer: B. A permissions boundary configured in CDK bootstrapping and the application's default boundary proactively limits the maximum permissions of roles created by CDK, reducing operational complexity compared with reactive validation.

contents.en: A company uses an AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) application for its infrastructure. The AWS CDK application creates AWS Lambda functions and the IAM roles that are attached to the functions. The company also uses AWS Organizations. The company's developers can assume the AWS CDK application deployment role. The company's security team discovered that the developers and the role used to deploy the AWS CDK application have more permissions than necessary. The security team also discovered that the roles attached to the Lambda functions that the CDK application creates have more permissions than necessary. The developers must not have the ability to grant additional permissions. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) 应用程序管理其基础设施。AWS CDK 应用程序创建 AWS Lambda 函数以及附加到这些函数的 IAM roles。该公司还使用 AWS Organizations。公司的开发人员可以代入 AWS CDK application deployment role。公司的安全团队发现，开发人员和用于部署 AWS CDK 应用程序的 role 拥有超出必要范围的权限。安全团队还发现，附加到 CDK 应用程序创建的 Lambda 函数的 roles 拥有超出必要范围的权限。开发人员不得具备授予额外权限的能力。哪种解决方案能以最少的运维开销满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) private registries to store container images. A DevOps team needs to ensure that the container images are regularly scanned for software package vulnerabilities. Which solution will meet this requirement?

options.label: A
options.content: Enable enhanced scanning for private registries in Amazon ECR.

contents.en: Enable enhanced scanning for private registries in Amazon ECR.
contents.zh: 为 Amazon ECR 中的 private registries 启用 enhanced scanning。

options.label: B
options.content: Enable basic continuous scanning for private registries in Amazon ECR.

contents.en: Enable basic continuous scanning for private registries in Amazon ECR.
contents.zh: 为 Amazon ECR 中的 private registries 启用 basic continuous scanning。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS System Manager Automation document to scan images by using the AWS SDK. Configure the Automation document to run when a new image is pushed to an ECR registry.

contents.en: Create an AWS System Manager Automation document to scan images by using the AWS SDK. Configure the Automation document to run when a new image is pushed to an ECR registry.
contents.zh: 创建 AWS System Manager Automation document，使用 AWS SDK 扫描镜像。配置该 Automation document 在新镜像推送到 ECR registry 时运行。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function that scans all images in Amazon ECR by using the AWS SDK. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function each day.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that scans all images in Amazon ECR by using the AWS SDK. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke the Lambda function each day.
contents.zh: 创建 AWS Lambda 函数，使用 AWS SDK 扫描 Amazon ECR 中的所有镜像。创建 Amazon EventBridge rule 每天调用该 Lambda 函数。

explanations.en: Correct answer: A. ECR enhanced scanning uses managed scanning and supports continuous scanning, scan on push, and periodic rescans, providing ongoing image vulnerability findings with low operational overhead.

contents.en: A company uses Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) private registries to store container images. A DevOps team needs to ensure that the container images are regularly scanned for software package vulnerabilities. Which solution will meet this requirement?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) private registries 存储容器镜像。DevOps 团队需要确保定期扫描容器镜像的软件包漏洞。哪种解决方案可以满足此要求？

questions.content: A security team sets up a workflow that invokes an AWS Step Functions workflow when Amazon EventBridge matches specific events. The events can be generated by several AWS services. AWS CloudTrail records user activities. The security team notices that some important events do not invoke the workflow as expected. The CloudTrail logs do not indicate any direct errors related to the missing events. Which combination of steps will identify the root cause of the missing event invocations? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Enable EventBridge schema discovery on the event bus to determine whether the event patterns match the expected schema.

contents.en: Enable EventBridge schema discovery on the event bus to determine whether the event patterns match the expected schema.
contents.zh: 在 event bus 上启用 EventBridge schema discovery，以确定 event patterns 是否与预期 schema 匹配。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure Amazon CloudWatch to monitor EventBridge metrics and Step Functions metrics. Set up alerts for anomalies in event patterns and workflow invocations.

contents.en: Configure Amazon CloudWatch to monitor EventBridge metrics and Step Functions metrics. Set up alerts for anomalies in event patterns and workflow invocations.
contents.zh: 配置 Amazon CloudWatch 监控 EventBridge metrics 和 Step Functions metrics。为 event patterns 和 workflow invocations 中的异常设置警报。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure an AWS Lambda logging function to monitor and log events from EventBridge to provide more details about the processed events.

contents.en: Configure an AWS Lambda logging function to monitor and log events from EventBridge to provide more details about the processed events.
contents.zh: 配置 AWS Lambda logging function 监控并记录来自 EventBridge 的事件，以提供有关已处理事件的更多详细信息。

options.label: D
options.content: Review the Step Functions execution history for patterns of failures or timeouts that could correlate to the missing event invocations.

contents.en: Review the Step Functions execution history for patterns of failures or timeouts that could correlate to the missing event invocations.
contents.zh: 查看 Step Functions execution history，查找可能与缺失事件调用相关联的失败或超时模式。

options.label: E
options.content: Review metrics for the EventBridge failed invocations to ensure that the IAM execution role that is attached to the rule has sufficient permissions.

contents.en: Review metrics for the EventBridge failed invocations to ensure that the IAM execution role that is attached to the rule has sufficient permissions.
contents.zh: 查看 EventBridge failed invocations 的指标，以确保附加到规则的 IAM execution role 具有足够权限。

options.label: F
options.content: Verify that the Step Functions workflow has the correct permissions to be invoked by EventBridge.

contents.en: Verify that the Step Functions workflow has the correct permissions to be invoked by EventBridge.
contents.zh: 验证 Step Functions workflow 具有可由 EventBridge 调用的正确权限。

questions.explanation: ????? A?B?E?A ? EventBridge schema discovery ???????B ?? EventBridge ? Step Functions ??????E ?? EventBridge failed invocations ??????????????????

explanations.zh: ????? A?B?E?A ? EventBridge schema discovery ???????B ?? EventBridge ? Step Functions ??????E ?? EventBridge failed invocations ??????????????????
explanations.en: Correct answers: A, B, and E. A uses EventBridge schema discovery to validate event structure, B monitors EventBridge and Step Functions metrics with alerts, and E checks EventBridge failed invocations for insufficient rule execution role permissions.

contents.en: A security team sets up a workflow that invokes an AWS Step Functions workflow when Amazon EventBridge matches specific events. The events can be generated by several AWS services. AWS CloudTrail records user activities. The security team notices that some important events do not invoke the workflow as expected. The CloudTrail logs do not indicate any direct errors related to the missing events. Which combination of steps will identify the root cause of the missing event invocations? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 安全团队设置了一个工作流，当 Amazon EventBridge 匹配特定事件时调用 AWS Step Functions 工作流。这些事件可以由多个 AWS 服务生成。AWS CloudTrail 记录用户活动。安全团队注意到，一些重要事件没有按预期调用工作流。CloudTrail 日志未显示与缺失事件相关的任何直接错误。哪组步骤组合将识别缺失事件调用的根本原因？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company's DevOps engineer uses AWS Systems Manager to perform maintenance tasks. The company has a few Amazon EC2 instances that require a restart after notifications from AWS Health. The DevOps engineer must implement an automated solution that uses Amazon EventBridge to remediate the notifications during the company's scheduled maintenance windows. How should the DevOps engineer configure an EventBridge rule to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure an event source of AWS Health. Configure event types that indicate scheduled instance termination and retirement. Target the AWS-RestartEC2Instance Systems Manager Automation runbook to restart the EC2 instances.

contents.en: Configure an event source of AWS Health. Configure event types that indicate scheduled instance termination and retirement. Target the AWS-RestartEC2Instance Systems Manager Automation runbook to restart the EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 配置事件源为 AWS Health。配置表示计划实例终止和退役的事件类型。将 AWS-RestartEC2Instance Systems Manager Automation runbook 作为目标以重启 EC2 实例。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure an event source of Systems Manager. Configure an event type that indicates a maintenance window. Target the AWS-RestartEC2Instance Systems Manager Automation runbook to restart the EC2 instances.

contents.en: Configure an event source of Systems Manager. Configure an event type that indicates a maintenance window. Target the AWS-RestartEC2Instance Systems Manager Automation runbook to restart the EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 配置事件源为 Systems Manager。配置表示 maintenance window 的事件类型。将 AWS-RestartEC2Instance Systems Manager Automation runbook 作为目标以重启 EC2 实例。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure an event source of AWS Health. Configure event types that indicate scheduled instance termination and retirement. Target a newly created AWS Lambda function that registers a Systems Manager maintenance window task to restart the EC2 instances.

contents.en: Configure an event source of AWS Health. Configure event types that indicate scheduled instance termination and retirement. Target a newly created AWS Lambda function that registers a Systems Manager maintenance window task to restart the EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 配置事件源为 AWS Health。配置表示计划实例终止和退役的事件类型。将新创建的 AWS Lambda 函数作为目标，该函数注册 Systems Manager maintenance window task 以重启 EC2 实例。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure an event source of EC2. Configure an event type that indicates instance state notification. Target a newly created AWS Lambda function that registers a Systems Manager maintenance window task to restart the EC2 instances.

contents.en: Configure an event source of EC2. Configure an event type that indicates instance state notification. Target a newly created AWS Lambda function that registers a Systems Manager maintenance window task to restart the EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 配置事件源为 EC2。配置表示 instance state notification 的事件类型。将新创建的 AWS Lambda 函数作为目标，该函数注册 Systems Manager maintenance window task 以重启 EC2 实例。

questions.explanation: ????? A??? AWS Health ????????????????????????? AWS-RestartEC2Instance Systems Manager Automation runbook????????? EC2 ???

explanations.zh: ????? A??? AWS Health ????????????????????????? AWS-RestartEC2Instance Systems Manager Automation runbook????????? EC2 ???
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. Using AWS Health events for scheduled instance termination and retirement, with AWS-RestartEC2Instance as the Systems Manager Automation target, automates restarting the affected EC2 instances.

contents.en: A company's DevOps engineer uses AWS Systems Manager to perform maintenance tasks. The company has a few Amazon EC2 instances that require a restart after notifications from AWS Health. The DevOps engineer must implement an automated solution that uses Amazon EventBridge to remediate the notifications during the company's scheduled maintenance windows. How should the DevOps engineer configure an EventBridge rule to meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司的 DevOps 工程师使用 AWS Systems Manager 执行维护任务。该公司有少量 Amazon EC2 实例在收到 AWS Health 通知后需要重启。DevOps 工程师必须实施一种自动化解决方案，使用 Amazon EventBridge 在公司的计划维护窗口期间修复这些通知。DevOps 工程师应如何配置 EventBridge 规则以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer manages an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that builds and deploys a web application on AWS. The pipeline has a source stage, a build stage, and a deploy stage. When deployed properly, the web application responds with a 200 OK HTTP response code when the URL of the home page is requested. The home page recently returned a 503 HTTP response code after CodePipeline deployed the application. The DevOps engineer needs to add an automated test into the pipeline. The automated test must ensure that the application returns a 200 OK HTTP response code after the application is deployed. The pipeline must fail if the response code is not present during the test. The DevOps engineer has added a CheckURL stage after the deploy stage in the pipeline. What should the DevOps engineer do next to implement the automated test?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure the CheckURL stage to use an Amazon CloudWatch action. Configure the action to use a canary synthetic monitoring check on the application URL and to report a success or failure to CodePipeline.

contents.en: Configure the CheckURL stage to use an Amazon CloudWatch action. Configure the action to use a canary synthetic monitoring check on the application URL and to report a success or failure to CodePipeline.
contents.zh: 配置 CheckURL stage 使用 Amazon CloudWatch action。配置该 action 对应用程序 URL 使用 canary synthetic monitoring check，并向 CodePipeline 报告成功或失败。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function to check the response code status of the URL and to report a success or failure to CodePipeline. Configure an action in the CheckURL stage to invoke the Lambda function.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function to check the response code status of the URL and to report a success or failure to CodePipeline. Configure an action in the CheckURL stage to invoke the Lambda function.
contents.zh: 创建 AWS Lambda 函数，检查 URL 的 response code status，并向 CodePipeline 报告成功或失败。配置 CheckURL stage 中的 action 调用该 Lambda 函数。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the CheckURL stage to use an AWS CodeDeploy action. Configure the action with an input artifact that is the URL of the application and to report a success or failure to CodePipeline.

contents.en: Configure the CheckURL stage to use an AWS CodeDeploy action. Configure the action with an input artifact that is the URL of the application and to report a success or failure to CodePipeline.
contents.zh: 配置 CheckURL stage 使用 AWS CodeDeploy action。为该 action 配置一个作为应用程序 URL 的 input artifact，并向 CodePipeline 报告成功或失败。

options.label: D
options.content: Deploy an Amazon API Gateway HTTP API that checks the response code status of the URL and that reports success or failure to CodePipeline. Configure the CheckURL stage to use the AWS Device Farm test action and to provide the API Gateway HTTP API as an input artifact.

contents.en: Deploy an Amazon API Gateway HTTP API that checks the response code status of the URL and that reports success or failure to CodePipeline. Configure the CheckURL stage to use the AWS Device Farm test action and to provide the API Gateway HTTP API as an input artifact.
contents.zh: 部署 Amazon API Gateway HTTP API，用于检查 URL 的 response code status 并向 CodePipeline 报告成功或失败。配置 CheckURL stage 使用 AWS Device Farm test action，并将 API Gateway HTTP API 作为 input artifact 提供。

questions.explanation: ????? B?Lambda ???????? URL ? HTTP ?????? CodePipeline ????????????? CheckURL ??????? 200 OK ????????

explanations.zh: ????? B?Lambda ???????? URL ? HTTP ?????? CodePipeline ????????????? CheckURL ??????? 200 OK ????????
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. Lambda can check the application's home page HTTP response code and report success or failure to CodePipeline; as a CheckURL stage action, a non-200 response can fail the pipeline.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer manages an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that builds and deploys a web application on AWS. The pipeline has a source stage, a build stage, and a deploy stage. When deployed properly, the web application responds with a 200 OK HTTP response code when the URL of the home page is requested. The home page recently returned a 503 HTTP response code after CodePipeline deployed the application. The DevOps engineer needs to add an automated test into the pipeline. The automated test must ensure that the application returns a 200 OK HTTP response code after the application is deployed. The pipeline must fail if the response code is not present during the test. The DevOps engineer has added a CheckURL stage after the deploy stage in the pipeline. What should the DevOps engineer do next to implement the automated test?
contents.zh: DevOps 工程师管理一个在 AWS 上构建并部署 Web 应用程序的 AWS CodePipeline pipeline。该 pipeline 有 source stage、build stage 和 deploy stage。正确部署时，当请求主页 URL 时，Web 应用程序会返回 200 OK HTTP response code。最近 CodePipeline 部署应用程序后，主页返回了 503 HTTP response code。DevOps 工程师需要向 pipeline 中添加自动化测试。该自动化测试必须确保应用程序部署后返回 200 OK HTTP response code。如果测试期间不存在该响应码，pipeline 必须失败。DevOps 工程师已在 pipeline 的 deploy stage 之后添加了 CheckURL stage。DevOps 工程师接下来应做什么来实施该自动化测试？

questions.content: A company has an application that uploads access logs to an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. The fields in the log lines include the response code and the application name. The company wants to create a CloudWatch metric to track the number of requests by response code in a specific range and with a specific application name. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a CloudWatch Logs log event filter on the CloudWatch Logs log stream to match the response code range. Configure the log event filter to increment a metric. Set the response code and application name as dimensions.

contents.en: Create a CloudWatch Logs log event filter on the CloudWatch Logs log stream to match the response code range. Configure the log event filter to increment a metric. Set the response code and application name as dimensions.
contents.zh: 在 CloudWatch Logs log stream 上创建 CloudWatch Logs log event filter，以匹配 response code 范围。配置该 log event filter 递增一个 metric。将 response code 和 application name 设置为 dimensions。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a CloudWatch Logs metric filter on the CloudWatch Logs log group to match the response code range. Configure the metric filter to increment a metric. Set the response code and application name as dimensions.

contents.en: Create a CloudWatch Logs metric filter on the CloudWatch Logs log group to match the response code range. Configure the metric filter to increment a metric. Set the response code and application name as dimensions.
contents.zh: 在 CloudWatch Logs log group 上创建 CloudWatch Logs metric filter，以匹配 response code 范围。配置该 metric filter 递增一个 metric。将 response code 和 application name 设置为 dimensions。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a CloudWatch Contributor Insights rule on the CloudWatch Logs log stream with a filter to match the response code range. Configure the Contributor Insights rule to increment a CloudWatch metric with the response code and application name as dimensions.

contents.en: Create a CloudWatch Contributor Insights rule on the CloudWatch Logs log stream with a filter to match the response code range. Configure the Contributor Insights rule to increment a CloudWatch metric with the response code and application name as dimensions.
contents.zh: 在 CloudWatch Logs log stream 上创建 CloudWatch Contributor Insights rule，并带有用于匹配 response code 范围的 filter。配置 Contributor Insights rule，使其使用 response code 和 application name 作为 dimensions 递增 CloudWatch metric。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a CloudWatch Logs Insights query on the CloudWatch Logs log group to match the response code range. Configure the Logs Insights query to increment a CloudWatch metric with the response code and application name as dimensions.

contents.en: Create a CloudWatch Logs Insights query on the CloudWatch Logs log group to match the response code range. Configure the Logs Insights query to increment a CloudWatch metric with the response code and application name as dimensions.
contents.zh: 在 CloudWatch Logs log group 上创建 CloudWatch Logs Insights query，以匹配 response code 范围。配置 Logs Insights query，使其使用 response code 和 application name 作为 dimensions 递增 CloudWatch metric。

questions.explanation: ????? B?CloudWatch Logs metric filter ?????????????????????? response code ? application name ????????????????????

explanations.zh: ????? B?CloudWatch Logs metric filter ?????????????????????? response code ? application name ????????????????????
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. A CloudWatch Logs metric filter can match the response code range in log events, increment a metric, and set response code and application name as dimensions for per-application and per-code tracking.

contents.en: A company has an application that uploads access logs to an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. The fields in the log lines include the response code and the application name. The company wants to create a CloudWatch metric to track the number of requests by response code in a specific range and with a specific application name. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个应用程序将访问日志上传到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group。日志行中的字段包括 response code 和 application name。该公司希望创建一个 CloudWatch metric，用于按特定范围内的 response code 和特定 application name 跟踪请求数。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer provisioned an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster with managed node groups. The DevOps engineer associated an OpenID Connect (OIDC) issuer with the cluster. The DevOps engineer is configuring Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) General Purpose SSD (gp3) volumes for the cluster. The DevOps engineer attempts to initiate a PersistentVolumeClaim (PVC) request but is unable to provision a volume. To troubleshoot the issue, the DevOps engineer runs the kubectl describe pyc command. The DevOps engineer receives a failed to provision volume with StorageClass error and a could not create volume in EC2:UnauthorizedOperation error. Which solution will resolve these errors?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a Kubernetes cluster role that allows the persistent volumes to perform get, list, watch, create, and delete operations. Configure the cluster role to allow get, list, and watch operations for storage in the cluster.

contents.en: Create a Kubernetes cluster role that allows the persistent volumes to perform get, list, watch, create, and delete operations. Configure the cluster role to allow get, list, and watch operations for storage in the cluster.
