contents.zh: 创建 Kubernetes cluster role，允许 persistent volumes 执行 get、list、watch、create 和 delete 操作。配置 cluster role 允许对集群中的 storage 执行 get、list 和 watch 操作。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon EBS Container Storage Interface (CSI) driver IAM role that has the required permissions and trust relationships. Attach the IAM role to the Amazon EBS CSI driver add-on in the cluster.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EBS Container Storage Interface (CSI) driver IAM role that has the required permissions and trust relationships. Attach the IAM role to the Amazon EBS CSI driver add-on in the cluster.
contents.zh: 创建具有所需权限和 trust relationships 的 Amazon EBS Container Storage Interface (CSI) driver IAM role。将 IAM role 附加到集群中的 Amazon EBS CSI driver add-on。

options.label: C
options.content: Add the ebs.csi.aws.com/volumeType:gp3 annotation to the PersistentVolumeClaim object in the cluster.

contents.en: Add the ebs.csi.aws.com/volumeType:gp3 annotation to the PersistentVolumeClaim object in the cluster.
contents.zh: 将 ebs.csi.aws.com/volumeType:gp3 annotation 添加到集群中的 PersistentVolumeClaim object。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a Kubernetes storage class object. Set the provisioner value to ebs.csi.aws.com. Set the volumeBindingMode value to WaitForFirstConsumer in the luster.

contents.en: Create a Kubernetes storage class object. Set the provisioner value to ebs.csi.aws.com. Set the volumeBindingMode value to WaitForFirstConsumer in the luster.
contents.zh: 创建 Kubernetes storage class object。将 provisioner 值设置为 ebs.csi.aws.com。将集群中的 volumeBindingMode 值设置为 WaitForFirstConsumer。

questions.explanation: ????? B??? UnauthorizedOperation ?? EBS CSI driver ???? EC2 API ????????? EBS CSI driver ??????? OIDC ????? IAM role????? add-on ???

explanations.zh: ????? B??? UnauthorizedOperation ?? EBS CSI driver ???? EC2 API ????????? EBS CSI driver ??????? OIDC ????? IAM role????? add-on ???
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. The UnauthorizedOperation error indicates the EBS CSI driver lacks EC2 API permissions to create volumes; creating an IAM role with the required permissions and OIDC trust, then attaching it to the add-on, addresses that gap.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer provisioned an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster with managed node groups. The DevOps engineer associated an OpenID Connect (OIDC) issuer with the cluster. The DevOps engineer is configuring Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) General Purpose SSD (gp3) volumes for the cluster. The DevOps engineer attempts to initiate a PersistentVolumeClaim (PVC) request but is unable to provision a volume. To troubleshoot the issue, the DevOps engineer runs the kubectl describe pyc command. The DevOps engineer receives a failed to provision volume with StorageClass error and a could not create volume in EC2:UnauthorizedOperation error. Which solution will resolve these errors?
contents.zh: DevOps 工程师预置了一个带有 managed node groups 的 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 集群。DevOps 工程师将 OpenID Connect (OIDC) issuer 与该集群关联。DevOps 工程师正在为该集群配置 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) General Purpose SSD (gp3) volumes。DevOps 工程师尝试发起 PersistentVolumeClaim (PVC) 请求，但无法预置 volume。为排查问题，DevOps 工程师运行 kubectl describe pyc 命令。DevOps 工程师收到 failed to provision volume with StorageClass 错误和 could not create volume in EC2:UnauthorizedOperation 错误。哪种解决方案可以解决这些错误？

questions.content: A company runs a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances in a VPC. The company's employees remotely access the EC2 instances by using the Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP). The company wants to collect metrics about how many RDP sessions the employees initiate every day. Which combination of steps will meet this requirement? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to EC2 Instance State-change Notification events.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to EC2 Instance State-change Notification events.
contents.zh: 创建 Amazon EventBridge rule，对 EC2 Instance State-change Notification events 做出反应。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. Specify the log group as a target for the EventBridge rule.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. Specify the log group as a target for the EventBridge rule.
contents.zh: 创建 Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group。将该 log group 指定为 EventBridge rule 的目标。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a flow log in VPC Flow Logs.

contents.en: Create a flow log in VPC Flow Logs.
contents.zh: 在 VPC Flow Logs 中创建 flow log。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. Specify the log group as a destination for the flow log.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. Specify the log group as a destination for the flow log.
contents.zh: 创建 Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group。将该 log group 指定为 flow log 的目标。

options.label: E
options.content: Create a log group metric filter.

contents.en: Create a log group metric filter.
contents.zh: 创建 log group metric filter。

options.label: F
options.content: Create a log group subscription filter. Use EventBridge as the destination.

contents.en: Create a log group subscription filter. Use EventBridge as the destination.
contents.zh: 创建 log group subscription filter。使用 EventBridge 作为目标。

questions.explanation: ????? C?D?E?C ?? VPC Flow Logs ???????D ? flow log ??? CloudWatch Logs log group?E ? log group ??? metric filter ??? RDP ?????

explanations.zh: ????? C?D?E?C ?? VPC Flow Logs ???????D ? flow log ??? CloudWatch Logs log group?E ? log group ??? metric filter ??? RDP ?????
explanations.en: Correct answers: C, D, and E. C creates VPC Flow Logs to capture network traffic, D sends the flow logs to a CloudWatch Logs log group, and E creates a metric filter on that log group to count RDP connection events.

contents.en: A company runs a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances in a VPC. The company's employees remotely access the EC2 instances by using the Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP). The company wants to collect metrics about how many RDP sessions the employees initiate every day. Which combination of steps will meet this requirement? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司在 VPC 中运行一组 Amazon EC2 实例。公司的员工使用 Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP) 远程访问 EC2 实例。该公司希望收集有关员工每天发起多少个 RDP 会话的指标。哪组步骤组合可以满足此要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company is using Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) to run its applications. The EKS cluster is successfully running multiple pods. The company stores the pod images in Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR). The company needs to configure Pod Identity access for the EKS cluster. The company has already updated the node IAM role by using the permissions for Pod Identity access. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an IAM OpenID Connect (OIDC) provider for the EKS cluster.

contents.en: Create an IAM OpenID Connect (OIDC) provider for the EKS cluster.
contents.zh: 为 EKS 集群创建 IAM OpenID Connect (OIDC) provider。

options.label: B
options.content: Ensure that the nodes can reach the EKS Auth API. Add and configure the EKS Pod Identity Agent add-on for the EKS cluster.

contents.en: Ensure that the nodes can reach the EKS Auth API. Add and configure the EKS Pod Identity Agent add-on for the EKS cluster.
contents.zh: 确保节点可以访问 EKS Auth API。为 EKS 集群添加并配置 EKS Pod Identity Agent add-on。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an EKS access entry that uses the API_AND-CONFIG_MAP cluster authentication mode.

contents.en: Create an EKS access entry that uses the API_AND-CONFIG_MAP cluster authentication mode.
contents.zh: 创建使用 API_AND-CONFIG_MAP cluster authentication mode 的 EKS access entry。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure the AWS Security Token Service (AWS STS) endpoint for the Kubernetes service account that the pods in the EKS cluster use.

contents.en: Configure the AWS Security Token Service (AWS STS) endpoint for the Kubernetes service account that the pods in the EKS cluster use.
contents.zh: 为 EKS 集群中的 pods 使用的 Kubernetes service account 配置 AWS Security Token Service (AWS STS) endpoint。

questions.explanation: ????? B???? EKS Pod Identity???????? EKS Auth API????????? EKS Pod Identity Agent add-on ????????

explanations.zh: ????? B???? EKS Pod Identity???????? EKS Auth API????????? EKS Pod Identity Agent add-on ????????
explanations.en: Correct answer: B. To use EKS Pod Identity, nodes must reach the EKS Auth API, and the EKS Pod Identity Agent add-on must be installed so it can request temporary credentials.

contents.en: A company is using Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) to run its applications. The EKS cluster is successfully running multiple pods. The company stores the pod images in Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR). The company needs to configure Pod Identity access for the EKS cluster. The company has already updated the node IAM role by using the permissions for Pod Identity access. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在使用 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 运行其应用程序。EKS 集群已成功运行多个 pods。该公司将 pod images 存储在 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) 中。该公司需要为 EKS 集群配置 Pod Identity 访问权限。该公司已经使用 Pod Identity access 的权限更新了 node IAM role。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has multiple AWS accounts in an organization in AWS Organizations that has all features enabled. The company's DevOps administrator needs to improve security across all the company's AWS accounts. The administrator needs to identify the top users and roles in use across all accounts. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a new organization trail in AWS CloudTrail. Configure the trail to send log events to Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Create a CloudWatch Contributor Insights rule for the userIdentity.arn log field. View the results in CloudWatch Contributor Insights.

contents.en: Create a new organization trail in AWS CloudTrail. Configure the trail to send log events to Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Create a CloudWatch Contributor Insights rule for the userIdentity.arn log field. View the results in CloudWatch Contributor Insights.
contents.zh: 在 AWS CloudTrail 中创建新的 organization trail。配置该 trail 将 log events 发送到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs。为 userIdentity.arn log field 创建 CloudWatch Contributor Insights rule。在 CloudWatch Contributor Insights 中查看结果。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an unused access analysis for the organization by using AWS Identity and Access Management Access Analyzer. Review the analyzer results and determine if each finding has the intended level of permissions required for the workload.

contents.en: Create an unused access analysis for the organization by using AWS Identity and Access Management Access Analyzer. Review the analyzer results and determine if each finding has the intended level of permissions required for the workload.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Identity and Access Management Access Analyzer 为组织创建 unused access analysis。查看 analyzer 结果，并确定每个 finding 是否具有工作负载所需的预期权限级别。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a new organization trail in AWS CloudTrail. Create a table in Amazon Athena that uses partition projection. Load the Athena table with CloudTrail data. Query the Athena table to find the top users and roles.

contents.en: Create a new organization trail in AWS CloudTrail. Create a table in Amazon Athena that uses partition projection. Load the Athena table with CloudTrail data. Query the Athena table to find the top users and roles.
contents.zh: 在 AWS CloudTrail 中创建新的 organization trail。在 Amazon Athena 中创建使用 partition projection 的表。用 CloudTrail data 加载 Athena 表。查询 Athena 表以查找使用最多的用户和角色。

options.label: D
options.content: Generate a Service access report for each account by using Organizations. From the results, pull the last accessed date and last accessed by account fields to find the top users and roles.

contents.en: Generate a Service access report for each account by using Organizations. From the results, pull the last accessed date and last accessed by account fields to find the top users and roles.
contents.zh: 使用 Organizations 为每个账户生成 Service access report。从结果中提取 last accessed date 和 last accessed by account 字段，以查找使用最多的用户和角色。

questions.explanation: ????? A?????? CloudWatch Logs ? CloudTrail organization trail???? userIdentity.arn ?????? CloudWatch Contributor Insights ?????? CloudWatch ???????????

explanations.zh: ????? A?????? CloudWatch Logs ? CloudTrail organization trail???? userIdentity.arn ?????? CloudWatch Contributor Insights ?????? CloudWatch ???????????
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. Creating a CloudTrail organization trail that sends events to CloudWatch Logs, then building a CloudWatch Contributor Insights rule on userIdentity.arn, lets the team view contributor results in CloudWatch.

contents.en: A company has multiple AWS accounts in an organization in AWS Organizations that has all features enabled. The company's DevOps administrator needs to improve security across all the company's AWS accounts. The administrator needs to identify the top users and roles in use across all accounts. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 AWS Organizations 的一个已启用所有功能的组织中拥有多个 AWS 账户。公司的 DevOps 管理员需要提高公司所有 AWS 账户的安全性。管理员需要识别所有账户中使用最多的用户和角色。哪种解决方案能以最高的运维效率满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has an organization in AWS Organizations with many Oils that contain many AWS accounts. The organization has a dedicated delegated administrator AWS account. The company needs the accounts in one OU to have server-side encryption enforced for all Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volumes and Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queues that are created or updated on an AWS CloudFormation stack. Which solution will enforce this policy before a CloudFormation stack operation in the accounts of this OU?

options.label: A
options.content: Activate trusted access to CloudFormation StackSets. Create a CloudFormation Hook that enforces server-side encryption on EBS volumes and SQS queues. Deploy the Hook across the accounts in the OU by using StackSets.

contents.en: Activate trusted access to CloudFormation StackSets. Create a CloudFormation Hook that enforces server-side encryption on EBS volumes and SQS queues. Deploy the Hook across the accounts in the OU by using StackSets.
contents.zh: 激活对 CloudFormation StackSets 的 trusted access。创建一个 CloudFormation Hook，对 EBS volumes 和 SQS queues 强制执行 server-side encryption。使用 StackSets 在 OU 中的账户间部署该 Hook。

options.label: B
options.content: Set up AWS Config in all the accounts in the OU. Use AWS Systems Manager to deploy AWS Config rules that enforce server- side encryption for EBS volumes and SQS queues across the accounts in the OU.

contents.en: Set up AWS Config in all the accounts in the OU. Use AWS Systems Manager to deploy AWS Config rules that enforce server- side encryption for EBS volumes and SQS queues across the accounts in the OU.
contents.zh: 在 OU 中的所有账户中设置 AWS Config。使用 AWS Systems Manager 部署 AWS Config rules，在 OU 中的账户间对 EBS volumes 和 SQS queues 强制执行 server- side encryption。

options.label: C
options.content: Write an SCP to deny the creation of EBS volumes and SQS queues unless the EBS volumes and SQS queues have server- side encryption. Attach the SCP to the OU.

contents.en: Write an SCP to deny the creation of EBS volumes and SQS queues unless the EBS volumes and SQS queues have server- side encryption. Attach the SCP to the OU.
contents.zh: 编写 SCP，拒绝创建 EBS volumes 和 SQS queues，除非 EBS volumes 和 SQS queues 具有 server- side encryption。将 SCP 附加到 OU。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function in the delegated administrator account that checks whether server-side encryption is enforced for EBS volumes and SQS queues. Create an IAM role to provide the Lambda function access to the accounts in the OU.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function in the delegated administrator account that checks whether server-side encryption is enforced for EBS volumes and SQS queues. Create an IAM role to provide the Lambda function access to the accounts in the OU.
contents.zh: 在 delegated administrator account 中创建 AWS Lambda 函数，检查 EBS volumes 和 SQS queues 是否强制执行 server-side encryption。创建 IAM role，为 Lambda 函数提供对 OU 中账户的访问权限。

questions.explanation: ????? A??????? CloudFormation stack ??????????CloudFormation Hook ???? EBS volume ? SQS queue ????????????? StackSets ??? OU ???

explanations.zh: ????? A??????? CloudFormation stack ??????????CloudFormation Hook ???? EBS volume ? SQS queue ????????????? StackSets ??? OU ???
explanations.en: Correct answer: A. The key requirement is enforcing the policy before CloudFormation stack operations; a CloudFormation Hook can check server-side encryption on EBS volumes and SQS queues, and StackSets can deploy it across the OU accounts.

contents.en: A company has an organization in AWS Organizations with many Oils that contain many AWS accounts. The organization has a dedicated delegated administrator AWS account. The company needs the accounts in one OU to have server-side encryption enforced for all Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volumes and Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queues that are created or updated on an AWS CloudFormation stack. Which solution will enforce this policy before a CloudFormation stack operation in the accounts of this OU?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 AWS Organizations 中有一个组织，其中包含许多 Oils，且这些 Oils 包含许多 AWS 账户。该组织有一个专用的 delegated administrator AWS account。公司需要该 OU 中的账户对在 AWS CloudFormation stack 上创建或更新的所有 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volumes 和 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queues 强制执行 server-side encryption。哪种解决方案将在此 OU 账户中的 CloudFormation stack 操作之前强制执行该策略？

questions.content: A company is running an internal application in an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster on Amazon EC2. The ECS cluster instances can connect to the public internet. The ECS tasks that run on the cluster instances are configured to use images from both private Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repositories and a public ECR registry repository. A new security policy requires the company to remove the ECS cluster's direct access to the internet. The company must remove any NAT gateways and internet gateways from the VPC that hosts the cluster. A DevOps engineer needs to ensure the ECS cluster can still download images from both the public ECR registry and the private ECR repositories. Images from the public ECR registry must remain up-to-date. New versions of the images must be available to the ECS cluster within 24 hours of publication. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS CodeBuild project and a new private ECR repository for each image that is downloaded from the public ECR registry. Configure each project to pull the image from the public ECR repository and push the image to the new private ECR repository. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that invokes the CodeBuild project once every 24 hours. Update each task definition in the ECS cluster to refer to the new private ECR repository.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodeBuild project and a new private ECR repository for each image that is downloaded from the public ECR registry. Configure each project to pull the image from the public ECR repository and push the image to the new private ECR repository. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that invokes the CodeBuild project once every 24 hours. Update each task definition in the ECS cluster to refer to the new private ECR repository.
contents.zh: 为从 public ECR registry 下载的每个镜像创建 AWS CodeBuild project 和新的 private ECR repository。配置每个 project 从 public ECR repository 拉取镜像，并将镜像推送到新的 private ECR repository。创建 Amazon EventBridge rule，每 24 小时调用 CodeBuild project 一次。更新 ECS 集群中的每个 task definition，使其引用新的 private ECR repository。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new Amazon ECR pull through cache rule for each image that is downloaded from the public ECR registry. Create an AWS Lambda function that invokes each pull through cache rule. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that invokes the Lambda function once every 24 hours. Update each task definition in the ECS cluster to refer to the image from the pull through cache.

contents.en: Create a new Amazon ECR pull through cache rule for each image that is downloaded from the public ECR registry. Create an AWS Lambda function that invokes each pull through cache rule. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that invokes the Lambda function once every 24 hours. Update each task definition in the ECS cluster to refer to the image from the pull through cache.
contents.zh: 为从 public ECR registry 下载的每个镜像创建新的 Amazon ECR pull through cache rule。创建 AWS Lambda 函数，调用每个 pull through cache rule。创建 Amazon EventBridge rule，每 24 小时调用该 Lambda 函数一次。更新 ECS 集群中的每个 task definition，使其引用来自 pull through cache 的镜像。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a new Amazon ECR pull through cache rule for the public ECR registry. Update each task definition in the ECS cluster to refer to the image from the pull through cache. Ensure each public image has been downloaded through the pull through cache at least once before removing internet access from the VPC.

contents.en: Create a new Amazon ECR pull through cache rule for the public ECR registry. Update each task definition in the ECS cluster to refer to the image from the pull through cache. Ensure each public image has been downloaded through the pull through cache at least once before removing internet access from the VPC.
contents.zh: 为 public ECR registry 创建新的 Amazon ECR pull through cache rule。更新 ECS 集群中的每个 task definition，使其引用来自 pull through cache 的镜像。确保在从 VPC 移除互联网访问之前，每个公共镜像都已至少通过 pull through cache 下载一次。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon ECR interface VPC endpoint for the public ECR repositories that are in the VPC.

contents.en: Create an Amazon ECR interface VPC endpoint for the public ECR repositories that are in the VPC.
contents.zh: 为 VPC 中的 public ECR repositories 创建 Amazon ECR interface VPC endpoint。

options.label: E
options.content: Create an Amazon ECR interface VPC endpoint for the private ECR repositories that are in the VPC.

contents.en: Create an Amazon ECR interface VPC endpoint for the private ECR repositories that are in the VPC.
contents.zh: 为 VPC 中的 private ECR repositories 创建 Amazon ECR interface VPC endpoint。

options.label: F
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 gateway endpoint in the VPC.

contents.en: Create an Amazon S3 gateway endpoint in the VPC.
contents.zh: 在 VPC 中创建 Amazon S3 gateway endpoint。

questions.explanation: ????? C?E?F?C ? ECR pull through cache ???? ECR ???????????????E ???? ECR interface VPC endpoint?F ?? S3 gateway endpoint????????????? S3?

explanations.zh: ????? C?E?F?C ? ECR pull through cache ???? ECR ???????????????E ???? ECR interface VPC endpoint?F ?? S3 gateway endpoint????????????? S3?
explanations.en: Correct answers: C, E, and F. C caches public ECR images with an ECR pull through cache and updates task definitions to use it, E adds an interface VPC endpoint for private ECR, and F adds an S3 gateway endpoint because image layers are downloaded from S3.

contents.en: A company is running an internal application in an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster on Amazon EC2. The ECS cluster instances can connect to the public internet. The ECS tasks that run on the cluster instances are configured to use images from both private Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repositories and a public ECR registry repository. A new security policy requires the company to remove the ECS cluster's direct access to the internet. The company must remove any NAT gateways and internet gateways from the VPC that hosts the cluster. A DevOps engineer needs to ensure the ECS cluster can still download images from both the public ECR registry and the private ECR repositories. Images from the public ECR registry must remain up-to-date. New versions of the images must be available to the ECS cluster within 24 hours of publication. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司在 Amazon EC2 上的 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 集群中运行内部应用程序。ECS cluster instances 可以连接到公共互联网。在 cluster instances 上运行的 ECS tasks 配置为使用来自 private Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repositories 和 public ECR registry repository 的镜像。一项新的安全策略要求公司移除 ECS 集群对互联网的直接访问。公司必须从托管该集群的 VPC 中移除任何 NAT gateways 和 internet gateways。DevOps 工程师需要确保 ECS 集群仍然可以从 public ECR registry 和 private ECR repositories 下载镜像。来自 public ECR registry 的镜像必须保持最新。镜像的新版本必须在发布后 24 小时内可供 ECS 集群使用。哪组步骤组合能以最少的运维开销满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company has a continuous integration pipeline where the company creates container images by using AWS CodeBuild. The created images are stored in Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR). Checking for and fixing the vulnerabilities in the images takes the company too much time. The company wants to identify the image vulnerabilities quickly and notify the security team of the vulnerabilities. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Activate Amazon Inspector enhanced scanning for Amazon ECR. Configure the enhanced scanning to use continuous scanning. Set up a topic in Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS).

contents.en: Activate Amazon Inspector enhanced scanning for Amazon ECR. Configure the enhanced scanning to use continuous scanning. Set up a topic in Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS).
contents.zh: 为 Amazon ECR 激活 Amazon Inspector enhanced scanning。配置 enhanced scanning 使用 continuous scanning。设置 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 中的 topic。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule for Amazon Inspector findings. Set an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic as the rule target.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule for Amazon Inspector findings. Set an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic as the rule target.
contents.zh: 为 Amazon Inspector findings 创建 Amazon EventBridge rule。将 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic 设置为规则目标。

options.label: C
options.content: Activate AWS Lambda enhanced scanning for Amazon ECR. Configure the enhanced scanning to use continuous scanning. Set up a topic in Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES).

contents.en: Activate AWS Lambda enhanced scanning for Amazon ECR. Configure the enhanced scanning to use continuous scanning. Set up a topic in Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES).
contents.zh: 为 Amazon ECR 激活 AWS Lambda enhanced scanning。配置 enhanced scanning 使用 continuous scanning。设置 Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES) 中的 topic。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a new AWS Lambda function. Invoke the new Lambda function when scan findings are detected.

contents.en: Create a new AWS Lambda function. Invoke the new Lambda function when scan findings are detected.
contents.zh: 创建新的 AWS Lambda 函数。在检测到 scan findings 时调用新的 Lambda 函数。

options.label: E
options.content: Activate default basic scanning for Amazon ECR for all container images. Configure the default basic scanning to use continuous scanning. Set up a topic in Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS).

contents.en: Activate default basic scanning for Amazon ECR for all container images. Configure the default basic scanning to use continuous scanning. Set up a topic in Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS).
contents.zh: 为所有容器镜像激活 Amazon ECR 的 default basic scanning。配置 default basic scanning 使用 continuous scanning。设置 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 中的 topic。

questions.explanation: ????? A?B?A ?? Amazon Inspector enhanced scanning ???????? SNS?B ???? Inspector findings ? EventBridge rule?? SNS topic ??????????????????

explanations.zh: ????? A?B?A ?? Amazon Inspector enhanced scanning ???????? SNS?B ???? Inspector findings ? EventBridge rule?? SNS topic ??????????????????
explanations.en: Correct answers: A and B. A enables Amazon Inspector enhanced scanning with continuous scanning and SNS, while B creates an EventBridge rule for Inspector findings that targets the SNS topic for low-maintenance notifications.

contents.en: A company has a continuous integration pipeline where the company creates container images by using AWS CodeBuild. The created images are stored in Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR). Checking for and fixing the vulnerabilities in the images takes the company too much time. The company wants to identify the image vulnerabilities quickly and notify the security team of the vulnerabilities. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个持续集成 pipeline，公司使用 AWS CodeBuild 创建容器镜像。创建的镜像存储在 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) 中。检查并修复镜像中的漏洞耗费公司太多时间。该公司希望快速识别镜像漏洞，并将这些漏洞通知安全团队。哪组步骤组合能以最少的运维开销满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A DevOps administrator is configuring a repository to store a company's container images. The administrator needs to configure a lifecycle rule that automatically deletes container images that have a specific tag and that are older than 15 days. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a repository in Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR). Add a lifecycle policy to the repository to expire images that have the matching tag after 15 days.

contents.en: Create a repository in Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR). Add a lifecycle policy to the repository to expire images that have the matching tag after 15 days.
contents.zh: 在 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) 中创建 repository。向该 repository 添加 lifecycle policy，使具有匹配标签的镜像在 15 天后过期。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a repository in AWS CodeArtifact. Add a repository policy to the CodeArtifact repository to expire old assets that have the matching tag after 15 days.

contents.en: Create a repository in AWS CodeArtifact. Add a repository policy to the CodeArtifact repository to expire old assets that have the matching tag after 15 days.
contents.zh: 在 AWS CodeArtifact 中创建 repository。向 CodeArtifact repository 添加 repository policy，使具有匹配标签的旧 assets 在 15 天后过期。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a bucket in Amazon S3. Add a bucket lifecycle policy to expire old objects that have the matching tag after 15 days

contents.en: Create a bucket in Amazon S3. Add a bucket lifecycle policy to expire old objects that have the matching tag after 15 days
contents.zh: 在 Amazon S3 中创建 bucket。添加 bucket lifecycle policy，使具有匹配标签的旧 objects 在 15 天后过期

options.label: D
options.content: Create an EC2 Image Builder container recipe. Add a build component to expire the container that has the matching tag after 15 days.

contents.en: Create an EC2 Image Builder container recipe. Add a build component to expire the container that has the matching tag after 15 days.
contents.zh: 创建 EC2 Image Builder container recipe。添加 build component，使具有匹配标签的 container 在 15 天后过期。

explanations.en: Correct answer: A. An Amazon ECR lifecycle policy can expire images by matching tag and age; setting the repository policy to remove matching-tag images after 15 days is purpose-built for low-overhead image retention management.

contents.en: A DevOps administrator is configuring a repository to store a company's container images. The administrator needs to configure a lifecycle rule that automatically deletes container images that have a specific tag and that are older than 15 days. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?
contents.zh: DevOps 管理员正在配置一个 repository，用于存储公司的容器镜像。管理员需要配置 lifecycle rule，自动删除具有特定标签且早于 15 天的容器镜像。哪种解决方案能以最高的运维效率满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses Amazon Redshift as its data warehouse solution. The company wants to create a dashboard to view changes to the Redshift users and the queries the users perform. Which combination of steps will meet this requirement? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch log group. Create an AWS CloudTrail trail that writes to the CloudWatch log group.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch log group. Create an AWS CloudTrail trail that writes to the CloudWatch log group.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon CloudWatch 日志组。创建一个写入该 CloudWatch 日志组的 AWS CloudTrail 跟踪。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new Amazon S3 bucket. Configure default audit logging on the Redshift cluster. Configure the S3 bucket as the target.

contents.en: Create a new Amazon S3 bucket. Configure default audit logging on the Redshift cluster. Configure the S3 bucket as the target.
contents.zh: 创建一个新的 Amazon S3 存储桶。在 Redshift 集群上配置默认审计日志记录。将该 S3 存储桶配置为目标。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the Redshift cluster database audit logging to include user activity logs. Configure Amazon CloudWatch as the target.

contents.en: Configure the Redshift cluster database audit logging to include user activity logs. Configure Amazon CloudWatch as the target.
contents.zh: 配置 Redshift 集群数据库审计日志记录以包含用户活动日志。将 Amazon CloudWatch 配置为目标。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch dashboard that has a log widget. Configure the widget to display user details from the Redshift logs.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch dashboard that has a log widget. Configure the widget to display user details from the Redshift logs.
contents.zh: 创建一个包含日志小组件的 Amazon CloudWatch 仪表板。配置该小组件以显示 Redshift 日志中的用户详细信息。

options.label: E
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function that uses Amazon Athena to query the Redshift logs. Create an Amazon CloudWatch dashboard that has a custom widget type that uses the Lambda function.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that uses Amazon Athena to query the Redshift logs. Create an Amazon CloudWatch dashboard that has a custom widget type that uses the Lambda function.
contents.zh: 创建一个使用 Amazon Athena 查询 Redshift 日志的 AWS Lambda 函数。创建一个包含自定义小组件类型的 Amazon CloudWatch 仪表板，该小组件使用该 Lambda 函数。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 C、D。C 在 Redshift 集群上启用数据库审计日志并包含用户活动日志，才能记录用户查询活动；D 使用 CloudWatch 仪表板日志组件展示这些 Redshift 日志中的用户详细信息。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 C、D。C 在 Redshift 集群上启用数据库审计日志并包含用户活动日志，才能记录用户查询活动；D 使用 CloudWatch 仪表板日志组件展示这些 Redshift 日志中的用户详细信息。
explanations.en: The correct answers are C and D. C enables Redshift database audit logging with user activity logs so user queries can be captured, and D displays the user details from those Redshift logs in a CloudWatch dashboard log widget.

contents.en: A company uses Amazon Redshift as its data warehouse solution. The company wants to create a dashboard to view changes to the Redshift users and the queries the users perform. Which combination of steps will meet this requirement? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon Redshift 作为其数据仓库解决方案。该公司希望创建一个仪表板，以查看 Redshift 用户的变更以及用户执行的查询。哪组步骤组合可以满足此要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations to manage its 500 AWS accounts. The organization has all features enabled. The AWS accounts are in a single OU. The developers need to use the CostCenter tag key for all resources in the organization's member accounts. Some teams do not use the CostCenter tag key to tag their Amazon EC2 instances. The cloud team wrote a script that scans all EC2 instances in the organization's member accounts. If the EC2 instances do not have a CostCenter tag key, the script will notify AWS account administrators. To avoid this notification, some developers use the CostCenter tag key with an arbitrary string in the tag value. The cloud team needs to ensure that all EC2 instances in the organization use a CostCenter tag key with the appropriate cost center value. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an SCP that prevents the creation of EC2 instances without the CostCenter tag key. Create a tag policy that requires the CostCenter tag to be values from a known list of cost centers for all EC2 instances. Attach the policy to the OU. Update the script to scan the tag keys and tag values. Modify the script to update noncompliant resources with a default approved tag value for the CostCenter tag key.

contents.en: Create an SCP that prevents the creation of EC2 instances without the CostCenter tag key. Create a tag policy that requires the CostCenter tag to be values from a known list of cost centers for all EC2 instances. Attach the policy to the OU. Update the script to scan the tag keys and tag values. Modify the script to update noncompliant resources with a default approved tag value for the CostCenter tag key.
contents.zh: 创建一个 SCP，阻止在没有 CostCenter 标签键的情况下创建 EC2 实例。创建一个标签策略，要求所有 EC2 实例的 CostCenter 标签值必须来自已知成本中心列表。将该策略附加到 OU。更新脚本以扫描标签键和标签值。修改脚本，以使用默认的已批准 CostCenter 标签键值更新不合规资源。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an SCP that prevents the creation of EC2 instances without the CostCenter tag key. Attach the policy to the OU. Update the script to scan the tag keys and tag values and notify the administrators when the tag values are not valid.

contents.en: Create an SCP that prevents the creation of EC2 instances without the CostCenter tag key. Attach the policy to the OU. Update the script to scan the tag keys and tag values and notify the administrators when the tag values are not valid.
contents.zh: 创建一个 SCP，阻止在没有 CostCenter 标签键的情况下创建 EC2 实例。将该策略附加到 OU。更新脚本以扫描标签键和标签值，并在标签值无效时通知管理员。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an SCP that prevents the creation of EC2 instances without the CostCenter tag key. Attach the policy to the OU. Create an IAM permission boundary in the organization's member accounts that restricts the CostCenter tag values to a list of valid cost centers.

contents.en: Create an SCP that prevents the creation of EC2 instances without the CostCenter tag key. Attach the policy to the OU. Create an IAM permission boundary in the organization's member accounts that restricts the CostCenter tag values to a list of valid cost centers.
contents.zh: 创建一个 SCP，阻止在没有 CostCenter 标签键的情况下创建 EC2 实例。将该策略附加到 OU。在组织成员账户中创建一个 IAM 权限边界，将 CostCenter 标签值限制为有效成本中心列表。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a tag policy that requires the CostCenter tag to be values from a known list of cost centers for all EC2 instances. Attach the policy to the OU. Configure an AWS Lambda function that adds an empty CostCenter tag key to an EC2 instance. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that matches events to the RunInstances API action with the Lambda function as the target.

contents.en: Create a tag policy that requires the CostCenter tag to be values from a known list of cost centers for all EC2 instances. Attach the policy to the OU. Configure an AWS Lambda function that adds an empty CostCenter tag key to an EC2 instance. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that matches events to the RunInstances API action with the Lambda function as the target.
contents.zh: 创建一个标签策略，要求所有 EC2 实例的 CostCenter 标签值必须来自已知成本中心列表。将该策略附加到 OU。配置一个 AWS Lambda 函数，为 EC2 实例添加一个空的 CostCenter 标签键。创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，用于匹配 RunInstances API 操作事件，并将该 Lambda 函数作为目标。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A。SCP 可阻止未带 CostCenter 标签键的 EC2 实例创建，标签策略可将 CostCenter 值限制在已知列表内；脚本再扫描标签键和值，并用默认批准值修复不合规资源。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A。SCP 可阻止未带 CostCenter 标签键的 EC2 实例创建，标签策略可将 CostCenter 值限制在已知列表内；脚本再扫描标签键和值，并用默认批准值修复不合规资源。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The SCP prevents EC2 instances from being created without the CostCenter tag key, the tag policy restricts CostCenter values to an approved list, and the updated script scans and remediates noncompliant resources with a default approved value.

contents.en: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations to manage its 500 AWS accounts. The organization has all features enabled. The AWS accounts are in a single OU. The developers need to use the CostCenter tag key for all resources in the organization's member accounts. Some teams do not use the CostCenter tag key to tag their Amazon EC2 instances. The cloud team wrote a script that scans all EC2 instances in the organization's member accounts. If the EC2 instances do not have a CostCenter tag key, the script will notify AWS account administrators. To avoid this notification, some developers use the CostCenter tag key with an arbitrary string in the tag value. The cloud team needs to ensure that all EC2 instances in the organization use a CostCenter tag key with the appropriate cost center value. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations 中的一个组织来管理其 500 个 AWS 账户。该组织已启用所有功能。AWS 账户位于单个 OU 中。开发人员需要对该组织成员账户中的所有资源使用 CostCenter 标签键。有些团队没有使用 CostCenter 标签键来标记其 Amazon EC2 实例。云团队编写了一个脚本，用于扫描该组织成员账户中的所有 EC2 实例。如果 EC2 实例没有 CostCenter 标签键，该脚本将通知 AWS 账户管理员。为了避免此通知，一些开发人员使用 CostCenter 标签键，并在标签值中填入任意字符串。云团队需要确保组织中的所有 EC2 实例都使用 CostCenter 标签键，并且标签值为适当的成本中心值。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer uses a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline. The pipeline has a build action and a deploy action for a single-page web application that is delivered to an Amazon S3 bucket. Amazon CloudFront serves the web application. The build action creates an artifact for the web application. The DevOps engineer has created an AWS CloudFormation template that defines the S3 bucket and configures the S3 bucket to host the application. The DevOps engineer has configured a CloudFormation deploy action before the S3 action. The CloudFormation deploy action creates the S3 bucket. The DevOps engineer needs to configure the S3 deploy action to use the S3 bucket from the CloudFormation template. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Add an output named BucketName to the CloudFormation template. Set the output's value to refer to the S3 bucket from the CloudFormation template. Configure the output value to export to an AWS::SSM::Parameter resource named Stackvariables.

contents.en: Add an output named BucketName to the CloudFormation template. Set the output's value to refer to the S3 bucket from the CloudFormation template. Configure the output value to export to an AWS::SSM::Parameter resource named Stackvariables.
contents.zh: 向 CloudFormation 模板添加一个名为 BucketName 的输出。将该输出的值设置为引用 CloudFormation 模板中的 S3 存储桶。将该输出值配置为导出到名为 Stackvariables 的 AWS::SSM::Parameter 资源。

options.label: B
options.content: Add an output named BucketName to the CloudFormation template. Set the output's value to refer to the S3 bucket from the CloudFormation template. Set the CloudFormation action's namespace to StackVariables in the pipeline.

contents.en: Add an output named BucketName to the CloudFormation template. Set the output's value to refer to the S3 bucket from the CloudFormation template. Set the CloudFormation action's namespace to StackVariables in the pipeline.
contents.zh: 向 CloudFormation 模板添加一个名为 BucketName 的输出。将该输出的值设置为引用 CloudFormation 模板中的 S3 存储桶。将流水线中 CloudFormation 操作的命名空间设置为 StackVariables。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the output artifacts of the CloudFormation action in the pipeline to be an AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store parameter named StackVariables. Name the artifact BucketName.

contents.en: Configure the output artifacts of the CloudFormation action in the pipeline to be an AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store parameter named StackVariables. Name the artifact BucketName.
contents.zh: 将流水线中 CloudFormation 操作的输出构件配置为名为 StackVariables 的 AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store 参数。将该构件命名为 BucketName。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure the build artifact from the build action as the input to the CodePipeline S3 deploy action. Configure the deploy action to deploy to the S3 bucket by using the StackVariables.BucketName variable.

contents.en: Configure the build artifact from the build action as the input to the CodePipeline S3 deploy action. Configure the deploy action to deploy to the S3 bucket by using the StackVariables.BucketName variable.
contents.zh: 将构建操作生成的构建构件配置为 CodePipeline S3 部署操作的输入。配置部署操作，通过使用 StackVariables.BucketName 变量部署到 S3 存储桶。

options.label: E
options.content: Configure the build artifact from the build action and the AWS Systems Manager parameter as the inputs to the deploy action. Configure the deploy action to deploy to the S3 bucket by using the StackVariables.BucketName variable.

contents.en: Configure the build artifact from the build action and the AWS Systems Manager parameter as the inputs to the deploy action. Configure the deploy action to deploy to the S3 bucket by using the StackVariables.BucketName variable.
contents.zh: 将构建操作生成的构建构件和 AWS Systems Manager 参数配置为部署操作的输入。配置部署操作，通过使用 StackVariables.BucketName 变量部署到 S3 存储桶。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 B、D。B 在 CloudFormation 模板中输出 BucketName，并将 CloudFormation 动作命名空间设为 StackVariables；D 将构建产物作为 S3 部署动作输入，并用 StackVariables.BucketName 动态指定目标桶。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 B、D。B 在 CloudFormation 模板中输出 BucketName，并将 CloudFormation 动作命名空间设为 StackVariables；D 将构建产物作为 S3 部署动作输入，并用 StackVariables.BucketName 动态指定目标桶。
explanations.en: The correct answers are B and D. B exposes the bucket name as a CloudFormation output under the StackVariables namespace, and D uses the build artifact as the S3 deploy input while referencing StackVariables.BucketName for the target bucket.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer uses a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline. The pipeline has a build action and a deploy action for a single-page web application that is delivered to an Amazon S3 bucket. Amazon CloudFront serves the web application. The build action creates an artifact for the web application. The DevOps engineer has created an AWS CloudFormation template that defines the S3 bucket and configures the S3 bucket to host the application. The DevOps engineer has configured a CloudFormation deploy action before the S3 action. The CloudFormation deploy action creates the S3 bucket. The DevOps engineer needs to configure the S3 deploy action to use the S3 bucket from the CloudFormation template. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师在 AWS CodePipeline 中使用一条流水线。该流水线包含一个构建操作和一个部署操作，用于部署交付到 Amazon S3 存储桶的单页 Web 应用程序。Amazon CloudFront 提供该 Web 应用程序。构建操作会为该 Web 应用程序创建一个构件。DevOps 工程师已创建一个 AWS CloudFormation 模板，该模板定义 S3 存储桶并配置该 S3 存储桶来托管应用程序。DevOps 工程师已在 S3 操作之前配置了一个 CloudFormation 部署操作。该 CloudFormation 部署操作会创建 S3 存储桶。DevOps 工程师需要配置 S3 部署操作，以使用 CloudFormation 模板中的 S3 存储桶。哪组步骤组合可以满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company used a lift and shift strategy to migrate a workload to AWS. The company has an Auto Scaling group of Amazon EC2 instances. Each EC2 instance runs a web application, a database, and a Redis cache. Users are experiencing large variations in the web application's response times. Requests to the web application go to a single EC2 instance that is under significant load. The company wants to separate the application components to improve availability and performance. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a Network Load Balancer and an Auto Scaling group for the web application. Migrate the database to an Amazon Aurora Serverless database. Create an Application Load Balancer and an Auto Scaling group for the Redis cache.

contents.en: Create a Network Load Balancer and an Auto Scaling group for the web application. Migrate the database to an Amazon Aurora Serverless database. Create an Application Load Balancer and an Auto Scaling group for the Redis cache.
contents.zh: 为 Web 应用程序创建一个 Network Load Balancer 和一个 Auto Scaling 组。将数据库迁移到 Amazon Aurora Serverless 数据库。为 Redis 缓存创建一个 Application Load Balancer 和一个 Auto Scaling 组。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Application Load Balancer and an Auto Scaling group for the web application. Migrate the database to an Amazon Aurora database that has a Multi-AZ deployment. Create a Network Load Balancer and an Auto Scaling group in a single Availability Zone for the Redis cache.

contents.en: Create an Application Load Balancer and an Auto Scaling group for the web application. Migrate the database to an Amazon Aurora database that has a Multi-AZ deployment. Create a Network Load Balancer and an Auto Scaling group in a single Availability Zone for the Redis cache.
contents.zh: 为 Web 应用程序创建一个 Application Load Balancer 和一个 Auto Scaling 组。将数据库迁移到具有 Multi-AZ 部署的 Amazon Aurora 数据库。在单个可用区中为 Redis 缓存创建一个 Network Load Balancer 和一个 Auto Scaling 组。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a Network Load Balancer and an Auto Scaling group for the web application. Migrate the database to an Amazon Aurora Serverless database. Create an Amazon ElastiCache (Redis OSS) cluster for the cache. Create a target group that has a DNS target type that contains the ElastiCache (Redis OSS) cluster hostname.

contents.en: Create a Network Load Balancer and an Auto Scaling group for the web application. Migrate the database to an Amazon Aurora Serverless database. Create an Amazon ElastiCache (Redis OSS) cluster for the cache. Create a target group that has a DNS target type that contains the ElastiCache (Redis OSS) cluster hostname.
contents.zh: 为 Web 应用程序创建一个 Network Load Balancer 和一个 Auto Scaling 组。将数据库迁移到 Amazon Aurora Serverless 数据库。为缓存创建一个 Amazon ElastiCache (Redis OSS) 集群。创建一个目标类型为 DNS 的目标组，其中包含 ElastiCache (Redis OSS) 集群主机名。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Application Load Balancer and an Auto Scaling group for the web application. Migrate the database to an Amazon Aurora database that has a Multi-AZ deployment. Create an Amazon ElastiCache (Redis OSS) cluster for the cache.

contents.en: Create an Application Load Balancer and an Auto Scaling group for the web application. Migrate the database to an Amazon Aurora database that has a Multi-AZ deployment. Create an Amazon ElastiCache (Redis OSS) cluster for the cache.
contents.zh: 为 Web 应用程序创建一个 Application Load Balancer 和一个 Auto Scaling 组。将数据库迁移到具有 Multi-AZ 部署的 Amazon Aurora 数据库。为缓存创建一个 Amazon ElastiCache (Redis OSS) 集群。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 D。该方案使用 ALB 和 Auto Scaling 组提升 Web 层可用性，将数据库迁移到 Multi-AZ Aurora，并使用 ElastiCache Redis OSS 作为缓存，覆盖应用、数据库和缓存层的高可用需求。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 D。该方案使用 ALB 和 Auto Scaling 组提升 Web 层可用性，将数据库迁移到 Multi-AZ Aurora，并使用 ElastiCache Redis OSS 作为缓存，覆盖应用、数据库和缓存层的高可用需求。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. It improves the web tier with an ALB and Auto Scaling group, migrates the database to Multi-AZ Aurora, and uses ElastiCache for Redis OSS for the cache layer.

contents.en: A company used a lift and shift strategy to migrate a workload to AWS. The company has an Auto Scaling group of Amazon EC2 instances. Each EC2 instance runs a web application, a database, and a Redis cache. Users are experiencing large variations in the web application's response times. Requests to the web application go to a single EC2 instance that is under significant load. The company wants to separate the application components to improve availability and performance. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用直接迁移策略将一个工作负载迁移到 AWS。该公司拥有一个由 Amazon EC2 实例组成的 Auto Scaling 组。每个 EC2 实例都运行一个 Web 应用程序、一个数据库和一个 Redis 缓存。用户发现该 Web 应用程序的响应时间波动很大。发送到 Web 应用程序的请求会进入一个负载很高的单个 EC2 实例。该公司希望分离应用程序组件，以提高可用性和性能。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company is using AWS Organizations and wants to implement a governance strategy with the following requirements: • AWS resource access is restricted to the same two Regions for all accounts. • AWS services are limited to a specific group of authorized services for all accounts. • Authentication is provided by Active Directory. • Access permissions are organized by job function and are identical in each account. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Establish an organizational unit (OU) with group policies in the management account to restrict Regions and authorized services. Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to provision roles with permissions for each job function, including an IAM trust policy for IAM identity provider authentication in each account.

contents.en: Establish an organizational unit (OU) with group policies in the management account to restrict Regions and authorized services. Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to provision roles with permissions for each job function, including an IAM trust policy for IAM identity provider authentication in each account.
contents.zh: 在管理账户中建立一个带有组策略的组织单元 (OU)，以限制区域和授权服务。使用 AWS CloudFormation StackSets 为每个工作职能预置具有权限的角色，包括在每个账户中用于 IAM 身份提供商身份验证的 IAM 信任策略。

options.label: B
options.content: Establish a permission boundary in the management account to restrict Regions and authorized services. Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to provision roles with permissions for each job function, including an IAM trust policy for IAM identity provider authentication in each account.

contents.en: Establish a permission boundary in the management account to restrict Regions and authorized services. Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to provision roles with permissions for each job function, including an IAM trust policy for IAM identity provider authentication in each account.
contents.zh: 在管理账户中建立权限边界，以限制区域和授权服务。使用 AWS CloudFormation StackSets 为每个工作职能预置具有权限的角色，包括在每个账户中用于 IAM 身份提供商身份验证的 IAM 信任策略。

options.label: C
options.content: Establish a service control policy in the management account to restrict Regions and authorized services. Use AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM) to share management account roles with permissions for each job function, including AWS IAM Identity Center for authentication in each account.

contents.en: Establish a service control policy in the management account to restrict Regions and authorized services. Use AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM) to share management account roles with permissions for each job function, including AWS IAM Identity Center for authentication in each account.
contents.zh: 在管理账户中建立服务控制策略，以限制区域和授权服务。使用 AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM) 共享管理账户中具有每个工作职能权限的角色，包括在每个账户中使用 AWS IAM Identity Center 进行身份验证。

options.label: D
options.content: Establish a service control policy in the management account to restrict Regions and authorized services. Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to provision roles with permissions for each job function, including an IAM trust policy for IAM identity provider authentication in each account.

contents.en: Establish a service control policy in the management account to restrict Regions and authorized services. Use AWS CloudFormation StackSets to provision roles with permissions for each job function, including an IAM trust policy for IAM identity provider authentication in each account.
contents.zh: 在管理账户中建立服务控制策略，以限制区域和授权服务。使用 AWS CloudFormation StackSets 为每个工作职能预置具有权限的角色，包括在每个账户中用于 IAM 身份提供商身份验证的 IAM 信任策略。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 D。SCP 在组织级别限制可用区域和授权服务；CloudFormation StackSets 在各账户中统一预置按岗位划分的角色和权限，并通过 IAM 信任策略支持身份提供者认证。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 D。SCP 在组织级别限制可用区域和授权服务；CloudFormation StackSets 在各账户中统一预置按岗位划分的角色和权限，并通过 IAM 信任策略支持身份提供者认证。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. SCPs enforce allowed Regions and services across the organization, while CloudFormation StackSets consistently provision job-function roles and permissions in each account with an IAM trust policy for identity provider authentication.

contents.en: A company is using AWS Organizations and wants to implement a governance strategy with the following requirements: • AWS resource access is restricted to the same two Regions for all accounts. • AWS services are limited to a specific group of authorized services for all accounts. • Authentication is provided by Active Directory. • Access permissions are organized by job function and are identical in each account. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在使用 AWS Organizations，并希望实施一项治理策略，要求如下： • 所有账户的 AWS 资源访问都限制在相同的两个区域。 • 所有账户的 AWS 服务都限制为一组特定的授权服务。 • 身份验证由 Active Directory 提供。 • 访问权限按工作职能组织，并且在每个账户中相同。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company detects unusual login attempts in many of its AWS accounts. A DevOps engineer must implement a solution that sends a notification to the company's security team when multiple failed login attempts occur. The DevOps engineer has already created an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic and has subscribed the security team to the SNS topic. Which solution will provide the notification with the LEAST operational effort?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure AWS CloudTrail to send management events to an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. Create a CloudWatch Logs metric filter to match failed ConsoleLogin events. Create a CloudWatch alarm that is based on the metric filter. Configure an alarm action to send messages to the SNS topic.

contents.en: Configure AWS CloudTrail to send management events to an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. Create a CloudWatch Logs metric filter to match failed ConsoleLogin events. Create a CloudWatch alarm that is based on the metric filter. Configure an alarm action to send messages to the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 配置 AWS CloudTrail 将管理事件发送到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 日志组。创建一个 CloudWatch Logs 指标筛选器以匹配失败的 ConsoleLogin 事件。创建一个基于该指标筛选器的 CloudWatch 警报。配置警报操作以向 SNS 主题发送消息。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure AWS CloudTrail to send management events to an Amazon S3 bucket. Create an Amazon Athena query that returns a failure if the query finds failed logins in the logs in the S3 bucket. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to periodically run the query. Create a second EventBridge rule to detect when the query fails and to send a message to the SNS topic.

contents.en: Configure AWS CloudTrail to send management events to an Amazon S3 bucket. Create an Amazon Athena query that returns a failure if the query finds failed logins in the logs in the S3 bucket. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to periodically run the query. Create a second EventBridge rule to detect when the query fails and to send a message to the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 配置 AWS CloudTrail 将管理事件发送到 Amazon S3 存储桶。创建一个 Amazon Athena 查询，如果该查询在 S3 存储桶中的日志里找到失败登录，则返回失败。创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则定期运行该查询。创建第二个 EventBridge 规则，用于检测查询失败并向 SNS 主题发送消息。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure AWS CloudTrail to send data events to an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. Create a CloudWatch logs metric filter to match failed ConsoleLogin events. Create a CloudWatch alarm that is based on the metric filter. Configure an alarm action to send messages to the SNS topic.

contents.en: Configure AWS CloudTrail to send data events to an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. Create a CloudWatch logs metric filter to match failed ConsoleLogin events. Create a CloudWatch alarm that is based on the metric filter. Configure an alarm action to send messages to the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 配置 AWS CloudTrail 将数据事件发送到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 日志组。创建一个 CloudWatch logs 指标筛选器以匹配失败的 ConsoleLogin 事件。创建一个基于该指标筛选器的 CloudWatch 警报。配置警报操作以向 SNS 主题发送消息。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure AWS CloudTrail to send data events to an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure an Amazon S3 event notification for the s3:ObjectCreated event type. Filter the event type by ConsoleLogin failed events. Configure the event notification to forward to the SNS topic.

contents.en: Configure AWS CloudTrail to send data events to an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure an Amazon S3 event notification for the s3:ObjectCreated event type. Filter the event type by ConsoleLogin failed events. Configure the event notification to forward to the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 配置 AWS CloudTrail 将数据事件发送到 Amazon S3 存储桶。为 s3:ObjectCreated 事件类型配置 Amazon S3 事件通知。按 ConsoleLogin failed 事件筛选该事件类型。配置事件通知以转发到 SNS 主题。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A。CloudTrail 将管理事件发送到 CloudWatch Logs，指标筛选器匹配失败的 ConsoleLogin 事件，再由 CloudWatch 告警通过 SNS 发送通知，方案直接且简单。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A。CloudTrail 将管理事件发送到 CloudWatch Logs，指标筛选器匹配失败的 ConsoleLogin 事件，再由 CloudWatch 告警通过 SNS 发送通知，方案直接且简单。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. CloudTrail sends management events to CloudWatch Logs, a metric filter matches failed ConsoleLogin events, and a CloudWatch alarm notifies the SNS topic.

contents.en: A company detects unusual login attempts in many of its AWS accounts. A DevOps engineer must implement a solution that sends a notification to the company's security team when multiple failed login attempts occur. The DevOps engineer has already created an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic and has subscribed the security team to the SNS topic. Which solution will provide the notification with the LEAST operational effort?
contents.zh: 一家公司在其许多 AWS 账户中检测到异常登录尝试。DevOps 工程师必须实施一种解决方案，在发生多次登录失败时向公司的安全团队发送通知。DevOps 工程师已经创建了一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题，并已将安全团队订阅到该 SNS 主题。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运维工作量提供通知？

questions.content: A company has deployed a new REST API by using Amazon API Gateway. The company uses the API to access confidential data. The API must be accessed from only specific VPCs in the company. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create and attach a resource policy to the API Gateway API. Configure the resource policy to allow only the specific VPC IDs.

contents.en: Create and attach a resource policy to the API Gateway API. Configure the resource policy to allow only the specific VPC IDs.
contents.zh: 创建资源策略并将其附加到 API Gateway API。配置该资源策略，仅允许特定 VPC ID。

options.label: B
options.content: Add a security group to the API Gateway API. Configure the inbound rules to allow only the specific VPC IP address ranges.

contents.en: Add a security group to the API Gateway API. Configure the inbound rules to allow only the specific VPC IP address ranges.
contents.zh: 向 API Gateway API 添加安全组。配置入站规则，仅允许特定 VPC IP 地址范围。

options.label: C
options.content: Create and attach an IAM role to the API Gateway API. Configure the IAM role to allow only the specific VPC IDs.

contents.en: Create and attach an IAM role to the API Gateway API. Configure the IAM role to allow only the specific VPC IDs.
contents.zh: 创建 IAM 角色并将其附加到 API Gateway API。配置该 IAM 角色，仅允许特定 VPC ID。

options.label: D
options.content: Add an ACL to the API Gateway API. Configure the outbound rules to allow only the specific VPC IP address ranges.

contents.en: Add an ACL to the API Gateway API. Configure the outbound rules to allow only the specific VPC IP address ranges.
contents.zh: 向 API Gateway API 添加 ACL。配置出站规则，仅允许特定 VPC IP 地址范围。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A。API Gateway 资源策略可基于 VPC ID 控制访问来源；将策略附加到 API 并只允许指定 VPC ID，即可限制 API 只能从这些 VPC 访问。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A。API Gateway 资源策略可基于 VPC ID 控制访问来源；将策略附加到 API 并只允许指定 VPC ID，即可限制 API 只能从这些 VPC 访问。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. An API Gateway resource policy can control API access by VPC ID, so attaching a policy that allows only the specified VPC IDs restricts access to those VPCs.

contents.en: A company has deployed a new REST API by using Amazon API Gateway. The company uses the API to access confidential data. The API must be accessed from only specific VPCs in the company. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon API Gateway 部署了一个新的 REST API。该公司使用该 API 访问机密数据。该 API 必须只能从公司中的特定 VPC 访问。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company runs a website by using an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) service that is connected to an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The service was in a steady state with tasks responding to requests successfully. A DevOps engineer updated the task definition with a new container image and deployed the new task definition to the service. The DevOps engineer noticed that the service is frequently stopping and starting new tasks because the ALB healtth checks are failing. What should the DevOps engineer do to troubleshoot the failed deployment?

options.label: A
options.content: Ensure that a security group associated with the service allows traffic from the ALB.

contents.en: Ensure that a security group associated with the service allows traffic from the ALB.
contents.zh: 确保与该服务关联的安全组允许来自 ALB 的流量。

options.label: B
options.content: Increase the ALB health check grace period for the service.

contents.en: Increase the ALB health check grace period for the service.
contents.zh: 增加该服务的 ALB 运行状况检查宽限期。

options.label: C
options.content: Increase the service minimum healthy percent setting.

contents.en: Increase the service minimum healthy percent setting.
contents.zh: 提高服务的 minimum healthy percent 设置。

options.label: D
options.content: Decrease the ALB health check interval.

contents.en: Decrease the ALB health check interval.
contents.zh: 减少 ALB 运行状况检查间隔。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 B。新 ECS 任务在部署后可能需要时间启动并通过 ALB 健康检查；增加健康检查宽限期可避免任务在尚未就绪时被判定为不健康并反复重启。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 B。新 ECS 任务在部署后可能需要时间启动并通过 ALB 健康检查；增加健康检查宽限期可避免任务在尚未就绪时被判定为不健康并反复重启。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. New ECS tasks can need time to start and pass ALB health checks, so increasing the health check grace period prevents premature unhealthy markings and repeated restarts.

contents.en: A company runs a website by using an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) service that is connected to an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The service was in a steady state with tasks responding to requests successfully. A DevOps engineer updated the task definition with a new container image and deployed the new task definition to the service. The DevOps engineer noticed that the service is frequently stopping and starting new tasks because the ALB healtth checks are failing. What should the DevOps engineer do to troubleshoot the failed deployment?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用连接到 Application Load Balancer (ALB) 的 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 服务运行网站。该服务之前处于稳定状态，任务能够成功响应请求。DevOps 工程师使用新的容器映像更新了任务定义，并将新的任务定义部署到该服务。DevOps 工程师注意到，由于 ALB healtth checks 失败，该服务频繁停止并启动新任务。DevOps 工程师应如何排查失败的部署？

questions.content: A company that uses electronic patient health records runs a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances with an Amazon Linux operating system. The company must continuously ensure that the EC2 instances are running operating system patches and application patches that are in compliance with current privacy regulations. The company uses a custom repository to store application patches. A DevOps engineer needs to automate the deployment of operating system patches and application patches. The DevOps engineer wants to use both the default operating system patch repository and the custom patch repository. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST effort?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS Systems Manager to create a new custom patch baseline that includes the default operating system repository and the custom repository. Run the AWS-RunPatchBaseline document by using the Run command to verify and install patches. Use the BaselineOverride API to configure the new custom patch baseline.

contents.en: Use AWS Systems Manager to create a new custom patch baseline that includes the default operating system repository and the custom repository. Run the AWS-RunPatchBaseline document by using the Run command to verify and install patches. Use the BaselineOverride API to configure the new custom patch baseline.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Systems Manager 创建一个新的自定义补丁基线，其中包含默认操作系统存储库和自定义存储库。使用 Run command 运行 AWS-RunPatchBaseline 文档以验证并安装补丁。使用 BaselineOverride API 配置新的自定义补丁基线。

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS Direct Connect to integrate the custom repository with the EC2 instances. Use Amazon EventBridge events to deploy the patches.

contents.en: Use AWS Direct Connect to integrate the custom repository with the EC2 instances. Use Amazon EventBridge events to deploy the patches.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Direct Connect 将自定义存储库与 EC2 实例集成。使用 Amazon EventBridge 事件部署补丁。

options.label: C
options.content: Use the yum-config-manager command to add the custom repository to the /etc/yum.repos.d configuration. Run the yum- config-manager-enable command to activate the new repository.

contents.en: Use the yum-config-manager command to add the custom repository to the /etc/yum.repos.d configuration. Run the yum- config-manager-enable command to activate the new repository.
contents.zh: 使用 yum-config-manager 命令将自定义存储库添加到 /etc/yum.repos.d 配置。运行 yum- config-manager-enable 命令以激活新存储库。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS Systems Manager to create a patch baseline for the default operating system repository and a second patch baseline for the custom repository. Run the AWS-RunPatchBaseline document by using the Run command to verify and install patches. Use the BaselineOverride API to configure the default patch baseline and the custom patch baseline.

contents.en: Use AWS Systems Manager to create a patch baseline for the default operating system repository and a second patch baseline for the custom repository. Run the AWS-RunPatchBaseline document by using the Run command to verify and install patches. Use the BaselineOverride API to configure the default patch baseline and the custom patch baseline.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Systems Manager 为默认操作系统存储库创建一个补丁基线，并为自定义存储库创建第二个补丁基线。使用 Run command 运行 AWS-RunPatchBaseline 文档以验证并安装补丁。使用 BaselineOverride API 配置默认补丁基线和自定义补丁基线。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A。一个包含默认操作系统仓库和自定义仓库的自定义补丁基线更简单；通过 AWS-RunPatchBaseline 验证和安装补丁，并使用 BaselineOverride 指定该基线，避免维护多个基线和重复运行。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A。一个包含默认操作系统仓库和自定义仓库的自定义补丁基线更简单；通过 AWS-RunPatchBaseline 验证和安装补丁，并使用 BaselineOverride 指定该基线，避免维护多个基线和重复运行。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. A single custom patch baseline that includes both the default OS repository and the custom repository is simpler, and AWS-RunPatchBaseline with BaselineOverride avoids managing separate baselines and duplicate runs.

contents.en: A company that uses electronic patient health records runs a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances with an Amazon Linux operating system. The company must continuously ensure that the EC2 instances are running operating system patches and application patches that are in compliance with current privacy regulations. The company uses a custom repository to store application patches. A DevOps engineer needs to automate the deployment of operating system patches and application patches. The DevOps engineer wants to use both the default operating system patch repository and the custom patch repository. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST effort?
contents.zh: 一家使用电子患者健康记录的公司运行着一组采用 Amazon Linux 操作系统的 Amazon EC2 实例。该公司必须持续确保 EC2 实例运行的操作系统补丁和应用程序补丁符合当前隐私法规。该公司使用自定义存储库来存储应用程序补丁。DevOps 工程师需要自动化部署操作系统补丁和应用程序补丁。DevOps 工程师希望同时使用默认操作系统补丁存储库和自定义补丁存储库。哪种解决方案能够以最少工作量满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company use an organization in AWS Organizations to manage multiple AWS accounts. The company has enabled all features enabled for the organization. The company configured the organization as a hierarchy of OUs under the root OU. The company recently registered all its OUs and enrolled all its AWS accounts in AWS Control Tower. The company needs to customize the AWS Control Tower managed AWS Config configuration recorder in each of the company's AWS accounts. The company needs to apply the customizations to both the existing AWS accounts and to any new AWS accounts that the company enrolls in AWS Control Tower in the future. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a new AWS account. Create an AWS Lambda function in the new account to apply the customizations to the AWS Config configuration recorder in each AWS account in the organization.

contents.en: Create a new AWS account. Create an AWS Lambda function in the new account to apply the customizations to the AWS Config configuration recorder in each AWS account in the organization.
contents.zh: 创建一个新的 AWS 账户。在新账户中创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，以将自定义应用到组织中每个 AWS 账户的 AWS Config 配置记录器。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new AWS account as an AWS Config delegated administrator. Create an AWS Lambda function in the delegated administrator account to apply the customizations to the AWS Config configuration recorder in the delegated administrator account.

contents.en: Create a new AWS account as an AWS Config delegated administrator. Create an AWS Lambda function in the delegated administrator account to apply the customizations to the AWS Config configuration recorder in the delegated administrator account.
contents.zh: 创建一个新的 AWS 账户作为 AWS Config 委派管理员。在委派管理员账户中创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，以将自定义应用到委派管理员账户中的 AWS Config 配置记录器。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule in the AWS Control Tower management account to invoke an AWS Lambda function when the Organizations OU is registered or reregistered. Re-register the root Organizations OU.

contents.en: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule in the AWS Control Tower management account to invoke an AWS Lambda function when the Organizations OU is registered or reregistered. Re-register the root Organizations OU.
contents.zh: 在 AWS Control Tower 管理账户中配置一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，当 Organizations OU 被注册或重新注册时调用 AWS Lambda 函数。重新注册根 Organizations OU。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure the AWSControlTowerExecution IAM role in each AWS account in the organization to be assumable by an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to assume the AWSControlTowerExecution IAM role.

contents.en: Configure the AWSControlTowerExecution IAM role in each AWS account in the organization to be assumable by an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to assume the AWSControlTowerExecution IAM role.
contents.zh: 配置组织中每个 AWS 账户中的 AWSControlTowerExecution IAM 角色，使其可由 AWS Lambda 函数代入。配置 Lambda 函数以代入 AWSControlTowerExecution IAM 角色。

options.label: E
options.content: Create an IAM role in the AWS Control Tower management account that an AWS Lambda function can assume. Grant the IAM role permission to assume the AWSControlTowerExecution IAM role in any account in the organization. Configure the Lambda function to use the new IAM role.

contents.en: Create an IAM role in the AWS Control Tower management account that an AWS Lambda function can assume. Grant the IAM role permission to assume the AWSControlTowerExecution IAM role in any account in the organization. Configure the Lambda function to use the new IAM role.
contents.zh: 在 AWS Control Tower 管理账户中创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数可代入的 IAM 角色。向该 IAM 角色授予权限，使其能够代入组织中任意账户的 AWSControlTowerExecution IAM 角色。配置 Lambda 函数使用新的 IAM 角色。

options.label: F
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule in the AWS Control Tower management account to invoke an AWS Lambda function when an AWS account is updated or enrolled in AWS Control Tower or when the landing zone is updated. Re-register each Organizations OU in the organization.

contents.en: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule in the AWS Control Tower management account to invoke an AWS Lambda function when an AWS account is updated or enrolled in AWS Control Tower or when the landing zone is updated. Re-register each Organizations OU in the organization.
contents.zh: 在 AWS Control Tower 管理账户中配置一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，当 AWS 账户在 AWS Control Tower 中更新或注册，或者着陆区更新时调用 AWS Lambda 函数。重新注册组织中的每个 Organizations OU。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A、E、F。A 使用新账户中的 Lambda 应用 AWS Config 记录器自定义；E 让 Lambda 通过管理账户角色跨账户承担 AWSControlTowerExecution；F 用 EventBridge 在账户注册、更新或 landing zone 更新时触发，并重新注册 OU。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A、E、F。A 使用新账户中的 Lambda 应用 AWS Config 记录器自定义；E 让 Lambda 通过管理账户角色跨账户承担 AWSControlTowerExecution；F 用 EventBridge 在账户注册、更新或 landing zone 更新时触发，并重新注册 OU。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A, E, and F. A provides a Lambda function to apply AWS Config recorder customizations, E grants it cross-account access through a management-account role that can assume AWSControlTowerExecution, and F triggers the function from EventBridge when accounts or the landing zone change.

contents.en: A company use an organization in AWS Organizations to manage multiple AWS accounts. The company has enabled all features enabled for the organization. The company configured the organization as a hierarchy of OUs under the root OU. The company recently registered all its OUs and enrolled all its AWS accounts in AWS Control Tower. The company needs to customize the AWS Control Tower managed AWS Config configuration recorder in each of the company's AWS accounts. The company needs to apply the customizations to both the existing AWS accounts and to any new AWS accounts that the company enrolls in AWS Control Tower in the future. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations 中的一个组织来管理多个 AWS 账户。该公司已为组织启用所有功能。该公司将组织配置为根 OU 下的 OU 层次结构。该公司最近注册了所有 OU，并将所有 AWS 账户注册到 AWS Control Tower 中。该公司需要自定义公司每个 AWS 账户中的 AWS Control Tower 托管 AWS Config 配置记录器。该公司需要将这些自定义应用于现有 AWS 账户，以及未来注册到 AWS Control Tower 的任何新 AWS 账户。哪组步骤组合可以满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company runs an application in an Auto Scaling group of Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The EC2 instances run Docker containers that make requests to a MySQL database that runs on separate EC2 instances. A DevOps engineer needs to update the application to use a serverless architecture. Which solution will meet this requirement with the FEWEST changes?

options.label: A
options.content: Replace the containers that run on EC2 instances and the ALB with AWS Lambda functions. Replace the MySQL database with an Amazon Aurora Serverless v2 database that is compatible with MySQL.

contents.en: Replace the containers that run on EC2 instances and the ALB with AWS Lambda functions. Replace the MySQL database with an Amazon Aurora Serverless v2 database that is compatible with MySQL.
contents.zh: 用 AWS Lambda 函数替换运行在 EC2 实例上的容器和 ALB。用与 MySQL 兼容的 Amazon Aurora Serverless v2 数据库替换 MySQL 数据库。

options.label: B
options.content: Replace the containers that run on EC2 instances with AWS Fargate. Replace the MySQL database with an Amazon Aurora Serverless v2 database that is compatible with MySQL.

contents.en: Replace the containers that run on EC2 instances with AWS Fargate. Replace the MySQL database with an Amazon Aurora Serverless v2 database that is compatible with MySQL.
contents.zh: 用 AWS Fargate 替换运行在 EC2 实例上的容器。用与 MySQL 兼容的 Amazon Aurora Serverless v2 数据库替换 MySQL 数据库。

options.label: C
options.content: Replace the containers that run on EC2 instances and the ALB with AWS Lambda functions. Replace the MySQL database with Amazon DynamoDB tables.

contents.en: Replace the containers that run on EC2 instances and the ALB with AWS Lambda functions. Replace the MySQL database with Amazon DynamoDB tables.
contents.zh: 用 AWS Lambda 函数替换运行在 EC2 实例上的容器和 ALB。用 Amazon DynamoDB 表替换 MySQL 数据库。

options.label: D
options.content: Replace the containers that run on EC2 instances with AWS Fargate. Replace the MySQL database with Amazon DynamoDB tables.

contents.en: Replace the containers that run on EC2 instances with AWS Fargate. Replace the MySQL database with Amazon DynamoDB tables.
contents.zh: 用 AWS Fargate 替换运行在 EC2 实例上的容器。用 Amazon DynamoDB 表替换 MySQL 数据库。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 B。用 AWS Fargate 替换运行在 EC2 上的容器可减少服务器管理；用兼容 MySQL 的 Aurora Serverless v2 替换 MySQL 数据库，可在保持兼容性的同时转向无服务器数据库。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 B。用 AWS Fargate 替换运行在 EC2 上的容器可减少服务器管理；用兼容 MySQL 的 Aurora Serverless v2 替换 MySQL 数据库，可在保持兼容性的同时转向无服务器数据库。
