explanations.en: The correct answer is B. Replacing EC2-hosted containers with AWS Fargate reduces server management, and Aurora Serverless v2 with MySQL compatibility minimizes database changes while moving the data layer to serverless.

contents.en: A company runs an application in an Auto Scaling group of Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The EC2 instances run Docker containers that make requests to a MySQL database that runs on separate EC2 instances. A DevOps engineer needs to update the application to use a serverless architecture. Which solution will meet this requirement with the FEWEST changes?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 Application Load Balancer (ALB) 后面的 Amazon EC2 实例 Auto Scaling 组中运行应用程序。EC2 实例运行 Docker 容器，这些容器向运行在独立 EC2 实例上的 MySQL 数据库发出请求。DevOps 工程师需要更新该应用程序以使用无服务器架构。哪种解决方案能够以最少的更改满足此要求？

questions.content: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations to manage 10 AWS accounts. All features are enabled, and trusted access for AWS CloudFormation is enabled. A DevOps engineer needs to use CloudFormation to deploy an IAM role to the Organizations management account and all member accounts in the organization. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a CloudFormation StackSet that has service-managed permissions. Set the root OU as a deployment target.

contents.en: Create a CloudFormation StackSet that has service-managed permissions. Set the root OU as a deployment target.
contents.zh: 创建一个具有服务托管权限的 CloudFormation StackSet。将根 OU 设置为部署目标。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a CloudFormation StackSet that has service-managed permissions. Set the root OU as a deployment target. Deploy a separate CloudFormation stack in the Organizations management account.

contents.en: Create a CloudFormation StackSet that has service-managed permissions. Set the root OU as a deployment target. Deploy a separate CloudFormation stack in the Organizations management account.
contents.zh: 创建一个具有服务托管权限的 CloudFormation StackSet。将根 OU 设置为部署目标。在 Organizations 管理账户中部署一个单独的 CloudFormation 堆栈。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a CloudFormation StackSet that has self-managed permissions. Set the root OU as a deployment target.

contents.en: Create a CloudFormation StackSet that has self-managed permissions. Set the root OU as a deployment target.
contents.zh: 创建一个具有自托管权限的 CloudFormation StackSet。将根 OU 设置为部署目标。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a CloudFormation StackSet that has self-managed permissions. Set the root OU as a deployment target. Deploy a separate CloudFormation stack in the Organizations management account.

contents.en: Create a CloudFormation StackSet that has self-managed permissions. Set the root OU as a deployment target. Deploy a separate CloudFormation stack in the Organizations management account.
contents.zh: 创建一个具有自托管权限的 CloudFormation StackSet。将根 OU 设置为部署目标。在 Organizations 管理账户中部署一个单独的 CloudFormation 堆栈。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 B。服务托管权限的 StackSet 可面向根 OU 部署到组织账户，但 StackSets 不会向 Organizations 管理账户部署堆栈实例，因此管理账户需要单独部署 CloudFormation 堆栈。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 B。服务托管权限的 StackSet 可面向根 OU 部署到组织账户，但 StackSets 不会向 Organizations 管理账户部署堆栈实例，因此管理账户需要单独部署 CloudFormation 堆栈。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. A service-managed StackSet can target the root OU for member accounts, but StackSets do not deploy stack instances to the Organizations management account, so a separate stack is required there.

contents.en: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations to manage 10 AWS accounts. All features are enabled, and trusted access for AWS CloudFormation is enabled. A DevOps engineer needs to use CloudFormation to deploy an IAM role to the Organizations management account and all member accounts in the organization. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations 中的一个组织来管理 10 个 AWS 账户。所有功能均已启用，并且已为 AWS CloudFormation 启用可信访问。DevOps 工程师需要使用 CloudFormation 将一个 IAM 角色部署到 Organizations 管理账户和组织中的所有成员账户。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运维开销满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company runs an application that stores artifacts in an Amazon S3 bucket. The application has a large user base. The application writes a high volume of objects to the S3 bucket. The company has enabled event notifications for the S3 bucket. When the application writes an object to the S3 bucket, several processing tasks need to be performed simultaneously. The company's DevOps team needs to create an AWS Step Functions workflow to orchestrate the processing tasks. Which combination of steps should the DevOps team take to meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a Standard workflow that contains a parallel state that defines the processing tasks. Create an Asynchronous Express workflow that contains a parallel state that defines the processing tasks.

contents.en: Create a Standard workflow that contains a parallel state that defines the processing tasks. Create an Asynchronous Express workflow that contains a parallel state that defines the processing tasks.
contents.zh: 创建一个包含定义处理任务的并行状态的 Standard workflow。创建一个包含定义处理任务的并行状态的 Asynchronous Express workflow。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a Synchronous Express workflow that contains a map state that defines the processing tasks.

contents.en: Create a Synchronous Express workflow that contains a map state that defines the processing tasks.
contents.zh: 创建一个包含定义处理任务的 map 状态的 Synchronous Express workflow。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to match when a new S3 object is created. Configure the EventBridge rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to start the processing workflow.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to match when a new S3 object is created. Configure the EventBridge rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to start the processing workflow.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，用于匹配新 S3 对象创建事件。配置 EventBridge 规则调用 AWS Lambda 函数。配置 Lambda 函数启动处理工作流。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to match when a new S3 object is created. Configure the EventBridge rule to start the processing workflow.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to match when a new S3 object is created. Configure the EventBridge rule to start the processing workflow.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，用于匹配新 S3 对象创建事件。配置 EventBridge 规则启动处理工作流。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A、D。A 使用包含 parallel state 的 Step Functions 工作流并行处理任务，适合需要可靠性、重试和可观测性的处理流程；D 用 EventBridge 匹配新 S3 对象创建事件并直接启动工作流，减少中间代码。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A、D。A 使用包含 parallel state 的 Step Functions 工作流并行处理任务，适合需要可靠性、重试和可观测性的处理流程；D 用 EventBridge 匹配新 S3 对象创建事件并直接启动工作流，减少中间代码。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A and D. A uses a Step Functions workflow with a parallel state for the processing tasks, and D starts that workflow from an EventBridge rule when a new S3 object is created.

contents.en: A company runs an application that stores artifacts in an Amazon S3 bucket. The application has a large user base. The application writes a high volume of objects to the S3 bucket. The company has enabled event notifications for the S3 bucket. When the application writes an object to the S3 bucket, several processing tasks need to be performed simultaneously. The company's DevOps team needs to create an AWS Step Functions workflow to orchestrate the processing tasks. Which combination of steps should the DevOps team take to meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司运行一个将构件存储在 Amazon S3 存储桶中的应用程序。该应用程序拥有庞大的用户群。该应用程序向 S3 存储桶写入大量对象。该公司已为 S3 存储桶启用事件通知。当应用程序向 S3 存储桶写入对象时，需要同时执行多项处理任务。公司的 DevOps 团队需要创建一个 AWS Step Functions 工作流来编排这些处理任务。DevOps 团队应采取哪组步骤组合，以最少的运维开销满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A DevOps team supports an application that runs in an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Currently, the DevOps team uses AWS CodeDeploy to deploy the application by using a blue/green all-at-once strategy. Recently, the DevOps team had to roll back a deployment when a new version of the application dramatically increased response times for requests. The DevOps team needs use to a deployment strategy that will allow the team to monitor a new version of the application before the team shifts all traffic to the new version. If a new version of the application increases response times, the deployment should be rolled back as quickly as possible. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Modify the CodeDeploy deployment to use the CodeDeployDefault.ECSCanary10Percent5Minutes configuration.

contents.en: Modify the CodeDeploy deployment to use the CodeDeployDefault.ECSCanary10Percent5Minutes configuration.
contents.zh: 修改 CodeDeploy 部署以使用 CodeDeployDefault.ECSCanary10Percent5Minutes 配置。

options.label: B
options.content: Modify the CodeDeploy deployment to use the CodeDeployDefault.ECSLinear10PercentEvery3Minutes configuration.

contents.en: Modify the CodeDeploy deployment to use the CodeDeployDefault.ECSLinear10PercentEvery3Minutes configuration.
contents.zh: 修改 CodeDeploy 部署以使用 CodeDeployDefault.ECSLinear10PercentEvery3Minutes 配置。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to monitor the UnHealthyHostCount metric for the ALB. Set the alarm to activate if the metric is higher than the desired value. Associate the alarm with the CodeDeploy deployment group. Modify the deployment group to roll back when a deployment fails.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to monitor the UnHealthyHostCount metric for the ALB. Set the alarm to activate if the metric is higher than the desired value. Associate the alarm with the CodeDeploy deployment group. Modify the deployment group to roll back when a deployment fails.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon CloudWatch 警报来监控 ALB 的 UnHealthyHostCount 指标。将警报设置为在该指标高于期望值时激活。将该警报与 CodeDeploy 部署组关联。修改部署组，使其在部署失败时回滚。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to monitor the TargetResponseTime metric for the ALB. Set the alarm to activate if the metric is higher than the desired value. Associate the alarm with the CodeDeploy deployment group. Modify the deployment group to roll back when alarm thresholds are met.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to monitor the TargetResponseTime metric for the ALB. Set the alarm to activate if the metric is higher than the desired value. Associate the alarm with the CodeDeploy deployment group. Modify the deployment group to roll back when alarm thresholds are met.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon CloudWatch 警报来监控 ALB 的 TargetResponseTime 指标。将警报设置为在该指标高于期望值时激活。将该警报与 CodeDeploy 部署组关联。修改部署组，使其在达到警报阈值时回滚。

options.label: E
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to monitor the TargetConnectionErrorCount metric for the ALB. Set the alarm to activate if the metric is higher than the desired value. Associate the alarm with the CodeDeploy deployment group. Modify the deployment group to roll back when alarm thresholds are met.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to monitor the TargetConnectionErrorCount metric for the ALB. Set the alarm to activate if the metric is higher than the desired value. Associate the alarm with the CodeDeploy deployment group. Modify the deployment group to roll back when alarm thresholds are met.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon CloudWatch 警报来监控 ALB 的 TargetConnectionErrorCount 指标。将警报设置为在该指标高于期望值时激活。将该警报与 CodeDeploy 部署组关联。修改部署组，使其在达到警报阈值时回滚。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A、D。A 使用 CodeDeployDefault.ECSCanary10Percent5Minutes 进行受控金丝雀发布；D 监控 ALB 的 TargetResponseTime 并将 CloudWatch 告警关联到部署组，超过阈值时自动回滚。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A、D。A 使用 CodeDeployDefault.ECSCanary10Percent5Minutes 进行受控金丝雀发布；D 监控 ALB 的 TargetResponseTime 并将 CloudWatch 告警关联到部署组，超过阈值时自动回滚。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A and D. A applies a controlled ECS canary deployment, and D uses a CloudWatch alarm on ALB TargetResponseTime tied to the deployment group so CodeDeploy can roll back when thresholds are breached.

contents.en: A DevOps team supports an application that runs in an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Currently, the DevOps team uses AWS CodeDeploy to deploy the application by using a blue/green all-at-once strategy. Recently, the DevOps team had to roll back a deployment when a new version of the application dramatically increased response times for requests. The DevOps team needs use to a deployment strategy that will allow the team to monitor a new version of the application before the team shifts all traffic to the new version. If a new version of the application increases response times, the deployment should be rolled back as quickly as possible. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一个 DevOps 团队支持一个运行在 Application Load Balancer (ALB) 后面的 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 集群中的应用程序。目前，DevOps 团队使用 AWS CodeDeploy，并采用蓝/绿一次性全部切换策略部署应用程序。最近，当应用程序的新版本显著增加请求响应时间时，DevOps 团队不得不回滚部署。DevOps 团队需要使用一种部署策略，使团队能够在将所有流量切换到新版本之前监控新版本。如果应用程序的新版本增加响应时间，应尽快回滚部署。哪组步骤组合可以满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A security team must record the configuration of AWS resources, detect issues, and send notifications for findings. The main workload in the AWS account consists of an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group that scales in and out several times during the day. The team wants to be notified within 2 days if any Amazon EC2 security group allows traffic on port 22 for 0.0.0.0/0. The team also needs a snapshot of the configuration of the AWS resources to be taken routinely. The security team has already created and subscribed to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure AWS Config to use periodic recording for the AWS account. Deploy the vpc-sg-port-restriction-check AWS Config managed rule. Configure AWS Config to use the SNS topic as the target for notifications.

contents.en: Configure AWS Config to use periodic recording for the AWS account. Deploy the vpc-sg-port-restriction-check AWS Config managed rule. Configure AWS Config to use the SNS topic as the target for notifications.
contents.zh: 为 AWS 账户配置 AWS Config 使用周期性记录。部署 vpc-sg-port-restriction-check AWS Config 托管规则。配置 AWS Config 使用 SNS 主题作为通知目标。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure AWS Config to use configuration change recording for the AWS account. Deploy the vpc-sg-open-only-to- authorized-ports AWS Config managed rule. Configure AWS Config to use the SNS topic as the target for notifications.

contents.en: Configure AWS Config to use configuration change recording for the AWS account. Deploy the vpc-sg-open-only-to- authorized-ports AWS Config managed rule. Configure AWS Config to use the SNS topic as the target for notifications.
contents.zh: 为 AWS 账户配置 AWS Config 使用配置变更记录。部署 vpc-sg-open-only-to- authorized-ports AWS Config 托管规则。配置 AWS Config 使用 SNS 主题作为通知目标。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure AWS Config to use configuration change recording for the AWS account. Deploy the ssh-restricted AWS Config managed rule. Configure AWS Config to use the SNS topic as the target for notifications.

contents.en: Configure AWS Config to use configuration change recording for the AWS account. Deploy the ssh-restricted AWS Config managed rule. Configure AWS Config to use the SNS topic as the target for notifications.
contents.zh: 为 AWS 账户配置 AWS Config 使用配置变更记录。部署 ssh-restricted AWS Config 托管规则。配置 AWS Config 使用 SNS 主题作为通知目标。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function to evaluate security groups and publish a message to the SNS topic. Use an Amazon EventBridge rule to schedule the Lambda function to run once a day.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function to evaluate security groups and publish a message to the SNS topic. Use an Amazon EventBridge rule to schedule the Lambda function to run once a day.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数来评估安全组并向 SNS 主题发布消息。使用 Amazon EventBridge 规则安排该 Lambda 函数每天运行一次。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 C。AWS Config 的配置变更记录可持续监控资源变化；ssh-restricted 托管规则专门检查安全组是否允许 0.0.0.0/0 访问 22 端口，并可通过 SNS 发送不合规通知。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 C。AWS Config 的配置变更记录可持续监控资源变化；ssh-restricted 托管规则专门检查安全组是否允许 0.0.0.0/0 访问 22 端口，并可通过 SNS 发送不合规通知。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. AWS Config records configuration changes, the ssh-restricted managed rule checks for security groups that allow SSH from 0.0.0.0/0, and SNS notifications alert the team when noncompliance is detected.

contents.en: A security team must record the configuration of AWS resources, detect issues, and send notifications for findings. The main workload in the AWS account consists of an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group that scales in and out several times during the day. The team wants to be notified within 2 days if any Amazon EC2 security group allows traffic on port 22 for 0.0.0.0/0. The team also needs a snapshot of the configuration of the AWS resources to be taken routinely. The security team has already created and subscribed to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Which solution meets these requirements?
contents.zh: 安全团队必须记录 AWS 资源的配置、检测问题并发送发现项通知。该 AWS 账户中的主要工作负载由一个 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 组组成，该组每天会多次扩缩容。团队希望在 2 天内收到通知，如果任何 Amazon EC2 安全组允许 0.0.0.0/0 访问端口 22。团队还需要定期获取 AWS 资源配置的快照。安全团队已经创建并订阅了一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has proprietary data available by using an Amazon CloudFront distribution. The company needs to ensure that the distribution is accessible by only users from the corporate office that have a known set of IP address ranges. An AWS WAF web ACL is associated with the distribution and has a default action set to Count. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a new regex pattern set. Add the regex pattern set to a new rule group. Create a new web ACL that has a default action set to Block. Associate the web ACL with the CloudFront distribution. Add a rule that allows traffic based on the new rule group.

contents.en: Create a new regex pattern set. Add the regex pattern set to a new rule group. Create a new web ACL that has a default action set to Block. Associate the web ACL with the CloudFront distribution. Add a rule that allows traffic based on the new rule group.
contents.zh: 创建一个新的 regex pattern set。将该 regex pattern set 添加到新的规则组。创建一个默认操作设置为 Block 的新 web ACL。将该 web ACL 与 CloudFront 分配关联。添加一条基于新规则组允许流量的规则。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS WAF IP address set that matches the corporate office IP address range. Create a new web ACL that has a default action set to Allow. Associate the web ACL with the CloudFront distribution. Add a rule that allows traffic from the IP address set.

contents.en: Create an AWS WAF IP address set that matches the corporate office IP address range. Create a new web ACL that has a default action set to Allow. Associate the web ACL with the CloudFront distribution. Add a rule that allows traffic from the IP address set.
contents.zh: 创建一个匹配公司办公室 IP 地址范围的 AWS WAF IP address set。创建一个默认操作设置为 Allow 的新 web ACL。将该 web ACL 与 CloudFront 分配关联。添加一条允许来自该 IP address set 的流量的规则。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a new regex pattern set. Add the regex pattern set to a new rule group. Set the default action on the existing web ACL to Allow. Add a rule that has priority 0 that allows traffic based on the regex pattern set.

contents.en: Create a new regex pattern set. Add the regex pattern set to a new rule group. Set the default action on the existing web ACL to Allow. Add a rule that has priority 0 that allows traffic based on the regex pattern set.
contents.zh: 创建一个新的 regex pattern set。将该 regex pattern set 添加到新的规则组。将现有 web ACL 的默认操作设置为 Allow。添加一条优先级为 0 的规则，该规则基于 regex pattern set 允许流量。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a WAF IP address set that matches the corporate office IP address range. Set the default action on the existing web ACL to Block. Add a rule that has priority 0 that allows traffic from the IP address set.

contents.en: Create a WAF IP address set that matches the corporate office IP address range. Set the default action on the existing web ACL to Block. Add a rule that has priority 0 that allows traffic from the IP address set.
contents.zh: 创建一个匹配公司办公室 IP 地址范围的 WAF IP address set。将现有 web ACL 的默认操作设置为 Block。添加一条优先级为 0 的规则，允许来自该 IP address set 的流量。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 D。WAF IP 集用于匹配公司办公室 IP 范围；将现有 Web ACL 默认动作设为 Block，再添加优先级 0 的允许规则，即可只允许公司 IP 访问并阻止其他流量。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 D。WAF IP 集用于匹配公司办公室 IP 范围；将现有 Web ACL 默认动作设为 Block，再添加优先级 0 的允许规则，即可只允许公司 IP 访问并阻止其他流量。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. A WAF IP set matches the corporate office IP range, the web ACL blocks by default, and a priority 0 allow rule permits only that IP set.

contents.en: A company has proprietary data available by using an Amazon CloudFront distribution. The company needs to ensure that the distribution is accessible by only users from the corporate office that have a known set of IP address ranges. An AWS WAF web ACL is associated with the distribution and has a default action set to Count. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?
contents.zh: 一家公司通过 Amazon CloudFront 分配提供专有数据。该公司需要确保该分配只能由来自公司办公室、且具有一组已知 IP 地址范围的用户访问。一个 AWS WAF web ACL 已与该分配关联，并且默认操作设置为 Count。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运维开销满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company runs several applications in the same AWS account. The applications send logs to Amazon CloudWatch. A data analytics team needs to collect performance metrics and custom metrics from the applications. The analytics team needs to transform the metrics data before storing the data in an Amazon S3 bucket. The analytics team must automatically collect any new metrics that are added to the CloudWatch namespace. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure a CloudWatch metric stream to include metrics from the application and the CloudWatch namespace. Configure the metric stream to deliver the metrics to an Amazon Data Firehose delivery stream. Configure the Firehose delivery stream to invoke an AWS Lambda function to transform the data. Configure the delivery stream to send the transformed data to the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Configure a CloudWatch metric stream to include metrics from the application and the CloudWatch namespace. Configure the metric stream to deliver the metrics to an Amazon Data Firehose delivery stream. Configure the Firehose delivery stream to invoke an AWS Lambda function to transform the data. Configure the delivery stream to send the transformed data to the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 配置 CloudWatch metric stream 以包含来自应用程序和 CloudWatch 命名空间的指标。配置该 metric stream 将指标传送到 Amazon Data Firehose 传输流。配置 Firehose 传输流调用 AWS Lambda 函数来转换数据。配置传输流将转换后的数据发送到 S3 存储桶。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure a CloudWatch metrics stream to include all the metrics and to deliver the metrics to an Amazon Data Firehose delivery stream. Configure the Firehose delivery stream to invoke an AWS Lambda function to transform the data. Configure the delivery stream to send the transformed data to the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Configure a CloudWatch metrics stream to include all the metrics and to deliver the metrics to an Amazon Data Firehose delivery stream. Configure the Firehose delivery stream to invoke an AWS Lambda function to transform the data. Configure the delivery stream to send the transformed data to the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 配置 CloudWatch metrics stream 以包含所有指标，并将指标传送到 Amazon Data Firehose 传输流。配置 Firehose 传输流调用 AWS Lambda 函数来转换数据。配置传输流将转换后的数据发送到 S3 存储桶。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure metric filters for the CloudWatch logs to create custom metrics. Configure a CloudWatch metric stream to deliver the application metrics to the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Configure metric filters for the CloudWatch logs to create custom metrics. Configure a CloudWatch metric stream to deliver the application metrics to the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 为 CloudWatch 日志配置指标筛选器以创建自定义指标。配置 CloudWatch metric stream 将应用程序指标传送到 S3 存储桶。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure subscription filters on the application log groups to target an Amazon Data Firehose delivery stream. Configure the Firehose delivery stream to invoke an AWS Lambda function to transform the data. Configure the delivery stream to send the transformed data to the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Configure subscription filters on the application log groups to target an Amazon Data Firehose delivery stream. Configure the Firehose delivery stream to invoke an AWS Lambda function to transform the data. Configure the delivery stream to send the transformed data to the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 在应用程序日志组上配置订阅筛选器，以指向 Amazon Data Firehose 传输流。配置 Firehose 传输流调用 AWS Lambda 函数来转换数据。配置传输流将转换后的数据发送到 S3 存储桶。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 B。CloudWatch metric stream 可包含命名空间中的所有指标，并交付到 Firehose；Firehose 调用 Lambda 转换后写入 S3，新指标加入后也会被收集。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 B。CloudWatch metric stream 可包含命名空间中的所有指标，并交付到 Firehose；Firehose 调用 Lambda 转换后写入 S3，新指标加入后也会被收集。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. A CloudWatch metrics stream can include all metrics and deliver them to Firehose, which invokes Lambda for transformation before sending the data to S3; newly added metrics are collected as well.

contents.en: A company runs several applications in the same AWS account. The applications send logs to Amazon CloudWatch. A data analytics team needs to collect performance metrics and custom metrics from the applications. The analytics team needs to transform the metrics data before storing the data in an Amazon S3 bucket. The analytics team must automatically collect any new metrics that are added to the CloudWatch namespace. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?
contents.zh: 一家公司在同一个 AWS 账户中运行多个应用程序。这些应用程序将日志发送到 Amazon CloudWatch。数据分析团队需要从这些应用程序收集性能指标和自定义指标。分析团队需要在将指标数据存储到 Amazon S3 存储桶之前转换这些指标数据。分析团队必须自动收集添加到 CloudWatch 命名空间的任何新指标。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运维开销满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses an HPC platform to run analysis jobs for data. The company uses AWS CodeBuild to create container images and store the images on Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR). The images are then deployed on Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). To maintain compliance, the company needs to ensure that the images are signed before the images are deployed on Amazon EKS. The signing keys must be rotated periodically and must be managed automatically. The company needs to track who generates the signatures. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational effort?

options.label: A
options.content: Use CodeBuild to retrieve the image that was previously pushed to Amazon ECR. Use AWS Signer to sign the image. Use AWS CloudTrail to track who generates the signatures.

contents.en: Use CodeBuild to retrieve the image that was previously pushed to Amazon ECR. Use AWS Signer to sign the image. Use AWS CloudTrail to track who generates the signatures.
contents.zh: 使用 CodeBuild 检索先前推送到 Amazon ECR 的映像。使用 AWS Signer 对该映像进行签名。使用 AWS CloudTrail 跟踪谁生成了签名。

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS Lambda to retrieve the image that was previously pushed to Amazon ECR. Use a Lambda function to sign the image. Use Amazon CloudWatch to track who generates the signatures.

contents.en: Use AWS Lambda to retrieve the image that was previously pushed to Amazon ECR. Use a Lambda function to sign the image. Use Amazon CloudWatch to track who generates the signatures.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Lambda 检索先前推送到 Amazon ECR 的映像。使用 Lambda 函数对该映像进行签名。使用 Amazon CloudWatch 跟踪谁生成了签名。

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS Lambda to retrieve the image that was previously pushed to Amazon ECR. Use AWS Signer to sign the image. Use Amazon CloudWatch to track who generates the signatures.

contents.en: Use AWS Lambda to retrieve the image that was previously pushed to Amazon ECR. Use AWS Signer to sign the image. Use Amazon CloudWatch to track who generates the signatures.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Lambda 检索先前推送到 Amazon ECR 的映像。使用 AWS Signer 对该映像进行签名。使用 Amazon CloudWatch 跟踪谁生成了签名。

options.label: D
options.content: Use CodeBuild to build the image. Sign the image by using AWS Signer before pushing the image to Amazon ECR. Use AWS CloudTrail to track who generates the signatures.

contents.en: Use CodeBuild to build the image. Sign the image by using AWS Signer before pushing the image to Amazon ECR. Use AWS CloudTrail to track who generates the signatures.
contents.zh: 使用 CodeBuild 构建映像。在将映像推送到 Amazon ECR 之前，使用 AWS Signer 对映像进行签名。使用 AWS CloudTrail 跟踪谁生成了签名。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 D。镜像需要在 ECR 中生成 digest 后再签名；使用 CodeBuild 构建镜像、用 AWS Signer 在推送到 ECR 前签名，并用 CloudTrail 跟踪签名生成者。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 D。镜像需要在 ECR 中生成 digest 后再签名；使用 CodeBuild 构建镜像、用 AWS Signer 在推送到 ECR 前签名，并用 CloudTrail 跟踪签名生成者。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. The image needs an ECR digest before signing, so CodeBuild builds the image, AWS Signer signs it before it is pushed to ECR, and CloudTrail tracks who generated the signatures.

contents.en: A company uses an HPC platform to run analysis jobs for data. The company uses AWS CodeBuild to create container images and store the images on Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR). The images are then deployed on Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). To maintain compliance, the company needs to ensure that the images are signed before the images are deployed on Amazon EKS. The signing keys must be rotated periodically and must be managed automatically. The company needs to track who generates the signatures. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational effort?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 HPC 平台运行数据分析作业。该公司使用 AWS CodeBuild 创建容器映像，并将映像存储在 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) 中。然后，这些映像会部署到 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 上。为保持合规，该公司需要确保映像在部署到 Amazon EKS 之前已签名。签名密钥必须定期轮换并自动管理。该公司需要跟踪谁生成了签名。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运维工作量满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses an AWS CodeArtifact repository to store Python packages that the company developed internally. A DevOps engineer needs to use AWS CodeDeploy to deploy an application to an Amazon EC2 instance. The application uses a Python package that is stored in the CodeArtifact repository. A BeforeInstall lifecycle event hook will install the package. The DevOps engineer needs to grant the EC2 instance access to the CodeArtifact repository. Which solution will meet this requirement?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a service-linked role for CodeArtifact. Associate the role with the EC2 instance. Use the aws codeartifact get- authorization-token CLI command on the instance.

contents.en: Create a service-linked role for CodeArtifact. Associate the role with the EC2 instance. Use the aws codeartifact get- authorization-token CLI command on the instance.
contents.zh: 为 CodeArtifact 创建一个服务相关角色。将该角色与 EC2 实例关联。在实例上使用 aws codeartifact get- authorization-token CLI command。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure a resource-based policy for the CodeArtifact repository that allows the ReadFromRepository action for the EC2 instance principal.

contents.en: Configure a resource-based policy for the CodeArtifact repository that allows the ReadFromRepository action for the EC2 instance principal.
contents.zh: 为 CodeArtifact 存储库配置基于资源的策略，允许 EC2 实例主体执行 ReadFromRepository 操作。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure ACLs on the CodeArtifact repository to allow the EC2 instance to access the Python package.

contents.en: Configure ACLs on the CodeArtifact repository to allow the EC2 instance to access the Python package.
contents.zh: 在 CodeArtifact 存储库上配置 ACL，以允许 EC2 实例访问 Python 包。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an instance profile that contains an IAM role that has access to CodeArtifact. Associate the instance profile with the EC2 instance. Use the aws codeartifact login CLI command on the instance.

contents.en: Create an instance profile that contains an IAM role that has access to CodeArtifact. Associate the instance profile with the EC2 instance. Use the aws codeartifact login CLI command on the instance.
contents.zh: 创建一个实例配置文件，其中包含有权访问 CodeArtifact 的 IAM 角色。将该实例配置文件与 EC2 实例关联。在实例上使用 aws codeartifact login CLI command。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 D。CodeArtifact 访问由 IAM 控制；为 EC2 实例关联包含 CodeArtifact 权限的实例配置文件，并在实例上运行 aws codeartifact login，即可让实例获取访问凭证。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 D。CodeArtifact 访问由 IAM 控制；为 EC2 实例关联包含 CodeArtifact 权限的实例配置文件，并在实例上运行 aws codeartifact login，即可让实例获取访问凭证。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. CodeArtifact access is controlled through IAM, so attaching an instance profile with a role that has CodeArtifact permissions and running aws codeartifact login on the EC2 instance provides access.

contents.en: A company uses an AWS CodeArtifact repository to store Python packages that the company developed internally. A DevOps engineer needs to use AWS CodeDeploy to deploy an application to an Amazon EC2 instance. The application uses a Python package that is stored in the CodeArtifact repository. A BeforeInstall lifecycle event hook will install the package. The DevOps engineer needs to grant the EC2 instance access to the CodeArtifact repository. Which solution will meet this requirement?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS CodeArtifact 存储库来存储公司内部开发的 Python 包。DevOps 工程师需要使用 AWS CodeDeploy 将应用程序部署到 Amazon EC2 实例。该应用程序使用存储在 CodeArtifact 存储库中的 Python 包。BeforeInstall 生命周期事件钩子将安装该包。DevOps 工程师需要授予 EC2 实例访问 CodeArtifact 存储库的权限。哪种解决方案可以满足此要求？

questions.content: A company has a file-reading application that saves files to a database that runs on Amazon EC2 instances. Regulations require the company to delete files from EC2 instances every day at a specific time. The company must delete database records that are older than 60 days. The database record deletion must occur after the file deletions. The company has created scripts to delete files and database records. The company needs to receive an email notification for any failure of the deletion scripts. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST development effort?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS Systems Manager State Manager to automatically invoke a Systems Manager Automation document at the specified time each day. Configure the Automation document to use a run command to run the deletion scripts in sequential order. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to use Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) to send failure notifications to the company.

contents.en: Use AWS Systems Manager State Manager to automatically invoke a Systems Manager Automation document at the specified time each day. Configure the Automation document to use a run command to run the deletion scripts in sequential order. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to use Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) to send failure notifications to the company.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Systems Manager State Manager 在每天指定时间自动调用 Systems Manager Automation 文档。配置该 Automation 文档使用 run command 按顺序运行删除脚本。创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，使用 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 向公司发送失败通知。

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS Systems Manager State Manager to automatically invoke a Systems Manager Automation document at the specified time each day. Configure the Automation document to use a run command to run the deletion scripts in sequential order. Create a conditional statement inside the Automation document as the last step to check for errors. Use Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES) to send failure notifications as email messages to the company.

contents.en: Use AWS Systems Manager State Manager to automatically invoke a Systems Manager Automation document at the specified time each day. Configure the Automation document to use a run command to run the deletion scripts in sequential order. Create a conditional statement inside the Automation document as the last step to check for errors. Use Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES) to send failure notifications as email messages to the company.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Systems Manager State Manager 在每天指定时间自动调用 Systems Manager Automation 文档。配置该 Automation 文档使用 run command 按顺序运行删除脚本。在 Automation 文档的最后一步内创建一个条件语句以检查错误。使用 Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES) 以电子邮件消息形式向公司发送失败通知。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that invokes an AWS Lambda function at the specified time. Add the necessary permissions for the invocation to the Lambda function's resource-based policy. Configure the Lambda function to run the deletion scripts in sequential order. Configure the Lambda function to use Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) to send failure notifications to the company.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that invokes an AWS Lambda function at the specified time. Add the necessary permissions for the invocation to the Lambda function's resource-based policy. Configure the Lambda function to run the deletion scripts in sequential order. Configure the Lambda function to use Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) to send failure notifications to the company.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，在指定时间调用 AWS Lambda 函数。向 Lambda 函数的基于资源的策略添加调用所需权限。配置 Lambda 函数按顺序运行删除脚本。配置 Lambda 函数使用 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 向公司发送失败通知。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that invokes an AWS Lambda function at the specified time. Add the necessary permissions for the invocation to the Lambda function's resource-based policy. Configure the Lambda function to run the deletion scripts in sequential order. Configure the Lambda function to use Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES) to send failure notifications as email messages to the company.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that invokes an AWS Lambda function at the specified time. Add the necessary permissions for the invocation to the Lambda function's resource-based policy. Configure the Lambda function to run the deletion scripts in sequential order. Configure the Lambda function to use Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES) to send failure notifications as email messages to the company.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，在指定时间调用 AWS Lambda 函数。向 Lambda 函数的基于资源的策略添加调用所需权限。配置 Lambda 函数按顺序运行删除脚本。配置 Lambda 函数使用 Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES) 以电子邮件消息形式向公司发送失败通知。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A。Systems Manager State Manager 可按每天指定时间自动调用 Automation 文档；Automation 文档按顺序运行删除脚本，EventBridge 规则再通过 SNS 发送失败通知，开发工作量较低。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A。Systems Manager State Manager 可按每天指定时间自动调用 Automation 文档；Automation 文档按顺序运行删除脚本，EventBridge 规则再通过 SNS 发送失败通知，开发工作量较低。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. Systems Manager State Manager schedules the Automation document, the document runs the deletion scripts sequentially, and EventBridge with SNS handles failure notifications with minimal development effort.

contents.en: A company has a file-reading application that saves files to a database that runs on Amazon EC2 instances. Regulations require the company to delete files from EC2 instances every day at a specific time. The company must delete database records that are older than 60 days. The database record deletion must occur after the file deletions. The company has created scripts to delete files and database records. The company needs to receive an email notification for any failure of the deletion scripts. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST development effort?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个文件读取应用程序，该应用程序将文件保存到运行在 Amazon EC2 实例上的数据库。法规要求该公司每天在特定时间从 EC2 实例中删除文件。该公司必须删除超过 60 天的数据库记录。数据库记录删除必须在文件删除之后进行。该公司已创建用于删除文件和数据库记录的脚本。该公司需要在任何删除脚本失败时收到电子邮件通知。哪种解决方案能够以最少的开发工作量满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations that has all features enabled to manage its AWS accounts. Amazon EQ instances run in the AWS accounts. The company requires that all current EC2 instances must use Instance Metadata Service Version 2 (IMDSv2). The company needs to block AWS API calls that originate from EC2 instances that do not use IMDSv2. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a new SCP statement that denies the ec2:RunInstances action when the ec2:MetadataHttpTokens condition key is not equal to the value of required. Attach the SCP to the root of the organization.

contents.en: Create a new SCP statement that denies the ec2:RunInstances action when the ec2:MetadataHttpTokens condition key is not equal to the value of required. Attach the SCP to the root of the organization.
contents.zh: 创建一个新的 SCP 语句，当 ec2:MetadataHttpTokens 条件键不等于 required 值时，拒绝 ec2:RunInstances 操作。将该 SCP 附加到组织根。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new SCP statement that denies the ec2:RunInstances action when the ec2:MetadataHttpPutResponseHopLimit condition key value is greater than two. Attach the SCP to the root of the organization.

contents.en: Create a new SCP statement that denies the ec2:RunInstances action when the ec2:MetadataHttpPutResponseHopLimit condition key value is greater than two. Attach the SCP to the root of the organization.
contents.zh: 创建一个新的 SCP 语句，当 ec2:MetadataHttpPutResponseHopLimit 条件键值大于 two 时，拒绝 ec2:RunInstances 操作。将该 SCP 附加到组织根。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a new SCP statement that denies "*" when the ec2:RoleDelivery condition key value is less than two. Attach the SCP to the root of the organization.

contents.en: Create a new SCP statement that denies "*" when the ec2:RoleDelivery condition key value is less than two. Attach the SCP to the root of the organization.
contents.zh: 创建一个新的 SCP 语句，当 ec2:RoleDelivery 条件键值小于 two 时，拒绝 "*"。将该 SCP 附加到组织根。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a new SCP statement that denies when the ec2:MetadataHttpTokens condition key value is not equal to required. Attach the SCP to the root of the organization.

contents.en: Create a new SCP statement that denies when the ec2:MetadataHttpTokens condition key value is not equal to required. Attach the SCP to the root of the organization.
contents.zh: 创建一个新的 SCP 语句，当 ec2:MetadataHttpTokens 条件键值不等于 required 时拒绝。将该 SCP 附加到组织根。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 D。SCP 使用 ec2:MetadataHttpTokens 条件键，在值不等于 required 时拒绝操作，并附加到组织根，可在组织范围内强制使用 IMDSv2。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 D。SCP 使用 ec2:MetadataHttpTokens 条件键，在值不等于 required 时拒绝操作，并附加到组织根，可在组织范围内强制使用 IMDSv2。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. An SCP that denies requests when ec2:MetadataHttpTokens is not required, attached at the organization root, enforces IMDSv2 across the organization.

contents.en: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations that has all features enabled to manage its AWS accounts. Amazon EQ instances run in the AWS accounts. The company requires that all current EC2 instances must use Instance Metadata Service Version 2 (IMDSv2). The company needs to block AWS API calls that originate from EC2 instances that do not use IMDSv2. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations 中启用所有功能的组织来管理其 AWS 账户。Amazon EQ 实例在这些 AWS 账户中运行。该公司要求所有当前 EC2 实例必须使用 Instance Metadata Service Version 2 (IMDSv2)。该公司需要阻止来自未使用 IMDSv2 的 EC2 实例的 AWS API 调用。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps team supports an application that runs on a large number of Amazon EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group. The DevOps team uses AWS CloudFormation to deploy the EC2 instances. The application recently experienced an issue. A single instance returned errors to a large percentage of requests. The EC2 instance responded as healthy to both Amazon EC2 and Elastic Load Balancing health checks. The DevOps team collects application logs in Amazon CloudWatch by using the embedded metric format. The DevOps team needs to receive an alert if any EC2 instance is responsible for more than half of all errors. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a CloudWatch Contributor Insights rule that groups logs from the CloudWatch application logs based on instance ID and errors.

contents.en: Create a CloudWatch Contributor Insights rule that groups logs from the CloudWatch application logs based on instance ID and errors.
contents.zh: 创建一个 CloudWatch Contributor Insights 规则，根据实例 ID 和错误对 CloudWatch 应用程序日志中的日志进行分组。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a resource group in AWS Resource Groups. Use the CloudFormation stack to group the resources for the application. Add the application to CloudWatch Application Insights. Use the resource group to identify the application.

contents.en: Create a resource group in AWS Resource Groups. Use the CloudFormation stack to group the resources for the application. Add the application to CloudWatch Application Insights. Use the resource group to identify the application.
contents.zh: 在 AWS Resource Groups 中创建一个资源组。使用 CloudFormation 堆栈对应用程序资源进行分组。将该应用程序添加到 CloudWatch Application Insights。使用资源组识别该应用程序。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a metric filter for the application logs to count the occurrence of the term "Error.'' Create a CloudWatch alarm that uses the METRIC_COUNT function to determine whether errors have occurred. Configure the CloudWatch alarm to send a notification to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to notify the DevOps team.

contents.en: Create a metric filter for the application logs to count the occurrence of the term "Error.'' Create a CloudWatch alarm that uses the METRIC_COUNT function to determine whether errors have occurred. Configure the CloudWatch alarm to send a notification to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to notify the DevOps team.
contents.zh: 为应用程序日志创建一个指标筛选器，以统计术语 "Error.'' 的出现次数。创建一个使用 METRIC_COUNT 函数判断是否发生错误的 CloudWatch 警报。配置 CloudWatch 警报向 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题发送通知，以通知 DevOps 团队。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a CloudWatch alarm that uses the INSIGHT_RULE_METRIC function to determine whether a specific instance is responsible for more than half of all errors reported by EC2 instances. Configure the CloudWatch alarm to send a notification to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to notify the DevOps team.

contents.en: Create a CloudWatch alarm that uses the INSIGHT_RULE_METRIC function to determine whether a specific instance is responsible for more than half of all errors reported by EC2 instances. Configure the CloudWatch alarm to send a notification to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to notify the DevOps team.
contents.zh: 创建一个使用 INSIGHT_RULE_METRIC 函数的 CloudWatch 警报，以确定某个特定实例是否导致了 EC2 实例报告的全部错误中超过一半的错误。配置 CloudWatch 警报向 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题发送通知，以通知 DevOps 团队。

options.label: E
options.content: Create a CloudWatch subscription filter for the application logs that filters for errors and invokes an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to send the instance ID and error and in a notification to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to notify the DevOps team.

contents.en: Create a CloudWatch subscription filter for the application logs that filters for errors and invokes an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to send the instance ID and error and in a notification to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to notify the DevOps team.
contents.zh: 为应用程序日志创建一个 CloudWatch 订阅筛选器，该筛选器过滤错误并调用 AWS Lambda 函数。配置 Lambda 函数发送实例 ID 和错误，并在通知中发送到 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题，以通知 DevOps 团队。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A、D。A 用 CloudWatch Contributor Insights 按实例 ID 和错误对应用日志分组以识别主要贡献者；D 用 INSIGHT_RULE_METRIC 创建告警，当某实例贡献超过一半错误时通过 SNS 通知团队。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A、D。A 用 CloudWatch Contributor Insights 按实例 ID 和错误对应用日志分组以识别主要贡献者；D 用 INSIGHT_RULE_METRIC 创建告警，当某实例贡献超过一半错误时通过 SNS 通知团队。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A and D. Contributor Insights groups log errors by instance ID to identify top contributors, and an alarm using INSIGHT_RULE_METRIC can notify SNS when a specific instance is responsible for more than half of the errors.

contents.en: A DevOps team supports an application that runs on a large number of Amazon EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group. The DevOps team uses AWS CloudFormation to deploy the EC2 instances. The application recently experienced an issue. A single instance returned errors to a large percentage of requests. The EC2 instance responded as healthy to both Amazon EC2 and Elastic Load Balancing health checks. The DevOps team collects application logs in Amazon CloudWatch by using the embedded metric format. The DevOps team needs to receive an alert if any EC2 instance is responsible for more than half of all errors. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一个 DevOps 团队支持一个运行在 Auto Scaling 组中大量 Amazon EC2 实例上的应用程序。DevOps 团队使用 AWS CloudFormation 部署 EC2 实例。该应用程序最近出现了一个问题。单个实例对大量请求返回错误。该 EC2 实例对 Amazon EC2 和 Elastic Load Balancing 运行状况检查都响应为正常。DevOps 团队使用嵌入式指标格式在 Amazon CloudWatch 中收集应用程序日志。DevOps 团队需要在任何 EC2 实例导致超过一半错误时收到警报。哪组步骤组合能够以最少的运维开销满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company is using AWS CloudFormation to perform deployments of its application environment. A deployment failed during a recent update to the existing CloudFormation stack. A DevOps engineer discovered that some resources in the stack were manually modified. The DevOps engineer needs a solution that detects manual modification of resources and sends an alert to the DevOps lead. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational effort?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe the DevOps lead to the topic by using an email address. Create an AWS Config managed rule that has the CLOUDFORMATION_STACK_DRIFT_DETECTION_CHECK identifier. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that is invoked on the NON_COMPLIANT resources status. Set the SNS topic as the rule target.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe the DevOps lead to the topic by using an email address. Create an AWS Config managed rule that has the CLOUDFORMATION_STACK_DRIFT_DETECTION_CHECK identifier. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that is invoked on the NON_COMPLIANT resources status. Set the SNS topic as the rule target.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。使用电子邮件地址将 DevOps 负责人订阅到该主题。创建一个具有 CLOUDFORMATION_STACK_DRIFT_DETECTION_CHECK 标识符的 AWS Config 托管规则。创建一个在 NON_COMPLIANT resources status 上调用的 Amazon EventBridge 规则。将 SNS 主题设置为规则目标。

options.label: B
options.content: Tag all CloudFormation resources with a specific tag. Create an AWS Config custom rule by using the AWS Config Rules Development Kit Library (RDKlib) that checks all resource changes that have the specific tag. Configure the custom rule to mark all the tagged resource changes as NON_COMPLIANT when the change is not performed by CloudFormation. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that is invoked on the NON_COMPUANT resources status. Create an AWS Lambda function that sends an email message to the DevOps lead. Set the Lambda function as the rule target.

contents.en: Tag all CloudFormation resources with a specific tag. Create an AWS Config custom rule by using the AWS Config Rules Development Kit Library (RDKlib) that checks all resource changes that have the specific tag. Configure the custom rule to mark all the tagged resource changes as NON_COMPLIANT when the change is not performed by CloudFormation. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that is invoked on the NON_COMPUANT resources status. Create an AWS Lambda function that sends an email message to the DevOps lead. Set the Lambda function as the rule target.
contents.zh: 使用特定标签标记所有 CloudFormation 资源。使用 AWS Config Rules Development Kit Library (RDKlib) 创建一个 AWS Config 自定义规则，用于检查具有该特定标签的所有资源更改。配置该自定义规则，当更改不是由 CloudFormation 执行时，将所有带标签的资源更改标记为 NON_COMPLIANT。创建一个在 NON_COMPUANT resources status 上调用的 Amazon EventBridge 规则。创建一个向 DevOps 负责人发送电子邮件消息的 AWS Lambda 函数。将该 Lambda 函数设置为规则目标。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe the DevOps lead to the topic by using an email address. Create an AWS Config managed rule that has the CLOUDFORMATION_STACK_DRIFT_DETECTION_CHECK identifier. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that is invoked on the COMPLIANT resources status. Set the SNS topic as the rule target.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe the DevOps lead to the topic by using an email address. Create an AWS Config managed rule that has the CLOUDFORMATION_STACK_DRIFT_DETECTION_CHECK identifier. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that is invoked on the COMPLIANT resources status. Set the SNS topic as the rule target.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。使用电子邮件地址将 DevOps 负责人订阅到该主题。创建一个具有 CLOUDFORMATION_STACK_DRIFT_DETECTION_CHECK 标识符的 AWS Config 托管规则。创建一个在 COMPLIANT resources status 上调用的 Amazon EventBridge 规则。将 SNS 主题设置为规则目标。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS Config managed rule that has the CLOUDFORMATION_STACK_DRIFT_DETECTION_CHECK identifier. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that is invoked on the NON_COMPLIANT resources status. Create an AWS Lambda function that sends an email message to the DevOps lead. Set the Lambda function as the rule target.

contents.en: Create an AWS Config managed rule that has the CLOUDFORMATION_STACK_DRIFT_DETECTION_CHECK identifier. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that is invoked on the NON_COMPLIANT resources status. Create an AWS Lambda function that sends an email message to the DevOps lead. Set the Lambda function as the rule target.
contents.zh: 创建一个具有 CLOUDFORMATION_STACK_DRIFT_DETECTION_CHECK 标识符的 AWS Config 托管规则。创建一个在 NON_COMPLIANT resources status 上调用的 Amazon EventBridge 规则。创建一个向 DevOps 负责人发送电子邮件消息的 AWS Lambda 函数。将该 Lambda 函数设置为规则目标。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A。AWS Config 托管规则 CLOUDFORMATION_STACK_DRIFT_DETECTION_CHECK 可检测 CloudFormation 管理资源的漂移；EventBridge 捕获 NON_COMPLIANT 状态并以 SNS 邮件通知 DevOps 负责人。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A。AWS Config 托管规则 CLOUDFORMATION_STACK_DRIFT_DETECTION_CHECK 可检测 CloudFormation 管理资源的漂移；EventBridge 捕获 NON_COMPLIANT 状态并以 SNS 邮件通知 DevOps 负责人。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The AWS Config managed rule CLOUDFORMATION_STACK_DRIFT_DETECTION_CHECK detects drift in CloudFormation-managed resources, and EventBridge sends NON_COMPLIANT events to an SNS topic for email notification.

contents.en: A company is using AWS CloudFormation to perform deployments of its application environment. A deployment failed during a recent update to the existing CloudFormation stack. A DevOps engineer discovered that some resources in the stack were manually modified. The DevOps engineer needs a solution that detects manual modification of resources and sends an alert to the DevOps lead. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational effort?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在使用 AWS CloudFormation 执行其应用程序环境的部署。在最近一次更新现有 CloudFormation 堆栈期间，部署失败。DevOps 工程师发现堆栈中的某些资源被手动修改。DevOps 工程师需要一种解决方案来检测资源的手动修改，并向 DevOps 负责人发送警报。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运维工作量满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer deployed multiple AWS accounts by using AWS Control Tower to support different business, technical, and administrative units in a company. A security team needs the DevOps engineer to automate AWS Control Tower guardrails for the company. The guardrails must be applied to all accounts in an OU of the company's organization in AWS Organizations. The security team needs a solution that has version control and can be reviewed and rolled back if necessary. The security team will maintain the management of the solution in its OU. The security team wants to limit the type of guardrails that are allowed and allow only new guardrails that are approved by the security team. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Create individual AWS CloudFormation templates that align to a guardrail. Store the templates in an AWS CodeCommit repository. Create an AWS::ControlTower::EnableControl logical resource in the template for each OU in the organization. Configure an AWS Code Build project that an Amazon EventBridge rule will invoke for the security team's AWS CodeCommit changes.

contents.en: Create individual AWS CloudFormation templates that align to a guardrail. Store the templates in an AWS CodeCommit repository. Create an AWS::ControlTower::EnableControl logical resource in the template for each OU in the organization. Configure an AWS Code Build project that an Amazon EventBridge rule will invoke for the security team's AWS CodeCommit changes.
contents.zh: 创建与防护栏对应的单独 AWS CloudFormation 模板。将这些模板存储在 AWS CodeCommit 存储库中。在模板中为组织中的每个 OU 创建一个 AWS::ControlTower::EnableControl 逻辑资源。配置一个 AWS Code Build 项目，由 Amazon EventBridge 规则在安全团队的 AWS CodeCommit 更改时调用。

options.label: B
options.content: Create individual AWS CloudFormation templates that align to a guardrail. Store the templates in an AWS CodeCommit repository. Create an AWS::ControlTower::EnableControl logical resource in the template for each account in the organization. Configure an AWS CodePipeline pipeline in the security team's account. Advise the security team to invoke the pipeline and provide these parameters when starting the pipeline.

contents.en: Create individual AWS CloudFormation templates that align to a guardrail. Store the templates in an AWS CodeCommit repository. Create an AWS::ControlTower::EnableControl logical resource in the template for each account in the organization. Configure an AWS CodePipeline pipeline in the security team's account. Advise the security team to invoke the pipeline and provide these parameters when starting the pipeline.
contents.zh: 创建与防护栏对应的单独 AWS CloudFormation 模板。将这些模板存储在 AWS CodeCommit 存储库中。在模板中为组织中的每个账户创建一个 AWS::ControlTower::EnableControl 逻辑资源。在安全团队账户中配置一条 AWS CodePipeline 流水线。建议安全团队在启动流水线时调用该流水线并提供这些参数。

options.label: C
options.content: Create individual AWS CloudFormation templates that align to a guardrail. Store the templates in an AWS CodeCommit repository. Create an AWS::ControlTower::EnableControl logical resource in the template for each OU in the organization. Configure an AWS CodePipeline pipeline in the security team's account that an Amazon EventBridge rule will invoke for the security team's CodeCommit changes.

contents.en: Create individual AWS CloudFormation templates that align to a guardrail. Store the templates in an AWS CodeCommit repository. Create an AWS::ControlTower::EnableControl logical resource in the template for each OU in the organization. Configure an AWS CodePipeline pipeline in the security team's account that an Amazon EventBridge rule will invoke for the security team's CodeCommit changes.
contents.zh: 创建与防护栏对应的单独 AWS CloudFormation 模板。将这些模板存储在 AWS CodeCommit 存储库中。在模板中为组织中的每个 OU 创建一个 AWS::ControlTower::EnableControl 逻辑资源。在安全团队账户中配置一条 AWS CodePipeline 流水线，由 Amazon EventBridge 规则在安全团队的 CodeCommit 更改时调用。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure an AWS CodePipeline pipeline in the security team's account that an Amazon EventBridge rule will invoke for PutObject events to an Amazon S3 bucket. Create individual AWS CloudFormation templates that align to a guardrail. Store the templates in the S3 bucket. Create an AWS::ControlTower::EnableControl logical resource in the template for each OU in the organization.

contents.en: Configure an AWS CodePipeline pipeline in the security team's account that an Amazon EventBridge rule will invoke for PutObject events to an Amazon S3 bucket. Create individual AWS CloudFormation templates that align to a guardrail. Store the templates in the S3 bucket. Create an AWS::ControlTower::EnableControl logical resource in the template for each OU in the organization.
contents.zh: 在安全团队账户中配置一条 AWS CodePipeline 流水线，由 Amazon EventBridge 规则在 Amazon S3 存储桶的 PutObject 事件发生时调用。创建与防护栏对应的单独 AWS CloudFormation 模板。将这些模板存储在 S3 存储桶中。在模板中为组织中的每个 OU 创建一个 AWS::ControlTower::EnableControl 逻辑资源。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 C。将 Control Tower guardrail 对应的 CloudFormation 模板存入 CodeCommit，并用 AWS::ControlTower::EnableControl 为各 OU 启用控制；CodePipeline 由 EventBridge 在代码变更时触发，满足版本控制、审批和回滚需求。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 C。将 Control Tower guardrail 对应的 CloudFormation 模板存入 CodeCommit，并用 AWS::ControlTower::EnableControl 为各 OU 启用控制；CodePipeline 由 EventBridge 在代码变更时触发，满足版本控制、审批和回滚需求。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. Control Tower guardrails are represented as CloudFormation templates in CodeCommit, AWS::ControlTower::EnableControl enables them for each OU, and EventBridge-triggered CodePipeline provides versioned, automated delivery.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer deployed multiple AWS accounts by using AWS Control Tower to support different business, technical, and administrative units in a company. A security team needs the DevOps engineer to automate AWS Control Tower guardrails for the company. The guardrails must be applied to all accounts in an OU of the company's organization in AWS Organizations. The security team needs a solution that has version control and can be reviewed and rolled back if necessary. The security team will maintain the management of the solution in its OU. The security team wants to limit the type of guardrails that are allowed and allow only new guardrails that are approved by the security team. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师使用 AWS Control Tower 部署了多个 AWS 账户，以支持公司中不同的业务、技术和管理单位。安全团队需要 DevOps 工程师自动化公司 AWS Control Tower 防护栏。防护栏必须应用于公司在 AWS Organizations 中某个 OU 的所有账户。安全团队需要一种具有版本控制、可审查并在必要时可回滚的解决方案。安全团队将在其 OU 中维护该解决方案的管理。安全团队希望限制允许的防护栏类型，并且只允许新增经过安全团队批准的防护栏。哪种解决方案能够以最高运维效率满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company runs a web application on Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). The company uses Amazon CloudFront to distribute the application. The company recently enabled AWS WAF. The company set up Amazon CloudWatch Logs to send logs to an aws-waf-logs log group. The company wants a DevOps engineer to receive alerts if there are sudden changes in blocked traffic. The company does not want to receive alerts for other changes in AWS WAF log behavior. The company will tune AWS WAF rules over time. The DevOps engineer is currently subscribed to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic in the environment. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a CloudWatch Logs metrics filter for blocked requests on the AWS WAF log group to create a custom metric. Create a CloudWatch alarm by using CloudWatch anomaly detection and the published custom metric. Configure the alarm to notify the SNS topic to alert the DevOps engineer.

contents.en: Create a CloudWatch Logs metrics filter for blocked requests on the AWS WAF log group to create a custom metric. Create a CloudWatch alarm by using CloudWatch anomaly detection and the published custom metric. Configure the alarm to notify the SNS topic to alert the DevOps engineer.
contents.zh: 在 AWS WAF 日志组上为被阻止的请求创建 CloudWatch Logs metrics filter，以创建自定义指标。使用 CloudWatch anomaly detection 和已发布的自定义指标创建 CloudWatch 警报。配置警报通知 SNS 主题，以提醒 DevOps 工程师。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a CloudWatch anomaly detector for the log group. Create a CloudWatch alarm by using metrics that the CloudWatch anomaly detector publishes. Use the high setting for the LogAnomalyPriority metric. Configure the alarm to go into alarm state if a static threshold of one anomaly is detected. Configure the alarm to notify the SNS topic to alert the DevOps engineer.

contents.en: Create a CloudWatch anomaly detector for the log group. Create a CloudWatch alarm by using metrics that the CloudWatch anomaly detector publishes. Use the high setting for the LogAnomalyPriority metric. Configure the alarm to go into alarm state if a static threshold of one anomaly is detected. Configure the alarm to notify the SNS topic to alert the DevOps engineer.
contents.zh: 为日志组创建 CloudWatch anomaly detector。使用 CloudWatch anomaly detector 发布的指标创建 CloudWatch 警报。对 LogAnomalyPriority 指标使用 high 设置。配置警报在检测到一个异常的静态阈值时进入警报状态。配置警报通知 SNS 主题，以提醒 DevOps 工程师。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a CloudWatch metrics filter for counted requests on the AWS WAF log group to create a custom metric. Create a CloudWatch alarm that activates when the sum of blocked requests in the custom metric during a period of 1 hour is greater than a static estimate for the acceptable number of blocked requests in 1 hour. Configure the alarm to notify the SNS topic to alert the DevOps engineer.

contents.en: Create a CloudWatch metrics filter for counted requests on the AWS WAF log group to create a custom metric. Create a CloudWatch alarm that activates when the sum of blocked requests in the custom metric during a period of 1 hour is greater than a static estimate for the acceptable number of blocked requests in 1 hour. Configure the alarm to notify the SNS topic to alert the DevOps engineer.
contents.zh: 在 AWS WAF 日志组上为计数请求创建 CloudWatch metrics filter，以创建自定义指标。创建 CloudWatch 警报，当自定义指标中 1 小时期间被阻止请求的总和大于 1 小时内可接受被阻止请求数量的静态估计值时激活。配置警报通知 SNS 主题，以提醒 DevOps 工程师。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a CloudWatch anomaly detector for the log group. Create a CloudWatch alarm by using metrics that the CloudWatch anomaly detector publishes. Use the medium setting for the LogAnomalyPriority metric. Configure the alarm to go into alarm state if a sum of anomalies over 1 hour is greater than an expected value. Configure the alarm to notify the SNS topic to alert the DevOps engineer.

contents.en: Create a CloudWatch anomaly detector for the log group. Create a CloudWatch alarm by using metrics that the CloudWatch anomaly detector publishes. Use the medium setting for the LogAnomalyPriority metric. Configure the alarm to go into alarm state if a sum of anomalies over 1 hour is greater than an expected value. Configure the alarm to notify the SNS topic to alert the DevOps engineer.
contents.zh: 为日志组创建 CloudWatch anomaly detector。使用 CloudWatch anomaly detector 发布的指标创建 CloudWatch 警报。对 LogAnomalyPriority 指标使用 medium 设置。配置警报在 1 小时内异常总和大于预期值时进入警报状态。配置警报通知 SNS 主题，以提醒 DevOps 工程师。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A。CloudWatch Logs 指标筛选器从 AWS WAF 日志中发布被阻止请求的自定义指标；CloudWatch anomaly detection 基于该指标识别异常增长，并通过 SNS 告警 DevOps 工程师。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A。CloudWatch Logs 指标筛选器从 AWS WAF 日志中发布被阻止请求的自定义指标；CloudWatch anomaly detection 基于该指标识别异常增长，并通过 SNS 告警 DevOps 工程师。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. A CloudWatch Logs metric filter publishes a custom metric for blocked WAF requests, and CloudWatch anomaly detection alarms on unusual changes and notifies the SNS topic.

contents.en: A company runs a web application on Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). The company uses Amazon CloudFront to distribute the application. The company recently enabled AWS WAF. The company set up Amazon CloudWatch Logs to send logs to an aws-waf-logs log group. The company wants a DevOps engineer to receive alerts if there are sudden changes in blocked traffic. The company does not want to receive alerts for other changes in AWS WAF log behavior. The company will tune AWS WAF rules over time. The DevOps engineer is currently subscribed to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic in the environment. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 上运行 Web 应用程序。该公司使用 Amazon CloudFront 分发应用程序。该公司最近启用了 AWS WAF。该公司设置 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 将日志发送到 aws-waf-logs 日志组。该公司希望 DevOps 工程师在被阻止流量突然变化时收到警报。该公司不希望因为 AWS WAF 日志行为的其他变化而收到警报。该公司将随时间调整 AWS WAF 规则。DevOps 工程师目前已订阅环境中的一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A video platform company is migrating its video catalog to AWS. The company will host MP4 videos files in an Amazon S3 bucket. The company will use Amazon CloudFront and Amazon EC2 instances to serve the video files. Users first connect to a frontend application that redirects to a video URL. The video URL contains an authorization token in CloudFront. The cache is activated on the CloudFront distribution. Authorization token check activity needs to be logged in Amazon CloudWatch. The company wants to prevent direct access to video files on CloudFront and Amazon S3 and wants to implement checks of the authorization token that the frontend application provides. The company also wants to perform regular rolling updates of the code that checks the authorization token signature. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational effort?

options.label: A
options.content: Implement an authorization token check in Lambda@Edge as a trigger on the CloudFront distribution. Enable CloudWatch logging for the Lambda@Edge function. Attach the Lambda@Edge function to the CloudFront distribution. Implement CloudFront continuous deployment to perform updates.

contents.en: Implement an authorization token check in Lambda@Edge as a trigger on the CloudFront distribution. Enable CloudWatch logging for the Lambda@Edge function. Attach the Lambda@Edge function to the CloudFront distribution. Implement CloudFront continuous deployment to perform updates.
contents.zh: 在 Lambda@Edge 中实现授权令牌检查，作为 CloudFront 分配上的触发器。为 Lambda@Edge 函数启用 CloudWatch 日志记录。将 Lambda@Edge 函数附加到 CloudFront 分配。实施 CloudFront continuous deployment 以执行更新。

options.label: B
options.content: Implement an authorization token check in CloudFront Functions. Enable CloudWatch logging for the CloudFront function. Attach the CloudFront function to the CloudFront distribution. Implement CloudFront continuous deployment to perform updates.

contents.en: Implement an authorization token check in CloudFront Functions. Enable CloudWatch logging for the CloudFront function. Attach the CloudFront function to the CloudFront distribution. Implement CloudFront continuous deployment to perform updates.
contents.zh: 在 CloudFront Functions 中实现授权令牌检查。为 CloudFront function 启用 CloudWatch 日志记录。将 CloudFront function 附加到 CloudFront 分配。实施 CloudFront continuous deployment 以执行更新。

options.label: C
options.content: Implement an authorization token check in the application code that is installed on the EC2 instances. Install the CloudWatch agent on the EC2 instances. Configure the application to log to the CloudWatch agent. Implement a second CloudFront distribution. Migrate the traffic from the first CloudFront distribution by using Amazon Route 53 weighted routing.

contents.en: Implement an authorization token check in the application code that is installed on the EC2 instances. Install the CloudWatch agent on the EC2 instances. Configure the application to log to the CloudWatch agent. Implement a second CloudFront distribution. Migrate the traffic from the first CloudFront distribution by using Amazon Route 53 weighted routing.
contents.zh: 在安装于 EC2 实例上的应用程序代码中实现授权令牌检查。在 EC2 实例上安装 CloudWatch agent。配置应用程序记录到 CloudWatch agent。实施第二个 CloudFront 分配。使用 Amazon Route 53 weighted routing 将流量从第一个 CloudFront 分配迁移。

options.label: D
options.content: Implement an authorization token check in CloudFront Functions. Enable CloudWatch logging for the CloudFront function. Attach the CloudFront function to the CloudFront distribution. Implement a second CloudFront distribution. Migrate the traffic from the first CloudFront distribution by using Amazon Route 53 weighted routing.

contents.en: Implement an authorization token check in CloudFront Functions. Enable CloudWatch logging for the CloudFront function. Attach the CloudFront function to the CloudFront distribution. Implement a second CloudFront distribution. Migrate the traffic from the first CloudFront distribution by using Amazon Route 53 weighted routing.
contents.zh: 在 CloudFront Functions 中实现授权令牌检查。为 CloudFront function 启用 CloudWatch 日志记录。将 CloudFront function 附加到 CloudFront 分配。实施第二个 CloudFront 分配。使用 Amazon Route 53 weighted routing 将流量从第一个 CloudFront 分配迁移。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 B。CloudFront Functions 可在边缘执行授权令牌检查；启用 CloudWatch 日志、附加到 CloudFront 分配，并使用 CloudFront continuous deployment 更新，可实现低运维开销的访问控制和发布。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 B。CloudFront Functions 可在边缘执行授权令牌检查；启用 CloudWatch 日志、附加到 CloudFront 分配，并使用 CloudFront continuous deployment 更新，可实现低运维开销的访问控制和发布。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. CloudFront Functions perform authorization token checks at the edge, CloudWatch logging records function activity, and CloudFront continuous deployment supports controlled updates.

contents.en: A video platform company is migrating its video catalog to AWS. The company will host MP4 videos files in an Amazon S3 bucket. The company will use Amazon CloudFront and Amazon EC2 instances to serve the video files. Users first connect to a frontend application that redirects to a video URL. The video URL contains an authorization token in CloudFront. The cache is activated on the CloudFront distribution. Authorization token check activity needs to be logged in Amazon CloudWatch. The company wants to prevent direct access to video files on CloudFront and Amazon S3 and wants to implement checks of the authorization token that the frontend application provides. The company also wants to perform regular rolling updates of the code that checks the authorization token signature. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational effort?
contents.zh: 一家视频平台公司正在将其视频目录迁移到 AWS。该公司将在 Amazon S3 存储桶中托管 MP4 videos files。该公司将使用 Amazon CloudFront 和 Amazon EC2 实例提供视频文件。用户首先连接到前端应用程序，前端应用程序会重定向到一个视频 URL。该视频 URL 在 CloudFront 中包含授权令牌。CloudFront 分配上已启用缓存。授权令牌检查活动需要记录到 Amazon CloudWatch。该公司希望防止直接访问 CloudFront 和 Amazon S3 上的视频文件，并希望实现对前端应用程序提供的授权令牌的检查。该公司还希望定期对检查授权令牌签名的代码执行滚动更新。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运维工作量满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations to manage multiple AWS accounts in a hierarchical structure. An SCP that is associated with the organization root allows IAM users to be created. A DevOps team must be able to create IAM users with any level of permissions. Developers must also be able to create IAM users. However, developers must not be able to grant new IAM users excessive permissions. The developers have the CreateAndManageUsers role in each account. The DevOps team must be able to prevent other users from creating IAM users. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an SCP in the organization to deny users the ability to create and modify IAM users. Attach the SCP to the root of the organization. Attach the CreateAndManageUsers role to developers.

contents.en: Create an SCP in the organization to deny users the ability to create and modify IAM users. Attach the SCP to the root of the organization. Attach the CreateAndManageUsers role to developers.
contents.zh: 在组织中创建一个 SCP，拒绝用户创建和修改 IAM 用户的能力。将该 SCP 附加到组织根。将 CreateAndManageUsers 角色附加给开发人员。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an SCP in the organization to grant users that have the DeveloperBoundary policy attached the ability to create new IAM users and to modify IAM users. Configure the SCP to require users to attach the PermissionBoundaries policy to any new IAM user. Attach the SCP to the root of the organization.

contents.en: Create an SCP in the organization to grant users that have the DeveloperBoundary policy attached the ability to create new IAM users and to modify IAM users. Configure the SCP to require users to attach the PermissionBoundaries policy to any new IAM user. Attach the SCP to the root of the organization.
contents.zh: 在组织中创建一个 SCP，向附加了 DeveloperBoundary 策略的用户授予创建新 IAM 用户和修改 IAM 用户的能力。配置该 SCP，要求用户将 PermissionBoundaries 策略附加到任何新的 IAM 用户。将该 SCP 附加到组织根。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an IAM permissions policy named PermissionBoundaries within each account. Configure the PermissionBoundaries policy to specify the maximum permissions that a developer can grant to a new IAM user.

contents.en: Create an IAM permissions policy named PermissionBoundaries within each account. Configure the PermissionBoundaries policy to specify the maximum permissions that a developer can grant to a new IAM user.
contents.zh: 在每个账户中创建一个名为 PermissionBoundaries 的 IAM 权限策略。配置 PermissionBoundaries 策略，以指定开发人员可以授予新 IAM 用户的最大权限。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an IAM permissions policy named PermissionBoundaries within each account. Configure PermissionsBoundaries to allow users who have the PermissionBoundaries policy to create new IAM users.

contents.en: Create an IAM permissions policy named PermissionBoundaries within each account. Configure PermissionsBoundaries to allow users who have the PermissionBoundaries policy to create new IAM users.
contents.zh: 在每个账户中创建一个名为 PermissionBoundaries 的 IAM 权限策略。配置 PermissionsBoundaries 以允许具有 PermissionBoundaries 策略的用户创建新的 IAM 用户。

options.label: E
options.content: Create an IAM permissions policy named DeveloperBoundary within each account. Configure the DeveloperBoundary policy to allow developers to create IAM users and to assign policies to IAM users of only if the developer includes the PermissionBoundaries policy as the permissions boundary. Attach the DeveloperBoundary policy to the CreateAndManageUsers role within each account.

contents.en: Create an IAM permissions policy named DeveloperBoundary within each account. Configure the DeveloperBoundary policy to allow developers to create IAM users and to assign policies to IAM users of only if the developer includes the PermissionBoundaries policy as the permissions boundary. Attach the DeveloperBoundary policy to the CreateAndManageUsers role within each account.
contents.zh: 在每个账户中创建一个名为 DeveloperBoundary 的 IAM 权限策略。配置 DeveloperBoundary 策略，以允许开发人员创建 IAM 用户并向 IAM 用户分配策略，但前提是开发人员包含 PermissionBoundaries 策略作为权限边界。将 DeveloperBoundary 策略附加到每个账户中的 CreateAndManageUsers 角色。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 C、E。C 在每个账户中创建权限边界策略，限制开发人员可授予新 IAM 用户的最大权限；E 要求开发人员创建用户和附加策略时必须使用该权限边界，并将策略附加到 CreateAndManageUsers 角色。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 C、E。C 在每个账户中创建权限边界策略，限制开发人员可授予新 IAM 用户的最大权限；E 要求开发人员创建用户和附加策略时必须使用该权限边界，并将策略附加到 CreateAndManageUsers 角色。
explanations.en: The correct answers are C and E. C creates the permissions boundary that caps what developers can grant to new IAM users, and E enforces that developers can create users and attach policies only when that boundary is included.

contents.en: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations to manage multiple AWS accounts in a hierarchical structure. An SCP that is associated with the organization root allows IAM users to be created. A DevOps team must be able to create IAM users with any level of permissions. Developers must also be able to create IAM users. However, developers must not be able to grant new IAM users excessive permissions. The developers have the CreateAndManageUsers role in each account. The DevOps team must be able to prevent other users from creating IAM users. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
