contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations 中的一个组织，以层次结构管理多个 AWS 账户。与组织根关联的 SCP 允许创建 IAM 用户。DevOps 团队必须能够创建具有任意级别权限的 IAM 用户。开发人员也必须能够创建 IAM 用户。但是，开发人员不得向新的 IAM 用户授予过多权限。开发人员在每个账户中都有 CreateAndManageUsers 角色。DevOps 团队必须能够阻止其他用户创建 IAM 用户。哪组步骤组合可以满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company has deployed a landing zone that has a well-defined AWS Organizations structure and an SCP. The company's development team can create their AWS resources only by using AWS CloudFormation and the AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK). A DevOps engineer notices that Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queues that are deployed in different CloudFormation stacks have different configurations. The DevOps engineer also notices that the application cost allocation tag is not always set. The DevOps engineer needs a solution that will enforce tagging and promote the reuse of code. The DevOps engineer needs to avoid different configurations for the deployed SQS queues. What should the DevOps engineer do to meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Organizations tag policy to enforce the cost allocation tag in CloudFormation stacks. Instruct the development team to use CloudFormation to define SQS queues. Instruct the development team to deploy the SQS queues by using CloudFormation StackSets.

contents.en: Create an Organizations tag policy to enforce the cost allocation tag in CloudFormation stacks. Instruct the development team to use CloudFormation to define SQS queues. Instruct the development team to deploy the SQS queues by using CloudFormation StackSets.
contents.zh: 创建 Organizations 标签策略，以在 CloudFormation 堆栈中强制执行成本分配标签。指示开发团队使用 CloudFormation 定义 SQS 队列。指示开发团队使用 CloudFormation StackSets 部署 SQS 队列。

options.label: B
options.content: Update the SCP to enforce the cost allocation tag in CloudFormation stacks. Instruct the development team to use CloudFormation modules to define SQS queues. Instruct the development team to deploy the SQS queues by using CloudFormation stacks.

contents.en: Update the SCP to enforce the cost allocation tag in CloudFormation stacks. Instruct the development team to use CloudFormation modules to define SQS queues. Instruct the development team to deploy the SQS queues by using CloudFormation stacks.
contents.zh: 更新 SCP，以在 CloudFormation 堆栈中强制执行成本分配标签。指示开发团队使用 CloudFormation modules 定义 SQS 队列。指示开发团队使用 CloudFormation 堆栈部署 SQS 队列。

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS CDK tagging to enforce the cost allocation tag in CloudFormation StackSets. Instruct the development team to use the AWS CDK to define SQS queues. Instruct the development team to deploy the SQS queues by using CDK stacks.

contents.en: Use AWS CDK tagging to enforce the cost allocation tag in CloudFormation StackSets. Instruct the development team to use the AWS CDK to define SQS queues. Instruct the development team to deploy the SQS queues by using CDK stacks.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CDK tagging 在 CloudFormation StackSets 中强制执行成本分配标签。指示开发团队使用 AWS CDK 定义 SQS 队列。指示开发团队使用 CDK stacks 部署 SQS 队列。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS CDK tagging to enforce the cost allocation tag in CloudFormation stacks. Instruct the development team to use the AWS CDK to define SQS queues. Instruct the development team to deploy the SQS queues by using CDK feature flags.

contents.en: Use AWS CDK tagging to enforce the cost allocation tag in CloudFormation stacks. Instruct the development team to use the AWS CDK to define SQS queues. Instruct the development team to deploy the SQS queues by using CDK feature flags.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CDK tagging 在 CloudFormation 堆栈中强制执行成本分配标签。指示开发团队使用 AWS CDK 定义 SQS 队列。指示开发团队使用 CDK feature flags 部署 SQS 队列。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 B。更新 SCP 以在 CloudFormation 堆栈中强制成本分配标签，并要求开发团队通过 CloudFormation modules 定义 SQS 队列、通过 CloudFormation stacks 部署，可集中约束资源创建方式和标签要求。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 B。更新 SCP 以在 CloudFormation 堆栈中强制成本分配标签，并要求开发团队通过 CloudFormation modules 定义 SQS 队列、通过 CloudFormation stacks 部署，可集中约束资源创建方式和标签要求。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. Updating the SCP to enforce the cost allocation tag in CloudFormation stacks and having developers define and deploy SQS queues through CloudFormation modules and stacks centralizes the required tagging controls.

contents.en: A company has deployed a landing zone that has a well-defined AWS Organizations structure and an SCP. The company's development team can create their AWS resources only by using AWS CloudFormation and the AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK). A DevOps engineer notices that Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queues that are deployed in different CloudFormation stacks have different configurations. The DevOps engineer also notices that the application cost allocation tag is not always set. The DevOps engineer needs a solution that will enforce tagging and promote the reuse of code. The DevOps engineer needs to avoid different configurations for the deployed SQS queues. What should the DevOps engineer do to meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司部署了一个具有明确定义的 AWS Organizations 结构和 SCP 的着陆区。该公司的开发团队只能使用 AWS CloudFormation 和 AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) 创建其 AWS 资源。DevOps 工程师注意到，部署在不同 CloudFormation 堆栈中的 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列具有不同配置。DevOps 工程师还注意到 application 成本分配标签并不总是设置。DevOps 工程师需要一种解决方案来强制执行标签并促进代码复用。DevOps 工程师需要避免已部署 SQS 队列出现不同配置。DevOps 工程师应如何满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps team manages a company's AWS account. The company wants to ensure that specific AWS resource configuration changes are automatically reverted. Which solution will meet this requirement?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS Config rules to detect changes in resource configurations. Configure remediation action that uses AWS Systems Manager Automation documents to revert the configuration changes.

contents.en: Use AWS Config rules to detect changes in resource configurations. Configure remediation action that uses AWS Systems Manager Automation documents to revert the configuration changes.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Config 规则检测资源配置变更。配置使用 AWS Systems Manager Automation 文档的修复操作，以恢复配置更改。

options.label: B
options.content: Use Amazon CloudWatch alarms to monitor resource metrics. When an alarm is activated, use an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to notify an administrator to manually reverts the configuration changes.

contents.en: Use Amazon CloudWatch alarms to monitor resource metrics. When an alarm is activated, use an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to notify an administrator to manually reverts the configuration changes.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon CloudWatch 警报监控资源指标。当警报激活时，使用 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题通知管理员手动恢复配置更改。

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation to create a stack that deploys the necessary configuration changes. Update the stack when configuration changes need to be reverted.

contents.en: Use AWS CloudFormation to create a stack that deploys the necessary configuration changes. Update the stack when configuration changes need to be reverted.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CloudFormation 创建一个部署必要配置更改的堆栈。当需要恢复配置更改时更新该堆栈。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS Trusted Advisor to check for noncompliant configurations. Manually apply necessary changes based on Trusted Advisor recommendations.

contents.en: Use AWS Trusted Advisor to check for noncompliant configurations. Manually apply necessary changes based on Trusted Advisor recommendations.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Trusted Advisor 检查不合规配置。根据 Trusted Advisor 建议手动应用必要更改。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A。AWS Config rules 可检测资源配置变化；配置使用 Systems Manager Automation documents 的修复动作后，可在发现不合规配置时自动还原变更。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A。AWS Config rules 可检测资源配置变化；配置使用 Systems Manager Automation documents 的修复动作后，可在发现不合规配置时自动还原变更。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. AWS Config rules detect resource configuration changes, and remediation actions using Systems Manager Automation documents can automatically revert noncompliant changes.

contents.en: A DevOps team manages a company's AWS account. The company wants to ensure that specific AWS resource configuration changes are automatically reverted. Which solution will meet this requirement?
contents.zh: 一个 DevOps 团队管理公司的 AWS 账户。该公司希望确保特定 AWS 资源配置更改能够自动恢复。哪种解决方案可以满足此要求？

questions.content: A company hosts an application in its AWS account. The application uses an Amazon S3 bucket to store objects that contain sensitive information. The company needs to capture object-level S3 API calls, including calls that are rejected because the calls were made by using credentials that are not valid. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS CloudTrail trail in the account. Enable S3 data events logging. Configure the trail to log to Amazon CloudWatch.

contents.en: Create an AWS CloudTrail trail in the account. Enable S3 data events logging. Configure the trail to log to Amazon CloudWatch.
contents.zh: 在账户中创建一个 AWS CloudTrail 跟踪。启用 S3 数据事件日志记录。配置该跟踪将日志记录到 Amazon CloudWatch。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new S3 bucket. Configure access logging on the application's S3 bucket. Deliver the access logs to the new S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create a new S3 bucket. Configure access logging on the application's S3 bucket. Deliver the access logs to the new S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 创建一个新的 S3 存储桶。在应用程序的 S3 存储桶上配置访问日志记录。将访问日志传送到新的 S3 存储桶。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure Amazon GuardDuty with S3 protection enabled for the account. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that matches findings that are associated with the S3 bucket. Configure the rule to use an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue as the target.

contents.en: Configure Amazon GuardDuty with S3 protection enabled for the account. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that matches findings that are associated with the S3 bucket. Configure the rule to use an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue as the target.
contents.zh: 为该账户配置 Amazon GuardDuty，并启用 S3 protection。创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，用于匹配与该 S3 存储桶关联的发现项。配置该规则使用 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列作为目标。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS CloudTrail trail and a new S3 bucket in the account. Configure the trail to log to the S3 new bucket.

contents.en: Create an AWS CloudTrail trail and a new S3 bucket in the account. Configure the trail to log to the S3 new bucket.
contents.zh: 在账户中创建一个 AWS CloudTrail 跟踪和一个新的 S3 存储桶。配置该跟踪将日志记录到 S3 new bucket。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A。创建 CloudTrail trail 并启用 S3 data events logging 后，可记录 S3 对象级数据事件；将日志发送到 CloudWatch 便于集中查看和告警。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A。创建 CloudTrail trail 并启用 S3 data events logging 后，可记录 S3 对象级数据事件；将日志发送到 CloudWatch 便于集中查看和告警。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. A CloudTrail trail with S3 data events logging captures object-level S3 activity, and sending the trail to CloudWatch supports centralized monitoring.

contents.en: A company hosts an application in its AWS account. The application uses an Amazon S3 bucket to store objects that contain sensitive information. The company needs to capture object-level S3 API calls, including calls that are rejected because the calls were made by using credentials that are not valid. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司在其 AWS 账户中托管一个应用程序。该应用程序使用 Amazon S3 存储桶来存储包含敏感信息的对象。该公司需要捕获对象级别的 S3 API 调用，包括因使用无效凭证而被拒绝的调用。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps administrator is responsible for managing the security of a company's Amazon CloudWatch Logs log groups. The company's security policy states that employee IDs must not be visible in logs except by authorized personnel. Employee IDs follow the pattern of Emp-XXXXXX, where each X is a digit. An audit discovered that employee IDs are found in a single log file. The log file is available to engineers, but the engineers are not authorized to view employee IDs. Engineers currently have an AWS IAM Identity Center permission that allows logs:* on all resources in the account. The administrator must mask the employee ID so that new log entries that contain the employee ID are not visible to unauthorized personnel. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a new data protection policy on the log group. Add an Emp-\d{6} custom data identifier configuration. Create an IAM policy that has a Deny action for the Action":"logs:Unmask" permission on the resource. Attach the policy to the engineering accounts.

contents.en: Create a new data protection policy on the log group. Add an Emp-\d{6} custom data identifier configuration. Create an IAM policy that has a Deny action for the Action":"logs:Unmask" permission on the resource. Attach the policy to the engineering accounts.
contents.zh: 在日志组上创建新的数据保护策略。添加 Emp-\d{6} 自定义数据标识符配置。创建一个 IAM 策略，该策略对资源上的 Action":"logs:Unmask" 权限具有 Deny 操作。将该策略附加到工程账户。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new data protection policy on the log group. Add managed data identifiers for the personal data category. Create an IAM policy that has a Deny action for the "NotAction":"logs:Unmask" permission on the resource. Attach the policy to the engineering accounts.

contents.en: Create a new data protection policy on the log group. Add managed data identifiers for the personal data category. Create an IAM policy that has a Deny action for the "NotAction":"logs:Unmask" permission on the resource. Attach the policy to the engineering accounts.
contents.zh: 在日志组上创建新的数据保护策略。为个人数据类别添加托管数据标识符。创建一个 IAM 策略，该策略对资源上的 "NotAction":"logs:Unmask" 权限具有 Deny 操作。将该策略附加到工程账户。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function to parse a log file entry, remove the employee ID, and write the results to a new log file. Create a Lambda subscription filter on the log group and select the Lambda function. Grant the lambda:InvokeFunction permission to the log group.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function to parse a log file entry, remove the employee ID, and write the results to a new log file. Create a Lambda subscription filter on the log group and select the Lambda function. Grant the lambda:InvokeFunction permission to the log group.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数来解析日志文件条目、移除员工 ID，并将结果写入新的日志文件。在日志组上创建 Lambda 订阅筛选器并选择该 Lambda 函数。向日志组授予 lambda:InvokeFunction 权限。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon Data Firehose delivery stream that has an Amazon S3 bucket as the destination. Create a Firehose subscription filter on the log group that uses the Firehose delivery stream. Remove the "logs:*" permission on the engineering accounts. Create an Amazon Macie job on the S3 bucket that has an Emp-\d{6} custom identifier.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Data Firehose delivery stream that has an Amazon S3 bucket as the destination. Create a Firehose subscription filter on the log group that uses the Firehose delivery stream. Remove the "logs:*" permission on the engineering accounts. Create an Amazon Macie job on the S3 bucket that has an Emp-\d{6} custom identifier.
contents.zh: 创建一个以 Amazon S3 存储桶为目标的 Amazon Data Firehose 传输流。在日志组上创建使用该 Firehose 传输流的 Firehose 订阅筛选器。移除工程账户上的 "logs:*" 权限。在 S3 存储桶上创建一个具有 Emp-\d{6} 自定义标识符的 Amazon Macie 作业。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A。CloudWatch Logs 数据保护策略可用自定义数据标识符识别敏感数据；添加 Emp-\d{6} 标识符并拒绝工程账户 logs:Unmask 权限，可让匹配的员工编号保持脱敏。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A。CloudWatch Logs 数据保护策略可用自定义数据标识符识别敏感数据；添加 Emp-\d{6} 标识符并拒绝工程账户 logs:Unmask 权限，可让匹配的员工编号保持脱敏。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. CloudWatch Logs data protection policies can use custom data identifiers, so adding Emp-\d{6} and denying logs:Unmask to engineering accounts keeps matching employee IDs masked.

contents.en: A DevOps administrator is responsible for managing the security of a company's Amazon CloudWatch Logs log groups. The company's security policy states that employee IDs must not be visible in logs except by authorized personnel. Employee IDs follow the pattern of Emp-XXXXXX, where each X is a digit. An audit discovered that employee IDs are found in a single log file. The log file is available to engineers, but the engineers are not authorized to view employee IDs. Engineers currently have an AWS IAM Identity Center permission that allows logs:* on all resources in the account. The administrator must mask the employee ID so that new log entries that contain the employee ID are not visible to unauthorized personnel. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 管理员负责管理公司 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 日志组的安全性。公司的安全策略规定，除授权人员外，员工 ID 不得在日志中可见。员工 ID 遵循 Emp-XXXXXX 的模式，其中每个 X 都是一个数字。一次审计发现员工 ID 出现在单个日志文件中。工程师可以访问该日志文件，但工程师无权查看员工 ID。工程师当前拥有 AWS IAM Identity Center 权限，允许对账户中的所有资源执行 logs:*。管理员必须屏蔽员工 ID，以便未经授权的人员无法看到包含员工 ID 的新日志条目。哪种解决方案能够以最高运维效率满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations to manage many AWS accounts. The company has enabled all features for the organization. The company uses AWS CloudFormation StackSets to deploy configurations to the accounts. The company uses AWS Config to monitor an Amazon S3 bucket. The company needs to ensure that all object uploads to the S3 bucket use AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) encryption. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS Config conformance pack that includes the s3-bucket-server-side-encryption-enabled rule. Deploy the conformance pack to the accounts. Configure the rule to target an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic.

contents.en: Create an AWS Config conformance pack that includes the s3-bucket-server-side-encryption-enabled rule. Deploy the conformance pack to the accounts. Configure the rule to target an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic.
contents.zh: 创建一个包含 s3-bucket-server-side-encryption-enabled 规则的 AWS Config 合规包。将该合规包部署到账户。配置该规则以 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题为目标。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an SCP that includes a deny statement for the s3:createBucket action and a condition statement where s3:x-amz- server-side-encryption is not aws:kms. Attach the SCP to the root of the organization.

contents.en: Create an SCP that includes a deny statement for the s3:createBucket action and a condition statement where s3:x-amz- server-side-encryption is not aws:kms. Attach the SCP to the root of the organization.
contents.zh: 创建一个 SCP，其中包含针对 s3:createBucket 操作的拒绝语句，以及 s3:x-amz- server-side-encryption 不是 aws:kms 的条件语句。将该 SCP 附加到组织根。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS CloudFormation stack set to enable an AWS CloudTrail trail to capture S3 data events for the organization. In the stack set, create an Amazon EventBridge rule to match S3 PutObject events that do not use AWS KMS encryption. Configure the rule to target an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic.

contents.en: Create an AWS CloudFormation stack set to enable an AWS CloudTrail trail to capture S3 data events for the organization. In the stack set, create an Amazon EventBridge rule to match S3 PutObject events that do not use AWS KMS encryption. Configure the rule to target an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CloudFormation stack set，以启用 AWS CloudTrail 跟踪来捕获组织的 S3 数据事件。在该 stack set 中，创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，用于匹配不使用 AWS KMS 加密的 S3 PutObject 事件。配置该规则以 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题为目标。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an SCP that includes a deny statement for the s3:putObject action and a condition where s3:x-amz-server-side- encryption is not aws:kms. Attach the SCP to the root of the organization.

contents.en: Create an SCP that includes a deny statement for the s3:putObject action and a condition where s3:x-amz-server-side- encryption is not aws:kms. Attach the SCP to the root of the organization.
contents.zh: 创建一个 SCP，其中包含针对 s3:putObject 操作的拒绝语句，以及 s3:x-amz-server-side- encryption 不是 aws:kms 的条件。将该 SCP 附加到组织根。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 D。SCP 可在组织范围内强制护栏；当 s3:PutObject 请求的 s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption 不是 aws:kms 时拒绝操作，即可阻止未使用 KMS 加密的上传。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 D。SCP 可在组织范围内强制护栏；当 s3:PutObject 请求的 s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption 不是 aws:kms 时拒绝操作，即可阻止未使用 KMS 加密的上传。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. An organization-level SCP can deny s3:PutObject when s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption is not aws:kms, enforcing KMS encryption at upload time.

contents.en: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations to manage many AWS accounts. The company has enabled all features for the organization. The company uses AWS CloudFormation StackSets to deploy configurations to the accounts. The company uses AWS Config to monitor an Amazon S3 bucket. The company needs to ensure that all object uploads to the S3 bucket use AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) encryption. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations 中的一个组织来管理许多 AWS 账户。该公司已为组织启用所有功能。该公司使用 AWS CloudFormation StackSets 将配置部署到账户。该公司使用 AWS Config 监控 Amazon S3 存储桶。该公司需要确保上传到 S3 存储桶的所有对象都使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 加密。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses an Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster and loads transactional data into the database every 5 hours. Data analysts use the Aurora PostgreSQL database to run short-running queries, create complex aggregated queries, and create simple reports that use the data. The data analysts also manually update the data, including deleting and inserting data. The data analysts have reported performance issues. The database team recently identified a long-running idle transaction connection that affected performance by blocking other queries and preventing VACUUM operations. The team wants to be proactively notified about these potential operational issues and about the recommended actions to fix the issues. The company's AWS account uses Amazon DevOps Guru to monitor all the applications in the account. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Turn on Performance Insights and DevOps Guru in the existing Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster. Configure DevOps Guru to send notifications to the database team by using Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS).

contents.en: Turn on Performance Insights and DevOps Guru in the existing Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster. Configure DevOps Guru to send notifications to the database team by using Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS).
contents.zh: 在现有 Aurora PostgreSQL DB 集群中开启 Performance Insights 和 DevOps Guru。配置 DevOps Guru 使用 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 向数据库团队发送通知。

options.label: B
options.content: Turn on Performance Insights in the existing Aurora PostrgreSQL DB cluster. Configure Amazon EventBridge to receive events from the existing Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster. Configure the Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster to send notifications to the database team by using Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS).

contents.en: Turn on Performance Insights in the existing Aurora PostrgreSQL DB cluster. Configure Amazon EventBridge to receive events from the existing Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster. Configure the Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster to send notifications to the database team by using Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS).
contents.zh: 在现有 Aurora PostrgreSQL DB 集群中开启 Performance Insights。配置 Amazon EventBridge 接收来自现有 Aurora PostgreSQL DB 集群的事件。配置 Aurora PostgreSQL DB 集群使用 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 向数据库团队发送通知。

options.label: C
options.content: Turn on Performance Insights and DevOps Guru in the existing Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster. Configure the Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster to send notifications to the database team by using Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES).

contents.en: Turn on Performance Insights and DevOps Guru in the existing Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster. Configure the Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster to send notifications to the database team by using Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES).
contents.zh: 在现有 Aurora PostgreSQL DB 集群中开启 Performance Insights 和 DevOps Guru。配置 Aurora PostgreSQL DB 集群使用 Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES) 向数据库团队发送通知。

options.label: D
options.content: Turn on Performance Insights in the existing Aurora PostrgreSQL DB cluster. Configure Amazon EventBridge to receive events from the existing Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster. Configure DevOps Guru to send notifications to the database team by using Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS).

contents.en: Turn on Performance Insights in the existing Aurora PostrgreSQL DB cluster. Configure Amazon EventBridge to receive events from the existing Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster. Configure DevOps Guru to send notifications to the database team by using Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS).
contents.zh: 在现有 Aurora PostrgreSQL DB 集群中开启 Performance Insights。配置 Amazon EventBridge 接收来自现有 Aurora PostgreSQL DB 集群的事件。配置 DevOps Guru 使用 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 向数据库团队发送通知。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A。对现有 Aurora PostgreSQL 集群启用 Performance Insights 和 DevOps Guru，可获得数据库性能洞察；DevOps Guru 直接通过 SNS 通知数据库团队，无需 EventBridge。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A。对现有 Aurora PostgreSQL 集群启用 Performance Insights 和 DevOps Guru，可获得数据库性能洞察；DevOps Guru 直接通过 SNS 通知数据库团队，无需 EventBridge。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. Enabling Performance Insights and DevOps Guru on the existing Aurora PostgreSQL cluster provides database insights, and DevOps Guru can notify the database team through SNS without needing EventBridge.

contents.en: A company uses an Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster and loads transactional data into the database every 5 hours. Data analysts use the Aurora PostgreSQL database to run short-running queries, create complex aggregated queries, and create simple reports that use the data. The data analysts also manually update the data, including deleting and inserting data. The data analysts have reported performance issues. The database team recently identified a long-running idle transaction connection that affected performance by blocking other queries and preventing VACUUM operations. The team wants to be proactively notified about these potential operational issues and about the recommended actions to fix the issues. The company's AWS account uses Amazon DevOps Guru to monitor all the applications in the account. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL DB 集群，并每 5 小时将事务数据加载到数据库中。数据分析师使用 Aurora PostgreSQL 数据库运行短时查询、创建复杂聚合查询，并创建使用这些数据的简单报告。数据分析师还会手动更新数据，包括删除和插入数据。数据分析师报告了性能问题。数据库团队最近发现一个长时间运行的空闲事务连接影响了性能，因为它阻塞了其他查询并阻止 VACUUM 操作。团队希望主动收到有关这些潜在运维问题以及修复这些问题的建议操作的通知。该公司的 AWS 账户使用 Amazon DevOps Guru 监控账户中的所有应用程序。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is implementing governance controls for a company that requires its infrastructure to be housed within the United States. The company has many AWS accounts in an organization in AWS Organizations that has all features enabled. The engineer must restrict which AWS Regions the company can use. The engineer must also ensure that an alert is sent as soon as possible if any activity outside the governance policy occurs. The controls must be automatically enabled on any new Region outside the United States. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Organizations SCP deny policy that has a condition that the aws:RequestedRegion property does not match a list of all US Regions. Include an exception in the policy for global services. Attach the policy to the root of the organization.

contents.en: Create an Organizations SCP deny policy that has a condition that the aws:RequestedRegion property does not match a list of all US Regions. Include an exception in the policy for global services. Attach the policy to the root of the organization.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Organizations SCP 拒绝策略，该策略具有一个条件：aws:RequestedRegion 属性不匹配所有美国区域列表。在该策略中包含全局服务的例外。将该策略附加到组织根。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure AWS CloudTrail to send logs to Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Enable CloudTrail for all Regions. Use a CloudWatch Logs metric filter to create a metric in non-US Regions. Configure a CloudWatch alarm to send an alert if the metric is greater than 0.

contents.en: Configure AWS CloudTrail to send logs to Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Enable CloudTrail for all Regions. Use a CloudWatch Logs metric filter to create a metric in non-US Regions. Configure a CloudWatch alarm to send an alert if the metric is greater than 0.
contents.zh: 配置 AWS CloudTrail 将日志发送到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs。为所有区域启用 CloudTrail。使用 CloudWatch Logs 指标筛选器在非美国区域创建指标。配置 CloudWatch 警报，如果该指标大于 0，则发送警报。

options.label: C
options.content: Use an AWS Lambda function that checks for AWS service activity. Deploy the Lambda function to all Regions. Write an Amazon EventBridge rule that runs the Lambda function every hour. Configure the rule to send an alert if the Lambda function finds any activity in a non-US Region.

contents.en: Use an AWS Lambda function that checks for AWS service activity. Deploy the Lambda function to all Regions. Write an Amazon EventBridge rule that runs the Lambda function every hour. Configure the rule to send an alert if the Lambda function finds any activity in a non-US Region.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Lambda 函数检查 AWS 服务活动。将 Lambda 函数部署到所有区域。编写一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，每小时运行该 Lambda 函数。如果 Lambda 函数在非美国区域发现任何活动，配置该规则发送警报。

options.label: D
options.content: Use an AWS Lambda function to query Amazon Inspector to look for service activity in non-US Regions. Configure the Lambda function to send alerts if Amazon Inspector finds any activity.

contents.en: Use an AWS Lambda function to query Amazon Inspector to look for service activity in non-US Regions. Configure the Lambda function to send alerts if Amazon Inspector finds any activity.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Lambda 函数查询 Amazon Inspector，以查找非美国区域中的服务活动。如果 Amazon Inspector 发现任何活动，配置 Lambda 函数发送警报。

options.label: E
options.content: Create an Organizations SCP allow policy that has a condition that the aws:RequestedRegion property matches a list of all US Regions. Include an exception in the policy for global services. Attach the policy to the root of the organization.

contents.en: Create an Organizations SCP allow policy that has a condition that the aws:RequestedRegion property matches a list of all US Regions. Include an exception in the policy for global services. Attach the policy to the root of the organization.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Organizations SCP 允许策略，该策略具有一个条件：aws:RequestedRegion 属性匹配所有美国区域列表。在该策略中包含全局服务的例外。将该策略附加到组织根。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A、B。A 使用 aws:RequestedRegion 条件的 SCP 将操作限制在美国区域，并为全局服务设置例外；B 启用全区域 CloudTrail 到 CloudWatch Logs，用指标筛选器和告警发现非美国区域中的活动。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A、B。A 使用 aws:RequestedRegion 条件的 SCP 将操作限制在美国区域，并为全局服务设置例外；B 启用全区域 CloudTrail 到 CloudWatch Logs，用指标筛选器和告警发现非美国区域中的活动。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A and B. A uses an SCP with aws:RequestedRegion to restrict activity to US Regions while excepting global services, and B monitors all-Region CloudTrail logs with a metric filter and alarm for activity in non-US Regions.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer is implementing governance controls for a company that requires its infrastructure to be housed within the United States. The company has many AWS accounts in an organization in AWS Organizations that has all features enabled. The engineer must restrict which AWS Regions the company can use. The engineer must also ensure that an alert is sent as soon as possible if any activity outside the governance policy occurs. The controls must be automatically enabled on any new Region outside the United States. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师正在为一家公司实施治理控制，该公司要求其基础设施位于美国境内。该公司在启用所有功能的 AWS Organizations 组织中拥有许多 AWS 账户。工程师必须限制公司可以使用的 AWS 区域。工程师还必须确保一旦发生治理策略之外的任何活动，就尽快发送警报。控制措施必须在美国以外的任何新区域中自动启用。哪组步骤组合可以满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company runs applications on Amazon EC2 instances that are in an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group. The EC2 instances are behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Users recently began to experience errors when traffic was directed to some of the EC2 instances. A DevOps engineer discovers that the Auto Scaling group reports the problematic instances are healthy despite the application errors. User experience returns to normal after the DevOps engineer resolves the application errors on the problematic instances. The company wants to ensure that traffic is routed only to healthy instances that are not experiencing application errors. The company also wants a support team to receive a notification if the traffic routing configuration changes. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure the Auto Scaling group to use ELB health checks. Enable AWS Config. Create an AWS Config rule to ensure that any new Auto Scaling group will use ELB health checks. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to notify the support team if the traffic routing configuration changes. Configure the AWS Config rule to send a notification to the topic.

contents.en: Configure the Auto Scaling group to use ELB health checks. Enable AWS Config. Create an AWS Config rule to ensure that any new Auto Scaling group will use ELB health checks. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to notify the support team if the traffic routing configuration changes. Configure the AWS Config rule to send a notification to the topic.
contents.zh: 配置 Auto Scaling 组使用 ELB 运行状况检查。启用 AWS Config。创建一个 AWS Config 规则，确保任何新的 Auto Scaling 组都将使用 ELB 运行状况检查。创建一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题，以在流量路由配置更改时通知支持团队。配置 AWS Config 规则向该主题发送通知。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure the Auto Scaling group to use EC2 health checks. Enable AWS Config. Create an AWS Config rule to ensure that any new Auto Scaling group will use EC2 health checks. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to notify the support team if the traffic routing configuration changes. Configure the AWS Config rule to send a notification to the topic.

contents.en: Configure the Auto Scaling group to use EC2 health checks. Enable AWS Config. Create an AWS Config rule to ensure that any new Auto Scaling group will use EC2 health checks. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to notify the support team if the traffic routing configuration changes. Configure the AWS Config rule to send a notification to the topic.
contents.zh: 配置 Auto Scaling 组使用 EC2 运行状况检查。启用 AWS Config。创建一个 AWS Config 规则，确保任何新的 Auto Scaling 组都将使用 EC2 运行状况检查。创建一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题，以在流量路由配置更改时通知支持团队。配置 AWS Config 规则向该主题发送通知。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the Auto Scaling group to use EC2 health checks. Create an Amazon CloudWatch synthetic canary to monitor the application. Create a CloudWatch alarm that is triggered when the CloudWatch canary fails. Configure the alarm to notify the support team when the alarm state is in alarm.

contents.en: Configure the Auto Scaling group to use EC2 health checks. Create an Amazon CloudWatch synthetic canary to monitor the application. Create a CloudWatch alarm that is triggered when the CloudWatch canary fails. Configure the alarm to notify the support team when the alarm state is in alarm.
contents.zh: 配置 Auto Scaling 组使用 EC2 运行状况检查。创建一个 Amazon CloudWatch synthetic canary 来监控应用程序。创建一个 CloudWatch 警报，在 CloudWatch canary 失败时触发。配置该警报在警报状态为 in alarm 时通知支持团队。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure the Auto Scaling group to use ELB health checks. Create an Amazon CloudWatch synthetic canary to monitor the application. Create a CloudWatch alarm that is triggered when the CloudWatch canary fails. Configure the alarm to notify the support team when the alarm state is in alarm.

contents.en: Configure the Auto Scaling group to use ELB health checks. Create an Amazon CloudWatch synthetic canary to monitor the application. Create a CloudWatch alarm that is triggered when the CloudWatch canary fails. Configure the alarm to notify the support team when the alarm state is in alarm.
contents.zh: 配置 Auto Scaling 组使用 ELB 运行状况检查。创建一个 Amazon CloudWatch synthetic canary 来监控应用程序。创建一个 CloudWatch 警报，在 CloudWatch canary 失败时触发。配置该警报在警报状态为 in alarm 时通知支持团队。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A。为 Auto Scaling 组启用 ELB 健康检查可进行应用级健康检测；AWS Config 规则可治理新建或变更的 Auto Scaling 组配置，并通过 SNS 通知流量路由配置变化。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A。为 Auto Scaling 组启用 ELB 健康检查可进行应用级健康检测；AWS Config 规则可治理新建或变更的 Auto Scaling 组配置，并通过 SNS 通知流量路由配置变化。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. ELB health checks provide application-level health detection for the Auto Scaling group, while AWS Config enforces governance for new or changed groups and sends SNS notifications when routing-related configuration changes.

contents.en: A company runs applications on Amazon EC2 instances that are in an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group. The EC2 instances are behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Users recently began to experience errors when traffic was directed to some of the EC2 instances. A DevOps engineer discovers that the Auto Scaling group reports the problematic instances are healthy despite the application errors. User experience returns to normal after the DevOps engineer resolves the application errors on the problematic instances. The company wants to ensure that traffic is routed only to healthy instances that are not experiencing application errors. The company also wants a support team to receive a notification if the traffic routing configuration changes. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 组中的 Amazon EC2 实例上运行应用程序。这些 EC2 实例位于 Application Load Balancer (ALB) 后面。最近，当流量被定向到某些 EC2 实例时，用户开始遇到错误。DevOps 工程师发现，尽管应用程序出现错误，Auto Scaling 组仍报告有问题的实例为正常。DevOps 工程师解决有问题实例上的应用程序错误后，用户体验恢复正常。该公司希望确保流量只路由到未发生应用程序错误的健康实例。该公司还希望在流量路由配置发生更改时通知支持团队。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer needs to troubleshoot a pipeline that uses a GitHub code repository. The pipeline contains a source stage, a build stage, and a deploy stage. The pipeline also has an AWS CodeStar connection to the GitHub code repository. The build stage uses an AWS CodeBuild build project. The build project needs to perform a git clone of the repository as part of the build process. The DevOps engineer validates that the source stage is working properly. However, the build stage fails each time the pipeline runs. What is the reason that the build stage fails in the pipeline?

options.label: A
options.content: The build stage within the pipeline needs to use the AWS CodeStar connection action.

contents.en: The build stage within the pipeline needs to use the AWS CodeStar connection action.
contents.zh: 流水线中的构建阶段需要使用 AWS CodeStar 连接操作。

options.label: B
options.content: The AWS CodeStar connection to GitHub contains incorrect credentials.

contents.en: The AWS CodeStar connection to GitHub contains incorrect credentials.
contents.zh: 到 GitHub 的 AWS CodeStar 连接包含不正确的凭证。

options.label: C
options.content: The AWS CodePipeline service role does not have permission to use the AWS CodeStar connection.

contents.en: The AWS CodePipeline service role does not have permission to use the AWS CodeStar connection.
contents.zh: AWS CodePipeline 服务角色没有使用 AWS CodeStar 连接的权限。

options.label: D
options.content: The AWS CodeBuild service role does not have permission to use the AWS CodeStar connection.

contents.en: The AWS CodeBuild service role does not have permission to use the AWS CodeStar connection.
contents.zh: AWS CodeBuild 服务角色没有使用 AWS CodeStar 连接的权限。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 D。Source 阶段已能工作，说明 CodeStar 连接凭证和 CodePipeline 服务角色不是主要问题；构建阶段访问仓库依赖 CodeBuild 服务角色具备使用 CodeStar connection 的权限。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 D。Source 阶段已能工作，说明 CodeStar 连接凭证和 CodePipeline 服务角色不是主要问题；构建阶段访问仓库依赖 CodeBuild 服务角色具备使用 CodeStar connection 的权限。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. Since the source stage works, the CodeStar connection and CodePipeline service role are not the likely issue; the build depends on the CodeBuild service role having permission to use the CodeStar connection.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer needs to troubleshoot a pipeline that uses a GitHub code repository. The pipeline contains a source stage, a build stage, and a deploy stage. The pipeline also has an AWS CodeStar connection to the GitHub code repository. The build stage uses an AWS CodeBuild build project. The build project needs to perform a git clone of the repository as part of the build process. The DevOps engineer validates that the source stage is working properly. However, the build stage fails each time the pipeline runs. What is the reason that the build stage fails in the pipeline?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师需要排查一条使用 GitHub 代码存储库的流水线。该流水线包含源阶段、构建阶段和部署阶段。该流水线还具有一个连接到 GitHub 代码存储库的 AWS CodeStar 连接。构建阶段使用 AWS CodeBuild 构建项目。该构建项目需要在构建过程中执行该存储库的 git clone。DevOps 工程师确认源阶段工作正常。但是，每次流水线运行时构建阶段都会失败。流水线中构建阶段失败的原因是什么？

questions.content: A company's DevOps team uses Node Package Manager (NPM) open source libraries to build applications. The DevOps team runs its application build process in an AWS CodeBuild project that downloads the NPM libraries from public NPM repositories. The company wants to host the NPM libraries in private NPM repositories. The company also needs to be able to run checks on new versions of the libraries before the DevOps team uses the libraries. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational effort?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS CodeArtifact repository with an upstream repository named npm-store. Configure the application build process to use the CodeArtifact repository as the default source for NPM. Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline to perform the required checks on package versions in the CodeArtifact repository. Set the package status to unlisted if a failure occurs.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodeArtifact repository with an upstream repository named npm-store. Configure the application build process to use the CodeArtifact repository as the default source for NPM. Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline to perform the required checks on package versions in the CodeArtifact repository. Set the package status to unlisted if a failure occurs.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CodeArtifact 存储库，并配置一个名为 npm-store 的上游存储库。配置应用程序构建流程，将 CodeArtifact 存储库用作 NPM 的默认来源。创建一个 AWS CodePipeline 流水线，对 CodeArtifact 存储库中的软件包版本执行所需检查。如果发生失败，则将软件包状态设置为 unlisted。

options.label: B
options.content: Enable Amazon S3 caching in the CodeBuild project configuration. Add a step in the buildspec.yaml config file to perform the required checks on the package versions in the cache.

contents.en: Enable Amazon S3 caching in the CodeBuild project configuration. Add a step in the buildspec.yaml config file to perform the required checks on the package versions in the cache.
contents.zh: 在 CodeBuild 项目配置中启用 Amazon S3 缓存。在 buildspec.yaml 配置文件中添加一个步骤，对缓存中的软件包版本执行所需检查。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS CodeCommit repository for each library. Clone the required NPM libraries to the appropriate CodeCommit repository. Modify the CodeBuild appspec.yaml config file to use the private CodeCommit repositories. Add a step to perform the required checks on the package versions.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodeCommit repository for each library. Clone the required NPM libraries to the appropriate CodeCommit repository. Modify the CodeBuild appspec.yaml config file to use the private CodeCommit repositories. Add a step to perform the required checks on the package versions.
contents.zh: 为每个库创建一个 AWS CodeCommit 存储库。将所需的 NPM 库克隆到相应的 CodeCommit 存储库。修改 CodeBuild appspec.yaml 配置文件以使用私有 CodeCommit 存储库。添加一个步骤，对软件包版本执行所需检查。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS CodeCommit repository for each library. Clone the required NPM libraries to the appropriate CodeCommit repository. Modify the CodeBuild buildspec.yaml config file so that NPM uses the private CodeCommit repositories. Add an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that performs the required checks on the package versions for each new commit to the repositories. Configure the pipeline to revert to the most recent commit in the event of a failure.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodeCommit repository for each library. Clone the required NPM libraries to the appropriate CodeCommit repository. Modify the CodeBuild buildspec.yaml config file so that NPM uses the private CodeCommit repositories. Add an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that performs the required checks on the package versions for each new commit to the repositories. Configure the pipeline to revert to the most recent commit in the event of a failure.
contents.zh: 为每个库创建一个 AWS CodeCommit 存储库。将所需的 NPM 库克隆到相应的 CodeCommit 存储库。修改 CodeBuild buildspec.yaml 配置文件，使 NPM 使用私有 CodeCommit 存储库。添加一个 AWS CodePipeline 流水线，对存储库中每个新提交的软件包版本执行所需检查。配置流水线在发生失败时还原到最近的提交。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A。CodeArtifact 可创建私有仓库并连接 npm-store 等上游公共仓库，按需缓存软件包；构建流程使用该仓库作为 NPM 默认源，流水线检查包版本并在失败时将包设为 unlisted。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A。CodeArtifact 可创建私有仓库并连接 npm-store 等上游公共仓库，按需缓存软件包；构建流程使用该仓库作为 NPM 默认源，流水线检查包版本并在失败时将包设为 unlisted。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. CodeArtifact can use an upstream npm-store repository to fetch and cache packages on demand, while the build uses CodeArtifact as the default NPM source and a pipeline checks package versions and unlists failures.

contents.en: A company's DevOps team uses Node Package Manager (NPM) open source libraries to build applications. The DevOps team runs its application build process in an AWS CodeBuild project that downloads the NPM libraries from public NPM repositories. The company wants to host the NPM libraries in private NPM repositories. The company also needs to be able to run checks on new versions of the libraries before the DevOps team uses the libraries. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational effort?
contents.zh: 一家公司的 DevOps 团队使用 Node Package Manager (NPM) 开源库来构建应用程序。DevOps 团队在 AWS CodeBuild 项目中运行应用程序构建流程，该项目会从公共 NPM 存储库下载 NPM 库。公司希望在私有 NPM 存储库中托管这些 NPM 库。公司还需要能够在 DevOps 团队使用这些库之前，对库的新版本运行检查。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营工作量满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has a search application that has a web interface. The company uses Amazon CloudFront, Application Load Balancers (ALBs), and Amazon EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group with a desired capacity of 3. The company uses prebaked AMIs. The application starts in 1 minute. The application queries an Amazon OpenSearch Service cluster. The application is deployed to multiple Availability Zones. Because of compliance requirements, the application needs to have a disaster recovery (DR) environment in a separate AWS Region. The company wants to minimize the ongoing cost of the DR environment and requires an RTO and an RPO of under 30 minutes. The company has created an ALB in the DR Region. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Add the new ALB as an origin in the CloudFront distribution. Configure origin failover functionality. Copy the AMI to the DR Region. Create a launch template and an Auto Scaling group with a desired capacity of 0 in the DR Region. Create a new OpenSearch Service cluster in the DR Region. Set up cross-cluster replication for the cluster.

contents.en: Add the new ALB as an origin in the CloudFront distribution. Configure origin failover functionality. Copy the AMI to the DR Region. Create a launch template and an Auto Scaling group with a desired capacity of 0 in the DR Region. Create a new OpenSearch Service cluster in the DR Region. Set up cross-cluster replication for the cluster.
contents.zh: 将新的 ALB 添加为 CloudFront 分配中的一个源。配置源故障转移功能。将 AMI 复制到 DR Region。创建启动模板和 Auto Scaling 组，并将 DR Region 中的期望容量设置为 0。在 DR Region 中创建新的 OpenSearch Service 集群。为该集群设置跨集群复制。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new CloudFront distribution in the DR Region and add the new ALB as an origin. Use Amazon Route 53 DNS for Regional failover. Copy the AMI to the DR Region. Create a launch template and an Auto Scaling group with a desired capacity of 0 in the DR Region. Reconfigure the OpenSearch Service cluster as a Multi-AZ with Standby deployment. Ensure that the standby nodes are in the DR Region.

contents.en: Create a new CloudFront distribution in the DR Region and add the new ALB as an origin. Use Amazon Route 53 DNS for Regional failover. Copy the AMI to the DR Region. Create a launch template and an Auto Scaling group with a desired capacity of 0 in the DR Region. Reconfigure the OpenSearch Service cluster as a Multi-AZ with Standby deployment. Ensure that the standby nodes are in the DR Region.
contents.zh: 在 DR Region 中创建新的 CloudFront 分配，并将新的 ALB 添加为源。使用 Amazon Route 53 DNS 进行区域故障转移。将 AMI 复制到 DR Region。创建启动模板和 Auto Scaling 组，并将 DR Region 中的期望容量设置为 0。将 OpenSearch Service 集群重新配置为 Multi-AZ with Standby 部署。确保备用节点位于 DR Region 中。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a new CloudFront distribution in the DR Region and add the new ALB as an origin. Use Amazon Route 53 DNS for Regional failover. Copy the AMI to the DR Region. Create a launch template and an Auto Scaling group with a desired capacity of 3 in the DR Region. Reconfigure the OpenSearch Service cluster as a Multi-AZ with Standby deployment. Ensure that the standby nodes are in the DR Region.

contents.en: Create a new CloudFront distribution in the DR Region and add the new ALB as an origin. Use Amazon Route 53 DNS for Regional failover. Copy the AMI to the DR Region. Create a launch template and an Auto Scaling group with a desired capacity of 3 in the DR Region. Reconfigure the OpenSearch Service cluster as a Multi-AZ with Standby deployment. Ensure that the standby nodes are in the DR Region.
contents.zh: 在 DR Region 中创建新的 CloudFront 分配，并将新的 ALB 添加为源。使用 Amazon Route 53 DNS 进行区域故障转移。将 AMI 复制到 DR Region。创建启动模板和 Auto Scaling 组，并将 DR Region 中的期望容量设置为 3。将 OpenSearch Service 集群重新配置为 Multi-AZ with Standby 部署。确保备用节点位于 DR Region 中。

options.label: D
options.content: Add the new ALB as an origin in the CloudFront distribution. Configure origin failover functionality. Copy the AMI to the DR Region. Create a launch template and an Auto Scaling group with a desired capacity of 3 in the DR Region. Create a new OpenSearch Service cluster in the DR Region. Set up cross-cluster replication for the cluster.

contents.en: Add the new ALB as an origin in the CloudFront distribution. Configure origin failover functionality. Copy the AMI to the DR Region. Create a launch template and an Auto Scaling group with a desired capacity of 3 in the DR Region. Create a new OpenSearch Service cluster in the DR Region. Set up cross-cluster replication for the cluster.
contents.zh: 将新的 ALB 添加为 CloudFront 分配中的一个源。配置源故障转移功能。将 AMI 复制到 DR Region。创建启动模板和 Auto Scaling 组，并将 DR Region 中的期望容量设置为 3。在 DR Region 中创建新的 OpenSearch Service 集群。为该集群设置跨集群复制。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A。CloudFront 是全局服务，因此无需区域级 CloudFront；将新 ALB 加为源并配置 origin failover，同时在 DR 区域准备 AMI、启动模板、容量为 0 的 Auto Scaling 组和 OpenSearch 跨集群复制，可支持灾备切换。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A。CloudFront 是全局服务，因此无需区域级 CloudFront；将新 ALB 加为源并配置 origin failover，同时在 DR 区域准备 AMI、启动模板、容量为 0 的 Auto Scaling 组和 OpenSearch 跨集群复制，可支持灾备切换。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. CloudFront is global, so adding the DR ALB as an origin with origin failover is enough at the edge; the copied AMI, launch template, zero-capacity Auto Scaling group, and OpenSearch cross-cluster replication prepare the DR Region.

contents.en: A company has a search application that has a web interface. The company uses Amazon CloudFront, Application Load Balancers (ALBs), and Amazon EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group with a desired capacity of 3. The company uses prebaked AMIs. The application starts in 1 minute. The application queries an Amazon OpenSearch Service cluster. The application is deployed to multiple Availability Zones. Because of compliance requirements, the application needs to have a disaster recovery (DR) environment in a separate AWS Region. The company wants to minimize the ongoing cost of the DR environment and requires an RTO and an RPO of under 30 minutes. The company has created an ALB in the DR Region. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个带有 Web 界面的搜索应用程序。该公司使用 Amazon CloudFront、Application Load Balancers (ALBs)，以及位于 Auto Scaling 组中的 Amazon EC2 实例，该组的期望容量为 3。公司使用预烘焙 AMI。应用程序在 1 分钟内启动。应用程序查询 Amazon OpenSearch Service 集群。应用程序部署在多个 Availability Zones 中。由于合规性要求，应用程序需要在单独的 AWS Region 中拥有灾难恢复 (DR) 环境。公司希望尽量降低 DR 环境的持续成本，并要求 RTO 和 RPO 低于 30 分钟。公司已在 DR Region 中创建了一个 ALB。哪种解决方案能够满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer uses AWS WAF to manage web ACLs across an AWS account. The DevOps engineer must ensure that AWS WAF is enabled for all Application Load Balancers (ALBs) in the account. The DevOps engineer uses an AWS CloudFormation template to deploy an individual ALB and AWS WAF as part of each application stack's deployment process. If AWS WAF is removed from the ALB after the ALB is deployed, AWS WAF must be added to the ALB automatically. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Enable AWS Config. Add the alb-waf-enabled managed rule. Create an AWS Systems Manager Automation document to add AWS WAF to an ALB. Edit the rule to automatically remediate. Select the Systems Manager Automation document as the remediation action.

contents.en: Enable AWS Config. Add the alb-waf-enabled managed rule. Create an AWS Systems Manager Automation document to add AWS WAF to an ALB. Edit the rule to automatically remediate. Select the Systems Manager Automation document as the remediation action.
contents.zh: 启用 AWS Config。添加 alb-waf-enabled 托管规则。创建一个 AWS Systems Manager Automation 文档，用于将 AWS WAF 添加到 ALB。编辑该规则以自动修复。选择 Systems Manager Automation 文档作为修复操作。

options.label: B
options.content: Enable AWS Config. Add the alb-waf-enabled managed rule. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to send all AWS Config ConfigurationItemChangeNotification notification types to an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to call the AWS Config start-resource-evaluation API in detective mode.

contents.en: Enable AWS Config. Add the alb-waf-enabled managed rule. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to send all AWS Config ConfigurationItemChangeNotification notification types to an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to call the AWS Config start-resource-evaluation API in detective mode.
contents.zh: 启用 AWS Config。添加 alb-waf-enabled 托管规则。创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，将所有 AWS Config ConfigurationItemChangeNotification 通知类型发送到 AWS Lambda 函数。配置 Lambda 函数以侦测模式调用 AWS Config start-resource-evaluation API。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to periodically call an AWS Lambda function that calls the detect-stack-drift API on the CloudFormation template. Configure the Lambda function to modify the ALB attributes with waf.fail_open.enabled set to true if the AWS::WAFv2::WebACLAssociation resource shows a status of drifted.

contents.en: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to periodically call an AWS Lambda function that calls the detect-stack-drift API on the CloudFormation template. Configure the Lambda function to modify the ALB attributes with waf.fail_open.enabled set to true if the AWS::WAFv2::WebACLAssociation resource shows a status of drifted.
contents.zh: 配置一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，定期调用 AWS Lambda 函数，该函数调用 CloudFormation 模板上的 detect-stack-drift API。如果 AWS::WAFv2::WebACLAssociation 资源显示状态为 drifted，则配置 Lambda 函数将 ALB 属性 waf.fail_open.enabled 修改为 true。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to periodically call an AWS Lambda function that calls the detect-stack-drift API on the CloudFormation template. Configure the Lambda function to delete and redeploy the CloudFormation stack if the AWS::WAFv2::WebACLAssociation resource shows a status of drifted.

contents.en: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to periodically call an AWS Lambda function that calls the detect-stack-drift API on the CloudFormation template. Configure the Lambda function to delete and redeploy the CloudFormation stack if the AWS::WAFv2::WebACLAssociation resource shows a status of drifted.
contents.zh: 配置一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，定期调用 AWS Lambda 函数，该函数调用 CloudFormation 模板上的 detect-stack-drift API。如果 AWS::WAFv2::WebACLAssociation 资源显示状态为 drifted，则配置 Lambda 函数删除并重新部署 CloudFormation 堆栈。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A。AWS Config 的 alb-waf-enabled 托管规则可检测 ALB 是否关联 WAF；将 Systems Manager Automation 文档配置为自动修复动作后，可在发现不合规时自动为 ALB 添加 WAF。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A。AWS Config 的 alb-waf-enabled 托管规则可检测 ALB 是否关联 WAF；将 Systems Manager Automation 文档配置为自动修复动作后，可在发现不合规时自动为 ALB 添加 WAF。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The AWS Config alb-waf-enabled managed rule detects ALBs without WAF, and an automatic Systems Manager Automation remediation can attach WAF when noncompliance is found.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer uses AWS WAF to manage web ACLs across an AWS account. The DevOps engineer must ensure that AWS WAF is enabled for all Application Load Balancers (ALBs) in the account. The DevOps engineer uses an AWS CloudFormation template to deploy an individual ALB and AWS WAF as part of each application stack's deployment process. If AWS WAF is removed from the ALB after the ALB is deployed, AWS WAF must be added to the ALB automatically. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师使用 AWS WAF 管理某个 AWS 账户中的 Web ACL。DevOps 工程师必须确保该账户中的所有 Application Load Balancers (ALBs) 都启用 AWS WAF。DevOps 工程师使用 AWS CloudFormation 模板，在每个应用程序堆栈的部署过程中部署单独的 ALB 和 AWS WAF。如果在 ALB 部署后从 ALB 中移除了 AWS WAF，则必须自动将 AWS WAF 添加回 ALB。哪种解决方案能够以最高的运营效率满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company is developing an ecommerce application on AWS. The company wants to make sure that the application can handle sudden increases in traffic. The company uses AWS CodePipeline for its CI/CD process. The company must implement a solution to integrate automated load testing into the CI/CD pipeline to validate the application's performance. The solution must perform production deployment only if the performance exceeds a threshold. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Deploy the application by using AWS Elastic Beanstalk. Enable load balancing. Use Elastic Beanstalk to deploy tools for load tests. Run the tests during each deployment, and roll back the deployment if performance thresholds are unmet. Create an AWS Lambda function to monitor test metrics. Set up alarms for performance thresholds. Configure Amazon EventBridge to return an error if a test fails and to proceed with production deployment if a test passes.

contents.en: Deploy the application by using AWS Elastic Beanstalk. Enable load balancing. Use Elastic Beanstalk to deploy tools for load tests. Run the tests during each deployment, and roll back the deployment if performance thresholds are unmet. Create an AWS Lambda function to monitor test metrics. Set up alarms for performance thresholds. Configure Amazon EventBridge to return an error if a test fails and to proceed with production deployment if a test passes.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Elastic Beanstalk 部署应用程序。启用负载均衡。使用 Elastic Beanstalk 部署负载测试工具。在每次部署期间运行测试，如果未达到性能阈值则回滚部署。创建 AWS Lambda 函数来监控测试指标。为性能阈值设置告警。配置 Amazon EventBridge 在测试失败时返回错误，并在测试通过时继续生产部署。

options.label: B
options.content: Implement AWS Fargate tasks to run tools for load tests. Use Amazon Elastic container Service (Amazon ECS) to manage the test containers. Create AWS Lambda functions to analyze the test results. Integrate the functions with CodePipeline by using custom actions to initiate and evaluate the tests. Program the functions to return an error if a test fails and to proceed with production deployment if a test passes.

contents.en: Implement AWS Fargate tasks to run tools for load tests. Use Amazon Elastic container Service (Amazon ECS) to manage the test containers. Create AWS Lambda functions to analyze the test results. Integrate the functions with CodePipeline by using custom actions to initiate and evaluate the tests. Program the functions to return an error if a test fails and to proceed with production deployment if a test passes.
contents.zh: 实施 AWS Fargate 任务来运行负载测试工具。使用 Amazon Elastic container Service (Amazon ECS) 管理测试容器。创建 AWS Lambda 函数来分析测试结果。通过自定义操作将这些函数与 CodePipeline 集成，以启动和评估测试。编写函数逻辑，使其在测试失败时返回错误，并在测试通过时继续生产部署。

options.label: C
options.content: Launch Amazon EC2 instances to run tools for load tests. Store test scripts in a GitHub repository. Use AWS Step Functions to orchestrate the tests and result analysis in the CodePipeline workflow. Use Amazon EventBridge to invoke an AWS Lambda function based on the test results. Program the function to return an error if a test fails and to proceed with production deployment if a test passes.

contents.en: Launch Amazon EC2 instances to run tools for load tests. Store test scripts in a GitHub repository. Use AWS Step Functions to orchestrate the tests and result analysis in the CodePipeline workflow. Use Amazon EventBridge to invoke an AWS Lambda function based on the test results. Program the function to return an error if a test fails and to proceed with production deployment if a test passes.
contents.zh: 启动 Amazon EC2 实例来运行负载测试工具。将测试脚本存储在 GitHub 存储库中。使用 AWS Step Functions 在 CodePipeline 工作流中编排测试和结果分析。使用 Amazon EventBridge 根据测试结果调用 AWS Lambda 函数。编写该函数，使其在测试失败时返回错误，并在测试通过时继续生产部署。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS CodeBuild to run tools for load tests, store the test artifacts in Amazon S3, and configure a CodePipeline stage to invoke the CodeBuild project. Use Amazon CloudWatch to monitor the test metrics and to set up alarms for performance thresholds. Integrate an AWS Lambda function into the pipeline by using a custom action. Program the function to return an error if a test fails and to proceed with production deployment if a test passes.

contents.en: Use AWS CodeBuild to run tools for load tests, store the test artifacts in Amazon S3, and configure a CodePipeline stage to invoke the CodeBuild project. Use Amazon CloudWatch to monitor the test metrics and to set up alarms for performance thresholds. Integrate an AWS Lambda function into the pipeline by using a custom action. Program the function to return an error if a test fails and to proceed with production deployment if a test passes.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CodeBuild 运行负载测试工具，将测试构件存储在 Amazon S3 中，并配置一个 CodePipeline 阶段来调用 CodeBuild 项目。使用 Amazon CloudWatch 监控测试指标并为性能阈值设置告警。通过自定义操作将 AWS Lambda 函数集成到流水线中。编写该函数，使其在测试失败时返回错误，并在测试通过时继续生产部署。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 D。CodeBuild 可作为 CodePipeline 测试阶段运行负载测试并将产物存入 S3；CloudWatch 监控测试指标和阈值，Lambda 自定义动作根据测试结果返回失败或允许继续生产部署。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 D。CodeBuild 可作为 CodePipeline 测试阶段运行负载测试并将产物存入 S3；CloudWatch 监控测试指标和阈值，Lambda 自定义动作根据测试结果返回失败或允许继续生产部署。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. CodeBuild runs the load tests as a CodePipeline stage and stores artifacts in S3, CloudWatch monitors thresholds, and a Lambda custom action gates production deployment based on the test result.

contents.en: A company is developing an ecommerce application on AWS. The company wants to make sure that the application can handle sudden increases in traffic. The company uses AWS CodePipeline for its CI/CD process. The company must implement a solution to integrate automated load testing into the CI/CD pipeline to validate the application's performance. The solution must perform production deployment only if the performance exceeds a threshold. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在 AWS 上开发电子商务应用程序。公司希望确保应用程序能够处理流量的突然增加。公司使用 AWS CodePipeline 作为其 CI/CD 流程。公司必须实施一种解决方案，将自动化负载测试集成到 CI/CD 流水线中，以验证应用程序性能。只有当性能超过阈值时，该解决方案才必须执行生产部署。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company needs to update its order processing application to improve resilience and availability. The application requires a stateful database and uses a single-node Amazon RDS DB instance to store customer orders and transaction history. A DevOps engineer must make the database highly available. Which solution will meet this requirement?

options.label: A
options.content: Migrate the database to Amazon DynamoDB global tables. Configure automatic failover between AWS Regions by using Amazon Route 53 health checks.

contents.en: Migrate the database to Amazon DynamoDB global tables. Configure automatic failover between AWS Regions by using Amazon Route 53 health checks.
contents.zh: 将数据库迁移到 Amazon DynamoDB global tables。使用 Amazon Route 53 运行状况检查配置 AWS Regions 之间的自动故障转移。

options.label: B
options.content: Migrate the database to Amazon EC2 instances in multiple Availability Zones. Use Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Multi-Attach to connect all the instances to a single EBS volume.

contents.en: Migrate the database to Amazon EC2 instances in multiple Availability Zones. Use Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Multi-Attach to connect all the instances to a single EBS volume.
contents.zh: 将数据库迁移到位于多个 Availability Zones 中的 Amazon EC2 实例。使用 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Multi-Attach 将所有实例连接到单个 EBS 卷。

options.label: C
options.content: Use the RDS DB instance as the source instance to create read replicas in multiple Availability Zones. Deploy an Application Load Balancer to distribute read traffic across the read replicas.

contents.en: Use the RDS DB instance as the source instance to create read replicas in multiple Availability Zones. Deploy an Application Load Balancer to distribute read traffic across the read replicas.
contents.zh: 使用 RDS DB instance 作为源实例，在多个 Availability Zones 中创建只读副本。部署 Application Load Balancer，在只读副本之间分配读取流量。

options.label: D
options.content: Modify the RDS DB instance to be a Multi-AZ deployment. Verify automatic failover to the standby instance if the primary instance becomes unavailable.

contents.en: Modify the RDS DB instance to be a Multi-AZ deployment. Verify automatic failover to the standby instance if the primary instance becomes unavailable.
contents.zh: 将 RDS DB instance 修改为 Multi-AZ 部署。验证在主实例不可用时能够自动故障转移到备用实例。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 D。将现有 RDS DB 实例改为 Multi-AZ 部署可提升有状态数据库的高可用性和容错能力，并可验证主实例不可用时自动故障转移到备用实例。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 D。将现有 RDS DB 实例改为 Multi-AZ 部署可提升有状态数据库的高可用性和容错能力，并可验证主实例不可用时自动故障转移到备用实例。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. Converting the existing RDS DB instance to Multi-AZ improves availability and fault tolerance for the stateful database and supports automatic failover to the standby instance.

contents.en: A company needs to update its order processing application to improve resilience and availability. The application requires a stateful database and uses a single-node Amazon RDS DB instance to store customer orders and transaction history. A DevOps engineer must make the database highly available. Which solution will meet this requirement?
contents.zh: 一家公司需要更新其订单处理应用程序，以提高韧性和可用性。该应用程序需要有状态数据库，并使用单节点 Amazon RDS DB instance 存储客户订单和交易历史记录。DevOps 工程师必须使数据库具备高可用性。哪种解决方案能够满足这一要求？

questions.content: A company has application code in an AWS CodeConnections compatible Git repository. The company wants to configure unit tests to run when pull requests are opened. The company wants to ensure that the test status is visible in pull requests when the tests are completed. The company wants to save output data files that the tests generate to an Amazon S3 bucket after the tests are finished. Which combination of solutions will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create an IAM service role to allow access to the resources that are required to run the tests. B Create a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline that has a test stage. Create a trigger to run the pipeline when pull requests are created or updated. Add a source action to report test results.

contents.en: Create an IAM service role to allow access to the resources that are required to run the tests. B Create a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline that has a test stage. Create a trigger to run the pipeline when pull requests are created or updated. Add a source action to report test results.
contents.zh: 创建一个 IAM service role，以允许访问运行测试所需的资源。B 在 AWS CodePipeline 中创建一个包含测试阶段的流水线。创建一个触发器，在创建或更新拉取请求时运行流水线。添加一个源操作来报告测试结果。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS CodeBuild project to run the tests. Enable webhook triggers to run the tests when pull requests are created or updated. Enable build status reporting to report test results.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodeBuild project to run the tests. Enable webhook triggers to run the tests when pull requests are created or updated. Enable build status reporting to report test results.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CodeBuild 项目来运行测试。启用 webhook 触发器，以便在创建或更新拉取请求时运行测试。启用构建状态报告以报告测试结果。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a buildspec.yml file that has a reports section to upload output files when the tests have finished running.

contents.en: Create a buildspec.yml file that has a reports section to upload output files when the tests have finished running.
contents.zh: 创建一个 buildspec.yml 文件，其中包含 reports 部分，以便在测试运行完成后上传输出文件。

options.label: E
options.content: Create a buildspec.yml file that has an artifacts section to upload artifacts when the tests have finished running.

contents.en: Create a buildspec.yml file that has an artifacts section to upload artifacts when the tests have finished running.
contents.zh: 创建一个 buildspec.yml 文件，其中包含 artifacts 部分，以便在测试运行完成后上传构件。

options.label: F
options.content: Create an appspec.yml file that has a files section to upload output files when the tests have finished running.

contents.en: Create an appspec.yml file that has a files section to upload output files when the tests have finished running.
contents.zh: 创建一个 appspec.yml 文件，其中包含 files 部分，以便在测试运行完成后上传输出文件。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A、C、E。A 提供测试所需资源访问的 IAM 服务角色；C 使用 CodeBuild 项目、PR webhook 触发和构建状态报告；E 在 buildspec.yml 的 artifacts 部分上传测试完成后的输出文件。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A、C、E。A 提供测试所需资源访问的 IAM 服务角色；C 使用 CodeBuild 项目、PR webhook 触发和构建状态报告；E 在 buildspec.yml 的 artifacts 部分上传测试完成后的输出文件。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A, C, and E. A supplies the IAM service role needed by the tests, C runs the tests in CodeBuild with pull request webhooks and build status reporting, and E uploads the finished test artifacts through the buildspec artifacts section.

contents.en: A company has application code in an AWS CodeConnections compatible Git repository. The company wants to configure unit tests to run when pull requests are opened. The company wants to ensure that the test status is visible in pull requests when the tests are completed. The company wants to save output data files that the tests generate to an Amazon S3 bucket after the tests are finished. Which combination of solutions will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司在 AWS CodeConnections 兼容的 Git 存储库中保存应用程序代码。公司希望在打开拉取请求时运行单元测试。公司希望确保测试完成后，测试状态在拉取请求中可见。公司还希望在测试完成后，将测试生成的输出数据文件保存到 Amazon S3 存储桶。哪组解决方案组合能够满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A software development team is implementing a CI/CD pipeline for its web application. The team is using AWS CodeBuild to compile Java-based source code and to run unit tests. The team needs to store the artifacts that are created by the CodeBuild project. Which solution will meet this requirement?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure the S3 bucket as an artifact output location in the project. Add the artifact locations to the project's buildspec file. Configure an S3 bucket policy that allows the CodeBuild project's resource access role to access the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure the S3 bucket as an artifact output location in the project. Add the artifact locations to the project's buildspec file. Configure an S3 bucket policy that allows the CodeBuild project's resource access role to access the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon S3 存储桶。将该 S3 存储桶配置为项目中的构件输出位置。将构件位置添加到项目的 buildspec 文件中。配置一个 S3 存储桶策略，允许 CodeBuild 项目的资源访问角色访问该 S3 存储桶。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure the S3 bucket as an artifact output location in the project's buildspec file. Add the artifact locations to the project's buildspec file. Configure an S3 bucket policy that allows the CodeBuild service role to access the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure the S3 bucket as an artifact output location in the project's buildspec file. Add the artifact locations to the project's buildspec file. Configure an S3 bucket policy that allows the CodeBuild service role to access the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon S3 存储桶。在项目的 buildspec 文件中将该 S3 存储桶配置为构件输出位置。将构件位置添加到项目的 buildspec 文件中。配置一个 S3 存储桶策略，允许 CodeBuild service role 访问该 S3 存储桶。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system as a file system location for the project. Configure the EFS file system as the artifact output location in the project's buildspec file. Configure a file system policy that allows CodeBuild to access the file system.

contents.en: Configure an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system as a file system location for the project. Configure the EFS file system as the artifact output location in the project's buildspec file. Configure a file system policy that allows CodeBuild to access the file system.
contents.zh: 将 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 文件系统配置为项目的文件系统位置。在项目的 buildspec 文件中将 EFS 文件系统配置为构件输出位置。配置文件系统策略，允许 CodeBuild 访问该文件系统。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume. Configure the EBS volume as the artifact output location in the project's buildspec file. Configure an IAM role that allows CodeBuild to access the volume.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume. Configure the EBS volume as the artifact output location in the project's buildspec file. Configure an IAM role that allows CodeBuild to access the volume.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 卷。在项目的 buildspec 文件中将该 EBS 卷配置为构件输出位置。配置一个 IAM role，允许 CodeBuild 访问该卷。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 B。该选项创建 S3 桶用于保存构建产物，并允许 CodeBuild 服务角色访问该桶；其他基于 EFS 或 EBS 的方案不符合 CodeBuild 产物输出方式。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 B。该选项创建 S3 桶用于保存构建产物，并允许 CodeBuild 服务角色访问该桶；其他基于 EFS 或 EBS 的方案不符合 CodeBuild 产物输出方式。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. The solution uses an S3 bucket for build artifacts and grants the CodeBuild service role access to it; EFS and EBS are not supported as CodeBuild artifact outputs.

contents.en: A software development team is implementing a CI/CD pipeline for its web application. The team is using AWS CodeBuild to compile Java-based source code and to run unit tests. The team needs to store the artifacts that are created by the CodeBuild project. Which solution will meet this requirement?
contents.zh: 一个软件开发团队正在为其 Web 应用程序实施 CI/CD 流水线。该团队使用 AWS CodeBuild 编译基于 Java 的源代码并运行单元测试。该团队需要存储 CodeBuild 项目创建的构件。哪种解决方案能够满足这一要求？

questions.content: A company uses AWS Organizations to manage multiple AWS accounts. The accounts are in an OU that has a policy attached to allow all actions. The company is migrating several Git repositories to a specified AWS CodeConnections supported Git provider. The Git repositories manage AWS CloudFormation stacks for application infrastructure that the company deploys across multiple AWS Regions. The company wants a DevOps team to integrate CodeConnections into the CloudFormation stacks. The DevOps team must ensure that company staff members can integrate only with the specified Git provider. The deployment process must be highly available across Regions. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Add a new SCP statement to the OU that denies the CodeConnections CreatingConnections action where the provider type is not the specified Git provider.

contents.en: Add a new SCP statement to the OU that denies the CodeConnections CreatingConnections action where the provider type is not the specified Git provider.
contents.zh: 向 OU 添加一个新的 SCP 语句，在提供商类型不是指定 Git 提供商时拒绝 CodeConnections CreatingConnections 操作。

options.label: B
options.content: Add a new SCP statement to the OU that allows the CodeConnections CreatingConnections action where the provider type is the specified Git provider.

contents.en: Add a new SCP statement to the OU that allows the CodeConnections CreatingConnections action where the provider type is the specified Git provider.
contents.zh: 向 OU 添加一个新的 SCP 语句，在提供商类型是指定 Git 提供商时允许 CodeConnections CreatingConnections 操作。

options.label: C
options.content: Use CodeConnectlons to configure a single CodeConnections connection to each Git repository.

contents.en: Use CodeConnectlons to configure a single CodeConnections connection to each Git repository.
contents.zh: 使用 CodeConnectlons 为每个 Git 存储库配置单个 CodeConnections 连接。

options.label: D
options.content: Use CodeConnections to create a CodeConnections connection from each Region where the company operates to each Git repository.

contents.en: Use CodeConnections to create a CodeConnections connection from each Region where the company operates to each Git repository.
contents.zh: 使用 CodeConnections，从公司运营的每个 Region 到每个 Git 存储库创建一个 CodeConnections 连接。

options.label: E
options.content: Use CodeConnections to create a CodeConnections repository link. Update each CfoudFormation stack to sync from the Git repository.

contents.en: Use CodeConnections to create a CodeConnections repository link. Update each CfoudFormation stack to sync from the Git repository.
contents.zh: 使用 CodeConnections 创建 CodeConnections 存储库链接。更新每个 CfoudFormation 堆栈，使其从 Git 存储库同步。

options.label: F
options.content: For each Git repository, create a pipeline in AWS CodePipefine that has the Git repository set as the source and a CloudFormation deployment stage.

contents.en: For each Git repository, create a pipeline in AWS CodePipefine that has the Git repository set as the source and a CloudFormation deployment stage.
contents.zh: 对于每个 Git 存储库，在 AWS CodePipefine 中创建一条流水线，将 Git 存储库设为源，并包含一个 CloudFormation 部署阶段。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A、C、E。A 用 SCP 限制只能创建指定 Git provider 类型的 CodeConnections 连接；C 为每个 Git 仓库配置 CodeConnections 连接；E 创建 repository link 并更新 CloudFormation 堆栈从 Git 仓库同步。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A、C、E。A 用 SCP 限制只能创建指定 Git provider 类型的 CodeConnections 连接；C 为每个 Git 仓库配置 CodeConnections 连接；E 创建 repository link 并更新 CloudFormation 堆栈从 Git 仓库同步。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A, C, and E. A enforces the approved Git provider through an SCP, C configures CodeConnections connections to the Git repositories, and E creates a repository link so CloudFormation stacks can sync from Git.

contents.en: A company uses AWS Organizations to manage multiple AWS accounts. The accounts are in an OU that has a policy attached to allow all actions. The company is migrating several Git repositories to a specified AWS CodeConnections supported Git provider. The Git repositories manage AWS CloudFormation stacks for application infrastructure that the company deploys across multiple AWS Regions. The company wants a DevOps team to integrate CodeConnections into the CloudFormation stacks. The DevOps team must ensure that company staff members can integrate only with the specified Git provider. The deployment process must be highly available across Regions. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
