contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations 管理多个 AWS 账户。这些账户位于一个附加了允许所有操作的策略的 OU 中。公司正在将多个 Git 存储库迁移到指定的 AWS CodeConnections 支持的 Git 提供商。这些 Git 存储库管理公司跨多个 AWS Regions 部署的应用程序基础设施的 AWS CloudFormation 堆栈。公司希望 DevOps 团队将 CodeConnections 集成到 CloudFormation 堆栈中。DevOps 团队必须确保公司员工只能与指定的 Git 提供商集成。部署流程必须跨 Regions 高可用。哪组步骤组合能够满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A DevOps engineer updates an AWS CloudFormation stack to add a nested stack that includes several Amazon EC2 instances. When the DevOps engineer attempts to deploy the updated stack, the nested stack fails to deploy. What should the DevOps engineer do to determine the cause of the failure?

options.label: A
options.content: Use the CloudFormation detect root cause capability for the failed stack to analyze the failure and return the event that is the most likely cause for the failure.

contents.en: Use the CloudFormation detect root cause capability for the failed stack to analyze the failure and return the event that is the most likely cause for the failure.
contents.zh: 对失败的堆栈使用 CloudFormation detect root cause 功能来分析失败，并返回最可能导致失败的事件。

options.label: B
options.content: Query failed stacks by specifying the root stack as the ParentId property. Examine the StackStatusReason property for all returned stacks to determine the reason the nested stack failed to deploy.

contents.en: Query failed stacks by specifying the root stack as the ParentId property. Examine the StackStatusReason property for all returned stacks to determine the reason the nested stack failed to deploy.
contents.zh: 通过将根堆栈指定为 ParentId 属性来查询失败的堆栈。检查所有返回堆栈的 StackStatusReason 属性，以确定嵌套堆栈部署失败的原因。

options.label: C
options.content: Activate AWS Systems Manager for the AWS account where the application runs. Use the AWS Systems Manager Automation AWS-SupportTroubleshootCFNCustomResource runbook to determine the reason the nested stack failed to deploy.

contents.en: Activate AWS Systems Manager for the AWS account where the application runs. Use the AWS Systems Manager Automation AWS-SupportTroubleshootCFNCustomResource runbook to determine the reason the nested stack failed to deploy.
contents.zh: 在应用程序运行的 AWS 账户中激活 AWS Systems Manager。使用 AWS Systems Manager Automation AWS-SupportTroubleshootCFNCustomResource runbook 来确定嵌套堆栈部署失败的原因。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure the CloudFormation template to publish logs to Amazon CloudWatch. View the CloudFormation logs for the failed stack in the CloudWatch console to determine the reason the nested stack failed to deploy.

contents.en: Configure the CloudFormation template to publish logs to Amazon CloudWatch. View the CloudFormation logs for the failed stack in the CloudWatch console to determine the reason the nested stack failed to deploy.
contents.zh: 配置 CloudFormation 模板将日志发布到 Amazon CloudWatch。在 CloudWatch 控制台中查看失败堆栈的 CloudFormation 日志，以确定嵌套堆栈部署失败的原因。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 B。通过将根堆栈指定为 ParentId 查询失败的嵌套堆栈，并查看返回堆栈的 StackStatusReason，可定位嵌套堆栈部署失败原因。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 B。通过将根堆栈指定为 ParentId 查询失败的嵌套堆栈，并查看返回堆栈的 StackStatusReason，可定位嵌套堆栈部署失败原因。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. Querying failed stacks with the root stack as ParentId and reviewing StackStatusReason for the returned stacks identifies why the nested stack failed to deploy.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer updates an AWS CloudFormation stack to add a nested stack that includes several Amazon EC2 instances. When the DevOps engineer attempts to deploy the updated stack, the nested stack fails to deploy. What should the DevOps engineer do to determine the cause of the failure?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师更新 AWS CloudFormation 堆栈，以添加一个包含多个 Amazon EC2 实例的嵌套堆栈。当 DevOps 工程师尝试部署更新后的堆栈时，嵌套堆栈部署失败。DevOps 工程师应该做什么来确定失败原因？

questions.content: A DevOps team operates an integration service that runs on an Amazon EC2 instance. The DevOps team uses Amazon Route 53 to manage the integration service's domain name by using a simple routing record. The integration service is stateful and uses Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) for data storage and state storage. The integration service does not support load balancing between multiple nodes. The DevOps team deploys the integration service on a new EC2 instance as a warm standby to reduce the mean time to recovery. The DevOps team wants the integration service to automatically fail over to the standby EC2 instance. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Update the existing Route 53 DNS record's routing policy to weighted. Set the existing DNS record's weighting to 100. For the same domain, add a new DNS record that points to the standby EC2 instance. Set the new DNS record's weighting to 0. Associate an application health check with each record.

contents.en: Update the existing Route 53 DNS record's routing policy to weighted. Set the existing DNS record's weighting to 100. For the same domain, add a new DNS record that points to the standby EC2 instance. Set the new DNS record's weighting to 0. Associate an application health check with each record.
contents.zh: 将现有 Route 53 DNS 记录的路由策略更新为加权。将现有 DNS 记录的权重设置为 100。为同一域添加一条指向备用 EC2 实例的新 DNS 记录。将新 DNS 记录的权重设置为 0。为每条记录关联应用程序运行状况检查。

options.label: B
options.content: Update the existing Route 53 DNS record's routing policy to weighted. Set the existing DNS record's weighting to 99. For the same domain, add a new DNS record that points to the standby EC2 instance. Set the new DNS record's weighting to 1. Associate an application health check with each record.

contents.en: Update the existing Route 53 DNS record's routing policy to weighted. Set the existing DNS record's weighting to 99. For the same domain, add a new DNS record that points to the standby EC2 instance. Set the new DNS record's weighting to 1. Associate an application health check with each record.
contents.zh: 将现有 Route 53 DNS 记录的路由策略更新为加权。将现有 DNS 记录的权重设置为 99。为同一域添加一条指向备用 EC2 实例的新 DNS 记录。将新 DNS 记录的权重设置为 1。为每条记录关联应用程序运行状况检查。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Update the existing Route 53 record to point to the ALB. Create a target group for each EC2 instance. Configure an application health check on each target group. Associate both target groups with the same ALB listener. Set the primary target group's weighting to 100. Set the standby target group's weighting to 0.

contents.en: Create an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Update the existing Route 53 record to point to the ALB. Create a target group for each EC2 instance. Configure an application health check on each target group. Associate both target groups with the same ALB listener. Set the primary target group's weighting to 100. Set the standby target group's weighting to 0.
contents.zh: 创建 Application Load Balancer (ALB)。更新现有 Route 53 记录，使其指向 ALB。为每个 EC2 实例创建目标组。在每个目标组上配置应用程序运行状况检查。将两个目标组与同一个 ALB 侦听器关联。将主目标组的权重设置为 100。将备用目标组的权重设置为 0。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Update the existing Route 53 record to point to the ALB. Create a target group for each EC2 instance. Configure an application health check on each target group. Associate both target groups with the same ALB listener. Set the primary target group's weighting to 99. Set the standby target group's weighting to 1.

contents.en: Create an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Update the existing Route 53 record to point to the ALB. Create a target group for each EC2 instance. Configure an application health check on each target group. Associate both target groups with the same ALB listener. Set the primary target group's weighting to 99. Set the standby target group's weighting to 1.
contents.zh: 创建 Application Load Balancer (ALB)。更新现有 Route 53 记录，使其指向 ALB。为每个 EC2 实例创建目标组。在每个目标组上配置应用程序运行状况检查。将两个目标组与同一个 ALB 侦听器关联。将主目标组的权重设置为 99。将备用目标组的权重设置为 1。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A。应用是有状态的且不支持多节点负载均衡，因此 Route 53 加权路由配合健康检查更合适；主记录权重 100、备用记录权重 0，正常时只走主实例，主实例健康检查失败时切到备用实例。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A。应用是有状态的且不支持多节点负载均衡，因此 Route 53 加权路由配合健康检查更合适；主记录权重 100、备用记录权重 0，正常时只走主实例，主实例健康检查失败时切到备用实例。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. Because the stateful application cannot be load balanced across nodes, Route 53 weighted records with health checks work: weight 100 sends normal traffic to the primary, and weight 0 keeps the standby unused until primary health fails.

contents.en: A DevOps team operates an integration service that runs on an Amazon EC2 instance. The DevOps team uses Amazon Route 53 to manage the integration service's domain name by using a simple routing record. The integration service is stateful and uses Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) for data storage and state storage. The integration service does not support load balancing between multiple nodes. The DevOps team deploys the integration service on a new EC2 instance as a warm standby to reduce the mean time to recovery. The DevOps team wants the integration service to automatically fail over to the standby EC2 instance. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一个 DevOps 团队运营一项运行在 Amazon EC2 实例上的集成服务。DevOps 团队使用 Amazon Route 53 通过简单路由记录管理该集成服务的域名。该集成服务是有状态的，并使用 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 进行数据存储和状态存储。该集成服务不支持在多个节点之间进行负载均衡。DevOps 团队在新的 EC2 实例上将该集成服务部署为温备用，以降低平均恢复时间。DevOps 团队希望该集成服务自动故障转移到备用 EC2 实例。哪种解决方案能够满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company hosts several applications in an AWS account. Each application sends logs to its own log group in Amazon CloudWatch. The company's CloudWatch costs for ingestion are increasing. A DevOps engineer needs to identify which applications are the source of the increased logging costs. Which solution will meet this requirement in the MOST operationally efficient way?

options.label: A
options.content: Use CloudWatch metrics to create a custom expression that identifies the CloudWatch log groups that receive the most data.

contents.en: Use CloudWatch metrics to create a custom expression that identifies the CloudWatch log groups that receive the most data.
contents.zh: 使用 CloudWatch 指标创建一个自定义表达式，以识别接收数据最多的 CloudWatch 日志组。

options.label: B
options.content: Use Amazon CloudWatch Logs Insights to create a query for the application log groups to identify the number of log groups that received data during a specific time period.

contents.en: Use Amazon CloudWatch Logs Insights to create a query for the application log groups to identify the number of log groups that received data during a specific time period.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon CloudWatch Logs Insights 为应用程序日志组创建查询，以识别在特定时间段内接收了数据的日志组数量。

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS Cost Explorer to generate a cost report that details costs for CloudWatch usage.

contents.en: Use AWS Cost Explorer to generate a cost report that details costs for CloudWatch usage.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Cost Explorer 生成一份成本报告，详细列出 CloudWatch 使用成本。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS CloudTrail to filter for CreateLogStream events for each application.

contents.en: Use AWS CloudTrail to filter for CreateLogStream events for each application.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CloudTrail 筛选每个应用程序的 CreateLogStream 事件。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A。使用 CloudWatch metrics 创建自定义表达式可识别接收数据最多的 CloudWatch log groups，从而找出日志摄入量最大的来源。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A。使用 CloudWatch metrics 创建自定义表达式可识别接收数据最多的 CloudWatch log groups，从而找出日志摄入量最大的来源。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. A custom expression based on CloudWatch metrics can identify the CloudWatch log groups receiving the most data, which points to the largest ingestion sources.

contents.en: A company hosts several applications in an AWS account. Each application sends logs to its own log group in Amazon CloudWatch. The company's CloudWatch costs for ingestion are increasing. A DevOps engineer needs to identify which applications are the source of the increased logging costs. Which solution will meet this requirement in the MOST operationally efficient way?
contents.zh: 一家公司在一个 AWS 账户中托管了多个应用程序。每个应用程序都会将日志发送到 Amazon CloudWatch 中自己的日志组。公司的 CloudWatch 摄取成本正在增加。DevOps 工程师需要确定哪些应用程序是日志成本增加的来源。哪种解决方案能够以最高的运营效率满足这一要求？

questions.content: A company has an AWS account named PipelineAccount. The account manages a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline. The account uses an IAM role named CodePipeline_Service_Role and produces an artifact that is stored in an Amazon S3 bucket. The company uses a customer managed AWS KMS key to encrypt objects in the S3 bucket. A DevOps engineer wants to configure the pipeline to use an AWS CodeDeploy application in an AWS account named CodeDeployAccount to deploy the produced artifact. The DevOps engineer updates the KMS key policy to grant the CodeDeployAccount account permission to use the key. The DevOps engineer configures an IAM role named DevOps_Role in the CodeDeployAccount account that has access to the CodeDeploy resources that the pipeline requires. The DevOps engineer updates an Amazon EC2 instance role that operates within the CodeDeployAccount account to allow access to the S3 bucket and the KMS key that is in the PipelineAccount account. Which additional steps will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Update the S3 bucket policy to grant the CodeDeployAccount account access to the S3 bucket. Configure the DevOps_Role IAM role to have an IAM trust policy that allows the PipelineAccount account to assume the role. Update the CodePipeline_Service_Role IAM role to grant permission to assume the DevOps_Role role.

contents.en: Update the S3 bucket policy to grant the CodeDeployAccount account access to the S3 bucket. Configure the DevOps_Role IAM role to have an IAM trust policy that allows the PipelineAccount account to assume the role. Update the CodePipeline_Service_Role IAM role to grant permission to assume the DevOps_Role role.
contents.zh: 更新 S3 存储桶策略，授予 CodeDeployAccount 账户访问 S3 存储桶的权限。配置 DevOps_Role IAM role，使其具有允许 PipelineAccount 账户代入该角色的 IAM trust policy。更新 CodePipeline_Service_Role IAM role，授予其代入 DevOps_Role 角色的权限。

options.label: B
options.content: Update the S3 bucket policy to grant the CodeDeployAccount account access to the S3 bucket. Configure the DevOps_Role IAM role to have an IAM trust policy that allows the PipelineAccount account to assume the role. Update the DevOps_Role IAM role to grant permission to assume CodePipelfne_Service_Role role.

contents.en: Update the S3 bucket policy to grant the CodeDeployAccount account access to the S3 bucket. Configure the DevOps_Role IAM role to have an IAM trust policy that allows the PipelineAccount account to assume the role. Update the DevOps_Role IAM role to grant permission to assume CodePipelfne_Service_Role role.
contents.zh: 更新 S3 存储桶策略，授予 CodeDeployAccount 账户访问 S3 存储桶的权限。配置 DevOps_Role IAM role，使其具有允许 PipelineAccount 账户代入该角色的 IAM trust policy。更新 DevOps_Role IAM role，授予其代入 CodePipelfne_Service_Role 角色的权限。

options.label: C
options.content: Update the S3 bucket policy to grant the PipelineAccount account access to the S3 bucket. Configure the DevOps_Role IAM role to have an IAM trust policy that allows the PipelineAccount account to assume the role. Update the CodePipeline_Service_Role IAM to grant permission to assume the DevOps_Role role.

contents.en: Update the S3 bucket policy to grant the PipelineAccount account access to the S3 bucket. Configure the DevOps_Role IAM role to have an IAM trust policy that allows the PipelineAccount account to assume the role. Update the CodePipeline_Service_Role IAM to grant permission to assume the DevOps_Role role.
contents.zh: 更新 S3 存储桶策略，授予 PipelineAccount 账户访问 S3 存储桶的权限。配置 DevOps_Role IAM role，使其具有允许 PipelineAccount 账户代入该角色的 IAM trust policy。更新 CodePipeline_Service_Role IAM，授予其代入 DevOps_Role 角色的权限。

options.label: D
options.content: Update the S3 bucket policy to grant the CodeDeployAccount account access to the S3 bucket. Configure the DevOps_Role IAM role to have an IAM trust policy that allows the CodeDeployAccount account to assume the role. Update the CodePipeline_Service_Role IAM role to grant permission to assume the DevOps_Role role.

contents.en: Update the S3 bucket policy to grant the CodeDeployAccount account access to the S3 bucket. Configure the DevOps_Role IAM role to have an IAM trust policy that allows the CodeDeployAccount account to assume the role. Update the CodePipeline_Service_Role IAM role to grant permission to assume the DevOps_Role role.
contents.zh: 更新 S3 存储桶策略，授予 CodeDeployAccount 账户访问 S3 存储桶的权限。配置 DevOps_Role IAM role，使其具有允许 CodeDeployAccount 账户代入该角色的 IAM trust policy。更新 CodePipeline_Service_Role IAM role，授予其代入 DevOps_Role 角色的权限。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A。跨账户部署需要 S3 桶策略授予 CodeDeployAccount 访问权限，DevOps_Role 信任 PipelineAccount 可承担该角色，并让 CodePipeline_Service_Role 具备 assume DevOps_Role 的权限。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A。跨账户部署需要 S3 桶策略授予 CodeDeployAccount 访问权限，DevOps_Role 信任 PipelineAccount 可承担该角色，并让 CodePipeline_Service_Role 具备 assume DevOps_Role 的权限。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. Cross-account deployment requires the S3 bucket policy to allow CodeDeployAccount access, the DevOps_Role trust policy to allow PipelineAccount to assume it, and the CodePipeline_Service_Role to have permission to assume DevOps_Role.

contents.en: A company has an AWS account named PipelineAccount. The account manages a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline. The account uses an IAM role named CodePipeline_Service_Role and produces an artifact that is stored in an Amazon S3 bucket. The company uses a customer managed AWS KMS key to encrypt objects in the S3 bucket. A DevOps engineer wants to configure the pipeline to use an AWS CodeDeploy application in an AWS account named CodeDeployAccount to deploy the produced artifact. The DevOps engineer updates the KMS key policy to grant the CodeDeployAccount account permission to use the key. The DevOps engineer configures an IAM role named DevOps_Role in the CodeDeployAccount account that has access to the CodeDeploy resources that the pipeline requires. The DevOps engineer updates an Amazon EC2 instance role that operates within the CodeDeployAccount account to allow access to the S3 bucket and the KMS key that is in the PipelineAccount account. Which additional steps will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个名为 PipelineAccount 的 AWS 账户。该账户在 AWS CodePipeline 中管理一条流水线。该账户使用名为 CodePipeline_Service_Role 的 IAM role，并生成一个存储在 Amazon S3 存储桶中的构件。公司使用客户托管的 AWS KMS key 加密 S3 存储桶中的对象。DevOps 工程师希望配置该流水线，使用名为 CodeDeployAccount 的 AWS 账户中的 AWS CodeDeploy 应用程序来部署生成的构件。DevOps 工程师更新 KMS key policy，授予 CodeDeployAccount 账户使用该密钥的权限。DevOps 工程师在 CodeDeployAccount 账户中配置了一个名为 DevOps_Role 的 IAM role，该角色可以访问流水线所需的 CodeDeploy 资源。DevOps 工程师更新了在 CodeDeployAccount 账户中运行的 Amazon EC2 实例角色，以允许访问 PipelineAccount 账户中的 S3 存储桶和 KMS key。还需要哪些额外步骤才能满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has multiple development teams in separate business units that work in a single shared AWS account. All Amazon EC2 resources that users create in the account must include tags that specify which user created the resources. The tagging must occur within the first hour of resource creation. A DevOps engineer needs to add tags to new resources that include the ID of the user that created the resource and the appropriate cost center ID. The DevOps engineer configures an AWS Lambda function to use the cost center mappings to tag the resources. The DevOps engineer also sets up AWS CloudTrail in the shared AWS account. An Amazon S3 bucket stores the CloudTrail event logs. Which solution will meet the tagging requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an S3 event notification on the S3 bucket to invoke the Lambda function for s3:ObjectTagging:Put events. Enable bucket versioning on the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create an S3 event notification on the S3 bucket to invoke the Lambda function for s3:ObjectTagging:Put events. Enable bucket versioning on the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 在 S3 存储桶上创建 S3 事件通知，针对 s3:ObjectTagging:Put 事件调用 Lambda 函数。在 S3 存储桶上启用版本控制。

options.label: B
options.content: Enable server access logging on the S3 bucket. Create an S3 event notification on the S3 bucket for s3:ObjectTagging:* events.

contents.en: Enable server access logging on the S3 bucket. Create an S3 event notification on the S3 bucket for s3:ObjectTagging:* events.
contents.zh: 在 S3 存储桶上启用服务器访问日志记录。为 s3:ObjectTagging:* 事件在 S3 存储桶上创建 S3 事件通知。

options.label: C
options.content: Enable AWS Config in the account. Configure the required-tags AWS managed rule to check and update the required tags.

contents.en: Enable AWS Config in the account. Configure the required-tags AWS managed rule to check and update the required tags.
contents.zh: 在该账户中启用 AWS Config。配置 required-tags AWS 托管规则以检查并更新所需标签。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that uses Amazon EC2 as the event source. Configure the rule to match events that CloudTrail delivers. Configure the rule to target the Lambda function.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that uses Amazon EC2 as the event source. Configure the rule to match events that CloudTrail delivers. Configure the rule to target the Lambda function.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，将 Amazon EC2 用作事件源。配置该规则以匹配 CloudTrail 传递的事件。配置该规则以 Lambda 函数为目标。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 D。EventBridge 规则可使用 Amazon EC2 作为事件源，匹配 CloudTrail 交付的 EC2 事件，并将匹配事件发送到 Lambda 函数处理。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 D。EventBridge 规则可使用 Amazon EC2 作为事件源，匹配 CloudTrail 交付的 EC2 事件，并将匹配事件发送到 Lambda 函数处理。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. An EventBridge rule can use Amazon EC2 as the event source, match events delivered by CloudTrail, and target the Lambda function.

contents.en: A company has multiple development teams in separate business units that work in a single shared AWS account. All Amazon EC2 resources that users create in the account must include tags that specify which user created the resources. The tagging must occur within the first hour of resource creation. A DevOps engineer needs to add tags to new resources that include the ID of the user that created the resource and the appropriate cost center ID. The DevOps engineer configures an AWS Lambda function to use the cost center mappings to tag the resources. The DevOps engineer also sets up AWS CloudTrail in the shared AWS account. An Amazon S3 bucket stores the CloudTrail event logs. Which solution will meet the tagging requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司有多个开发团队，分属不同业务部门，但在同一个共享 AWS 账户中工作。用户在该账户中创建的所有 Amazon EC2 资源都必须包含用于标明资源创建者的标签。标记必须在资源创建后的第一小时内完成。DevOps 工程师需要向新资源添加标签，其中包括创建该资源的用户 ID 和相应的成本中心 ID。DevOps 工程师配置了一个 AWS Lambda 函数，使用成本中心映射来标记资源。DevOps 工程师还在共享 AWS 账户中设置了 AWS CloudTrail。一个 Amazon S3 存储桶存储 CloudTrail 事件日志。哪种解决方案能够满足标记要求？

questions.content: A company is developing code and wants to use semantic versioning. The company's DevOps team needs to create a pipeline for compiling the code. The team also needs to manage versions of the compiled code. If the code uses any open source libraries, the libraries must also be cached in the build process. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS CodeArtifact repository and associate the upstream repositories. Create an AWS CodeBuild project that builds the semantic version of the code artifacts. Configure the project to authenticate and connect to the CodeArtifact repository and publish the artifact to the repository.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodeArtifact repository and associate the upstream repositories. Create an AWS CodeBuild project that builds the semantic version of the code artifacts. Configure the project to authenticate and connect to the CodeArtifact repository and publish the artifact to the repository.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CodeArtifact 存储库并关联上游存储库。创建一个 AWS CodeBuild 项目，用于构建代码构件的语义化版本。配置该项目进行身份验证并连接到 CodeArtifact 存储库，然后将构件发布到该存储库。

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS CodeDeploy to upload the generated semantic version of the artifact to an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system.

contents.en: Use AWS CodeDeploy to upload the generated semantic version of the artifact to an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CodeDeploy 将生成的构件语义化版本上传到 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 文件系统。

options.label: C
options.content: Use an AWS CodeBuild project to build the code and to publish the generated semantic version of the artifact to AWS Artifact. Configure build caching in the CodeBuild project.

contents.en: Use an AWS CodeBuild project to build the code and to publish the generated semantic version of the artifact to AWS Artifact. Configure build caching in the CodeBuild project.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CodeBuild 项目构建代码，并将生成的构件语义化版本发布到 AWS Artifact。在 CodeBuild 项目中配置构建缓存。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a new AWS CodeArtifact repository. Create an AWS Lambda function that pulls open source packages from the internet and publishes the packages to the repository. Configure AWS CodeDeploy to build semantic versions of the code and publish the versions to the repository.

contents.en: Create a new AWS CodeArtifact repository. Create an AWS Lambda function that pulls open source packages from the internet and publishes the packages to the repository. Configure AWS CodeDeploy to build semantic versions of the code and publish the versions to the repository.
contents.zh: 创建一个新的 AWS CodeArtifact 存储库。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，从互联网拉取开源软件包并将这些软件包发布到该存储库。配置 AWS CodeDeploy 构建代码的语义化版本并将这些版本发布到该存储库。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 A。CodeArtifact 仓库关联上游仓库后可作为制品发布目标；CodeBuild 构建语义版本制品，认证并连接到 CodeArtifact，然后将制品发布到该仓库。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 A。CodeArtifact 仓库关联上游仓库后可作为制品发布目标；CodeBuild 构建语义版本制品，认证并连接到 CodeArtifact，然后将制品发布到该仓库。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. CodeArtifact with upstream repositories provides the package repository, and CodeBuild builds the semantic versioned artifact, authenticates to CodeArtifact, and publishes it there.

contents.en: A company is developing code and wants to use semantic versioning. The company's DevOps team needs to create a pipeline for compiling the code. The team also needs to manage versions of the compiled code. If the code uses any open source libraries, the libraries must also be cached in the build process. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在开发代码，并希望使用语义化版本控制。公司的 DevOps 团队需要创建一条用于编译代码的流水线。该团队还需要管理已编译代码的版本。如果代码使用任何开源库，这些库也必须在构建过程中被缓存。哪种解决方案能够满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline to deploy an application. The company created an AWS Fault Injection Service (AWS FIS) experiment template to test the resiliency of the application. A DevOps engineer needs to integrate the experiment into the pipeline. Which solution will meet this requirement?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure a new stage in the pipeline that includes an AWS FIS action. Configure the action to reference the AWS FIS experiment template. Grant the pipeline access to start the experiment.

contents.en: Configure a new stage in the pipeline that includes an AWS FIS action. Configure the action to reference the AWS FIS experiment template. Grant the pipeline access to start the experiment.
contents.zh: 在流水线中配置一个包含 AWS FIS 操作的新阶段。配置该操作引用 AWS FIS 实验模板。授予流水线启动实验的访问权限。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon EventBridge scheduler. Grant the scheduler permission to start the AWS FIS experiment. Configure a new stage in the pipeline that includes an action to invoke the EventBridge scheduler.

contents.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge scheduler. Grant the scheduler permission to start the AWS FIS experiment. Configure a new stage in the pipeline that includes an action to invoke the EventBridge scheduler.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon EventBridge scheduler。授予该 scheduler 启动 AWS FIS 实验的权限。在流水线中配置一个新阶段，其中包含调用 EventBridge scheduler 的操作。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function to start the AWS FIS experiment. Grant the Lambda function permission to start the experiment. Create a new stage in the pipeline that has a Lambda action. Set the action to invoke the Lambda function.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function to start the AWS FIS experiment. Grant the Lambda function permission to start the experiment. Create a new stage in the pipeline that has a Lambda action. Set the action to invoke the Lambda function.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数来启动 AWS FIS 实验。授予 Lambda 函数启动实验的权限。在流水线中创建一个具有 Lambda 操作的新阶段。将该操作设置为调用 Lambda 函数。

options.label: D
options.content: Export the AWS FIS experiment template to an Amazon S3 bucket. Create an AWS CodeBuild unit test project that has a buildspec that starts the AWS FIS experiment. Grant the CodeBuild project access to start the experiment. Configure a new stage in the pipeline that includes an action to run the CodeBuild unit test project.

contents.en: Export the AWS FIS experiment template to an Amazon S3 bucket. Create an AWS CodeBuild unit test project that has a buildspec that starts the AWS FIS experiment. Grant the CodeBuild project access to start the experiment. Configure a new stage in the pipeline that includes an action to run the CodeBuild unit test project.
contents.zh: 将 AWS FIS 实验模板导出到 Amazon S3 存储桶。创建一个 AWS CodeBuild 单元测试项目，该项目具有会启动 AWS FIS 实验的 buildspec。授予 CodeBuild 项目启动实验的访问权限。在流水线中配置一个新阶段，其中包含运行 CodeBuild 单元测试项目的操作。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 C。通过 Lambda 函数启动 AWS FIS 实验，并授予其启动实验的权限；在流水线中新增 Lambda action 调用该函数，即可把故障注入实验纳入部署流程。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 C。通过 Lambda 函数启动 AWS FIS 实验，并授予其启动实验的权限；在流水线中新增 Lambda action 调用该函数，即可把故障注入实验纳入部署流程。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. A Lambda function with permission to start the AWS FIS experiment can be invoked from a new pipeline stage through a Lambda action.

contents.en: A company uses a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline to deploy an application. The company created an AWS Fault Injection Service (AWS FIS) experiment template to test the resiliency of the application. A DevOps engineer needs to integrate the experiment into the pipeline. Which solution will meet this requirement?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS CodePipeline 中的流水线部署应用程序。公司创建了一个 AWS Fault Injection Service (AWS FIS) 实验模板，用于测试应用程序的韧性。DevOps 工程师需要将该实验集成到流水线中。哪种解决方案能够满足这一要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is creating a CI/CD pipeline to build container images. The engineer needs to store container images in Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) and scan the images for common vulnerabilities. The CI/CD pipeline must be resilient to outages in upstream source container image repositories. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an ECR private repository in the private registry to store the container images and scan images when images are pushed to the repository. Configure a replication rule in the private registry to replicate images from upstream repositories.

contents.en: Create an ECR private repository in the private registry to store the container images and scan images when images are pushed to the repository. Configure a replication rule in the private registry to replicate images from upstream repositories.
contents.zh: 在私有注册表中创建一个 ECR 私有存储库来存储容器镜像，并在镜像推送到该存储库时扫描镜像。在私有注册表中配置复制规则，从上游存储库复制镜像。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an ECR public repository in the public registry to cache images from upstream source repositories. Create an ECR private repository to store images. Configure the private repository to scan images when images are pushed to the repository.

contents.en: Create an ECR public repository in the public registry to cache images from upstream source repositories. Create an ECR private repository to store images. Configure the private repository to scan images when images are pushed to the repository.
contents.zh: 在公共注册表中创建一个 ECR 公共存储库，用于缓存来自上游源存储库的镜像。创建一个 ECR 私有存储库来存储镜像。配置私有存储库在镜像推送到该存储库时扫描镜像。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an ECR public repository in the public registry. Configure a pull through cache rule for the repository. Create an ECR private repository to store images. Configure the ECR private registry to perform basic scanning.

contents.en: Create an ECR public repository in the public registry. Configure a pull through cache rule for the repository. Create an ECR private repository to store images. Configure the ECR private registry to perform basic scanning.
contents.zh: 在公共注册表中创建一个 ECR 公共存储库。为该存储库配置拉取缓存规则。创建一个 ECR 私有存储库来存储镜像。配置 ECR 私有注册表执行基本扫描。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an ECR private repository in the private registry to store the container images. Enable basic scanning for the private registry, and create a pull through cache rule.

contents.en: Create an ECR private repository in the private registry to store the container images. Enable basic scanning for the private registry, and create a pull through cache rule.
contents.zh: 在私有注册表中创建一个 ECR 私有存储库来存储容器镜像。为私有注册表启用基本扫描，并创建拉取缓存规则。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 D。ECR 私有仓库可保存构建镜像和上游镜像；启用 basic scanning 可扫描常见漏洞，pull through cache rule 可缓存公共上游仓库镜像，在上游不可用时仍能从本地缓存拉取。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 D。ECR 私有仓库可保存构建镜像和上游镜像；启用 basic scanning 可扫描常见漏洞，pull through cache rule 可缓存公共上游仓库镜像，在上游不可用时仍能从本地缓存拉取。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. An ECR private repository stores the images, basic scanning checks for common vulnerabilities, and a pull-through cache rule caches upstream public images so cached copies remain available if the upstream is unavailable.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer is creating a CI/CD pipeline to build container images. The engineer needs to store container images in Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) and scan the images for common vulnerabilities. The CI/CD pipeline must be resilient to outages in upstream source container image repositories. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师正在创建一条 CI/CD 流水线来构建容器镜像。工程师需要将容器镜像存储在 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) 中，并扫描镜像中的常见漏洞。CI/CD 流水线必须能够抵御上游源容器镜像存储库的中断。哪种解决方案能够满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company is running its ecommerce website on AWS. The website is currently hosted on a single Amazon EC2 instance in one Availability Zone. A MySQL database runs on the same EC2 instance. The company needs to eliminate single points of failure in the architecture to improve the website's availability and resilience. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST configuration changes to the website?

options.label: A
options.content: Deploy the application by using AWS Fargate containers. Migrate the database to Amazon DynamoDB. Use Amazon API Gateway to route requests.

contents.en: Deploy the application by using AWS Fargate containers. Migrate the database to Amazon DynamoDB. Use Amazon API Gateway to route requests.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Fargate 容器部署应用程序。将数据库迁移到 Amazon DynamoDB。使用 Amazon API Gateway 路由请求。

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy the application on EC2 instances across multiple Availability Zones. Put the EC2 instances into an Auto Scaling group behind an Application Load Balancer. Migrate the database to Amazon Aurora Multi-AZ. Use Amazon CloudFront for content delivery.

contents.en: Deploy the application on EC2 instances across multiple Availability Zones. Put the EC2 instances into an Auto Scaling group behind an Application Load Balancer. Migrate the database to Amazon Aurora Multi-AZ. Use Amazon CloudFront for content delivery.
contents.zh: 在跨多个 Availability Zones 的 EC2 实例上部署应用程序。将 EC2 实例放入 Application Load Balancer 后面的 Auto Scaling 组。将数据库迁移到 Amazon Aurora Multi-AZ。使用 Amazon CloudFront 进行内容分发。

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS Elastic Beanstalk to deploy the application across multiple AWS Regions. Migrate the database to Amazon Redshift. Use Amazon ElastiCache for session management.

contents.en: Use AWS Elastic Beanstalk to deploy the application across multiple AWS Regions. Migrate the database to Amazon Redshift. Use Amazon ElastiCache for session management.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Elastic Beanstalk 跨多个 AWS Regions 部署应用程序。将数据库迁移到 Amazon Redshift。使用 Amazon ElastiCache 进行会话管理。

options.label: D
options.content: Migrate the application to AWS Lambda functions. Use Amazon S3 for static content hosting. Migrate the database to Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility).

contents.en: Migrate the application to AWS Lambda functions. Use Amazon S3 for static content hosting. Migrate the database to Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility).
contents.zh: 将应用程序迁移到 AWS Lambda 函数。使用 Amazon S3 托管静态内容。将数据库迁移到 Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility)。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 B。将应用部署到跨多个可用区的 EC2 Auto Scaling 组并置于 ALB 后，可提升应用层可用性；迁移到 Aurora Multi-AZ 提升数据库可用性，CloudFront 用于内容分发。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 B。将应用部署到跨多个可用区的 EC2 Auto Scaling 组并置于 ALB 后，可提升应用层可用性；迁移到 Aurora Multi-AZ 提升数据库可用性，CloudFront 用于内容分发。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group across multiple Availability Zones behind an ALB improve application availability, Aurora Multi-AZ improves database availability, and CloudFront handles content delivery.

contents.en: A company is running its ecommerce website on AWS. The website is currently hosted on a single Amazon EC2 instance in one Availability Zone. A MySQL database runs on the same EC2 instance. The company needs to eliminate single points of failure in the architecture to improve the website's availability and resilience. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST configuration changes to the website?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 上运行其电子商务网站。该网站目前托管在一个 Availability Zone 中的单个 Amazon EC2 实例上。MySQL 数据库运行在同一个 EC2 实例上。公司需要消除架构中的单点故障，以提高网站的可用性和韧性。哪种解决方案能够以最少的网站配置更改满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company is developing a microservices-based application on AWS. The application consists of AWS Lambda functions and Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) services that need to be deployed frequently. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a consistent deployment solution across all components of the application. The solution must automate the deployments, minimize downtime during updates, and manage configuration data for the application. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST development effort?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation to define and provision the Lambda functions and ECS services. Implement stack updates with resource replacement for all components. Use AWS Secrets Manager to manage the configuration data.

contents.en: Use AWS CloudFormation to define and provision the Lambda functions and ECS services. Implement stack updates with resource replacement for all components. Use AWS Secrets Manager to manage the configuration data.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CloudFormation 定义和预置 Lambda 函数及 ECS 服务。对所有组件实施会进行资源替换的堆栈更新。使用 AWS Secrets Manager 管理配置数据。

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS CodeDeploy to manage deployments for the Lambda functions and ECS services. Implement canary deployments for the Lambda functions. Implement blue/green deployments for the ECS services. Use AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store to manage the configuration data.

contents.en: Use AWS CodeDeploy to manage deployments for the Lambda functions and ECS services. Implement canary deployments for the Lambda functions. Implement blue/green deployments for the ECS services. Use AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store to manage the configuration data.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CodeDeploy 管理 Lambda 函数和 ECS 服务的部署。对 Lambda 函数实施金丝雀部署。对 ECS 服务实施蓝/绿部署。使用 AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store 管理配置数据。

options.label: C
options.content: Use AWS Step Functions to orchestrate deployments for the Lambda functions and ECS services. Use canary deployments for the Lambda functions and ECS services in a different AWS Region. Use AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store to manage the configuration data.

contents.en: Use AWS Step Functions to orchestrate deployments for the Lambda functions and ECS services. Use canary deployments for the Lambda functions and ECS services in a different AWS Region. Use AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store to manage the configuration data.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Step Functions 编排 Lambda 函数和 ECS 服务的部署。对位于不同 AWS Region 中的 Lambda 函数和 ECS 服务使用金丝雀部署。使用 AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store 管理配置数据。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS Systems Manager to manage deployments for the Lambda functions and ECS services. Implement all-at-once deployments for the Lambda functions. Implement rolling updates for the ECS services. Use AWS Secrets Manager to manage the configuration data.

contents.en: Use AWS Systems Manager to manage deployments for the Lambda functions and ECS services. Implement all-at-once deployments for the Lambda functions. Implement rolling updates for the ECS services. Use AWS Secrets Manager to manage the configuration data.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Systems Manager 管理 Lambda 函数和 ECS 服务的部署。对 Lambda 函数实施一次性全部部署。对 ECS 服务实施滚动更新。使用 AWS Secrets Manager 管理配置数据。

questions.explanation: 正确答案为 B。CodeDeploy 可统一管理 Lambda 函数和 ECS 服务部署；Lambda 使用金丝雀部署、ECS 使用蓝绿部署，并用 Systems Manager Parameter Store 管理配置数据。

explanations.zh: 正确答案为 B。CodeDeploy 可统一管理 Lambda 函数和 ECS 服务部署；Lambda 使用金丝雀部署、ECS 使用蓝绿部署，并用 Systems Manager Parameter Store 管理配置数据。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. CodeDeploy manages deployments for both Lambda functions and ECS services, with canary deployments for Lambda, blue/green deployments for ECS, and Systems Manager Parameter Store for configuration data.

contents.en: A company is developing a microservices-based application on AWS. The application consists of AWS Lambda functions and Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) services that need to be deployed frequently. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a consistent deployment solution across all components of the application. The solution must automate the deployments, minimize downtime during updates, and manage configuration data for the application. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST development effort?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在 AWS 上开发基于微服务的应用程序。该应用程序由需要频繁部署的 AWS Lambda 函数和 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 服务组成。DevOps 工程师需要在应用程序的所有组件中实施一致的部署解决方案。该解决方案必须自动化部署，在更新期间尽量减少停机时间，并管理应用程序的配置数据。哪种解决方案能够以最少的开发工作量满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company is implementing a CI/CD pipeline for an application by using AWS CodePipeline and AWS CodeBuild. The company needs a solution to run unit tests and automatically generate code coverage reports before any code is deployed to production. The CI/CD pipeline execution must fail if the code coverage is less than 80%. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS Lambda function to run unit tests and generate code coverage reports. Add a Lambda invoke action to a stage in the CodePipeline pipeline. Create an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule to run hourly to monitor the Lambda function's output. Configure the rule to fail the pipeline if coverage is less than 80%.

contents.en: Create an AWS Lambda function to run unit tests and generate code coverage reports. Add a Lambda invoke action to a stage in the CodePipeline pipeline. Create an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule to run hourly to monitor the Lambda function's output. Configure the rule to fail the pipeline if coverage is less than 80%.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数来运行单元测试并生成代码覆盖率报告。在 CodePipeline 流水线的某个阶段添加 Lambda 调用操作。创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 计划规则，每小时运行以监控 Lambda 函数的输出。配置该规则在覆盖率低于 80% 时使流水线失败。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS Step Functions workflow to run unit tests and generate code coverage reports. Add a Step Functions test action to a stage in the CodePipeline pipeline to invoke the workflow. Configure the workflow to fail if the code coverage is less than 80%.

contents.en: Create an AWS Step Functions workflow to run unit tests and generate code coverage reports. Add a Step Functions test action to a stage in the CodePipeline pipeline to invoke the workflow. Configure the workflow to fail if the code coverage is less than 80%.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Step Functions 工作流来运行单元测试并生成代码覆盖率报告。在 CodePipeline 流水线的某个阶段添加 Step Functions 测试操作以调用该工作流。配置该工作流在代码覆盖率低于 80% 时失败。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a CodeBuild project with a buildspec.yml file that includes commands to run unit tests and generate code coverage reports. Add a CodeBuild test action to a stage in the CodePipeline pipeline. Configure the CodeBuild test action to use the source artifacts from the source action as input. Modify the buildspec.yml file to fail the build if coverage is less than 80%.

contents.en: Create a CodeBuild project with a buildspec.yml file that includes commands to run unit tests and generate code coverage reports. Add a CodeBuild test action to a stage in the CodePipeline pipeline. Configure the CodeBuild test action to use the source artifacts from the source action as input. Modify the buildspec.yml file to fail the build if coverage is less than 80%.
contents.zh: 创建一个 CodeBuild 项目，并使用包含运行单元测试和生成代码覆盖率报告命令的 buildspec.yml 文件。在 CodePipeline 流水线的某个阶段添加 CodeBuild 测试操作。配置 CodeBuild 测试操作使用源操作中的源构件作为输入。修改 buildspec.yml 文件，使构建在覆盖率低于 80% 时失败。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a CodeBuild project with Jenkins installed. Configure Jenkins to run unit tests and generate code coverage reports. Add a Jenkins test action to a stage in the CodePipeline pipeline. Configure the Jenkins test action to output the coverage report as an output artifact. Configure an approval action to fail the pipeline if code coverage is less than 80%.

contents.en: Create a CodeBuild project with Jenkins installed. Configure Jenkins to run unit tests and generate code coverage reports. Add a Jenkins test action to a stage in the CodePipeline pipeline. Configure the Jenkins test action to output the coverage report as an output artifact. Configure an approval action to fail the pipeline if code coverage is less than 80%.
contents.zh: 创建一个安装了 Jenkins 的 CodeBuild 项目。配置 Jenkins 运行单元测试并生成代码覆盖率报告。在 CodePipeline 流水线的某个阶段添加 Jenkins 测试操作。配置 Jenkins 测试操作将覆盖率报告输出为输出构件。配置一个审批操作，在代码覆盖率低于 80% 时使流水线失败。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。应在 CodePipeline 中加入 CodeBuild 测试动作，使用源代码工件运行包含单元测试和覆盖率报告命令的 buildspec.yml，并在覆盖率低于 80% 时让构建失败。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。应在 CodePipeline 中加入 CodeBuild 测试动作，使用源代码工件运行包含单元测试和覆盖率报告命令的 buildspec.yml，并在覆盖率低于 80% 时让构建失败。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. Add a CodeBuild test action to CodePipeline, use the source artifact as input, run unit tests and coverage reporting from buildspec.yml, and fail the build when coverage is below 80%.

contents.en: A company is implementing a CI/CD pipeline for an application by using AWS CodePipeline and AWS CodeBuild. The company needs a solution to run unit tests and automatically generate code coverage reports before any code is deployed to production. The CI/CD pipeline execution must fail if the code coverage is less than 80%. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在使用 AWS CodePipeline 和 AWS CodeBuild 为应用程序实施 CI/CD 流水线。公司需要一种解决方案，在任何代码部署到生产环境之前运行单元测试并自动生成代码覆盖率报告。如果代码覆盖率低于 80%，CI/CD 流水线执行必须失败。哪种解决方案能够满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has a web application that publishes logs that contain metadata for transactions, with a status of success or failure for each log. The logs are in JSON format. The application publishes the logs to an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. The company wants to create a dashboard that displays the number of successful transactions. Which solution will meet this requirement with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an Amazon OpenSearch Service cluster and an OpenSearch Service subscription filter to send the log group data to the cluster. Create a dashboard within the Dashboards feature in the OpenSearch Service cluster by using a search query for transactions that have a status of success.

contents.en: Create an Amazon OpenSearch Service cluster and an OpenSearch Service subscription filter to send the log group data to the cluster. Create a dashboard within the Dashboards feature in the OpenSearch Service cluster by using a search query for transactions that have a status of success.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon OpenSearch Service 集群和一个 OpenSearch Service 订阅筛选器，将日志组数据发送到该集群。使用针对状态为 success 的交易的搜索查询，在 OpenSearch Service 集群的 Dashboards 功能中创建仪表板。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a CloudWatch subscription filter for the log group that uses an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to parse the JSON logs and publish a custom metric to CloudWatch for transactions that have a status of success. Create a CloudWatch dashboard by using a metric graph that displays the custom metric.

contents.en: Create a CloudWatch subscription filter for the log group that uses an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to parse the JSON logs and publish a custom metric to CloudWatch for transactions that have a status of success. Create a CloudWatch dashboard by using a metric graph that displays the custom metric.
contents.zh: 为日志组创建使用 AWS Lambda 函数的 CloudWatch 订阅筛选器。配置 Lambda 函数解析 JSON 日志，并为状态为 success 的交易向 CloudWatch 发布自定义指标。使用显示该自定义指标的指标图创建 CloudWatch 仪表板。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a CloudWatch metric filter for the log groups with a filter pattern that matches the transaction status property and a value of success. Create a CloudWatch dashboard by using a metric graph that displays the new metric.

contents.en: Create a CloudWatch metric filter for the log groups with a filter pattern that matches the transaction status property and a value of success. Create a CloudWatch dashboard by using a metric graph that displays the new metric.
contents.zh: 为日志组创建 CloudWatch 指标筛选器，筛选模式匹配交易状态属性和值 success。使用显示新指标的指标图创建 CloudWatch 仪表板。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon Kinesis data stream that is subscribed to the log group. Configure the data stream to filter incoming log data based on a status of success and to send the filtered logs to an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to publish a custom metric to CloudWatch. Create a CloudWatch dashboard by using a metric graph that displays the custom metric.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Kinesis data stream that is subscribed to the log group. Configure the data stream to filter incoming log data based on a status of success and to send the filtered logs to an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to publish a custom metric to CloudWatch. Create a CloudWatch dashboard by using a metric graph that displays the custom metric.
contents.zh: 创建一个订阅到日志组的 Amazon Kinesis data stream。配置该 data stream 根据 success 状态筛选传入日志数据，并将筛选后的日志发送到 AWS Lambda 函数。配置 Lambda 函数向 CloudWatch 发布自定义指标。使用显示该自定义指标的指标图创建 CloudWatch 仪表板。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。CloudWatch Logs 指标筛选器可以直接匹配 JSON 日志中的交易状态 success，并把匹配次数转换为指标，再用 CloudWatch 仪表板图表展示。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。CloudWatch Logs 指标筛选器可以直接匹配 JSON 日志中的交易状态 success，并把匹配次数转换为指标，再用 CloudWatch 仪表板图表展示。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. A CloudWatch Logs metric filter can match the JSON transaction status value of success, publish it as a metric, and display that metric on a CloudWatch dashboard.

contents.en: A company has a web application that publishes logs that contain metadata for transactions, with a status of success or failure for each log. The logs are in JSON format. The application publishes the logs to an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. The company wants to create a dashboard that displays the number of successful transactions. Which solution will meet this requirement with the LEAST operational overhead?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个 Web 应用程序，该应用程序发布包含交易元数据的日志，每条日志都有 success 或 failure 状态。日志采用 JSON 格式。应用程序将日志发布到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 日志组。公司希望创建一个显示成功交易数量的仪表板。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销满足这一要求？

questions.content: A company uses Amazon API Gateway and AWS Lambda functions to implement an API. The company uses a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline to build and deploy the API. The pipeline contains a source stage, build stage, and deployment stage. The company deploys the API without performing smoke tests. Soon after the deployment, the company observes multiple issues with the API. A security audit finds security vulnerabilities in the production code. The company wants to prevent these issues from happening in the future. Which combination of steps will meet this requirement? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a smoke test script that returns an error code if the API code fails the test. Add an action in the deployment stage to run the smoke test script after deployment. Configure the deployment stage for automatic rollback.

contents.en: Create a smoke test script that returns an error code if the API code fails the test. Add an action in the deployment stage to run the smoke test script after deployment. Configure the deployment stage for automatic rollback.
contents.zh: 创建一个冒烟测试脚本，如果 API 代码未通过测试则返回错误代码。在部署阶段添加一个操作，在部署后运行冒烟测试脚本。配置部署阶段进行自动回滚。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a smoke test script that returns an error code if the API code fails the test. Add an action in the deployment stage to run the smoke test script after deployment. Configure the deployment stage to fail if the smoke test script returns an error code.

contents.en: Create a smoke test script that returns an error code if the API code fails the test. Add an action in the deployment stage to run the smoke test script after deployment. Configure the deployment stage to fail if the smoke test script returns an error code.
contents.zh: 创建一个冒烟测试脚本，如果 API 代码未通过测试则返回错误代码。在部署阶段添加一个操作，在部署后运行冒烟测试脚本。配置部署阶段在冒烟测试脚本返回错误代码时失败。

options.label: C
options.content: Add an action in the build stage that uses Amazon Inspector to scan the Lambda function code after the code is built. Configure the build stage to fail if the scan returns any security findings.

contents.en: Add an action in the build stage that uses Amazon Inspector to scan the Lambda function code after the code is built. Configure the build stage to fail if the scan returns any security findings.
contents.zh: 在构建阶段添加一个操作，在代码构建后使用 Amazon Inspector 扫描 Lambda 函数代码。配置构建阶段在扫描返回任何安全发现时失败。

options.label: D
options.content: Add an action in the build stage to run an Amazon CodeGuru code scan after the code is built. Configure the build stage to fail if the scan returns any security findings.

contents.en: Add an action in the build stage to run an Amazon CodeGuru code scan after the code is built. Configure the build stage to fail if the scan returns any security findings.
contents.zh: 在构建阶段添加一个操作，在代码构建后运行 Amazon CodeGuru 代码扫描。配置构建阶段在扫描返回任何安全发现时失败。

options.label: E
options.content: Add an action in the deployment stage to run an Amazon CodeGuru code scan after deployment. Configure the deployment stage to fail if the scan returns any security findings.

contents.en: Add an action in the deployment stage to run an Amazon CodeGuru code scan after deployment. Configure the deployment stage to fail if the scan returns any security findings.
contents.zh: 在部署阶段添加一个操作，在部署后运行 Amazon CodeGuru 代码扫描。配置部署阶段在扫描返回任何安全发现时失败。

questions.explanation:
正确答案是 B 和 D。B 在部署后运行 smoke test，并根据脚本错误码让部署阶段失败；D 在构建阶段运行 CodeGuru 扫描，并在发现安全问题时让构建失败。

讨论指出 Inspector 只扫描 Lambda 代码，而题目关注整个生产代码库，因此需要流水线中的部署验证和代码安全扫描。

explanations.zh:
正确答案是 B 和 D。B 在部署后运行 smoke test，并根据脚本错误码让部署阶段失败；D 在构建阶段运行 CodeGuru 扫描，并在发现安全问题时让构建失败。

讨论指出 Inspector 只扫描 Lambda 代码，而题目关注整个生产代码库，因此需要流水线中的部署验证和代码安全扫描。
explanations.en:
The correct answers are B and D. B runs a smoke test after deployment and fails the deployment stage on a nonzero error code; D runs a CodeGuru scan in the build stage and fails on security findings.

The discussion notes that Inspector only scans Lambda code, while the need is broader production code coverage, so pipeline-based deployment validation and code scanning fit.

contents.en: A company uses Amazon API Gateway and AWS Lambda functions to implement an API. The company uses a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline to build and deploy the API. The pipeline contains a source stage, build stage, and deployment stage. The company deploys the API without performing smoke tests. Soon after the deployment, the company observes multiple issues with the API. A security audit finds security vulnerabilities in the production code. The company wants to prevent these issues from happening in the future. Which combination of steps will meet this requirement? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon API Gateway 和 AWS Lambda 函数来实现 API。公司使用 AWS CodePipeline 中的流水线构建和部署 API。该流水线包含源阶段、构建阶段和部署阶段。公司在未执行冒烟测试的情况下部署 API。部署后不久，公司发现 API 存在多个问题。安全审计发现生产代码中存在安全漏洞。公司希望防止这些问题将来再次发生。哪组步骤组合能够满足这一要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A company is implementing a standardized security baseline across its AWS accounts. The accounts are in an organization in AWS Organizations. The company must deploy consistent IAM roles and policies across all existing and future accounts in the organization. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Enable AWS Control Tower in the management account. Configure AWS Control Tower Account Factory customization to deploy the required IAM roles and policies to all accounts.

contents.en: Enable AWS Control Tower in the management account. Configure AWS Control Tower Account Factory customization to deploy the required IAM roles and policies to all accounts.
contents.zh: 在管理账户中启用 AWS Control Tower。配置 AWS Control Tower Account Factory customization，将所需 IAM roles 和 policies 部署到所有账户。

options.label: B
options.content: Activate trusted access for AWS CloudFormation StackSets in Organizations. In the management account, create a stack set that has service-managed permissions to deploy the required IAM roles and policies to all accounts. Enable automatic deployment for the stack set.

contents.en: Activate trusted access for AWS CloudFormation StackSets in Organizations. In the management account, create a stack set that has service-managed permissions to deploy the required IAM roles and policies to all accounts. Enable automatic deployment for the stack set.
contents.zh: 为 Organizations 中的 AWS CloudFormation StackSets 激活可信访问。在管理账户中创建一个具有服务托管权限的 stack set，用于将所需 IAM roles 和 policies 部署到所有账户。为该 stack set 启用自动部署。

options.label: C
options.content: In each member account, create IAM roles that have permissions to create and manage resources. In the management account, create an AWS CloudFormation stack set that has self-managed permissions to deploy the required IAM roles and policies to all accounts. Enable automatic deployment for the stack set.

contents.en: In each member account, create IAM roles that have permissions to create and manage resources. In the management account, create an AWS CloudFormation stack set that has self-managed permissions to deploy the required IAM roles and policies to all accounts. Enable automatic deployment for the stack set.
contents.zh: 在每个成员账户中，创建具有创建和管理资源权限的 IAM roles。在管理账户中创建一个具有自管理权限的 AWS CloudFormation stack set，用于将所需 IAM roles 和 policies 部署到所有账户。为该 stack set 启用自动部署。

options.label: D
options.content: In the management account, create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline. Configure the pipeline to use AWS CloudFormation to automate the deployment of the required IAM roles and policies. Set up cross-account IAM roles to allow CodePipeline to deploy resources in the member accounts.

contents.en: In the management account, create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline. Configure the pipeline to use AWS CloudFormation to automate the deployment of the required IAM roles and policies. Set up cross-account IAM roles to allow CodePipeline to deploy resources in the member accounts.
contents.zh: 在管理账户中创建一个 AWS CodePipeline 流水线。配置该流水线使用 AWS CloudFormation 自动部署所需 IAM roles 和 policies。设置跨账户 IAM roles，允许 CodePipeline 在成员账户中部署资源。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。启用 Organizations 对 CloudFormation StackSets 的可信访问后，可以在管理账号中使用服务托管权限的 StackSet，把所需 IAM 角色和策略自动部署到所有账号。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。启用 Organizations 对 CloudFormation StackSets 的可信访问后，可以在管理账号中使用服务托管权限的 StackSet，把所需 IAM 角色和策略自动部署到所有账号。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. With trusted access for CloudFormation StackSets in Organizations, a service-managed StackSet from the management account can automatically deploy the required IAM roles and policies to all accounts.

contents.en: A company is implementing a standardized security baseline across its AWS accounts. The accounts are in an organization in AWS Organizations. The company must deploy consistent IAM roles and policies across all existing and future accounts in the organization. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在其 AWS 账户中实施标准化安全基线。这些账户位于 AWS Organizations 中的一个组织内。公司必须在组织中的所有现有账户和未来账户中部署一致的 IAM roles 和 policies。哪种解决方案能够以最高的运营效率满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company is migrating its web application to AWS. The application uses WebSocket connections for real-time updates and requires sticky sessions. A DevOps engineer must implement a highly available architecture for the application. The application must be accessible to users worldwide with the least possible latency. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Deploy an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Deploy another ALB in a different AWS Region. Enable cross-zone load balancing and sticky sessions on the ALBs. Integrate the ALBs with Amazon Route 53 latency-based routing.

contents.en: Deploy an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Deploy another ALB in a different AWS Region. Enable cross-zone load balancing and sticky sessions on the ALBs. Integrate the ALBs with Amazon Route 53 latency-based routing.
contents.zh: 部署一个 Application Load Balancer (ALB)。在另一个 AWS Region 中部署另一个 ALB。在 ALB 上启用跨区负载均衡和粘性会话。将 ALB 与 Amazon Route 53 基于延迟的路由集成。

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy a Network Load Balancer (NLB). Deploy another NLB in a different AWS Region. Enable cross-zone load balancing and sticky sessions on the NLBs. Integrate the NLBs with Amazon Route 53 geolocation routing.

contents.en: Deploy a Network Load Balancer (NLB). Deploy another NLB in a different AWS Region. Enable cross-zone load balancing and sticky sessions on the NLBs. Integrate the NLBs with Amazon Route 53 geolocation routing.
contents.zh: 部署一个 Network Load Balancer (NLB)。在另一个 AWS Region 中部署另一个 NLB。在 NLB 上启用跨区负载均衡和粘性会话。将 NLB 与 Amazon Route 53 地理位置路由集成。

options.label: C
options.content: Deploy a Network Load Balancer (NLB) with cross-zone load balancing enabled. Configure the NLB with IP-based targets in multiple Availability Zones. Use Amazon CloudFront for global content delivery. Implement sticky sessions by using source IP address preservation on the NLB.

contents.en: Deploy a Network Load Balancer (NLB) with cross-zone load balancing enabled. Configure the NLB with IP-based targets in multiple Availability Zones. Use Amazon CloudFront for global content delivery. Implement sticky sessions by using source IP address preservation on the NLB.
contents.zh: 部署一个启用跨区负载均衡的 Network Load Balancer (NLB)。使用多个 Availability Zones 中的基于 IP 的目标配置 NLB。使用 Amazon CloudFront 进行全球内容分发。通过在 NLB 上使用源 IP 地址保留来实现粘性会话。

options.label: D
options.content: Deploy an Application Load Balancer (ALB) for HTTP traffic. Deploy a Network Load Balancer (NLB) in each of the company's AWS Regions for WebSocket connections. Enable sticky sessions on the ALB. Configure the ALB to forward requests to the NLB.

contents.en: Deploy an Application Load Balancer (ALB) for HTTP traffic. Deploy a Network Load Balancer (NLB) in each of the company's AWS Regions for WebSocket connections. Enable sticky sessions on the ALB. Configure the ALB to forward requests to the NLB.
contents.zh: 为 HTTP 流量部署 Application Load Balancer (ALB)。在公司的每个 AWS Region 中为 WebSocket 连接部署 Network Load Balancer (NLB)。在 ALB 上启用粘性会话。配置 ALB 将请求转发到 NLB。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。ALB 原生支持 WebSocket 和基于 Cookie 的粘性会话；跨可用区负载均衡可均衡分发流量，Route 53 延迟路由可把用户导向延迟最低的区域。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。ALB 原生支持 WebSocket 和基于 Cookie 的粘性会话；跨可用区负载均衡可均衡分发流量，Route 53 延迟路由可把用户导向延迟最低的区域。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. ALB natively supports WebSockets and cookie-based sticky sessions; cross-zone load balancing spreads traffic across Availability Zones, and Route 53 latency-based routing sends users to the lowest-latency Region.

contents.en: A company is migrating its web application to AWS. The application uses WebSocket connections for real-time updates and requires sticky sessions. A DevOps engineer must implement a highly available architecture for the application. The application must be accessible to users worldwide with the least possible latency. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在将其 Web 应用程序迁移到 AWS。该应用程序使用 WebSocket 连接进行实时更新，并需要粘性会话。DevOps 工程师必须为该应用程序实施高可用架构。应用程序必须可供全球用户访问，并具有尽可能低的延迟。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has a workflow that generates a file for each of the company's products and stores the files in a production environment Amazon S3 bucket. The company's users can access the S3 bucket. Each file contains a product ID. Product IDs for products that have not been publicly announced are prefixed with a specific UUID. Product IDs are 12 characters long. IDs for products that have not been publicly announces begin with the letter P. The company does not want information about products that have not been publicly announced to be available in the production environment S3 bucket. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a new staging S3 bucket. Generate all files in the new staging bucket. Create an Amazon Macie custom data identifier to identify product IDs in the new bucket that begin with the specific UUID. Launch an Amazon Macie sensitive data discovery job with the custom data identifier. Copy all files that do not have a Macie finding to the production S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create a new staging S3 bucket. Generate all files in the new staging bucket. Create an Amazon Macie custom data identifier to identify product IDs in the new bucket that begin with the specific UUID. Launch an Amazon Macie sensitive data discovery job with the custom data identifier. Copy all files that do not have a Macie finding to the production S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 创建一个新的暂存 S3 存储桶。在新的暂存存储桶中生成所有文件。创建一个 Amazon Macie 自定义数据标识符，用于识别新存储桶中以特定 UUID 开头的产品 ID。使用该自定义数据标识符启动 Amazon Macie 敏感数据发现作业。将所有没有 Macie 发现结果的文件复制到生产 S3 存储桶。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon Macie custom data identifier to identify product IDs in the production bucket that begin with the specific UUID. Launch an Amazon Macie sensitive data discovery job with the custom data identifier. Remove all files that have a Macie finding from the production S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Macie custom data identifier to identify product IDs in the production bucket that begin with the specific UUID. Launch an Amazon Macie sensitive data discovery job with the custom data identifier. Remove all files that have a Macie finding from the production S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon Macie 自定义数据标识符，用于识别生产存储桶中以特定 UUID 开头的产品 ID。使用该自定义数据标识符启动 Amazon Macie 敏感数据发现作业。从生产 S3 存储桶中移除所有具有 Macie 发现结果的文件。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a new staging S3 bucket. Generate all files in the new staging bucket. Launch an Amazon Macie sensitive data discovery job with a managed data identifier. Copy all files that do not have a Macie finding to the production S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create a new staging S3 bucket. Generate all files in the new staging bucket. Launch an Amazon Macie sensitive data discovery job with a managed data identifier. Copy all files that do not have a Macie finding to the production S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 创建一个新的暂存 S3 存储桶。在新的暂存存储桶中生成所有文件。使用托管数据标识符启动 Amazon Macie 敏感数据发现作业。将所有没有 Macie 发现结果的文件复制到生产 S3 存储桶。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon Macie sensitive data discovery job with a managed data identifier. Remove all files that have a Macie finding from the production S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Macie sensitive data discovery job with a managed data identifier. Remove all files that have a Macie finding from the production S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 使用托管数据标识符创建 Amazon Macie 敏感数据发现作业。从生产 S3 存储桶中移除所有具有 Macie 发现结果的文件。

questions.explanation:
正确答案是 A。在暂存 S3 桶中生成文件，用 Amazon Macie 自定义数据标识符识别符合特定 UUID 前缀的产品 ID，只把没有 Macie 发现的文件复制到生产桶。

这种做法在敏感数据进入生产前进行过滤，符合讨论中的预防性思路。

explanations.zh:
正确答案是 A。在暂存 S3 桶中生成文件，用 Amazon Macie 自定义数据标识符识别符合特定 UUID 前缀的产品 ID，只把没有 Macie 发现的文件复制到生产桶。

这种做法在敏感数据进入生产前进行过滤，符合讨论中的预防性思路。
explanations.en:
The correct answer is A. Generate files in a staging S3 bucket, use a Macie custom data identifier to find product IDs with the specified UUID prefix, and copy only files without Macie findings to production.

This filters sensitive data before it reaches production, matching the preventive approach described in the discussion.

contents.en: A company has a workflow that generates a file for each of the company's products and stores the files in a production environment Amazon S3 bucket. The company's users can access the S3 bucket. Each file contains a product ID. Product IDs for products that have not been publicly announced are prefixed with a specific UUID. Product IDs are 12 characters long. IDs for products that have not been publicly announces begin with the letter P. The company does not want information about products that have not been publicly announced to be available in the production environment S3 bucket. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个工作流，会为公司的每个产品生成一个文件，并将这些文件存储在生产环境 Amazon S3 存储桶中。公司的用户可以访问该 S3 存储桶。每个文件包含一个产品 ID。尚未公开发布的产品的产品 ID 以前缀为特定 UUID。产品 ID 长度为 12 个字符。尚未公开 announces 的产品 ID 以字母 P 开头。公司不希望尚未公开发布的产品信息出现在生产环境 S3 存储桶中。哪种解决方案能够满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses Amazon RDS for Microsoft SQL Server as its primary database for applications. The company needs to ensure high availability within and across AWS Regions. An Amazon Route 53 CNAME record is configured for the database endpoint. The applications connect to the database endpoint. The company must redirect application traffic to a standby database during a failover event. The company must maintain an RPO of less than 1 minute and an RTO of less than 10 minutes. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Deploy an Amazon RDS for SQL Server Multi-AZ DB cluster deployment that uses cross-Region read replicas. Use automation to promote the read replica to a standalone instance and to update the Route 53 record.

contents.en: Deploy an Amazon RDS for SQL Server Multi-AZ DB cluster deployment that uses cross-Region read replicas. Use automation to promote the read replica to a standalone instance and to update the Route 53 record.
contents.zh: 部署使用跨 Region 只读副本的 Amazon RDS for SQL Server Multi-AZ DB cluster 部署。使用自动化将只读副本提升为独立实例，并更新 Route 53 记录。

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy an Amazon RDS for SQL Server Multi-AZ DB cluster deployment. Set up automated snapshots to be copied to another Region every 5 minutes. Use AWS Lambda to restore the latest snapshot in the secondary Region during failover.

contents.en: Deploy an Amazon RDS for SQL Server Multi-AZ DB cluster deployment. Set up automated snapshots to be copied to another Region every 5 minutes. Use AWS Lambda to restore the latest snapshot in the secondary Region during failover.
contents.zh: 部署 Amazon RDS for SQL Server Multi-AZ DB cluster 部署。设置自动快照，每 5 分钟复制到另一个 Region。在故障转移期间使用 AWS Lambda 在辅助 Region 中还原最新快照。

options.label: C
options.content: Deploy an Amazon RDS for SQL Server Single-AZ DB instance. Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to replicate data continuously to an RDS DB instance in another Region. Use Amazon CloudWatch alarms to notify the company about failover events.

contents.en: Deploy an Amazon RDS for SQL Server Single-AZ DB instance. Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to replicate data continuously to an RDS DB instance in another Region. Use Amazon CloudWatch alarms to notify the company about failover events.
contents.zh: 部署 Amazon RDS for SQL Server Single-AZ DB instance。使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 将数据持续复制到另一个 Region 中的 RDS DB instance。使用 Amazon CloudWatch 告警通知公司故障转移事件。

options.label: D
options.content: Deploy an Amazon RDS for SQL Server Single-AZ DB instance. Configure AWS Backup to create cross-Region backups every 30 seconds. Use automation to restore the latest backup and to update the Route 53 record during failover.

contents.en: Deploy an Amazon RDS for SQL Server Single-AZ DB instance. Configure AWS Backup to create cross-Region backups every 30 seconds. Use automation to restore the latest backup and to update the Route 53 record during failover.
contents.zh: 部署 Amazon RDS for SQL Server Single-AZ DB instance。配置 AWS Backup 每 30 秒创建跨 Region 备份。在故障转移期间使用自动化还原最新备份并更新 Route 53 记录。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。RDS for SQL Server Multi-AZ 集群提供主区域高可用，跨区域只读副本可用于灾难恢复；通过自动化提升副本并更新 Route 53 记录，可把故障切换流程标准化。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。RDS for SQL Server Multi-AZ 集群提供主区域高可用，跨区域只读副本可用于灾难恢复；通过自动化提升副本并更新 Route 53 记录，可把故障切换流程标准化。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. An RDS for SQL Server Multi-AZ cluster provides high availability in the primary Region, while cross-Region read replicas support disaster recovery; automation can promote the replica and update Route 53 records.

contents.en: A company uses Amazon RDS for Microsoft SQL Server as its primary database for applications. The company needs to ensure high availability within and across AWS Regions. An Amazon Route 53 CNAME record is configured for the database endpoint. The applications connect to the database endpoint. The company must redirect application traffic to a standby database during a failover event. The company must maintain an RPO of less than 1 minute and an RTO of less than 10 minutes. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon RDS for Microsoft SQL Server 作为应用程序的主数据库。公司需要确保在 AWS Regions 内部和跨 AWS Regions 的高可用性。已为数据库端点配置 Amazon Route 53 CNAME 记录。应用程序连接到该数据库端点。公司必须在故障转移事件期间将应用程序流量重定向到备用数据库。公司必须保持低于 1 分钟的 RPO 和低于 10 分钟的 RTO。哪种解决方案能够满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company wants to build a pipeline to update the standard AMI monthly. The AMI must be updated to use the most recent patches to ensure that launched Amazon EC2 instances are up to date. Each new AMI must be available to all AWS accounts in the company's organization in AWS Organizations. The company needs to configure an automated pipeline to build the AMI. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that uses AWS CodeBuild. Create an AWS Lambda function to run the pipeline every month. Create an AWS CloudFormation template. Share the template with all AWS accounts in the organization.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that uses AWS CodeBuild. Create an AWS Lambda function to run the pipeline every month. Create an AWS CloudFormation template. Share the template with all AWS accounts in the organization.
contents.zh: 创建一条使用 AWS CodeBuild 的 AWS CodePipeline 流水线。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，每月运行该流水线。创建一个 AWS CloudFormation 模板。与组织中的所有 AWS 账户共享该模板。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AMI pipeline by using EC2 Image Builder. Configure the pipeline to distribute the AMI to the AWS accounts in the organization. Configure the pipeline to run monthly.

contents.en: Create an AMI pipeline by using EC2 Image Builder. Configure the pipeline to distribute the AMI to the AWS accounts in the organization. Configure the pipeline to run monthly.
contents.zh: 使用 EC2 Image Builder 创建 AMI 流水线。配置该流水线将 AMI 分发到组织中的 AWS 账户。配置该流水线每月运行。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that runs an AWS Lambda function to build the AMI. Configure the pipeline to share the AMI with the AWS accounts in the organization. Configure Amazon EventBridge Scheduler to invoke the pipeline every month.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that runs an AWS Lambda function to build the AMI. Configure the pipeline to share the AMI with the AWS accounts in the organization. Configure Amazon EventBridge Scheduler to invoke the pipeline every month.
contents.zh: 创建一条运行 AWS Lambda 函数来构建 AMI 的 AWS CodePipeline 流水线。配置该流水线与组织中的 AWS 账户共享 AMI。配置 Amazon EventBridge Scheduler 每月调用该流水线。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook. Configure the automation to run in all AWS accounts in the organization. Create an AWS Lambda function to run the automation every month.

contents.en: Create an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook. Configure the automation to run in all AWS accounts in the organization. Create an AWS Lambda function to run the automation every month.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook。配置该自动化在组织中的所有 AWS 账户中运行。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，每月运行该自动化。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。EC2 Image Builder 专用于创建、修补、测试和分发 AMI，并可按月计划运行，还能把 AMI 分发到组织内账号，运维开销最低。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。EC2 Image Builder 专用于创建、修补、测试和分发 AMI，并可按月计划运行，还能把 AMI 分发到组织内账号，运维开销最低。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. EC2 Image Builder is built for creating, patching, testing, and distributing AMIs, can run on a monthly schedule, and can distribute AMIs across organization accounts with low operational effort.

contents.en: A company wants to build a pipeline to update the standard AMI monthly. The AMI must be updated to use the most recent patches to ensure that launched Amazon EC2 instances are up to date. Each new AMI must be available to all AWS accounts in the company's organization in AWS Organizations. The company needs to configure an automated pipeline to build the AMI. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?
contents.zh: 一家公司希望构建一条流水线，每月更新标准 AMI。AMI 必须更新为使用最新补丁，以确保启动的 Amazon EC2 实例保持最新。每个新 AMI 必须可供公司在 AWS Organizations 中组织内的所有 AWS 账户使用。公司需要配置一条自动化流水线来构建 AMI。哪种解决方案能够以最高的运营效率满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has an application that uses an Amazon API Gateway REST API, AWS Lambda functions, and an Amazon DynamoDB table. The application currently runs in a single AWS Region. The company wants to make the application highly available across two Regions. User traffic must be routed to the Region that provides the least latency. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Create a replica of the DynamoDB table in a second Region.

contents.en: Create a replica of the DynamoDB table in a second Region.
contents.zh: 在第二个 Region 中创建 DynamoDB 表的副本。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a global secondary index for the DynamoDB table.

contents.en: Create a global secondary index for the DynamoDB table.
contents.zh: 为 DynamoDB 表创建全局二级索引。

options.label: C
options.content: Create copies of the REST API and the Lambda functions in a second Region.

contents.en: Create copies of the REST API and the Lambda functions in a second Region.
contents.zh: 在第二个 Region 中创建 REST API 和 Lambda 函数的副本。

options.label: D
options.content: Create health checks in Amazon Route 53. Create DNS records that include a failover routing policy.

contents.en: Create health checks in Amazon Route 53. Create DNS records that include a failover routing policy.
contents.zh: 在 Amazon Route 53 中创建运行状况检查。创建包含故障转移路由策略的 DNS 记录。

options.label: E
options.content: Create health checks in Amazon Route 53. Create DNS records that include a latency routing policy.

contents.en: Create health checks in Amazon Route 53. Create DNS records that include a latency routing policy.
contents.zh: 在 Amazon Route 53 中创建运行状况检查。创建包含延迟路由策略的 DNS 记录。

options.label: F
options.content: Create DNS records in Amazon Route 53 that include a multivalue answer routing policy.

contents.en: Create DNS records in Amazon Route 53 that include a multivalue answer routing policy.
contents.zh: 在 Amazon Route 53 中创建包含多值应答路由策略的 DNS 记录。
