questions.explanation:
正确答案是 A、C 和 E。A 在第二区域创建 DynamoDB 副本，C 在第二区域复制 REST API 和 Lambda，E 使用 Route 53 延迟路由和健康检查。

这些组件共同支持多区域本地服务、低延迟访问和故障绕行。

explanations.zh:
正确答案是 A、C 和 E。A 在第二区域创建 DynamoDB 副本，C 在第二区域复制 REST API 和 Lambda，E 使用 Route 53 延迟路由和健康检查。

这些组件共同支持多区域本地服务、低延迟访问和故障绕行。
explanations.en:
The correct answers are A, C, and E. A creates a DynamoDB replica in the second Region, C copies the REST API and Lambda functions there, and E uses Route 53 latency routing with health checks.

Together these support local multi-Region service, low-latency routing, and failover around unhealthy endpoints.

contents.en: A company has an application that uses an Amazon API Gateway REST API, AWS Lambda functions, and an Amazon DynamoDB table. The application currently runs in a single AWS Region. The company wants to make the application highly available across two Regions. User traffic must be routed to the Region that provides the least latency. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个应用程序，该应用程序使用 Amazon API Gateway REST API、AWS Lambda 函数和 Amazon DynamoDB 表。该应用程序目前运行在单个 AWS Region 中。公司希望使该应用程序在两个 Regions 中高可用。用户流量必须路由到提供最低延迟的 Region。哪组步骤组合能够满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company has a web application that is hosted on Amazon EC2 instances. The company is deploying the application into multiple AWS Regions. The application consists of dynamic content such as WebSocket-based real-time product updates. The company uses Amazon Route 53 to manage all DNS records. Which solution will provide multi-Region access to the application with the LEAST latency?

options.label: A
options.content: Deploy an Application Load Balancer (ALB) in front of the EC2 instances in each Region. Create a Route 53 A record with a latency-based routing policy. Add IP addresses of the ALBs as the value of the record.

contents.en: Deploy an Application Load Balancer (ALB) in front of the EC2 instances in each Region. Create a Route 53 A record with a latency-based routing policy. Add IP addresses of the ALBs as the value of the record.
contents.zh: 在每个 Region 中，在 EC2 实例前部署 Application Load Balancer (ALB)。创建一个具有基于延迟路由策略的 Route 53 A 记录。将 ALB 的 IP 地址添加为该记录的值。

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy an Application Load Balancer (ALB) in front of the EC2 instances in each Region. Deploy an Amazon CloudFront distribution with an origin group that contains the ALBs as origins. Create a Route 53 alias record that points to the CloudFront distribution's DNS address.

contents.en: Deploy an Application Load Balancer (ALB) in front of the EC2 instances in each Region. Deploy an Amazon CloudFront distribution with an origin group that contains the ALBs as origins. Create a Route 53 alias record that points to the CloudFront distribution's DNS address.
contents.zh: 在每个 Region 中，在 EC2 实例前部署 Application Load Balancer (ALB)。部署一个 Amazon CloudFront 分配，其中包含以 ALB 为源的源组。创建一个指向 CloudFront 分配 DNS 地址的 Route 53 别名记录。

options.label: C
options.content: Deploy a Network Load Balancer (NLB) in front of the EC2 instances in each Region. Create a Route 53 A record with a multivalue answer routing policy. Add IP addresses of the NLBs as the value of the record.

contents.en: Deploy a Network Load Balancer (NLB) in front of the EC2 instances in each Region. Create a Route 53 A record with a multivalue answer routing policy. Add IP addresses of the NLBs as the value of the record.
contents.zh: 在每个 Region 中，在 EC2 实例前部署 Network Load Balancer (NLB)。创建一个具有多值应答路由策略的 Route 53 A 记录。将 NLB 的 IP 地址添加为该记录的值。

options.label: D
options.content: Deploy a Network Load Balancer (NLB) in front of the EC2 instances in each Region. Deploy an AWS Global Accelerator standard accelerator with an endpoint group for each NLB. Create a Route 53 alias record that points to the accelerator's DNS address.

contents.en: Deploy a Network Load Balancer (NLB) in front of the EC2 instances in each Region. Deploy an AWS Global Accelerator standard accelerator with an endpoint group for each NLB. Create a Route 53 alias record that points to the accelerator's DNS address.
contents.zh: 在每个 Region 中，在 EC2 实例前部署 Network Load Balancer (NLB)。部署一个 AWS Global Accelerator 标准加速器，并为每个 NLB 配置一个端点组。创建一个指向加速器 DNS 地址的 Route 53 别名记录。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。NLB 适合面向 TCP/WebSocket 的流量，AWS Global Accelerator 可优化到各区域 NLB 的网络路径并降低实时应用延迟，Route 53 别名记录提供稳定入口。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。NLB 适合面向 TCP/WebSocket 的流量，AWS Global Accelerator 可优化到各区域 NLB 的网络路径并降低实时应用延迟，Route 53 别名记录提供稳定入口。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. NLBs fit TCP/WebSocket traffic, AWS Global Accelerator optimizes the network path to regional NLBs for lower latency, and a Route 53 alias provides a stable entry point.

contents.en: A company has a web application that is hosted on Amazon EC2 instances. The company is deploying the application into multiple AWS Regions. The application consists of dynamic content such as WebSocket-based real-time product updates. The company uses Amazon Route 53 to manage all DNS records. Which solution will provide multi-Region access to the application with the LEAST latency?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个托管在 Amazon EC2 实例上的 Web 应用程序。公司正在将该应用程序部署到多个 AWS Regions。该应用程序包含动态内容，例如基于 WebSocket 的实时产品更新。公司使用 Amazon Route 53 管理所有 DNS 记录。哪种解决方案能够为该应用程序提供延迟最低的多 Region 访问？

questions.content: A company manages its multi-account environment by using AWS Organizations and AWS Control Tower. The company must deploy standardized security controls and compliance policies across all of its AWS accounts and AWS Regions. Any changes to these controls must be automatically applied to all accounts simultaneously. The company has the required security controls and compliance policies defined in AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) as a security controls construct. Which solution will deploy these controls across all accounts and Regions with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS CDK app that includes an AWS CloudFormation StackSets construct. Configure the StackSets construct to use the security controls construct as its template. Specify the target accounts and Regions. Create automation to deploy the CDK app to create and manage the CloudFormation stack set.

contents.en: Create an AWS CDK app that includes an AWS CloudFormation StackSets construct. Configure the StackSets construct to use the security controls construct as its template. Specify the target accounts and Regions. Create automation to deploy the CDK app to create and manage the CloudFormation stack set.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CDK app，其中包含 AWS CloudFormation StackSets construct。配置 StackSets construct 使用 security controls construct 作为其模板。指定目标账户和 Regions。创建自动化以部署 CDK app，从而创建和管理 CloudFormation stack set。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS CDK app that synthesizes an AWS CloudFormation template from the security controls construct. Use Amazon EventBridge to invoke an AWS Lambda function to update a CloudFormation stack set when changes are made to the security controls construct.

contents.en: Create an AWS CDK app that synthesizes an AWS CloudFormation template from the security controls construct. Use Amazon EventBridge to invoke an AWS Lambda function to update a CloudFormation stack set when changes are made to the security controls construct.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CDK app，从 security controls construct 合成 AWS CloudFormation 模板。使用 Amazon EventBridge 调用 AWS Lambda 函数，在 security controls construct 发生更改时更新 CloudFormation stack set。

options.label: C
options.content: Convert the security controls construct to an AWS CloudFormation macro. Create a CloudFormation stack set that references the macro and deploys the macro to all target accounts. Use Organizations to automatically add new accounts to the stack set's list of target accounts.

contents.en: Convert the security controls construct to an AWS CloudFormation macro. Create a CloudFormation stack set that references the macro and deploys the macro to all target accounts. Use Organizations to automatically add new accounts to the stack set's list of target accounts.
contents.zh: 将 security controls construct 转换为 AWS CloudFormation macro。创建一个引用该 macro 并将该 macro 部署到所有目标账户的 CloudFormation stack set。使用 Organizations 将新账户自动添加到 stack set 的目标账户列表中。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS Control Tower to create a customized landing zone that includes configurations from the security controls construct. Configure AWS Control Tower to automatically enroll new accounts and to apply the landing zone template.

contents.en: Use AWS Control Tower to create a customized landing zone that includes configurations from the security controls construct. Configure AWS Control Tower to automatically enroll new accounts and to apply the landing zone template.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Control Tower 创建包含 security controls construct 中配置的自定义 landing zone。配置 AWS Control Tower 自动注册新账户并应用 landing zone 模板。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。AWS Control Tower 可使用包含安全控制构造配置的自定义 landing zone，并自动注册新账号、应用 landing zone 模板，符合低运维开销的集中治理方式。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。AWS Control Tower 可使用包含安全控制构造配置的自定义 landing zone，并自动注册新账号、应用 landing zone 模板，符合低运维开销的集中治理方式。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. AWS Control Tower can use a customized landing zone with security control construct configurations, automatically enroll new accounts, and apply the landing zone template with low operational overhead.

contents.en: A company manages its multi-account environment by using AWS Organizations and AWS Control Tower. The company must deploy standardized security controls and compliance policies across all of its AWS accounts and AWS Regions. Any changes to these controls must be automatically applied to all accounts simultaneously. The company has the required security controls and compliance policies defined in AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) as a security controls construct. Which solution will deploy these controls across all accounts and Regions with the LEAST operational overhead?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations 和 AWS Control Tower 管理其多账户环境。公司必须在所有 AWS 账户和 AWS Regions 中部署标准化安全控制和合规策略。这些控制的任何更改都必须同时自动应用到所有账户。公司已在 AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) 中将所需的安全控制和合规策略定义为 security controls construct。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销将这些控制部署到所有账户和 Regions？

questions.content: A company needs to manage shared libraries for various projects across its development AWS account and production AWS account. The company has configured IAM roles for developers and has defined an AWS CodePipeline pipeline by using the AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK). A DevOps engineer must implement a solution to ensure that only developers can access the latest versions of the libraries. The solution must test shared packages independently before the shared packages are consumed by other applications and before they go to production. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a single AWS CodeArtifact repository for development and production in a central account. Use IAM policies for the developer roles to allow only developers to access the shared libraries. Create an Amazon EventBridge role to start an AWS CodeBuild project and to test each package before the package is copied to the production repository.

contents.en: Create a single AWS CodeArtifact repository for development and production in a central account. Use IAM policies for the developer roles to allow only developers to access the shared libraries. Create an Amazon EventBridge role to start an AWS CodeBuild project and to test each package before the package is copied to the production repository.
contents.zh: 在中央账户中为开发和生产创建单个 AWS CodeArtifact 存储库。为开发人员角色使用 IAM policies，仅允许开发人员访问共享库。创建一个 Amazon EventBridge role，用于启动 AWS CodeBuild 项目，并在每个软件包复制到生产存储库之前测试该软件包。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS CodeArtifact repository in the development account. Create another CodeArtifact repository in the production account. For the development repository, add a repository policy that allows only developers to access the shared libraries. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to start the CodePipeline pipeline and to test each package before the package is copied to the production repository.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodeArtifact repository in the development account. Create another CodeArtifact repository in the production account. For the development repository, add a repository policy that allows only developers to access the shared libraries. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to start the CodePipeline pipeline and to test each package before the package is copied to the production repository.
contents.zh: 在开发账户中创建一个 AWS CodeArtifact 存储库。在生产账户中创建另一个 CodeArtifact 存储库。对于开发存储库，添加一个仅允许开发人员访问共享库的存储库策略。创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，用于启动 CodePipeline 流水线，并在每个软件包复制到生产存储库之前测试该软件包。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a single Amazon S3 bucket with versioning enabled for development and production in a central account. Use IAM policies for the developer roles to allow only the developers to access the shared libraries. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to start an AWS CodeBuild project and to test each package before the package is copied to production.

contents.en: Create a single Amazon S3 bucket with versioning enabled for development and production in a central account. Use IAM policies for the developer roles to allow only the developers to access the shared libraries. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to start an AWS CodeBuild project and to test each package before the package is copied to production.
contents.zh: 在中央账户中创建一个启用版本控制的单个 Amazon S3 存储桶，用于开发和生产。为开发人员角色使用 IAM policies，仅允许开发人员访问共享库。创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 规则，用于启动 AWS CodeBuild 项目，并在每个软件包复制到生产之前测试该软件包。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket with versioning enabled in the development account. Create another S3 bucket with versioning enabled in the production account. For the development S3 bucket, add a bucket policy that allows only developers to access the shared libraries. Create an Amazon EventBridge role to start the CodePipeline pipeline. Configure the role to test each package when the package is copied to production and to revert the changes if the tests fail.

contents.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket with versioning enabled in the development account. Create another S3 bucket with versioning enabled in the production account. For the development S3 bucket, add a bucket policy that allows only developers to access the shared libraries. Create an Amazon EventBridge role to start the CodePipeline pipeline. Configure the role to test each package when the package is copied to production and to revert the changes if the tests fail.
contents.zh: 在开发账户中创建一个启用版本控制的 Amazon S3 存储桶。在生产账户中创建另一个启用版本控制的 S3 存储桶。对于开发 S3 存储桶，添加一个仅允许开发人员访问共享库的存储桶策略。创建一个 Amazon EventBridge role，用于启动 CodePipeline 流水线。配置该角色在软件包复制到生产时测试每个软件包，并在测试失败时还原更改。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。共享库流程应使用开发和生产两个 CodeArtifact 仓库；开发仓库限制开发者访问，并通过 EventBridge 启动 CodePipeline，在复制到生产仓库前测试每个包。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。共享库流程应使用开发和生产两个 CodeArtifact 仓库；开发仓库限制开发者访问，并通过 EventBridge 启动 CodePipeline，在复制到生产仓库前测试每个包。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. A shared library workflow should use separate development and production CodeArtifact repositories, restrict developer access to the development repository, and use EventBridge and CodePipeline to test packages before copying them to production.

contents.en: A company needs to manage shared libraries for various projects across its development AWS account and production AWS account. The company has configured IAM roles for developers and has defined an AWS CodePipeline pipeline by using the AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK). A DevOps engineer must implement a solution to ensure that only developers can access the latest versions of the libraries. The solution must test shared packages independently before the shared packages are consumed by other applications and before they go to production. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司需要在其开发 AWS 账户和生产 AWS 账户中为各个项目管理共享库。公司已为开发人员配置 IAM roles，并使用 AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) 定义了 AWS CodePipeline 流水线。DevOps 工程师必须实施一种解决方案，确保只有开发人员可以访问库的最新版本。该解决方案必须在共享软件包被其他应用程序使用之前以及进入生产环境之前，独立测试这些共享软件包。哪种解决方案能够满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company manages environments for its application in multiple AWS accounts. Each environment account is in a different OU in AWS Organizations. A DevOps team is responsible for the application deployment process across the environments. The deployment process uses an AWS CodePipeline pipeline in a Shared Services account. The DevOps team members are in the same user group. The team members have administrative access to all accounts through AWS IAM Identity Center. A recent deployment problem in the development environment required the DevOps team to perform manual steps. The deployment to the production environment then resulted in an incident that caused the pipeline to fail, which blocked new deployments for several hours. A DevOps engineer needs to ensure that only the pipeline can perform deployments in the production environment. The DevOps engineer must have access to the environment in case of an emergency. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Update the DevOps group to have the ReadOnlyAccess permission set for the production accounts. Configure the DevOps engineer user with a new permission set that has AdministratorAccess permissions and that allows the user to assume the pipeline role. Add an SCP that denies modification of resources by any entity other than the pipeline role.

contents.en: Update the DevOps group to have the ReadOnlyAccess permission set for the production accounts. Configure the DevOps engineer user with a new permission set that has AdministratorAccess permissions and that allows the user to assume the pipeline role. Add an SCP that denies modification of resources by any entity other than the pipeline role.
contents.zh: 将 DevOps 组更新为对生产账户具有 ReadOnlyAccess permission set。为 DevOps 工程师用户配置一个新的 permission set，该 permission set 具有 AdministratorAccess 权限，并允许该用户代入流水线角色。添加一个 SCP，拒绝除流水线角色以外的任何实体修改资源。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an SCP that denies all write actions for the DevOps team members on the production OU. Configure a new user in IAM Identity Center for the DevOps engineer with a new permission set that has AdministratorAccess permissions. Add an SCP that denies modification of resources by any entity other than the pipeline role.

contents.en: Create an SCP that denies all write actions for the DevOps team members on the production OU. Configure a new user in IAM Identity Center for the DevOps engineer with a new permission set that has AdministratorAccess permissions. Add an SCP that denies modification of resources by any entity other than the pipeline role.
contents.zh: 创建一个 SCP，拒绝 DevOps 团队成员在生产 OU 上的所有写入操作。在 IAM Identity Center 中为 DevOps 工程师配置一个新用户，并分配具有 AdministratorAccess 权限的新 permission set。添加一个 SCP，拒绝除流水线角色以外的任何实体修改资源。

options.label: C
options.content: Update the DevOps group to be able to assume the pipeline role for the production accounts. Configure a new user in IAM Identity Center for the DevOps engineer with a new permission set that has AdministratorAccess permissions. Add an SCP that denies modification of resources by any entity other than the DevOps engineer.

contents.en: Update the DevOps group to be able to assume the pipeline role for the production accounts. Configure a new user in IAM Identity Center for the DevOps engineer with a new permission set that has AdministratorAccess permissions. Add an SCP that denies modification of resources by any entity other than the DevOps engineer.
contents.zh: 更新 DevOps 组，使其能够代入生产账户的流水线角色。在 IAM Identity Center 中为 DevOps 工程师配置一个新用户，并分配具有 AdministratorAccess 权限的新 permission set。添加一个 SCP，拒绝除 DevOps 工程师以外的任何实体修改资源。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an SCP that denies all write actions for the DevOps team members on the production OU. Use a specific tag to tag the resources that CodePipeline provisions. Add an SCP that denies modification of tagged resources by any entity other than the DevOps engineer.

contents.en: Create an SCP that denies all write actions for the DevOps team members on the production OU. Use a specific tag to tag the resources that CodePipeline provisions. Add an SCP that denies modification of tagged resources by any entity other than the DevOps engineer.
contents.zh: 创建一个 SCP，拒绝 DevOps 团队成员在生产 OU 上的所有写入操作。使用特定标签标记 CodePipeline 预置的资源。添加一个 SCP，拒绝除 DevOps 工程师以外的任何实体修改带标签的资源。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。SCP 拒绝除 pipeline role 以外的实体修改资源时，工程师即使有普通权限也会被拦截；让其日常只读，并在紧急时假设 pipeline role，既避免误改又保留恢复路径。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。SCP 拒绝除 pipeline role 以外的实体修改资源时，工程师即使有普通权限也会被拦截；让其日常只读，并在紧急时假设 pipeline role，既避免误改又保留恢复路径。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. If an SCP denies modifications by any entity other than the pipeline role, normal user permissions are still blocked; daily read-only access plus emergency assumption of the pipeline role prevents accidental changes while preserving a recovery path.

contents.en: A company manages environments for its application in multiple AWS accounts. Each environment account is in a different OU in AWS Organizations. A DevOps team is responsible for the application deployment process across the environments. The deployment process uses an AWS CodePipeline pipeline in a Shared Services account. The DevOps team members are in the same user group. The team members have administrative access to all accounts through AWS IAM Identity Center. A recent deployment problem in the development environment required the DevOps team to perform manual steps. The deployment to the production environment then resulted in an incident that caused the pipeline to fail, which blocked new deployments for several hours. A DevOps engineer needs to ensure that only the pipeline can perform deployments in the production environment. The DevOps engineer must have access to the environment in case of an emergency. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?
contents.zh: 一家公司在多个 AWS 账户中管理其应用程序环境。每个环境账户都位于 AWS Organizations 中不同的 OU。DevOps 团队负责跨环境的应用程序部署流程。部署流程使用 Shared Services 账户中的 AWS CodePipeline 流水线。DevOps 团队成员位于同一用户组中。团队成员通过 AWS IAM Identity Center 对所有账户具有管理访问权限。最近开发环境中的一次部署问题需要 DevOps 团队执行手动步骤。随后部署到生产环境导致了一次事故，使流水线失败，并阻塞了新的部署数小时。DevOps 工程师需要确保只有流水线能够在生产环境中执行部署。DevOps 工程师必须能够在紧急情况下访问该环境。哪种解决方案能够以最高的运营效率满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company builds container images and stores them on Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) in the company's primary AWS Region. A DevOps engineer wants to replicate all the company's ECR repository images to a secondary Region. The DevOps engineer creates a new ECR repository in the secondary Region and configures permission on the new repository to allow replication. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.label: A
options.content: Pull the existing primary ECR images and then push the images to the secondary ECR repository. Create a replication rule on the primary ECR registry to replicate the images to the secondary ECR registry.

contents.en: Pull the existing primary ECR images and then push the images to the secondary ECR repository. Create a replication rule on the primary ECR registry to replicate the images to the secondary ECR registry.
contents.zh: 拉取现有主 ECR 镜像，然后将镜像推送到辅助 ECR 存储库。在主 ECR 注册表上创建复制规则，将镜像复制到辅助 ECR 注册表。

options.label: B
options.content: Pull the existing primary ECR images and then push the images to the secondary ECR repository. Configure permission on the primary ECR registry to allow access from the secondary Region.

contents.en: Pull the existing primary ECR images and then push the images to the secondary ECR repository. Configure permission on the primary ECR registry to allow access from the secondary Region.
contents.zh: 拉取现有主 ECR 镜像，然后将镜像推送到辅助 ECR 存储库。在主 ECR 注册表上配置权限，以允许来自辅助 Region 的访问。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure permission on the primary ECR registry to allow access from the secondary Region. Create a replication rule on the primary ECR registry to replicate the images to the secondary ECR registry.

contents.en: Configure permission on the primary ECR registry to allow access from the secondary Region. Create a replication rule on the primary ECR registry to replicate the images to the secondary ECR registry.
contents.zh: 在主 ECR 注册表上配置权限，以允许来自辅助 Region 的访问。在主 ECR 注册表上创建复制规则，将镜像复制到辅助 ECR 注册表。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure an AWS Lambda function to automatically save the ECR images to an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure cross-Region replication for the S3 bucket. Configure a second Lambda function to push the images to ECR repositories in the replication destination Region when images are replicated to the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Configure an AWS Lambda function to automatically save the ECR images to an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure cross-Region replication for the S3 bucket. Configure a second Lambda function to push the images to ECR repositories in the replication destination Region when images are replicated to the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 配置一个 AWS Lambda 函数，自动将 ECR 镜像保存到 Amazon S3 存储桶。为该 S3 存储桶配置跨 Region 复制。配置第二个 Lambda 函数，在镜像复制到 S3 存储桶中的复制目标 Region 时，将镜像推送到 ECR 存储库。

questions.explanation:
正确答案是 C。应授予辅助区域访问主 ECR 注册表的权限，并在主注册表上创建复制规则，把镜像复制到辅助 ECR 注册表。

讨论补充了 ECR 复制对新推送镜像是事件驱动的，因此方案核心是用原生跨区域复制处理后续镜像同步。

explanations.zh:
正确答案是 C。应授予辅助区域访问主 ECR 注册表的权限，并在主注册表上创建复制规则，把镜像复制到辅助 ECR 注册表。

讨论补充了 ECR 复制对新推送镜像是事件驱动的，因此方案核心是用原生跨区域复制处理后续镜像同步。
explanations.en:
The correct answer is C. Grant the secondary Region access to the primary ECR registry and create a replication rule on the primary registry to replicate images to the secondary registry.

The discussion notes that ECR replication is event-driven for newly pushed images, so native cross-Region replication is the core mechanism for ongoing synchronization.

contents.en: A company builds container images and stores them on Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) in the company's primary AWS Region. A DevOps engineer wants to replicate all the company's ECR repository images to a secondary Region. The DevOps engineer creates a new ECR repository in the secondary Region and configures permission on the new repository to allow replication. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?
contents.zh: 一家公司构建容器镜像，并将其存储在公司主 AWS Region 的 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) 中。DevOps 工程师希望将公司的所有 ECR 存储库镜像复制到辅助 Region。DevOps 工程师在辅助 Region 中创建了新的 ECR 存储库，并在新存储库上配置了允许复制的权限。哪种解决方案能够以最高的运营效率满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company is experiencing failures in its AWS CodeDeploy deployments for a critical application. The application is deployed on Amazon EC2 instances. A DevOps engineer must analyze the failed deployments to identify the root cause of the failures. Which solution will provide the appropriate information to troubleshoot the deployment issues?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure VPC Flow Logs to monitor network traffic. Use Amazon Inspector to detect non-network deployment issues. Use Amazon Detective to analyze the findings.

contents.en: Configure VPC Flow Logs to monitor network traffic. Use Amazon Inspector to detect non-network deployment issues. Use Amazon Detective to analyze the findings.
contents.zh: 配置 VPC Flow Logs 以监控网络流量。使用 Amazon Inspector 检测非网络部署问题。使用 Amazon Detective 分析发现结果。

options.label: B
options.content: Enable detailed monitoring on the EC2 instances. Use AWS Systems Manager Run Command to run troubleshooting scripts on all the EC2 instances simultaneously. Analyze the results in AWS CloudTrail logs.

contents.en: Enable detailed monitoring on the EC2 instances. Use AWS Systems Manager Run Command to run troubleshooting scripts on all the EC2 instances simultaneously. Analyze the results in AWS CloudTrail logs.
contents.zh: 在 EC2 实例上启用详细监控。使用 AWS Systems Manager Run Command 同时在所有 EC2 实例上运行故障排查脚本。在 AWS CloudTrail 日志中分析结果。

options.label: C
options.content: Use Amazon CloudWatch Logs to review application logs. Analyze CodeDeploy deployment logs in the /opt/codedeploy- agent/deployment-root/ directory on the EC2 instances. Use AWS X-Ray to trace requests through the application components.

contents.en: Use Amazon CloudWatch Logs to review application logs. Analyze CodeDeploy deployment logs in the /opt/codedeploy- agent/deployment-root/ directory on the EC2 instances. Use AWS X-Ray to trace requests through the application components.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 查看应用程序日志。分析 EC2 实例上 /opt/codedeploy- agent/deployment-root/ 目录中的 CodeDeploy 部署日志。使用 AWS X-Ray 跟踪请求通过应用程序组件的路径。

options.label: D
options.content: Examine AWS Trusted Advisor checks for the CodeDeploy deployments. Use the AWS Health Dashboard to monitor application health. Analyze performance metrics in Amazon CloudWatch dashboards.

contents.en: Examine AWS Trusted Advisor checks for the CodeDeploy deployments. Use the AWS Health Dashboard to monitor application health. Analyze performance metrics in Amazon CloudWatch dashboards.
contents.zh: 检查 AWS Trusted Advisor 针对 CodeDeploy 部署的检查项。使用 AWS Health Dashboard 监控应用程序运行状况。在 Amazon CloudWatch 仪表板中分析性能指标。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。排查 CodeDeploy 失败时，应查看 CloudWatch Logs 中的应用日志、EC2 实例上 /opt/codedeploy-agent/deployment-root/ 下的部署日志，并用 X-Ray 跟踪跨组件请求。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。排查 CodeDeploy 失败时，应查看 CloudWatch Logs 中的应用日志、EC2 实例上 /opt/codedeploy-agent/deployment-root/ 下的部署日志，并用 X-Ray 跟踪跨组件请求。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. For CodeDeploy troubleshooting, review application logs in CloudWatch Logs, inspect deployment logs under /opt/codedeploy-agent/deployment-root/ on the EC2 instances, and use X-Ray to trace requests across components.

contents.en: A company is experiencing failures in its AWS CodeDeploy deployments for a critical application. The application is deployed on Amazon EC2 instances. A DevOps engineer must analyze the failed deployments to identify the root cause of the failures. Which solution will provide the appropriate information to troubleshoot the deployment issues?
contents.zh: 一家公司在关键应用程序的 AWS CodeDeploy 部署中遇到失败。该应用程序部署在 Amazon EC2 实例上。DevOps 工程师必须分析失败的部署，以识别失败的根本原因。哪种解决方案将提供适当的信息来排查部署问题？

questions.content: A company has developed a web application that conducts seasonal sales on public holidays. The web application is deployed on AWS and uses AWS services for storage, database, computing, and encryption. During seasonal sales, the company expects high network traffic from a large number of users. The company must receive insights regarding any unexpected behavior during the sale. A DevOps team wants to review the insights upon detecting anomalous behaviors during the sale. The DevOps team wants to receive recommended actions to resolve the anomalous behaviors. The recommendations must be provided on the provisioned infrastructure to address the issues that might occur in the future. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead? (Choose two.)

options.label: A
options.content: Enable Amazon DevOps Guru in the AWS account. Determine the coverage for DevOps Guru for all supported AWS resources in the account. Use the DevOps Guru dashboard to find the analysis, recommendations, and related metrics.

contents.en: Enable Amazon DevOps Guru in the AWS account. Determine the coverage for DevOps Guru for all supported AWS resources in the account. Use the DevOps Guru dashboard to find the analysis, recommendations, and related metrics.
contents.zh: 在 AWS 账户中启用 Amazon DevOps Guru。确定 DevOps Guru 对账户中所有受支持 AWS 资源的覆盖范围。使用 DevOps Guru 仪表板查找分析、建议和相关指标。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Configure Amazon DevOps Guru to send notifications about important events to the company when anomalies are identified.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Configure Amazon DevOps Guru to send notifications about important events to the company when anomalies are identified.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。配置 Amazon DevOps Guru 在识别到异常时向公司发送有关重要事件的通知。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket. Store Amazon CloudWatch logs, AWS CloudTrail data, and AWS Config data in the S3 bucket. Use Amazon Athena to generate insights on the data. Create a dashboard by using Amazon QuickSight.

contents.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket. Store Amazon CloudWatch logs, AWS CloudTrail data, and AWS Config data in the S3 bucket. Use Amazon Athena to generate insights on the data. Create a dashboard by using Amazon QuickSight.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon S3 存储桶。将 Amazon CloudWatch 日志、AWS CloudTrail 数据和 AWS Config 数据存储在该 S3 存储桶中。使用 Amazon Athena 对数据生成洞察。使用 Amazon QuickSight 创建仪表板。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure email message reports for an Amazon QuickSight dashboard. Schedule and send the email reports to the company.

contents.en: Configure email message reports for an Amazon QuickSight dashboard. Schedule and send the email reports to the company.
contents.zh: 为 Amazon QuickSight 仪表板配置电子邮件报告。计划并向公司发送电子邮件报告。

options.label: E
options.content: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Configure Amazon Athena to send query results about important events to the company when anomalies are identified.

contents.en: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Configure Amazon Athena to send query results about important events to the company when anomalies are identified.
contents.zh: 创建一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。配置 Amazon Athena 在识别到异常时向公司发送有关重要事件的查询结果。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A 和 B。DevOps Guru 可自动分析受支持资源，提供异常分析、建议和相关指标；结合 SNS 可在发现重要异常时通知团队。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A 和 B。DevOps Guru 可自动分析受支持资源，提供异常分析、建议和相关指标；结合 SNS 可在发现重要异常时通知团队。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A and B. DevOps Guru can automatically analyze supported resources and provide anomaly analysis, recommendations, and related metrics; SNS integration notifies the team when important anomalies are identified.

contents.en: A company has developed a web application that conducts seasonal sales on public holidays. The web application is deployed on AWS and uses AWS services for storage, database, computing, and encryption. During seasonal sales, the company expects high network traffic from a large number of users. The company must receive insights regarding any unexpected behavior during the sale. A DevOps team wants to review the insights upon detecting anomalous behaviors during the sale. The DevOps team wants to receive recommended actions to resolve the anomalous behaviors. The recommendations must be provided on the provisioned infrastructure to address the issues that might occur in the future. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead? (Choose two.)
contents.zh: 一家公司开发了一个 Web 应用程序，在公共假日期间进行季节性销售。该 Web 应用程序部署在 AWS 上，并使用 AWS 服务进行存储、数据库、计算和加密。在季节性销售期间，公司预计会有来自大量用户的高网络流量。公司必须获得关于销售期间任何意外行为的洞察。DevOps 团队希望在销售期间检测到异常行为时查看这些洞察。DevOps 团队希望收到解决异常行为的建议操作。这些建议必须针对已预置的基础设施提供，以解决将来可能发生的问题。哪组步骤组合能够以最少的运营开销满足这些要求？（选择两项。）

questions.content: A DevOps engineer needs to design a cloud-based solution to standardize deployment artifacts for AWS Cloud deployments and on-premises deployments. There is currently no routing traffic between the on-premises data center and the AWS environment. The solution must be able to consume downstream packages from public repositories and must be highly available. Data must be encrypted in transit and at rest. The solution must store the deployment artifacts in object storage and deploy the deployment artifacts into Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). The deployment artifacts must be encrypted in transit if the deployment artifacts travel across the public internet. The DevOps engineer needs to deploy this solution in less than two weeks. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: B
options.content: Use an AWS Direct Connect connection and a VPN connection to connect the on-premises data center to AWS. Deploy third-party artifact management software on Amazon EC2 instances.

contents.en: Use an AWS Direct Connect connection and a VPN connection to connect the on-premises data center to AWS. Deploy third-party artifact management software on Amazon EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Direct Connect 连接和 VPN 连接，将本地数据中心连接到 AWS。在 Amazon EC2 实例上部署第三方构件管理软件。

options.label: C
options.content: Use two AWS VPN connections to connect the on-premises data center to AWS. Use AWS CodeArtifact to store the deployment artifacts.

contents.en: Use two AWS VPN connections to connect the on-premises data center to AWS. Use AWS CodeArtifact to store the deployment artifacts.
contents.zh: 使用两个 AWS VPN 连接将本地数据中心连接到 AWS。使用 AWS CodeArtifact 存储部署构件。

options.label: D
options.content: Use parallel AWS Direct Connect connections to connect the on-premises data center to AWS. Deploy third-party artifact management software on Amazon EC2 instances.

contents.en: Use parallel AWS Direct Connect connections to connect the on-premises data center to AWS. Deploy third-party artifact management software on Amazon EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 使用并行 AWS Direct Connect 连接将本地数据中心连接到 AWS。在 Amazon EC2 实例上部署第三方构件管理软件。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。在少于两周且需要高可用的约束下，两条 AWS VPN 连接可快速建立混合连接，CodeArtifact 则以托管方式存储部署构件，避免自管 EC2 的额外开销。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。在少于两周且需要高可用的约束下，两条 AWS VPN 连接可快速建立混合连接，CodeArtifact 则以托管方式存储部署构件，避免自管 EC2 的额外开销。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. Under a less-than-two-week timeline and high availability requirement, two AWS VPN connections provide quick hybrid connectivity, while CodeArtifact stores deployment artifacts as a managed service without EC2 management overhead.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer needs to design a cloud-based solution to standardize deployment artifacts for AWS Cloud deployments and on-premises deployments. There is currently no routing traffic between the on-premises data center and the AWS environment. The solution must be able to consume downstream packages from public repositories and must be highly available. Data must be encrypted in transit and at rest. The solution must store the deployment artifacts in object storage and deploy the deployment artifacts into Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). The deployment artifacts must be encrypted in transit if the deployment artifacts travel across the public internet. The DevOps engineer needs to deploy this solution in less than two weeks. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师需要设计一个基于云的解决方案，以标准化 AWS Cloud 部署和本地部署的部署构件。目前本地数据中心与 AWS 环境之间没有路由流量。该解决方案必须能够从公共存储库使用下游软件包，并且必须具备高可用性。数据必须在传输中和静态时加密。该解决方案必须将部署构件存储在对象存储中，并将部署构件部署到 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)。如果部署构件通过公共互联网传输，则必须在传输中加密。DevOps 工程师需要在不到两周内部署该解决方案。哪种解决方案能够满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer successfully creates an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster that includes managed node groups. When the DevOps engineer tries to add node groups to the cluster, the cluster returns an error that states, "NodeCreationFailure: Instances failed to join the Kubernetes cluster." The DevOps engineer confirms that the EC2 worker nodes are running and that the EKS cluster is in an active state. How should the DevOps engineer troubleshoot this issue?

options.label: A
options.content: Ensure that the EKS cluster's VPC subnets do not overlap with the 172.17.0.0/16 CIDR range.

contents.en: Ensure that the EKS cluster's VPC subnets do not overlap with the 172.17.0.0/16 CIDR range.
contents.zh: 确保 EKS 集群的 VPC 子网不与 172.17.0.0/16 CIDR 范围重叠。

options.label: B
options.content: Use kubectl to update the kubeconfig file to use the credentials that created the cluster.

contents.en: Use kubectl to update the kubeconfig file to use the credentials that created the cluster.
contents.zh: 使用 kubectl 更新 kubeconfig 文件，以使用创建该集群的凭证。

options.label: C
options.content: Run the AWSSupport-TroubleshootEKSWorkerNode runbook.

contents.en: Run the AWSSupport-TroubleshootEKSWorkerNode runbook.
contents.zh: 运行 AWSSupport-TroubleshootEKSWorkerNode runbook。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) OpenID Connect (OIDC) provider for the cluster.

contents.en: Create an AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) OpenID Connect (OIDC) provider for the cluster.
contents.zh: 为该集群创建 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) OpenID Connect (OIDC) provider。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。EKS 工作节点加入集群时，集群 VPC 子网不应与 172.17.0.0/16 CIDR 范围重叠；该选项直接处理源答案给出的正确配置点。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。EKS 工作节点加入集群时，集群 VPC 子网不应与 172.17.0.0/16 CIDR 范围重叠；该选项直接处理源答案给出的正确配置点。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. For EKS worker nodes to join properly, the cluster VPC subnets should not overlap with the 172.17.0.0/16 CIDR range; this option directly addresses the configuration identified by the source answer.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer successfully creates an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster that includes managed node groups. When the DevOps engineer tries to add node groups to the cluster, the cluster returns an error that states, "NodeCreationFailure: Instances failed to join the Kubernetes cluster." The DevOps engineer confirms that the EC2 worker nodes are running and that the EKS cluster is in an active state. How should the DevOps engineer troubleshoot this issue?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师成功创建了一个包含托管节点组的 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 集群。当 DevOps 工程师尝试向该集群添加节点组时，集群返回一条错误，内容为 "NodeCreationFailure: Instances failed to join the Kubernetes cluster." DevOps 工程师确认 EC2 工作节点正在运行，并且 EKS 集群处于活动状态。DevOps 工程师应如何排查此问题？

questions.content: A company is developing an ecommerce application that has a backend that runs on Amazon EC2 instances. The application has a static frontend website that is hosted in an Amazon S3 bucket. The company uses a GitHub repository for version control and must automate builds and deployments whenever code is pushed to the main branch. The company must deploy changes to the frontend and backend independently of each other. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a single AWS CodePipeline pipeline to use for the frontend and the backend. Specify the GitHub repository as the source. Configure two build stages that use AWS CodeBuild as the action provider to build the frontend components and backend components, respectively. Configure two deployment stages that use AWS CodeDeploy as the action provider to deploy the frontend and backend, respectively.

contents.en: Create a single AWS CodePipeline pipeline to use for the frontend and the backend. Specify the GitHub repository as the source. Configure two build stages that use AWS CodeBuild as the action provider to build the frontend components and backend components, respectively. Configure two deployment stages that use AWS CodeDeploy as the action provider to deploy the frontend and backend, respectively.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CodePipeline 管道同时用于前端和后端。将 GitHub 存储库指定为源。配置两个构建阶段，分别使用 AWS CodeBuild 作为操作提供程序来构建前端组件和后端组件。配置两个部署阶段，分别使用 AWS CodeDeploy 作为操作提供程序来部署前端和后端。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a single AWS CodePipeline pipeline to use for the frontend and the backend. Specify the GitHub repository as the source. Configure two build stages that use AWS CodeBuild as the action provider to build the frontend components and backend components, respectively. Configure two deployment stages. For the backend stage, use AWS CodeDeploy as the action provider to deploy the backend to the EC2 instances. For the frontend stage, use Amazon S3 as the action provider to deploy the frontend to the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create a single AWS CodePipeline pipeline to use for the frontend and the backend. Specify the GitHub repository as the source. Configure two build stages that use AWS CodeBuild as the action provider to build the frontend components and backend components, respectively. Configure two deployment stages. For the backend stage, use AWS CodeDeploy as the action provider to deploy the backend to the EC2 instances. For the frontend stage, use Amazon S3 as the action provider to deploy the frontend to the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 创建一个 AWS CodePipeline 管道同时用于前端和后端。将 GitHub 存储库指定为源。配置两个构建阶段，分别使用 AWS CodeBuild 作为操作提供程序来构建前端组件和后端组件。配置两个部署阶段。对于后端阶段，使用 AWS CodeDeploy 作为操作提供程序，将后端部署到 EC2 实例。对于前端阶段，使用 Amazon S3 作为操作提供程序，将前端部署到 S3 存储桶。

options.label: C
options.content: Create two AWS CodePipeline pipelines: one for the frontend and one for the backend. Specify the GitHub repository as the source. Configure a build stage that uses AWS CodeBuild as the action provider for each pipeline to build the frontend and the backend. Configure a deployment stage that uses AWS CodeDeploy as the action provider for each pipeline to deploy the frontend and the backend.

contents.en: Create two AWS CodePipeline pipelines: one for the frontend and one for the backend. Specify the GitHub repository as the source. Configure a build stage that uses AWS CodeBuild as the action provider for each pipeline to build the frontend and the backend. Configure a deployment stage that uses AWS CodeDeploy as the action provider for each pipeline to deploy the frontend and the backend.
contents.zh: 创建两个 AWS CodePipeline 管道：一个用于前端，一个用于后端。将 GitHub 存储库指定为源。为每个管道配置一个构建阶段，使用 AWS CodeBuild 作为操作提供程序来构建前端和后端。为每个管道配置一个部署阶段，使用 AWS CodeDeploy 作为操作提供程序来部署前端和后端。

options.label: D
options.content: Create two AWS CodePipeline pipelines: one for the frontend and one for the backend. Specify the GitHub repository as the source. Configure a build stage that uses AWS CodeBuild as the action provider for each pipeline to build the frontend and the backend. For the backend pipeline, use AWS CodeDeploy as the action provider to deploy the backend to the EC2 instances. For the frontend pipeline, use Amazon S3 as the action provider to deploy the frontend to the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create two AWS CodePipeline pipelines: one for the frontend and one for the backend. Specify the GitHub repository as the source. Configure a build stage that uses AWS CodeBuild as the action provider for each pipeline to build the frontend and the backend. For the backend pipeline, use AWS CodeDeploy as the action provider to deploy the backend to the EC2 instances. For the frontend pipeline, use Amazon S3 as the action provider to deploy the frontend to the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 创建两个 AWS CodePipeline 管道：一个用于前端，一个用于后端。将 GitHub 存储库指定为源。为每个管道配置一个构建阶段，使用 AWS CodeBuild 作为操作提供程序来构建前端和后端。对于后端管道，使用 AWS CodeDeploy 作为操作提供程序，将后端部署到 EC2 实例。对于前端管道，使用 Amazon S3 作为操作提供程序，将前端部署到 S3 存储桶。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。前端和后端需要独立部署，因此创建两个 CodePipeline 流水线；前端用 S3 部署静态内容，后端用 CodeDeploy 部署到 EC2，配置标准且运维开销低。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。前端和后端需要独立部署，因此创建两个 CodePipeline 流水线；前端用 S3 部署静态内容，后端用 CodeDeploy 部署到 EC2，配置标准且运维开销低。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. Independent frontend and backend deployment calls for two CodePipeline pipelines; the frontend can use the native S3 deploy action, while the backend uses CodeDeploy for EC2, keeping the setup standard and low overhead.

contents.en: A company is developing an ecommerce application that has a backend that runs on Amazon EC2 instances. The application has a static frontend website that is hosted in an Amazon S3 bucket. The company uses a GitHub repository for version control and must automate builds and deployments whenever code is pushed to the main branch. The company must deploy changes to the frontend and backend independently of each other. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在开发一个电子商务应用程序，其后端运行在 Amazon EC2 实例上。该应用程序有一个托管在 Amazon S3 存储桶中的静态前端网站。公司使用 GitHub 存储库进行版本控制，并且必须在代码推送到 main 分支时自动执行构建和部署。公司必须能够彼此前后端独立部署更改。哪种解决方案将满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has an RPO of 24 hours and an RTO of 10 minutes for a critical web application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances. The company uses AWS Organizations to manage its AWS account. The company wants to set up AWS Backup for its AWS environment. A DevOps engineer configures AWS Organizations for AWS Backup. The DevOps engineer creates a new centralized AWS account to store the backups. Each EC2 instance has four Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volumes attached. Which solution will meet this requirement MOST securely?

options.label: A
options.content: Create encrypted backup vaults and customer managed AWS KMS keys in both accounts. Configure AWS Backup to create full EC2 backups as AMIs. Copy the backups to the centralized vault.

contents.en: Create encrypted backup vaults and customer managed AWS KMS keys in both accounts. Configure AWS Backup to create full EC2 backups as AMIs. Copy the backups to the centralized vault.
contents.zh: 在两个账户中创建加密的备份保管库和客户托管 AWS KMS 密钥。配置 AWS Backup 以 AMI 形式创建完整 EC2 备份。将备份复制到集中式保管库。

options.label: B
options.content: Create encrypted vaults in both accounts by using the source account's AWS KMS key. Configure AWS Backup to create EC2 AMIs. Copy the AMIs to the centralized vault.

contents.en: Create encrypted vaults in both accounts by using the source account's AWS KMS key. Configure AWS Backup to create EC2 AMIs. Copy the AMIs to the centralized vault.
contents.zh: 使用源账户的 AWS KMS 密钥在两个账户中创建加密保管库。配置 AWS Backup 创建 EC2 AMI。将 AMI 复制到集中式保管库。

options.label: C
options.content: Create backup vaults in both accounts. Use AWS managed keys for encryption. Configure AWS Backup to create EC2 AMIs. Copy the AMIs to the centralized vault.

contents.en: Create backup vaults in both accounts. Use AWS managed keys for encryption. Configure AWS Backup to create EC2 AMIs. Copy the AMIs to the centralized vault.
contents.zh: 在两个账户中创建备份保管库。使用 AWS managed keys 进行加密。配置 AWS Backup 创建 EC2 AMI。将 AMI 复制到集中式保管库。

options.label: D
options.content: Create encrypted vaults in both accounts. Use a customer managed KMS key in the source account. Use an AWS managed key in the centralized account. Configure AWS Backup to create EC2 AMIs. Copy the AMIs to the centralized vault.

contents.en: Create encrypted vaults in both accounts. Use a customer managed KMS key in the source account. Use an AWS managed key in the centralized account. Configure AWS Backup to create EC2 AMIs. Copy the AMIs to the centralized vault.
contents.zh: 在两个账户中创建加密保管库。在源账户中使用 customer managed KMS key。在集中式账户中使用 AWS managed key。配置 AWS Backup 创建 EC2 AMI。将 AMI 复制到集中式保管库。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。为了满足 10 分钟 RTO，将 EC2 作为 AMI 进行完整备份可快速恢复包含多个 EBS 卷的环境；在两个账号中使用客户托管 KMS 密钥和加密备份保管库也支持更好的跨账号安全控制。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。为了满足 10 分钟 RTO，将 EC2 作为 AMI 进行完整备份可快速恢复包含多个 EBS 卷的环境；在两个账号中使用客户托管 KMS 密钥和加密备份保管库也支持更好的跨账号安全控制。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. To meet a 10-minute RTO, full EC2 backups as AMIs enable fast recovery of the instance and its EBS volumes; encrypted backup vaults and customer managed KMS keys in both accounts provide stronger cross-account security control.

contents.en: A company has an RPO of 24 hours and an RTO of 10 minutes for a critical web application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances. The company uses AWS Organizations to manage its AWS account. The company wants to set up AWS Backup for its AWS environment. A DevOps engineer configures AWS Organizations for AWS Backup. The DevOps engineer creates a new centralized AWS account to store the backups. Each EC2 instance has four Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volumes attached. Which solution will meet this requirement MOST securely?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个关键 Web 应用程序运行在 Amazon EC2 实例上，其 RPO 为 24 小时，RTO 为 10 分钟。公司使用 AWS Organizations 管理其 AWS 账户。公司希望为其 AWS 环境设置 AWS Backup。DevOps 工程师为 AWS Backup 配置 AWS Organizations。DevOps 工程师创建一个新的集中式 AWS 账户来存储备份。每个 EC2 实例都附加了四个 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 卷。哪种解决方案将以最安全的方式满足此要求？

questions.content: A company wants to proactively monitor and respond to AWS service issues that might affect an application. The company must correlate AWS Health events with application performance metrics and must set up automated alerts. The solution must give the company the ability to archive events, test the application's latency in different scenarios, and create custom metrics. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Use AWS CloudTrail to log all AWS Health events. Use Amazon Athena to query the logs and to correlate the logs with application metrics stored in Amazon Timestream for LiveAnalytics. Set up AWS Chatbot for real-time notifications.

contents.en: Use AWS CloudTrail to log all AWS Health events. Use Amazon Athena to query the logs and to correlate the logs with application metrics stored in Amazon Timestream for LiveAnalytics. Set up AWS Chatbot for real-time notifications.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CloudTrail 记录所有 AWS Health 事件。使用 Amazon Athena 查询日志，并将日志与存储在 Amazon Timestream for LiveAnalytics 中的应用程序指标相关联。设置 AWS Chatbot 用于实时通知。

options.label: B
options.content: Use Amazon EventBridge to route AWS Health events to Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Create a metric filter for AWS Health events. Create custom metrics in CloudWatch that are based on application performance data. Set up CloudWatch alarms that correlate AWS Health events with the custom metrics.

contents.en: Use Amazon EventBridge to route AWS Health events to Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Create a metric filter for AWS Health events. Create custom metrics in CloudWatch that are based on application performance data. Set up CloudWatch alarms that correlate AWS Health events with the custom metrics.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon EventBridge 将 AWS Health 事件路由到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs。为 AWS Health 事件创建指标筛选器。在 CloudWatch 中基于应用程序性能数据创建自定义指标。设置将 AWS Health 事件与自定义指标相关联的 CloudWatch 警报。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the AWS Health Dashboard to send notifications to Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS). Use AWS Lambda to correlate the notifications with metrics and to update custom metrics in Amazon CloudWatch. Set up CloudWatch alarms for the custom metrics. Use AWS Systems Manager for automated remediation.

contents.en: Configure the AWS Health Dashboard to send notifications to Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS). Use AWS Lambda to correlate the notifications with metrics and to update custom metrics in Amazon CloudWatch. Set up CloudWatch alarms for the custom metrics. Use AWS Systems Manager for automated remediation.
contents.zh: 配置 AWS Health Dashboard 将通知发送到 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)。使用 AWS Lambda 将通知与指标相关联，并更新 Amazon CloudWatch 中的自定义指标。为自定义指标设置 CloudWatch 警报。使用 AWS Systems Manager 进行自动化修复。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure AWS X-Ray to trace AWS Health events and application performance. Use Amazon QuickSight to visualize the correlations between events and metrics. Use Amazon GuardDuty to detect anomalies in the application's behavior and to provide alerts.

contents.en: Configure AWS X-Ray to trace AWS Health events and application performance. Use Amazon QuickSight to visualize the correlations between events and metrics. Use Amazon GuardDuty to detect anomalies in the application's behavior and to provide alerts.
contents.zh: 配置 AWS X-Ray 来跟踪 AWS Health 事件和应用程序性能。使用 Amazon QuickSight 可视化事件与指标之间的关联。使用 Amazon GuardDuty 检测应用程序行为中的异常并提供警报。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。EventBridge 可把 AWS Health 事件路由到 CloudWatch Logs 以满足归档需求，再通过指标筛选器和应用自定义指标，在 CloudWatch 中完成关联告警。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。EventBridge 可把 AWS Health 事件路由到 CloudWatch Logs 以满足归档需求，再通过指标筛选器和应用自定义指标，在 CloudWatch 中完成关联告警。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. EventBridge can route AWS Health events to CloudWatch Logs for archiving, then metric filters and application custom metrics allow correlation and alerting within CloudWatch.

contents.en: A company wants to proactively monitor and respond to AWS service issues that might affect an application. The company must correlate AWS Health events with application performance metrics and must set up automated alerts. The solution must give the company the ability to archive events, test the application's latency in different scenarios, and create custom metrics. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司希望主动监控并响应可能影响某个应用程序的 AWS 服务问题。公司必须将 AWS Health 事件与应用程序性能指标相关联，并且必须设置自动化警报。该解决方案必须让公司能够归档事件、在不同场景中测试应用程序延迟，并创建自定义指标。哪种解决方案将满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses a CI/CD pipeline to deploy its workload in the ap-southeast-2 Region. The company receives images through a Network Load Balancer (NLB) and processes the images in AWS Fargate tasks on an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster. An Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository stores the images as Docker images. The company uses Amazon Route 53 to configure DNS. The company saves the images in an Amazon S3 bucket and saves the metadata from the images in an Amazon DynamoDB table. The company wants to expand the workload to a second Region. A DevOps engineer needs to build a highly available and resilient design to expand the workload to the eu-west-2 Region. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the FEWEST configuration changes? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Configure ECR replication to eu-west-2 on the repository. Configure an NLB in eu-west-2 that resolves to Fargate tasks in an ECS cluster in eu-west-2. Configure a latency routing policy in Route 53 for the two workloads.

contents.en: Configure ECR replication to eu-west-2 on the repository. Configure an NLB in eu-west-2 that resolves to Fargate tasks in an ECS cluster in eu-west-2. Configure a latency routing policy in Route 53 for the two workloads.
contents.zh: 在存储库上配置 ECR replication 到 eu-west-2。配置 eu-west-2 中的 NLB，使其解析到 eu-west-2 中 ECS 集群内的 Fargate 任务。在 Route 53 中为两个工作负载配置延迟路由策略。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure the DynamoDB table as a global table with a replica in eu-west-2. Configure the Fargate tasks to interact with the DynamoDB table in ap-southeast-2.

contents.en: Configure the DynamoDB table as a global table with a replica in eu-west-2. Configure the Fargate tasks to interact with the DynamoDB table in ap-southeast-2.
contents.zh: 将 DynamoDB 表配置为 global table，并在 eu-west-2 中创建副本。配置 Fargate 任务与 ap-southeast-2 中的 DynamoDB 表交互。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the DynamoDB table as a global table with a replica in eu-west-2. Configure the Fargate tasks to interact with the DynamoDB table in the same Region that the tasks run in.

contents.en: Configure the DynamoDB table as a global table with a replica in eu-west-2. Configure the Fargate tasks to interact with the DynamoDB table in the same Region that the tasks run in.
contents.zh: 将 DynamoDB 表配置为 global table，并在 eu-west-2 中创建副本。配置 Fargate 任务与任务运行所在同一 Region 中的 DynamoDB 表交互。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure a new S3 bucket in eu-west-2. Configure data replication between the S3 bucket in ap-southeast-2 and the S3 bucket in eu-west-2. Configure the Fargate tasks to use the S3 bucket in the same Region that the tasks run in to perform S3 PUT operations and GET operations.

contents.en: Configure a new S3 bucket in eu-west-2. Configure data replication between the S3 bucket in ap-southeast-2 and the S3 bucket in eu-west-2. Configure the Fargate tasks to use the S3 bucket in the same Region that the tasks run in to perform S3 PUT operations and GET operations.
contents.zh: 在 eu-west-2 中配置新的 S3 存储桶。在 ap-southeast-2 中的 S3 存储桶与 eu-west-2 中的 S3 存储桶之间配置数据复制。配置 Fargate 任务使用与任务运行所在同一 Region 中的 S3 存储桶来执行 S3 PUT 操作和 GET 操作。

options.label: E
options.content: Configure an S3 Multi-Region Access Point for the S3 bucket in ap-southeast-2 and a new S3 bucket in eu-west-2. Configure two-way replication on the S3 buckets. Configure the workloads to use the Multi-Region Access Point for S3 PUT operations and GET operations.

contents.en: Configure an S3 Multi-Region Access Point for the S3 bucket in ap-southeast-2 and a new S3 bucket in eu-west-2. Configure two-way replication on the S3 buckets. Configure the workloads to use the Multi-Region Access Point for S3 PUT operations and GET operations.
contents.zh: 为 ap-southeast-2 中的 S3 存储桶和 eu-west-2 中的新 S3 存储桶配置 S3 Multi-Region Access Point。在 S3 存储桶上配置双向复制。配置工作负载使用 Multi-Region Access Point 执行 S3 PUT 操作和 GET 操作。

options.label: F
options.content: Configure the CI/CD pipeline to deploy ECR images to both Regions. Configure an NLB in eu-west-2 that resolves to Fargate tasks in an ECS cluster in eu-west-2. Configure a failover routing policy in Route 53 for the two workloads.

contents.en: Configure the CI/CD pipeline to deploy ECR images to both Regions. Configure an NLB in eu-west-2 that resolves to Fargate tasks in an ECS cluster in eu-west-2. Configure a failover routing policy in Route 53 for the two workloads.
contents.zh: 配置 CI/CD 管道将 ECR images 部署到两个 Region。配置 eu-west-2 中的 NLB，使其解析到 eu-west-2 中 ECS 集群内的 Fargate 任务。在 Route 53 中为两个工作负载配置故障转移路由策略。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、C 和 E。A 通过 ECR 复制和 eu-west-2 中的 NLB/ECS 工作负载支持区域部署，C 使用 DynamoDB 全局表让任务访问本区域表，E 使用 S3 多区域访问点和双向复制简化跨区域对象访问。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、C 和 E。A 通过 ECR 复制和 eu-west-2 中的 NLB/ECS 工作负载支持区域部署，C 使用 DynamoDB 全局表让任务访问本区域表，E 使用 S3 多区域访问点和双向复制简化跨区域对象访问。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A, C, and E. A uses ECR replication and an eu-west-2 NLB/ECS workload, C uses DynamoDB global tables with same-Region access from tasks, and E uses S3 Multi-Region Access Points with two-way replication for cross-Region object access.

contents.en: A company uses a CI/CD pipeline to deploy its workload in the ap-southeast-2 Region. The company receives images through a Network Load Balancer (NLB) and processes the images in AWS Fargate tasks on an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster. An Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository stores the images as Docker images. The company uses Amazon Route 53 to configure DNS. The company saves the images in an Amazon S3 bucket and saves the metadata from the images in an Amazon DynamoDB table. The company wants to expand the workload to a second Region. A DevOps engineer needs to build a highly available and resilient design to expand the workload to the eu-west-2 Region. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the FEWEST configuration changes? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 CI/CD 管道在 ap-southeast-2 Region 部署其工作负载。公司通过 Network Load Balancer (NLB) 接收图像，并在 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 集群上的 AWS Fargate 任务中处理图像。Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) 存储库将图像存储为 Docker images。公司使用 Amazon Route 53 配置 DNS。公司将图像保存到 Amazon S3 存储桶，并将图像的元数据保存到 Amazon DynamoDB 表。公司希望将工作负载扩展到第二个 Region。DevOps 工程师需要构建一个高可用且具备弹性的设计，以将工作负载扩展到 eu-west-2 Region。哪组步骤组合将在配置更改最少的情况下满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company has deployed a microservices-based application on Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). The application is experiencing performance issues. The company needs to identify which microservices are causing the issues. Which solution will provide this information?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure AWS X-Ray for each ECS task. Create an X-Ray group for each microservice. Implement custom X-Ray subsegments in each microservice to capture detailed timing information. Use an X-Ray service map to visualize and identify slow microservices and requests.

contents.en: Configure AWS X-Ray for each ECS task. Create an X-Ray group for each microservice. Implement custom X-Ray subsegments in each microservice to capture detailed timing information. Use an X-Ray service map to visualize and identify slow microservices and requests.
contents.zh: 为每个 ECS 任务配置 AWS X-Ray。为每个微服务创建一个 X-Ray 组。在每个微服务中实现自定义 X-Ray 子分段以捕获详细计时信息。使用 X-Ray 服务地图可视化并识别缓慢的微服务和请求。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure AWS X-Ray for each ECS task. Use an X-Ray service map to visualize the application's architecture and request flow. Filter the X-Ray traces by response time and error rate. Identify the microservices that have high latency or high error rates. Analyze individual traces to identify slow microservices and requests.

contents.en: Configure AWS X-Ray for each ECS task. Use an X-Ray service map to visualize the application's architecture and request flow. Filter the X-Ray traces by response time and error rate. Identify the microservices that have high latency or high error rates. Analyze individual traces to identify slow microservices and requests.
contents.zh: 为每个 ECS 任务配置 AWS X-Ray。使用 X-Ray 服务地图可视化应用程序架构和请求流。按响应时间和错误率筛选 X-Ray 跟踪。识别具有高延迟或高错误率的微服务。分析单个跟踪以识别缓慢的微服务和请求。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure Amazon CloudWatch Container Insights for each ECS task. Analyze Container Insights metrics to identify slow microservices. Use CloudWatch Logs Insights to filter the Container Insights log data by response time and error rate. Analyze the log data to identify slow requests.

contents.en: Configure Amazon CloudWatch Container Insights for each ECS task. Analyze Container Insights metrics to identify slow microservices. Use CloudWatch Logs Insights to filter the Container Insights log data by response time and error rate. Analyze the log data to identify slow requests.
contents.zh: 为每个 ECS 任务配置 Amazon CloudWatch Container Insights。分析 Container Insights 指标以识别缓慢的微服务。使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 按响应时间和错误率筛选 Container Insights 日志数据。分析日志数据以识别缓慢的请求。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure Amazon CloudWatch Container Insights for each ECS task. Use the CloudWatch automatic dashboard for Amazon ECS to identify slow microservices. Use CloudWatch Logs Insights to analyze the Container Insights performance logs for each ECS task to identify slow requests.

contents.en: Configure Amazon CloudWatch Container Insights for each ECS task. Use the CloudWatch automatic dashboard for Amazon ECS to identify slow microservices. Use CloudWatch Logs Insights to analyze the Container Insights performance logs for each ECS task to identify slow requests.
contents.zh: 为每个 ECS 任务配置 Amazon CloudWatch Container Insights。使用适用于 Amazon ECS 的 CloudWatch 自动仪表板来识别缓慢的微服务。使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 分析每个 ECS 任务的 Container Insights 性能日志，以识别缓慢的请求。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。为每个 ECS 任务配置 X-Ray 后，可通过服务地图查看架构和请求流，并按响应时间或错误率筛选 trace，定位高延迟或高错误率的微服务。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。为每个 ECS 任务配置 X-Ray 后，可通过服务地图查看架构和请求流，并按响应时间或错误率筛选 trace，定位高延迟或高错误率的微服务。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. Configuring X-Ray for each ECS task enables the service map and trace filtering by response time or error rate, helping identify the microservices and individual requests causing latency or errors.

contents.en: A company has deployed a microservices-based application on Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). The application is experiencing performance issues. The company needs to identify which microservices are causing the issues. Which solution will provide this information?
contents.zh: 一家公司已在 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 上部署了基于微服务的应用程序。该应用程序遇到性能问题。公司需要确定哪些微服务导致了这些问题。哪种解决方案将提供这些信息？

questions.content: A company uses AWS Organizations, AWS Control Tower, AWS Config, and Terraform to manage its AWS accounts and resources. The company must ensure that users deploy only AWS Lambda functions that are connected to a VPC in member AWS accounts. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational effort?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure AWS Control Tower to use proactive controls (guardrails). Enable the optional controls (guardrails) implemented with AWS CloudFormation hooks for Lambda on all OUs.

contents.en: Configure AWS Control Tower to use proactive controls (guardrails). Enable the optional controls (guardrails) implemented with AWS CloudFormation hooks for Lambda on all OUs.
contents.zh: 配置 AWS Control Tower 使用主动控制（guardrails）。在所有 OU 上启用使用 AWS CloudFormation hooks 为 Lambda 实现的可选控制（guardrails）。

options.label: B
options.content: Create a new SCP. Include a conditional statement that uses a StringEquals condition operator to check the lambd:Vpclds condition key against a list of VPC IDs. Configure the SCP to allow the lambda CreateFunction action and the lambda UpdateFunctionConfiguration action if the value of the condition key matches one of the VPC IDs.

contents.en: Create a new SCP. Include a conditional statement that uses a StringEquals condition operator to check the lambd:Vpclds condition key against a list of VPC IDs. Configure the SCP to allow the lambda CreateFunction action and the lambda UpdateFunctionConfiguration action if the value of the condition key matches one of the VPC IDs.
contents.zh: 创建新的 SCP。包含一个条件语句，该语句使用 StringEquals 条件运算符，根据 VPC ID 列表检查 lambd:Vpclds 条件键。配置 SCP，使其在条件键的值匹配其中一个 VPC ID 时允许 lambda CreateFunction 操作和 lambda UpdateFunctionConfiguration 操作。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a custom rule in AWS Config to detect Lambda functions that are not connected to a VPC when any Lambda function is created or updated.

contents.en: Create a custom rule in AWS Config to detect Lambda functions that are not connected to a VPC when any Lambda function is created or updated.
contents.zh: 在 AWS Config 中创建自定义规则，以便在创建或更新任何 Lambda 函数时检测未连接到 VPC 的 Lambda 函数。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a new SCP. Include a conditional statement that uses a Null condition operator to determine whether the lambda Vpclds condition key is absent. Configure the SCP to deny the lambda CreateFunction action and the lambda UpdateFunctionConfiguration action if the condition key is absent.

contents.en: Create a new SCP. Include a conditional statement that uses a Null condition operator to determine whether the lambda Vpclds condition key is absent. Configure the SCP to deny the lambda CreateFunction action and the lambda UpdateFunctionConfiguration action if the condition key is absent.
contents.zh: 创建新的 SCP。包含一个条件语句，该语句使用 Null 条件运算符来确定 lambda Vpclds 条件键是否不存在。配置 SCP，使其在条件键不存在时拒绝 lambda CreateFunction 操作和 lambda UpdateFunctionConfiguration 操作。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。由于 Terraform 会直接调用服务 API，基于 CloudFormation Hook 的预防控制可能不适用；SCP 在 IAM 授权边界拦截请求，可在缺少 lambda VpcIds 条件键时拒绝创建或更新函数配置。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。由于 Terraform 会直接调用服务 API，基于 CloudFormation Hook 的预防控制可能不适用；SCP 在 IAM 授权边界拦截请求，可在缺少 lambda VpcIds 条件键时拒绝创建或更新函数配置。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. Because Terraform typically calls service APIs directly, CloudFormation Hook-based controls may not apply; an SCP works at the IAM authorization boundary and can deny Lambda create or update calls when the VpcIds condition key is absent.

contents.en: A company uses AWS Organizations, AWS Control Tower, AWS Config, and Terraform to manage its AWS accounts and resources. The company must ensure that users deploy only AWS Lambda functions that are connected to a VPC in member AWS accounts. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational effort?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations、AWS Control Tower、AWS Config 和 Terraform 来管理其 AWS 账户和资源。公司必须确保用户在成员 AWS 账户中只部署连接到 VPC 的 AWS Lambda 函数。哪种解决方案将在运维工作量最少的情况下满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer is planning to use the AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) to manage infrastructure as code (IaC) for a microservices-based application. The DevOps engineer must create reusable components for common infrastructure patterns and must apply the same cost allocation tags across different microservices. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Create a custom CDK construct library that includes common infrastructure patterns. Create a CDK app. Use the TagManager class to add cost allocation tags to the whole app. Use the custom CDK construct library to write a higher-level construct that contains all the microservices. Deploy the microservices as a single CDK stack with environment-specific configurations

contents.en: Create a custom CDK construct library that includes common infrastructure patterns. Create a CDK app. Use the TagManager class to add cost allocation tags to the whole app. Use the custom CDK construct library to write a higher-level construct that contains all the microservices. Deploy the microservices as a single CDK stack with environment-specific configurations
contents.zh: 创建一个包含常见基础设施模式的自定义 CDK construct 库。创建一个 CDK app。使用 TagManager 类向整个 app 添加成本分配标签。使用自定义 CDK construct 库编写一个包含所有微服务的高级 construct。将微服务作为单个 CDK stack 部署，并使用特定于环境的配置

options.label: B
options.content: Create a custom CDK construct library that includes common infrastructure patterns. Create a CDK app. Use the Tags class to add cost allocation tags to the whole app. Use the custom CDK construct library to write higher-level constructs for each microservice. Deploy the microservices as separate CDK stacks with environment-specific configurations.

contents.en: Create a custom CDK construct library that includes common infrastructure patterns. Create a CDK app. Use the Tags class to add cost allocation tags to the whole app. Use the custom CDK construct library to write higher-level constructs for each microservice. Deploy the microservices as separate CDK stacks with environment-specific configurations.
contents.zh: 创建一个包含常见基础设施模式的自定义 CDK construct 库。创建一个 CDK app。使用 Tags 类向整个 app 添加成本分配标签。使用自定义 CDK construct 库为每个微服务编写高级 constructs。将微服务作为单独的 CDK stacks 部署，并使用特定于环境的配置。

options.label: C
options.content: Create AWS Service Catalog products that contain common infrastructure components. Create a CDK app. Use the TagManager class to add cost allocation tags to the whole app. Use the Service Catalog products to write a higher-level construct that contains all the microservices. Deploy the microservices as a single CDK stack with environment-specific configurations.

contents.en: Create AWS Service Catalog products that contain common infrastructure components. Create a CDK app. Use the TagManager class to add cost allocation tags to the whole app. Use the Service Catalog products to write a higher-level construct that contains all the microservices. Deploy the microservices as a single CDK stack with environment-specific configurations.
contents.zh: 创建包含常见基础设施组件的 AWS Service Catalog 产品。创建一个 CDK app。使用 TagManager 类向整个 app 添加成本分配标签。使用 Service Catalog 产品编写一个包含所有微服务的高级 construct。将微服务作为单个 CDK stack 部署，并使用特定于环境的配置。

options.label: D
options.content: Create AWS Service Catalog products that contain common infrastructure components. Create a CDK app. Use the Tags class to add cost allocation tags to the whole app. Use the Service Catalog products to write higher-level constructs for each microservice. Deploy the microservices as separate CDK stacks with environment-specific configurations.

contents.en: Create AWS Service Catalog products that contain common infrastructure components. Create a CDK app. Use the Tags class to add cost allocation tags to the whole app. Use the Service Catalog products to write higher-level constructs for each microservice. Deploy the microservices as separate CDK stacks with environment-specific configurations.
contents.zh: 创建包含常见基础设施组件的 AWS Service Catalog 产品。创建一个 CDK app。使用 Tags 类向整个 app 添加成本分配标签。使用 Service Catalog 产品为每个微服务编写高级 constructs。将微服务作为单独的 CDK stacks 部署，并使用特定于环境的配置。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。自定义 CDK construct library 可复用通用基础设施模式，Tags 类可递归添加成本分配标签，按微服务拆分独立 CDK stack 则支持独立生命周期和环境配置。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。自定义 CDK construct library 可复用通用基础设施模式，Tags 类可递归添加成本分配标签，按微服务拆分独立 CDK stack 则支持独立生命周期和环境配置。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. A custom CDK construct library reuses common infrastructure patterns, the Tags class applies cost allocation tags recursively, and separate CDK stacks per microservice support independent lifecycles and environment-specific configuration.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer is planning to use the AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) to manage infrastructure as code (IaC) for a microservices-based application. The DevOps engineer must create reusable components for common infrastructure patterns and must apply the same cost allocation tags across different microservices. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师计划使用 AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) 为一个基于微服务的应用程序管理基础设施即代码 (IaC)。该 DevOps 工程师必须为常见基础设施模式创建可重用组件，并且必须在不同微服务之间应用相同的成本分配标签。哪种解决方案将满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company runs an application that uses an Amazon S3 bucket to store images. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a multi- Region disaster recover (DR) strategy for the S3 objects. The DevOps engineer enables two-way replication between the S3 buckets. The company must be able to fail over to a second S3 bucket that is in a second AWS Region. When an image is added to either S3 bucket, the image must be replicated to the other S3 bucket within 15 minutes. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient way? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Enable S3 Replication Time Control (S3 RTC) for each replication rule used in the configuration.

contents.en: Enable S3 Replication Time Control (S3 RTC) for each replication rule used in the configuration.
contents.zh: 为配置中使用的每个复制规则启用 S3 Replication Time Control (S3 RTC)。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an S3 Multi-Region Access Point in an active-passive configuration.

contents.en: Create an S3 Multi-Region Access Point in an active-passive configuration.
contents.zh: 以主动-被动配置创建 S3 Multi-Region Access Point。

options.label: C
options.content: Call the SubmitMultiRegionAccessPointRoutes operation in the Amazon S3 API when the company needs to fail over to the S3 bucket in the second Region.

contents.en: Call the SubmitMultiRegionAccessPointRoutes operation in the Amazon S3 API when the company needs to fail over to the S3 bucket in the second Region.
contents.zh: 当公司需要故障转移到第二个 Region 中的 S3 存储桶时，调用 Amazon S3 API 中的 SubmitMultiRegionAccessPointRoutes 操作。

options.label: D
options.content: Enable S3 Transfer Acceleration on both S3 buckets.

contents.en: Enable S3 Transfer Acceleration on both S3 buckets.
contents.zh: 在两个 S3 存储桶上启用 S3 Transfer Acceleration。

options.label: E
options.content: Configure a routing control in Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller. Add both S3 buckets in an active-passive configuration.

contents.en: Configure a routing control in Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller. Add both S3 buckets in an active-passive configuration.
contents.zh: 在 Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller 中配置 routing control。以主动-被动配置添加两个 S3 存储桶。

options.label: F
options.content: Use an Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller to shift traffic from the primary bucket to the failover bucket in the second Region.

contents.en: Use an Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller to shift traffic from the primary bucket to the failover bucket in the second Region.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller 将流量从主存储桶切换到第二个 Region 中的故障转移存储桶。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、B 和 C。A 启用 S3 RTC 以满足 15 分钟复制目标，B 使用主动-被动 S3 多区域访问点简化访问，C 在故障切换时调用 SubmitMultiRegionAccessPointRoutes。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、B 和 C。A 启用 S3 RTC 以满足 15 分钟复制目标，B 使用主动-被动 S3 多区域访问点简化访问，C 在故障切换时调用 SubmitMultiRegionAccessPointRoutes。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A, B, and C. A enables S3 RTC to support the 15-minute replication target, B uses an active-passive S3 Multi-Region Access Point, and C performs failover with SubmitMultiRegionAccessPointRoutes.

contents.en: A company runs an application that uses an Amazon S3 bucket to store images. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a multi- Region disaster recover (DR) strategy for the S3 objects.
