The DevOps engineer enables two-way replication between the S3 buckets. The company must be able to fail over to a second S3 bucket that is in a second AWS Region. When an image is added to either S3 bucket, the image must be replicated to the other S3 bucket within 15 minutes. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient way? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司运行一个使用 Amazon S3 存储桶存储图像的应用程序。DevOps 工程师需要为 S3 对象实施多 Region 灾难恢复 (DR) 策略。DevOps 工程师在 S3 存储桶之间启用双向复制。公司必须能够故障转移到位于第二个 AWS Region 的第二个 S3 存储桶。当图像添加到任一 S3 存储桶时，图像必须在 15 分钟内复制到另一个 S3 存储桶。哪组步骤组合将以最高运维效率满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company is developing a mobile app that requires extensive automated testing across multiple device types. The company is using AWS CodePipeline for its CI/CD pipeline. The company must implement a scalable testing solution that can handle increased test loads as the app grows. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST management overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Integrate AWS Device Farm with the pipeline to run the tests and scale as needed.

contents.en: Integrate AWS Device Farm with the pipeline to run the tests and scale as needed.
contents.zh: 将 AWS Device Farm 与管道集成，以运行测试并按需扩展。

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances with various mobile device emulators and auto scaling to run the tests. Create a custom AWS Lambda function to invoke EC2 test runs.

contents.en: Deploy a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances with various mobile device emulators and auto scaling to run the tests. Create a custom AWS Lambda function to invoke EC2 test runs.
contents.zh: 部署一组 Amazon EC2 实例，包含各种移动设备模拟器和自动扩缩以运行测试。创建自定义 AWS Lambda 函数来调用 EC2 测试运行。

options.label: C
options.content: Implement a containerized testing solution that uses Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with auto scaling. Configure the pipeline to invoke an AWS Lambda function to start the test runs on the ECS cluster.

contents.en: Implement a containerized testing solution that uses Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with auto scaling. Configure the pipeline to invoke an AWS Lambda function to start the test runs on the ECS cluster.
contents.zh: 实施一个容器化测试解决方案，使用带有自动扩缩的 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)。配置管道调用 AWS Lambda 函数，以在 ECS 集群上启动测试运行。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS Lambda functions with custom runtime emulators to run the tests. Integrate the Lambda functions with the pipeline.

contents.en: Use AWS Lambda functions with custom runtime emulators to run the tests. Integrate the Lambda functions with the pipeline.
contents.zh: 使用带有自定义运行时模拟器的 AWS Lambda 函数运行测试。将 Lambda 函数与管道集成。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。AWS Device Farm 是用于多设备移动应用测试的托管服务，并可与流水线集成，按需扩展测试而无需管理 EC2 或容器基础设施。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。AWS Device Farm 是用于多设备移动应用测试的托管服务，并可与流水线集成，按需扩展测试而无需管理 EC2 或容器基础设施。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. AWS Device Farm is a managed service for mobile testing across real devices and integrates with the pipeline, scaling tests without requiring EC2 or container infrastructure management.

contents.en: A company is developing a mobile app that requires extensive automated testing across multiple device types. The company is using AWS CodePipeline for its CI/CD pipeline. The company must implement a scalable testing solution that can handle increased test loads as the app grows. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST management overhead?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在开发一款移动应用，需要跨多种设备类型进行大量自动化测试。公司正在使用 AWS CodePipeline 作为其 CI/CD 管道。公司必须实施一个可扩展的测试解决方案，能够随着应用增长处理增加的测试负载。哪种解决方案将在管理开销最少的情况下满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has an application that streams logs to an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. The logs must be available for the team to search in CloudWatch for at least 30 days. Logs must be accessible with low latency for at least 90 days. After 180 days, log retrieval is rare and latency is not important. A DevOps engineer creates an Amazon S3 bucket to store the logs. Log availability metrics and data protection are important to the company. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST cost-effective way?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure the log group to have a retention period of 30 days and to use the infrequent access log class. Create a CloudWatch metric stream that uses Amazon Kinesis Data Streams to send log events to the S3 bucket. Create an S3 Lifecycle policy to move objects to Amazon S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) after 90 days and to Amazon Glacier Flexible Retrieval after 180 days.

contents.en: Configure the log group to have a retention period of 30 days and to use the infrequent access log class. Create a CloudWatch metric stream that uses Amazon Kinesis Data Streams to send log events to the S3 bucket. Create an S3 Lifecycle policy to move objects to Amazon S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) after 90 days and to Amazon Glacier Flexible Retrieval after 180 days.
contents.zh: 配置日志组的保留期为 30 天，并使用 infrequent access log class。创建一个使用 Amazon Kinesis Data Streams 将日志事件发送到 S3 存储桶的 CloudWatch metric stream。创建 S3 Lifecycle policy，在 90 天后将对象移动到 Amazon S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA)，在 180 天后移动到 Amazon Glacier Flexible Retrieval。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure the log group to have a retention period of 30 days and to use the infrequent access log class. Create a CloudWatch metric stream that uses Amazon Data Firehose to send log events to the S3 bucket. Create an S3 Lifecycle policy to move objects to Amazon S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA) after 90 days and to Amazon S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval after 180 days.

contents.en: Configure the log group to have a retention period of 30 days and to use the infrequent access log class. Create a CloudWatch metric stream that uses Amazon Data Firehose to send log events to the S3 bucket. Create an S3 Lifecycle policy to move objects to Amazon S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA) after 90 days and to Amazon S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval after 180 days.
contents.zh: 配置日志组的保留期为 30 天，并使用 infrequent access log class。创建一个使用 Amazon Data Firehose 将日志事件发送到 S3 存储桶的 CloudWatch metric stream。创建 S3 Lifecycle policy，在 90 天后将对象移动到 Amazon S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA)，在 180 天后移动到 Amazon S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the log groups to have a retention period of 30 days. Create a CloudWatch subscription filter that uses Amazon Kinesis Data Streams to send log events to the S3 bucket by writing files. Create an S3 Lifecycle policy to move objects to Amazon S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) after 90 days and to Amazon S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval after 180 days.

contents.en: Configure the log groups to have a retention period of 30 days. Create a CloudWatch subscription filter that uses Amazon Kinesis Data Streams to send log events to the S3 bucket by writing files. Create an S3 Lifecycle policy to move objects to Amazon S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) after 90 days and to Amazon S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval after 180 days.
contents.zh: 配置日志组的保留期为 30 天。创建一个 CloudWatch subscription filter，使用 Amazon Kinesis Data Streams 通过写入文件将日志事件发送到 S3 存储桶。创建 S3 Lifecycle policy，在 90 天后将对象移动到 Amazon S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA)，在 180 天后移动到 Amazon S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure the log groups to have a retention period of 30 days. Create a CloudWatch subscription filter that uses Amazon Data Firehose to send log events to the S3 bucket. Create an S3 Lifecycle policy to move objects to Amazon S3 Standard- Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) after 90 days and to Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 180 days.

contents.en: Configure the log groups to have a retention period of 30 days. Create a CloudWatch subscription filter that uses Amazon Data Firehose to send log events to the S3 bucket. Create an S3 Lifecycle policy to move objects to Amazon S3 Standard- Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) after 90 days and to Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 180 days.
contents.zh: 配置日志组的保留期为 30 天。创建一个 CloudWatch subscription filter，使用 Amazon Data Firehose 将日志事件发送到 S3 存储桶。创建 S3 Lifecycle policy，在 90 天后将对象移动到 Amazon S3 Standard- Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA)，在 180 天后移动到 Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。保留 CloudWatch 日志 30 天后，用订阅筛选器经 Amazon Data Firehose 发送到 S3；S3 生命周期策略在 90 天转入 Standard-IA、180 天转入 Glacier Deep Archive，以平衡保护和成本。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。保留 CloudWatch 日志 30 天后，用订阅筛选器经 Amazon Data Firehose 发送到 S3；S3 生命周期策略在 90 天转入 Standard-IA、180 天转入 Glacier Deep Archive，以平衡保护和成本。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. Keep CloudWatch logs for 30 days, use a subscription filter with Amazon Data Firehose to send events to S3, and apply lifecycle transitions to Standard-IA after 90 days and Glacier Deep Archive after 180 days for cost-effective retention.

contents.en: A company has an application that streams logs to an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. The logs must be available for the team to search in CloudWatch for at least 30 days. Logs must be accessible with low latency for at least 90 days. After 180 days, log retrieval is rare and latency is not important. A DevOps engineer creates an Amazon S3 bucket to store the logs. Log availability metrics and data protection are important to the company. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST cost-effective way?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个应用程序将日志流式传输到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 日志组。团队必须能够在 CloudWatch 中搜索日志至少 30 天。日志必须至少 90 天以低延迟访问。180 天后，日志检索很少发生，并且延迟并不重要。DevOps 工程师创建了一个 Amazon S3 存储桶来存储日志。日志可用性指标和数据保护对公司很重要。哪种解决方案将以最具成本效益的方式满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has an organization in AWS Organizations. The organization has all features enabled and has AWS CloudTrail trusted access configured for the management account. An Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic is configured for notifications. The company needs all AWS events in all AWS Regions in the organization to be recorded and retained in an audit account. The company needs near real-time notifications of any failed login attempts. A DevOps engineer has created an organization trail in the management account to log events for all Regions. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational effort?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure the trail to publish logs to a new Amazon S3 bucket in the audit account. In the audit account, create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to failed login events in CloudTrail. Configure the EventBridge rule to notify the SNS topic.

contents.en: Configure the trail to publish logs to a new Amazon S3 bucket in the audit account. In the audit account, create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to failed login events in CloudTrail. Configure the EventBridge rule to notify the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 配置 trail 将日志发布到审计账户中的新 Amazon S3 存储桶。在审计账户中，创建对 CloudTrail 中失败登录事件作出反应的 Amazon EventBridge 规则。配置 EventBridge 规则通知 SNS 主题。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure the trail to publish logs to a new Amazon S3 bucket in the management account. Configure an Amazon Athena table to read from the new S3 bucket. Create an AWS Lambda function that queries the Athena table for failed login events and publishes the findings to the SNS topic. Create an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule to invoke the Lambda function every 5 minutes.

contents.en: Configure the trail to publish logs to a new Amazon S3 bucket in the management account. Configure an Amazon Athena table to read from the new S3 bucket. Create an AWS Lambda function that queries the Athena table for failed login events and publishes the findings to the SNS topic. Create an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule to invoke the Lambda function every 5 minutes.
contents.zh: 配置 trail 将日志发布到管理账户中的新 Amazon S3 存储桶。配置 Amazon Athena 表以从新的 S3 存储桶读取。创建 AWS Lambda 函数，查询 Athena 表中的失败登录事件，并将发现发布到 SNS 主题。创建 Amazon EventBridge 计划规则，每 5 分钟调用 Lambda 函数。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the trail to publish logs to a new Amazon S3 bucket in the audit account and a new Amazon CloudWatch log group in the management account. Create a CloudWatch Logs metric filter on the log group to create a custom metric for failed logins. Configure a CloudWatch alarm that uses the custom metric and notifies the SNS topic.

contents.en: Configure the trail to publish logs to a new Amazon S3 bucket in the audit account and a new Amazon CloudWatch log group in the management account. Create a CloudWatch Logs metric filter on the log group to create a custom metric for failed logins. Configure a CloudWatch alarm that uses the custom metric and notifies the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 配置 trail 将日志发布到审计账户中的新 Amazon S3 存储桶，以及管理账户中的新 Amazon CloudWatch 日志组。在该日志组上创建 CloudWatch Logs metric filter，以便为失败登录创建自定义指标。配置使用该自定义指标并通知 SNS 主题的 CloudWatch alarm。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure the trail to publish logs to a new Amazon CloudWatch log group in the audit account. Create an Amazon Kinesis data stream in the audit account. Configure a subscription filter on the log group to send the logs to the data stream. Use Amazon Managed Service for Apache Flink to filter the data stream for failed logins. Publish the results to the SNS topic.

contents.en: Configure the trail to publish logs to a new Amazon CloudWatch log group in the audit account. Create an Amazon Kinesis data stream in the audit account. Configure a subscription filter on the log group to send the logs to the data stream. Use Amazon Managed Service for Apache Flink to filter the data stream for failed logins. Publish the results to the SNS topic.
contents.zh: 配置 trail 将日志发布到审计账户中的新 Amazon CloudWatch 日志组。在审计账户中创建 Amazon Kinesis data stream。在该日志组上配置 subscription filter，将日志发送到 data stream。使用 Amazon Managed Service for Apache Flink 筛选 data stream 中的失败登录。将结果发布到 SNS 主题。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。组织 trail 发送到 CloudWatch Logs 时，可把整个组织、所有成员账号和区域的事件聚合到管理账号的单个日志组，再用一个指标筛选器、告警和 SNS 通知处理失败登录。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。组织 trail 发送到 CloudWatch Logs 时，可把整个组织、所有成员账号和区域的事件聚合到管理账号的单个日志组，再用一个指标筛选器、告警和 SNS 通知处理失败登录。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. When an organization trail publishes to CloudWatch Logs, events from member accounts and Regions can be aggregated into one log group in the management account, where a single metric filter, alarm, and SNS notification can handle failed logins.

contents.en: A company has an organization in AWS Organizations. The organization has all features enabled and has AWS CloudTrail trusted access configured for the management account. An Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic is configured for notifications. The company needs all AWS events in all AWS Regions in the organization to be recorded and retained in an audit account. The company needs near real-time notifications of any failed login attempts. A DevOps engineer has created an organization trail in the management account to log events for all Regions. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational effort?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 AWS Organizations 中有一个组织。该组织已启用所有功能，并且已为管理账户配置 AWS CloudTrail trusted access。一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题已配置用于通知。公司需要记录并保留组织中所有 AWS Region 的所有 AWS 事件，并将其保留在审计账户中。公司需要对任何失败的登录尝试进行近实时通知。DevOps 工程师已在管理账户中创建 organization trail，用于记录所有 Region 的事件。哪种解决方案将在运维工作量最少的情况下满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company runs a microservices application on Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). Users recently reported significant delays while accessing an account summary feature, particularly during peak business hours. A DevOps engineer used Amazon CloudWatch metrics and logs to troubleshoot the issue. The logs indicated normal CPU and memory utilization on the EKS nodes. The DevOps engineer was not able to identify where the delays occurred within the microservices architecture. The DevOps engineer needs to increase the observability of the application to pinpoint where the delays are occurring. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Deploy the AWS X-Ray daemon as a DaemonSet in the EKS cluster. Use the X-Ray SDK to instrument the application code. Redeploy the application

contents.en: Deploy the AWS X-Ray daemon as a DaemonSet in the EKS cluster. Use the X-Ray SDK to instrument the application code. Redeploy the application
contents.zh: 将 AWS X-Ray daemon 作为 DaemonSet 部署到 EKS 集群。使用 X-Ray SDK 对应用程序代码进行插桩。重新部署应用程序

options.label: B
options.content: Enable CloudWatch Container Insights for the EKS cluster. Use the Container Insights data to diagnose the delays.

contents.en: Enable CloudWatch Container Insights for the EKS cluster. Use the Container Insights data to diagnose the delays.
contents.zh: 为 EKS 集群启用 CloudWatch Container Insights。使用 Container Insights 数据诊断延迟。

options.label: C
options.content: Create alarms based on the existing CloudWatch metrics. Set up an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to send email alerts.

contents.en: Create alarms based on the existing CloudWatch metrics. Set up an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to send email alerts.
contents.zh: 基于现有 CloudWatch 指标创建警报。设置 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题以发送电子邮件提醒。

options.label: D
options.content: Increase the timeout settings in the application code for network operations to allow more time for operations to finish.

contents.en: Increase the timeout settings in the application code for network operations to allow more time for operations to finish.
contents.zh: 增加应用程序代码中网络操作的超时设置，以允许操作有更多时间完成。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。当 CPU/内存正常但性能下降时，瓶颈可能在服务间调用；在 EKS 中以 DaemonSet 部署 X-Ray daemon，并用 X-Ray SDK 对应用插桩后，可通过分布式追踪定位延迟来源。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。当 CPU/内存正常但性能下降时，瓶颈可能在服务间调用；在 EKS 中以 DaemonSet 部署 X-Ray daemon，并用 X-Ray SDK 对应用插桩后，可通过分布式追踪定位延迟来源。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. When CPU and memory look normal but performance degrades, the bottleneck may be service-to-service communication; deploying the X-Ray daemon as a DaemonSet and instrumenting the app with the X-Ray SDK enables distributed tracing to pinpoint latency.

contents.en: A company runs a microservices application on Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). Users recently reported significant delays while accessing an account summary feature, particularly during peak business hours. A DevOps engineer used Amazon CloudWatch metrics and logs to troubleshoot the issue. The logs indicated normal CPU and memory utilization on the EKS nodes. The DevOps engineer was not able to identify where the delays occurred within the microservices architecture. The DevOps engineer needs to increase the observability of the application to pinpoint where the delays are occurring. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 上运行微服务应用程序。用户最近报告在访问账户摘要功能时出现明显延迟，尤其是在业务高峰时段。DevOps 工程师使用 Amazon CloudWatch 指标和日志排查该问题。日志显示 EKS 节点上的 CPU 和内存利用率正常。DevOps 工程师无法确定延迟在微服务架构中的哪个位置发生。DevOps 工程师需要提高应用程序的可观测性，以准确定位延迟发生的位置。哪种解决方案将满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline to upload AWS CloudFormation templates to an Amazon S3 bucket. The pipeline uses the templates to deploy CloudFormation stacks that match the names of the templates. The company has experienced issues when it tries to revert templates to a previous version. To prevent these issues, the company must have the ability to review template modifications before the modifications are deployed to production. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure a connection in AWS CodeConnections to a Git repository. Store the templates in the Git repository. Configure a pull request workflow to review template modifications. Configure AWS CloudFormation Git sync for the stacks.

contents.en: Configure a connection in AWS CodeConnections to a Git repository. Store the templates in the Git repository. Configure a pull request workflow to review template modifications. Configure AWS CloudFormation Git sync for the stacks.
contents.zh: 在 AWS CodeConnections 中配置到 Git 存储库的连接。将模板存储在 Git 存储库中。配置 pull request 工作流以审查模板修改。为 stacks 配置 AWS CloudFormation Git sync。

options.label: B
options.content: Add a manual review action in the pipeline to review modifications to the template code before the stack deployments.

contents.en: Add a manual review action in the pipeline to review modifications to the template code before the stack deployments.
contents.zh: 在管道中添加 manual review 操作，以便在 stack 部署之前审查模板代码的修改。

options.label: C
options.content: Update the pipeline to invoke an AWS Lambda function to check the template modifications before the stack deployments.

contents.en: Update the pipeline to invoke an AWS Lambda function to check the template modifications before the stack deployments.
contents.zh: 更新管道，在 stack 部署之前调用 AWS Lambda 函数检查模板修改。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure a connection in AWS CodeConnections to a Git repository. Store the templates in the Git repository. Configure the pipeline to include a source action that uses the connection. Add a manual review action to the pipeline to review template modifications before the stack deployments.

contents.en: Configure a connection in AWS CodeConnections to a Git repository. Store the templates in the Git repository. Configure the pipeline to include a source action that uses the connection. Add a manual review action to the pipeline to review template modifications before the stack deployments.
contents.zh: 在 AWS CodeConnections 中配置到 Git 存储库的连接。将模板存储在 Git 存储库中。配置管道包含使用该连接的源操作。向管道添加 manual review 操作，以便在 stack 部署之前审查模板修改。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。将 CloudFormation 模板放在 Git 仓库中，通过 CodeConnections 和拉取请求流程审查修改，再使用 CloudFormation Git sync 在合并后自动同步堆栈，既支持版本管理也降低运维开销。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。将 CloudFormation 模板放在 Git 仓库中，通过 CodeConnections 和拉取请求流程审查修改，再使用 CloudFormation Git sync 在合并后自动同步堆栈，既支持版本管理也降低运维开销。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. Storing CloudFormation templates in Git, reviewing changes through pull requests via CodeConnections, and using CloudFormation Git sync after merge provides versioning, review, and automated deployment with low overhead.

contents.en: A company uses a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline to upload AWS CloudFormation templates to an Amazon S3 bucket. The pipeline uses the templates to deploy CloudFormation stacks that match the names of the templates. The company has experienced issues when it tries to revert templates to a previous version. To prevent these issues, the company must have the ability to review template modifications before the modifications are deployed to production. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 AWS CodePipeline 中使用一个管道将 AWS CloudFormation 模板上传到 Amazon S3 存储桶。该管道使用这些模板部署名称与模板名称匹配的 CloudFormation stacks。公司在尝试将模板回退到以前版本时遇到过问题。为防止这些问题，公司必须能够在模板修改部署到生产环境之前审查这些修改。哪种解决方案将在运维开销最少的情况下满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses a trunk-based development branching strategy. The company has two AWS CodePipeline pipelines that are integrated with a Git provider. The pull_request pipeline has a branch filter that matches the feature branches. The main_branch pipeline has a branch filter that matches the main branch. When pull requests are merged into the main branch, the pull requests are deployed by using the main_branch pipeline. The company's developers need test results for all submitted pull requests as quickly as possible from the pull_request pipeline. The company wants to ensure that the main_branch pipeline's test results finish and that each deployment is complete before the next pipeline execution. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure the pull_request pipeline to use PARALLEL mode. Configure the main_branch pipeline to use QUEUED mode.

contents.en: Configure the pull_request pipeline to use PARALLEL mode. Configure the main_branch pipeline to use QUEUED mode.
contents.zh: 配置 pull_request 管道使用 PARALLEL 模式。配置 main_branch 管道使用 QUEUED 模式。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure the pull_request pipeline to use SUPERSEDED mode. Configure the main_branch pipeline to use QUEUED mode.

contents.en: Configure the pull_request pipeline to use SUPERSEDED mode. Configure the main_branch pipeline to use QUEUED mode.
contents.zh: 配置 pull_request 管道使用 SUPERSEDED 模式。配置 main_branch 管道使用 QUEUED 模式。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure the pull_request pipeline to use PARALLEL mode. Configure the main_branch pipeline to use SUPERSEDED mode

contents.en: Configure the pull_request pipeline to use PARALLEL mode. Configure the main_branch pipeline to use SUPERSEDED mode
contents.zh: 配置 pull_request 管道使用 PARALLEL 模式。配置 main_branch 管道使用 SUPERSEDED 模式

options.label: D
options.content: Configure the pull_request pipeline to use QUEUED mode. Configure the main_branch pipeline to use SUPERSEDED mode.

contents.en: Configure the pull_request pipeline to use QUEUED mode. Configure the main_branch pipeline to use SUPERSEDED mode.
contents.zh: 配置 pull_request 管道使用 QUEUED 模式。配置 main_branch 管道使用 SUPERSEDED 模式。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。pull_request 流水线使用 PARALLEL 模式可并发运行测试、快速反馈；main_branch 流水线使用 QUEUED 模式可确保部署按顺序完成，避免相互覆盖。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。pull_request 流水线使用 PARALLEL 模式可并发运行测试、快速反馈；main_branch 流水线使用 QUEUED 模式可确保部署按顺序完成，避免相互覆盖。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. PARALLEL mode for the pull_request pipeline gives fast concurrent test feedback, while QUEUED mode for the main_branch pipeline ensures deployments run sequentially and finish before the next begins.

contents.en: A company uses a trunk-based development branching strategy. The company has two AWS CodePipeline pipelines that are integrated with a Git provider. The pull_request pipeline has a branch filter that matches the feature branches. The main_branch pipeline has a branch filter that matches the main branch. When pull requests are merged into the main branch, the pull requests are deployed by using the main_branch pipeline. The company's developers need test results for all submitted pull requests as quickly as possible from the pull_request pipeline. The company wants to ensure that the main_branch pipeline's test results finish and that each deployment is complete before the next pipeline execution. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用基于主干的开发分支策略。公司有两个 AWS CodePipeline 管道，与 Git 提供商集成。pull_request 管道具有匹配功能分支的分支筛选器。main_branch 管道具有匹配 main 分支的分支筛选器。当 pull requests 合并到 main 分支时，pull requests 会使用 main_branch 管道进行部署。公司的开发人员需要尽快从 pull_request 管道获得所有已提交 pull requests 的测试结果。公司希望确保 main_branch 管道的测试结果完成，并且每次部署都在下一次管道执行之前完成。哪种解决方案将满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer needs to configure an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that publishes container images to an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository. The pipeline must wait for the previous run to finish and must run when new Git tags are pushed to a Git repository that is connected to AWS CodeConnections. An existing deployment pipeline needs to run in response to the publication of new container images. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure a CodePipeline V2 type pipeline that uses QUEUED mode. Add a trigger filter to the pipeline definition that includes all tags. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that matches container image pushes to start the existing deployment pipeline.

contents.en: Configure a CodePipeline V2 type pipeline that uses QUEUED mode. Add a trigger filter to the pipeline definition that includes all tags. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that matches container image pushes to start the existing deployment pipeline.
contents.zh: 配置使用 QUEUED 模式的 CodePipeline V2 类型管道。向管道定义添加包含所有 tags 的触发器筛选器。配置匹配容器映像推送的 Amazon EventBridge 规则，以启动现有部署管道。

options.label: B
options.content: Configure a CodePipeline V2 type pipeline that uses SUPERSEDED mode. Add a trigger filter to the pipeline definition that includes all branches. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that matches container image pushes to start the existing deployment pipeline.

contents.en: Configure a CodePipeline V2 type pipeline that uses SUPERSEDED mode. Add a trigger filter to the pipeline definition that includes all branches. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that matches container image pushes to start the existing deployment pipeline.
contents.zh: 配置使用 SUPERSEDED 模式的 CodePipeline V2 类型管道。向管道定义添加包含所有 branches 的触发器筛选器。配置匹配容器映像推送的 Amazon EventBridge 规则，以启动现有部署管道。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure a CodePipeline V1 type pipeline that uses SUPERSEDED mode. Add a trigger filter to the pipeline definition that includes all tags. Add a stage at the end of the pipeline to invoke the existing deployment pipeline.

contents.en: Configure a CodePipeline V1 type pipeline that uses SUPERSEDED mode. Add a trigger filter to the pipeline definition that includes all tags. Add a stage at the end of the pipeline to invoke the existing deployment pipeline.
contents.zh: 配置使用 SUPERSEDED 模式的 CodePipeline V1 类型管道。向管道定义添加包含所有 tags 的触发器筛选器。在管道末尾添加一个阶段来调用现有部署管道。

options.label: D
options.content: Configure a CodePipeline V1 type pipeline that uses QUEUED mode. Add a trigger filter to the pipeline definition that includes all branches. Add a stage at the end of the pipeline to invoke the existing deployment pipeline.

contents.en: Configure a CodePipeline V1 type pipeline that uses QUEUED mode. Add a trigger filter to the pipeline definition that includes all branches. Add a stage at the end of the pipeline to invoke the existing deployment pipeline.
contents.zh: 配置使用 QUEUED 模式的 CodePipeline V1 类型管道。向管道定义添加包含所有 branches 的触发器筛选器。在管道末尾添加一个阶段来调用现有部署管道。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。CodePipeline V2 的 QUEUED 模式可让执行等待前一次完成；V2 触发器可按 Git 标签过滤，EventBridge 可监听 ECR 镜像推送并启动现有部署流水线。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。CodePipeline V2 的 QUEUED 模式可让执行等待前一次完成；V2 触发器可按 Git 标签过滤，EventBridge 可监听 ECR 镜像推送并启动现有部署流水线。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. CodePipeline V2 QUEUED mode makes executions wait for previous runs, V2 triggers support Git tag filtering, and EventBridge can listen for ECR image push events to start the existing deployment pipeline.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer needs to configure an AWS CodePipeline pipeline that publishes container images to an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) repository. The pipeline must wait for the previous run to finish and must run when new Git tags are pushed to a Git repository that is connected to AWS CodeConnections. An existing deployment pipeline needs to run in response to the publication of new container images. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师需要配置一个 AWS CodePipeline 管道，将容器映像发布到 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) 存储库。该管道必须等待上一次运行完成，并且必须在新的 Git tags 推送到连接到 AWS CodeConnections 的 Git 存储库时运行。现有部署管道需要响应新容器映像的发布而运行。哪种解决方案将满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company is running an application on Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). The company needs to implement comprehensive logging for the control plane and the nodes. The company must analyze API requests to the Kubernetes control plane and must monitor container performance on the nodes. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Enable AWS CloudTrail for control plane logging. Deploy Logstash as a ReplicaSet on the nodes to collect logs from the nodes. Use Amazon OpenSearch Service to store and analyze the logs for the control plane and the nodes.

contents.en: Enable AWS CloudTrail for control plane logging. Deploy Logstash as a ReplicaSet on the nodes to collect logs from the nodes. Use Amazon OpenSearch Service to store and analyze the logs for the control plane and the nodes.
contents.zh: 为控制平面日志记录启用 AWS CloudTrail。在节点上将 Logstash 部署为 ReplicaSet，以收集节点日志。使用 Amazon OpenSearch Service 存储和分析控制平面与节点的日志。

options.label: B
options.content: Enable control plane logging for the EKS cluster. Send the logs to Amazon CloudWatch. Use CloudWatch Container Insights to collect logs for the nodes and the containers. Use CloudWatch Logs Insights to query and analyze the logs for the control plane and the nodes.

contents.en: Enable control plane logging for the EKS cluster. Send the logs to Amazon CloudWatch. Use CloudWatch Container Insights to collect logs for the nodes and the containers. Use CloudWatch Logs Insights to query and analyze the logs for the control plane and the nodes.
contents.zh: 为 EKS 集群启用控制平面日志记录。将日志发送到 Amazon CloudWatch。使用 CloudWatch Container Insights 收集节点和容器的日志。使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 查询和分析控制平面与节点的日志。

options.label: C
options.content: Enable API server control plane logging for the EKS cluster. Send the logs to Amazon S3 Deploy Kubernetes Event Exporter to the nodes to collect logs from the nodes. Send the logs to Amazon S3. Use Amazon Athena to query logs for the control plane and the nodes. Use Amazon QuickSight for visualization.

contents.en: Enable API server control plane logging for the EKS cluster. Send the logs to Amazon S3 Deploy Kubernetes Event Exporter to the nodes to collect logs from the nodes. Send the logs to Amazon S3. Use Amazon Athena to query logs for the control plane and the nodes. Use Amazon QuickSight for visualization.
contents.zh: 为 EKS 集群启用 API server 控制平面日志记录。将日志发送到 Amazon S3 在节点上部署 Kubernetes Event Exporter 以收集节点日志。将日志发送到 Amazon S3。使用 Amazon Athena 查询控制平面和节点的日志。使用 Amazon QuickSight 进行可视化。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS Distro for OpenTelemetry to collect logs for the control plane and the nodes. Stream all the logs to Amazon Data Firehose. Use Amazon Redshift to analyze the aggregated log data for the control plane and the nodes.

contents.en: Use AWS Distro for OpenTelemetry to collect logs for the control plane and the nodes. Stream all the logs to Amazon Data Firehose. Use Amazon Redshift to analyze the aggregated log data for the control plane and the nodes.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Distro for OpenTelemetry 收集控制平面和节点的日志。将所有日志流式传输到 Amazon Data Firehose。使用 Amazon Redshift 分析控制平面和节点的聚合日志数据。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。启用 EKS 控制平面日志并发送到 CloudWatch，同时用 Container Insights 收集节点和容器日志，再用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 查询分析，可避免管理额外日志平台。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。启用 EKS 控制平面日志并发送到 CloudWatch，同时用 Container Insights 收集节点和容器日志，再用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 查询分析，可避免管理额外日志平台。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. Enable EKS control plane logging to CloudWatch, use Container Insights for node and container logs, and analyze both with CloudWatch Logs Insights, avoiding extra logging infrastructure.

contents.en: A company is running an application on Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). The company needs to implement comprehensive logging for the control plane and the nodes. The company must analyze API requests to the Kubernetes control plane and must monitor container performance on the nodes. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 上运行应用程序。公司需要为控制平面和节点实施全面日志记录。公司必须分析对 Kubernetes 控制平面的 API 请求，并且必须监控节点上的容器性能。哪种解决方案将在运维开销最少的情况下满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company wants to improve its security practices by enforcing least privilege across all projects. Developers must be able to access Amazon EC2 resources but not Amazon RDS resources. Database administrators must have access only to Amazon RDS resources. Every employee has a unique IAM user. There are already pre-existing IAM policies for developer and database administrator job functions. All AWS resources are already tagged with appropriate project tags. All the IAM users are tagged with the appropriate project and job function. The company must ensure that each employee can access only the project that the employee is working on. Which solution will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: For each project, create one IAM role for developers and one IAM role for database administrators. Tag the IAM roles with the corresponding projects and job functions.

contents.en: For each project, create one IAM role for developers and one IAM role for database administrators. Tag the IAM roles with the corresponding projects and job functions.
contents.zh: 为每个项目创建一个面向开发人员的 IAM role 和一个面向数据库管理员的 IAM role。使用对应的项目和工作职能标记 IAM roles。

options.label: B
options.content: Modify the pre-existing IAM policies to include a StringEquals ResourceTag condition for projects that match the PrincipalTag value. Attach the modified policies to the IAM roles for each job function.

contents.en: Modify the pre-existing IAM policies to include a StringEquals ResourceTag condition for projects that match the PrincipalTag value. Attach the modified policies to the IAM roles for each job function.
contents.zh: 修改预先存在的 IAM policies，包含用于项目的 StringEquals ResourceTag 条件，该条件匹配 PrincipalTag 值。将修改后的 policies 附加到每个工作职能的 IAM roles。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an IAM policy that allows users to assume a role when the ResourceTag value matches the PrincipalTag value for project tags and job title tags. Attach the new policy to all IAM users.

contents.en: Create an IAM policy that allows users to assume a role when the ResourceTag value matches the PrincipalTag value for project tags and job title tags. Attach the new policy to all IAM users.
contents.zh: 创建一个 IAM policy，当项目标签和职位标签的 ResourceTag 值匹配 PrincipalTag 值时，允许用户代入角色。将新 policy 附加到所有 IAM users。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an IAM policy that allows users to assume a role when the ResourceTag value matches the PrincipalTag value for project tags and job title tags. Attach the new policy to the IAM roles for each job function.

contents.en: Create an IAM policy that allows users to assume a role when the ResourceTag value matches the PrincipalTag value for project tags and job title tags. Attach the new policy to the IAM roles for each job function.
contents.zh: 创建一个 IAM policy，当项目标签和职位标签的 ResourceTag 值匹配 PrincipalTag 值时，允许用户代入角色。将新 policy 附加到每个工作职能的 IAM roles。

options.label: E
options.content: Tag the pre-existing IAM policies with the appropriate projects and job functions. Attach the modified policies to IAM roles for each job function.

contents.en: Tag the pre-existing IAM policies with the appropriate projects and job functions. Attach the modified policies to IAM roles for each job function.
contents.zh: 使用相应的项目和工作职能标记预先存在的 IAM policies。将修改后的 policies 附加到每个工作职能的 IAM roles。

options.label: F
options.content: For each project, create one IAM group for developers and one IAM group for database administrators. Add the appropriate users to each group so the users can assume their respective IAM roles.

contents.en: For each project, create one IAM group for developers and one IAM group for database administrators. Add the appropriate users to each group so the users can assume their respective IAM roles.
contents.zh: 为每个项目创建一个面向开发人员的 IAM group 和一个面向数据库管理员的 IAM group。将相应用户添加到每个 group，以便用户可以代入其各自的 IAM roles。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、B 和 C。该方案基于 ABAC：A 创建并标记按项目和职能区分的角色，C 允许用户只假设标签匹配的角色，B 在角色策略中用 PrincipalTag 和 ResourceTag 条件隔离资源。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、B 和 C。该方案基于 ABAC：A 创建并标记按项目和职能区分的角色，C 允许用户只假设标签匹配的角色，B 在角色策略中用 PrincipalTag 和 ResourceTag 条件隔离资源。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A, B, and C. This is an ABAC design: A creates tagged roles by project and job function, C lets users assume only roles with matching tags, and B uses PrincipalTag and ResourceTag conditions in role policies to isolate resources.

contents.en: A company wants to improve its security practices by enforcing least privilege across all projects. Developers must be able to access Amazon EC2 resources but not Amazon RDS resources. Database administrators must have access only to Amazon RDS resources. Every employee has a unique IAM user. There are already pre-existing IAM policies for developer and database administrator job functions. All AWS resources are already tagged with appropriate project tags. All the IAM users are tagged with the appropriate project and job function. The company must ensure that each employee can access only the project that the employee is working on. Which solution will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一家公司希望通过在所有项目中强制执行最小权限来改进其安全实践。开发人员必须能够访问 Amazon EC2 资源，但不能访问 Amazon RDS 资源。数据库管理员只能访问 Amazon RDS 资源。每位员工都有唯一的 IAM user。已经存在用于开发人员和数据库管理员工作职能的 IAM policies。所有 AWS 资源都已使用相应的项目标签进行标记。所有 IAM users 都已使用相应的项目和工作职能进行标记。公司必须确保每位员工只能访问该员工正在参与的项目。哪种解决方案将满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company runs a development environment website and database on an Amazon EC2 instance that uses Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) storage. The company wants to make the instance more resilient to underlying hardware issues. The company wants to automatically recover the EC2 instance if AWS determines the instance has lost network connectivity. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Add the EC2 instance to an Auto Scaling group. Set the minimum, maximum, and desired capacity to 1.

contents.en: Add the EC2 instance to an Auto Scaling group. Set the minimum, maximum, and desired capacity to 1.
contents.zh: 将 EC2 实例添加到 Auto Scaling group。将最小、最大和所需容量设置为 1。

options.label: B
options.content: Add the EC2 instance to an Auto Scaling group. Configure a lifecycle hook to detach the EBS volume if the EC2 instance shuts down or terminates

contents.en: Add the EC2 instance to an Auto Scaling group. Configure a lifecycle hook to detach the EBS volume if the EC2 instance shuts down or terminates
contents.zh: 将 EC2 实例添加到 Auto Scaling group。配置 lifecycle hook，以便在 EC2 实例关闭或终止时分离 EBS 卷

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for the StatusCheckFailed_System metric. Add an EC2 action to recover the instance when the alarm state is in ALARM

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for the StatusCheckFailed_System metric. Add an EC2 action to recover the instance when the alarm state is in ALARM
contents.zh: 为 StatusCheckFailed_System 指标创建 Amazon CloudWatch 警报。当警报状态为 ALARM 时，添加 EC2 action 来恢复实例

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for the NetworkOut metric. Add an EC2 action to recover the instance when the alarm state is in INSUFFICIENT_DATA.

contents.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm for the NetworkOut metric. Add an EC2 action to recover the instance when the alarm state is in INSUFFICIENT_DATA.
contents.zh: 为 NetworkOut 指标创建 Amazon CloudWatch 警报。当警报状态为 INSUFFICIENT_DATA 时，添加 EC2 action 来恢复实例。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。StatusCheckFailed_System 指标表示底层硬件或网络连通性问题；对该指标创建 CloudWatch 告警并配置 EC2 recover 动作，可自动迁移实例到底层健康硬件并保留实例属性。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。StatusCheckFailed_System 指标表示底层硬件或网络连通性问题；对该指标创建 CloudWatch 告警并配置 EC2 recover 动作，可自动迁移实例到底层健康硬件并保留实例属性。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. The StatusCheckFailed_System metric indicates underlying hardware or network connectivity issues; a CloudWatch alarm with an EC2 recover action can move the instance to healthy hardware while preserving its attributes.

contents.en: A company runs a development environment website and database on an Amazon EC2 instance that uses Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) storage. The company wants to make the instance more resilient to underlying hardware issues. The company wants to automatically recover the EC2 instance if AWS determines the instance has lost network connectivity. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司在使用 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 存储的 Amazon EC2 实例上运行开发环境网站和数据库。公司希望让该实例对底层硬件问题更具弹性。如果 AWS 确定该实例已失去网络连接，公司希望自动恢复 EC2 实例。哪种解决方案将满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company operates a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances that host critical applications and handle sensitive data. The EC2 instances must have up-to-date security patches to protect against vulnerabilities and ensure compliance with industry standards and regulations. The company needs an automated solution to monitor and enforce security patch compliance across the EC2 fleet. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Configure AWS Systems Manager Patch Manager and AWS Config with defined patch baselines and compliance rules that run Systems Manager Automation documents.

contents.en: Configure AWS Systems Manager Patch Manager and AWS Config with defined patch baselines and compliance rules that run Systems Manager Automation documents.
contents.zh: 配置 AWS Systems Manager Patch Manager 和 AWS Config，并使用定义的 patch baselines 和运行 Systems Manager Automation documents 的合规规则。

options.label: B
options.content: Access each EC2 instance by using SSH keys. Check for and apply security updates by using package managers. Verify the installations.

contents.en: Access each EC2 instance by using SSH keys. Check for and apply security updates by using package managers. Verify the installations.
contents.zh: 使用 SSH keys 访问每个 EC2 实例。使用包管理器检查并应用安全更新。验证安装。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure Auto Scaling groups that have scaling policies based on Amazon CloudWatch metrics. Configure Auto Scaling launch templates that launch new instances by using the latest AMIs that contain new security patches.

contents.en: Configure Auto Scaling groups that have scaling policies based on Amazon CloudWatch metrics. Configure Auto Scaling launch templates that launch new instances by using the latest AMIs that contain new security patches.
contents.zh: 配置具有基于 Amazon CloudWatch 指标的扩缩策略的 Auto Scaling groups。配置 Auto Scaling launch templates，以使用包含新安全补丁的最新 AMI 启动新实例。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS CloudFormation to recreate EC2 instances with the latest AMI every time a new patch becomes available. Use AWS CloudTrail logs to monitor patch compliance and to send alerts for non-compliant instances.

contents.en: Use AWS CloudFormation to recreate EC2 instances with the latest AMI every time a new patch becomes available. Use AWS CloudTrail logs to monitor patch compliance and to send alerts for non-compliant instances.
contents.zh: 每次有新补丁可用时，使用 AWS CloudFormation 通过最新 AMI 重新创建 EC2 实例。使用 AWS CloudTrail logs 监控补丁合规性，并为不合规实例发送警报。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。Systems Manager Patch Manager 可定义补丁基线并管理 EC2 补丁合规，AWS Config 可持续检测不合规资源并触发 SSM Automation 自动修复。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。Systems Manager Patch Manager 可定义补丁基线并管理 EC2 补丁合规，AWS Config 可持续检测不合规资源并触发 SSM Automation 自动修复。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. Systems Manager Patch Manager manages EC2 patch compliance with patch baselines, and AWS Config can continuously detect noncompliance and trigger SSM Automation for remediation.

contents.en: A company operates a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances that host critical applications and handle sensitive data. The EC2 instances must have up-to-date security patches to protect against vulnerabilities and ensure compliance with industry standards and regulations. The company needs an automated solution to monitor and enforce security patch compliance across the EC2 fleet. Which solution will meet these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司运营一组 Amazon EC2 实例，这些实例托管关键应用程序并处理敏感数据。EC2 实例必须安装最新安全补丁，以防范漏洞并确保符合行业标准和法规。公司需要一个自动化解决方案来监控并强制执行整个 EC2 队列的安全补丁合规性。哪种解决方案将满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has implemented a new microservices-based application on an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster. After each deployment, the company wants to validate the critical user journeys and API endpoints before routing traffic to the new application version. The company must implement an automated solution to detect issues in the new deployment and to initiate a rollback if necessary. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Set up Amazon CloudWatch Application Insights for the ECS cluster. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function to analyze the task states. Program the Lambda function to use the ECS UpdateService API call to initiate a rollback if a specific percentage of tasks fail.

contents.en: Set up Amazon CloudWatch Application Insights for the ECS cluster. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function to analyze the task states. Program the Lambda function to use the ECS UpdateService API call to initiate a rollback if a specific percentage of tasks fail.
contents.zh: 为 ECS 集群设置 Amazon CloudWatch Application Insights。创建 Amazon EventBridge 规则以调用 AWS Lambda 函数来分析任务状态。编写 Lambda 函数，使用 ECS UpdateService API 调用在特定百分比的任务失败时启动回滚。

options.label: B
options.content: Set up Amazon CloudWatch Application Insights for the ECS cluster. Configure Application Insights to monitor key performance indicators of the microservices in the critical user journeys and API calls. Create CloudWatch alarms based on the insights. Use Amazon EventBridge to invoke an AWS Step Functions workflow to evaluate the alarms. Configure the workflow to initiate a rollback if necessary by using the alarms' built-in integration with Amazon ECS.

contents.en: Set up Amazon CloudWatch Application Insights for the ECS cluster. Configure Application Insights to monitor key performance indicators of the microservices in the critical user journeys and API calls. Create CloudWatch alarms based on the insights. Use Amazon EventBridge to invoke an AWS Step Functions workflow to evaluate the alarms. Configure the workflow to initiate a rollback if necessary by using the alarms' built-in integration with Amazon ECS.
contents.zh: 为 ECS 集群设置 Amazon CloudWatch Application Insights。配置 Application Insights 监控关键用户旅程和 API 调用中微服务的关键性能指标。基于 insights 创建 CloudWatch alarms。使用 Amazon EventBridge 调用 AWS Step Functions workflow 来评估 alarms。配置该 workflow 在必要时使用 alarms 与 Amazon ECS 的内置集成启动回滚。

options.label: C
options.content: Create CloudWatch Synthetics canaries that simulate critical user journeys and API calls. Implement AWS X-Ray tracing for all the microservices Configure X-Ray to send traces to CloudWatch. Create CloudWatch alarms based on error rates and latency metrics. Create an AWS Lambda function to analyze the traces and to initiate a rollback if necessary by using the alarms' built- in integration with Amazon ECS.

contents.en: Create CloudWatch Synthetics canaries that simulate critical user journeys and API calls. Implement AWS X-Ray tracing for all the microservices Configure X-Ray to send traces to CloudWatch. Create CloudWatch alarms based on error rates and latency metrics. Create an AWS Lambda function to analyze the traces and to initiate a rollback if necessary by using the alarms' built- in integration with Amazon ECS.
contents.zh: 创建模拟关键用户旅程和 API 调用的 CloudWatch Synthetics canaries。为所有微服务实现 AWS X-Ray tracing 配置 X-Ray 将 traces 发送到 CloudWatch。基于错误率和延迟指标创建 CloudWatch alarms。创建 AWS Lambda 函数来分析 traces，并在必要时使用 alarms 与 Amazon ECS 的内置集成启动回滚。

options.label: D
options.content: Create CloudWatch Synthetics canaries that simulate critical user journeys and API calls. Configure the canaries to run against the new deployment. Create CloudWatch alarms that are invoked when canaries fail. Use the alarms' built-in integration with Amazon ECS to initiate a rollback if the alarms are invoked before traffic is routed to the new deployment.

contents.en: Create CloudWatch Synthetics canaries that simulate critical user journeys and API calls. Configure the canaries to run against the new deployment. Create CloudWatch alarms that are invoked when canaries fail. Use the alarms' built-in integration with Amazon ECS to initiate a rollback if the alarms are invoked before traffic is routed to the new deployment.
contents.zh: 创建模拟关键用户旅程和 API 调用的 CloudWatch Synthetics canaries。配置 canaries 针对新部署运行。创建在 canaries 失败时调用的 CloudWatch alarms。如果在流量路由到新部署之前触发 alarms，则使用 alarms 与 Amazon ECS 的内置集成启动回滚。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。CloudWatch Synthetics canaries 可模拟关键用户路径和 API 调用；当新部署上的 canary 失败时，CloudWatch 告警可通过内置 ECS/CodeDeploy 集成在流量切换前触发回滚。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。CloudWatch Synthetics canaries 可模拟关键用户路径和 API 调用；当新部署上的 canary 失败时，CloudWatch 告警可通过内置 ECS/CodeDeploy 集成在流量切换前触发回滚。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. CloudWatch Synthetics canaries simulate critical user journeys and API calls, and CloudWatch alarms can use the built-in ECS/CodeDeploy integration to roll back before traffic is routed if canaries fail.

contents.en: A company has implemented a new microservices-based application on an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster. After each deployment, the company wants to validate the critical user journeys and API endpoints before routing traffic to the new application version. The company must implement an automated solution to detect issues in the new deployment and to initiate a rollback if necessary. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 集群上实施了新的基于微服务的应用程序。每次部署后，公司希望在将流量路由到新的应用程序版本之前验证关键用户旅程和 API endpoints。公司必须实施自动化解决方案，以检测新部署中的问题，并在必要时启动回滚。哪种解决方案将在运维开销最少的情况下满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company's applications run on Amazon EC2 instances and use AWS Lambda functions in multiple AWS accounts. All EC2 instances have the Amazon CloudWatch agent installed. All accounts belong to the same organization in AWS Organizations. The company has created a dedicated central log account. All logs that the applications produce must be sent to a central location. The logs must be encrypted with keys that the company manages. Which solution meets these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: In the central log account, enable logs as the data source in CloudWatch. Add the organization ID to the source account list. Create a CloudFormation StackSet by using the template provided by CloudWatch to enable central monitoring in all the organization's accounts.

contents.en: In the central log account, enable logs as the data source in CloudWatch. Add the organization ID to the source account list. Create a CloudFormation StackSet by using the template provided by CloudWatch to enable central monitoring in all the organization's accounts.
contents.zh: 在中央日志账户中，启用 logs 作为 CloudWatch 中的数据源。将组织 ID 添加到源账户列表。使用 CloudWatch 提供的模板创建 CloudFormation StackSet，以在组织的所有账户中启用集中监控。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket in the central log account. Create an Amazon Data Firehose stream in the central log account. Set the S3 bucket as the destination of the Firehose stream. Create a log subscription in the central log account. Set the Firehose stream as a target of the subscription. Store the subscription log ARN in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store for each project to use to send logs to the S3 bucket.

contents.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket in the central log account. Create an Amazon Data Firehose stream in the central log account. Set the S3 bucket as the destination of the Firehose stream. Create a log subscription in the central log account. Set the Firehose stream as a target of the subscription. Store the subscription log ARN in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store for each project to use to send logs to the S3 bucket.
contents.zh: 在中央日志账户中创建 Amazon S3 存储桶。在中央日志账户中创建 Amazon Data Firehose stream。将 S3 存储桶设置为 Firehose stream 的目标位置。在中央日志账户中创建 log subscription。将 Firehose stream 设置为 subscription 的目标。将 subscription log ARN 存储在每个项目使用的 AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store 中，以便向 S3 存储桶发送日志。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket in each account. Create an Amazon OpenSearch Service cluster in the central log account. Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue in the central log account. Create an S3 trigger that sends events to the SQS queue each time a new file is uploaded to the S3 bucket. Create a Lambda function that processes each file and sends each file to the OpenSearch Service cluster.

contents.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket in each account. Create an Amazon OpenSearch Service cluster in the central log account. Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue in the central log account. Create an S3 trigger that sends events to the SQS queue each time a new file is uploaded to the S3 bucket. Create a Lambda function that processes each file and sends each file to the OpenSearch Service cluster.
contents.zh: 在每个账户中创建 Amazon S3 存储桶。在中央日志账户中创建 Amazon OpenSearch Service 集群。在中央日志账户中创建 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列。创建 S3 触发器，每当新文件上传到 S3 存储桶时将事件发送到 SQS 队列。创建 Lambda 函数处理每个文件，并将每个文件发送到 OpenSearch Service 集群。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket in the central log account. Create an Amazon Data Firehose stream in each account. Set the S3 bucket as the destination of the Firehose streams. Create a log subscription in each account with the Firehose streams as a target.

contents.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket in the central log account. Create an Amazon Data Firehose stream in each account. Set the S3 bucket as the destination of the Firehose streams. Create a log subscription in each account with the Firehose streams as a target.
contents.zh: 在中央日志账户中创建 Amazon S3 存储桶。在每个账户中创建 Amazon Data Firehose stream。将 S3 存储桶设置为 Firehose streams 的目标位置。在每个账户中创建以 Firehose streams 为目标的 log subscription。

questions.explanation:
正确答案是 A。在中央日志账号中启用 CloudWatch 日志数据源，添加组织 ID，并用 CloudWatch 提供的 CloudFormation StackSet 模板为组织账号启用集中监控。

源讨论提到日志集中化的取舍，但源正确选项为 A，因此解释聚焦于该选项的跨账号集中可观测能力。

explanations.zh:
正确答案是 A。在中央日志账号中启用 CloudWatch 日志数据源，添加组织 ID，并用 CloudWatch 提供的 CloudFormation StackSet 模板为组织账号启用集中监控。

源讨论提到日志集中化的取舍，但源正确选项为 A，因此解释聚焦于该选项的跨账号集中可观测能力。
explanations.en:
The correct answer is A. Enable logs as a CloudWatch data source in the central log account, add the organization ID, and use the CloudWatch-provided CloudFormation StackSet template to enable central monitoring across organization accounts.

The discussion raises centralization tradeoffs, but the source correct option is A, so this explanation focuses on its cross-account observability capability.

contents.en: A company's applications run on Amazon EC2 instances and use AWS Lambda functions in multiple AWS accounts. All EC2 instances have the Amazon CloudWatch agent installed. All accounts belong to the same organization in AWS Organizations. The company has created a dedicated central log account. All logs that the applications produce must be sent to a central location. The logs must be encrypted with keys that the company manages. Which solution meets these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?
contents.zh: 一家公司的应用程序运行在 Amazon EC2 实例上，并在多个 AWS 账户中使用 AWS Lambda 函数。所有 EC2 实例都安装了 Amazon CloudWatch agent。所有账户都属于 AWS Organizations 中的同一组织。公司已创建一个专用的中央日志账户。应用程序产生的所有日志都必须发送到集中位置。日志必须使用公司管理的密钥进行加密。哪种解决方案将在运维开销最少的情况下满足这些要求？

questions.content: A DevOps engineer needs to implement a CI/CD pipeline in an AWS account. The pipeline must consume sensitive database credentials that are stored in an AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store parameter. The Parameter Store parameter is in a separate central account. The DevOps engineer needs to create and integrate the parameter with the CI/CD account. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.label: A
options.content: Use an advanced tier Parameter Store parameter to store the database credentials in the central AWS account.

contents.en: Use an advanced tier Parameter Store parameter to store the database credentials in the central AWS account.
contents.zh: 使用 advanced tier Parameter Store 参数将数据库凭证存储在中央 AWS 账户中。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an IAM role in the AWS account that hosts the CI/CD pipeline. Add the full ARN of the parameter to the IAM policy that is associated with the IAM role.

contents.en: Create an IAM role in the AWS account that hosts the CI/CD pipeline. Add the full ARN of the parameter to the IAM policy that is associated with the IAM role.
contents.zh: 在托管 CI/CD 管道的 AWS 账户中创建 IAM role。将参数的完整 ARN 添加到与该 IAM role 关联的 IAM policy。

options.label: C
options.content: Use a standard tier Parameter Store parameter to store the database credentials in the central AWS account.

contents.en: Use a standard tier Parameter Store parameter to store the database credentials in the central AWS account.
contents.zh: 使用 standard tier Parameter Store 参数将数据库凭证存储在中央 AWS 账户中。

options.label: D
options.content: Use an AWS KMS managed key to encrypt the parameter. Grant decrypt permissions for the KMS key to the AWS account that hosts the CI/CD pipeline.

contents.en: Use an AWS KMS managed key to encrypt the parameter. Grant decrypt permissions for the KMS key to the AWS account that hosts the CI/CD pipeline.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS KMS managed key 加密该参数。向托管 CI/CD 管道的 AWS 账户授予该 KMS key 的 decrypt 权限。

options.label: E
options.content: Use a customer managed AWS KMS key to encrypt the parameter. Grant decrypt permissions for the customer managed key to the AWS account that hosts the CI/CD pipeline.

contents.en: Use a customer managed AWS KMS key to encrypt the parameter. Grant decrypt permissions for the customer managed key to the AWS account that hosts the CI/CD pipeline.
contents.zh: 使用 customer managed AWS KMS key 加密该参数。向托管 CI/CD 管道的 AWS 账户授予该 customer managed key 的 decrypt 权限。

options.label: F
options.content: Create an AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM) resource share in the central AWS account. Share the parameter with the account that hosts the CI/CD pipeline.

contents.en: Create an AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM) resource share in the central AWS account. Share the parameter with the account that hosts the CI/CD pipeline.
contents.zh: 在中央 AWS 账户中创建 AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM) resource share。与托管 CI/CD 管道的账户共享该参数。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A、E 和 F。跨账号共享 SSM 参数需要高级层参数；敏感值应使用客户托管 KMS 密钥加密并授予 CI/CD 账号解密权限，再通过 AWS RAM 从中央账号共享该参数。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A、E 和 F。跨账号共享 SSM 参数需要高级层参数；敏感值应使用客户托管 KMS 密钥加密并授予 CI/CD 账号解密权限，再通过 AWS RAM 从中央账号共享该参数。
explanations.en: The correct answers are A, E, and F. Cross-account SSM parameter sharing requires an advanced tier parameter; sensitive values should use a customer managed KMS key with decrypt permission for the CI/CD account, and AWS RAM shares the parameter from the central account.

contents.en: A DevOps engineer needs to implement a CI/CD pipeline in an AWS account. The pipeline must consume sensitive database credentials that are stored in an AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store parameter. The Parameter Store parameter is in a separate central account. The DevOps engineer needs to create and integrate the parameter with the CI/CD account. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)
contents.zh: 一名 DevOps 工程师需要在一个 AWS 账户中实施 CI/CD 管道。该管道必须使用存储在 AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store 参数中的敏感数据库凭证。Parameter Store 参数位于单独的中央账户中。DevOps 工程师需要创建该参数并将其与 CI/CD 账户集成。哪组步骤组合将满足这些要求？（选择三项。）

questions.content: A company is using the AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) to develop a microservices-based application. The company needs to create reusable infrastructure components for three environments: development, staging, and production. The components must include networking resources, database resources, and serverless compute resources. The company must implement a solution that provides consistent infrastructure across environments while offering the option for environment-specific customizations. The solution also must minimize code duplication. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST development overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Create custom Level 1 (L1) constructs out of Level 2 (L2) constructs where repeatable patterns exist. Create a single set of deployment stacks that takes the environment name as an argument upon instantiation. Deploy CDK applications for each environment.

contents.en: Create custom Level 1 (L1) constructs out of Level 2 (L2) constructs where repeatable patterns exist. Create a single set of deployment stacks that takes the environment name as an argument upon instantiation. Deploy CDK applications for each environment.
contents.zh: 在存在可重复模式的地方，基于 Level 2 (L2) constructs 创建自定义 Level 1 (L1) constructs。创建一组单一的部署 stacks，在实例化时将环境名称作为参数。为每个环境部署 CDK applications。

options.label: B
options.content: Create custom Level 1 (L1) constructs out of Level 2 (L2) constructs where repeatable patterns exist. Create separate deployment stacks for each environment. Use the CDK context command to determine which stacks to run when deploying to each environment.

contents.en: Create custom Level 1 (L1) constructs out of Level 2 (L2) constructs where repeatable patterns exist. Create separate deployment stacks for each environment. Use the CDK context command to determine which stacks to run when deploying to each environment.
contents.zh: 在存在可重复模式的地方，基于 Level 2 (L2) constructs 创建自定义 Level 1 (L1) constructs。为每个环境创建单独的部署 stacks。使用 CDK context 命令确定部署到每个环境时要运行哪些 stacks。

options.label: C
options.content: Create custom Level 3 (L3) constructs out of Level 2 (L2) constructs where repeatable patterns exist. Create a single set of deployment stacks that takes the environment name as an argument upon instantiation. Deploy CDK applications for each environment.

contents.en: Create custom Level 3 (L3) constructs out of Level 2 (L2) constructs where repeatable patterns exist. Create a single set of deployment stacks that takes the environment name as an argument upon instantiation. Deploy CDK applications for each environment.
contents.zh: 在存在可重复模式的地方，基于 Level 2 (L2) constructs 创建自定义 Level 3 (L3) constructs。创建一组单一的部署 stacks，在实例化时将环境名称作为参数。为每个环境部署 CDK applications。

options.label: D
options.content: Create custom Level 3 (L3) constructs out of Level 2 (L2) constructs where repeatable patterns exist. Create separate deployment stacks for each environment. Use the CDK context command to determine which stacks to run when deploying to each environment.

contents.en: Create custom Level 3 (L3) constructs out of Level 2 (L2) constructs where repeatable patterns exist. Create separate deployment stacks for each environment. Use the CDK context command to determine which stacks to run when deploying to each environment.
contents.zh: 在存在可重复模式的地方，基于 Level 2 (L2) constructs 创建自定义 Level 3 (L3) constructs。为每个环境创建单独的部署 stacks。使用 CDK context 命令确定部署到每个环境时要运行哪些 stacks。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C。可重复的基础设施模式应封装为由 L2 构造组成的 L3 构造；单一部署栈接收环境名称参数，可在 dev、staging、prod 中复用并减少代码重复。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 C。可重复的基础设施模式应封装为由 L2 构造组成的 L3 构造；单一部署栈接收环境名称参数，可在 dev、staging、prod 中复用并减少代码重复。
explanations.en: The correct answer is C. Repeatable infrastructure patterns should be packaged as L3 constructs built from L2 constructs, and a single deployment stack that accepts an environment name can be reused across dev, staging, and prod with less duplication.

contents.en: A company is using the AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) to develop a microservices-based application. The company needs to create reusable infrastructure components for three environments: development, staging, and production. The components must include networking resources, database resources, and serverless compute resources. The company must implement a solution that provides consistent infrastructure across environments while offering the option for environment-specific customizations. The solution also must minimize code duplication. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST development overhead?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在使用 AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) 开发基于微服务的应用程序。公司需要为三个环境创建可重用的基础设施组件：development、staging 和 production。这些组件必须包括网络资源、数据库资源和无服务器计算资源。公司必须实施一种解决方案，既能在各环境之间提供一致的基础设施，又能提供环境特定自定义的选项。该解决方案还必须尽量减少代码重复。哪种解决方案将在开发开销最少的情况下满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company runs an application on an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) service by using the AWS Fargate launch type. The application consumes messages from an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. The application can take several minutes to process each message from the queue. When the application processes a message, the application reads a file from an Amazon S3 bucket and processes the data in the file. The application writes the processed output to a second S3 bucket. The company uses Amazon CloudWatch Logs to monitor processing errors and to ensure that the application processes messages successfully. The SQS queue typically receives a low volume of messages. However, occasionally the queue receives higher volumes of messages. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a solution to reduce the processing time of message bursts. Which solution will meet this requirement in the MOST cost-effective way?

options.label: A
options.content: Register the ECS service as a scalable target in AWS Application Auto Scaling. Configure a target tracking scaling policy to scale the service in response to the queue size.

contents.en: Register the ECS service as a scalable target in AWS Application Auto Scaling. Configure a target tracking scaling policy to scale the service in response to the queue size.
contents.zh: 在 AWS Application Auto Scaling 中将 ECS 服务注册为 scalable target。配置 target tracking scaling policy，使服务根据队列大小进行扩缩。

options.label: B
options.content: Increase the maximum number of messages that Amazon SQS requests to batch messages together. Use long polling to minimize the number of API calls to Amazon SQS during periods of low traffic.

contents.en: Increase the maximum number of messages that Amazon SQS requests to batch messages together. Use long polling to minimize the number of API calls to Amazon SQS during periods of low traffic.
contents.zh: 增加 Amazon SQS 请求批量处理消息的最大消息数。使用 long polling 在低流量期间尽量减少对 Amazon SQS 的 API 调用次数。

options.label: C
options.content: Send messages to an Amazon EventBridge event bus instead of the SQS queue. Replace the ECS service with an EventBridge rule that launches ECS tasks in response to matching events.

contents.en: Send messages to an Amazon EventBridge event bus instead of the SQS queue. Replace the ECS service with an EventBridge rule that launches ECS tasks in response to matching events.
contents.zh: 将消息发送到 Amazon EventBridge event bus，而不是 SQS 队列。将 ECS 服务替换为 EventBridge 规则，该规则响应匹配事件启动 ECS 任务。

options.label: D
options.content: Create an Auto Scaling group of EC2 instances. Create a capacity provider in the ECS cluster by using the Auto Scaling group. Change the ECS service to use the EC2 launch type.

contents.en: Create an Auto Scaling group of EC2 instances. Create a capacity provider in the ECS cluster by using the Auto Scaling group. Change the ECS service to use the EC2 launch type.
contents.zh: 创建 EC2 实例的 Auto Scaling group。使用该 Auto Scaling group 在 ECS 集群中创建 capacity provider。将 ECS 服务改为使用 EC2 启动类型。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。将 ECS 服务注册为 Application Auto Scaling 的可扩缩目标，并用基于队列大小的目标跟踪策略扩缩 Fargate 任务，是处理突发 SQS 流量的标准且具成本效益的方式。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。将 ECS 服务注册为 Application Auto Scaling 的可扩缩目标，并用基于队列大小的目标跟踪策略扩缩 Fargate 任务，是处理突发 SQS 流量的标准且具成本效益的方式。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. Registering the ECS service as an Application Auto Scaling target and using a target tracking policy based on queue size is the standard, cost-effective way to scale Fargate tasks for bursty SQS workloads.

contents.en: A company runs an application on an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) service by using the AWS Fargate launch type. The application consumes messages from an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. The application can take several minutes to process each message from the queue. When the application processes a message, the application reads a file from an Amazon S3 bucket and processes the data in the file. The application writes the processed output to a second S3 bucket. The company uses Amazon CloudWatch Logs to monitor processing errors and to ensure that the application processes messages successfully. The SQS queue typically receives a low volume of messages. However, occasionally the queue receives higher volumes of messages. A DevOps engineer needs to implement a solution to reduce the processing time of message bursts. Which solution will meet this requirement in the MOST cost-effective way?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Fargate 启动类型在 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 服务上运行应用程序。该应用程序从 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列消费消息。应用程序处理队列中的每条消息可能需要几分钟。当应用程序处理消息时，应用程序会从 Amazon S3 存储桶读取文件并处理文件中的数据。应用程序将处理后的输出写入第二个 S3 存储桶。公司使用 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 监控处理错误，并确保应用程序成功处理消息。SQS 队列通常接收少量消息。但偶尔队列会收到较高数量的消息。DevOps 工程师需要实施一种解决方案来缩短消息突增时的处理时间。哪种解决方案将以最具成本效益的方式满足此要求？

questions.content: A global company uses Amazon S3 to host its product catalog website in the us-east-1 Region. The company must improve website performance for users across different geographical regions and must reduce the load on the origin server. The company must implement a highly available cross-Region solution that uses Amazon CloudFront. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational effort?

options.label: A
options.content: Set up multiple CloudFront distributions. Point each distribution to another S3 bucket in a different Region. Use Amazon Route 53 latency-based routing to direct users to the nearest distribution. Enable S3 replication between the S3 bucket in us- east-1 and the S3 bucket in the different Region.

contents.en: Set up multiple CloudFront distributions. Point each distribution to another S3 bucket in a different Region. Use Amazon Route 53 latency-based routing to direct users to the nearest distribution. Enable S3 replication between the S3 bucket in us- east-1 and the S3 bucket in the different Region.
contents.zh: 设置多个 CloudFront distributions。将每个 distribution 指向不同 Region 中的另一个 S3 存储桶。使用 Amazon Route 53 latency-based routing 将用户引导到最近的 distribution。在 us- east-1 中的 S3 存储桶和不同 Region 中的 S3 存储桶之间启用 S3 replication。

options.label: B
options.content: Enable CloudFront with Origin Shield in us-east-1. Configure global edge locations. Set up cache behaviors with optimal TTLs for static content and dynamic content. Configure origin failover to an S3 bucket in a different Region. Enable S3 replication between the S3 bucket in us-east-1 and the S3 bucket in the different Region.

contents.en: Enable CloudFront with Origin Shield in us-east-1. Configure global edge locations. Set up cache behaviors with optimal TTLs for static content and dynamic content. Configure origin failover to an S3 bucket in a different Region. Enable S3 replication between the S3 bucket in us-east-1 and the S3 bucket in the different Region.
contents.zh: 在 us-east-1 中启用带有 Origin Shield 的 CloudFront。配置全球边缘站点。为静态内容和动态内容设置具有最佳 TTL 的缓存行为。配置 origin failover 到不同 Region 中的 S3 存储桶。在 us-east-1 中的 S3 存储桶和不同 Region 中的 S3 存储桶之间启用 S3 replication。

options.label: C
options.content: Enable CloudFront with Origin Shield in us-east-1. Configure Amazon ElastiCache clusters in multiple Regions to serve as a distributed caching layer between CloudFront and the S3 origin. Set up a replication script to synchronize the S3 bucket in us- east-1 to an S3 bucket in a different Region. Use Amazon EventBridge to schedule the script to run once a day.

contents.en: Enable CloudFront with Origin Shield in us-east-1. Configure Amazon ElastiCache clusters in multiple Regions to serve as a distributed caching layer between CloudFront and the S3 origin. Set up a replication script to synchronize the S3 bucket in us- east-1 to an S3 bucket in a different Region. Use Amazon EventBridge to schedule the script to run once a day.
contents.zh: 在 us-east-1 中启用带有 Origin Shield 的 CloudFront。在多个 Region 中配置 Amazon ElastiCache 集群，作为 CloudFront 与 S3 源之间的分布式缓存层。设置复制脚本，将 us- east-1 中的 S3 存储桶同步到不同 Region 中的 S3 存储桶。使用 Amazon EventBridge 安排脚本每天运行一次。

options.label: D
options.content: Enable CloudFront with Origin Shield in the eu-west-1 Region. Configure Regional edge caches. Implement AWS Global Accelerator to route requests to the nearest Regional edge location. Enable S3 replication between the S3 bucket in us-east-1 and an S3 bucket in a different Region.

contents.en: Enable CloudFront with Origin Shield in the eu-west-1 Region. Configure Regional edge caches. Implement AWS Global Accelerator to route requests to the nearest Regional edge location. Enable S3 replication between the S3 bucket in us-east-1 and an S3 bucket in a different Region.
contents.zh: 在 eu-west-1 Region 中启用带有 Origin Shield 的 CloudFront。配置 Regional edge caches。实施 AWS Global Accelerator，将请求路由到最近的 Regional edge location。在 us-east-1 中的 S3 存储桶和不同 Region 中的 S3 存储桶之间启用 S3 replication。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。CloudFront Origin Shield 作为边缘节点和源站之间的集中缓存层，配合合适 TTL、源站故障转移以及跨区域 S3 复制，可用单个全球入口提升性能和可用性。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。CloudFront Origin Shield 作为边缘节点和源站之间的集中缓存层，配合合适 TTL、源站故障转移以及跨区域 S3 复制，可用单个全球入口提升性能和可用性。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. CloudFront Origin Shield acts as a centralized cache between edge locations and the origin; with appropriate TTLs, origin failover, and S3 replication, it improves performance and availability through a single global entry point.

contents.en: A global company uses Amazon S3 to host its product catalog website in the us-east-1 Region. The company must improve website performance for users across different geographical regions and must reduce the load on the origin server. The company must implement a highly available cross-Region solution that uses Amazon CloudFront. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational effort?
contents.zh: 一家全球公司使用 Amazon S3 在 us-east-1 Region 托管其产品目录网站。公司必须提升不同地理区域用户的网站性能，并减少源服务器负载。公司必须实施一个使用 Amazon CloudFront 的高可用跨 Region 解决方案。哪种解决方案将在运维工作量最少的情况下满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company is using AWS CodeDeploy to deploy applications to a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances. During a recent deployment, several EC2 instances failed to update successfully. A DevOps engineer must investigate the root cause of the failures and must determine which specific deployment lifecycle events encountered errors. What is the MOST operationally efficient way to access and analyze the detailed deployment logs for troubleshooting?

options.label: A
options.content: Use SSH to connect to each EC2 instance that failed to update successfully. Read the logs from the CodeDeploy agent.

contents.en: Use SSH to connect to each EC2 instance that failed to update successfully. Read the logs from the CodeDeploy agent.
contents.zh: 使用 SSH 连接到每个未能成功更新的 EC2 实例。从 CodeDeploy agent 读取日志。

options.label: B
options.content: Use AWS Systems Manager Session Manager to connect to each EC2 instance that failed to update successfully. Read the logs from the CodeDeploy agent.

contents.en: Use AWS Systems Manager Session Manager to connect to each EC2 instance that failed to update successfully. Read the logs from the CodeDeploy agent.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Systems Manager Session Manager 连接到每个未能成功更新的 EC2 实例。从 CodeDeploy agent 读取日志。

options.label: C
options.content: Create an Amazon S3 bucket to store CodeDeploy logs. Update the appspec.yml file to copy logs to the S3 bucket. Query the S3 bucket by using Amazon Athena

contents.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket to store CodeDeploy logs. Update the appspec.yml file to copy logs to the S3 bucket. Query the S3 bucket by using Amazon Athena
contents.zh: 创建 Amazon S3 存储桶来存储 CodeDeploy 日志。更新 appspec.yml 文件以将日志复制到 S3 存储桶。使用 Amazon Athena 查询 S3 存储桶

options.label: D
options.content: Send CodeDeploy agent logs to Amazon CloudWatch Logs by using the CloudWatch agent. Analyze the logs by using CloudWatch Logs Insights.

contents.en: Send CodeDeploy agent logs to Amazon CloudWatch Logs by using the CloudWatch agent. Analyze the logs by using CloudWatch Logs Insights.
