contents.zh: 使用 CloudWatch agent 将 CodeDeploy agent 日志发送到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs。使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 分析日志。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。通过 CloudWatch agent 将 CodeDeploy agent 日志发送到 CloudWatch Logs，再用 Logs Insights 分析，可集中筛选多台 EC2 实例上的失败部署生命周期事件。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。通过 CloudWatch agent 将 CodeDeploy agent 日志发送到 CloudWatch Logs，再用 Logs Insights 分析，可集中筛选多台 EC2 实例上的失败部署生命周期事件。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. Sending CodeDeploy agent logs to CloudWatch Logs with the CloudWatch agent and analyzing them with Logs Insights enables centralized filtering of failed deployment lifecycle events across EC2 instances.

contents.en: A company is using AWS CodeDeploy to deploy applications to a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances. During a recent deployment, several EC2 instances failed to update successfully. A DevOps engineer must investigate the root cause of the failures and must determine which specific deployment lifecycle events encountered errors. What is the MOST operationally efficient way to access and analyze the detailed deployment logs for troubleshooting?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在使用 AWS CodeDeploy 将应用程序部署到一组 Amazon EC2 实例。在最近一次部署期间，多个 EC2 实例未能成功更新。DevOps 工程师必须调查失败的根本原因，并且必须确定哪些具体部署生命周期事件遇到错误。访问和分析详细部署日志以进行故障排除的最高运维效率方式是什么？

questions.content: A company built its serverless infrastructure on AWS. The infrastructure consists of an Amazon API Gateway REST API, multiple AWS Lambda functions, and Amazon EventBridge. The company wants to be aware of any new supply chain attacks that the company's CI/CD pipelines do not catch. The company needs a solution to detect malicious activity in the deployed application. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.label: A
options.content: Enable AWS WAF for the API Gateway REST API. Configure an AWS WAF ACL. Add the known bad inputs managed rule group.

contents.en: Enable AWS WAF for the API Gateway REST API. Configure an AWS WAF ACL. Add the known bad inputs managed rule group.
contents.zh: 为 API Gateway REST API 启用 AWS WAF。配置 AWS WAF ACL。添加 known bad inputs managed rule group。

options.label: B
options.content: Enable Amazon GuardDuty. Enable Lambda Protection. Use EventBridge for event notifications.

contents.en: Enable Amazon GuardDuty. Enable Lambda Protection. Use EventBridge for event notifications.
contents.zh: 启用 Amazon GuardDuty。启用 Lambda Protection。使用 EventBridge 进行事件通知。

options.label: C
options.content: Deploy AWS CloudFormation Guard in the CI/CD pipelines. Write rules to catch the supply chain attacks.

contents.en: Deploy AWS CloudFormation Guard in the CI/CD pipelines. Write rules to catch the supply chain attacks.
contents.zh: 在 CI/CD 管道中部署 AWS CloudFormation Guard。编写规则来捕获供应链攻击。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a firewall in AWS Network Firewall. Configure a policy. Add the managed rule for the Emerging Threats rule group.

contents.en: Create a firewall in AWS Network Firewall. Configure a policy. Add the managed rule for the Emerging Threats rule group.
contents.zh: 在 AWS Network Firewall 中创建 firewall。配置 policy。添加 Emerging Threats rule group 的 managed rule。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。GuardDuty Lambda Protection 可监控 Lambda 运行时的恶意行为，例如绕过静态 CI/CD 扫描的后门连接；EventBridge 可用于事件通知。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。GuardDuty Lambda Protection 可监控 Lambda 运行时的恶意行为，例如绕过静态 CI/CD 扫描的后门连接；EventBridge 可用于事件通知。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. GuardDuty Lambda Protection monitors malicious Lambda runtime behavior, such as backdoor connections that bypass static CI/CD scans, and EventBridge can provide event notifications.

contents.en: A company built its serverless infrastructure on AWS. The infrastructure consists of an Amazon API Gateway REST API, multiple AWS Lambda functions, and Amazon EventBridge. The company wants to be aware of any new supply chain attacks that the company's CI/CD pipelines do not catch. The company needs a solution to detect malicious activity in the deployed application. Which solution meets these requirements?
contents.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 上构建了其无服务器基础设施。该基础设施由 Amazon API Gateway REST API、多个 AWS Lambda 函数和 Amazon EventBridge 组成。公司希望了解其 CI/CD 管道未捕获的任何新供应链攻击。公司需要一种解决方案来检测已部署应用程序中的恶意活动。哪种解决方案满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company has a stateless web application that is deployed on Amazon EC2 instances. The EC2 instances are in a target group behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Amazon Route 53 manages the application domain. The company updates the application UI and develops a beta version of the application. The company wants to test the beta version on 10% of its traffic. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST number of configuration changes?

options.label: A
options.content: Deploy the beta version to new EC2 instances in a new target group. Associate the new target group with a new ALB. Update the existing Route 53 record to use a weighted routing policy. Add a new Route 53 record that points to the new ALB with the same routing policy. Assign a weight of 90 to the existing record. Assign a weight of 10 to the new record.

contents.en: Deploy the beta version to new EC2 instances in a new target group. Associate the new target group with a new ALB. Update the existing Route 53 record to use a weighted routing policy. Add a new Route 53 record that points to the new ALB with the same routing policy. Assign a weight of 90 to the existing record. Assign a weight of 10 to the new record.
contents.zh: 将 beta 版本部署到新 target group 中的新 EC2 实例。将新 target group 与新的 ALB 关联。更新现有 Route 53 记录以使用 weighted routing policy。添加指向新 ALB 且使用相同路由策略的新 Route 53 记录。为现有记录分配权重 90。为新记录分配权重 10。

options.label: B
options.content: Deploy the beta version to new EC2 instances in a new target group. Associate the new target group with the same ALB listener rule. Assign a weight of 90 to the existing target group. Assign a weight of 10 to the new target group.

contents.en: Deploy the beta version to new EC2 instances in a new target group. Associate the new target group with the same ALB listener rule. Assign a weight of 90 to the existing target group. Assign a weight of 10 to the new target group.
contents.zh: 将 beta 版本部署到新 target group 中的新 EC2 实例。将新 target group 与同一个 ALB listener rule 关联。为现有 target group 分配权重 90。为新 target group 分配权重 10。

options.label: C
options.content: Refactor the application to implement a feature flag for the beta version by using AWS AppConfig. Use the feature flag to enable the beta version for 10% of the EC2 instances.

contents.en: Refactor the application to implement a feature flag for the beta version by using AWS AppConfig. Use the feature flag to enable the beta version for 10% of the EC2 instances.
contents.zh: 重构应用程序，使用 AWS AppConfig 为 beta 版本实现 feature flag。使用 feature flag 为 10% 的 EC2 实例启用 beta 版本。

options.label: D
options.content: Containerize and deploy the application on Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). Use AWS CodeDeploy to deploy the beta version by using the CodeDeployDefault.ECSCanary10Percent15Minutes deployment configuration.

contents.en: Containerize and deploy the application on Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). Use AWS CodeDeploy to deploy the beta version by using the CodeDeployDefault.ECSCanary10Percent15Minutes deployment configuration.
contents.zh: 将应用程序容器化并部署到 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)。使用 AWS CodeDeploy 通过 CodeDeployDefault.ECSCanary10Percent15Minutes 部署配置来部署 beta 版本。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。ALB 加权目标组可在同一监听器规则中把 90% 流量发往现有目标组、10% 发往 beta 目标组，无需改 DNS 或创建新负载均衡器，适合快速金丝雀测试。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。ALB 加权目标组可在同一监听器规则中把 90% 流量发往现有目标组、10% 发往 beta 目标组，无需改 DNS 或创建新负载均衡器，适合快速金丝雀测试。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. ALB weighted target groups can send 90% of traffic to the existing target group and 10% to the beta target group within the same listener rule, without DNS changes or a new load balancer.

contents.en: A company has a stateless web application that is deployed on Amazon EC2 instances. The EC2 instances are in a target group behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Amazon Route 53 manages the application domain. The company updates the application UI and develops a beta version of the application. The company wants to test the beta version on 10% of its traffic. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST number of configuration changes?
contents.zh: 一家公司有一个部署在 Amazon EC2 实例上的无状态 Web 应用程序。EC2 实例位于 Application Load Balancer (ALB) 后面的 target group 中。Amazon Route 53 管理应用程序域名。公司更新应用程序 UI，并开发了应用程序的 beta 版本。公司希望在 10% 的流量上测试 beta 版本。哪种解决方案将以最少的配置更改满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company frequently creates Docker images of an application. The company stores the images in Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR). The company creates both tagged images and untagged images. The company wants to implement a solution to automatically delete images that have not been updated for a long time and are not frequently used. The solution must retain at least a specified number of images. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Use Amazon S3 Lifecycle policies on the ECR repository to automatically delete images based on image age or the absence of tags on the image.

contents.en: Use Amazon S3 Lifecycle policies on the ECR repository to automatically delete images based on image age or the absence of tags on the image.
contents.zh: 在 ECR 存储库上使用 Amazon S3 Lifecycle policies，根据 image age 或 image 上没有 tags 的情况自动删除 images。

options.label: B
options.content: Use Amazon ECR lifecycle policies to delete images based on age or the number of images that need to be to retained in the repository.

contents.en: Use Amazon ECR lifecycle policies to delete images based on age or the number of images that need to be to retained in the repository.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon ECR lifecycle policies，根据 age 或需要在存储库中保留的 images 数量删除 images。

options.label: C
options.content: Configure an AWS Lambda function to run a schedule to delete images based on age or the number of images that need to be retained in the repository.

contents.en: Configure an AWS Lambda function to run a schedule to delete images based on age or the number of images that need to be retained in the repository.
contents.zh: 配置 AWS Lambda 函数按计划运行，根据 age 或需要在存储库中保留的 images 数量删除 images。

options.label: D
options.content: Use AWS Systems Manager to run a script by using the aws:executeScript action to automatically delete images based on image age or the absence of tags on the image.

contents.en: Use AWS Systems Manager to run a script by using the aws:executeScript action to automatically delete images based on image age or the absence of tags on the image.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Systems Manager 通过 aws:executeScript 操作运行脚本，根据 image age 或 image 上没有 tags 的情况自动删除 images。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B。Amazon ECR 生命周期策略是原生托管功能，可按镜像年龄或保留数量自动删除镜像，无需额外代码或维护流程。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 B。Amazon ECR 生命周期策略是原生托管功能，可按镜像年龄或保留数量自动删除镜像，无需额外代码或维护流程。
explanations.en: The correct answer is B. Amazon ECR lifecycle policies are a native managed feature that can delete images automatically by age or retention count, without extra code or operational maintenance.

contents.en: A company frequently creates Docker images of an application. The company stores the images in Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR). The company creates both tagged images and untagged images. The company wants to implement a solution to automatically delete images that have not been updated for a long time and are not frequently used. The solution must retain at least a specified number of images. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?
contents.zh: 一家公司经常创建某个应用程序的 Docker images。公司将 images 存储在 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) 中。公司会创建带标签和未带标签的 images。公司希望实施一种解决方案，自动删除长时间未更新且不常使用的 images。该解决方案必须至少保留指定数量的 images。哪种解决方案将在运维开销最少的情况下满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company is developing a web application that runs on Amazon EC2 Linux instances. The application requires monitoring of custom performance metrics. The company must collect metrics for API response times and database query latency across multiple instances. Which solution will generate the custom metrics with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Install the Amazon CloudWatch agent on the instances. Configure the agent to collect the custom metrics. Instrument the application to send the metrics to the agent.

contents.en: Install the Amazon CloudWatch agent on the instances. Configure the agent to collect the custom metrics. Instrument the application to send the metrics to the agent.
contents.zh: 在实例上安装 Amazon CloudWatch agent。配置 agent 收集自定义指标。对应用程序进行插桩，将指标发送到 agent。

options.label: B
options.content: Use Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus to scrape the custom metrics from the application. Use the Amazon CloudWatch agent to forward the metrics to CloudWatch.

contents.en: Use Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus to scrape the custom metrics from the application. Use the Amazon CloudWatch agent to forward the metrics to CloudWatch.
contents.zh: 使用 Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus 从应用程序抓取自定义指标。使用 Amazon CloudWatch agent 将指标转发到 CloudWatch。

options.label: C
options.content: Create a custom AWS Lambda function that polls the application endpoints and database at regular intervals. Program the Lambda function to calculate the custom metrics and to send the metrics to Amazon CloudWatch by using PutMetricData API calls.

contents.en: Create a custom AWS Lambda function that polls the application endpoints and database at regular intervals. Program the Lambda function to calculate the custom metrics and to send the metrics to Amazon CloudWatch by using PutMetricData API calls.
contents.zh: 创建自定义 AWS Lambda 函数，定期轮询应用程序端点和数据库。编写 Lambda 函数计算自定义指标，并使用 PutMetricData API 调用将指标发送到 Amazon CloudWatch。

options.label: D
options.content: Implement custom logging in the application code to record the custom metrics. Use Amazon CloudWatch Logs Insights to extract and analyze the metrics.

contents.en: Implement custom logging in the application code to record the custom metrics. Use Amazon CloudWatch Logs Insights to extract and analyze the metrics.
contents.zh: 在应用程序代码中实现自定义日志记录来记录自定义指标。使用 Amazon CloudWatch Logs Insights 提取并分析这些指标。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。CloudWatch agent 支持收集自定义应用指标，应用可将延迟等内部指标发送给 agent，从而以较少配置把指标发布到 CloudWatch。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。CloudWatch agent 支持收集自定义应用指标，应用可将延迟等内部指标发送给 agent，从而以较少配置把指标发布到 CloudWatch。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The CloudWatch agent can collect custom application metrics, allowing the application to send internal metrics such as latency to the agent and publish them to CloudWatch with minimal configuration.

contents.en: A company is developing a web application that runs on Amazon EC2 Linux instances. The application requires monitoring of custom performance metrics. The company must collect metrics for API response times and database query latency across multiple instances. Which solution will generate the custom metrics with the LEAST operational overhead?
contents.zh: 一家公司正在开发一个运行在 Amazon EC2 Linux 实例上的 Web 应用程序。该应用程序需要监控自定义性能指标。公司必须跨多个实例收集 API 响应时间和数据库查询延迟的指标。哪种解决方案将在运维开销最少的情况下生成自定义指标？

questions.content: A company uses AWS Lambda functions in the primary operating AWS Region of its AWS account. The company manually created the Lambda functions. The company needs to use a Python-based AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) application to manage the Lambda functions. Which solution meets these requirements with the LEAST implementation effort?

options.label: A
options.content: Start a partial scan by using the AWS CloudFormation infrastructure as code (IaC) generator. Filter by the Lambda resource type. Create an AWS CDK application from the scanned resources. Download the AWS CDK application. For each Lambda function, set the from_asset parameter for the Lambda handler code object.

contents.en: Start a partial scan by using the AWS CloudFormation infrastructure as code (IaC) generator. Filter by the Lambda resource type. Create an AWS CDK application from the scanned resources. Download the AWS CDK application. For each Lambda function, set the from_asset parameter for the Lambda handler code object.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CloudFormation infrastructure as code (IaC) generator 启动 partial scan。按 Lambda 资源类型筛选。从扫描到的资源创建 AWS CDK 应用程序。下载 AWS CDK 应用程序。对于每个 Lambda 函数，为 Lambda handler code object 设置 from_asset 参数。

options.label: B
options.content: Start a partial scan by using the AWS CloudFormation infrastructure as code (IaC) generator. Filter by the Lambda resource type. Create a CloudFormation template from the scanned resources. Download the CloudFormation template. For each Lambda function, replace the Code/S3Bucket property and the Code/S3Key property with the Code/ZipFile property. Convert the CloudFormation template to an AWS CDK application.

contents.en: Start a partial scan by using the AWS CloudFormation infrastructure as code (IaC) generator. Filter by the Lambda resource type. Create a CloudFormation template from the scanned resources. Download the CloudFormation template. For each Lambda function, replace the Code/S3Bucket property and the Code/S3Key property with the Code/ZipFile property. Convert the CloudFormation template to an AWS CDK application.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CloudFormation infrastructure as code (IaC) generator 启动 partial scan。按 Lambda 资源类型筛选。从扫描到的资源创建 CloudFormation 模板。下载 CloudFormation 模板。对于每个 Lambda 函数，将 Code/S3Bucket 属性和 Code/S3Key 属性替换为 Code/ZipFile 属性。将 CloudFormation 模板转换为 AWS CDK 应用程序。

options.label: C
options.content: Start a partial scan by using the AWS CloudFormation infrastructure as code (IaC) generator. Filter by the Lambda resource type. Create a CloudFormation template from the scanned resources. Download the CloudFormation template. For each Lambda function, replace the Code/S3Bucket property and the Code/S3Key property with the Code/ImageUri property. Convert the CloudFormation template to an AWS CDK application.

contents.en: Start a partial scan by using the AWS CloudFormation infrastructure as code (IaC) generator. Filter by the Lambda resource type. Create a CloudFormation template from the scanned resources. Download the CloudFormation template. For each Lambda function, replace the Code/S3Bucket property and the Code/S3Key property with the Code/ImageUri property. Convert the CloudFormation template to an AWS CDK application.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS CloudFormation infrastructure as code (IaC) generator 启动 partial scan。按 Lambda 资源类型筛选。从扫描到的资源创建 CloudFormation 模板。下载 CloudFormation 模板。对于每个 Lambda 函数，将 Code/S3Bucket 属性和 Code/S3Key 属性替换为 Code/ImageUri 属性。将 CloudFormation 模板转换为 AWS CDK 应用程序。

options.label: D
options.content: Create a resource inventory by using AWS Config. Filter by the Lambda resource type. Export the inventory to a .csv file. Write an AWS CDK application that references the Lambda functions from the .csv file. For each Lambda function, set the from_asset parameter for the Lambda handler code object.

contents.en: Create a resource inventory by using AWS Config. Filter by the Lambda resource type. Export the inventory to a .csv file. Write an AWS CDK application that references the Lambda functions from the .csv file. For each Lambda function, set the from_asset parameter for the Lambda handler code object.
contents.zh: 使用 AWS Config 创建资源清单。按 Lambda 资源类型筛选。将清单导出到 .csv 文件。编写引用 .csv 文件中 Lambda 函数的 AWS CDK 应用程序。对于每个 Lambda 函数，为 Lambda handler code object 设置 from_asset 参数。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。CloudFormation IaC generator 可对 Lambda 资源进行部分扫描并直接生成 CDK 应用，减少把 CloudFormation 模板手工转换为 CDK 代码的工作量；随后为各 Lambda 函数设置 from_asset。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。CloudFormation IaC generator 可对 Lambda 资源进行部分扫描并直接生成 CDK 应用，减少把 CloudFormation 模板手工转换为 CDK 代码的工作量；随后为各 Lambda 函数设置 from_asset。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The CloudFormation IaC generator can partially scan Lambda resources and directly create a CDK application, avoiding manual conversion from CloudFormation templates; then set from_asset for each Lambda handler code object.

contents.en: A company uses AWS Lambda functions in the primary operating AWS Region of its AWS account. The company manually created the Lambda functions. The company needs to use a Python-based AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) application to manage the Lambda functions. Which solution meets these requirements with the LEAST implementation effort?
contents.zh: 一家公司在其 AWS 账户的主要运营 AWS Region 中使用 AWS Lambda 函数。公司手动创建了这些 Lambda 函数。公司需要使用基于 Python 的 AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) 应用程序来管理这些 Lambda 函数。哪种解决方案以最少的实施工作量满足这些要求？

questions.content: A company uses Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Services (Amazon EKS) to host containerized applications that are available in Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR). The company currently launches EKS clusters in the company's development environment by using the AWS CLI aws eks create- cluster command. The company uses the aws eks create-addon command to install required add-ons. All installed add-ons are currently version compatible with the version of Kubernetes that the company uses. All clusters exclusively use managed node groups for compute capacity. Some of the EKS clusters require a version upgrade. A DevOps engineer must ensure that upgrades continuously occur within the AWS standard support schedule. Which solution will meet this requirement with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Run the aws eks update-cluster-version command. Providing appropriate arguments such as cluster name and version number.

contents.en: Run the aws eks update-cluster-version command. Providing appropriate arguments such as cluster name and version number.
contents.zh: 运行 aws eks update-cluster-version 命令。提供适当的参数，例如集群名称和版本号。

options.label: B
options.content: Enable EKS Auto Mode on all EKS clusters. Remove all existing managed node groups.

contents.en: Enable EKS Auto Mode on all EKS clusters. Remove all existing managed node groups.
contents.zh: 在所有 EKS 集群上启用 EKS Auto Mode。移除所有现有 managed node groups。

options.label: C
options.content: Run the eksctl command to upgrade the EKS clusters. Provide appropriate arguments such as cluster name and version number

contents.en: Run the eksctl command to upgrade the EKS clusters. Provide appropriate arguments such as cluster name and version number
contents.zh: 运行 eksctl 命令升级 EKS 集群。提供适当的参数，例如集群名称和版本号

options.label: D
options.content: Refactor the environment to create EKS clusters by using infrastructure as code (IaC). Upgrade the clusters by using code changes.

contents.en: Refactor the environment to create EKS clusters by using infrastructure as code (IaC). Upgrade the clusters by using code changes.
contents.zh: 重构环境，以使用 infrastructure as code (IaC) 创建 EKS 集群。通过代码更改升级集群。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A。源正确选项给出使用 aws eks update-cluster-version 命令并提供集群名称和版本等参数，因此该命令是执行 EKS 集群版本更新的直接方式。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 A。源正确选项给出使用 aws eks update-cluster-version 命令并提供集群名称和版本等参数，因此该命令是执行 EKS 集群版本更新的直接方式。
explanations.en: The correct answer is A. The source correct option specifies running aws eks update-cluster-version with arguments such as the cluster name and version number, making it the direct method for updating the EKS cluster version.

contents.en: A company uses Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Services (Amazon EKS) to host containerized applications that are available in Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR). The company currently launches EKS clusters in the company's development environment by using the AWS CLI aws eks create- cluster command. The company uses the aws eks create-addon command to install required add-ons. All installed add-ons are currently version compatible with the version of Kubernetes that the company uses. All clusters exclusively use managed node groups for compute capacity. Some of the EKS clusters require a version upgrade. A DevOps engineer must ensure that upgrades continuously occur within the AWS standard support schedule. Which solution will meet this requirement with the LEAST operational overhead?
contents.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Services (Amazon EKS) 托管可在 Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) 中获取的容器化应用程序。公司当前使用 AWS CLI aws eks create- cluster 命令在公司的开发环境中启动 EKS 集群。公司使用 aws eks create-addon 命令安装所需插件。所有已安装插件当前都与公司使用的 Kubernetes 版本兼容。所有集群都仅使用 managed node groups 提供计算容量。部分 EKS 集群需要版本升级。DevOps 工程师必须确保升级持续在 AWS standard support schedule 内进行。哪种解决方案将在运维开销最少的情况下满足此要求？

questions.content: A company produces builds for an open source project every day. The company hosts the open source project in a public code repository that the company supports. The company manually invokes a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline to build artifacts for the project. The company wants to make the build artifacts publicly available on a website that the company hosts in an Amazon S3 bucket. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.label: A
options.content: Create an AWS CodeBuild project. Set the public repository as the source. Use a webhook to rebuild when the company pushes a code change. Configure the artifacts section of the project to use the S3 bucket as the destination. Set up an appropriate path to store build outputs in the bucket. Disable artifact encryption.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodeBuild project. Set the public repository as the source. Use a webhook to rebuild when the company pushes a code change. Configure the artifacts section of the project to use the S3 bucket as the destination. Set up an appropriate path to store build outputs in the bucket. Disable artifact encryption.
contents.zh: 创建 AWS CodeBuild 项目。将公共存储库设置为源。使用 webhook 在公司推送代码更改时重新构建。配置项目的 artifacts 部分，将 S3 存储桶用作目标。设置适当路径以在存储桶中存储构建输出。禁用 artifact encryption。

options.label: B
options.content: Create an AWS CodeBuild project. Set the public repository as the source. Configure the artifacts section of the project to use the S3 bucket as the destination. Ensure that artifact encryption is enabled in the artifacts configuration. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to initiate the CodeBuild project on a daily schedule.

contents.en: Create an AWS CodeBuild project. Set the public repository as the source. Configure the artifacts section of the project to use the S3 bucket as the destination. Ensure that artifact encryption is enabled in the artifacts configuration. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to initiate the CodeBuild project on a daily schedule.
contents.zh: 创建 AWS CodeBuild 项目。将公共存储库设置为源。配置项目的 artifacts 部分，将 S3 存储桶用作目标。确保在 artifacts 配置中启用 artifact encryption。配置 Amazon EventBridge 规则，以按每日计划启动 CodeBuild 项目。

options.label: C
options.content: Add a new stage to the end of the pipeline. Configure the stage to include an action to publish artifacts to the S3 bucket. Update the pipeline to run in response to pull requests to the public repository.

contents.en: Add a new stage to the end of the pipeline. Configure the stage to include an action to publish artifacts to the S3 bucket. Update the pipeline to run in response to pull requests to the public repository.
contents.zh: 在管道末尾添加新阶段。配置该阶段包含一个将 artifacts 发布到 S3 存储桶的操作。更新管道，使其响应对公共存储库的 pull requests 而运行。

options.label: D
options.content: Add a new stage to the end of the pipeline. Configure the stage to include an action to publish artifacts to the S3 bucket. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to initiate the pipeline on a daily schedule.

contents.en: Add a new stage to the end of the pipeline. Configure the stage to include an action to publish artifacts to the S3 bucket. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to initiate the pipeline on a daily schedule.
contents.zh: 在管道末尾添加新阶段。配置该阶段包含一个将 artifacts 发布到 S3 存储桶的操作。创建 Amazon EventBridge 规则，以按每日计划启动管道。

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D。EventBridge 规则可按每日计划启动现有流水线，流水线末尾新增发布到 S3 的阶段即可满足每日发布构件的需求，并避免新建额外 CodeBuild 项目。

explanations.zh: 正确答案是 D。EventBridge 规则可按每日计划启动现有流水线，流水线末尾新增发布到 S3 的阶段即可满足每日发布构件的需求，并避免新建额外 CodeBuild 项目。
explanations.en: The correct answer is D. An EventBridge rule can start the existing pipeline on a daily schedule, and adding a final stage that publishes artifacts to S3 meets the daily artifact requirement without creating an extra CodeBuild project.

contents.en: A company produces builds for an open source project every day. The company hosts the open source project in a public code repository that the company supports. The company manually invokes a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline to build artifacts for the project. The company wants to make the build artifacts publicly available on a website that the company hosts in an Amazon S3 bucket. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?
contents.zh: 一家公司每天为一个开源项目生成构建。公司在其支持的公共代码存储库中托管该开源项目。公司手动调用 AWS CodePipeline 中的管道为该项目构建构件。公司希望在其托管于 Amazon S3 存储桶的网站上公开提供这些构建构件。哪种解决方案将在运维开销最少的情况下满足这些要求？
